26.11: Hessa gisho, Abimelekey ba asa, “Ha ura woyko iya machiw bochiya oonika tuma hayqana” yaagidi kiittis.
26.12: Yisaaqi he biittan kathi zeridi, Goday iya anjida gisho he laythan xeetu kushe ekis.
26.13: I duretethan eretana gakanaw daro duretishe bis.
26.14: Yisaaqas dorsa wudey, miiza wudeynne aylleti aadhidi darida gisho, Filisxeeme asati iya qanaatidosona.
26.15: Hessa gisho, iya aawa Abrahaame wode iya aawa aylleti bookida haatha olla ubba Filisxeemeti biitta ushshidi kunthidosona.
26.16: He wode Abimelekey Yisaaqako, “Neeni nuupe aadhada minnida gisho nu matape ba” yaagis.
26.17: Yisaaqi hessafe dendidi, Geraara zangaara bidi dunkaane tokidi yan de7is.
26.18: Yisaaqi ba aawa Abrahaame wode booketida haatha ollata, Abrahaamey hayqidaape guye, Filisxeemeti kunthidaysata zaari booki kessidi, iya aaway sunthida sunthan xeegis.
26.19: Yisaaqa aylleti he zangaaran haatha olla bookidi yan lo77o pulto haatha demmidosona.
26.20: Shin Geraara henthanchoti Yisaaqa henthanchotara, “Haathay nubaa” yaagidi ooyetidosona. Enti palametida gisho, Yisaaqi he haatha olla “Eseeqa” gidi sunthis.
26.21: Hessafe guye, enti hara haatha olla bookidosona. Shin enti he haatha olla geedonka ooyetidosona. Hessa gisho, Yisaaqi he haatha olla “Siixina” gidi sunthis.
26.22: Hessafe guuthi sinthe shiiqidi hara haatha olla bookisis. Iya gaason oonika ooyetiboonna gisho, “Xoossay ha7i nuus dalgisis nuuni ha biittan darana” gidi he bessa Rehoboota gidi sunthis.
26.24: He bida gallas qamma Goday iyaw qoncidi, “Taani ne aawa Abrahaame Xoossa, taani neera de7iya gisho, babofa. Ta aylliya Abrahaame gisho taani nena anjana, ne sheeshaka darsana” yaagis.
26.25: Yisaaqi yan yarsho bessi giigisidi Godaa suntha xeegis. Yan I ba dunkaaniya tokis, iya aylleti yan haatha olla bookidosona.
26.26: Hessafe guye, Abimelekey bana zoriya Ahuzanne toora mocona Fikoola ekidi, Geraarape Yisaaqako yis.
26.27: Yisaaqi entako, “Hinte kase tana ixidi, hinte biittafe kessi yeddibeeketii? Ha7i taako ay ekanaw yidetii?” yaagis.
26.28: Enti, “Goday neera de7eysa nuuni geeshshi erida. Hessa gisho, sarotetha caaqoy nu giddoninne ne giddon daanaw koshshees.
26.29: Nuuni nena bochibooko, new keehatetha xalaala oothidi, nena sarotethan moyzidi yeddida. Hessadaka neeni nu bolla iitaba oothonna mela, ane neera caaqoos. Tumaka ha7i nena Goday anjis” yaagidosona.
26.30: He wode Yisaaqi entaw gibira giigisin midosona, uyidosona.
26.31: Wontetha gallas wonta guura dendidi enti issoy issuwara caaqidosona. Yisaaqi enta moyzin, enti saro shaaketidi bidosona.
26.32: He gallas Yisaaqa aylleti yidi, “Nuuni haathe demmida” yaagidi banta bookida haatha ollaba iyaw odidosona.
26.33: I he haatha olla Saabe (Caaqo) gidi sunthis. Hessa gisho, he katama sunthay hachi gakanaw Barsaabe (Caaqo haatha olla) geetetees.
26.34: Eesawes laythi oytama gidida wode Hite addiya Bi7eera na7iw Yooditonne Hite addiya Eloona na7iw Basemaato machis.

27.1: Yisaaqi cimin iya ayfey xeelo ixida wode ba bayra na7a Eesawe xeegidi, “Ta na7aw” yaagis. Ika, “Yee” gidi koyis.
27.2: Yisaaqi, “Heko, ha7i taani cimas, taani awude hayqaneko erike.
27.3: Yaaniya gisho, ha7i ne shanka dongiya ekada bazzo bada do7a shankatada asho ekada ya.
27.4: Mal7o kathi ta doseysatho ootha kathada taw eha. Taani hayqanaape sinthe ma simmada nena anjana” yaagis.
27.5: Yisaaqi ba na7a Eesawes odiya wode Irbiqa si7awusu. Eesawey do7a shankatidi ehanaw bazzo bidaape guye,
27.6: Irbiqa ba na7a Yayqooba, “Ne aaway ne isha Eesawe,
27.7: ‘Do7a shankata ehada taw mal7o kathi ta maanaw katha. Taani hayqanaape sinthe ma simmada Godaa sinthan nena anjana’ yaagishin taani si7as.
27.8: Ta na7aw, ha7i taani new odeysa loytha si7a.
27.9: Wudiya giddo bada nam7u modho deesha marata taw ekada ya. Taani ne aawas mal7o kathi I doseysada oothada kathana.
27.10: Ne aaway hayqanaape sinthe midi nena anjana mela iyaw aatha” yaagasu.
27.11: Shin Yayqoobi ba aayiw, “Ta isha Eesawe bolla ikisey de7ees shin ta bollay liiqo.
27.12: Ta aaway tana oyki be7idi taani iya cimmidaba daaniko, taani anjuwa gisho baadethi ta bolla ehanaysa erikii?” yaagis.
27.13: Iya aayiya, “Ta na7aw, he baadethay tana gako. Taani new odeysa ootha, bada deesha marata taw ekada ya” yaagasu.
27.14: Ehidi ba aayes immin iya aayiya mal7o kathi iya aaway doseysada oothada kathasu.
27.15: Hessafe guye, Irbiqa bayra na7a Eesawe ma7o lo77uwa ehada Yayqooba mayzasu.
27.16: Qassi he deeshata itiya iya kushiyanne iya liiqo qoodhiya mayzasu.
27.17: Ba kathida mal7o kathaanne uythaa ba na7a Yayqoobas immasu.
27.18: Yaatin, I ba aawako gelidi, “Ta aawaw” yaagis. Ika, “Yee, ta na7aw, neeni oonee?” yaagis.
27.19: Yayqoobi ba aawa, “Taani ne bayra na7a Eesawe. Neeni tana kiitidaysada taani oothas; ha77i denda uttada, taani shankata ehidaysafe mada, tana anja” yaagis.
27.20: Yisaaqi ba na7a, “Ta na7aw, waata ellesada demmadii?” yaagidi oychis. Yayqoobi, “Goday, ne Xoossay taw giigisis” yaagis.
27.21: Yisaaqi Yayqooba, “Ta na7aw, neeni tuma ta na7a Eesaweko ta nena oyka be7ana ane ha shiiqa” yaagis.
27.22: Yayqoobi ba aawako shiiqin oyki be7idi, “Ne qaalay Yayqooba qaala shin kushey Eesawe kushiya daanees” yaagis.
27.23: Iya kushey iya isha Eesawe kushiyada ikisera de7iya gisho, shaakidi eriboona iya anjis.
27.24: Iya, “Tuma neeni ta na7a Eesawee?” yaagidi zaari oychis. Ika, “Ee, tana” yaagis.
27.25: Yaatin I, “Ta na7aw, taani ne shankata ehidabaape mada nena anjana mela ane ha aatha” yaagis. Yayqoobi aathin mis, qassi iyaw woyne ehin uyis.
27.26: Hessafe guye, iya aawa Yisaaqi, “Ta na7aw, ha shiiqada tana yeera” yaagis.
27.27: Yayqoobi shiiqidi iya yeeris. Yisaaqi iya ma77uwa singi si7idi, “Ta na7a peenoy Goday anjida goshshada sawees.
27.28: Xoossay salo akanne sa7a shica, kathinne woyne darsidi new immo.
27.29: Kawotethati new haareto, asay new gulbato. Neeni ne ishatas godaa gida, ne aaye sheeshati new gulbato. Nena baaddeysati baadetidaba gido, nena anjeysati anjetidaba gido” yaagidi anjis.
27.30: Yisaaqi Yayqooba anjidi ongidaape guye, Yayqoobi ba aawa sinthafe buroo keyiya wode Eesawey shankafe puttu gis.
27.31: Ika qassi mal7o kathi kathidi ba aawas aathidi, “Ta aawaw, danda uttada ta shankatidabaape ma, yaatada tana anja” yaagis.
27.32: Yisaaqi, “Ne oonee?” yaagidi oychis. Ika, “Taani ne bayra na7a Eesawe” yaagis.
27.33: Yisaaqi dagammidi kokorishe, “Yaatin do7a shankatidaysafe taw aathiday oonee? Taani ha7i neeni yaana sinthan mada, iya anjas. Ika tuma anjetidaysa gidana” yaagis.
27.34: Eesawey ba aawa qaala si7ida wode ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, daro iita yeeho yeekishe, “Ta aawaw, tanaka anja” yaagis.
27.35: Shin I, “Ne ishay cimmidi ne anjuwa eki diggis” yaagis.
27.36: Eesawey, “I eridi Yayqooba (Cimmeysa) gidi sunthetis. I tana cimmishin haysi nam7antho, kase ta bayratetha ekis, ha7i qassi ta anjuwa ekis” yaagis. Yaatin, “Neeni taw anjuwafe aykoka ashshabikii?” yaagidi oychis.
27.37: Yisaaqi Eesawe, “Taani iya new godaa oothas. Iya ishata ubbataka iyaw aylle oothas. Qassi taani kathaninne woynen iya minthas. Yaatin, ta na7aw, new ta ay ootho?” yaagis.
27.38: Eesawey ba aawa, “Ta aawaw, new issi anjo xalaali de7ii? Ta aawaw, tanaka qassi anja” yaagis. Hessafe guye, Eesawey ba qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekis.
27.39: Iya aawa Yisaaqi zaaridi, “Ne de7iya bessay ha sa7a duretethafe haaho, salo akika new wodhenna.
27.40: Neeni ne mashshan aqana, ne ishaas haaretana. Shin neeni iyara eqetiya wode iya qambara ne gannaafe holana” yaagis. Yisaaqi Yayqooba Laabako Yeduwa
27.41: Yayqooba iya aaway anjida gisho, Eesawey ba ulon iya morkis. I ba wozanan, “Ta aaway hayqanaw matis. I hayqida mela ta isha Yayqooba wodhana” yaagis.
27.42: Shin Irbiqa he ba bayra na7a Eesawe qaala si7ida gisho, ba kaalo na7a Yayqooba xeegisa ehada, “Ne isha Eesawey nena wodhidi haluwa kessanaw halchees.
27.43: Hayyana ta na7aw, taani new odeysa ootha. Dendada Kaaranen de7iya ta isha Laabako baqata.
27.44: Ne isha hanqoy irxana gakanaw guutha wode iyara de7aasha.
27.45: Ne ishaa yiloy wodhiya wodenne neeni iya bolla oothidaba I dogiya wode taani kiittada nena ehana. Taani issi gallas hinte nam7aafeka mela atanaw koyke” yaagasu.
27.46: Hessafe guye, Irbiqa Yisaaqako, “Eesawey ekida Hiteta macca nayta gaason taani ta de7uwa shaatetas. Qassi Yayqoobika haysatho Hiteta macca naytape macho ekiko, taw hayqoy lo77o” yaagasu.

28.1: Hessa gisho, Yisaaqi Yayqooba xeegidi, “Kanaane biitta macca naytape macho ekofa.
28.2: Dendada ne aaye aawa Batu7eelako Masephexoome biitta bada yaape ne aaye isha Laaba macca naytape macho eka.
28.3: Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay nena anjo, I new nayta immo, daro dere gidana gakanaw I nena darso.
28.4: Neeni ha7i betetethan uttida ha biitta nebaa oothana mela newunne ne sheeshas Xoossay Abrahaame anjuwa immo” yaagi anjidi kiittis.
28.5: Yaagidi Yisaaqi Yayqooba yeddis. Yayqoobi Masephexoome biitta Laabako bis. Laabi Yayqoobanne Eesawe aaye Irbiqa ishanne Araame addiya Batu7eela na7a. Eesawey Hara Macho Ekuwa
28.6: Yisaaqi Yayqooba anjidi Masephexoome biittafe macho ekana mela iya yedidaysa, I Yayqooba anjida wode, “Kanaane maccas ekofa” gidi kiittidaysanne,
28.7: Yayqoobi ba aawasinne ba aayes kiitetidi Masephexoome biitta bidaysa, Eesawey eris.
28.8: Eesawey hessan Kanaane biitta maccas ba aawa Yisaaqi ay mela ixiyako eris.
28.9: Hessa gisho, Eesawey Abrahaame na7a Isma7eelako bidi, iya na7iw Mahlaato, Nebayoota michiw, ba macheta bolla gujidi ekis. Yayqoobi Beetelen Amuho Be7uwa
28.11: I, issi bessi gakiya wode awi wullin, qamma yan aqis. He bessan de7iya shuchatape issuwa borkotidi he bessan dhiskis.
28.12: I amuho amuhidi kodo issoy sa7an eqin xeeray salo gakidaysanne, Xoossa kiitanchoti iya bollara pude keyeysatanne duge wodheyisata be7is.
28.13: He koduwas xeeran Goday eqidi, “Taani Godaa, ne aawa Abrahaame Xoossa, Yisaaqa Xoossa, ha neeni zin7ida biitta newunne ne sheeshas immana.
28.14: Ne sheesha sa7a shafeda darsana. Neeni doloha bagga, wuloha bagga, pudeha bagganne dugeha bagga dalgana. Biitta bolla de7iya asa ubbay ne baggaranne ne sheesha baggara anjetana.
28.15: Taani neera de7ayis. Neeni biya bessa ubban taani nena naagana. Taani nena ha biitta guye zaarada ehana. Taani new oothana gidaysa polana, nena aggike” yaagis.
28.16: Yayqoobi dhiskofe barkidi, “Ta erabikefe attishin, tuma Goday ha bessan de7ees” yaagis.
28.17: I babidi, “Ha bessay waani yashshi! Ha bessay Xoossa keethife attishin, haraso gidenna. Haysi salo penge” yaagis.
28.18: Wontetha gallas wonta guura Yayqoobi dendidi, Xoossas dummayanaw ba borkotida shucha ekidi tuussatho essidi iya bolla zayte tigis.
28.19: Yayqoobi he bessa Beetele (Xoossa keethi) gidi xeegis. Shin he katamay hessafe kase Looza geetetees.
28.20: Yayqoobi, “Ta biya ogiyan ne tana naagiko, taw kathinne ma7o immiko,
28.21: ne tana ta aawa soo saro zaariko, ne ta Xoossa gidana.
28.22: Taani dummayanaw tuussatho essida ha shuchay Xoossa keetha gidana. Tuma neeni taw immiyaba ubbaafe tammaafe issuwa new immana” yaagidi Xoossas caaqis.

29.1: Hessafe guye, Yayqoobi dendidi, bidi doloha bagga asa biitta gakis.
29.2: Yanka demba bessan haatha olla demmis. Heedzu dorsa wudeti he haatha olla matan de7oosona. Wude ubbay haathe uyey he ollafe. He haatha olla doona gordiya shuchay gita.
29.3: Dorsa wude ubbay yaa shiiqiko, wudiya heemmeysati haatha olla doonape he shucha gondorsidi wudiya haathe ushshoosona. Ushshi simmidi he shucha olla doonan zaari wothoosona.
29.4: Yayqoobi entako, “Hinte awupe yidetii?” yaagidi oychis. Entika, “Nuuni Kaaranepe yida” yaagidosona.
29.5: I, “Nakoora na7a na7aa Laaba ereetii?” yaagidi oychis. “Ee, iya eroos” yaagidosona.
29.6: Yayqoobi enta, “I lo77o de7ii?” yaagidi oychis. “Ee, lo77o, iya na7iw Raheelo dorsata laaggada yaaro hini be7a” yaagidosona.
29.7: Yayqoobi entako, “Heko, ha7i awi dhoqan de7ees. Wude mehey soo simmiya wodey buroo gakibeenna, dorsa ushshi efidi heemmite” yaagis.
29.8: Shin enti, “Wude ubbay shiiqin shucha haatha olla doonape gondorsana gakanaw nu ushshanaw danda7oko. Hessafe guye, shucha gondorsidi dorsata ushshana” yaagidosona.
29.9: I buroo odishin, Laaba na7iya Raheela dorsata heemmiya gisho, ba aawa dorsata laagga ekada gakasu.
29.10: Yayqoobi ba aaye isha Laaba na7iw Raheelo Laaba dorsata laaggada yaaro be7ida wode bidi olla doonape shucha gondorsidi dorsata haathe ushshis.
29.11: Yayqoobi Raheelo yeeridi, ufaysan ba qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekis.
29.12: Yayqoobi, “Taani ne aawa miche Irbiqa na7a” yaagidi iw odis. Hessa gisho, iya woxa bada ba aawas odasu.
29.13: Laabi ba miche na7a Yayqooba yuussaa si7ida mela mokanaw woxidi bis. Iya idimi yeeridi ba soo efis. Yan Yayqoobi hanidaba ubba Laabas odis. Yayqoobi Laaba Nayta Machis
29.14: Laabi iya, “Neeni tuma ta ashonne ta suuthi” yaagis. Yayqoobi iyara issi ageena kumethi uttis.
29.15: Hessafe guye, Laabi Yayqooba, “Neeni taw dabbo gidida gisho, taw mela coo oothaneyee? Ane ta new ay qanxanaw koshshiyako taw oda” yaagis.
29.16: Laabas nam7u macca nayti de7oosona. Bayre sunthay Liya, kaaliya qassi Raheelo geetetawusu.
29.17: Liya ayfera cuuca, shin Raheela yegelsinne mala lo77o.
29.18: Yayqoobi Raheelo dosidi, “Taani ne kaalo na7e Raheeli gisho new laapun laythi oothana” yaagis.
29.19: Laabi, “Iyo hara asas immanaape new imoy lo77o, ne taara haysan de7a” yaagis.
29.20: Hessa gisho, Yayqoobi Raheelo ekanaw laapun laythi oothis. Shin I iyo daro dosiya gisho, iyaw guutha gallas daanis.
29.21: Hessafe guye, Yayqoobi, “Ta machiw taw imma, ta laythay wuris taani iyo ekanaw koyayis” yaagis.
29.22: Hessa gisho, Laabi asa ubba xeegidi yaagano kessis.
29.23: Shin sa7i qammin Laabi ba na7iw Liya efidi Yayqoobas immis. Yayqoobi iyo ekis.
29.24: Qassi Laabi ba aylliw Zalafa ba na7e Liyas aylle oothidi immis.
29.25: Sa7ay wontin I xeelliya wode, heko, Liya. Yayqoobi Laaba, “Haysi neeni ta bolla oothidaysi aybee? Taani new oothiday Raheeli gishosa gidenneyee? Tana ayis cimmadi” yaagis.
29.26: Laabi iyako, “Nu biittan bayriya de7ishin kaaliw azinas immeysi woga gidenna.
29.27: Mishiratethan iira saaminta ongiko, qassi kaaliwka taani new immana. Hessafe guye, hara laapun laythi taw oothaasa” yaagis.
29.28: Yayqoobi oda ma77idi saaminta iira ongis. Hessafe guye, Laabi ba na7iw Raheelo iyaw immis.
29.29: Qassi Laabi ba aylliw Baalo ba na7e Raheelis aylle oothidi immis.
29.30: Yayqoobi Raheeloka ekis. Raheelo Liyape aathidi dosis. Hara laapun laythi Laabas oothis. Yayqoobanne Iya Nayta
29.31: Goday Liya Raheelitho dosetabonaro be7idi, iw yelo uluwa dooyis. Shin Raheela na7a yelonna gam7asu.
29.32: Liya qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Iya, “Goday ta metuwa be7is, ha7i tana ta azinay dosana” gada he na7a Robeela gada sunthasu.
29.33: Iya nam7antho qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Iya, “Goday taani dosetabonaysa be7ida gisho, taw haysaka gujis” gada Simoona gada sunthasu.
29.34: Iya heedzantho qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Iya, “Taani iyaw heedzu adde nayta yelida gisho, ta azinay ha7i taara siiqon waaxetana” gada iya Leewe gada sunthasu.
29.35: Iya hara qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Iya, “Ha7i taani Godaa galatana” gada iya suntha Yihuda gada unthasu. Hessafe guye, yelo eqasu.

30.1: Raheela Yayqoobas nayta yelonnaysa be7ada ba michiw qanaatasu. Hessa gisho, Yayqooba, “Taw na7a imma, ixiko taani hayqana” yaagasu.
30.2: Yayqoobi Raheelo hanqetidi, “Tana new yelo immanaw woyko digganaw Xoosse gadiyee?” yaagis.
30.3: Iya, “Ta gadhindiw Baalo hinno be7a. Iya ta gisho yelana mela neeni iira aqa, yaaniko, taani I baggara na7a demmana” yaagasu.
30.4: Ba gadhindiw Baalo macho oothidi ekana mela iyaw immasu.
30.5: Baala qanthatada adde na7a Yayqoobas yelasu.
30.6: Yaatin Raheela, “Xoossay taw pirdis, ta woosaka si7idi taw adde na7a immis” yaagada he na7a Daane gada sunthasu.
30.7: Raheeli gadhindiya Baala qanthatada Yayqoobas nam7antho adde na7a yelasu.
30.8: Raheela, “Taani ta michera wolqaama baaxe baaxetada xoonas” yaagada he na7a Niftaaleme gada sunthasu.
30.9: Liya yelo eqidaysa be7ada, ba gadhindiya Zalafa Yayqoobas macho oothada immasu.
30.10: Liya gadhindiya Zalafa adde na7a Yayqoobas yelasu.
30.11: Liya, “La haysi aybi lo77o qaade!” yaagada, he na7a Gaade sunthasu.
30.12: Liya gadhindiya Zalafa Yayqoobas nam7antho adde na7a yelasu.
30.13: Liya, “Tana daro ufaysees; maccasi ubbay tana ufaytiyaro gaana” gada he na7a Aseera gada sunthasu.
30.14: Giste cakiya ageenan Robeeli gade bidi inkoya mitha ayfe demmidi ba aaye Liyas ekidi yis. Raheela Liyako, “Ne na7ay ehida enkoya mitha ayfiyape taw imma” yaagasu.
30.15: Shin Liya, “Ta azinaa neeni wolqan ekidaysi gidonna ixin ha7i qassi ta na7a inkoya mitha ayfiya ekanee?” yaagasu. Raheela, “Ne na7a inkoya ayfiya taw immiko, Yayqoobi hachi qamma neera aqo” yaagasu.
30.16: He gallas omarsi Yayqoobi bazzofe yaa wode Liya iya mokanaw keyada, “Neeni taara aqanaw koshshees; taani ta na7a inkoya ayfiyan nena shammas” yaagasu. Hessa gisho, I he qamma iira aqis.
30.17: Xoossay Liya woosa si7is. Iya qanthatada ichashantho adde na7a Yayqoobas yelasu.
30.18: Liya, “Taani ta aylliw ta azinas immida gisho, Xoossay hessa taw qanxis” yaagada he na7a Yisakoora gada sunthasu.
30.19: Liya hara qanthatada usupuntho adde na7a Yayqoobas yelasu.
30.20: Liya, “Xoossi taw al7o imota immis. Taani ta azinaas usupun adde nayta yelida gisho, ha7i I tana bonchana” yaagada he na7a Zabloona gada sunthasu.
30.21: Hessafe guye, issi macca na7a yelasu, iyo Diina gada sunthasu.
30.22: Xoossay Raheelo qopis. I woosa si7idi I yelo uluwa dooyis.
30.23: Iya qanthatada adde na7a yelasu; “Xoossay ta yeella qaaris.
30.24: Goday taw hara adde na7aka gujo” yaagada he na7a Yoosefa gada sunthasu. Yayqoobanne Laaba
30.25: Raheela Yoosefa yelidaape guye, Yayqoobi, “Taani ta aawa biitta simmada bana tana moyza.
30.26: Taani enta gisho new oothida ta macceetanne ta nayta imma. Taani baana, taani new ay mela ooso oothidaako neeni eraasa” yaagis.
30.27: Shin Laabi iyako, “Taani new issiba odayis, Goday ne gaason tana anjidaysa taani ta Xoossafe eras.
30.28: Ne damooziya taw oda, taani new qanxana” yaagis.
30.29: Yayqoobi, “Taani new waata oothidaako, ne mehetika waani yeletidaako neeni eraasa.
30.30: Taani yaanape kase new de7iya guuthay ha7i loythi daris. Goday nena taani aadhida bessa ubban anjis. Shin ha7i, taani ta soo asaas oothana wode” yaagis.
30.31: Laabi, “Yaatin taani new ay immo?” yaagidi iya oychis. Yayqoobi, “Taw aykoka immofa, neeni taw issiba oothana gidiko, taani ne wudiya ha7ika heemmananne naagana.
30.32: Taani hachi ne wude ubbaa giddora aadhana. Hessan ne dorsatape wancuwa woyko gazza, kareetha marazeta ubbaa, deeshape gazzanne wanco ubbaa taani shaakana, enti ta damooze gido.
30.33: Hessa gisho, ta xillotethay ne taw qanxida damooziya be7anaw yaa wode taw markatana. Ta deeshape gazza woyko puncare gidonabay woyko kareethi gidonna ay dorsati ta matan bentiko, kaysotetidaada tayba” yaagis.
30.35: Shin he gallasan Laabi kalaade woyko gazza gidida kole ubba, wanco woyko gazza gidida macca deesha ubba, bootha wanco deeshatanne kareetha wanco dorsata ubba kessidi ba adde nayta heenthis.
30.36: Yaatidi he wudiya heedzu gallasa ogiya Yayqoobape haassidi efis. Shin Yayqoobi attida Laaba wudiya heemmis.
30.37: Yayqoobi ongafirepe, bar7efenne lawuze mithafe xam7a kessidi, poquwa poqidi giddo bootha bagga qaaridi shiloyis.
30.38: Wudey haathe uyanaw yaa wode gongen wudiya sinthan poqida xam7a wothis. Biraysi keydaysati haathe uyanaw yidi,
30.39: he xam7ata sinthan biraysetosona. He biraysidaysati kalaade, wanconne gazza marata yelidosona.
30.40: Yayqoobi deesha maratanne dorsa wudiyape shaakidi dumma wothis. Attida wudiya kalaadenne kareethi gidiya Laaba mehiyako zaaridi essis. Yaatidi Laaba wudiyara gathonna ba wudiya dummayidi darsis.
30.41: Wudiyape gooba maccati biraysas keyiya wode he xam7ata matan biraysetana mela Yayqoobi he xam7ata haatha gongen meheta sinthan wothees.
30.42: Shin meheti laafa gidiko enta sinthan xam7a wothenna. Hessa gisho, laafa meheti Laababa gidin goobati Yayqoobaba gididosona.
30.43: Hessada oothidi Yayqoobi daro duretidi, daro wudiya, macca aylletanne adde aylleta, daro gimaletanne hareta haaris.

31.1: Laaba adde nayti, “Yayqoobi nu aawaba ubba ekidigis. Ha shalo ubba nu aawabape demmis” yaagishin Yayqoobi si7is.
31.2: Yayqoobi Laaba som7oy iyaw kase mela gidonaysa be7is.
31.3: He wode Goday Yayqooba, “Neeni ne aawata biitta, ne dabbotako guye simma. Taani neera gidana” yaagis.
31.4: Yayqoobi Raheelonne Liya ba wudey heemetiya bessaa yaana mela kiittidi xeegisis.
31.5: I entako, “Hinte aawa som7oy taw kase mela gidonaysa taani be7ayis. Shin ta aawa Xoossay taara de7ees.
31.6: Taani ta kumetha wolqan hinte aawas oothidaysa hinte ereeta.
31.7: Shin hinte aaway tana cimmidi, ta damooziya tammu toho laammis. Gidikoka Xoossay tana I qohonnaada diggis.
31.8: I, ‘Puncareti ne damooze gido’ gin wude ubbay puncare yelis. Qassi I, ‘Kalaadeti ne damooze gido’ gin wude ubbay kalaade yelis.
31.9: Xoossay hessan hinte aawa mehiya wothi ekidi taw immis.
31.10: “Meheti biraysas keyiya ageenan taani issi amuho amuhas. He amuhuwan taani xeelliya wode mehiya biraysiya deesha urgeti kalaade, puncarenne gazza.
31.11: Xoossa kiitanchoy amuhon tana, ‘Yayqooba’ yaagis. Taani, ‘Yee’ gada koyas.
31.12: Ika, ‘Dhoqu gada mehiya biraysiya deesha urge ubba kalaade, puncarenne gazza be7a. Laabi ne bolla oothiyaba ubba taani be7ida gisho hessa oothas.
31.13: Neeni essida shucha zayte tiyada taw caaqida Beetele Xoossay tana. Ha7i dendada ha biittafe keya. Guye ne yeletida biitta simma’ gis” yaagis.
31.14: Hessafe guye, Raheeliranne Liyara “Nu aawabape nuna gakiyabay aybee?
31.15: I nuna allagada xeellees gidennee? I nuna bayzi ekis. Bayzi ekidaba ubbaa midi dhaysis.
31.16: Xoossay nu aawape wothi ekida shalo ubbay tumaka nubaanne nu naytabaa. Hessa gisho, Xoossay new odidaba ubba ootha” yaagi zaaridosona.
31.17: -18 Yayqoobi Kanaane biittan de7iya ba aawa Yisaaqako baanaw dendis. I ba naytanne ba macheta gimale togisis. Wude ubba laaggidi, Masephexoomen de7ishe shiishida shalo ubba ekidi bis.
31.19: Laabi ba dorsata ikisiya qanxanaw bidashin, Raheela ba aawa soo eeqa misileta kaysotasu.
31.20: Qassi Yayqoobi Araame addiya Laabas ba buussaa odonna ixidi cimmis.
31.21: I baw de7iyaba ubba ekidi ellesidi Efraxiisa shaafa pinnidi, derey dariya Galada biitta bis. Laabi Yayqooba Kaallidi Buussaa
31.22: Heedzu gallasape guye, Yayqoobi baqatidi bidaysa Laabi si7is.
31.23: Ba dabbota baara ekidi, laapun gallasa oge Yayqooba geedo kaalli derey dariya Galada biittan iya gakis.
31.24: He wode Xoossay qamma Soore Laabako amuhon qoncidi, “Neeni Yayqooba bolla iitaba gidin lo77oba, aybibaaka odetiko nena era” yaagis.
31.25: Laabi gakiya wode Yayqoobi derey dariya Galada biittan dunkaane tokidi uttis. Laabika dabbotara yan dunkaanidosona.
31.26: Hessafe guye, Laabi Yayqooba, “Neeni haysada tana ayis cimmadii? Ta macca naytaka olan di7etidabada ayis laagga kessadii?
31.27: Neeni ayis qosan taape kessa ekada tana cimmadii? Taani nena ufaysaninne yethan, karaaboninne diithan moyzana mela ayis taw odabikii?
31.28: Neeni hari attoshin, ta nayta naytanne ta macca nayta taani yeera ekona mela diggadasa. Neeni iita oothadasa.
31.29: Taani nena genanaw taw wolqi de7ees shin ne aawa Xoossay zine qamma tana, ‘Yayqooba bolla iitaba gidin lo77oba aybibaaka odetonaada nena era’ yaagidi taw odis.
31.30: Ha7i neeni ne aawa soo baanaw daro laamotida gisho keyadasa. Shin ta soo eeqa misileta ayis kaysotadii?” yaagis.
31.31: Yayqoobi Laaba, “Neeni ne nayta taape wolqan wosisa ekanekonne gada qopida gisho yayada haysada oothas.
31.32: Shin ne soo eeqa misileta ekida asi oonaka neeni demmiko, he uray hayqo. Nu dabbota sinthan nebaa gididaba ubba koyada eka” yaagis. Yayqoobi Raheela ba aawa soo eeqa misileta kaysotidaysa eribeenna.
31.33: Hessa gisho, Laabi Yayqooba dunkaaniya giddo, Liya dunkaaniya giddonne nam7u aylleta dunkaaniya giddo gelidi koyis. Shin aykoka demmibeenna. Liya dunkaaniyape keyidi, Raheeli dunkaaniya gelis.
31.34: Raheela soo eeqa misileta ekada gimale koora garsan qosada iya bolla uttasu. Laabi dunkaaniyan de7iyaba ubba pilgidi koyis. Shin aykoka demmibeenna.
31.35: Raheela ba aawa, “Ta godaw, tana hanqetofa. Taani new denda eqanaw danda7ike, ta kushe metora de7ayis” yaagasu. I koyidi soo eeqa misileta demmibeenna.
31.36: Yayqoobi yilotidi Laabako, “Taani ay iissadina? Haysa neeni tana kaallanaw ta ay qoho oothadina?
31.37: Ha7i neeni ta miishe ubba pilgada koyadasa. Ne soo eeqa misiletape ay demmadii? Enti nu nam7a giddon pirdana mela ne dabbota sinthaninne ta dabbota sinthan haysan wotha.
31.38: “Taani neera laatamu laythi kumethi de7as. Ne dorsatinne deeshati awucaybokona woyko ne wudiyape issuwaka qottada mabike.
31.39: Do7i mida gawuxaka ta new eha erike; taani taape ciggayis. Gallas woyko qamma kaysotetidaysata qanxisaasa.
31.40: Gallasa suulan, qamma meegon taani qohetas. Maara dhisko dhiska erike.
31.41: Taani haysada hanada ne son laatamu laythi de7as. Tammanne oyddu laythi ne nam7u macca nayta gisho, usupun laythi ne mehiya gisho new oothas. Shin neeni ta damooziya tammu toho laammadasa.
31.42: Ta aawa Xoossay, Abrahaame Xoossay, Yisaaqi Xoossay taara gidonaba gidiyako, sidhey bayna neeni tana mela kushe kessa yeddadasa. Shin Xoossay ta metuwanne ta daabursa be7idi zine qamma nena hanqis” yaagis. Yayqoobanne Laaba Caaquwa
31.43: Laabi zaaridi Yayqooba, “Maccasati ta macca nayta, enta nayti ta nayta, ha meheyka ta mehiya, neeni be7iya ubbay taba. Hachi ha macca nayta bollanne enta nayta bolla ay oothanaw danda7ayna?
31.44: Ane haaya, neeranne taara wolla ane caaqoos. Hessi ne giddoninne ta giddon marka gido” yaagis.
31.45: Hessa gisho, Yayqoobi issi shucha ekidi tuussatho essis.
31.46: Ba dabbota, “Shucha shiishite” yaagis. Enti shucha shiishidi keelidosona. He keela matan kathi midosona.
31.47: Laabi he keela, Yigar-Sahaduta gidi sunthis. Yayqoobi qassi iya Galada gidi sunthis.
31.48: Laabi, “Ha keelay neepenne taape giddon hachi marka” yaagis. Hessa gisho, iya sunthay Galada geetetis.
31.49: Laabi, “Nuuni issoy issuwafe haakidi de7iya bessan Goday nenanne tana naago” gidi he bessa Mixipha gidi sunthis.
31.50: Laabi, “Neeni ta macca nayta naaqiko, woyko neeni ta macca nayta bolla hara macco ekiko, ta eronna ixikoka ne giddoninne ta giddon Xoossay marka gideysa akeeka” yaagis.
31.51: Laabi qassika, “Keeletida shuchaynne taani ne giddoninne ta giddon essida shucha tuussay haysish.
31.52: Taani ha keelape nena genanaw neeko kanthonnaada, neka tana genanaw ha keelapenne ha shucha tuussafe haa aadhonada ha keelaynne ha shucha tuussay marka.
31.53: Abrahaame Xoossay, Nakoora Xoossay, enta aawa Xoossay, nu giddon pirdo” yaagis. Yayqoobi ba aawa Yisaaqa Xoossa sunthan caaqis.
31.54: Yayqoobi zuma bolla yarsho yarshis. Ba dabbota kathi maanaw xeegis. Enti midi zuma bolla aqidosona.
31.55: Wontetha gallas guura Laabi dendidi ba nayta naytanne ba macca nayta anjidi, yeeridi ba soo simmis.

32.1: Yayqoobi dendidi ba ogiya bishin Xoossa kiitanchoti iyara gahetidosona.
32.2: Yayqoobi enta be7ida wode “Haysati Xoossa olanchota” yaagidi, he bessa Mahanayma (Nam7u guta) gidi sunthis.
32.3: Yayqoobi Edoome biittan Sayre giya bessan de7iya ba isha Eesaweko kiita baape sinthe kiittis.
32.4: I enta, “Hinte ta godaa Eesawes gaanabay haysa, ‘Taani ne aylley Yayqoobi, ha77i gakanaw Laaba matan gam7as.
32.5: Taw miizi, harey, dorsinne deeshi, adde aylletinne macca aylleti de7oosona. Ha7i taani ha kiita ta godaa sinthan saba demmandinasha gada kiittas yaagis’ yaagite” yaagidi kiittis.
32.6: Kiitetidaysati Yayqoobako simmidi, “Nuuni ne isha Eesaweko bida. Ika qassi neera gahetanaw yees. Iyara oyddu xeetu asay de7oosona” yaagidosona.
32.7: Yayqoobi daro babidi baara de7iya asa nam7u cugan shaakis. Ba dorsa, deesha, miizanne gimaleta nam7u cugan shaakis.
32.8: I, “Eesawey yidi issi cuga oliyaba gidiko, attida cugay kessi ekana” gidi qopis.
32.9: He wode Yayqoobi haysada yaagidi woossis, “Abeeti Godaw, ta aawa Abrahaame Xoossaw, ta aawa Yisaaqa Xoossaw, tana, ‘Ne biitta, ne dabbotako simma, taani new lo77oba oothana gidayso, tana si7arki’,
32.10: neeni ne aylliyas keehidabasinne ammanetetha ubbaas taani bessona asi. Taani Yordaanose shaafa pinniya wode taw issi xam7a xalaali de7ees; shin ha7i taani nam7u cuga godaa gidas.
32.11: Taani nena woossayis ta isha Eesawe kushepe tana ashsha. I yidi, tananne aayeta enta naytara dhaysona aggenna gada yayyayis.
32.12: Shin neeni tana, ‘Taani new tuma lo77oba oothana. Taani ne sheesha taybanaw danda7etona abba shafeda oothana’ gidaysa qopa” yaagis.
32.13: He gallas qamma I yan aqis. Baw de7iyaba ubbaafe ba isha Eesawes immanaba qoridi kessis.
32.14: -15 I, nam7u xeetu macca deeshatanne laatamu deesha marazeta, nam7u xeetu macca dorsatanne laatamu dorsa marazeta, hastamu dhanthiya gimaleta enta maratara, oytamu macca miizata, tammu korma boorata, laatamu macca haretanne tammu adde hareta qoridi kessis.
32.16: Hessata wuden wuden shaakidi ba aylletas immidi, “Taape sinthe bidi wudiya wudiyape haahon haahon laaggite” yaagis.
32.17: Sinthan kaaletheysa, “Ta ishay Eesawey neera gahetidi, ‘Neeni oodesee? Neeni aw bay? Ne sinthan de7iya mehe ubbay oodebayee?’ yaagidi oychiko,
32.18: ne iyako, ‘Haysati ne aylliya Yayqoobasa, I ta godaa Eesawes immanaw yeddidaysata. Ika nuupe guyera yees’ yaaga” yaagidi kiittis.
32.19: Qassi nam7anthuwa, heedzanthuwanne wudiya kaalliya harata ubbaa, “Hinte Eesawera gahetiya wode haysada geeta;
32.20: ‘Ne aylliya Yayqoobi nuupe guyera yees’ goonna aggofite” yaagidi kiittis. I, “Taani immanaw sinthe yeddidaysan iya irxisana. Ooni eri hessafe guye taani iyara gahetiya wode I tana moki ekana” yaagidi qopis.
32.21: Hessa gisho, ba immanaba baape sinthe yeddis. Shin I ba huuphen he gallas qamma yan aqis. Yayqoobi Xoossara Baaxetuwa
32.22: He qamma Yayqoobi dendidi, ba nam7u macheta, ba nam7u aylleta, ba nayta tammanne issota ekidi, Yaaboqa shaafa pinnis.
32.23: I enta shaafa pinthi simmidi baw de7iyaba ubbaa pinthidi yeddis.
32.24: Shin Yayqoobi barka guye attis. He wode issi asi sa7i wontana gakanaw iyara baaxetishe aqis.
32.25: He uray iya xoonanaw danda7onaysa be7ida wode Yayqoobas bulxiya bochin, iya bulxey kesuwape keyis.
32.26: Yaatin uray iya, “Sa7i wontana haniya gisho, tana yedda” yaagis. Shin Yayqoobi, “Neeni tana anjonna nena yeddike” yaagis.
32.27: Uray, “Ne sunthay oonee?” yaagidi oychis. I zaaridi, “Yayqooba” yaagis.
32.28: Uray, “Neeni Xoossaranne asara baaxetada xoonida gisho, hizape ne sunthay Yayqooba geetetofo, Isra7eele (Xoossara baaxetis) geeteto” yaagis.
32.29: Yayqoobi uraa, “Ne sunthay oonee?” yaagidi oychis. Shin uray, “Neeni ta suntha ayis oychay?” yaagidi iya anjis.
32.30: Hessa gisho, Yayqoobi, “Taani Xoossa som7on be7as shin paxa de7ayis” yaagidi, he bessa Phin7eela (Xoossa som7o) gidi sunthis.
32.31: I Phin7eelape dendiya wode iya bolla xalqey dolis. Iya bulxe kessay sakiya gisho dogees.
32.32: Yayqooba bulxey wodire ashuwa matan boshetida gisho, Isra7eele asay mehes bulxe asho hachi gakanaw mookonna.

33.1: Yayqoobi dhoqu gidi xeelliya wode Eesawey ba oyddu xeetu asaara yeysa be7is. Hessa gisho, nayta Liyas, Raheelisinne nam7u aylletas shaaki immis.
33.2: Aylletanne enta nayta sinthan, Liyanne I nayta enta geedon, Raheelonne Yoosefa wursethan wothis.
33.3: Shin I baw sinthe aadhidi ba ishaako matishe sa7a gaki gaki laapuntoho ziggis.
33.4: Shin Eesawey iyara gahetanaw woxi yidi iya qoodhiya qoomidi yeeris. Nam7ayka yeekidosona.
33.5: Eesawey dhoqu gidi xeellidi maccasatanne nayta be7idi, “Ha neera de7eysati oonantee?” yaagidi oychis. Yayqoobi, “Ta godaw, haysati Xoossay ne aylliyas ba keehatethan immida nayta” yaagis.
33.6: Aylleti banta naytara shiiqidi iyaw ziggidosona.
33.7: Kaallidi Liyaranne I naytara yidi ziggidosona. Wursethan Yoosefaranne Raheelira yidi ziggidosona.
33.8: Eesawey, “Ha sinthan bishe taara gahetida wudey ubbay aybee?” yaagidi oychis. Yayqoobi, “Ta godaw, hessi taani ne sinthan saba demmanaw yeddidaysata” yaagis.
33.9: Shin Eesawey, “Ta ishaw, taw gidiya shaloy de7ees, nebay new gido” yaagis.
33.10: Yayqoobi, “Hayyana, ha7i taani ne sinthan saba demmidaba gidiko, ha taani immeysa eka. Neeni tana moka ekida gisho, ta ne som7uwa be7eysi Xoossa som7o be7eysa mela.
33.11: Taani new ehida ha imota eka. Xoossay taw keehi immida gisho kumis” yaagis. Yayqoobi woossidi aggonna ixida gisho, Eesawey iya imota ekis.
33.12: Eesawey, “Ane yedha, taani neera issife baana” yaagis.
33.13: Shin Yayqoobi, “Ta godaw, nayti shugo gideysa eraasa. Qassi taani galo marata dhanthiya dorsatanne miiza naaganaw koshshees. Asay enta hari attoshin, issi gallas minthi laagiko, mehe ubbay hayqana.
33.14: Hessa gisho, ta godaw, ne aylletape sinthatada ba. Taani Sayren ta godaa gakanaw, ta sinthan de7iya mehiyanne nayta hemethaa mela loddan kaallada ta godaa taani Edoomen gakana” yaagis.
33.15: Eesawey, “Yaaniko, taani ta asaape guuthara new asho” yaagis. Shin Yayqoobi, “Koshshenna; taani ta godaa sinthan sabetidaysi taw gidana” yaagis.
33.16: Hessa gisho, Eesawey he gallas ogen wodhidi Sayre simmis.
33.17: Shin Yayqoobi Sukota bis. Yan baw keethe keexis, ba mehetas shaqara shaqaris. Hessa gisho, he bessa Sukota (Kuya woyko Gaabba) gidi sunthis.
33.18: Yayqoobi Masephexoomepe simmidi Kanaane biittan de7iya Seekema katama saron gakis. I he katamas sintha baggara dunkaane tokidi uttis.
33.19: Ba dunkaaniya tokidi uttida gadiya Seekema aawa Hamoora naytape issi xeetu bira santimen shammis.
33.20: Yan yarsho bessi giigisidi, “Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossa” gidi sunthis.

34.1: Liya Yayqoobas yelida na7iya Diina, he wode Kanaane maccasata be7anaw keyasu.
34.2: He biitta haariya Hiwe addiya Hamoora na7a Seekemi iyo be7idi, dafidi iissis.
34.3: Iya wozanay Yayqooba na7iw Diinas qadhetis. I iw mishetida gisho lo77o qaalara iyo odisis.
34.4: Seekemi ba aawa Hamoora, “Taw ha na7iw macho oycharki” yaagis.
34.5: Yayqoobi ba na7iw, Diina, azini dafidaysa si7ida wode iya adde nayti mehera bazzon de7oosona. Hessa gisho, enti yaana gakanaw si77i gis.
34.6: Hessafe guye, Seekema aawa Hamoori Yayqooba odisanaw yis.
34.7: Yayqooba adde nayti bazzofe yidi hessa si7idosona. Enti Seekemi Yayqooba na7iw dafidi, iissidi Isra7eele yeellayida gisho daro yilotidosona.
34.8: Shin Hamoori entako, “Ta na7ay Seekemi hinte na7ees daro mishetees, hayyana iyo iyaw macho immerketi.
34.9: Nuura eketitenne geletite, hinte macca nayta nuus immite, nu macca naytaka hintew ekite.
34.10: Hinte nu giddon daanaw danda7eeta. Biittay daro dalga, iya oothidi zal7idi hintew aqo demmanaw danda7eeta” yaagis.
34.11: He wode Seekemi Diina aawanne I ishata, “Taani hinte sinthan sabetiko, hinte koyiyaba aybiba gidikoka immana.
34.12: Hinte mishira na7ees immanabaanne koyta hinte koyda mela tana oychite. Taani hinte tana oychidaba ubba immana. Shin taani machanaw na7iw taw immerketi” yaagis.
34.13: Banta michiw Diina Seekemi tunisida gisho, Yayqooba adde nayti Seekemasinne iya aawa Hamooras wordotidosona.
34.14: Entako, “Nuuni hessa mela palabaa oothanaw danda7oko, nuuni nu michiw qaxaretiboona asas immoko, hessi nuna kawushiyaba.
34.15: Hinte nuus issiba ero giiko nu hintew ero gaana. Hessika, hinte biitta adde asa ubbay qaxaretidi nuuda haniko,
34.16: nuuni nu macca nayta hintew immanaw Ero gaana. Hinte macca naytaka nuus ekana. Nuuni hinte giddon de7idi hintera issi ase gidana.
34.17: Shin hinte qaxaretanaw ero goonna ixiko, nuuni nu michiw eki baana” yaagidosona.
34.18: Yaatin ha enti gidabay Hamoorasinne iya na7a Seekemas lo77o daanis.
34.19: He panthay ba aawa keethan de7iya ubbaafe aadhidi bonchetida gisho koydaba oothanaw iyaw maati de7ees. Yayqooba na7iw daro dosida gisho, enti gidaba oothanaw guye gibeenna.
34.20: He wode Hamoorinne iya na7ay Seekemi banta katama dabaaba bidi, banta katama asaas haysada yaagidi odidosona.
34.21: “Ha asati nuura siga de7oosona. Biittay daro dalga gidiya gisho enti ha biittan goyo zal7o. Enta macca naytaka nuuni ekana, entika nu macca nayta ekona.
34.22: Shin nuura enti issi asada de7anaw nuuni issiba ero gaanaw koshshees. Hessika, enti qaxaretidaysada nu adde asa ubbay qaxaretanaysa.
34.23: Nuuni hessada oothiko, enta meheynne, enta aqo ubbay nubaa gidennee? Hessa gisho, ane nuuni enti geysa ero goos. Entika nu giddon de7ana” yaagidosona.
34.24: Katamaa dabaaba shiiqida asati ubbay Hamoorasinne iya na7a Seekemas, “Ero” gidoosona. Yaatin he katama adde asati ubbay qaxaretidosona.
34.25: Heedzantho gallas, enti ubbay banta qaxara maduntha saketishin, Yayqooba adde naytape nam7ay, Diina ishati, Simoonaranne Leewera banta mashsha ekidi oonika eronna katama gelidi adde asa ubba wodhidosona.
34.26: Hamooranne iya na7a Seekema mashshan wodhidi, banta michiw Diina Seekema keethafe eki bidosona.
34.27: Yayqooba hara adde nayti ahata bolla gelidi banta michiw Diina tunisida katama ubbaa bonqidosona.
34.28: Enta dorsa wudiya, miiza wudiya, hariya, katama giddon de7iyabaanne gaxan de7iyaba ubba ekidosona.
34.29: Enta keethan de7iya aquwa ubba, enta nayta ubbaanne maccasata ubba di7idosona.
34.30: Yayqoobi Simoonanne Leewe, “Hinte ta bolla gita meto ehideta. Ha biittan de7iya Kanaanetinne Parzeti tana ixana. Nuuni taybon guutha, enti issife gididi ta bolla dendiko, taaninne ta soo asay dhayana” yaagis.
34.31: Shin enti, “Yaatin, I nu michiw layma maccasada oothanaw bessii?” yaagidosona.

35.1: Hessafe guye Xoossay Yayqooba, “Dendada pude Beetele keyada yan de7a. Neeni ne isha Eesawepe baqatida wode new qoncida Xoossas yan yarsho bessi giigisa” yaagis.
35.2: Hessa gisho, Yayqoobi ba soo asaanne iyara de7eyisata ubba, “Hinte giddon de7iya allaga xoossata diggite. Hintena geeshshite, hinte ma7uwa laammite.
35.3: Haysafe dendidi pude Beetele boos. Ta metuwa gallas taw si7ida, taani bida bessa ubban taara gidida Xoossas taani yan yarsho bessi giigisana” yaagis.
35.4: Enti bantaw de7iya allaga xoossata ubbaanne banta haythan aathida worqa ubba kessidi Yayqoobas immidosona. Yayqoobi hessata Seekeman de7iya wolaa garsan moogis.
35.5: Hessafe guye, Yayqoobinne iya adde nayti dendidi biyade enta yuushuwan de7iya asa bolla Xoossa yashshay wodhida gisho entana kaallidi oykanaw oonika danda7ibeenna.
35.6: Yayqoobinne iyara de7iya asa ubbay Kanaane biittan de7iya Beetele geetetiya Looza gakidosona.
35.7: Yan I yarsho bessi giigisis. I he bessa El-Beetele (Beetele Xoossa) gidi sunthis. I ba ishaape baqatidi biya wode Xoossay iyaw qonciday he bessaana.
35.8: Irbiqa dichiya Diboora yan hayqasu. Beetelepe garsara de7iya wolaa garsan iya moogetasu. Hessa gisho, he mitha sunthay Alon-Bakute (Yeeho Wola) geetetis.
35.9: Yayqoobi Masephexoomepe simmidaape guye, Xoossay iyaw zaari qoncidi iya anjis.
35.10: Xoossay, “Ne sunthay Yayqooba. Shin hizape neeni Yayqooba geetetaka, ne sunthay Isra7eele geetetana” yaagidi iya “Isra7eele” gidi sunthis.
35.11: Qassi Xoossay Yayqooba, “Taani Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossa. Neeni yeleta, dara. Dereynne kawotethati neepe keyo. Kawotika ne gulbatape keyo.
35.12: Taani Abrahaamesinne Yisaaqas immida biitta, new immana. Neepe guye taani ha biitta ne sheeshas immana” yaagis.
35.13: Xoossay iyara odetida bessaafe pude keyis.
35.14: Yayqoobi Xoossay iyara odetida bessan qofisiya shucha mala essidi iya bolla woyniyanne zayte tigis.
35.15: Yayqoobi Xoossay iyara odetida bessa “Beetele” gidi sunthis. Raheeli Hayquwa
35.16: Enti hessafe guye, Beetelepe dendidi bidosona. Enti Efraata gakanaw guuthu attishin, Raheelo iqethi oykin daro waayetasu.
35.17: Iqethay iyo waaysida wode iyo yelisiyara, “Babofa; haysika adde na7a” yaagasu.
35.18: Shin iya hayqos matada shempoy keyana hanishin, ba na7a Benoona (Meto na7a) gada sunthasu. Shin iya aaway Biniyaame (Ta ushacha) gidi sunthis.
35.19: Hessafe guye, Raheela hayqa aggasu. Beeteleme geetetiya Efraata efiya ogiya gaxan moogetasu.
35.20: Yayqoobi I duufuwa bolla hawulte shucha essis. He hawultey hachu gakanawuka Raheeli duufuwa erisees.
35.21: Isra7eeley hessafe dendidi Edera gimbiyafe hefinthan ba dunkaaniya tokis.
35.22: Isra7eeley he biittan de7ishin, Robeeli ba aawas yelida aylle Baalira aqis. Isra7eeley he odaa si7is. Yayqooba adde nayti tammanne nam7a.
35.23: Liya nayti Yayqooba bayra na7a Robeela, Simoona, Leewe, Yihuda, Yisakooranne Zabloona.
35.25: Raheeli aylle Baali adde nayti Daanenne Niftaaleme.
35.26: Liya aylle Zalafa adde nayti Gaadenne Aseera. Ha nayti Yayqoobas Masephexoomen yeletida adde nayta.
35.27: Yayqoobi Kebroona geetetiya Qiriyaat-Arba matan Mamiren de7iya ba aawa Yisaaqa soo bis. He bessay kase Abrahaameynne Yisaaqi de7ida bessaa.
35.28: Yisaaqi xeetanne hospun tammu laythi de7is.
35.29: I daro wodiya de7idi lo77o cimidi, hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis. Iya nayti Eesaweynne Yayqoobi iya moogidosona.

36.1: Edoome geetetiya Eesawe yeletethay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa;
36.2: Eesawey Kanaane biitta macca naytape baw machota ekis. Entika Hite addiya Eloona na7iw Ado, Hiwe addiya Xiba7oona na7ay Ani yelida Oholbaamonne
36.4: Ada Eesawes Elfaaza yelasu. Basemaata Ragu7eela yelasu.
36.5: Oholbaama Ye7usa, Ya7ilamanne Qore yelasu. Kanaane biittan Eesawes yeletida adde nayti haysata.
36.6: Eesawey ba macheta, ba adde naytanne macca nayta, ba soo asa ubbaa, ba miizanne ba hara mehe ubbaa Kanaane biittan haaridaba ubbaa ekidi ba isha Yayqoobape haakidi hara biitta bis.
36.7: Enta shaloy darida gisho, enti issife daanaw danda7ibookona. Enta mehey darida gisho, enti de7iya biittay enta nam7aas gidonna ixis.
36.8: Yaanin, Edoome geetetiya Eesawey derey dariya Sayre biittan de7is.
36.9: Derey dariya Sayre biittan de7ida Edoometa mayza Eesawe yeletethay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa;
36.10: Eesawe adde nayta sunthay, Eesawe mache Adi na7aa Elfaazanne Eesawe mache Basemaati na7a Ragu7eela.
36.11: Elfaaza nayti Temaana, Omaara, Xafa, Ga7itamanne Qeneza.
36.12: Qassi Timnaa7a Eesawe na7a Elfaazas aylle. Iya Elfaazas Amaaleqa yelasu. Haysati Eesawe mache Adi na7aa nayta.
36.13: Ragu7eela adde nayti Nahaata, Zara, Shamanne Miiza. Haysati Eesawe mache Basemaati na7a nayta.
36.14: Xiba7oona na7ay Ani yelida Oholbaama adde nayti haysata; Entika Ye7usa, Ya7ilamanne Qore.
36.15: Eesawe yeleta halaqati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; Eesawes bayra na7a Elfaaza adde nayti, halaqa gididaysati Temaana, Omaara, Xafa, Qanaza,
36.16: Qore, Ga7itamanne Amaaleqa; Edoome biittan Elfaazi yelida halaqati haysata; hessati ubbay Adi na7aa nayta.
36.17: Eesawe na7a Ragu7eela adde nayti, halaqa gididaysati Nahaata, Zaraha, Shamanne Miiza; Edoome biittan Ragu7eeli yelida halaqati haysata; enti Eesawe mache Basemaati na7a nayta.
36.18: Eesawe mache Oholbaami adde nayti, halaqa gididaysati Ye7usa, Ya7ilamanne Qore; enti Ana na7e, Eesawe mache Oholbaamipe yeletida halaqata.
36.19: Edoome geetetiya Eesawe adde nayti haysata; enta halaqatika haysata. Sayrenne Yeletetha (1 Taari 1:38-42)
36.20: Edoome biittan de7iya Hoora Sayre adde nayti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; hessatika Loxaana, Shobaala, Xiba7oona, Ana,
36.21: Disoona, Exeranne Disaana; hessati, Edoome biittan de7iya Sayre adde nayti, Hoorata halaqata.
36.22: Loxaana adde nayti Hooranne Hemaama; Loxaana michiya Timnaa7o.
36.23: Sobaala adde nayti Aliwa, Manahoota, Ebaala, Sifanne Onaama.
36.24: Xiba7oona adde nayti Ayanne Ana; haysi Ani mela biittan ba aawa Xiba7oona hareta heemmishe bilbo haatha pultuwa demmidaysa.
36.25: Ana na7ay Disoona; na7iya qassi Oholbaamo.
36.26: Disoona adde nayti Hemdaana, Esbaana, Yitraananne Kaarana.
36.27: Exera adde nayti Bilihaana, Zawananne Aqana.
36.29: Hoorata halaqati haysata; Loxaana, Shobaala, Xiba7oona, Ana,
36.30: Disoona, Exeranne Disaana. Haysati Sayre biittan banta yaran yaran shaaketida Hoorata halaqata. Edoome Ayseysata (1 Taari 1:43-54)
36.31: Isra7eelen Kawoy kawotanaape kase Edoome biittan kawotida kawoti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata.
36.32: Bi7oora na7ay Balaaqi Edoomen kawotis; iya katamaa sunthay Dinaaba geetetees.
36.33: Balaaqi hayqin, Baasora addey Zaara na7ay Yobaabi iya bessan kawotis.
36.34: Yobaabi hayqin, Temaana addey Husami kawotis.
36.35: Husami hayqin, Badada na7ay Hadaadi, Midiyaameta Moo7abe biittan xoonidaysi kawotis; iya katamaa sunthay Awiita geetetis.
36.36: Hadaadi hayqin, Masreeqa addey Samili kawotis.
36.37: Samili hayqin, shaafa matan de7iya Rehoboota addey Saa7uli kawotis.
36.38: Saa7uli hayqin, Akboora na7ay Ba7al-Hanani kawotis.
36.39: Akboora na7a Ba7al-Hanani hayqin, Hadaadi kawotis; iya katamaa sunthay Paa7u geetetees; iya machiya Mezahaaba na7iya Maxireeda yelida Mahexabeelo geetetawusu.
36.40: Eesawe yeleta halaqati banta yaran yaran, banta bessan bessan banta sunthan sunthan haysata; Timina, Aliwa, Yeteta,
36.43: Magdelanne Irama. Haysati banta aysiya biittan, banta de7iyasuwan de7iyasuwan Edoome halaqata. Haysi Eesawey, Edoometa aawa.

37.1: Yayqoobi iya aaway Yisaaqi de7ida Kanaane biittan de7is.
37.2: Yayqooba yeletetha taarikey haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Yoosefi tammanne laapun laytha na7a gidida wode ba aawa machetape, Baalipenne Zilpafe yeletida ba ishatara mehe heemmees. I ba aawas ba ishati oothida iitabata odees.
37.3: Isra7eeley Yoosefa cimidi yelida gisho, ba hara adde nayta ubbaafe aathidi dosees. Hessa gisho, iyaw alleeqetida ma7o giigisis.
37.4: Iya ishati enta aaway iya entafe aathidi doseysa be7ida wode iya ixidosona. Mal7o qaalaka iyako odetanaw danda7ibookona.
37.5: Issi wode Yoosefi amuho amuhidi, ba ishatas odin enti iya kaseysafe aathidi ixidosona.
37.7: Nuuni gaden giste mirqishin ta mirqey dendidi luule eqis. Hinte mirqeti yuuyi aadhidi ta mirqiyas ziggidosona” yaagis.
37.8: Iya ishati, “Neeni nu bolla kawotada nuna haaranaw qopay?” yaagidi oychidosona. Enti iya amuhuwa gishonne iya odaa gisho, kaseysafe aathidi ixidosona.
37.9: Qassika Yoosefi hara amuho amuhidi ba ishatas odis. “Heko, taani hara amuhoka amuhas. He amuhuwan awi, ageeninne tammanne issi xoolintoti taw ziggoosona” yaagis.
37.10: Ba ishatas odida amuhuwa ba aawas odida wode iya aaway, “Haysi waanida amuho? Tuma taani, ne aayanne ne ishati yidi, ne sinthan zigganeyee?” yaagidi hanqetis.
37.11: Iya ishati iya qanaatidosona, shin iya aaway he odaa ba wozanan wothis. Yoosefa Bayzetetha
37.12: Issi gallas iya ishati Seekeman banta aawa meheta heemmanaw bidosona.
37.13: Isra7eeley Yoosefa, “Ne ishati Seekeman meheta heemmeysa eraasa. Haaya, taani nena entako kiittana” yaagis. Yoosefika, “Ero” yaagis.
37.14: I iyako, “Bada ne ishatinne mehey saro gideysa be7ada entaba taw yada oda” yaagidi Yoosefa Kebroona zangaarape kiittis. Yoosefi kiitetidi Seekema bis.
37.15: Yan demba bessan enta koshshan yaa haa simeretishin, issi asi iya demmidi, “La na7aw, ay koyay?” yaagidi oychis.
37.16: I, “Ta ishata koyayis; enti mehiya heemmiya bessaa be7idaako, hayyana taw odarkii” yaagis.
37.17: Uray, “Haysafe bidosona; enti, ‘Nuuni Dootane baana’ gishin si7as” yaagis. Hessa gisho, Yoosefi ba ishata geedo kaalli bidi, enta Dootanen demmis.
37.18: Shin I haahon de7ishin, enti iya be7idosona. I entako gakonna de7ishin, wodhanaw iya bolla maqetidosona.
37.19: Enti issoy issuwako, “Hini be7ite, amuhuwa goday yees.
37.20: Haayite, iya wodhidi, ha ollatape issuwan yeggoos. Hessafe guye, ‘Do7i iya mis’ yaagana. Yaatidi, iya amuhuwa wursethaa be7ana” yaagidosona.
37.21: Robeeli hessa si7ida wode, enta kushepe iya ashshanaw koydi, “Iya wodhoko;
37.22: iya wodhanaape mela biittan de7iya ha ollan yeggite; iya bolla kushe wothofite” yaagis. Robeeli hessa giday, iya enta kushepe ashshidi guye aawako zaaranaasa.
37.23: Yoosefi ba ishatako gakida wode I ma77ida alleeqetida ma7uwa iyape qaari ekidosona.
37.24: Iya efidi haathi bayna mela ollan yeggidosona.
37.25: Enti kathi mishin hassayoona Isma7eela asati Galadape Gibxe bishin, dhoqu gidi be7idosona. Enti banta gimaleta bolla sawuwa, madiyanne karbiya caanidosona.
37.26: Yihudi ba ishata, “Nuuni nu isha wodhidi, iya suuthaa qottiko nuna ay maaddanee?
37.27: Haayite, iya Isma7eela asaas bayzoos. I nu isha, nu suuthunne nu asho gidiya gisho iya bolla nu kushiya wothoko” yaagis. Iya ishati iya odaa ma77idosona.
37.28: Hessa gisho, Midiyaame biitta zal7anchoti yaara aadhishin, iya ishati Yoosefa ollafe kessidi, Isma7eela asatas laatamu bira santimen bayzidosona. Enti Yoosefa Gibxe biitta efidosona.
37.29: Robeeli ollaako simmidi, Yoosefi yan baynaysa be7ida wode, azzanidi ba ma7uwa daakis.
37.30: I guye ba ishatako bidi, “Na7ay yan baawa; hiza, taani ay hanosha?” yaagis.
37.31: Enti Yoosefa ma7uwa ekidi, issi deeshe shukidi, he suuthan naaqidosona.
37.32: Alleeqetida iya ma7uwa banta aawako efidi “Nuuni haysa demmida; haysi ne na7a ma7uwakonne ane be7a” yaagidosona.
37.33: Yayqoobi ma7uwa eridi, “Haysi ta na7aa ma7uwa; ta na7aa do7i mis. Yoosefi tumaka zaazetis” yaagis.
37.34: Yayqoobi azzanidi, ba ma7uwa peedhis. Kayo ma7o ma7idi, ba na7aas daro gallas yeekis.
37.35: Iya adde naytinne macca nayti ubbay iya minthethanaw yidosona. Shin I minettonna ixidi, “Akay, taani yeehoy yeehoshin duufo gelana” yaagidi, Yoosefas yeekis.
37.36: He wode Midiyaame biitta asati Yoosefa, Gibxe kawa moorinnatanne kawa naageysata halaqa gidida Phoxfaaras bayzidosona.

38.1: He wode Yihudi ba ishatape shaaketidi, Adulaama kataman de7iya Hira geetetiya uraara daanaw bis.
38.2: Yan Yihudi Shuu7a geetetiya Kanaane ura na7iw machis.
38.3: Iya Yihudas qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. I he na7a Era gidi sunthis.
38.4: Qassika qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Iya he na7a Onaana gada sunthasu.
38.5: Zaaradaka hara adde na7a yelasu. Iya he na7aa Seela gada sunthasu. He na7ay yeletiya wode Yihudi Akziiba biittana.
38.6: Yihudi ba bayra na7a Eras Timaaro geetetiya macho immis.
38.7: Yihuda bayra na7ay, Eri, Godaa sinthan iita asi gidiya gisho, Goday iya wodhis.
38.8: Yihudi Onaanako, “Wogay nena kiiteysa mela ne ishaa machera aqa. Ne ishaas na7a yelada iya suntha xeegisa” yaagis.
38.9: Shin Onani yeletana nayti iyabaa gidonaysa erida gisho, ba ishaa machera aqiya wode ba ishaas na7i yeletonna mela ba attunta sa7an gussees.
38.10: I oothidabay Godaa sinthan iitaba gidida gisho, Goday iyaka wodhis.
38.11: Hessafe guye, Yihudi ba na7aa machiw Timaaro, “Ta na7ay Seeli diccana gakanaw ne aawa soo bada, am7etethan de7aasha” yaagis. Hessa I giday, ika ba ishatada hayqanekonne gidi hirgida gishosa. Hessa gisho, Timaara bada ba aawa son de7asu.
38.12: Daro wodepe guye, Yihuda machiya, Shuu7a na7iya hayqasu. Yihudi ba kayo wodiya ongidi, ba dorsata ikisiya meediya asatako Timina geetetiya bessi ba laggiya Adulaama addiya Hirera bis.
38.13: Asay Timaaro, “Heko, ne azina aaway Yihudi, ba dorsata ikisiya meedanaw Timina bees” yaagidi odidosona.
38.14: Iya ba am7etetha ma7uwa laammada, bana balethanaw shaashe ekada guuluntasu. Yaatada, Timina efiya ogiya doonan de7iya Enayme katama gaxan uttasu. Hessa iya oothidaysi, Seeli diccidi gakinka iyaw macho gidada imetonaysa iya erida gishosa.
38.15: Iya ba som7uwa guuluntida gisho, Yihudi iyo be7ida wode, layma maccas gidi qopis.
38.16: Ba na7aa machiw gideysa eronna de7ishe, ogiya gaxa iiko shiiqidi “Taara aqanee?” yaagidi oychis. Iya, “Taani neera aqiko, ne taw ay immanee?” gada oychasu.
38.17: I, “Taani ta mehiyape issi kole new yeddana” yaagis. Iya, “Neeni hessa taw yeddana gakanaw ay oythanee?” yaagasu.
38.18: I, “Ay oytho?” yaagis. Iya, “Ne maatamiya iya gooshuwaranne ne kushiyan de7iya xam7a oytha” yaagasu. I hessata immidi, iira aqis; iyaka qanthatasu.
38.19: Iya hessafe dendada bidaape guye, ba guulunthaa qaarada, ba am7etetha ma7uwa ma7asu.
38.20: Yihudi ba oythidaba he maccaseepe zaari ekanaw deesha ba laggiya Hira bolla iw yeddis. Shin I iyo demmibeenna.
38.21: I he biitta asaako, “Enayme kataman, oge doonan uttida layma maccasiya awunee?” yaagidi oychis. Asay, “Layma maccas haysan ubbaka baawa” yaagidosona.
38.22: I Yihudako simmidi, “ ‘Taani iyo demmabike; hessa bollaka he biitta asay, layma maccas haysan ubbaka baawa’ yaagidosona” yaagis.
38.23: Yihudi, “Ba oykidaysa baw eko, atto giiko, asi nuna miicana. Hiza taani iw deeshe yeddas shin neeni iyo demmabaaka” yaagis.
38.24: Heedzu ageena gidishin asay, “Ne na7aa maccasiya Timaara laymatada qanthatasu” yaagidi Yihudas odidosona. Yihudi, “Iyo kare kessidi taman xuuggite” yaagis.
38.25: Iyo kare kessiya wode, “Taani qanthatiday ha miisheta godaasa. Ha maatameynne xam7ay oodebayeko eranaw danda7iko era” gada ba azina aawaka kiittasu.
38.26: Yihudi he miisheta eridi, “Taani ta na7aa Seelas iyo immaboonna gisho, taape iya xillo” yaagis. Hessafe guye, I iira zaaridi aqibeenna.
38.27: Iwu yelo qammi gakiya wode, I ulon mente nayti de7eysi eretis.
38.28: Iya maaretishin, entafe issoy ba kushiya kessin yelisiyara, “Haysi koyro keyis” gaanaw zo7o qacina ekada iya kushen qachasu.
38.29: Shin I ba kushiya guye ekida wode, iya ishay keyin iya, “Neeni waanada porxu gada keyadii?” yaagasu. Hessa gisho, Paaresa (Porxu gis) gada sunthasu.
38.30: Hessafe guye, iya kushiyan zo7o qacini de7iya iya ishay yeletis. Iya sunthay Zaara (Zo7o) geetetis.

39.1: Isma7eela asati Yoosefa Gibxe biitta efidosona. Gibxe kawa moorinatape issuwas, kawa naageysata halaqaas Yoosefa bayzidosona.
39.2: Goday Yoosefara de7iya gisho, I oothiyaba ubbaa iyaw injeyis. Yaatin, ba Gibxe godaa son de7is.
39.3: Goday iyara de7eysanne I oothiyaba ubbaa iyaw injeyidaysa Phoxfaari be7ida wode,
39.4: Yoosefa dosis, baw mata oosancho oothis. Phoxfaari iya ba keetha bollanne baw de7iyaba ubbaa bolla shuumis.
39.5: He wodepe doomidi, Goday Gibxe ura keetha Yoosefa gisho anjis. Godaa anjoy Phoxfaara sooninne iya gaden de7iyaba ubbaa bolla wodhis.
39.6: I miya kathiw eriyaripe attishin, baw de7iya haraba ubbaa Yoosefa kushen sheedhis. Yoosefi yegelsinne mala lo77o asi.
39.7: Guutha wodepe guye, iya godaa machiya Yoosefa be7ada, “Haaya, taara zin7a” yaagasu.
39.8: Shin I ixidi, iiko, “Be7a, ta goday, baw de7iyaba ubbaa ta kushen yeggida gisho, ba son de7iyabas aykoka hirgenna.
39.9: Ha son taape aadhey oonika baawa. Neeni iya macho gidiya gisho, neepe attishin, haraa, I taw immonabay baawa. Yaatin, taani waatada haysa mela daro iitaba hanada Xoossa bolla nagara ootho?” yaagis.
39.10: Iya he odaa wonta wonta Yoosefas odinka, I iira aqonna woyko I mata shiiqona ixis.
39.11: Shin issi gallas I ba ooso oothanaw soo geliya wode, soo aylletape oonika son baawa.
39.12: Iya Yoosefa afila oykada, “Taara zin7a” yaagasu. Shin I ba afila I kushiyan yeggi aggidi, soope kare woxi keyis.
39.13: Yoosefi ba afila I kushiyan yeggi aggidi, soope kare woxi keydaysa iya be7ida wode,
39.14: ba soo aylleta xeegada, “Heko, ta azinay ehida ha Ibraawe uray tana kawushshanaw oykis. I tana iissanaw ta de7iyasuwa gelis, shin taani waassas.
39.15: I ba afila ta matan yeggi aggidi, soope kare woxidi keyis” yaagasu.
39.16: I azinay soo yaana gakanaw iya Yoosefa afila ba matan wothasu.
39.17: I yin, iyaw haysada gada odasu; “Haysi ne ehida Ibraawe aylley tana iissanaw taako gelis.
39.18: Shin taani waassin, ba afila ta matan yeggi aggidi, soope kare woxi keyis” yaagasu.
39.19: Iya goday hanidaba si7ida wode daro yilotis.
39.20: Iya goday Yoosefa efidi, kawa qasho asay de7iya qasho keethan yeggis.
39.21: Shin Yoosefi qasho keethan de7iya wode, Goday iyara de7ees. Ba keehatetha iyaw darsidi, qasho keetha kaapuwa sinthan iyaw saba immis.
39.22: Yaanin, qasho keetha kaapoy qasho asa ubba Yoosefa kushen yeggis. Yan oosetiyaba ubbaas aawatetha immis.
39.23: Goday Yoosefara gididi, I oothiyaba ubbaa iyaw injeyida gisho, qasho keethaa kaapoy Yoosefa kushen de7iyabas aykoka hirgenna.

40.1: Guutha wodepe guye, Gibxe kawa ushsha kaapoynne katha kaapoy banta godaa, Gibxe kawa naaqidosona.
40.2: Kawoy he nam7u kaapota bolla daro yilotidi,
40.3: Yoosefi qashetida, qasho keetha naageysata kaapuwa son enta qachis.
40.4: Naageyseta halaqay enta Yoosefas sheedhis, ika entaw kiitetees. Enti qasho keethan daro wode uttidosona.
40.5: Gibxe kawa ushsha kaapoynne katha kaapoy, qasho keethan de7ishe nam7ayka issi qamma dumma dumma amuho amuhidosona. He amuhotas dumma dumma birshethay de7ees.
40.6: Yoosefi wonta entako geliya wode enti azzanidi uttidashin be7is.
40.7: I entana, “Hachi hinte som7oy ayis dhumidee?” yaagidi oychis.
40.8: Enti, “Nu nam7ayka amuho amuhida, shin nuus birshiya asi dhayis” yaagidosona. Yoosefi entako, “Amuho birshiya eratethay Xoossaba gidenneyee? Ane hinte amuhuwa taw odite” yaagis.
40.9: Yaatin ushsha kaapoy ba amuhuwa Yoosefas odis; “Taani ta amuhon issi woyne ta sinthan be7as.
40.10: He woyniyas heedzu tasheti de7oosona. I hayxidi, ciiyi simmidi teeris.
40.11: Kawo wanci ta kushen de7ees. Taani woyne teera ekada iyan gum7ada, he wanca kawa kushen wothas” yaagis.
40.12: Yoosefi, “Ha amuhuwa birshethay haysa; heedzu tasheti heedzu gallasata.
40.13: Heedzu gallasata giddon Kawoy nena qashope billana. I nena kase shuumatethaako zaarana. Kase neeni ushsha kaapo gidada ootheysada neeni kawa wanca iya kushiyan wothana.
40.14: Shin new sa7i lo77ida wode tana dogopa; taw keeha. Tabaa kawas odada, ha qasho keethafe tana kesisa.
40.15: Tana Ibraawe biittafe wolqan ehidosona. Hari attoshin, haysan tana qashos gathiyaba aybibaaka oothabike” yaagis.
40.16: Kathaa kaapoy Yoosefi amuhuwa loythidi birshidaysa be7ida wode Yoosefako, “Taani amuhida amuhoy haysa; ta huuphen heedzu gabate uythi de7ees;
40.17: bolla bagga gabatiyan Gibxe kawas dumma dumma katha qommofe uuketida uythay de7ees. Shin kafoti he ta huuphen de7iya gabatiyape moosona” yaagis.
40.18: Yoosefi, “He amuhuwa birshethay haysa; heedzu gabateti heedzu gallasata.
40.19: Heedzu gallasa giddon Kawoy nena qashope billana. Ne qoodhiya qanxisidi mithan kaqisana; ne ashuwaka kafoy maana” yaagis.
40.20: Heedzantho gallasan Gibxe Kawoy ba yeletida gallasan ba moorinnata ubbaas gibira giigisis. Ushsha kaapuwanne katha kaapuwa billi ehidi ba asa sinthan essis.
40.21: Ushsha kaapuwa iya shuumatethaako zaarin, I kawa kushiyan wanca wothis.
40.22: Shin Kawoy kathaa kaapuwa kaqisis. Ubbayka Yoosefi enta amuhuwa birshidaysada hanis.
40.23: Shin ushsha kaapoy Yoosefa hassayonna dogi aggis.

41.1: Nam7u laythafe guye, Gibxe Kawoy amuho amuhis. He amuhuwan I Nayle Shaafa gaxan eqis.
41.2: Laapun ordenne modho miizati Nayle Shaafape keyidi, maata mishin be7is.
41.3: Entafe kaallidi, hara laapun gilqa miizati Nayle Shaafape keyidi, shaafa gaxan de7iya hara miizata matan eqidosona.
41.4: He gilqa miizati laapun ordenne modho miizata mittidosona. Hessafe guye, Kawoy barkis.
41.5: I zaari dhiskidi, hara amuhoka amuhis. Laapun lo77onne muruuta mor7eti issi maqa bolla keyidosona.
41.6: Entafe kaallidi, lee7onne doloha bagga carkon shullida hara laapun mor7eti keyidosona.
41.7: He lee7ida mor7eti lo77onne muruuta mor7eta mittidosona. Hessafe guye, Kawoy barkidi amuho gideysa eris.
41.8: Sa7ay wontin dhiskofe I dendiya wode iya wozanay yarkis. Hessa gisho, Gibxen de7iya bitanchotanne eranchota ubbaa kawoy xeegisidi entaw ba amuhuwa odis. Shin iyaw he amuhuwa birshiya asi dhayis.
41.9: Ushsha kaapoy he wode Gibxe kawako, “Taani ta naaquwa hachi hassayayis.
41.10: Issi wode Kawoy ba aylleta hanqetidi, tananne kathaa kaapuwa qasho keethan yeggis.
41.11: Yan de7ishe nu nam7ati amuho amuhida. He amuhotas dumma dumma birshethay de7ees.
41.12: He wode naageysata kaapuwa aylley, Ibraawe panthay, nuura qashon de7ees. Nuuni nu amuhuwa iyaw odin, I nuus huuphen huuphen amuhuwa billis.
41.13: Yaanin, he hanoti I nuus billidaysada hanidosona. Hessi aybe giiko, taani ta shuumatethaako simmas, hankoy kaqetis” yaagis.
41.14: Yaatin, Gibxe Kawoy Yoosefa xeegisis. Enti iya qasho keethafe ellesidi ehidosona. I meedetidi ba ma7uwa laammidi, kawako gelis.
41.15: Kawoy Yoosefa, “Taani amuho amuhas, shin taw issi asika billanaw danda7ibeenna. Taani, ne amuho billanaw danda7eysa si7as” yaagis.
41.16: Yoosefi, “Taani hessa danda7ike, shin Xoossay kawas lo77onne like birshethi immana” yaagis.
41.17: Kawoy, “Taani ta amuhora Nayle Shaafa gaxan eqidashin,
41.18: laapun ordenne modho miizati Nayle Shaafape keyidi, maata moosona.
41.19: Entafe kaallidi, hara laapun gilqanne laafida miizati keyidosona. Taani hessa mela gilqa miizi Gibxe biittan ubbaka be7a erike.
41.20: He gilqanne laafida miizati koyro keyida laapun modho miizata mittidosona.
41.21: Shin enta mittidaape guye kaseysada gilqi uttida gisho, enti mittidaba oonika eranaw danda7ibeenna. Hessafe guye, taani barkas.
41.22: “Taani ta amuhuwan qassi laapun lo77onne muruuta mor7eti issi maqa bolla keydaysata be7as.
41.23: Entafe kaallidi, lee7onne doloha bagga carkuwan shullida hara laapun mor7eti keyidosona.
41.24: He lee7ida mor7eti laapun lo77o mor7eta midosona. Taani ha amuhuwa bitanchotas odas, shin taw amuhuwa birshiya asi bentibeenna” yaagis.
41.25: Hessafe guye, Yoosefi Gibxe kawako, “kawa amuhota birshethay issino. Xoossay ba oothana haniyaba kawas qoncisis.
41.26: He laapun lo77o miizati laapun laythata, qassi laapun lo77o mor7eti laapun laythata, ha amuhota birshethay issino.
41.27: He laapun gilqanne laafida miizati laapun laythata, qassi doloha bagga carkuwan shullida, lee7o laapun mor7eti laapun kosha laythata.
41.28: “Taani kawas odidaysadaka, Xoossay ba oothana haniyaba kawa bessis.
41.29: Laapun daro kalo laythati Gibxe biitta ubban yaana.
41.30: Shin hessafe guye, laapun kosha laythati kaallidi yaana. He wode Gibxe kaaloy ubbay dogetana, koshi biitta caacana.
41.31: Koshay daro iita gidiya gisho he biitta kaaloy dogetidi attana.
41.32: Nam7u ogiyan kawas he amuhoy bentiday Xoossay ba qopidaba oothanaw qanxida gishosa. Hessa Xoossay mata woden oothana.
41.33: “Ha7i hiza, neeni eranchonne cinca asi koyada Gibxe biittan shuuma.
41.34: Laapun kalo laythan kaxiya kathaafe ichashu kushiyape issuwa shiishana asata shuuma.
41.35: Enti yaa kalo laythan kathaa shiishidi, banta aawatethan kataman kataman minjidi wothana mela kiita.
41.36: Biittay koshan dhayona mela ha kathay Gibxe biittan laapun laythan dendana koshas minjetidi de7o” yaagis. Yoosefi Gibxe Biittan Shuumetetha
41.37: Yaatin he oday Gibxe kawasinne iya moorinnatas lo77o gididi bentis.
41.38: Hessa gisho, Kawoy entako, “Yoosefape aadhiya hara Xoossa Ayyaanara de7iya asi demmanaw danda7oko” yaagis.
41.39: Hessafe guye Kawoy Yoosefa, “Xoossay haysa ubba nena erisida gisho, ne mela eranchoynne cinca asi oonika baawa.
41.40: Taani nena ta biittan shuumas. Ta asa ubbay new kiitetana. Taape hari neepe aadhiya oonika baawa.
41.41: Heko, taani nena Gibxe biitta ubba bolla shuumas” yaagis.
41.42: Hessafe guye, Kawoy ba paramiya migiduwa ba biradhiyafe kessidi, Yoosefa biradhen aathis. Boncho ma7onne qoodhe worqa iya mayzis.
41.43: Kawoy ba nam7antho para gaariya Yoosefa togisis. Boncho wotaadarey, “Ziggite! Ziggite!” yaagishe iyape sinthara hemetees. Hessada oothidi, kawoy iya Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla shuumis.
41.44: Hessafe guye Kawoy Yoosefa, “Taani kawo gidikoka ne kiittonna oonika Gibxe biitta ubban ba kushiya woyko ba tohuwa qaaxofo” yaagis.
41.45: Kawoy Yoosefa, “Xafnaat-Pa7ina” gidi sunthis. I iyaw Ona katama kahiniya Phoxfaara na7iw Asnaato macho immis. Yaanin, Yoosefi Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla maata ekis.
41.46: Yoosefi Gibxe kawas ooso oykiya wode, iyaw laythi hastama. Yoosefi kawa sinthafe keyidi, Gibxe biitta ubbaa giddon hemetis.
41.47: He laapun kalo laythan biittan daro kathi kaxis.
41.48: Yoosefi Gibxe biittan he laapun kalo laytha katha ubbaa shiishidi, katamatan minjis. Issi issi katama yuushuwan de7iya gadiyape katha ubbaa he katamatan shiishis.
41.49: Yoosefi abba shafiya mela daro katha shiishis. Katha darotethaafe dendoysan makanaw danda7etibona gisho, maki maki qoleysa aggaagis.
41.50: Kosha laythi yaanape sinthe, Ona katama kahine Phoxfaara na7e Asnaatipe Yoosefi nam7u adde nayta yelis.
41.51: Yoosefi ba bayra na7aa sunthaa, “Xoossay tana ta metuwanne ta aawa soo asa ubbaa dogisis” gidi Minaase gidi sunthis.
41.52: Nam7antho na7aa sunthaaka, “Xoossay ta metootida biittan taw na7a immis” gidi Efreema gidi sunthis.
41.53: Gibxe biittan de7iya he laapun kalo laythati aadhidosona.
41.54: Yoosefi odidaysada laapun kosha laythati kaalli yidosona. Hara biitta ubban koshi keyis, shin Gibxe biitta ubban kathay de7ees.
41.55: Gibxe biittay ubbay koshatida wode, asay kathas kawako waassidosona. Kawoy Gibxe asa ubba, “Yoosefako bidi, I odeysa oothite” yaagidi kiittis.
41.56: Koshay Gibxe biitta ubba gakida wode, Yoosefi katha minjida shaaleta ubba dooydi, kathi Gibxe asaas bayzis.
41.57: Biitta ubban koshi suullida gisho, sa7an de7iya asa ubbay kathi Yoosefape shammanaw Gibxe yidosona.

42.1: Yayqoobi Gibxen kathi de7eysa si7ida wode ba adde nayta, “Hinte issoy issuwa ayis xeelleetii?
42.2: Gibxen kathi de7eysa taani si7as; yaa bidi, nuuni hayqonna mela guutha kathi shammite” yaagis.
42.3: Yaatin, Yoosefa ishati tammati kathi shammanaw Gibxe bidosona.
42.4: Shin Yayqoobi I qohetana gidi hirgida gisho Yoosefa isha Biniyaame iya ishatara yeddibeenna.
42.5: Kanaane biittan wolqaama koshi de7iya gisho, kathi shammanaw beysatara Isra7eele adde nayti Gibxe gelidosona.
42.6: He wode Yoosefi he biitta aysiya gisho biittan de7iya asa ubbaas kathi bayzees. Hessa gisho, Yoosefa ishati yaa gakida wode banta som7uwa sa7a gathidi iyaw ziggidosona.
42.7: Yoosefi ba ishata be7ida melaka eri aggis. Shin I enta eronna asada hanidi; entako, “Hinte awupe yideti?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Kathi shammanaw, Kanaane biittafe yida” yaagidosona.
42.8: Yoosefi ba ishata eris, shin enti iya eribookona.
42.9: Yoosefi entaba amuhida ba amuhuwa akeekidi entako, “Hinte wochanaw yida asi, hinte nu biittan naagoy lepiya baggay awuneko be7anaw yideta” yaagis.
42.10: Enti, “Akay, nu godaw, nuuni wochanaw yida asi gidoko. Nuuni ne aylleti kathi shammanaw yida.
42.11: Nuuni ubbayka issi aawa nayta. Nuuni ne aylleti ammanetiya asi” yaagidosona.
42.12: Yoosefi entako, “Akay, hinte nu biittan naagoy lepiya baggay awuneko be7anaw yideta” yaagis.
42.13: Shin enti, “Nuuni ne aylleti Kanaane biittan de7iya issi ura nayta; nuuni tammanne nam7u ishanta. Wursetha kaaloy ha7i nu aawara son de7ees, issoy hayqis” yaagidosona.
42.14: Yoosefi entako, “Taani hintew odidaysada hinte biitta wocheyisata.
42.15: Hinte paacetanaysi haysana; tuma Kawoy hayqo, hinte wursetha kaalo ishay haysa yoona ixiko, hinte ha bessaafe beeketa.
42.16: Hinte odeysi tuma gideysa paacanaw, hintefe issuwa kiittite. I hinte isha ekidi yo, attidaysati qasho keethan gam7eeta. Hessi hanona ixiko, Kawoy hayqo, hinte biitta wocheyisata” yaagis.
42.17: Entana heedzu gallas qasho keethan qachis.
42.18: Heedzantho gallasan Yoosefi entako, “Taani Xoosse yayiya asi. Yaaniya gisho, hinte issiba oothiko hinte shempuwa ashshana.
42.19: Hinte tumaka ammanetiya ase gidiko, hinte ishatape issoy haysan qasho keethan de7o; attidaysati koshatiya hinte soo asaas kathi efite;
42.20: Shin hinte wursetha ishaa taako ehiko, hinte qaalay tumatana; hinteka hayqonna attana” yaagis. Entika iya oda ero gidi ekidosona.
42.21: Enti issoy issuwako, “Tuma nuuni nu ishas oothidabay nuna kaa7ees. I ba shempuwas watwatidi woossiya wode nuuni si7ishe ixida. Hessa gisho, ha waayey nuna gakis” yaagidosona.
42.22: Robeeli, “Taani hintena, na7aa bolla nagara oothopite gada odas, Shin hinte si7onna ixideta. Ha7i iya suuthay nuna achees” yaagis.
42.23: Yoosefi entara turjumaanen odetiya gisho enti giyaba I ereysa enti akeekibokona;
42.24: I entafe haraso bidi yeekis. Shin zaari entako yidi, entaw gujidika odis. I Simoona enta giddofe kessidi enti be7ishin qachis. Yoosefa Ishati Kanaane Simuwa
42.25: Yoosefi ba aylleta, “Katha enta ogoruwan kunthite; enta miishiyaka zaaridi, enta ogoruwan ogoruwan yeggite. Entaw oges shinqeka immite” yaagidi kiittis.
42.26: Enti I gidaysada oothidaape guye, Yoosefa ishati katha banta hareta bolla caanidi bidosona.
42.27: Enti qamma aqiya bessan entafe issoy ba hariyas kathaafe yegganaw ba ogoruwa billidi, he ogoruwa doonan de7iya ba miishiya demmis.
42.28: I ba ishatako, “Ta miishey taw simmis; tuma haysa be7ite; Ta ogoruwan de7ees” yaagis. Enti dagammidi kokorishe, issoy issuwako simmidi, “Xoossay nu bolla oothidabay haysi aybee?” yaagidosona.
42.29: Enti Kanaane biittan de7iya banta aawa Yayqoobako yidi, bantana gakidaba ubbaa iyaw odidosona.
42.30: Enti iyako, “He biitta haariya uray, nuna he biitta wochiya asada oothidi nu bolla yilotidi odetis.
42.31: Shin nuuni iyako, ‘Nuuni ammanetiya asi, biitta wocheyisata gidoko.
42.32: Nuuni tammanne nam7u ishanti issi aawa nayta. Issoy hayqis; wursetha kaaloy Kanaane biittan ha7i nu aawara de7ees’ yaagida.
42.33: Yaatin he biitta haariya uray nuna, ‘Hinte ammanetiya ase gideysa taani erana mela hinte ishatape issuwa haysan ta matan aggidi, koshatiya hinte soo asaas kathi ekidi biite.
42.34: Hinte biitta wocheyisata gidonna, ammanetiya asi gideysa taani erana mela, hinte wursetha isha taako ekidi yiite. Yaatiko, taani han attida hinte ishaa hintew zaarada immana. Hinteka ha biittan de7idi zal7anaw danda7eeta’ ” yaagidosona.
42.35: Enti banta ogoruwape kathaa qolishe, banta ogoruwan ogoruwan banta miishiya qashuwara uttidaysa demmidosona. Entinne enta aaway he qashuwara de7iya miishiya be7idi yayyidosona.
42.36: Enta aawa Yayqoobi entako, “Hinte tana ta naytape mela ashshideta. Yoosefi baawa, Simooni baawa, ha7i qassi Biniyaame efanaw koyeeta. Ubbabay taw zoko zaaris” yaagis.
42.37: Hessafe guye Robeeli ba aawako, “Taani Biniyaame new zaarada ehonna ixiko, ta adde nayta nam7aaka wodha. Tana ammanetada iya ta kushen yegga; taani iya zaarada ehana” yaagis.
42.38: Shin Yayqoobi entako, “Ta na7ay hintera beenna; iya ishay hayqin, attiday iya xalaala. Hinte efishin, ogen iitabay iya gakiko, hinte ta cimatetha afuthu muzishe ta hayquwa matayeta” yaagis.

43.1: Kanaane biittan koshay ha77ika kaseysafe aadhidi wolqaamis.
43.2: Yaanin, enti Gibxefe ehida katha ubba midi ongin, enta aaway, “Qassika Gibxe bidi nuus guutha kathi shammite” yaagis.
43.3: Shin Yihudi, “He uray nuna, ‘Hinte ishay hintera yoona ixiko, ta som7uwa zaari be7eketa’ yaagidi minthidi odis.
43.4: Neeni nu isha nuura yeddiko, nuuni Gibxe bidi new kathi shammana.
43.5: Shin he uray, ‘Hinte ishay hintera yoona ixiko hinte ta som7uwa zaari be7eketa’ ” yaagida gisho, neeni iya yeddonnaba gidiko nuuni booko.
43.6: Yaatin Isra7eeley, “Hinte, ‘Nuus hara ishi de7ees’ gidi odidi ha metuwa ta bolla ayis ehidetii?” yaagis.
43.7: Enti zaaridi, “He uray nubaanne nu soo asaaba minthidi oychis. I nuuko, ‘Hinte aaway paxa de7ii? Hintew hara ishi de7ii?’ yaagidi oychis. Nuuni I oychidaysa iyaw zaarida. I nuna, ‘Hinte isha eki yiite’ gaanaba nu awude erido?” yaagidosona.
43.8: Yihudi ba aawa Isra7eeleko, “Nuuni, neeninne nu nayti koshan hayqanaape na7aa taara yedda, nuuni baana.
43.9: Na7a ta waasetethan imma; iyabaa tana oycha. Taani iya new saro zaarada ehonna ixiko, ta de7o ubban ne baadethay tana gako.
43.10: Nu gam7onaba gidiyako, hannoode nam7antho yaa simmana shin” yaagis.
43.11: Enta aaway Isra7eeley, “Hessa gidiko haareysas kushe genthiyaba, ha biittan kaxiyaba ubbaafe lo77oba doorite. Hessika, qibaate, shitto, dumma dumma sawo, eessinne, ocholone hinte ogoruwan yeggidi, ekidi biite.
43.12: Hinte ogoruwa doonan simmida miishey baletidaba gidanaw danda7iya gisho, miishiya nam7u kushe oothidi eki biite.
43.13: Hinte ishaa ekidi, he uraako ellesidi guye biite.
43.14: I hanko hinte ishaanne Biniyaame hintera yeddana mela Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay he uray hintew qadhetanada ootho. Tana gidiko, ta naytape mela attikoka attas” yaagis.
43.15: Hessa gisho, ishanti wolla banta immiyabata, nam7u kushe miishiyanne Biniyaame bantara ekidi bidosona. Enti Gibxe gakidi, Yoosefa sinthe shiiqidosona.
43.16: Yoosefi Biniyaame entara be7ida wode ba keetha kaapuwako, “Ha asata ta soo ekada ba. Issi mehe shukada giigisa; enti kathi taara maana” yaagidi kiittis.
43.17: Yaatin kaapoy, Yoosefi kiitidaysada he asata iya soo efis.
43.18: Enti Yoosefa soo bishe, yayidi, “Enti nuna haysa ehiday koyro nu ogoruwan simmida miishiya gisho gidonna aggenna. Enti nuna qohidi aylletethan haaronnanne nu hareta ekona aggokona” yaagi hirgidosona.
43.19: Hessa gisho, enti Yoosefa soo penge gakidi, keetha kaapuwa odisidosona.
43.20: “Godaw, nuuni koyro kathi shammanaw haysa yida.
43.21: Guye simmishe nuuni qamma aqiya bessan ogoruwa billiya wode huuphen huuphen nu miishey paconna nu ogoruwan de7eysa demmida. Heko, nuuni he miishiya guye eki yida.
43.22: Ha7i nuuni katha shammanaw hara miishe oyki yida. Nu miishiya nu ogoruwan ooni yeggidaako eroko” yaagidosona.
43.23: I zaaridi, “Aykoy baawa, yayofite; hinte Xoossay, hinte aawa Xoossay, hinte ogoruwan hintew miishe immis. Taani hinte ciggida miishiya kumethi ekas” yaagis. Hessafe guye, Simoona entako kessis.
43.24: He uray he asata Yoosefa soo efidi, enta tohuwas haathe ehin, enti meecetidosona. Enta haretasika miyaba yeggis.
43.25: Enti Yoosefara kathi maanaysa si7ida gisho banta immanabata Yoosefas giigisidosona.
43.26: Yoosefi ba soo gelida wode enti ehida banta immiyabata iyaw immidi, iya sinthan sa7a gakidi ziggidosona.
43.27: I enta sarotetha oychi simmidi, “Hinte taw odida hinte cimida aaway lo77o de7ii? Ha77ika I paxa de7ii?” yaagis.
43.28: Enti, “Ee, ne aylley, nu aaway paxa de7ees; I lo77o” yaagidi, hokidi iyaw ziggidosona.
43.29: I ba aaye na7aa Biniyaame be7ida wode entako, “Hinte odida wursetha hinte ishay haysee?” yaagis. Biniyaame, “Ta na7aw, nena Xoossay anjo” yaagis.
43.30: Yoosefi, iya ishaabay iyaw gompan seellida gisho, ellesidi, qol7a gelidi yan yeekis.
43.31: I ba som7uwa meecetidaape guye keyidi bana minthethidi, kathi aathana mela kiittis.
43.32: Enti Yoosefas dumma, iya ishatas dumma aathidosona. Gibxe asay Ibraawe asatara issife meysi bantana kawushiyaba oothi xeelliya gisho iyara miya Gibxe asatas dumma aathidosona.
43.33: Enti Yoosefa sinthan bayray ba bayratethan, kaaloy ba kaalotethan maaran uttidosona. Enti issoy issuwa xeellidi, enta waatidi utisidaako be7idi malaaletidosona.
43.34: Yoosefa gaytape entaw qumi gishetees, shin Biniyaames haratape aathidi ichashu kushe immis. Yaanidi, enti Yoosefara midi uyidi ufaytidosona.

44.1: Yoosefi ba keetha kaapuwa, “Neeni ha asati tookanaw denda7ida keena enta ogoruwan kathi kuntha. Enta ubbaa miishiya enta ogoruwa doonan doonan yegga.
44.2: Yaatada wursetha kaaluwa ogoruwa doonan ta bira wancaanne I shammanaw ehida miishiya yegga” yaagidi kiittis. I Yoosefi gidaysada oothis.
44.3: Sa7i wontin he asati banta hareta ekidi baanaw dendidosona.
44.4: Enti he katamaape keyidi haaki boonna de7ishin, Yoosefi ba keetha kaapuwako, “Ha asata geedo kaalla. Neeni enta gakida wode entako, ‘Hinte ayis keeha iitan zaaridetii?
44.5: Haysi ta goday uyeysanne xuuraba demmiya wanca gideysa ereketii? Ayis kaysotidetii? Haysi hinte oothidabay daro iitaba’ yaaga” yaagis.
44.6: Yaatin I enta geedo kaali gakidi, he gidaysadaka entaw odis.
44.7: Shin enti, “Godaw haysa melaba ayis odetay? Hessa melaba oosoy nuupe ne aylletape haako.
44.8: Nuuni hari attoshin, nu ogoruwa doonape demmida miishiya Kanaane biittafe guye zaaridi new ehidaysa eraasa. Ne godaa keethaafe nuuni worqa woyko bira waati kaysotanee?
44.9: Ne aylleta giddon he wancay bentida uray hayqo. Qassi attida nuka nu godaas aylle gidana” yaagidosona.
44.10: I entako, “Hessa gidiko lo77o, hinte gidaysada hano. Wanca ekida oonika ta aylle gidana; attidaysati saron beeta” yaagis.
44.11: Hessafe guye, enti ellesidi banta ogoruwa ogoruwa sa7an wothidi billidosona.
44.12: He kaapoy ubbaafe bayra ogoruwape doomidi wursetha kaaluwaysa gakanaw koyidi, he wanca Biniyaame ogoruwape demmis.
44.13: Hessan enti azzanidi, banta ma7uwa peedhidosona. Banta ogoruwa hareta bolla caanidi, guye katama simmidosona.
44.14: Yihudi ba ishatara Yoosefako geliya wode Yoosefi son de7ees; enti iya sinthan sa7an gufannidosona.
44.15: Yoosefi entako, “Hinte aybi palaba oothidetii? Ta mela asi xuuraba demmanaw danda7eysa hinte ereketiyee?” yaagis.
44.16: Yihudi, “Ta godaas nuuni ay gaanee? Nuuni ay odetiyabay de7ii? Nu xillotetha nuuni waati bessanee? Xoossay ne aylleta naaquwa qoncisis. Hiza nuunika he wancay bentida urayka ta godaas aylle gidida” yaagis.
44.17: Shin Yoosefi, “Hessa melaba oothanaysi taape haako; ta wancay iyape bentida ura xalaali ta aylle gidana. Hanko hinte hinte aawako guye saro simmite” yaagis.
44.18: Yihudi iyako shiiqidi “Ta godaw, neeni kawa mela gidikoka taani neera odetanaw nena woossayis. Tana ne aylliya hanqetofa.
44.19: Neeni ta goday nuna ne aylleta, ‘Hintew aawi woyko ishi de7ii?’ gada oychadasa.
44.20: Nuunika, ‘Nuus cimida aaway de7ees. I cimatethan yelida kaalo na7ayka de7ees. He na7aa ishay hayqis, ba Aayen issino, iya aaway iya daro dosees’ yaagida.
44.21: “Neeni nuuko, ‘Taani iya be7ana mela taw ehite’ yaagadasa.
44.22: Yaatin nuuni, ‘He na7ay ba aawape shaaketanaw danda7enna; shaaketiko iya aaway hayqana’ yaagida.
44.23: Shin neeni, ‘Hinte kaalo ishay hintera yoona ixiko, ta ayfiya zaari be7eketa’ yaagadasa.
44.24: Nuuni nu aawako simmidi bida wode ne gidaysa iyaw odida.
44.25: “Nu aaway, ‘Guye bidi guutha kathi shammite’ yaagin,
44.26: nuuni iyako, ‘Nu kaalo ishay nuura boonna ixiko, ura ayfiya be7anaw danda7oko. Nu kaalo ishay nuura biyaba gidiko, nuuni yaa baana’ yaagida.
44.27: “Yaatin nu aaway nuna, ‘Ta machiya Raheela taw nam7u adde nayta yelidaysa hinte ereeta.
44.28: Entafe issoy taape shaaketidi bin, iya do7i moonna aggenna yaagas. Hachi gakanaw taani iya be7abike.
44.29: Haysa qassi taape hinte shaaki efin, iitabay iya gakiko, hinte tana ta cimatethan afuthu muzishe ta hayquwa matayeta’ ” yaagis.
44.30: -31 “Hessa gisho, ha77i taani guye ta aawako biya wode Biniyaamey taara baanaw bessees. Ta aaway na7aa shempofe dosiya gisho, na7ay nuura baynaysa be7iko hayqana. Nuuni ne aylleti nu aawa cimatetha afuthan duufo gelsoos.
44.32: Taani ne aylley na7aa ta waasetethan ekas. Qassi, ‘Ta aawaw, taani iya new saro zaarada ehonna ixiko ta de7uwa ubban ne baadethay tana gako’ yaagas.
44.33: “Yaaniya gisho, taani ne aylley na7aa gisho aylletada haysan attana na7ay ba ishatara guye simmo.
44.34: Na7ay bayna taani waanada guye ta aawako simmanee? Tana ta aaway seeletana seela bessofo” yaagis.

45.1: He wode Yoosefi ba aylleta sinthan gencanaw danda7iboona gisho, “Asa ubbaa ta sinthafe kessite” yaagidi waassis. Hessa gisho, Yoosefi ba ishatas bana erisida wode iyara oonika allagi baawa.
45.2: I ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, Gibxeti iya si7ana gakanaw yeekis; kawa soo asayka he woriya si7idosona.
45.3: Yoosefi ba ishatako, “Taani Yoosefabay. Ta aaway hanno gakanaw paxa de7ii?” yaagidi oychis. Shin iya ishati daro dagammida gisho, iyaw aykoka zaaranaw danda7ibookona.
45.4: Yaanin, Yoosefi ba ishatako, “Taako haa shiiqite” yaagis. Enti iyako shiiqin I enta, “Taani hinte tana Gibxe biitta bayzida hinte ishaa Yoosefa.
45.5: Ha77i hinte tana bayzida gisho, qiirotofitenne hintena baaddofite. Ayis giiko, Xoossay tana hintefe sinthe kiitiday asa shempo ashshanaasa.
45.6: Ha biitta koshi gelin haysi nam7antho laythi. Asi goyonna woyko cakonna hara ichashu laythati buroo de7oosona.
45.7: Shin taani sa7an hinte sheeshanne hintena malaalsiya ogen ashshana mela Xoossay tana hintefe sinthe kiittis.
45.8: Hessa gisho, tana ha bessa kiittiday Xoossafe attishin, hintena gideketa. I tana Gibxe kawas zoriya aawa, iya aqo ubbaa bolla godanne Gibxe biitta haariya asi oothis.
45.9: “Ha77i ellesidi guye ta aawako bidi iyako, ne na7ay Yoosefi haysada yaagees giite; ‘Xoossay tana Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla godaa kessis; neeni gam7onna taako haaya.
45.10: Ne nayta, ne nayta nayta, ne dorsaa, ne deesha, ne mehiyanne new de7iyaba ubbaa ekada haaya; ta matan Geesame biittan de7aasa.
45.11: Buroo ichashu kosha laythati attidosona. Nena, ne soo asaanne ne mehiya koshi qohonna mela taani nena muzana’ ” yaagis.
45.12: Qassika Yoosefi entako, “Hinteka, ta ishaa Biniyaameyka, ha hintera odetey tuma tana Yoosefa gideysa hinte ayfiyan be7ideta.
45.13: Taw Gibxe biittan de7iya gita bonchuwanne hinte be7idaba ubbaa ta aawas odite. Ta aawaka ellesidi haa ekidi yiite” yaagis.
45.14: Yoosefara Biniyaamera nam7ay wolu qoomidi yeekidosona
45.15: Yoosefi yeekishe ba ishata ubbaa yeeris. Hessafe guye, iya ishati iyara odetidosona.
45.16: Yoosefa ishata yuussaa worey kawo keethi gakida wode kawoynne iya moorinnati ufaytidosona.
45.17: Kawoy Yoosefako, “Neeni ne ishatako yaaga; hinte hareta caanidi, Kanaane biitta simmite.
45.18: Hinte aawanne hinte soo asa ekidi, guye taako haa yiite. Taani hintew Gibxe biittan ubbaafe lo77iya bessa immiko, he biitta modhuwa hinte kaashana.
45.19: Qassika, banta nayta, banta machetanne banta aawa ehanaw Gibxefe gita para gaare eki baana mela enta kiita.
