18.20: Xoossa kiitaanne higgiya enta tamaarsa. Enti waani daanekonne ay oothaneko enta bessa.
18.21: Qassi asaa giddon oda shaakidi eriya asata, Xoossaa yayyeyisata, ammantheysatanne wodhaafe ekonnaysati doora. Entana asaa bolla shaalaqata, mato halaqata, hamsalaqatanne asiralaqata oothada shuuma.
18.22: Enti ubba wode kawushsha odata bantaw pirdo, shin deexo odata neeko eho. Hessada ne oothiko toohoy new kawuyana.
18.23: Ne oothana mela Xoossi koyey hessa. Qassi ne daaburaka ha asa ubbay ba allalley poletin ba soo ba soo simmana” yaagis.
18.24: Musey Yotora zoriya si7is; I gidaba ubbaa oothis.
18.25: Musey Isra7eeleta giddofe oda shaaki eriya asata dooris. Entana asaa bolla shaalaqata, mato halaqata, hamsalaqatanne asiralaqata oothidi shuumis.
18.26: Shuumati kawusha odata bantaw pirdidosona, shin deexo odata Museko ehoosona.
18.27: Hessafe guye, Musey ba bolluwa moyzin, I ba biitta simmis.

19.1: Isra7eele asay Gibxefe keyida heedzantho ageenas koyro gallasan Siina mela biitta gakidosona.
19.2: Enti Rafidimape dendidi bidi, Siina zuma sinthan de7iya mela biittan uttidosona.
19.3: Musey Xoossara gahetanaw zuma bolla keyis. Goday zumaa huuphepe iya xeegidi, “Yayqooba sheeshi gidida Isra7eeletas haysada yaaga;
19.4: ‘Taani Gibxeta bolla oothidabaanne arganthi ba na7a ba qefiyan tookeysda ta hintena waata tookada taako ehidaako hinte hinte huuphen be7ideta.
19.5: Ha77i hinte taw kiitetikonne ta caaquwa naagiko, biitta kumethay tabaa gidikoka hinte taw dooretida dere gidana.
19.6: Hinte taw geeshsha dere gidana; hinte kawotethan kahine gididi tana haggaazana.’ Neeni Isra7eeletas odana qaalay haysa” yaagis.
19.7: Musey guye bidi, zumako cimata xeegi shiishidi, Goday odida qaala ubbaa entaw odis.
19.8: Enti, “Goday gidaba ubbaa nuuni oothana” yaagidosona. Musey enti gidaysa Godaas odis.
19.9: Goday Museko “Taani neera haasayishin asay si7anaadanne enti nena ubba wode ammananada taani muumida shaarara neeko yaana” yaagis. Hessafe guye, Musey asay gidaysa Godaas odis.
19.10: Goday Museko “Neeni asaako bada hachinne wonto taara gahetanaw bantana geeshshana mela entaw oda. Enti banta ma7uwa meeccidi,
19.11: heedzantho gallasas giigeto. He gallas asa ubbay tana be7ishin taani Siina zuma bolla wodhana.
19.12: Neeni ha zuma yuushuwan zawa wotha. Asay zuma bolla keyonna mela woyko zumaa xaphuwa bochonna mela entaw oda. Zumaa bochida oonika hayqana.
19.13: He uray shuchan cadetidi woyko dongen duketidi hayqo; iya kushen oonika bochofo. Mehey woyko asi hessada hayqo. Moyzey punetiya wode enti zumaa bolla keyanaw danda7oosona” yaagis.
19.14: Musey zumaa bollafe wodhidi, asay Xoossaa goyinnanaw bantana giigisana mela odis. Entika banta ma7uwa meeccidosona.
19.15: Musey asaako, “Heedzantho gallasaas giigetite; hinte machetara aqopite” yaagis.
19.16: Heedzantho gallas wonta guura deshoy dechis. Wol7anthinne sakana shaari zumaa ma7idi bentis. Wolqaama moyze waasoy si7etis. Asay dunkaanida bessa ubban yashshan kokoridosona.
19.17: Hessafe guye, Musey asaa Xoossara gathanaw entana dunkaaniyape kessidi efis; enti zumaa xaphon eqidosona.
19.18: Goday Siina zumaa bolla tama lacora wodhida gisho Siina derey cuyan kametis. Gita coocepe cuyi keyeysada iyape cuyiya zuley suure keyis. Asa ubbay daro kokoridosona.
19.19: Moyziya waasoy dari dari bida wode Musey odin, Xoossay deshon iyaw zaaris.
19.20: Goday Siina zumaa huuphe bolla wodhidi, Muse pude zumaa bolla xeegis. Musey zumaa bolla keyis.
19.21: Goday iyako, “Neeni duge bada asay tana be7ana gidi, zawa aadhona melanne entafe daroy hayqonna mela entaw oda.
19.22: Hari atto Godaa mati shiiqiya kahinetika bantana geeshsho. Enti hessa oothonna ixiko ta enta hanqana” yaagis.
19.23: Musey Godaako, “Neeni zuma dummayida gishonne zawa immida gisho asay zuma huuphe keyanaw danda7okona” yaagis.
19.24: Goday iyako, “Neeni duge bada Aarona neera ekada ya. Kahinetinne asay zawa kanthidi taako yishe dhayona mela entaw oda” yaagis.
19.25: Hessa gisho, Musey asaako wodhidi Goday gidaysa entaw odis.

20.1: Xoossay Isra7eele asaako haysada yaagis;
20.2: “Nena Gibxefe aylletethaafe kessida Goday ne Xoossay tana.
20.3: “Taape attishin, hara xoosse goyinnofa.
20.4: “Bolla saluwan de7iyaba, woyko garsa sa7an de7iyaba, woyko sa7ape garsan haatha giddon de7iyaba aybaka new goyinniya eeqa daanisada oothofa.
20.5: Entaw hokofa woyko enta goyinnofa. Ayis giiko, taani, Goday ne Xoossay, ta bonchuwa hara xoossatara koxonna Xoosse. Tana ixiya aawata nagaraa gisho nayta heedzantho woyko oyddantho yeletethi gakanaw hanqana.
20.6: Shin tana siiqeysatanne ta kiita naageysata sheesha mukulu yeletethi gakanaw keehana.
20.7: “Xoossaa ne Godaa sunthaa hadan denthofa. Goday ba sunthaa hadan dentheyisata seeronna aggenna.
20.8: “Sambaata Geeshsha gallas oothada naaga.
20.9: Neeni ooso oothanaw bessiya usupun gallasati de7oosona.
20.10: Shin laapuntha gallasay neeni Godaa bonchiya shempo gallas. He gallasan ayba oosoka oothofa. Neeni, woyko ne nayti, woyko ne aylleti, woyko ne mehey, woyko ne biittan de7iya asa gade asati he gallasan ooso oothopite.
20.11: Usupun gallasa giddon Goday salota, sa7aa, abbanne enta giddon de7iya ubbaa medhis, shin laapuntha gallasan shempis. Hessa gisho, Goday Sambaata gallasaa anjisinne dummayis.
20.12: “Goday ne Xoossay new immiya biittan ne laythay aduqana mela ne aawanne ne aayiw boncha.
20.13: “Ase wodhopa.
20.14: “Laammofa.
20.15: “Kaysotopa.
20.17: “Ne laggiya keethaa amottofa. Ne laggiya machiw, woyko iya aylleta, woyko iya mehiya, woyko iya hariya, woyko iyaw de7iyaba aybaka amottofa” yaagis.
20.18: Asa ubbay deshoy decheysanne moyzey puneteysa si7idi, wol7anthay wol7ameysanne derey cuyeysa be7idi yashshan kokorishe haahon eqidosona.
20.19: Enti Museko, “Neeni nuus oda; nuuni si7ana. Shin nuuni hayqonna mela Xoossay nuus odopo” yaagidosona.
20.20: Musey asaako, “Yayyofite; Xoossay hintena paacanawunne hinte iyaw kiitetidi nagara oothonna mela I yis” yaagis.
20.21: Asay banta de7iyasuwan haakidi eqidashin, Xoossay de7iyasuwa muumida shaarako Musey shiiqis. Yarsho Bessatanne Eeqata
20.22: Hessafe guye, Goday Museko “Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; ‘Salope taani hintew odishin hinte tana hinte huuphen be7ideta.
20.23: Yaaniya gisho, bira eeqa woyko worqa eeqa hintew oothidi ta bolla gujidi goyinnofite.
20.24: Neeni taw yarsho bessi urqafe giigisa. Ne dorsatapenne ne booratape ekada xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho iya bolla yarsha. Hinte tana goyinnana mela taani doorida bessa ubban hinteko yada hintena anjana.
20.25: Neeni taw yarsho bessi shuchafe keexiyaba gidiko masetida shuchafe keexofa. Neeni massiya miishen iya bochiko tunisaasa.
20.26: Neeni keyashe kallotonna mela taw yarsho bessi kodora keyiya bessan keexofa’ ” yaagis.

21.1: Goday Muse baggara ba deriyas immida wogay haysa;
21.2: “Ne Ibraawe aylle shammiko, I new usupun laythi ootho, shin laapuntha laythan aykoka qanxonna, aylletethaafe coo yedeto.
21.3: I macho ekona shametidaba gidiko, barka yedeto. I machidi, shametidaba gidiko, iya machiyaka iyara yedeto.
21.4: Iya goday iyaw macho immidaba gidikonne machiya iyaw adde nayta woyko macca nayta yelidaba gidiko, iya machiyanne I nayti iya godaaba gido; addey barka yedeto.
21.5: Shin aylley, ‘Taani ta godaa, ta machiwnne ta nayta dosayis’ gidi aylletethaafe keyanaw koyonna ixiko,
21.6: iya goday, Godaa sinthe iya aatho. Yaatidi, penge woyko penge zizgiya matan iya essidi, iya haythaa goothan luko. Hessafe guye, I ba de7o laytha ubban iyaw aylle gido.
21.7: “Issi asi ba macca na7iw aylletethas bayziko, adde aylletatho aylletethaafe keyopo.
21.8: Iyo shammidi machanaw efida goday iyo dosona ixiko, I goday iyo deriyan woziso. I goday I bolla iitabaa oothida gisho, iyo allagas bayzanaw danda7ena.
21.9: I iyo ba na7aas immanaw koyiko, ba macca na7atho oothidi eko.
21.10: I hara macho I bolla ekiko, koyro machees kathi, ma7onne indas bessiya woga iw pacisopo.
21.11: I ha heedzubata iw oothonna ixiko, aybi miisheka qanxonna aylletethaafe keyada boo.” Iita Asi Seero Woga
21.12: “Ase shocidi wodhiya oonika hayqanaw bessees.
21.13: I wodhanaw qoponna iyape hayqiyaba gidiko, I baqatidi attana bessi taani iyaw giigisana.
21.14: Shin asi qopidi hara asi wodhiko, he uray ta yarsho bessi biiko yaape diggada hara bessan wodha.
21.15: “Ba aawa woyko ba aayiw dechiya oonika hayqo.
21.16: “Ase bayzanaw woyko haaranaw wolqan oykiya asi hayqanaw bessees.
21.17: “Ba aawa woyko ba aayiw cayey hayqo.
21.18: “Nam7u asati ooyetidi, issoy issuwa shuchan caddidi qoo7iko, woyko zhultiko, he deshetidaysi hayqonna attidi hargidi hiixan pee7iko,
21.19: dendidi guufetidi kare heeran hemetiko, he dechidaysi hayqope attees. Gidikoka I iya oosope ashshida gisho, accanawunne paxana gakanaw hargisanaw koshshees.
21.20: “Issi asi ba adde aylliya woyko macca aylliw xam7an shocidi wodhiko seeretanaw bessees.
21.21: Shin he aylley issi woyko nam7u gallasa giddon hayqonna ixiko, iya goday seeretofo. He aylley iya shalo gidiya gisho iya hayqoy baw seera.
21.22: “Nam7u asati issoy issuwara wadhetidi qanxatida maccasiw dechidi, iya boshetana mela oothiko, hara iita qoho gathonna ixiko, he dechida uray, he mache azinay oychiya aca daynnati pirdiko ciggo.
21.23: Shin he maccase deshethay dariko, shempo gisho shempo,
21.24: ayfe gisho ayfe, acha gisho ache, kushe gisho kushe, toho gisho toho,
21.25: xuussa gisho xuussi, maduntha gisho madunthi, qoo7o gisho qoo7o ekanaw koshshees.
21.26: “Issi asi ba adde aylliyas woyko macca ayllees ayfe baqidi toysiko, he ayfiya gisho aylletethafe kessi yeddo.
21.27: Hessadaka, ba aylliya ache woyko ba aylle ache menthiko, he acha gisho aylletethafe kessi yeddo.
21.28: “Boori ase qaycidi wodhiko, he booray shuchan caddeti hayqo. Iya ashoy meetetofo, shin boora goday seeretofo.
21.29: Shin booray kaseka qayciyaba gidikonne koyrottidi boora godaas odetin, I qachonna ixidaba gidiko, he booray ase wodhiko, booraynne boora goday issife shuchan cadetidi hayqo.
21.30: Shin boora goday aca qanxana mela oyshetiko, enti oychidaba qanxidi ba shempuwa wozo.
21.31: Booray adde na7a woyko macca na7a qaycidi wodhiko pirday iya mela gido.
21.32: Booray adde aylle woyko macca aylle qaycidi wodhiko, boora goday aylliya godaas hastamu bira santime qanxo; booray shuchan caddetidi hayqo.
21.33: “Issi asi olla bookidi kammonna aggiko woyko kamaa denthin boori woyko harey he ollan wulliko,
21.34: he ollaa goday mehiya gatiya qanxo. I iya godaas gatiya qanxidi, hayqida mehiya baw eko.
21.35: “Issi asa boori hara asa boori caddidi wodhiko, paxa boora bayzidi, iya miishiyanne hayqida boora ashuwa nam7ay shaaki eko.
21.36: Shin he booray kaseka qayciyaba gideysa erishe, iya goday qachonna aggidaba gidiko, he uray iyaw boori qanxo. Yaatidi, he hayqidaysa baw eko.”

22.1: “Issi asi boori woyko dorse kaysidi shukiko, woyko bayziko, boora gisho ichashu boorata, dorsaa gisho oyddu dorsata ciggo.
22.2: “Kaysoy keethe bookishe oyketidi shocetidi hayqiko, shoci wodhidaysi oyshetenna.
22.3: Shin hessi haniday gallas gidiko, I he gusida suuthaa acuwan oyshetees. Kaysoy ba kaysidaysa zaaro, shin iyaw zaaranabay dhayko ba huuphen aylletethas bayzeto.
22.4: I kaysida mehey paxa de7ishe iya kushen bentiko, boori woyko hare woyko dorse gidiko, I kaysidaysas nam7u kushe ciggo.
22.5: “Issi asi ba mehiya denban woyko woyne gaden heemmishin, mehey hara asa kathi miiko, I ba kathaafe woyko ba woyniyape lo77uwa aca qanxo.
22.6: “Issi asi ba gaden tama xuuggishin tamay buuriya kanthidi hara asa gaden dicciya kathaanne dooriya miiko, tama oythida uray aco qanxo.
22.7: “Issi asi bira woyko hara al7o miishe ba shooruwas hadara immin, he shooruwa soope kaysoy he miishiya ekikonne he kaysoy oyketiko, he kaysoy miishiya nam7u kushe ciggo.
22.8: Shin kaysoy bentonna ixiko, uray Xoossaa sinthe shiiqidi, ba shooruwa miishiya, I ekonnaysa erisanaw caaqo.
22.9: “Nam7u asati boora gaason woyko hare gaason woyko dorsa gaason woyko ma7o gaason woyko hara dhaydaba gaason mootetidi, Xoossaa sinthe shiiqiko, Xoossay iya bolla pirdidaysi nam7u kushe ciggo.
22.10: “Issi asi hare woyko boori woyko dorse woyko hara mehe hadara immidasuwan hayqiko woyko me7iko woyko oonika be77onna kaysotetiko,
22.11: hadaro ekidaysi ba laggiya mehiya kaysotonaysa Godaa sinthan caaqo. He mehiya goday caaquwa eko; mehey iyape dhayida uray cigganaw koshshenna.
22.12: Shin mehey kaysotetidaba gidiko, mehiya godaas ciggo.
22.13: He mehiya do7i midaba gidiko, marka gidanaada gawuxaa eho; do7i midaba gidiko iyaw ciggofo.
22.14: “Asi ba shooruwape mehe woossi ekiko iya goday bayna bessan he mehey deshetiko woyko hayqiko, he mehiyas ciga immo.
22.15: Shin iya goday iyara de7ishin hessi hanidaba gidiko aca qanxofo. Hashe ekidaba gidiko, he hashe miishey aco gate gido. Duussa Wogata
22.16: “Issi asi issi geela7iw cimmidi, iira zin7etiyaba gidiko, iw aca immidi, baw macho ootho.
22.17: I aaway iyo iyaw immanaw koyona ixiko, geela7o ekiya uray aca immiya miishe mela I aawas immidi acco.
22.18: “Bita bitiya maccasi hayqo.
22.19: “Mehera tuniya oonika hayqo.
22.20: “Xoossaafe hara godatas yarshiya oonika hayqo.
22.21: Hinte Gibxe biittan bete asi gididi, de7ida gisho, bete asi qohopite woyko un7ethofite.
22.23: Hinte enta un7ethiko, enti taako waassana;
22.24: taani enta waasuwa si7ana. He wode ta hinte bolla hanqetada hintena olan wursana. Hinte macheti am7o, hinte naytika aawu baynayisata gidana.
22.25: “Hinte giddon de7iya manqo gidida ta asaape oodeska miishe tal7iko, yelon tal7iya asada yelo oychofite.
22.26: Neeni issiba gisho, iya ma7uwa oykida asi de7iko, awi wullonna de7ishin iya ma7uwa zaara.
22.27: I ma7idi aqey I xalaala. I hara ay ma7idi aqanaw danda7ii? Taani qadhetiya Xoossi gidiya gisho, I taako waassiya wode si7ana.
22.28: “Xoossaa bolla cashsha qaala haasayopa, woyko ne deriya ayseysa baaddofa.
22.29: Ne kathaafe, ne woyne ushshafenne ne shamaho zaytiyape taw yarsho yarsha. “Bayra gididi yeletida adde na7aa taw imma.
22.30: Ne miizapenne ne dorsaafe bayra yeletidaysa taw imma. Enti laapun gallas gakanaw, banta aayetara gam7o; hospuntho gallasan enta taw imma.
22.31: “Hinte taw geeshsha asi gidanaw koshshees. Hessa gisho, do7i menthidi wodhida mehe asho moopite; hessa kanas yeggite.”

23.1: “Wordo oda gasethofa; wordo markatada bala asi maaddofa.
23.2: Iitaba oothanaw daro asaa kaallofa. Pirda wobisanaw daro asaara issifada markatofa.
23.3: Manqoy pirdas shiiqiya wode iya manqotetha be7ada maaddofa.
23.4: “Ne morkiya booray woyko harey dhayin demmiko, zaarada iyaw efa.
23.5: Nena ixiya uraa harey caanara kundin be7ada, uraa maaddada denthona aggada aadhofa.
23.6: “Pirda dabaaban manqoy pirdas shiiqiya wode iya pirdaa wobbisopa.
23.7: Oonaka malten mootopa; xilluwa wodhopa. Hessa melaba oothidaysa taani pirdonna aggike.
23.8: Wodhaafe ekofa; wodhaafey suure xeelliya asa ayfe qooqisees, xillota pirdaa mirqees.
23.9: “Betanchuwa naaqofa. Hinte Gibxe biittan bete asi gididi de7ida gisho, asa gade asi gidoy ay mela si7etiyako ereeta. Laapuntho Laythinne Laapuntho Gallas
23.10: “Neeni ne gadiya usupun laythi goyada ma.
23.11: Laapuntha laythan gadiya goyonna shaacha; iyan dolidi kaxiyaba shiishopa. Ne asaa giddon de7iya manqoti iyape mo; qassi entafe attidaysa do7ati mo. Ne woyne gadiyanne ne shamaho gadiya hessada ootha.
23.12: “Neeni usupun gallas ooso ootha. Ne booraynne ne harey shempana melanne ne son yeletida aylleynne bete asi shempana mela laapuntha gallasan ooso oothofa.
23.13: Taani hintew odidaba ubbaa minthidi oothite. Hara xoossata sunthaa xeegidi woossofite; enta sunthaa denthofite. Gita Ba7aale Gallasata (Kessa 34:18-26; Zaare 16:1-17)
23.14: “Tana bonchanaw laythan heedzu ba7aale gallasati hintew de7o.
23.15: Hinte Gibxefe keyida Abiiba geetetiya ageenan, taani hintena kiitidaysada Uytha Ba7aale bonchite. Laapun gallas irsho yeggidi uukida uythi moopite. Tana goyinnanaw yishe mela kushe yoopite.
23.16: “Qassi hinte, hinte gaden zerin, koyro gakida kathaa cakiya wode Kathaa Cako Ba7aale bonchite. “Laytha wursethan, woyniyanne hessa mela mithata ayfiya hinte gadepe maxiya wode Shaqara Ba7aale bonchite.
23.17: Laythan laythan bonchetiya ha heedzu ba7aaletan adde ubbay tana, hinte Godaa goyinnanaw yo.
23.18: “Neeni taw mehe yarshiya wode irsho yeggidi uukida uythara taw yarshofa. Ba7aale bonchiya gallas yarshetida modhuwafe wontas aybika attofo.
23.19: Hinte gaden bayra kaxida katha ubbaafe lo77uwa Godaa, hinte Xoossaa soo ehite. Deesha mari woyko dorsa mari iya aaye maathan doysopa. Ufaysa Qaalatanne Wogata
23.20: “Ne ogiyan nena naagana malanne taani new giigisida bessaa nena efana mela taani kiitancho ne sinthan kiittana.
23.21: I odiyaba si7ada iyaw kiiteta; iya bolla Makallofa. Ta iyaw maata immida gisho, hinte nagara oothiyaba gidiko, hinte nagaraa maarenna.
23.22: Hinte iyaw kiitetikonne ta kiita ubbaa poliko, hinte morketa ubbaa morkana; hintera eqeteyisata taani olana.
23.23: Ta kiitanchoy hinte sinthan bidi, hintena Amooreta, Hiteta, Parzeta, Kanaaneta, Hiwetanne Yaabuseta biitta ehana. Taani enta dhaysana.
23.24: Enta xoossatas ziggofite woyko goyinnofite, woyko enta ammano wogaa kaallopite. Enta xoossata dhaysite, enta eeqa shuchata mentherethite.
23.25: Godaa, hinte Xoossaa tana, goyinnite. Hessada hinte oothiko, taani hinte kathaanne hinte haatha anjana; hargiyaka hinte giddofe diggana.
23.26: Hinte biittan maccasay boshetenna; maynnena. Taani hinte laytha adussana.
23.27: “Taani ne morketa bolla ta yashsha yeddana. Hintera eqetiya kawotethata ubbaa daganthana. Hinte morketi ubbay hintew zoko zaaridi baqatana mela oothana.
23.28: Taani hinte morketa bolla kazhe yeddada Hiweta, Kanaanetanne Hiteta hinte sinthafe goodda kessana.
23.29: Shin biittay mela attonaadanne bazzo do7i hintena waaysonaada issi laythan enta goodike.
23.30: Shin hinte taybon daridi, minnidi, he biitta laattana gakanaw enta guuthara guuthara goodda kessana.
23.31: Taani hinte zawa Zo7o Abbaafe Filisxeeme Abbaa, mela biittafe bidi Efraxiisa Shaafa gakanaw dalgisana. He biittan de7iya ubbaa taani hinte kushen aathada immana; hinteka enta gooddidi kessana.
23.32: Entara woyko enta xoossatara caaqo oothopite.
23.33: Enta hinte biittan wothofite. Hankoode enti hintena ta bolla nagara oosisana. Enta xoossata hinte goyinniko hintew xihe gidana” yaagis.

24.1: Goday Museko, “Neeni, Aaroni, Naadabi Abyoodanne Isra7eele cimatape laapun tammu asati taako zuma bolla keyidi, haahon eqidi, gufannidi, taw goyinnite.
24.2: Shin neeni nerka taako shiiqa; harati ta mati shiiqopo. Qassi asayka neera zuma bolla keyopo” yaagis.
24.3: Musey bidi, Godaa qaalanne woga ubbaa asaas odin, asa ubbay issi qaalan, “Goday gidaba ubbaa nuuni oothana” yaagidosona.
24.4: Musey Goday odidaba ubbaa xaafis. Wontetha gallas guura dendidi, zumaa garsan yarsho besse giigisis. Tammanne nam7u Isra7eele sheeshata sunthan, tammanne nam7u shucha tuussi essis.
24.5: Isra7eele panthata I kiittin, enti bidi xuussa yarshuwanne issifetetha yarshuwas kormata shukidi, Godaas yarshidosona.
24.6: Musey mehiya suuthaafe bagga ekidi keriyan tigis; attida bagga suuthaa yarsho bessan dharcis.
24.7: Hessafe guye, Caaqo Maxaafa ekidi, asaas nabbabin, enti, “Goday gidaba ubbaa nuuni oothana; nuuni iya kiita polana” yaagidosona.
24.8: Hessafe guye, Musey he suuthaa ekidi, asaa bolla dharcidi, enta, “Goday hintew ha kiitata immiya wode hintera gelida caaquwa minthiya suuthay haysa” yaagis.
24.9: Musey, Aaroni, Naadabi, Abyoodanne Isra7eele cimatape laapun tammay zumaa bolla keyidi,
24.10: Isra7eele Xoossaa be7idosona. Iya tohuwape garsan saloda geeyida, sanpare geetetiya shuchafe oosetidaba daaniya demba bessi de7ees.
24.11: Shin Xoossay Isra7eele asaa halaqata wodhibeenna. Enti Xoossaa be7idosona; iya sinthan midosonanne uyidosona. Musey Siina Zuma Bolla
24.12: Goday Museko, “Neeni taako zumaa bolla haa keyada, haysan gam7a. Ta asay taw kiitetana mela nam7u loche shuchata bolla ta kushen ta xaafida higgeta new immana” yaagis.
24.13: Museynne iyaw kiitetiya Iyyasuy baanaw dendidosona; Musey Xoossara gahetanaw zumaa bolla keyis.
24.14: Musey Isra7eele cimatako, “Nuuni hinteko simmana gakanaw haysan gam7ite. Aaroninne Huuri haysan hintera de7oosona; odi de7iya oonika entako boo” yaagis.
24.15: Musey zumaa bolla keyida wode shaaray zumaa ma7is.
24.16: Godaa bonchoy Siina Zumaa bolla uttis. He shaaray usupun gallas zuma bolla ma7is; laapuntha gallas Goday shaara giddon gididi Muse xeegis.
24.17: Zumaa bolla qoncida Godaa bonchoy Isra7eeletas tama laco daanidi bentis.
24.18: Hessafe guye, Musey zumaa huuphiya keyidi shaara giddo gelis; yan oytamu gallasinne oytamu qamma gam7is.

25.2: “Taw imota ehana mela Isra7eeletas oda. Iya wozani iya imma imma gidaba immiya imota asa ubbaafe taw eka.
25.3: Hinte entafe ekana imotay, worqaa, bira, naase birata,
25.4: kaalose qacina, ocha teera daaniya qacina, zo7o qacinanne al7o liino, deesha ikise,
25.5: haashetidi zo7o qalamen tiyetida dorsa ite, lo77o do7a ite, soqala mithi,
25.6: xompes maaddiya shamaho zayte, shuumatetha zayteninne ixaanen guzhetiya sawota,
25.7: Kahine halaqay ma7iya efuude geetetiya ma7uwa bollanne iya tiran wosetiya margide geetetiya al7o shuchaanne hara alleeqo shuchata eho.
25.8: Taani enta giddon daana mela enti tana goyinniya bessi giigiso.”
25.9: Dunkaaniyanne iya giddon de7iya miisheta ubbaa ta nena bessiya maaran ootha. Caaqo Taabote (Kessa 37:1-9)
25.10: “Soqala mithafe, adussatethay nam7u wadhanne takadho, gompay issi wadhanne takadho, geesay issi wadhanne takadho gidiya saaxine oothite.
25.11: Gaathaanne kariya walahi bayna worqan kamma; iya yuushuwaka worqan lanxa.
25.12: He Taabotiyas oyddu worqa sagaayota oothada; oyddu gedata bolla issi baggara nam7u sagaayota, qassi hanko baggara nam7u sagaayota aathada gasetha.
25.13: Taabotiya tookiya kaso mithata soqala mithafe kessada worqan lanxa.
25.14: Taabotiya tookanaw iya miyen de7iya sagaayotan kaso mithata aatha.
25.15: Tookiya kaso mithati Taabotiya sagaayota giddon de7o; enti yaape keyopo.
25.16: Taabotiya giddon taani new immiya, tammu kiitati xaafetida nam7u loche shuchata wotha.
25.17: “Walahi bayna worqafe adussatethay nam7u wadhanne takadho, gompay issi wadhanne takadho gidiya nagara atotetha kama ootha.
25.18: Qefera de7iya nam7u kiruubeta worqafe qoxada ootha.
25.19: Issi kiruubiya issi bagga gaxan, nam7antho kiruubiya hanko bagga gaxan wothada nam7aa Taabotiya guphiyara oythada ootha.
25.20: Kiruubeti woliko simmi uttidi, banta qefiya denthidi, atotetha kamaa kammo.
25.21: Taani new immiya loche shucha bolla xaafetida tammu kiitata Taabotiya giddon wotha. Yaatada, guphiya Taabotiya bolla wotha.
25.22: Taabotiya guphiya bolla de7iya nam7u kiruubetape giddon gidada taani neera gahetana. Isra7eele asaas immiya kiita ubbaa taani yan new immana.” Uytha Xarpheeza
25.23: “Soqala mithafe adussatethay nam7u wadha, gompay issi wadha, geesay issi wadhanne takadho gidiya issi xarpheeza ootha.
25.24: Yaatada, walahi bayna worqan lanxa; iya yuushuwaka worqan lanxa.
25.25: Hessadaka, gompay takadho gidiya goossa iya bolla yuushsha aatha. Yaatada, iya yuushuwa worqan lanxa.
25.26: He xarpheezas oyddu worqa sagaayota oothada, xarpheezaa oyddu tohotara oytha.
25.27: Xarpheezaa tookanaw kaso mithata aathiya sagaayoti xarpheeza goossaa matan shiiqidi de7o.
25.28: He tookiya kasota soqala mithafe kessada, worqan lanxa.
25.29: Hessadaka, shaatetanne cilpata, woyne yarshuwa duuqiya miishetanne xuu7ata walahi bayna worqafe ootha.
25.30: Xarpheezay Taabotiyas sintha baggara utto. Ta sinthan uttiya geeshsha uythay ubba wode xarpheezaa bollafe dhayopo.” Xompe Wothiya Kocaa (Kessa 37:17-24)
25.31: “Xompe wothiya kocaa walahi bayna worqafe ootha. He kocay eqiya tohuwanne tooma worqafe qoxada ootha. Alleeqos oosetiya wallaxati, gambuthatinne ciishshati ubbay issino gididi oosetanaw bessees.
25.32: Nam7u baggara, heedzu heedzu tasheta iyaw kessa.
25.33: Usupun tashetas xeeran xeeran heedzu heedzu alleeqo gambuthatinne ciishshati de7iya lawuze mitha ciishshe daaniyabay de7o.
25.34: Xompiya wothiya kocaa giddon de7iya tooma xeeran oyddu alleeqo gambuthatinne ciishshati de7iya lawuze mitha ciishshe daaniyabay de7o.
25.35: Tashetape garsan, nam7u tasheti gahetiya bessan issi issi gambuthi de7o.
25.36: Gambuthay, tasheynne xompiya wothiya kocay issino gididi, walahi bayna worqafe qoxetidi ooseto.
25.37: “Xompe wothiya kocaa bolla laapun xompeta giigisada, enti sinthe poo7ana mela dhoqu oothada wotha.
25.38: Xompiya naaganaw maaddiya Qaphetanne enta wothiyabata walahi bayna worqafe ootha.
25.39: Xompe wothiya kocaynne iya miisheti ubbay hastamanne ichashu kilo giraame gidiya walahi bayna worqafe ooseto.
25.40: Taani nena zumaa bolla bessida leemisuwa kaallada, akeekada ootha.”

26.1: “Dunkaaniya gaatha baggaas al7o liinope oosetida, tammu geshe giigisa. Enta kaalose, ocha teera daaneysaninne zo7o qacinan daddada kiruubeta misiliyara alleeqisa.
26.2: Gesheti ubbay issi like gido; adussatethay laatamanne oydda, gompay qassi oyddu wadha gido.
26.3: Ichashu gesheta issife gathada sika; hanko attida ichashata hessada ootha.
26.4: Issife gahetidi siketida nam7u geshetas issuwa issuwa gaxan kaalose afilape oosetida sagaayota ootha.
26.5: Issife siketida koyro magarajuwa bolla koyro maaran kaalose afilape oosetida ishatamu sagaayota ootha; hessadaka nam7antho magarajuwa bolla wursetha gaxan ishatamu sagaayota ootha.
26.6: Geeshsha Dunkaaney issino gidana mela nam7un shaaketi siketida gesheta woli gathidi oysethanaw, ishatamu worqafe oosetida oykiyabata ootha.
26.7: “Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollara kammana mela tammanne issi gesheta deesha ikisepe ootha.
26.8: Tammanne issi gesheti issi gina gido; issi issi magarajuwa adussatethay hastamu wadha, gompay oyddu wadha gido.
26.9: Ichashu gesheta issi baggara, usupun gesheta hanko baggara gathada sika. Usupuntho magarajoy dakoyetidi, dunkaaniyas sintha baggara daabuleto.
26.10: Woli gathi sikida geshetape issi magarajuwas macara bolla ishatamu sagaayota ootha; qassi hanko magarajuwas macara bolla ishatamu sagaayota ootha.
26.11: Nam7un shaaketi siketida gesheti issi kama gidana mela ishatamu naase biratape oosetida oykiyabata ootha.
26.12: He dunkaaniya geshetape palahida baggaa ekada Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas guye baggara kaqa.
26.13: Dunkaaniya geshetape adusatetha baggara palahida gompay issi issi wadha gidida gesheta Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas nam7u baggara kaqa.
26.14: “Dunkaaniyas bolla baggara daabulidi kammanaw zo7o qalamen tiyetida maraze itenne lo77o do7a ite ootha.
26.15: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tuuqeta soqala mithafe ootha.
26.16: Issi issi tuuqiya adussatethay tammu wadha, gompay issi wadhanne bagga gido.
26.17: Nam7u tuuqeti issife oyketana mela issi issi tuuqiyas oysethiyabay de7o. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tuuqeta ubbaa hessada ootha.
26.18: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya wuloha baggara laatamu tuuqeta ootha.
26.19: Entana essanaw enta garsan bira biratape oosetida oytamu luhoy de7iya tohota ootha. Issi issi tuuqiyas nam7u nam7u toho kessa.
26.20: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pudeha baggara laatamu tuuqeta ootha.
26.21: Entana essanaw enta garsan bira biratape oosetida oytamu luhoy de7iya tohota ootha. Issi issi tuuqiyas nam7u nam7u toho kessa.
26.22: Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas guyera wuloha baggara usupun tuuqeta ootha.
26.23: Guye baggara de7iya maazanetas nam7u tuuqeta ootha.
26.24: He maazaniyan de7iya tuuqeti tohope huuphe gakanaw oyketo. Nam7u maazaneta medhiya nam7u tuuqeta hessatho oosetanaw bessees.
26.25: Hessadaka nam7u nam7u tohoy de7iya hospun tuuqeta oothada, entaw bira biratape oosetida tammanne usupun luhoy de7iya tohota ootha.
26.26: “Tuuqeta sathidi oythiya soqala mithafe oosetida tammanne ichashu liyoota kessa. Entafe ichashata Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas issi bagga miyen de7iya tuuqetas,
26.27: qassi ichashata hanko bagga miyen de7iya tuuqetas, hessadaka attida ichashata wuloha baggan de7iya tuuqetas ootha.
26.28: Ha gaxa tuuqiyapenne ya gaxa tuuqiyape yaa liyooti giddo tuuqiyara oyketo.
26.29: Tuuqeta worqan lanxa; liyoota oykanaw maaddiya sagaayota worqafe ootha; qassi liyoota worqan lanxa.
26.30: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya zumaa bolla ta nena bessidaysada ootha.
26.31: “Al7o liinope issi magarajo oothada, iya kaalose, ocha teera daaneysaninne zo7o qacinan daddada kiruubeta misilen alleeqisa.
26.32: Iya soqala mithafe oothada, worqan meeshetida kocataninne bira biratape oosetida oyddu tohoy de7iya tuussata bolla kaqa.
26.33: He magarajuwa Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas kaaran de7iya qaphetape garsan kaqa. Yaatada higgey xaafetida nam7u loche shuchata oykida Caaqo Taabotiya magarajuwas guye baggan wotha. He geshey, Geeshsha Bessaanne Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaafe shaakees.
26.34: Nagara atotetha kaman Caaqo Taabotiya kamma.
26.35: Xarpheezaa, Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaafe karera, Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape pudeha baggan wotha; xompe wothiya kocaa dugeha baggara wotha.
26.36: “Dunkaaniya penge magarajuwa, al7o liinope giigisada, kaalose, ocha teera daaneysaninne zo7o qacinan daddada alleeqisa.
26.37: Magarajuwas ichashu tuussata soqala mithafe oothada worqan lanxa; kocatika worqafe oosetidaysata gido. Tuussatas naase biratape ichashu tohota giigisa.”

27.1: “Soqala mithafe yarsho bessi ootha. Adussatethaynne gompay oyddu wadhanne takadho, geesay heedzu wadha gidida oyddu maazanera de7iya yarsho bessi ootha.
27.2: Oyddu maazaneta bolla kace daaniyaba kessa; kaceti yarsho bessaara issino gididi ooseto. Yaatada, yarsho bessa ubbaa naase biratan laxa.
27.3: Iyaw go7etiya miisheta; bido kessiya kereta, akaafata, baldeta, asho qaphetanne cooceta ubbaa naase biratape ootha.
27.4: Yaatada, naase biratape zarzare daaniyaba oothada, iyaw oyddu maazaneta bolla oyddu sagaayota giigisa.
27.5: He zarzariya yarsho bessa goossaafe garsan yarsho bessaas bagga zawa gathada wotha.
27.6: Soqala mithafe yarsho bessa tookiya kaso mithata kessada, naase biratan lanxa.
27.7: Yarsho bessaa tookiya wode maaddana mela he kaso mithata nam7u miyera de7iya sagaayotan aatha.
27.8: Taani nena zumaa bolla bessidaysada yarsho bessi xawulape oothada, gidduwa kaysi ootha.” Geeshsha Dunkaane Dabaaba
27.9: “Geeshsha Dunkaaniya dabaaba gechanaw al7o liinope magarajo giigisa. Geshetas adussatethay dugeha baggara xeetu wadha gido.
27.10: Iyaw kate gidana mela naase biratape oosetida laatamu tuussatanne laatamu tohota ootha. Enta bolla bira biratape oosetida xam7atanne kaceta ootha.
27.12: “Dabaabas wuloha bagga adussatethay ishatamu wadha gidida gesheti oosetidi, entaw tammu tohoy de7iya tuussati de7o.
27.13: Geliya wulay de7iya, doloha bagga dabaaba gompay ishatamu wadha gido.
27.14: Dabaaba pengiyafe issi baggara adussatethay tammanne ichashu wadha gidiya gesheti de7o; entaw heedzu tohoy de7iya heedzu tuussati de7o.
27.15: Hanko baggara de7iya geshetika hessada ooseto.
27.16: “Dabaaba geliya wulaas adussatethay laatamu wadha gidiya, al7o liinope magarajo giigisada, kaalose, ocha teera daaneysaninne zo7o qacinan daddada alleeqisa. Enti iyan zempana mela oyddu tohora de7iya oyddu tuussata giigisa.
27.17: Dabaaba yuushuwan de7iya tuussati ubbay bira biratape oosetida xam7atan oyketo; enta kaceti bira biratape, enta tohoti naase biratape ooseto.
27.18: Dabaaba adussatethay xeetu wadha, gompay oytamu wadha, geesay ichashu wadha gido. Magarajoti al7o liinope, enta tohotika naase biratape ooseto.
27.19: “Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan go7etiya miishe ubbay, dunkaaniyanne dabaaba dhisheti ubbay naase biratape ooseto. Xompe Zayte
27.20: “Xompey qamma poo7ishe aqana mela gum7i xillisida shamaho zayte new ehana mela Isra7eele asaa kiita.
27.21: Aaroninne iya nayti, poo7oy, Godaa sinthan omarsafe wonta gakanaw poo7ana mela Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon, Marka Taabotiya sinthan de7iya magarajuwafe kare baggara eetho. Hessi Isra7eele asaas merina woga gididi de7o.

28.1: “Ne ishaa Aaronanne iya nayta Nadaaba, Abyooda, Alaazaranne Itamaara neeko xeega. Enti kahine gididi taw haggaazana mela Isra7eele asaa giddofe enta dummaya.
28.2: Iyaw bonchonne teema immana mela ne ishaa Aaronas boncho ma7ota giigisa.
28.3: Aaroni kahinetethan dummatidi taw haggaazanaada, taani hiillatethi immida oosanchota ubbaa xeegada, Aaronas ma7ota giigisana mela oda.
28.4: Enti giigisana ma7otika haysata; tiran ma7etiya ma7o, efuude, adussa qamise, alleeqetidi dadetida shamize, qacenne danco. Ne ishay Aaroninne iya nayti kahine gididi taw haggaazishe ma7ana mela geeshsha ma7ota entaw giigiso.
28.5: Kushe hiillanchoti he ma7ota worqa cachafe, kaalosepe, ocha teera daaneysafe zo7o qacinapenne al7o liinope giigiso. Efuude (Kessa 39:2-7)
28.6: “Efuude geetetiya ma7uwa worqa cacha qacinape, kaalosepe, ocha teera daaneysafe, zo7o qacinapenne al7o liinope kushe hiillanchoti alleeqisidi giigiso.
28.7: Nam7u hashiyara wodhidi, nam7u baggaa woli gathidi qachanaw maaddiya qangoti de7o.
28.8: Efuudey oosetidabaape hiillan oosetida dancoy efuudiyara wolla oosetidaba gididi issife oyketo.
28.9: Margide geetetiya nam7u shuchata ekada, tammanne nam7u Yayqooba nayta sunthaa enta bolla woocada xaafa.
28.10: Enta yeleta maarada issi shucha bolla usupun sunthata, hanko shuchaa bolla attida usupun sunthata woocada xaafa.
28.11: Ha nam7u shuchata bolla tammanne nam7u Yayqooba nayta sunthaa woocadi xaafanaw hiillancho demma; he xaafetida shuchata efuudiya bolla oythanaw iya yuushuwa worqan lanxa.
28.12: Yaatada tammanne nam7u Isra7eele sheesha qofisiyaba gidana mela ha nam7u shuchata efuudiyara oythada hashiyara aadhiya qanguwa bolla wotha. Taani, Goday, ta asaa ubba wode hassayana mela Aaroni enta sunthaa ba hashiyan tooko.
28.14: Qassi walahi bayna worqafe wodoroda dooqetida nam7u santhalaata hashiyara aadhiya qanguwara oyketana mela ootha. Tiran Ma7etiya Ma7o
28.15: “Godaa sheniya oychidi eranaw, tiran ma7etiya ma7uwa kushe hiillanchon oosisa. He tiran ma7etiya ma7uwa worqa cacha qacinape, kaalosepe, ocha teera daaneysafe, zo7o qacinapenne al7o liinope efuudiyada alleeqisidi giigiso. Kaalosepe oosetidabaape oothada alleeqisa.
28.16: Iyaw geesaynne gompay issi issi takadho gididi oyddu maazaney de7o.
28.17: Iyaw oyddu maaran al7o shuchata wotha. Koyro maaran sardiyoone, toophazenne phooliya al7o shuchata wotha.
28.18: Nam7antho maaran baluure, sanperenne almaaze geetetiya al7o shuchata wotha.
28.19: Heedzantho maaran yaakinte, kelqedoonenne ametesxinoosa geetetiya al7o shuchata wotha.
28.20: Oyddantho maaran birelle, margide, yasphide geetetiya al7o shuchata wotha. Haysati ubbay worqa kaquwa bolla woseto.
28.21: Isra7eele naytas qofiso gidana mela ha tammanne nam7u al7o shuchata, issi issi Yayqooba nayta sunthay, issi issi shucha bolla woocetidi xaafeto.
28.22: “Tiran ma7etiya ma7uwas walahi bayna worqafe wodoroda dooqada santhalaata ootha.
28.23: Nam7u worqa migiddota oothada, tiran ma7etiya ma7uwas qommo gaxa maazaniyan gathada oytha.
28.24: He nam7u worqa santhalaatata migiddotara gathada oytha.
28.25: Hanko baggan de7iya nam7u santhalaata gaxa nam7u qangotara gasetha. Hessada oothada sintha baggara, hashiyara wodhiya efuudiya qanguwara gasetha.
28.26: Qassi nam7u worqa sagaayota oothada, efuudiyape gatha baggara kaallidi de7iya tiran ma7etiya ma7uwas nam7u maazaneta xeeran aatha.
28.27: Hessadaka, worqafe hara nam7u migiddota oothada, efuudiyas sintha bagga hashiyara wodhiya qanguwas garsa baggara gasetha. Efuudiya sikuwa matan dancuwaafe qommo baggara enta gasethanaw bessees.
28.28: Tiran ma7etiya ma7uwan de7iya migiddota efuudiyan de7iya migiddotara gathada kaalose qacinan qacha. Hessada oothiko, tiran ma7etiya ma7oy xeessafe qommon de7iya gisho, qashoy dol7enna.
28.29: “Aaroni Geeshsha bessa geliya wode Isra7eele mayzata sunthaa oykida, tiran ma7etiya ma7uwa ma7o. Yaaniya gisho, taani, Goday ubba wode ta asaa qopana.
28.30: Qassi saama yeggiya nam7u geeshsha shuchata tiran ma7etiya ma7uwan yegga. Aaroni Geeshsha dunkaaniya geliya wode ba tiran enta tookidi gelo. Ta sheniya Isra7eele asaa erisanaw ta sinthe geliya wode ubban tira kiisiyape dhaysofo. Hara Kahine Ma7ota
28.31: “Efuudiyape bollara ma7iya adussa ma7uwa kumethi kaalose afilape giigisa.
28.32: He adusse ma7uwas huuphe aathiya luho medha. He luhoy peedhetonna mela guye qalam7ada yuushsha aathada sika.
28.33: Adussa ma7uwas duge bagga macara yuushuwan kaalose, ocha teera daaneysaninne zo7o qacinape, oromaane teera misile medha. Yaatada enta giddon aatha aatha worqafe oosetida daalata ootha.
28.34: Worqa daalatinne oromaane teera misileti he adusse ma7uwas duge bagga macara yuushuwan aadho.
28.35: Aaroni kahinetethan oothiya wode ha adussa ma7uwa ma7o. Godaa sinthe, Geeshsha Bessaa geliya wodenne keyiya wode, daalay giirana; ika hayqenna.
28.36: Walahi bayna worqafe issi alleeqo oothada, iya bolla ‘Godaas Dummatis’ yaagada woocada xaafa.
28.37: Yaatada huuphiya qaciya bolla kaalose qacinara qacha.
28.38: Aaroni iya ba som7uwan wotho. Hessan Isra7eele asay Godaas imota immishe balidabay de7iko, he balaa Aaroni tookees. Asay ehiyaba Goday ekana mela I hessa ubba wode ba som7uwan wothanaw koshshees.
28.39: “Aarona shamziyanne qacciya al7o liinope dadda. Qassi dancuwaka al7o liinope daddada alleeqisa.
28.40: Aarona naytas bonchonne puula immana mela shamizeta, dancotanne huuphen wothiya qoobeta giigisa.
28.41: Neeni ha ma7ota ne ishaa Aaronanne iya nayta mayza. Enti kahinetethan taw haggaazana mela enta shamaho zayten tiyada taw dummaya.
28.42: Enta kalloy kametana mela garsan ma7iya ma7uwa xeessafe bidi wodire gakanaw kammiyaba al7o liinope sure giigisa.
28.43: Aaroninne iya nayti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya geliya wode woyko Geeshsha Bessan kahinetethan haggaazanaw yarsho bessi shiiqiya wode ha ma7ota ma7o. Hessada haniko, enti banta bolla hayqo ehokona. Hessi Aaronasinne iya sheeshatas merinaa woga gido.

29.1: “Aaroninne iya nayti kahinetethan taw haggaazana mela neeni enta dummayanaw haysada ootha; borey bayna wofaanonne nam7u maraze eka.
29.2: Geeshsha giste dhiille ekada, irsho yeggonna shamaho zaytera gindada uythu uuka. Qassi zaytey gelonna hara uythu uuka; hessadaka, lee7o uythu uukada zayten tiya.
29.3: Wofaanuwanne nam7u marazeta yarshiya wode he uytha ubbaa gaytan wothada taw shiisha.
29.4: “Yaatada Aaronanne iya nayta Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge ehada haathan enti meecetana mela oda.
29.5: Hessafe guye, kahinetetha ma7ota, shamziya, efuudiya, efuudiya bollara ma7iya adussa ma7uwanne tiran ma7etiya ma7uwa Aarona mayza; dancuwaka dancisa.
29.6: Qacciya qaccisa; iya bolla, ‘Godaas dummatis’ geetetidi xaafetida worqa alleequwa wotha.
29.7: Tishsha zaytiya ekada iya huuphiyan tigada tiya.
29.9: Enta xeessaa dancisa; enta huuphiyanka qoobe wotha. Aaronanne iya nayta yaatada kahinetethan shuuma. Hessika, entaw merina woga gido.
29.10: “Wofaanuwa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthe ehada, Aaroninne iya nayti iya huuphiyan banta kushiya wothana mela ootha.
29.11: Wofaanuwa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengiyan Godaa sinthan shuka.
29.12: Wofaanuwa suuthaafe guuthu ekada ne biradhiyan, yarsho bessa bolla de7iya kaceta tiya. Attidaysa yarsho bessaafe garsan gussa.
29.13: Hessafe guye, ulo ashuwa kammida modhuwa ubbaa, tiriyaas lo77o baggaa, nam7u kilahotanne enta kammida modhuwa ekada, yarsho bessaa bolla wothada xuugga.
29.14: Shin wofaanuwa ulo ashuwa, iya galbaanne maraaciya gutaape gaxa kessada xuugga. Hessi kahineta nagaraa quchiya yarsho.
29.15: “Nam7u marazetape issuwa ekada, Aaroninne iya nayti banta kushiya iya huuphen wothana mela ootha.
29.16: He maraziya shukada, suuthaa yarsho bessan oyddu maazanetan wurxa.
29.17: Iya ashuwa qanxerethada, ulo ashuwanne gedaa meeccada, huuphiya hara qommo ashotara issife yarsho bessan wotha.
29.18: Hessafe guye, kumetha ashuwa yarsho bessan xuugga. Hessika Godaas xuussa yarsho. He yarshuwa sawoy Godaa ufaysees.
29.19: “Qassi kahinetetha wogas eketida hanko maraziya ekada Aaroninne iya nayti banta kushiya iya huuphen wothana mela oda.
29.20: Iya shukada, suuthaafe guuthu ekada, Aaronasinne iya naytas ushacha haythatas gaxaa, enta ushacha kushiyasinne tohuwas wogga biradheta tiya. Attida suuthaa yarsho bessa oyddu maazanetan wurxa.
29.21: Yarsho bessan de7iya suuthaafenne tiyiya zaytiyape guuthu ekada, Aarona bollanne iya ma7uwa bolla, qassika iya nayta bollanne enta ma7uwa bolla wurxa. Hessan Aaroninne iya nayti banta ma7uwara taw dummatidaysata gidana.
29.22: “He marazey kahineta shuuma wogaas eketiya gisho, goyna modhuwa, ulo ashuwa kammida modhuwa, tiriya kammida moodhiya, nam7u kilahota, enta kammida moodhiyanne ushacha guye gedaa qanxada shaaka.
29.23: Godaa sinthan wothida uythatape, zaytey geliboonna uythaa, zaytera uukida uythaanne lee7o uythaafe issuwa eka.
29.24: Neeni ha katha ubbaa Aarona kushiyaninne iya nayta kushiyan wotha. Enti iya yuusho yarsho oothidi Godaas immiya yarsho oothidi Godaa sinthan shiisho.
29.25: Hessafe guye, enta kushepe ekada yarsho bessa bolla wotha; xuussa yarshuwara gathada, Godaa sawana mela yarsho bessa bolla taman xuugga.
29.26: Aaroni kahine gididi shuumetiya wode shukida maraziya angaasuwa ekada, Godaa sinthan yuusho yarsho ootha. Hessi hintena gakiya gisho gidana.
29.27: “Kahiney shuumetiya wode, Aaronanne iya nayta kahinetethan shuumanaw eketida angaaysuwanne toho ashuwa taw dummaya. Hessika, kahineta gakiya gisho gido.
29.28: Isra7eeleti ubbay kahine shuumanaw woyko anjetanaw Godaas Angaasonne guye toho yarsho immiya wode ashoy taw dummatidaysa gido. Shin gishoy Aaronasinne iya naytas gako; he wogay laametofo.
29.29: “Aaroni hayqida wode iya nayti iya kahinetetha ma7uwa laatto. Enti kahinetethan shuumetidaape guye he ma7uwa ma7o.
29.30: Iya naytape iya bessan kahine gididi, Geeshsha bessan haggaazanaw Geeshsha Dunkaaniya yaa na7i he ma7uwa laapun gallas ma7o.
29.31: “Aaroninne iya nayti kahine gididi shuumetiya wode shuketida maraziya ashuwa ekada, geeshsha bessan katha.
29.32: Aaroninne iya nayti maraziya ashuwa gaytan attida uythaara Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen mo.
29.33: Enti kahine gididi shuumetiya wode nagara atotethas yarshetida he ashuwa mona. Shin he kathay geeshshi gidida gisho, kahineta xalaali mo; hara asi oonika moopo.
29.34: Ashuwapenne kathaafe mishin attidi aqiko, taman xuugeto; geeshshi gidida gisho meetetofo.
29.35: “Aaroninne iya nayti kahine gididi shuumetiya wode, ta nena kiitida ubbaa ootha; ba7aaley laapun gallasan poleto.
29.36: Nagaraa atotethas issi issi gallasan issi wofaano shukada yarsha. Hessi yarsho bessa geeshshees. Yaatada yarsho bessa polo geeshshanaw shamaho zayte tiya.
29.37: Hessa laapun gallas gakanaw gallas gallas ootha. Yaatiko yarsho bessay polo geeshshi gidana. I polo geeshshi gidida gisho, iya bochiya asi woyko haraba ubbay geeyana. Gallasa Yarsho
29.38: “Laythan laythan yarsho bessan gallas gallas issi laythi gidida nam7u marazeta yarsha.
29.39: Marazetape issuwa wonta, qassi hankuwa omarsi yarsha.
29.40: Koyro maraziyara issi kilo giraame gidiya geeshsha lo77o giste dhiille, issi litiro shamaho zaytera gindada yarsha. Issi litiro woyne ushsha yarsho oothada gussa.
29.41: Hanko maraziya omarsi yarshashe wonta yarshoysa mela dhiille, zaytenne woyne ushsha shiisha. Hessi taw yarshetiya katha yarsho; iya sawoy tana ufayseysa gidana.
29.42: “Laythan laythan he xuussa yarshoy Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen, Godaa sinthan paci bayna yashetanaw bessees. He bessan taani ta deriyara gahetana; neeraka yan odetana.
29.43: Yan taani Isra7eeletara gahetana; ta bonchoy he bessa dummayana.
29.44: Taani Geeshsha Dunkaaniyanne yarsho bessa dummayana; enti taw kahine gididi haggaazana mela Aaronanne iya nayta dummayana.
29.45: Yaatada, taani Isra7eeleta giddon daana; enta Xoossaa gidana.
29.46: Enta giddon daanaw Gibxefe enta kessida Goday, enta Xoossay tana gideysa enti erana. Taani Godaa, enta Xoossaa.

30.2: Iyaw oyddu maazaney de7o. Adussatethaynne gompay issi issi wadha, geesay nam7u wadha gido. Oyddu maazaniyan de7iya kaceti iyara oyketidi oosetonna.
30.3: Iyaw bolla baggaa, iya oyddu maazanetanne iya kaceta walahi bayna worqan lanxa. Iya yuushuwaka worqan lanxa.
30.4: Nam7u worqa sagaayota oothada, xarpheeza tookanaw maaddiya kaso mithata aathanaw goossaas nam7u baggara oytha.
30.5: Kaso mithata soqala mithafe kessada, enta worqan lanxa.
30.6: He ixaane yarsho xarpheezaa, Caaqo Taabotiya sinthan kaqetida magarajuwafe kare baggara wotha. Yan taani neera gahetana.
30.7: “Aaroni wonta wonta xompeta giigisanaw yaa wode, sawiya ixaane yarshiya bessan cuyiso.
30.8: Hessada, Aaroni omarsi xompeta xompiya wodeka ixaane cuyiso. He ixaaniya yarshoy yaana laytha ubban Godaa sinthan cuyo.
30.9: Ha yarsho bessan hara digetida ixaane, katha yarsho, mehe yarshonne woyne yarsho yarshofa.
30.10: Aaroni, nagaraa atotethas laythafe issi toho shuketiya mehiya suuthaafe ekidi, he yarsho bessa maazaneta bolla de7iya kaceta wothidi geeshsho wogaa polo. Ha wogay sinthara yaana wode ubban laythan laythan poleto. He yarsho bessay geeshshi gidiya gisho Godaas dummatis” yaagis. Nagara Atotetha Miishe
30.11: Hessafe guye, Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
30.12: “Neeni Isra7eele asaa taybiya wode, issi issi asi ba shempuwa wozanaw Godaas miishe qanxo. Yaatiko neeni enta taybiya wode gadoy enta bolla yeenna.
30.13: Taybon geliya asi oonika huuphen huuphen geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaane ginan bira ciggo. Issi issi asi hessa taw yarsho oothidi immo.
30.14: Taybon geliya asi oonika laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida ubbay Godaas hessa eho.
30.15: Enti banta shempuwa wozanaw Godaas imota immiya wode, dureyka manqoyka issi gina immofe attishin, durey darsidi woyko manqoy guuthidi immofo.
30.16: He miishiya Isra7eele asaape ekada, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya naaganaw peeshsha. He miishey enta shempuwa wozanawunne ta enta naagana mela qofisiyaba gidana” yaagis. Meecha Kere
30.18: “Meecha keriyanne iya tohuwa naase biratape medha. Iyan haathe tigada Geeshsha Dunkaaniyapenne yarsho bessaafe giddon wotha.
30.19: Aaroninne iya nayti banta kushiyanne banta tohuwa yan meeceto.
30.20: Enti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya gelanaapenne yarsho yarshanaape sinthe hessa oothanaw bessees. Hessa enti oothiko hayqope attoosona.
30.21: Enti hayqonna mela, banta kushiyanne banta tohuwa meecetanaw bessees. Hessi Aaronasinne iya sheeshatas, yaa yeletetha ubbaas merinaa woga gidana” yaagis. Shuumatetha Zayte
30.23: “Geeshsha sawota, hessatika; usupun kilo giraame gukiya karbe, heedzu kilo giraame sawiya qarafa, heedzu kilo giraame sawiya maata,
30.24: usupun kilo giraame burgude eka. He ubbayka geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaaniya gina gido. Hessata bolla oyddu litiro zayte guja.
30.25: Hessata shittoda walakada, sawiya geeshsha zayte oothada,
30.27: Xarpheezanne iya miisheta, xompe wothiya kocaanne iya miisheta, ixaane cuyisiya xarpheezaa,
30.28: xuussa yarsho bessinne iyan bolla de7iya miisheta ubba, meecha keriyanne iya tohuwa tiya.
30.29: Enti polo geeshshi gidana mela enta dummaya. Enta bochiya oonika geeshshi gidana.
30.30: “Hessafe guye, Aaroninne iya nayti kahine gididi taw haggaazana mela enta tiyada dummaya.
30.31: Isra7eele asaas, ‘Haysi Geeshsha shuumatetha zaytey yaa yeletethaas tana haggaazanaw maaddiya zayte gido.
30.32: He zaytiya coo asa bolla gussofa; qassi ay zayteka iya oothida ogiyan oothofa. Zaytey geeshshi gidida gisho, hinteka iya geeshshatetha erite.
30.33: He shittuwa giigisiya asi, woyko kahine gidonna hara asi tiyiya oonika ta asaa giddofe hileto’ yaaga” yaagis. Ixaane
30.34: Goday Museko haysada yaagis; “Geeshsha sawota, xokiya mitha made, dhaadhe keethan de7iya shitto, sawiya madenne sawiya ixaane eka; enta ubbaa mizaaney issi gina gido.
30.35: Shittoda walahetida ixaane oothada enta go7eta. Walahi baynanne geeshshi gidana mela iyan maxine yegga.
30.36: Iyape guuthara ekada liiqisa caddada, taani neera gahetiya Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon, Caaqo Taabotiya sinthan wurxa. He ixaaney new polo geeshshi gido.
30.37: Hintew go7etanaw he ixaaniya ay ogenka giigisopite. Hessi taw dummatidaysa gideysa erite.
30.38: Hessatho oothidi, iya sawuwa singidi ufaytanaw koyiya oonika, ta asaa giddofe dhayana” yaagis.

31.2: “Taani Yihuda sheeshape gidida Huura na7aa na7aa, Ure na7aa, Basili7eela dooras.
31.3: Taani iya ta Ayyaanan kunthas; taani hiilla, akeekanne ooso ubbaa oothiya era iyaw immas.
31.4: Hessika, hiillan oothana oosota halchidi worqafe, birapenne naase biratape dumma dummaba kessidi oothanaasa.
31.5: Hessadaka, al7o shuchu massidi giigiseysa, mithi masseysanne hara ooso ubbaa oothana mela cincatethi immas.
31.6: Qassi iya maaddana mela Daane sheeshi gidida Ahisamaaka na7aa Eliyaaba dooras. Taani nena kiittidaba ubbaa enti oothana mela kushe hiilla eriya harata ubbaas gita eratethi immas.
31.7: Enti oothanabati, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya, Caaqo Taabotiya, iya bolla wothiya nagara atotetha kamaa, Dunkaaniya giddon go7etiya miishe ubbaa,
31.8: xarpheezanne iya miisheta, walahi bayna worqafe oosetida xompe wothiya kocaanne iya miishe ubbaa, ixaane cuyisiya xarpheezaa,
31.9: xuussa yarsho bessinne iya miishe ubbaa, meecha keriyanne iya tohuwa,
31.10: Aaroninne iya nayti kahinetethan haggaazishe ma7iya kahinetetha ma7uwa,
31.11: shuumatetha zaytiyanne Geeshsha Bessaas haniya sawiya ixaaniya, taani nena kiitidaysada enti oothana” yaagis. Sambaata
31.13: “Isra7eele asaa, ‘Ta Sambaata naagite. Hessi taani, Goday, hintena taw geeshsha dere oothada dooridaysa bessiya malla gididi, yaana yeletetha ubbaas taapenne hintefe giddon de7o.
31.14: He gallasay geeshshi gidiya gisho, iya bonchite. Sambaata bonchonaynne he gallasan ooso oothiya oonika ta asaa giddofe dhayo woyko hayqo.
31.15: Hinte ooso oothanaw bessiya usupun gallasati de7oosona. Shin laapuntha gallasay Godaas dummatida, shempo gallas. Sambaata gallasan ooso oothiya oonika hayqo.
31.16: Isra7eele yeletetha ubbay ha Sambaata gallasaa merina caaqo malla oothidi boncho.
31.17: Taani usupun gallasan saluwanne sa7aa medhida gishonne laapuntha gallasan ooso aggada shempida gisho, ta giddoninne Isra7eeleta giddon hessi merinaw eqidi de7iya malla gidana’ yaaga” yaagis.
31.18: Goday Muse Siina zuma bolla odiseysa ongida wode, I ba biradhen xaafida tammu kiitata oykida nam7u loche shuchata Muses immis.

32.1: Asay, Musey zumaa bollafe wodhanaw gam7idaysa be7ida wode Aaronako yidi, “Nuna kaalethishe naagana xoossata nuus ootha. Gibxe biittafe nuna kessida Musey waanidaako eroko” yaagidosona.
32.2: Aaroni entako, “Hinte macheta, hinte adde naytanne hinte macca nayta haythan de7iya worqaa kessidi, taw haa ekidi yiite” yaagis.
32.3: Asi ubbay banta haythafe worqaa kessidi, Aaronas ehidosona.
32.4: I hessa entafe ekidi, taman sheeshidaape guye, qoxidi, worqa mara misile oothidi medhis. Enti, “Isra7eeleto, nuna Gibxe biittafe kaalethidi kessida nu xoossati haysata” yaagidosona.
32.5: Aaroni hessa be7ida wode, he maraa sinthan yarsho besse giigisidi, “Wonto Godaa bonchiya ba7aale gallas gidana” yaagidi erisis.
32.6: Wontetha gallas guura asay dendidi, xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho yarshidosona. Yaatidi, asay maanawunne uyanaw uttidosona. Mi uyi simmidi, duranawunne pokoba hananaw dendidosona.
32.7: Goday Museko, “Neeni Gibxefe kessada, ehida ne asay nagara oothidi, bantana tunisida gisho ellesada duge wodha.
32.8: Taani enta kiitida ogiyape enti ellesidi shiretidosona. Worqa sheeshidi mara misile oothidi, bantaw eeqa medhidi iya goyinnidosona. Iyaw yarshidi, ‘Nuna Gibxe biittafe kessida nu xoossay haysa’ yaagidosona.
32.9: Goday Museko, ha asay ay mela wozana muumeko ta be7as.
32.10: Ha77i ta hanqoy enta bolla eexin, taani enta dhaysanaw giigetida gisho, neeni tana diggofa. Yaatada, taani nena gita dere oothana” yaagis.
32.11: Shin Musey ba Godaa, Xoossaa haysada yaagidi woossis; “Abeeti Godaw, neeni ne gita wolqaaninne ne mino kushiyan Gibxefe kessada ehida ne asaa bolla ne hanqoy ayis eexii?
32.12: Ne hessa oothiyaba gidiko, Gibxeti, ‘Goday entana dereta bolla wodhanawunne biittafe pittidi dhaysanaw kessis’ ayis gaanee? Ne yashshiya hanquwafe simma. Ne asaa dhaysanaw qopidaysa agga.
32.13: Ne aylleta Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Yayqooba hassaya. Neeni entaw, ‘Taani hinte sheesha salo xoolintoda darsana; taani hintew immana gida ha biitta ubbaa hinte sheeshatas immana; enti he biitta merinaw laattana’ gada ne huuphen ne caaqida caaquwa qopa” yaagis.
32.14: Hessa gisho, Goday ba deriya bolla iitabaa ehanaw qopidaysa aggidi, enta maaris.
32.15: Musey nam7u baggara xaafetida, tammu kiitati de7iya nam7u loche shuchata ba kushen oykidi, zumaape duge wodhis.
32.16: He masetida shuchata giigisiday Xoossaa; shuchata bolla woocidi xaafidayka Xoossaa.
32.17: Iyyasuy asaa kooshincha si7ida wode, Museko, “Asay siiratida bessan ola waasoy si7etees” yaagis.
32.18: Musey zaaridi, “Haysi xoonida asa ceeqo woyko xoonetida asa yeeho gidonashin, yetha waaso” yaagis.
32.19: Musey gutaako matida wode maranne dursaa be7idi daro hanqetis. He wode ba kushen oykidi yida, masetida shuchata zumaa xaphon holidi mentherethis.
32.20: Enti medhida maraa ekidi, taman xuuggis. Hessafe guye, liiqana gakanaw gaaccidi haathara maadhidi, Isra7eele asay uyanaada oothis.
32.21: Musey Aaronako, “Ha asay new ay oothin, enta haysa mela iita nagara banta bolla oothana mela oothadii?” yaagis.
32.22: Aaroni zaaridi, “Ta godaw, tana hanqetofa. Ha asay iitaba oothanaw ay mela koyaako ne eraasa.
32.23: Enti, ‘Nuna Gibxefe kessidi ehida, Musey waanidaako nu eroko. Hessa gisho, kaalethiya xoossata nuus ootha’ yaagidosona.
32.24: Taani entako, ‘Hinte haythan de7iya worqaa kessidi, hammite’ yaagas. Enti taw immida worqaa taani taman yeggin, ha mara misiley keyis” yaagis.
32.25: Aaroni asaa coo yeddi aggin, asay ba morketa sinthan kawuyidi, kadhetidaysa Musey be7is.
32.26: Hessa gisho, Musey gutaa geliya pengiyan eqidi, “Godaa bagga gidiya asi oonika taako yo” yaagis. He wode Leeweti ubbay iyako shiiqidosona.
32.27: I, entako, “Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, hinte issoy issoy hinte mashshaa shoddidi, gutaas ha pengefe hini penge gakanaw bidi, hinte ishata, hinte laggetanne hinte shoorota wodhite” yaagis.
32.28: Leeweti Musey kiitidaysada oothidi, he gallas heedzu mukulu gidiya asaa wodhidosona.
32.29: Musey Leewetako, “Hachi hinte, hinte naytanne hinte ishata wodhanaw kiitetidi hintena Godaas dummayideta. Goday hintena anjis” yaagis.
32.30: Wontetha gallas Musey asaako, “Hinte iita nagara oothideta; shin ha77i taani Godaako zuma bolla keyada, ooni eri hinte nagaras atotethi demmonna aggike” yaagis.
32.31: Yaatin Musey Godaako simmidi bidi, “Ha asay iita nagaraa oothidosona; enti bantaw worqafe xoosse medhidosona.
32.32: Shin hayyana, ha77i enta nagaraa atto yaaga. Hessi hanonnaba giiko, ne asaa ne xaafida mazgabiyape ta sunthaa qucha” yaagis.
32.33: Goday zaaridi Museko, “Taani ta mazgabiyape quchana asaa sunthay, ta bolla nagara oothidaysata sunthaa.
32.34: Ha77i bada, ha asaa taani new odida bessaa kaaletha. Ta kiitanchoyka nena kaalethanaysa akeeka, shin taani ha asaa enta nagara gisho seerana wodey yaanaysi attenna” yaagis.
32.35: Aaroni worqafe mara misiliya medhanaada oothiday asaa gidiya gisho, Goday asaa bolla wolqaama gado yeddis.

33.1: Hessafe guye, Goday Museko, “Neeninne ne Gibxefe kessida asay ha bessaafe dendidi, taani Abrahaames, Yisaaqas, Yayqoobasinne enta sheeshatas immana yaagada caaqida biitta biite.
33.2: Taani hinte sinthan kiitanchuwa kiittana. Kanaaneta, Amooreta, Hiteta, Parzeta, Hiwetanne Yaabuseta taani gooddada kessana.
33.3: Maathinne eessi goggiya he biitta biite. Shin hinte, wozani muumida asi gidiya gisho ta hintena ogen dhaysona mela hintera biike” yaagis.
33.4: Asay he yashshiya odaa si7idi yeekidosona. He wodepe doomidi ubbay banta alleequwa aathibokona.
33.5: Goday Museko, Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda yaagis; “Hinte wozana muume asi. Taani hintera hari attoshin guutha wodeska biiko, hinte taape dhayana. Ha77i hinte, hinte alleeqota kessite; taani hinte bolla oothanaba bessaana yaaga” yaagis.
33.6: He wode Isra7eeleti Koreeba zumaa aggidi bidaape guye, banta alleeqota aathibokona. Gahetetha Dunkaane
33.7: Isra7eele asay bishe siiratiya guta ubban Musey dunkaaniya gutaape haassidi tokees. He dunkaaney, “Godaara gahetiya Dunkaane” geetetidi xeegetis. Godaa oychanaw koyiya ubbay yaa bees.
33.8: Musey dunkaaniyako biya wode asa ubbay ba dunkaaniya pengen pengen eqidi, Musey yaa gelana gakanaw iya be7oosona.
33.9: Musey yaa gelidaape guye, shaara tuussay wodhidi Dunkaaniya pengen eqees. Goday shaara giddon gididi Musera odetees.
33.10: Asay shaara tuussa Dunkaaniya pengiyan be7ida wode ubban, ba pengen pengen gulbatidi Godaas goyinnoosona.
33.11: Asi ba laggera odeteysada Goday Musera som7on odetees. Hessafe guye, Musey gutaa simmees. Shin iya maaddiya na7atethay, Nawe na7aa Iyyasuy, Godaara gahetiya Dunkaaniyape shaaketenna. Goday Ba Asaas Gelida Qaala
33.12: Musey Godaako, “Neeni tana, ha asaa ta gida biitta kaaletha yaagadasa. Shin taara baana mela neeni kiittey ooneko, tana erisabaaka. Neeni, tana ereysanne tanan ufayteysa taw qoncisadasa.
33.13: Hessi tuma gidiko, ta nena haggaazana melanne guja ufaysana mela ne ogiya tana tamaarsa. Ha asay ne dere gideysa be7a” yaagis.
33.14: Goday zaaridi, “Taani, neera baana melanne new saro immana mela koyay?” yaagis.
33.15: Musey zaaridi, “Neeni nuura boonnaba gidiko, haysafe nuna kessofa.
33.16: Neeni nuura boonnaba gidiko, tananinne ne asan ne ufaytidaysa asa ubbay waatidi eranee? Biitta ubban de7iya hara asa ubbaafe taaninne ne asay dummatey ne nuura de7eysan gidenneyee?” yaagis.
33.17: Goday Museko, “Taani nena eriya gishonne nenan ufaytida gisho, ne tana oychidaysa ubbaa oothana” yaagis.
33.18: Musey Godaako, “Hayyana ne kumetha bonchuwa tana bessa?” yaagis.
33.19: Goday zaaridi, “Taani ta maarotanne ta lo77otetha ubbaa ne sinthara aathana. Ta geeshsha sunthaa ne matan awaajana. Taani Godaa; ta dooridaysata maarananne entaw qadhetana.
33.20: Shin oonika ta som7uwa be7idi paxa doonna gisho, neeni ta som7uwa be7aka” yaagis.
33.21: Shin, “Neeni zaalla bolla eqanaw haysan ta matan bessi de7ees.
33.22: Ta bonchoy aadhiya wode taani za77ida zaalla giddon nena wothana. Ta aadhana gakanaw ta kushiyan nena kammana.
33.23: Hessafe guye, taani ta kushiya denthana; neeni ta zokuwa be7ana, shin ta som7uwa be7aka” yaagis.

34.1: Goday Museko, “Koyroyisata daaniya nam7u loche shuchata massada giigisa. Taani he shuchata bolla kase neeni menthida shuchata bolla de7iya qaalata xaafana.
34.2: Wonto wonta guura taara gahetanaw Siina Zumaa huuphiya keya.
34.3: Neera oonika keyopo woyko zumaa bolla awunka bentofo. Hari attoshin dorsa woyko mehe wudey zumaa xaphon heemetofo woyko moopo” yaagis.
34.4: Hessa gisho, Musey koyro shuchata daaniya nam7u shuchata massidi, Goday kiitidaysada, shuchata oykidi wonta guura Siina zuma bola keyis.
34.5: Goday shaarara wodhidi, iyara yan eqidi, “Taani Godaa” yaagidi ba geeshsha sunthaa awaajis.
34.6: Goday Muse sinthara aadhishe haysada yaagidi awaajis; “Taani Xoossaa, ta sunthay Godaa. Taani, qadheynne maarotay kumida Xoossaa. Taani danda7aninne merina siiqon kumidaysanne daro ammantheysa.
34.7: Taani, ta asaas geliya qaala mukulu yeletethi gakanaw naageysanne iitatethaa, makallanne nagaraa atto geysa. Shin heedzanthonne oyddantho yeletethi gakanaw aawata nagara gisho nayta seeronna aggike” yaagis.
34.9: I zaaridi, “Abeeti Godaw, neeni tanan ufaytiyaba gidiko, nuura issife yedha. Haysi asay si7onna asi; nu iitatethaanne nu nagaraa atto yaagada, nuna ne ase ootha” yaagis.
34.10: Goday Museko, “Taani Isra7eele asaara caaqana. Haysafe kase biitta bolla awunka hani eronna malaalsiyaba ne asaa sinthan oothana. Taani Goday, ay mela malaalsiyaba oothiyako, neeni enta giddon de7iya asay be7ana.
34.11: Hachi taani hintena kiittiya kiita naagite. Hinte sinthafe Amooreta, Kanaaneta, Hiteta, Parzeta, Hiwetanne Yaabuseta taani gooddana.
34.12: Enti hintew xihe gidonna mela hinte geliya biittan de7iya asaara caaqofite.
34.13: Enta yarsho bessata laallite; goyinno tuussata mentherethite. Asheera geetetiya macca xoosse misile tuussata qanxerethite.
34.14: Taani Goday, ta bonchuwa hara xoossatara koxonna Xoosse gidiya gisho, taape hara xoossatas goyinnofite.
34.15: He biittan de7iya asatara ayba caaqoka caaqofite. Enti banta xoossata goyinniya wodenne entaw yarshiya wode, enti hintena bantara issifana mela oychiko, hinte enti banta xoossatas yarshiya kathaa maanaw paacetidi, taw ammanetona ixana.
34.16: Qassi hinte enta macca naytape hinte adde naytas immiko, he wode he macca nayti banta xoossata goyinnidi, hinte adde naytika taw ammanetona ixidi, banta xoossata goyinnana mela oothana.
34.18: “Uythaa Ba7aale bonchite. Hinte Gibxefe keyday, Abiiba ageenan gidiya gisho, taani hintena kiitidaysada, he ageenan, laapun gallas gakanaw uythi miite.
34.19: “Bayra yeletiya adde na7i ubbaynne bayra yeletiya mehe adde ubbay tabaa.
34.20: Koyro yeletida hare mari dorsa marara laammada woza. Wozonna ixiko, iya morgiya mentha. Bayra yeletida adde na7a ubbaa woza. “Oonika immiyaba oykonna mela kushe ta sinthan shiiqopo.
34.21: “Usupun gallas oothite, shin laapuntha gallasan shempite. Zeriya wode gidin woyko kathaa cakiya wode laapuntha gallasan shempite.
34.22: “Koyro hinte gistiya cako doomiya wode, Katha Shiisho Ba7aale bonchite. Qassi laytha wursetha kathaa shiishiya wode, Shaqara Ba7aale bonchite.
34.23: Laythan heedzu toho Isra7eele adde ubbay medhetetha Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaa goyinnanaw yo.
34.24: Kawotethata taani hinte sinthafe yedetha kessada hinte zawa aassana. Hinte tana goyinnanaw laythan heedzu toho yaa wode, oonika hinte biitta olidi ekanaw amottenna.
34.25: “Hinte taw mehe yarshiya wode, irsho yeggidi uukida uythara shishopitte. Paasika bonchiya gallasas yarshida yarshuwafe wontas aybaka ashshofite.
34.26: “Hinte gaden bayra kaxida kathaafe koyro ayfiya Godaa hinte Xoossaa keethi ehite. “Deesha mari iya aaye maathan doysopite” yaagis.
34.27: Goday Museko, “Taani neeranne Isra7eele asaara caaqo geley ha qaalatan gidiya gisho, ha qaalata xaafa” yaagis.
34.28: Musey moonnanne uyonna, oytamu gallasinne oytamu qamma Godaara zuma bolla gam7is. I, caaqo qaala gelida tammu kiitata loche shuchatan xaafis. Musey Siina Zumaape Wodhetha
34.29: Musey Godaara odetishe gam7idi, tammu kiitata oykida nam7u loche shuchata ekidi Siina Zumaape wodhiya wode iya som7oy phoolees, shin I hessa eribeenna.
34.30: Aaroninne Isra7eele asa ubbay Muse xeellidi, iya som7oy phooleysa be7idi, iyako shiiqanaw yayyidosona.
34.31: Shin Musey enta xeegis. Aaroninne Isra7eele halaqati ubbay iyako shiiqin, I enta odisis.
34.32: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asa ubbay iyako shiiqin, Goday iyaw Siina zuma bola immida kiita ubbaa I entaw immis.
34.33: Musey entara odeteysa wursida wode ba som7uwa laxanan kammis.
34.34: Shin Musey Godaa sinthe, iyara odetanaw geliya wode laxana ba som7uwafe qaarees. Yaape keyiya wode, Goday iya kiittidaba ubbaa Isra7eele asaas odees.
34.35: He ubban enti iya som7oy phooleysa be7oosona. Hessa gisho, Musey Godaara odetanaw baana gakanaw, ba som7uwa laxanan kammees.

35.1: Musey Isra7eele asaa ubbaa xeegidi, “Hinte oothana mela Goday kiittidabay haysa;
35.2: Saaminta giddon usupun gallasa xalaalan ooso oothite; shin laapuntha gallasay hintew geeshsha gallas; Godaaska dummatida shempo Sambaata. He gallasan ooso oothiya oonika hayqanaw bessees.
35.3: Sambaata gallas hinte son tama eethofite” yaagis. Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas Imetida Imuwa
35.4: Musey Isra7eele asaako, “Goday haysada yaagidi hintena kiittis;
35.5: Godaas hinte wozanay immo giyaba immanaw ehite. Hinte immanaw ehiyabati worqaa, bira, naase birata,
35.6: kaalose qacina, ocha teera daaniya qacina, zo7o qacinanne al7o liino, deesha ikise,
35.7: zo7o qalamen yeggi kessida dorsa ite, lo77o do7a ite, soqala mithi,
35.8: xompes shamaho zayte, shuumatetha zayte, iyan yegetiya sawuwanne ixaane sawo,
35.9: efuudiyasinne tiran ma7etiya ma7uwas haniya margide geetetiya shuchaanne hara alleeqota eho. Geeshsha Dunkaanen Go7etiya Miisheta (Kessa 39:32-43)
35.10: “Hinte giddon de7iya kushe hiillancho ubbay yidi, Goday kiitidaysa ubbaa ootho.
35.11: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya, iya gaatha kamaanne kare kamaa, kaqota, tuuqeta, liyoota, tuussatanne enti eqiya tohota;
35.12: Taabotiyanne iya tookiya kaso mithata, nagara atotetha kamaanne Taabotiya genthiya magarajuwa;
35.13: xarpheezaa, iya tookiya kaso mithatanne, iya miisheta ubbaanne Godaa sinthan wothiya geeshsha uythaa;
35.14: xompe wothiya kocaa, iya miisheta, xompiyanne xompe zaytiya;
35.15: ixaane cuyisiya xarpheezanne iya tookiya kasota, shuumatetha zaytiyanne sawiya ixaane, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge magarajuwa;
35.16: xuussa yarsho bessinne iya naase birata zarzariya, iya tookiya kasotanne iya miisheta ubbaa, naase biratape oosetida meecha keriyanne iya tohuwa;
35.17: dabaaba godaa gesheta, tuussatanne enta tohota, dabaaba penge magarajuwa,
35.18: Geeshsha Dunkaaniyanne dabaaba dunkaaniya tole dhishetanne enta wodorota;
35.19: Aaroninne iya nayti Geeshsha bessan haggaazishe ma7anaw alleeqetidi oosetida boncho ma7ota ootho” yaagis. Asay Ehida Imuwa
35.20: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asa ubbay Muse sinthafe keyidosona.
35.21: Asa ubbay ba wozanan immo immo gidaba Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas, iya giddon oosetiya ooso ubbaasinne boncho kahine ma7otas koshshiyaba ubbaa ehidosona.
35.22: Immanaw koyida macci adde ubbay worqa alleeqota, siidhe worqata, migidota, qoodhe worqa ehidi, Godaas imo oothidi immidosona.
35.23: Kaalose qacina, ocha teera daaniya qacina, zo7o qacina, al7o liino, woyko deesha ikise, woyko zo7o qalamen yeggi kessida dorsa ite woyko, lo77o do7a itey de7iya asi ubbay ehis.
35.24: Bira woyko naase birata immanaw danda7iya ubbay banta imota Godaas immidosona. Qassi soqala mithi de7iya asi ubbay dumma dumma oosuwas ehis.
35.25: Kushe hiilla maccasa ubbay banta kushen suqida kaalose qacina, ocha teera daaniya qacina, zo7o qacinanne al7o liino ehidosona.
35.26: Qassika imota immanaw koyida maccasa ubbay deesha itepe dooqetida wodoro ehidosona.
35.27: Halaqati efuudiyasinne tiran ma7etiya ma7uwas haniya margidenne hara lo77o shuchata,
35.28: qassika enti ixaanen, shuumatethasinne xompes maaddiya shamaho zayten yegetiya sawo ehidosona.
35.29: Isra7eele asa ubbay, oothana mela Goday Muse baggara kiitida oosuwas haniya imotata ubbaa banta dosan Godaas ehidosona. Kushe Hiillanchota
35.30: Musey Isra7eele asaako haysada yaagis; “Goday Yihuda sheeshape gidida Huura na7aa na7aa, Ure na7aa, Basili7eela dooris.
35.31: Goday iya ba Ayyaanan, hiillan, akeekaninne ooso ubbaa oothiya eran kunthis.
35.32: Hessika, hiillan oothana oosota halchidi worqafe, birapenne naase biratape dumma dummaba kessidi oothanaasa.
35.33: Hessadaka, al7o shuchu massidi giigiso, mithi masethinne hara ooso ubbaa oothana mela cincatethi immis.
35.34: Qassi iyasinne Daane sheeshi gidida Ahisamaaka na7aa Eliyaabas, banta hiilla harata tamaarsana mela eratethi immis
35.35: Enti dumma dumma ooso oothana mela ooso halcho kessana mela, kaalosen, ocha teera daaneysaninne zo7o suufe qacinan al7o liino alleeqisidi, daddiya hiillatethi immis. Goday enta, eratethan kunthis. Enti ubbay dumma dumma ooson luxida hiillancho gididosona.

36.1: “Hessa gisho, Basili7eeli, Eliyaabinne Geeshsha Dunkaaniya keexana mela Goday hiillanne eratethi immida asa ubbay, Goday kiitidaysada ubbaba oothana” yaagis. Imuwa Darotethaa
36.2: Musey Basili7eela, Eliyaaba, Goday dumma eratethi immidaysatanne ooso oothanaw koyiya ubbaa xeegidi, oosuwa doomana mela kiittis.
36.3: Enti, Isra7eele asay Geeshsha Dunkaaniya oothanaw ehida imo ubbaa Muse kushepe ekidosona. Qassi asay ba dosan immiya imota wonta wonta ehuwa aggibokona.
36.4: Yaatin, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya oothiya hiillanchoti banta oosuwa essidi, museko bidi,
36.5: “Asay, Goday kiitida oosuwas koshsheysafe aathidi eho bolla de7oosona” yaagidosona.
36.6: Musey, “Geeshsha Dunkaaniya keexanaw oonika immiyaba ehopo” yaagidi kiittin, asay eheysa aggaagidosona.
36.7: Enti ehida imotay ooso ubbaa oothi polanaw gididi palahees. Geeshsha Dunkaane Oosuwa (Kessa 26:1-37)
36.8: Oosuwa ootheysatape hiillan aadheysati Geeshsha Dunkaaniya oothidosona. Enti iya al7o liinope, kaalosen ocha teera daaneysaninne zo7o qacinan alleeqisidi daddida tammu gesheta giigisidi, iya bolla kiruubeta misiliya sikidosona.
36.9: Magarajoti ubbay issi gina gididi, adussatethay laatamanne oyddu wadha, gompay oyddu wadha.
36.10: Ichashu gesheta issife gathidi sikidosona; qassi hanko attida ichashu geshetaka hessada oothidosona.
36.11: Issife gathidi sikida geshetape issi magarajuwas wursetha gaxan kaalose afilape oosetida sagaayota medhidosona. Qassi issife gathidi sikida hanko geshetape issuwa gaxanka hessada oothidosona.
36.12: Enti issife siketida koyro magarajuwa bolla koyro maaran kaalose afilape oosetida ishatamu sagaayota, hessadaka nam7antho magarajuwa bolla wursetha maaran, hanko sagaayota ginan, ishatamu sagaayota oothidosona.
36.13: Enti nam7u baggan de7iya gesheta gasethidi issino oothanaw worqafe ishatamu oykiya bessata medhidosona.
36.14: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollara kammanaw tammanne issi gesheta deesha ikisepe daddidosona.
36.15: Tammanne issi gesheta adussatethaa laatamanne usupun wadha, gompaa oyddu wadha oothidi medhidosona.
36.16: Ichashu gesheta issi baggara, qassi usupun gesheta hanko baggara gathidi sikidosona.
36.17: Woli gathidi sikida geshetape wursetha magarajuwa macaran ishatamu sagaayota, qassi woli gathidi sikida hanko geshetape wursetha magarajuwa macaran ishatamu sagaayota medhidosona.
36.18: Nam7u baggara de7iya gesheta gasethidi issi kama oothanaw naase biratape ishatamu oykiya bessata medhidosona.
36.19: Dunkaaniya kammanaw zo7o qalamen yeggi kessida dorsa ite, qassi iya bollara kammanaw lo77o do7a ite giigisidosona.
36.20: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tuuqeta soqala mithafe kessidosona.
36.21: Issi issi tuuqiya adussatethay tammu wadha, gompay issi wadhanne takadho.
36.22: Issi tuuqiya issuwara gasethanaw nam7u luhoti de7oosona. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tuuqeta ubbaa hessada oothidosona.
36.23: Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas dugeha baggara laatamu tuuqeta medhidosona.
36.24: Issi issi tuuqetas nam7u toho medhidi, he tohota oythanaw oytamu luhota biratape giigisidosona.
36.25: Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas pudeha baggara laatamu tuuqeta medhidosona.
36.26: Issi issi tuuqetas nam7u toho medhidi, he tohota oythanaw oytamu luhota biratape giigisidosona.
36.27: Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas guye baggan, wuloha baggara usupun tuuqeta medhidosona.
36.28: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya guye baggan de7iya maazanetas nam7u tuuqeta giigisidosona.
36.29: He nam7u maazane tuuqeti xaphope xeera gakanaw oyketi bidosona. Nam7u maazaniyan de7iya nam7u tuuqeti hessada hanidi oosetidosona.
36.30: Hessa gisho, issi issi tuuqiyas garsan nam7u nam7u tohoti de7oosona. Hospun tuuqetas biratape oosetida tammanne usupun tohoti de7oosona.
36.31: Qassi enti soqala mithafe tammanne ichashu liyoota kessidosona. Ichashu liyooti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya issi bagga miyen,
36.32: qassi ichashu liyoota hanko bagga miyen, hessadaka ichashu liyoota guye baggara wuloha baggan wothidosona.
36.33: Tuuqetas miye baggara giddon de7iya liyoy, ha gaxape ya gaxa gakanaw kanthi keyana mela oothidosona.
36.34: Tuuqetanne liyoota worqan lanxidosona. Liyooti enta giddora kanthi aadhana mela worqa sagaayota tuuqetara oysethidosona.
36.35: Magarajuwa al7o liinope kaalosen, ocha teera daaneysaninne, zo7o qacinan alleeqisidi oothidosona. He magarajuwa bolla kiruube misileta sikidosona.
36.36: Magarajuwa kaqanaw oyddu tuussata soqala mithafe giigisidi, worqan lanxidosona. Yaatidi worqa sagaayota entas giigisidosona. Qassi tuussata essiya oyddu tohota bira biratape medhidosona.
36.37: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengiyas al7o liinope kaalosen, ocha teera daaneysafenne zo7o qacinan alleeqisid magarajo giigisidosona.
36.38: Qassi iyaw kocati de7iya ichashu tuussata medhidi, entaw xeeranne tohuwa worqan lanxidosona. Tuussatas naase biratappe oosetidi ichashu tohota giigisidosona.

37.1: Basili7eeli Taabotiya soqala mithafe giigisis. Taabotiya adussatethay nam7u wadhanne bagga, gompaynne geesay issi wadhanne bagga.
37.2: Taabotiya giigisidi, gaathaanne kariya walahi bayna worqan lanxis. Iya yuushuwa bollaka worqan lanxis.
37.3: Oyddu worqa sagaayota Taabotiyas oyddu gedata bolla, issi baggara nam7u sagaayota, qassi hanko baggara nam7u sagaayota aathis.
37.4: Yaatidi soqala mithafe oosetida kasota kessidi enta worqan lanxis.
37.5: Taabotiya tookanaw, Taabotiyas miyiyan de7iya sagaayotan kasota aathis.
37.6: Walahi bayna worqafe, adussatethay nam7u wadhanne bagga, gompay issi wadhanne bagga gidida nagara atotetha kamaa oothis.
37.7: Qefey de7iya nam7u kiruubeta qoxetida worqafe oothidi,
37.8: issi kiruubiya issi baggan, hanko kiruubiya hanko baggan wothidi, atotetha kamuwara issino oothidi medhis.
37.9: Kiruubeti banta qefiya miccidi, atotetha kamuwa kammidi, issoy issuwa xeelloosona. Daabbo Xarpheeza (Kessa 25:23-30)
37.10: Adussatethay nam7u wadha, gompay issi wadha, geesay issi wadhanne bagga gidida xarpheezaa soqala mithafe medhis.
37.11: Walahi bayna worqan iya lanxidi, yuushuwaka worqan lanxis.
37.12: Hessadaka, gompay takadho gidiya goosse oothidi, iya worqan yuushshi aathidi lanxis.
37.13: Taabotiya tookanaw maaddiya oyddu worqa sagaayota medhidi, oyddu gedata oyddu maazaneta bolla wothis.
37.14: Xarpheeza tookanaw kasota aathiya sagaayoti xarpheezaa goossa matan oosetidosona.
37.15: Xarpheezaa tookiya kaso mithata soqala mithafe kessidi, worqan lanxis.
37.16: Hessadaka, xarpheezaa bolla wothiya dumma dumma miisheta walahi bayna worqafe medhis. Hessatika saaneta, cilpata, kereta, woyne yarshsho tigiya xuu7ata. Xompe Wothiya Kocaa (Kessa 25:1-40)
37.17: Hessafe guye, Basili7eeli xompe wothiya kocaa walahi bayna worqafe oothis. Kocaa essiya tohuwanne tooma qoxetida worqafe giigisis. Alleeqos oosetiya, iya gambuthata, iya wallaxatanne iya ciishshata ubbaa iyara issife oythidi medhis.
37.18: Issi baggara heedzu tasheti, qassi hanko baggara heedzu tasheti de7iya usupun tasheta iya miyiyan medhis.
37.19: Usupun tashetas xeeran xeeran heedzu heedzu alleeqo gambuthatinne ciishshati de7iya lawuze mitha ciishshe daaniyaba medhis.
37.20: Xompe wothiya kocaa giddon de7iya tooma xeeran oyddu alleeqo gambuthatinne ciishshati de7iya lawuze mitha ciishshe daaniyaba medhis.
37.21: Waathan de7iya heedzu heedzu tashetape garsan issi issi gambuthi oosetis.
37.22: Gambuthati, tashetinne xompe wothiya kocay issino gididi, walahi bayna worqafe qoxetidi oosetidosona.
37.23: Xompe wothiya kocaas laapun xompeta, xompe toysiya qaphetanne enta wothiyabata walahi bayna worqafe oothis.
37.24: Xompe wothiya kocaanne iyaw go7etiya miishe ubbaa oothanaw hastamanne ichashu kilo giraame gidiya, walahi bayna worqa ongis. Ixaane xarpheeza (Kessa 30:1-5)
37.25: Basili7eeli ixaane cuyisiya xarpheeza soqala mithafe giigisis. Iyaw oyddu maazaney de7ees. He xarpheezas adussatethaynne gompay issi wadha; qassi geesay nam7u wadha. Oyddu maazaniyan de7iya kaceti iyara issino gidi oyketidi oosetidosona.
37.26: Iyaw bolla bagga, oyddu miyanne kaceta walahi bayna worqan lanxis, iya yuushuwaka worqan lanxidi yuushshi aathis.
37.27: Iyaw gaxa bolla tookanaw maaddiya nam7u worqa sagaayota medhidi, nam7u bagga miyiyan wothis. Enti ixaane xarpheezaa tookiya wode kaso mithata aathanaw maaddeyisata.
37.28: Kaso mithata soqala mithafe kessidi, worqan lanxis.
37.29: Geeshsha shuumatetha zaytiyanne sawiya lo77o ixaane shittoda walakidi oothis.

38.1: Soqala mithafe xuussa yarsho bessi oothis. He yarsho bessa adussatethaynne gompay, ichashu ichashu wadha, qassi geesay nam7u wadhanne takadho. Iyaw oyddu maazaney de7ees.
38.2: Oyddu maazanetara oyketidi oosetida kaceta medhis. Yaatidi, he yarsho bessa naase biratan lanxis.
38.3: He yarsho bessan go7etiya miisheta, disteta, baldeta, akaafata, ashuwa qaphiya qaphetanne tama cooceta ubbaa naase biratape medhis.
38.4: Naase biratape gite daaniya teqe yarsho bessaas giigisidi, yarsho bessaas giddo zawa yuushshi aathidi wothis.
38.5: Tookanaw maaddiya kasota aathanaw, oyddu sagaayota medhidi, oyddu maazaneta bolla wothis.
38.6: Soqala mithafe yarsho bessa tookiya kaso mithata kessidi, naase biratan lanxis.
38.7: Ha kasota nam7u miyen de7iya sagaayotan aathis. Yarsho bessaa xawulape giigisidi, gidduwa kaysi oothis. Meecha Kere
38.8: Naase biratape meecha kerenne iya wothiya toho medhis. He naase biratay, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen oothiya maccasati ehida mastootiyape eketis. Geeshsha Dunkaane Dabaaba
38.9: Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas dabaaba baggaa gechanaw al7o liinope magarajo oothis. Dugeha bagga geshetas adussatethay xeetu wadha.
38.10: Geshetas kate gidana mela laatamu tuussatanne enti eqiya tohota naase biratape oothis. Enta xam7atanne kaceta bira biratape oothis.
38.11: Pudeha bagga dabaabayka hessada hanidi oosetis.
38.12: Wuloha bagga gesheta adussatethay ishatamu wadha. Entaw tammu tuussatinne tuussati eqiya tammu tohoti de7oosona. Tuussatas bira biratape oosetida xam7atinne kaceti de7oosona.
38.13: Dabaaba geliya pengey de7iya, doloha bagga magarajuwa gompay ishatamu wadha.
38.14: Issi baggara de7iya magarajuwa adussatethay tammanne ichashu wadha. Iyaw heedzu tuussatinne tuussati eqiya tohoti de7oosona.
38.15: Hanko baggara de7iya magarajuwa adussatethay tammanne ichashu wadha. Iyaw heedzu tuussatinne tuussati eqiya tohoti de7oosona.
38.16: Dabaaba yuushuwan de7iya gesheti ubbay al7o liinope oosetidosona.
38.17: Tuussati eqiya tohoti naase biratape oosetidosona. Xam7ati, kacetinne tuussata xeera goossati bira biratape oosetidosona. Dabaaba yuushuwan de7iya tuussati ubbay bira xam7atan oyketidosona.
38.18: Dabaaba pengiyan de7iya magarajuwa al7o liinope oothidi, kaalosen ocha teera daaneysaninne zo7o qacinan daddidi alleeqisis. Iyaw hanko dabaaba geshetada adussatethay laatamu wadha; qassi geesay ichashu wadha.
38.19: Iya, oyddu tohoti de7iya oyddu tuussata bolla kaqis. Kaceti, xaara kammeysatinne xam7ati bira biratape oosetidosona.
38.20: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya dhishetinne iya yuushuwan de7iya gesheta dhisheti ubbay naase biratape oosetidosona. Geeshsha Dunkaanen Go7etiya Birata Miisheta
38.21: Tammu kiitata oykida nam7u loche shuchati de7iya bessan, Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan, go7etiya miisheta mazgabey haysa. He miisheta mazgabana mela kahiniya Aarona na7a Itamaara aawatetha garsan de7iya Leeweta Musey kiittis.
38.22: Yihuda sheeshape gidida Huura na7aa na7aa, Ure na7aa, Basili7eeli, Goday kiitidaysada ubbaba oothis.
38.23: Daane sheeshape gidida Ahisamaaka na7aa Eliyaabi, kushe hiillanchoy, oothiyabas koyro halcho kessiya asi; I, kaalose, ocha teera daaneysanne zo7o qacinan al7o liino daddidi alleeqisiya asi.
38.24: Geeshsha dunkaaniya oosuwas hanana mela Godaas imetida worqay geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen issi mukulu kilo giraame gidis.
38.25: Taybon de7iya asaape eketida biray geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen, heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetanne hastamu kilo giraame gidis.
38.26: Hessika, taybon gelida adde asay, issoy issoy geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaaniya liken koyetiya ubbaa immidosona. Laatamu laythinne iyape bolla gidida, mazgaben gelida, adde asaa tayboy usupun xeetanne heedzu mukulunne ichashu xeetanne ishatama.
38.27: Geeshsha Dunkaaniyanne magarajota essanaw maaddiya xeetu tohota oothanaw 3,400 kilo giraame bira birata ekidosona. Hessika, issi issi tohoy hastamanne oyddu kilo giraame bira birata ekis.
38.28: Basili7eeli, attida hastamu kilo giraame bira biratan xam7ata, kacetanne tuussatas xeera goossata oothis.
38.29: Asay Godaas immida naase biratay 2,425 kilo giraame.
38.30: He naase biratan Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengiya essiya tohota, gite daaniyabara naase birata yarsho bessaanne iya giddon go7etiya dumma dumma miisheta medhis.
38.31: Qassi dabaaba yuushuwan de7iya dirsaa tohotinne pengiya bolla eqida tohoti, Geeshsha Dunkaaneynne iya yuushuwan de7iya dabaaba dirsaa dhisheti ubbay he naase biratape oosetidosona.

39.1: Kahineti Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothiya wode ma7ana boncho ma7ota, kaalosen, ocha teera daaniya qacinapenne zo7o qacinan daddidosona. Aaroni ma7iya kahinetetha ma7uwa Goday Muse kiitidaysada oothidosona.
39.2: Qassi efuudiya, worqafe, kaalosepe, ocha teera daaniya qacinape, zo7o qacinapenne al7o liinope daddidosona.
39.3: Enti worqaa qoxidi, lee7isidi, iya qaraaridi, qacinada kessidosona. Yaatidi kaalosen, ocha teera daaneysan, zo7o qacinaninne al7o liinon alleeqisidi daddidosona.
39.4: Enti nam7u hashiyara wodhidi, nam7u bagga woli gathidi oysethanaw maaddiya qangota efuudiyas oothidosona.
39.5: Goday Muse kiitidaysada, hiillanchoy alleeqisida dancoyka efuudey oosetidaysatape oosetidi, worqan, kaalosen, ocha teera daaneysan, zo7o qacinaninne al7o liinon dadetis.
39.6: Enti margide geetetiya shuchata giigisidi, worqafe oosetida kaquwa bolla wothidosona. Maatame bolla woocidi xaafeysada, he shuchata bolla Isra7eele nayta sunthaa woocidi xaafidosona.
