20.12: Issi asi ba na7aa machiw xaalliko, enti nam7ay hayqo. Enti tunabaa oothidosona; enta suuthaa acoy enta bolla gido.
20.13: “Issi addey maccasara gaheteysada addera gahetiko, enti nam7ay ixetidaba oothida gisho hayqo. Enta suuthaa acoy enta bolla gido.
20.14: Issi asi na7iwunne aayiw macho ekiko, hessi tunabaa. Hinte giddon tunatethi doonna mela inne enti taman xuugeto.
20.15: “Issi asi mehera gahetiko, I hayqo; he miiziw wodhite.
20.16: Issi maccasi mehera gahetiko he maccasiyanne he mehey nam7ay hayqo; enta suuthaa acoy enta bolla gido.
20.17: “Issi asi ba aawa na7iw woyko ba aaye na7iw macho ekiko, hessi tunabaa. Enti banta asaa giddofe shaaketidi hayqo. I ba michiw kawushida gisho, ba nagaran baw oysheto.
20.18: Issi asi kushe metora de7iya maccasara aqiko, I qetha qaarida gisho, enti nam7ay banta asaa giddofe kuretto.
20.19: “Ne aaye michiw woyko ne aawa michiw xaallofa; hessa oothey ba mata dabbotetha kawushshees. Enti nam7ay banta nagaran oysheto.
20.20: Issi asi ba aawa ishaa machiw xaalliko, I ba aawa ishaa kawushis. Enti banta nagaran bantaw oysheto; enti nam7ay na7a yelonna hayqana.
20.21: Issi asi ba ishaa machiw ekiko, hessi tuna. I ba ishaa kawushis; enti nam7ay yelo dhayana.
20.22: “Hinte daana mela ta hintena gelsiya biittay hintena cuttonna mela hinte ta higgiyanne ta kiitaa naagite.
20.23: Taani hinte sinthafe dhaysiya asaa de7uwa wogaa kaallopite. Enti hessa ubbaa oothida gisho, ta enta ixas.
20.24: Hinte enta biitta laatana; maathinne eessi goggey biitta hintew immana. Taani hintena hara asaape dummayada kessida, Godaa hinte Xoossaa.
20.25: “Hessa gisho, hinte tunanne tuna gidonna mehetanne kafota shaakidi erite. Taani hessati hintew tuna gada wothida meheta, kafotanne biittan qaaxiyabata ubban hintena tunisopite.
20.26: Taani Goday geeshshi gidiya gishonne hinte tabaa gidana mela hintena hara asaape dummayida gisho, hinteka taw geeshshi gidite.
20.27: “Addey woyko macci moytillera haasayiko woyko marotiko, enti hayqanaw bessees. Enti shuchan cadetidi hayqo; enta suuthaa acoy enta bolla gido.”

21.1: Goday Museko, “Kahine gidida Aarona adde naytas haysada yaagada oda. Hintefe oonika
21.2: ba mata dabbo, ba aaye, ba aawa, ba adde na7aa, ba macca na7e, ba ishaa,
21.3: woyko azina gelonna, iya son de7iya ba miche aha gidonna ixiko, hayqida asa aha bochidi bana tunisopo.
21.4: Ekoninne gelon dabbotida asa aha bochidi bana tunisopo.
21.5: “Kahineti kayos banta huuphiyanne banta buuchaa meedopo; woyko banta asatethaa gaaropo.
21.6: Enti Godaas xuussa yarshonne katha yarsho shiishiya kahineta gidiya gisho banta Xoossaas geeshshi gido; banta Xoossaa sunthaa tunisopo. Hessa gisho, enti geeshshi gidanaw bessees.
21.7: “Kahineti banta Xoossaas geeshshi gidiya gisho, kahineti layma maccasi, geela7o gidonna maccasi woyko azini yeddida maccasi ekofo.
21.8: Kahineti hinte Xoossaas katha yarsho yarsheyisata gidiya gisho, hinte enta geeshshi oothidi ekite. Hintena geeshshiya Goday, taani, geeshshi gidiya gisho, enti geeshshi gido.
21.9: Kahiniya na7iya laymatada bana tunisiko, iya ba aawa kawushasu; iya taman xuugetada hayqo.
21.10: “Kahine halaqay, iya huuphen tiyo zaytey gukidaysinne kahinetetha ma7uwa ma7anaw dummatidaysi, ba huuphiyape xaatha qacciya denthofo; ba ma7uwa daakofo.
21.11: Ahi de7iya soo gelopo; hari attoshin ba aawa woyko ba aaye aha gidikoka, hessa bochidi bana tunisopo.
21.12: Iya dummayanaw tiyida Xoossaa zaytey iya bolla de7iya gisho, kahiney Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape keyopo; Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tunisopo. Taani Godaa.
21.13: “I ekiya machiya geela7o gido.
21.14: Azini hayqida maccasi woyko azini yeddida maccasi woyko layma maccasi macho ekofo. Shin ba asaa giddofe geela7o macca na7a dooridi macho eko.
21.15: Hessi hanonna ixiko, ba asaa giddon ba nayta tuna oothees. Taani iya geeshsheysa, iya Godaa.”
21.16: Goday Museko haysada yaagis.
21.17: “Neeni Aaronas haysada yaagada oda; ne kochaafe asatethan borey de7iya oonika katha yarsho taw yarshanaw bessenna.
21.18: Asatethan borey de7iya asi, hessika qooqe woyko wobbe woyko som7oy iitida asi woyko laqoy de7iya asi,
21.19: woyko tohoy woyko kushey silida asi,
21.20: woyko kuuna asi woyko daro qantha asi woyko ayfe mulca asi woyko puusoy oykida asi woyko iralley de7iya asi woyko shuufa asi taw katha yarsho yarshanaw bessenna.
21.21: Kahiniya Aarona kochaafe asatethan borey de7iya asi oonika Godaas xuussa yarshonne katha yarsho shiishanaw yarsho bessa yaanaw bessenna.
21.22: I geeshsha kathaanne Ubbaafe geeshshi gidida ba Xoossaa kathaa maanaw danda7ees.
21.23: Shin iya asatethan borey de7iya asi gidiya gisho, I ta Dunkaaniya tunisonna mela magarajuwako woyko yarsho bessaako shiiqopo. Entana geeshshiya Goday tana.”
21.24: Musey hessa ubbaa Aaronas, iya adde naytasinne Isra7eele asa ubbaas odis.

22.1: Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
22.2: Ta geeshsha sunthaa enti tunisonna mela, Isra7eele asay taw dummayida imotata Aaroninne iya adde nayti bonchon ekidi, geeshshatethan naagana mela entaw oda. Taani Godaa.
22.3: Entako haysada yaaga; “Yaana yeletetha ubban hinte kochaafe oonika tunidi de7ishe, Isra7eele asay Godaas dummayida geeshsha yarshuwako shiiqiko, he uray ta sinthan bentofo. Taani Godaa.
22.4: “Aarona kochaafe goga hargey de7iya, woyko asatethafe goggiyabay de7iya oonika geeyana gakanaw geeshsha yarshuwa moopo. Aha bochidi tunidaba woyko iya atunthay gukida uraa bochiya oonika tuna.
22.5: Qassi sa7ara gooshetiya tunisiyabata, woyko aybibanka tuna gididaba bochiya oonika,
22.6: woyko hessa melaba bochiya oonika, omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees. I ba asatethaa haathan meecetonna de7ishe, geeshsha yarshuwafe maanaw koshshenna.
22.7: Awi wulliya wode I geeshshi gidees. Hessafe guye, he geeshsha yarshuwafe bana gakiya gishuwa mo.
22.8: Hayqidaba woyko do7i wodhida mehe asho moopo; hessi tunisiyaba. Taani Godaa.
22.9: “Kahineti ta wogaa naago; enti iya naagonna ixidi banta balan hayqana. Enta geeshshiya Goday tana.
22.10: “He geeshsha yarshuwa kahiniya soo asaape attishin, hara asi moopo. Kahiniya soo yida imathe gidin, qaxaretidi oothiya ase gidin moopo.
22.11: Shin kahiney ba biran shammida aylley woyko iya son yeletida aylley he kathaa mo.
22.12: Kahine gidonna asi gelida kahiniya na7iya he geeshsha yarshuwafe moopo.
22.13: Shin I azinay hayqiko woyko iyo yeddiko qassi iw na7i bayna ixiko, iya kase ba geela7otethan de7idaysada simmada ba aawa son de7iko, iya ba aawa gakeysafe mo. Shin hara asi oonika hessafe moopo.
22.14: “Issi asi eronna de7ishe geeshsha yarshuwafe miiko, he I mida kathaa gatiya bolla xeetaape laatamu kushe gujidi kahiniyas immo.
22.15: Isra7eele asay Godaas yarshiya geeshsha yarshuwa kahineti tunisopo.
22.16: Enti banta ehida geeshsha yarshuwa bantaw midi nagaran oyshetana mela oothofo. Enta geeshshiya Goday tana.” Eketonna Yarshota
22.17: Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
22.18: “Aaronas, iya adde naytasinne Isra7eele asa ubbaas haysada yaagada oda; Isra7eele asi gidin woyko enta giddon de7iya bete asi gidin, oonika Godaas xuussa yarsho ba dosan immey woyko ba qangetha gathey,
22.19: he yarshoy eketana mela borey bayna wofaano, woyko maraze woyko kole eho.
22.20: Borey de7iya ay meheyka eketonna gisho hessa shiishopite.
22.21: “Issi asi ba qangetha gathanaw issifetetha yarsho Godaas yarshiya wode woyko ba mehiyape dosan imota Godaas shiishiya wode hessi eketana mela he mehey borey baynaba gido.
22.22: Hinte mehiyape qooqe woyko meqo woyko wobbe woyko giyiya madunthi woyko puusoy woyko shattoy de7iyaba Godaas yarshofite. Taman xuussa yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan Godaas shiishopite.
22.23: Iya bolla laqoy medheti woyko bolla paci de7iya korma woyko dorse issi asi ba dosan immiya yarsho shiishanaw danda7ees; shin qangetha gasos gidiko hessi eketenna.
22.24: Sanga woyko madunxidaba Godaas yarshofite. Hinte biittan hessa melaba oothopite.
22.25: Hinte giddon de7iya allaga asatape ekida hessa mela mehiya hinte Xoossaas katha yarsho oothidi shiishopite. Enta bolla borey de7iya gisho hinte gisho eketokona.”
22.27: “Boora na7i woyko marazey woyko koley yeletiya wode laapun gallas ba aayera gam7o. Hospuntha gallasape doomidi, Godaas xuussa yarsho oothidi shiishanaw danda7etees.
22.28: Miizi woyko dorse I maraara issi gallas shukofite.
22.29: “Hinte galata yarsho Godaas shiishiya wode hinte yarshoy eketana mela yarshite.
22.30: Yarshoy yarshetida gallas meetetidi wuranaw koshshees; iyape wontos ashshofite. Taani Godaa.
22.32: Ta geeshsha sunthaa tunisopite. Ta geeshshi gideysi Isra7eele asaa giddon eretanaw bessees. Hintena geeshshiya Goday tana.
22.33: Hinte Xoosse gidanaw hintena Gibxe biittafe kessiday tana. Taani Godaa.”

23.1: Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
23.2: Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; Geeshsha shiiqo yaagidi awaajishe, hinte bonchanaw bessiya eretida Godaa ba7aaleti haysata.
23.3: Hinte usupun gallas ooso ootheeta, shin laapuntha gallasay hinte shempiya Sambaata gallas. He gallas geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite; ay oosoka oothopite; hinte de7iya bessa ubban hessi Godaas Sambaata. Paasika Ba7aalenne Uytha Ba7aale (Taybo 28:16-25)
23.4: Enta woden woden geeshsha shiiqo oothidi hinte bonchanaw bessiya eretida Godaa ba7aaleti haysata;
23.5: Koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallas sa7i omarsiya wode Godaa Paasikay doomees.
23.6: He ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasan Godaas Uytha Ba7aale gallasay doomees. Hessa gisho, laapun gallasatan irshoy geliboonna uythi miite.
23.7: He gallasatape koyro gallas geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite; ooso oothopite.
23.8: Laapun gallas ubbaa Godaas xuussa yarsho yarshite; laapuntha gallasan geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite; ooso oothopite. Bayra Kathi
23.10: Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; taani hintew immiya biitta gelidi hinte kathi cakiya wode, he kathaa koyro mirqiya kahiniyas ehite.
23.11: Goday hintebaa ekana mela Sambaata kaalliya wontetha gallas kahiney he mirqiya Godaa sinthan dhoqu oothidi yuushsho.
23.12: Hinte mirqiya yuushshida he gallas borey bayna issi laytha maraze xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas shiishite.
23.13: He yarshuwara issife shamaho zaytera munuqetida nam7u kilo giraame lo77o dhiille katha yarsho oothidi shiishite. Hessi Godaas sawo tonku giya xussa yarsho gidana; iyara issife issi litiro gidiya woyne ushshi shiishite.
23.14: Ha yarshuwa hinte, hinte Xoossaas shiishiya gallasay gakanaw, wacha kathaafe qaye woyko caaca woyko uukidi moopite. Hessi hinte de7iya bessa ubban yaana yeletethaas merinaa woga gido. Katha Shiisho Ba7aale (Taybo 28:26-31)
23.15: Hinte yuusho yarsho mirqiya ehida Sambaata wontetha gallasaape doomidi, laapun saaminta taybite.
23.16: Laapuntha Sambaata kaalliya wontetha gallasay gakanaw ishatamu gallas taybite; wacha kathaafe yarsho Godaas shiishite.
23.17: Hinte de7iya bessaafe nam7u kilo giraame gidiya lo77o dhiilliyan irsho yeggidi uukida nam7u uythi yuusho yarshos ekidi yiite. Hessi wacha kathaafe Godaas shiiqiya yarsho gidees.
23.18: He uythaara issife borey bayna issi laythi gidida laapun dorsa urgeta, issi wofaanonne nam7u marazeta shiishite. Enta katha yarshoranne ushsha yarshora issife Godaas xuugetiya sawo tonku giya yarsho oothidi yarshite.
23.19: Qassi issi kole nagara yarshos, issi laythi gidida nam7u dorsa urgeta issifetetha yarshos shiishite.
23.20: Kahiney bayra kathaa, uythaanne nam7u dorsa urgeta yuusho yarsho oothidi, Godaa sinthan dhoqu oothidi yuushsho. Hessati Godaas geeshshi; kahinetas qassi gisho.
23.21: He gallas hintew geeshsha shiiqo gidana mela awaajite; ooso oothopite. Haysi hinte de7iya bessa ubban yaana yeletethaas merinaa woga gido.
23.22: Hinte biittan kaxida kathaa cakiya wode gadiya gaxaa gakanaw cakofite; cakishin attida poshiliya qoropite; hessa manqotasinne bete asaas aggaagite. Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa. Moyze Puno Ba7aale (Taybo 29:1-6)
23.24: Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; laapuntha ageenan koyro gallasaa shempo gallas oothidi bonchite; hassayiso moyze punnishe geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite.
23.25: He gallas Godaas xuussa yarsho shiishitepe attishin, ooso oothopite. Nagara Atotetha Gallasaa (Taybo 29:7-11)
23.27: Laapuntha ageenan tammantho gallasay nagara atotetha gallas; he gallas geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite. He gallas hintena kawushite; Godaas xuussa yarsho shiishite.
23.28: He gallasay Godaa hinte Xoossaa sinthan hinte nagaray qushetana mela hinte nagaraa atotetha gallas gidiya gisho he gallasan ooso oothopite.
23.29: He gallas banatetha kawushonna asi oonika ba asaa giddofe kuretto.
23.30: He gallas ooso oothiya uraa oonaka taani iya asaa giddofe kurana.
23.31: He gallas ooso oothopite. Haysi hinte de7iya bessa ubban yaana yeletethaas merinaa woga gido.
23.32: Hessi hintew dummatida shempo gallas; he gallas hintenatethaa kawushite. He ageenan uddufuntho gallas omarsafe doomidi, tammantha gallas omarsi gakanaw hinte Sambaata bonchite. Shaqara Ba7aale (Taybo 29:12-40)
23.34: Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; laapuntha ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasaape doomidi, laapun gallas gakanaw Godaas Shaqara Ba7aale.
23.35: He gallasatape koyro gallasan geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite; ooso oothopite.
23.36: Laapun gallas ubban Godaas xuussa yarsho shiishite; hospuntho gallasan geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite. Godaas xuussa katha yarsho shiishite. He gallasay baaliya wursetha gallas gidiya gisho, ooso oothopite.
23.37: Xuussa yarsho, katha yarsho, hara yarshotanne ushsha yarsho koshshiya woden Godaas shiishanaw geeshsha shiiqo oothidi awaajana Godaa ba7aaleti haysata.
23.38: Ha yarshoti Godaa Sambaatatape, Godaas immiya imotatape, qangetha imotatapenne dosan immiya imotatape dumma.
23.39: Hinte gaden kaxida kathaa shiishidaape guye, tammanne ichashantho gallasaape doomidi laapun gallas gakanaw Godaa ba7aale bonchite. Koyro gallasaynne hospuntho gallasay hintew dumma shempo gallas gidana.
23.40: Koyro gallas lo77o mitha ayfe, zamba tashe, cil7o mitha haythenne shaafa gaxan dicciya mitha haythi ekidi, Godaa hinte Xoossaa sinthan ufaytishe laapun gallas ba7aale bonchite.
23.41: He baaliya laythan laythan laapuntha ageenan laapun gallas Godaa bonchite. Hessi yaana yeletethaas merinaa woga gido.
23.42: He laapun gallasaa shaqaran de7ite; Isra7eele asi gidida ubbay he shaqaran de7o.
23.43: Taani hintena Gibxe biittafe kessida wode shaqaran daana mela oothidaysa yaana yeletethay erana. Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa.
23.44: Hessada oothidi, Musey Godaa ba7aaleta bonchiya wogaa Isra7eele asaas odis.

24.1: Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
24.2: Xompey to7onna eexishe daana mela iyaw koshshiya gum7idi xillisida shamaho zayte new ehana mela Isra7eele asaa kiitta.
24.3: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon de7iya markatetha magarajuwafe kare baggara omarsafe wonta gakanaw Aaroni Godaa sinthan he xompiya ubba wode eetho. Yaana yeletetha ubbaas hessi merinaa woga gido.
24.4: Xompe wothiya walahi bayna worqa kocaa bolla de7iya xompeti Godaa sinthan ubba wode eexana mela Aaroni naago.
24.5: Tammanne nam7u kilo giraame gidiya lo77o dhiille ekada tammanne nam7u uythi uuka.
24.6: He uythata usupuna usupuna nam7u maaran Godaa sinthan de7iya walahi bayna worqa xarpheeza bolla wotha.
24.7: Godaas xuugetanaw shiiqida katha yarsho gideysa erisanaw, nam7u maarata miyen geeshsha ixaane wotha.
24.8: Ha uythaa Sambaatan Sambaatan ubba wode Aaroni Isra7eele asaa gisho merinaa caaqo oothidi Godaa sinthan wotho.
24.9: Hessi Aaronanne iya adde nayta gakiya gisho; enti iya geeshsha bessan mo. Hessi Godaas xuussa yarshuwafe wogaada Aaronanne iya nayta gakiya gisho gidiya gisho Ubbaafe Geeshshi. Suure Pirda
24.10: Ba aayen Isra7eele, ba aawan Gibxe asi gidida issi uray de7ees. Issi gallas I hara Isra7eele asara heeran wadhetis.
24.11: Ba aayen Isra7eele gidida uray Godaa sunthaa cayis; yaatin iya asay Museko ehidosona. He uraa aayiya Daane koche gidida Debira na7a. I sunthay Salomito.
24.12: He uraa waataneko Godaa sheney qoncana gakanaw iya naagisidosona.
24.14: He cayida uraa gutaape gaxa kessa. I cayishin si7ida asa ubbay banta kushiya iya huuphiya bolla wotho; Isra7eele maabara ubbay iya shucha caddidi wodho.
24.15: Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; issi asi ba Xoossaa cayiko, I ba nagaran oyshetana.
24.16: Godaa sunthaa cayiya asi hayqo; Isra7eele maabara ubbay iya shuchan caddo. Bete asi woyko gade asi Godaa sunthaa cayiko hayqo.
24.18: Asa mehe wodhida asi oonika ba wodhida mehiya gisho paxa mehiya qanxo.
24.19: Issi asi ba shooruwa qohiko, I oothidaysada iya bolla ooseto.
24.20: Menthiko me77o; ayfe gisho ayfe; acha gisho ache. Asa bolla qoho gathida oonika I gathida qohuwada iya bolla gako.
24.21: Mehe wodhida asi he mehiya gatiya qanxo; shin ase wodhida asi hayqo.
24.22: Bete asaasinne Isra7eele asas higgey issino gido. Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa.
24.23: Musey hessa Isra7eele asaas odis; enti he cayida uraa gutaape gaxa kessidi, shuchan caddidi wodhidosona. Yaatidi Isra7eele asay Goday Muse kiitidaysada oothidosona.

25.1: Siina zuma bolla Goday Museko haysada yaagis.
25.2: Neeni Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; taani hintew immiya biitta hinte geliya wode biittiya ba huuphen Godaa Sambaata boncho.
25.3: Usupun laythi kumethi hinte gaden zerite; usupun laythi kumethi hinte woyne xeera xunqite; iya ayfiya maxite.
25.4: Shin laapuntha laythay biittas shempo Sambaata; hessi Godaa Sambaata. He laapuntha laythan gaden zeropite; hinte woyne xeeraa xunqofite.
25.5: Hinte biittan aasebo kaxidaba shiishopite; woyne xeera xunqofite; ayfiya maxopite. He laythay biittas kumethi shempo laythi gido.
25.6: He Sambaata laythan biittay oosetonna de7ishin kaxiya kathaa neeni, ne adde aylley, ne macca aylley, ne son une oothey, guutha wodes de7iya bete asi maanaw danda7ees.
25.7: Hessadaka, ne mehiyasinne ne biittan de7iya do7atas gidiya kathi demmana; biittan kaxiyaba ubbay meeteto. Ishatammantho Laythi
25.8: Laythatas giddon de7iya laapun Sambaatata tayba; laapun Sambaatatas laytha tayboy laapun toho laapuna; hessika oytamanne uddufun laythi.
25.9: Laapuntha ageenan, tammantho gallas bonchetiya nagara atotetha gallasan moyze punniya asi biitta ubbaa kiitta.
25.10: Ishatammantho laytha dummayidi, he biittan de7iya ubbaas la77atethi awaajite. Hessi hintew Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale. He wode hinte ubbay hinte gadiyakonne hinte soo asaako simmite.
25.11: He laythay hintew Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale. He laythan zeropite; aasebo kaxidaba cakofite; xeera xunqonna ayfida woyne ayfiya maxopite.
25.12: Hessi Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale gidiya gisho I hintew geeshshi; goyonna coo denban kaxidaba miite.
25.13: He Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale wode asi ubbay ba gade simmo.
25.14: Hinte, hinte shooruwape gade shammiko woyko iyaw bayziko issoy issuwa cimmofite.
25.15: Hinte Ishatammantho Laytha Baaliyape guye de7iya laythata taybuwan hinte shooruwape shammite. Hinte shooroy gadey kathi immanaw de7iya laythata taybuwada bayzo.
25.16: Laytha tayboy daro gidiko gatey darees; laythata tayboy guuxiko gatey guuxees. Gadiya lo77otethaada hinte shooroy hintew bayzees.
25.17: Hinte issoy issuwa cimmofite; shin hinte, hinte Xoossaa yayyite. Taani Godaa, hinte Xoossaa.
25.18: Hinte ha biittan saro daana mela ta kiitta polite; ta higgiya naagite.
25.19: Biittay ba ayfiya hintew immin hinte kallana gakanaw maana; he biittan hinte saro daana.
25.20: Heko, nuuni zeronna aggidi, qassi kathi shiishonna aggidi, laapuntha laythan ay maanee? giiko,
25.21: taani usupuntho laythan ta anjuwa hintew kiittana; biittay heedzu laythas gidiya kathi immana.
25.22: Hospuntha laythan hinte, hinte biittan zeriya wode shaacha kathaa maana. Hinte zeriya kathaa uddufuntho laythan shiishana gakanaw shaacha kathaa maana. Shalo Zaaro Woga
25.23: Biittay tabaa gidiya gishonne hinte he biittan imathenne bete gididi de7iya gisho biitta simmonnaada oothidi bayzopite.
25.24: Hinte oykida gadiya godati, wozana maatay Isra7eele ubban naagetanaw bessees.
25.25: Issi Isra7eele asi manqidi ba gadiyape bayziko, iya mata dabboy he gadiya iyaw wozo.
25.26: Iyaw he gadiya woziya dabboy dhayiko, I wonto duretidi woziya miishe demmiko zaaridi wozanaw danda7ees.
25.27: Ba bayzida wodepe doomidi de7iya laytha taybidi, attida laytha miishiya shammidaysas zaaro; yaatidi I ba gadiya simmo.
25.28: Shin iyaw he gadiya wozanaw gidiya miishey dhayiko, Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw gadey shammida uraa kushen gam7o. Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale wode iya gadey iyaw simmo.
25.29: Issi asi gimbetida katama giddon de7iya keethe bayziko, I bayzida wodiyape bidi issi laythi kumana gakanaw zaaridi wozanaw danda7ees.
25.30: Shin issi laytha giddon wozanaw danda7etonna ixiko, he gimbetida katamaa giddon de7iya keethay shammida uraasinne iya kochaas gidees. Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale wode simmenna.
25.31: Shin gimbetiboona heeran de7iya keethati gade mela wozetoosona. Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale wode bayzidaysas simmoosona.
25.32: Gidoshin, Leeweti katamatan de7iya banta keethaa banta koyida wode wozanaw danda7oosona.
25.33: Leewetape issi asi enta katamaa giddon de7iya keethaa bayzidi wozanaw xoonetiko, he enta katamaa giddon de7iya keethay Ishatammantho Laytha Baaliya wode simmees. Leeweta katamaa giddon de7iya keethay Isra7eele asaa giddon Leewetasa.
25.34: Shin enta katamaa yuushuwan de7iya hentha biittay entaw merinaa aqo gidiya gisho bayzetenna. Tal7e Woga
25.35: Issi Isra7eele asi manqidi bana aysanaw xoonetiko, imathada woyko bete asada I neera daana mela maadda.
25.36: Iya neera wothanaw iyape yelo ekofa woyko wodhe moopa. Shin ne Xoossaa yayya.
25.37: Ne bira iyaw yelora tal7ofa; ne kathaa iyaw wodhera bayzopa.
25.38: Hintew Kanaane biitta immanawunne hinte Xoossaa gidanaw, hintena Gibxe biittafe kessida, taani, Godaa hinte Xoossaa.
25.39: Issi Isra7eele asi manqidi, bana new aylle oothidi bayziko iya aylleda oosisopa.
25.40: I bete asada une oothidi Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw neera de7o.
25.41: He wode I ba naytara issife ne soope keyidi ba soo asaako boo; ba aawa gade simmo.
25.42: Isra7eele asay taani Gibxe biittafe kessida ta aylle gidiya gisho enti aylletethas bayzetofo.
25.43: Neeni enta un7ethada haaropa; shin neeni, ne Xoossaa yayya.
25.44: New addenne macca aylley daana mela koyiko, ne yuushuwan de7iya kawotethatape shamma.
25.45: Hinte biittan de7iya bete asaa nayta shammanaw danda7eeta. Hinte biittan de7ishe yeletida enta soo asaape hintew shalo oothanaw danda7eeta.
25.46: Hintefe guye, hinte nayti enta merinaw laattana mela hinte naytas immite. Hinte enta ubba wode hinte aylle oothanaw danda7eeta; shin Isra7eele asi un7ethidi haaropite.
25.47: Ne matan de7iya imathi woyko bete asi duretiko, iya matan de7iya Isra7eele uray manqidi, ne matan de7iya imathas woyko bete uraas woyko imatha addiya kochaafe issuwas bana bayziko,
25.48: I bayzetidi simmin, iya wozanaw danda7etees; iya dabbotape issoy iya wozo.
25.49: Iya aawa ishay, woyko iya aawa ishaa na7ay woyko iya yaraape mata dabboy iya wozo; woyko I ba huuphen duretidi bana wozo.
25.50: I bana shammida uraara gididi, I bana bayzida laythafe doomidi Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw de7iya laythata taybo. Iya la77atetha gatey, he laytha taybuwa keena gido. I bana shammidaysara gam7ida wodiya gatey issi asi une oothidi demmiya miishiyara gina gido.
25.51: Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw daro laythi attidaba gidiko, ba bayzetida gatiyape he laytha taybon bana woziya gatiya qanxo.
25.52: Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw attida laythay guutha gidiko, bana shammidaysara issife taybidi, he laytha taybon bana woziya gatiya qanxo.
25.53: I laythan laythan une oothiya asada bana shammidaysara de7o; iya goday iya un7ethidi haaranaw bessenna.
25.54: Shin I hessa mela hanon wozetonna ixiko, Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakiya wode inne iya nayti aylletethafe keyo.
25.55: Isra7eele asay, ta Gibxe biittafe kessida ta aylle. Taani, Godaa hinte Xoossaa.

26.1: Goyinnanaw eeqata oothopite; qassi hawulte woyko eeqa tuussu woyko shucha eeqa essofite. Taani Godaa, hinte Xoossaa.
26.2: Ta Sambaatata naagite; ta goyinno bessaa bonchite. Taani Godaa.
26.3: Hinte ta higgiya kaallikonne ta kiita naagiko,
26.4: taani hintew ira woden woden immana; biittay kathaa darsidi dolisana; gaden de7iya mithay ayfana.
26.5: Hinte kathaa shiishidi ongonna de7ishin woyne maxiya wodey gakana; woyniya maxidi wursonna kathaa zeriya wodey gakana. Hinte kallana gakanaw kathi maana; hinte, hinte biittan saro daana.
26.6: Taani biittas sarotethi immana; oonika hintena yashisonna hinte zin7ana. Iita do7ata taani biittafe dhaysana; hinte biittan nam7antho oli dendenna.
26.7: Hinte morketa hinte yedethana; enti hinte sinthan mashshan hayqana.
26.8: Hintefe ichashay xeeta yedethana; qassi xeetay tammu mukula yedethana. Hinte morketi hinte sinthan mashshan hayqana.
26.9: Taani hintena maarota ayfen be7ana; hintena ayfisana; hintena darsana; taani ta caaquwa hintera minthana.
26.10: Hinte shaacha kathaa midi wursonna de7ishe, wacha kathaa wothanaw, shaacha kathaa diggidi besse giigisana.
26.11: Taani ta de7iya bessaa hinte giddon oothana; taani hintena ixike.
26.12: Taani hinte giddon hemetana; hinte Xoossaa gidana; hinte ta ase gidana.
26.13: Hinte Gibxetas aylle gidonna mela he biittafe hintena kessida Goday, taani hinte Xoossaa. Taani hinte aylletetha qambara menthas; hinte dhoqu gidi hemetana mela oothas. Kiitetetha Ixoy Ehiya Seera
26.14: Shin hinte taana si7onna ixikonne, ta kiita polonna ixiko,
26.15: ta wogaa kadhiko, ta kiita ubbaa polonna ixidi ta caaquwa menthanaw ta higgiya boriko,
26.16: he wode taani hinte bolla haysa oothana; hinte akeekona de7ishin yashshi, gilqatethi, hinte ayfiya teljumisiyanne hinte asatethaa melisiya misha harge hinte bolla yeddana. Hinte morketi maana gisho hinte zeriya zerethay mela gidana.
26.17: Ta hintena iita ayfen xeellana; hinte morketa sinthan hinte kundana; hintena ixeysati haarana; oonika yedethonna hinte baqatana.
26.18: Hessa ubbaa oothinka hinte tana si7onna ixiko, taani hinte nagaraa gisho hinte seera laapun dako oothana.
26.19: Ta hinte otoruwa menthana; saluwa birata; sa7aa naase birata oothana.
26.20: Hinte biittay kathi, hinte mithay ayfe immonna gisho hinte wolqay coo bessan wurana.
26.21: Hinte taw ixas giikonne tana si7onna ixiko, hinte nagara mela laapun dako gado taani hinte bolla ehana.
26.22: Taani hinte bolla bazzo do7ata yeddana; enti hinte nayta bonqana. Hinte meheta dhaysana; hinte taybuwa guuthana; hessa gaason hinte hemetiya ogey husatana.
26.23: He seera ubban hinte taako simmonna ixiko,
26.24: he wode taka hintew ixas gaana. Hinte nagaraa gisho taani ta huuphen hintena laapun dako seerana.
26.25: Ta caaquwa hinte menthida gisho, kushe zaaranaw mashsha hinte bolla ehana. Hinte, hinte katamatan shiiqikoka, taani hinte bolla gado yeddana. Hinte, hinte morketa kushen aadhidi imetana.
26.26: Hinte kathaa taani dhaysiya wode tammu maccasati issi beshen uythu uukana; he uythaa mizaanen shaakidi ekana; hinte hessa maana shin kalleketa.
26.27: Ha ubban hinte tana si7onna ixikonne hinte iitatethan gujidi biiko,
26.28: ta hinte bolla hanqon dendana. Hinte nagaraa gisho taani hintena laapun dako seerana.
26.29: Hinte, hinte adde naytanne hinte macca nayta ashuwa maana.
26.30: Taani, hinte dhoqa goyinno bessata dhaysana; hinte ixaane yarshiya bessaa laallana. Taani hinte aha hinte eeqata aha bolla holana; taani hintena polo ixana.
26.31: Taani hinte katamata baysa oothana; hinte goyinno bessata dhaysana; hinte sawiya yarshuwa singike.
26.32: Taani hinte biitta dhaysana; he biittan de7iya morketi hessan malaaletana.
26.33: Taani hintena kawotethata giddon laallana; hinte bolla ta mashshaa shoddana. Hinte biittay baysatana; hinte katamati laaletana.
26.34: Hinte morketa biittan de7iya wode, baysa giigidi de7iya hinte biittay ba Sambaata bonchana. He wode hinte biittay shempananne ba Sambaata bonchishe ufaytana.
26.35: Hinte he biittan de7iya wode Sambaatatan demmiboonna shempuwa ha77i baysa gidida wode demmana.
26.36: Hinte di7etidi biya wode guye attida asata wozanan yashshi yeddana; carkoy qaathiya bonco girsay enta daganthana; enti mashshafe baqatiya mela baqatana; enta oonika yedethonna kundana.
26.37: Oonika yedethonna olape baqatiyada baqatishe, issoy issuwara dhubetidi kundana. Hinte, hinte morketa sinthan eqanaw hintew wolqi dhayana.
26.38: Kawotethata giddon hinte dhayana; hinte morketa biittan hinte mitetidi dhayana.
26.39: Morketa biittan attidaysati banta nagaraa gishonne banta aawata nagaraa gisho gilqidi dhayana.
26.40: Shin enti banta nagaraanne ta bolla makallidi si7onna ixida banta aawata nagaraa paaxiko,
26.41: ta enta ixanaadanne enta morketa biitta yedethannaada oothida banta nagaraa aggikonne enta kiitetonna wozanay simmiko,
26.42: Taani Yayqoobara, Yisaaqaranne Abrahaamera caaqida caaquwa hassayana; enta biitta zaara qopana.
26.43: Enta biittay baysa attana; he enti dhayin baysa gididi de7ida woden biittay Sambaata bonchishe ufaytana. Enti ta kiitaa kadhida gishonne ta wogaa leqida gisho banta nagaraa seera ekana.
26.44: Gidoshin, enti banta morketa biittan de7ida wode kumethi dhayana gakanaw entara de7iya ta caaquwa menthike; enta yeggike. Taani, Godaa enta Xoossaa.
26.45: Taani enta Xoossaa gidanaw, kawotethati xeellishin, Gibxe biittafe kessida enta mayzatara taani caaqida caaquwa enta gisho hassayana. Taani Godaa.
26.46: Goday Siina zuma bolla Muse baggara baapenne Isra7eele asaape giddon wothida wogati kiitatinne higgeti haysata.

27.2: Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; issi asi Godaas ase immanaw qangiko, wozo gatiya ne gammatidaysa mela he uraa gisho miishe qanxo.
27.3: Laatamu laythafe bidi usupun tammu laythi gakanaw de7iya adde gidiko geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen usupun xeetu bira santime qanxo.
27.4: Macca gidiko hastamu bira santime qanxo.
27.5: Ichashu laythafe bidi laatamu laythi gakanaw de7iya adde gidiko laatamu bira santime qanxo; qassi maccas gidiko tammu bira santime qanxo.
27.6: Issi ageenape bidi ichashu laythi gakanaw de7iya adde gidiko ichashu bira santime qanxo; qassi maccas gidiko heedzu bira santime qanxo.
27.7: Laythi usupun tammanne iyape bolla gidida adde gidiko, tammanne ichashu bira santime; qassi maccas gidiko tammu bira santime qanxo.
27.8: Qangida uray neeni gammatidaysa qanxanaw danda7onna manqo gidiko, I ba qangetha gathanaw immida uraa ehidi kahiniya sinthan esso; qangetida uray qanxanaw danda7eysa keena qopidi kahiney gammato.
27.9: Issi asi Godaas yarsho oothidi immanaw qangiday mehe gidiko Godaas imetiya mehe ubbay geeshshi gidees.
27.10: He mehiya gisho hara mehe immofo; woyko iya hara mehera laammofo. Lo77uwa iitaara woyko iitaa lo77uwara laammofo; shin I laammiko, koyro meheynne laame immida mehey nam7ayka geeshshi gido.
27.11: Issi asi Godaas yarsho oothidi immanaw gepida mehey geeshshi gidonna ixiko, he uray he mehiya kahiniya sinthe eho.
27.12: Lo77o gidin, iita gidin kahiney he mehiya gammato; kahiney gammatidaysi iyaw gate gido.
27.13: Shin he mehiya goday zaaridi wozanaw koyiko, he mehiya gatiya bolla xeetape laatamu kushe gujo.
27.14: Issi asi ba keethaa geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayiko, lo77o gidin, iita gidin kahiney he keethaa gammato; kahiney gammatidaysi iyaw gate gido.
27.15: Ba keethaa geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayida uray zaaridi wozanaw koyiko, he keethaa gatiya bolla xeetape laatamu kushe gujo; simmidi keethay iyabaa gidees.
27.16: Issi asi ba laata gadiyape shaakidi geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayiko, he gadiya gatey iyan zeretiya zerethan gammateto. Hessika nam7u xeetanne laatamu kilo giraame banga zeriya gade gidiko, ishatamu saqile qanxo.
27.17: I ba gadiya Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aalepe doomidi geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayiko, he gadiya kumetha gatiya qanxo.
27.18: Shin I ba gadiya Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley aadhin, geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayiko, kaallidi de7iya Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw de7iya laythata kahiney taybidi, iya kumetha gatiyape wodho.
27.19: He gadiya geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayida uray zaaridi wozanaw koyiko, gammatetida gatiya bolla xeetape laatamu kushe gujo; simmidi gadey iyabaa gidees.
27.20: Shin I gadiya zaaridi wozanaape sinthe hara asas bayziko, he gadiya wozanaw danda7enna.
27.21: Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakin gadey yedetiya wode he gadey nam7antho guye simmonna Godaas geeshshi gido; he gadey kahinetaba gidees.
27.22: Issi asi hara asape shammida gadiya geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayanaw koyiko,
27.23: kaalliya Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw de7iya gatiya kahiney gammatiko, uray he gallas gammatida gatiya qanxo; He miishey Godaas dummatida miishe gidana.
27.24: Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakiya wode he gadey koyro laatan ekidi bayzida uraas simmees.
27.25: Enta gatey geeshsha dunkaaniyan eretida mizaanen gammatetees. (Issi saqiley laatamu Geera gidees).
27.26: Shin oonika bayra yeletida mehe Godaas dummayidi shiishanaw danda7enna; I kaseka Godaaba. Miizi woyko dorse gidin Godaaba.
27.27: He mehey geeshshi gidonna ixiko, I gammatetida gatiya bolla ichashape issi kushe gujidi iya goday zaaridi wozo. I wozonna ixiko, gammatetida gatiyan hara asas bayzeto.
27.28: Issi asi Godaas dummayidi immidabay ayba gidikoka, ase woyko mehe woyko iya laata gade gidin, bayzetenanne wozetenna. I dummayidaba ubbay Godaas Ubbaafe geeshshi.
27.29: Asaa giddofe hayqana mela pirdetida asi oonika wozetofo; he uray hayqo.
27.30: Gaden kaxida kathi woyko mitha ayfe gidin tammaafe issoy Godaaba. Hessi Godaas geeshshi.
27.31: Issi asi ba asraata wozanaw koyiko, iya gatiya bolla xeetape laatamu kushe gujidi wozo.
27.32: Miiza asraata woyko dorsa asraata woyko deesha asraata gidin, henthanchuwa xam7afe garsara aadhiya tammaafe issoy Godaas geeshshi.
27.33: Tammantho mehey iita gidin, lo77o gidin dooropo; woyko iya haraara laammofo. Laammiko, koyroynne laame immida nam7ay Godaas geeshshi gidoosona; zaaridi wozanaw danda7etenna.
27.34: Siina zuma bolla Goday Muse baggara Isra7eele asaa kiitida kiitay haysa.

1.1: Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida nam7antho laythan, nam7antho ageenan, he ageena koyro gallasan, Goday Siina mela biittan Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan Museko haysada yaagis;
1.2: “Neeranne Aaronara Isra7eele asa ubbaa enta kochan kochan, qassi enta soo asan asan taybadi, adde asaa sunthaa xaafite.
1.3: Laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida, oletanaw danda7iya Isra7eele asa ubbaa taybite.
1.4: Kochape kochape issi issi asi ba soo asaas halaqa gididi hintena maaddo.
1.5: Hintena maaddana asaa sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Robeelape, Shade7ura na7aa Elixura;
1.6: Simoonape Sursadaya na7a Salumi7eela;
1.7: Yihudape Amnadaabe na7aa Na7asoona;
1.8: Yisakoorape Zu7ara na7aa Natina7eela;
1.9: Zabloonape Heloona na7aa Eli7aaba;
1.10: Yoosefa naytape, Efreemape Amhuda na7aa Elishama7a; Minaasepe Padazuura na7aa Gamali7eela;
1.11: Biniyaamepe Gadiyoona na7aa Abdaana;
1.12: Daanape Amsadaya na7aa Aki7ezera;
1.13: Aseerape Okraana na7aa Pagi7eela;
1.14: Gaadape Ragu7eela na7aa Elyaasafa;
1.15: Niftaalemepe Enaana na7a Akira;
1.16: Ha asay banta aawata keethaa asaape kaalethanaw dooretida Isra7eele yarata halaqata” yaagis.
1.17: Yaatin Museynne Aaroni he dooretida asata ekidi,
1.18: nam7antho ageenan koyro gallasan kumetha maabara xeegidi shiishidosona. Asay banta kochan kochan, qassi banta soo asan asan laatamu laythinne iyape bolla gidida adde ubbay xaafetis.
1.19: Goday iya Kiittidaysada Musey enta Siina mela biittan taybis.
1.20: -21 Oletanaw danda7iya adde ubbay, laatamu laythinne iyape bolla gidida adde ubbay taybetidi huuphen huuphen xaafetidosona. Enti banta kochan kochaaninne banta soo asan shaaketidi haysafe kaallidi de7iya taybo maaran mazgabetidosona. Bayra na7aa Robeelape 46,500
1.21: 22-23 Simoonape 59,300
1.23: 26-27 Yihudape 74,600
1.24: 28-29 Yisakoorape 54,400
1.25: 30-31 Zabloonape 57,400
1.26: 32-33 Yoosefa na7aa Efreemape 40,500
1.44: Musey, Aaroninne banta soo asaape asaape dooretida tammanne nam7u Isra7eele kochaa halaqati taybida asay haysata.
1.45: Oletanaw danda7iya adde ubbay, laatamu laythinne iyape bolla gidida asay banta soo asan asan taybetidosona.
1.48: Gaasoyka kase Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
1.49: “Leewe kochata taybopa; enta attida Isra7eele asaa taybon gelsofa.
1.50: Leeweta, Geeshsha Dunkaaniyaninne iyan de7iya miisheta ubbaa bolla halaqa oothada shuuma. Enti Dunkaaniyanne iyan de7iya miisheta tookana; iya giddon oothananne iya yuushon dunkaanana.
1.51: Geeshsha Dunkaaney shodetiya wode Leeweti shoddo; Geeshsha Dunkaaney eqiya wode Leeweti esso; entafe hari oonika iyako shiiqiko hayqo.
1.52: Hanko Isra7eele asay banta heeraninne banta cugan cugan shaaketidi, banta dunkaaniya dunkaanona.
1.53: Shin Godaa hanqoy Isra7eele maabara bolla wodhonna mela Leeweti Dunkaaniya yuushuwan banta dunkaaniya dunkaanidi naago” yaagis.
1.54: Isra7eele asay Goday Muse kiitida ubbaa oothidosona.

2.1: Goday Musenne Aarona haysada yaagis;
2.2: Isra7eele asay banta kochan kochan mallanne banta kocha kocha erisiya bandira kaallidi, Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape guuthi haakidi iya yuushuwan dunkaanona.
2.3: Doloha baggara Yihuda kochay banta malla kaallidi dunkaanona. Yihuda kochaa kaalethey Amnadaabe na7aa Na7asoona.
2.4: Iya cugaa tayboy 74,600.
2.5: Yihuda gakidi dunkaananay Yisakoore kochaa. Yisakoora kochaa kaalethey Zu7ara na7aa Natina7eela.
2.6: Iya cugaa tayboy 54,400.
2.7: Iyape kaallidi Zabloona kochay dunkaanees. Zabloona kochaa kaalethey Heloona na7aa Eli7aaba.
2.8: Iya cugaa tayboy 57,400
2.9: Yihuda baggan dunkaanida olanchota tayboy 186,400. Isra7eele asay gutaa yeddidi biya wode koyroti keyey enta.
2.10: Dugeha baggara Robeela kochay banta malla kaallidi dunkaanona. Enta kaalethey Sadiyoora na7aa Elisuura.
2.11: Iya cugaa tayboy 46,500.
2.12: Robeela gakidi dunkaaney Simoona kochaa. Simoona kochaa kaalethey Zurishadaya na7a Salumi7eela.
2.13: Iya cuga tayboy 59,300.
2.14: Iyape kaallidi Gaade kochay dunkaanees. Enta kaalethey De7u7eela na7aa Eliyasaafa.
2.15: Enta cugaa tayboy 45,650.
2.16: Robeela, baggan dunkaanida olanchota tayboy 151,450. Isra7eele asay gutaa yeddidi biya wode nam7antho keyey enta.
2.17: Hessafe guye, koyro keyiya Yihuda cugaapenne nam7antho keyiya Robeela cugaape giddon Geeshsha dunkaaniya tookidi Leeweti geloosona. Issi issi kochay banta dunkaanida maaran banta malla oykidi keyo.
2.18: Wuloha baggara Efreema baggay banta malla kaallidi dunkaanona. Entana kaalethey Amhuda na7aa Elishama7a.
2.19: Enta cugaa tayboy 40,500.
2.20: Enta gakidi Minaase kochay dunkaanees. Entana kaalethey Padazuura na7aa Gamali7eela.
2.21: Enta olanchota tayboy 32,200.
2.22: Iyape kaallidi dunkaaney Biniyaame kochaa. Biniyaame kochaa kaalethey Gidi7oona na7aa Abdaana.
2.23: Enta cugaa tayboy 35,400.
2.24: Efreema baggan dunkaanida olanchota tayboy 108,100. Isra7eele asay gutaa yeddidi biya wode heedzantho keyey enta.
2.25: Pudeha baggara Daane kochay banta malla kaallidi dunkaanona. Entana kaalethey Amsadaya na7aa Aki7ezera.
2.26: Enta cugaa tayboy 62,700.
2.27: Entana gakidi Aseera kochay dunkaanees. Aseera kochaa kaalethey Okraana na7aa Pagi7eela.
2.29: Iyape kaallidi Niftaaleme kochay dunkaanees. Niftaaleme kochaa kaalethey Enaana na7aa Akira.
2.31: Daane baggan dunkaanida olanchota tayboy 157,600. Isra7eele asay gutaa yeddidi biya wode wursethan keyey enta.
2.32: Banta kochan kochan shaaketidi taybetida Isra7eele olanchota tayboy 603,550.
2.33: Shin Goday Muse kiitidaysada, Leeweti hara Isra7eele asaara taybetibookona.
2.34: Isra7eele asay, Goday Muse Kiittidaba ubbaa oothidosona. Enti banta mala kaallidi dunkaanidosona; qassi banta kochaanne banta soo asaa asaa kaallidi keyoosona.

3.1: Goday Siina zuma bolla Musera odetiya wode de7iya Aaronanne Muse soo asay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa.
3.2: Aarona adde nayta sunthay, bayray Nadaaba, kaalley Abyooda, Alaazaranne Itamaara.
3.3: He Aarona adde nayti ubbay, kahine gididi oothanaw tiyetidi shuumetidosona.
3.4: Shin enta giddofe Naadabeynne Abyoodi Siina mela biittan Godaa sinthan geeshshi gidonna taman yarsho yarshidi hayqidosona. Entaw na7i baawa. Hessa gisho, enta aaway Aaroni paxa de7ida laytha ubban Alaazarinne Itamaara xalaali kahine gididi oothidosona. Leeweta Ooso
3.5: Goday Museko,
3.6: “Leewe kochata ehada kahiniya Aarona maaddana mela enta iya sinthe shiisha.
3.7: Enti Aaronanne Isra7eele maabara ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthan dumma dumma ooso oothidi maaddo.
3.8: Enti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon de7iya miishe ubbaa aawatethan ayso. Isra7eele asaa gisho Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon ooso ubbaa enti oothonna.
3.9: Aaronanne iya adde nayta maadana mela Leeweta shuuma. Enti Isra7eele asaa giddofe shaaketidi Aarona maaddana mela imetidosona.
3.10: Aaronanne iya adde nayta kahine oothada shuuma. Entafe hara asi oonika Geeshsha dunkaaniyako shiiqiko hayqo” yaagis.
3.11: Qassi Goday Museko,
3.12: “Taani Isra7eelen yeletiya bayra adde nayta gisho Leeweta ekas. Leeweti tabaa.
3.13: Ayis giiko, bayra yeletida ubbay tabaa. Ta Gibxe biittan bayra yeletida ubbaa wodhida gallasan, Isra7eelen bayra yeletidaba ubbaa ase gidin, mehe gidin, taw dummayas. Enti tabaa gidana. Taani Godaa” yaagis. Leeweta Taybuwa
3.14: Qassika Goday Museko Siina mela biittan,
3.15: “Leeweta enta kochan, qassi enta soo asan asan tayba. Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida adde nayta ubbaa tayba” yaagis.
3.16: Yaatin Goday kiitidaysada Musey enta taybis.
3.17: Leewe adde nayti Gedisoona, Qahatanne Maraara.
3.18: Gedisoona adde nayti Libinanne Same7a geetetoosona.
3.19: Qahaata adde nayti Amraama, Yizihaara, Kebroonanne Uzi7eela.
3.20: Meraara adde nayti Mahilanne Musa geetetoosona. Leeweta mayzati haysata.
3.21: Nam7u Gedisoona kochati Libinanne Sim7a.
3.22: Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida adde nayta tayboy 7,500.
3.23: Gedisoona kochati Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape guyen wuloha baggan dunkaanidosona.
3.24: Gedisoona kochaa soo asaa halaqay La7eela na7aa Eliyasaafa.
3.25: Gedisoona kochaas Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla de7iya aawatethay, Dunkaaniya, gaatha kamaa, kare kamaa, wula magarajuwa,
3.26: Dunkaaniya yuushon de7iya dabaaba magarajuwa, yarsho bessa magarajuwa, dabaaba wula magarajuwa, wodorotanne iyan go7etiya miisheta ubbaa aawatethan aysoosona.
3.27: Qahaata kochati Amraama, Yizihaara, Kebroonanne Uzi7eela.
3.28: Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida adde nayta tayboy 8,600. Qahaata kochati Geeshsha Dunkaaniya aawatethan naagoosona.
3.29: Qahaata kochati Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape dugeha baggara dunkaanidosona.
3.30: Qahaata kochaa kaalethey Uzi7eela na7aa Elzafaana.
3.31: Enti Taabotiya, xarpheeza, xompe wothiya kocaa, yarshsho bessaa, kahineti go7etiya Geeshsha Dunkaaniya miisheta, Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa geliya wula bolla de7iya magarajuwa aawatethan ayso.
3.32: Leeweta halaqay kahiniya Aarona na7aa Alaazara. I Geeshsha Bessan ootheysatas shuuma.
3.34: Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida adde nayta tayboy 6,200.
3.35: Meraara kochaa kaalethey Abikaala na7aa Zur7eela. Meraara kochay Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape pudeha baggara dunkaanidosona.
3.36: Meraara kochay Dunkaaniya tuuqeta, liyoota, tuussatanne tuussati eqiya gedata, hessadaka giddon koshshiya miisheta ubbaa enti aawatethan aysoosona.
3.37: Gujidika, Dunkaaniya yuushon de7iya dabaaba tuussatanne enta gedata, dhishetanne wodorota aawatethan aysoosona.
3.38: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthan doloha baggara Musey, Aaroninne iya adde nayti dunkaanidosona. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon Isra7eela asaa gisho oosetiya ooso ubbaa enti aawatethan aysoosona. Hara asi Geeshsha Dunkaaniyako shiiqiko hayqo.
3.39: Goday, Musenne Aarona Kiittidaysa mela issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida Leeweta adde nayta tayboy 22,000. Bayra Adde Nayta Wozo
3.40: Goday Museko, “Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida Isra7eele bayra adde nayta taybada enta suntha xaafa.
3.41: Isra7eele bayra adde nayta bessan Leeweta, qassi Isra7eele bayra mehiya bessan Leeweta bayra mehiya taw eka. Taani Godaa” yaagis.
3.42: Goday Muse kiitidaysada Isra7eelen bayra yeletida ubbaa taybis.
3.43: Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida bayra adde nayta tayboy 22,273.
3.45: “Isra7eele bayra adde nayta bessan Leeweta taw dummaya. Qassi Isra7eele bayra meheta bessan Leeweta bayra mehiya taw dummaya; taani Godaa.
3.46: Isra7eele bayra adde nayta tayboy Leeweta bayra adde nayta taybuwape 273 aadhiya gisho he attidaysata taw woza.
3.47: Issuwas issuwas geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen ichashu bira santimen woza.
3.48: He wozo miishiya Aaronasinne iya adde naytas imma” yaagis.
3.50: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya mizaaniya liken Isra7eele bayra adde nayta wozo miishiya 1,365 bira santime ekis.
3.51: Goday kiitidaysada Musey wozo miishiya Aaronasinne iya adde naytas immis.

4.1: Goday Musenne Aarona haysada yaagis;
4.2: “Leewe kochatape Qahaata kochatanne enta soo asaa asaa shaakada tayba.
4.3: Laythi 30-50 gakida adde ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothanaw danda7eyisata tayba.
4.4: Qahaata kochati Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothana oosoy Dunkaaniyan go7etiya geeshsha miisheta aawatethan naago.
4.5: “Asay gutaape baanaw dendiya wode Aaroninne iya adde nayti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddo gelidi, Caaqo Taabotiya sinthan de7iya magarajuwa wodhisidi he Caaqo Taabotiya iyara xaaxo.
4.6: He kamaa bolla liiqo galba kammo; iya bolla gujidi kaalose carqe kammo; tookiya kasota sagaayotan aatho.
4.7: “Godaas shiiqiya uytha wothiya xarpheezaa bolla kaalose carqe kammo. Xarpheeza bolla saaneta, cilpata, xuu7atanne woyne ushsha yarshuwa duuqiya otota wothona. Uythay ubba wode xarpheeza bolla de7o.
4.8: He ubbaa bolla zo7o carqe kammidi iya bolla qassi liiqo galba kammo; hessafe kaallidi tookiya kasota sagaayotan aatho.
4.9: “Kaalose carqe ekidi xompe wothiya kocaa, iya xompetara, iya qaphetara, bido kessiya keretaranne zayte tigiya xaarotara ubbaa kammo.
4.10: Yaatidi iya miisheta ubbaa liiqo galban kammidi tookiya arsa bolla wothona.
4.11: “Kaallidi worqa yarsho saaxiniya kaalose carqen kammo; qassi iya bollara liiqo galba yeggo. Yaatidi tookiya kasota sagaayotan aatho.
4.12: Hessadaka, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon go7etiya miisheta ubbaa kaalose carqen xaaxo; iya bolla liiqo galba yeggidi, tookiya alga bolla wotho.
4.13: “Naase yarsho bessaafe biduwa pitidi iya bolla ocha teera daaniya carqe kammo.
4.14: Yarsho bessan go7etiya miisheta ubbaa; tama cooceta, asho qapheta, akaafatanne haatha kereta iya bolla wothidi, liiqo galba kammo. Yaatidi tookiya kasota sagaayotan aatho.
4.15: Aaroninne iya adde nayti, geeshshabatanne iyan go7etiya geeshsha miisheta ubbaa kammidaape guye Isra7eele asay gutaape dendiya wode Qahaata kochay yidi tooko. Shin enti hayqonna mela geeshsha miisheta bochofo. Geeshsha Dunkaaney bessaafe dendiya wode qahaata kochaas de7iya aawatethay haysa.
4.16: “Kahiniya Aarona na7ay Alaazari xompe zaytiya, sawiya ixaaniya, yarsho kathaanne tiyo zaytiya, hessadaka Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan de7iya dumma dumma geeshsha miisheta ubbaa bolla aawatethi de7ees” yaagis.
4.17: Goday Musekonne Aaronako,
4.18: “Qahaata kochay Leewe kochaa giddofe hayqidi dhayana mela oothopite.
4.19: Ubbaafe Geeshsha miishiyako shiiqidi hayqonna mela Aaroninne iya adde nayti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddo gelidi, Qohaata kochay huuphen huuphen oothana oosuwanne tookana toohuwa shaakidi besso.
4.20: Qahaata kochay hayqonnaada geeshsha miisheta be7anaw guutha wodeska Dunkaaniya giddo gelopo” yaagis. Gedisoona Kochaas Imetida Ooso
4.21: Goday Museko,
4.22: “Leewe kochaafe Gedisoona kochaanne enta soo asaa asaa shaakada tayba.
4.23: Laythi 30-50 gakida adde ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata tayba.
4.24: Gedisoona kochati oothana oosoy haysafe kaallidi de7eysa;
4.25: enti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya gaatha kamaa, kare kamaa, bollara yegetiya liiqo do7a galba, geliya wula bolla kaqetiya magarajuwa tooko.
4.26: Hessadaka Geeshsha Dunkaaniyanne yarsho bessa yuushuwan de7iya dabaaba magarajota, dabaaba geliya wula bolla de7iya gesheta, wodorotanne iyaw go7etiya miisheta ubbaa tooko. Gedisoona kochay miishetan oothanaw bessiya ooso ubbaa ootho.
4.27: Tooho gidin, hara ooso gidin, enti oothiya ooso ubbaa Aaroninne iya adde nayti enta kaalli oosiso. Enti tookanaw bessiyabata ubbaa ne aawatethan entaw gisha.
4.28: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon Gedisoona kochay oothana oosoy haysa. Enta oosuwa kahiniya Aarona na7ay Itamaari kaallidi oosiso. Maraara Kochaas Imetida Ooso
4.29: “Leewe kochaafe Meraara kochaanne enta soo asaa asaa shaakada tayba.
4.30: Laythi 30-50 gakida adde ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata tayba.
4.31: “Enti Dunkaaniya tuuqeta, liyoota, tuussata, Dunkaaniya gedata,
4.32: Dunkaaniya yuushon dabaaban eqiya tuussata, he tuussata gedata, dhisheta, wodorotanne iyan koshshiya miisheta ubbaa tooko. Issoy issoy tookanaw bessiya miishiya iya sunthan shaakada gisha.
4.33: Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon Meraara kochay oothana oosoy haysa. Enti oothana ooso ubbaa kahiniya Aarona na7aa Itamaari aawatethan kaallidi oosiso” yaagis. Leewe Kocha Taybuwa
4.34: Musey, Aaroninne Isra7eele halaqati Qahaata kocha enta soo asan asan shaakidi taybidosona.
4.35: Laythi 30-50 gakida adde ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata taybidosona.
4.37: Goday Muse kiitidaysada Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothana mela Museynne Aaroni taybida Qahaata kochati haysata.
4.38: Gedisoona kochati banta soo asan asan shaaketidi taybetidosona.
4.39: Laythi 30-50 gakida addeti ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata
4.41: Goday Muse kiitidaysada Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothana mela Museynne Aaroni taybida Gedisoona kochati haysata.
4.42: Meraara kochati banta soo asan asan shaaketidi taybetidosona.
4.43: Laythi 30-50 gakida addeti ubbay, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata
4.45: Goday Muse kiitidaysada Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothana mela Museynne Aaroni taybida Meraara kochati haysata.
4.46: Musey, Aaroninne Isra7eele halaqati Leeweta ubbaa enta kochaaninne enta soo asan asan shaakidi tayba.
4.47: Laythi 30-50 gakida addeti ubbay, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanawnune miisheta tookanaw danda7iya,
4.49: Goday Muse kiitidaysada, enti huuphen huuphen taybetidosona. Hessadaka Goday Muse kiitidaysada enti oothana oosoynne tookana toohoy imetis.

5.1: Goday Museko,
5.2: “Isra7eele asay baro hargen oyketida asi woyko asatethafe goggiyabay de7iya asi woyko aha bochidi tunida asi oonaka banta gutaape kessana mela kiita.
5.3: Ta enta giddon de7iya gutaa tunisonna mela ha geeshshi gidonna asati macca gidin adde enta giddofe kessada goodda” yaagis.
5.4: Goday Muse kiitidaysada Isra7eele asay enta ubbaa gutaape kessidi gooddidosona. Naaqo Aca
5.5: Goday Museko,
5.6: “Neeni Isra7eele asaas haysa oda; adde gidin woyko macci gidin oonika Godaas ammanetona ixidi hara asi naaqiko he uray bala oothis.
5.7: I ba nagara paaxo; ba nagara acciya kumetha aca bolla xeetape laatamu kushe gujidi I naaqida uraas ciggo.
5.8: Shin he naaqetida uray hayqidaba gidiko, aca ekanaw mata dabboy iyaw dhayko, he acay Godaas gididi kahiniyas imeto. He aca bolla gujidi iya nagara atotethas qoho yarshos gidiya maraze dorsi immo.
5.9: Qassi Isra7eele asay Godaas immiya geeshsha imo ubbay he kahiniyas gido.
5.10: Issi issi asi immiya geeshsha imotay he uraaba, shin kahiniyas immiko he imotay kahiniyasa” yaagis. Azini Sidhiya Machiw
5.11: Goday Museko,
5.12: “Isra7eele asaas yaagada oda; issi addiya machiya kare hemetada iyaw ammanetona ixiko,
5.13: hara addera aqiko, qassi hessa iya ba azinaape qosiko, iya laymatishin be7ida marki baynaba gidiko,
5.14: I azinay iyo tunasu gidi sidhiko, woyko iya tunonna de7ishin I ba machiw sidhiko,
5.15: he addey ba machiw kahiniyako efo. I gisho yarshanaw issi kilo giraame banga dhiille efo. He addey ba machiw sidhida gisho, I qohuwa qoncisiya katha yarsho gidiya gisho, dhiilliya bolla zayte tigopo; ixaane iya bolla wothofo.”
5.16: Kahiney he maccasiw Godaa sinthan esso.
5.17: Geeshsha haathi keren eko. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya wuygiyape biitta ekidi he haathan gujo.
5.18: He maccasiw Godaa sinthan esso; he maccase huuphiya billidi sidhida gisho yarshetiya qohuwa qoncisiya katha yarsho I kushen wotho; qassi kahiney ba kushen baadethi ehiya camo haatha keren oyko.
5.19: Hessafe guye, maccasiw yaagidi caaqiso; “Neeni hara addera aqabonaba gidiko, nenatethaa tunisaboonaba gidiko, baadethi ehiya haathay new gome gidopo.
5.20: Shin neeni ne azina aggada hara addera aqada tunidaba gidiko,
5.21: Goday ne yelo keetha gundisidi, ne uluwa gabbisidi ne asaa sinthan nena baadetidaba ootho.
5.22: Ha baadethi ehiya haathay ne uluwan gelidi ne uluwa gabbiso; ne yelo keethaa gundiso” yaagidi caaqiso. Maccasiya, “Amin7i, hessi tana gako” yaago.
5.23: “Haysafe guye, kahiney he baadetha xaafo; he xaafidaysa keriyan de7iya haathan meecco.
5.24: Qangethi ehiya haatha maccasiw ushshanaape sinthe,
5.25: kahiney maccase kushepe yarsho dhiilliya ekidi, dentho yarsho oothidi Godaas yarsho.
5.26: Kahiney yarsho kathaafe zolle ekidi bala qoncisiya yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan xuuggo. Hessafe guye, maccasiw he haatha ushsho.
5.27: Iya ba azinaas ammanetona ixada tunidaba gidiko baadetha haathay I uluwan camo saho medho. I uloy gabbana; I yelo keethayka gundana; iya ba asaa giddon baadetidaaro gidana.
5.28: Iya tunaboonabanne xillo maccas gidiko, iya geeshshi gidana; na7a yelanaw danda7awusu.
5.29: -30 “Issi asi ba machiw laymatasu gidi sidhiko woyko qaanatiko yarsho bessi ehidi iyo esso. Kahiney he wogaa ubbaa I bolla polo.
5.31: Azinay, qohoy baynaba gidana, shin macciya ba nagaraa gaason gakiya waaye ubbaa tookana” yaagis.

6.1: Goday Museko,
6.2: “Isra7eele asaa haysada gada kiita; adde gidin woyko macca bana Godaas dummayidi Naazirawe gidanaw qangiko,
6.3: woyne woyko hara mathoyiya ushshi uyopo. Caalabanne mathoyaba uyopo; woyne teera, tiyanne mela moopo.
6.4: I bana Godaas dummayida wode ubban, woyne ayfiya gidin poquwa gidin woyko kochaa gidin moopo.
6.5: “I bana Godaas dummayida wode ubban, ba huuphiya meedetofo woyko qanxetofo. I ba huuphe binaana adussidi dicho. I bana Godaas dummayida wodey poletana gakanaw geeshshi gidanaw koshshees.
6.6: I bana Godaas dummayida woden ubban ahako shiiqopo.
6.7: I bana dummayidaysa erisey iya huuphiya gidiya gisho, iya aaway woyko iya aayiya woyko iya ishay woyko iya michiya hayqiko enta aha bochidi bana tunisopo.
6.8: I bana Godaas dummayida wode ubban Godaas geeshshi.
6.9: “Asi iya matan qoponna hayqiko, Godaas geeshshi gidida ba huuphiya tunisiko laapun gallas gam7idi ba huuphiya meedeto.
6.10: Hospuntha gallasan nam7u holleta woyko nam7u kuraachota Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen de7iya kahiniyas eho.
6.11: Naazirawey aha bochidi tunida gisho nagarape iya geeshshanaw kahiney holletape issuwa nagara yarsho, hankuwa qassi xuussa yarsho oothidi yarsho. He gallas I ba huuphiya wogaada zaaridi Godaas geeshsho;
6.12: I bana zaaridi Godaas dummayo. Yaatidi issi laytha maraze naaqo yarsho oothidi yarsho. I Godaas dummayida huuphey tunida gisho, kase I bana Godaas dummayidi de7ida wodey taybetenna.
6.13: “Issi naazirawey ba qangetha wodiya ongida wode polana wogay haysa; Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge bidi;
6.14: borey bayna issi laytha dorsa urge xuussa yarshos, issi laytha uzzo dorsi nagara yarshos, issi maraze issifetetha yarshos he bessaa eho.
6.15: Qassi katha yarshonne ushsha yarsho entara issife yarshanaw eho. He katha yarshoy irshoy geliboonna lo77o dhiille shamaho zaytera uuketida orde uythinne shamaho zayten tiyetida lee7o gaytan eho.
6.16: “Kahiney he ubbaa nagara yarshonne xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarsho.
6.17: Kahiney maraziya gaytan de7iya uythaara Godaas issifetetha yarsho oothidi yarsho; kaallidi katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa yarsho.
6.18: Naazirawey Godaas dummayida ba huuphiya Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen meedetidi, binaana issifetetha yarshoy eexiya taman yeggo.
6.19: “Naazirawey ba huuphiya meedetidaape guye, kahiney doysetida maraziya gedaa ashuwa gaytan de7iya orde uythaafenne lee7o uythaafe ekidi, Naazirawiya kushen wotho.
6.20: Yaatidi kahiney he ubbaa yuusho yarsho oothidi, Godaas yarsho. He ubbay kahiniya gisho gidiya angaasuwaranne gedaara kahiniyas geeshsha yarsho gidees. Hessafe Godaas Naazirawey woyne ushsha uyo.
6.21: Hiza Godaas bana dummayida Naazirawey oothana mela imetida wogay haysa. Shin naazirawey yarshanaw koshshiya yarshotape aathidi immanaw qangidaba gidiko, ba qangetha gathanaw koshshees” yaagis. Kahineti Anjiya Anjuwa
6.22: Goday Museko,
6.23: “Aaroninne iya adde nayti Isra7eele asaa anjiya wode haysada yaagidi anjite yaaga;
6.25: Goday ba som7uwa hintew poo7iso; I hintew qadheto;
6.26: Goday ba keeha ayfiyan xeello; I hintew sarotethi immo’ yaagidi anjite” yaaga.
6.27: “Enti Isra7eele asaa ta sunthan anjiya wode ta enta anjana” yaagis.

7.1: Musey Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tokidi ongida wode he Dunkaaniyanne iya miishiya, yarsho bessaanne iya miishiya ubbaa zayten tiyidi geeshshis.
7.2: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asaa kochan kochan taybidi kaalethiya wode halaqa gidida ubbay,
7.3: Godaas imota shiishidosona. Enti immida imotay nam7u halaqa sunthan issi para gaare, qassi issi issi halaqa sunthan issi issi booru oothidi, usupun gaaretanne tammanne nam7u boorata Geeshsha Dunkaaniya ehidosona.
7.4: Goday Museko,
7.5: “Geeshsha Dunkaaniya oosuwas go77ana mela neeni he imota entafe ekada, enta oosuwas oosuwas koshsheysada shaakada Leewetas imma” yaagis.
7.6: Hessa gisho, Musey gaaretanne boorata ekidi Leewetas immis.
7.7: Gedisoona kochaas koshsheysada shaakidi enta oosuwas nam7u gaaretanne oyddu boorata immis.
7.8: Meraara kochaas koshsheysada shaakidi, enta oosuwas uyddu gaaretanne hospun boorata immis. Enta oosuwa aawatethan kaalethey kahiniya Aarona na7aa Itamaara.
7.9: Shin Qahaata kochaa oosoy Dunkaaniya geeshsha miisheta hashen toho gidiya gisho Musey entaw para gaarenne booru immibeenna.
7.10: Musey yarsho bessi Godaas dummayida gallas halaqati yarsho bessa sinthe banta imota ehidosona.
7.11: Goday Museko, “Issi issi gallas issi issi halaqay yarsho bessi Godaas dummayanaw ba imota immo” yaagis.
7.12: Koyro gallas ba imota ehiday Yihuda kochaafe Amnadaabe na7aa Na7asoona.
7.13: Na7asooni ehida imotay geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen 1,500 giraame birape oosetida picca Saane, 800 giraame birape oosetida ollatiya saane, nam7aaka katha yarsho yarshanaw zaytera walaketida lo77o dhiille kumidaysa;
7.14: qassi 110 giraame worqafe oosetida ixaaney kumida shaate;
7.15: xuussa yarshos, issi wofaano, issi maraze, issi laytha urge dorsi;
7.16: nagara yarshos issi kole;
7.17: issifetetha yarshos nam7u boorata, ichashu marazeta, ichashu koletanne ichashu urge dorsata ehis. Kaalliya hanko halaqatika Amnadaabe na7ay Na7asooni immidaysada banta imota ehidosona.
7.18: -23 Nam7antho gallasan Yisakoora kochaafe Zu7ara na7ay Natina7eeli ba imota ehis.
7.19: 24-29 Heedzantho gallasan Zabloona kochaafe Heloona na7ay Eli7aabi ba imota ehis.
7.20: 30-35 Oyddantho gallasan Robeela, kochaafe Shade7ura na7ay Elizuuri ba imota ehis.
7.21: 36-40 Ichashantho gallasan Simoona kochaafe Zurishadaya na7ay Salumi7eeli ba imota ehis.
7.22: 41-47 Usupuntho gallasan Gaade kochaafe Ragu7eela na7ay Eliyasaafi ba imota ehis.
7.23: 48-53 Laapuntha gallasan Efreema kochaafe Amhuda na7ay Elishama7i ba imota ehis.
7.24: 54-59 Hospuntha gallasan Minaase kochaafe Padazuura na7ay Gamali7eeli ba imota ehis.
7.25: 60-65 Uddufuntho gallasan Biniyaame kochaafe Gida7oona na7ay Abdaani ba imota ehis.
7.26: 66-71 Tammantho gallasan Daane kochaafe Amsadaya na7ay Aki7ezeri ba imota ehis.
7.27: 72-77 Tammanne issintho gallasan Aseera kochaafe Okraana na7ay Pagi7eeli ba imota ehis.
7.28: 78-83 Tammanne nam7antho gallasan Niftaaleme kochaafe Enaana na7ay Akira ba imota ehis.
7.84: Yarsho bessay tiyetiya wode Godaas dummayanaw Isra7eele halaqati ehida imotay haysafe kaallidi de7eysa. Birape oosetida tammanne nam7u picca saanetanne ollatiya saaneta; worqafe oosetida tammanne nam7u ixaaney kumida shaateta ehidosona.
7.85: Issoy issoy 1,500 giraame birape oosetida picca Saane; qassi issoy issoy 800 giraame birape oosetida ollatiya saane, geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen he ubbaa 28 kilo giraame ehidosona.
7.86: Ixaaney kumida tammanne nam7u worqa shaateta 1.4 kilo giraame geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen shiishidosona.
7.87: Xuussa yarshos shiiqida mehey katha yarshuwara wolla tammanne nam7u wofaanota, tammanne nam7u maraze, tammanne nam7u issi laytha urge dorsinne, tammanne nam7u koleta nagara yarshos shiishidosona.
7.88: Issifetetha yarshos laatamanne oyddu boorati, usupun tammu marazeta, usupun tammu koleta, usupun tammu issi laytha urge dorsata shiishidosona. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya dummayanaw tiya wode shiiqida yarshoti haysata.
7.89: Musey Godaara odetanaw Geeshsha Dunkaaniya geliya wode caaqo taabotiya kamaa bolla de7iya nam7u kiruubetape giddon gididi Goday odishin si7is.

8.1: Goday Museko,
8.2: “Aaroni laapun xompeta kocaa bolla wothiya wode poo7oy sintha baggara de7iya heera poo7isana mela oothidi wotho gada oda” yaagis.
8.3: Goday Muse kiitidaysada, Aaroni xompeta kocaa bolla wothidi sintha baggara de7iya heera poo7isana mela oothis.
8.4: Xompe wothiya kocay, Goday Muse bessidaysada toomape bidi bolla ciishsha gakanaw qoxetida worqafe oosetis. Leeweta geeshsho Woga
8.5: Goday Museko,
8.6: “Isra7eele asaa giddofe Leeweta shaakada wogaada enta geeshsha.
8.7: Neeni enta geeshshanaw haysada ootha; geeshshiya haatha ekada enta bolla wurxa; enti banta asatethaa ubbaa meedeto; banta ma7uwa meecco; yaanidi enti wogaada geeshshi gidana.
8.8: Kaallidi enti issi wofaanonne katha yarshos gidiya zaytera walahetida lo77o dhiille eko; qassi neeni nagara yarshos hara issi wofaano eka.
8.9: Hessafe guye Isra7eele asa ubbaa shiishada, Leeweta Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthe ehada essa.
8.10: Isra7eele asay enta huuphiya bolla banta kushiya wotho.
8.11: Leeweti Isra7eele asaa giddofe taw dummatidi oothana mela yuusho yarsho oothidi Aaroni ta sinthe shiisho.
8.12: Leeweti banta kushiya nam7u wofaanota huuphen wotho. Leeweta nagara atotethas issuwa nagara yarsho, qassi hankuwa xuussa yarsho oothada Godaas yarsha.
8.13: “Leeweta shaakada taw dummaya; Aaronanne iya adde nayta enta bolla shuuma.
8.14: Hessada oothada Leeweta Isra7eele asape taw dummaya; enti tabaa gidana.
8.15: “Neeni enta geeshshidaapenne dummayidaape guye Leeweti Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan banta oosuwa oothanaw yo.
8.16: Isra7eele asaa giddofe kumethi enti taw imetidosona; Isra7eelen bayra yeletida adde nayta bessan Leeweta taw ekas.
8.17: Isra7eele asaa giddon bayra yeletida ase gidin mehe gidin ubbay tabaa. Taani Gibxe biittan bayra ubbaa wodhida wode enta taw dummayas.
8.18: Isra7eelen bayra yeletida adde nayta bessan taw Leeweta ekas.
8.19: Isra7eele asaa giddofe Leeweta Aaronasinne iya adde naytas immas. Isra7eele asay Geeshsha Dunkaaniyako shiiqidi qohetonna mela Leeweti Isra7eele asaa gisho Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothanawunne nagara atotethi ehanaw dooretidosona” yaagis.
8.20: Goday Muse kiitidaysada, Musey, Aaroninne Isra7eele asa ubbay Leeweta dummayidosona.
8.21: Leeweti bantana geeshshidosona; banta ma7uwa meeccidosona. Aaroni enta Godaas dumma imo oothidi shiishis; entaw nagara atotethas yarshidi enta geeshshis.
8.22: Hessafe guye, Leeweti Aaronanne iya adde nayta aawatetha garsan gididi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon banta oosuwa oothanaw yidosona. Goday Muse Leeweta dummayanaw kiitidaysada enti oothidosona.
8.24: “Haysi Leeweti oothana wogaa; laythi laatamanne ichashanne iyape bolla gidida Leewe adde ubbay Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothanaw yo.
8.25: Shin laythi ishatamu gidiya wode banta oosuwape shempo; zaari oothofo.
8.26: Enti Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothiya banta ishata oothi maaddanaw danda7oosona. Shin enti bantaw ay oosoka oothofo. Hiza neeni Leeweta haysada oosisa” yaagis.

9.1: Isra7eele asay Gibxefe keyida nam7antho laythan koyro ageenan Siina mela biittan Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
9.2: “Isra7eele asay Paasika Ba7aale iya qamman boncho.
9.3: Ha ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallasan iya qamman omarsi iya woga ubbaadanne iya kiita ubbaada boncho” yaagis.
9.4: Hessa gisho, Musey Isra7eele asay Paasika Ba7aale bonchana mela entaw odis.
9.5: Goday Muse kiitidaysada, Isra7eele asay koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallasan, omarsi Siina mela biittan Paasika Ba7aale bonchidosona.
9.6: Shin entafe baggati aha bochidi tunida gisho he gallas Paasika Ba7aale bonchanaw danda7ibookona. Hessa gisho, enti he gallas Musekonne Aaronako yidi,
9.7: “Nuuni aha bochida gisho tunida, shin he qamman hara Isra7eele asaara Godaas yarsho yarshonna mela ayis digetido?” yaagidosona.
9.8: Musey zaaridi, “Goday hintebaa taw odana gakanaw gam7ishite” yaagis.
9.9: Goday Museko,
9.10: “Isra7eele asaako haysada yaaga; hintefe woyko hinte kochaafe oonika aha bochidi tuniko woyko ogetidabaa gidiko, Paasika Ba7aale bonchanaw danda7ees.
9.11: Nam7antho ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallas omarsi Paasika Ba7aale boncho. Paasika dorsa uytharanne camo boncora mo.
9.12: Sa7ay wontana gakanaw dorsa ashuwape aybika attofo; qassi iya meqethafe issuwaka menthofo. Paasika Baaliya woga ubbaa ootho.
9.13: Shin geeshshinne ogetonna as Paasika bonchona ixiko, I ta asaa giddofe kuretto. Godaa yarshuwa iya qamman yarshiboona gisho ba nagaraa gisho pirda ekees.
9.14: “Hinte giddon de7iya bete asi Paasika Ba7aale bonchanaw koyko, Paasika wogaada boncho. Betanchoynne biitta aawu na7i ubbay he wogaatho ootho” yaagis. Tama Shaara
9.15: Geeshsha Dunkaaney toketida gallas shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya ma7is. Omarsafe doomidi, wonta gakanaw Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollara de7iya shaaray tama daanees.
9.16: Hessada gallas gallas shaaray ma77ees; qamma qamma he shaaray tamada poo7ees.
9.17: He shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollafe dendiya wode ubban Isra7eele asay banta dunkaanida gutaape dendoosona. Qassi he shaaray wodhiya bessan Isra7eele asay dunkaanosona.
9.18: Isra7eele asay Godaa kiitan gutaape dendoosona; qassi Godaa kiitan dunkaanosona. Shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla gam7iya wode ubban banta dunkaanida gutan gam7oosona.
9.19: Shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla daro gallas gam7ikoka, Isra7eele asay Godaa kiita naagosonape attishin, awuka bookona.
9.20: Issi issi toho shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla guutha gallas gam7ees. Gidikoka enti Godaa kiitan dunkaanosona; qassi Godaa kiitan gutaape dendoosona.
9.21: Issi issi toho shaaray omarsafe wontana gakanaw xalaala gam7ees; shaaray dendiya wode enti dendoosona. Gallas gidin, qamma gidin, shaaray dendiya wode enti dendoosona.
9.22: Shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla nam7u gallas gidin woyko issi ageena woyko issi laythi gam7in Isra7eele asay banta dunkaanida gutan gam7osonape attishin, bookona. Shin shaaray dendiya wode entika dendoosona.
9.23: Goday Muse Kiittidaysada enti Godaa kiitan dunkaanosona qassi Godaa kiitan gutaape dendidi boosona.

10.1: Goday Museko,
10.2: asaa shiiqos xeeganawunne dunkaanida gutaape denthanaw maaddiya nam7u moyzeta birape qoxada medha.
10.3: Ha nam7u moyzeti punetiya wode asa ubbay Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen neeko shiiqo.
10.4: Shin issi moyze xalaali punetiko, Isra7eele kochaa halaqati ne sinthe shiiqo.
10.5: Moyzey koyro punetiya wode Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape doloha baggan dunkaanida kochay dendo.
10.6: Moyzey nam7antho punetiya wode dugeha baggan dunkaanida kochay dendo. Moyzey hessatho punetiya wode gutaape dendanaw malla gido.
10.7: Asa shiishanaw moyze punna, shin hankoysada dumma mallara punnofa.
10.8: Kahineti, Aarona nayti moyze punno. Haysi newunne yaana yeletetha ubbaas merina woga gido.
10.9: “Hinte gadiya bolla ola denthida hinte morkiyara hinte oletanaw keyiya wode he moyzeta goochidi punnite. He wode Goday, hinte Xoossay hintena akeekidi, hinte morketape ashshana.
10.10: Hinte ufaysa gallasatan hessika ageena xeeron, eretida ba7aaletan, xuussa yarsho wodeninne issifetetha yarsho wode moyze punnite. Hessi Xoossaa sinthan hintena akeekisiyaba gidana. Taani Godaa, hinte Xoossaa” yaagis. Isra7eeleti Siina Yeddidi Denduwa
10.11: Asay Gibxefe keyin, nam7antho laythan, nam7antho ageenan, laatamantho gallasan, shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollafe dendis.
10.12: Yaatin asay Siina mela biittafe maaran maaran dendidosona; shaaray Paarana mela biitta gakidi wodhis.
10.13: Goday Muse kiitidaysada enti baanaw koyro dendidosona.
10.14: Koyro Yihuda kochaa baggan dunkaanida kochay banta mala ekidi keyidosona. Entana kaalethey Amnadaabe na7aa Na7asoona.
10.15: Yisakoora kochaa kaalethey Zu7ara na7aa Natina7eela.
10.16: Zabloona kochaa kaalethey Heloona na7aa Eli7aaba.
10.17: Yaatin, Geeshsha Dunkaaney shodetin, Gedisoona kochatinne Meraara kochati tookidi dendidosona.
10.18: Kaallidi Robeela kochaa baggan dunkaanida kochay banta mala oykide keyidosona. Robeela kochaa kaalethey Shade7ura na7aa Elizuura.
10.19: Simoona kochaa kaalethey Zurishadaya na7aa Salumi7eela.
10.20: Gaade kochaa kaalethey Ragu7eela na7aa Eliyasaafa.
10.21: Yaatin Qahaata kochay geeshsha miisheta tookidi dendidosona. Enti kaalliya guta gakanaape sinthe Geeshsha Dunkaaney toketidi uttees.
10.22: Kaallidi Efreema kochaa baggan dunkaanida kochati banta malla oykidi keyoosona. Efreema kochaa kaalethey Amhuda na7aa Elishama7a.
10.23: Minaase kochaa kaalethey Padazuura na7aa Gamali7eela.
10.24: Biniyaame kochaa kaalethey Gadiyoona na7aa Abdaana.
10.25: Wursethan Daane kochaa baggan dunkaanida kochay, ubbaas guye baggara kate gididi, banta malaoykidi keyidosona. Daane kochaa kaalethey Amsadaya na7aa Aki7ezera.
10.26: Aseera kochaa kaalethey Okraana na7aa Pagi7eela.
10.27: Niftaaleme kochaa kaalethey Enaana na7aa Akira.
10.28: Isra7eele asay banta zerethan zerethan gutaape dendidi biya maaray hessa.
10.29: Musey Midiyaame addiya Ragu7eela na7aa Hobaabako, “Goday nuus immana gida biitta laattanaw boos; Goday Isra7eele anjana gida gisho nuura yedha; nuuni new lo77oba oothana” yaagis.
10.30: Yaatin Hobaabi, “Akay, taani ta biitta ta dabbotako baana” yaagis.
10.31: Musey zaaridi, “Hayyana, nuna yeggada boopa. Nu biya mela biittan nuuni dunkaanana bessaa ne eraasa; nu baana ogiya nuna kaalethanaw danda7aasa.
10.32: Neeni nuura biiko, Goday nuus immiya anjuwa ubbaa Nu new shaakana” yaagis.
10.33: Asay Godaa zumaape dendidi, heedzu gallasa oge bidosona. Godaa caaqo Taabotey enti shempana bessi koyishe heedzu gallas entafe sinthe sinthe bis.
10.34: Enti dunkaanida gutaape dendiya wode ubban Godaa shaaray gallas gallas entafe bollara de7ees.
10.35: Taabotey dendiya wode ubban Musey, “Abeeti Godaw, denda; ne morketi laaleto; nena ixeysati ne sinthafe baqato” yaagees.
10.36: Taabotey shempiya wode ubban Musey, “Abeeti Godaw, daro mukulan taybetiya Isra7eele asaako simma” yaagees.

11.1: Isra7eele asay bantana gakida metuwan Godaa bolla zuuzumidosona. Enta zuuzuntha Goday si7ida wode iya hanqoy eexin, xuuggiya tama enta bolla yeddis; he tamay enti dunkaanida gutaape issi bagga gaxaa mis.
11.2: Yaatin Musey enta gisho Godaa woossana mela enti Museko yidi yeekidosona. Musey woossin tamay to7is.
11.3: Godaa tamay enta giddon eexida gisho, he bessay Tabeera geetetidi xeegetis.
11.4: Isra7eeletara Gibxefe keyida dumma dumma derey hara kathi maanaw daro amotidosona. Enti, “Nu asho awupe demmanee?
11.5: Nuuni Gibxen de7iya wode miishe qanxonna miya moluwa, leehiya, habaabe, shunkurte, miskati bayna shunkurtenne tuumuwa hassayoos.
11.6: Shin ha77i nu qoodhey gordetis; nu ayfeyka ha mannafe attishin, haraba aybaka be7enna” yaagidi yeekidosona.
11.7: Mannay deebbo ayfe daanees; iya malay bootha adil7e ciishshe daanees.
11.8: Mannay qamma wodhees; asay yuuyidi iya maxidi woxan gaaccidi woyko udulan caddidi kathoosona. Yaatidi uukosona; iya mal7oy shamaho zaytera uuketida uytha mela.
11.9: Manni qamma enta gutan akara wodhees.
11.10: Asay banta dunkaaniya pengen pengen eqidi yeekishin Musey si7is. Enti Godaa hanquwa denthethida gisho, Musey un7etis.
11.11: Musey Godaako, “Ne aylliya, ta bolla ayis ha metuwa ehadii? Ne tanan ayis ufaytabikii? Ne ha asa ubbaa toohuwa ta bolla ayis wothadii?
11.12: Ha asa ubbaa ta qanthatadinayee? Woyko enta ta yeladinaayee? Ne enta mayzatas, immana gada caaqida biitta gatho gada na7a idimmada dichiya aseeda ta ki7on ayis enta yeggadii?
11.13: Ha asa ubbaas ta asho awupe ehanee? Enti taako yidi, ‘Maanaw nuus asho imma’ yaagidi yeekosona.
11.14: Taani ha asa ubbaa tarka tookanaw danda7ike; taw hessi deexo tooho.
11.15: Hiza neeni tana haysada oothanaape taw qadheta; ha77i tana wodha; ha metuwape ta shempa aggana” yaagis. Laapun Tammu Asaa Dooretetha
11.16: Goday Museko, “Asaa kaalethanaw danda7iya Isra7eele halaqatape laapun tammu cimata doora. Enta Geeshsha Dunkaaniyako ehada ne matan essa.
11.17: Taani wodhada neera yan odetana; ta new immida Ayyaanape shaakada enta bolla wothana. Neeni asaa toohuwa nerka tookonna mela enti nena maaddana.
11.18: “Neeni asaako haysada yaaga; ‘Wonto hinte asho maana gisho hintena geeshshite. Nu asho awupe demmanee? Nuus Gibxen sa7i lo77oshin’ yaagidi hinte yeekida yeehuwa Goday si7is. Ha77i Goday asho immana; hinteka maana.
11.19: Hinte maanay issi gallas woyko nam7u gallas woyko ichashu gallas woyko tammu gallas woyko laatamu gallas xalaala gidenna.
11.20: Shin ‘Hinte giddon de7iya Godaa hinte kadhida gishonne Gibxefe keyonna attidaako nuus lo77oshin gida gisho, hintew siidhera keyana gakanawunne hinte saletana gakanaw issi ageena kumethi hinte asho maana’ yaaga” yaagis.
11.21: Shin Musey Godaako, “Heko, ta 600,000 asaa kaalethashe de7ayis. Neeni issi ageena kumethi enti asho maana mela immana gaasa.
11.22: Miiza wudenne dorsa wude ubbaa shukin entaw gidanee? Abban de7iya molo ubbaa shiishiyako entaw gidanee?” yaagis.
11.23: Yaatin, Goday Museko, “Godaa kushey qantheyee? Taani new odiyabay tumeekonne wordoko neeni ha77i be7ana” yaagis.
11.24: Hessa gisho, Musey kare keyidi, Goday gidaysa asaas odis. Isra7eele cimatape laapun tammu asaa shiishidi, Geeshsha Dunkaaniya yuushon essis.
11.25: Yaatin, Goday shaarara wodhidi iyara odetis; iya bolla de7iya Ayyaanape ekidi, he laapun tammu cimata bolla wothis. Ayyaanay enta bolla shempida wode enti nabeda tinbite odidosona. Shin hessafe guye, zaaridi tinbite odibookona.
11.26: He laapun tammu cimatara xaafetida asatape Eldaadanne Modaada geetetiya nam7ati dunkaanida gutan attidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniyako yibookona. Shin enta bollaka Ayyaanay wodhin, dunkaanida gutan tinbite odidosona.
11.27: Issi pantha addey Museko woxi yidi, “Eldaadinne Modaadi dunkaanida gutan tinbite odoosona” yaagis.
11.28: Yaanin, ba na7atethafe doomidi, Muse maaddiya Nawe na7aa Iyyasuy Museko, “Ta godaw, Muse, enta teqa” yaagis.
11.29: Shin Musey zaaridi, “Ta gisho ne qanaatay? Goday ba asa ubbaa bolla ba ayyaana wothidi nabeda tinbite odisiyaba gidiyako ta ufaytayis” yaagis.
11.30: Yaatidi, Museynne Isra7eele cimati dunkaanida gutaa simmidosona.
11.31: Qoponna Goday carko denthidi, sa7ape nam7u wadha mela dhoqu gidi piradhiya kuraachota abbafe ehis. Enta dunkaaniya yuushuwan ubba baggara issi gallasa oge mela sa7an wodhidosona.
11.32: He gallasinne he qamma ubbaa, qassi wontetha gallasika asay kare keyidi, he kuraachota oykidi shiishidosona. Entafe oonika 10 kilo giraamepe guuthu shiishibenna. Enti dunkaaniya guta yuushon melisanaw miccidosona.
11.33: Shin ashoy buroo enta doonan de7ishininne meetetidi wuronna de7ishin, Godaa hanqoy asaa bolla eexis; Goday asaa wolqaama boshan shocis.
11.34: Asho amotidi hayqida asaa enti he bessan moogida gisho he bessay Kebroot-Hataaba geetetidi sunthetis.
11.35: Asay he bessaafe dendi bidi Haxeroota geetetiya bessan dunkaanidosona.

12.1: Musey Tophe biitta maccas ekida gisho, Mayraamanne Aaroni Muse yaagidi boridosona.
12.2: “Goday Muse baggara xalaala odetidee? I nu baggara odibeennee?” yaagidosona. Goday enti gidaysa si7is.
12.3: Musey biittan de7iya asa ubbaafe aadhiya aada asi.
12.4: Qoponna Goday Muse, Aaronanne Mayraamo, “Hinte heedzati Geeshsha Dunkaaniyako keyte” yaagis. Entika keyidosona.
12.5: Goday shaara tuussara wodhidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen eqidi, Aarona! Mayraame! yaagidi xeegis. Enti nam7ay iya sinthe shiiqin,
12.6: Goday, “Ta odeysa si7ite; hinte giddon nabey de7iko, ta iyaw qoncayis; qassi iyaw amuhon odayis.
12.7: Shin ta aylley Muse hessada gidenna; I ta keetha ubban ammanetidaysa.
12.8: Taani Musera som7on odetasipe attishin, leemison odike. I ta malaa be7ees. Yaatin, hinte ta aylliya Muse boranaw ayis yayyibeketii?” yaagis.
12.9: Godaa hanqoy enta bolla eexin, I enta aggidi bis.
12.10: Shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollafe dendida wode Mayraama baro hargen milxi gada booxasu. Aaroni iiko simmidi xeelliya wode baro hargen oyketidaaro be7is.
12.11: Aaroni Museko, “Hay ta godaw, nuuni eeyatethan oothida nagaraas nuna haysada seeropa.
12.12: Iyo ba aaye ulope keyiya wode I asatethafe baggay meetetin, hayqidi yeletida na7a mela oothofa” yaagis.
12.13: Yaatin, Musey, “Abeeti Godaw, iyo patharki” yaagidi Godaa woossis.
12.14: Goday Museko, “I aaway I som7on cuttiyaba gidiyako, iya laapun gallas yeellara gam7awusu gidikee? Hessa gisho, laapun gallas dunkaaniya gutaape iyo gaxa kessada dumma bessan wotha; hessafe guye, simmada yo” yaagis.
12.15: Yaatin, Mayraama dunkaaniya gutaape gaxa keyada laapun gallas uttasu. Iya simmana gakanaw asay gutaa aggidi baanaw dendibeenna.
12.16: Hessafe guye, asay Haxeroota geetetiya bessaafe dendidi, Paarana mela biittan dunkaanidosona.

13.1: Goday Museko,
13.2: “Taani Isra7eeletas immana Kanaane biitta wochana mela tammanne nam7u Isra7eele kochaafe issi issi asi halaqa oothada kiitta” yaagis.
13.3: Yaatin Musey Goday kiitidaysada Paarana mela biittafe Isra7eele kochaafe tammanne nam7u halaqata kiittis.
13.4: Enta sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Robeela kochaafe Zakura na7aa Samu7a;
13.5: Simoona kochaafe Hoora na7aa Shaafaxa;
13.6: Yihuda kochaafe Yoofona na7aa Kaaleba;
13.7: Yisakoora kochaafe Yoosefa na7aa Yigi7aala;
13.8: Efreema kochaafe Nawe na7aa Awuse;
13.9: Biniyaame kochaafe Raafu na7aa Falxa;
13.10: Zabloona kochaafe Sooda na7aa Gadi7eela;
13.11: Yoosefa na7aa Minaase kochaafe Suusa na7aa Gaade;
13.12: Daane kochaafe Gamaala na7aa Ami7eela;
13.13: Aseera kochaafe Mika7eela na7aa Satura;
13.14: Niftaaleme kochaafe Waafisa na7aa Nahiba;
13.15: Gaade kochaafe Maka na7aa Ge7u7eela.
13.16: He biitta wochana mela Musey kiitida asata sunthay haysata. Musey Nawe na7aa Awuse sunthaa Iyyasu gidi sunthaa laammis.
13.17: Musey enta, “Negebe mela biitta kanthidi pude derey dariya biitta keyte.
13.18: Biittay ay mela biittako, asay ay mela minookonne taybon guutheko daroko be7ite.
13.19: Enti de7iya biittay lo77oko iiteko, enta katamati diretidaakonne mela de7iyako,
13.20: biittay araddeko laddeko, biittay woran kametidaakonne quu7eko be7ite. Minnite; he biittan de7iya katha ayfiyape ekonna yoopite” yaagis. He wodey woyney teeridi maxetiya wode.
13.21: Enti keyidi Siina mela biittafe doomidi, Lebo-Hamaata matan de7iya Rehooba gakanaw de7iya biitta wochidosona.
13.22: Negebe mela biitta kanthidi, Kebroona gakidosona. He bessan Akmaana, Sesayanne Talmaya geetetiya Enaaqa kochati de7oosona. Kebrooni Gibxen de7iya Xo7aane katamaape laapun laythi koyrottidi keexetis.
13.23: Yaara kanthidi, Eshkola Zangaara bidi gakiya wode teera woyne tashiyara qanxidosona. He tashey deexo gidiya gisho nam7u asi kaso aathidi tookidosona. Iya bolla gujidi oromaanenne balase mithaa ayfe ekidi yidosona.
13.24: Isra7eele asay he bessaafe woyne tashiya qanxida gisho he bessaa Eshkola Zangaara gidi xeegidosona.
13.25: Enti he biitta oytamu gallas wochidi guye simmidosona.
13.26: Paarana mela biittan Qaadesan de7iya Museko, Aaronakonne Isra7eele maabara ubbaako yidosona. Enti be7idaba asa ubbaas odidosona; he biittafe ekidi yida ayfiyaka enta bessidosona.
13.27: Enti Museko, “Neeni nuna yeddida biitta bida; he biittan maathinne eessi goggees; he biitta ayfiyaka haysa be7a.
13.28: Shin he biittan de7iya asay wolqaama; enta katamatika gimbe dirsan diretidaysatanne gita. Nuuni ubbaafe aathidi Enaaqa kochata yan be7ida.
13.29: Amaaleqati Negebe mela biittan; Hitetinne, Yaabuseti derey dariya Amooreta biittan; qassi Kanaaneti Medetiraane Abbaa doonaninne Yordaanose shaafa gaxan de7oosona” yaagidosona.
13.30: Yaatin Kaalebi asaa Muse sinthan si77i oothidi, “Nuuni xoonanaw danda7iya gisho, ha77i keyidi he biitta yegisidi ane oykoos” yaagis.
13.31: Shin Kaalebara bida asati, “He biitta asay nuupe aadhidi minniya gisho, nuuni enta xoonanaw danda7oko” yaagidosona.
13.32: Enti yuuyidi wochida biittaba Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagidi iita oda odidosona. “Nuuni wochida biittay yan de7iya asaaka miya biitta; yan de7iya asayka daro adusse.
13.33: Nuuni yan Enaaqa koche gidida Nifilime asata be7ida. Enta be7ida ayfen nuna xeelliya wode nuuni xaqo mela; entika nuna hessada be7oosona” yaagidosona.

14.1: He wode qamma maabara ubbay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona.
