14.2: Isra7eele asay Muse bollanne Aarona bolla zuuzumidosona. Kumetha maabaray, “Nuuni Gibxe biittan de7ishe woyko ha mela biittan hayqida gidorko.
14.3: Nuuni mashshan wurana mela Goday ha biitta nuna ayis ehii? Nu machetinne nu nayti di7etana; hessa hananaape guye Gibxe simoy nuus keehennee?” yaagidosona.
14.4: Enti issoy issuwako, “Nuna kaalethiya asi dooridi guye Gibxe simmoos” yaagidosona.
14.5: Yaatin, Museynne Aaroni he bessan shiiqida Isra7eele maabara sinthan som7ora sa7an gufannidosona.
14.6: Biittaa wochanaw bida asaa giddofe Nawe na7aa Iyyasuynne Yoofona na7aa Kaalebi banta ma7uwa peedhidosona.
14.7: Isra7eele maabaraako, “Nuuni kanthi keyidi wochida biittay daro lo77o.
14.8: Goday nunan ufaytiyaba gidiko maathinne eessi goggiya biitta nuna gelsana; he biitta nuus immana.
14.9: Hessa gisho, Godaa bolla makallofite. He biitta asaas yayyofite; enti nuus oythika gidokona. Entaw eeshoy baawa; Goday nuura de7ees; hinte entaw yayyofite” yaagidosona.
14.10: Yaatin Isra7eele maabaray enta shuchan caddanaw dendis. He wode Godaa bonchoy Xoossaa Dunkaaniyan Isra7eele asa ubbaas qoncis.
14.11: Goday Museko, “Ha asay tana kadhey awude gakanaasee? Taani enta giddon oothida malaatata be7ishe, awude gakanaw tanan ammanonna ixanee?
14.12: Taani enta gadon shocada dhaysana, shin nena entafe dariyanne minniya kawotethas aawa oothana” yaagis.
14.13: Musey zaaridi Godaako, “Neeni ne wolqan ha asaa Gibxefe kessidaysa eriya Gibxeti hessa si7iko woyganee?
14.14: Enti he biittan de7iya asaas hessa odana. Abeeti Godaw, neeni ha asaara de7eysa enti si7idosona. Abeeti Godaw, nuuni nena be7idaysa, ne shaaray nu bolla kuyatidaysanne gallas shaara tuussan, qamma tama tuussan neeni nuna kaalethidaysa enti be7idosona.
14.15: Yaatin, ha77i neeni ha asa ubbaa issi toho wodha dhaysiyaba gidiko ne kase oothidaysa si7ida kawotethati,
14.16: ‘Goday, ha asaas immana gidi caaqida biitta enta gelsanaw danda7iboona gisho mela biittan wodhi dhaysis yaagidi’ odana.
14.17: “Hessa gisho, Godaw, ne wolqaa nuna bessa; ne nuus gelida qaala qopa.
14.18: ‘Goday elle hanqetenna; maarotinne siiqoy kumidaysa nagaranne geellatethi atto geysa; shin balida uraa seeronna aggenna. Yelidaysata nagaraa gisho heedzanthonne oyddantho yeletethi gakanaw nayta seerana’ yaagadasa.
14.19: Ha asay Gibxefe keyoosope doomada hachi gakanaw enta maaridaysada ne merinaa siiquwan ha asaa nagaraa atto garki” yaagis.
14.20: Goday zaaridi, “Ne oychidaysada ta enta maarana.
14.21: Shin ta de7o gideysadanne ta bonchoy sa7a ubbaa kumidaysada,
14.22: ha asaape issi asika he biitta be7enna. Gibxe biittaninne mela biittan oothida malaatata ha asati be7idosona; shin enti tammu toho tana paacidi taw kiitetonna ixidosona.
14.23: Hessa gisho, ta enta mayzatas immana gada caaqida biitta tana kadhidaysatape issoyka gelenna.
14.24: Shin ta aylley Kaalebi entafe dummatiya gishonne tana polo wozanape kaallida gisho, I kase wochida biitta iyaw immana; iya zerethayka he biitta laattana.
14.25: Shin ha77i Amaaleqatinne Kanaaneti zangaaran de7iya gisho, wonto Zo7o Abbaako efiya ogiya oykidi mela biitta guye simmite” yaagis. Zuuzummida Asaa Seeretethaa
14.27: “Ha iita asay ta bolla awude gakanaw zuuzumanee? Taani Isra7eele asaa zuuzuntha si7as.
14.28: Hessa gisho, neeni entaw haysada gada oda; ‘Taani ta de7uwan caaqayis; hinte gidaysada ta hintew oothana.’ Taani, Goday haysa odayis.
14.29: Asay taybetiya wode laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida asi ubbay ta bolla zuuzumida gisho, hinte ahay ha mela biittan kundana.
14.30: Yoofona na7a Kaalebapenne Nawe na7a Iyyasupe attishin, hintefe oonika ta hintena laatisanaw caaqida biitta gelenna.
14.31: Hinte, ‘Nu nayti di7eti attana’ gida hinte nayta, he hinte kadhida biitta gelsana; he biittay entaw laata gidana.
14.32: Shin hinte ahay ha mela biittan kundidi attana.
14.33: Hinte ammanetibona gisho, hintefe wursetha ahay ha mela biittan kundana gakanaw, hinte nayti ha mela biittan waayetishe oytamu laythi dorse heemmana.
14.34: Hinte biitta wochida oytamu gallasaa taybon, issi gallasas issi laythi, oytamu laythi hinte nagaraa gisho waayetana; he wode ta hinte bolla ay mela hanqetidaako hinte erana.
14.35: Issife ta bolla dendida ha iita maabara bolla ta haysada oothana; enti ha mela biittan kundi attana; haysan enti hayqana; ta Goday haysa odayis” yaagis.
14.36: He biitta wochana mela Musey kiitida asati simmidi, he biittaba iita oda odidi, Muse bolla asay zuuzumana mela oothidaysati,
14.38: He biitta wochanaw bida asaape Yoofona na7ay Kaalebinne Nawe na7ay Iyyasu xalaali attidosona.
14.39: Musey hessa Isra7eele asaas odida wode asay daro yeekis.
14.40: Wontetha gallas wonta guura dendidi, gezze biitta keyidi, “Nuuni nagara oothida, shin ha77i Goday nuus immana gida bessaa pude keyana” yaagidosona.
14.41: Shin Musey entako, “Godaa kiitaa hinte ayis menthetii? Hintew hanenna.
14.42: Goday hintera doonna gisho, boopite; hinte morketi hintena xoonana.
14.43: Amaaleqa asaaranne Kanaane asaara hinte oletidi mashshan hayqana. Godaas hinte kiitetonna ixida gisho, Goday hintera deenna” yaagis.
14.44: Shin enti Godaa Caaqo Taaboteynne Musey gutaape dendonna de7ishin, derey dariya biitta baanaw minnidi dendidosona.
14.45: Yaanin derey dariya biittan de7iya Amaaleqa asaynne Kanaane asay enta ollan xoonidi, Horma gakanaw enta yedethidosona.

15.1: Goday Museko,
15.2: “Isra7eele asaa haysada yaaga; hinte daana mela ta hintew immiya biitta geliya wode,
15.3: xuussa yarsho gidin woyko gaso yarsho gidin woyko dosan yarshiya yarsho gidin woyko ba7aale gallasa yarsho gidin, mehepe woyko dorsaafe Godaas taman xuugetiya sawiya yarsho yarshite.
15.4: Yarshuwa yarshiya uray katha yarshuwas issi kilo giraame lo77o dhiille sayso litiro shamaho zayten munuqetidaysa eho.
15.5: Qassi xuussa yarshos woyko hara yarshos ehiya issi issi dorsaara sayso litiro woyne ushsha yarsho oothidi giigisite.
15.6: Maraze yarshiya wode nam7u kilo giraame lo77o dhiille issi litironne bagga shamaho zayten munuqetidaysa ehite.
15.7: Ushsha yarshuwas siko litiro woyne ushsha yarshuwas ehite. Hessi Godaas sawiya yarsho gidana.
15.8: Gaso woyko issifetetha yarshos wofaano xuussa yarsho oothada Godaas yarshiya wode,
15.9: wofaanuwara issife heedzu kilo giraame lo77o dhiille, nam7u litiro shamaho zayten munuqetidaysa katha yarsho oothada eha.
15.10: Ushsha yarshuwas bagga litiro woyne ushsha ehite. Hessi Godaas sawiya xuussa yarsho gidana.
15.11: “Issi issi wofaanoy woyko issi issi marazey woyko issi issi koley yarshetiya wode haysada hanidi ooseto.
15.12: Daro mehey yarshetiya wode yarshetiya katha yarshoyka hessada daro.
15.13: Isra7eele asi gidida oonika sawiya xuussa yarsho Godaas yarshiya wode ubban haysada oothanaw koshshees.
15.14: Yaana yeletethan hinte giddon de7iya bete woyko hara asi oonika sawiya xuussa yarsho Godaas yarshanaw koyiko hessada oothanaw koshshees.
15.15: Hintewunne hinte giddon de7iya bete asaas he wogay issino; hessi yaana yeletethaaska eqidi daana woga; Hinteka bete asatika Godaa sinthan issino.
15.16: Hintewunne hinte giddon de7iya bete asaas higgeynne wogay issino” yaagis.
15.17: Goday Museko,
15.18: “Isra7eele asaas haysada gada oda; taani hintena efiya biitta hinte gelidi,
15.19: he biittan kaxiya kathi hinte miya wode he kathaafe xeera kessidi hinte Godaas yarshite.
15.20: Hessika, bayra kaxida kathaafe uukida koyro uythi, gidishin, kathi bukiya wudumaafe immiya yarsho oothidi yarshite.
15.21: Yeletetha ubban hinte biittan kaxida kathaafe koyruwa uukidi Godaas yarsho yarshite.
15.22: “Goday, Muses odida kiitaa hinte eronna ixidi naagonna attiko,
15.23: woyko Goday iya baggara immida kiita ubbaa, Goday immida gallasaape doomidi yaana yeletetha gakanaw naagonna ixiko,
15.24: qassi hessa Isra7eele maabaray eronna oothidaba gidiko maabara ubbay Godaas issi wofaano sawiya xuussa yarsho oothidi, wogay kiiteysada katha yarshuwaranne ushsha yarshuwara yarsho; qassi nagara yarsho oothidi issi kole yarsho.
15.25: Kahiney kumetha Isra7eele maabaraas nagara atotetha yarsho shiishees. Enti eronna balida banta naaquwa gisho Godaas xuussa yarshonne nagara yarsho yarshida gisho enta nagaray atto geetetana.
15.26: Isra7eele maabaraynne enta giddon de7iya bete asay eronna he bala oothida gisho asa ubbaa nagaray atto geetetana.
15.27: “Issi asi eronna nagara oothiko issi laytha kole nagara yarsho oothidi yarsho.
15.28: Eronna de7ishe nagara oothida uraas kahiney Godaa sinthan nagara atotetha wogaa polo; iya nagaray atto geetetana.
15.29: Eronna nagara oothida uraas kahiney Godaa sinthan nagara atotetha wogaa polo; iya nagaray atto geetetana.
15.30: “Shin Isra7eele asi gidin woyko bete asi gidin erishe otoron nagara oothiya uray Godaa cayees. He uray deriya giddofe dhayo.
15.31: He uray Godaa kiitaa erishe kadhida gishonne iya kiitaa kawushida gisho iyaw dhayoy bessees. Iya balay iya bolla gido” yaagis. Sambaata Menthida Ura
15.32: Issi gallas Isra7eele asay mela biittan de7ishin, issi uray Sambaata gallas mithi mixishe oyketis.
15.33: He uraa asay Museko, Aaronakonne Isra7eele maabaraako ehidosona.
15.34: Enti iya bolla oothanaba eriboona gisho qashon gam7isidosona.
15.35: Hessafe guye, Goday Museko, “Ha uray hayqanaw bessees; Isra7eele maabaray banta gutaape gaxa kessidi shuchan caddidi wodho” yaagis.
15.36: Yaatin Isra7eele maabara ubbay Goday Muse kiitidaysada, gutaape gaxa kessidi shuchan caddidi wodhidosona. Afila Macara Woga
15.38: “Isra7eele asaas haysada gada oda; hintenne yaana yeletethay hinte afilaa gaxan macara kessidi he macara gaxan kaalose qacina sikite.
15.39: He macaraa hinte be7iya wode ubban ta kiitata, akeekidi poleeta; taape haakidi hinte ayfiya amuwanne hinte wozanaa qofaa kaallidi laameteketa.
15.40: He macaraa be7idi hinte ta kiita ubbaa akeekidi polananne Xoossaas dummatidaysata gidana.
15.41: Taani Godaa, hinte Xoossaa; ta hinte Xoossaa gidanaw hintena Gibxefe kessas. Taani Godaa, hinte Xoossaa yaaga” yaagis.

16.1: Leewe kochaafe Qahaata koche gidida Yisi7ara na7ay Qorey, Robeela kochaafe Eli7aaba nayti Daataneynne Abeeroy qassi Faleta na7ay Oni,
16.2: Muse bolla dendidosona. Entara nam7u xeetanne ishatamu asati de7oosona; he asati asan eretidaysatanne maabara kaaletheyisata.
16.3: Enti Musenne Aarona sinthe shiiqidi, “Hinte darsideta; maabara ubbay geeshshi; Goday entara de7ees. Yaatin, Godaa maabara bolla hintena ayis dhoqu dhoqu oothetii?” yaagidosona.
16.4: Musey hessa si7ida wode Godaa sinthan gufannis.
16.5: Qorekonne iya cugaako, “Goday wonto wonta ooni iya baggekonne ooni geeshsheko bessana; he I doorida uraa baako shiishana; he uray iyako shiiqana.
16.6: Wonto wonta neeranne ne asaara haysa oothite; ixaane cuyisiya miishe ekidi,
16.7: bonqo tama iyan wothidi, Godaa sinthan ixaane cuyisite. Goday dooriya uray I geeshshi gidana. Hinte, Leeweti zawape aadhideta.”
16.8: Qassika Musey Qoreko, “Hinte Leeweti si7ite.
16.9: Isra7eele Xoossay hintena ba maabara giddofe dummayidi, geeshsha dunkaaniyan oothana melanne ba asaa sinthan eqidi haggaazana mela baako shiishidaysi hintew guuxidee?
16.10: I hintenanne hinte ishata Leeweta ubbaa baako shiishis; shin ha77i hinte kahineta bessaa koyeeta.
16.11: Neeninne ne cuga ubbay Godaa bolla makallidi dendideta; hinte iya bolla zuuzumanaw I Aaroni oonee?” yaagis.
16.12: “Yaatidi, Musey, Eli7aaba nayta, Daatanenne Abeero xeegisis; shin enti, ‘Nuuni booko’ yaagidosona.
16.13: Neeni mela biittan nuna wodhanaw maathinne eessi goggiya biittafe nuna kessidaysi guuxis gada ha77i nu bolla halaqa gidanaw koyay?
16.14: Neeni nuna maathinne eessi goggiya biitta gelsabaaka; woyko neeni nuus laata oothada goshsha gadenne woyne gade immabaaka; neeni nuna cimmaasa; nuuni booko” yaagidosona.
16.15: Yaatin, Musey daro hanqetidi, Godaako, “Neeni enta yarshuwa ekofa; ta entafe issuwaka qohabike; qassi hari attoshin issi hareka entafe ekabike” yaagis.
16.16: Qassi Musey Qoreko, “Wonto neeranne ne asaara hessada Aaronika Godaa sinthe shiiqite.
16.17: Issi issi asi ba ixaane cuyisiya miishiya eko; ixaaneka iyan wotho; ubbay issife nam7u xeetanne ishatamu ixaane cuyisiya miishe gidees; ixaane iyan wothidi Godaa sinthe shiisho. Neeninne Aaroni hinte ixaaniya hessada shiishite” yaagis.
16.18: Yaatin, issi issi asi ba miishen ixaanenne tama bonqo wothidi geeshsha dunkaaniya pengen Museranne Aaronara issife eqidosona.
16.19: Qorey ba asaara geeshsha dunkaaniya pengen Muse sinthaninne Aarona sinthan eqidosona. He wode Godaa bonchoy kumetha maabaraas qoncis.
16.20: Goday Musekonne Aaronako,
16.21: “Taani issi toho ha asaa dhaysana gisho, entafe shaaketite” yaagis.
16.22: Shin Museynne Aaroni sa7an gufannidi, “Abeeti Xoossaw, asa shempo ubbaa medhida Xoossaw, issi asi nagara oothiko, neeni kumetha maabara hanqetayee?” yaagidosona.
16.24: “Asaas ‘Qore, Daatanenne Abeero dunkaaniya matape kichite’ gada oda” yaagis.
16.25: Musey dendidi, Daatanekonne Abeeroko bin, Isra7eele cimati iya kaallidosona.
16.26: I Maabaraako, “Ha iita asaa dunkaaniya matape kichite; entaba aybibaaka bochofite. Akay, giiko, enta nagara gaason hinteka pitetidi dhayana” yaagidi minthidi odis.
16.27: Yaatin asay Qore, Daatanenne Abeero dunkaaniya matape kichidosona. Daataneynne Abeeroy kare keyidi, banta machetaranne banta naytara banta dunkaaneta pengen eqidosona.
16.28: Musey asaako, “Taani ha ooso ubbaa oothana mela, Goday tana kiittidaysanne taani ta shenen oothonaysa hinte eranay haysana.
16.29: Ha asati asi hayqeysada hayqiko woyko asa bolla gakiyaba xalaali enta bolla gakiko Goday tana Kiittibeenna.
16.30: Shin, Goday oorathaba oothidi, biittay dooyetidi entanne entaw de7iyaba ubbaa mittikonne enti paxa de7ishe duufo geliko he wode ha asati Godaa kadhidaysa hinte erana” yaagis.
16.31: I yaagidi ongida wode enti eqida biittay dooyetidi,
16.32: entanne enta soo asaa, Qore cuga ubbaanne entaw de7iyaba ubbaa mittis.
16.33: Yaatin enti bantaw de7iyaba ubbaara paxa de7ishe, duufo gelidosona. Biittay enta bolla gordetis; enti maabara giddofe dhayidosona.
16.34: Enta waasuwa gaason enta matan de7iya Isra7eele asa ubbay, “Biittay nunaka mittana hanees” yaagidi baqatidosona.
16.35: Qassi tami Godaa matape yidi ixaane cuyisiya nam7u xeetanne ishatamu asaa mis.
16.37: “Kahiney, Aarona na7aa Alaazari naase biratape oosetida ixaane cuyisiya miisheta xuugetida asaape ekidi, he miisheti geeshshi gidiya gisho, bonqo tama hara soo efidi laallana mela oda.
16.38: He miisheti banta de7uwa dhaysanaw nagara oothida asay ixaane cuyisiya miishe. He miisheti Godaas imetida gishonne geeshshi gidiya gisho lee7isa qoxada yarsho bessa lanxa. Hessi Isra7eele asaas naagiso malla gido” yaagis.
16.39: Yaatin kahiney Alaazari ixaane cuyisiya miisheta ekidi yarsho bessa lanxanaw lee7isidi qoxis.
16.40: Goday Muse baggara kiitidaysada, Aarona koche gidonna oonika Godaa sinthan ixaane cuyisanaw shiiqonna mela, ixas giiko, Qore bollanne iya kaalleyisata bolla gakidaysi iya gakonna mela Isra7eele asaa akeekisanaw haysata oothis.
16.41: Wontetha gallas Isra7eele maabara ubbay, “Godaa asaa hinte wodhideta” yaagidi Muse bollanne Aarona bolla zuuzumidosona.
16.42: Enti Musenne Aarona bolla dendanaw shiiqidi, enti geeshsha dunkaaniya xeelliya wode shaaray geeshsha dunkaaniya kammin, Godaa bonchoy qoncis.
16.43: Hessafe guye, Museynne Aaroni geeshsha dunkaaniya sinthe yidi eqidosona.
16.45: “Ha asaa giddofe kichite; ta enta issi tohon dhaysana” yaagis. Museynne Aaroni sa7an gufannidosona.
16.46: Musey Aaronako, “Ixaane cuyisiya ne miishiya ekada yarsho bessaafe bonqo tama ekada iyan wotha; iya bolla ixaane gujada Isra7eele maabaraako efa. Godaa hanqoy iya matape keyi kichis; boshayka doomis” yaagis.
16.47: Yaatin Aaroni, Musey kiitidaysada ba ixaane cuyisiya miishiya ekidi maabara giddo woxidi gelis. Boshay asaa wodho oykis shin, Aaroni ixaane cuyisidi asaas atotethi ehis.
16.48: Yaatidi, I hayqidaysatanne paxata giddon eqin, boshay aggis.
16.49: Qore gaason hayqida asay attishin, he boshan hayqida asaa tayboy 14,700.
16.50: Boshay eqidaape guye, Aaroni geeshsha dunkaaniya pengen de7iya Museko simmis.

17.1: Goday Museko,
17.2: “Isra7eele asay issi issi kochaa halaqatape issi issi xam7a ekidi tammanne nam7u xam7a new ehana mela entaw oda. He xam7aa bolla issi issi asaa sunthaa xaafa.
17.3: Issi issi kochaa halaqaas issi xam7a koshshiya gisho, Leewe xam7aa bolla Aarona sunthaa xaafa.
17.4: He xam7ata geeshsha dunkaaniya giddon ta neera gahetiya Taabotiya sinthan wotha.
17.5: Ta dooriya uraa xam7ay aacana; hessada oothada hinte bolla Isra7eele asaa zuuzuntha ta teqana” yaagis.
17.6: Hessa Musey Isra7eele asaas odin, tammanne nam7u halaqati huuphen huuphen issi issi xam7a ehidosona. Aarona xam7ayka he xam7ata giddon de7ees.
17.7: Musey he xam7ata ubbaa geeshsha dunkaaniya giddon Godaa sinthan wothis.
17.8: Wontetha gallas Musey geeshsha dunkaaniya giddo geliya wode Leewe koche gidida Aarona xam7ay aacidaysa, gambuxidaysa, ciiyidaysanne lawuze mitha ayfe ayfidaysa be7is.
17.9: Musey xam7a ubbaa Godaa sinthafe ehidi Isra7eele asaa bessis. Enti hanidaba be7idaape guye issi issi halaqay banta xam7aa xam7aa ekidosona.
17.10: Goday Museko, “Aarona xam7aa Taabotiya sinthan zaarada wotha. Makallida Isra7eele asay ta bolla zuuzuntha aggonna ixiko hayqanaysa entaw malaata oothada wotha” yaagis.
17.11: Musey, Goday kiitidaysada oothis.
17.12: Isra7eele asay Museko, “Hessa gidiko, nu ubbay hayqana; dhayana.
17.13: Geeshsha dunkaaniyako shiiqiya ubbay hayqana gidiko, nu ubbayka hayqoos guusseyee?” yaagidosona.

18.1: Goday Aaronako, “Geeshsha dunkaaniyan oosetiya nagaraas neeni, ne adde naytinne ne aawa soo asay oyshetana; hinte kahinetetha oosuwan poletiya nagaraa nenne ne adde nayta xalaali oyshetana.
18.2: Neeninne ne adde nayti geeshsha dunkaaniya sinthan oothiya wode hintena oothidi maadana mela Leewe koche gidida ne dabbota eha.
18.3: Enti hintefe garsan geeshsha dunkaaniya ooso ubbaa oothonna; shin entika hinteka hayqonna mela enti geeshsha dunkaaniya miishiyakonne yarsho bessaako shiiqopo.
18.4: Enti hintera issife gididi geeshsha Dunkaaniyan de7iya ooso ubbaa ootho. Shin Leewetape attishin, hara asi oonika hinte de7iya bessaa shiiqopo.
18.5: Zaaridi Isra7eele asaa bolla hanqoy wodhonna mela geeshsha dunkaaniyaninne yarsho bessan oosetiya oosuwa hinte xalaala oothite.
18.6: Leeweta, hinte dabbota, Isra7eele asaa giddofe ta dooras. Enti geeshsha dunkaaniya oosuwa oothana mela taani enta taw dummayas.
18.7: Shin yarsho bessaaninne magarajuwafe gaatha baggan de7iya oosuwa nenne ne adde nayta xalaali oothite. Kahinetetha oosuwa taani hintew imota oothada immas; hara asi oonika he bessaa shiiqiko hayqo” yaagis.
18.8: Goday Aaronako, “Isra7eele asay taw immiya geeshsha imota ubbaa ta new immas. Taani newunne ne adde naytas merinaa gisho oothada immas.
18.9: Taw imetiya daro geeshsha imuwape taman xuugetonna baggay hintebaa gidana. Enti taw immiya geeshsha imo ubbay katha yarsho gidin nagara yarsho gidin naaqo yarsho gidin newunne ne adde naytas gidana.
18.10: Hinte hessa geeshsha bessan miite; adde ubbay hessa mo; hessi hintew geeshshi gidana.
18.11: “Qassi Isra7eele asay taw yarshiya yuusho yarsho ubbaa new, ne adde naytasinne ne macca naytas merinaw gisho oothada immas; hinte soo asaa giddon wogada tuna gidonna ubbay hessa mo.
18.12: “Isra7eele asay taw bayra oothidi immiya koyro ayfiyape, shamaho zayte ubbaa, yalaga woyne ubbaanne katha ubbaa new immas.
18.13: Enti Godaas ehiya gaden koyro gakida ayfey hintesa; hinte soo asaa giddon wogaada tuna gidonna ubbay hessa mo.
18.14: “Isra7eele asaa giddofe Godaas dummatida ubbay hintesa.
18.15: Bayra yeletida asi woyko mehey Isra7eele asay Godaas immida ubbay hintesa. Shin bayra yeletida adde na7anne bayra yeletida geeshshi gidonna mehe hinte wozanaw bessees.
18.16: Issi ageena nayta wozanaw geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen ichashu bira santime wozo gate qanxite.
18.17: Shin enti geeshshi gidiya gisho mehe, dorsenne deesha bayra hinte wozanaw koshshenna. Enta suutha yarsho bessa bolla gussa; Godaas sawiya xuussa yarsho oothada enta modho ashuwa taman xuugga.
18.18: Angaasoynne ushacha geday yuusho yarshon nebaa gididaysada enta ashoyka nebaa.
18.19: Isra7eele asay Godaas immiya geeshsha yarsho ubbaa new, ne adde naytasinne ne macca naytas merinaw gisho oothada immas. Hessi taani neeranne ne kochaara caaqiya merinaa caaquwa.”
18.20: Qassika Goday Aaronako, “Enta biittafe nena gakiya gishoy woyko laati baawa; Isra7eele asaa giddon ne laataynne nena gakiya gishoy tana.”
18.21: Goday, “Leeweti geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothiya oosuwas damooze gidana mela Isra7eele asay taw ehiya asraata ubbaa entaw immas.
18.22: Hachife doomidi Isra7eele asay banta nagara gaason hayqonna mela geeshsha dunkaaniyako shiiqopo.
18.23: Geeshsha dunkaaniya giddon ootheysatinne iya giddon poletiya nagaraa tookey Leeweta. Hessi yeletetha ubbaas merinaa woga. Leewetas Isra7eele asaa giddon laati baawa.
18.24: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele asay Godaas immiya asraata, ta Leewetas immas. Taani, entaw Isra7eele asaa giddon laati baawa giday hessasa” yaagis.
18.26: “Neeni Leewetako haysada yaaga; taani hintew laata oothada immida asraata hinte Isra7eele asaape ekiya wode hinte he asraatape asraata Godaas immite.
18.27: Hinte imoy wudummafe shiiqida kathada woyko gum7iya bessaafe ha77i keyida woyneda hintew taybetana.
18.28: Hessadaka Isra7eele asaape hinte ekiya asraata ubbaafe dumma imo Godaas immite; hinte asraatape Godaa gisho gidida imota kahiniya Aaronas immite.
18.29: Hinte ekiya imota ubbaafe lo77uwanne geeshsha Godaas gisho oothidi immanaw bessees.
18.30: Ubbaafe lo77o imuwa hinte immiya wode attidaysi hintew buketiya wudumma kathaadanne gum7etiya woyniyada taybetana.
18.31: Attidaysi geeshsha Dunkaaniyan hinte oothiya oosuwas damooze gidiya gisho hintenne hinte soo asay awunka maanaw danda7eeta.
18.32: Lo77o baggaa Godaas immidaape guye hinte miiko hessi hintew nagara gidenna. Lo77o baggaa kessonna de7ishe he imotape midi hinte Isra7eele asaa imota tunisonna mela naagetite; hessa hinte oothonna ixiko hinte hayqana” yaagada Leewetas oda.

19.1: Goday Musekonne Aaronako,
19.2: “Goday higgiyan kiitetida wogay haysa; borsoy bayna, I gannan qambari wodhiboonna zo7o ussu ehana mela Isra7eele asaas odite.
19.3: Kahiniya Alaazaras iyo immite; gutaape iyo gaxa kessidi kahiniya sinthan shuko.
19.4: Kahiney Alaazari I suuthaafe guuthara ekidi ba biradhiyan geeshsha dunkaaniyako simmidi laapun toho wurxo.
19.5: Kahiney be7ishin ussiya xuugeto; galbay, ashoy, suuthaynne tocey xuugeto.
19.6: Kahiney ziga mithi, hisoophe tashenne zo7o qacina ekidi ussiya eexiya taman yeggo.
19.7: Hessafe guye, kahiney ba ma7uwanne ba asatethaa meecetidi gutaa gelo; shin omarsi gakanaw wogaada tuna gidana.
19.8: He ussiw xuuggidaysi ba ma7uwanne ba asatethaa meeceto; ika omarsi gakanaw wogaada tuna gidana.
19.9: “Hessafe guye, hara geeshsha asi ussiya xuugetida biduwa shiishidi gutaape gaxan geeshsha bessan wotho. Isra7eele asay tunatethaafe geeshshiya haathan go7etanaw hessi naagetidi uttana; hessi nagaraape geeshshanaw go77ees.
19.10: Qassi ussee biduwa shiishida urayka ba ma7uwa meecco; I omarsi gakanaw wogaada tuna gidana. Ha wogay Isra7eele asaasinne enta giddon de7iya hara dere asaas merinaa woga gidana.
19.11: “Aha bochiya oonika laapun gallas wogaada tuna gidana.
19.12: Tunatethaafe geeshshiya haathan heedzantho gallasinne laapuntha gallas I bana geeshsho; hessafe guye, I wogaada geeshshi gidana. Shin heedzantho gallasinne laapuntha gallas I bana geeshshona ixiko I geeshshi gidenna.
19.13: Hayqida asa aha bochiya oonika bana geeshshonna ixiko I Godaa dunkaaniya tunisees; he uray Isra7eele asaa giddofe kuretto. Tunatethaafe geeshshiya haathay iya bolla wurxetiboona gisho I tuna; I tuna gididi gam7ees.
19.14: “Issi asi dunkaaniya giddon hayqiko oothana wogay haysa; unkaaniya giddo geliya oonika, qassi dunkaaniya giddon de7iya oonika laapun gallas gakanaw tuna gidana.
19.15: Hessadaka, kamettonna dooya de7iya miishe ubbay tuna gidana.
19.16: Qassi denban hayqida asa aha woyko hargetidi hayqida asa aha woyko meqethi woyko duufo bochiya oonika laapun gallas gakanaw tuna gidana.
19.17: “Tunatethaafe geeshshanaw xuugetida ussee biduwape guuthara ekada oton yeggada pulto haathe iya bolla tiga.
19.18: Geeshsha asi hisoophe wurco ekidi haathan naaqi kessidi, dunkaaniya, iya giddon de7iya miishiyanne asa ubbaa bolla wurxo. Qassi hayqida asa aha woyko meqethi woyko duufo woyko hargeti hayqida asi bochida asa bolla wurxo.
19.19: Geeyida asi heedzantho gallasinne laapuntha gallas geeyiboonna uraa bolla wurxo. I laapuntha gallas he uraa tunatethaafe geeshsho; he geeyida addey, ba ma7uwanne ba asatethaa meeceto; he gallas omarsi I geeshshi gidana.
19.20: “Shin tuna uray bana geeshshonna ixiko, he uray geeshsha dunkaaniya tunisida gisho, Isra7eele asaa giddofe kuretto; tunatethaafe geeshshiya haathay iya bolla wurxetiboona gisho I tuna.
19.21: Haysi hintew merina woga gidana. Tunatethaafe geeshshiya haatha wurxiya uray ba ma7uwa meecco; qassi tunatethaafe geeshshiya haatha bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna gidana.
19.22: Tuna uray bochiya aybibayka tunees; qassi he miishiya bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees” yaagis.

20.1: Koyro ageenan Isra7eele asa ubbay Siina mela biitta gakidi, Qaadesa geetetiya bessan dunkaanidosona. Mayraama yan hayqada moogetasu.
20.2: He bessan asaas haathi dhayin, asay Muse bollanne Aarona bolla dendidosona.
20.3: Enti, “Nu ishati Godaa sinthan hayqida wode nuka hayqida gidorkoshin.
20.4: Nunne nu mehey ha mela biittan hayqana mela Godaa maabara ha bessa ayis ehidetii?
20.5: Gibxefe kessidi ha iita bessaa nuna ayis ehidetii? Haysan kathi woyko balasey woyko woyney woyko oromaaney baawa; hari attoshin uyetiya haathika haysan baawa” yaagidi Musera kacetidosona.
20.6: Yaatin Museynne Aaroni asaa matape geeshsha dunkaaniya penge bidi sa7an gufannidosona; Godaa bonchoyka entaw qoncis.
20.7: Goday Museko,
20.8: “Ne xam7a eka; neeranne ne ishaa Aaronara maabara shiishite. Enta sinthan zaallay haathe kessana mela oda. Hinte zaallafe haathe kessidi, entanne enta mehiya ushshana” yaagis.
20.9: Goday kiitidaysada Musey Godaa sinthafe xam7aa ekis.
20.10: Museynne Aaroni maabara zaalla sinthan shiiqana mela oothidi, asaako, “Hinteno geellato, si7ite; ha zaallafe hintew nuuni tuma haathe kessanee?” yaagis.
20.11: Musey ba xam7a denthidi zaalla nam7u toho shocis; haathi dhuuqidi keyin entinne enta meheti uyidosona.
20.12: Shin Goday Musekonne Aaronako, “Isra7eele asaa sinthan hinte ta geeshshatetha bessanaw ammanetibona gisho ta entaw immiya biitta ha asaa kaalethidi hinte geleketa” yaagis.
20.13: Isra7eele asay Godaara kacetida gishonne Goday ba geeshshatetha enta giddon qoncisida gisho he bessay Mariba haatha geetetis. Isra7eeleti Edoomera Aadhethi Digetidosona
20.14: Edoome kawako Musey Qaadesape haysada yaagidi kiita yeddis. “Ne ishay Isra7eeley haysada yaagees; nuna gakida meto ubbaa ne si7adasa.
20.15: Nu mayzati duge Gibxe wodhidosona; yan nuuni daro laythi de7ida. Gibxeti nunanne nu aawata un7ethidosona.
20.16: Nuuni Godaako waassin, I nu waasuwa si7idi, ba kiitanchuwa Kiitidi nuna Gibxefe kessis. Ha77i nuuni ne biitta gaxan de7iya Qaadesa kataman de7oos.
20.17: Hayyana, nuuni ne biittaara kanthidi aadhana mela ootharki; nuuni ogepe gaxa keyoko; ne goshsha woyko woyne gade giddo geloko; nuuni haatha ollafe haathe uyoko. Nuuni kawo oge oykidi baana; nuuni ne biittara kanthidi aadhana gakanaw haddirsi woyko ushachi gooko” yaagis.
20.18: Shin Edoome asay, “Nu biittaara kanthisoko; hinte haysara kanthanaw qopiko, nuuni dendidi hintena olana” yaagidosona.
20.19: Yaatin Isra7eele asay, “Nuuni kawo ogiyara baana; nuuni woyko nu mehey hinte haathaafe uyiko, nuuni hessas gate ciggana; nuuni tohora aadhetha xalaala koyoos; haraba aykoka koyoko” yaagidosona.
20.20: Edoome asay zaaridi, “Hinte haysara aadhanaw danda7eketa” yaagis. Kaallidi, daronne wolqaama olanchota ekidi Isra7eele asaa olanaw keyis.
20.21: Edoome asay banta biittara Isra7eele asaa aathona ixin, Isra7eele asay simmidi hara ogera bidosona.
20.22: Isra7eele asa ubbay Qaadesape dendidi Hoora zumako bidosona.
20.23: Edoome zawan de7iya Hoora zuman, Goday Musekonne Aaronako,
20.24: “Aaroni ba mayzatan gahetiya wodey gakis. Hinte nam7ay Mariba haatha matan ta kiitaa bolla geellatida gisho Isra7eele asaas ta immiya biitta I gelenna.
20.25: Aaronanne iya na7aa Alaazara ekada Hoora zuma bolla keya.
20.26: Aarona kahinetetha ma7uwa qaarada, iya na7aa Alaazara mayza. Aaroni yan hayqana” yaagis.
20.27: Goday kiitidaysada Musey oothis; Isra7eele asa ubbay be7ishin, enti Hoora zuma bolla keyidosona.
20.28: Musey Aarona kahinetetha ma7uwa qaaridi iya na7aa Alaazara mayzis. Aaroni he zuma huuphen hayqis. Museynne Alaazari zumaape wodhidosona.
20.29: Aaroni hayqidaysa Isra7eele asay erida wode Isra7eele asay Aaronas hastamu gallas yeekidosona.

21.1: Kanaane biittan, Negebe mela biittan de7iya Arada Kawoy, Isra7eele asay Ataarima efiya ogiyara yeysa si7ida wode Isra7eele asaara oletidi entafe guutha asaa di7idosona.
21.2: He wode Isra7eele asay, “Neeni ha asaa nu kushen aathada immiko, nuuni entanne enta katamata kumethi dhaysana” yaagidi Godaas qangidosona.
21.3: Goday Isra7eele asaa woosa si7idi, Kanaaneta enta kushen aathidi immin, enti Kanaanetanne enta katamata kumethi dhaysidosona. Hessa gisho, he bessay Horma geetetidi sunthetis. Naase Biratape Oosetida Shooshu
21.4: Isra7eele asay Hoora zumaape dendidi, Edoome biitta yuushuwara baanaw Zo7o Abbaako efiya ogiyara bidosona; shin oge bolla asaas danda7ay wuris.
21.5: Asay, “Nuuni mela biitta hayqana mela Gibxefe nuna ayis kessidetii? Kathi baawa; haathi baawa; ha iita kathay nuna shaattis” yaagidi Xoossaa bollanne Muse bolla zuuzumidosona.
21.6: Yaatin, Goday asaa giddo marzera de7iya shooshi yeddin, Isra7eele asaape daroti duketidi hayqidosona.
21.7: Asay Museko yidi, “Nuuni Godaa bollanne ne bolla zuuzumidi, nagara oothida. Goday ha shooshata nuupe haassana mela nuus woossarki” yaagidosona. Yaatin, Musey asaa gisho woossis.
21.8: He wode Goday Museko, “Naase biratape shooshi medhada, enta sinthan mitha bolla kaqa; shooshan duketida oonika iya be7iko paxana” yaagis.
21.9: Yaatin, Musey naase biratape shooshi medhidi, mitha bolla kaqis. Shooshan duketida asa ubbay naase birata shooshaa be7idi paxidosona. Hoora Zumaape Moo7abe Gakanaw
21.10: Isra7eele asay Hoorape dendidi Obota geetetiya bessan dunkaanidosona.
21.11: Obotape dendidi, Moo7abepe sintha baggan de7iya mela biittan, doloha baggan Abariiman dunkaanidosona.
21.12: Yaape dendidi, Zareeda Zangaaran dunkaanidosona.
21.13: Yaape dendidi, Amooreta biitta gaxa gakanaw de7iya mela biittan Arnoona Shaafape hefinthan dunkaanidosona. Arnoona Shaafay Moo7abe biittasinne Amoore biittas giddon de7iya zawa.
21.14: Hessa gisho, Godaa ola taarikiya odiya maxaafan, “Suufa heeran de7iya Waaheba katamaanne Arnoona Shaafa zangaara,
21.15: Era katamaanne Moo7abe biitta zawa gakanaw de7iya zangaara” yaagetidi xaafetis.
21.16: Enti yaape dendidi, Goday Museko, “Asaa shiisha; ta entaw haathe immana” yaagidi odida Beera geetetiya haatha ollaako bidosona.
21.17: He wode Isra7eele asay ha mazmuriya yexidosona. “Haatha ollaw, pulta; Hinteka yexite.
21.18: Halaqati bookida haatha ollaas, kaaletheysati kawotetha xam7aninne banta xam7an bookida haatha ollaas yexite” yaagis. Enti he mela biittafe dendidi Mataana geetetiya bessaa bidosona.
21.19: Maatanape Nahili7eela, Nahali7eelape Baamota geetetiya bessaa bidosona.
21.20: Baamotape dendidi, Moo7aben de7iya zangaara bidosona; he zangaaray Pisga zumaape garsan bazzuwa ginan de7ees. Sihoonanne Ooge Xoonetethaa
21.21: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asay Amoore kawa Sihooneko haysada yaagidi kiita yeddidosona.
21.22: “Hayyana, nu ne biittara kanthidi aadhana mela ootharki; nuuni ogepe gaxa keyoko; ne goshsha woyko woyne gade giddo geloko; nuuni haatha ollafe haathe uyoko. Nuuni ne biittara kanthidi aadhana gakanaw haddirsi woyko ushachi gooko” yaagis.
21.23: Sihooney Isra7eele asay ba biittara kanthonna mela diggis. I ba olanchota ubbaa shiishidi, Isra7eele asaa olanaw mela biitta bis; Yahaaxa geetetiya bessaa bidi Isra7eele asaara oletis.
21.24: Isra7eele asay olan Amooretape darota mashshan wodhidi, Arnoona Shaafape doomidi, Amooneta zawan de7iya Yaaboqa shaafa gakanaw oykis. Amoone asaa biitta zaway gimbetidi de7iya gisho, enti yaa gelibookona.
21.25: Isra7eele asay Amooreta, Haseboonanne iya yuushuwan de7iya katamata ubbaa xooni ekidi yan uttidosona.
21.26: Haseboona katamay Amooreta kawa Sihoone uttiya katama. Sihooney kase Moo7abe biitta kawa olidi, Arnoona shaafa gakanaw de7iya biitta ubbaa ekis.
21.27: Hessa gisho, leemison haysada yaagidosona; “Haseboonako haayite; ha katamay zaaridi keexeto; Sihoone katamay kase ba bessaa simmo.
21.28: Tami Haseboonape keyis; lacoy Sihoona kataman bentis; Moo7aben de7iya Era dhaysis; Arnoona dhoqa bessata mis.
21.29: Moo7abe, nena ayye! Kamoosha asay dhayideta. Hinte adde nayti baqatanaada, hinte macca nayti di7etanaada, Amooreta kawa Sihoones immis.
21.30: Nuuni hinte kochata Haseboonape doomidi, Diboona gakanaw kumethi dhaysida. Medeba matan de7iya Noofa gakanaw de7iya ubbaa tami dhaysis” yaagidosona.
21.31: Yaatidi, Isra7eele asay Amooreta biittan de7idosona.
21.32: Qassi Musey wocheyisata Ya7izeera katamaa yeddin, Isra7eele asay he katamaanne iya heeran de7iya guutha katamata oykidi, yan de7iya Amooreta kessidi goodidosona.
21.33: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asay simmidi, Baasane efiya ogiyara keyidosona. Baasane kawoy Oogey ba olanchotara Edraa7a kataman entara oletanaw keyis.
21.34: Shin Goday Museko, “Ha uraas babofa; hiza, kawa Ooge, iya asaanne iya biitta ubbaa ne kushen aathada immas. Haseboonan uttidi haarida Amooreta kawa Sihoone bolla ootheysada neeni iya bolla oothana” yaagis.
21.35: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele asay Ooge, iya naytanne iya asa ubbaa issoy attonna wodhidi iya biitta laattidosona.

22.1: Isra7eele asay dendidi, Iyaarko ginan, Yordaanosepe hefinthan de7iya Moo7abe denban dunkaanidosona.
22.2: Isra7eele asay Amooreta bolla oothidaysa ubbaa Sifoora na7ay Balaaqi si7is.
22.3: Isra7eele asay daro gidida gisho, Moo7abeti daro dagammidi yayidosona.
22.4: Moo7abeti Midiyaame cimatako, “Boori maata pitidi midi dhayseysada ha wude asay nu yuushuwan de7iya ubbaa midi dhaysana” yaagidosona. He wode Moo7abe kawoy, Sifoora na7ay Balaaqi,
22.5: Amawa biittan, Efraxiisa shaafa matan, Patoora kataman de7iya Bi7oora na7aa Balaamako haysada yaagidi kiittis. “Gibxefe keyida daro asay biitta ubbaa ma7idi, ta matan dunkaanidosona.
22.6: Enti taape daro wolqaama gidiya gisho, hayyana yada enta baaddarki. Ooni eri, ta enta xoonanawunne biittafe kessanaw danda7ana. Hiza, neeni anjeysi anjeteysa qassi neeni baaddeysi baadetidaba gideysa taani erayis” yaagis.
22.7: Moo7abe cimatinne Midiyaame cimati baadetha miishiya ekidi Balaamako bidi Balaaqi gidaysa iyaw odidosona.
22.8: Balaami entako, “Hachi qamma haysan aqite; Goday taw odeysa ta hintew odana” yaagis. Yaanin, Moo7abe halaqati Balaamara gam7idosona.
22.9: Xoossay Balaama, “Haysati neera de7iya asati oonee?” yaagidi oychis.
22.10: Balaami Xoossaako, “Moo7abe kawoy, Sifoora na7ay Balaaqi,
22.11: ‘Gibxefe keyida daro asay, enti biitta ubbaa kumidosona. Neeni yada, enta baaddarki. Ooni eri, ta enta xoonanawunne biittafe kessanaw danda7onna aggike’ yaagidi enta taako Kiittis” yaagis.
22.12: Yaatin Xoossay Balaamako, “Neeni entara boopa; Isra7eele asay anjetida dere gidiya gisho, neeni enta baaddofa” yaagis.
22.13: Wontetha gallas wonta Balaami dendidi, Balaaqa halaqatako, “Taani hintera boonnada Goday diggida gisho, hinte biitta simmite” yaagis.
22.14: Moo7abe halaqati Balaaqako guye simmidi, “Balaami nuura yoonna ixis” yaagidosona.
22.15: Zaaridi Balaaqi kaseysatape aadho bonchetidanne taybon daro halaqata iyako kiittis.
22.16: Enti Balaamako bidi, “Sifoora na7ay Balaaqi, ‘Neeni taako yaanaysa nena aybika teqofo.
22.17: Ta new daro woyto immana; ne oychiyaba ubbaa ta new oothana. Hayyana yada ha asaa baaddarki’ yaagis” yaagidi odidosona.
22.18: Shin Balaami entako, “Balaaqi hari attoshin ba kawotethan kumida biraanne worqaa taw immiyaba gidikoka Godaa, ta Xoossaa kiitaa menthada aykoka pacisanaw woyko gujanaw danda7ike.
22.19: Goday taw bessiya harabay de7iko ta erana mela hinteka hachi qamma haysan aqite” yaagis.
22.20: He qamma Xoossay Balaamako, “Ha asay nena xeeganaw yida gisho, neeni entara ba; shin ta new odeysa xalaala ootha” yaagis. Balaamanne Iya Haariw
22.21: Yaatin wontetha gallas Balaami ba hariw kooridi Moo7abe halaqatara bis.
22.22: Shin I biya gisho Xoossay hanqetis. He wode Balaami ba hariw toggidi, ba nam7u aylletara bishin Godaa kiitanchoy iya teqanaw ogen eqis.
22.23: Godaa kiitanchoy mashsha shoddidi ogen eqidaysa hariya be7ada, ogiya aggada goshsha giddo gelasu. Balaami hariw ogen zaaranaw shocis.
22.24: Yaatin, Godaa kiitanchoy nam7u woyne gadetape giddon ya baggaranne ha baggara gimben diretida xuntha ogen eqis.
22.25: Hariya Godaa kiitanchuwa be7ida wode gimbe dirsaako shiiqida, Balaama tohuwa gimbe dirsara oythasu; yaatin I hariw nam7antho shocis.
22.26: Hessafe guye, Godaa kiitanchoy sintha aadhidi, haddirsi woyko ushachi simmanaw ogey bayna xuntha bessan eqis.
22.27: Hariya Godaa kiitanchuwa be7ada, Balaami toggidi de7ishin zin7asu; Balaami daro yilotidi, ba xam7an hariw shocis.
22.28: Hessafe guye, Goday harey doona dooyin, hariya Balaama, “Ta new ay iissin tana heedzu toho shocadii?” yaagasu.
22.29: Balaami zaaridi, “Neeni tana yiloyida gishosa; ta kushen mashshi de7iyaba gidiyako ta nena ha77i wodhanashin” yaagis.
22.30: Hariya Balaamako, “Neeni hachi gakanaw toggiya ne hariw gidikina? Taani new haysada hana eriyana?” yaagasu. Balaami zaaridi, “Hana eraka” yaagis.
22.31: He wode Goday Balaama ayfiya dooyin, Godaa kiitanchoy shodetida mashsha oykidi ogen eqidaysa be7is. I lichi gidi som7ora sa7an gufannis.
22.32: Godaa kiitanchoy, “Ne hariw heedzu toho ayis shocadii? Ne ogey ta sinthan geella gidiya gisho ta nena teqanaw yas.
22.33: Hariya tana be7ada ta sinthafe heedzu toho hara soo simmasu. Hariya hara soo simmaboonnaba gidiyako, hannoode ta nena wodhada hariw ashshanashin” yaagis.
22.34: Balaami zaaridi, “Taani nagara oothas; neeni tana teqanaw oge bolla eqidaysa ta erabike. Ne dosonnaba gidiko ta ha77i guye simmana” yaagis.
22.35: Shin kiitanchoy Balaamako, “Neeni ha asatara ba; shin ta new odeysa xalaala oda” yaagis. Yaatin, Balaami Balaaqa biitta halaqatara bis.
22.36: Balaami yeysa Balaaqi si7ida wode Arnoona shaafa gaxan ba biitta zawan de7iya Moo7abeta kataman iya mokanaw bis.
22.37: Balaaqi Balaamako, “Neeni ellesada yaana mela ta kiittabikina? Neeni ayis taako ellesada yabikii? Taani new kushe zaaranaw danda7ikina?” yaagis.
22.38: Balaami Balaaqako, “Heko, ha77i ta neeko yas; shin ta aykoka taape gaanaw danda7ike. Xoossay tana oda gidaba xalaala odana” yaagis.
22.39: Yaatin, Balaami Balaaqara Qiriyat-Haxoota katamaa bis.
22.40: Yan Balaaqi mehenne dorse yarshidi, ashuwape guuthara Balaamasinne iyara de7iya halaqatas immis.
22.41: Wontetha gallas Balaaqi Balaama Baamot-Ba7aali geetetiya bessa kessis; Balaami yan eqidi Isra7eele asape baggaa be7is.

23.1: Balaami Balaaqako, “Haysan taw laapun yarsho bessata gimba; qassi laapun kormatanne laapun marazeta taw giigisa” yaagis.
23.2: Balaami gidaysada Balaaqi oothis; enti nam7ay issi issi yarsho bessan issi kormanne issi maraze yarshidosona.
23.3: Yaatidi, Balaami Balaaqako, “Neeni ne yarshuwa matan de7aasha; taani gede baana. Ooni eri Goday taara gahetanaw yoonna aggenna; I taw qoncisiyaba ubbaa ta new odana” yaagidi issi dere bolla keyis.
23.4: Yan Xoossay Balaamara gahetin, Balaami, “Taani laapun yarsho bessata giigisas; issi issi yarsho bessan issi kormanne issi maraze yarshas” yaagis.
23.5: Balaami gaanaba Goday iyaw odidi, “Neeni Balaaqako simmada iyaw ha kiita oda” yaagis.
23.6: Balaami simmiya wode Balaaqi Moo7abe halaqata ubbaara ba yarshuwa matan eqis.
23.7: Balaami haysada yaagidi tinbite odis; “Moo7abe kawoy, Balaaqi, doloha bagga deretape, Soore biittafe tana ehis; ‘Haa ya; Yayqooba taw bada; Isra7eele asaa baadda’ yaagis.
23.8: Xoossi baaddiboonaysa ta waatada baaddo? Goday, baaddiboonaysa ta waatada baaddo?
23.9: Ta dhoqa zaalla huuphen eqada enta xeellayis; zumaa bolla eqada enta be7ayis. Enti bantarka de7iya dere; enti hara kawotethatape dumma gideysa eroosona.
23.10: Yayqooba baana ooni taybi onganee? Isra7eele saysuwa ooni taybi kanthanee? Xillota hayquwa ta hayqarkina; ta wursethay entaysada hano” yaagis.
23.11: Balaaqi Balaamako, “Neeni ta bolla oothiyabay aybee? Taani nena ta morketa baaddana mela ehas, shin neeni enta anjadasa; haraba aykoka oothabaaka” yaagis.
23.12: Balaami zaaridi, “Goday taw odeysafe haraa odoyee?” yaagis. Balaama Nam7antho Haasaya
23.13: Balaaqi Balaamako, “Enta neeni be7anaw danda7iya hara bessi taara yedha; yanka ne entafe guuthara be7aasape attishin, ubbaa be7aka. Neeni yan eqada enta baaddarki” yaagis.
23.14: Pisga deriya huuphen de7iya Xofima demba efis. Yan laapun yarsho bessata gimbidi, issi issi yarsho bessan issi kormanne issi maraze yarshis.
23.15: Balaami Balaaqako, “Neeni haysan ne yarshuwa matan de7aasha; taani Godaara gahetanaw gede baana” yaagis.
23.16: Goday Balaamara gahetidi, “Neeni Balaaqako simmada iyaw ha kiita oda” yaagis.
23.17: Balaami simmidi yaa wode Balaaqi Moo7abe biitta halaqatara yarshuwa matan eqidaysa demmis. Balaaqi iyako, “Goday new ay odidee?” yaagis.
23.18: Balaami haysada yaagidi tinbite odis; “Sifoora na7aw, Balaaqa, denda; ta odeysa loythada si7a.
23.19: Wordotanaw Xoossay ase gidenna; ba qofaa laammanaw asa na7a gidenna. Odidi, ba odidaysa oothennee? Woyko ba gidaysa polennee?
23.20: Taani anjanaw kiita ekas; I anjis; ta laammanaw danda7ike.
23.21: Yayqooba kochaa bolla iitabay yeenna; Isra7eele asaa metoy gakenna. Goday, enta Xoossay entara de7ees; I entaw kawo gideysa awaajosona.
23.22: Xoossay enta Gibxefe kessis; I mino menthada entaw oletees.
23.23: Yayqooba kochaa bolla biti oothenna; Isra7eele asaa qohana murunnoy baawa. Heko, Yayqoobasinne Isra7eeles ‘Xoossay oothidaba be7ite’ yaagana.
23.24: Ha asay macca gaammoda dendees; ba oykidaba maana gakanaw, ba wodhidaysa suuthaa uyana gakanaw, shemponna gaammoda dendoosona” yaagis.
23.25: Yaatin, Balaaqi Balaamako, “Ne enta ubbaka baaddofa; ubbaka anjofa” yaagis.
23.26: Balaami zaaridi, “Taani Goday giyaba xalaala oothana gada new odabikina?” yaagis. Balaama Heedzantho Haasaya
23.27: Balaaqi Balaamako, “Haaya; ta nena hara bessi efana. Ooni eri, hessan Xoossay ufaytidi, neeni yan eqada enta baaddana mela oothanaw danda7ees” yaagis.
23.28: Balaaqi Balaama bazzuwa duge xeelliya Paa7ora zuma bolla efis.
23.29: Balaami, “Neeni haysan taw laapun yarsho bessata gimba; qassi laapun kormatanne laapun marazeta taw giigisa” yaagis.
23.30: Balaami gidaysada Balaaqi oothis; issi issi yarsho bessan issi kormanne issi maraze yarshis.

24.1: Balaami Isra7eele anjeysi Godaa ufaysidaysa I be7ida wode kase I ootheysada bita malla koybeenna, shin ba som7uwa mela biittako zaaris.
24.2: I dhoqu gidi xeelliya wode Isra7eele asay ba kochan kochan dunkaanidi uttidaysa be7iya wode Xoossaa Ayyaanay iya bolla wodhis.
24.3: I haysada yaagidi tinbite odis; “Bi7oora na7aa Balaama tinbitiya; iya ayfey dooyetin xeelliya addiya tinbitiya;
24.4: Xoossay giyaba si7eysa tinbitiya; I som7ora gufannin, iya ayfey dooyetidaysi; Ubbaa danda7iya Xoossaa qoncethaa be7ida addiya tinbitey haysa.
24.5: Yayqooba, ne dunkaaneti, Isra7eele, ne gutati, ayba lo77oona.
24.6: Enti micetida zangaarada, shaafa gaxan de7iya atakiltiya bessada, Goday tokida godare uuthada, haatha gaxan de7iya ziga mithada hanoosona.
24.7: Enta xuggay haathan kumana; enta kochay gidiya haathi demmana. Enta kawoy kawa Agaagape aadhana; enta kawotethay bonchetana.
24.8: Xoossay enta Gibxefe kessis; I mino menthada entaw oletees. Enta morketa mentherethees; enta meqethaa gaaccees; ba dongiyan caddees.
24.9: Enti gaammoda zin7idosona; macca gaammoda zaqullidosona; enta boshechanaw danda7ey oonee? Enta anjiya ubbay anjetana; enta baaddiya ubbay baadetana” yaagis.
24.10: Yaatin, Balaaqi Balaama bolla yilotis. Ba kushiya baqidi Balaamako, “Ta morketa baaddana mela ta nena ehas, shin neeni heedzu toho enta anjadasa.
24.11: Ha77i ellesada ne soo ba; ta nena darobaa woytana gas, shin neeni woytuwa ekonna mela Goday nena diggis” yaagis.
24.12: Balaami Balaaqako zaaridi, “Neeni taako kiitida asaako,
24.13: ‘Balaaqi hari attoshin ba kawotethan kumida biraanne worqaa taw immiyaba gidikoka Goday odidaysa menthada lo77o woyko iita ta shenen oothanaw danda7ike. Taani Goday giyaba xalaala odana’ gada new odabikinayee?” yaagis. Balaama Oyddantho Haasaya
24.14: Balaami Balaaqako, “Taani ha77i ta asaako bayis; shin ne haaya; Isra7eele asay yaana wodiyan ne asaa oothanaba ta new odana” yaagis.
24.15: I ba tinbitiya haysada yaagidi odis; “Iya ayfey tishshi oothidi xeelliya, Bi7oora na7aa Balaama tinbitey haysa.
24.16: Haysi Xoossay giyaba si7eysa tinbitiya, Ubbaa danda7iya Xoossafe gidida eratethi de7iya uray. Lichi gidi som7ora gufannin, iya ayfey dooyetidaysinne Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa qoncethaa be7eysa tinbitey haysa.
24.17: “Taani iya be7ayis, shin wodey ha7i gidenna; ta iya xeellayis, shin matan deenna. Yayqooba sheeshape xoolintoy keyana; Isra7eelepe kawotetha xam7ay keyana. Moo7abe asaa som7uwa I gaaccana; Seeta asaa ubbaa huuphiya I tinchana.
24.18: Edoomey xoonetana; iya morkey Sayrey oyketana; shin Isra7eeley minni minni baana.
24.19: Yayqoobape haareysi keyana; kataman paxa attidaysata dhaysana” yaagis.
24.20: Hessafe guye, Balaami Amaaleqa be7idi haysada yaagidi tinbite odis; “Amaaleqi kawotethata giddon koyro, shin enta wursethay dhayo” yaagis.
24.21: Qassi Balaami Qeena be7idi haysada yaagidi tinbite odis. “Hinte de7iya bessay saro bessi; hinte keethay zaalla bolla keexetis.
24.22: Shin Asooreti hintena di77iya wode, hinte Qeena asay dhayana” yaagis.
24.23: Wursethan Balaami haysada yaagidi tinbite odis; “Xoossay hessa oothiya wode, ooni de7on daanaw danda7ii?
24.24: Markabeti Qophiroosape yaana; enti Asoorenne Ebeera xoonana; shin entika qassi dhayana” yaagis.
24.25: Hessafe guye, Balaami dendidi ba soo simmis; Balaaqika ba ogiya bis.

25.1: Isra7eele asay Seexima geetetiya bessan dunkaanidi de7ishin, Isra7eele addeti Moo7abe maccatara laymato doomidosona.
25.2: He maccasati banta xoossata yarshuwa maana mela xeegidosona. Enti he yarsho kathaa midi enta xoossata goyinnidosona.
25.3: Isra7eeleti Bi7eel-Fagoora geetetiya eeqa goyinnida gisho Goday enta bolla hanqetis.
25.4: Yaatin, Goday Museko, “Godaa hanqoy Isra7eelepe simmana mela kaalethiya asa ubbaa efada seeta gallas Godaa sinthan kaqa” yaagis.
25.5: Musey Isra7eele daynnatako, “Hinte issoy issoy Bi7eel-Fagoora geetetiya eeqa goyinnida asa ubbaa wodhite” yaagis.
25.6: Museynne maabaray ubbay geeshsha dunkaaniya pengen yeekishin, Isra7eeletape issoy Midiyaame maccasiw enta sinthara aathidi, ba keetha asaako ehis.
25.7: Kahiniya Aarona na7aa Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasi hessa be7ida wode maabara giddofe dendidi, toora ekidi,
25.8: Isra7eele addiya kaallidi dunkaaniya giddo gelidi, uraanne maccasiw tooran caddidi kanthi kessis. Hessi hanin Isra7eeleta wursiya gadoy eqis.
25.9: Shin he gadoy laatamanne oyddu mukulu asaa wodhis.
25.11: “Kahiniya Aarona na7aa Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasi Isra7eele asaa giddon taani ta bonchuwas misheteysada mishetida gisho, taani hinte bolla hanqetida hanquwa doshisis. Taani ta qaanatiyan enta polo dhaysabike.
25.12: Hessa gisho, taani ta sarotetha caaquwa iyara caaqanaysa Pinihaasas oda.
25.13: I ba Xoossaa bonchuwas mishetida gishonne Isra7eele asaas nagara atotetha ehida gisho, inne iya kochay merinaw kahine gidana” yaagis.
25.14: Midiyaame maccaseera hayqida uraa sunthay Saalu na7aa Zimira geetetees. Saalu Simoona kochan issi kochaa halaqa.
25.15: Hayqida Midiyaame maccase sunthay Kozibo; I aaway Zuri Midiyaameta kochaa halaqa.
25.18: Enti hintena morkidi Paa7oran cimmidosona qassi bosha gallas Paa7oran hayqida Midiyaameta kochaa halaqa na7e Kozibi gaason hintena morkidosona” yaagis.

26.1: Boshaape guye, Goday Musekonne kahiniya Aarona na7aa Alaazarako,
26.2: “Laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida Isra7eeleta, olanaw danda7eyisata ubbaa, enta keethan keethan taybite” yaagis.
26.3: Yaatin, Museynne kahiney Alaazari Yordaanose Shaafape hefinthan, Iyaarko matan, Moo7abe denban asaa shiishidi,
26.4: “Goday Muse kiitidaysada, laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida asaa taybidosona.” Gibxefe keyida Isra7eele asay haysata.
26.5: Isra7eele bayra na7aa Robeela kochati banta kochan kochan, Hanooka kochaa, Faalu kochaa,
26.7: Haysati Robeela kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 43,730.
26.9: Eli7aaba adde nayti Nemu7eela, Daatanenne Abeero. Daataninne Abeeroy maabaray dooridaysata, shin enti Qorenne iya kaalleysatara tobbidi Godaa bolla makallidi Muse bollanne Aarona bolla dendidosona.
26.10: Biittay dooyetidi enta Qorera issife mittis; enta kaalliya 250 asaa tami min hayqidosona. Yaatin, harati enta be7idi naagetana mela malla gididosona.
26.11: Shin Qore adde nayti ubbay hayqidi dhaybookona.
26.12: Simoona kochati banta kochan kochan, Nemu7eela kochaa, Yamina kochaa, Yakina kochaa,
26.14: Haysati Simoona kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 22,200.
26.15: Gaade kochati banta kocha kochan, Xifoona kochaa, Haggi kochaa, Shuuna kochaa,
26.18: Haysati Gaade kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 40,500.
26.19: Yihuda adde nayti Erinne Onani Kanaane biittan hayqidosona.
26.20: Yihuda kochati banta kochan kochan, Seela kochaa, Faaresa kochaanne Zara kochaa.
26.22: Haysati Yihuda kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 76,500.
26.23: Yisakoora kochati banta kochan kochan, Toolla kochaa, Puu7a kochaa,
26.25: Haysati Yisakoora kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 64,300.
26.26: Zabloona kochati banta kochan kochan, Sareda kochaa, Eloona kochaanne Yahilaala kochaa.
26.27: Haysati Zabloona kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 60,500.
26.28: Yoosefa nayta Minaasenne Efreema kochati banta kochan kochan,
26.29: Minaasey Makira yelis, Makiri Galada yelis.
26.30: Galada kochati, Izera koche, Kelega koche,
26.33: Hefeera na7ay Selophaadi macca na7a xalaala yelis; iyaw adde na7i baawa. Selophaada macca nayta sunthay Mahilo, No7o, Hoglo, Milkonne Tirxo.
26.34: Haysati Minaase kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 52,700.
26.35: Efreema kochati banta kochan kochan, Shutula kochaa, Bekera kochaa, Tahana kochatanne
26.37: Haysati Efreema kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 32,500. Yoosefa kochati banta kochan kochan haysata.
26.38: Biniyaame kochati banta kochan kochan, Beella kochaa, Asbeela kochaa, Akira kochaa,
26.40: Beella na7aa Arada kochaanne Beella na7aa Naamane kochaa.
26.41: Haysati Biniyaame kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 45,600.
26.44: Aseera kochati banta kochan kochan, Yimina kochaa, Yisiwa kochaa, Beri7a kochaa,
26.45: Beri7a na7a Hebeera kochaanne Beri7a na7aa Malki7eela kochaa.
26.46: Aseeras Saraho geetetiya macca na7i de7awusu.
26.47: Haysati Aseera kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 53,400.
26.48: Niftaaleme kochati banta kochan kochan, Yahixeela kochaa, Guna kochaa,
26.50: Haysati Niftaaleme kochata; enta kumetha tayboy 45,400.
26.51: Taybetida Isra7eele adde asaa tayboy kumethi 601,730.
26.53: “Ha kochatas enta sunthaa sunthaa taybuwan biitta shaakada laata oothada entaw imma.
26.54: Taybon dareysatas darsada qassi taybon guuxeysatas guuthada imma. Ubbayka xaafetida banta taybuwa keena eko.
26.55: Shin biittay saaman shaaketo; issi issi kochay laata ekey ba kochaa sunthan gido.
26.56: Issi issi laatay taybon darota giddoninne taybon guuthata giddon saaman shaaketees” yaagis.
26.57: Banta zerthan zerthan taybetida Leewe kochati haysata; Gedisoona kochaa, Qahaata kochaanne Meraara kochaa.
26.58: Haysatika qassi Leewe kochata; Libina kochaa, Kebroona kochaa, Mohoola kochaa, Muse kochaanne Qore kochaa. Qahaati Amraama yelis.
26.59: Amraama mache sunthay Yokebeedo; iya Gibxen Leewepe yeletida Leewe na7a. Iya Aarona, Musenne enta michiw Mayraamo yelasu.
26.60: Aaronas Naadabe, Abyooda, Alaazaranne Itamaara geetetiya oyddu nayti de7oosona.
26.61: Shin Naadabeynne Abyoodi Godaa sinthan geeshshi gidonna taman yarsho yarshida gisho boshan hayqidosona.
26.62: Laythi issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida Leewe adde nayta tayboy laatamanne heedzu mukula. Isra7eele asaa giddon entaw laata biitti imetiboonna gisho enti Isra7eeletara taybetibookona.
26.63: Yordaanose Shaafape hefinthan, Iyaarko matan, Moo7abe denban Museynne kahiney Alaazari Isra7eele asaa taybida wode taybetida asay haysa.
26.64: Museynne kahiney Aaroni koyro Siina mela biittan Isra7eele taybida wode taybetida asaape mexi issi asika attibeenna.
26.65: Goday ha Isra7eeletaba, “Enti ubbay mela biittan hayqana” yaagidi odida gisho, Yoofona na7aa Kaalebapenne Nawe na7aa Iyyasupe attishin, hari issi asika attibeenna.

27.1: Selophaadi Hefeera na7a; Hefeeri Galada na7a; Galadi Makira na7a; Makiri Minaase na7a; Minaasey Yoosefa na7a. Selophaada macca nayti Mahilo, No7o, Hoglo, Milkonne Tirxo.
27.2: Ha macca nayti geeshsha dunkaaniya pengen Muse sinthan, kahiniya Alaazara sinthan, halaqata sinthaninne maabara ubbaa sinthan eqidi,
27.3: “Nu aaway mela biittan hayqis; I ba nagaraa gaason hayqisipe attishin, Godaa bolla dendida Qore kaalleyisata giddon deenna. Iyaw adde na7i baawa.
27.4: Yaatin, nu aaway adde na7a yeliboona gisho iya sunthay iya kochaa giddofe waanidi dhayii? Nu aawa dabbota giddon nuus laata biitta imma” gidoosona.
27.5: Yaatin, Musey enta oysha Godaa sinthe shiishis.
27.7: “Selophaada macca nayta oyshay like; enta aawa dabbota giddon neeni entaw laata biitta imma; iya gishoy enta laata gido.
27.8: Qassi Isra7eele asaako, ‘Issi asi adde na7a yelonna hayqiko iya macca nayti laatto.
27.9: Iyaw macca na7i baynaba gidiko iya ishati laatto.
27.10: Iyaw ishi baynaba gidiko iya aawa ishati laatto.
27.11: Iyaw aawa ishi baynaba gidiko iya mata dabboy laatto. Taani Goday nena kiitidaysada haysi Isra7eele asaas woga gido’ ” yaagis. Muse Bessan Iyyasu Dooretetha
27.12: Goday Museko, “Abariima Zumaa bolla keyada ta Isra7eele asaas immida biitta be7a.
27.13: Ne be7idaape guye, ne ishaa Aaronada neka hayqada ne mayzatan gahetana.
27.14: Xiina mela biittan, Mariba haatha matan asay ta bolla zuuzumida wode hinte nam7ay enta sinthan tana geeshshi oothidi bonchibeeketa” yaagis. (Mariba haathay Xiina mela biittan, Qaadesa geetetiya bessan de7iya pulto.)
27.16: “Asa ubbaas de7o immiya Godaa Xoossaw, ne asay henthanchoy bayna wude mela gidonnaada,
27.17: ha asaa sinthan keyaanne geliya qassi enta kaalethidi kessiyanne gelsiya issi asi ha maabara bolla shuuma” yaagis.
27.18: Goday Museko, “Ayyaanay iyan de7iya Nawe na7aa Iyyasu ekada ne kushiya iya bolla wotha.
27.19: Iya kahiniya Alaazara sinthaninne maabara ubbaa sinthan essada enti be7ishin shuuma.
27.20: Isra7eele ubbay iyaw kiitetana mela ne maatape iyaw shaakada imma.
27.21: Ika Uriimen Godaa sheniya oychidi shaakiya kahiniya Alaazara sinthan eqo. Iyyasuynne Isra7eele maabaray ubbay Alaazara kiitan keyonne gelo” yaagis.
27.22: Musey Goday kiitidaysada oothis; Iyyasu efidi, kahiniya Alaazara sinthaninne maabara ubbaa sinthan essis.
27.23: Goday kiitidaysada Musey ba kushiya iya bolla wothidi shuumis.

28.2: “Isra7eele asaa haysada yaagada kiitta; xuugetiya sawiya katha yarsho woden woden taw yarshite.
28.3: Godaas taman xuugetidi yarshetiya yarshoy haysa; kumetha bollara de7iya issi laythi kumida nam7u marazeta wonta wonta xuussa yarsho oothidi yarshite.
28.4: Marazetape issuwa wonta issuwa qassi omarsi yarshite.
28.5: Qassi he maraziyara issi litiro shamaho zayten munuqetida issi kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille katha yarsho yarshite.
28.6: Haysi Godaa ufaysiya xuussa yarsho. Ika Siina zuma bolla yarshetida koyro xuussa yarsho.
28.7: Koyro maraziyara issi litiro caala woyne ushsha yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan Godaas gussite.
28.8: Omarsi nam7antho maraziya yarshiya wode koyroysa mela katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa gujidi yarshite. Ika Godaa ufaysiya sawo yarsho gidana.” Sambaata Yarsho
28.9: “Sambaata gallas borey bayna issi laythi kumida nam7u marazeta zayten munuqetida nam7u kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille ekidi katha yarshonne ushsha yarsho oothidi yarshite.
28.10: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla Sambaatan Sambaatan hinte yarshana xuussa yarshoynne ushsha yarshoy haysa.” Ageena Xeero Yarsho
28.11: “Ageeni xeeriya koyro gallas nam7u wofaanota, issi marazenne issi laythi kumida borey bayna laapun dorsa urgeta xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshite.
28.12: Issi issi wofaanuwara shamaho zayten munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame gidiya lo77o giste dhiillera katha yarsho oothidi yarshite. Qassi shamaho zayten munuqetida nam7u kilo giraame gidiya lo77o giste dhiilliya maraziyara wolla yarsha.
28.13: Laapun marazetape issi issi maraze shamaho zayten munuqetida issi kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiillera xuugetiya sawiya katha yarsho oothada Godaas yarishsha.
28.14: Qassi ushsha yarshuwa issi issi wofaanuwas nam7u litiro woyne, issi maraziyas issi litironne bagga woyne ushshaanne issi issi dorsa urgiyas issi litiro gidiya woyne ushshi shiishite. Haysi laytha giddon ageeni xeeriya koyro gallasan oosetiya xuussa yarsho.
28.15: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla issi kole nagara yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshite.” Paasika Yarsho (Leewe 23:5-14)
28.16: “Koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallasay Godaa Paasika bonchiya gallas gido.
28.17: Qassi he ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasan Uytha ba7aaley bonchetees; he gallasaape doomidi laapun gallas gakanaw irshoy geliboonna uytha miite.
28.18: He gallasatape koyro gallasan goyinnanaw shiiqite; he gallasan ay oosoka oothopite.
28.19: Borey bayna nam7u wofaanota, issi marazenne issi laythi kumida laapun dorsa urgeta xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshite.
28.20: Issi wofaanuwara shamaho zayten munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille, issi maraziyara nam7u kilo giraame dhiillenne
28.21: laapun dorsa urgetape issi issi dorsaara issi kilo giraame dhiille yarshite.
28.22: Qassi issi deeshi deriya nagaraas atotethi gidana mela nagara yarsho oothidi yarshite.
28.23: Hessa ubba wode gallas gallas yarshetiya yarshuwa bolla gujidi yarshite.
28.24: Ubba wode oosetiya xuussa yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla gujidi laapun gallasi Godaas sawiya katha yarsho oothidi yarshite.
28.25: Laapuntha gallasan goyinnoos shiiqite; he gallas ay oosoka oothopite.” Katha Shiisho Ba7aale (Leewe 23:15-22)
28.26: “Katha Shiisho Ba7aale saamintan koyro gallas goyinnoos shiiqiya wode hinte ooratha kathaafe yarsho yarshite; he wode ay oosoka oothopite.
28.27: Nam7u wofaanota, issi maraziyanne issi laythi kumida laapun dorsa urgeta Godaas sawiya xuussa yarsho oothidi yarshite.
28.28: Issi issi wofaanuwara shamaho zayten munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille, issi dorsa urgiyara nam7u kilo giraame dhiillenne
28.29: laapun dorsa urgetape issi issi urgiyara issi kilo giraame giste dhiille ekidi yarshite.
28.30: Iya bolla gujidi issi kole nagara atothetha yarsho oothidi yarshite.
28.31: Gallas gallas yarshetiya yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla katha yarsho yarshite. Hinte yarshiya meheti borey baynaba gido.”

29.1: “Laapuntha ageenas koyro gallasan goyinnanaw shiiqite; ay oosoka oothopite; he gallasay moyzey punetiya gallas.
29.2: Borey bayna issi wofaano, issi marazenne issi laythi kumida laapun dorsa urgeta sawiya xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshite.
29.3: He wofaanuwara shamaho zayten munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille, issi maraziyara nam7u kilo giraame giste dhiillenne,
29.4: laapun dorsa urgetape issi issi urgiyara issi kilo giraame dhiille yarshite.
29.5: Qassi issi kole hintew nagaraa atotethas yarshite.
29.6: Wogay kiiteysatho, ageena xeeron yarshetiya xuussa yarsho bolla, katha yarsho bolla, gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa katha yarsho bollanne ushsha yarsho bolla gujidi yarshite; hessi Godaa sawiya xuussa yarsho. Nagara Atotetha Yarsho
29.7: “Laapuntha ageenan tammantho gallasan ay oosoka oothopite; hintena kawushidi goyinnoos shiiqite.
29.8: Borey bayna issi wofaano, issi marazenne issi laythi kumida laapun dorsa urgeta sawiya xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshite.
29.9: Katha yarsho oothidi issi wofaanora shamaho zayten heedzu kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille, issi dorsa urgiyara nam7u kilo giraame dhiillenne
29.10: laapun dorsa urgetape issi issi urgiyara issi kilo giraame dhiille yarshite.
29.11: Qassi nagara yarsho oothidi issi kole yarshite. Nagara atothetha yarshuwa bolla, gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla hessa gujidi yarshite. Shaqara Ba7aale Yarsho (Leewe 23:33-44)
29.12: “Laapuntha ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasan, deexo ooso oothopite; laapun gallas kumethi Godaa bonchanaw Shaqara Ba7aale bonchite.
29.13: Borey bayna tammanne heedzu wofaanota, nam7u marazeta, issi laythi kumida tammanne oyddu dorsa urgeta sawiya xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshite.
29.14: Katha yarsho gidana mela tammanne heedzu wofaanotape issi issi wofaanuwara shamaho zayten munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille, nam7u marazetape issi issi urgiyara nam7u kilo giraame dhiillenne
29.15: tammanne oyddu dorsa urgetape issi issi urgiyara issi kilo giraame dhiille yarshite.
29.16: Qassi nagara yarshuwas issi kole yarshite. Hessi gallas gallas xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarsho bolla gujidika yarshite.
29.17: “Nam7antho gallasan tammanne nam7u borey bayna wofaanota, nam7u marazetanne issi laythi kumida tammanne oyddu urgeta yarshite.
29.18: Wofaanotara, marazetaranne dorsa urgetara katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa wogay kiitteysa mela enta taybuwada yarshite.
29.19: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla gujidi nagara yarshuwas issi kole yarshite.
29.20: “Heedzantho gallasan borey bayna tammanne issi wofaanota, nam7u marazeta issi laythi kumida tammanne oyddu dorsa urgeta yarshite.
29.21: Wofaanotara, marazetaranne dorsa urgetara katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa wogay kiitteysa mela enta taybuwada yarshite.
29.22: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla nagara yarshos issi kole gujidi yarshite.
29.23: “Oyddantho gallasan borey bayna tammu wofaanota, nam7u marazetanne issi laythi kumida tammanne oyddu dorsa urgeta yarshite.
29.24: Wofaanotara, marazetaranne dorsa urgetara katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa wogay kiitteysa mela enta taybuwada yarshite.
29.25: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla gujidi nagara yarshos issi kole yarshite.
29.26: “Ichashantho gallasan borey bayna uddufun wofaanota, nam7u marazetanne issi laythi kumida tammanne oyddu dorsa urgeta yarshite.
29.27: Wofaanotara, Marazetaranne dorsa urgetara katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa wogay kiiteysada enta taybuwada yarshite.
29.28: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla gujidi nagara yarshos issi kole yarshite.
29.29: “Usupuntho gallasan borey bayna hospun wofaanota, nam7u marazetanne issi laythi kumida tammanne oyddu dorsa urgeta yarshite.
29.30: Wofaanotara, Marazetaranne dorsa urgetara katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa wogay kiitteysa mela enta taybuwada yarshite.
29.31: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla gujidi nagara yarshos issi kole yarshite.
29.32: “Laapuntha gallasan laapun wofaanota, nam7u marazetanne issi laythi kumida tammanne oyddu dorsa urgeta yarshite.
29.33: Wofaanotara, Marazetaranne dorsa urgetara katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa wogay kiitteysa mela enta taybuwada yarshite.
29.34: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla gujidi nagara yarshos issi kole yarshite.
29.35: “Hospuntha gallasan goyinnanaw shiiqite; ay oosoka oothopite.
29.36: Borey bayna issi wofaano, issi maraze, issi laythi kumida laapun dorsa urgeta sawiya xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshite.
29.37: Wofaanotara, Marazetaranne dorsa urgetara katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa wogay kiiteysada enta taybuwada yarshite.
29.38: Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla, katha yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla gujidi nagara yarshos issi kole yarshite.
29.39: “Hinte gaso yarshuwa bollanne hinte dosa yarshuwa bolla xuussa yarsho, katha yarsho, ushsha yarshonne issifetetha yarsho Baaliya bonchanaw kiitetida wodiyan yarshite” yaagis.
29.40: Musey, Goday bana kiittidaysa ubbaa Isra7eele asaas odis.

30.1: Musey Isra7eele zeretha halaqatako, “Godaa kiitay haysa;
30.2: Issi asi Godaas issiba oothanaw caaqiko woyko issibaape bana naaganaw qangiko guye goonna polo.
30.3: “Ba aawa son de7iya geela7iya Godaas issiba oothanaw caaqiko woyko issibaape bana naaganaw qangiko,
30.4: I aaway iya caaqidaysa woyko iya qangetidaysa si7idi, iyo diggonna ixiko, iya polanaw koshshees.
30.5: Shin I aaway hessa si7idi iyo diggiko I caaqoynne I qangethay attanaw danda7ees. I aaway iyo diggida gisho Goday iw atto gaana.
30.6: “Gelonna macca na7iya caaqada de7ashe woyko issibaape bana naaganaw qangetada de7ashe azina geliko,
30.7: I azinay hessa si7idi iyo diggonna ixiko iya ba caaquwanne ba qangetha polanaw koshshees.
30.8: Shin I azinay hessa si7idi iyo diggiko iya caaqida caaqoy woyko qangetida qangethay iyo gomenna. Hessa Goday iw atto gaana.
30.9: “Shin am7iya woyko sayo maccasi caaqida caaquwa woyko qangida qangetha polanaw bessees.
30.10: “Azinara de7iya maccasi caaqiko woyko issiba oothanaw qangiko,
30.11: I azinay hessa si7idi iyo diggonna ixiko, iya caaqida caaquwanne qangetida qangetha polo.
30.12: I azinay hessa si7ida gallas iyo diggiko I caaqoy woyko iya oothanaw qangetida qangethay iyo gomenna. I azinay diggida gisho Goday iw atto gaana.
30.13: I azinay iya caaqida caaquwa woyko iya bana kawushanaw qangetida qangetha laallanaw woyko minthanaw danda7ees.
30.14: Shin I azinay he gallas woyko wontetha gallas aykoka goonna ixiko, I caaquwa woyko I qangetha minthis guussu. I hessa si7idi, si77i giiko I qofaa ma7is guussu.
30.15: Shin I hessa si7i gam7idi zaari diggiyaba gidiko hessas oyshetey iya” yaagis.
30.16: Hiza haysi azina giddoninne machi giddon, ba aawara son de7iya geela7o giddoninne I aawa giddon de7iya gahetethaba Goday Muses immida wogaa.

31.2: “Isra7eele asaa qohida gisho Midiyaame asaa olada halo keya; hessafe guye, neeni hayqada ne mayzata gakana” yaagis.
31.3: Hessa gisho, Musey asaako, “Midiyaame asaa olidi Godaa halo keyana mela hinte giddofe guutha asaa olas dancisite.
31.4: Issi issi Isra7eele kochaafe issi mukulu adde asaa olas yeddite” yaagis.
31.5: Hessa gisho, issi issi Isra7eele kochaafe issi issi mukulu asay keyidi, tammanne nam7u mukulu olanchoti olas giigidosona.
31.6: Musey kahiniya Alaazara na7aa Pinihaasa aawatethan, issi issi kochaafe issi issi mukulu asi dooridi olas yeddis; Pinihaasi bishe geeshsha miishetanne mallas punniya zaye ekidi bis.
31.7: Goday Muse kiitidaysada, enti Midiyaame asaa olidi adde ubbaa wodhidosona.
31.8: Ichashu Midiyaame kawota, Ewa, Reqeema, Zura, Huranne Reeba geetetiya asata wodhidosona; qassi Bi7oora na7aa Balaamaka mashshan wodhidosona.
31.9: Isra7eele asay Midiyaame maccasaanne nayta di7idosona; enta mehiya, dorsaanne deesha wudiyanne enta miishe ubbaa di7idosona.
31.10: Enti de7iya katamatanne enta gutata ubbaa xuuggidosona.
31.11: Asaa mehiyanne de7idaba ubbaa ekidi bidosona.
31.12: Enti di7ida asaa, mehiyanne shalo ubbaa Iyaarkofe hefinthan, Yordaanose shaafa matan de7iya Moo7abe denban dunkaanida Museko, kahiniya Alaazarakonne Isra7eele maabaraako ehidosona.
31.13: Musey, kahiniya Alaazarinne maabara halaqati ubbay dunkaanida gutaape gaxa keyidi entana mokidosona.
31.14: Musey olape simmida tora moconata, shaalaqatanne mato halaqata bolla hanqetis.
31.16: Enti Balaama zoriya si7idi, Pe7oora geetetiya bessan Isra7eele asay Godaa aggidi, boshan hayqanaada oothiday maccasa gideysa dogidetii?
31.17: Hessa gisho, ha77i adde naytanne addera aqida maccas ubbaa wodhite.
31.18: Shin addera aqiboona macca nayta ubbaa hintew ashshite.
31.19: Hinte giddofe ase wodhida asi woyko aha bochida oonika gutaape gaxan laapun gallas utto; heedzantho gallasaninne laapuntha gallasan hintenanne hinte di77ida asaa geeshshite.
31.20: Hessadaka ma7o ubbaa, galbafe, deesha ikisepenne mithafe oosetidabata ubbaa geeshshite” yaagis.
31.21: Kahiney Alaazari olape simmida olanchotako, “Goday Muses immida higgiya maaray haysa;
31.22: Worqa, bira, naase, birata, qorqoro, irsaase,
31.23: taman meetetonnabati ubbay taman geeyanaw bessees. Shin taman meetetiyabati geeshsho haathan geeyanaw bessees.
31.24: Laapuntha gallasan hinte ma7uwa meeccite; hintena geeshshite. Hessafe guye, gutaa gelite” yaagis. Di77idabaa Shaaketidosona
31.26: “Neera, kahiniya Alaazararanne Isra7eele maabara halaqati di7etida asaanne mehiya taybite.
31.27: Ola bidaysatasinne boonnaysatas nam7u kessidi shaakite.
31.28: Ola bidaysata gishuwape ase gidin miizi gidin hare gidin dorse woyko deeshe gidin ichashu xeetape issino Godaas immite.
31.29: Enta gishuwape ekida Godaa imota kahiniya Alaazaras immite.
31.30: Hanko Isra7eeleta gakida gishuwape, ase gidin miizi gidin hare gidin dorse woyko deeshe gidin ishatammaafe issino ekidi Godaa Dunkaaniya aawatethan aysiya Leewetas immite” yaagis.
31.31: Museynne kahiney Alaazari Goday kiitidaysada oothidosona.
31.32: -35 Olanchoti bantaw ekin attida di7oy 675,000 dorsata, 72,000 miizata, 61,000 haretanne 32,000 geela7o macca nayta.
31.41: Goday Muse kiitidaysada Godaa imota kahiniya Alaazaras immis.
31.42: -46 Ola boonna Isra7eele maabara gakida gishoy ola bida asaa gishuwara issi gina; ika 337,500 dorsata, 36,000 miizata, 30,500 haretanne 16,000 geela7o macca nayta.
31.47: Isra7eele maabara gakida gishuwape ishatamu asaapenne mehiyape isso isso kessidi Goday iya kiitidaysada geeshsha Dunkaaniya aawatethan aysiya Leewetas immis.
31.48: Hessafe guye, tora moconati, shaalaqatinne mato halaqati Museko shiiqidi,
31.49: “Nuuni ne aylleti nu aawatetha garsan de7iya olanchota taybin issoyka pacibeenna.
31.50: Goday nu shempuwa ashshida gisho, nu issoy issoy ekida worqa alleeqota, sagaayota, toho albota, migiddota, haytha worqatanne qoodhe worqata Godaas immanaw ekidi yida” yaagidosona.
31.51: Museynne kahiney Alaazari worqa alleeqota ubbaa entafe ekidosona.
31.52: Shaalaqatinne mato halaqati Godaas immida worqay nam7u xeetu kilo giraame gidis.
31.53: Hanko olanchoti ehida di7uwa bantaw ekidosona.
31.54: Museynne kahiney Alaazari shalaqatapenne mato halaqatape ekida worqa Godaa sinthan Isra7eele asaa hassayisiyaba oothidi geeshsha dunkaaniya giddo ehidosona.

32.1: Robeelanne Gaade kochaas daro mehey de7ees. Enti Ya7izeera biittaynne Galada biittay mehes inje gideysa,
32.2: be7idi Museko, kahiniya Alaazarakonne Isra7eele maabara halaqatako yidi haysada yaagidosona.
32.3: -4 “Isra7eele asay laattana mela Goday maaddida biittay, Axaarotey, Dibooni, Ya7izeeri, Nimiri, Hasebooni, Eliyaali, Sebami, Naboynne Ba7ooni mehes inje biitta; nuus hinte aylletas daro mehey de7ees.
32.5: Nuuni hinte sinthan saba demmidaba gidiko, he biitta nuus hinte aylleta laata oothidi immite; nuna Yordaanose shaafape hefinthi pinthofite” yaagidosona.
32.6: Musey Gaade kochatakonne Robeela kochatako, “Hinte bagga gidida Isra7eele asay olas biya wode hinte haysan uttanaw koyeetii?
32.7: Goday entaw immida biitta enti pinnonna mela hinte ayis enta wozanaa shugiseetii?
32.8: Qaadesa Barnefe ha biitta wochana mela hinte aawata ta yeddida wode entika haysada oothidosona.
32.9: Enti Eshkola Zangaara gakanaw bidi he biitta be7i simmidi Isra7eeleti Goday entaw immida biitta gelonna mela Isra7eeleta wozanaa shugisidosona.
32.10: Goday he gallas daro hanqetidi haysada yaagidi caaqis;
32.11: ‘Banta kumetha wozanaape tana kaalliboonna gisho, Gibxe biittafe keydaysatape laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida adde asaape issoyka Abrahaames, Yisaaqasinne Yayqoobas immana gada caaqida biitta gelekona.
32.12: Banta kumetha wozanape kaallida gisho, Qeneza Yoofona na7aa Kaalebapenne Nawe na7aa Iyyasupe attishin, hari oonika gelenna’ yaagis.
32.13: Godaa hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexida gisho Godaa sinthan iita oothida he yeletetha ubbay dhayana gakanaw mela biittan oytamu laythi toylatidosona.
32.14: Hinteno, nagaranchota nayto hinte aawata bessan eqidi Goday Isra7eele asaa bolla gujidi hanqetana mela ootheeta.
32.15: Hinte Godaa kaallonna ixiko, I qassika ba deriya mela biittan aggana. Entana gakiya dhayuwas hinte oyshetana” yaagis.
32.16: Enti Museko shiiqidi, “Nuuni haysan nu mehiyas dara, nu naytasinne nu machetas katama keexanaw koyoos.
32.17: Shin Isra7eele asay banta bessaa ekana gakanaw nuuni ola miishe dancidi enta sinthan keyidi oletanaw giigetida. He wode he biittan de7iya asay nu naytanne nu macheta qohonna mela gimbetidi uttida katamatan de7ona.
32.18: Isra7eele asa ubbay banta laata laata ekana gakanaw, nuuni nu soo simmoko.
32.19: Nuuni nu laata Yordaanose shaafape hafinthan doloha baggan laattida gisho, Yordaanosepe hefinthan wuloha baggan entara laata ekoko” yaagidosona.
32.20: Musey entako, “Hinte geysi tuma gidiko haysan Godaa sinthan ola baanaw dancetite.
32.21: Goday ba morketa ba sinthafe gooddana gakanaw hinte ola miishiya dancidi, Yordaanose shaafa Godaa sinthan pinniko,
32.22: he biitta Goday xoonidaape guye hinte simmanaw danda7eeta. He wode hinte Godaasinne Isra7eele asaas oletidi polideta guussu. Qassi he biittay Godaa sinthan hintew laata gidana.
32.23: “Hinte hessa oothonna ixiko Godaa bolla nagara ootheeta; hiza, hinte nagaraa gisho hintena seeri gakanaysa loythi erite.
32.24: Hinte hintew katamata, hinte mehiyas dara keexite, shin hinte gelida qaala polite” yaagis.
32.25: Gaade kochaynne Robeela, kochay Museko, “Nuuni ne aylleti ne kiitidaysada oothana.
32.26: Nu nayti, nu macheti, nu dorsatinne nu mehey haysan Galada katamatan de7ishshona.
32.27: Shin nuuni ne aylleti, olanchoti ubbay, neeni nu goday gidaysada oletanaw Godaa sinthan Yordaanose shaafa pinnana” yaagidosona.
32.28: Hessa gisho, Musey kahiniya Alaazara, Nawe na7a Iyyasunne Isra7eele kochata halaqata entaba yaagidi Kiittis.
32.29: “Gaade kochaynne Robeela kochay ubbay ola miishiya dancidi, Godaa sinthan hintera Yordaanose shaafa pinnikonne hinte he biitta xooniko, hessafe guye, Galada biitta hinte enta laatisite.
32.30: Shin enti ola miishiya dancidi, hintera pinnidi olas boonna ixiko, hinteda entaw Kanaane biittan laati imeto” yaagis.
32.31: Yaatin. Gaade kochaynne Robeela kochay zaaridi, “Nuuni ne aylleti Goday gidaysa oothana.
32.32: Nuuni ola miishiya dancidi, Godaa sinthan Kanaane biitta gelanaw pinnana; shin nuuni laattiya laatay Yordaanosepe hafintha bagga gido” yaagidosona.
32.33: Hessa gisho, Musey Gaade kochaas, Robeela kochaasinne Yoosefa na7aa Minaase kochaafe baggaas Amoore kawa Sihoona kawotethaanne Baasane kawa Ooge kawotethaa enta yuushuwan de7iya katamatara immis.
32.36: Beet-Nimiranne Beet-Harana geetetiya gimben diretida katamata zaaridi keexidosona; banta mehiyas dara keexidosona.
32.38: Naaba, Ba7aal-Ma7oonanne Sebama geetetiya katamata zaarethi keexidosona; he katamata sunthaa laammidosona.
32.39: Minaase na7aa Makira kochati Galada biitta oli oykidi yan de7iya Amooreta goodidosona.
32.40: Hessa gisho, Minaase na7aa Makira kochaas Musey Galada biitta immin enti yan de7idosona.
32.41: Minaase kochi gidida Ya7iri he si olli oykidi, “Ya7ira katamata” yaagidi sunthis.
32.42: Nooba Qanaata katamaanne iya yuushuwan de7iya gutata ollan oykide, ba sunthan “Nooba” gidi sunthis.

33.1: Museynne Aaroni kaalethin, Isra7eele asay, banta cugan cugan Gibxefe keyidi siiratida gutata odiya taarikey haysa.
33.2: Goday Kiittidaysa mela Musey enti siiratida bessata sunthaa ubbaa kaali kaali xaafis.
33.3: Isra7eele asay koyro ageenan, tammanne ichashantho gallasan, Paasika bonchiya nam7antho gallas dendidi, Gibxe asa ubbay be7ishin, yayyonna Ramisepe keyidosona.
33.4: He wode Gibxe asay Godaa gadon hayqida banta bayra nayta moogosona. Hessada oothidi, Goday enta xoossata bolla pirda ehis.
33.5: Isra7eele asay Ramisepe dendidi Sukota geetetiya bessan dunkaanidosona.
33.6: Sukotape dendidi mela biitta gaxan de7iya Etaaman dunkaanidosona.
33.7: Etaamape dendidi Ba7ali-Xafoonape doloha baggan de7iya Pihahiroota simmidi Migdoola matan dunkaanidosona.
33.8: Pihahirootape dendidi, Zo7o Abbaa pinnidi, Suuza mela biitta bidosona. Etaama mela biittan heedzu gallas hemetidi Maaran dunkaanidosona.
33.9: Maarape dendidi tammanne nam7u pultotinne laapun tammu zambati de7iya Eliman dunkaanidosona.
33.10: Elimape dendidi Zo7o Abbaa matan dunkaanidosona.
33.11: Zo7o Abbaa matape dendidi Siina mela biittan dunkaanidosona.
33.12: Siina mela biittafe dendidi Rafaqan dunkaanidosona.
33.14: Elusape dendidi haathi bayna bessan Rafidiman dunkaanidosona.
33.15: Rafidimape dendidi Siina mela biittan dunkaanidosona.
33.16: Siina mela biittafe dendidi Kibirooti Hati7awan dunkaanidosona.
33.36: Exiyooni-Gabirape dendidi Siina mela biittan Qaadesan dunkaanidosona.
33.37: Qaadesape dendidi Edoome biitta zawan de7iya Hoora zuman dunkaanidosona.
33.38: Kahiney Aaroni Godaa kiitan Hoora zuma bolla keyidi, Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida oytamantho laythan, ichashantho ageenan, koyro gallasan yan hayqis.
33.39: Aaroni Hoora zuma bolla hayqiya wode iyaw laythi xeetanne laatamanne heedza.
33.40: Negebe mela biittan Kanaanen de7iya Arada Kawoy Isra7eele asaa yuussaa si7is.
33.41: Isra7eele asay Hoora zumaape dendidi Xalmoonan dunkaanidosona.
33.44: Obotape dendidi Moo7abe biitta zawan de7iya Abariiman dunkaanidosona.
33.47: Almoon-Dibilataymape dendidi Nabo zuma sinthan Abariima zumata bolla dunkaanidosona.
33.48: Abariima zumatape dendidi Iyaarkofe hefinthan, Yordaanose shaafa matan de7iya Moo7abe denban dunkaanidosona.
33.49: Yordaanose shaafa matan de7iya Moo7abe denban, Beet-Yashimootapenne Abeel-Saxima Zangaarape giddon dunkaanidosona.
33.50: Iyaarkofe hefinthan, Yordaanose shaafa matan de7iya Moo7abe demban Goday Museko,
33.51: “Isra7eele asaas yaagada oda; Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi, Kanaane biitta hinte geliya wode
33.52: he biittan de7iya asa ubbaa hinte sinthafe yedethite. Shuchafe masetidi oosetida misiletanne sheeshidi medhida eeqata dhaysite. Dhoqa goyinno bessata ubbaa laallite.
33.53: He biitta ta hintew immida gisho iya laattidi yan de7ite.
33.54: Hinte kochan kochan saama kessidi biitta shaaketite. Taybon dariya kochatas dalga laata immite; taybon guuxiya kochatas guutha laata immite. Saaman enta gakida biittay entaba gidana. Biittaa hinte mayzata kochan kochan shaakidi ekite.
33.55: Shin he biittan de7iya asaa hinte yedethonna ixiko, hinte ashshidaysati hinte ayfiyas pinco, hinte miyiyas agunthu gidana; hinte daana biittan ubba wode ola denthidi hintena waaysana.
33.56: Hinte enta yedethonna ixiko, ta enta bolla oothanaw halchidaba hinte bolla oothana gada oda” yaagis.

34.2: “Isra7eele asaas haysada gada oda; hinte Kanaane geliya wode ta hintew laata oothada immana biitta zaway haysa.
34.3: Dugeha bagga zaway Siina mela biittafe dendidi Edoome zawa kanthees. Doloha baggara hinte zaway Maxine Abbaafe duge baggara doomidi,
34.4: Aqirabima aadhiya bessaa shaakidi Siina biitta bazzuwa kanthidi dugeha baggara Qaades-Barne gakees. Yaape Hadar-Adaara kanthidi Aximoona gakees.
34.5: Aximoonape dendidi Gibxe shaafa guye simmidi Medetiraane Abbaa gakees.
34.6: “Wuloha bagga zaway Medetiraane Abbaa gaxa gidana.
34.7: “Pudeha bagga zaway Medetiraane Abbaa kaallidi Hoora zuma gakanaw bees.
34.8: Hoora zumaape Hamaata geliya bessaa gakanaw bees; he zawa wursethay Xadaada.
34.9: Yaape dendidi Zifiroona gakidi, Haxar-Enaanan eqees; pudeha bagga zaway haysa.
34.10: “Doloha bagga zaway Haxar-Enaanape Safaama mallaa gakees.
34.11: Safaama mallafe dendidi Aynape doloha baggara Irbila duge wodhidi Kenereeta Abbaafe doloha baggara de7iya zumata gakees.
34.12: Hessafe hinte zaway duge Yordaanose shaafa wodhi zawaydi Maxine Abbaa gakees. Hinte biitta yuusho zawati haysata” yaagis.
34.13: Musey Isra7eele asaa haysada yaagidi Kiittis; “Uddufun bagga kochaas hinte saama yeggidi shaakana laata biittay haysa.
34.14: Robeela kochay, Gaade kochaynne Minaase kochaafe baggay,
34.15: banta laata Iyaarkofe hefinthan, Yordaanose Shaafape doloha baggan ekidosona” yaagis.
34.17: “Kahiniya Alaazaranne Nawe na7aa Iyyasuy he biitta asaas shaako.
