21.8: Abeeti Godaw, neeni wozida ne asaa, Isra7eele maara; ha xillo suuthaa ne asaa bolla naaqo oothada taybopa. Ha xillo suuthaa gisho nu nagaray atto ga” yaago.
21.9: Neeni Godaa ayfiya sinthan hessada oothada, xillo suuthay gukida nagara ne giddofe digga. Olan Di7etida Maccasataba
21.10: Ne morketara ne oletanaw keyin, Goday, ne Xoossay enta ne kushen aathidi immin, enta di7iya wode,
21.11: di7etida asaa giddon issi mala lo7o maccas be7ada, iw mishetada machanaw koyiko,
21.12: iyo ne soo eha. I huuphiya meeda; I xuguntha cigga;
21.13: di7etiya wode de7iya ma7uwa laammada, issi ageena ne son uttada, ba aawasinne ba aayes kayoto. Hessafe guye, iyo macha.
21.14: Yaata simmada, iira duussay nena ufaysonna ixiko, iya ba koyida soo baana mela iyo yedda. Neeni iyo macho oothada iira issife aqida gisho, iyo miishen bayzanaw woyko aylle oothanaw bessenna. Bayra Na7a Laata Maata
21.15: Issi asas I dosiyanne dosonna nam7u macheti de7iko, he nam7ayka iyaw adde na7a yeliko, bayray I dosonna macceepe yeletidaba gidiko,
21.16: I ba nayta ba shaluwa laatisiya wode, I dosonnaripe yeletida bayray de7ishin, I dosiyaripe yeletida kaaluwa bayrayanaw bessenna.
21.17: Hara naytas immeysafe iyaw nam7u kushe aathidi immidi I dosonnari na7ay bayra gideysa erisanaw bessees. He na7ay iyaw kushe toho phalqida bayra gidiya gisho, bayratetha I ekanaw bessees. Dumma Dumma Higgeta
21.18: Aawasinne aayes kiitetonna ixida, enti seerinka simmonna, wozana muumenne makallancho gidida na7i de7iko,
21.19: aawaynne aayiya he katamaa pengen de7iya cimatako iya eho.
21.20: Enti cimatako, “Haysi nu na7ay wozana muumenne makallancho; I nuus kiitetenna; I yarambanne ushshancho” yaagidi odo.
21.21: Hessafe guye, he kataman de7iya adde ubbay iya shuchan caddidi wodho. Hessada oothidi hinte giddofe iita uraa dhaysite; Isra7eele ubbay hessa si7idi yayyana.
21.22: Issi asi hayqo pirdisiya bala oothiko, ne iya mitha bolla kaqada wodhiko,
21.23: he mithaa bolla iya ahay aqopo; iya he gallas mooga. Mitha bolla kaqetidi hayqiya oonika Xoossan baadetidaysa. Goday, ne Xoossay new laata oothidi immiya ne biitta tunisopa.

22.1: Isra7eele asa boori woyko dorsi dhayidi bishin demmiko agga aadhofa; laagga ehada iya godaas imma.
22.2: He mehiya goday ne heera asi gidonna ixiko woyko iya goday ooneko ne eronna ixiko, iya goday koyishe yaana gakanaw ne soo efa; I koyishe yiiko iyaw imma.
22.3: Hessada hare woyko ma7o woyko aybaka dhayidabaa demmiko, hessada ootha.
22.4: Isra7eele asa harey woyko boori ogen kundin be7iko, maaddada denthafe attishin, aggada aadhofa.
22.5: Maccasi adde ma7o ma7ofo; addeyka maccasa ma7o ma7ofo. Hessa melaba oothiya oonaka Goday, hinte Xoossay ixees.
22.6: Ne oge bishin, mitha bolla gidin, sa7an ba na7aa woyko ba phuuphulliya haphida kafo demmiko, iyo, I naytara oykada ne soo efopa.
22.7: Nayta efanaw danda7aasa; shin aayiw baana mela yedda agga. Hessada oothiko, neeni duretada adussa laythi daana.
22.8: Ooratha keethi keexiya wode kaarape asi kundi hayqin ne oyshetonna mela keetha bolla kate giigisa.
22.9: Ne woyne gaden nam7u qommo kathi zeropa; hessada oothiko, ne zerida kathaynne woyney nam7ayka iitana.
22.10: Boorinne hare issife waaxada goyopa.
22.11: Suufepenne liinope oosetida ma7o ma7ofa.
22.12: Ne ma7iya ma7oy oyddu baggara macari de7iyaba gido. Eko Gelo Geeshshatethi
22.13: Issi asi macho eki simmidi iyo dosona ixidi,
22.14: “Ha machiw ta ekiya wode kumethi giduku” yaagidi iyo iissidi odetiko,
22.15: na7e aawaynne na7e aayiya I geela7otetha malla efidi, katamaa pengen de7iya cimata besso.
22.16: Na7e aaway cimatas haysada yaagidi odo; “Taani ta na7iw ha uraas macho oothada immas, shin I, iyo ixis.
22.17: I, ‘Ne na7iya kumethi giduku’ yaagidi iyo iissidi odis. Gidoshin, ‘Ta na7e geela7otetha mallaa haysa be7ite’ ” yaagidi, I geela7otetha erisiya carqiya besso.
22.18: Yaatiko, he katamaa cimati iya garaafo.
22.19: I Isra7eele geela7e sunthaa iissida gisho, cimati iya xeetu bira santime acisidi, na7e aawas immo. Na7iya iyaw macho gidada de7o; ba de7o laytha ubban iyo yeddanaw bessenna.
22.20: Iya mootoy tuma gididi, na7iya kumethi gidonna ixiko,
22.21: iya ba aawa son de7ashe laymatida gisho, na7iw I aawa kare ehidi, he katamaa addeti iyo shuchan caddidi wodho. Isra7eele giddon iya borsoba oothasu; hessada oothada ne giddofe iitaa digga.
22.22: Issi asi hara asa machira laymatishe oyketiko, inne iyara laymatida maccasiya hayqo. Hessada oothada ne giddofe iitaa digga.
22.23: Issi asi hara asas oysheta giigida geela7iw katama giddon demmidi iira laymatiko,
22.24: enta nam7aa katamape gaxa kessidi, shuchan caddidi wodhite. Na7iya hayqey, katama giddon de7ashe, asi ashshana mela waassaboonna gishosa. Na7ay hayqey, hara asas giigida geela7iw iissida gishosa. Hessada oothada ne giddofe iitaa digga.
22.25: Issi asi asas giigida geela7iw asi bayna bessan wolqan oykidi, iyo iissiko, iya xalaali hayqo.
22.26: Iya hayqos gathiya nagara oothaboonna gisho, na7e bolla aybaka oothopite. Hessi issi asi coo dendidi hara asi wodheysa mela.
22.27: I iyo asi bayna bessan demmidi oykin, he geela7iya waassasu, shin iyo ashshiya asi bentibeenna.
22.28: Issi asi oyshetaboonna geela7iw oykidi, I geela7otetha ekidi oyketeko,
22.29: na7e aawa ishatamu bira santime acco. Yaatidi na7iw baw macho ootho. Ba de7o laytha ubban iyo yeddofo.
22.30: Issi asi ba aawa machiw ekidi, ba aawa kawushofo.

23.1: Sangatida woyko qaaratetida addey Godaa shiiquwa gelopo.
23.2: Laymatethan yeletida asi Godaa shiiquwa gelopo. Hari attoshin tammantho yeletethi gakanaw, iya kochaafe oonika Godaa shiiquwa gelopo.
23.3: Amoone asi gidin woyko Moo7abe asi gidin, Godaa asaa shiiquwa gelopo. Hari attoshin tammantho yeletethi gakanaw enta ase gidida oonika Godaa asaa shiiquwa gelopo.
23.4: Neeni Gibxefe keyada bishin, enti katharanne haathara nena mokibookona. Enti Masephexoomen Patoora kataman de7iya Bi7oora na7aa Balaami nena baaddana mela shammidosona.
23.5: Goday, ne Xoossay nena dosida gisho Balaama si7ibeenna; iya baadetha new anjon laammis.
23.6: Ne de7o laytha ubban enti saro daana melanne duretana mela amottofa.
23.7: Edoometi new dabbo gidiya gisho enta kadhopa; ne enta biittan bete asi gidada de7ida gisho Gibxeta kadhopa.
23.8: Enta heedzantho yeletethay Godaa shiiquwa gelanaw danda7oosona. Guta Tunatethafe Naago
23.9: Ne morketa olanaw keyada dunkaanida bessan nena tunatethafe naaga.
23.10: Qamma amuhon atuntethay gukin, irxabay iya bolla de7iya oonika gutaape gaxa keyidi yan gam7o.
23.11: Sa7i omarsiya wode ba asatethaa meecetidi, awi wulliya wode gutaa simmo.
23.12: Ne wora sheeshi uttiya bessi gutaape karen giigisa.
23.13: Sheeshas uttiya olla bookiya miishe ola miishera gathada oyka; sheeshas utta simmada ollan biitta zaara.
23.14: Goday, ne Xoossay nena naaganawunne ne morketa ne kushen aathidi immanaw, ne gutan simeretees. I yan shaatiyaba be7idi, nena aggidi simmonna mela ne gutay geeshshi gidanaw koshshees. Dumma Dumma Higgeta
23.15: Ba godaape baqatidi, neeko yida aylliya zaarada iya godaas immofa.
23.16: I ne katamatape issuwan, ba koyida bessan ba koyida wode gakanaw de7o; iya un7ethofa.
23.17: Isra7eele asaape oonika adde gidin woyko macca gidin, eeqa goyinniya asay ootheysada laymatopo.
23.18: Adde gidin woyko maccas gidin, laymatethan demmida miishe qaangethi gathanaw Godaa ne Xoossaa keethi ehopo. Enta nam7aa Goday ne Xoossay ixees.
23.19: Hinte koche gidida Isra7eele asaas miishe woyko kathi woyko haraba tal7ada yelo ekofa.
23.20: Hara biitta asape yelo ekanaw danda7aasa; shin neeni laattanaw geliya biittan ne oothiyaba Goday, ne Xoossay anjana mela ne koche gidida Isra7eele asaas yelora tal7ofa.
23.21: Godaas, ne Xoossaas, immanaw qangetidaba gathanaw gam7ofa. Goday ne Xoossay ne qangidaysa kumethi neepe koyiya gisho, polonna ixiko new nagara gidana.
23.22: Shin ne qangonna aggiko hessi nagara gidenna.
23.23: Godaas ne Xoossaas, immana gida ne doonan odetidaba neeni dosan immana gida gisho, ne inxarsan odetidaba pola.
23.24: Neeni issi asa woyne gade giddora aadhiya wode woyniyape koyda mela ma, shin iyape aybaka ne oykida miishen yeggofa.
23.25: Issi asa gadera neeni aadhiya wode he gadiyan de7iya tiyape duuthada ma; shin kathaafe cakada ne soo efopa.

24.1: Issi asi macho eki simmidi, issi iitabaa I bolla demmidi iyo ixidi, pirimaa daakidi, yeddiko,
24.2: iya soope keyada, hara azina geliko,
24.3: he nam7antho azinay iyo dosonna ixidi, pirimaa daakidi, iyo ba soope kessidi yeddiko, woyko iyo ekida nam7antho azinay hayqiko,
24.4: iya tunida gisho, koyro ekida azinay, zaaridi iyo ekofo. Hessi Godaa sinthan ixetidaba; ne Goday, ne Xoossay ne immiya biittan hessa mela nagara oothofa.
24.5: Ooratha macho ekida asi olas boopo; hara deexo ooso oothofo. Issi laythi aadhana gakanaw awuka boonna ba machiw ufayso.
24.6: Issi asa woxa woyko mayde acos oykofa; hessi keetha asay miyaba dhayidi hayqo guussu.
24.7: Issi Isra7eele gidida ba ishaa kaysoti efidi, aylle kessey woyko haras bayziya uray hayqo. Hessada oothada iita uraa ne giddofe digga.
24.8: Goga hargefe nena minthada naaga; Leewe koche gidida kahineti nena tamaarsiya ubbaa pola; ta entaw immida kiita naaga.
24.9: Neeni Gibxefe keyada ogen de7ishin, Goday ne Xoossay Mayraami bolla oothidaysa akeeka.
24.10: Issi asas issiba tal7ada, oythiyaba oychanaw iya soo gelopa.
24.11: Neeni karen eqidashin, ne tal7ida uray oothiyaba soope kessidi new immo.
24.12: I manqo gidiko, neeni acos oykida iya ma7uwa ne son aysopa.
24.13: I ma7idi aqana mela sa7i omarsiya wode iyaw guye zaara; I nena galatana. Hessi Godaa ne Xoossaa sinthan new xillotetha ooso gididi taybetana.
24.14: Manqonne maade koyidi dookaletida, Isra7eele gidida ne ishaa gidin woyko ne katamatape issuwan de7iya hara biitta asi naaqofa.
24.15: I hachi oothidaysa hachi ekanaw minthidi koyiya gisho, awi wullonna iyaw qanxa. Hessi hanonna ixiko, manqoy Godaako waassin hessi new nagara gidana.
24.16: Nayti oothida nagaraa gisho, aawata wodhanaw bessenna; qassi aawati oothida nagaraa gisho nayta wodhanaw bessenna. Oonika ba oothida nagaran nagaran hayqanaw bessees.
24.17: Hara biitta asaa pirdaanne yi7o nayta pirdaa wobbisopa; am7e ma7uwa aco gisho oykofa.
24.18: Neeni Gibxe biittan aylle gididaysanne Goday ne Xoossay nena yaape wozidi kessidaysa akeeka. Taani nena kiittey hessa gishosa.
24.19: Neeni kathi cakiya wode ne dogida mirqiya ekanaw guye simmofa. Goday, ne Xoossay ne kushe ooso ubban nena anjana mela hessa bete asas, yi7o naytasinne am7etas aggaaga.
24.20: Neeni shamaho ayfe maxiya wode wursada maxanaw nam7antho guye simmofa. Attidaysa bete asaas, yi7o naytasinne am7etas aggaaga.
24.21: Neeni woyne ayfe maxiya wode wursada maxanaw nam7antho guye simmofa. Attidaysa bete asas, yi7o naytasinne am7etas aggaaga.
24.22: Neeni Gibxe biittan aylle gidada de7idaysa dogopa. Taani nena kiittey hessa gishosa.

25.1: Nam7u asati ooyetidi pirda keethi biiko, daynnati xilluwa ne like gidi, naaqidaysa ne bala gidi pirdo.
25.2: Balidaysa garaafo bessiyaba gidiko, iya tirara zin7isidi zokon shocana mela daynnay kiitto. I garaafetey daynna sinthaninne I oothida balaa mela gido.
25.3: I oytamu gakanaw garaafetanaw danda7ees, shin hessafe daropo. Hessafe dariko ne ishay ne sinthan kawuyana.
25.4: Wudumman kathi yedhiya boora doona qachofa.
25.5: Issife de7iya ishatape issoy na7a yelonna hayqiko, iya machiya hara asi gelopo. I azinaa ishay iyo ekidi, iw koshshiyaba kuntho.
25.6: Hayqida ishaa sunthay Isra7eele asaa giddofe qushetidi dhayonna mela iya, koyro yeliya adde na7ay hayqida ishaa sunthan xeegeto.
25.7: Gidoshin, I ba ishaa machiw ekanaw koyona ixiko, maccasiya katamaa pengen de7iya cimatako bada, “Ta azinaa ishay ba ishaa sunthay Isra7eelen daana mela koybeenna; tana ekidi, taw koshshiyaba kunthonna ixis” yaagada odo.
25.8: Katamaa cimati iya xeegidi oychin, I ha77ika, “Taani iyo ekike” giiko,
25.9: maccasiya cimata sinthan iyako shiiqada, iya caammaafe issuwa kessada, iya som7on cuttada, “Ba ishaas zerthi daana mela koyonna asa bolla haysa mela kawushi gakanaw bessees” yaago.
25.10: Yaatin, he uraa soo asay Isra7eele kochaa giddon, “Caamma kessida asaa soo” geetetidi xeegetishe daana.
25.11: Nam7u asati wadhetishin, issuwa machiya yada, ba azinaa shoceysa kushepe ashshanaw, ba kushiya yeddada hankuwa addetetha oykiko,
25.13: Gitanne guuthi gidida nam7u mizaane oykofa.
25.14: Daronne guuthi makiya nam7u maka miishey new doopo.
25.15: Goday, ne Xoossay new immiya biittan adussa laythi ne daana mela like mizaaneynne maka miishey new de7o.
25.16: Goday ne Xoossay hessa melaba oothidi, balethiya oonaka ixees.
25.17: Ne Gibxefe keyada oge bolla de7ishin, Amaaleqati ne bolla oothidaba akeeka.
25.18: Enti Xoosse yayyonna dere; ne ogiyan enti neera eqetidosona. Ne bishin, daaburidi guye attida asa ubbaa wodhidosona.
25.19: Hessa gisho, Goday ne Xoossay nena he biitta laatisidi, ne yuushuwan de7iya morketape nena shempisiya wode ha biittan enta hassayiya asi dhayana gakanaw Amaaleqata ubbaa dhaysa; hessa oothanaysa dogopa.

26.1: Goday, ne Xoossay nena laatisiya biitta gelada, wopu gada duussi oykiya wode,
26.2: Goday, ne Xoossay new immiya biittan mokida katha ubbaafe bayraa, Goday ne Xoossay ba sunthay xeegetana mela doorida bessaa ekada ba.
26.3: He wode aawatiya kahiniyako bada, “Goday taw immana gidi kase nu mayzatas caaqida bessaa nuna gelsida Godaas, nu Xoossaas, hachi markatayis” yaagite.
26.4: Kahiney kathaa ne kushepe ekidi, Godaa ne Xoossaa yarsho bessa sinthan wotho.
26.5: Hessafe guye, Godaa ne Xoossaa sinthan haysada yaaga; “Ta mayzay bessafe besse yuuyishe de7ida Soore biitta asi; I taybon guutha asatara Gibxe wodhidi yan de7is. I yan de7ishe gita, wolqaamanne taybon daro dere gidis.
26.6: Shin Gibxeti nuuni aylle gididi oothana mela un7ethidosona; kawushidosona.
26.7: Yaatin, nuuni Godaako, nu aawata Xoossaako waassida. Goday nu waasuwa si7is; nu waayiya, nu daaburanne nu un7etetha be7is.
26.8: Goday ba wolqaama kushiyan, ba micetida qesiyan, gita dagaman, malaataninne malaalsiyabatan nuna Gibxefe kessis.
26.9: Ha bessaa nuna ehidi, maathinne eessi goggiya ha biitta nuus immis.
26.10: Heko, Goday nuus immida biitta ayfiyape bayraa ehas” yaagada, kathaa Godaa ne Xoossaa sinthan wothada, iya sinthan gufanna.
26.11: Newunne ne soo asaas Goday, ne Xoossay immida lo77oba ubban ufaytashe, Godaa galata. Leewetinne ne giddon de7iya bete asa ubbayka neera ufayto.
26.12: Asraata kessiya heedzantho laythan, ne kathaafe asraata kessa ongidaape guye ne kataman de7iya Leewetas, bete asaas, yi7otasinne am7etas immada enti kallidi maana mela ootha.
26.13: Godaa, ne Xoossaako, “Taani ta soope dummatida katha imota kessada, ne tana kiittidaysada Leewetas, bete asaas, yi7otasinne am7etas immas. Taani ne kiitaape issuwaka menthabike; issuwaka doga aggabike.
26.14: Ta kayotiya wodeka, he asraatape aybaka mabike; ta tunida wodeka iya bochabike; hayqida asas iyape immabike. Taani Godaa, ta Xoossaa bonchas; I tana kiittidaba ubba polas.
26.15: Ne de7iya geeshsha bessaafe, salope duge xeella; ne deriya Isra7eele anja; kase nu mayzatas ne immana gada caaqida maathinne eessi goggiya biitta nuus anja” yaaga. Xoossas Dummatida Dere
26.16: Ne ha awaajotanne wogata naagana mela Goday ne Xoossay hachi nena kiittis. Hessa gisho, ne kumetha wozanapenne kumetha shempuwafe enta naaga.
26.17: Goday, new Xoosse gideysanne neeni iya ogiyan baanaw, iya wogaa, iya kiitaanne higgiya naaganaysa hachi erisadasa.
26.18: Goday ba gelida qaalada ne iya dere gideysa, iyaw buzo miishe gideysanne iya kiita ubbaa naageysata gideysa hachi nena erisis.
26.19: Hessa ne oothiko, I medhida dere ubbaafe aathidi nena galatan, sunthaninne bonchon gita dere oothana. I gelida qaalada ne iyaw geeshsha dere gidana.

27.1: Hessafe guye, Museynne Isra7eele cimati asaako, “Taani hachi hintena kiittiya kiitaa naagite.
27.2: Yordaanose shaafa pinnada, Goday ne Xoossay new immiya biitta geliya wode gita shuchata essada noora tiya.
27.3: Goday, ne aawata Xoossay new immana gidaysada maathinne eessi goggiya biitta, Goday ne Xoossay new immiya biitta ne pinniya wode ha higgeta ubbaa he shuchata bolla xaafa.
27.4: Neeni Yordaanose pinnida wode ta nena hachi kiittidaysada ha shuchata Ebaala zuma bolla essada enta bolla noora tiya.
27.5: He bessan Godaas, ne Xoossaas, birati bochonna shuchafe yarsho bessi giigisa.
27.6: Godaas, ne Xoossaas yarsho bessi masetiboonna shuchafe ootha; iya bolla Godaas, ne Xoossaas xuussa yarsho yarsha.
27.7: Issifetetha yarshuwa shiishada mashe Godaa, ne Xoossaa sinthan ufayta.
27.8: Ha higgeta bentana mela oothada ha shuchata bolla qoncen xaafa” yaagis. Ebaalape Wodhiya Baadethi
27.9: Museynne Leewe gidida kahineti issife asaako, “Isra7eele, si77i gada wozanape si7a; hachi ne Godaa, ne Xoossaa dere gidadasa.
27.10: Ta hachi new immiya Godaa, ne Xoossaa awaajota naaganne kiiteta” yaagis.
27.11: He gallas Musey asaa haysada yaagidi kiittis.
27.12: “Hinte Yordaanose pinnidaape guye Garzaana zuma bolla eqidi asaa anjanaysati, Simoona, Leewe, Yihuda, Yisakoora, Yoosefanne Biniyaame kochata.
27.13: Qassi Ebaala zuma bolla eqidi asaa baaddanaysati, Robeela, Gaade, Aseera, Zabloona, Daanenne Niftaaleme kochata.
27.14: “Leeweti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, Isra7eele asaako haysada yaago.
27.15: Godaa sinthan ixetidaba gidiya gisho, kushe hiillanchchoy mithi massidi, birata sheeshidi woyko shuchi qoxidi oothida eeqa geeman goyinniya oonika baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.16: “Ba aawa woyko ba aayiw kawushiya oonika baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.17: “Ba shooruwa zawa sugiya asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.18: “Qooqey baanaw bessiya ogiyape hara soo zaariya asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.19: “Bete asaa, yi7o naytanne am7eta pirda geellayiya asi baadetidaysa gido” yaagiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.20: “Ba aawa machiw xaallidi, ba aawa bonchuwa qaariya asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.21: “Mehera tuniya asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.22: “Ba micho gidida aawa woyko aaye na7era tuniya asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.23: “Ba mache aayera tuniya asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.24: “Ase geeman wodhiya asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.25: “Miishen shametidi, xillo asi wodhiya asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.
27.26: “Ha higgeta naagonna asi baadetidaysa gido” giiko, Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago.

28.1: Neeni Godaa ne Xoossaas polo kiitetiko, hachi ta new immiya kiita ubbaa minthada naagiko, Goday, ne Xoossay biittan de7iya kawotethata ubbaafe aathidi nena dhoqu dhoqu oothana.
28.2: Neeni Godaa, ne Xoossaas kiitetiko, haysafe kaallidi de7iya anjo ubbay nebaa gidana.
28.3: Ne katamaninne ne goshshan anjetidaysa gidana.
28.4: Ne ulo ayfey, ne kathay, ne mehey, ne dorsatinne ne deeshati anjetidaysata gidana.
28.5: Ne keesheynne ne munaqa miishey anjetidaysa gidana.
28.6: Ne kessaynne ne geloy anjetidaysa gidana.
28.7: Ne bolla dendiya ne morketa, Goday ne sinthan xoonetidaysata oothana. Enti ne bolla issi ogera yaana, shin laapun ogera ne sinthafe baqatana.
28.8: Goday ne kushey oykiyabaanne ne shaaliya anjana; Goday, ne Xoossay new immiya biittan nena anjana.
28.9: Neeni Godaa, ne Xoossaa kiita naagikonne iya ogiyan biiko, I new caaqidaysada Goday nena baw geeshsha dere oothidi essana.
28.10: Hessafe guye, biittan de7iya asa ubbay Goday ba sunthan nena xeegidaysa be7idi yayyana.
28.11: Goday new immanaw ne mayzatas caaqida he biittan, ne ulo ayfiya, ne mehiya, ne goshsha ayfiya darsidi anjana.
28.12: Ne kushe ooso ubbaa anjanawunne, Goday ne biittas ira woden woden bukisanaw ba minja keethaa, salo pengiya new dooyana. Neeni daro kawotethatas gede tal7anaape attishin, oodefeka haa tal7aka.
28.13: Goday nena ubbaas kace kessanaape attishin, goyna kessenna. Hachi ta new immiya, Godaa, ne Xoossaa kiita si7ada, minthada naagiko, ne bolla gidanaape attishin, garse gidaka.
28.14: Ta new hachi immida kiitaape haddirsi woyko ushachi gada, hara xoossata kaallofa; enta goyinnofa. Kiitetonna Ixoy Ehiya Baadethi (Leewe 26:14-46)
28.15: Shin neeni Godaa, ne Xoossaas kiitetonna ixada, hachi ta nena kiittiya wogaanne higgiya ubbaa naagonna ixiko, haysafe kaallidi de7iya baadethati ubbay ne bolla yaananne nena demmana.
28.16: Ne katamaninne ne goshshan baadetidaysa gidana.
28.17: Ne keesheynne munaqa miishey baadetidaysa gidana.
28.18: Ne ulo ayfey, ne katha ayfey, ne mehey, ne dorsaynne deeshay baadetidaysa gidana.
28.19: Ne kessaynne ne geloy baadetidaysa gidana.
28.20: Neeni iita ooso oothada tana aggida gisho, neeni eeson dhayana gakanaw ne oothiya ooso ubban Goday baadethi, dagamanne kawushatethi yeddana.
28.21: Neeni laattanaw biya biittafe dhayana gakanaw Goday, gadoy neepe duuxonna mela oothana.
28.22: Goday nena gilqatethan, mishan, madunthan, xuuggiya awan, koshan, wol7oninne kathi dhaysiya harmen ne dhayana gakanaw shocana.
28.23: Neepe bollara de7iya saloy naase birata gidana; neepe garsara de7iya biittay birata gidana.
28.24: Goday ne biittan bukiya ira bidonne baana kessana; neeni dhayana gakanaw salope baani bukana.
28.25: Goday nena ne morketan xoonisana. Neeni enta olanaw issi ogera keyana; shin laapun ogera ne enta sinthafe baqatana. Biittan de7iya kawotethi ubbay ne bolla gakidaba be7idi, yashshan kokorana.
28.26: Ne ahay salo kafotasinne bazzo do7atas kathi gidana; enta yedethiya oonika deenna.
28.27: Goday nena paxoy bayna Gibxe gadon, kixan, madunthaninne puuso hergen shocana.
28.28: Goday nena gooshshatethan, qooqetethaninne dagaman shocana.
28.29: Seeta gallas neeni qooqey tattafeysada tattafana; ne oothiyaba ubbay new giigonna ixana. Ne de7o laytha ubban ne un7etananne bonqetada daana. Nena maaddiya asi demmaka.
28.30: Ne macho oycha giigisana, shin iyo hari dafi ekidi iissana. Neeni keethe keexana, shin iyan de7aka. Woyne tokana, shin iya ayfiya maaka.
28.31: Ne booray ne sinthan shuketana, shin iya ashuwa maaka. Ne harey neepe wolqan eketana, shin new guye simmenna. Ne dorsati ne morketas imetana, enta ashshanaw nena maaddiya asi deenna.
28.32: Ne ayfey be7ishin ne adde naytinne macca nayti hara kawotethas imetana. Enti simmin be7ana gada xeellishin, ne ayfey tollu gidi attana; hessa digganaw new wolqi deenna.
28.33: Ne biitta ayfiyanne ne cawa ubbaa ne eronna asi maana; ne de7o laytha ubban un7etidaysanne naaqetidaysa gidana.
28.35: Goday paxoy bayna iita madunthan ne gulbatanne ne wodiriya hargisana; tohope huuphe gakanaw, nena he madunthan shocana.
28.36: Goday nenanne ne kawa, nenanne ne mayzata eronna asa biitta efana. Hessan neeni mithafenne shuchafe oosetida hara xoossata goyinnana.
28.37: Goday nena laaliya hara kawotethata giddon neeni miichasinne kaassas attana.
28.38: Neeni daro kathi ne goshshan zerana; shin booley midigin, guutha kathi shiishana.
28.39: Woyne tokada iya harmana, shin guxuney iya midigin, iyape ayfe demmaka woyko iyape uyaka.
28.40: Ne biitta ubban shamahoy dolana, shin ayfey qoqofetidi wuriya gisho, shamaho zayte demmaka.
28.41: Ne addenne macca yelana, shin oli di77idi efiya gisho enti neera dookona.
28.42: Ne mithaanne ne biitta ayfiya booley wursana.
28.43: Ne giddon de7iya bete asay ne bolla dhoqu dhoqu gaana, shin ne guye attada ziqi ziqi gaana.
28.44: I new tal7anaape attishin, ne iyaw tal7aka; I huuphe gidana; neeni goyna gidana.
28.45: Godaa, ne Xoossaa, ne kiitetonna ixida gishonne iya wogaanne higgiya naagonna ixida gisho, ne dhayana gakanaw ha baadethati ubbay ne bolla wodhana; nena enti yedethana.
28.46: Ha baadethati ne bollanne ne kochaa bolla merinaw malaatanne malaalsiyaba gidana.
28.47: New sa7i injetida wode Godaa, ne Xoossaa ufaysaninne galatan goyinnona gisho,
28.48: nena koshan, saamon, kallotethaninne meton ubbaba dhayada, Goday ne bolla yeddiya ne morketas haaretana. Goday nena dhaysana gakanaw ne morgen birata qambara wothana.
28.49: Goday ne enta qaala eronna kawotethata, biitta gaxape ankoy piradhidi wodheysada ne bolla ehana.
28.50: Enti wozana minota; cima bonchonayisata; naytas qadhetonayisata.
28.51: Ne dhayana gakanaw enti ne mehiyanne goshsha ayfiya maana. Neeni dhayana gakanaw ne kathaa, ne woyniya, ne zaytiya, ne miizanne ne dorsa wudiya maarokona.
28.52: Goday, ne Xoossay new immiya biittan de7iya ne ammanetiya adussenne mino dirsati laaletana gakanaw ne katamaa yuushuwa teqidi nena un7ethana.
28.53: Ne morketi katamaa teqidi nena un7ethiya wode miyaba dhayada, Goday ne Xoossay new immida ne ulo ayfe gidida ne adde naytanne ne macca nayta maana.
28.54: Ne giddon hari attoshin kase injen de7ida asika ba ishaas, ba dosiya machesinne ba yelida naytas ba kathaafe shaakenna.
28.55: Morketi katamaa teqidi un7ethiya wode maanabay hari bayna gisho, miya ba nayta ashuwape hara oodeska immenna.
28.56: Ne giddon kase injen de7ida, ba injiyafe dendoysan sa7a yedhanaw shaatetiya maccasiya, ba dosiya azinaasinne ba yelida naytas uuzettana.
28.57: Morketi iya de7iya katamaa teqidi iyo un7ethida gishonne waaysida gisho, iw hari miyabay dhayin, ba yelida na7aanne do7aa enta gathonna geeman barka maana.
28.58: Ha maxaafan xaafetida higgeta ne naagonna ixiko, malaalsiyanne yashshiya Godaa, ne Xoossaa suntha bonchona ixiko,
28.59: ne bollanne ne kochaa bolla Goday, yashshiya gado, daro wode gam7iya, paxoy bayna iita harge yeddana.
28.60: Kase Gibxe asaa bolla be7ada, ne yayyida Gibxe harge ubbaa zaaridi ne bolla ehana; he hargey nena yeddenna.
28.61: Gujidika, ha higge maxaafan xaafetiboonna hargetanne gadota ubbaa ne dhayana gakanaw Goday ne bolla ehana.
28.62: Godaa, hinte Xoossa hinte si7onna ixida gisho, salo xoolintoda darida hintefe guuthi attana.
28.63: Goday, hintew lo77oba oothiya wodenne hinte tayboy dariya wode ufaytidaysada ha77i hinte bolla gado ehiya wodenne hintena dhaysiya wode ufaytana; hinte laattanaw biya biittafe shodetidi dhayana.
28.64: Goday nena ha gaxape ya gaxa gakanaw kawotethata ubbaa giddon laallana. Yan neeni woyko ne mayzati eronna hara mithinne shucha xoossata goyinnana.
28.65: He kawotethata giddon hinte shempo demmeketa; tohoy yedhiya bessika new deenna. Yan Goday new qofan kumida guugge, amon argaacida ayfenne ufaysi qanxida wozana immana.
28.66: Ne de7oy hirgan kumana; gallasinne qamma dagamaninne hayqo yashshan un7etada daana.
28.67: Ne wozanan kumida yashshaafenne ne ayfey be7iya palabaape dendoysan, wontiya wode neeni, “Awude qammandeesha” qassi qammiya wode, “Awude wontandesha” yaagana.
28.68: Ta nena, “Zaarada ha ogiyara baaka” gida ogiyara Goday nena zaaridi markaben guye Gibxe yeddana. Yan neeni aylle gidanaw ne morketas nena bayzanaw koyana, shin hintena aylleyanaw shammiya asi demmeketa.

29.1: Goday Koreeba zuman, Isra7eele asaara caaqida caaquwa bolla gujidi Moo7aben entara caaqanaw Muse kiitida caaqo qaalati haysata.
29.2: Musey Isra7eele asaa ubbaa xeegi shiishidi, haysada yaagis. Goday Gibxe kawa bolla, iya olanchota bollanne iya biitta ubbaa bolla oothidabaanne gathidaba hinte, hinte ayfen be7ideta.
29.3: Enta bolla gathida iita metota, malaalsiyabatanne gita malaatata hinte, hinte ayfen be7ideta.
29.4: Shin hachi gakanaw Goday, hintew akeekiya wozana, xeelliya ayfenne si7iya haythi immibeenna.
29.5: Goday oytamu laythi kumethi hintena mela biittan kaalethiya wode hinte ma7oy wuribeenna, hinte caammay cimibeenna.
29.6: Goday, hinte Xoossaa gideysa hinte erana mela uythi mibeeketa; woyne woyko hara mathoyiya ushshi uyibeeketa.
29.7: Nuuni ha bessa gakida wode Haseboona Kawoy Sihooninne Baasane Kawoy Oogey nuura oletanaw keyidosona, shin nuuni enta xoonida.
29.8: Enta biitta ekidi, Robeelanne Gaade kochaas, qassi Minaase kochaafe baggaas laata oothidi immida.
29.9: Hinte oykiyabaynne yedhiyabay hintew anjetana mela ha caaqo qaalata ammanetidi naagite.
29.10: Hachi hinte ubbay, kochata halaqati, cimati, shuumatinne Isra7eele asa ubbay haysan Godaa sinthan eqideta.
29.11: Hinte naytara, hinte machetara, hinte giddon de7idi, mithi mixiyanne haathe tikiya hara biitta asaara issife haysan eqideta.
29.12: Godaa, hinte Xoossara qaala gelanaw haysan eqideta. Goday ha qaala hachi hintera caaqon minthana.
29.13: Goday hintena ba ase oothidi minthana; hintewunne hinte mayzatas, Abrahaames, Yisaaqasinne Yayqoobas caaqidaysada I hintew Xoosse gidana.
29.14: Goday ha caaqo qaala essey hinte xalaalara gidenna.
29.15: Hachi haysan, Godaa, nu Xoossaa sinthan eqida nu ubbaaranne sinthafe yaana yeleta ubbaara essees.
29.16: Nuuni Gibxen waanidi de7idaakonne ha77i gakanaw ogen de7iya kawotethata giddora waanidi kanthidi yidaako ereeta.
29.17: Enta giddon de7iya ixetida mitha, shucha, biranne worqa eeqa misileta be7ideta.
29.18: Ha hintefe oonika adde gidin macca gidin, issi soo asi gidin, issi kochi gidin Godaa, nu Xoossaafe, haakidi hara kawotethata xoossata goyinnona mela naagetite. Hessa mela cammiyanne wodhiya ayfe ayfiya asi hinte giddon de7opo.
29.19: Ha caaqo qaala si7idi, ba wozanan, “Ta shenen taani biikoka, metoy baawa” yaagidi bana cimmiko, hessa mela asi lo77ota bollanne iitata bolla dhayo ehees.
29.20: Godaa hanqoynne qanaatey hessa mela ase bolla eexidi keyana. Ha maxaafan xaafetida baadethi ubbay iya bolla yaana; salope garsan iya suntha Goday quchana.
29.21: Goday ha higge maxaafan xaafetida baadetha caaqo qaalada he uraa Isra7eele giddofe shaakidi dhaysana.
29.22: Yaana yeletethay, hinte sheeshaynne haaho biittafe yaa hara biitta asay, Goday hinte bolla ehida gaduwanne hargiya be7ana.
29.23: Biitta ubbay diinneninne maxinen kumana; toketiyabay deenna; doliyabay bentenna; maatinne mithi dolenna. Goday ba hanqon dhaysida Soodomadanne Gamoorada, Adaamadanne Xaboyma katamatada hanana.
29.24: Kawotethati, “Goday ha biitta bolla haysa melaba ayis oothidee? Ha wolqaama hanquwas gaasoy aybee?” yaagana.
29.25: Asay zaaridi, “Enti Goday, enta aawata Xoossay, enta Gibxefe kessida wode entara gelida caaqo qaala menthida gishosa.
29.26: Enti eronna xoossatasinne I goyinnofite gida xoossata goyinnidosona.
29.27: Hessa gisho, Goday hanqetidi, ha maxaafan xaafetida baadethata ubbaa enta bolla ehis.
29.28: Goday wolqaama hanqo hanqetidi, enta biittafe entana shoddidi hara biitta yedethis” yaagana.
29.29: Xuuray nu Godaa nu Xoossasa, shin nuuni ha higge qaala oothana mela qoncidaysati merinaw nuusanne nu naytasa.

30.1: Hachi ta ne sinthan wothida anjoynne baadethay ne bolla gakiya wode Goday, ne Xoossay nena laaliya hara kawotethata giddon de7ishe haysa ne akeekiko,
30.2: nenne ne nayti Godaa, ne Xoossaako, simmada, ne kumetha wozanapenne ne kumetha shempuwafe taani hachi nena kiittiya higgiyas kiitetiko,
30.3: yan Goday, ne Xoossay ne di7etida biittafe nena zaarana. I hintew qadhetidi hintena laallida kawotethata ubbaa giddofe zaaridi shiishana.
30.4: Biitta gaxape gaxa gakanaw ne laaletikoka, yaape Goday, ne Xoossay nena zaaridi shiishana.
30.5: Ne aawati kase laattida biitta, neka laattana mela Goday, ne Xoossay nena he biitta ehana. Yan nena ne aawatape aathidi dureyana; ne taybuwa darsana.
30.6: Ne de7on daana melanne Godaa, ne Xoossaa ne kumetha wozanapenne ne kumetha shempuwafe dosana mela I newunne ne naytas kiitetiya wozana immana.
30.7: Goday, ne Xoossay ha baadethata ubbaa ne morketanne nena gooddeyisata bolla ehana.
30.8: Hachi ta nena kiittiya higgiya ne naagana; zaarada Godaas, ne Xoossaas kiitetana.
30.9: He wode Goday ne Xoossay nena ne kushe ooso ubban, ne ulo ayfiyan, mehiyaninne ne goshsha ayfiyan nena darsidi anjana. Goday kase ne aawata anjidi ufaytidaysada nena anjidi ufaytana.
30.10: Hessi hananay ha higge maxaafan xaafetida Godaa, ne Xoossaa higgiyanne wogaa naagada, Godaa, ne Xoossaako ne kumetha wozanapenne ne kumetha shempuwafe simmiko.
30.11: Hachi ta nena kiittiya kiitati hessa mela deexo gidokona; neepe haakokona.
30.12: Neeni, “Nuuni si7idi kiitetana mela salo keyidi nuus wodhisanay oonee?” goonna mela salona gidenna.
30.13: “Nuuni si7idi kiitetana mela nuus abba pinnidi ehanay oonee?” goonna mela abbaafe hefinthana gidenna.
30.14: Qaalay new daro matan de7ees; ne oothana mela qaalay ne wozanaaninne ne doonan de7ees.
30.15: Heko, ta hachi ne sinthan de7onne lo77otethi, hayqonne dhayo wothas.
30.16: Ne Godaa, ne Xoossaa dosiko, iya ogiyan biiko, iya kiitaa, iya awaajuwanne iya higgiya naagiko, ne de7on daananne darana. Ne laattanaw geliya biittan Goday, ne Xoossay nena anjana.
30.17: Shin ne wozanay Godaape haakin, iyaw kiitetonna ixada, hara xoossatas gufannada enta goyinniko,
30.18: hinte ubbay dhayanaysa ta hachi hintew odayis. Yordaanose pinnidi hinte laattanaw biya biittan hinte laythay aduqenna.
30.19: Ta hinte sinthan de7onne hayqo, anjonne baadethi wothidaysas hachi salonne sa7a hinte bolla markayana. Hiza hintenne hinte sheeshay de7on daana mela de7o doorite.
30.20: Godaa ne Xoossaa dosa; iya qaala si7a, iyaw kiiteta; iyara oyketa. Hessada haniko, Goday kase ne mayzatas, Abrahaames, Yisaaqasinne Yayqoobas immanaw caaqida biittan nenne ne sheeshay adussa laythi daana.

31.1: Musey ba odaa wursidaape guye Isra7eele asaako haysada yaagis;
31.2: “Ha77i taw xeetanne laatamu laythi gidida gisho, hizape guye kaalethanaw danda7ike. Goday taako, ‘Ne Yordaanose pinnaka’ yaagis.
31.3: Goday, ne Xoossay ne sinthe aadhidi nena kaalethana. Yan de7iya kawotethata I dhaysana gisho, enta biitta ne laattana. Goday gidaysada Iyyasuy hintena kaalethana.
31.4: Goday Amoore kawota Sihoonanne Ooge xoonidi, enta biitta dhaysidaysada hinte morketa hessada oothana.
31.5: Goday enta hintew aathidi immin, hinte enta bolla ta hintena kiittidaysada oothana.
31.6: Minnite; gencite; yayyofite. Enta be7idi dagammopite. Goday hinte Xoossay hintera gidana; I hintena yeggenna, aggenna” yaagis.
31.7: Musey Iyyasu xeegidi, Isra7eele asaa ubbaa sinthan haysada yaagis; “Minna; genca. Ne ha asaara issife Goday enta mayzatas immana gidi caaqida biitta gelaasa; he biitta enta laatisaasa.
31.8: Goday, I ba huuphen neera gididi nena kaalethana. I nena yeggenna; aggenna. Hessa gisho, yayyofa; ufaysi qanxofa” yaagis. Higgey Qoncen Nabbabeto
31.9: Musey ha higgiya xaafidi, Godaa qaala caaqo Taabotiya tookiya kahine gidida Leewe naytasinne Isra7eele cimatas immis.
31.10: Musey entako, “Aco ubbay atto geetetiya laapuntha laytha wursethan, Shaqara Ba7aaley bonchetiya gallas, ha higgiya dhoqu oothidi nabbabite.
31.11: Godaa, hinte Xoossaa sinthan, I doorida bessan, iya goyinnanaw Isra7eele asa ubbay shiiqiya wode entaw nabbabite.
31.12: Enti ubbay si7idi, Godaa, hinte Xoossaas yashshi tamaarana mela ha higge qaala ubbaa naagana mela addeta, maccasata, naytanne hinte biittan de7iya hara biitta asaa issife shiishite.
31.13: Ha higge qaala eronna enta naytika Yordaanose pinnidi, hinte laattanaw biya biittan, hinte de7iya laytha ubban ha higgiya si7o; Godaas, hinte Xoossaas, yashshi tamaaro” yaagidi kiittis. Isra7eele Geellatethay Koyrottidi Odetis
31.14: Goday Museko, “Ne hayqiya wodey matis. I kaalethana wogaa ta iyaw immana mela Iyyasu xeegada, iyara issife Dunkaaniya penge shiiqite” yaagin, Museynne Iyyasuy Dunkaaniya pengiyako shiiqidosona.
31.15: Goday Dunkaaniya pengen eqida shaara tuussan entaw qoncis.
31.16: Goday Museko, “Neeni mata wode hayqada ne aawatan gahetaasa. Neepe guye, ha asay taw ammanetonayisata gidana; ta entara gelida caaquwa menthana. Enti tana aggidi, banta laattiya biittan de7iya eeqata kaallana.
31.17: Hessi haniya wode ta hanqoy enta bolla eexana; ta enta aggaagana; ta som7uwa entafe hara soo zaarana. Enti dhayana; iita metoynne dhayoy enta bolla yaana. He wode enti, ‘Tuma ha metoy nuna gakiday nu Xoossay nu giddon bayna gisho gidennee?’ yaagana.
31.18: Hara xoossata goyinnidi, enti oothida iita oosuwa gisho, ta he gallas ta som7uwa entafe hara soo zaarana.
31.19: “Ha77i ha mazmuriya xaafada, Isra7eele asaa ubbaa tamaarsa. Ha mazmurey taw Isra7eele asaa bolla marka gidana mela enta yexisa.
31.20: Enta mayzatas gelida qaalada, maathinne eessi goggiya biitta ta enta gelsa simmin, enti mi kallidi goobidaape guye, hara xoossata goyinnidi, tana kadhana; ta caaquwa menthana.
31.21: Daro metoynne dhayoy enta bolla gakida wode ha mazmurey enta naytape baletonna gisho, enta bolla marka gidana. Taani caaqida biitta enta buroo gelsonna de7ishin, haara enti qopiya qofaa taani erayis” yaagis.
31.22: Musey he gallas mazmuriya xaafidi, Isra7eele asaa tamaarsis.
31.23: Hessafe guye, Goday Nawe na7aa Iyyasuko, “Minna, genca; ta entaw immanaw qaala gelida biitta Isra7eele asaa efada gelsa. Ta neera gidana” yaagis.
31.24: Musey ha higgeta koyrope wursethi gakanaw xaafidi wursidaape guye,
31.25: Godaa, Qaala caaqo Taabotiya tookiya Leeweta haysada yaagidi kiittis;
31.26: “Godaa higgey xaafetida ha maxaafa efidi, Godaa, hinte Xoossaa Qaala caaqo Taabotiya matan wothite. Yan I hinte bolla marka gidana.
31.27: Hinte ay mela geellekonne wozana iiteko ta erayis. Tuma, ta hintera de7ida laytha ubban hinte Godaas makallata, shin ta hayqin, ubba hintte waanidi makallandetii?
31.28: Hessa gisho, haysa ubbaa ta entaw odanawunne salonne sa7a ta enta bolla markayanaw hinte kochaa halaqatanne deriya kaalethiya asaa ubbaa taw shiishite.
31.29: Ta hayqidaape guye, hinte tuma iita ase gidanaysanne taani hintena tamaarsida kiitaape hara soo simmanaysa taani erayis. Hinte iya sinthan iitabaa oothidi, Godaa yiloyiya gisho, wodepe I hinte bolla iita gado ehana” yaagis. Muse Mazmuriya
31.30: Hessafe guye, Musey ha mazmure qaalata wurana gakanaw shiiqida Isra7eele maabara ubbaa nabbabidi sissis.

32.1: Saloto, taani odeysa si7ite; biittay ta doona qaala hayzo.
32.2: Ta timirtey ira mela buko; ta qaalay akada wodho. Maata bolla wodhiya xaasada dola bolla wodhiya puuseda wodho.
32.3: Taani Godaa sunthaa awaajana; gitatetha nu Xoossaas immite.
32.4: I nu Zaalla; iya oosoy polo; iya ogey suure. Xoossay ammantheysa; wordoy baynaysa; I tumanchonne suure.
32.5: Iya sinthan banta tunatethaa bessidosona; enti iya na7a gidokona; enti iitanne geella yeletethi.
32.6: Hinteno, eeyanne akeeki bayna asaw, hinte Godaas immiya zaaroy haysee? I hintena medhida hinte Aawa gidennee? hintena medhidi minthi essiday iya gidennee?
32.7: Beni wodiya qopa; aadhida yeletethaa akeeka. Ne aawa oycha; I new odana; cimata oycha; enti new qoncisana.
32.8: Ubbaafe Wolqaamay kawotethatas enta laata shaakida wode, asa zerethika dummayida wode, Isra7eele asaa taybuwa mela, asaas enta zawa essis.
32.9: Godaa gakida gishoy Isra7eele; Yayqoobi iya gakida laata.
32.10: I enta mela biittan, aykoy bayna mela biittan, carkoy baqishin demmis. Iyaw gondalle gidis, iya naagis; ba ayfe na77eda minthidi naagis.
32.11: Arganthi ba na7a paalo tamaarseysada, ba miccida qefiyan gakidi ashsheysada, Goday ba qefiyan haphidi enta ashshis.
32.12: Goday ba xalaala enta kaalethis; hara allaga xoossi iyara baawa.
32.13: I biittas dhoqa bessaa enta kessis; goshsha ayfiya enta muzis. Zaalla qophope enta eessi kalsis; shucha biittafe bentiya zayte ushshis.
32.14: Enta mehiyape qeesa maathi, dorsafenne deeshape xamaata maathi, modho dorsenne deesha asho midosona. Baasane dorsaanne deesha ashuwa, lo77o giste uythara midosona; suuthi daaniya woyne ushsha uyidosona.
32.15: Shin Isra7eeley ordis; makallis; midi kallidi moollotis. Bana medhida Xoossaa aggis; ba Atotethaa Zaalla kawushis.
32.16: Enti allaga xoossata goyinnidi, iya qanaatisidosona. Ixetida banta eeqatan iya hanqethidosona.
32.17: Xoosse gidonaysatas, kase enti eronna xoossatas, zine dendidaysatas, enta aawati goyinniboona xoossatas yarshidosona.
32.18: Entaw de7o immiya Zaalla dogidosona; yelidi dichida Xoossa aggidosona.
32.19: Adde naytinne macca nayti iya yiloyidosona; Goday hessa be7idi enta kadhis.
32.20: I, “Enti geellanne ammanetona dere gidiya gisho, taani ta som7uwa entafe genthana; enta wursethaa si77i gada be7ana” yaagis.
32.21: Xoosse gidonaysatan tana qanaatisidosona; banta eeqatan tana yiloyidosona. Taani enta kadhetida asan qanaatisana; eeya asan enta yiloyana.
32.22: Ta hanqoy tamada eexana; Si7oole gakanaw xuuggana. Biittan de7iyaba ubbaa maana, deriya baasuwa gakanaw xuuggana.
32.23: “Taani enta bolla meto doorana; ta dongiyan enta dukana.
32.24: Ta enta bolla iita kosha yeddana; enti hargeninne gadon wurana. Enta bolla iita bazzo do7atanne dukidi wodhiya iita shooshata yeddana.
32.25: Enta, mashshi oge bolla wursana; keetha garsan dagami kawotana. Na7atetha addetinne maccati wurana; guutha naytinne cimati attokona.
32.26: Ta enta dhaysanawunne enta hassayiya asi doonna mela oothanaw qopas.
32.27: Shin enta morketi, ‘Xooniday nuna; ha ubbaa oothiday Godaa gidenna; yaagidi otoron ceeqetonna mela gada aggaagas’ ” yaagis.
32.28: Isra7eele asay wozani bayna asi; enti akeekokona.
32.29: Enti cincidi akeekidako haysa erana, banta wursethaka shaakanashin.
32.30: Goday enta Xoossay enta bayzonaako, enta medhida Wolqaamay aathidi immonaako, waatidi issi asi mukulu asaa, num7u asi tammu mukulu asaa xoonii?
32.31: Nu Zaallay nu morketa zaalla mela gidonnaysa enti eroosona.
32.32: Enta woyney Soodome woyniyape yees, enti Gamoora goshshan dolidosona; ayfiyan marzeynne camoy kumis.
32.33: Enta woyney shoosha marze; wodhiya soggo.
32.34: Goday, “Ta hessa dogadina? Ta mazgaben xaafabikina?
32.35: Entaw dhayo gallasi matis; enta bolla gakanabay ellesees. He wode enta tohoy dhubetana; ta halo keyananne kushe zaarana.”
32.36: Enta wolqay wuridaysanne enta maaddiya asi baynaysa be7ida wode, Goday ba asaas pirdana; ba aylletas qadhetana.
32.37: Xoossay entako, “Enti ammanetiya enta xoossati awunee? Enti baqatidi qosetiya enta zaallay awunee?” yaagana.
32.38: Enta modho yarshuwa midaysati, enta woyne ushsha yarshuwa uydaysati, ha77i dendidi enta maaddo; enta asho.
32.39: “Tuma, Godi tana; Xoossi ta xalaala; taape attishin, hara Xoossi baawa. Wodheynne paathey tana; ta madunxisayis; ta pathayis; ta kushepe oonika ashshena.
32.40: Ta kushiya denthada haysada yaagana; Taani merinaw de7o;
32.41: Phooliya ta mashsha leefada, pirdanaw ta kushen oykiya wode, ta morketa bolla ta halo keyana; tana ixeysatas kushe zaarana.
32.42: Ta dongey enta suuthan mathotana; ta mashshay enta ashuwa maana. Tana ixiya ubbaa maarike; madunxidaysatinne di7etidaysati hayqana.”
32.43: Kawotethato, Godaa asaara ufaytite; I ba aylleta suutha accana. Ba morketa bolla halo keyana; biittan de7iya ba asaa nagaraa atto gaana.
32.44: Museynne Nawe na7ay Iyyasuy Isra7eele asaa shiishidi, ha mazmuriya ubbaa asay si7ishin yexidosona.
32.45: Musey ha qaala ubbaa Isra7eele asaas odi wursidaape guye,
32.46: entako, “Ha higge qaala ubbaa hinte nayti naagana melanne kiitetana mela hachi ta hintew marka oothada immiya qaala ubbaa hinte wozanan wothite.
32.47: Ha qaalay hintew de7ope attishin, coo qaala gidenna. Hinte ha qaala naagiko, Yordaanose pinnidi laattana biittan adussa laythi daana” yaagis.
32.48: He gallas Goday Muse haysada yaagis;
32.49: “Moo7aben, Iyaarko katamape sintha baggara de7iya Abariima Zumatape issuwa gidida Nabo Zuma bolla keya; yan Isra7eele asaa ta laatisana, Kanaane biitta haahon xeella.
32.50: Ne ishaa Aaroni Hoora Zuma bolla hayqidi, ba mayzata gakidaysada neka ha zumaa bolla hayqada ne mayzata gakana.
32.51: Hinte nam7ay Isra7eele asaa sinthan taw ammanetibeketa. Siina mela biittan, Qaadesa matan de7iya Mariba haatha matan ta geeshshatetha Isra7eele asaa bessibeketa.
32.52: Hessa gisho, neeni he biitta haahon xeellanaape attishin, ta Isra7eele asaa laatisana biitta gelaka” yaagis.

33.1: Xoossa asi gidida Musey hayqanaape sinthe, Isra7eele asaa anjida anjo qaalay haysa.
33.2: Musey, “Goday Siina zumaape yis; Sayre zumaape nu bolla poo7is. Paarana zumaape phoolis. Mukulan taybetiya kiitanchoti iyara de7oosona; Iya ushachan tama lacoy de7ees.
33.3: Godaw neeni ne asaa dosadasa; Geeshshati ubbay ne kushen de7oosona. Ne tohuwa garsan ubbay gulbatidi goyinnoosona; neepe kiita ekoosona.
33.4: Musey immida higgiya Isra7eele asaa laata ekoosona.
33.5: Isra7eele zerethati deriya halaqatara shiiqida wode, Goday ba asaa, Isra7eele bolla kawotis.
33.6: “Robeela kochay taybon guutha gidikoka, I hayqofo; paxa de7o.”
33.7: Musey Yihuda kochaaba, “Godaw, Yihuda waasuwa si7a; hanko iya yaratara iya bu7a. Enta kushiya minthetha; enti banta morketara oletiya wode enta maadda.
33.8: Musey Leewe kochaaba, ne Tumiimeynne Uriimey, neeni Masahan paacidanne Mariban palamida, ne geeshsha asaasa.
33.9: Bantana yelidaysatape, banta ishatapenne banta naytape aathidi, enti new ammanetidosona; ne caaqo qaala naagidosona.
33.10: Enti ne wogaa Yayqooba, ne higgiya Isra7eele tamaarsoosona. Enti ne sinthan ixaane cuyisoosona; yarsho bessan xuussa yarsho yarshoosona.
33.11: Abeeti Godaw, Leeweta anja; enta kushe oosuwan ne ufayta. Enta bolla dendiya morketa mentheretha zaari dendonna mela enta morketa cadda.”
33.12: Biniyaame kochaaba, “Godan dosetiday iyan ammanetidi de7ees; qamma gallas I enta naagees; ba hashiyan tookidi shempisees.”
33.13: Yoosefa kochaaba, “Goday, salope iran, sa7ape pulto haathan enta biitta anjo.
33.14: Awan kaxidi dooretida ayfeninne woden woden kaxiya ayfen anjeto.
33.15: Benipe de7iya deretinne zumati lo77o ayfen anjeto.
33.16: Enta biittay lo77obay kumida biitta gido; tushiya giddon eexiya taman qoncida Goday iya anjo. Ha anjoti ubbay Yoosefa kochaa gako; I ba ishata giddon halaqa gido.
33.17: Yoosefi koyro yeletida kormada mino; iya kaceti mentha kaceda mino. Iya kaceti tammu mukulan taybetiya Efreema kochata; mukulun taybetiya Minaase kochata. He kacetan I kawotethata qaycana; biitta gaxaa gakanaw I enta sugana.”
33.18: Zabloona kochaaba, “Zabloona, neeni ne kessan ufayta; Yisaakora, neeni ne dunkaaniyan ufayta.
33.19: Enti asaa banta zumako xeegana; yan enti geeshshatetha yarsho yarshana. Banta aquwanne banta duretetha, abbaafenne abba gaxan de7iya shafiyape demmana” yaagis.
33.20: Gaade kochaaba, “Enta biitta dalgisida Goday galatetto; Gaadi morke som7o woyko qese menthanaw, gaammoda naagees.
33.21: Enti lo77o biitta bantaw dooridosona; halaqatas gida biitta enti ekidosona. Isra7eele halaqati shiiqida wode, Godaa geeshsha sheniya shaakidi eridosona Isra7eeles suure pirdaa pirdidosona” yaagis.
33.22: Daane kochaaba, “Daaney wodala gaammo mela; I Baasanepe gupidi keyana” yaagis.
33.23: Niftaaleme kochaaba, “Niftaalemey Godaa aadho keehatethan, iya anjuwan duretis; enta biittay Abbaafe dugeha bagga gakees” yaagis.
33.24: Aseera kochaaba, “Aseeri hara kochatape aadhidi anjetidaysa; ba ishatan dosetidaysa gido; iya biittay shamaho zayten dureto.
33.25: Iya katamati birata pengen gordetidi naageto; ba laytha ubban I wolqaama gido.
33.26: Isra7eele, salope nena maaddanaw, ba gitatethan shaara bolla hemetiya, ne Xoossaa mela xoossi oonee?
33.27: Merinaa Xoossay ne de7iya bessi; iya merinaa kusheti neepe garsara de7oosona. I ne morketa ne sinthafe kessidi, ‘enta dhaysa’ yaagis.
33.28: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele kochay, salo iray bukiya bessan, kathinne woyney kumida biittan, hirgi bayna saro daana.
33.29: Isra7eele, ne anjetadaysa; Goday ashshida ne meli oonee? I new gondallenne maaddiya mashsha; ne morketi ne sinthan gufannana; ne enta baasuwa laallana” yaagis.

34.1: Musey Moo7abe dembaafe dendidi, Nabo zuma huuphiya, qassi Iyaarkofe doloha baggara de7iya Pisga zuma huuphiya gakis. Yan Goday Daane gakanaw de7iya Galada biitta,
34.2: Niftaaleme biitta ubbaa, Efreemenne Minaase biitta, wuloha baggara bidi Medetiraane Abbaa gakanaw de7iya Yihuda biittanne
34.3: dugeha baggara Zo7aarepe dendidi, zambi de7iya Iyaarko katamaa, zangaaran de7iya demba ubbaa bessis.
34.4: Goday Museko, “Taani hinte sheeshas immana gada Abrahaames, Yisaaqasinne Yayqoobas, caaqida biittay haysa. Ha77i neeni ne ayfen be7ana mela oothas, shin neeni yaa pinnaka” yaagis.
34.5: Godaa aylley, Musey, Goday gidaysada, yan Moo7abe biittan hayqis.
34.6: Goday Beet-Pa7oora katamaape sintha baggan Moo7abe zangaaran iya moogis. Shin hachi gakanaw I moogetida duufuwa eriya asi baawa.
34.7: Musey hayqiya wode iyaw laythi xeetanne laatama; shin iya ayfey ixibeenna; iya wolqay daaburibeenna.
34.8: Isra7eele asay Moo7abe denban hastamu gallas Muses yeekidosona. Hessafe guye, baley dendin, yeeho wodey wuris.
34.9: Musey, ba bessan oothana mela, iya bolla ba kushiya wothida gisho, Nawe na7ay Iyyasuy cincatetha ayyaanan kumis. Isra7eele asay Iyyasus kiitetidosona; Goday Muse baggara immida kiita naagidosona.
34.10: Godaa som7on odisida, Muse mela nabey, Isra7eele biittan dendibeenna.
34.11: Goday Muse Gibxe kawako, iyara oothiya moorinnatakonne kumetha asaako yeddidi, iya baggara malaatatanne malaalsiyabata ubbaa oothida, Muse mela hara nabey oonika baawa.
34.12: Isra7eele ubbaa sinthan gita wolqan malaalsiyaba oothida, Muse mela asi oonika baawa.

1.1: Godaa aylley Musey hayqidaape guye, Goday Muse maaddiya Nawe na7aa Iyyasu, haysada yaagis.
1.2: “Ta aylley, Musey hayqis. Hessa gisho, neeranne ha asa ubbay dendidi, taani Isra7eele asaas immanaw de7iya biitta gelanaw, Yordaanose shaafa pinnite.
1.3: Taani Muses odidaysada, hinte tohoy yedhiyaso ubba hintew immas.
1.4: Hinte zaway dugeha Negebe mela biittafe dendidi, pudehan de7iya Libaanose zuma gakanaasa. Qassi doloha baggan de7iya Efraxiisa wogga shaafape dendidi, Hiteta biitta ubba ekidi wuloha baggan de7iya Medetrane abba gakanaasa.
1.5: Iyyasu, ne laytha ubban oonika neera eqetanaw danda7ena. Taani Musera gididaysada, neeraka gidana. Taani nena yeggike; aggike.
1.6: Aykoy baawa minna. Taani enta mayzatas immana gada caaqida biitta neeni ha asaa laatisana.
1.7: Aykoy baawa minna. Ta aylley Musey new immida higgiya ubbaa minthada naaga. Neeni biya bessa ubban new injetana mela iyape ushachi woyko haddirsi goopa.
1.8: Ha higge maxaafay ne doonape shaaketofo. Iyan xaafetidaba ubbaa minthada naaganaw gallasinne qamma iya qopa. Hessa ne oothiko, new ubbabay injetananne poletana.
1.9: Ne biya bessa ubban taani Goday ne Xoossay neera de7iya gisho, babofa; hirgofa; yaagada new odayis” yaagis.
1.10: Hessafe guye, Iyyasuy deriya halaqata haysada yaagis;
1.11: “Asay dunkaanidi de7iya guta bidi, heedzu gallasa garsan, ‘Goday, hinte Xoossay, hintew immiya biitta laattanaw Yordaanose shaafa pinniya gisho, hintew shinqe giigisite’ yaagidi deriyas odite” yaagis.
1.12: Iyyasuy, Robeelanne Gaade kochata qassi Minaase kochatape bagga haysada yaagis;
1.13: “Goday, hinte Xoossay, hintena shempisana, ha biittaa hintew immana yaagidi, Godaa aylley Musey odidaysa qopite.
1.14: Hinte macheti, hinte naytinne hinte mehey Yordaanose Shaafape hafinthan Musey hintew immida biittan de7ishshona. Shin hinte olanchoti banta ola miishiya oykidi, hinte asaape sinthatidi, oletanaw Yordaanose shaafa pinnona.
1.15: Goday hintena shempisidaysada, entaka shempisana gakanawunne Goday hinte Xoossay entaw immiya biitta enti laattana gakanaw, enta maaddite; oletite. Yaatidi, simmi yidi, Yordaanose Shaafape hafinthan doloha baggan, Godaa aylley Musey immida hinte buzo biittan de7ite” yaagis.
1.16: Enti zaaridi Iyyasuko, “Ne nuna kiitida ubbaa nuuni oothana; ne kiittiyaso ubbaa baana.
1.17: Nuuni Muses ubbaban kiitetidaysada, newuka kiitetana. Goday, ne Xoossay Musera gididaysada, neeraka gido.
1.18: Neera eqeteynne ne kiita ixiya oonika de7iko, hayqo. Gidoshin neeni minna” yaagidosona.

2.1: Nawe na7ay Iyyasuy, biitta wochi be7iya nam7u asata Seexima geetetiya bessaafe qosan kiittishe, “Bidi biitta wochite; qassi Iyaarko katama dummayidi wochite” yaagidi kiittis. Enti bidi, Raabo geetetiya laymatethan aqiya ase soo aqanaw gelidosona.
2.2: Iyaarko kawoy, “Isra7eele asape kiitetidaysati ha biitta wochanaw hachi qamma yidosona” giya odaa si7is.
2.3: Yaatin, Iyaarko kawoy Raabiko, “Ne soo gelida asati biitta wochanaw yida asi gidiya gisho, entana kessada imma” yaagidi kiittis.
2.4: Shin maccasiya he nam7u asata qottada, “Ee asati taako yidosona, shin enti awupe yidaako ta erike.
2.5: Omarsi katama pengiya gordana haniya wode, enti keyidi bidosona. Enti awu bidaako ta erike. Ellesidi enta hinte kaalliko, oykana” yaagada entaw odasu.
2.6: Shin iya asata dasa bolla kessada talba coyna giddon qosasu.
2.7: Yaatin, kawoy kiitida asati wocheyisata koyishe, Yordaanose Shaafa pinthiya ogiya gakanaw bidosona. Enti katamaape buroo keyida mela katama pengey gordetis.
2.8: Wocheysati dhiskanaape kasetada, iya entako keyada,
2.9: haysada yaagasu; “Goday ha biitta hintew immidaysa ta erayis. Gaasoyka, hintefe dendidaysan gita yashshan asa ubbay til7is.
2.10: Gibxe biittafe hinte keyida wode, Goday hinte sinthan Zo7o Abbaa waati melisidaako nu si7ida. Qassi Yordaanose Shaafape doloha baggara de7iya Amoore kawota nam7ata, Sihoonanne Ooge hinte waatidi wodhidakonne enta katama waatidi dhaysidaako nu si7ida.
2.11: Nuuni hessa si7ida wode, nu wozanay yashshan til7is. Hiza, hinte Goday, Xoossay saluwaka sa7aaka haareysi iya gideysa nu erida.
2.12: Hessa gisho, ta hintew keehidaysada hinte ta aawa soo asaas keehanaada Godaa sunthan caaqite. Hessas ammanthiya malla taw immite.
2.13: Ta aawanne ta aayiw, ta ishatanne ta micheta eta soo asaa ubbaa wodhoko gidi caaqite” yaagasu.
2.14: He asati zaaridi, “Nu new caaqida caaquwa polonna ixiko, Xoossay nuna wodho. Nu oothiyaba ne asas qoncisonna ixiko, Goday ha biitta nuus immiya wode, nuuni new ammanetananne keehana” yaagidosona.
2.15: Ra7aabi keethay katama gimbe dirsara oyketidi keexetida gisho, maskootiyara wodoro duge yeddada, entana duge wodhisasu.
2.16: Ra7aaba entako, “Hintena koyeysati demmonna mela deriyako, bidi enti simmana gakanaw yan heedzu gallas qosetite. Yaani simmidi, hinte biya bessa baanaw danda7eeta” yaagasu.
2.17: -18 Asati zaaridi, “Nuuni ha biitta oykanaw geliya wode, ha zo7o wodoruwa ne nuna wodhisida maskootiyan qachonna ixikonne ne aawa, ne aayiw, ne ishatanne ne soo asa ubbaa ne soo shiishonna ixiko, ne nuna caaqisida caaqoy nuus gome gidenna.
2.19: Oonika ne soope kare keyidi hayqiko, hessi iya gome. Nuuni hessas oyshetoko. Neera son de7ishe oonika qohetiko, iya suuthaa gomey nuna gako.
2.20: Shin nu oothiyaba neeni asas qoncisiko neeni nuna caaqisida caaqoy nuus gome gidenna” yaagidosona.
2.21: Iya zaarada, “Hinte qaalada hano” gada enta moyzasu. Enti bidaape guye, he zo7o wodoruwa maskootiyan qachasu.
2.22: Enti deriyako bidi, enta koyeysati Iyaarko simmana gakanaw yan heedzu gallas qosetidosona. Enta koyeysati oge ubban koydosona, shin demmibookona.
2.23: Hessafe guye, he nam7u asati deriyape wodhidosona. Yordaanose pinnidi, Nawe na7aa Iyyasuko yidi, bantana gakidaba ubbaa odidosona.
2.24: Enti Iyyasuko, “Goday tuma he biittiw nuus aathidi immis. Qassi he biittan de7iya asa ubbay, nuus yayyidi til7idosona” yaagidosona.

3.1: Wontetha gallas, wonta guura Iyyasuynne asay Seexima geetetiya bessaafe dendidi, Yordaanose shaafa bidi, pinnonna yan dunkaanidosona.
3.2: Heedzu gallasape guye, halaqati enti dunkaanida guta gelidi,
3.3: “Leewe koche gidida kahineti tookida, Godaa, hinte Xoossaa caaqo taabotiya hinte be7ida wode dunkaanida gutaape dendidi enta kaallite.
3.4: Hinte kase ha ogiyara bidi eronna gisho, hinte baana ogiya enti bessaana. Shin caaqo taabotiyako shiiqopite. Hinte giddoninne caaqo taabotiya giddon nam7u mukulu wadha gidiya haahotethi de7o” yaagidi odidosona.
3.5: Iyyasuy asaako, “Goday wonto hinte giddon malaalsiyaba oothana gisho, hintenatethaa geeshshite” yaagis.
3.6: Qassi kahinetas, “Caaqo taabotiya tookidi, asape sinthe aadhite” yaagidi kiittis. Kahineti caaqo taabotiya tookidi, asape sinthe aadhidosona.
3.7: Goday Iyyasuko, “Taani Musera gididaysada, neeraka gidanaysa asa ubbay erana mela hachi Isra7eele ubbaa sinthan nena dhoqu dhoqu ooso doomana.
3.8: Neeni, caaqo taabotiya tookiya kahinetas, ‘Yordaanose shaafa doona gakiya wode haatha gido gelidi eqite’ gada kiita” yaagis.
3.9: Iyyasuy Isra7eele asaako, “Haa yidi Godaa, hinte Xoossaa qaala si7ite.
3.10: De7o Xoossay hinte giddon de7eysa hinte eranay, Kanaaneta, Hiteta, Hiweta, Parzeta, Gergeseta, Amooretanne Yaabuseta hinte sinthafe I gooddidi kesseysana.
3.11: Biitta ubba Godaa caaqo taabotey hintefe sinthatidi, Yordaanose shaafa pinnana.
3.12: Hiza tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zerethatape issi issi asi doorite.
3.13: Biitta ubba Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineta tohoy Yordaanose haatha yedhiya wode haathay eqana. Qommofe duge goggiya Yordaanose haathay issi bolla shiiqidi dooretana” yaagis.
3.14: Asay Yordaanose shaafa pinnanaw dunkaanida gutaape dendiya wode, caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti asaa sinthan boosona.
3.15: Kathi shiishiya wode Yordaanose shaafay medhaysada kixikoka, caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti Yordaanose shaafa gakidi, enta tohoy haatha gaxa yedhida wode,
3.16: qommofe duge goggiya haathay eqis. Zartaana matan de7iya Adaama katama gakanaw shiiqidi dooretis. Duge Hayqo abbaako goggiya haathay eqis. Yaanin, asay Iyaarko katama pinnidosona.
3.17: Isra7eele asay mela biittara pinnidi wurana gakanaw Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti Yordaanose shaafa giddon mela biittan eqidosona.

4.1: Asa ubbay Yordaanose pinnidaape guye Goday Iyyasuko,
4.2: “Issi issi Isra7eele kochaafe issi issi asi ekada tammanne nam7u asata doora.
4.3: He asati Yordaanose shaafa giddon kahineti eqida bessaafe tammanne nam7u shuchata ekana melanne he shuchata hachi hinte dunkaanidi aqiya bessan wothana mela oda” yaagis.
4.4: Iyyasuy Isra7eele zerethatape dooretida tammanne nam7u asata xeegis.
4.5: Entako, “Godaa hinte Xoossaa caaqo taabotey de7iya bessa guye Yordaanose shaafa gelidi, issi issi Isra7eele zerethata taybon ubbay issi issi shuchi hinte hashen tookite.
4.6: Ha shuchati, Goday hachi oothidaba hintena qofisiya malaata gidana. Wonto hinte nayti, ‘Ha shuchati aybisee?’ yaagidi oychiya wode,
4.7: hinte zaaridi, ‘Godaa caaqo taabotey pinniya wode Yordaanose haathay gogethi aggis. Hessa gisho, ha shuchati ha bessan hanidaba Isra7eele asaa ubba wode qofisiyaba gidana’ ” yaagis.
4.8: He asati Iyyasuy kiitidaysada oothidosona. Goday Iyyasus odidaysada, Isra7eele zerethata taybon Yordaanose shaafape tammanne nam7u shuchata efidi, enti aqiya bessan wothidosona.
4.9: Iyyasuy, Kahineti Yordaanose shaafan caaqo taabotiya tookidi, eqida bessan tammanne nam7u shuchata essis. He shuchati hachi gakanaw yan de7oosona.
4.10: Musey Iyyasu kiitidaysa mela, Goday Iyyasu kiittidaba ubbay poletana gakanaw, caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti Yordaanose shaafan eqidi gam7idosona. Asay ellesidi shaafa pinnidosona.
4.11: Asa ubbay, pinnidaape guye, Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti asaape sinthe aadhidi kaalethidosona.
4.12: Musey kiitidaysada, Robeelanne Gaade kochati, qassi Minaase kochaafe baggay olas dancetidi, asaape sinthatidi pinnidosona.
4.13: Darotethan oytamu mukulu gidiya olanchoti, Godaa sinthan, Iyaarko matan de7iya denban oletanaw shiiqidosona.
4.14: He gallas, Goday Iyyasu Isra7eele asa ubbaa sinthan dhoqu dhoqu oothis. Enti Muse bonchidaysada Iyyasuka iya de7o laytha ubban bonchidosona.
4.15: Goday Iyyasuko,
4.16: “Caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti Yordaanose shaafape keyana mela oda” yaagis.
4.17: Iyyasuy kahineti Yordaanose shaafape keyana mela odis.
4.18: Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti Yordaanose shaafape keyidosona. Enta tohoy mela biitta yedhida wode ellesidi, Yordaanose haathay ba bessa simmidi, kase goggeysada gaxa gakidi gogethi oykis.
4.19: Asay koyro ageenan tammantho gallasan Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi, Iyaarkos doloha baggan de7iya Galgalan dunkaanidosona.
4.20: Iyyasuy Yordaanose shaafape eketida tammanne nam7u shuchata Galgalan essidi,
4.21: Isra7eele asaako haysada yaagis; “Wonto hinte nayti, ‘Ha shuchati aybisee?’ yaagidi hintena oychiya wode,
4.22: ‘Isra7eele asay Yordaanose shaafa mela biittara yedhidi pinnidaysa qofisiyaba’ yaagidi odeeta.
4.23: Nuuni pinnana gakanaw, Goday, nu Xoossay Zo7o Abbaa kase nu sinthan melisidaysada, hinteka pinnana gakanaw, Goday, hinte Xoossay Yordaanose shaafa hinte sinthan melisidaysa odite.
4.24: Hessa gisho, biittan de7iya asa ubbay, Godaa wolqay ay mela giteeko erana; hinteka Godaa, hinte Xoossaa, merinaw bonchana” yaagis.

5.1: Yordaanose shaafape wuloha baggan de7iya Amooreta kawotinne Medetiraane Abbaa lanqen de7iya Kanaaneta kawoti ubbay, Isra7eele asay pinnana gakanaw Yordaanose shaafa Goday waati melisidaako si7ida wode enta wozanay til7in, Isra7eele asaara eqetanaw xaalatethi dhayidosona.
5.2: He wode Goday Iyyasuko, “Salo shuchu qarayada Isra7eele adde asaa nam7antho qaxara” yaagis.
5.3: Iyyasuy qara salo shucha ekidi, “Qaxara Dere” geetetiya bessan Isra7eeleta qaxaris.
5.4: I hessa oothiday, Gibxefe keyda addetan laythi olas gakida ubbay mela biittan hayqi wurida gishosa.
5.5: Gibxefe keyida adde asa ubbay, qaxaretidosona, shin Gibxefe bishe mela biittan yeletida adde nayti qaxaretibookona.
5.6: Gibxefe keyiya wode laythi olas gakida adde asa ubbay Godaas kiitetonna ixida gisho, enti hayqidi wurana gakanaw Isra7eeleti mela biittan oytamu laythi yuuyidosona. Goday, nuus immana gidi enta mayzatas caaqida eessinne maathi goggiya aradda biittaa hayqida enta nayti laattonna mela kase caaqis.
5.7: Hessa gisho, Iyyasuy qaxariday Goday enta bessan denthida enta nayta. Enti oge bolla yeletida gisho qaxaretibookona.
5.8: Asa ubbay, qaxaretidaape guye, enta madunthay paxana gakanaw enti dunkaanida bessan gam7idosona.
5.9: Goday Iyyasuko, “Hachi taani Gibxeta boriya hintefe diggas” yaagis. Hessa gisho, he bessaa sunthay hachi gakanaw Galgala geetetidi xeegetees.
5.10: Isra7eele asay Iyaarko denban Galgala geetetiya bessan dunkaanidi, koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallasan omarsi Paasika Baaliya bonchidosona.
5.11: Paasikape guye, wontetha gallas, he gadiyan dolida katha ayfiya, uythunne tiya caaca midosona.
5.12: He gadiyan mokida kathaa enti mida wontetha gallas mannay wodheysa aggis. He wodepe doomidi Isra7eele asay manna demmibookona. Hessafe guye, enti Kanaanen kaxida katha midi de7idosona. Iyaarko Kundethaa
5.13: Iyyasuy Iyaarko matan de7iya wode mashsha oykidi ba sinthan eqida issi adde be7is. Iyyasuy iyako shiiqidi, “Neeni nu baggaye woyko nu morketa baggee?” yaagidi oychis.
5.14: Addey zaaridi, “Taani oodde baggaka gidike. Shin ta Godaa tora mocona gidada yas” yaagis. Iyyasuy sa7an kundi goyinnidi, “Ta godaw, ta oothanaba taw odaa” yaagis.
5.15: Godaa toora moconay Iyyasuko, “Neeni eqida bessay geeshshi gidiya gisho, ne tohuwape caammaa kessa” yaagis. Yaatin Iyyasuy I gidaysada oothis.

6.1: Isra7eele asaas yayyida gisho, Iyaarko katama gimbe dirsaa pengeti gordetidosona. Oonika katamaa gelanawunne keyanaw danda7enna.
6.2: Goday Iyyasuko, “Iyaarko katamaa iya kawaranne iya mino olanchotara ne kushen aatha immas.
6.3: Neeranne ne olanchotara salpidi, gallasan issi toho usupun gallas gakanaw, katamaa gimbe dirsaa yuushuwa yuuyite.
6.4: Laapun kahineti issoy issoy moyze oykidi, Godaa caaqo taabotiya sinthan boo. Laapuntha gallas kahineti moyze punniya wode hinte katamaa laapun toho yuuyite.
6.5: Kahineti moyze goochidi punuwa hinte si7iya wode, asa ubbay ellesidi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi waasso. Hessafe guye, katamaa gimbe dirsay kundana. He wode asa ubbay gido lawuhu gidi gelana” yaagis.
6.6: Nawe na7a Iyyasu kahineta xeegidi, “Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookite. Hintefe laapun kahineti moyze oykidi, caaqo taabotiyape sinthe aadhidi boo” yaagis.
6.7: Asaako qassi, “Bidi, katamaa yuushuwan yuuyite; olanchoti Godaa caaqo taabotiya sinthan hemetonna” yaagidi kiittis.
6.8: Iyyasuy odidaysada, laapun kahineti laapun moyze punnishe Godaa sinthan hemetidosona; qassi Godaa caaqo taabotey enta kaallis.
6.9: Olas dancidaysati moyze punniya kahineta sinthan hemetoosona. Kahineti qanxonna moyze punniya wode derey taabotiyape guyera kaallees.
6.10: Shin Iyyasuy, “Ta hintena waasso goonnashin waassofite woyko hinte qaala sissofite; hari attoshin issi qaalaka odetofite. Ta hintena waasso giya he gallas waassite” yaagidi asaa kiittis.
6.11: Hessa gisho, Godaa caaqo taabotey he katamaa issi toho yuuyanaada oothis. Yaatidi asay banta dunkaanida guta simmidi, yan aqidosona.
6.12: Wontetha gallas Iyyasuy guuridi dendis; kahinetika Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookidosona.
6.13: Laapun moyzeta oykida laapun kahineti banta moyziya qanxonna punnishe caaqo taabotiya sinthan boosona. Moyzey qanxonna punetiya wode olanchoti kahinetape sinthan qassi derey taabotiyape guyera kaallees.
6.14: Nam7antho gallas katamaa issi toho yuuyidi, banta dunkaanida guta simmidosona. Usupun gallas gakanaw hessada oothidosona.
6.15: Laapuntha gallas gontey wadhishin dendidi, kaseysada katama laapun toho yuuyidosona. He gallasa xalaala katamaa laapun toho enti yuuyidosona.
6.16: Laapuntha yuushuwan, kahineti moyze punniya wode, Iyyasuy asaako, “Goday ha katamaa hintew aathidi immida gisho, waassite” yaagidi kiittis.
6.17: “Katamaynne iya giddon de7iyaba ubbay Godaas qangetidaba gididi dhayanaw bessees. Nuuni biitta xomoosana mela yeddida asata qosada ashshida, laymiya Raabanne I son de7iya asaa xalaali attanaw bessees.
6.18: Shin hinte metonne qoho Isra7eele guta bolla ehona mela dhayanaw bessiyabape aybaka amotidi ekonnaada hinte huuphes naagetite.
6.19: Biraynne worqey, naase biratape oosetida miisheti ubbay, Godaas dummatidaba gido. Enti Godaa miishiya minjiya shaaliyan de7o” yaagis.
6.20: Hessa gisho, moyzey punetis; asay waassis. Derey moyze punuwa si7ida wode banta qaala dhoqu oothi waassin, katamaa gimbiya dirsay kundis. He saaten asay lawuhu gidi gelidi katamaa oykidosona.
6.21: Banta mashsha denthidi, macca adde, na7a cima, mehe, dorse, harenne kataman shempora de7iyaba ubbaa wodhidosona.
6.22: Iyyasuy biitta xomoosanaw kiitetida nam7u asatako, “Layme Raabi soo bidi, kase hinte iw caaqidaysada, iyonne I soo asa ubbaa kessite” yaagis.
6.23: Enti bidi, Raabo, I aawa, I aayiw, I ishatanne I dabbota ubbaa Isra7eele asay dunkaanida gutaape gaxa kessidi wothidosona.
6.24: Yaati simmidi katamaanne iya giddon de7iyaba ubbaa xuuggidosona. Shin biranne worqaa, naase biratape oosetida miisheta Godaa miishiya minjiya shaaliyan wothidosona.
6.25: Shin laymiya Raaba Iyaarko xomoosana mela kiitetida asata qosada ashshida gisho, Iyyasuy iyo, I aawa soo asaanne iira de7iya dabbota ubbaa hayqope ashshis. I kochati hachi gakanaw Isra7eele biittan de7oosona.
6.26: He wode Iyyasuy, “Iyaarko katamaa zaari keexanaw dendiya oonika, Godaa sinthan baadetidabaa gido. Buroo baasiya wode iya bayra na7ay hayqo, Pengiya aathiya wode iya tesho na7ay hayqo” yaagidi baaddis.
6.27: Goday Iyyasura gidida gisho, iya sunthay biitta ubbaa gakis.

7.1: Isra7eele asay digetidabaa bochidi, Godaas kiitetonna ixidosona. Yihuda koche gidida Karma na7ay, Zebda na7aa na7ay, Zaara na7ay Akaani, digetidabatape ekidi Isra7eele bolla Godaa hanquwa denthis.
7.2: Isra7eele asay Iyaarko matan dunkaanidi de7ishin, Iyyasuy Beet-Aweena matan Beetelepe doloha baggan de7iya Gayee katamanne iya heera xomoosidi yaana mela guutha asata kiittis. Kiitetida asati bidi, Gayee katamaa xomoosidosona.
7.3: Enti Iyyasuko simmi yidi, “Gayee katamaa olanaw asa ubbay baanaw koshshenna; nam7u woyko heedzu mukulu olanchoti biiko gidana. Yan guutha asi de7iya gisho, asa ubbay daaburanaw bessena” yaagidosona.
7.4: Yaatin, heedzu mukulu gidiya asati olanaw Gayee katamaa bidosona. Shin Isra7eeleti Gayee katamaa asaa sinthafe baqatidosona.
7.5: Gaye katamaa asay Isra7eele asaape hastamanne usupun asaa wodhidi, katamaa dirsaa pengiyafe doomidi, Shebarime gakanaw Isra7eele asaa wodhishe goodidosona. Isra7eele asaa wozanay til7idi, haathe gidis.
7.6: Yaanin, Iyyasuynne Isra7eele cimati azzanidi, banta ma7uwa daakidosona. Godaa taabotiya sinthan omarsi gakanaw gufannidosona. Banta huuphen bido qolidosona.
7.7: Yaatin, Iyyasuy, “Hay7i Godaa Xoossaw, Yordaanose shaafa pinthada ne nuna ehiday Amooretas nuna aatha immanaasee? Yordaanosepe hefinthan de7idaako nuus lo77oshin.
7.8: Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele asay xoonetidi, banta morketa sinthafe baqatiko, ta woygo?
7.9: Kanaanetinne ha biittan de7iya asa ubbay, hessa si7idi, nuna teqidi, biittafe dhaysana. Yaatin, ne gita sunthaa gisho ne oothanay aybee?” yaagis.
7.10: Goday Iyyasuko, “Ayis gufannadii? Denda eqa.
7.11: Isra7eele asay qohidosona; ta entana kiitida kiita naagonna ixidi, caaquwa menthidosona. Enti digetidabaape ekidosona; kaysotidosona; wordotidosona; qassi he miishiya banta miishiyara walakidosona.
7.12: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele asay banta morketa sinthan eqanaw danda7ibookona. Enti dhayanaw bessiya gisho, banta morketa sinthafe guye simmidi baqatidosona. Hinte giddofe dhayanaw bessiyaba hinte dhaysona ixiko, hizape ta hintera gidike.”
7.13: Bada asaa geeshsha. Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, “Hinte ekanaw bessonnaba ekida gisho, wontos hintenatethaa geeshshite” yaagees gada oda. Isra7eele asaw, hessa hinte giddofe diggona ixiko, hinte morketa sinthan eqanaw danda7eketa.
7.14: Wonto wonta, hinte zariyan zariyan shiiqite. Goday shaakiya zarey ba kochan kochan shiiqo. Goday shaakiya kochay ba soo asan asan shiiqo; qassi Goday shaakiya soo asay, issoy issoy baw shiiqo.
7.15: Digetidabaa ekida uray Godaa caaquwa menthidaynne Isra7eele asaa qohiday iya gidiya gisho, inne iyaw de7iyaba ubbay taman xuugeto.
7.16: Iyyasuy wontetha gallas guura dendidi, kochan kochan Isra7eele asaa shiishin, Goday Yihuda kochay bala gideysa bessis.
7.17: Iyyasuy Yihuda kochaa shiishin, Goday Zaraha kochay bala gideysa bessis. Zaraha kochaa shiishin, Goday Zabida soo asay bala gideysa bessis.
7.18: Zabida soo asay issoy issoy baw shiiqin, wursethan Goday Zabida na7a na7aa, Karma na7aa Akaani bala gideysa qoncisis.
7.19: Iyyasuy Akaanako, “Ta na7aw, Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaa boncha; ane ne oothidaba taw qosonna oda” yaagis.
7.20: Akaani zaaridi, “Ee tuma, taani Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa naaqas. Taani oothiday haysa;
7.21: Nuuni di77idi ekida miishiya giddofe issi lo77o Sana7oora biitta kaaba, nam7u kilo gidiya birata biranne bagga kilo gidiya worqa be7ada amottas; ekas. Yaatada ta dunkaaniya giddon biitta bookada bira garsara wothada moogas.”
7.22: Yaatin, Iyyasuy ase kiittis. Enti woxi bidi dunkaaniya giddon bira garsara wothidi moogida miisheta demmidosona.
7.23: Kiitetidi bida asati he miisheta dunkaaniyape Iyyasukonne Isra7eele asa ubbaako ehidi, Godaa sinthan wothidosona.
7.24: Yaatin Iyyasuynne Isra7eele asa ubbay, Akaana, bira, kaaba, worqaa, iya adde naytanne iya macca nayta, iya mehiya, iya hareta, iya dorsata, iya dunkaaniyanne iyaw de7iyaba ubbaa Meto Zangaara geetetiya bessa efidosona.
7.25: Iyyasuy Akaanako, “Ha metuwa nu bolla ayis ehadii? Goday hachi ne bolla meto ehana” yaagis. Yaatin Isra7eele asa ubbay, Akaananne iya soo asaa shuchan caddi wodhidi, iyaw de7iyaba ubbaara woli gathidi taman xuuggidosona.
7.26: Enti Akaana bolla hachi gakanaw bentiya daro shuchi keelidosona. Yaatin, Goday ba eexiya hanquwafe simmis. Hachi gakanaw he bessay Meto Zangaara geetetidi xeegetees.

8.1: Goday Iyyasuko, “Yayyofa; hirgofa; olanchota ubbaa neera ekada, Gayee katamaa olanaw keya. Gaye kawa, iya asaa, iya katamaanne iya biitta ta ne kushen aathada immas.
8.2: Neeni Iyaarko bollanne iya kawa bolla oothidaysada Gaye bollanne iya kawa bolla oothana. Shin hinte ha77i olidi di7iya shalonne mehe hintew ekite. Katamaape guye baggara qoponna mentha gelanaw giigeta.”
8.3: Hessa gisho, Iyyasuynne olanchoti ubbay, Gaye katamaa olanaw dendidosona. Iyyasuy ba olanchota giddofe hastamu mukulu gidiya mino olanchota dooridi qamma yeddishe,
8.4: entana haysada yaagidi kiittis; “Bidi katamaape guye baggara qosetidi naagite. Katamaape haakidi boonnashin, menthi gelanaw giigidi naagite.
8.5: Tanne taara de7iya asa ubbay, katamaako shiiqana. He wode Gaye katamaa asay nuna olanaw yaa wode kaseysada nu enta sinthafe guye simmidi baqatana.
8.6: Enti kesseysada nu enta sinthafe baqatiya daanin, nuupe baqatoosona gidi, katamaape nu enta haassana gakanaw nuna kaallana.
8.7: He wode hinte qosetida bessaafe keyidi katamaa oykite. Goday hinte Xoossay katamaa hinte kushen aathidi immana.
8.8: Katamaa oykidaape guye, Goday kiitidaysa mela taman xuuggite. Ta hintena kiittas” yaagis.
8.9: Hessafe guye, Iyyasuy olanchota kiittis. Enti bidi Gayee katamaape wuloha baggan Beetelepenne Gayeepe giddon qosetidi naagidosona. Shin Iyyasuy he qamma asaara aqis.
8.10: Wontetha gallas guura Iyyasuy dendidi, olanchota xeegis. Yaatidi, inne Isra7eele cimati olanchota kaalethidi Gaye katamaa bidosona.
8.11: Iyara de7iya olanchoti ubbay, sinthe bidi Gaye katama matidi, katamaape pudeha baggan dunkaanidosona. Entafenne Gaye katamaape giddon zangaari de7ees.
8.12: Iyyasuy ichashu mukulu olanchota dooridi, katamaape wuloha baggara, Beetelepenne Gayeepe giddon qosidi wothis.
8.13: Olanchotape baggaa katamaape pudeha baggara, qassi katamaa menthidi gelana olanchota wuloha baggara besse besse oythis. He qamma Iyyasuy he zangaaran aqis.
8.14: Gaye katamaa kawoy hessa be7ida wode, ba olanchota ubbaa ekidi, Isra7eele asaara oletanaw demba biitta keyidosona. Shin kawoy katamaape guye baggara qoseti uttida olanchoti de7eysa eribeenna.
8.15: Iyyasuynne Isra7eele asa ubbay xoonetidaba daanidi, enta sinthafe mela biitta simmidi baqatidosona.
8.16: Gaye kataman de7iya asa ubbay, enta yedethanaw xeegereti keyidi, Iyyasu goodishe katamaape haakidi bidosona.
8.17: Gayen woyko Beetelen de7iya asa ubbay, Isra7eele asaa yedethanaw katamaa yeggidi keyin katama pengiya naagiya asi dhayida gisho; dooya attis.
8.18: Hessafe guye, Goday Iyyasuko, “Ne toora Gaye katamaa bolla dentha. Taani Gaye katamaa ne kushen aathada immana” yaagis. Yaatin Iyyasuy ba toora katamaa bolla denthis.
8.19: Iyyasuy ba toora denthida wode qosetida olanchoti banta bessaafe dendidi, katamaa geli oykidi, ellesidi taman xuuggidosona.
8.20: Gaye katamaa asay guye simmidi xeelliya wode, katamaa cuyay salo dendishin be7idosona. Mela biitta baqatida Isra7eele asay, bantana yedethiya asaa bolla guye simmida gisho, enti awu baggaraka kessi ekanaw danda7ibookona.
8.21: Iyyasunne iyara de7iya asa ubbay, qoseti uttida olanchoti katamaa oykidaysanne cuyay salo dendidaysa be7ida wode guye simmidi, Gaye katamaa asaa wodhidosona.
8.22: Katamaa gelidi oykida olanchotika katamaape enta bolla keyidosona. Yaatin, Gaye asay Isra7eele olanchotan ubba baggara teqetida gisho, issoyka attona woyko kessi ekonna ubbaa wodhidi wursidosona.
8.23: Shin Gaye katamaa kawa de7idi, Iyyasuko ehidosona.
8.24: Isra7eele asay Gaye katamaa asa entana yedethida bessan mashshan wodhidi ongidaape guye, ubbay guye katamaa simmidi, kataman attida asaa ubbaa mashshan wodhidosona.
8.25: He gallas Gaye kataman hayqida addeynne macci tammanne nam7u mukula.
8.26: Iyyasuy Gaye kataman de7iyaba ubbaa ongana gakanaw katamaa bolla denthida toora duge wothibeenna.
8.27: Shin Goday Iyyasu kiitidaysa mela Isra7eele asay he katamaa mehiyanne shaluwa bantaw di7idosona.
8.28: Iyyasuy Gaye katamaa xuuggis; he katamay hachi gakanaw laaletha doorenne asi baynna bessi gididi attis.
8.29: Iyyasuy, Gaye katama kawa wodhidi omarsi gakanaw mitha bolla kaqis. Awi wulliya wode, iya aha katamaa geliya pengen yeggana mela oothis. Iya bolla daro shucha keelidosona; he keela shuchay hachi gakanaw he bessan de7ees. Caaqo Qaalay Ooraxis
8.30: Hessafe guye, Iyyasuy Ebaala deriya bolla Godaas Isra7eele Xoossaas yarsho bessi keexis.
8.31: Godaa aylley Musey Isra7eele asaa kiitidaysadanne higge maxaafan xaafetidaysada, yarsho bessaa masetiboonnanne birati bochiboona shuchafe keexidi, iya bolla Godaas xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho yarshidosona.
8.32: Iyyasuy, Isra7eele asaa sinthan, Muse higgiya shuchaa bolla zaari xaafis.
8.33: Isra7eele asaa anjana mela Godaa aylley Musey kiitidaysada Isra7eele asa ubbay, asa gade asata, enta cimati, enta shuumatinne daynnati ubbay, Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookida Leewe koche gidida kahineta sinthan ushacha bagganinne haddirsa baggan eqidosona. Entafe baggay Garzaana zuma sinthan, qassi baggay Ebaala deriya sinthan eqidosona.
8.34: Higge maxaafan xaafetidaysada, Iyyasuy higge qaala ubbaa, anjuwanne baadetha nabbabis.
8.35: Musey kiitida higgiya Iyyasuy, Isra7eele asa ubbaas, maccasas, naytasinne, asa gade asaas issi qaalaka ashshona nabbabis.

9.1: Yordaanose shaafape wuloha baggan derey dariya biittaninne gadhan Medetrane abbaafe bidi Libaanose gakanaw de7iya Hiteta, Amooreta, Kanaaneta, Parzeta, Hiwetanne Yaabuseta kawoti ubbay, Gaye asay xoonetidaysa si7ida wode,
9.2: Iyyasunne Isra7eeleta olanaw issife shiiqidi zoretidosona.
9.3: Gaba7oona asay Iyyasuy Iyaarko bollanne Gaye katamaa bolla oothidaba si7idi,
9.4: Iyyasu cimmanaw koydosona. Enti shinqe qachidi, cima woyne ogoronne curqa qarxiita hare bolla caanidi, Iyyasuko ase kiittidosona.
9.5: Kiitetida asati wurida caamma aathidosona; peedhetida afila ma7idosona; enti oykida shinqeyka melidabaanne meqertidaba.
9.6: Enti Isra7eele asay dunkaanida guta Galgala bidi, Iyyasukonne Isra7eele asaako, “Nuuni haaho gadepe yida. Nu yiday hintera caaqetidi saro daanasa” yaagidosona.
9.7: Yaatin, Isra7eele asay Gaba7oone asaako, “Hinte nu matan de7iya asaakosh? Nu aybin eridi hintera caaqetanee?” yaagidosona.
9.8: Enti Iyyasuko, “Nu ne aylleta” yaagidi zaaridosona. Iyyasuy zaaridi, “Hinte oonantee? Awupe yidetii?” yaagidi oychis.
9.9: Enti zaaridi, “Nuuni ne aylleti Goday hinte Xoossay Gibxen oothidaysa si7ida gisho, daro haaho gadepe yida.
9.10: Qassi Yordaanose shaafape hefinthan wuloha baggan de7iya nam7u Amoore kawota, Haseboona kawa Sihoonanne Astarooten de7iya Baasane kawa Ooge bolla I oothidaysa nu si7ida.
9.11: Nu biitta cimatinne nu biittan de7iya ubbay, oges shinqe giigisi oykidi bidi entara gahetidi, entako, ‘Nu hinte aylleta; nu yiday hintera caaqetidi saro daanasa’ yaagite.
9.12: “Nu oykida shinqiya be7ite. Nu soope ekidi keyiya wode ho77o, shin ha77i melidaysanne puulumidaysa be7ite.
9.13: Ha woyniya ogorotan nu kunthiya wode oorathi, shin ha77i daaketidaysa be7ite. Ogiya haahotethaafe dendoysan nu ma7oynne nu caammay wuris” yaagidosona.
9.14: Shin Godaa sheniya oychonna de7ishe, Isra7eele asay enta shinqiyafe guuthara ekidosona.
9.15: Yaatin, Iyyasuy hintena wodhoko gidi saro caaqo entara caaqetis. Isra7eele cimatika he caaquwa menthoko gidi caaqidosona.
9.16: Entara caaqida heedzantho gallasan he asati enta biittan de7eysanne entaw shooro gideysa Isra7eele asay si7idosona.
9.17: Isra7eele asay heedzu gallas hemetidi, he asati de7iya katamata gakidosona. Enta katamati Gaba7oona, Kafira, Baarotenne Qiriyat-Yi7aarima geetetidi xeegetoosona.
9.18: Shin Isra7eele cimati entaw Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaa sunthan caaqida gisho, Isra7eele asay enta wodhibookona. Yaatin, asa ubbay cimata bolla zuuzumidosona.
9.19: Shin Isra7eele cimati, “Nu entaw Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sunthan caaqida gisho, ha77i enta bochanaw danda7oko.
9.20: Nuuni entaw haysada oothana; nuuni entaw caaqida caaquwa menthin Godaa hanqoy nu bolla yoonnaada enta wodhoko.
9.21: Enti de7o giite. Gidoshin Isra7eele asa ubbaas mithinne haathe shiisheyisata gido” yaagidosona. Hessa gisho, cimati banta caaquwa naagidosona.
9.22: Iyyasuy Gaba7oona asaa xeegidi, “Nu matan de7ishe, ‘Nuuni daro haaho biittafe yida’ gidi, nuna ayis cimmidetii?
9.23: Hinte hessa oothida gisho, baadetidaysata. Hinte merinaw ta Xoossaa keethan mithin haathe shiishiya aylle gidana” yaagis.
9.24: Enti zaaridi, “Nuuni ne aylleti, Goday hinte Xoossay ha biittan de7iya asa ubbaa dhaysidi, biitta hintew immanaw ba aylliya Muses odidaysa si7ida. Hessa gisho, hintew babidi haysa oothida.
9.25: Ha77i nu ne kushen de7oos. New lo77onne suure daanidi bentidaba ootha” gidi zaaridosona.
9.26: Iyyasuy Isra7eele asay enta wodhonna mela ashshis.
9.27: He gallas Iyyasuy, Gaba7oona asata Isra7eeletasinne Goday doorida bessan de7iya iya yarsho bessaas haathenne mithi shiishiya asi gidana mela oothis. Gaba7oona asati hachi gakanaw hessa oothosona.

10.1: Iyyasuy Iyaarko katamaa oli dhaysidi, iya kawa wodhidaysada, Gayee katamaa oli dhaysidi, iya kawa wodhidaysa Yerusalaame kawoy Adooni-Xedeqi si7is. Qassi Gaba7oona asay Isra7eele asaara saro daanaw caaqetidaysa si7is.
10.2: Gaba7ooni hanko kawo katamatada gita katama; he katamay Gaye katamaape aadhees; iyan de7iya addetika mino olancho gideysa eriya gisho, Adooni-Xedeqinne iya asay daro yayyidosona.
10.3: Hessa gisho, Yerusalaame kawoy Adooni-Xedeqi, Kebroona kawa Hoohamas, Yarmuta kawa Piraamas, Laakiso kawa Yafi7asinne, Egloona kawa Dabiras haysada yaagidi kiittis;
10.4: “Gaba7oona asay Iyyasuranne Isra7eele asaara saro de7anaw caaqida gisho, enta olanaw yidi tana maaddite” yaagis.
10.5: Ha ichashu Amoore kawoti banta olanchota issife gathidi, Gaba7oona olidosona.
