10.6: Gaba7oona asay Galgalan dunkaanida Iyyasuko, “Nuna ne aylleta aggofa; ellesa yada nuna ashsha. Derey dariya biittan de7iya Amoore kawoti ubbay nuna olanaw banta olanchota issino oothida gisho, ne nuna maadda” yaagidi kiittidosona.
10.7: Hessa gisho, Iyyasuy, baara de7iya olanchotanne mino asata ubbaa, Galgalape ekidi bis.
10.8: Goday Iyyasuko, “Entaw babofa; taani enta ne kushen aathada immas. Entafe issi asika neera eqetanaw danda7enna” yaagis.
10.9: Iyyasuy Galgalape qamma kumethi hemetishe aqidi, Gaba7oone asay qoponna de7ishin enta bolla ola denthis.
10.10: Goday Isra7eele asa sinthan entaw wozana kaha dhaysis. Isra7eele asay enta Gaba7oonan wodhidosona. Isra7eeleti enta Beet-Horona efiya ogiya oythidi goodishe, Azeeqanne Maqeda gakanaw goodidosona.
10.11: Enti Beet-Horonape duge Azeeqa efiya ogiyara Isra7eele asaa sinthafe baqatishin, Goday gita shacha shuchu salope enta bolla bukisis. Isra7eele asay wodhida asape, shachay wodhida asay daro.
10.12: Goday Isra7eele asaas Amooreta, aathidi immida gallas, Isra7eele asay si7ishin, Iyyasuy, “Away Gaba7oona bolla wullonna eqo. Ageenayka Eloona zangaara bolla eqo” yaagidi Godaa woossis.
10.13: Isra7eele asay banta morketa xoonana gakanaw, away wullonna eqis; ageenayka ba de7iya bessaafe qaaxibeenna. Hessi Yaashara maxaafan xaafetis. Away salos giddon qaaxonna eqis; issi gallas kumethi away wullonna gam7is.
10.14: Goday asa qaala si7ida he gallasa mela gallas haysafe kaseka haysafe sinthanka deenna. Tumaka Goday Isra7eele asaas oletis.
10.15: Hessafe guye, Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti banta dunkaanida guta Galgala simmidosona. Ichashu Amoore Kawota Hayquwa
10.16: He ichashu Amoore kawoti baqatidi, Maqeda gongoluwan qosetidosona.
10.17: Ichashu kawoti, Maqeda gongoluwan qosetidi de7ishin demmidaysa Iyyasus odidosona.
10.18: Iyyasuy zaaridi, “Gita shuchata gondorsidi, gongoluwa doona gordite; enta naagana mela ase yan wothite.
10.19: Shin hinte yan gam7ofite; enti banta katamaa gelidi attona mela hinte morketa gooddidi enta wodhite. Goday hinte Xoossay enta hinte kushen aathidi immis” yaagis.
10.20: Guutha asati baqatidi banta gimbetida katamaa gelidi attikoka, Iyyasuynne Isra7eele asay asa ubbaa wodhidosona.
10.21: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asa ubbay saron simmidi, Iyyasuy dunkaanidi de7iya guta Maqeda yidosona. He wodepe doomidi oonika Isra7eele asaa bolla issi qaalaka odetanaw xaalida asi baawa.
10.22: Hessafe guye, Iyyasuy, “Gongoluwa doona dooyidi, he ichashu kawota kessidi, taw ha ekidi yiite” yaagis.
10.23: Gongoluwa doona dooyidi, Yerusalaame kawa, Kebroona kawa, Yarmuta kawa, Laakiso kawanne Egloona kawa iyako ehidosona.
10.24: Enti he kawota iyako ehida wode, Iyyasuy Isra7eele asa ubbaa baako xeegidi, baara bida toora moconatako, “Haa yidi, hinte tohuwa ha kawota qoodhiyan wothite” yaagis. Enti yidi kiitetidaysada oothidosona.
10.25: Iyyasuy entako, “Hinte oletiya hinte morketa bolla Goday haysada oothana gisho, aykoy baawa yayyofite; minnite” yaagis.
10.26: Iyyasuy he ichashu kawota wodhidi, ichashu mitha bolla kaqis; enta ahay omarsi gakanaw yan pee7is.
10.27: Awi wulliya wode Iyyasuy, “Aha wodhisidi, enti kase qosetida gongoluwan holite. Yaatidi, he gongoluwa doona gita shuchan gordite” yaagidi kiittis. He shuchati hachi gakanaw yan de7oosona.
10.28: He gallas Iyyasuy Maqeda katamaa oykis; katamaa kawaka wodhis; kataman de7iya asa ubbaa issi asika ashshona dhaysis. Iyaarko katamaa kawa bolla oothidaysada, Maqeda katamaa kawa bolla oothis. Dugeha Katamata Xoonetethaa
10.29: Yaape simmidi, Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti ubbay Maqedape bidi Libina katamaa olidosona.
10.30: Goday he katamaanne katamaa kawa enta kushen aathidi immis. Iyyasuy kataman de7iya asaape issuwaka ashshona mashshan wodhis. Iyaarko katamaa kawa bolla oothidaysada Libina katamaa kawa bolla oothis.
10.31: Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti Libina katamaape Laakiso katama bidi, he katama olidosona.
10.32: Goday Laakiso katama Isra7eele asa kushen aathidi immin, Iyyasuy he katamaa yuushuwa teqidi nam7antho gallasan oykis. Libina kataman oothidaysada Laakiso kataman de7iya asa ubbaa mashshan wodhis.
10.33: He wode, Gezera kawoy Horami, Laakiso kawa maaddanaw yis, shin Iyyasuy iyanne iya olanchota dhaysis; entafe issi asika attibeenna.
10.34: Hessafe simmidi, Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti ubbay Laakiso katamaape Egloona katamaa bidi, he katama yuushuwa teqidi olidosona.
10.35: He gallas Egloona katamaa oykidi, Laakiso kataman oothidaysada mashshan ase ubbaa wodhidosona.
10.36: Yaati simmidi, Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti Egloonape Kebroona yidi, olidosona.
10.37: He katamaanne iya yuushuwan de7iya guutha katamata oykidi iyan de7iya asaanne kawa wodhidosona. Iyyasuy Egloonan oothidaysada he katamaa bollaka oothis.
10.38: Hessafe guye, Iyyasuynne iyara de7iya Isra7eele olanchoti guye simmidi Dabira katamaa olidosona.
10.39: He katamaanne iya yuushuwan de7iya guutha gutata oykidi, iyan de7iya asaanne kawa wodhidosona. Iyyasuy Kebroonanne Libina katamata bolla oothidaysada Dabira bolla oothis.
10.40: Iyyasuy he biittan de7iya katamata ubbaa oykis. Derey dariya biittan, Negebe gadhan, loobuwanne enta kawota ubbaa oykis. Goday Isra7eele Xoossay iya kiitidaysada, biitta bolla de7iya asi issuwaka ashshona ubbaa wodhidi dhaysis.
10.41: Iyyasuy Qaades-Barnefe bidi Gaaza gakanaw qassi Goshena biittafe bidi Gaba7oona gakanaw de7iya ubbaa olidi xoonis.
10.42: Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, Isra7eeletas oletida gisho Iyyasuy ha kawotanne enta biitta ubbaa olidi oykis.
10.43: Hessafe guye, Iyyasuynne Isra7eele olanchoti banta dunkaanida gutaa Galgala simmidosona.

11.1: Hazoora kawoy Yaabini, Isra7eeleta xoonuwa si7ida wode Madoona kawa Yobaabas, Shimroona kawas, Azifa kawas,
11.2: pudeha gezzen de7iya kawotas, Kenereeta abbaafe dugeha baggan Yordaanose zangaaran de7iya kawotas, Nafat-Doorape wuloha baggara gadhan de7iya kawotas kiita yeddis.
11.3: Qassi dolohanne wuloha baggan de7iya Kanaanetas, Amooretas, Hitetas, Parzetas, derey dariya biittan de7iya Yaabusetasinne Mixiphan Armoona zumaape garsan de7iya Hiwetas kiittis.
11.4: Enti ubbay, banta olanchota, paratanne para gaareta issife gathidi yidosona. Enta tayboy abba gaxan de7iya shafe mela.
11.5: He kawoti ubbay banta wolqaa issife gathidi, Isra7eeleta olanaw Meroome haatha matan dunkaanidosona.
11.6: Goday Iyyasuko, “Ne entaw babofa; taani wonto hannoode enta ubbaa wodhada Isra7eele asaas aatha immana. Neeni enta parata gaadiya qanxana; enta para gaaretaka taman xuuggana” yaagis.
11.7: Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti ubbay enti qoponna de7ishin Meroome haatha matan enta bolla keyidi olidosona.
11.8: Goday entana Isra7eeleta kushen aathidi immis. Isra7eeleti enta olidi, gita Sidoonanne Masroota gakanaw, qassi doloha baggan de7iya Mixipha zangaara gakanaw entana yedethidosona. Entafe issi asika ashshona ubbaa wodhidosona.
11.9: Iyyasuy, Goday kiitidaysada ubbaa bolla oothis; enta parata gaadiya qanxis; enta gaareta xuuggis.
11.10: Yaatidi, Iyyasuy guye simmidi, Hazoora oli oykidi, kawuwaka mashshan wodhis. He wode Hazoora kawotethay hara kawotethaa ubbaas huuphe.
11.11: Isra7eele asay Hazooran de7iya asaa ubbaa mashshan wodhida gisho shempora attida asi baawa. He katamay taman xuugetis.
11.12: Godaa aylley Musey kiitidaysada, Iyyasuy he katamatanne enta kawota ubba di77is. Issi asika ashshona asa ubbaa mashshan wodhis.
11.13: Gidoshin, Iyyasuy xuuggida Hazoora katamaape attishin, zooze bolla keexetida katamata Isra7eele asay xuugibookona.
11.14: Isra7eele asay he katamatape bonqida, miishiyanne mehe ubbaa bantaw ekidosona. Issi asika ashshona asa ubbaa mashshan wodhidosona.
11.15: Goday ba aylliya Muse kiitidaysada, Musey Iyyasu kiittis; Iyyasuyka kiitaa polis. Goday Muse kiitidabaape issibaaka Iyyasuy ashshibeenna; ubbaa oothis.
11.16: Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti derey dariya biitta, Negebe mela biitta, Goshena biitta ubbaa, wuloha baggan de7iya gadhaanne Yordaanose zangaara olidi oykis.
11.17: I Sayre kanthisiya Halaqa zumaape bidi, Armoona zumaape garsa baggan de7iya Libaanose zangaaranne Ba7aal-Gaade gakanaw de7iya biittata oykis. Enta kawota ubbaa shocis; di77idi wodhis.
11.18: Iyyasuy daro wode he kawota ubbaara oletis.
11.19: Gaba7oonan de7iya Hiwetape attishin, hara katami Isra7eeletara saro daanaw caaqiday baawa. Isra7eeleti hara katamata ubbaa olan xoonidi oykidosona.
11.20: Goday Muse kiitidaysada, Iyyasuy enta maaroti baynna ubbaa wodhana mela Goday enta wozana muumisidi Isra7eeleta olana mela denthethis.
11.21: He wode Iyyasuy bidi derey dariya Kebroonan, Dabiran, Anaaban, derey dariya Yihudaninne Isra7eelen de7iya adusata, Anaaqe kochata wodhidi ongis. Iyyasuy entanne enta katamata kumethi dhaysis.
11.22: Anaaqe kochatape oonika Isra7eele biittan attibeenna, shin Gaazan, Gaataninne Ashdoodan guuthati attidosona.
11.23: Goday Muse kiitidaysada Iyyasuy biitta ubbaa oykidi, Isra7eele asaa kochan kochan shaakidi laatisis. Hessafe guye, biittay olape shempis.

12.1: Isra7eele asay Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggara de7iya Arnoona zangaarape bidi Armoona zumaa gakanaw, qassi doloha baggara Yordaanose zangaara gakanaw de7iya biitta ubbaa olidi oykis. He xoonetida kawoti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata;
12.2: Haseboonan uttidi haariya Amooreta kawa Sihoona. I Galada biittas baggaa ekidi, Arnoona zangaara matan de7iya Aroorape dendidi, Amooneta zawa Yaaboqa shaafa gakanaw de7eysa haarees.
12.3: Qassi doloha baggara Yordaanose zangaaran Kenereeta abbaafe bidi, Beet-Yashimoota baggara Maxine Abbaa kanthidi, Pisga deriyape garsa baggara de7iya biittata haarees.
12.4: Hessadaka, Raafaymeta sheeshape wursethi gidida, Astarootenne Edraa7a haariya, Baasane kawa Ooge xoonis.
12.5: Oogey, haariya zaway pudehan Armoona zumaa, dolohan Salaka katamaa gakidi, wulohan Geeshuretanne Makata zawa gakanaw de7iya Baasane biitta ubbaa gakees. Haseboona kawa Sihoona biitta Galada pudeha baggaa gujidi haarees.
12.6: Godaa aylley Musey kaalethin, Isra7eele asay ha kawota xoonidosona. Godaa aylley Musey enta biitta Robeela kochatas, Gaade kochatasinne Minaase kochaafe baggaas shaakidi laatisis.
12.7: Iyyasuynne Isra7eele asay Yordaanose shaafape wuloha baggan de7iya kawota ubba xoonidosona. He biittay Libaanose zangaaran de7iya Ba7aal-Gaadepe bidi, dugeha baggara Sayre matan de7iya Halaqa deriya gakees. Iyyasuy he biittaa shaakidi, Isra7eele kochatas laata biitta oothidi immis.
12.8: He I immida biittay, derey dariya biitta, wuloha baggan de7iya gadha, Yordaanose zangaara, Yihudanne Negebe mela biitta. He biittay kase Hiteti, Amooreti, Kanaaneti, Parzeti, Hiwetinne Yaabuseti de7iya biitta.
12.9: Isra7eele asay xoonida kawoti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; Iyaarko kawa, Beetele matan de7iya Gaye kawa,
12.10: Yerusalaame kawa, Kebroona kawa,
12.11: Yarmuta kawa, Laakiso kawa,
12.12: Egloona kawa, Gezera kawa,
12.13: Dabira kawa, Gedera kawa,
12.14: Horma kawa, Arada kawa,
12.15: Libina kawa, Adulaama kawa,
12.16: Maqeda kawa, Beetele kawa,
12.17: Tapuha kawa, Hefeera kawa,
12.18: Afeeqa kawa, Saarona kawa,
12.19: Madoona kawa, Hazoora kawa,
12.20: Shimroon-Maroona kawa, Azifa kawa,
12.21: Tanaka kawa, Magido kawa,
12.22: Qaadesa kawa, Qarmeloosan de7iya Yoqinaame kawa,
12.23: Gezzen de7iya Doora kawa, Galgalan de7iya Goyma kawanne
12.24: Tirsa kawa. Enti kumethi hastamanne issi kawota.

13.1: Iyyasuy daro cimida wode Goday iyako, “Neeni cimadasa; ne laythayka sugetis, gidoshin oyketona attida daro biittati de7oosona.
13.2: Oyketiboonna biittati haysata; Filisxeemetanne Geeshureta biitta ubbaa.
13.3: Gibxefe doloha baggan de7iya Shihoora Shaafape bidi, pudeha baggan de7iya Ekroona biitta gakanaw de7iya biitta ubbaa. He biittati Kanaane biitta geetetoosona. Entika ichashu Filisxeeme kawoti aysiya Gaaza, Ashdooda, Asqeloona, Gaatenne Ekroona geetetiya katamata. Aweeta biittayka buroo oyketibeenna.
13.4: Dugeha baggan de7iya Kanaaneta biittanne, Sidoonata biitta gidida Maarape bidi Amooreta zawa Afeeqa gakanaw de7iya biittay oyketibeenna.
13.5: Gebaalata biittaynne Ba7aal-Gaadepe doloha baggan de7iya Armoona zumaape bidi, Hamaata pino gakanaw buroo oyketibeenna.
13.6: Libaanosepe bidi Maseroona gakanaw gezze biittan de7iya Sidoonata ubbaa taani Isra7eeleta sinthafe goodda kessana. Taani nena kiitidaysada he biitta Isra7eele asaas laata oothada shaaka.
13.7: Neeni he biitta uddufun kochatasinne Minaase kochaafe baggaas shaaka” yaagis. Yordaanosepe Doloha Bagga Biitta
13.8: Robeela kochaas, Gaade kochaasinne Minaase kochaafe baggaas Godaa aylley Musey Yordaanosepe hefinthan, doloha baggan de7iya biitta kase laata oothidi entaw immis.
13.9: Enta biittay Arnoona Zangaara matan de7iya Aro7eerape bidi, he zangaaran de7iya katamaape bidi, Medeba gezziya kanthidi Diboona gakanaasa.
13.10: Qassi Haseboonan uttidi Amooneta zawa gakanaw haariya Amooreta kawa Sihoona katamata ubbaa gakees.
13.11: Hessadaka, Galadata, Geeshuretanne Ma7ikata biitta ubbaa, Armoona zuma ubbaanne Salaka gakanaw de7iya Baasane biitta ubbaa oykees.
13.12: Astarooteninne Edraa7an uttidi, haarida Baasane kawa Ooge biitta ubbaa oykees; He biittay kase Raafaymetape attida biitta. Musey enta xoonidi biittafe gooddidi kessis.
13.13: Shin Isra7eele asay Geeshuretanne Ma7ikata gooddidi kessibookona. Enti hachi gakanaw Isra7eele asaa giddon de7oosona.
13.14: Musey Leewe kochaas laata biitta immibeenna. Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, entaw kiitidaysada taman xuussa yarsho entaw laata oothidi immis.
13.15: Musey Robeela kochaas enta kochan kochan laata immis.
13.16: Enta biittay Arnoona Zangaara matan de7iya Aro7eerape bidi, he zangaaran de7iya katamaa kanthidi gezze Medeba gakees.
13.17: Haseboona, gezze katamata, Diboona, Baamot-Ba7aala, Beet-Baal-Me7oona,
13.18: Yahaaxa, Qedemoota, Mefaata,
13.19: Qiratayma, Sebama, derey dariya zangaaran de7iya Xeret-Shahaare,
13.20: Beet-Pa7oora, Pisga zumaape garsan de7iya biittanne Beet-Yashimoota geetetiya biittata ubbaa gakees.
13.21: Qassi gezzen de7iya katamatanne Haseboonan uttidi haarida Amooreta kawa Sihoona biitta ubbaa gakees. Musey kawa Sihoonanne Midiyaameta halaqata Ewa, Reqeema, Xuura, Huranne Reeba olidi xoonis. Haysati kawa Sihoonape garsan he biitta haareyisata.
13.22: Isra7eele asay maruwa, Bi7oora na7aa, Balaama wodhidosona.
13.23: Robeela kochaas wuloha bagga zaway Yordaanose shaafa. Robeela kochaas kochan kochan laata gididi imetida katamatinne gutati haysata.
13.24: Musey Gaade kochaas enta kochan kochan laata biitta shaakidi immis.
13.25: Enta biittay Ya7izeera, Galadan de7iya katamata ubbaanne Amooneta biittafe baggaa ekidi, Raaba doloha baggan de7iya Aro7eera gakees.
13.26: Hessadaka, Haseboonape dendidi, Ramoot-Mixiphanne Bexonima gakees. Qassi Mahinaymape bidi Dabeera zawa gakees.
13.27: Qassi Yordaanose zangaaran, Haseboona kawa Sihoona kawotethaafe attida, Beet-Harame, Beet-Nimira, Sukotanne Xafoona geetetiya katamata ekees. Enta zaway wuloha baggan Yordaanose shaafa, qassi pudeha baggan Kenereeta abba gakees.
13.28: Gaade kochaas kochan kochan laata biitta gididi imetida katamatinne gutati haysata.
13.29: Musey Minaase kochaafe baggaas enta kochan kochan laata biitta immis.
13.30: Enta biittay Mahinaymanne Baasane biitta ubbaa gaki oykees. Baasane kawa Ooge kawotetha ubbaanne Baasanen de7iya usupun tammu Ya7ira katamata oykees.
13.31: Qassi Galadape bagganne Baasanen Ooge kawotethaas waanna katamaa gidida Astarootenne Edraa7a geetetiya katamata gakees. He ubbay Minaase na7a Makira kochaas enta kochan kochan gakidaysa.
13.32: Musey Yordaanosepe hefinthan, Iyaarkofe doloha baggan de7iya Moo7abe denban de7ishe shaakidi immida biittay haysa.
13.33: Shin Musey Leewe kochaas laata biitta immibeenna. Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay enta laata.

14.1: Kahiney Alaazari, Nawe na7ay Iyyasuynne Isra7eele soo asaa halaqati, Kanaane biitta enta kochan kochan shaakin, Isra7eele asaa gakida biittay haysafe kaallidi de7eysa.
14.2: Goday Muse kiitidaysada laata biittay uddufunanne bagga kochaas saaman shaaketis.
14.3: Musey kase nam7anne bagga kochaas Yordaanosepe doloha baggan de7iya biitta immis, shin Leewe kochaas enta giddon laata biitta immibeenna.
14.4: Yoosefa nayti Minaaseynne Efreemey nam7u koche gididosona. Leewe kochaas duussa katamatanne mehe heemmiya biitta immisipe attishin, laata biitta immibeenna.
14.5: Goday Muse kiitidaysada Isra7eele asay biitta shaaketidi ekidosona. Kebrooney Kaalebas Imetis
14.6: Issi gallas Yihuda asay Iyyasuko Galgala yidosona. Entafe issoy, Qeneza kochay, Yoofona na7ay Kaalebi Iyyasuko, “Nuuni Qaades-Barnen de7iya wode Goday nabiya Muse baggara nebaanne tabaa odidaysa eraasa.
14.7: Godaa aylley Musey ha biitta wochana mela Qaades-Barnefe tana kiittiya wode taw laythi oytama. He wode taani ammanthiya oda Muses ehas.
14.8: Taara bida asati asaa wozanaa yashshan til7isidosona, shin taani Godaa, Xoossaa polo kaallas.
14.9: He gallas Musey, ‘Neeni, Godaa, Xoossaa polo kaallida gisho, ne tohoy yedhida biittay newunne ne kochaas merinaa laata biitta gidana’ gidi taw caaqis.
14.10: Iyyasu, ane qopa; Goday hessa Muses odi simmin hachi oytamanne ichashu laythi gidis. Isra7eele asay mela biittan simeretiya wode ubban hachi gathanaw Goday tana paxa wothis. Ha77i taw laythi hospun tammanne ichasha gidis.
14.11: Taw he wode de7iya minotethay hachika de7ees. Oletanaw, keyanawunne gelanaw taw ha77ika wolqinne xaalatethi de7ees.
14.12: He wode Goday taw immana gidi caaqida he derey dariya biitta taw imma. He biittan Anaaqeti de7eysanne enta katamati gitanne gimbetida katama gideysa he wode ne si7adasa. Gidikoka Goday gidaysada I taara gidiko, enta he biittafe taani gooddana” yaagis.
14.13: Iyyasuy Yoofona na7a Kaaleba anjidi, Kebroona iyaw laata oothi immis.
14.14: I Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaa polo kaallida gisho, Kebroona hachi gakanaw Qeneza kocha Yoofona na7aa Kaaleba kochaas laata biitta gidis.
14.15: Kase Kebroona sunthay Qiriyaat-Arba geetetees. Arbi, Anaaqeta giddon eretida gita ase. Hessafe guye, biittay olape shempis.

15.1: Yihuda kochaas enta kochan kochan shaaketida biittay Edoomen zawatidi, dugeha baggan de7iya Xiine mela biitta wursethaa gakees.
15.2: Dugeha baggan enta zaway Maxine Abbaafe dugeha baggan wursetha gaxa gakees.
15.3: Akraabima Pinuwa kanthidi, Xiinepe bidi, Qaades-Barnes dugeha bagga gakees. Qassi Hexroona kanthidi, Adaare keydi, Qarqako simmees.
15.4: Hessafe qassi Aximoona kanthidi, Gibxe shaafa gakidi, Medetiraane Abban zawatees. Dugeha baggan de7iya Yihuda zaway hessa.
15.5: Doloha bagga zaway Maxine Abbaa bidi, Yordaanose shaafa wursethaa gakees. Pudeha bagga zaway qassi Yordaanose shaafay geliyasuwap bidi,
15.6: Beet-Hogila keyees. Yaape Beet-Araba baggara kanthidi, Robeela na7aa Bohaana qofiso shuchan zawatees.
15.7: Yaape zaway Akoora Zangaarape Dabira keyidi, zangaarape dugeha baggan de7iya Adumima Pinuwa sintha baggan aggidi pudeha baggara Galgala simmees. Hessafe qassi Enshemeshe pultuwa kanthidi, Enrogeelan zawatees.
15.8: Hessafe Hinooma Zangaara kanthidi, Yaabuseta katama gidida Yerusalaame dugeha baggaa gakees. Kaallidi zaway Hinoome Zangaarape wuloha baggan de7iya zumaa huuphiya keyidi, pudeha baggan Raafayme Zangaara gakees.
15.9: He zumaa huuphiyape bidi, Naftooha pultuwa kanthidi, Efroona zumaa bolla de7iya katamatako keyees. Hessafe qassi Ba7aala woyko Qiriyat-Yi7aarima simmees.
15.10: Baala pudeha baggara zawaydi, Sayre zumako wuloha bagga mirqetidi, Yi7aarime woyko Kisaloone deriya gakidi, iyape duge Beet-Sameesa wodhidi, Timina pinnees.
15.11: He zaway Eqroona pudeha baggara kanthidi, Shikroona mirqetidi, Baala zumaara bidi, Yabni7eelan zawatees. He zawa wursethay Medetiraane abba gididi,
15.12: wuloha bagga zaway Medetiraane abbas gaxa gidees. Yihuda kochay de7ida biitta zaway haysa. Kaaleba Biitta (Ayse 1:11-15)
15.13: Goday kiitidaysada, Iyyasuy, Yoofona na7aa Kaaleba gakiya laata Yihuda biittafe Qiriyaat-Arba geetetiya Kebroona immis. Arbi Anaaqe aawa.
15.14: Kaalebi Anaaqe kochata, Sesaya, Akmaananne Talmaya geetetiya heedzata Kebroonape kessis.
15.15: Hessafe dendidi, Dabiran de7iya asaa olanaw bis. Dabira katamay kase Qiriyat-Sefera geetetees.
15.16: Kaalebi, “Qiriyat-Sefera olidi, oykiya addiyas taani, ta na7iw Akiso immana” yaagis.
15.17: Yaatin, Kaaleba ishaa Qanaza na7ay, Gotoniyali he katama olidi oykin, Kaalebi ba na7iw Akiso iyaw immis.
15.18: Aksa Gotoniyala geliya wode I aaway iw gade immanaada woossana mela Gotoniyali iyo zoris. Iya baqulo bollafe wodhin, Kaalebi iyo, “Ay koyay?” yaagidi oychis.
15.19: Iya zaarada, “Ne kase taw woytida biittay mela biitta gidiya gisho, haatha pultoy de7iya biitta taw gujada immarki” yaagasu. Yaatin, Kaalebi qommoninne garsan de7iya pulto haatha iw immis. Yihuda Katamata
15.20: Yihuda kochati banta kochan kochan ekida laatay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa.
15.21: Dugeha baggan Edoome gaxan de7iya Yihuda katamati, Qabdu7eela, Edera, Yaagura,
15.32: Lebawoota, Shilihaama, Aynanne Irmoona. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife laatamanne uddufuna.
15.33: Wuloha baggan zuma xaphon de7iya katamati, Eshta7oola, Xor7a, Ashina,
15.36: Sha7irayma, Aditayma, Gederanne Gederotayma. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife tammanne oydda.
15.37: Qassi hara katamati, Xinana, Hadasha, Migidaal-Gaade,
15.41: Gederoota, Beet-Daagona, Na7imaananne Maqeda. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife tammanne usupuna.
15.44: Qa7ila, Akziibanne Mareesa. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife uddufuna.
15.45: Hessadaka, Eqroona katamay ba gutaara yan de7ees.
15.46: Eqroonape wuloha baggan Ashdooda katamaynne iya gutati de7oosona.
15.47: Qassi Ashdoodanne Gaaza katamati banta gutatara bidi, Gibxe shaafa zawanne Medetiraane abba lanqiya gakanaw de7oosona.
15.48: Derey dariya katamati, Samira, Yatira, Sooko,
15.51: Goshena, Holonanne Gilo. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife tammanne issino.
15.54: Humixa, Kebroona woyko Qiriyat-Arbanne Xi7oora. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife uddufuna.
15.57: Qayna, Gib7anne Timina. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife tamma.
15.59: Ma7irata, Beet-Anotanne Eltiqoona. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife usupuna.
15.60: Qassi Qiriyaat-Ba7aale woyko Qiriyat-Yi7aarimanne Raaba. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife nam7a.
15.61: Mela biittan qassi Beet-Araba, Midina, Sekaka,
15.62: Nibishaana, Maxine katamaanne Engaade. Ha katamati banta gutatara issife usupuna.
15.63: Gidoshin, Yihuda asay Yerusalaamen de7iya Yaabuseta gooddidi kessanaw danda7ibookona. Hessa gisho, Yaabuseti hachi gakanaw Yerusalaamen Yihuda asaara issife de7oosona.

16.1: Yoosefa kochata gakida laata biittay dugeha baggara Iyaarko matan de7iya Yordaanosen doomees. Iyaarko pultuwas wuloha bagga gaxape bidi, mela biitta kanthidi, derey dariya biitta ekidi, Beetele gakees.
16.2: Beetelepe bidi, Arketi de7iya Axaroot-Adaare kanthidi, Looza gakees.
16.3: Hessafe wuloha baggan de7iya Yafleexata biitta duge wodhidi, garsa Beet-Horona gakidi, yaape Gezera kanthidi, Medetiraane abban zawatees.
16.4: Yoosefa kochati, Minaasenne Efreema kochati, bantana gakiya biitta laattidosona.
16.5: Efreema kochaa enta kochan kochan gakida biittay haysa; enta zaway doloha baggara de7iya Axaroot-Adaarepe bidi, qommo bagga Beet-Horona keyees.
16.6: Yaape kanthidi Medetiraane abban zawatees. Qassi pudeha baggara de7iya zaway Mikmaatata. Yaape doloha baggara de7iya Taanat-Seeloko mirqetidi, Yanoha gakees.
16.7: Yanohaape dendidi, Axarootenne Na7araate wodhidi, Iyaarko gakidi, wursethay Yordaanose shaafan eqees.
16.8: Gaxa zaway Tapuhape bidi, wuloha baggara de7iya Qaana shaafa lanqiya oykidi, Medetiraane abban eqees. Efreema kochay banta kochan kochan laattida biittay haysa.
16.9: Hessi Minaase kochaa laata giddon Efreema kochaas imetida katamatanne enta gutata ubbaa gujees.
16.10: Gidoshin, Efreema kochay Gezeran de7iya Kanaaneta gooddidi kessibookona. Hessa gisho, Kanaaneti hachi gakanaw Efreema kochaa giddon de7oosona. Shin Efreema kochaas aylletidi oothosona.

17.1: Yoosefa bayra na7aa Minaase kochaas imetida laata biittay kaallidi de7eysa; Galada aaway Makiri Minaase bayra na7a. Makiri mino olancho gidida gisho, Galadanne Baasane biitta ekidosona.
17.2: Yordaanose shaafape wuloha baggara de7iya biittay hanko attida Minaase kochaas, Abi7ezeras, Heleqas, Asir7eelas, Seekemas, Hefeerasinne Shamida7as imetis. Haysati Yoosefa na7aa Minaase kochata.
17.3: Hefeera na7aa Selophaada, Galada na7aa Hefeera, Makira na7aa Galada, Minaase na7aa Makira. Selophaadas macca na7ape attishin, adde na7i baawa. He macca nayta sunthay Mahilo, No7o, Hoglo, Milkonne Tirxo.
17.4: Enti kahiniya Alaazarako, Nawe na7aa Iyyasukonne deriya cimatako bidi, “Nu dabbotada nuuska laata biitta immana mela Goday Muse kiittis” yaagidosona. Yaatin, Goday kiitidaysada enta dabbotada entawuka laata biitta immis.
17.5: Minaase kochati Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan de7iya Galadanne Baasane bolla gujidi tammu biittata saaman ekidosona.
17.6: Hessa gisho, Minaase kochaafe macca nayti adde naytara issife laata biitta shaaketidosona. Galada biittay attida Minaase kochaas gidis.
17.7: Minaase kochaa biitta zaway Aseerape bidi, Seekemape doloha baggan de7iya Mikmaatata gakees. He zaway yaape kanthidi, dugeha baggan Antapuhan de7iya deriya gujees.
17.8: Tapuha biittay Minaase kochaasa, shin Minaase zawan de7iya Tapuha katamay Efreema kochaasa.
17.9: Qassi he zaway yaape bidi, Qaana shaafan zawatees. Minaase katamata giddon Efreema katamatika de7oosona. Shin Minaase zaway Qaana shaafape pudeha baggara bidi Medetiraane abban eqees.
17.10: Shaafape dugeha baggan de7iya biittay Efreemasa; qassi pudeha baggan de7iya biittay Minaasesa. Minaase biitta zaway Medetiraane abba gakees. Iyaw pudeha baggara Aseeri, qassi doloha baggara Yisakoori zawatees.
17.11: Yisakooranne Aseera biittata giddon, Beet-Saana, Yiblaama, Doora, Endoora, Tanakanne Magido geetetiya katamatinne gutati Minaasesa.
17.12: Shin Minaase kochati he katamatan de7iya asata kessidi katamata oykanaw danda7ibookona. Hessa gisho, Kanaaneti yan duussi oykidosona.
17.13: Isra7eele asay wolqan minnikoka, Kanaaneti wolqa ooso oothana mela un7ethidosonape attishin, enta kumethi gooddidi kessibookona.
17.14: Yoosefa kochay, “Goday nuna anjidi, darsis; yaatin, ayis issi saama xalaala laata biitta nuus immadii?” yaagidi Iyyasu oychidosona.
17.15: Iyyasuy zaaridi, “Hinte daro gidiko, derey dariya Efreema biittay hintew guuxidaba gidiko, Parzetinne Raafaymeti de7iya biitta bidi wora qeexite” yaagis.
17.16: Yoosefa kochay, “He derey dariya biittayka nuus gidenna. Qassi Beet-Saana katamaninne iya gutan de7eysatasinne Izra7eele zangaaran de7iya Kanaanetas birata para gaareti de7oosona” yaagidosona.
17.17: Yaatin Iyyasuy Yoosefa koche gidida Efreemanne Minaase, “Hinte daronne wolqaama; hintew issi saama xalaala gidanaw bessenna.
17.18: Hessa gisho, derey dariya biittay hintebaa gidana. He gezzey wora gidikoka qeexidi, gaxa gakanaw hintebaa oothite. Kanaanetas birata para gaareti de7ikoka, qassi enti ay mino gidikoka hinte enta gooddidi kessanaw danda7eeta” yaagis.

18.1: Biitta oli xoonidi oykidaape guye, Isra7eele asa ubbay Seelon shiiqidi, Goda goyinno dunkaaniya yan essidosona.
18.2: Shin Isra7eele asape laata biitta ekiboonna laapun kochati attidosona.
18.3: Hessa gisho, Iyyasuy Isra7eele asaako, “Goday hinte aawata Xoossay hintew immida biitta laattonna awude gakanaw gam7anee?
18.4: Issi issi kochaafe heedzu heedzu asata doorite. Issi issi kochay laattana biitta enti yuuyidi, xomoosi be7idi, mazgabidi yaana mela ta enta kiittana. Enti he biittaba xaafi ekidi, simmidi taako yaana.
18.5: He biitta laapun bessan shaakana. Yihuda kochay dugeha baggan, Yoosefa kochay pudeha baggan de7iya banta biitta oykida mela daana.
18.6: Ha laapun bessan shaaketana biitta qoncisi xaafidi ekidi yiite. Godaa, nu Xoossaa sinthan entaw saama yeggana.
18.7: Gidoshin, Leewe kochati kahine gididi, Godaas oothiya gisho, hintera laata biitta ekokona. Gaade kochay, Robeela kochaynne, Minaase kochaafe baggay Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan, Godaa aylley, Musey entaw immida biitta koyrottidi laatidosona” yaagis.
18.8: He asati biitta xomoosidi, xaafanaw baanape sinthe, Iyyasuy, “Bidi biitta yuuyidi xomoosidi xaafite; simmidi taako yiite. Taani haysan, Seelon, Godaa sinthan hintew saama yeggana” yaagidi kiittis.
18.9: Asati bidi, biitta ubbaa yuuyidosona. Katamata ubbaa xaafidi, biitta waati laapun bessan shaakaneko qoncisidosona. Yaati simmidi, Iyyasuy dunkaanida gutaa, Seelo simmidosona.
18.10: Iyyasuy Godaa sinthan, Seelon entaw saama yeggis. Attida Isra7eele zerethata gakiya laata biitta shaakidi immis. Biniyaame Laata
18.11: Koyro saamay Biniyaame kochaa enta kochan kochan gakis. Enta gakida biittay Yihudapenne Yoosefa kochaafe giddon de7ees.
18.12: Pudeha baggara enta zaway Yordaanosepe dendidi, Iyaarko pude keyidi, wuloha baggan de7iya derey dariya biitta kanthidi, Beet-Aweena mela biittan eqees.
18.13: He zaway dugeha baggara kase Looza geetetidi xeegetiya Beetele kanthidi, dugeha Axaroot-Adaare wodhidi, Beet-Horonape dugeha baggan de7iya zuman zawatees.
18.14: He zaway dugeha baggara Beet-Horona sinthan de7iya zumaape wuloha bagga xaaxetidi, Yihuda kochaa katama gidida, Qiriyaat-Ba7aale woyko Qiriyat-Yi7aarima aadhees. Hessi wuloha baggara de7iya zawa.
18.15: Dugeha bagga zaway wuloha baggara Qiriyaat-Yi7aarimepe dendidi, Naftooha pultotan zawatees.
18.16: Hessafe he zaway duge bidi Raafayme zangaarape pudeha baggan de7iya Henooma zangaarape sintha baggara duge wodhees. Yaape Yaabuseta katamaape dugeha baggan de7iya lanqiya oykidi, Hinoome zangaara wodhidi, Enrogeelan zawatees.
18.17: Yaape pudeha bagga mirqetidi Enshemeshe baggara Adumima zuma sinthan de7iya Geliloota gakees. Yaape qassi Robeela na7aa Bohaana shuchaako duge wodhees.
18.18: Qassi Beet-Araba pudeha bagga lanqiya oykidi, duge Yordaanose zangaara wodhees.
18.19: Hessafe Beet-Hogila pudeha lanqiya kanthi bidi, Yordaanose shaafay goggidi geliya Maxine Abbaafe pudeha bagga gaxa gakees. Haysi dugeha bagga zawa.
18.20: Doloha bagga zaway Yordaanose shaafa. Biniyaame kochati laattida biittay ubba baggara zawatida zaway haysa.
18.21: Biniyaame kochay banta kochan kocha laattida katamati, Iyaarko, Beet-Hogila, Emeq-Qaxixa,
18.22: Beet-Araba, Zamarayme, Beetele,
18.23: Awiime, Paara, Ofira,
18.24: Kefaar-Amoona, Ofinanne Gib7a. Enti kumethi tammanne nam7u katama. Enta yuushuwan de7iya gutatika enta bolla guzhetoosona.
18.28: Xela7a, Elefa, Yerusalaame geetetiya Yaabuseta katama, Gib7anne Qiriyat-Yi7aarima. Enti kumethi tammanne oyddu katama. Enta yuushuwan de7iya gutatika enta bolla guzhetoosona. Biniyaame kochay banta kochan laattida biittay haysa.

19.1: Nam7antho saamay Simoona kochaa enta kochan kochan gakis. Enti laattida biittay Yihuda kochati laattida biitta giddon de7ees.
19.2: Enti laattida katamati, Barsaabe woyko Seeba, Molada,
19.3: Haxar-Shu7aala, Bala, Exema,
19.4: Eltolaada, Batula, Horma,
19.5: Xiqilaaga, Beet-Markaboota, Haxar-Suusa,
19.6: Beet-Laba7ootanne Sharuha. Enti kumethi tammanne heedza katama. Enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati enta bolla guzhetoosona.
19.7: Qassi hara bessan Ayna, Irmoona, Eteranne Ashana geetetiya oyddu katamatanne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutata oykidosona.
19.8: Simoona biittay dugeha baggan de7iya Ba7ilaat-Ba7eera woyko Rama katamatanne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutata ubbaa gakees. Simoona kochay banta kochan kochan laattida biittay haysa.
19.9: Yihuda kochata gakida biittay dalga gidida gisho, iyape shaaketidi, Simoona kochatas imetis. Zabloona Laata
19.10: Heedzantho saamay Zabloona kochaa enta kochan kochan gakis. Enti laattida biittay Sarida gakees.
19.11: Yaape dendidi zaway wuloha baggan de7iya Mar7ala kanthidi, Dabasheeta bochishe, Yoqinaama matan de7iya haatha gakees.
19.12: Saridape doloha bagga mirqetidi, Kisiloot-Taabora kanthidi Dabirataninne Yaafan zawatees.
19.13: Yaape wuloha baggara kanthidi, Gaat-Hefeeranne It-Qaxinaana gakidi, Irmoonakonne Ne7ako mirqettees.
19.14: Pudeha bagga zaway Hanatoone yuuyidi, Yiftaahe zangaaran zawatees.
19.15: He zaway Qaxata, Nahilaala, Shimroona, Yidaalanne Beeteleme geetetiya katamata oykees. Enti kumethi tammanne nam7u katama; enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati enta bolla guzhetoosona.
19.16: Zabloona kochati banta kochan kochan laattida katamatinne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati haysata. Yisakoora Laata
19.17: Oyddantho saamay Yisakoora kochaa enta kochan kochan gakis.
19.18: Enta zaway Izra7eele, Kasulota, Suneema,
19.19: Hafarayma, Shi7oona, Anahaarata,
19.22: He biitta zaway Taabore, Shahaxumanne Beet-Sameesa bochishe bidi, Yordaanose shaafan zawatees. Enti kumethi tammanne usupun katama; enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati enta bolla guzhetoosona.
19.23: Yisakoora kochay banta kochan kochan laattida biitta giddon de7iya katamatinne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati haysata. Aseera laata biitta
19.24: Ichashantho saamay Aseera kochaa enta kochan kochan gakis.
19.25: Enta biitta zaway, Helqata, Hala, Bexena, Azifa,
19.26: Alameleke, Amadanne Mishaala ekees. Wuloha baggara Qarmeloosaninne Sihoor-Libnaatan zawatees.
19.27: Qassi doloha baggara Beet-Daagonako mirqetidi, Zabloonanne Yiftahi7eela zangaara bochishe bidi, pudeha baggara Beet-Emeqanne Ni7eela gakees. Qassi pudeha baggara Kaabula,
19.28: Ebroona, Rehooba, Hamoonanne Qaana kanthidi, Sidoonan zawatees.
19.29: He zaway Rama yuuyidi, gimben diretida Xiroosa katamaa gakidi, Hoosako mirqetidi, Medetiraane abban zawatees. Qassi Mahalaba, Akziiba,
19.30: Uma, Afeeqanne Rehooba geetetiya katamata gakidi zawatees. Enti kumethi laatamanne nam7u katama; enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati enta bolla guzhetoosona.
19.31: Aseera kochay banta kochan kochan laattida katamatinne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati haysata. Niftaaleme Laata
19.32: Usupuntho saamay Niftaaleme kochaa enta kochan kochan gakis.
19.33: Enta zaway Helefapenne Zananime wolaape bidi, Adaam-Neqeba, Yabni7eelanne Laquma kanthidi, wursethay Yordaanose shaafan eqees.
19.34: Qassi he zaway wuloha baggara Aznoot-Taboorako mirqetidi, Huqooqan eqees. He zaway dugeha baggan Zabloona, wuloha baggan Aseera, doloha baggan Yordaanose shaafa kanthidi Yihudan gakees.
19.35: Gimben diretida katamati, Xidima, Xeera, Hamaata, Raqata, Kenereeta abba,
19.38: Yir7oona, Magdela, Horema, Beet-Anaatanne Beet-Sameesa katamata oykees. He katamati kumethi tammanne uddufuna; enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati enta bolla guzhetoosona.
19.39: Niftaaleme kochay banta kochan kochan laattida katamatinne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati haysata. Daane Laata
19.40: Laapuntha saamay Daane kochaa enta kochan kochan gakis.
19.41: Enti laattida katamati Xor7a, Eshta7oola, Irshemesha,
19.46: Mayarqoona, Raqoonanne Yoophe katama yuushuwan de7iya heerata oykees.
19.47: Daane kochay enta laata biittay entafe eketin, Lashema katama bidi, olan xoonidi, he kataman de7iya asaa mashshan wodhidi, he biitta bantaba oothidosona. He katama sunthaa laammidi, banta aawa Daane sunthan Daane gidi sunthidosona.
19.48: Daane kochati banta kochan kochan laattida katamatinne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutati haysata.
19.49: Isra7eele asay biitta shaahuwa ongida wode, Nawe na7aa Iyyasus laata biitta immidosona.
19.50: Goday kase kiittidaysada Iyyasuy derey dariya Efreeman de7iya Timnaat-Saara katama immana mela oychin, iyaw immidosona. He katamaa zaari giigisidi, yan de7is.
19.51: Kahiney Alaazari, Nawe na7aa Iyyasuynne Isra7eele soo asaa halaqati Seelon, Godaa sinthan Xoossaa dunkaaniya pengen saama yeggidi, shaakida laata biittay haysa. Enti biitta shaakidi ongidosona.

20.1: Hessafe guye, Goday Iyyasuko haysada yaagis;
20.2: “Taani Muse baggara kiitidaysada, ‘Asay baqatidi attiya katamata dummayana mela’ Isra7eele asaas oda.
20.3: Oonika qoponnanne eronna ase wodhiko, yaa baqatidi gukida suuthaa gisho suuthi zaaranaw koya uraape attana.
20.4: Ase wodhidaysi he katamatape issuwako baqatidi bidi, katamaa pengen eqidi, hanidaba ubbaa he katamaa cimatas odo. Hessafe guye, enti banta katamaa efidi, I daana bessi immiko entara yan de7o.
20.5: Suuthaa gisho suuthi zaaranaw koya uray iya kaallidi yiiko, I ba ishaa eridi, qohanaw koyidi wodhiboonna gisho he katamaa cimati iya aathidi immofo.
20.6: Shango sinthan shiiqidi, pirdetana gakanawunne he wode de7iya kahine halaqay hayqana gakanaw he kataman de7o. Hessafe guye, baqatidi keyida katamaa guye simmidi ba soo gelo” yaagis.
20.7: Yaatin Isra7eele asay derey dariya Niftaalemen Galilan de7iya Qaadesa, derey dariya Efreeman de7iya Seekemanne derey dariya Yihudan de7iya Qiriyaat-Arba woyko Kebroona dummayidosona.
20.8: Yordaanose shaafape hefinthan, Iyaarkofe doloha baggan dhoqan, mela biittan, Robeela, kochata biittan de7iya Boosora, Gaade kochata biittan, Galadan de7iya Ramotanne Minaase kochata biittan, Baasanen de7iya Goolana dummayidosona.
20.9: Isra7eele asaynne enta giddon de7iya betanchoti baqatidi attana mela dummatida katamati haysata. Oonika eronna de7ishe ase wodhiko, shango sinthan pirdetonna de7ishe, hayqonna attanaw ha katamatape issuwako baqatanaw danda7ees.

21.1: -2 Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asay Kanaane biittan, Seelon dunkaanidi de7ishin, Leewe soo asaa halaqati kahiniya Alaazarako, Nawe na7aa Iyyasukonne Isra7eele halaqatako yidi, “Nuuni daana katamatanne mehe heemmiya biitta nuus immana mela, Goday Muse baggara kiittis” yaagidosona.
21.3: Hessa gisho, Goday kiitidaysada, Isra7eele asay Leewetas katamatanne mehe heemmiya biitta banta biittafe shaakidi, immidosona.
21.4: Koyro saamay Qahaata kochaas keyis. Kahiniya Aarona kochay, Yihuda, Simoonanne Biniyaame kochaafe tammanne heedzu katamata saaman ekidosona.
21.5: Attida Qahaata kochay, Efreema, Daanenne wuloha baggan de7iya Minaase kochaafe tammu katamata saaman ekidosona.
21.6: Gedisoona kochay, Yisakoora, Aseera Niftaalemenne doloha baggan de7iya Minaase kochaafe tammanne heedzu katamata saaman ekidosona.
21.7: Meraara kochay, Robeela, Gaadenne Zabloona kochaafe tammanne nam7u katamata ekidosona.
21.8: Goday Muse baggara kiitidaysada, Isra7eele asay ha katamatanne mehe heemmiya biitta Leewetas saaman shaakidi immidosona.
21.9: Isra7eele asay Yihudanne Simoona kochaafe kaallidi sunthan xeegetida katamata immidosona.
21.10: Koyro saamay Leewe kochaafe yeletida, Qahaata koche gidida Aarona yaraas keyin, entaw imetida katamati haysata;
21.11: Derey dariya Yihudan de7iya Qiriyaat-Arba woyko Kebroonenne iya yuushuwan de7iya hentha biittata entaw immidosona. (Arbi Anaaqe aawa.)
21.12: Shin koyro he katama yuushuwan de7iya biittanne gutata Yoofona na7aa Kaalebas laata oothidi immidosona.
21.13: Kahiniya Aarona yaraas ase wodhida asi baqatidi attiya Kebroonenne hentha biitta, Libinanne hentha biitta,
21.14: Yatiranne hentha biitta, Eshtamoo7anne hentha biitta,
21.15: Holonanne hentha biitta, Dabiranne hentha biitta,
21.16: Aynanne hentha biitta, Yuuxanne hentha biitta, Beet-Sameesanne hentha biitta. Haysati Yihudapenne Simoonape eketida, katamati kumethi uddufuna.
21.17: Biniyaame kochaafe eketida oyddu katamati, Gaba7oonanne hentha biitta, Gib7anne hentha biitta,
21.18: Anatootenne hentha biitta, Almoonanne hentha biitta.
21.19: Aarona koche gidida kahinetas imetida katamatinne hentha biittati tammanne heedza.
21.20: Leewe koche gidida, attida Qahaata kochaas, Efreemas imetida biittafe shaaketidi imetis.
21.21: Qassi entaw derey dariya Efreeman, ase wodhida asi baqatidi attiya oyddu katamati Seekemanne hentha biitta, Gezeranne hentha biitta,
21.22: Qibxaymanne hentha biitta, Beet-Horonanne hentha biitta immidosona.
21.23: Daane kochaafe shaaketi imetida oyddu katamati, Eltaqanne hentha biitta, Gibetonanne hentha biitta,
21.24: Eloonanne hentha biitta, Gaat-Rimoonanne hentha biitta.
21.25: Minaase kocha baggafe shaaketi imetida nam7u katamati, Tanakanne hentha biitta, Gaat-Rimoonanne hentha biitta.
21.26: Attida Qahaata kochati hentha biittara issife tammu katama ekidosona.
21.27: Hara Leewe koche gidida Gedisoona kochaas imetida biittay, Minaase kocha baggaafe ase wodhida asi baqatidi attiya nam7u katamati, Baasanen de7iya Goolananne hentha biitta, Be7eshtiranne hentha biitta.
21.28: Yisakoora kochaafe imetida oyddu katamati, Qisoonanne hentha biitta, Debraatanne hentha biitta.
21.29: Yarmutanne hentha biitta, Enganimanne hentha biitta.
21.30: Aseera kochaafe shaaketi imetida oyddu katamati Mishaalanne hentha biitta, Abdoonanne hentha biitta,
21.31: Helqatenne hentha biitta, Rehoobanne hentha biitta.
21.32: Niftaaleme kochaafe shaaketi imetida heedzu katamati, ase wodhida asi baqatidi attiya, Galilan de7iya Qaadesanne hentha biitta, Hamoot-Dooranne hentha biitta, Qartananne hentha biitta.
21.33: Gedisoona kochati hentha biittara issife tammanne heedzu katamata ekidosona.
21.34: Leewe koche gidida attida Meraara kochati, Zabloona kochaafe shaaketi imetida oyddu katamati, Yoqnaamanne hentha biitta, Qartananne hentha biitta,
21.35: Diminanne hentha biitta, Nahilaalanne hentha biitta ekidosona.
21.36: Robeela, kochaafe shaaketidi imetida oyddu katamati, Boosoranne hentha biitta, Yahaaxanne hentha biitta,
21.37: Qidemootanne hentha biitta, Mefaatanne hentha biitta.
21.38: Gaade kochaafe shaaketidi imetida oyddu katamati, Galadan ase wodhida asi baqatidi attiya, Ramotanne hentha biitta, Mahinayme,
21.40: Leewe koche gidida attida Meraara kochay ekida katamati tammanne nam7a.
21.41: Isra7eele asay laattida biittafe Leewe kochaas imetida katamati hentha biittara issife oytamanne hospuna.
21.42: He katamata ubbaa yuushuwan hentha biittati de7oosona.
21.43: Goday enta aawatas immana gidi caaqida biitta ubbaa Isra7eele asaas immis. Enti he biitta laattidi, yan de7idosona.
21.44: Goday enta aawatas caaqidaysada, enta saron wothis. Enti olas keyida wode ubban enta morketi entara eqetanaw danda7ibookona.
21.45: Goday Isra7eele asaas immana gidi caaqida lo77oba ubbaa polisipe attishin, issoyka attibeenna.

22.1: Hessafe guye, Iyyasuy Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochaafe baggaa xeegidi,
22.2: “Godaa aylley Musey hintena kiitida ubbaa polideta; qassi taw kiitetideta.
22.3: He ubban hachi gakanaw hinte ishata yeggibeeketa. Godaa, hinte Xoossaa kiitta ubbaa polideta.
22.4: Goday hinte Xoossay hintew caaqida qaalada, hinte ishata shempisis. Hessa gisho, Godaa aylley Musey hintew Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan immida, laata biittan de7iya hinte soo soo simmite.
22.5: Godaa aylley Musey hintena kiitida higgiya minthidi naagite. Godaa hinte Xoossaa siiqite. Iya ogiyape deshopite; iya kiita polite. Iyara shiphi gidi de7ite; hinte kumetha wozanapenne kumetha shempuwafe iyaw oothite” yaagis.
22.6: Iyyasuy enta anjidi yeddin enti banta soo simmidosona.
22.7: Iyyasuy, Minaase kochaa baggaas Baasanen laata biitta immis. Attida bagga kochaas qassi Yordaanosepe wuloha baggan laata biitta immis. Iyyasuy enta anjidi moyzishe,
22.8: Hinte, “Daro mehe, bira, worqa, naase, biratanne daro ma7o ekidi hinte soo simmana haneeta. Hessa gisho, hinte morketape di77idaysa hinte ishatara shaaketite” yaagis.
22.9: Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochaa baggay banta laata biitta simmidosona. Enti, Goday Muse baggara kiittin laattida Galada biitta, Kanaane biittan, Seelon de7iya Isra7eele asaape shaaketidi bidosona. Doloha Bagga Yarsho Bessaa
22.10: Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochaafe baggay Yordaanose matan Kanaane biittan de7iya Galiloota yidi, shaafa matan malaalsiya gita yarsho bessi keexidosona.
22.11: Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochaafe baggay Yordaanose matan, Galilootan, Kanaane biittan yarsho bessi keexidaysa attida Isra7eele asay si7idosona.
22.12: Isra7eele asay hessa si7idi, enta olanaw Seelon shiiqidosona.
22.13: Hessafe sinthe Isra7eele asay, kahiniya Alaazara na7aa Pinihaasa, Galadan de7iya Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochaafe baggatako yeddidosona.
22.14: Issi issi kochay ba soo halaqatape issi issi ase dooridi, tammu asi Pinihaasara yeddidosona.
22.15: Enti Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochaafe baggay Galada bidi,
22.16: “Godaa asay, ‘Isra7eele Xoossaa bolla de7iya hinte ammanuwa ayis paciseetii? Hintew yarsho bessi keexidi, Godaape haakideta. Iya bolla ayis makallidetii?
22.17: Pe7ooran nu oothida nagaray gidennee? Godaa asaa bolla boshi wodhis; hachi gakanaw nuuni he nagaraape geeyibooko.
22.18: Godaa bolla hachi hinte zoko zaarideta. Hachi hinte iya bolla zoko zaariko wonto I kumetha Isra7eele asaa hanqana.
22.19: Hinte de7iya biittay tunidaba gidiko, Godaa dunkaaney de7iya biitta, haa nuuko yidi, nu laata shaaketite. Shin Godaa, nu Xoossaa yarsho bessaafe hara yarsho bessi keexidi Xoossaa bolla woyko nu bolla makallofite.
22.20: Zaara na7ay Akaani digetidaba ekidi, nagara oothida gisho, kumetha Isra7eele asaa bolla Godaa hanqoy wodhibeenneyee? Iya nagara gaason hayqiday iya xalaala gidenna’ ” yaagidosona.
22.21: Yaatin Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochaafe baggay haysada yaagidi zaaridosona.
22.22: “Godaa xalaali Xoosse! Godaa xalaali Xoosse! Nuuni haysa ayis oothidaako I erees; hinteka erana mela nu koyoos. Nuuni Godaa bolla makallidabaanne kiitetonna ixidaba gidiko, hachi nuna paxa wothofite.
22.23: Nu Godaas kiitetonna ixidi, xuussa yarshuwa, katha yarshuwanne issifetetha yarshuwa yarshanaw yarsho bessi keexidaba gidiko, Goday nuna hanqo.
22.24: Nu hessa qopidi keexibooko. Nuuni yarsho bessi keexiday, wonto hinte nayti, nu naytako, ‘Hintew Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossara ay gahetethi de7ii?
22.25: Goday nu giddoninne Robeelanne Gaade kochaa giddon Yordaanose shaafa zawa wothis. Hessa gisho, Godaara hintew gahetethi baawa’ gandeshsha gidi yayyida gishosa. Qassi hinte kochay nu kochaa Godaa goyinno diggonna aggokona” yaagidi qopida.
22.26: “Nu yarsho bessi keexiday hessasa. Xuussa woyko hara yarsho yarshanaasa gidenna.
22.27: Nuuni yarsho bessi keexiday, xuussa, issifetethanne hara yarshuwa yarshishe de7idaysasinne Godaa dunkaaniya sinthan goyinnishe de7idaysas, nu giddoninne hinte giddon qassi kaalliya yeleta giddon hessi marka gidana melasa. Hessi hinte nayti nu naytako, ‘Hintew Godaara ay gahetethika baawa’ yaagonna mela maadana.
22.28: Enti wodepe nuuko woyko nu kochaako hessada giiko, nu nayti zaaridi, ‘Nu aawati Godaas keexida yarsho bessa leemisuwa haysa be7ite. Hessi hinte giddoninne nu giddon marka gidana melasafe attishin, xuussa woyko hara yarsho yarshanaasa gidenna’ gaanaw danda7ana melasa.
22.29: Nu Godaa bolla makallanaysi nuupe haako. Godaa nu Xoossaa dunkaaniya sinthan de7iya yarsho bessaafe haraa xuussa, kathaanne hara yarsho bessi keexidi Xoossaa goyinno aggoko” yaagidi zaaridosona.
22.30: Kahiney Pinihaasinne iyara de7iya Isra7eele halaqati, Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochaafe baggay odidaysa si7idi, ufaytidosona.
22.31: Kahiniya Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasi, Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochatako, “Goday nuura de7eysa nu hachi erida. Hinte Godaa bolla makallibeeketa. Hinte Isra7eele asaa Godaa pirdaafe ashshideta” yaagis.
22.32: Kahiniya Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasinne iyara de7iya halaqati Galadan de7iya Robeelanne Gaade kochaa matape Kanaanen de7iya Isra7eele asaako simmidi, hanidaba entaw odidosona.
22.33: Isra7eele asay ufaytidi, Xoossaa galatidosona. Hessafe guye, Robeelanne Gaade asati de7iya biitta olidi dhaysanaw odetibookona.
22.34: Robeelanne Gaade kochay, “Ha yarsho bessay Godaa xalaali Xoossaa gideysas nuus marka” yaagidi, he yarsho bessa “Marka” gidi sunthidosona.

23.1: Daro wode gakanaw Goday Isra7eele asaa enta yuushuwan de7iya morketape shempisis. He wode Iyyasuy cimin, laythi sugetis.
23.2: Iyyasuy, Isra7eele asa ubbaa, cimata, halaqata, daynnatanne toora moconata issife xeegidi, “Taani ha77i daro cimas.
23.3: Goday, hinte Xoossay ha biittan de7iya kawotethata oli xoonana mela waatidi hintena maaddidaako be7ideta.
23.4: Dolohan Yordaanose shaafa, wulohan Medetiraane abba gakanaw de7iya oyketida biittanne oyketonna biitta ubbaa hinte kochaas shaaka immas.
23.5: Goday, hinte Xoossay enta hinte sinthafe gooddidi kessana. Goday, hinte Xoossay hintew caaqidaysada hinte enta biitta laattana.
23.6: “Muse higge maxaafan xaafetida ubbaa minnidi naagitenne polite; iyape ushachi woyko haddirsi goopite.
23.7: Hinte giddon attida deriyara walaketofite. Enta xoossata sunthaa xeegopite woyko enta sunthan caaqofite. Entaw oothopite woyko entaw goyinnofite.
23.8: Shin hachi gakanaw hinte oothidaysada Godaa hinte Xoossaas ammanetite.
23.9: “Goday, gitanne mino kawotethata hinte sinthafe gooddidi kessis. Hintera hachi gakanaw oonika eqetanaw danda7ibeena.
23.10: Goday, hinte Xoossay hintew caaqidaysada, I hintew oletiya gisho, hintefe issi asi mukulu asaa yedethana.
23.11: Godaa, hinte Xoossaa ubba wode siiqite.
23.12: Shin hinte guye simmidi, hinte giddon attida deriyara walaketiko, hinte enta maccasa, qassi enti hinte maccasa ekidi entara qashetiko,
23.13: Goday, hinte Xoossay he deriya hinte sinthafe gooddidi kessonnaysa erite. Goday, hinte Xoossay hintew immida ha lo77o biittafe hinte dhayana gakanaw, enti hintew xihenne gite gidana. Enti hinte zokuwas lisso, hinte ayfiyas agunthu gidana.
23.14: “Ha77i ta hayqanaw matas. Goday, hinte Xoossay hintew immana gidi caaqida lo77oba ubbaafe issoyka attiboonaysa hinte ubbay, hinte wozananinne shempuwan ereeta. I hintew immana gidi caaqidabape issoyka attona ubbay poletis.
23.15: Goday, hinte Xoossay hintera caaqida caaquwa hinte menthidi, hara xoossatas oothikonne goyinniko, Godaa hanqoy hinte bolla eexana.
23.16: Goday, hinte Xoossay hintew immana gidi caaqida lo77oba ubbaa ashshona polidaysada, I hintew immida ha lo77o biittafe hintena dhaysana gakanaw iita ubbaa hinte bolla ehana. I hintew immida lo77o biittafe ellesidi hinte dhayana.”

24.1: Iyyasuy Isra7eele asa ubbaa Seekeman xeegis. Cimata, halaqata, daynnatanne toora moconata xeegin, enti Xoossa sinthan shiiqidosona.
24.2: Iyyasuy asaako, “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; ‘Beni hinte aawati Efraxiisa shaafape hefinthan, hara xoossatas goyinnishe de7idosona. Entafe issoy Abrahaamenne Nakoora aawa Taara.
24.3: Shin hinte aawa Abrahaame, Efraxiisa shaafape hefinthan de7iya biittafe xeegada, Kanaane biittan kaalethas. Iya kochaa darsas; Yisaaqaka iyaw immas.
24.4: Yisaaqas Yayqoobanne Eesawe immas. Derey dariya Sayre biitta Eesawe laatisas, shin Yayqoobinne iya nayti Gibxe bidosona.
24.5: “ ‘Guyepe Musanne Aarona kiittada Gibxe biitta gadon shocas; wursethan hintena kessas.
24.6: Hinte aawata Gibxefe kessida wode Zo7o Abbaako bidosona. Gibxeti parataninne para gaaretan hinte aawata guye zaaranaw yedethidosona.
24.7: Enti taako waassida wode enta giddoninne Gibxeta giddon dhumaa yeggas. Yaatada, abbay enta bolla simmanaadanne enta mittanaada oothas. Taani Gibxeta bolla oothidaba hinte hinte ayfen be7ideta. Hinte mela biittan daro wode de7ideta.
24.8: Hessafe guye, Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan de7iya Amooreta biitta hintena ehas. Enti hintena olidosona, shin ta hintew xoono immas. Ta enta dhaysin, hinte enta biitta laattideta.
24.9: Hessafe guye, Moo7abe biitta kawoy, Sifoora na7ay Balaaqi, dendidi, Isra7eeletara oletis. I hintena baaddana mela Bi7oora na7aa, Balaama xeegis.
24.10: Shin ta Balaama si7abike; I hintena anjana mela oothada, hintena Balaaqa kushiyape ashshas.
24.11: Hinte Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi, Iyaarko yideta. Iyaarko asay, Amooreti, Parzeti, Kanaaneti, Hiteti, Gergeseti, Hiwetinne Yaabuseti hintera oletanaw dendidosona, shin ta hintena xoonisas.
24.12: Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan de7iya nam7u Amoore kawota bolla oothidaysada, kazhe kiittada entana hinte sinthafe goodda kessas. Hessi haniday, hinte mashshaana woyko hinte dongiyana gidenna.
24.13: Hinte qeexi kessiboonna biittanne hinte keexiboonna katamata taani hintew immin de7eeta. Ha77i hinte tokiboonna woyne ayfiyanne shamaho ayfiya meeta’ ” yaagees.
24.14: Qassika Iyyasuy kaallidi, “Godaa bonchite; polo ammanetethaninne suure wozanan iyaw kiitetite. Hinte mayzati Efraxiisa shaafape hefinthaninne Gibxen goyinnida eeqata aggidi Godaa goyinnite.
24.15: Hinte Godaa goyinnanaw koyonna ixiko, hinte aawati Efraxiisa shaafape hefinthan de7ishe goyinnida eeqata gidin, woyko ha77i hinte de7iya Amooreta eeqata gidin, hinte goyinnana Xoossa hachi doorite. Shin taani, ta soo asaara nu Godaa goyinnana” yaagis.
24.16: Asay zaaridi, “Godaa aggidi, hara eeqa xoossata goyinnanaysi nuupe haako.
24.17: Nu Godaa Xoossay nunanne nu aawata Gibxe aylletethaafe kessis; I oothida gita malaatata be7ida. Nu kanthidi aadhida biitta ubban Goday nuna naagis.
24.18: Goday Amooretanne he biittan de7iya hara kawotethata nu sinthafe gooddidi kessis. Hessa gisho, I nu Xoossaa gidiya gisho nu iya goyinnana” yaagidosona.
24.19: Iyyasuy zaaridi, “Goday geeshshinne qanaatiya Xoossi gidiya gisho, hinte iya goyinnanaw danda7eketa. I hinte naaquwa woyko hinte nagara atto geenna.
24.20: Hinte Godaas zoko zaaridi, eeqa xoossata goyinniko, I hintew kase lo77o gidikoka simmidi hintena qohananne dhaysana” yaagis.
24.21: Asay zaaridi, “Nu hara eeqa xoossata goyinnoko; nuuni Godaa, iya xalaala goyinnana” yaagis.
24.22: Iyyasuy, “Hinte Godaa goyinnana gidaysas hinte, hinte huuphen marka” yaagis. Entika, “Ee nuuni marka” yaagidosona.
24.23: Iyyasuy zaaridi, “Hinte giddon de7iya eeqa xoossata diggite; hinte wozanaa Godaako, Isra7eele Xoossaako zaarite” yaagis.
24.24: Entika, “Nuuni Godaa, nu Xoossaa goyinnana; iya kiita naagana” yaagidosona.
24.25: He gallas Iyyasuy, Seekeman asay Xoossara caaqana mela oothis. Enti kaallana higgiya entaw giigisidi,
24.26: higge maxaafan xaafis. Hessafe guye, issi gita shuchi ekidi, Godaa dunkaaniya matan de7iya wolaa garsan essis.
24.27: Iyyasuy asaako, “Ha shuchaa be7ite; I nu bolla marka. Goday nuus odidaba ubbaa ha shuchay si7is. Hinte Xoossaa bolla makalliko, ha shuchay hinte bolla marka gidana” yaagis. Iyyasunne Alaazara Hayquwa
24.28: Yaatidi, Iyyasuy asaa ubbaa moyzis. Asa ubbay banta laata biitta simmidi bidosona.
24.29: Godaa aylley, Nawe na7aa Iyyasuy xeetanne tammu laythan hayqis.
24.30: Asay iya Ga7aasa zumaape pudeha baggan, derey dariya Efreeman de7iya iya laata biittan, Timnaat-Saaran iya moogidosona.
24.31: Iyyasuy paxa de7ida wode ubban Isra7eele asay Godaa goyinnidosona. Iyape guye, Xoossay Isra7eele asaas oothida ooso ubbaa banta ayfen be7ida cimata wode ubban Godaa goyinnidosona.
24.32: Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe eki keyida, Yoosefa meqethaa Seekeman moogidosona. He bessaa Yayqoobi Seekema aawa Hamoora naytape issi xeetu bira santimen shammis. He biitta guyepe Yoosefa kochay laattidosona.
24.33: Aarona na7ay Alaazari hayqidi, iya na7aa Pinihaasas imetida derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya Gib7an moogetis.

1.1: Iyyasuy hayqidaape guye Isra7eele asay, “Kanaane biitta olanaw nu kochatape koyrottidi keyanay oonee?” yaagidi Godaa oychidosona.
1.2: Goday, “Yihuda kochay koyrottidi keyo. Taani biitta iya kushen aathada immas” yaagis.
1.3: Yihuda asay banta ishata, Simoona kochata, “Nuuni Kanaaneta olana mela nuna gishon gakida biitta nuura yedhite. Nuka hintena gishon gakida biitta hintera baana” yaagis. Simoona kochay Yihuda kochaara issife olanaw bis.
1.4: Goday Kanaanetanne Parzeta enta kushen aathidi immin, Beezeqa kataman tammu mukulu asaa wodhidosona.
1.5: Beezeqa kataman kawa Adooni-Beezeqa demmidi, iyara oletidi Kanaanetanne Parzeta xoonidosona.
1.6: Adooni-Beezeqi baqatiya wode enti yedethi oykidi, iya kushiyanne iya tohuwa wogga biradheta qanxidosona.
1.7: Adooni-Beezeqi, “Kushenne toho wogga biradheta taani qanxida laapun tammu kawoti ta gaytape wodhida tiifiya maxidi moosona. Taani enta bolla oothidaysada Xoossay ta bolla oothis” yaagis. Iya Yerusalaame ehin yan hayqis.
1.8: Yihuda asay Yerusalaame oli oykidi asaa mashshan wodhidi, katamaa taman xuuggidosona.
1.9: Hessafe guye, Yihuda asay derey dariya biittan, Negeba mela biittaninne gadhan de7iya Kanaaneta olanaw bidosona.
1.10: Kase Qiriyaat-Arba geetetiya Kebroona kataman de7iya Kanaaneta olidi Sesaya, Akmaananne Talmaya geetetiya kochata xoonidosona.
1.11: Yaape dendidi Yihuda asay Debira kataman de7iya asaa olanaw bidosona. Debira katamay kase Qiriyat-Sefera geetetees.
1.12: Kaalebi, “Qiriyat-Sefera olidi oykiya uraas taani ta na7iw Akiso immana” yaagis.
1.13: Kaaleba kaalo isha Qanaza na7ay Gotoniyali he katamaa olidi oykin, Kaalebi ba na7iw Akiso iyaw immis.
1.14: Aksa Gotoniyala geliya wode, I aaway iw gade immanaada woossana mela Gotoniyali iyo zoris. Iya baqulo bollafe wodhishin Kaalebi ta naatte, “Ay koyay?” yaagidi oychis.
1.15: Iya, “Taw woyto imma. Neeni kase taw immida biittay qaa7e gidida gisho haatha pultota taw immarki” yaagasu. Kaalebi qommo pultuwanne garsa pultuwa iw immis.
1.16: Musey bolluwa Qenaati kochati Yihuda asaara Zamba Katama geetetiya Iyaarko katamaape dendidi Arada katamaape dugeha baggara, Negeban de7iya Yihuda mela biitta bidi yan de7iya asaa giddon uttidosona.
1.17: Yihuda asay Simoona asaara issife bidi, Xafaata kataman de7iya Kanaaneta xoonidi katamaa kumethi dhaysidi, he katamaa Horma gidi sunthidosona.
1.18: Yihuda asay gujidi Gaaza, Asqaloona, Eqroonanne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutata oykidosona.
1.19: Goday Yihuda asaara de7iya gisho, derey dariya biitta laattidosona. Shin demba biittan de7iya asatas biratape oosetida ola para gaareti de7iya gisho, Yihuda asay enta gooddidi kessanaw danda7ibookona.
1.20: Musey kiittidaysada, Kebroona katamaa Kaalebas immin Kaalebi Anaaqe koche gidida heedzu kochata gooddidi kessis.
1.21: Shin Biniyaame kochati Yerusalaamen de7iya Yaabuseta gooddidi kessibookona. He wodepe doomin Yaabuseti Biniyaame kochatara issife Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
1.22: Qassi Yoosefa kochati Beetele katamaa olidosona; Xoossay entara de7ees.
1.23: Yoosefa kochati kase Looza geetetiya Beetele katamaa wochiya asata kiittidosona.
1.24: Enti katamaape keyiya issi addiya demmidi, “Katamaa giddo waanidi gelanaw danda7etiyako nuna bessa; nuuni new keehana” yaagidosona.
1.25: I enta bessin kataman de7iya asaa mashshan buthidosona; shin he addiyanne iya soo asa ubbaa ashshidosona.
1.26: Guype he addey Hiteta biitta bidi, yan katamaa keexidi Looza gidi sunthis. Hachi gakanaw he katamay he sunthan xeegetees.
1.27: Minaase kochati Beet-Saana, Tanaka, Doora, Yiblaama Magidonne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutatan de7iya asata gooddidi kessibookona. Yaatin, Kanaaneti yan duussu oykidosona.
1.28: Isra7eele asay minnida wode Kanaaneta bantaw wolqan oosisidosona; shin enta kumethi biittafe kessidi goodibookona.
1.29: Efreema kochatika Gezera kataman de7iya Kanaaneta gooddidi kessibookona; yaatin, Kanaaneti yan entara de7idosona.
1.30: Zabloona kochati Qitiroonaninne Nahilaalan de7iya asata gooddidi kessibookona; yaatin, Kanaaneti yan entara issife de7idosona. Shin Zabloona kochati enta bantaw wolqan oosisidasona.
1.31: Aseera kochati Akon, Sidoonan, Ahilaaban, Akziiban, Helban, Afeeqaninne Rehooban de7iya asata gooddi kessibookona.
1.32: Kanaaneti keyonna attida gisho Aseera kochati entara yan issife de7idosona.
1.33: Niftaaleme kochati Beet-Sameesaninne Beet-Anaatan de7iya asata gooddi kessibookona; shin Kanaanetara yan issife de7idosona. Beet-Sameesanne Beet-Anata asata bantaw wolqan oosisidosona.
1.34: Amooreti Daane kochata derey dariya biitta yedethidosona; enti demba biitta wodhonna mela teqidosona.
1.35: Amooreti Hereesa deriyan, Eloonaninne Sha7albiman duussu oykidosona; shin Yoosefa kochati minni minni bidi bantaw wolqan oosisidosona.
1.36: Amooreta biitta zaway Sela7a matan de7iya Akraabima pudetha keyees.

2.1: Godaa kiitanchoy Galgalape Bookima bidi, Isra7eele asaako haysada yaagis; “Taani hintena Gibxefe kessada beni hinte mayzatas immana gada caaqida biitta hintena gelsada, ‘Taani hintera caaqida caaquwa menthike;
2.2: hinte ha biittan de7iya asatara caaqofite; enta yarsho bessa laallite’ yaagas. Shin hinte taw kiitetibeketa; ayis hessa hanidetii?
2.3: Hessa gisho, taani enta hinte sinthafe gooddike; enti hintew morke gidana; enta xoossati hintew xihe gidana” yaagis.
2.4: Godaa kiitanchoy Isra7eele asaas hessa odida wode asay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona.
2.5: Yaatidi he bessaa Bookima yaagidi sunthidi yan Godaas yarshidosona. Kiitetetha Ixoy Ehiya Meto
2.6: Iyyasuy Isra7eele asaa yeddidaape guye, asay issoy issoy bana gakida laata biitta ekanaw bis.
2.7: Iyyasuy paxa de7iya laythaninne Goday Isra7eele asaas oothida gita ooso ubbaa be7ida cimati de7iya wode asay Godaas kiitetidosona.
2.8: Godaa aylley, Nawe na7ay Iyyasuy laythay xeetanne tamma gidin hayqis.
2.9: Enti iya Ga7aasa zumaape pudeha baggan, Efreema gezze biittan, Timnaat-Saraha geetetiya bessan iya laata biittan moogidosona.
2.10: He yeletetha ubbay hayqidi banta mayzatan gahetidosona. Hessafe guye Godaa woyko Goday Isra7eele asaas oothidaba eronna hara yeletethi dendis.
2.11: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asay Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothidosona; Ba7aale eeqa misileta goyinnidosona.
2.12: Gibxe biittafe enta kessida Godaa, banta mayzata Xoossaa aggidosona. Enta yuushuwan de7iya asaa eeqatako simmidi, entaw goyinnidosona; hessan Godaa hanqethidosona.
2.13: Qassi Godaa aggidi, Ba7aalenne Astaroote eeqa goyinnidosona.
2.14: Yaatin, Godaa hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexis; bonqeysati enta bonqana mela oothis. Enta yuushuwan de7iya morketas aathidi immis. Yaatin, enti banta morketara eqetanaw danda7ibookona.
2.15: Enti oletanaw keyiya wode ubban, Goday kase entaw odidaysadanne caaqidaysada enti xoonetana mela I enta bolla dendis. Yaatin, enti daro un7etidosona.
2.16: Yaatin, Goday ayseysata entaw denthin, enti Isra7eele asaa bonqeyisata kushepe ashshidosona.
2.17: Gidoshin Isra7eele asay haareysatas kiitetibookona; Godaas ammanetona ixidi hara xoossata goyinnidosona. Enta aawati Godaas kiitetidi hemetida ogiya aggidi hara soo simmidosona.
2.18: Goday entaw ayseysata denthida wode ubban I ayseysatara issife gididi he ayseysi paxa de7iya laytha ubban enta morketa kushepe ashshis. Enti un7aninne meton gididi Godaako waassiya wode ubban Goday entaw qadhetees.
2.19: Shin ayseysi hayqidaape guye, asay guye simmidi, kase enta aawati oothida iitaape aadhida iita oothidosona. Enti hara xoossatako simmidi, entaw goyinnidosona. Banta iita oosuwanne geella ogiya aggonna ixidosona.
2.20: Goday Isra7eele asaa bolla yilo eexidi, “Ha asay taani enta mayzatas caaqida caaquwa menthida gishonne taw kiitetonna ixida gisho,
2.21: Iyyasuy hayqiya wode biitta bolla attida kawotethatape issuwaka taani enta sinthafe gooddada kessike.
2.22: Isra7eele asay kase banta mayzatada ta ogiya kaalliyakonne kaallonnaako paacanaw taani ha attida kawotethata go7etana” yaagis.
2.23: Hessa gisho, Goday he kawotethati biittafe goodetonna gam7ana mela oothis. I enta ellesidi gooddi kessibeenna; enta Iyyasus aathidi immibeenna.

3.1: Kanaanen ola meezetiboonna Isra7eele asaa paacanaw Goday Kanaanen ashshida asay haysata.
3.2: I hessa oothiday haysafe kase ola meezetiboonna Isra7eele yeletethaa ola hiilla tamaarsanaasa.
3.3: Hessatika ichashu Filisxeeme halaqata, Kanaaneta, Sidoonatanne Ba7aal-Armoona zumaape doomidi Hamaata gakanaw Libaanose zumaa bolla de7iya Hiweta.
3.4: Goday Muse baggara kase Isra7eele mayzatas immida kiita enti kiitetiyakonne kiitetonaako paacanaw enta kessonna aggis.
3.5: Yaatin, Isra7eele asay Kanaanetara, Hitetara, Amooretara, Parzetara, Hiwetaranne Yaabusetara issife de7idosona.
3.6: Enta macca nayta bantaw ekidosona; banta macca nayta enta adde naytas immidosona. Yaatidi enta xoossata goyinnidosona. Gotoniyala
3.7: Isra7eele asay Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothidosona. Enti Godaa banta Xoossaa dogidi, Ba7aalenne Asheera geetetiya xoossata goyinnidosona.
3.8: Hessa gisho, Godaa hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexis. Goday Masephexoome kawa Kushan-Rishataymi enta haarana mela aathidi immin, enti iyaw hospun laythi haaretidosona.
3.9: Shin Isra7eele asay Godaako waassida wode enta ashshiya, Kaaleba kaalo ishaa Qanaze na7aa Gotoniyala denthis.
3.10: Godaa Ayyaanay iya bolla wodhin, I Isra7eele bolla pirdeysa gidis. I olas keyida wode Goday Masephexoome kawa Kushan-Rishatayma iyaw aathidi immin xoonis.
3.11: Yaatin, biittay oytamu laythi wopu gidi de7is. Hessafe guye, Qanaze na7ay Gotoniyali hayqis. Naa7oda
3.12: Isra7eele asay zaaridi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothidosona. Hessa gisho, Goday Moo7abe kawoy Eglooni Isra7eele bolla wolqatanaada oothis.
3.13: Eglooni Amoonetanne Amaaleqata shiishidi Isra7eele asa oli xoonidi, Zamba katamaa Iyaarko oykis.
3.14: Yaatin, Isra7eele asay Moo7abe kawa Egloonas tammanne hospun laythi haaretidosona.
3.15: Shin Isra7eele asay Godaako waassida wode enta ashshiya, Biniyaame koche gidida Geera na7aa Naa7oda, haddirsa kushen ootheysa denthis. Isra7eele asay Naa7oda Moo7abe kawa Egloonako giirara kiittis.
3.16: Naa7odi nam7u baggara qaratida issi wadha mashshe giigisidi ushacha baggan ba ma7uwa garsan dancis.
3.17: Hessafe guye, daro orde gidida Moo7abe kawa Egloonas giira efidi immis.
3.18: Naa7odi giira kawas immidaape guye, giira tookidi bida asaa moyzis.
3.19: Shin Naa7odi Galgala matan de7iya masetida shuchata matape Egloonako guye simmi bidi, “Kawaw, ta new odiya issi xuuri de7ees” yaagis. Kawoy, “Si77i ga” yaagis. Iya naageysati ubbay kare keyidosona.
3.20: He wode kawoy pooqiya bolla issi kifiliyan barka uttidashin, Naa7odi iyako shiiqidi, “Xoossay new kiittidabay de7ees” yaagin, kawoy ba uttida bessaafe dendi eqis.
3.21: Naa7odi ba haddirsa kushiya yeddidi, ushacha bagga xeessan de7iya mashsha shoddidi, kawa uluwan dirgim oothis.
3.22: Mashshaa tuytey attonna ulo giddo gelidi, zokuwara kanthi keyis. Modhoy kammida gisho Naa7odi mashsha kawa uluwape shoddiboonna.
3.23: Hessafe guye, Naa7odi kare keyidi, kifiliya pengiya gordidi iya bolla qulpis.
3.24: Naa7odi bidaape guye aylleti yidi, pengey gordetidaysa be7idi, “Kawoy giddo kifiliyan sheeshas uttonna aggenna” yaagidi qopidosona.
3.25: Enti saletana gakanaw naagidosona. Shin kawoy pengiya dooyonna ixin, qulpe ekidi pengiya dooyidi, banta goday hayqidi, wuygen kundidaysa be7idosona.
3.26: Enti yan eqidi naagishin, Naa7odi kessi ekidi eeqa shuchata matara aadhidi Sa7iira baqatis.
3.27: I bidi derey dariya Efreema biitta gakida wode Isra7eele asay olas shiiqana mela moyze punnin, asay iya kaallidi duge wodhidosona.
3.28: I entako, “Tana kaallite; Goday hinte morketa, Moo7abeta hinte kushen aathidi immis” yaagis. Enti iya kaalli wodhidi, Yordaanose shaafa pinniya bessaa oykidosona. Moo7abe asape issi asika yaara aadhona mela teqidosona.
3.29: He wode Moo7abe asaape tammu mukulu gidiya dooretida mino olanchota wodhidosona; issi asika kessi ekibeenna.
3.30: He gallas Isra7eele asay Moo7abe asaa xoonidosona. Biittay hospun tammu laythi wopu gidi de7is. Samgaara
3.31: Na7odaape guye, Anaata na7ay Samgaari dendidi, Filisxeeme asaape usupun xeetu asaa booru laagiya birata xam7an wodhidi Isra7eele asaa ashshis.

4.1: Naa7odi hayqidaape guye Isra7eele asay Godaa sinthan zaaridi iitabaa oothidosona.
4.2: Hessa gisho, Goday Haxoora kataman de7iya Kanaane kawa Iyaabisas enta aathidi immis. Iya tora moconay Haroseeti Hagoyma kataman de7iya Sisaara.
4.3: Iyaabisas uddufun xeetu birata para gaareti de7iya gishonne I Isra7eele asaa qadhey bayna laatamu laythi un7ethida gisho enti maado demmanaw Godaako waassidosona.
4.4: He wode Lafidoota machiya, nabiya Diboora Isra7eele asaa kaalethawus.
4.5: Diboora derey dariya Efreema biittan, Ramapenne Beetelepe giddon de7iya Diboora zamba garsan uttada pirdawusu. Isra7eele asay pirda demmanaw iiko yoosona.
4.6: Issi gallas Diboora Abinooma na7aa Baaraqa Niftaaleme biittan de7iya Qaadesape xeegisada, “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay nena haysada yaagidi kiittis; ‘Niftaalemenne Zabloona zariyape tammu mukulu asaa ekada Taabore zumaa bolla keya.
4.7: Taani Yabina tora moconata Sisaari para gaaretanne olanchota ekidi, Qisoona shaafan nena olanaw yaana mela oothana. Yan taani new iya aathada immana’ yaagees” yaagasu.
4.8: Baaraqi, “Neeni taara biiko taani baana; shin neeni taara boonna ixiko taani biike” yaagis.
4.9: Iya zaarada, “Ero, taani neera baana; shin Goday Sisaara maccasa kushen aathidi immana gisho ta buussay new boncho gidenna” yaagasu. Hessa gisho Diboora dendada, Baaraqara Qaadesa basu.
4.10: Baaraqi Niftaalemenne Zabloona kochata Qaadesa xeegin, tammu mukulu asi iya kaallidi keyis; Dibooraka iyara basu.
4.11: He wode Qeena asi gidida Hebeeri, Muse bolloy, Hobaaba yaray hara Qeenatape shaaketidi Qaadesa matan Zenaanimen de7iya wolaa matan ba dunkaaniya tokis.
4.12: Abinooma na7ay Baaraqi Taabore zuma bidaysa Sisaari si7ida wode,
4.13: uddufun xeetu birata para gaaretanne baara de7iya asa ubbaa xeegisidi, Haroseet-Hagoymape Qisoona shaafa shiishis.
4.14: Yaatin Diboori Baaraqako, “Hachi Goday Sisaara ne kushen aathidi immiya gallas gidiya gisho denda. Heko, Goday new sinthe aadhis” yaagasu. Baaraqi tammu mukulu olanchota kaalethidi, Taabore zumaape wodhis.
4.15: Goday Sisaara, iya para gaaretanne iya olanchota ubbaa Baaraqa mashshas aathidi immis. Yaatin, Sisaari ba para gaariyape wodhidi tohon baqatis.
4.16: Baaraqi para gaaretanne olanchota Haroseet-Hagoyma gakanaw yedethis. Sisaara olanchoti ubbay mashshan hayqidosona; issi asika attibeenna.
4.17: He wode Haxoora kawoy Yaabini Hebeera keethaa asaara saro de7ees. Hessa gisho, Sisaari tohon baqatidi, Qeena asi gidida Hebeera mache Ya7eeli dunkaaniya gakis.
4.18: Ya7eela Sisaara mokanaw keyada, “Ta godaw, gela; haa gela; yayyofa” yaagasu. I dunkaaniya giddo iiko gelin iya afilara kammas.
4.19: Sisaari, “Tana saamees; haathe tana ushsharki” yaagis. Iya maatha ogoro dooyada ushshasu; yaatada zaarada kammasu.
4.20: Hessafe guye i, “Dunkaaniya pengen eqa. Ay asika yidi, ‘Haysan asi de7ii?’ yaagidi oychiko, ‘Baawa’ yaaga” yaagis.
4.21: Sisaari daro daaburida gisho dhisko hayqi aggis. Hebeera machiya Ya7eela naariqanne dunkaane dhishe ekada, loddara iyako shiiqada dhishiya haytha karen dhishada, sa7ara oythin Sisaari hayqis.
4.22: Baaraqi Sisaara koyishe yin, Ya7eela iya mokanaw kare keyada, “Haaya; ne koyiya addiya taani nena bessaana” yaagasu. Hessa gisho, iira dunkaaniya giddo gelidi, Sisaara haytha karen dhishey gelin iya ahay sa7an zin7idaysa be7is.
4.23: He gallas Xoossay Isra7eele asay Kanaane kawa Yabina xoonana mela oothis.
4.24: Yabina kawa dhaysana gakanaw Isra7eele asay iya bolla minni minni bis.

5.1: He gallas Dibooranne Abinooma na7ay Baaraqi ha mazmuriya yexidosona.
5.2: Halaqati Isra7eele asaa kaalethida gisho, asayka bana aathidi immida gisho, Godaa galatite.
5.3: Hinteno kawoto, si7ite; Hinteno haareysato, hayzite; Taani Godaas yexana. Isra7eele Xoossaa galatana.
5.4: Abeeti Godaw, neeni Sayre zumaape dendiya wode, Edoome biittafe ne keyiya wode, biitti qaaxis; Salope iri bukis; haathi shaarape goggis.
5.5: Siina Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaa sinthan, dereti qaaxidosona;
5.6: Anaata na7aa Samgaara wodenne Ya7eela wode ogey dogetis; zal7anchoti yuusho ogera boosona.
5.7: Diboori Isra7eele asaas, aayo gidada dendana gakanaw, Isra7eele gutati baysatidosona;
5.8: Isra7eele asay allaga xoossata doorida wode, biitta bolla oli dendis. Oytamu mukulu Isra7eele olanchota giddon, issi gondalley woyko issi toori bentibeenna.
5.9: Ta wozanay Isra7eele toora moconatara, Asaa giddofe dosan bantana aathidi, immidaysatara de7ees. Godaa galatite;
5.10: Hinteno, bootha hareta toggeysato, lo77o gilaasiya bolla uttidi dincaketeysato, oge gaxara hemeteysato haysa si7ite.
5.11: Haatha ollata matan, shiiqida asaa yetha si7ite. Enti Godaa xoonuwa yexoosona; Isra7eele asaa xoonuwa odoosona. Hessafe guye, Godaa asay katamaa pengetako wodhidosona.
5.12: Diboora, Denda! Denda! Denda! Dendada mazmure yexa. Abinooma na7aw, Baaraqa, denda! ne di77idabaa ekada ya.
5.13: Hessafe guye, attida asati, halaqatako wodhidosona. Godaa asati oletanaw giigidi Baaraqako yidosona.
5.14: Amaaleqa kochati beni de7ida bessan de7iya Efreema asati yidosona. Biniyaame asati enta kaallidosona. Makirape halaqati, Zabloonape kawotetha xam7a oykeysati yidosona.
5.15: Yisakoora halaqati Diboorara de7oosona; ee, Yisakoore asay Baaraqara yidosona; enti iya kaallidi, zangaara gelidosona. Shin Robeela kochati qofan shaaketidi, banta wozanan heettidosona.
5.16: Enti ayis attidonaa? Dorsata heemmanaseyee? Robeela kochati qofan shaaketidi, banta wozanan heettidosona.
5.17: Gaade kochati Yordaanose pinthan attis, Daana kochati markabetan attidosona. Aseera kochati banta de7iyason, Abbaa gaxan attidosona.
5.18: Zabloona kochati, bantana hayqos aathidi immidosona. Niftaaleme kochati, toora denban bantana aathidi immidosona.
5.19: Magido pultota matan Tanakan, kawoti oletidosona. Kanaane kawoti yan oletidi, bira woyko haraba di77ibookona.
5.20: Salope xoolintoti oletidosona; banta yuushan Sisaara olidosona.
5.21: Qisoona shaafay enta efis; benipe de7iya Qisooni enta shokis. Ta shempe, minna; sinthe hordofa.
5.22: Parati adarsishe yidosona, banta tohuwan biitta giirsoosona.
5.23: Godaa kiitanchoy haysada yaagis; “Merooza baaddite! Yan de7iya asaa iissidi baaddite! Enti Godaa maaddanaw yibookona; iya wolqaama morketa olanaw keybookona.”
5.24: Qeena asi gidida Hebeera machiya, Ya7eeli maccasa ubbaafe anjetidaaro gido. Dunkaanen de7iya maccasa ubbaafe, iya anjetidaaro gido.
5.25: Sisaari iyo haathe oychin maathi immasu; lo77o ogoron meqida maathi ehasu.
5.26: Ba haddirsa kushen dunkaane dhishe, ba ushacha kushen oosanchota naariqa oykasu. Sisaara huuphen dhishasu; iya haytha karera kantha kessasu.
5.27: I tohuwa garsan kundis; I tohuwa matan zohetis. I tohuwa garsan kundis; he kundida bessan hayqis.
5.28: Sisaara aayiya maskootera kare xeellasu; “Ta na7aa para gaarey ayis gam7idee? Parati ayis ellesidi simmibokona?” yaagada bana oychasu.
5.29: I cinca maccasati I oysha zaaridosona; shin iya ba qofan zaara zaarada yaagasu.
5.30: “Enti di77o demmidi shaaketonna aggokona; Issi issi addes issi geela7oy woyko nam7u geela7oti gakonna aggenna. Enti Sisaaras lo77iya ma7o immana; tawka qoodhen ma7iya, alleeqetida ma7o ehana” yaagasu.
5.31: Abeeti Godaw, ne morketi ubbay haysada hayqo; shin nena doseysati wonta xalqeda phoolo. Hessafe guye, biittay oytamu laythi wopu gidi de7is.

6.1: Isra7eele asay Godaa sinthan zaaridi iitabaa oothidosona. Hessa gisho, Goday enta Midiyaame asaas aathidi immin laapun laythi enta haaridosona.
6.2: Midiyaame asay Isra7eele asaa un7ethin, entafe attanaw dere bolla, gongoloninne hom7on banta katha qosidosona.
6.3: Isra7eele asay kathi zeriya wode ubban, Midiyaame asay Amaaleqa asaaranne doloha bagga asaara yidi enta oloosona.
6.4: Enti he biittan dunkaanidi, Gaaza gakanaw, biitta bolla dolidaba ubbaa dhaysoosona. Dorse, mehenne hare laaggidi efiya gisho, Isra7eele asaas aybaka ashshokona.
6.5: Banta mehiyanne banta dunkaaniya ekidi, booley yada daridi yoosona. Entanne enta gimaleta taybanaw danda7etenna; enti yishe biitta dhaysoosona.
6.6: Isra7eele asay Midiyaameta gaason daro metootidosona; maade demmanaw Godaako waassidosona.
6.7: Midiyaameta gaason Isra7eele asay Godaako waassida wode,
6.8: Goday entaw issi nabe Kiittin, nabey entako, “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; Gibxefe, aylletetha biittafe ta hintena kessas.
6.9: Taani hintena Gibxe asaa kushepenne un7ethiya asa ubbaa kushepe ashshas. Hinte sinthafe un7ethiya asaa gooddada enta biitta hintew immas.
6.10: Taani hintena, ‘Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa; hinte enta biitta laattida Amooreta xoossata goyinnofite’ yaagas. Shin hinte ta qaala si7onna ixideta” yaagis.
6.11: Hessafe guye, Godaa kiitanchoy Ofira geetetiya bessan de7iya Abezeera addiya Iyo7aasa wolaa garsan uttis. He wode Iyo7aasa na7ay Gediyooni Midiyaame asaape qosetedi woyne gum7iya bessan giste bukees.
6.12: Yan Godaa kiitanchoy iyaw qoncidi, “La neno, mino olanchaw, Goday neera de7ees” yaagis.
6.13: Gediyooni, “Ta godaw, Goday nuura de7iyaba gidiko ha meto ubbay nuna ayis gakidee? Nu aawati, ‘Goday nuna Gibxe biittafe kessis’ yaagidi nuus odida malaalsiya iya oosoti ubbay awun de7ii? Shin ha77i Goday nuna kumethi aggis; Midiyaame asaas aathidi immis” yaagis.
6.14: Hessafe guye, Goday iyako simmidi, “New de7iya ha wolqan bada Isra7eele asaa Midiyaame kushepe ashsha. Nena kiittey tana” yaagis.
6.15: Gediyooni zaaridi, “Abeeti Godaw, taani Isra7eele asaa waatada asho? Ta yaray Minaase kocha ubbaafe aadhida laafa; taani ta aawa soo asa ubbaafe guutha” yaagis.
6.16: Goday, “Taani neera gidana; issi asi shociya mela neeni Midiyaame asaa shocada xoonana” yaagis.
6.17: Gediyooni, “Neeni tanan ufaytiyaba gidiko, tuma taara odetey neeni Godaa gidiko, nena erisiya malla tana bessa.
6.18: Taani guye simma bada ta yarshuwa ehana gakanaw hayyana haysafe boopa” yaagis. Goday, “Neeni simmana gakanaw taani haysan naagana” yaagis.
6.19: Gediyooni soo gelidi, urge deeshi shukidi kathis; tammu kilo giraame gidiya dhiille ekidi uythi uukis. Ashuwa gaytan wothidi, cambaa shaaten tigidi, wolaa garsan uttida Godaa kiitanchuwas shiishis.
6.20: Xoossaa kiitanchoy, “Ashuwanne uythaa ha shuchaa bolla wotha; cambaa iya bolla tiga” yaagis. Gediyooni kiitetidaysada oothis.
6.21: Godaa kiitanchoy ba kushen oykida xam7aa xeeran ashuwanne uythaa bochin tami shuchaa giddofe keyidi, ashuwanne uythaa mis. Hessafe guye, Godaa kiitanchoy iya sinthafe geemmis.
6.22: Gediyooni be7iday Godaa kiitanchuwa gideysa akeekida wode, “Godaa Xoossaw, tana ayye! taani Godaa kiitanchuwa ta ayfen be7as” yaagis.
6.23: Shin Goday, “Saroy new gido; Yayyofa! Ne hayqaka” yaagis.
6.24: Gediyooni Godaas yarsho bessi yan giigisidi, “Goday Saro Xoossi” yaagidi xeegis. He yarsho bessay Abi7ezeera kochaaba gidida Ofiran hachi gakanaw eqidi de7ees.
6.25: He qamma Goday Gediyoonako, “Ne aawa kormatape laapun laythi gidida lo77o korma eka. Ne aaway Ba7aale eeqas yarshiya bessaa laalla; iya matan de7iya Asheera eeqa misiliya mentheretha yegga.
6.26: Ha zumaa huuphen Godaas ne Xoossaas, shuchan yarsho bessi loythada giigisa. Hessafe guye, neeni mentherethida Asheera eeqa misiliya qeretha eethada, he kormaa xuussa yarsho oothada yarsha” yaagis.
6.27: Gediyooni ba oosanchotape tammata ekidi, Goday iyaw odidaysada oothis. Shin I ba aawa soo asaasinne kataman de7iya asaas yayyida gisho gallas oothanaysa aggidi qamma oothis.
6.28: Wonta guura katamaa asay dendiya wode Ba7aale eeqa yarsho bessay laaletin, iya matan de7iya Asheera misiley meqidi wodhidaysa be7idosona. Qassi he bessan yarsho bessi giigidaysanne iya bolla korma yarshidaysa be7idosona.
6.29: Enti issoy issuwa, “La haysa oothiday oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona. Enti hessa pilgidi be7ida wode hessa oothiday Iyo7aasa na7aa Gediyoona gideysa eridosona.
6.30: Hessafe guye, katamaa asay Iyo7aasako, “Ba7aale yarsho bessa laallida gishonne iya matan de7iya Asheera misiliya mentherethidi yeggida gisho ne na7aa haa kessa; nu iya wodhana” yaagidosona.
6.31: Shin Iyo7aasi ba bolla dendida asaako, “Hinte Ba7aales mootetetii? Woyko hinte iya ashshanaw koyeetii? Hinte giddofe iyaw mootetiya asi de7iko, sa7i wontanaw I hayqo. Ba7aaley xoosse gidiko ba yarsho bessa laallidaysara I baw mooteto” yaagis.
6.32: He gallas Iyo7aasi, “Laaletiday iya yarsho bessa gidiya gisho iyara Ba7aaley mooteto” yaagidi Gediyoona Yeruba7aala gidi sunthis.
6.33: Hessafe guye, Midiyaame, Amaaleqanne doloha bagga biitta asay issife shiiqidi, Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi Izra7eela zangaaran dunkaanidosona.
6.34: Godaa Ayyaanay Gediyoona bolla wodhin Abi7ezera kochi gidida asa ubbay bana kaallana mela enta xeeganaw moyze punnis.
6.35: Minaase kocha ubbaas kiita yeddidi, bana kaallana mela enta xeegisis. Qassi Aseera, Zabloonanne Niftaaleme kochatas kiita yeddin, enti iyara olas baanaw keyidosona.
6.36: Gediyooni Xoossaako, “Ne taw qaala gelidaysada Isra7eele asaa ashshanaw tana dooridaba gidiko,
6.37: Heko, taani giste bukiya wudumman paadetida dorse ikise wothana. Hara biitta ubbay mela gididi he ikisiya bolla xalaala aki wodhiko ne odidaysada Isra7eele asaa ta kushen ashshanaysa ta erana” yaagis.
6.38: I gidaysada hanis. Wontetha gallas wonta guura dendidi, dorsa ikisiya gum7ida wode issi xaaro gidiya haathi iyape keyis.
6.39: Qassi Gediyooni, “Hayyana hanqetofa; taani nena gujadaka hara oysho oychana. Dorsa ikisiya bolla hara malla bessaana mela oychayis. Ha77i dorsa ikisey mela gidin yuushuwan de7iya biittay akatidi laakanada ootha” yaagis.
6.40: He qamma Xoossay he malla oothis. Wontetha gallas dorsa ikisey mela gidin biitta ubbay akatidi laakis.

7.1: Wontetha gallas Yeruba7aala geetetiya Gediyooninne iyara de7iya asa ubbay wonta guura dendidi bidi, Harooda pultuwa matan dunkaanidosona. Midiyaame asay entafe pudeha baggara More zumaa matan de7iya zangaaran dunkaanidosona.
7.2: Goday Gediyoonako, “Neera de7iya asay daro gidiya gishonne Isra7eele asay, ‘Nuuni nu wolqan xoonida’ gidi ta bolla ceeqetonna mela taani Midiyaameta hinte kushen aathada immike.
7.3: Hessa gisho, asaako, ‘Yayyiya asi de7iko Galada zumaape simmidi guye ba soo soo boo’ yaagada awaaja” yaagis. Yaatin, laatamanne nam7u mukulu asay guye simmin tammu mukulu asi attis.
