7.4: Gidoshin, Goday Gediyoonako, “Ha77ika asay daro. Ne enta ekada duge shaafa wodha; taani enta yan paacana. Taani, ‘Haysi neera boo’ geysi neera boo; taani, ‘Haysi neera boopo’ geysi boopo” yaagis.
7.5: Gediyooni asaa shaafu ekidi bis. Goday iyako, “Ha asaa giddofe gulbatidi haathe uyeysatanne kanada haathe inxarsan uyeyisata shaaka” yaagis.
7.6: Banta kushen haathe uyeyisata tayboy heedzu xeeta; shin attidaysati ubbay haathe gulbatidi uyidosona.
7.7: Goday Gediyoonako, “Banta kushen haathe kophetidi uyida heedzu xeetu asatan taani hintena ashshana; Midiyaameta hintew aathada immana. Shin attida asa ubbay ba soo soo simmo” yaagis.
7.8: Hessa gisho, Gediyooni asata shinqiyanne enta moyziya ekida heedzu xeetu asata baara ashshidi, hanko asa ubbaa enta soo soo yeddis. Ha ubbay haniya wode Midiyaame olanchoti entafe garsa baggara de7iya zangaaran dunkaanidi uttidosona.
7.9: He qamma Goday Gediyoonako, “Taani new aathada immida gisho dendada enti dunkaanida bessan de7ishin ola.
7.10: Neeni enta olanaw yayyiko ne oosanchuwa Puura ekada enti dunkaanida bessaa duge wodha.
7.11: Enti giyaba si7a. Hessafe guye, neeni enta olanaw minotethi demmana” yaagis. Gediyooninne iya aylley Puuri, Midiyaameti dunkaanida bessaa matan naagiya olanchotako bidosona.
7.12: He wode booleda darida Midiyaameti, Amaaleqatinne doloha bagga asa ubbay zangaaran dunkaanidi uttidosona. Enta gimaleti abba gaxan de7iya shafe mela taybanaw danda7etenna.
7.13: Gediyooni yaa gakiya wode issi addey ba amuhuwa ba laggiyas odishin si7is. Hessika, “Issi banga uythi okoleti gakidi Midiyaameta dunkaaniya dom7is; dunkaaney shireti wodhidi micetis” yaagis.
7.14: Iya laggey zaaridi, “Hessi Isra7eele addiya, Iyo7aasa na7aa Gediyoona mashshafe attishin, haraba gidenna. Xoossay Midiyaamenne Midiyaametara de7iya olanchota ubbaa Gediyoonas aathidi immis” yaagis.
7.15: Gediyooni he amuhuwanne iya birshethaa si7ida wode gulbatidi Xoossaa goyinnis. Isra7eele asay dunkaanida bessaa guye simmidi, “Dendite; Goday Midiyaame olanchota hinte kushen aathidi immis” yaagis.
7.16: Heedzu xeetu asata heedzu cugan shaakidi entaw huuphen huuphen issi issi moyzenne giddon eexiya xompey de7iya issi issi xaaro immis.
7.17: Gediyooni entako, “Tana xeellite; taani enti dunkaanida bessaa gakiya wode ootheysada hinteka oothite.
7.18: Tanne taara de7eysati ubbay moyze punniy wode hinteka enti dunkaanida bessaa yuushuwan eqidi moyze punnishe, ‘Godaasanne Gediyoonasa’ yaagidi waassite” yaagis.
7.19: Giddi bilahe gidiya wode naageysati laametidaape guye Gediyooninne iyara de7iya xeetu asati bidi, Midiyaameti dunkaanida bessaa gakidi banta moyziya punnidosona; oykida xaaruwa menthidosona.
7.20: Hara baggara de7iya nam7u cugay hessada oothidosona. Banta haddirsa kushen eexiya xompe, banta ushacha kushen moyze oykidi, “Godaanne Gediyoona mashshaa” yaagidi waassidosona.
7.21: Asa ubbay Midiyaameti dunkaanida bessaa yuushon ba bessan bessan eqidashin, Midiyaame olanchoti ubbay waassishe baqatidosona.
7.22: Heedzu xeetu asay banta moyziya punnida wode morke olanchoti banta mashshaa issoy issuwa bolla denthana mela Goday oothis. Attida olanchoti Xararako simmidi Beet-Shixa gakanaw, yaape aadhidi, Xabaata matan de7iya Abeel-Mahoola gakanaw baqatidosona.
7.23: Hessafe guye, Niftaaleme, Aseeranne Minaase kochati xeegetidi, shiiqidi Midiyaameta yedethidosona.
7.24: Derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya asaako Gediyooni kiittidi, “Midiyaameta olanaw duge wodhidi Beet-Baara gakanaw de7iya Yordaanosen geliya shaafata entafe kasetidi oykite” yaagis. Efreema asa ubbay xeegetidi, shiiqidi Beet-Baara gakanaw Yordaanosen geliya shaafata oykidosona.
7.25: Enti Oreebanne Zeba geetetiya nam7u Midiyaame halaqata di77idosona. Oreeba, “Oreeba Zaalla” geetetiya bessan, qassi Zeba, “Zeba Woyne Gum77iya Bessi” geetetiya bessan wodhidosona. Hessafe guye, attida Midiyaameta yedethidi, Oreebanne Zeba qoodhiya qanxidi enta huuphiya, Yordaanose shaafape hefinthan de7iya Gediyoonako ehidosona.

8.1: Efreema asay Gediyoonako, “Midiyaameta olanaw bashe nuna ayis xeegabikii? Nu bolla hessa melaba ayis oothadii?” yaagidi yilotidosona.
8.2: Shin Gediyooni, “Hinte oothidaysi ta oothidaysafe aadhenee? Ta kochay Abi7ezeri shiishida kathaafe hinte Efreema kochati qorida budhey aadhenee?
8.3: Midiyaame halaqata, Oreebanne Zeba Xoossay hinte kushen aathidi immis. Hinte oothidaysa mela taani ay oothanaw danda7iyana?” yaagis. I yaagin enti zarbidosona.
8.4: Gediyooninne iyara de7iya heedzu xeetu asay Yordaanose shaafa pinnidosona. Enti ay daaburikoka banta morketa yedetho aggibokona.
8.5: Enti Sukota gakida wode Gediyooni he katamaa asaako, “Ta asay daaburida gisho, hayyana guutha kathi immerketi. Taani Midiyaame kawota Zebanne Salmoona yedethashe de7ayis” yaagis.
8.6: Sukota katamaa halaqati, “Zebanne Salmoona neeni di77abakashin ne olanchotas ayis kathi immanee?” yaagidosona.
8.7: Gediyooni, “Lo77o aykoy baawa; Goday Zebanne Salmoona ta kushen aathidi immiya wode taani bazzo agunthaninne xunduqen hintena wadhana” yaagis.
8.8: Yaape dendidi Panu7eela bidi, yan de7iya asaaka he oysha oychin, Panu7eela asay Sukota asay zaaridaysada zaaridosona.
8.9: I Panu7eela asaako, “Taani xoonada saro simmiya wode hinte katamaa naagiya ha adussa gimbiya laallana” yaagis.
8.10: He wode Zebinne Salmooni doloha baggafe yida olanchotape attida 15,000 olanchotara Qarqoran de7oosona. Entafe 120,000 olanchoti olan hayqidosona.
8.11: Gediyooni Noobapenne Yogibape doloha baggan de7iya bazzo ogiyara bidi, yan de7iya olanchoti qoponna de7ishin ola denthis.
8.12: Nam7u Midiyaame kawoti Zebinne Salmooni baqatidosona; shin Gediyooni enta yedethi gakidi di77is. Enta olanchoti ubbay wolqaama dagaman kundidosona.
8.13: Iyo7aasa na7ay Gediyooni Hereesa baggara olape simmis.
8.14: Sukotape issi na7atetha na7aa oykidi oychis. He na7ay laapun tammanne laapun Sukota halaqatanne cimata sunthaa xaafidi iyaw immis.
8.15: Hessafe guye, Gediyooni Sukota yidi, “ ‘Zebanne Salmoona neeni di77abakashin, daaburida ne asaas ayis kathi immanee?’ gidi ta bolla qelqisideta; shin Zebanne Salmoona haysa be7ite” yaagis.
8.16: Gediyooni bazzo agunthinne xunduqe ekidi Sukota halaqata wadhis.
8.17: Qassi Panu7eelan katamaa adussa gimbe shakuwa laallidi kataman de7iya addeta wodhis.
8.18: Yaatidi Gediyooni Zebanne Salmoona, “Hinte Taaboren ay mela asi wodhidetii?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Ne mela asi; enti kawo na7a daanosona” yaagidi zaaridosona.
8.19: Gediyooni, “Enti ta ishata; enti ta aaye nayta. De7o Xoossi eriya mela enta hinte wodhonnaba gidiyako ta hintena wodhikeshin” yaagis.
8.20: Ba bayra na7aa Yeterako, “Dendada, haysata wodha” yaagis. Yeteri buroo yooga gidiya gisho yayyidi ba mashshaa shoddibeenna.
8.21: Zebinne Salmooni Gediyoonako, “Hiza ne nuna wodha; adde ooso oothanaw adde koshshees” yaagidosona. Yaatin, Gediyooni enta wodhis; enta gimaleta qoodhen de7iya alleeqo ubbaa ekis.
8.22: Isra7eele asay Gediyoonako, “Neeni nuna Midiyaametape ashshida gisho neeni, ne na7aynne ne na7aa na7ay nuna haarite” yaagis.
8.23: Shin Gediyooni, “Taani hintena haarike; ta na7ayka hintena haarenna; Goday hintena haarana” yaagis.
8.24: I entako, “Ta hintena issiba oychayis; hinte ubbay di77idi ehida haytha worqiyafe taw immite” yaagis. (Isma7eela asaas haythan worqa aasoy woga.)
8.25: Isra7eele asay zaaridi, “Ero, ufaytidi immana” yaagidosona. Afila hiixidi, asa ubbay di77idi ehida haytha worqiya yeggidosona.
8.26: Gediyooni ekida haytha worqey laatamu kilo giraame deexees. Hessika, hara alleeqota, qoodhen aathiya gozddata, Midiyaame kawoti ma7iya ocha teera daaniya ma7otanne enta gimaleta qoodhiyape eketida alleeqota gujonnashina.
8.27: Gediyooni worqa eeqa misiliya giigisidi, ba de7iya Ofira kataman wothis. Isra7eele asa ubbay Godaa aggidi he eeqa misiliya goyinnidosona; hessi Gediyoonasinne iya soo asaas xihe gidis.
8.28: Hessada hanidi, Midiyaame asay Isra7eele asaas haaretis; enti Isra7eele asaa bolla nam7antho dendibookona. Gediyooni hayqana gakanaw oytamu laythi biittay wopu gidi de7is. Gediyoona Hayquwa
8.29: Yeruba7aala geetetiya Gediyooni, Iyo7aasa na7ay ba soo simmidi de7is.
8.30: Gediyooni daro macho ekida gisho, iyaw laapun tammu adde nayti yeletidosona.
8.31: Seekeman de7iya laggethiya iyaw adde na7aa yelin, iya sunthaa Abimeleke yaagidi sunthis.
8.32: Iyo7aasa na7ay Gediyooni lo77o cimidi hayqis; ba aawa Iyo7aasa duufon moogetis. He duufoy Abezeera kochati de7iya Ofiran de7ees.
8.33: Gediyooni hayqidaape guye, Isra7eele asay Godaa aggidi Ba7aale xoossata goyinnidosona. Ba7aal-Biriita geetetiya eeqa bantaw xoosse oothidosona.
8.34: Isra7eele asay banta yuushuwan de7iya morketa ubbaafe enta ashshida Godaa banta Xoossaa hassaybookona.
8.35: Isra7eele asaas oothida lo77o oosuwa gisho Yeruba7aala geetetiya Gediyoona soo asaas lo77o kushe zaaribookona.

9.1: Gediyoona na7ay, Abimelekey Seekeman de7iya ba aaye dabbotako bidi, entanne ba aaye kochata haysada yaagis;
9.2: “Seekeman de7iya asaa, ‘Gediyoona laapun tammu nayti ubbay hintena haariko lo77oyee? Woyko issi asi haariko lo77o?’ yaagidi oychite. Taani hinte ashonne hinte meqethi gideysa dogopite” yaagis.
9.3: Iya aaye dabboti ha qaala ubbaa iya gisho Seekema asaas odin, Abimelekey entaw dabbo gidida gisho Seekema asay iya kaallanaw dosidosona.
9.4: Enti Ba7aal-Biriita eeqa keethaafe laapun tammu bira santime ekidi iyaw immidosona. Abimelekey he biran iita asatanne bonqeyisata shammidi bana kaallanaada oothis.
9.5: Ofran de7iya ba aawa soo bidi, laapun tammu ba ishata Gediyoona nayta, issi shucha bolla goyris. Shin Gediyoona na7ay, teshoy, Iyo7atami qosetidi hayqonna attis.
9.6: Hessafe guye, Seekema asaynne Beet-Milo asay issife shiiqidi, Seekeman eeqa tuussa matan de7iya goyinno wolaako bidi yan Abimeleke kawothidosona.
9.7: Iyo7atami hessa si7ida wode Garzaana deriya bolla keyidi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Hinteno Seekema asaw, Xoossay hintena si7ana mela ta odeysa si7ite.
9.8: Issi gallas mithati ubbay shiiqidi, banta bolla kawo kawothanaw bidi shamaho, ‘Haaya, nu bolla kawota’ yaagidosona.
9.9: Shin shamahoy, ‘xoossatanne asata bonchisiya zayte immeysa aggada mithata bolla kawoto?’ yaagidi zaaris.
9.10: “Yaatin, mithati balase mithaa, ‘Haaya, nu bolla kawota’ yaagidosona.
9.11: Shin balasey, ‘Mal7onne lo77o gidida ayfe immeysa aggada mithata bolla kawotanaw boo?’ yaagidi zaaris.
9.12: “Yaatin, mithati woyneko, ‘Haaya, nu bolla kawota’ yaagidosona.
9.13: Shin woyney, ‘Xoossatanne asata ufaysiya ushsha immeysa aggada mithata bolla kawotanaw boo?’ yaagidi zaaris.
9.14: “Yaatin, wursethan mithati ubbay xunduqeko, ‘Haaya, nu bolla kawota’ yaagidosona.
9.15: Xunduqey, ‘Hinte tuma tana hinte bolla kawothanaw koyiko, haa yidi ta kuyan shempite. Hessa hinte ixiko, xunduqe tashiyape tami keyidi Libaanose zigaa mo’ yaagis.
9.16: “Hinte Abimeleke kawothiday tumatethaninne suuretethanee? Gediyooni hintew oothidaba akeekidi iya soo asaas lo77o kushe zaaridetii?
9.17: Ta aaway hintew oletidaysa akeekite; Midiyaame asaape hintena ashshana yaagidi, bana hayqos aathidi immis.
9.18: Shin hinte hachi ta aawa soo asaa bolla dendidi, iya laapun tammu nayta issi shucha bolla goyrideta. Gediyoona ayllefe yeletida Abimelekey hintew dabbo gidida gisho Seekeman kawothideta.
9.19: Ha77i simmidi Gediyoonasinne iya soo asaas hinte oothida oosoy tumatethaninne suuretethan gidiko Abimelekera ufaytite; ika hintera ufayto.
9.20: Shin hessi hanonna ixiko Abimelekepe tami keyidi Seekemanne Beet-Milo asaa mo. Qassi Seekema asaapenne Beet-Milo asaape tami keyidi Abimeleke mo” yaagis.
9.21: Iyo7atami ba ishaa Abimelekes yayyida gisho baqatidi Beera bidi yan de7is.
9.22: Abimelekey Isra7eele biittan heedzu laythi kawotis.
9.23: Hessafe guye, Xoossay Abimeleke giddoninne Seekema asaa giddon iita ayyaana kiittin Seekema asay Abimeleke bolla makallidosona.
9.24: Xoossay hessa oothiday, Abimelekey ba ishata wodhida gishonne enta wodhana mela Seekema asay iya minthethida gishosa.
9.25: Seekema asay guutha asi dooridi deriya huuphiyan uttidi Abimeleke bolla morketethan dendana mela oothidosona. Enti ogera aadhiya asa ubbaa bonqidosona; Abimelekey hessa si7is.
9.26: He wode Ebeeda na7ay Gaali ba ishatara Seekema yin, Seekema asay iyan ammanetidosona.
9.27: Ubbay banta gade bidi woyne maxidosona; woyniya aggidi gita gibira giigisidosona. Banta eeqa keethaa gelidi yan mishenne uyishe Abimeleke cayidosona.
9.28: Ebeeda na7ay Gaali, “Nuuni Seekema asay iyaw haaretanaw Abimelekey oonee? I Yeruba7aala na7aa gidennee? Zabuli ha katamaa haarana mela Abimelekey shuumidaysa gidennee? Hessafe Seekema sheeshi gidida Hamoore asaas haaretana.
9.29: Ha asaa kaalethey tana gidiyako Abimeleke digganashin. Abimeleke xeegada, ‘Ne olanchota darsa ekada oletanaw haaya’ yaaganashin” yaagis.
9.30: Ebeeda na7ay Gaali gidaysa katamaa haariya Zabuli si7ida wode daro yilotis.
9.31: Qosan Abimelekeko ase kiittidi, “Ebeeda na7ay Gaalinne iya ishati Seekema yidi yan de7iya asaa ne bolla denthethoosona.
9.32: Hessa gisho, neeninne neera de7iya asay qamma dendidi issi bessan zugidi naagite.
9.33: Wontetha gallas awi doliya wode enti qoponna katamaa olite. Gaalinne iyara de7iya asay hintena olanaw keyiya wode hinte koyida mela enta bolla oothite” yaagis.
9.34: Abimelekeynne iyara de7iya asa ubbay qamma dendidi Seekemape karera oyddu cugan shaaketidi zugidosona.
9.35: Abimelekeynne iyara de7iya asay Ebeeda na7ay Gaali keyidi katamaa pengiyan eqidaysa be7idi qosetida bessaafe keyidosona.
9.36: Gaali asaa be7ida wode Zabulako, “Heko, asay deriya huuphiyape wodhees” yaagis. Zabuli, “Haysi deriya eeshope attishin, ase gidenna” yaagidi zaaris.
9.37: Gaali zaaridi, “Heko, asay deriyas gidduwa oykidi wodhees; hara cugi qassi marota wolay de7iya ogiyara yees” yaagis.
9.38: Zabuli Gaalako, “ ‘Nuuni iyaw haaretanaw Abimelekey oonee?’ yaagida ne doonay ha77i aw bidee? Haysati neeni kadhida asaa gidokonaayee? Ha77i keyada entara oleta” yaagis.
9.39: Gaali Seekema asaa kaalethi keyidi Abimelekera oletis.
9.40: Abimelekey yedethin Gaali baqatis; katamaa pengiya gakanaw daroti deshetidi kundidosona.
9.41: Abimelekey Aruman de7in, Zabuli Gaalanne iya ishata Seekemape yedethidi kessis.
9.42: Wontetha gallas Seekema asay goshshas bidaysa Abimelekey si7is.
9.43: I ba asaa ekidi heedzu cugan shaakidi, issi bessan zugidi naaganaada oothis. Asay katamaape keyeysa be7ida wode enta wodhanaw qosetida bessaafe keyis.
9.44: Abimelekeynne iyara de7iya cugay sinthe woxi bidi, katamaa pengiyan eqidosona. Attida nam7u cugay goshshan de7iya asaa olidi wodhidosona.
9.45: Gallas kumethi Abimelekey asaara oletidi oykidaape guye kataman de7iya asa ubbaa wodhis; katamaa dhaysis; biitta bolla maxine laallis.
9.46: Seekema Adussa Gimbiya giddon de7iya asa ubbay hessa si7ida wode Ba7aal-Barta eeqa keethan de7iya gongoluwan qosetidosona.
9.48: si7idi inne iyara de7iya asa ubbay Salmoona deriya keyidosona. Abimelekey kalta ekidi mitha tashe qanxidi, ba hashiyan tookis. Baara de7iya asaako, “Taani oothishin be7idaysada hinte ellesidi oothite” yaagis.
9.49: Asa ubbay mitha tashe qanxi ekidi, Abimeleke kaallis. He tasheta sa7a keethaa bolla dooridi asay iya giddon de7ishin tama oythidosona. Iyan de7iya asa ubbay hayqidosona. Hayqida addeynne maccasa tayboy issi mukulu gidana.
9.50: Abimelekey Temeesa bidi katamaa teqidi oykis.
9.51: He katamaa giddon issi mino adussa gimbey de7ees. Katamaa asay macci, addey, kaaletheysatinne hara asa ubbay attonna woxidi adussa gimbiya giddo gelidosona. Pengiya gordidi gimbiya huuphe keyidosona.
9.52: Abimelekey olishe adussa gimbiya gakidi taman xuugganaw pengiyako shiiqis.
9.53: Shin issi maccasiya Abimeleke huuphen woxa mayde holada iya guuggiya phalqa yeggasu.
9.54: Iya ola miishiya tookiya na7atetha ellesi xeegidi, “Abimeleke maccasi wodhis goonnaada ne mashshaa shoddada tana wodha” yaagis. Yaagin na7atethay caddin I hayqis.
9.55: Isra7eele asa ubbay Abimelekey hayqidaysa be7idi ba soo soo bis.
9.56: Abimelekey laapun tammu ba ishata wodhidi, ba aawa bolla I oothida gomiya Xoossay iya bolla zaaris.
9.57: Xoossay Seekema asaa iitatetha ubbaa enta bolla zaaris. Hessada hanidi Gediyoona na7ay Iyo7atami baaddida baadethay enta gakis.

10.1: Abimelekey hayqidaape guye, Yisakoora koche gidida Dooda na7aa, Puuha na7ay Toli, Isra7eele asaa ashshanaw dendis. I derey dariya Efreema biittan Samiran de7is.
10.2: Toli Isra7eele asaa laatamanne heedzu laythi aysis. Toli hayqidi, Samiran moogetis. Ya7ira
10.3: Tolape kaallidi, Galada addey Ya7iri dendis. I Isra7eele asaa laatamanne nam7u laythi aysis.
10.4: Iyaw hastamu baqulo toggiya hastamu adde nayti de7oosona. Entaw Galada biittan hastamu katamati de7oosona. He katamati hachi gakanaw Ya7ira katamata geetetidi xeegetoosona.
10.5: Ya7iri hayqidi Qamoonan moogetis. Yoftaahe
10.6: Qassika Isra7eele asay Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothidosona. Enti Ba7aalenne Astaroota eeqata, Soore xoossata, Sidoona xoossata, Moo7abe xoossata, Amoone xoossatanne Filisxeeme xoossata goyinnidosona. Enti Godaa aggaagidosona; iya goyinnibookona.
10.7: Goday Isra7eele asa bolla hanqetidi, enta Filisxeeme asaasinne Amoone asaas aathidi immis.
10.8: He laythi Filisxeemetinne Amooneti Isra7eele asaa un7ethidosona. Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan, Amooreti kase de7ida Galada biittan de7iya Isra7eele asaa enti tammanne hospun laythi haaridosona.
10.9: Qassika Amoone asay Yihuda, Biniyaamenne Efreema kochata olanaw Yordaanose shaafa pinnidosona; Isra7eele asay daro un7etidosona.
10.10: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asay, “Nuuni nena nu Xoossaa aggidi, Ba7aale goyinnidi, nagara oothida” yaagidi Godaako waassidosona.
10.11: Goday entako, “Gibxeti, Amooreti, Amooneti, Filisxeemeti,
10.12: Sidoonati, Amaaleqatinne Mo7aaneti hintena un7ethin, hinte taako waassin, taani hintena enta kushepe ashshabikina?
10.13: Shin hinte tana aggidi hara xoossata goyinnideta; hizape taani hintena ashshike.
10.14: Bidi hinte doorida xoossaako waassite. Hintena metoy gakiya wode ane enti asho” yaagidi zaaris.
10.15: Shin Isra7eele asay zaaridi Godaako, “Nuuni nagara oothida. Ne koydaba nu bolla ootha; shin hayyana hachi nuna ashsha” yaagidosona.
10.16: Allaga xoossata banta giddofe diggidi, Godaa goyinnidosona. Goday Isra7eele asaa un7etetha be7idi mishetis.
10.17: Hessafe guye, Amoone olanchoti olas giigidi, Galadan shiiqidosona. Isra7eele asay issife shiiqidi Galadan Mixiphan dunkaanidosona.
10.18: Galada biitta halaqati banta giddon, “Amoone olanchotara koyrottidi ola gahetanay oonee? He addey Galada biittan de7iya asa ubbaas halaqa gidana” yaagidosona.

11.1: Galada biittan de7iya Yoftaahey mino olancho. Iya aawa sunthay Galada; shin iya aayiya layma maccas.
11.2: Galada machiya iyaw adde nayta yelasu. Enti diccidi gakida wode banta ishaa Yoftaahe, “Neeni hara maccasape yeletida na7a gidiya gisho nu aawa aquwape aykoka laattaka” yaagidi soope yedethidosona.
11.3: Yaatin, Yoftaahey ba ishatape baqatidi, Tooba biittan de7is. Yan I de7ishin guutha worandzoti iyako shiiqidi iya kaallidosona.
11.4: Guutha wodepe guye Amooneti Isra7eeletara oletidosona.
11.5: Amooneti Isra7eeletara oletida wode Galada biitta cimati Toobape Yoftaahe zaaridi ehanaw bidosona.
11.6: Enti iyako, “Amooneta nuuni olana mela yada nuus halaqa gida” yaagidosona.
11.7: Shin Yoftaahey, “Tana ixidi, ta aawa keethaafe yedethibeeketii? Ha77i hintena metoy gakin taako ayis yidetii?” yaagis.
11.8: Galada cimati, “Gidoshin ha77i nuuni neeko simmida; neeni ola kaalethada Amooneta nuus olana melanne Galada biittas halaqa gidana mela koyoos” yaagidosona.
11.9: Yoftaahey, “Amoonetara oletana mela hinte tana guye zaarin, Goday enta ta kushen aathidi immiko, hinte tuma tana halaqa oothanee?” yaagis.
11.10: Galada cimati, “Goday nu giddon marka; neeni giyaba nu oothana” yaagidosona.
11.11: Yoftaahey Galada cimatara bis; enti iya banta halaqanne kaaletheysa oothidosona. Yoftaahey Mixiphan Godaa sinthan zaaridi qaala gelis.
11.12: Yoftaahey Amoone kawako ase kiittidi, “Neeni nu biitta olana mela nuuni new ay oothido?” yaagidi oychis.
11.13: Amoone kawoy Yoftaahey kiitida asaako, “Isra7eele asay Gibxefe keyida wode Arnoona shaafapenne Yaaboqa shaafape giddon, Yordaanose shaafa gakanaw de7iya ta biitta ekidosona. Ha77i ta biitta taw saron zaarite” yaagidi zaaris.
11.14: Yoftaahey nam7antho Amoone kawako ase kiittis.
11.15: Kiitetida asay, “Isra7eele asay Moo7abe biitta woyko Amoone biitta ekibeenna.
11.16: Isra7eele asay Gibxefe keyida wode bazzo kanthi bidi, Zo7o Abbaa gakis; yaape Qaadesa bis.
11.17: Isra7eele asay Edoome kawako, ‘Ne biittara nuna aatharkii?’ yaagidi ase kiittis; shin Edoome kawoy aathona ixis. Hessadaka, Moo7abe kawako kiittin, ika aathona ixis; yaatin, Isra7eele asay Qaadesan gam7is.
11.18: “Wursethan enti bazzuwa kanthidi, Edoomenne Moo7abe biitta gaxaa oykidi, Moo7abe biittafe doloha baggara yidi Arnoona shaafape hefintha baggan dunkaanidosona. Shin Arnoona shaafay Moo7abe zawa gidida gisho Moo7abe bagga pinnibookona.
11.19: “Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asay Haseboona kataman de7iya Amooreta kawa Sihoonako ase kiittidi, ‘Hayyana, ne biittara nuna aatharki’ yaagidi oychis.
11.20: Shin Sihooney Isra7eele asaa ammanetona gisho aathanaw koybeenna. I ba olanchota ekidi Yahaaxan dunkaanidi Isra7eele asaa olis.
11.21: Goday Isra7eele Xoossay Sihoonanne iya olanchota Isra7eele asaa kushen aathidi immin, enta xoonidosona. Yan de7iya Amooreta biitta ubbaa laattidosona.
11.22: Arnoona shaafape bidi Yaaboqa shaafa gakanaw, bazzuwafe bidi Yordaanose shaafa gakanaw de7iya Amooreta biitta ubbaa ekidosona.
11.23: “Hessada oothidi Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay ba asaa Isra7eele sinthafe Amooreta yedethidi dhaysis. Yaatin, neeni zaarada new ekanaw waata qopay?
11.24: Neeni ne xoossay kamooshi new immeysa ekikii? Shin nuuni, Goday nu Xoossay nuus immidaba ubbaa laattidi daana.
11.25: Gidoshin neeni Sifoora na7aa, Moo7abe kawa Balaaqape minnay? I Isra7eele asaara ooyetide woyko oletidee?
11.26: Isra7eele asay Haseboona, Aro7eeranne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutata ubbaa, qassi Arnoona shaafa matan de7iya katamata ubbaa laattidi heedzu xeetu laythi de7is. Yaatin, he wode ayis wotha ekabikii?
11.27: Taani hintena aykoka qohabike; shin tana olanaw dendada naaqey nena. Pirdiya Goday hachi Isra7eelepenne Amoonepe giddon pirdo” yaagis.
11.28: Shin Yoftaahey kiitida kiitaa Amooneta kawoy si7onna ixis.
11.29: He wode Godaa Ayyaanay Yoftaahe bolla wodhin, Galadanne Minaase biitta kanthi bidi, Galada biittan de7iya Mixipha simmis. Yaape olanchota kaalethidi Amoone biitta bis.
11.30: Yoftaahey Godaas qangetidi, “Neeni Amooneta ta kushen aathada immiko,
11.31: taani olaa xoonada soo simmiya wode tana mokanaw ta soope keyiya aybika neesa; taani iya xuuggiya yarsho oothada new shiishana” yaagis.
11.32: Hessafe guye, Yoftaahey Amooneta olanaw zawa bin, Goday enta iya kushen aathidi immis.
11.33: Aro7eerape bidi Minitanne Abeel-Kiramima gakanaw de7iya laatamu katamata olidi dhaysis; daro asaa wodhis. Hessafe guye, Amooneti Isra7eeletas haaretidosona.
11.34: Yoftaahey ba soo Mixipha simmiya wode iya na7iya karaabo oykada yexashenne durashe iya mokanaw keyasu. Iyaw iipe attishin, hara na7i baawa.
11.35: I iyo be7ida wode azzanidi ba ma7uwa daakidi, “Hay ta naate! Tana kawushadasa; tana meton yeggadasa. Taani Godaas qangas; gathonna agganaw danda7ike” yaagis.
11.36: Na7iya, “Ta aawaw, neeni Godaas qangidaba gidiko, Goday ne morketa, Amooneta bolla neeni halo keyida gisho ne qangidaba ta bolla pola” yaagasu.
11.37: Shin iya ba aawako, “Taw issiba ootharki. Taani azina gelonna attiya gisho, ta laggetara bada zumaa bolla ta geela7otethaas yeekana mela nam7u ageenas tana yeddarki” yaagada oychasu.
11.38: I, “Ba” yaagidi, nam7u ageenas iyo yeddis. Iya ba laggetara zumaa bolla keyada ba geela7otethaas entara yeekasu.
11.39: Nam7u ageenape guye, ba aawako simmada yasu. I aaway Godaas qangida ba qangetha gathis; iya geela7oshin hayqasu. He wodepe doomidi,
11.40: Isra7eele macca nayti laythan laythan oyddu gallas banta soope haaki bidi, Galada addiya Yoftaahe na7ees yeekeysinne kayoteysi meeze gidis.

12.1: Efreema asay ola baanaw xeegetidi, Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi, Xafoona gakida wode Yoftaaheko, “Amooneta olanaw zawa pinnada bashe nuuni neera baana mela ayis xeegabikii? Nuuni ne bolla gordidi ne keethan tama yeddana” yaagidosona.
12.2: Yoftaahey entako, “Taaninne ta asay Amoonetara daro baaxen gelida wode hintena xeegas; shin hinte tana entafe ashshibeketa.
12.3: Hinte tana ashshonaysa be7ida wode zawa pinnada ta shempuwas qadhetonna Amooneta olanaw bas; Goday enta ta kushen aathidi immis. Yaatin, hinte hachi ayis tana olanaw yidetii?” yaagis.
12.4: Yoftaahey Galada asa ubbaa shiishidi, Efreema asaara oletin Galada asay xoonidosona. Efreema asay kase enta, “Hinte Galada asay kase Efreemanne Minaase kochata kaddidi yidaysata gideketii?” yaagosona.
12.5: Efreema asay kessi ekonnaada Yordaanose shaafa pinuwa ubbaa Galadati oykidosona. Kessi ekanaw koyiya Efreema asi pinnanaw oychiya wode Galadati, “Neeni Efreema asee?” yaagidi oychoosona. I, “Gidike” giiko,
12.6: enti, “Ane, ‘Shiboleete’ ga” yaagosona. Shin i, “Shi” geetetiya pidaliya loythi xeeganaw danda7onna gisho, “Siboleete” yaagees. I hessa giya wode oykidi, Yordaanose shaafa pinniya bessan wodhoosona. He wode yan Efreema asaape oytamanne nam7u mukulu asay hayqis.
12.7: Yoftaahey Isra7eele asaa usupun laythi aysis. Galada addey Yoftaahey hayqidi Galadan de7iya issi kataman moogetis. Ibxana, Eloona, Abdoona
12.8: Yoftaahepe kaallidi, Beetelemen Ibxani Isra7eele asaa haaris.
12.9: Ibxanas hastamu adde naytinne hastamu macca nayti de7oosona. I ba macca nayta ba koche gidonna adde naytas immis; ba adde naytas ba koche gidonna macca nayta giigisidi immis. Ibxani Isra7eele laapun laythi aysis.
12.10: Hessafe guye, Ibxani hayqidi Beetelemen moogetis.
12.11: Ibxanape kaallidi Zabloona koche gidida Elooni Isra7eele asaa tammu laythi haaris.
12.12: Hessafe guye, Elooni hayqidi Zabloona biittan de7iya Ayaloonan moogetis.
12.13: Eloonape kaallidi, Piratoona addey, Hilaala na7ay Abdooni Isra7eele aysis.
12.14: Abdoonas laapun tammu baqulota toggiya oytamu adde naytinne hastamu na7a na7i de7ees. Abdooni Isra7eele hospun laythi aysis.
12.15: Hessafe guye, Hilaala na7ay Abdooni hayqidi derey dariya Amaaleqan, Efreema biittan, Piratoona geetetiya duufon moogetis.

13.1: Isra7eele asay Godaa sinthan qassika iitabaa oothidosona. Yaatin, Goday enta oytamu laythi Filisxeeme asaa kushen aathidi immis.
13.2: He wode Xor7a kataman Maanuhe geetetiya issi addey de7ees. I Daane koche; iya machiya maynthi gidida gisho iyaw na7a yelabuuku.
13.3: Issi gallas Godaa kiitanchoy he maccasees qoncidi, “Neeni maynthi; new na7i baawa; shin ne qanthatana; adde na7aka yelana.
13.4: Hessa gisho, woyne woyko mathoyiya ushshi uyonna melanne tunabaa aybaka moonna mela naageta.
13.5: Ne qanthatada adde na7a yelana. Na7ay yeletida wodiyape doomidi Xoossas dummatida Naazirawe gidiya gisho iya huuphiya meedopa. I Isra7eele Filisxeemeta kushepe asho doomana” yaagis.
13.6: Maccasiya bada, ba azinaas haysada yaagada odasu; “Issi Xoossa asi taako yis; iya medhoy Xoossa kiitancho mela daro yashshees. I awupe yidaako taani iya oychabike; ika ba sunthaa taw odibeenna.
13.7: Shin I taako, ‘Ne qanthatana; adde na7a yelana. Na7ay yeletida wodepe doomidi hayqana gakanaw Xoossas dummatida Naazirawe gidiya gisho woyne woyko mathoyiya ushshi uyopa; tunabaaka moopa’ yaagis” yaagasu.
13.8: Hessafe guye, Maanuhey, “Abeeti Godaw, na7ay yeletiya wode ay oothanaw koshshiyako erisana mela neeni kiitida Xoossa uray nuuko simmidi yaana mela ootharki” yaagidi Godaa woossis.
13.9: Xoossay Maanuhe woosa si7is. Machiya gaden uttidashin Xoossa kiitanchoy nam7antho yis; shin he wode I azinay Maanuhey iira deenna.
13.10: Machiya ellesada ba azinaako bada, “Heede taako yida addey hachi taw qoncis” yaagasu.
13.11: Maanuhey uttida bessaafe dendidi, ba machiw kaalli bidi uraako, “Ta machera odetiday nenee?” yaagidi oychis. Uray, “Ee, tana” yaagis.
13.12: Maanuhey, “Neeni odida qaalay poletiya wode yeletana na7aa de7uwasinne oosuwas wogay aybee?” yaagidi iya oychis.
13.13: Godaa kiitanchoy, “Ne machiya taani odida ubbaafe naageto.
13.14: Woyne mithafe bentiyaba aybaka moopo; woyne woyko mathoyiya ushshi uyopo; tuna gididaba moopo. Taani iw odida ubbaa ootho” yaagis.
13.15: Maanuhey Godaa kiitanchuwako, “Nuuni new issi urge deeshi shukidi giigisana gakanaw hayyana guuthu gam7arki” yaagis.
13.16: Godaa kiitanchoy, “Taani gam7iyakoka ne kathaa miike. Shin neeni xuussa yarsho giigisanaw koyiko, Godaas yarshanaw danda7aasa” yaagis. I Godaa kiitancho gideysa Maanuhey eribeenna.
13.17: Maanuhey Godaa kiitanchuwako, “Neeni odida qaalay poletiya wode nuuni nena bonchana mela ne sunthay oonee?” yaagidi oychis.
13.18: Godaa kiitanchoy, “Ne ta sunthaa ayis oychay? Ta sunthay malaalseysa” yaagidi zaaris.
13.19: Maanuhey urge deeshinne katha yarshuwa ekidi shucha bolla Godaas yarshis. Maanuheynne iya machiya xeellishin, Goday malaalsiyaba oothis.
13.20: Yarsho bessaafe tama lacoy pude laxidi keyishin, Godaa kiitanchoy tama lacuwa giddora salo keyis. Maanuheynne iya machiya hessa be7idi som7ora sa7an gufannidosona.
13.21: Godaa kiitanchoy Maanuhesinne iya machees zaari bentonna aggin, maanuhey I Godaa kiitancho gididaysa he wode akeekis.
13.22: Maanuhey ba macheko, “Nuuni Xoossaa be7ida gisho hayqana” yaagis.
13.23: Shin iya machiya, “Goday nuna wodhanaw koydaba gidiyako, xuussa yarshuwanne katha yarshuwa nuupe ekenna woyko ha ubbaa nuna bessenna woyko haysa nuus odenna” yaagada zaarasu.
13.24: Machiya adde na7a yelasu; iya sunthaa Samsoona gada xeegasu. Na7ay diccis; Godayka iya anjis.
13.25: Na7ay Xor7afenne Eshta7oolape giddon de7iya Daane gutan de7ishin Godaa Ayyaanay iya denthetho doomis.

14.1: Issi gallas Samsooni Timina wodhis; yan issi Filisxeeme geela7iw be7is.
14.2: I Soo simmidi ba aawanne ba aayiw, “Taani Timinan issi Filisxeeme geela7iw be7as; ha77i iyo taw oychidi immite” yaagis.
14.3: Shin iya aawanne aayiya, “Macho oychanaw ha qaxaretiboona Filisxeemetako baanaw nena ay koshshidee? Nu kochaa giddon woyko nu asa ubbaa giddon new haniya macca na7a demmanaw danda7abikii?” yaagidi oychidosona. Shin Samsooni ba aawako, “Taani iyo dosida gisho, iyo oychada taw imma” yaagis.
14.4: Filisxeemeta olanaw Goday gaaso koyidi, hessa enta bolla ootheysa Samsoona aawaynne aayiya eribookona. He wode Filisxeemeti Isra7eeleta haaroosona.
14.5: Samsooni ba aawaranne ba aayera Timina wodhis. Enti Timina woyne gade matara kanthidi aadhiya wode issi wodala gaammoy gudishe iya bolla keyis.
14.6: He wode Godaa Ayyaanay Samsoona bolla wolqan wodhis; I deesha mari duuseretheysada ba kushen aykoka oykonna gaammuwa duuserethi yeggis. Ba oothidaysa ba aawasinne ba aayes odibeenna.
14.7: Hessafe guye, bidi geela7iw odisis; iyo dosis.
14.8: Guutha wodepe guye iyo ekanaw yaa simmidi bis. Ogiya bishe ba wodhida gaammo bawuta be7anaw ogepe gaxa keyidi biya wode gaammo bawuta giddon mathi eessi eessidaysa be7is.
14.9: He eessaafe guuthara qanxi ekidi mishe ogiya bis. Ba aawanne ba aayiw gakidi, ba oykida eessaafe guuthara immin, entika midosona. Shin Samsooni he eessa gaammo bawuta giddofe ekidaysa entaw odibeenna.
14.10: Iya aaway geela7iw be7anaw I soo bin, Samsooni yan gibira giigisis. Hessa mela gibiray yaaganon na7atethati oothiya meezetida woga.
14.11: Filisxeeme asay iya be7ida wode iyara gam7ana mela hastamu na7atethata dooridi yeddidosona.
14.12: Samsooni enta, “Ane hinte eriyako issi qan77ishe ta hintena oychana. Yaaganoy bonchetiya laapun gallasa giddon ha qan7ishiya birshethaa taw hinte odiyaba gidiko taani hintew hastamu liino afilanne hastamu kumetha ma7o immana.
14.13: Shin hinte taw birshethaa odanaw danda7onna ixiko hinte taw hastamu liino afilanne hastamu kumetha ma7o immeeta” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Ero, ne qan7ishiya nuus oda” yaagidosona.
14.14: I, “Meysafe meetetiyabay bentis; minuwa garsafe mal7iyabay keyis” yaagis. Heedzu gallas gakanaw enti qan7ishiya birshanaw danda7ibookona.
14.15: Oyddantho gallas enti Samsoona machiw, “Ne azinaa cimmada qan7ishiya birshethaa I nuus odana mela ootha. Hessi hanonna ixiko, nuuni nenanne ne aawa keethaa taman xuuggana. Hinte nuna xeegiday nuna manqisanaasee?” yaagidosona.
14.16: Yaatin, Samsoona machiya yeekashe iyako shiiqada, “Neeni tana dosaka; ne tana daro ixaasa. Neeni ta biitta asaa qan7ishe oychada birshethaa taw odabaaka” yaagasu. I zaaridi, “Hessa taani ta aawasinne ta aayes odabike. Yaatin, new ayis odo?” yaagis.
14.17: Yaaganoy bonchetiya laapun gallasa ubban yeekada shempo diggasu. Laapuntha gallas qan7ishiya birshethaa iw odis; iya bada ba biitta asaas odasu.
14.18: Yaatin, laapuntha gallas awi wullanaape sinthe katamaa asay, “Eessaafe aadhidi mal7iyabay, gaammofe aadhidi minniyabay aybee?” yaagidi qan7ishiya birshethaa odidosona. Samsooni entako, “Hinte ta ussen goyonnaba gidiyako, ta qan7ishiya birshethaa ereketashin” yaagis.
14.19: Hessafe guye, Godaa Ayyaanay iya bolla wolqan wodhin, Asqaloona wodhidi, hastamu asi wodhis. Enta ma7uwa qaari ekidi qan7ishiya birshida asaas immis. Hanidaba ubban daro shenetidi ba aawa soo simmis.
14.20: Samsoona machiya waanna laazanthi gidida iya laggiyas imetasu.

15.1: Guutha wodepe guye, giste caka wode Samsooni ba machiw be7anaw issi urge kole ekidi bis. Na7ee aawako, “Taani ta machiya de7iya kifiliya gelanaw koyayis” yaagis. Shin I aaway I gelonnaada diggis.
15.2: I aaway Samsoonako, “Neeni iyo ixidaba daanin iyo ne laazanthas immas. Shin I, kaalo michiya iipe aadhada mala lo77o gidekee? Iyo eka” yaagis.
15.3: Samsooni, “Taani ha77i Filisxeeme asaa bolla iitabaa oothiko bala gidike” yaagis.
15.4: Hessafe guye, bidi heedzu xeetu workanata oykidi nam7aa nam7a goyna issife gathi qachidi goynatape giddon xompe wothidi qachis.
15.5: Xompiyan tama oythidi buroo caketiboona Filisxeemeta kathaa giddo workanata yeddis. Tamay caketida kathaa, eqon de7iya kathaa, woyniyanne shamahuwa mis.
15.6: Filisxeemeti, “Haysa oothiday oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona. Asay, “Hessa oothiday Samsoona. Timina asi gidida iya bolloy, iya machiw iya laazanthas immida gisho hessa oothis” yaagidosona. Filisxeemeti bidi iyonne I aawa taman xuuggidosona.
15.7: Samsooni entako, “Hinte hessa oothida gisho ta halo keyonna aggike” yaagis.
15.8: I enta wolqaama iita shochi shocidi darota wodhis. Hessafe guye bidi, Etaama gongoluwan de7is.
15.9: Filisxeeme asay yidi Yihudan dunkaanidi Leha katamaa olis.
15.10: Yihuda asay, “Ayis nuna olanaw yidetii?” yaagidi oychidosona. Enti, “Nuuni Samsoona oykidi qachanawunne I nu bolla oothidaysada iya bolla oothanaw yida” yaagidi zaaridosona.
15.11: Yaatin, Yihudape heedzu mukulu asay Etaama gongoluwa bidi, Samsoona, “Nuna haarey Filisxeeme gideysa erikii? Yaatin, nu bolla haysa mela palaba ayis oothay?” yaagidosona. I zaaridi, “Enti ta bolla oothidaysada taanika enta bolla oothas” yaagis.
15.12: Enti zaaridi, “Nuuni yiday nena qachidi, Filisxeemetas aathidi immanaasa” yaagidosona. Samsooni zaaridi, “Hinte nu nena wodhoko gidi taw caaqite” yaagis.
15.13: Enti, “Ero, nuuni nena qachidi entaw aathidi immanaape attishin, wodhoko” yaagidi zaaridosona. Hessa gisho, nam7u ooratha wodoron qachidi gongoluwape kessidi efidosona.
15.14: Samsooni Leha bida wode Filisxeemeti buraaqishe iyako yidosona. Godaa Ayyaanay iya bolla wolqan wodhis. Iya kushey qashetida wodoroy shaloy tama be7idi duuxereteysada duuxereti wodhis.
15.15: Mata wode hayqida hare gaco demmidi, iyara mukulu asi wodhis.
15.16: Samsooni, “Hare gacon, aha bolla aha dooras. Hare gacon mukulu asi wodhas” yaagis.
15.17: Haasaya wursidaape guye, ba oykida gacuwa holidi he bessaa Ramat-Leha yaagidi xeegis.
15.18: Samsooni daro saamotidi, “Neeni haysa mela gita xoono taw ne aylliyas immadasa. Yaatin, taani ha77i saamon hayqo? Ha qaxaretonna asaa kushen wodho?” yaagidi Xoossaako waassis.
15.19: Xoossay Lehan de7iya aafo kakaa phalqin iyape haathi keyis. Samsooni he haatha uyidi alida wode iyaw shempoy simmis. Hessa gisho, he bessaa Ayn-Haqore yaagidi xeegis. He bessay hachi gakanaw Lehan de7ees.
15.20: Filisxeemeti biitta haariya wode Samsooni Isra7eele laatamu laythi aysis.

16.1: Issi gallas Samsooni Filisxeeme katama gidida Gaaza katamaa bis; Yan issi layma maccas be7idi iira aqanaw I soo gelis.
16.2: Gaaza katamaa asay Samsooni enta katamaa yidaysa si7idi keetha teqidi qamma kumethi naagishe katamaa pengiyan aqidosona. Sa7i wontiko wodhana gidi naagishe doona phuqona aqidosona.
16.3: Shin Samsooni yan gidi bilahe gakanaw gam7is. Bilahe dendidi katamaa dirsa pengiya, pengiya oykiya nam7u tuussatanne kobe biratata issife shoddis. He ubbaa hashen tookidi Kebroonape sintha baggara de7iya zumaa huuphe kessis.
16.4: Guutha wodepe guye Samsooni Soreqa zangaaran de7iya issi Dalilo geetetiya maccasiw dosis.
16.5: Filisxeeme halaqati iiko bidi, “Neeni iya cimmada, he wolqa ubbaa I awupe demmiyakonne nuuni iya waati xoonidi qachanaw danda7iyako oycha. Nuuni issoy issoy new tammanne issi kilo giraame bira santime immana” yaagidosona.
16.6: Hessa gisho Dalila Samsoonako, “Haysa mela minotethi ne awupe demmidaako, hayyana taw odarkii. Asi nena qachidi waatidi ne wolqaa daabursanaw danda7ii?” yaagasu.
16.7: Samsooni, “Tana laapun irxa dafora asi qachiko daaburada hara asada hanana” yaagidi zaaris.
16.8: Filisxeeme halaqati Dalilas laapun irxa dafota ehin iya Samsoona qachasu.
16.9: Qol7an ase qotta wothada, “Samsoona, Filisxeemeti yidosona” gada xeegasu. Shin shaloy tami oykin duuxereteysada dafota duuserethi yeggis. Ha77ika iya minotethaa xuuray eretibeenna.
16.10: Dalila Samsoonako, “Neeni tana eeya oothaasa; ne taw wordo odadasa. Ha77ika nena waati qachanaw danda7etiyako hayyana taw oda” yaagasu.
16.11: I zaaridi, “Asi go7etiboonna ooratha wodoron tana qachiko daaburada hara asada hanana” yaagis.
16.12: Dalila ooratha wodoro ekada Samsoona qachasu. Qol7an ase qotta wothada, “Samsoona, Filisxeemeti yidosona” yaagasu. Shin I wodoruwa ba qesiyape shaloda duuserethi yeggis.
16.13: Dalila Samsoonako, “Ha77i gakanaw ne tana cimmaasa; neeni taw wordo odadasa. Ha77ika nena waatidi qachanaw danda7etiyako hayyana taw oda” yaagasu. I zaaridi, “Ta huuphiya laapun binaana dathata qacinara gathada, quxarada daddiko, taani daaburada hara asada hanana” yaagis.
16.14: Hessafe guye, Samsooni dhiskidashin, Dalila iya huuphiya laapun binaana dathata qacinara gathada dooqasu. Hessafe guye, “Samsoona, Filisxeemeti yidosona” yaagasu. I dhiskofe barkidi, ba binaanay dooqetidi toletida bessaafe shoddi ekis.
16.15: Yaatin iya, “Ne wozanay taara deenna, ‘Woygada ta nena dosayis’ gay? Heedzu toho tana cimmadasa. Neeni ha minotethaa awupe demmiyako taw oda” yaagasu.
16.16: Gallas gallas oychada I hayqo amottana gakanaw iya waaysasu.
16.17: Wursethan Samsooni, “Ta aaye ulope doomin taani Xoossaas dummatida Naazirawe gidida gisho, ta huuphe binaanay meedetidi erenna. Ta binaanay meedetiko, ta wolqay taape eketin, taani daaburada hara asada hanana” yaagidi, ba xuura ubbaa iw odis.
16.18: Ba wozanan de7iyaba ubbaa I odidaysa Dalila be7ida wode, “Ba wozanan de7iyaba ubbaa taw odida gisho, ane issi toho simmidi yiite” yaagada Filisxeeme halaqatas kiita yeddin enti bira ekidi iiko yidosona.
16.19: Dalila Samsoona ba wodire bolla dhiskisada issi asi xeegin yidi, iya huuphiya laapun datha binaana meedin iya wolqay iyape dhayis. Hessafe guye, iya waayso doomasu.
16.20: Iya, “Samsoona, Filisxeemeti yidosona” yaagasu. I dhiskofe barkidi, kaseysada duuserethada baana yaagidi qopis; shin Goday iyape shaaketidaysa eribeenna.
16.21: Filisxeemeti iya oykidaape guye, iya nam7u ayfeta wooci kessidosona. Gaaza katamaa efidi naase birata santhalaatan qachidi qasho keethan kathi gaacisidosona.
16.22: Enti iya huuphiya binaana meedidaape guye, binaanay simmidi dolo doomis. Samsoona Hayquwa
16.23: Filisxeeme halaqati, “Nu xoossay nu morkiya Samsoona nu kushen aathidi immis” yaagidi banta xoossaa Daagonas yarsho yarshanawunne ufaytanaw issife shiiqidosona.
16.24: Asi ubbay iya be7ida wode, “Nu biitta dhaysidanne nuupe darota wodhida nu morkiya, nu xoossay nu kushen aathidi immis” yaagidi banta xoossaa galatidosona.
16.25: Enti daro ufaytida gisho, “Duridi nuna ufaysana mela Samsoona xeegite” yaagidosona. Samsoona qasho keethafe xeegidi ehin, I enta sinthan duridaape guye tuussatape giddon essidosona.
16.26: Samsooni ba kushiya oykidi kaalethiya na7aako, “Taani entan zempada eqana mela keethaa tookida tuussata tana oytha” yaagis.
16.27: Keethaa giddon addeynne maccasi, hessadaka Filisxeeme halaqati ubbay kumidi de7oosona. Samsooni durishin, pooqiya bolla uttidi be7iya heedzu mukulu gidiya addeynne maccasi be7oosona.
16.28: He wode Samsooni, “Abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, tana qoparki. Abeeti Xoossaw, Filisxeemeti ta nam7u ayfeta kessida gisho, halo keyana mela tana issi toho mintharki!” yaagidi Godaa woossis.
16.29: Samsooni keethaa tookida giddo tuussata nam7aaka oykis. Issuwa ushacha kushen, issuwa, haddirsa kushen oykidaape guye,
16.30: “Taani Filisxeemetara issife hayqana” yaagidi waassis. Baw de7iya wolqa ubban sugin, keethay halaqata bollanne garsan de7iya asa ubbaa bolla kundis. Samsooni paxa de7ishe wodhida asaape hayqishe wodhida asay daro.
16.31: Iya ishatinne iya dabboti ubbay yidi, iya aha ekidosona. Xor7afenne Eshta7oolape giddon iya aawa Maanuhe duufuwan moogidosona. Samsooni Isra7eele laatamu laythi aysis.

17.1: Derey dariya Efreema biittan Mika geetetiya issi addey de7ees.
17.2: Issi gallas Miiki ba aayiw, “Neepe asi tammanne issi kilo giraame bira santime kaysin neeni he kaysida addiya baaddishin ta si7as. He miishey ta matan de7ees; taani ekas” yaagis. Iya aayiya, “Ta na7aw, nena Godi anjo” yaagasu.
17.3: Na7ay tammanne issi kilo giraame bira santime aayes zaaris. Iya aayiya, “Baadethay ta na7aa gakonna mela taani ha miishiya Godaas dummayana. Biraa sheeshidi, mithafe oosetida eeqa misiliya tiyanaw go7etana; bira ta new zaarana” yaagasu.
17.4: Na7ay miishiya ba aayes zaarin, iya he birape nam7u xeetu bira santime ekada, mithi massidi, bira sheeshi tiyidi, eeqa misile medhiya, issi hiillas immasu. I oothida misiley Mika son uttis.
17.5: Mikas eeqa goyinniya keethi de7ees. I efuudenne soo giddo eeqa misileta giigisidi, he keethan ba naytape issuwa kahine oothidi shuumis.
17.6: He wode Isra7eele biittan kawoy baawa; asi ubbay baw lo77o daanidaba oothees.
17.7: He wode Yihuda biittan Beeteleme kataman Leewe koche gidida issi na7atethay de7ees.
17.8: Ha addey baw de7iya bessi koyanaw Beeteleme katamaape dendidi derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya Mika soo gakis.
17.9: Miki, “Awupe yadii?” yaagidi oychis. Addey, “Taani Yihuda biitta Beeteleme katamaape yas; taani Leewe koche. Ha77i taani de7iya bessi koyayis” yaagidi zaaris.
17.10: Miiki iyako, “Taara de7a; taw aawanne kahine gida. Taani new laythan laythan tammu bira santime, kumetha afilanne miyaba immana” yaagis.
17.11: Na7atetha Leewey Mikara issife daanaw gelis; Mikas yelida na7ada hanis.
17.12: Miiki iya ba kahine oothidi shuumin iya son de7is.
17.13: Miiki, “Issi Leewey taw kahine gidida gisho Goday tabaa loythanaysa erayis” yaagis.

18.1: He wode Isra7eele biittan kawoy baawa. He wodey gakanaw Daane kochati Isra7eele kochata giddon laattida biitti baawa. Enti bantaw de7iya biitta koyishe de7oosona.
18.2: Hessa gisho, Daane kochati banta giddofe ichashu mino olanchota dooridi biitta wochana mela Xor7afenne Eshta7oolape enta kiittidosona. Enti derey dariya Efreema biitta gakidi Mika son aqidosona.
18.3: Enti Mika son de7iya wode Leewe koche gidida na7atetha iya odan eridosona. Enti iyako shiiqidi, “Nena haysa ehiday oonee? Haysa ayis yadii?” yaagidi oychidosona.
18.4: I zaaridi, “Miiki taw damooze qanxin, taani iyaw kahine gidada oothayis” yaagis.
18.5: Enti, “Nuuni biya ogey nuus suurane, suurenne hayyana nuus Xoosse oycha” yaagidosona.
18.6: Kahiney, “Saro biite; hinte biya ogiyan Goday hintera gidana” yaagis.
18.7: Hessape guye, ichashu asati yaape dendidi, Laysha katamaa gakidosona. Yan de7iya asay Sidoona biitta asaada saron de7eysa be7idosona; asati oonika sidhonna wopu gida asi; entaw aykoyka paconna ubbabay kumida asi. Ay asaraka gahetonna Sidoona asaape haakidi bantaw dumma de7oosona.
18.8: Ichashu asati Xor7aninne Eshta7oolan de7iya banta ishatako simmidosona; enta ishati, “Ay wore ekidi yidetii?” yaagidosona.
18.9: Enti zaaridi, “Biittay daro aradda gideysa nu be7ida. Ane dendidi Laysha oloos. Haysan ooso dhayidi coo uttofite; elle bidi oykite.
18.10: Hinte yaa bidi, oonanne sidhonna uttida asaako gakana. Biittay dalga; asas koshshiya ubbabay he biittan de7ees. Xoossay he biitta hintew immis” yaagidosona.
18.11: Yaatin, Daane kochaafe toora dancida usupun xeetu asati Xor7apenne Eshta7oolape dendidi bidosona.
18.12: Yihuda biittan Qiriyat-Yi7aarimape wuloha baggara uttidosona. Hessa gisho, he bessay hachi gakanaw Daane Gutaa geetetidi xeegetees.
18.13: Yaape dendidi derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya Mika soo yidosona.
18.14: Laysha biitta wochanaw bida ichashu asati banta ishatako, “Ha bessan, ha keethatape issuwan efuudey, soo giddo eeqa misiletinne mithafe oothidi bira sheeshidi tiyida misiley de7eysa ereetii? Ane ay oothanaw koshshiyako qopite” yaagidosona.
18.15: Enti ogiyape simmidi, Leewe koche gidida na7atetha kahiney de7iya Mika soo bidi iya sarothidosona.
18.16: He wode usupun xeetu Daane olanchoti ola miishe oykidi penge bolla eqidosona.
18.17: Enti he kahiniyara yan eqidashin, biitta wochiya ichashu asati Mika soo gelidi, mithafe oothidi, bira sheeshidi, tiyida eeqa misiliya, efuudiyanne soo giddo eeqa misileta ekidosona.
18.18: He wode kahiney enta, “Waatetii?” yaagidi oychis.
18.19: Enti iya, “Hayza, issi qaalaka pogopa. Nuura bada nuus aawanne kahine gida. Issi keetha asas kahine gideysafe Isra7eele gidiya issi kochas kahine gideysi new lo77enee?” yaagidosona.
18.20: Kahiney hessa si7idi ufaytidi efuudiya, soo giddo eeqa misiletanne mithafe oothidi bira sheeshidi tiyida misiliya ekidi entara bis.
18.21: Yaape dendidi, banta nayta, banta mehiyanne bantaw de7iyaba ubbaa sinthe aathidi bidosona.
18.22: Enti Mika soope haakidi bidaape guye, Miiki ba shoorota xeegin, Daane asata kaallidi gakidosona.
18.23: Enta gakidi waassin, Daane asati guye simmidi, “Waanadii? Ha asa ubbaa ayis shiishadii?” yaagidi Mika oychidosona.
18.24: Miiki zaaridi, “Taani medhida ta xoossatanne taw oothiya kahiniya bonqideta. Yaatin taw attidabay aybee? Tana, ‘Woygidi waanadi, geetii?’ ” yaagis.
18.25: Daane asati, “Ane doona pogada nena era! Ha shenera de7iya asaa neeni denthethiko, enti ne bolla dendana; nenanne soo asa ubbaa dhaysana” yaagidosona.
18.26: Daane asati banta ogiya bidosona. Mikika enti baape daro mino gideysa be7idi ba soo simmis.
18.27: Daane asati Miiki medhida xoossatanne iya kahiniya ekidi, Leesan oonaka sidhonna saro de7iya asatako bidi, asa ubbaa mashshan wodhidi katamaa taman xuuggidosona.
18.28: Laysha katamay Sidoonape haakidi de7iya gishonne enti hara asara gahetidi eronna gisho enta ashshanaw oonika danda7ibeenna. Laysha katamay Beet-Rehooba geetetiya bessaa matan de7iya zangaaran de7ees. Daane asati katamaa zaari keexidi yan de7idosona.
18.29: Katamaa sunthaa beni banta mayza Yayqooba na7aa Daane sunthan laammidi, Daane yaagidi sunthidosona; shin koyro he katamay Laysha geetetees.
18.30: Daane asati bantaw eeqa misiliya yan wothidi, Muse na7aa Gedisoonape yeletida Yoonataana banta kahine oothidosona. Iya kochati asay di77etidi bida wode gakanaw yan kahine gididosona.
18.31: Hessada hanidi, Geeshsha Dunkaaney Seelon de7ida laytha ubban Miiki oothida misileti yan gam7idosona.

19.1: Isra7eele biittan kawoy bayna wode derey dariya Efreema biittan, haaho bessan, Leewe koche gidida issi uray de7ees. He uray Yihuda biittan, Beeteleme katamaape issi laggetho baw ehis.
19.2: Shin iyara ooyetada Yihuda biittan Beeteleme kataman de7iya ba aawa soo bada yan oyddu ageena uttasu.
19.3: I azinay iyo cimatidi soo zaaranaw ba aylliyanne nam7u hareta ekidi bis. I yaa gakiya wode iya moka ekada ba aawa soo gelsasu; I aaway iya be7ida wode ufaytidi mokis.
19.4: Na7ee aaway iya yeddonna ixin, yan iyara mishenne uyishe heedzu gallas gam7is.
19.5: Oyddantho gallas wonta guura dendidi, baanaw giigidosona. Shin na7e aaway ba na7e azinaako, “Guutha kathi mada gashtada ba” yaagis.
19.6: Nam7u asati uttidi issife midosonanne uyidosona. Hessafe guye na7e aaway iyako, “Hayyana, hachi ufaytada haysan aqa” yaagis.
19.7: Leewey baanaw dendin, na7e aaway boonna mela woossin qassika yan aqis.
19.8: Ichashantho gallas wonta guura baanaw dendin, na7e aaway, “Hayyana, guutha kathi mada, gashtada omarsi ba” yaagis. Enti nam7ayka issife kathi midosona.
19.9: Leewey ba laggetheranne ba aylliyara baanaw keyin, na7e aaway, “Heko, sa7i qammis; ha77ika aqite; wonta guura dendidi hinte soo biite” yaagis.
19.10: Shin I yan aqanaw koyiboona gisho ba laggethiw, ba aylliyanne nam7u caanetida hareta ekidi Yaabuse geetetiya Yerusalaame katamaa gakidosona.
19.11: Enti Yaabuse matiya wode sa7i daro omarsin, aylley, “Haysan, Yaabuseta kataman aqiko waananee?” yaagidi ba godaa oychis.
19.12: Shin iya goday, “Haysan, Isra7eele asi bayna allaga katamaa booko. Gib7a katamaa gakanaw baana” yaagis.
19.13: Qassika ba aylliyako, “Haaya, nuuni Gib7an woyko Raman aqiya bessi demmana” yaagis.
19.14: Hessa gisho banta ogiya oykidi bidosona. Biniyaame biittan Gib7a katamaa enti matiya wode awi wullis.
19.15: Enti Gib7a katamaa gelidi aqanaw yaa bidosona. He katamaa asay duulata uttiya bessan uttidosona; shin enta ba soo efidi aysiya asi bentibeenna.
19.16: Enti yan uttidashin, sa7i omarsin gadepe ba soo simmiya issi cima addey enta matara aadhis. Ha addey kase derey dariya Efreema biittafe yida asi; shin ha77i Gib7a kataman de7ees. He biittan Biniyaame kochaafe yeletida asay de7oosona.
19.17: He cima addey, katamaa asay duulata uttiya bessan uttida addiya be7idi, “Awupe yadii? Awu bay?” yaagidi oychis.
19.18: Leewey zaaridi, “Nuuni Yihuda biittan Beeteleme katamaape yida. Ha77i derey dariya Efreema biittan, haaho bessan de7iya Xoossa keethinne nu soo boos. Nuna ba soo efidi aysiya asi demmibooko.
19.19: Nu haretas utullinne kaley de7ees; taw, ta laggethesinne ta aylliyas gidiya kathinne woyne ushshi de7ees; nuus koshshiyaba ubbaa oykida” yaagis.
19.20: Cima addey, “Saroy hintew gido; ta soo yedhite; ta son aqite; hinte koyaba ubbaa ta hintew immana. Ha katamaa dabaaban hinte aqanaw bessenna” yaagis.
19.21: Enta ba soo efis; enta haretas miyaba yeggis. Imathati banta tohuwa meecetidi kaho midosona.
19.22: Enti ufaytishin, katamaape iita asati yidi, keethaa teqidi, pengiya qoxethi doomidosona. Enti cima addiyako, “Ha ne soo gelida addiya haa kessa; nuuni iyara gahetanaw koyoos” yaagidosona.
19.23: He keethaa goday, “Hanenna; ta ishato, hessa mela palaba oothopite; ha addey ta imathe.
19.24: Heko, ta geela7o na7iyanne iya laggethiya haysan de7oosona. Taani enta hintew kare kessana; hinte enta bolla koydaba oothite; shin ha addiya bolla hessa mela iitabaa oothopite” yaagis.
19.25: Shin asati I gidaysa si7onna ixidosona. Leewey ba laggethiw kare holis. Sa7i wontana gakanaw qamma kumethi taran taran iira wolqan gahetidi, iyo paxa kaa7ishe aysidosona; sa7i wontana hanishin iyo yeddi aggidosona.
19.26: Wontanaw gontey zo77iya wode yada, I goday aqida cima addiya keethaa pengen kundasu; xalqey dolana gakanaw yan zin7asu.
19.27: Wonta I goday dendidi, ba ogiya baanaw pengiya dooyidi keyiya wode iya laggethiya keethaa pengen ba kushiya miccada gufannidaaro be7is.
19.28: I goday, “Denda; ane boos” yaagis. Shin iya aykoka zaarabuuku. Yaatin, I aha haren caanidi ba soo bis.
19.29: I ba soo gakida wode mashsha ekidi, ba laggethe aha tammanne nam7u bessan qanxerethidi, issi issi qanxuwa tammanne nam7u Isra7eele kochatas yeddis.
19.30: Hessa be7ida ubbay, “Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyoodepe hachi gakanaw haysa melabay hanibeenna; nuka be7ibooko. Ane haysa qopi be7idi, akeekan zoretidi, ay oothaneko nuus odite” yaagidosona.

20.1: Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw Galadan de7iya Isra7eele asi ubbay issi asada Mixiphan Godaa sinthan issife shiiqidosona.
20.2: He shiiqida Xoossaa asaara, Isra7eele zare ubbaa halaqati de7oosona. Enta giddon mashshe dancidi oletanaw danda7iya 400,000 olanchoti de7oosona.
20.3: He wode Isra7eele asay Mixiphan shiiqidaysa Biniyaame asay si7idosona. Isra7eele asay, “Ha iitabay waanidi hanidaako nuus odite” yaagidosona.
20.4: Hayqida laggethe azinay, Leewey, haysada yaagidi zaaris; “Taaninne ta laggethiya sa7i qammin aqanaw Biniyaame biittan de7iya Gib7a katamaa yida.
20.5: Gib7a katamaa asati tana wodhanaw yidi, keethaa yuushuwa teqidosona. Shin guyepe ta laggethera wolqan, taran taran gahetidi iyo wodhidosona.
20.6: Taani I aha ekada qanxerethas; enti ha iitabaanne yeellaba Isra7eelen oothida gisho Isra7eele asay de7iya biitta ubbaa issi issi qanxo yedas.
20.7: Hiza, hinte ubbay Isra7eele asi; zoretidi bessiya pirdaa immite” yaagis.
20.8: Asa ubbay issife dendidi, “Nu giddofe oonika ba dunkaaniya woyko ba keethaa guye simmenna.
20.9: Nuuni Gib7a bolla haysa oothana; saama yeggidi, Gib7a katamaa olanaw baana asata doorana.
20.10: Isra7eele zare ubbaafe ola biya asaas shinqe giigisana mela xeetape tamma, mukulaape xeetaa, tammu mukulaape issi mukula dooridi ekana. Attida olanchoti Biniyaame biittan de7iya Gib7a bidi, Isra7eele bolla haysa mela iitabaa oothida asaa bolla halo keyanaw boo” yaagidosona.
20.11: Isra7eele asa ubbay katamaa olanaw issife shiiqidosona.
20.12: Isra7eele kochati Biniyaame kocha ubbaas haysada yaagidi ase kiittidosona; “Hinte giddon hanida ha iitabay aybee?
20.13: Nuuni enta wodhidi, Isra7eelepe iitabaa dhaysana mela Gib7an de7iya he iita asata kessidi nuus immite” yaagidosona. Shin Biniyaameti Isra7eele asay odidaysa si7onna ixidosona.
20.14: Enti Isra7eele asaara oletanaw banta katamatape keyidi issife Gib7an shiiqidosona.
20.15: He gallas Biniyaame katamatape yida mashshan oletiya laatamanne usupun mukulu olanchota shiishidosona. Hessika Gib7an de7iya asaa giddofe dooretida laapun xeetu asaape hara.
20.16: Ha olanchota giddofe laapun xeetu asati haddirsa kushen ootheyisata; enti yambarshan shuchu holidi, hari attoshin issi binaanaka balokona.
20.17: Biniyaame asaa gujonna, Isra7eele asay mashshan oletiya 400,000 olanchota shiishidosona.
20.18: Isra7eele asay dendidi, Beetele bidi, “Biniyaame asaa olanaw nuupe sinthatidi keyanay oonee?” yaagidi Xoossaa oychidosona. Goday, “Yihuda kochay sinthatidi keyo” yaagis.
20.19: Wontetha gallas wonta guura Isra7eele asay dendidi Gib7a katamaa matan shiiqidosona.
20.20: Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Biniyaame asaa olanaw bidi Gib7a katamaa matan salpidosona.
20.21: He gallas Biniyaame asay Gib7ape keyidi, Isra7eele asaape 22,000 olanchota wodhidosona.
20.22: Isra7eele asay issoy issuwa minthethin, koyro gallas enti olas salpida bessan nam7antho salpidosona.
20.23: Isra7eele asay bidi sa7i qammana gakanaw Godaa sinthan yeekidosona. Enti, “Nu ishatara, Biniyaame asatara oletanaw nam7antho keyino?” yaagidi Godaa oychidosona. Goday, “Ee, entara oletanaw keyite” yaagis.
20.24: Isra7eele asay Biniyaame asaara oletanaw nam7antho shiiqidosona.
20.25: Nam7antho gallasika Biniyaame asay Gib7a katamaape keyidi, Isra7eele olanchotape mashshan oletiya 28,000 asaa wodhidosona.
20.26: Hessafe guye, Isra7eeleti ubbay Beetele bidi yeekidosona; yan xoomishe sa7i qammana gakanaw, Godaa sinthan uttidosona. Godaa sinthan xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho shiishidosona.
20.27: He wode Xoossaa caaqo Taabotey Beetele kataman de7iya gisho Isra7eele asay Godaa oychidosona.
20.28: He wode Aarona na7ay, Alaazara na7ay Finihaasi kahinetethan oothees. Isra7eele asay, “Nu isha gidida Biniyaame asaara oletanaw keyinoye attino” yaagidi Godaa oychidosona. Goday, “Bidi oletite; taani enta wonto hinte kushen aathada immana” yaagis.
20.29: Isra7eele asay guutha olanchoti Gib7a katamaa yuushuwan zugidi naagana mela oothidosona.
20.30: Heedzantho gallas Isra7eele olanchoti kaseysada Biniyaame olanchota olanaw bidi, Gib7a katamaape sintha baggara salpidosona.
20.31: Biniyaame asay entara oletanaw katamaape keyidi, enta kaalli keyidi haakidi bidosona. Kaseysada Beetelenne Gib7a efiya dalga ogetaninne dembatan Isra7eele asaape hastamu gidiya asaa wodhidosona.
20.32: Biniyaame asay, “Nuuni kaseysada enta xoonida!” yaagidosona. Shin Isra7eele asay, “Enti katamaape haakidi, ogiya bolla keyana mela ane nuuni baqatoos” yaagidi woxidosona.
20.33: Isra7eele asa ubbay banta bessaafe dendidi, Ba7aal-Tamaara geetetiya bessan salpiya wode Gib7a denban zugidi uttida Isra7eeleti keyidosona.
20.34: Isra7eele asaape dooretida tammu mukulu asay Gib7a bolla ola denthidosona; olay daro wolqaamis. He ubbay haniya wode Biniyaame asaas dhayoy matidaysa eribookona.
20.35: Isra7eeleti Biniyaame asaa bolla xoono demmana mela Goday oothis. He gallas Isra7eele asay Biniyaame asaape mashshan oletiya laatamanne ichashu mukulunne issi xeetu olanchota wodhidosona.
20.36: Hessafe guye, Biniyaame asay xoonetidaysa eridosona. Isra7eele asay Gib7a katamaa yuushuwan zugidi uttida olanchotan ammanetida gisho, Biniyaame asan xoonetidaba daanidi guye shiiqida gishosa.
20.37: Qosetidi naagiya olanchoti Gib7a katamaa ellesi woxi gelidi katamaa giddon demmida ubbaa wodhidosona.
20.38: Qosetidi naagiya asatinne Isra7eele asay cuyaa shaarada denthana mela kase zoreti uttidosona.
20.39: Ola denban de7iya Isra7eele asay baqateysa aggidi, guye simmidi, enta olidosona. Biniyaame asay Isra7eele asaape hastamu gidiya asaa wodhidi, “Kaseysada ha77ika nu enta xoonida” yaagidosona.
20.40: Shin malla cuyay katamaape pude kessi doomis. Biniyaame asay guye xeelliya wode katamay taman xuugetin, cuyay pude keyeysa be7idosona.
20.41: Hessafe guye, Isra7eeleti Biniyaame asaa bolla guye simmidosona. Biniyaame asay wurana haneysa erida gisho dagammidosona.
20.42: Hessa gisho, enti Isra7eele asaa sinthafe bazzo simmidi baqatidosona; shin kessi ekanaw danda7ibookona. Katamatape keyida Isra7eele olanchoti gidduwan enta wodhi wursidosona.
20.43: Isra7eeleti Biniyaame asaa teqidi, Gib7a katamaape doloha baggara de7iya bessaa gakanaw yedethidi darota wodhidosona.
20.44: Yan Biniyaame asaape tammanne hospun mukulu mino olanchoti hayqidosona;
20.45: Entafe attidaysati guye simmidi, bazzuwa kanthidi, Irmoona zaallako baqatidosona. Isra7eeleti entafe ichashu mukulu asaa oge bolla wodhidosona. Entafe attidaysata Gidooma gakanaw yedethidi nam7u mukulu asaa wodhidosona.
20.46: He gallas Biniyaame asaape mashshan oletiya laatamanne ichashu mukulu mino olanchoti hayqidosona.
20.47: Shin usupun xeetu asati bazzuwa kanthidi, Irmoona Zaallako baqatidi, yan oyddu ageena gam7idosona.
20.48: Isra7eele asay attida Biniyaame asaako guye simmidi, addenne macca, naytanne mehiya ubbaa wodhidosona; heeran de7iya katamata ubbaa taman xuuggidosona.

21.1: Isra7eele asay Mixiphan shiiqida wode, “Nu giddofe oonika Biniyaame asas ba na7a macho immofo” yaagidi caaqi uttidosona.
21.2: Isra7eeleti Beetele katamaa bidi, yan sa7i qammana gakanaw Xoossaa sinthan uttidi, banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona.
21.3: Enti, “Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, haysi Isra7eelen ayis hanidee? Hachi Isra7eele asaa giddofe issi kochay ayis pacidee?” yaagidosona.
21.4: Wontetha gallas guura dendidi, yarsho bessi giigisidi, xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho shiishidosona.
21.5: Isra7eeleti, “Isra7eele zare ubbaafe Godaa sinthan shiiqiya bessaa yoonna kochay oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona. Enti hessa oychida gaasoy, “Mixipha kataman Godaa sinthan shiiqanaw yiboona asi oonika hayqo” yaagidi kase caaqida gishosa.
21.6: Isra7eele asay banta ishatas, Biniyaame kochatas qadhetidi, “Hachi Isra7eelepe issi kochay dhayis.
21.7: Nuuni nu macca nayta entaw immonna mela Godan caaqida gisho hayqope attida Biniyaame kochati macho ekana mela nuuni ay oothinoo?” yaagidosona.
21.8: Qassika enti, “Isra7eele kochatape Mixiphan Godaa sinthe yoonnay oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona. Galadan de7iya Yaabesa katamaape issi asika qangethi gathanaw yoonnaysa be7idosona.
21.9: Enti asa taybida wode Galadan de7iya Yaabesape issi asika bentibeenna.
21.10: Hessa gisho, maabaray 12,000 mino olanchota Galadan de7iya Yaabesa katamaa kiittidosona. Enti bidi, “Yaabesan de7iya maccasaanne nayta issuwaka ashshona mashshan buthite.
21.11: Hessada oothidi; addenne addera aqida macca ubbaa wodhite” yaagidi kiittidosona.
21.12: Yaabesa kataman de7iya asaa giddofe addera aqiboona oyddu xeetu geela7o macca nayta demmidosona. Enta Kanaane biittan, Seelon dunkaanida gutaa ekidi yidosona.
21.13: Hessafe guye, kumetha maabaray Irmoona Zaalla matan de7iya Biniyaame asaara sigetanaw cima yeddidosona.
21.14: Biniyaame asati simmidi yidosona. Isra7eele asay Yaabesa katamaape wodhonna ehida geela7o nayta entaw immidosona. Shin geela7ota tayboy addeta taybuwara ginibeenna.
21.15: Isra7eele kochata giddon de7iya issifetethay duuxana mela Goday oothida gisho asay Biniyaametas daro qadhetidosona.
21.16: Maabara cimati, “Biniyaame kochatape maccasi hayqidi wurida gisho, hayqope attida addetas nuuni maccas waatidi demmanee?
21.17: Isra7eele asaa giddofe qushetidi dhayonna mela Biniyaame kochatape attidaysata laattiya na7i daanaw koshshees.
21.18: Gidoshin, nuuni nu macca naytape entaw immanaw danda7oko. Isra7eele asay kase, ‘Ba na7a Biniyaame kochaas immiya uray baadetidaysa gido’ yaagidi caaqetidi uttidosona” yaagidosona.
21.19: Yaatin, cimati, “Heko, laythan laythan Seelon Godaa bonchiya ba7aaley matis” yaagidosona. Seeloy Beetelepe pudeha baggara, Laboonape dugeha baggara, Beetelepe Seekema efiya ogiyape doloha baggara de7ees.
21.20: Hessa gisho, cimati, Biniyaame asata haysada yaagidi kiittidosona; “Bidi woyne gade giddon qosetidi,
21.21: naagite. Seelo katamaa macca nayti ba7aale gallas karaabo oykidi, yexishenne durishe yaa wode hinte woyne gade giddofe keyite. Seelo macca naytape dafi ekidi, Biniyaame biitta efite.
21.22: Enta aawati woyko enta ishati nuuko maggannanaw yaa wode nuuni entako, ‘Hayyana, enta nuus immite; nuuni enta ola bessaafe un7ethidi ekibooko. Hinte dosidi immiboona gisho bala gideketa’ yaagana” yaagidosona.
21.23: Biniyaame asay Isra7eele cimati gidaysada oothidosona. Issoy issoy Seelon yexiya macca naytape baw macho dafidi ekis. Enti banta laata biitta simmidi, katamata zaari keexidi yan de7idosona.
21.24: He wode Isra7eele asay yaape laaletidi, issoy issoy ba kochaako, ba kochaakonne ba soo asaako bis.
21.25: He wode Isra7eele biittan kawoy baawa; asi ubbay baw lo77o daanidaba oothees.

1.1: Isra7eele biitta daynnati aysiya wode he biittan koshi keyis. Issi addey ba macheranne ba nam7u adde naytara Yihuda biittan Beeteleme katamape dendidi Moo7abe biitta guutha wode yan daanaw betis.
1.2: He addiya sunthay Abemeleke, iya mache sunthay Nuhaamo, iya nam7u adde nayta sunthay Mahaloonanne Kelewoona. Enti Yihuda Beetelemen de7iya Efraata yara. Enti Moo7abe bidi yan de7idosona.
1.3: Enti yan de7ishin Nuhaami azinay Abemelekey hayqin, iya ba nam7u naytara attasu.
1.4: He nayti Moo7abe biitta macca naytape Orfanne Uruuto geeteteyisata machidi, tammu laythi de7aape guye,
1.5: Mahalooninne Kelewooni nam7ayka hayqidosona. Nuhaama I azinaynne nam7u nayti hayqin barka attasu.
1.6: Iya Moo7aben de7ishin, Goday ba asa Isra7eeles keehidi kathi entaw immidaysa si7ada ba nam7u nayta machetara Moo7abe biittafe guye simmanaw dendasu.
1.7: Iya ba de7iya bessaafe nam7u ba nayta machetara guye Yihuda efiya oge bolla keyidosona.
1.8: Nuhaama ba nayta machetako, “Hinte ubbatika hinte aaye soo, aaye soo simmite. Hinte hayqidaysatasinne taw keehidaysada Goday hintew keeho.
1.9: Hinte gelana azinata son Goday hintew shempo immo” yaagada yeerada entana anjasu. Entika banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidi,
1.10: “Nuka neera ne asako baana” yaagidosona.
1.11: Shin Nuhaama entako, “Ta nayto hinte soo simmite. Hinte taara ayis beetii? Hintew azina gidana adde nayta hizape guye yelana daanii?
1.12: Ta nayto simmite, taani azina gelonnaada cimas. I wona taani yelana giyako ubba hachi qamma azina gelada adde na7a yeliyakoka,
1.13: hessati diccidi gakanaa gaso entana naaganeyee? Enta gisho gidi azina gelonna attanayee? Ta nayto, hessi hanonnaba gideysa hinte ereeta. Goday tana un7ethida gisho hintefe ta aadho cametas” yaagasu.
1.14: Hessan enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi darsi yeekidosona. Orfi ba azina aayiw yeerada guye simmasu. Shin Uruuta iipe shaaketike gada ganta kana shasho gidasu.
1.15: Nuhaama zaarada, “Be7a, ne azina isha machiya ba asaakonne ba xoossatako simmasu, neka iira simmada ba” yaagasu.
1.16: Shin Uruuta zaarada, “Taani neepe shaaketana melanne nena aggada guye simmana mela tana waaysopa. Neeni biya soo awu gidikonne ta baana, neeni de7iya soo awunka taani daana. Ne derey ta dere gidana, ne Xoossay ta Xoossa gidana.
1.17: Ne hayqiya son ta hayqana, yan moogetana. Hayqope attishin, harabay tana neepe shaakiko, Goday tana pirdo.”
1.18: Uruuta iira baanaw qanxidaysa Nuhaama erada si77i gasu.
1.19: Yaape nam7u maccasati Beeteleme gakanaw bidosona. Bidi enti Beeteleme gakida wode he katama asa ubbay entaban malaaletidosona. Qassi maccasay, “Hanna Nuhaamo?” yaagidosona.
1.20: Iya zaarada ubba danda7iya Xoossay ta de7uwa daro camethida gisho, “Tana Nuhaamo goopite; ‘Maara’ giite.
1.21: Taani kumethi keyada bas, shin Goday tana mela kushe zaaris. Goday tana kawushshis; ubbaa danda7iya Xoossay tana un7ethis. Tana ayis Nuhaame gidi xeegetii?” yaagasu.
1.22: Hessada hanada Nuhaama ba na7aa mache Moo7abe Uruutira simmasu. Enti Beeteleme gakiday bangi buroo caka doometiya wodena.

2.1: Nuhaamis I azina Abemeleke baggara dabbothiya, Boo7eza geetetiya issi eretida dure addey de7ees.
2.2: Issi gallas Moo7abe Uruuta Nuhaamo, “Taw qadhetiya asi kaallada budhe qoranaw kathi cakiya bessi boosha?” yaagasu. Iyaka, “Ee ta naate ba” yaagasu.
2.3: Hessa gisho, Uruuta bada katha cakiya asa geeduwaape budhe qoro doomasu. Piko mela budhiya qoriya gadey Abemeleke dabbuwa Boo7eza gade gidis.
2.4: Heko, guutha wodepe Boo7ezi Beetelemepe gade bidi, kathi cakiya asaa, “Godi wolqa immo” gidi sarothis. Enti zaaridi, “Godi anjo” yaagidosona.
2.5: Yaatin, Boo7ezi kathi cakeyisata kaapuwa, “Hanna na7atetha maccasiya oonee?” yaagidi oychis.
2.6: Katha cakeyisata kaapoy zaaridi, “Hanna yegelsiya Nuhaamira Moo7abe biittafe yida Moo7abe maccasi.
2.7: Iya tana, ‘Katha cakeyisata geeduwa kaallada mirqiya giddofe budhe qoro?’ gada oychasu. Ha77i buroo shempanaw uttawus; wonta guura yoodepe hano gakanaw haysan qorashe gam7asu” yaagis.
2.8: Boo7ezi Uruuto, “Ta naate si7a; hizape budhe qoranaw hara gade boopa. Qassi haysafe awuka qaaxofa. Ta macca aylletara haysan pee7a.
2.9: Asay kathi cakiya bessaa xeella xeellada macca aylletara gidada enta geedo kaallada qora. Adde aylleti nena bochonaada taani entaw odas. Qassi nena saamiko, adde aylleti tikidi wothida haathaafe paqada uya” yaagis.
2.10: Uruuta shoca ziggada, “Taani allaga gidikina? Neeni haysa mela taw qadhetiday aybise?” yaagasu.
2.11: Boo7ezi zaaridi, “Ne azinay hayqosaape doomin, neeni ne azina aayes oothidaba ubba, neeni ne aayiw, ne aawanne ne yeletida biitta aggada, ne eronna deriyara daanaw yidaysa taani geeshshada si7as.
2.12: Neeni oothidabaas Godi new kushe zaaro. Neeni iya qefiya garsan attana gada yida, Isra7eele Goday Xoossay new kumethaba immo” yaagis.
2.13: Uruuta, “Ta godaw, neeni taw daro qadhetadasa; taani ne aylletape issiniwuka gakike, shin taw keehaba hasayada, tana minthethadasa” yaagasu.
2.14: Quma miya wode Boo7ezi, “Haa shiiqa; uythu ekada woyniyan tushada ma” yaagis. Iyaka katha cakiya asa matan uttasu. Boo7ezi iw banga shaashshi immis; iya mada kallin kathay gididi palahis.
2.15: Iya budhe qoranaw dendiya wode, Boo7ezi ba aylleta, “Mirqiya giddofeka iya qoriko iyo yeellayopite.
2.16: Ubbaka mirqiyaafe shoddidi iw yeggite iya eko; iyo kaccofite” yaagis.
2.17: Hessan Uruuta omarsi gakanaw qorasu. Iya qora pe7idaysa qoxin, tammu kilo giraame banga gideysa ekasu.
2.18: Iya he katha ba77a ekada katama simmasu; iya ay mela qoridaako ehada ba azina aayiw bessasu. Qassi iya mishin attida kathi ehidaysa kessada iw immasu.
2.19: I azina aayiya, “Hachi haysa awupe qoradii? Awun ootha pee7adii? New haysada keehida uray anjeto” yaagasu. Yaagin Uruuta iya ba ootha pee7ida gadiya godaaba ba azina aayes odasu. “Taani hachi oothada pee7ida gadiya godaa sunthay Boo7eza geetetees” yaagasu.
2.20: Nuhaama zaarada, “Hayqidaysatasinne de7on de7eysatas ba keehatetha aggiboonna Goday iya anjo” yaagasu. Gujadaka, “Ha addey nuus mata dabbo; nuna ubba wozanaw gathiya asatape issoy iya” yaagasu.
2.21: Moo7abe Uruuta, “I tana, ‘Ta kathay caketidi wurana gakanaw, ta oosanchotape shaaketonashin yada budhe qora’ yaagis” yaagasu.
2.22: Nuhaama ba na7a mache Uruutiko, “Ta naate, tumaka Boo7eza gadiyan oothiya maccasatara biiko new lo77o. Hara asa gade biiko nena metoothana” yaagasu.
2.23: Hessa gisho, bangaynne gistiya cakay wurana gakanaw Uruuta Boo7eza macca aylletako shiiqada, budhiya qorashe gam7asu. Qassi ba azina aayera issife de7asu.

3.1: Issi gallas Nuhaama ba na7a machiw, “Ta naate, neeni giigin daana mela taani new wula koyaako waananee?
3.2: Neeni entara gam7ida macca aylleta goday, Boo7ezi, nuus mata dabbo gidenneyee? I hachi qamma wudumman banga punana.
3.3: Neeni meecetada shitto tiyeta; ne lo77o ma7uwa ma7ada, duge wudumman ba; Bada Boo7ezi midi uyidi simmana gakanaw iya ayfen keyopa.
3.4: I hiixa aadhiya wode I awun dhiskiyako be7ada, iya afila qaarada iya tohoson zin7a agga. Neeni hananaba I new odana” yaagasu.
3.5: Uruuta, “Neeni gidaba ubba ta oothana” yaagasu.
3.6: Hessa gisho, Uruuta dendada duge moothi bada, I azina aayiya iw odidaba ubba oothasu.
3.7: Boo7ezi midi uyidi ba bolla pashkisidaape guye, katha cacha matan aadhidi zin7is. Uruuta lepara shiiqada, iya tohuwa qaarada zin7asu.
3.8: Giddi bilahe gidiyade I dagami dendidi shiretiya wode, issi maccasi iya tohoson zin7idaaro demmis.
3.9: Ika, “Neeni oonee?” yaagidi oychis. Iya, “Taani ne aylliw Uruuto; neeni ta azinaas mata dabbonne tana wozanaw danda7ey nena gidiya gisho ta bolla ne afilaa yegga” yaagasu.
3.10: Boo7ezi zaaridi, “Ta naate, Goday nena anjo! ha keehatethay kase ne oothidaysafe aadhees. Neeni manqo woyko dure gidida na7atetha adde koyabaaka.
3.11: Ha7i ta naate babofa. Neeni oychidaba ubba new taani oothana. Ta kataman de7iya asa ubbay neeni lo77o maccasi gideysa erees.
3.12: Taani mata dabbo gideysi tuma; shin taape daro matey de7ees.
3.13: Hachi qamma haysan aqa. Wonto I nena wozanaw koyiko lo77o, wozo. Shin I wozanaw koyonna ixiko, De7o Goday eriya mela, taani nena wozana. Sa7i wontana gakanaw haysan zin7a” yaagis.
3.14: Hessa gisho, iya Boo7eza tohoson sa7i wontana gakanaw zin7ada aqasu. Boo7ezi, “Maccasi katha moothi yidaysa oonika eropo” gida gisho Uruuta asi ase shaakidi eronna wode wonta, daro guura dendasu.
3.15: Boo7ezi iyo, “Ne ma7ida yida laxana ha bessa” yaagis. Iya bessin laatamu kilo giraame banga maki qolidi iyo ba7isis. Ika ba7ada guye katama basu.
3.16: Uruuta ba azina aayeko simmada yin, Nuhaama, “Ta naate, ne bida allaley waanidee?” yaagada oychasu. Uruutaka Boo7ezi oothidaba ubba odasu;
3.17: Gujadaka, “ ‘Ne azina aayeko mela kushe boopa’ gidi haysa laatamu kilo giraame banga immis” yaagasu.
3.18: Yaagin Nuhaama, “Ta naate, aybi hananeeko eretana gakanaw naaga. Addey hachi ha allaley oge oykonna shempenna” yaagasu.

4.1: Boo7ezi pude katama pengiya matan de7iya dabaaban keyidi uttis. I yan uttidashin kase I odida mata dabboy he bessa yin, Boo7ezi iyako, “La, ha shiiqada haysan utta” yaagis. Ika, shiiqidi uttis.
4.2: Boo7ezi he katama cimatape tammu asata dooridi, “Haysan uttite” yaagis. Entika uttidosona.
4.3: Boo7ezi ba mata dabbuwako “Moo7abe biittafe simmada yida Nuhaama, nu isha Abemeleke gadiya bayzana gawusu.
4.4: Hessa gisho, haysan uttida asa sinthaninne ta katama cimata sinthan, woza gada ta new odanaw qopas. Neepe hari maati bayna gisho neeni wozanaw koyiko woza; ixiko, neepe kaalliya maata dabboy tana gidiya gisho tana erisa” yaagis. I “Taani wozana” yaagis.
4.5: Boo7ezi, “Nuhaamipenne Moo7abe Uruutipe gadiya ne shammiya gallas am7iw Uruutoka woza; yaatiko hayqidaysa sunthay iya laata gadiyan xeegetana” yaagis.
4.6: Ha mata dabboy, “Hessa gidiko, taani wozanaw danda7ike; ayis giiko, hessi ta buzo laata qohees. Hessa gisho, neeni woza, taani danda7ike” yaagis.
4.7: Beni wode Isra7eele biittan wozuwanne laata duuthanaw bayziya woyko laatisiya baggay ba caammaa tohuwape kessidi, hanko shammiya woyko laattiya baggaas immees. Isra7eele biittan zal7esinne laatas maaray haysa.
4.8: Hessa gisho, he mata dabboy Boo7ezako, “Neeni woza” gidi, ba caammaa tohuwape kessidi immis.
4.9: Yaatin, Boo7ezi cimatanne asa ubba, “Taani Abemelekes, Keliwoonasinne Mahiloonas de7iyaba ubba Nuhaamipe shammidaysas hachi hinte marka.
4.10: Qassi hayqidaysa sunthay enta soo asaa suntha giddofe woyko katama asaa taybuwape dhayonnaada iya suntha iya laata gadiyan xeegisanaw kase Mahiloona machiw Uruutoka taani wozeysas hachi hinte ubbay marka” yaagis.
4.11: Katama pengiya dabaaban de7iya cimatinne asa ubbay, “Ee, haysas nuuni marka! Goday hanno ne ekiya maccasiw, Isra7eele asa mayza aayeta gidida Raheelidanne Liyada ootho. Neenika Efraatan dure gida, ne sunthay Beetelemen ereto.
4.12: Ne keethay, Goday, ha na7atetha maccaseepe new immiya zerethan Timaara Yihudas yelida Faaresa keethada ootho” yaagis. Boo7eza Sheesha
4.13: Hessadaka oothidi, Boo7ezi Uruuto ekis iyaka iyaw macho gidasu. Goday iyo qanthatana mela oothin adde na7a yelasu.
4.14: Maccasati Nuhaamo, “Hachi nena heemmana asi dhaysiboonna Goday galatetto! Iya sunthay Isra7eelen dhoqu go!
4.15: Iyan new sa7i simmana, ne cimiya wode I nena heemmana. Ayis giiko, laapun adde naytapeka aathada nena siiqiyaranne new keehiyara, ne na7a machiya new na7a yelasu” yaagidosona.
4.16: Nuhaama na7aa idimmasu; loytha dichasu.
4.17: I shooro maccasati, “Nuhaamis adde na7i yeletis” yaagidi iya sunthaaka Yoobeda gidoosona. Yoobedi Dawita aawa Isseye yelidaysa.
4.18: Faaresa yeletethay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa; Faaresi Hesroona yelis;
4.19: Hesrooni Raame yelis; Raamey Amnadaabe yelis;
4.20: Amnadaabey Na7asoona yelis; Na7asooni Salmoona yelis;
4.21: Salmooni Boo7eza yelis; Boo7ezi Yoobeda yelis;
4.22: Yoobedi Isseye yelis; Isseyey Dawita yelis.

1.1: Derey dariya Efreema biittan, Rama kataman de7iya, Efreema kochenne Zuufa koche gidida, Hilqaana geetetiya issi addey de7ees. I Yirohaama na7a; Yirohaami Elihu na7a; Elihu Toohu na7a; Toohuy Zuufa na7aa.
1.2: Hilqaanas nam7u macheti de7oosona; issinne sunthay Haanno; hankoori sunthay Pinaano. Pinaanis nayti de7oosona, shin Haannas na7i baawa.
1.3: Hilqaani laythan laythan Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa goyinnanawunne iyaw yarshanaw Seelo bees. Eeli nayti nam7ay, Afnaninne Finihaasi Godaa kahine gididi Seelon haggaazosona.
1.4: Hilqaani yarsho yarshiya wode ubban ashuwape issi issi kushe ba mache Pinaanis, ba adde naytasinne macca naytas huuphen huuphen immees.
1.5: Goday Haanno yelo diggikoka, Hilqaani iyo dosiya gisho, iw nam7u kushe immees.
1.6: Goday Haanno yelo diggida gisho, I dawuthiya iyo toochada yiloyawusu.
1.7: Hessi laythan laythan ubba wode haniyaba. Haanna Godaa keethi bida wode ubban I dawuthiya iya yeekana gakanawunne kathi ixana gakanaw yiloyawusu.
1.8: I azinay Hilqaani, “Haanne, ne ayis yeekay? Ayis kathi miikii? Ne wozanay ayis azzanii? Taani new tammu naytape aadhikinayee?” yaagees.
1.9: Issi gallas enti Seelon midaapenne uyidaape guye, Haanna denda eqasu. Kahiney Eeli Godaa keetha pengiya matan ba uttiya bessan uttis.
1.10: Haanna daro azzanida gisho cametada yeekashe Godaa woossasu.
1.11: Iya haysada yaagada qangetasu; “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, tana ne aylliw be7a. Ta metuwa be7ada, tana hassaya; tana ne aylliw dogopa. Neeni taw ne ayllees adde na7a immiko, iya de7o laytha ubban taani iya new immana; iya huuphey polo meedetenna” yaagasu.
1.12: Haanna Godaa woosa adussida wode Eeli I doona be7ees.
1.13: Haanna ba wozanan Xoossaa woossiya wode I mettershay qaaxees, shin I qaalay si7etenna; hessa gisho, Eeli iyo mathotidaada qopis.
1.14: I, “Neeni awude gakanaw mathotay? Woyne ushsha neepe digga” yaagis.
1.15: Haanni zaarada, “Ta Godaw, gidenna; taani daro azzanida maccas; taani ta shempuwafe Godaa woossaysipe attishin, woyne woyko mathoyiya ushshu uyabike.
1.16: Taani metoynne azzanoy darida gisho woossayis. Tana ne aylliw pathenna maccas oothada qopofa” yaagasu.
1.17: Eeli zaaridi, “Saro ba; neeni woossiyaba Isra7eele Xoossay new immo” yaagis.
1.18: Haanna, “Ne aylliya ne sinthan saba demmo” yaagasu. Hessafe guye, iya ba ogiya bada kathi masu; hessafe simmada iya azzanabuuku.
1.19: Wontetha gallas guura dendidi, Hilqaaninne iya soo asay Godaa goynidaape guye, Rama kataman de7iya banta soo simmidosona. Hilqaani ba mache Haannira aqis; Goday iyo qopis.
1.20: Iya qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Haanna, “Taani Godaa woossin I tana si7is” gada iya sunthaa Sameela sunthasu.
1.21: Hilqaani ba soo asa ubbaara laytha yarsho Godaas yarshanawunne qangetha gathanaw Seelo bis.
1.22: Shin Haanna babuku. Iya ba azinaako, “Na7ay dhanthi duuthidaape guye, iya efada, Godaas immana; I merinaw yan daana” yaagasu.
1.23: Hilqaani, “Nena lo77idaba ootha; I dhanthi duuthana gakanaw son gam7anaw danda7aasa; Goday ba gelida qaala new polo” yaagis. Haanna ba na7aa dhanthi duuthana gakanaw son gam7asu.
1.24: Haanna na7ay dhanthi duuthidaape guye, na7aanne heedzu laytha wofaano laatamu kilo giraame dhiillenne ogoro kumetha woyne ushshu ekada Seelon de7iya Godaa keethi basu; he wode na7ay guutha.
1.25: Enti wofaanuwa shukidaape guye na7aa Eeliko efidosona.
1.26: Haanna, “Ta godaw, ne shempoy ero; ne sinthan eqada Godaa woossida maccasiya tana.
1.27: Ha na7aa immana mela woossin, Goday ta woossidaba immis.
1.28: Hessa gisho, taani iya Godaas immas; I ba de7o laytha ubban Godaas imetis” yaagasu. Enti yan Godaa goyinnidosona.

2.1: Haanna haysada yaagada woossasu; “Ta wozanay Godan ufaytees; ta kacey Godan dhoqu gis. Ta morketa bolla taani ceeqetayis; ne ashoy tana ufaysees.
2.2: Godaa mela geeshshi baawa; ne meli oonika baawa. Nu Xoossaafe attishin, hara Zaalli baawa.
2.3: Otoro haasaya aggite; otoro qaali hinte doonape keyopo. Godaa Xoossay ubbaa erees; asa ooso yiggidi xeellees.
2.4: Olanchota dongey meqis; shin daaburanchoti wolqa demmidosona.
2.5: Kallidaysati koshatidi unetidosona; shin koshatidaysati ha77i kallidosona. Maynthiya laapun nayta yelasu; shin daro nayta yelidaara barka attasu
2.6: Goday wodhees, pathees; Si7oolen yeggees, yaape kessees.
2.7: Goday dureyees; Goday manqethees; kawushshees; dhoqu oothees.
2.8: I manqota baanape denthees; metootanchota bidope denthees. Enta boncho asaara utisees; boncho araata laatisees. Biittaa baasoti Godaasa; enta bolla alamiya essis.
2.9: “I geeshshata tohuwa naagees; shin iitata dhuman si77i oothana; asi ba wolqan xoonenna;
2.10: Godaara eqeteysati liiqana; Goday salope enta bolla dadada dechana. Goday sa7an de7iya ubbaa pirdana; I ba kawas minotethi immana; I ba tiyidaysas xoono immana.”
2.11: Hessafe guye, Hilqaani Raman de7iya ba soo bis; shin na7ay Sameeli kahiniya Eelipe garsara Godaas oothees. Eeli Nayta Iitatethi
2.12: Eeli adde nayti iita; enti Godaa bonchokona.
2.13: He wode kahineti asaara de7iya gahetethan oothiya wogi de7ees. Hessika asay yarsho yarshiya wode kahiniya oosanchoy heedzu achara de7iya qaphe ekidi buroo ashoy kaxishin yees.
2.14: Doysiya otuwan woyko distiyan woyko xaaruwan ba qaphiya yeddidi, ay qommo asho gidikoka kessi efidi kahiniyas immees. Yarsho yarshanaw Seelo yaa Isra7eele asa ubbaa bolla enti haysada oothosona.
2.15: Qassi modhuwa yarsho bessan xuugganaape sinthe kahiniya oosanchoy yarsho yarshiya addiyako bidi, “Kahiney qaye ashope attishin, kaxida asho neepe ekonna gisho, iyaw caacanaw asho hamma” yaagees.
2.16: Addey zaaridi, “Koyrottidi modhoy xuugeto; hessafe guye, ne koyeysa eka” yaagees; shin kahiniya aylley, “Akay, taw ha77i imma, ne diggiko, taani wolqan ekana” yaagees.
2.17: Godaas immiya yarshuwa Eeli nayti kadhida gisho, enta nagaray Godaa sinthan aadhidi daris.
2.18: Shin Sameeli na7a de7ishe liinope oosetida efuude ma7o ma7idi Godaa sinthan oothees.
2.19: Sameela aayiya laythan laythan guutha qolle giigisada, laytha yarsho yarshanaw ba azinaara bashe iyaw ekada bawusu.
2.20: Eeli Hilqaananne iya machiw, “Hinte Godaas dummayidi immida ha na7aa bessan Goday new ha machefe hara nayta immo” yaagidi anjees; yaatin, enti banta soo simmoosona.
2.21: Goday Haanna anjin, qanthatada heedzu adde naytanne nam7u macca nayta yelasu. Na7ay Sameeli Godaa sinthan diccis.
