2.22: Eeli daro cimis. Iya nayti Isra7eele asa ubbaa bolla oothida iitabaanne Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen Godaas oothiya maccasatara tunidaysa si7is.
2.23: Hessa gisho entako, “Hinte haysa melaba ayis oothetii? Hinte iita oosuwa taani asa ubbaafe si7as.
2.24: Ta nayto, hessa aggite; Godaa asay hintena giyabay lo77o gidenna.
2.25: Issi asi ase naaqiko, Xoossay iyaw gaannatana; shin asi Godaa naaqiko, iyaw gaannatanay oonee?” yaagis. Goday entana wodhanaw koyida gisho enti banta aawa zoriya si7onna ixidosona.
2.26: Na7ay Sameeli Godaa sinthaninne asa sinthan diccisinne sabetis. Eeli Keetha Bolla Odetida Tinbite
2.27: Issi gallas nabey Eeliko yidi, “Goday haysada yaagees. ‘Ne aawa soo asay Gibxe biittan Paarona kushen de7iya wode ta entaw qoncabikina?
2.28: Ne aaway kahine gididi ta yarsho bessa keyana mela, ixaane cuyisana melanne ta sinthan efuude ma7idi oothana mela Isra7eele zare ubbaafe iya dooras. Isra7eele asay taman yarshiya yarsho ubbaa taani ne aawa kochaas immas.
2.29: Taani ta de7iya bessan shiiqana mela kiitida ta yarshuwanne imuwa hinte ayis kadhidetii? Ta asa Isra7eele, taw shiishida yarsho ubbaafe dooretidaysa midi modhana mela oothada ne nayta taape aathada ayis bonchadii?’
2.30: “Hessa gisho, Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees. Ne kochaynne ne aawa kochay merinaw taw oothana. Shin ha77i hessi taape haako; tana boncheyisata bonchana; tana kadheysati kadhetana.
2.31: Ne kochan asi ceeggonna mela taani ne wolqaanne ne aawa soo asaa wolqaa dhaysiya wodey yaana.
2.32: Neeni ta keethan meto be7ana; taani Isra7eele asaas immiya anjuwa neeni be7ada qanaatana; shin ne soo asan ceeggana asi oonika baawa.
2.33: Taani ta yarsho bessaafe dhaysona asi de7iko, iya gaason ne ayfey afuxishe qooqana; ne wozanay azzanon xuugetana; ne kocha ubbay na7atethan hayqana.
2.34: Ne nayti nam7ay, Afnaninne Finihaasi issi gallas hayqana; hessa new malla gidana.
2.35: Ta wozanaadanne ta qofaada oothiya taw ammanetiya kahine denthana. Taani iyaw ammanetida soo asi immana; taani tiyida kawa sinthan enti ubba wode oothana.
2.36: Ne kochaa giddofe attida ubbay guutha miishe woyko baso uythi woossanaw yidi, iya sinthan gufannidi, ‘Taani miyaba demmana mela kahine oothada tana shuumarki’ yaagana” yaagis.

3.1: Na7ay Sameeli Eelipe garsara Godaas oothees; Godaa qaalay he wode daro al7o; qoncethika baawa.
3.2: Ayfey daaburin waayetidi xeelliya Eeli issi qamma ba bessan zin7is.
3.3: He wode Xoossa xompey buroo to7ibeenna; Godaa Taabotey de7iya keethan Sameeli dhiskis.
3.4: Goday Sameela xeegis; Sameeli, “Yee” gidi koyis.
3.5: I Eeliko woxi bidi, “Neeni xeegin Heko yas” yaagis. Shin Eeli, “Ta nena xeegabike; bada zin7a” yaagin, Sameeli bidi zin7is.
3.6: Qassi Goday, “Sameela” yaagidi nam7antho xeegin, Sameeli dendidi, Eeliko bidi, “Neeni xeegin Heko yas” yaagis. Shin Eeli, “Ta na7aw, ta nena xeegabike; bada zin7a” yaagis.
3.7: Godaa qaalay buroo iyaw qonciboonna gisho, Sameeli Godaa gideysa eribeenna.
3.8: Goday Sameela heedzantho xeegin dendidi, Eeliko bidi, “Neeni xeegin Heko yas” yaagis. Hessan Goday na7aa xeegidaysa Eeli akeekidi,
3.9: “Bada zin7a; I nena xeegiyaba gidiko, ‘Godaw, oda; ta ne aylley si7ayis’ yaaga” gidi, Eeli iyaw odin, Sameeli ba bessaa bidi zin7is.
3.10: Hessafe guye, Goday yidi iya matan eqidi, kaseysada, “Sameela, Sameela” yaagidi xeegis. Sameeli, “Ne aylley si7ees, oda” yaagis.
3.11: Goday Sameela, “Heko, taani asa haythas iitiya issiba Isra7eele bolla oothana hanayis.
3.12: He gallas taani Eeli soo asaa bolla oothana gada odida ubbaa koyrope wursethi gakanaw polana.
3.13: Eeli eridi seeronna aggida iya nayta nagaraa gisho, taani iya soo asaa bolla merinaw pirdanaysa iyaw kase oda wothas.
3.14: Hessa gisho, ‘Eeli soo asaa nagaray yarshoninne imon polo atto geetetenna’ yaagada taani iya soo asaas kase caaqas” yaagis.
3.15: Sameeli wontana gakanaw dhiskis; wontin dendidi, Xoossa keetha pengiya dooyis. Sameeli qoncidaba Eelis odanaw yayyis.
3.16: Eeli, “Ta na7aw, Sameela” yaagidi xeegis. Sameeli, “Yee” gidi koyis.
3.17: Eeli, “Goday new odiday aybee? Taape aykoka qosopa; neeni Xoossay new odidabaape issibaaka taape qosiko, Xoossi nena pirdo” yaagidi oychis.
3.18: Sameeli aykoka qosonna ubbaa Eelis odis. Eeli, “I Godaa; bana lo77idaba ootho” yaagis.
3.19: Sameeli diccishe bis; Goday iyara de7ees. Sameeli odidabaape issi qaalika sa7an wodhenna.
3.20: Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw, Sameeli tuma Godaa nabe gideysa Isra7eele asa ubbay eris.
3.21: Goday Seelon qoncees; yan ba qaalan banatetha Sameelas qoncisees.

4.1: Sameeli odida qaalay Isra7eele ubbaa gakis. Isra7eeleti Filisxeematara oletanaw keyidosona; Isra7eeleti Aben7ezeran dunkaanin, Filisxeemeti Afeeqan dunkaanidosona.
4.2: Filisxeemeti cugan cugan gididi, Isra7eeletara oletanaw dendidosona; olay minnida wode Filisxeemeti Isra7eeleta xoonidi oyddu mukulu gidiya asaa wodhidosona.
4.3: Olanchoti dunkaanida gutaa simmida wode Isra7eele cimati, “Hachi Goday nuna Filisxeemeta kushen ayis aathidi immidee? Nuura baana melanne nu morketa kushepe nuna ashshana mela Godaa Taabotiya Seelope ane ehoos” yaagidosona.
4.4: Hessa gisho, asay Seelo kiittin, kiruubeta giddon araatan uttiya Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa Taabotiya ehidosona. Eeli nayti nam7ay Afnaninne Finihaasi caaqo Taabotiyara yan de7oosona.
4.5: Godaa Caaqo Taabotey asay dunkaanida gutaa gakida wode Isra7eele ubbay biitti qaaxana gakanaw banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Godaa Caaqo Taabotey gakis” yaagidi waassidosona.
4.6: Isra7eeleta waasuwa Filisxeemeti si7idi, “Ibraaweta gutan si7etiya wolqaama waasoy aybee?” yaagidosona. Godaa Taabotey enta gutaa yidaysa Filisxeemeti erida wode,
4.7: Yayyidi haysada yaagidosona; “Xoossay enta gutaa yis; nuna ayye! Haysa melabay haysafe kase hani erenna.
4.8: Nuna ayye! ha wolqaama Xoossaa kushepe nuna ashshanay oonee? Ha Xoossay Gibxeta mela biittan dumma dumma gadon shocis.
4.9: Hinteno Filisxeemeto, minnite! Adde gidite! Hessi hanonna ixiko, hinte enta kase aylletethan haaridaysada enti hintena haarana. Adde gidite; oletite” yaagidosona.
4.10: Filisxeemeti oletidi, Isra7eeleta xoonin Isra7eeleti banta soo soo baqatidosona. He olan daro asay hayqidosona; Isra7eele toho olanchotape hastamu mukulu asay hayqidosona.
4.11: Xoossaa Taabotey di7etis; Eeli nayti nam7ay, Afnaninne Finihaasi hayqidosona. Eeli Hayquwa
4.12: He gallas Biniyaame koche gidida issi addey ola dembafe woxishe yidi Seelo gakis. Ba azzanuwa erisanaw I ba ma7uwa daakidi, ba huuphen biitta qolis.
4.13: He addey gakiya wode Eeli ba wozanan Xoossa Taabotiyas hirgida gisho naagishe oge doonan de7iya ba oydiyan uttis. Addey katama gelidi, hanidaba odin, katama ubbay waaso goochi aggis.
4.14: Eeli he waasuwa si7idi, “Haysi aybi waaso?” yaagis. Addey ellesi bidi Eelis odis.
4.15: Eeli uddufun tammanne hospun laythi gidida cima; iya ayfey daaburidi xeelo aggis.
4.16: Addey Eeliko, “Ola dembafe yiday tana; taani hachi yaape baqatada yas” yaagis. Eeli, “Ta na7aw, yaatin waanidee?” yaagidi oychis.
4.17: Addey, “Isra7eeleti Filisxeemeta sinthafe baqatidosona; daro asi wuris; ne nayti nam7ay Afnaninne Finihaasi hayqidosona; Xoossaa Taabotey di77etis” yaagis.
4.18: Addey Xoossa Taabotiyabaa odida wode pengiya matan de7iya ba oydiyape Eeli guye kundis. I cimanne moollo gidiya gisho morgey meqin hayqis. Eeli Isra7eele biitta oytamu laythi haaris.
4.19: Eeli na7aa Pinihaasa machiya yelanaw wodey wurida qanthe. Xoossaa Taabotey di7etetha, ba bolluwanne ba azinaa hayquwa si7ida wode qoponna iqethi iyo oykin yelasu.
4.20: I shempoy keyiya wode yeliseysati, “Adde na7a yeladasa; yayyofa” yaagidosona. Shin entaw aykoka zaarabuuku; enti giyabaka si7abuku.
4.21: Iya ba na7aa Ikabooda gada sunthasu; Xoossaa Taabotey di7etida gishonne ba bolloynne ba azinay hayqida gisho, “Bonchoy Isra7eelepe shaaketis” yaagasu.
4.22: Iya, “Xoossaa Taabotey di7etida gisho bonchoy Isra7eelepe shaaketis” yaagasu.

5.1: Filisxeemeti Xoossa Taabotiya di77idaape guye Aben7ezerape Ashdooda efidosona.
5.2: Xoossa Taabotiya efidi, Daagone eeqa keethan gelsidi, Daagone misiliya matan wothidosona.
5.3: Ashdooda asay wontetha gallas guura dendidi be7iya wode Godaa Taabotiya sinthan Daagoni gufannidaysa be7idosona. Daagone denthidi, kase bessan essidosona.
5.4: Qassi wontetha gallas guura dendidi be7iya wode Godaa Taabotiya sinthan Daagoni sa7an gufannidaysa be7idosona. He wode Daagone huupheynne iya nam7u kushey meqidi pengiya bolla de7ees; hanko asatethay dumma attis.
5.5: Hachi gakanaw Daagone kahinetinne Ashdoodan de7iya Daagone keetha geliya asati ubbay Daagone pengiya yedhonna xambaali aadhey hessa gishosa.
5.6: Ashdooda katamaa bollanne iya heeran de7iya asaa bolla Godaa kushey deexis; Goday kixa harge yeddidi enta seeris.
5.7: Ashdooda katamaa asay hanidaba be7ida wode, “Isra7eele Xoossaa kushey nu bollanne nu xoossaa Daagone bolla deexida gisho, Isra7eele Xoossaa Taabotey nu matan gam7ofo” yaagidosona.
5.8: Hessa gisho, ichashu Filisxeeme halaqata ubbaa xeegidi, “Isra7eele Xoossaa Taabotiya waatino?” yaagidi oychidosona. Halaqati, “Isra7eele Xoossaa Taabotey Gaate katamaa boo” yaagidi zaaridosona. Isra7eele Xoossaa Taabotiya Gaate efidosona.
5.9: Shin Taabotey Gaate gakidaape guye, Godaa kushey he katamaa bolla deexidi, daro daganthis. Kataman de7iya asaa na7ape cima gakanaw kixa hargen shocis.
5.10: Hessa gisho, Xoossaa Taabotiya Eqroona katama yeddidosona. Xoossaa Taabotey Eqroona geliya wode, Eqroona asay, “Nunanne nu asaa dhaysanaw Isra7eele Xoossaa Taabotiya nuuko ehidosona” yaagidi waassidosona.
5.11: Hessa gisho, enti Filisxeeme halaqata xeegidi, “Nunanne nu asaa dhaysanaape sinthe Isra7eele Xoossaa Taabotiya haysafe diggite; iya iya bessaa guye zaarite” yaagidosona. Godaa kushey katamaa bolla deexida gisho Katama ubbay hayqo dagaman oyketis.
5.12: Hayqope attida asaa kixa hargey un7ethida gisho he katamaa asaa yeehoy salo gakis.

6.1: Godaa Taabotey Filisxeeme biittan laapun ageena uttis.
6.2: He wode Filisxeeme asay banta kahinetanne marota xeegidi, “Godaa Taabotiya nuuni waatino? Nuuni guye iya bessaa iya waati yeddaneeko nuus odite” yaagidosona.
6.3: Enti zaaridi, “Isra7eele Xoossaa Taabotiya guye yeddishe mela kushe yeddofite. Ay hanidika nagara yarshora yeddite. Hessa oothiko hinte paxana; iya kushey hinte bollafe ayis kichiboonako hinte erana” yaagidosona.
6.4: Filisxeeme asay, “Nuuni yeddanaw bessiya nagara yarshoy aybee?” yaagidi oychidosona. Enti, “Hintenanne hinte halaqata gakida gadoy issino gidiya gisho, Filisxeeme halaqata taybon ichashu worqa kixatanne ichashu worqa ecereta yeddite.
6.5: Hinte he kixatanne hinte biitta dhaysiya he ecereta misileta medhidi, Isra7eele Xoossaas boncho immite. Ooni eri I hinte bollafe, hinte xoossata bollafenne hinte biitta bollafe ba kushiya denthana.
6.6: Gibxe asaynne enta kawoy zore ekonna ixidaysada hinte ayis zore ekeketii? Goday enta daro seerin Isra7eeleti banta ogiya baana mela yeddibookona?
6.7: Ha77i issi ooratha gaare giigisite; qambara wothiboona nam7u dhanthiya miizata he gaariyan waaxite; shin marata entafe duuthidi son ashshite.
6.8: Godaa Taabotiya gaariya bolla wothite; nagara yarshos giigisida worqa kixatanne worqa ecereta saaxinen yeggidi Godaa Taabotiya matan wothidi I baana mela yeddite.
6.9: Shin I biya bessa be7ite; I ba zawa oykidi, Beet-Sameesa simmidi biyaba gidiko, ha gaduwa nu bolla ehiday Godaa gideysa bessees. Shin I hara soo biiko haysi nu bolla coo gakisipe attishin, nuna dechiday Godaa kushe gidonnaysa erana” yaagidi zaaridosona.
6.10: Enti geetetidaysada oothidosona; nam7u dhanthiya miizata ekidi, gaaren waaxidosona; marata soo zaaridi gordidosona.
6.11: Enti Godaa Taabotiya, worqa kixanne ecere misileti de7iya saaxiniya gaaren wothidosona.
6.12: Hessafe guye, miizati Beet-Sameesa efiya ogiya oykidi gede haa goonna “Himbaa” gidi waassishe bidosona. Filisxeeme halaqati miizata geedo kaallidi, Beet-Sameesa zawa gakanaw bidosona.
6.13: Beet-Sameesa asay he wode zangaaran giste cakoosona; enti dhoqu gidi xeellidi, Taabotiya be7idi ufaytidosona.
6.14: Gaarey Beet-Sameesan de7iya Iyyasu geetetiya uraa gade gakidi, issi gita shuchaa matan eqis. Enti gaariya mithaa qeridi, xuussa yarsho oothidi he miizata Godaas yarshidosona.
6.15: Leeweti Godaa Taabotiyanne worqa miisheti de7iya saaxiniya gaariyape wodhisidi, gita shucha bolla wothidosona. He gallas Beet-Sameesa asay Godaas xuussa yarshonne hara yarshota yarshidosona.
6.16: Ichashu Filisxeeme halaqati hanidaba ubbaa be7idi he gallas Eqroona simmidosona.
6.17: Worqa kixati Filisxeeme halaqati nagara yarsho oothidi Godaas kiitida Ashdooda, Gaaza, Asqaloona, Gaatenne Eqroona geetetiya ichashu katamata sunthan issuwa issuwa immidosona.
6.18: Worqa ecereta tayboy Filisxeeme halaqata ichashay de7iya gimbetida katamatanne heeran de7iya gutata taybuwa mela. Beet-Sameesan de7iya Iyyasu geetetiya uraa gaden Godaa Taabotiya wothida gita shuchay hachi gakanaw marka gididi de7ees.
6.19: Shin enti Godaa Taabotiyas giddo baggaa be7ida gisho Goday Beet-Sameesa asaape laapun tammu asata wodhis. Goday entafe daro asaa wodhida gisho asay yeekidosona.
6.20: Hessa gisho, Beet-Sameesa asay, “Godaa sinthan, ha geeshsha Xoossaa sinthan ooni eqanaw danda7ii? Taabotey nuupe keyidi oodeko baanee?” yaagidosona.
6.21: Qiriyat-Yi7aariman de7iya asaako kiita yeddidi, “Filisxeeme asay Godaa Taabotiya zaaridosona; yidi iya hinteko ekite” yaagidosona.

7.1: Qiriyat-Yi7aarima asay yidi, Godaa Taabotiya efidi dere huuphen de7iya Amnadaabe son wothidosona. Godaa Taabotiya naagana mela Amnadaabe na7aa Alaazara dummayidi sunthidosona. Sameela Shuumetetha
7.2: Taabotey Qiriyat-Yi7aariman daro wode gam7is; yan laatamu laythi uttis. Isra7eele asa ubbay azzanidi Godaa koydosona.
7.3: Sameeli Isra7eele asaako, “Kumetha wozanape hinte Godaako simmidaba gidiko, allaga xoossatanne Astaroote eeqa hinte giddofe diggite. Hintenatethaa Godaas sheedhite; iya xalaalas kiitetite; I hintena Filisxeemeta kushepe ashshana” yaagis.
7.4: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele asay Ba7aalenne Astaroote eeqa banta giddofe diggidi, Godaa xalaala goyinnidosona.
7.5: Hessafe guye, Sameeli, “Isra7eeleta, ubbay Mixipha shiiqite; taani yan hintew Godaa woossana” yaagis.
7.6: Enti Mixipha shiiqidi haathe duuqidi, Godaa sinthan gussidosona; he gallas xoomidosona; he bessan, “Nuuni Godaa bolla nagara oothida” yaagidi paaxidosona. Mixiphan Sameeli Isra7eele asaa bolla daynnatis.
7.7: Isra7eeleti Mixiphan shiiqidaysa Filisxeeme asay si7ida wode enta olanaw keyidosona. Isra7eeleti hessa si7idi, Filisxeemetas yayyidosona.
7.8: Isra7eele asay Sameelako, “Filisxeeme asaa kushepe nuna ashshana mela neeni Godaa, nu Xoossa woosa aggofa” yaagidosona.
7.9: Sameeli issi dhammiya dorsa na7a ekidi, kumethi xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshis; Isra7eele asaa gisho Godaa woossis; Goday iya woosa si7is.
7.10: Sameeli xuussa yarsho yarshiya wode Filisxeemeti Isra7eeleta olanaw shiiqidosona. Shin he gallas Filisxeemeta bolla Goday gita dada gunthidi daganthin, enti Isra7eeleta sinthafe baqatidosona.
7.11: Isra7eeleti Mixiphafe keyidi, Filisxeemeta yedethidi, Beet-Kaarape garsa baggara de7iya bessaa gakanaw oge bolla wodhidosona.
7.12: Hessafe guye, Sameeli issi shuchu ekidi, Mixiphafenne Shenape giddon essis; “Ha77i gakanaw Goday nuna maaddis” yaagidi he bessaa Aben7ezera gidi sunthis.
7.13: Filisxeeme asay xoonetidosona; enti Isra7eele biitta bolla nam7antho dendibookona. Sameeli de7ida laytha ubban Godaa kushey Filisxeeme asaa bolla deexis.
7.14: Filisxeeme asay Eqroonape Gaate gakanaw Isra7eelepe di77ida katamati Isra7eeles simmidosona. Isra7eele asay banta kase zawa Filisxeeme asaa kushepe wothi ekidosona. Isra7eele asaynne Amoore asay saro de7is.
7.15: Sameeli ba de7o laytha ubban Isra7eele bolla pirdees.
7.16: Sameeli laythan laythan Beetele, Galgalanne Mixipha yuuyidi Isra7eele bolla pirdees.
7.17: Iya keethay Raman de7iya gisho yaa simmidi he bessanka Isra7eele bolla pirdees. I Raman Godaas yarsho bessi keexis.

8.1: Sameeli cimida wode ba nayta Isra7eele bolla daynna oothidi shuumis.
8.2: Iya bayra na7aa sunthay Iyyu7eela; kaalo na7a sunthay Abiya; enti Barsaaben pirdoosona.
8.3: Shin iya nayti banta aawa ogiya kaallibookona. Enti bessonna go77a demmanaw guye simmidosona; wodhaafe ekidosona, suure pirda wobbisidosona.
8.4: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele cimati issife shiiqidi, Sameelako Rama yidi,
8.5: “Heko neeni cimadasa; ne nayti ne ogiya kaallokona; hara kawotethati ootheysada nuna aysiya kawo ha77i nuus shuuma” yaagidosona.
8.6: Enti, “Nuna aysiya kawo nuus imma” gidi oychidaysi Sameela ufaysibeenna. Hessa gisho, Sameeli Godaa woossis.
8.7: Goday Sameela, “Taani enta bolla kawotonnaada nena gidonashin tana ixida gisho asay neeko giyaba ubbaa si7a.
8.8: Enta taani Gibxefe kessida wodiyape doomidi hachi gakanaw tana aggidi, hara xoossata goyinnishe de7idosona. Ha77i enti ta bolla oothida ubbaa ne bolla oothosona.
8.9: Ha77i enti giyaba si7a; shin enta bolla kawotana kawa wogaa entaw minthada oda” yaagis.
8.10: Kawo oychida deriyas Goday odida qaala ubbaa Sameeli yaagidi odis.
8.11: “Hinte bolla kawotana kawoy oothanabay haysa; I hinte adde nayta ekidi, para gaare asatanne para asata oothana; enti iya gaariya sinthan woxana.
8.12: Entafe attidaysata shaalaqatanne hamsalaqata, harata iya biitta goyeyisata iya kathaa cakeyisata, qassi harata iya ola miishenne para gaare miishe ootheyisata kessana.
8.13: Hinte macca naytaka efidi, baw shitto giigiseyisata, katheysatanne uukeyisata oothana.
8.14: Hinte goshshaafe, woyne gadepenne shamaho gadepe lo77o bessata ekidi, ba moorinnatas immana.
8.15: Kathaafenne woyniyape tammaafe issi kushiya ekidi ba shuumatasinne ba moorinnatas immana.
8.16: Hinte adde aylletape, macca aylletape, hinte na7atethatafenne hinte hariyape lo77eysa baw go7etanaw ekana.
8.17: Hinte dorsafenne deeshape tammaafe issi kushe ekana; hinte iya oosancho gidana.
8.18: He gallasay gakida wode hinte doorida kawoy gathiya qohuwa gisho waassana; shin he gallas Goday hinte waasuwa si7enna” yaagis.
8.19: Gidoshin, asay Sameela qaala si7onna ixidi, “Akay, nuus kawoy de7o.
8.20: Hara kawotethata mela nuna kaalethiya, nu sinthan biyanne nu olaa oletiya kawoy de7o.”
8.21: Sameeli asaa qaala ubbaa si7idi, Godaas odis.
8.22: Goday Sameelako, “Enta qaala si7a; enta bolla kawo kawotha” yaagis. Sameeli Isra7eele asaako, “Hinte soo soo simmite” yaagis.

9.1: Biniyaame koche gidida issi Qiisa geetetiya addey de7ees; I eretida asi. I Abi7eela na7a; Abeeli Xaroora na7a; Xaroori Bakoraate na7a; Bakorati Biniyaame koche gidida Afeeqa na7a.
9.2: Iyaw Saa7ola geetetiya issi mala lo77o gidida pantha na7i de7ees. Isra7eeleta giddon iya mela mala lo77oy baawa; I asi ubbay iya hashepe garsan attiya adussa asi.
9.3: Issi gallas Saa7ola aawa Qiisa hareti dhayidosona; Qiisi ba na7aa Saa7olako, “Oosanchotape issuwa ekada hareta koyanaw ba” yaagis.
9.4: Enti derey dariya Efreema biittaranne Shalisha biittara koyishe aadhidosona, shin hareta demmibookona. Qassi Sha7alima biittara koyishe aadhidosona, shin yanka hareti dookona. Biniyaame biittara aadhidosona, shin yanka demmibookona.
9.5: Enti Zuufa biitta gakida wode Saa7oli baara de7iya oosanchuwako, “Haaya; ane guye simmoos; aaway haretaba qopeysa aggidi, nuus hirgana” yaagis.
9.6: Shin oosanchoy, “Heko, issi bonchetida Xoossa asi ha kataman de7ees; I odiya ubbay poletees. Ane ha77i yaa boos; ooni eri nu baana ogiya I nuus odaneko” yaagis.
9.7: Saa7oli, “Nu biyaba gidiko iyaw ay immanee? Nu oykida kathay wuris; nu Xoossa asas immiyabay baawa. Nuus aybi de7ii?” yaagis.
9.8: Oosanchoy zaaridi, “Ta kushen guutha bira santimey de7ees; nu baana ogiya nuus odana mela Xoossa uraas hanno immana” yaagis.
9.9: (Beni wode Isra7eele biittan issi asi Xoosse oychanaw bishe, “Ane qoncethi be7iya asako boos” yaagees. Ha77i nabe geeteteysi he wode qoncethi be7iya asi geetetees.)
9.10: Saa7oli zaaridi, “Lo77o; yedha” yaagin, Xoossa uray de7iya katamaa bidosona.
9.11: Enti pude katamaa keyishin, haathe tikanaw yaa geela7otara ogen gahetidi, “Qoncethi be7iya asi haysan de7ii?” yaagidi oychidosona.
9.12: Enti, “Ee de7ees; I hintefe sinthan de7ees; ellesidi biite. Hachi asay dhoqa goyinno bessan yarsho yarshiya gisho, I nu katamaa yis.
9.13: Hinte katamaa geliya wode I maanaw dhoqa goyinno bessaa keyonna de7ishin hinte iya demmana. I yarshuwa anjanaw koshshiya gisho I gakonna de7ishin asay kathaa meenna. I anjidaape guye xeegetidaysati maana. Elle keyite; hinte iya ha77i demmana” yaagidosona.
9.14: Enti katamaa geliya wode Sameeli goyinno bessaa keyanaw bishe entara gahetis.
9.15: Saa7oli yaanape kase gallas Sameelas Goday haysada yaagidi qoncisis;
9.16: “Wonto hannoode Biniyaame biittafe issi asi ta neeko yeddana; I ta asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela tiya. I ta asaa Filisxeeme kushepe ashshana; ta asa waasoy taako gakida gisho ta enta be7as” yaagis.
9.17: Sameeli Saa7ola be7ida wode Goday, “Taani new odida uray haysa; I ta asaa kaalethana” yaagis.
9.18: Saa7oli gimbe dirsa pengiya matan de7iya Sameelako shiiqidi, “Qoncethi be7iya ura soy awuneko taw odarkii?” yaagis.
9.19: Sameeli zaaridi, “Qoncethi be7ey tana. Hachi hinte taara miya gisho taape sinthatidi goyinno bessaa biite. Taani nena wonto guura yeddana; ne wozanan de7iya ubbaa ta new odana.
9.20: Heedzu gallasape sinthe dhayida haretaba gidiko enti bentida gisho hirgofa. Isra7eele asa ubbaa amoy oonee? Nenanne ne aawa soo asaa gidennee?” yaagis.
9.21: Saa7oli zaaridi, “Shin taani Isra7eele zare ubbaafe laafa gidida Biniyaame koche gidikina? Ta soo asay Biniyaame kochaa giddon guutha gidennee? Neeni ayis taw haysa melaba oday?” yaagis.
9.22: Hessafe guye, Sameeli Saa7olanne iya oosanchoy efidi, dalga keethi gelsidi he bessaa xeegetida hastamu gidiya asaa giddon boncho bessan utisis.
9.23: Sameeli kathi katheysako, “Ne matan dumma wothashsha gada taani new immida ashuwa hamma” yaagis.
9.24: Kathi katheysi missa ashuwa ehidi, Saa7ola sinthan wothis. Sameeli Saa7olako, “Ta new dumma shaakada wothida ashoy haysa; ekada ma. Taani imathata xeegida wodepe doomada haysa new ashshas” yaagis. He gallas Saa7oli Sameelara mis.
9.25: Enti goyinno bessaafe duge katama wodhin, keetha bolla de7iya bessan Sameeli Saa7olara odetis.
9.26: Sa7i wontin, Sameeli Saa7ola keetha bollafe xeegidi, “Denda; ta nena moyzana” yaagis. Saa7oli dendin, nam7ay oge bolla keyidosona.
9.27: Enti katama gaxa gakishin, Sameeli Saa7olako, “Ne oosanchoy sinthe baana mela oda” yaagis. Oosanchoy sinthe aadhidi bin, Sameeli Saa7olako, “Xoossi gidaba ta new odana mela haysan guuthu gam7a” yaagis.

10.1: He wode Sameeli tigiyabara zayte ekidi, Saa7ola huuphen tiyis. Saa7ola yeeridi, haysada yaagis; “Ba asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela Goday nena tiyis.
10.2: Neeni hachi taape shaaketada biya wode Raheeli duufuwa matan Biniyaame zawan de7iya Xalxaha geetetiya bessan nam7u asatara gahetana. Enti nena, ‘Ne koyanaw bida hareti bentidosona; ha77i ne aaway hareta qopeysa aggidi, ta na7ay waanidesha?’ yaagidi new hirgees” yaagidi odana.
10.3: Neeni he bessaafe dendada, Taabore gita mithaa gakanaw baana. Xoossaako Beetele biya heedzu asati yan neera gahetana. Entafe issoy heedzu deesha mari tookis; nam7anthoy heedzu uythi tookis; heedzanthoy ogoro kumitha woyne tookis.
10.4: Enti nena sarothana; new nam7u uythu immana; ne enta kushepe he uythaa ekanaw koshshees.
10.5: “Hessafe guye, neeni Filisxeeme olanchota cugay de7iya Xoossa deriya Gib7a baana. Neeni he katamaa gakiya wode diithara karaabora, suusul7enne zaye punnidi kaa7ishenne tinbite odishe, goyinno bessaafe wodhiya nabe cugara gahetana.
10.6: Godaa Ayyaanay ne bolla wolqan wodhana; neeni entara tinbite odana; neeni laametada hara asi gidana.
10.7: Ha mallati poletiya wode Xoossay neera de7iya gisho ne oothanaw danda7iyaba ubbaa ootha.
10.8: “Neeni taape sinthatada Galgala wodha. Taani xuussa yarshonne sarotetha yarsho yarshanaw neeko baana. Ta neeko bada ne oothanaba odana gakanaw laapun gallas gam7a” yaagis. Saa7oli Kawotis
10.9: Saa7oli Sameelape shaaketida wode Xoossay Saa7ola wozanaa laammis; Sameeli odida mallati ubbay he gallas hanidosona.
10.10: Saa7olinne iya aylley Gib7a gakiya wode nabe cugay iyara gahetis. Xoossa Ayyaanay iya bolla wolqara wodhin I enta giddon tinbite odetis.
10.11: Saa7ola kase eriya ubbay I nabetara tinbite odeteysa be7ida wode, “Qiisa na7ay waanidee? Saa7oli nabe yaree?” yaagidosona.
10.12: He bessan de7iya issi uray, “Nu enta aaway ooneko eriw?” yaagidi oychis. Hessa gisho, “Saa7oli nabe kochee?” geysi hayse gidis.
10.13: Saa7oli tinbite odeysa wursidaape guye goyinno zumaa bolla keyis.
10.14: Saa7ola aawa ishay Saa7olanne iya aylliya, “Awu bidetii?” yaagis. Saa7oli, “Hareta koyanaw bida; hareti bentonna ixin Sameela oychanaw bida” yaagis.
10.15: Saa7ola aawa ishay, “Hayyana Sameeli new gidaba taw odarkii” yaagis.
10.16: Saa7oli, “Hareti bentidaysa nabey Sameeli nuus geeshshidi odis” yaagis. Shin “Ne kawo gidana” gidi Sameeli iyaw odidaysa ba aawa ishas odibeenna.
10.17: Hessafe guye, Sameeli Mixiphan Isra7eele asaa Godaa sinthan shiishis.
10.18: Enta, “Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; ‘Taani Isra7eele Gibxefe kessas; Gibxe asaa kushepenne hintena un7ethiya kawotethata ubbaa kushepe ashshas.’
10.19: Shin hachi hintena hinte metuwapenne waayiyape ashshiya tana hinte Xoossaa ixideta. ‘Akay, nuus kawo kawotha’ yaagideta. Hessa gisho, ha77i hinte, hinte kochan kochan gididi Godaa sinthe shiiqite” yaagis.
10.20: Sameeli Isra7eele zare shiishin, Biniyaame kochay dooretis.
10.21: Biniyaame kochaa shiishin, Maxira kochay dooretis. Wursethan Qiisa na7ay Saa7oli dooretis; enti iya koydosona, shin I bentibeenna.
10.22: Hessa gisho enti, “Addey ha bessaa yidee?” yaagidi Godaa oychidosona. Goday, “Ee, Saa7oli miishe giddon qosetidi uttis” yaagis.
10.23: Enti woxi bidi, qosetida bessaafe kessi ehidosona. Asaa giddon I eqiya wode asi ubbay iya hashepe garsara attiya adussa asi.
10.24: Sameeli asaako, “Goday doorida addiya be7itee? Iya daaniya asi ha asa giddon oonika baawa” yaagis. Asa ubbay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Kawoy birata tuussi gido” yaagis.
10.25: Hessafe guye, Sameeli kawotetha wogaa asaas odis; xaatha maxaafan he wogaa xaafidi Godaa sinthan wothis. Yaatidi Sameeli asa ubbaa ba soo soo moyzis.
10.26: Saa7oli ba soo Gib7a bis; Xoossay enta wozanaa bochida mino asati Saa7olara bidosona.
10.27: Shin issi issi pathonna asati, “Ha addey nuna waatidi ashshanee?” yaagidosona. Enti iya kadhidi, iyaw ay imotaka immibookona. Shin Saa7oli si77i gis.

11.1: Issi ageenape guye, Amoone kawoy Na7oosi dendidi, Galadan de7iya Yaabesa katamaa teqis. Yaabesa asay, “Neeni nuura caaqa; nuuni new haaretana” yaagidosona.
11.2: Na7oosi, “Taani hintera caaqanay hinte ushacha ayfiya wooca kessada Isra7eele kawshidaape guyena” yaagis.
11.3: Yaabesa cimati Naa7osako, “Isra7eele biitta ubbaa nuuni kiita yeddana mela laapun gallas taka; nuna ashshiya asi dhayiko nuuni new kushe immana” yaagidosona.
11.4: Kiitetida asay Saa7oli de7iya bessaa Gib7a gakidi ha odaa asaas odidosona; asa ubbay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona.
11.5: He wode Saa7oli ba boorata laaggidi goshshafe yishe, “Asay waanidee? Ayis yeekona?” yaagidi oychis. Enti Yaabesa asay gidaba iyaw odidosona.
11.6: Ha qaala Saa7oli si7ida wode Xoossa Ayyaanay iya bolla wolqan wodhis; Saa7oli shene eexis.
11.7: Saa7oli waaxa boorata muxerethidi, “Saa7olanne Sameela kaallidi, keyonna asa boorati haysada muxetana” yaagidi kiitetida asata bolla Isra7eele biitta ubba yeddis. He wode asa ubbay Godaas yayyidosona; enti issi asada hanidi keyidosona.
11.8: Saa7oli Beezeqan enta shiishidi taybida wode Isra7eele asay heedzu xeetu mukulu; Yihuda asay hastamu mukulu gidis.
11.9: Kiitetida asay, “Bidi Yaabesa Galada asaas, ‘Wonto xalqey michiya wode nuuni hintena ashshana yaagidi odite’ ” yaagidosona. Kiitetida asay bidi, Yaabesa asaas hessa odin, enti daro ufaytidosona.
11.10: Yaabesa asay Amoonetako, “Nuuni wonto hintew kushe immana; hinte nu bolla dosidaba oothite” yaagidosona.
11.11: Wontetha gallas Saa7oli ba asaa heedzu cugan shaakis. Enti sa7i wontiya wode Amoone asay dunkaanida gutaa gelidi, xalqey michana gakanaw Amooneta goyridosona. Goyretethaafe attidaysati nam7u asi issife doonnaada baw baw baqaatis.
11.12: Isra7eele asay Sameelako, “Saa7oli nu bolla kawotane yaagida asati oonantee? Enti ooneko kessite; nu enta wodhana” yaagis.
11.13: Shin Saa7oli, “Hachi Goday Isra7eele ashshida gisho issi asika hayqenna” yaagidi zaaris.
11.14: Sameeli, “Haayite; Galgala bidi, yan Saa7oli kawo gideysa zaaridi erisoos” yaagis.
11.15: Hessa gisho, asa ubbay Galgala bidi, Godaa sinthan Saa7oli kawo gideysa erisidosona. Yan issifetetha yarsho Godaa sinthan yarshidosona. Saa7olinne Isra7eele asa ubbay he bessan ba7aale ufaysan bonchidosona.

12.1: Sameeli Isra7eele ubbaako, “Hinte taw odida ubbaa si7ada, hinte bolla kawo kawothas.
12.2: Ha77i hintena kaalethanaw kawoy de7ees. Taani daro cimada puulumas; ta nayti hintera de7oosona. Taani ta na7atethafe doomada hachi gakanaw hintena kaalethas.
12.3: Heko, taani hinte sinthan eqas; Godaa sinthaninne I tiyida kawa sinthan ta bolla markatite. Taani oodde booru ekadina? Oodde hare ekadina? Oona cimmadina? Oona un7ethadina? Be7ashe be7onnaada hananaw oodefe wodhaafe ekadina? Haysatape issuwa taani oothidaba gidiko taw odite; ta qanxana” yaagis.
12.4: Enti zaaridi, “Neeni nuna cimmabaaka; woyko nuna un7ethabaaka; ne oodde kushepe aybaka ekabaaka” yaagidosona.
12.5: Sameeli, “Hinte ta kushen ay balaka demmiboonaysa Godaynne I tiyida kawoy hachi hinte bolla marka” yaagis. Asay, “Ee, Xoossay marka” yaagidosona.
12.6: Qassika Sameeli, “Musenne Aarona dooridaynne hinte mayzata Gibxefe kessiday Godaa.
12.7: Ha77i hintewunne hinte mayzatas Goday oothida xillo ooso ubbaas taani hintenera Godaa sinthan mootetana mela haysan eqite.
12.8: Yayqoobinne iya soo asay Gibxen de7ishin, Gibxe asay enta un7ethida wode hinte mayzati Godaako waassidosona. Goday Musenne Aarona kiittis; enti hinte mayzata Gibxefe kessidi haysan wothidosona.
12.9: “Shin Isra7eele asay Godaa banta Xoossaa dogidosona. Goday enta Haxoora tora mocona Sisaara kushen, Filisxeeme asaa kusheninne Moo7abe kawa kushen aathidi immin enta olidosona.
12.10: Enti, ‘Nuuni nagara oothida; Godaa aggidi, Ba7aalenne Astaroota goyinnida. Shin ha77i ne nuna nu morketa kushepe ashsha; nuuni nena goyinnana’ yaagidi Godaako waassidosona.
12.11: Goday Gediyoona, Baaraqa, Yoftaahenne Sameela kiittidi, hinte yuusho ubban de7iya morketa kushepe hintena ashshis. Yaatin, hinte saro de7ideta.
12.12: “Amoone kawoy Na7oosi hinteko yidaysa be7ida wode Goday hinte Xoossay hinte kawo gidikoka, hinte, ‘Akay, nuuni kawo koyoos’ yaagideta.
12.13: Ha77i hinte dooridanne oychida kawoy haysish. Heko, Goday hinte bolla kawothis.
12.14: Hinte Godaas yayyiko, iyaw kiitetiko, iya qaala si7iko, iya kiitaa bolla makallonna ixiko, hintenne hinte bolla kawotiya kawoy Godaa hinte Xoossaa kaalliko ubbabay suurana.
12.15: Shin hinte Godaa qaalas kiitetonna ixikonne iya kiitaa bolla makalliko, Godaa pirday kase hinte aawata bolla yidaysada hinte bollaka yaana.
12.16: “Hiza minnidi eqite; Goday hinte ayfiya sinthan oothana gitaba be7ite.
12.17: Ha77i giste caka wode gidennee? Goday dadanne ira yeddana mela taani Godaa woossana. Hinte kawo oychidi, Godaa sinthan ay mela iitaba oothidaako hinte akeekana” yaagis.
12.18: Sameeli Godaa woossis; Goday he gallas dadanne ira yeddis; hessa gisho, asay Godaanne Sameela daro yayyidosona.
12.19: Asay, “Nuuni kawo oychidi, nu nagara ubbaa bolla ha iitatethaa gujida gisho nuuni ne aylleti hayqonna mela nuus Godaa ne Xoossaa woossarki” yaagis.
12.20: Sameeli asaako, “Yayyofite; hinte ha iitatetha ubbaa oothideta; shin hinte kumetha wozanan Godaas kiitetite; iya kaalo aggofite.
12.21: Pathonnaba gidiya gisho maaddonnanne ashshona eeqata kaallopite.
12.22: Goday ba gita sunthaa gisho ba asaa aggenna; I hintena ba ase oothanaw ufaytees.
12.23: Hinte gisho woosa aggada Godaa qohoy taape haako; taani hintena lo77onne suure ogiya tamaarsana.
12.24: Godaa yayyite; hinte kumetha wozanan ammanetidi, iyaw kiitetite; hintew I oothida gitaba hassayite.
12.25: Shin hinte zaari zaari nagara oothiko, hintenne hinte kawoy dhayana” yaagis.

13.1: Saa7oli kawotiya wode iyaw laythi hastama; I Isra7eele bolla nam7u laythi kawotidaape guye,
13.2: Isra7eeleta giddofe heedzu mukulu asi dooris. Entafe nam7u mukulu asay Mikmaasaninne derey dariya Beetele biittan Saa7olara de7ees. Issi mukulu asay qassi Biniyaamen de7iya Gib7an Yoonatanara de7ees; attida asaa Saa7oli enta soo soo yeddis.
13.3: Yoonataani Gib7an de7iya Filisxeeme olanchota olis; Filisxeeme asay hessa si7idosona. Hessafe guye, Saa7oli, “Ibraaweti haysa si7o” gidi biitta ubban moyze punisis.
13.4: Saa7oli Filisxeeme asaa olidi xoonidaysa Isra7eele asay si7idosona; Isra7eele asay Filisxeeme asaa matan ixetidaysata gideysa eridosona. Isra7eele asay Saa7ola kaallanaw xeegetidi Galgalan shiiqidosona.
13.5: Filisxeeme asay Isra7eele asaa olanaw heedzu mukulu para gaaretara, usupun mukulu para asataranne abba doonan de7iya shafeda darida olanchotara shiiqidosona. Enti bidi, Beet-Aweenape doloha baggara de7iya Mikmaasan zugidi uttidosona.
13.6: Isra7eele asay sa7i entaw iita gideysanne olanchoti dagammidaysa be7ida wode gongolon, buuren, zaalla giddon, kakan, haatha ollan qosetidosona.
13.7: Ibraawetape guuthati Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi, Gaadenne Galada biitta bidosona. Shin Saa7oli Galgalan attis; iyara de7iya olanchoti ubbay yashshan kokoridosona.
13.8: Saa7oli Sameeli keerida laapun gallas gakanaw gam7is; shin Sameeli Galgala yibeenna; yaatin, Saa7olara de7iya olanchoti laaletethi doomidosona.
13.9: Hessa gisho, Saa7oli, “Xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarshota taw ehite” yaagidi, xuussa yarsho yarshis.
13.10: Saa7oli xuussa yarshuwa yarshidi polidaape guye Sameeli yis. Yaatin, Saa7oli Sameela mokanaw kare keyis.
13.11: Sameeli, “Ha neeni oothidabay aybee?” yaagidi Saa7ola oychis. Saa7oli, “Asay laaletanaw matidaysa, neka gida wodiyan yaanaw gam7idaysanne Filisxeemeti Mikmaasan shiiqidaysa taani be7as.
13.12: Hessa gisho, ‘Filisxeemeti taara oletanaw Galgala wodhana hanoosona; taani Godaa maado oychabike’ gada qopas. Yaatin, xuussa yarsho yarshanaysi taw attonnaba gidis” yaagidi zaaris.
13.13: Sameeli, “Neeni boozaba oothadasa; Goday, ne Xoossay new immida kiitaa naagabaaka. Neeni naagidaako Goday hachi ne kawotethaa Isra7eele bolla merinaw minthanashin.
13.14: Shin ha77i ne kawotethay gam7enna; neeni Godaa kiita naagaboonna gisho, Goday ba wozanaada oothiya asi demmis; ba asaa kaalethana mela iya dooris” yaagis.
13.15: Sameeli Galgalape dendidi, Biniyaamen de7iya Gib7a bis. Saa7oli baara de7iya asaa taybin, asay usupun xeetu gidis.
13.16: Saa7oli, iya na7aa Yoonataaninne entara de7iya asay Biniyaamen de7iya Gib7an gam7idosona; Filisxeeme asay Mikmaasan dunkaanidosona.
13.17: Filisxeeme olanchoti heedzu cugan shaaketidi keyidosona. Entafe issi cugay Shu7aala biittan de7iya Ofirako simmidi bis;
13.18: Nam7anthoy Beet-Horonako bis; heedzantho cugay mela biitta sinthan de7iya Saboyma zangaara duge xeelliya zawa ogiya oykidi bis.
13.19: Filisxeeme asay, “Ibraaweti mashshenne toora qoxofo” gida gisho, Isra7eele biittan birata qoxiya asi baawa.
13.20: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele asay banta marasha, konte, kaltanne baaca poshisanaw Filisxeeme boosona.
13.21: Marashanne konte poshisanaw hospun giraame deexiya bira qanxoosona; kaltanne xooxe poshisanaw oyddu giraame qanxoosona.
13.22: Hessa gisho, ola gallas Saa7olinne iya na7aa Yoonataani attishin, harata kushen toorinne mashshi baawa.
13.23: Filisxeeme cugay Mikmaasa pinthi baanaw keyis.

14.1: Issi gallas Saa7ola na7ay Yoonataani ba ola miishiya tookiya panthaako haysada yaagis; “Haaya; hefinthan de7iya Filisxeemeti dunkaanida gutaa ane boos” yaagis. Shin ba aawas hessa odibeenna.
14.2: He wode Saa7oli Gib7a matan Migroonan, oromaane mitha garsan de7ees. Iyara usupun xeetu asati de7oosona.
14.3: Seelon Godaa kahine gidida Eeli na7ay, kahiney Finihaasi yelida Ikabooda ishay, Akxuuba na7ay, Akiyi efuude ma77idi, enta giddon de7ees. Yoonataani enta giddon baynaysa oonika eribeenna.
14.4: Yoonataani Filisxeemeti dunkaanida gutaa pinnanaw biya ogiya bolla ushacha bagganinne haddirsa baggan, issoy Boxexa, hankoy Sana geetetiya nam7u pooxetida gita zaallati de7oosona.
14.5: Zaallatape issoy pudeha baggan Mikmaasa sinthan de7iya wode, issoy qassi dugeha baggan Gib7a sinthan de7ees.
14.6: Yoonataani ba ola miishiya tookiya panthaako, “Haaya; ha qaxaretiboona asay dunkaanida gutaa ane boos. Goday nu gisho oletonna aggenna; daro asan gidin guutha asan, ashshanaysi Godaa xoonenna” yaagis.
14.7: Iya ola miishiya tookeysi, “Neeni qopidaba ubbaa ootha; guye goopa; ta wozanay neera de7ees” yaagis.
14.8: Yoonataani, “Yaako haaya; hefinthi pinnidi asaas bentoos.
14.9: Enti, ‘Nuuni hinteko yaana gakanaw yan naagite’ giiko, nuuni de7iya bessan naaganaape attishin, entako booko.
14.10: Shin enti, ‘Nuuko haa yiite’ giiko, nuuni entako keyana. Hessi Goday enta nu kushen aathidi immidaysas malla gidana” yaagis.
14.11: Enti nam7ay keyidi Filisxeemetas bentida wode Filisxeemeti, “Heko, Ibraaweti banta qosetida ollafe zuumidi keyoosona” yaagidosona.
14.12: Filisxeeme olanchoti, Yoonatananne ola miishiya tookeysa xeegidi, “Haa nuuko keyite; nuuni hintena issiba bessaana” yaagidosona. Hessa gisho, Yoonataani ba ola miishiya tookeysako, “Tana kaallada ha keya. Goday enta Isra7eele kushen aathidi immis” yaagis.
14.13: Yoonataani ba ola miishiya tookeysa kaalethidi, tohoninne kushen zuumidi keyis. Filisxeemeta Yoonataani shocidi yeggin, iya ola miishiya tookeysi kaallidi enta wodhis.
14.14: He koyro olan Yoonataaninne iya ola miishiya tookeysi bagga boora soo gaden laatamu gidiya asi wodhidosona.
14.15: Hessafe guye, gutanin goshshan, olas keyida asatinne naagon de7iya Filisxeemeti dagammidosona. Biitti qaaxis; he dagamay Xoossafe kiitetis.
14.16: Saa7oli Biniyaame biittan, Gib7an wothida wochiya asati, Filisxeeme olanchoti yaara haara piski gidi laaleteysa be7idosona.
14.17: Yaatin, Saa7oli baara de7iya asaako, “Ane olanchota shiishidi nu giddofe ooni bidaako be7ite” yaagis. Enti shiishidi taybiya wode Yoonataaninne iya ola miishiya tookeysi baynaysa be7idosona.
14.18: Saa7oli kahiniya Akiya, “Xoossaa Taabotiya haa ekada ya” yaagis. He wode Taabotey Isra7eelera de7ees
14.19: Saa7oli kahiniyara haasayishin, Filisxeemeti dunkaanida gutan wocamay dari dari bis. Hessa gisho, Saa7oli kahiniya, “Taabotiyape ne kushiya kessa” yaagis.
14.20: Hessafe guye, Saa7olinne iya olanchoti shiiqidi olaa bidosona. Filisxeeme asa ubbay hanana ba dhayidi, banta mashshan issoy issuwa buthidosona.
14.21: Kase Filisxeeme asaara wolla olla bessa bida Ibraaweti enta aggidi, Saa7olaranne Yoonatanara de7iya Isra7eele asaara walaketidosona.
14.22: Derey dariya Efreema biittan qosetida hara Isra7eeletika Filisxeemeti baqateysa si7idosona. Entika Isra7eeletara walaketidi yedetho oykidosona.
14.23: Goday he gallas Isra7eele asaa ashshis. Beet-Aweenape hefinthi gakanaw olay kanthis. Yoonataana Eessa Muussa
14.24: He gallas Isra7eele asay koshan labbanidosona. Saa7oli, “Sa7i qammanaape sinthe taani ta morketa halo keyonna de7ishin, kathi miya oonika baadetidaysa gido” yaagidi asaa caaqisidi wothis. Hessa gisho, olanchotape kathi doonako shiishida asi oonika baawa.
14.25: Olanchoti ubbay wora giddo geliya wode mitha bolla eessi de7ees.
14.26: Enti wora giddon eessi xokeysa be7idosona; shin caaquwa yayyida gisho, issi asika ba kushiya doonako shiishibenna.
14.27: Shin Yoonataani iya aaway asara oda qachidaysa si7ibeenna. Hessa gisho, ba kushen de7iya xam7a xeeraa ililo eessan yeddi kessidi, laacin iya ayfey xeellis.
14.28: Hessafe guye, olanchotape issoy, “Ne aaway olanchota ubbaa, ‘Hachi kathi miya asi baadetidaysa gido’ yaagidi, caaqisidi wothis; asa ubbay labbaniday hessasa” yaagis.
14.29: Yoonataani, “Ta aaway biittas meto medhis. Taani ha eessaafe guuthara laaccida ay mela minnidaako be7a.
14.30: Asay ba morketape di77ida kathaafe hachi midaba gidiyako lo77oshin; enti wodhana Filisxeemeta tayboyka ay mela daraneshin” yaagis.
14.31: He gallas Isra7eele asay Mikmaasape Eloona gakanaw Filisxeemeta shoci simmidi daaburidosona.
14.32: Enti di77ida dorsata, miizatanne marata shukidi suuthaa gussonna midosona.
14.33: Issi asi Saa7olako, “Heko, asay suuthara de7iya asho midi, Godaa sinthan nagara oothosona” yaagis. Saa7oli, “Hinte nagara oothideta; gita shuchu gondorsidi elle taako haa shiishite” yaagis.
14.34: Hessafe guye, “Asaa giddo bidi, ‘Hinte issoy issoy hinte mehetanne dorsata taako haa ehite; haysan wogaada shukidi miite. Suuthara de7iya asho midi, Godaa sinthan nagara oothopite’ yaaga” yaagis. Hessa gisho, he qamma issoy issoy ba boora ehidi yan shukidosona.
14.35: Saa7oli he bessan Godaas yarsho bessi gimbis; Godaas yarsho bessi gimbishin haysi iyaw koyro.
14.36: Saa7oli, “Hachi qamma Filisxeemeta kaalli, bidi sa7i wontana gakanaw entaba ubbaa bonqos; entafe issuwaka ashshona wodhoos” yaagis. Enti, “Ero, nena lo77idaba ootha” yaagidi zaaridosona. Shin kahiney, “Ane Xoossaa sheney aybeko oychoos” yaagis.
14.37: Hessa gisho, Saa7oli, “Filisxeeme asaa kaallada boo? Neeni enta Isra7eele kushen aathada immanee?” yaagidi Xoossaa oychis. Shin he gallas Xoossay iyaw zaaro immibeenna.
14.38: Saa7oli, “Kaaletheyisata xeegidi, ubbay haayite; hachi ayba nagari oosetidaako ane qoridi demmoos.
14.39: Isra7eele ashshiya de7o Goday eriya mela. Ta na7a Yoonataana gidikoka, hayqanaw bessees” yaagis. Shin asaape issi asika doona pogibeenna.
14.40: Hessafe guye, Saa7oli Isra7eele asaako, “Hinte ubbay ya baggan eqite; taaninne ta na7aa Yoonataani ha baggan eqana” yaagis. Asay, “Ero, nena lo77idaba ootha” yaagidosona.
14.41: Hessafe guye, Saa7oli, “Taw like zaaro imma” yaagidi Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa woossis. Saamay Saa7ola bollanne Yoonataana bolla wodhin asay geeyis.
14.42: Qassi Saa7oli, “Ta bollanne ta na7aa Yoonataana bolla saama yeggite” yaagis. Saamay Yoonataana bolla wodhis.
14.43: Saa7oli Yoonataana, “Ane neeni oothidaba oda” yaagis. Yoonataani, “Taani guutha eessa ililo ta xam7aa xeeran bochada laacas. Heko taani haysan de7ayis; hayqos giigetas” yaagis.
14.44: Saa7oli, “Yoonataana, neeni hayqonna ixiko, Xoossi tana pirdo” yaagis.
14.45: Shin asay Saa7olako, “Yoonataani, Isra7eeles hessa mela gita xoonuwa ehidaysi hayqanee? Hessi polo hanenna! De7o Xoossi eriya mela! Iya huuphiyape issi binaanika biittan wodhenna. I hachi haysa Xoossa maadon oothis” yaagidosona. Yaatidi asay Yoonataana ashshin, I hayqope attis.
14.46: Hessafe guye, Saa7oli Filisxeeme asaa yedetheysa aggin enti banta biitta simmidosona.
14.47: Saa7oli Isra7eele bolla kawotidaape guye, ubba baggara de7iya ba morketa olis. Hessatika, Moo7abeta, Amooneta, Edoometa, Suubba kawotanne Filisxeemeta. Olanaw bida bessa ubban xoonis.
14.48: I minnidi oletis; Amaaleqata xoonis; Isra7eele asaa bonqeyisata kushepe ashshis.
14.49: Saa7ola adde nayti Yoonataana, Yesuwanne Malkisa; iyaw bayra na7e sunthay Meraabo; kaalo na7e sunthay Melkoolo.
14.50: Iya machiya, Akmaasa na7iya Aknahoomo. Iya tora moconay iya aawa ishaa Neera na7aa Abeneera.
14.51: Saa7ola aawa Qiisinne Abeneera aawa Neeri Abi7eela nayta.
14.52: Saa7oli de7ida laytha ubban Filisxeemetara morketethan oletida mela de7is. Mino asi woyko xaala asi demmida wode ubban I he uraa ba olanchotan gujees.

15.1: Sameeli Saa7olako, “Ba asaa Isra7eele bolla neeni kawotanaada tiyana mela Goday kiittiday tana. Hessa gisho, Godaa qaala si7a.
15.2: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Isra7eeleti Gibxefe keyidi yaa wode Amaaleqati ogen entara eqetida gisho taani Amaaleqata seerana.
15.3: Ha77i bada Amaaleqata shoca; entaw de7iyaba ubbaa polo dhaysa. Enta ashshofa; Maccanne adde, naytanne yooga nayta, miizinne dorse, gimalenne hare ubbaa wodha’ ” yaagis.
15.4: Saa7oli asaa xeegidi, Xelaame geetetiya bessan taybis. Taybiya wode Isra7eelepe nam7u xeetu mukulu toho olanchota; Yihudape tammu mukulu asi demmis.
15.5: Saa7oli Amaaleqata katamaa bidi issi shaafan qosetidi uttis.
15.6: Saa7oli, “Isra7eeleti Gibxefe keyiya wode hinte entaw keehida gisho taani hintena Amaaleqatara issife dhaysona mela dendidi enta giddofe keyite” yaagidi Qeena asaas odis. Yaatin Qeena asay Amaaleqata giddofe keyidi bidosona.
15.7: Saa7oli Amaaleqata Hawilape doomidi, Gibxefe doloha baggan de7iya Shuura gakanaw shocis.
15.8: Amaaleqata kawa Agaaga paxa di77is; iya asa ubbaa mashshan wodhidi wursis.
15.9: Shin Saa7olinne iya olanchoti, Agaaganne lo77o dorsata, miizata, anqara maratanne marazeta, hessadaka hara lo77obata ubbaa ashshidosona. Enti haysata polo wodhanaw koybookona; shin enti laafatanne pathonayisata dhaysidosona.
15.10: Goday Sameelako,
15.11: “Saa7oli tana kaalleysa aggidi, ta kiita naagiboonna gisho, taani Saa7ola kawothidaysan qiirotas” yaagis. Sameeli hessa si7ida wode un7etidi qamma kumethi Godaako waassis.
15.12: Sameeli wonta guura dendidi, Saa7olara gahetanaw bis. Shin asay, “Saa7oli Qarmeloosa katamaa bidi, yan bana hassaysiya hawulte essidaape guye, Galgala wodhis” yaagidi odidosona.
15.13: Sameeli Saa7ola demmida wode Saa7oli Sameelako, “Goday nena anjo; taani Godaa kiitta polas” yaagis.
15.14: Shin Sameeli Saa7olako, “Yaatin, ha taani si7iya dorsa waasoynne mehe waasoy aybee?” yaagis.
15.15: Saa7oli, “Olanchoti haysata Amaaleqatape ehidosona; enti Godaas, ne Xoossaas yarshanaw, ubbaafe lo77iya dorsatanne meheta ashshidosona, shin harata ubbaa dhaysida” yaagis.
15.16: Sameeli, “Ane aggaaga; Goday zine qamma taw odidaba ta new odana” yaagis. Saa7oli, “Ero oda” yaagis.
15.17: Sameeli zaaridi, “Ne ayfe sinthan ne guutha gidikoka, Isra7eele zerethaas kawo gidabikii? Isra7eele bolla kawotana mela Goday nena tiyis.
15.18: Goday, ‘Neeni bada iita gidida Amaaleqata kumethi dhaysa; enti wurana gakanaw wodha’ yaagidi kiittis.
15.19: Yaatin, ayis Godaas kiitetabikii? Di7os yaaretada Godaa sinthan ayis iitabaa oothadii?” yaagis.
15.20: Saa7oli, “Taani Godaas kiitetas; I tana kiittidaysada bada Amaaleqata wodha wursas; enta kawa Agaaga ehas.
15.21: Shin olanchoti di7uwape lo77iya dorsenne mehiya Godaas, ne Xoossaas, Galgalan yarshanaw ehidosona” yaagis.
15.22: Sameeli, “Goday ba qaalas kiiteteysan ufayteysa mela xuussa yarshoninne hara yarshon ufaytii? Heko, kiitetethi yarshofe aadhees; iya sissi dorsa modho yarsheysafe aadhees.
15.23: Geellatethi marotho nagara mela; qassi otoroy iita eeqa goyinno mela. Neeni Godaa qaala ixida gisho Goday ne kawo gidonna mela ixis” yaagis.
15.24: Saa7oli, “Taani nagara oothas; Godaa kiitaanne ne qaala toochas. Taani asaas yayyida gisho enti gidaba oothas.
15.25: Ha77i ta nagaraa atto garki; taani Godaa goyinnana mela taara yedharki” yaagis.
15.26: Sameeli, “Taani neera simmada biike; neeni Godaa qaala ixida gisho ne Isra7eele bolla kawo gidonna mela Goday ixis” yaagis.
15.27: Sameeli baanaw dendin, Saa7oli iya ma7uwa macaraa oykin, ma7oy daaketis.
15.28: Sameeli, “Goday hachi Isra7eele kawotethaa neepe daakidi neepe lo77iya hara asas immis.
15.29: Isra7eele bonchoy, Xoossay wordotenna woyko ba qofaa laammenna; ba qaala laammanaw I asi gidenna” yaagis.
15.30: Saa7oli, “Taani nagara oothas; shin ta biitta cimata sinthaninne Isra7eele asaa sinthan tana boncha. Taani Godaa, ne Xoossaa goyinnana mela taara yedharki” yaagidi woossis.
15.31: Hessa gisho, Sameeli iyara issife bin, Saa7oli Godaa goyinnis.
15.32: Sameeli, “Amaaleqata kawa Agaaga taako ehite” yaagis. Agaagi kokorishe Sameelako yidi, “Tuma hayqoy haysada cammii?” yaagis.
15.33: Sameeli Agaagako, “Ne mashshay maccasa naytape mela ashshidaysada ne aayaka maccasa giddon naytape mela attana” yaagis. Sameeli Agaaga Godaa sinthan Galgalan qanxerethis.
15.34: Sameeli dendidi, Rama bis; Saa7olika ba soo Gib7a bis.
15.35: Sameeli hayqana gakanaw Saa7ola be7anaw simmidi bibeenna, shin Sameeli Saa7ola gisho yeekis. Saa7ola Isra7eele bolla kawo oothidaysas Goday azzanis.

16.1: Goday Sameelako, “Isra7eele bolla I kawo gidonna mela taani ixida Saa7olas neeni awude gakanaw yeekay? Ane kacen zayte kunthada Beetelem addiya Isseyeko ba; kawo gidana mela taani iya nayta giddofe issuwa doora wothas” yaagis.
16.2: Sameeli, “Taani waanada boo? Saa7oli si7idi tana wodhana” yaagis. Goday, “Issi ussi eka bada, ‘Taani Godaas yarshanaw yas’ yaaga.
16.3: Isseyeka yarshos xeega. Ne oothanaba ta nena bessaana; ta nena besseysa tiya” yaagis.
16.4: Sameeli Goday odidaysa oothis; Beeteleme bidi katamaa cimatara gahetida wode enti kokorishe iyako yidi, “Ne saro yadii?” yaagidi oychidosona.
16.5: Sameeli, “Ee, saro yas; ta Godaas yarshanaw yas; hinteka geeyidi taara yarshos yedhite” yaagis. Qassi Isseyenne iya nayta geeshshidi enta yarshos xeegis.
16.6: Enti yaa gakiya wode Sameeli Isseye na7aa Eliyaaba be7idi, “Tuma iya sinthan eqida, Goday tiya uray haysa” yaagidi qopis.
16.7: Shin Goday Sameela, “Iya malaa woyko iya adussatethaa xeellofa; taani iya kadhas. Taani Goday asi be7eysada be7ike; asi som7o be7ees, shin Goday wozanaa be7ees” yaagis.
16.8: Isseyey Abinadaabe xeegidi, Sameela sinthe aathin, Sameeli, “Goday haysaka dooribeenna” yaagis.
16.9: Isseyey Saama aathin, Sameeli, “Goday haysaka dooribeenna” yaagis.
16.10: Hessada oothidi, Isseyey ba nayta laapunata Sameela sinthe aathis; shin Sameeli Isseyeko, “Goday haysata dooribeenna” yaagis.
16.11: Sameeli, “New de7iya adde nayti haysata xalaalee?” yaagidi Isseye oychis. Isseyey, “Ubbaafe kaalo na7ay attis; shin I dorse heemmanaw bis” yaagis. Sameeli, “Kiittada iya ehisa; I yaana gakanaw nu maanaw uttoko” yaagis.
16.12: Isseyey kiittidi na7aa ehisis; he na7ay aarise; ayfey lo77onne mala lo77o na7a. Goday Sameela, “Ta dooriday haysa gidiya gisho denda eqada tiya” yaagis.
16.13: Sameeli kacen kumida zayte ekidi, iya ishata sinthan Dawita tiyis. He gallasape doomidi, Godaa Ayyaanay Dawita bolla wolqan wodhis. Hessafe guye, Sameeli dendidi, Rama bis. Dawiti Saa7ola Gadhon
16.14: Godaa Ayyaanay Saa7olape shaaketin Godaape kiitetida iita ayyaanay Saa7ola waaysees.
16.15: Saa7ola aylleti, “Xoossaafe kiitetida iita ayyaanay nena waaysees.
16.16: Nuuni diithi diixiya asi koyidi ehana mela nu goday ba aylleta kiitto. Xoossaafe kiitetida iita ayyaanay nena oykiya wode he uray diithi diixiko new lo77o gidana” yaagidosona.
16.17: Saa7oli ba aylleta, “Diithi diixiya asi koyidi taw ehite” yaagis.
16.18: Aylletape issoy, “Beetelemen Isseyes diithi diixiya issi na7i de7ees. He na7ay xaalanne toorancho. I mala lo77onne cinca; Goday iyara de7ees” yaagis.
16.19: Saa7oli Isseyeko kiittidi, “Dorse heemmiya ne na7aa Dawita taw yedda” yaagis.
16.20: Isseyey uythunne ogoro woyne ushshu haren caanidi, issi kole gooshisidi ba na7aa Dawitara Saa7olas yeddis.
16.21: Dawiti Saa7olako yidi ooso doomis. Saa7oli Dawita daro dosis; Dawiti Saa7olas ola miishe tookeysa gidis.
16.22: Saa7oli, “Dawiti taw oothishe ta matan gam7o; taani iya dosas” yaagidi Isseyeko kiittis.
16.23: Hessafe simmin, Xoossafe kiitetida iita ayyaanay Saa7ola oykiya wode ubban Dawiti diithi ekidi diixees. I diixiya wode iita ayyaanay Saa7ola yeddeesinne iyaw lo77ees.

17.1: Filisxeemeti banta olanchota Yihudan de7iya Sooko geetetiya bessan olas shiishidosona. Enti Sokopenne Azeeqape giddon de7iya Efees-Damima geetetiya bessan shiiqidi uttidosona.
17.2: Saa7olinne Isra7eeleti Ela zangaaran shiiqidi, Filisxeemetara oletanaw keyidosona.
17.3: Filisxeeme olanchoti issi bagga zuma bolla salpin, Isra7eeleti hanko bagga zuman salpidosona; zangaaray entaw giddon de7ees.
17.4: Gaate kataman de7iya Gooliyada geetetiya issi toora qara addey Filisxeemeti dunkaanida gutaape keyis; iya geesay usupun wadhanne takadho.
17.5: I ishatammanne laapun kilo giraame deexiya naase birata xurure ma7is; qassi naase birata barneexa ba huuphen wothis.
17.6: Naase birata gambaale ba tohon aathis; ba hashiyan naase birata toora tookis.
17.7: Iya toora toomay wandaraashe mela orde; iya toora ayfey laapun kilo giraame deexees; iya gondalliya tookiya issi addey iya sinthan hemetees.
17.8: Gooliyadi eqidi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Isra7eele olanchota bolla haysada yaagidi gayrees; hinte waanana gidi olas keydetii? Taani Filisxeeme asi; hinte qassi Saa7ola aylleta gideketii? Ane hinte giddofe issi asi doorite; he addey taako duge wodho.
17.9: He addey taara oletidi tana wodhiko, nuuni hinte aylle gidana; shin taani iya xoonada wodhiko hinte nu aylle gidananne nuus haaretana” yaagis.
17.10: Qassika he Filisxeeme addey, “Taani hachi Isra7eele olanchota mandayis; taw issi asi immite; ane nam7ay oletana” yaagis.
17.11: Saa7olinne Isra7eeleti Filisxeeme addiya qaala si7idi dagammidosona, daro yayyidosona.
17.12: Dawiti Yihuda biittan Beetelemen de7iya Efraata addiya Isseye na7a. Isseyes hospun adde nayti de7oosona; Saa7ola kawotetha laythan Isseyey daro laythi de7ida cima.
17.13: Isseye heedzu bayra adde nayti Saa7ola kaallidi olaa bidosona. Enta sunthay:- bayray Eliyaaba; kaaloy Amnadaabe; heedzanthoy Saama.
17.14: Dawiti nayta ubbaafe kaalo; bayra heedzu nayti Saa7ola kaallidosona.
17.15: Shin Dawiti ba aawa dorsata heemmanaw Saa7ola matape Beeteleme simeretees.
17.16: He Filisxeeme addey oytamu gallas wontanne omarsi yidi Isra7eeleta mandees.
17.17: Issi gallas Isseyey ba na7aa Dawita haysada yaagis; “Ha caacetida tiyape laatamu kilo giraamenne ha tammu uythata ekada ne ishatas efada ne ishati dunkaanida gutaa elle gatha.
17.18: Ha tammu nuka pila enta shaalaqas efa; ne ishati waani de7iyako be7ada, enti saro de7eysas malaata entafe ekada ya.
17.19: Kawoy Saa7oli, ne ishatinne Isra7eele asa ubbay Filisxeemetara oletishe Ela Zangaaran de7oosona” yaagis.
17.20: Dawiti guura dendidi dorsata hara asi henthidi, Isseyey kiittidaba caani ekidi bis. Isra7eele olanchoti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi gayrishe olas keyishin Dawiti gakis.
17.21: Isra7eeletinne Filisxeemeti issoy issuwako simmidi salpidosona.
17.22: Dawiti ba ehidaba shinqe naageysa kushen wothidi, olaa salpiya giddo woxi bidi, ba ishata sarothis.
17.23: Dawiti ba ishatara haasayishin, Gaatepe yida toora qaray, Filisxeeme Gooliyadi ba salpiyafe gaxa keyidi kaseysada Isra7eeleta mandishin Dawiti si7is.
17.24: Isra7eele asa ubbay he addiya be7ida wode daro yayyidi baqatidosona.
17.25: Isra7eele asay issoy issuwako, “Ha keyiya addiya be7idetii? I tuma Isra7eele mandanaw keyis. Ha addiya wodhiya uraas kawoy Saa7oli daro shalo immana; ba na7iwuka iyaw immana; iya aawa keethaa asay Isra7eelen kawo giira giirenna” yaagidosona.
17.26: Dawiti ba matan eqida asaa, “Ha Filisxeeme addiya wodhidi, ha yeellaa Isra7eelepe denthiya uraas aybe oosetanay? Ha qaxaretiboona Filisxeemey de7o Xoossaa olanchota mandey I oonee?” yaagidi oychis.
17.27: Enti, “Ha addiya wodhiya uraas haysi haysi oosetana” yaagidi kaseysada zaaridosona.
17.28: Dawiti asaara odeteysa iya bayra ishay Eliyaabi si7idi, Dawita bolla shene eexis. “Neeni ha bessaa ayis yadii? He guutha dorsata bazzon ooddes yeggadii? Ne otoruwanne ne wozanaa iitatethaa ta erayis; neeni olaa be7anaw yadasa” yaagis.
17.29: Dawiti, “Taani ha77i ay oothadina? Hari attoshin odetanawuka danda7ikina?” yaagis.
17.30: Dawiti ba ishaa aggidi, hara asaako simmidi, kaseysada oychin asay iyaw kaseysada zaaridosona.
17.31: Dawiti odidaysa si7ida asay Saa7olas odin, Saa7oli Dawita xeegisis.
17.32: Dawiti Saa7olako, “Ha addiya gaason oodde wozanika til7ofo; taani ne aylley bada, ha Filisxeeme addiyara oletana” yaagis.
17.33: Saa7oli Dawitako, “Neeni na7a; I ba na7atethafe doomidi ola meezetidi diccida gisho, ha Filisxeeme addiyara neeni oletanaw danda7aka” yaagis.
17.34: Shin Dawiti, “Taani, ne aylley ta aawa dorsata heemmiya wode gaammoy woyko garmafeeley keyidi dorse oykiya wode,
17.35: iya kaalla bada iya doonape wotha ekayis. Taako simmiya wode qoodhiya cuullada wodhayis.
17.36: Taani ne aylley gaammonne garmafeele wodhas; ha qaxaretiboona Filisxeeme addey de7o Xoossaa olanchota guuthida gisho I entafe issuwada hanana.
17.37: Gaammofenne garmafeelepe tana ashshida Goday, ha Filisxeeme addiya kushepe tana ashshana” yaagis. Saa7oli Dawitako, “Ba, Goday neera gido” yaagis.
17.38: Saa7oli ba ma7uwa Dawita mayzis; Dawita huuphen naase birata barneexa wothis; naase birata xururiya Dawita mayzis.
17.39: Dawiti ba ola ma7uwa bolla mashsha dancidi hemetidi be7is. Shin hessa mela ma7o ma7idi eronna gisho hemetanaw danda7ibeenna. Hessa gisho, Dawiti Saa7olako, “Taani haysa mela ma7o ma7ada meezetaboonna gisho haysara baanaw danda7ike” yaagidi ola ma7uwa qaaris.
17.40: Dawiti ba hentha xam7a oykidi, shaafape ichashu mulumuqe shuchu doori ekidi, ba hentha qarxiitan yeggidi, ba yambarsha oykidi, Goolyadako shiiqis.
17.41: Gooliyadi ba gondalliya tookiya addiyara issife hemetishe Dawitako matis.
17.42: I Dawita tishshi oothi xeellidi, Dawiti aarise, mala lo77onne na7a gideysa be7idi kadhis.
17.43: I Dawitako, “Neeni xam7a oykada taako yaanaw tana kana gadii?” yaagis. Ba xoossata sunthan Dawita baaddis.
17.44: Kaallidi Dawitako, “Haaya; taani ne ashuwa salo kafotasinne sa7a do7atas immana” yaagis.
17.45: Dawiti, “Neeni mashsha, tooranne gumba oykada taako yaasa; shin taani Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa sunthan, neeni guuthida Isra7eele olanchota Xoossaa sunthan ne bolla yayis.
17.46: Hachi Goday nena ta kushen aathidi immana; taani nena shocana; ne qoodhiya muuca holana. Filisxeeme olanchota aha salo kafotasinne sa7a do7atas hachi immana. He wode Isra7eelen Xoossi de7eysa sa7an de7iya asa ubbay erana.
17.47: Goday ba asaa ashshanaw toora woyko mashshe koyonnaysa haysan shiiqida asa ubbay erana. Olay Godaaba gidiya gisho, I hintena ubbaa nu kushen aathidi immana” yaagis.
17.48: Filisxeeme addey dendidi, Dawitara olaa gahetanaw shiiqida wode Dawiti iyara gahetanaw ola demba woxidi bis.
17.49: Dawiti ba qarxiitan kushe yeddidi, issi shuchu eki yambaridi, Filisxeeme addiya som7uwan caddis. Shuchay iya som7uwa lukidi gelis; yaatin, addey ba som7uwara sa7an kundis.
17.50: Dawiti Filisxeeme addiya yambarshaninne shuchan xoonis. Dawiti ba kushen mashshi bayna Filisxeeme addiya caddidi wodhis.
17.51: Dawiti woxi bidi, iya bolla keyi eqidi, iya wodhidi, Filisxeeme addiya mashshaa shoohuwape shoddidi, iya qoodhiya muuci yeggis. Filisxeemeti banta toora qaray hayqidaysa be7ida wode baqatidosona.
17.52: Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay dendidi gereerishe, Filisxeemeta Gaatenne Eqroona pengeta gakanaw yedethidosona. Filisxeeme asaa ahay Gaatenne Eqroona gakanaw Sha7irayma efiya ogiya ubban kundis.
17.53: Isra7eele asay Filisxeemeta yedethi simmidi, enti dunkaanida gutaa bonqidosona.
17.54: Dawiti Filisxeeme addiya huuphiya Yerusalaame ehis; shin Filisxeeme addiya ola miishiya ba dunkaaniya giddon wothis.
17.55: Dawiti Filisxeeme addiyara oletanaw bishin, Saa7oli be7idi, tora mocona Abeneera, “Ha na7ay oodde na7ee?” yaagidi oychis. Abeneeri zaaridi, “Kawaw, tuma ne asho taani iya erike” yaagis.
17.56: Kawoy zaaridi, “Ha na7ay oodde na7eko ane oycha” yaagis.
17.57: Dawiti Filisxeeme addiya wodhidi simmida wode Abeneeri iya Saa7ola sinthe ehis. He wode Dawiti muucida Filisxeeme addiya huuphiya ba kushen oykidi utisis.
17.58: Saa7oli, “Ta na7aw, ne oodde na7ee?” yaagidi oychis. Dawiti zaaridi, “Taani Beetelemen de7iya ne oosanchuwa, Isseye na7a” yaagis.

18.1: Dawiti Saa7olara haasaya wursidaape guye, Saa7ola na7ay Yoonataani Dawitara daro mata dabbotethi medhis; Yoonataani Dawita ba shempuwada dosis.
18.2: He gallasape doomidi, Saa7oli Dawita baara wothis; ba aawa soo guye simmonna mela diggis.
18.3: Yoonataani Dawita ba huupheda dosiya gisho iyara caaqis.
18.4: Yoonataani ba ma7ida kaaba, ba ola ma7uwa, ba mashshaa, ba dongiyanne ba saqiya kessidi Dawitas immis.
18.5: Saa7oli kiitida ubbaa Dawiti naagetidi oothiya gisho, Saa7oli Dawita ba olanchota giddon halaqa oothidi shuumis. Hessi asa ubbaanne iya moorinnata ufaysis.
18.6: Dawiti Filisxeeme addiya Gooliyada wodhin, asay soo simmiya wode maccasay ufaysa yethi yexishenne durishe, karaabo baqishenne diithi diixishe, kawa Saa7ola mokanaw Isra7eele katamata ubbaafe keyidosona.
18.7: Maccasati durishe, “Saa7oli mukulata wodhis; Dawiti tammu mukulata wodhis” yaagidi yexidosona.
18.8: Saa7ola ha yethay shaatin, daro hanqetis. Saa7oli ba qofan, “Dawita, ‘Tammu mukulata wodhadasa gidi, tana mukulata wodhadasa’ gidoosona. Yaatin, kawotethaafe attishin hari aybi attidee?” yaagis.
18.9: He wodepe doomidi Saa7oli Dawita qanaate ayfen xeellees.
18.10: Wontetha gallas iita ayyaani Xoossafe kiitetidi Saa7ola oykin, Saa7oli ba son elmotees. Dawiti kaseysada diithi diixishin Saa7oli toora ba kushen oykidi uttis.
18.11: I, “Dawita godaara gathada sikana” yaagi qopidi toora xongis. Shin Dawiti nam7u toho iyape attis.
18.12: Goday Saa7ola aggidi Dawitara de7iya gisho Saa7oli Dawita yayyis.
18.13: Saa7oli Dawita ba sinthafe haassanaw koyidi mukulu olanchotas halaqa oothis. Yaatin, Dawiti ba cugaa olas kaalethis.
18.14: Goday Dawitara de7iya gisho I oothiyabay ubbay iyaw injetees.
18.15: Dawiti oothiyaba ubbay injeteysa Saa7oli be7idi iyaw daro yayyis.
18.16: Shin Dawiti enta olan kaalethiya gisho Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asa ubbay iya dosoosona.
18.17: Saa7oli Dawitako, “Ta na7a bayriya Meraaba hannashu; taani iyo new macho immana; neeni mino asi gida; Godaa olaa oleta” yaagis. Saa7oli ba wozanan, “Taani iya bochike; Filisxeemeti iya wodho” yaagidi qopis.
18.18: Shin Dawiti, “Kawora bollotanaw taani oonee? Ta soo asay aybee? Woyko ta aawa yaray Isra7eele asaa giddon aybee?” yaagis.
18.19: Shin Saa7ola na7iya Meraaba Dawitas imetiya wodey gakin, Mahoola addiya Adri7eelas imetasu.
18.20: Gidoshin, Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola Dawita dosasu; Saa7oli hessa si7idi ufaytis.
18.21: I ba wozanan, “Iyaw xihe gidana melanne Filisxeemeti iya wodhana mela taani Milkoolo Dawitas immana” yaagidi qopis. Hessa gisho, Saa7oli Dawita, “Neeni taara bollotanaw nam7antho qaada new immas” yaagis.
18.22: Saa7oli ba oosanchota xeegidi, “ ‘Kawoy nenan ufaytis; iya aylleti ubbay nena dosoosona; ha77i neeni kawuwara bollota’ yaagidi dumma Dawitas odite” yaagidi kiittis.
18.23: Saa7oli gidaysada enti Dawitas odidosona. Shin Dawiti, “Kawora bollotanaysi hintew laafaba daaniyee? Taani manqonne eretonna asi” yaagidi zaaris.
18.24: Saa7ola moorinnati Dawiti gidaba Saa7olas odidosona.
18.25: Saa7oli ba aylletako, “Dawitas haysada yaagidi odite; ‘Kawoy ba morketa halo keyanaw xeetu Filisxeeme asata qaaratidi ehana melape attishin, neepe hara koyta koyenna’ yaagite” yaagis. Saa7oli hessa giday Dawiti Filisxeemeta kushen hayqana mela qopida gishosa.
18.26: Saa7ola aylleti Saa7oli gidaba Dawitas odidosona; kawuwara bollotanaysi Dawita ufaysis. Wodey aadhanape sinthe,
18.27: Dawitinne iya asay dendi bidi Filisxeemetape nam7u xeetu asaa wodhidosona. Dawiti kawuwara bollotanaw he asata qaarati ehidi, kawas kumethi taybidi sheedhis. Saa7oli ba na7iw Melkoolo Dawitas immis.
18.28: Saa7oli Goday Dawitara de7eysanne iya na7iya Milkoola Dawita doseysa eris.
18.29: Saa7oli Dawitas kaseysafe aathidi yayyis. Saa7oli ba de7o laytha ubban Dawitas morke gidis.
18.30: Filisxeeme olanchoti olas kessi aggibokona. Shin olas keyida wode ubban Saa7ola toora moconatape aathidi xoonoy haney Dawitasa; hessa gisho, I eretida asi gidis.

19.1: Dawita wodhana mela Saa7oli ba na7aa Yoonatanasinne ba oosanchotas odis. Shin Saa7ola na7ay Yoonataani Dawita daro dosees.
19.2: Hessa gisho, Yoonataani Dawitako, “Ta aaway Saa7oli nena wodhanaw koyiya gisho wonto wonta nena naaga; issi bessan qosetada de7aasha.
19.3: Taani ta aawara bada, neeni qosetida gadiyan eqana; taani nebaa iyaw odada, iyape si7iyaba new odana” yaagidi kiittis.
19.4: Yoonataani Dawita nashshidi, ba aawa Saa7olako haysada yaagis; “Kawoy ba aylliya Dawita qohidi nagara oothofo; I nena qohibeenna; I oothidabay nena daro go77is.
19.5: I Filisxeeme addiya wodhida wode ba shempuwas qadhetibeenna. Goday Isra7eele ubbaas gita xoono immis; hessa be7ada neka ufaytadasa. Yaatin, neeni geeshsha asi qohanaw ayis qopay? Gaasoy bayna Dawita wodhanaw ayis koyay?” yaagis.
19.6: Saa7oli Yoonataani odidaba si7idi, “De7o Xoossi eriya mela, taani Dawita wodhike” yaagidi caaqis.
19.7: Yoonataani Dawita xeegidi enti odetidaba ubbaa iyaw odis. Yaatidi Dawita Saa7olako ehin Dawiti kaseysada Saa7olara de7is.
19.8: Filisxeemetara zaaridi hara oli dendis; Dawiti keyidi Filisxeemetara oletidi, enta gita shochu shocin, enti iya sinthafe baqatidosona.
19.9: Hessafe simmin, Saa7oli toora oykidi ba son uttidashin, iita ayyaani Godaape kiitetidi iya oykis. Yaatin, Dawiti diithi diixishin,
19.10: Saa7oli Dawita godaara gathidi sikanaw toora xongis; Shin Dawiti iyape deesh gidi attin, tooray godan toketis. He qamma Dawiti kessi ekidi baqatis.
19.11: Dawita keethan naagidi wonta wodhana mela Saa7oli ase kiittis. Dawita machiya Melkoola, “Hachi qamma neeni ne shempuwa ashshona ixiko, wonto hayqaasa” yaagada Dawitas odasu.
19.12: Milkoola Dawita maskootera kessin, Dawiti kessi ekidi baqatis.
19.13: Hessafe guye, Melkoola eeqa misile ekada arsan zin7isasu; huupheson deesha ikise wothada afila mayzasu.
19.14: Dawita oykidi ehana mela Saa7oli ase kiittin Milkoola, “Dawiti saketis” yaagasu.
19.15: Dawita be7ana mela Saa7oli he asata guye kiittidi, “Taani Dawita wodhana mela iya algara tookidi eki yiite” yaagis.
19.16: Shin asati soo geliya wode eeqa misiley arsan zin7idaysanne iya huupheson deesha ikisey de7eysa demmidosona.
19.17: Saa7oli Melkoolo, “Neeni ayis haysada oothada tana cimmadii? Ta morkey kessi ekana mela ayis oothadii?” yaagis. Milkoola zaarada, “I taako, ‘Tana kessada yedda; ixiko ta nena wodhana’ yaagis” yaagasu.
19.18: Dawiti kessi ekidi Raman de7iya Sameelako bidi Saa7oli bana oothida ubbaa iyaw odis. Dawitinne Sameeli Nayoota bidi yan uttidosona.
19.19: Saa7oli Dawiti Raman de7iya Nayootan de7eysa si7is.
19.20: Dawita oykidi ehana mela ase yaa kiittis. Shin nabe cugay Sameela kaalethuwan tinbite odishin be7ida wode Saa7oli yeddida asata bolla Xoossa Ayyaanay wodhin, entika tinbite odidosona.
19.21: Saa7oli hessa si7ida wode hara asi yeddis; entika qassi tinbite odidosona. Saa7oli heedzantho ase yeddin entika tinbite odidosona.
19.22: Wursethan, Saa7oli ba huuphen Rama bidi, Seekun de7iya gita ollaa gakidi, “Sameelinne Dawiti awun de7oona?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Hinin Raman de7iya Nayootan de7oosona” yaagidi zaaridosona.
19.23: Hessa gisho, Saa7oli Raman de7iya Nayoota bis; qassi Xoossa Ayyaanay iya bollaka wodhin, Raman de7iya Nayoota gakanaw tinbite odishe bis.
19.24: I ba ma7uwa qaaridi, Sameela sinthan tinbite odis; gallasinne qamma kumethi kallo zin7is. Asay, “Saa7olika nabetape issuwa gidideye” geysi hessasa.

20.1: Dawiti Raman de7iya Nayootape baqatidi, Yoonatanako bidi, “Taani ay oothadina? Ta balay aybee? Ne aaway tana wodhanaw koyey taani iya ay qohinee?” yaagidi oychis.
20.2: Yoonataani, “Hessi neepe haako; neeni hayqaka. Guuthaba gidin, gitaba gidin, ta aaway taape qosidi aykoka oothenna. Ta aaway taape ayis hessa qosidee? Hessi hanenna” yaagidi zaaris.
20.3: Shin Dawiti, “Ne tana doseysa ne aaway loythi erees. I ba wozanan, Yoonataani ha oda eropo; I eriko azzanana” yaagis. Shin, “De7o Xoossi eriya mela, ne shempoy ero; taapenne hayqope giddon issi tango xalaali attis” yaagidi caaqis.
20.4: Yoonataani, “Neeni ootha gidaba aybaka taani new oothana” yaagis.
20.5: Dawiti zaaridi, “Wonto ageena xeero ba7aale bonchiya gallas; taani kawuwara kathi maanaw koshshees. Shin wonti pee7in omarsi gakanaw taani gaden qosetana.
20.6: Ne aaway tana koyiko, neeni, ‘Dawiti ba asaara laytha yarsho yarshiya wode gidiya gisho ba soo Beeteleme baanaw tana oychidi bis’ yaaga.
20.7: I, ‘Yaako lo77o’ giiko, taw ne aylliyas saro; shin I hanqetiko, I tana qohanaw ba wozanan qopidaysa hessan era.
20.8: Shin neeni taw ne aylliyas lo77oba ootha; Neeni taara ne aylliyara Godaa sinthan caaqadasa. Taani bala gidiko, tana ne wodha; ne aawas tana aathada immofa” yaagis.
20.9: Yoonataani, “Hessi neepe haako; ta aaway nena qohanaw qopidaba ta eridaako, new odikina?” yaagis.
20.10: Dawiti “Ne aaway new iita zaaro zaariko, taw odanay oonee?” yaagidi oychis.
20.11: Yoonataani, “Haaya; gade boos” yaagin, nam7ay gade bidosona.
20.12: Yoonataani Dawitako, “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay ero, taani wonti pee7in ta aaway nebaa giyaba si7ada new I qopiya qofay lo77o gidiko taani kiittada nena erisana.
20.13: Shin ta aaway nena qohanaw koyaba gidiko, hessa taani nena erisonnanne neeni saron kessa ekana mela oothonna ixiko, Goday tana pirdo; Goday ta aawara gididaysada neera gido.
20.14: Ta de7o laytha ubban ta hayqonna mela Godaa siiquwa tana bessa.
20.15: Goday Dawita morketa ubbaa biittafe dhaysiya wodeka ne siiquwa ta soo asaas bessa” yaagis.
20.16: Hessa gisho, Yoonataani, “Goday Dawita morketa pirdo” yaagidi Dawita soo asaara caaqis.
20.17: Yoonataani Dawita ba huupheda dosiya gisho, “Neeni tana tuma doseysa qoncisanaw taw ane nam7antho caaqa” yaagis.
20.18: Hessafe guye, Yoonataani, “Wonto ageena xeero ba7aale bonchiya gallas; neeni uttiya bessay mela attiko ne baynaysi eretana.
20.19: Wonti pee7in omarsi bada, ha metoy doomida gallas neeni qosetida bessan, Exela zaallafe guyera qosetta.
20.20: Taani issiba bolla xongiya asada hanada heedzu donge toorata he zaalla miye yeddana.
20.21: Hessafe guye, ‘Bada donge toorata koya’ yaagada issi na7a kiittana. Taani iyako, ‘Donge toorati neepe ha baggara de7oosona; haa ekada ya’ giyaba gidiko, haaya; de7o Goday eriya mela, new sa7i saro; nena aykoyka bochenna.
20.22: Shin taani na7aako, ‘Donge toorati neepe hini baggara de7oosona’ giyaba gidiko, neeni aggada ba; Goday ne baana mela koyiya gisho ba.
20.23: Neera taara odetida odaas Goday nu giddon merinaw marka” yaagis.
20.24: Hessa gisho, Dawiti gaden qosetis. Ageena xeero ba7aale bonchiya gallas gakida wode kawoy Saa7oli gibira bolla uttis.
20.25: Kawoy ba uttiya bessan godaa matan uttis; Yoonataani iyape sintha baggan, Abeneeri Saa7ola matan uttis; shin Dawita bessay mela de7ees.
20.26: Saa7oli he gallas aykoka gibeenna. Saa7oli ba wozanan, “Dawiti wogaada geeyonna mela issibay iya gakis; I geeybeenna” yaagidi qopis.
20.27: Shin wontetha gallas, ageenay xeerin nam7antho gallas Dawita bessay mela de7ees. Saa7oli ba na7aa Yoonataana xeegidi, “Isseye na7ay zineka hachika gibira maanaw ayis yibennee?” yaagidi oychis.
20.28: Yoonataani, “Dawiti Beeteleme baana gidi tana minthidi oychis.
20.29: I taako, ‘Nu soo asay kataman yarsho yarshiya gishonne ta yan bentana mela ta ishay tana kiitida gisho tana yeddarki. Ta ne sinthan saba demmidaba gidiko taani ta ishata be7ana mela tana yedda’ yaagidi oychis. Kawa gibiraape maanaw I yoonnay hessa gishosa” yaagidi zaaris.
20.30: Saa7oli Yoonataana bolla shene eexi keyidi, “La, geellanne makallancho maccase na7aw, neeni new kawushe, ne aayes yeella ehanaw Isseye na7aara laggeteysa ta erikinayee?
20.31: Isseye na7ay ha sa7a bolla de7ida peeshan ne woyko ne kawotethay eqenna. Ha77i kiittada elle ehisa; I hayqanaw bessees” yaagis.
20.32: Yoonataani ba aawa, “I ayis hayqii? I ay iitabaa oothidee?” yaagidi oychis.
20.33: Saa7oli Yoonataana wodhanaw toora iya bolla xongis. Hessa gisho, Yoonataani ba aawa Saa7oli, Dawita wodhanaw qopidaysa geeshshidi eris.
20.34: Yoonataani shenetidi gibira bollafe dendis; ba aaway, Dawita kawushida gisho Yoonataani azzanidi, ageena xeero ba7aale bonchiya nam7antho gallas kathi mibeenna.
20.35: Yoonataani baara issi na7a ekidi wonta guura Dawitara gahetanaw gade bis.
20.36: Yoonataani, “Taani dukiya donge toorata woxa bada ekada ya” yaagis. Na7ay woxiya wode issi donge toora hefinthi dukis.
20.37: Na7ay Yoonataana donge tooray wodhida bessaa gakiya wode Yoonataani na7aa xeegidi, “Donge tooray neepe hini baggara de7ennee?”
20.38: Yoonataani na7aa, “Ellesa; ba; eqofa” yaagidi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi odis. Na7ay donge toora maxidi ba godaas ehis.
20.39: Yoonatanapenne Dawitape attishin, na7ay he xuura erenna.
20.40: Yoonataani ba ola miishiya na7aas immidi, “Haysa katama ekada ba” yaagis.
20.41: Na7ay bidaape guye, Dawiti he zaalla guyepe keyidi Yoonataana sinthan gulbatidi, ba som7uwa sa7a gathidi heedzu toho ziggis. Hessafe guye, issoy issuwara yeeretidi yeekidosona, shin Dawiti Yoonatanape aadho yeekis.
20.42: Yoonataani, “Saro ba; ‘Ne giddoninne ta giddon, ne kochaa giddoninne ta kochaa giddon, Goday merinaw marka gido’ yaagidi nu nam7ay Godaa sunthan caaqida” yaagis. Hessafe guye, Dawiti dendidi bis; Yoonatanika katamaa guye simmis.

21.1: Dawiti kahiniya Abimelekeko Nooba bis. Abimelekey Dawitara gahetanaw kokorishe yidi, “Neeni nerka waanada yadii? Neera asi waanidi baawee?” yaagidi oychis.
21.2: Dawiti kahiniya Abimeleke, “Kawoy taako, ‘Taani nena kiitida kiitaanne ta new odidaba oonika eropo’ yaagidi tana kiittis. Ta asati issi bessan taara gahetana mela oda wothas.
21.3: Ha77i ne kushen aybi de7ii? Ichashu uythi woyko new de7iyaba taw imma” yaagis.
21.4: Kahiney zaaridi, “Coo asi miya uythi taw baawa; shin ne asati bantana maccasape naagidaba gidiko, enti maanaw danda7iya geeshsha uythi de7ees” yaagis.
21.5: Dawiti zaaridi, “Tuma nuuni ha kiita ekidi keydaape doomidi, maccasape naagetida; hari attoshin hara kiittaka ekidi keyiya wode enti banta geeshshatetha naagoosona. Shin hachi waanidi geeyanaw koshshennee?” yaagis.
21.6: Hessa gisho, kahiney Dawitas geeshsha uythaa immis. Kahiniyas de7iya uythay, Godaa sinthan wothanaw he gallas ho77o uythara laametida uythaafe attishin, hari baawa.
21.7: Saa7ola aylletape issoy, iya mehiya heemmeyisata halaqay, Doyqa geetetiya Edoome addey, he gallas Godaa sinthan naagishe de7ees.
21.8: Dawiti Abimelekeko, “Toori woyko mashshi new dandeesha? Kawa kiitay eesoya gisho taani ta mashshaa woyko hara ola miishe ehabike” yaagidi oychis.
21.9: Abimelekey, “Neeni Ela Zangaaran wodhida Filisxeeme addiya Gooliyada mashshay haysan de7ees; curqara xaaxetidi, efuude ma7uwape guye baggara de7ees. Neeni koyaba gidiko iya eka; iyape attishin, hara mashshi haysan baawa” yaagis. Dawiti, “Iya mela mashshi baawa; iya taw hamma” yaagis.
21.10: He gallas Dawiti Saa7olape baqatidi, Gaate kawa Ankusako bis.
21.11: Shin Ankusa moorinnati, “Haysi Dawiti ba biittan kawo gidennee? Maccasay yexishenne durishe, ‘Saa7oli mukulu wodhis; Dawiti tammu mukulu wodhis’ yaagidi sabbida addiya gidennee?” yaagidosona.
21.12: Dawiti enta haasaya ba wozanan si7idi, Gaate kawa Ankusa daro yayyis.
21.13: Hessa gisho, Dawiti enta sinthan gooshshu daanis. Enti iya oykana haniya wode gooshshada penge ibitha qaacethi oykis; buuchaara saasso qolis.
21.14: Ankusi ba oosanchotako, “Heko, ha addey gooyees; hinte ayis iya taako ehidetii?
21.15: Ha addey ta sinthan gooyanaada hinte ehiday, ta matan hari gooyey dhayineyee? Ha addey ta soo gelanaw bessii?” yaagis.

22.1: Dawiti Gaatepe baqatidi, Adulaama matan de7iya gongoluwa bis. Iya ishatinne iya aawa soo asa ubbay hessa si7ida wode yaa iyako bidosona.
22.2: Metootiday, acotidaynne sa7i iitida ubbay Dawitako shiiqin, enta tayboy oyddu xeetu gidis; I enta halaqa gidis.
22.3: Dawiti yaape dendidi Moo7aben de7iya Mixipha bidi Moo7abe kawa, “Xoossay taw oothanaba ta erana gakanaw ta aawanne aayiw ne matan wotharki” yaagidi woossis.
22.4: Dawiti enta Moo7abe kawa matan wothis; Dawiti qosetida bessan de7iya wode ubban enti kawa matan de7idosona.
22.5: Hessafe guye, nabey Gaadi Dawitako yidi, “Qosetida bessan gam7ofa; haysafe dendada Yihuda biitta ba” yaagis; Dawiti yaape keyidi Hereta wora bis.
22.6: Dawitinne iya asay bentidaysa Saa7oli si7is. Saa7oli Gib7a matan de7iya dere bolla, tamarsike mitha garsan toora oykidi uttis; iya moorinnati iya yuushuwan eqidosona.
22.7: Saa7oli entako, “Hinteno, Biniyaame asaw, si7ite; Isseye na7ay gadenne woyne tokiya bessi hinte ubbaas immanee? Shaalaqatanne mato halaqata oothidi hintena shuumanee?
22.8: Hinte ubbay ta bolla maqetideta; ta na7ay Isseye na7aara caaqidaba taw oonika odibeenna. Hintefe issi asika taw qadhetenna; hachi hanidaysada ta na7ay ta aylliyan tana wodhisanaw denthethidaysa taw oonika odibeenna” yaagis.
22.9: Saa7ola moorinnatara eqida Edoome addey Doyqi, “Isseye na7ay Akxuuba na7aa Abimelekeko Nooba bidaysa taani be7as.
22.10: Dawiti ay oothaneko Abimelekey Godaa oychis; yaatidi Dawitas shinqenne Filisxeeme addiya Gooliyada mashshaa iyaw immis” yaagidi Saa7olas odis.
22.11: Hessafe guye, Akxuuba na7aa kahiniya Abimelekenne Nooban kahine gididi de7iya iya aawa soo asa ubbaa kawoy xeegisin, enti kawako yidosona.
22.12: Saa7oli, “Akxuuba na7aw, si7a” yaagis. Abimelekey, “Ero ta godaw” yaagis.
22.13: Saa7oli, “Neera Isseye na7aara ta bolla ayis maqetidetii? Neeni iyaw uythinne mashshe immada, I tana wodhanaw dendana mela iya gisho Xoossaa ayis oychadii?” yaagis.
22.14: Abimelekey, “Ne oosanchota ubbaa giddon Dawita mela ammanetey, kawa bolloy, nena naageysata kiitteynne ne soo asaa giddon daro bonchetey iya meli oonee?
22.15: Taani iya gisho Xoossaa oychishin, haysi taw koyro? Gidenna, kawaw, tana ne aylliya woyko ta aawa soo asa ubbaa aykoka mootopa. Taani ne aylley ha odabaa guutha gidin woyko gita gidin erike” yaagis.
22.16: Kawoy, “Abimeleke, nenne ne aawa soo asa ubbay hayqana” yaagis.
22.17: Saa7oli ba matan eqidi naageysata, “Godaa kahineta wodhite; enti Dawita maaddidosona. Dawiti baqatidaysa erishe taw odibookona” yaagis. Shin kawa naageysati Godaa kahineta bolla banta kushiya denthonna ixidosona.
22.18: Kawoy Doyqa, “Enta ne wodha” yaagidi kiittis. Edoome addey Doyqi kahineta shocidi, he gallas efuude ma7ida hospun tammanne ichashu kahineta wodhis.
22.19: Qassi Doyqi kahineta katamaa, Nooba mashshan wursis; he kataman de7iya addenne macca, naytanne yooga nayta, meheta, haretanne dorsata mashshan wodhis.
22.20: Shin Akxuuba na7aa Abimeleke naytape Abyataara geetetiya issi na7ay kessi ekidi, Dawitako baqatis.
22.21: I, Saa7oli Godaa kahineta wodhidaysa Dawitas odis.
22.22: Dawiti Abyataara, “Edoome addey Doyqi he bessan de7eysa taani be7ida wode I Saa7olas odanaysa he gallas eras. Ne aawa soo asa ubbaa hayqos gathiday tana.
22.23: Hiza neeni taara de7a; yayyofa. Nena wodhanaw koyiya uray tana wodhanaw koyees; neeni ta matan saro daana” yaagis.

23.1: Filisxeemeti Qa7ila olidi, wudumman de7iya kathaa bonqidaysa Dawiti si7is.
23.2: Dawiti, “Taani bada Filisxeemeta olo?” yaagidi Godaa oychis. Goday, “Ba; Filisxeemeta ola; Qa7ila ashsha” yaagis.
23.3: Shin Dawita kaalleysati, “Nuuni haysan Yihuda biittan de7ishe daroban yayyoos. Filisxeemetara oletanaw Qa7ila nu biiko nuna ubbaa sa7i metana” yaagidosona.
23.4: Dawiti zaaridi Godaa oychin Goday, “Filisxeemeta taani new aatha immana; dendada Qa7ila ba” yaagis.
23.5: Dawitinne iya kaalleysati Qa7ila bidi, Filisxeemetara oletidi enta mehiya di77idosona. Entafe daro asaa wodhidi, Dawiti Qa7ila asaa ashshis.
23.6: Abimeleke na7ay Abyataari Dawitako Qa7ila baqatida wode efuude ma7uwa ekidi bis.
23.7: Dawiti Qa7ila bidaysa Saa7oli si7idi, “Xoossay Dawita ta kushen aathidi immis; Dawiti gimben diretida katama gelidi bana baw qachis” yaagis.
23.8: Qa7ila bidi, Dawitanne iya asaa teqana mela Saa7oli ba olanchota ubbaa xeegis.
23.9: Saa7oli ba bolla iitaba oothanaw maqidaysa Dawiti eridi kahiniya Abyataarako, “Efuudiya haa eka ya” yaagis.
23.10: Dawiti, “Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, ta gaason Saa7oli Qa7ila dhaysanaw maqidaysa taani ne aylley si7as.
23.11: Qa7ila asay tana Saa7olas aathidi immanesha? Taani ne aylley si7idaysada Saa7oli tumaka haa yaaneshsha? Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, taw ne aylliyas oda” yaagis. Goday Dawitako, “Ee; Saa7oli yaana” yaagidi zaaris.
23.12: Dawiti, “Qa7ila asay tananne ta asaa Saa7olas aathidi immanesha?” yaagidi zaaridi Godaa oychis. Goday, “Ee; enti hintena aathidi immana” yaagis.
23.13: Dawitinne usupun xeetu gidiya addeti Qa7ilape keyidi, issi bessafe hara bessi yuuyidosona. Dawiti Qa7ilape baqatidaysa Saa7oli si7ida wode baanaw qopidaysa aggaagis.
23.14: Dawiti bazzo miixataninne Ziifa mela biittan de7iya zumata bolla de7is. Saa7oli iya demmanaw ubba gallas koyees, shin Xoossay iya Saa7ola kushen aathidi immibeenna.
23.15: Dawiti Ziifa mela biittan de7iya Horesan de7ishin, Saa7oli iya wodhanaw keydaysa Dawiti eris.
23.16: Saa7ola na7aa Yoonataani dendidi, Dawitako Horesa bidi Dawiti Godaa wolqan minnanaada zoridi,
23.17: “Yayyofa; ta aawa Saa7oli nena kusheraka bochenna; neeni Isra7eele bolla kawotana; taanika neepe garsara haarana; ta aaway Saa7oli hessa loythidi erees” yaagis.
23.18: Enti nam7ay Godaa sinthan issoy issuwara caaqidosona; Dawiti Horesan gam7in Yoonataani ba soo bis.
23.19: Ziifa asay Saa7olako Gib7a bidi, “Dawiti Yasmoonape dugeha baggan, Hakila zuma bolla Horesa miixatan nu matan qosetidi de7ees.
23.20: Kawaw, ha77ika ne dosida wode duge wodha; nuuni iya ne kushen aathidi immana” yaagidosona.
