23.21: Saa7oli, “Hinte taw qopida gisho hintena Goday anjo.
23.22: Bidi ane gujidika geeshshite; Dawiti daro toho awu biyakoka ooni iya be7idaako, shaakidi erite; I gene asi gideysa ta si7as.
23.23: Dawiti qosetiya bessata ubbaa be7idi, muruuta oda ekidi taako simmidi yiite. Hessafe guye, taani hintera baana; I he heeran de7iko, taani iya Yihuda biitta ubban demmana gakanaw koyana” yaagis.
23.24: Hessa gisho, enti Saa7olape sinthatidi Ziifa bidosona. He wode Dawitinne iya asay Yasmoonape dugeha baggara de7iya Ma7oona mela biittan Araba gadhan de7oosona.
23.25: Saa7olinne iya asay Dawita koyanaw bidosona. Dawita hessa si7ida wode zaallako wodhidi, Ma7oona bazzuwan uttis. Saa7oli hessa si7ida wode Ma7oona bazzuwan Dawita koyishe bis.
23.26: Saa7oli zumaape issi bagga miyiyara bees; Dawitinne iya asay hanko bagga miyiyara boosona. Enti Saa7olape baqatanaw eesotoosona; Saa7olinne iya asati, Dawitanne iya asata oykanaw mati uttidosona.
23.27: Shin, “Ellesada haaya; Filisxeemeti nu biitta olanaw yidosona” giya hara kiiti Saa7ola gakis.
23.28: Saa7oli Dawita koyeysa aggidi, Filisxeemetara oletanaw bis. Hessa gisho, he bessay “Kessi ekidi attiya zaalla” geetetis.
23.29: Dawiti he bessaafe keyidi, Engaada matan de7iya miixatan uttis.

24.1: Saa7oli Filisxeemeta olidi simmidaape guye, Dawiti Engaada bazzuwan de7ees geysa si7is.
24.2: Saa7oli Isra7eele giddofe dooretida heedzu mukulu asaa ekidi, Dawitanne iya asaa koyanaw, “Bazzo Deeshata Zaalla” geetetiya bessaa mata bis.
24.3: Saa7oli ogiya doonan dorsa girbiya matan de7iya gongoluwa giddo gelidi shee7anaw uttis. Dawitinne iya asay gongoluwas guye baggara shiiqidi uttidosona.
24.4: Dawita asay, “ ‘Heko, taani ne morkiya ne kushen aatha immana; neeni iya bolla koydaba oothana’ yaagidi Goday new odida gallasay hachi” yaagidosona. Dawiti Saa7ola erisonna shiiqidi Saa7ola ma7uwa macaraape qanxi ekis.
24.5: Dawiti Saa7ola ma7uwa macaraa qanxida gisho iya wozanay qiirotis.
24.6: Dawiti ba asaako, “Goday tiyida kawa, ta godaa bolla taani hessa oothanaysi woyko iya bolla ta kushiya denthanaysi taape haako; Goday tiyidi iya kawothis” yaagis.
24.7: Dawiti haysada gidi, Saa7ola ba asan boshisonna diggis. Saa7oli gongoluwa giddofe keyidi ba ogiya bis.
24.8: Saa7oli bidaape guye, Dawiti gongoluwa giddofe keyidi, “Ta godaw, kawaw” yaagidi Saa7ola xeegin, Saa7oli guye simmidi xeellis. Dawiti sa7an gufannidi Saa7olas ziggis.
24.9: Dawiti Saa7olako, “Dawiti nena qohanaw koyees” giya asaa neeni ayis si7ay?
24.10: Hachi ha gongoluwan Goday nena taw aathidi immidaysa neeni ne ayfen be7adasa. Taani nena wodhana mela guutha asati tana denthethidosona. Shin, “I, Goday tiyidi kawothidaysa gidiya gisho taani ta godaa bolla ta kushiya denthike” yaagada nena aggas.
24.11: Ta aawaw, ta kushen de7iya ne ma7uwa maccara haysa xeella. Ne ma7uwa macaraape qanxa ekas, shin nena wodhabike. Taani nena qohonnaysanne ne bolla makallonnaysa akeeka; taani nena qohabike, shin neeni tana wodhanaw shankataasa.
24.12: Nebaanne tabaa Goday pirdo; Goday neeni tana qohidaysa haluwa kesso, shin taani ne bolla ta kushiya denthike.
24.13: “Iita ootheysatape iiti keyees” giya beni leemisoy de7ees. Hessa gisho, taani nena kushenka bochike.
24.14: “Isra7eele kawoy oodde bolla dendii? Oona oykanaw kaallii? Hayqida kana woyko kastolle goodiyee?
24.15: Goday nu bolla daannato; nebaanne tabaa I pirdo; ta gisho I mooteto; ne kushepe tana I asho” yaagis.
24.16: Dawiti haasaya wursida wode Saa7oli Dawitako, “Ta na7a Dawita, hessi ne qaalee?” yaagidi Saa7oli ba qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekis.
24.17: “Neeni taape aadhida xillo; taani new iitabaa oothin, neeni taw lo77oba oothadasa.
24.18: Goday tana hachi new aathidi immin neeni tana wodhaboonna gisho neeni taw lo77oba oothada bessadasa.
24.19: Asi ba morke demmidi qohonna yeddiyee? Neeni taw hachi oothida keehatetha gisho, Goday nena anjo.
24.20: Neeni Isra7eele kawo gidanaysanne Isra7eele kawotethay ne maata garsan eqanaysa ta erayis.
24.21: Hiza ta kochaa dhaysona melanne ta sunthaa ta aawa soo asaa giddofe quchonna mela Godaa sunthan taw caaqa” yaagis.
24.22: Dawiti Saa7olas caaqis. Hessafe guye, Saa7oli ba soo simmidi bis; Dawitinne iya asay banta miixaa bidosona.

25.1: Sameeli hayqin, Isra7eele asa ubbay shiiqidi, iyaw yeekidosona; Rama kataman iya moogidosona. Hessafe guye, Dawiti Ma7oona mela biitta bis.
25.2: Ma7oona mela biittan, Qarmeloosan shaloy de7iya issi dure addey de7ees. Iyaw issi mukulu deeshatinne heedzu mukulu dorsati de7oosona. I enta ikisiya Qarmeloosan meedees.
25.3: He addiya sunthay Naabala, I Kaaleba yara; iya mache sunthay Abigiya. Iya akeekanchonne mala lo77o maccas, shin I azinay wozani bayna iita asi.
25.4: Dawiti mela biittan de7ishe, Naabali dorsaa ikise meedeysa si7is.
25.5: Dawiti tammu panthata haysada yaagidi kiittis; “Naabalako Qarmeloosa bidi, ta sunthan iya sarothite.
25.6: ‘Ne barey aduqo! Saroy newunne ne soo asaas gido; new de7iya ubbaas saroy gido!
25.7: Ne dorsa ikise meedeysa taani si7as; ne dorsaa heemmeysati nuura de7ida wode nuuni enta genibooko; enti Qarmeloosan de7ida wode ubban entabaape aybika pacibeenna.
25.8: Hessa neeni ne aylleta oychiko enti new odana. Nuuni hachi gibira gallas neeko yida gisho, ta panthatas hayyana keeha. Ne kushen de7iyabaape ne aylletasinne ne na7aa Dawitas hayyana imma’ yaagite” yaagidi kiittis.
25.9: Dawita asati Naabalako gakidi, Dawita sunthaanne kiitaa iyaw odidi, I gaanaba naagishe yan uttidosona.
25.10: Naabali, “Dawiti oonee? Isseye na7ay oonee? Ha wodiyan daro aylleti banta godatape baqatoosona.
25.11: Ta kathaa, ta haathaanne ta dorsaata meedeysatas shuketida ashuwa ekada, guuyeyi eretonna asas ayis immo?” yaagis.
25.12: Dawita asati simmi guye bidi Naabali gidaba ubbaa Dawitas odidosona.
25.13: Dawiti, “Hinte mashshaa dancite” yaagin, ubbay banta mashshaa dancidosona; Dawitika ba mashshaa dancis. Dawiti oyddu xeetu gidiya asatara dendidi bis; nam7u xeetu asay entaba naagidi attis.
25.14: Naabala aylletape issoy Naabala mache Abigiyako haysada yaagis; “Dawiti mela biittan de7ishe nu godaa saro gaanaw ase kiittis, shin I enta cayidi yeddis.
25.15: Gidoshin, ha asati nuus daro lo77o; enti nuna genibookona; nuuni entara bazzon pee7ida wode ubban nubaape aykoyka pacibeenna.
25.16: Nuuni nu dorsa wudiya enta matan heemmiya wode, qammanne gallas enti nuus dirsi gididosona.
25.17: Nu godaa bollanne iya soo asaa bolla iitabay gakana haniya gisho, hayyana ha odaa waataneko qopa. Nu goday asa zore si7onna iita asi gidiya gisho, oonika iya haasayisanaw danda7enna” yaagis.
25.18: Abigiya eeson nam7u xeetu uythu, nam7u ogoro woyne ushshu, ichashu caacetida dorsata, ishatamu kilo giraame caacetida tiya, issi xeetu uuketida woyne mor7enne nam7u xeetu balase nuka ekada hareta bolla caanasu.
25.19: Ba aylletako, “Hinte sinthatidi biite; ta hintena kaallana” yaagasu; shin ba azinaa Naabalas aykoka odabuuku.
25.20: Ba hariya toggada zumaa loobuwa duge wodhiya wode Dawitinne iya asay yishe iira gahetidosona.
25.21: Dawiti, “Iyabape aykoyka paconna mela taani ha addiya shaluwa naagiday coo mela; taani oothida lo77o oosuwas I taw iita kushe zaaris.
25.22: Wonto wonta gakanaw, iyabaa gidida addetape issuwa ta paxa aggiko, Xoossi tana pirdo” yaagis.
25.23: Abigiya Dawita be7ida wode hariyape eesota wodhada, Dawita sinthan gufannada ziggasu.
25.24: Iya tohuwa bolla kundada, “Ta godaw, ta balay ta bolla gido! Ta issiba odana; ta ne aylliya giyaba si7a.
25.25: Ha wozani bayna addey, Naabali giyaba si7opa; I ba sunthada eeya. Ta godaw, ne kiitida asata ta ne aylliya be7abike.
25.26: De7o Goday eriya mela, ne shempoy erin, ne suuthu gussonnaadanne halo keyonnaada nena teqiday Godaa. Ne morketinne nena qohanaw koyeysati Naabalada hano.
25.27: Ha imotay taani ne aylliya new, ta godaas ehidaysi nena kaalliya asatas imeto.
25.28: Ta godaw, ne aylle nagaraa atto yaaga! Neeni Godaa olaa oletiya gisho, Goday nenanne ne sheesha kawoyana. Ne de7o laytha ubban iitatethi ne bolla bentofo.
25.29: Ay asika nena wodhanaw koyiko, issi asi ba al7o shaluwa naageysada Goday, ne Xoossay nena saro naagana. Shin yambarshan shuchu holeysada I ne morketa holana.
25.30: Goday, ta godaas oothanaw qaala gelida keehatetha ubbaa oothiya wodenne Isra7eele bolla kawothiya wode,
25.31: ta goday azzaniya gaasoy woyko qiiroyabay baawa. Gaasoy bayna suuthu gussidabay woyko halo keydabay bayna gisho ne wozanay dagammenna. Goday new lo77oba oothida wode tana ne aylliw dogopa” yaagasu.
25.32: Dawiti Abigiyako, “Taara gahetana mela hachi nena kiitida Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto.
25.33: Taani asa suuthu gussonnaadanne halo keyonnaada ne lo77o qofay tana teqida gisho neeni anjeta.
25.34: Ta nena qohonnaada teqida de7o Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay eriya mela ne taara gahetanaw ellesada yoonnaako, sa7i wontana gakanaw Naabala asaape issi addeyka paxa attenna” yaagis.
25.35: Abigiya iyaw ehida imota I kushepe Dawiti ekidi, “Ne soo saro ba; taani ne gidaba si7as; ne oyshaaka ekas” yaagis.
25.36: Abigiya simmada Naabalako yaa wode, kawo son giigiya gibira mela gibira muzishe son uttis. Naabali daro mathotidi, ba wozanan ufaytiya gisho sa7i wontana gakanaw Abigiya iyaw aykoka odabuuku.
25.37: Wonta Naabala mathoy simmidaape guye, iya machiya hanidaba ubbaa iyaw odasu; Naabala wozanay wodhin, I daaburis.
25.38: Tammu gallasape guye Goday Naabala shocin, I hayqis.
25.39: Naabali hayqidaysa Dawiti si7ida wode, “Goday galatetto! Naabali tana cayidaysa halo Goday kessis. Taani iya aylley iitaba oothonna mela tana teqis. Naabali oothida iitabaa Goday iya bolla zaaris” yaagis. Hessafe guye, Dawiti Abigiya ekanaw koyidi kiita yeddis.
25.40: Dawita aylleti Qarmeloosan de7iya Abigiyako bidi, “Dawiti nena machanaw dosida gisho nuuni nena ekanaw yida” yaagidosona.
25.41: Abigiya gufanna ziggada, “Taani ne aylliya new kiitetanawunne ne aylleta tohuwa meeccanaw giigeta uttas” yaagasu.
25.42: Abigiya ellesa dendada ba hariya toggasu, iya ba ichashu macca aylletaranne Dawita kitida asara bada Dawita gelasu.
25.43: Dawiti kase Izira7eele maccasiw Aknahoomo ekidi de7ees; enti nam7ay iya macheta.
25.44: Saa7oli Dawita machiw, ba na7iw Melkoolo Galima addiya Leesa na7aa Falxas immis.

26.1: Ziifa asay Saa7olako Gib7a bidi, “Dawiti Yasmoona sinthan de7iya Hakila zuman qosetis?” yaagidosona.
26.2: Saa7oli, Isra7eeletape dooretida heedzu mukulu asi ekidi, Dawita koyanaw Ziifa mela biitta bis.
26.3: Saa7oli Yasmoona sinthan de7iya Hakila zumaa bolla de7iya ogiya matan dunkaanis; shin Dawiti he mela biittan uttis. Saa7oli iya kaallidi yidaysa Dawiti erida wode,
26.4: wochiya asi yeddidi, Saa7oli tuma he bessaa gakidaysa shaakidi eris.
26.5: Dawiti dendidi, Saa7oli dunkaanida bessaa bidi Saa7olinne toora moconay Neera na7ay Abeneeri zin7ida bessa be7is. Saa7oli dunkaanida gutan olanchoti iya yuushuwa teqin I dhiskis.
26.6: Dawiti Hite addiya Abimelekenne Xaruya na7aa Iyo7aaba ishaa Abisaya, “Saa7oli dunkaanida bessaa taara baanay oonee?” yaagidi oychis. Abisayi, “Taani neera baana” yaagis.
26.7: Hessa gisho, Dawitinne Abisayi he qamma olanchotako yaa wode Saa7oli ba huuphe son toora essidi, dunkaaniya giddon zin7idaysa demmidosona. Abeneerinne olanchoti iya yuushuwan zin7idosona.
26.8: Abisayi, “Xoossay ne morkiya hachi ne kushen aathidi immis; taani tooran iya issi toho sa7ara oythada caddana; iya zaara caddanaw koshshenna” yaagis.
26.9: Shin Dawiti Abisayako, “Neeni iya wodhopa; Goday tiyida kawa bolla ba kushiya denthiya oonaka Goday seerana.
26.10: De7o Goday eriya mela, Xoossay iya wodhana; I ba gallasan woyko olan hayqana.
26.11: Goday tiyida kawa bolla ta kushiya denthonaada tana Goday teqo. Ane iya huuphe son de7iya tooranne haatha oykiya miishiya ekidi boos” yaagis.
26.12: Dawiti Saa7ola huuphe son de7iya tooranne haathe oykiya miishiya ekin, enti bidosona. Enta oonika be7ibeenna woyko oonika eribeenna woyko oonika barkibeenna. Goday enta bolla wolqaama dhisko yeddida gisho ubbay dhisko hayqi aggidosona.
26.13: Dawiti hefinthi pinnidi, entafe haakidi hara dere bolla keyidi eqis.
26.14: Dawiti Saa7ola olanchotanne Neera na7aa Abeneera xeegidi, “Abeneera, taani xeegiya wode si7ikii?” yaagidi waassis. Abeneeri, “Qaala dhoqu oothi xeegidi kawa dhisko diggey oonee?” yaagis.
26.15: Dawiti, “Neeni wozanaama asi gidikii? Isra7eele giddon ne mela asi oonee? Yaatin, kawa, ne godaa ayis naagikii? Issi asi kawa, ne godaa wodhanaw bis.
26.16: Ne oothidabay lo77o gidenna. De7o Goday eriya mela, nenne ne olanchoti Xoossay tiyida hinte godaa naagiboonna gisho hinte hayqanaw bessees. Kawa tooraynne iya huuphe son de7iya haathe oykiya miishey awun de7iyako be7a” yaagis.
26.17: Dawita qaala gideysa Saa7oli eridi, “Ta na7aw Dawita, hessi ne qaalee?” yaagis. Dawiti, “Ee, ta godaw, kawaw, hessi ta qaala.
26.18: Ta godaw, tana ne aylliya neeni ayis kaallay? Taani ay oothadina? Ta balay aybee?
26.19: Ta godaw, kawaw, neeni ne aylliya qaala si7ana mela ta nena woossayis. Goday nena ta bolla denthidaba gidiko, I yarsho eko. Shin asi nena denthidaba gidiko, ‘Bada hara xoossata goyinna’ yaagidosona. Godaa biittan taw de7iya laatape enti tana gooddida gisho enti Godaa sinthan baadetidaba gido!
26.20: Ha77i Godaa sinthafe haakidi, allaga biittan de7iya uraa suuthaa gussofa. Issi asi kuraacho shankatanaw dere bolla keyeysada, Isra7eele kawoy kastolle koyanaw keyis” yaagis.
26.21: Saa7oli, “Taani nena qohas. Ta na7aw, Dawita, haa simma! Hachi ne ta shempiw hayqope ashshida gisho taani nena zaarada genike. Tuma taani eeyaba hanas; gita bala balas” yaagis.
26.22: Dawiti zaaridi, “Kawaw, ne tooray haysish, ne asaape issi asi yidi eko.
26.23: Issi issi asas iya xillotethaa melanne iya ammanetetha mela Goday gate qanxees. Hachi Goday nena ta kushen aathidi immis; shin Goday tiyida kawa bolla taani ta kushiya wothanaw koyabike.
26.24: Hachi ne shempuwa ta ashshidaysada Goday tana meto ubbaafe ashshidi boncho” yaagis.
26.25: Saa7oli, “Ta na7aw, Dawita, neeni anjeta. Neeni gitaba oothana; new injetana” yaagis. Dawiti ba ogiya bis; Saa7olika ba soo simmis.

27.1: Dawiti ba wozanan, “Issi gallas taani Saa7ola kushen daafatana; taani Filisxeeme biitta baqatanaape attishin, harabay taw lo77enna. Yaaniko, Saa7oli Isra7eele biitta ubban tana koyeysa aggana; taani iya kushepe kessa ekana” yaagidi qopis.
27.2: Hessa gisho, Dawitinne iyara de7iya usupun xeetu asati dendidi, Gaate kawa Ma7oka na7aa Ankusako bidosona.
27.3: Dawitinne iya asay Ankusara Gaaten uttidosona. Asa ubbay ba soo asa asa ekidi bis; Dawitika ba macheta, Izira7eele Aknahoomonne Naabala am7iw, Qarmeloosa maccasiw, Abigiya ekidi bis.
27.4: Dawiti Gaate baqatis geysa si7idi, Saa7oli zaaridi iya koyeysa aggis.
27.5: Dawiti kawa Ankusako, “Neeni tanan ufaytiko, taani yan daana mela ne kawotethan de7iya katamatape issuwa taw imma. Taani ne aylley kawoy de7iya kataman neera ayis uttanee?” yaagis.
27.6: He gallas Ankusi Xiqilaaga katamaa Dawitas immis; hachi gakanaw Xiqilaaga katamay Yihuda kawotaba gididi attis.
27.7: Dawiti Filisxeeme biittan issi laythinne oyddu ageena de7is.
27.8: Dawitinne iya asati pude keyidi, Geeshureta, Garzetanne Amaaleqata oloosona. Benipe doomidi, he asati Shuurape bidi Gibxe gakanaw de7iya biittan de7idosona.
27.9: Dawiti he biitta oliya wode ubban he biittan de7iya macca gidin, adde gidin, paxa aggibeenna. Dorsenne mehe, harenne gimale ma7o di77ees; yaatidi Ankusako simmees.
27.10: Ankusi, “Hachi awun olidetii?” gidi Dawita oychees. Dawiti, “Yihuda dugeha baggaa woyko Yirama7eela dugeha baggaa woyko Qeena dugeha baggaa olida” yaagees.
27.11: Entafe issi asi Gaate bidi, “Dawiti haysa oothis” gidi odonna mela Dawitinne iya asati macca adde ashshona wodhidosona. Dawiti Filisxeeme biittan de7ida wode ubban haysada oothis.
27.12: Ankusi Dawitan ammanetidi, “Dawiti ba asan, Isra7eelen daro ixetis; hesaa gisho, I taw merinaw aylle gidana” yaagidi qopis.

28.1: He wode Filisxeeme asati Isra7eeleta olanaw banta olanchota shiishidosona. Ankusi Dawitako, “Nenne ne asati taara olas baanaysa tuma era utta” yaagis.
28.2: Dawiti, “Hessa gidiko, ta ne aylley oothanaba ne be7ana” yaagis. Ankusi, “Daro lo77o; taani nena ta de7o laytha ubban tana naageysa oothana” yaagis.
28.3: Haysafe kase Sameeli hayqin, Isra7eele asa ubbay iyaw yeekidi, iya kataman Raman iya moogidosona. Saa7oli moytille xeegeysatanne marota Isra7eele biittafe yedethidi kessis.
28.4: Filisxeeme olanchoti shiiqidi, Suneema kataman dunkaanidosona; Saa7oli Isra7eele asa ubbaa shiishidi, Gilbo7a zuman dunkaanis.
28.5: Saa7oli Filisxeeme olanchota be7idi yayyis; iya wozanay daro dagammis.
28.6: Hessa gisho, ay oothaneko Godaa oychis; shin Goday amuhon woyko Uriimen woyko nabeta baggara iyaw odibeenna.
28.7: Hessafe guye, Saa7oli ba aylleta, “Moytille xeegiya maro taw koyte; taani iiko bada iyo oychana” yaagidi kiittis. Saa7ola aylleti, “Moytille xeegiya issi maroy Endooran de7ausu” yaagidosona.
28.8: Yaagin Saa7oli bana erisonna mela hara ma7o ma7idi, nam7u asata ekidi, qamma he mareeko bidi, maccasiw, “Hayyana, taw issi moytille xeegarki; taani suntha odiya asa taw dentharki” yaagis.
28.9: Yaagin maccasiya, “Moytille xeegeysatanne marota Isra7eele biittafe Saa7oli waati yedethi kessidaako, tuma neeni eraasa. Tana wodhisanaw neeni taw ayis xihe yeggay?” yaagasu.
28.10: Yaagin Saa7oli maccasiw, “De7o Xoossay eriya mela, neeni haysa gisho seeretaka” yaagidi Godan caaqis.
28.11: Maccasiya, “Taani new oona dentho?” yaagada oychasu. Saa7oli, “Sameela taw dentha” yaagis.
28.12: Maccasiya Sameela be7ada, waaso goochada, Saa7olako, “Neeni tana ayis cimmadii? Neeni Saa7ola gidiki!” yaagasu.
28.13: Kawoy, “Yayyofa! New aybe bentey?” yaagis. Maccasiya, “Issi moytilley biitta giddofe keyishin be7as” yaagasu.
28.14: Saa7oli maccasiw, “I ay daanii?” yaagis. Maccasiya, “Kaabba ma7ida issi cima addey keyis” yaagasu. Saa7oli he addey Sameela gideysa eridi, iya sinthan sa7an gufannis.
28.15: Sameeli Saa7olako, “Tana denthada ayis waaysay?” yaagis. Saa7oli, “Taani daro un7etas; Filisxeeme asati tana oloosona; Xoossay taape shaaketis; nabeta baggara woyko amuhon I taani oychiyaba odenna. Hessa gisho, taani oothanaba ne taw odana mela nena xeegas” yaagis.
28.16: Sameeli, “Goday shaaketidi new morke gidiko tana ayis zore oychay?
28.17: Goday ta baggara kaseti odidaba oothis; Goday kawotethaa neepe ekidi, ne shooruwa Dawitas immis.
28.18: Neeni Godaas kiitetaboonna gishonne iya eexiya iya sheniya Amaaleqa bolla polaboona gisho Goday hachi haysa ne bolla ehis.
28.19: Nenanne Isra7eele, Goday Filisxeemetas aathidi immana; nenne ne adde nayti wonto tanan gahetana; Goday Isra7eele olanchota Filisxeemetas aathidi immana” yaagis.
28.20: Saa7oli Sameela odaa si7idi yayyida gisho daaburidi, bana dogidi sa7an kundis. Saa7oli qammanne gallas kathi miboonna gisho iyaw wolqi ixis.
28.21: He maccasiya Saa7olako yada, I daro kokoreysa be7ada, “Taani ne aylliya new kiitetas; neeni tana oychidaba ta shempuwa dogada oothas.
28.22: Ha77i taani ne aylliya giyaba hayyana si7a; neeni mada gashtada ne ogiya baana mela taani new guutha kathi giigisas” yaagasu.
28.23: Saa7oli, “Miike” yaagis. Shin iya asati he maccaseera gididi iya woossidosona; enta woosa si7is; biittafe dendidi hiixan uttis.
28.24: He maccasiya ba son de7iya anqara maraa shukasu; dhiille eka munuqada, uythi uukasu.
28.25: Yaatada kathaa Saa7olasinne iya asatas aathin, enti midosona. He qamma dendidi bidosona.

29.1: Filisxeemeti banta olanchota ubbaa Afeeqan shiishidosona. Isra7eeleti Izira7eelen de7iya pulto haatha matan dunkaanidosona.
29.2: Filisxeeme halaqati banta olanchota xeetaninne mukulu cugan salpisidosona; Dawitinne iya asay Ankusara issife gididi guye baggara salpidosona.
29.3: Filisxeeme halaqati enta be7idi, “Ha Ibraaweti haysan ay oothona?” yaagidosona. Ankusi, “Haysi Isra7eele kawa Saa7ola aylliya Dawita gidennee? I daro wode taara aathis; I Saa7ola kaddidi keyoodepe hachi gakanaw taani iyape bala demmabike” yaagis.
29.4: Shin Filisxeeme halaqati Ankusa bolla hanqetidi, “Ha addiya neeni iyaw immida katamaa guye zaara. Olay goobiya wode I nu bolla simmidi dendonna mela I nuura olaa boopo. I ba godaara sigetanaw nu asata qoodhiya qaanxofe attishin, haraa ay oothanee?
29.5: Haysafe kase maccasay, ‘Saa7oli mukulata wodhis; Dawiti tammu mukulata wodhis’ yaagidi durishenne yexishe sabbiday Dawita gidennee?” yaagidosona.
29.6: Hessa gisho, Ankusi Dawita xeegidi, “De7o Goday eriya mela, neeni ammanthiya asi; neeni taara olas beysa ta dosayis. Neeni taako yoosape hachi gakanaw taani ne bolla bala demmabike. Shin halaqati neeni olas beysa dosokona.
29.7: Neeni guye simmada saro ba; Filisxeeme halaqata ufaysonnaba aykoka oothofa” yaagis.
29.8: Dawiti, “Taani ay oothadina? Taani neera de7oodepe hachi gakanaw ne taape ay bala demmadii? Yaatin, kawa, ta godaa morketara ayis oletikinaa?” yaagis.
29.9: Ankusi, “Xoossa kiitanchoda neeni taw lo77o gideysa taani erayis. Shin Filisxeeme halaqati, ‘I nuura ola boopo’ yaagidosona.
29.10: Nenne neera yida ne godaa aylletara wonto guura dendidi biite” yaagis.
29.11: Hessa gisho, Dawitinne iya asati Filisxeeme simmanaw wonta guura dendidosona; Filisxeemeti Izira7eele bidosona.

30.1: Dawitinne iya asati heedzantho gallas Xiqilaaga gakidosona. Amaaleqati Negebanne Xiqilaaga olidi, Xiqilaaga taman xuuggidosona.
30.2: Xiqilaagan de7iya maccasaanne na7ape cima gakanaw de7iya ubbaa di77idosona; entafe issi asika wodhonna enta ubbaa di77idi efidosona.
30.3: Dawitinne iya asati Xiqilaaga gakiya wode katamay taman xuugetidaysanne enta macheti, adde naytinne macca nayti di7etidaysa be7idosona.
30.4: Dawitinne iyara de7iya asay banta wolqay ixana gakanaw waassidi yeekidosona.
30.5: Dawita macheti Izira7eele Aknahoomanne kase Naabala machiya Qarmeloosa Abigiya nam7ayka di7etidosona.
30.6: Iya asay banta adde naytinne macca nayti di7etida gisho yilotidi Dawita shuchan caddanaw odetin, Dawiti daro un7etis. Gidoshin, Dawiti Godan ba Xoossan minetis.
30.7: Dawiti Abimeleke na7aa kahiniya Abyataarako, “Efuudiya ekada ya” yaagin, Abiyatari efuudiya Dawitas ehis.
30.8: Dawiti, “Taani, tana oliya asata kaallada gakanee?” yaagidi Godaa oychis. Goday, “Ee; enta kaallada ba; tuma enta ne gakana; tuma di7uwa zaarana” yaagis.
30.9: Dawitinne iyara de7iya usupun xeetu asati dendidi Boosora shaafa gakiya wode entafe guutha asati yan attidosona.
30.10: Nam7u xeetu asay shaafa pinnanaw daro daaburidosona. Shin Dawitinne oyddu xeetu asay kaallidosona.
30.11: Enti issi Gibxe asi denban demmidi, Dawitako ehidi, iyaw haathenne kathi immidosona.
30.12: Balase ongochonne nam7u woyne nuka iyaw immin midi gashtisis. I heedzu gallasinne heedzu qamma kathi moonna haathe uyonna gam7is.
30.13: Dawiti, “Neeni oodde ayllee? Awupe yadii?” yaagidi addiya oychis. Addey, “Taani Amaaleqa addiyas aylletida Gibxe asi; heedzu gallasape kase ta saketin, ta goday tana yeggi aggidi bis.
30.14: Nuuni Yihuda zawa, Keltaaweta dugeha bagganne Kaaleba dugeha baggaa olidi Xiqilaaga taman xuuggida” yaagis.
30.15: Dawiti, “Neeni tana he olida cugatako kaalethanaw danda7ay?” yaagidi oychis. I zaaridi, “Neeni tana wodhonna melanne ta godaas aathada immike gada taw Xoossan caaqa; taani nena entako kaalethana” yaagis.
30.16: Dawita kaalethidi entako gathis. Enti Filisxeemepenne Yihudape daro di7o di77ida gisho ufaytidi mishenne uyishe laaletidi uttidosona.
30.17: He gallas omarsafe doomidi wontetha gallas omarsi gakanaw Dawiti enta shocis. Gimale toggidi baqatida oyddu xeetu panthatape attishin, hari issi asika attibeenna.
30.18: Amaaleqa asati efida ubbaa, ba nam7u machetara issife Dawiti wosisidi ekis.
30.19: Asati di77idi efidabaape issibayka pacibeenna; na7i woyko cimi, addey woyko macci, hessadaka enti di77idi efida haraba ubbay paconna de7ishin Dawiti ubbaa zaaris.
30.20: Dawiti dorse, deeshenne mehe ubbaa di77is; Dawita asay I di77ida mehiya hanko mehiyape sinthara laaggishe, “Haysi Dawita di7o” yaagidosona.
30.21: Dawiti daaburidi Boosora shaafa achan attida nam7u xeetu asaako yis. Enti Dawitanne iyara de7iya asaa mokanaw keyidosona. Dawiti ba asaara shiiqidi enta sarothis.
30.22: Shin Dawitara bida asata giddofe pathonna iita asati, “Enti nuura boonna gisho nuuni zaaridi ehidabaape aykoka entaw shaakoko; enti banta naytanne banta macheta ekidi boonna” yaagidosona.
30.23: Dawiti zaaridi, “Ta ishato, Goday nuus immidaban hinte haysada oothanaw bessenna. I nuna naagidi, nuna olida cugata nuus aathidi immis.
30.24: Hinte giyaba oonika ekenna. Oletanaw bidaysatanne nubaa naagishe haysan gam7idaysata gishoy issino; ubbay gina shaaketana” yaagis.
30.25: He gallasape doomidi hachi gakanaw Isra7eele biittan hessi higgenne woga gidis.
30.26: Dawiti Xiqilaaga gakida wode ba lagge gidida Yihuda cimatako, “Godaa morketape di7etidabaape taani hintew immeysa ekite” yaagidi guuthara yeddis.
30.27: I hessa Beetelen, Raamota Negebaninne Yatiran de7eysatas,
30.31: Kebroonan de7eysatas yeddis. Inne iya asati yuuyida bessa ubban de7iya asaas yeddis.

31.1: Filisxeemeti Isra7eeletara oletidosona; Isra7eeleti Filisxeemeta sinthafe baqatidosona; daro Isra7eeleti Gilbo7a deriya bolla hayqidosona.
31.2: Filisxeemeti Saa7olanne iya adde nayta yedethidi, iya adde nayta Yoonataana, Amnadaabenne Malkisa wodhidosona.
31.3: Olay teqidi Saa7ola un7ethis; dongen dukeysati iya caddidi daro madunxisidosona.
31.4: Saa7oli ba ola miishiya tookeysako, “Ha qaxaretiboonaysati yidi, tana caddidi kaa7onna mela ne mashshan tana caddada wodha” yaagis. Shin iya ola miishiya tookeysi yayyidi ixin, Saa7oli ba mashshaa sa7an essidi, iya bolla kundis.
31.5: Iya ola miishiya tookeysi Saa7oli hayqidaysa be7idi, ika ba mashshaa sa7an essidi, iya bolla kundidi iyara issife hayqis.
31.6: Haysada hanidi, Saa7olinne iya heedzu adde nayti, iya ola miishiya tookeysinne iya asati ubbay he gallas hayqidosona.
31.7: Zangaaraninne Yordaanose shaafape hefintha baggara de7iya Isra7eele asay, Isra7eele olanchoti baqatidaysa, Saa7olinne iya nayti hayqidaysa be7idi banta katamaa aggidi baqatidosona. Filisxeemeti yidi, he katamata oykidosona.
31.8: Wontetha gallas Filisxeemeti aha bollafe ola misheta qaaridi ekanaw yidi, Saa7olinne iya heedzu adde nayti Gilbo7a deriya bolla hayqidi zin7idaysata demmidosona.
31.9: Enti Saa7ola qoodhiya qanxidi iya ola miishiya qaari ekidosona. Yaatidi banta eeqa keethaninne banta asaa giddon xoonuwa awaajana mela Filisxeeme biitta ubbaas kiita yeddidosona.
31.10: Saa7ola ola miishiya Astaroote geetetiya enta macca xoosse keethan wothidosona. Saa7ola aha Beet-Saana katama gimbiya bolla mismaaren dhishidi kaqidosona.
31.11: Filisxeemeti Saa7ola oothidaba Galadan de7iya Yaabesa asay si7ida wode,
31.12: mino asati qamma dendi bidi, Saa7ola ahaanne iya nayta aha Beet-Saana katama gimbiya bollafe wodhisidi Yaabesa katamaa ehidi, yan xuuggidosona.
31.13: Hessafe guye, enta meqethaa maxi ekidi, Yaabesan de7iya tamarsike mithaa garsan moogidosona; yaatidi laapun gallas xoomidosona.

1.1: Saa7oli hayqidaape guye, Dawiti Amaaleqata xooni simmidi Xiqilaagan nam7u gallas gam7is.
1.2: Heedzantho gallas issi addey ba ma7uwa daakidi, ba huuphen baana qolidi, Saa7oli dunkaanida gutaape yis. I Dawitako yidi sa7an gufannidi ziggis.
1.3: Dawiti, “Neeni awape yadii?” yaagidi oychis. I zaaridi, “Taani Isra7eeleti dunkaanida gutaape kessa ekada yas” yaagis.
1.4: Dawiti, “Ane hanidaba taw oda” yaagis. I zaaridi, “Nu olanchoti olape baqatidosona; nu asaape daroti hayqidosona; Saa7olinne iya na7ay Yoonataani hayqidosona” yaagis.
1.5: Dawiti iyaw odida panthaa, “Saa7olinne iya na7aa Yoonataani hayqidaysa neeni aybin eray?” yaagidi oychis.
1.6: Panthay, “Taani Gilbo7a deriya bolla de7ishin, Saa7oli ba toora guufetidi eqidaysa be7as; para gaaretinne para asati Saa7olako matatidosona.
1.7: He wode Saa7oli guye simmidi tana demmidi xeegis. Taani, ‘Yee’ yaagada koyas.
1.8: Saa7oli, ‘Neeni oonee?’ yaagidi oychin, ‘Taani Amaaleqa asi’ yaagada zaaras.
1.9: Hessafe guye, Saa7oli, ‘Taani madunxada, hayqos gakas; neeni ta bolla keyiya eqada tana wodha’ yaagis.
1.10: I kundidaape guye hayqope attonnaysa erida gisho taani iya bolla keya eqada iya wodhas. Iya huuphen de7iya kallachanne iya qesen de7iya ambaariya ekada neeko ta godaako yas” yaagis.
1.11: Dawitinne Dawita asay kayotidi, banta ma7uwa daakidosona.
1.12: Enti Saa7oli, Yoonataani, Godaa olanchotinne Isra7eele asay olan wurida gisho omarsi gakanaw kayotidosona; yeekidosona; xoomidosona.
1.13: Dawiti hessa entaw ehida panthaa, “Ne awupe yadii?” yaagidi oychis. I zaaridi, “Taani bete asi gididi de7iya Amaaleqa addiya na7a” yaagis.
1.14: Dawiti, “Goday tiyida kawa wodhanaw ne kushiya denthashe waanada yayyabikii?” yaagis.
1.15: Dawiti ba asatape issuwa xeegidi, “Iya wodha” yaagin, I Amaaleqa panthaa caddidi wodhis.
1.16: Dawiti Amaaleqa addiyako, “Goday tiyida kawa taani wodhas” yaagada “Neeni ne doonan markatida gisho ne suuthaa gomey nena oyko” yaagis. Dawiti Saa7olasinne Yoonatanas Yeekis
1.17: Dawiti Saa7olasinne iya na7aa Yoonatanas haysada yaagidi zeleelis.
1.18: Yihuda asay, “Donge yeeho” geetetiya ha zelelsa tamaarana mela kiittis; ha zelelsay Yaashara maxaafan xaafetis.
1.19: “Neno Isra7eele, ne halaqati, dhoqa bessan hayqidosona. Wolqaamati waanidi kundidona!
1.20: Filisxeeme macca nayti hessa si7idi ufaytonna mela, qaxaretiboona asaa macca nayti hashshu goonna mela, haysa Gaate kataman odopite Asqaloona ogetan awaajofite.
1.21: Hinteno Gilbo7a dereto, hinte bolla iri bukofo; aki wodhofo. He bessan wolqaamata gondalley tunida gisho, Saa7ola gondalley zayten qushetiboona gisho, he gadiyan kathi dolopo.
1.22: Goyretidaysata suuthaafe, wolqaamata modhuwafe, Yoonataana dongey guye gibeenna; Saa7ola mashshay kallonna simmibeenna.
1.23: Saa7olinne Yoonataani doseteyisata; hayqoninne paxan shaaketibookona. Enti arganthafe aadhidi eeso; gaammofe aadhidi mino.
1.24: Hinteno Isra7eele maccasaw, zo7onne alleeqo ma7o mayzidaysas, hinte ma7uwa worqan alleeqisida Saa7olas yeekite.
1.25: Wolqaamati olan waanidi kundidona? Yoonataani dhoqa bessan hayqis.
1.26: Ta ishaa Yoonataana, ta new azzanayis; ne taw daro al7o. Neeni tana dosiya dosoy malaalsees; macca siiqopeka aadhees.
1.27: Wolqaamati waanidi kundidona? Ola miisheyka waanidi dhayidee?” yaagidi Dawiti zeleelis.

2.1: Hessafe guye, Dawiti, “Yihuda katamatape issuwa boo?” yaagidi Godaa oychis. Goday, “Ee, ba” yaagis. Dawiti, “Awu boo” yaagidi oychis. Goday, “Kebroona ba” yaagidi zaaris.
2.2: Dawiti ba nam7u macheta, Izira7eele Aknahoomanne kase Naabala machiw Qarmeloosa Abigiya ekidi Kebroona katamaa bis.
2.3: Dawiti baara de7iya asatanne enta soo asa ubbaa ehin, Kebroonaninne iya heeran de7iya katamatan de7idosona.
2.4: Yihuda asati Kebroona katamaa yidi, Dawita tiyidi Yihuda bolla kawothidosona. Dawiti Yaabesa Galada asay Saa7ola moogidaysa si7ida wode,
2.5: I ase kiittidi, “Hinte hinte godaa Saa7ola moogida gisho he keehatethas Goday hintena anjo.
2.6: Goday siiquwanne tumatethaa hintew qonciso; taanika ha keehatetha gisho hintew lo77o kushe zaarana.
2.7: Hiza minnite; xaalite; hinte goday Saa7oli hayqis. Yihuda asay tana tiyidi, banta bolla kawothidosona” yaagis. Nam7u Keethata Giddon De7iya Ola
2.8: Saa7ola tora moconay Neera na7ay Abeneeri Saa7ola na7aa Iyabuste ekidi, Mahinayma geetetiya bessaa efis.
2.9: Iya Galadan, Aseeran, Izra7eelan, Efreeman, Biniyaameninne Isra7eele biitta ubban kawothis.
2.10: Saa7ola na7ay, Iyabustey Isra7eele bolla kawotiya wode iyaw oytamu laythi; I nam7u laythi kawotis. Gidoshin, Yihuda asay Dawita kaallidosona.
2.11: Dawiti Kebroonan Yihuda bolla laapun laythinne bagga kawotis.
2.12: Neera na7ay Abeneerinne Saa7ola na7ay Iyabuste asay Mahinaymape Gaba7oona bidosona.
2.13: Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabinne Dawita asay Gaba7oona olla haatha matan entara gahetidosona. Issi cugay olla haathaafe hefinthan uttin, issi cugay hafinthan uttis.
2.14: Abeneeri Iyo7aabako, “Ane hintefenne nuupe panthati dendidi, nu sinthan oleto” yaagis. Iyo7aabi, “Ero, dendidi oleto” yaagis.
2.15: Hessa gisho, Biniyaamepe Saa7ola na7aa Iyabustes tammanne nam7u asati keyidi, Dawitas eqida tammanne nam7u asatara ola gahetidosona.
2.16: Issoy issoy ba morkiya huuphiya oykidi, mashshan miyen caddis; hessada hannidi laatamanne oydday hayqidosona. Hessa gisho Gaba7oonan de7iya he bessay Mashsha biitta geetetis.
2.17: He gallas wolqaama ola oletidi, Dawita asay Abeneeranne Isra7eele asaa xoonis.
2.18: Xaruya nayti heedzay Iyo7aabi, Abisinne Asaheeli he bessan de7oosona; Asaheeli woshi7eda eeson woxidi,
2.19: Asaheeli Abeneera ushachi woyko haddirsi goonna yedethis.
2.20: Abeneeri guye simmidi, “Asaheela, nenee?” yaagidi oychis. Asaheeli, “Ee tana” yaagis.
2.21: Abeneeri, “Ushachi woyko haddirsi simmada, asatape issuwa oykada iya ola miishiya eka” yaagis. Shin Asaheeli iya yedetheysa aggonna ixis.
2.22: Qassika Abeneeri, “Taani nena sa7ara gathada oythonna de7ishin, tana yedetheysa agga! Nena wodhada taani ne ishaa Iyo7aaba som7uwa waatada xeellanee?” yaagidi waassis.
2.23: Shin Asaheeli iya yedetheysa aggonna ixis. Hessa gisho, Abeneeri toora guye yeddidi, Asaheela uluwa caddin tooray zokora kanthidi keyis. Asaheeli he bessan kundidi hayqis; Asaheeli hayqida bessaa gakida asa ubbay yan eqis.
2.24: Shin Iyo7aabinne Abisi Abeneera gooddidosona; awi wulliya wode Gaba7oona mela biittako efiya ogiyan Gaadape sintha baggara de7iya Ama zumako gakidosona.
2.25: Biniyaame asay Abeneerako shiiqidosona; issi cuga medhidi issi zumaa bolla eqidosona.
2.26: Abeneeri Iyo7aaba xeegidi, “Merinaw oletishe daaneyee? Haysa wursethay camo gidanaysa neeni erikii? Ne asay, banta ishata gooddeysa aggana mela ayis odikii?” yaagis.
2.27: Iyo7aabi, “De7o Xoossay ero! Neeni odonnaba gidiyako ta asay ba ishata sa7i wontana gakanaw goodda aggokona” yaagis.
2.28: Iyo7aabi moyze punnin asa ubbay essis. Isra7eeleta zaari goodibookona woyko olibookona.
2.29: Abeneerinne iya asay he qamma kumethi hemetidi Araba gadha gakidosona. Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi, Betroona kanthidi Mahinayme yidosona.
2.30: Iyo7aabi Abeneera gooddeysa aggidi, ba asa ubbaa issi bessi shiishidi xeelliya wode, Asaheela gujonna Dawita asaape tammanne uddufun asi pacis.
2.31: Shin Dawita asay Abeneerara de7iya Biniyaame kochatape heedzu xeetanne usupun tammu asi wodhidosona.
2.32: Asaheela aha ekidi, Beeteleme kataman de7iya iya aawa duufon moogidosona. Iyo7aabinne iya asay qamma kumethi hemetidi sa7i wontiya wode Kebroona gakidosona.

3.1: Saa7ola soo asaynne Dawita asay daro wode oletidosona; Dawiti olan minni minni biya wode Saa7ola asay daaburi daaburi bis.
3.2: Kebroonan Dawitas nayti yeletidosona; Izira7eele Aknahooma yelida bayra na7ay Amnoona;
3.3: Qarmeloosa Abigiya kase Naabala machiya yelida Kil7aabi nam7antho na7a. Gashura kawa Talmaya na7iya Ma7ika yelida Abeseloomey heedzantho na7a.
3.4: Oyddanthoy Haagita na7aa Adoona; ichashanthoy Abixaala na7aa Safaaxa.
3.5: Usupunthoy Dawita mache Egili na7aa Yitra7aama; ha nayti ubbay Kebroonan yeletidosona. Abeneeri Dawitara Caaqis
3.6: Saa7ola soo asaaranne Dawita soo asaara oletiya wode Abeneeri Saa7ola asaa bolla minni minni bis.
3.7: Saa7olas Iyoheela na7a gidida Irxifo geetetiya issi laggethiya de7awusu; Iyabustey Abeneerako, “Ta aawa laggethera ayis aqadii?” yaagidi oychis.
3.8: Abeneeri iya odan daro yilotidi, “Tana neeni Yihudako simmida gaata kana gadiyee? Taani ne aawa Saa7olas, iya ishatasinne iya dabbotas ammanetada de7as; nenaka Dawitas aathada immabike. Shin ha77i neeni tana ha maccase gisho mootaasa!
3.9: Xoossay Dawitas oothana gidi caaqida qaala taani polonna ixiko, Xoossi tana pirdo.
3.10: Saa7ola kochaafe kawotethaa wosisidi, Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw Isra7eele bollanne Yihuda bolla, Dawita araata minthanaw Goday caaqis” yaagis.
3.11: Iyabustey Abeneeras yayyida gisho hara qaala pogibeenna.
3.12: Abeneeri Dawitako, “Biittay oossee? Neeni taara caaqa; Isra7eele asa ubbay neeko simmana mela ta nena maaddana” yaagidi ase kiittis.
3.13: Dawiti, “Lo77o! Ta neera caaqana. Shin taani nena issiba oychayis; neeni tana be7anaw yaa wode Saa7ola na7iw Melkoolo ekonna yoopa” yaagis.
3.14: Hessafe guye, Dawiti Saa7ola na7a Iyabusteko, “Xeetu Filisxeemeta qaaratada koyta oothada immida ta machiw Melkoolo taw imma” yaagidi ase kiittis.
3.15: Iyabustey ase kiittidi I azina Lawusha na7a Palxi7eelape kessi ekis.
3.16: I azinay Biraqima katama gakanaw yeekishe I geedo kaallis. Abeneeri iyako, “Guye soo ba” yaagin addey guye simmidi bis.
3.17: Abeneeri Isra7eele cimatako bidi, “Dawiti hinte bolla kawotana mela daro wode amotideta.
3.18: Ha77i polite! Goday, ‘Ta asaa Isra7eele, Filisxeemeta kushepenne enta morketa ubbaa kushepe ta aylliya Dawita baggara ashshana’ gidaysa hassayite” yaagis.
3.19: Abeneeri Biniyaame kochatas hessa odis. Isra7eele asaynne Biniyaame asa ubbay oothanaw koyida ubbaa Dawitas odanaw Abeneeri Kebroona bis.
3.20: Abeneeri baara laatamu asi ekidi, Kebroona bin, Dawiti iyawunne iya asaas gibira giigisis.
3.21: Abeneeri Dawitako, “Enti neera caaqana melanne ne wozanay amotiya ubbaa ne haarana mela ta bada Isra7eele asaa kawas ta godaas shiishana” yaagis. Yaagin Dawiti Abeneera moyzidi saro yeddis. Iyo7aabi Abeneera Wodhis
3.22: He wode Dawita asaynne Iyo7aabi olape darobaa di77idi simmidosona. Shin Dawiti iya saro ba gidi yeddida gisho, Abeneeri Kebroonan Dawitara deenna.
3.23: Iyo7aabinne iyara de7iya olanchoti gakiya wode asay, “Neera na7aa Abeneeri kawa Dawitako yin, kawoy iya yeddin saro bis” yaagidi odidosona.
3.24: Hessa gisho, Iyo7aabi kawako bidi, “Hessi waanidi hanidee? Abeneeri neeko yin, ayis yeddadii? Heko I bikichis!
3.25: Neera na7ay Abeneeri nena cimmanaw, neeni geliyasonne keyaso be7anawunne neeni oothiya ubbaa eranaw yis” yaagis.
3.26: Iyo7aabi Dawita sinthafe keyidi, Abeneera geedo kiitaa yeddin, enti iya Siira olla haatha matape guye zaaridosona; shin Dawiti hessa erenna.
3.27: Abeneeri Kebroona simmidi yida wode Iyo7aabi iyara dumma odetanaw koyida daanisidi dirsa pengiyako de7iya kifiliyanne iya efis. Ba ishaa Asaheela suutha zaaranaw Abeneera ulon caddin Abeneeri he bessan hayqis.
3.28: Dawiti guyepe hessa si7ida wode, “Taaninne ta kawotethay Neera na7aa Abeneera suuthaa gisho Godaa sinthan merinaw oyshetoko.
3.29: Iya suuthay Iyo7aabanne iya aawa soo asa acho; madunthi de7iya asi woyko goga hargey de7iya asi woyko wobbe asi woyko mashshan hayqiya asi woyko koshatiya asi Iyo7aaba kochan dhayopo” yaagis.
3.30: Gaba7oonan keyida olan banta ishaa Asaheela Abeneeri wodhida gisho, Iyo7aabinne iya isha Abisi Abeneera wodhidosona.
3.31: Dawiti Iyo7aabanne iyara de7iya asaa, “Hinte ma7uwa daakite; baana qolite; Abeneera halaa sinthan yeekite” yaagis. Kawo Dawiti hala kaallidi duufo bis.
3.32: Abeneeri Kebroonan moogetis; kawoy ba qaala dhoqu oothidi duufon yeekis; asa ubbay yeekidosona.
3.33: Kawoy Abeneeras, “Abeneeri eeya asada hayqanaw bessii?
3.34: Ne kushey qashetibeenna; Ne tohoy santhalaatan oyketibeenna. Asi iita asa kushen hayqeysada hayqis” yaagidi zeleelis. Asa ubbay Abeneeras zaaridi yeekidosona.
3.35: He gallas Dawiti kathi maana mela asay iya shoobbidosona. Shin Dawiti, “Awa ayfey de7ishin, kathi woyko haraba baariko Xoossi tana pirdo” yaagidi caaqis.
3.36: Kawoy oothidaba asa ubbay be7idi ufaytidosona; tumaka kawoy oothidaba ubbay asaa ufaysis.
3.37: Hessa gisho, he gallas Dawita asaynne Isra7eele asa ubbay kawoy Neera na7aa Abeneera wodhisiboonaysa eridosona.
3.38: Kawoy ba aylletako, “Isra7eele biittan gita asinne halaqi hayqidaysa hinte akeekeketii?
3.39: Taani Xoossay tiyida kawo gidikoka, taani daaburancho; haysati Xaruya nayti ta bolla minnidosona; iita oothidaysatas Goday enta oosuwada zaaro” yaagis.

4.1: Saa7ola na7ay Iyabustey Abeneeri Kebroonan hayqidaysa si7ida wode iya wozanay til7is; Isra7eele asa ubbayka dagammis.
4.2: Saa7ola na7aa Iyabustes ola kaalethiya nam7u halaqati de7oosona; issuwa sunthay Ba7ana; hankoy qassi Rakaaba. Enti Biniyaame koche gidida Ba7aarote addiya Irmoona nayta. Ba7aarotey Biniyaame baggada taybetees.
4.3: Ba7aarotan de7ida koyro asati Gitayma biitta baqatidi, hachi gakanaw bete asada yan de7idosona.
4.4: Saa7ola na7aa Yoonatanas nam7u tohoy silida na7i de7ees; Saa7olanne Yoonataana hayquwa worey Izra7eelepe si7etiya wode I ichashu laytha na7a. He na7aa dichiyara iya ekada baqatishin na7ay kundin iya tohoy silis; he na7aa sunthay Mempiboste.
4.5: Ba7aarote addiya Irmoona nayti Rekaabinne Ba7aani Iyabuste soo bidi seeta gallas gakidosona. Enti gakiya wode I shempanaw alga bolla zin7is.
4.6: Enti giste koyiya asada hanidi soo gelidi, iya uluwan caddidosona. Rekaabinne iya ishaa Ba7aani lepara keydi bidosona.
4.7: Iyabustey qol7an arsan zin7idaysa demmidi, iyaw uluwan caddidi wodhidosona; iya huuphiya qanxi ekidi, Araba gadha efiya ogiya oykidi, qammara bidosona.
4.8: Iyabuste huuphiya Kebroonan de7iya Dawitas ehidosona. Kawa, “Nena wodhanaw koyiya ne morkiya Saa7ola na7aa Iyabuste huuphiya haysa be7a. Saa7ola bollanne iya nayta bolla kawa nu godaa gisho Xoossay hachi halo keyis” yaagidosona.
4.9: Shin Ba7aarote addiya Irmoona nayta Rekaabanne iya ishaa Ba7ana Dawiti haysada yaagis; “Meto ubbaafe tana ashshida de7o Goday eriya mela.
4.10: Taw mishiraacho odiya asada, ‘Saa7oli hayqis’ yaagidi taw odin, taani iya Xiqilaagan oykada wodhas; taani iya mishiraachuwas immida woytoy haysa.
4.11: Ba son ba arsan zin7ida xillo addiya wodhida iita asatas iya haluwa keyeysi ay mela iitandesha! Iya suuthaa taani hinte kushepe achana; hintena taani biitta bollafe dhaysana!” yaagis.
4.12: Rekaabanne Ba7ana wodhana mela Dawiti ba olanchota kiittin, olanchoti enta wodhidosona. Enta kushiyanne tohuwa qanxidi, Kebroonan olla haatha matan kaqidosona. Iyabuste huuphiya efidi, Abeneera duufon Kebroonan moogidosona.

5.1: Isra7eele zare ubbay Dawitako Kebroona yidi, “Nuuni ne ashonne ne suuthu.
5.2: Kase Saa7oli nuus kawo gididi de7iya wodeka Isra7eele asaa olas kaalethiday nena. Goday nena, ‘Neeni ta asaa Isra7eele heemmana; enta bolla kawotana’ yaagidi qaala gelis” yaagidosona.
5.3: Isra7eele cimati ubbay kawa Dawitako Kebroona yidosona; I entara Kebroonan Godaa sinthan caaqis; Isra7eele bolla kawotana mela Dawita tiyidosona.
5.4: Dawiti kawotiya wode iyaw hastamu laythi; I oytamu laythi kawotis.
5.5: Kebroonan Yihuda bolla laapun laythinne usupun ageena kawotis; Yerusalaamen Isra7eele bollanne Yihuda bolla hastamanne heedzu laythi kawotis.
5.6: Yerusalaamen de7iya Yaabuse asaa olanaw Dawitinne iya asay bidosona. Yaabuse asay, “Dawiti ha katamaa gelanaw danda7enna” gidi qopida gisho hari attoshin, “Qooqetinne wobbeti nena teqanaw danda7oosona; ne ha katamaa gelaka” yaagidosona.
5.7: Gidoshin, Dawiti Xiyoonen de7iya enta miixa oykin, iya Dawita katama gidasu.
5.8: He gallas Dawiti, “Yaabuse asaa olidi oykiya oonika Dawita morke gidida wobbetinne qooqeti de7iya bessaa gakanaw shaafara pude keyanaw koshshees” yaagis. Hessa gisho, “Qooqetinne wobbeti gadho gelokona” geetetis.
5.9: Dawiti he miixaa oykidi, yan de7is; he miixaa Dawita katamaa yaagidi sunthis. Dawiti Miilope doomidi he katamaa yuushshidi gimbis.
5.10: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Xoossay iyara de7iya gisho Dawiti minni minni bis.
5.11: Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami Dawitas kawo gadho keexana mela ziga mithi, anaaxetanne shuchu masseyisata yeddin, enti iyaw keethe keexidosona.
5.12: Goday Isra7eele bolla iya kawo oothidi minthidaysanne ba asaa Isra7eele gisho iya kawotethaa dhoqu oothidi bonchidaysa Dawiti eris.
5.13: Dawiti Kebroonape Yerusalaame yidaape guye, hara laggethotanne macheta gujidi ekin, hara macca naytinne adde nayti iyaw yeletidosona.
5.14: Yerusalaamen iyaw yeletida adde nayta sunthay Samu7a, Shobaaba, Naatana, Solomone,
5.15: Yibhaara, Elishu7a, Nefega, Yafi7a,
5.16: Elishama7a, Eliyaadanne Elfalaxa. Dawiti Filisxeemeta Xoonis (1 Taari 14:8-17)
5.17: Dawiti Isra7eele bolla kawo gididi tiyetidaysa Filisxeemeti si7ida wode enti ubbay Dawita koyanaw keyidosona; shin Dawiti hessa si7idi miixan bidi gelis.
5.18: Filisxeemeti bidi, Raafayme zangaaran laaletidi uttidosona.
5.19: Hessa gisho, Dawiti, “Taani bada Filisxeemeta olo? Neeni enta taw aathada immanee?” yaagidi Godaa oychis. Goday, “Ee ola; tuma ta enta new aathada immana” yaagis.
5.20: Dawiti Ba7al-Parasime geetetiya bessaa bidi, yan enta xoonis. I, “Di7o haathi menthidi keyeysada Goday ta morketa ta sinthan mentherethis” yaagis. Hessa gisho, he bessa sunthay Ba7al-Parasime geetetis.
5.21: Filisxeemeti banta eeqata he bessan yeggidi bin, Dawitinne iya asay he eeqata ekidi bidosona.
5.22: Filisxeemeti guye bidi, nam7antho Raafayme zangaaran laaletidi uttidosona.
5.23: Dawiti Godaa nam7antho oychin, Goday, “Enta guye baggara teqada wolaa sinthan enta ola, shin entaw som7on keyopa.
5.24: Wola mithaa xeeran salpe qaala neeni si7iya wode Filisxeeme olanchota shocanaw Goday neepe sinthe aadhidaysa erada ellesa” yaagis.
5.25: Dawiti Goday kiittidaysada oothis; Geebape Gezera gakanaw Filisxeeme olanchota wodhis.

6.1: Isra7eele giddofe dooretida hastamu mukulu asata Dawiti zaaridi shiishis.
6.2: Dawitinne iya asa ubbay Yihuda Baala katamaape dendidi, kiruubetape giddon ba kawotetha araata bolla uttida Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa sunthan xeegetida Xoossa Taabotiya ehanaw bidosona.
6.3: Enti Xoossa Taabotiya ooratha gaaren wothidi, dere huuphen de7iya Amnadaabe soope ehidosona. Amnadaabe nayti Oozinne Ahiyoy ooratha gaariya kaalethoosona.
6.4: Dere huuphen de7iya Amnadaabe soope Xoossa Taabotiya ehiya wode Ahiyoy Taabotiyape sinthara hemetees.
6.5: Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay diithan, maasinqon, karaabon daalaninne shaashshoten kaa7ishe banta kumetha wolqan Godaa sinthan ufaytidi bonchoosona.
6.6: Naakoni katha bukiya wudumma gakiya wode boorati dhubetin, Oozi ba kushiya yeddidi, Xoossa Taabotiya oykis.
6.7: Oozi Taabotiya bochida gisho Godaa hanqoy iya bolla eexis. Xoossay iya shocin he bessan Xoossaa Taabotiya matan hayqis.
6.8: Godaa hanqoy Ooza shocida gisho Dawiti azzanis. He bessay hachi gakanaw Oozi shocetida bessaa geetetees.
6.9: He gallas Dawiti Godaa yayyida gisho “Godaa Taabotey taako waanidi yaanee?” yaagis.
6.10: Hessa gisho, I Godaa Taabotiya baara Dawita Katamaa ehanaw koybeenna. Hessa aggidi Gaate addiya Abidaara soo efis.
6.11: Godaa Taabotey Abidaara son heedzu ageena gam7is; Goday Abidaaranne iya soo asaa ubbaa anjis.
6.12: Xoossa Taabotiya gisho Goday Abidaara soo asaanne iyaw de7iya ubbaa anjidaysa kawoy Dawiti si7is. Hessa gisho, Dawiti Abidaara soo bidi, Xoossa Taabotiya Dawita Katamaa ufaysan ehis.
6.13: Dawiti Godaa Taabotiya tookida asati usupuna tango tangida wode enta essidi, issi kormanne issi anqara mari yarshis.
6.14: Dawiti liinope oosetida efuude ma7idi, baw de7iya wolqa ubban Godaa sinthan duris.
6.15: Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay ufaysan ililishenne moyze punnishe Godaa Taabotiya Dawita Katama ehidosona.
6.16: Godaa Taabotey Dawita Katama geliya wode Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola maskootera xeellada, kawoy Dawiti Godaa sinthan gupishininne durishin be7ada ba wozanan kadhasu.
6.17: Dawiti Godaa Taabotiya wothanaw tolida dunkaaniya giddon Taabotiya wothin, Dawiti xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho Godaas yarshis.
6.18: Dawiti xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho yarshidaape guye Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa sunthan asaa anjis.
6.19: Isra7eele asa ubbaas, maccas addes huuphen huuphen issi issi uythi, issi issi qanxo ashonne issi issi woyne nuka gishis. Hessafe guye asa ubbay ba soo soo simmis.
6.20: Dawiti ba soo asaa anjanaw soo simmida wode Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola iya mokanaw keyada, “Pathonna asati kallo hemeteysada hachi Isra7eele kawoy ba macca aylleta sinthan kallotidi ay mela bonchetide!” yaagasu.
6.21: Dawiti, “Ne aawapenne iya soo asape aathidi ba asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela tana doorida Godaa sinthan duras. Taani Godaa bonchoos dursa aggike.
6.22: Taani haysafe aathada buroo tana toochana; tanatethaa ziqi oothana. Shin neeni gida macca aylleta sinthan ta bonchetana” yaagis.
6.23: Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola hayqana gakanaw na7a yelabuuku.

7.1: Kawoy ba gadhon wopu gidi uttidaapenne Goday iya yuushuwan de7iya iya morketape shempisidaape guye,
7.2: nabiya Naatanako, “Taani zigape keexetida keethan de7ayis, shin Xoossa Taabotey dunkaanen de7ees” yaagis.
7.3: Naatani, “Oothanaw ne wozanan qopidaba ubbaa ootha; Goday neera de7ees” yaagis.
7.4: Shin he qamma Godaa qaalay Naatanako yidi,
7.5: “Bada ta aylliya Dawita haysada yaaga; ‘Taani daana keethaa keexanay nena gidaka.
7.6: Taani Isra7eeleta Gibxe biittafe kessida wodepe doomada hachi gakanaw keethan de7abike; taani dunkaanen yaanne haanne yuuyashe de7as.
7.7: Taani Isra7eele asaara yuuyida bessa ubban ta asa Isra7eele heemmana mela taani shuumida asaa, “Taw ziga mithan ayis keethe keexabikii?” gada oychabike’ yaagis.
7.8: “Hiza, ta aylliya Dawitas oda; ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday neeko haysada yaagees; taani nena hentha bessafe, dorse heemmiya soope denthada ta asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela oothas.
7.9: Neeni bida bessa ubban taani neera gidas; ne morketa ubbaa ne sinthafe dhaysas. Ha77i zaarada taani ha sa7an eretida gita asatada ne sunthaa gitayana.
7.10: Taani ta asaa Isra7eeles besse immada, enta he bessan tokana. Enti banta bessan daana; nam7antho dagammokona. Kase daynnata wodepe doomidi hanidaysada hizape guye enta iita asi haarenna.
7.11: Taani nena ne morketa ubbaafe shempisana. “ ‘Hessa bolla gujidi Goday ba huuphen taani new keethe keexana yaagidi odis.
7.12: Ne barey wurin, hayqada ne mayzata ne gakiya wode ne gulbatape keyida na7a taani denthana; iya kawotethaa minthana.
7.13: Ta sunthaas keethe keexanay iya; taani iya araata merinaw mintha essana.
7.14: Taani iyaw aawa gidana; ika taw na7a gidana. I baliya wode taani iya asa xam7an, asi shociya lisson seerana.
7.15: Shin taani ne sinthafe diggida Saa7olape ta keehatethay eketidaysada iyape kumthi eketenna.
7.16: Ne kochatinne ne kawotethay ta sinthan merinaw daana; ne araatay merinaw minnidi eqana’ ” yaaga.
7.17: Naatani Goday iyaw qoncethan bessida qaala ubbaa Dawitas odis. Dawita Woosa (1 Taari 17:16-27)
7.18: Hessafe guye, kawoy Dawiti giddo gelidi Godaa sinthan uttidi haysada yaagidi woossis. “Abeeti ta Godaa xoossaw, hachi gakanaw neeni haysa ubbaa oothanaw ta oonee? Ta soo asayka aybee?
7.19: Abeeti ta Godaw, Xoossaw, haysi ne ayfe sinthan guutha daanin, sinthafe ne aylliya kochatas oothanaba odadasa. Ta Godaa Xoossaw, neeni asara odetiya ogey haysee?
7.20: “Haysafe aadhiyaba taani, Dawiti ay gaanaw danda7iyana? Ta Godaa Xoossaw, neeni tana ne aylliya eraasa.
7.21: Neeni ne qaala gisho, ne wozanaa qofaada ha gitaba oothada tana ne aylliya bessadasa.
7.22: “Abeeti Ta Godaa Xoossaw, neeni gita. Ne meli baawa; nuuni nu haythan si7idaysada neepe attishin, hara xoossi baawa.
7.23: Ne ase oothanaw Gibxefe wozida ne asaa Isra7eele daaniya hara kawotethi sa7a bolla baawa. Neeni entaw oothida gitanne malaalsiya oosota gaason ne sunthay biittan eretis. Neeni ne asa sinthafe hara kawotethatanne enta xoossata goodda kessadasa.
7.24: Ne asaa Isra7eele merinaw nebaa oothadasa; minthadasa. Abeeti Godaw, ne enta Xoossa gidadasa.
7.25: “Abeeti ta Godaw, Xoossaw, neeni ne aylliyasinne iya keethaas oothana gada gelida qaala merinaw naaga; ne qaalatho ootha.
7.26: Hessan ne sunthay merinaw gita gidana. Asay nena, ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Isra7eele Xoossaa’ yaagana. Ne aylliya Dawita kochatika ne sinthan minnidi eqana.
7.27: “Abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, neeni, ‘Ne kochati merinaw kawotana’ yaagada taw ne aylliyas caaqadasa. Hessa gisho, taani ne aylley ha woosa woossanaw xaalas.
7.28: Abeeti Ta Godaa Xoossaw, neeni Xoosse! Ne qaalay tuma; neeni ha lo77obata oothana gada taw ne aylliyas odadasa.
7.29: Ne sinthan merinaw daana mela ne aylliya kochaa anja. Abeeti Ta Godaa Xoossaw ne gidaysada ne anjiko ne aylliya keethay merinaw anjetana” yaagidi woossis.

8.1: Hessafe guye, kawoy Dawiti Filisxeemeta xoonidi haaris; yaatidi Meteg-Ama katamaa Filisxeemeta kushepe ekis.
8.2: Dawiti qassi Moo7abeta xoonis. I enta biittan zin7isidi kushen wadhis; entafe nam7u kushiya wodhidi, heedzantho kushiya paxa aggis. Yaatin Moo7abeti Dawitas haaretidi giiridosona.
8.3: Rehooba na7ay, Suubba kawoy, Adraazari Efraxiisa shaafa matan de7iya ba zawa zaaranaw bida wode Dawiti iya olidi xoonis.
8.4: Dawiti iya asaape issi mukulunne laapun xeetu para asatanne laatamu mukulu toho asata di77is. Dawiti gaareta goochanaw xeetu parata ashshidi hara parata ubbaas gaadiya gildayis.
8.5: Damasqon de7iya Soore olanchoti Suubba kawa Adraazara maaddanaw yida wode Dawiti entafe laatamanne nam7u mukulu asaa wodhis.
8.6: Dawiti Soore kawotethan, Damasqon, olanchotas miixa medhis. Yaatin Soore asay Dawitas haaretidi giiridosona. Dawiti bida bessaa ubban Goday iyaw xoono immis.
8.7: Adraazara toora moconati oykiya worqa gondalliya Dawiti ekidi Yerusalaame ehis.
8.8: Bexahanne Beroota geetetiya Adraazara katamatape kawoy Dawiti daro naase birata ekis.
8.9: Adraazara olanchota ubbaa Dawiti xoonidaysa Hamaata kawoy To7i si7is.
8.10: Dawiti Adraazara olidi xoonida wode Hadadizeri To7ara oletishe gam7ida gisho iya hashshu gaanawunne sarothanaw ba na7aa Yoraama Dawitako kiittis. Yoraami worqafe, birapenne naase biratape oosetida imotata Dawitas ehis.
8.11: Kawoy Dawiti kase giirisiya kawotethata ubbaafe ekida worqanne bira oothidaysada ha imotataka Godaas dummayis.
8.12: I xoonida kawotethati Edoome, Moo7abe, Amoone, Filisxeemenne Amaaleqa. Hessadaka Rehooba na7aa, Suubba kawa Adraazara ekida di7uwa Godaas dummayis.
8.13: Maxine zangaaran tammanne hospun mukulu Edoome asata Dawiti wodhidi simmidaape guye iya sunthay keyis.
8.14: Dawiti Edoome biittan olanchota miixa medhis; he biittay Dawitas haaretis. Dawiti bida bessa ubban Goday iyaw xoono immis. Dawita Moorinnata
8.15: Dawiti Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawotis; ba asa ubbaa xillotethaninne suure pirdan aysis.
8.16: Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi tora mocona gidishin, Ahiluda na7ay Iyosaafexi taarike xaafe.
8.17: Ahixuuba na7ay Saadoqinne Abyataara na7ay Abimeleke kahine gidishin, Sarayi qassi xaafe.
8.18: Yoodahe na7ay Banayasi kawa naageysata halaqa gidishin, Dawita adde nayti kawa zoreyisata.

9.1: Dawiti, “Yoonatana gisho taani iyaw keehatethi oothanaw Saa7ola keethafe attida asi de7isha?” yaagidi oychis.
9.2: He wode Siiba geetetiya issi aylley Saa7ola son de7ees. I Dawita sinthe yaana mela xeegin, kawoy, “Neeni Siibee?” yaagidi oychis. Siibi, “Ee, taani ne aylliya Siiba” yaagis.
9.3: Kawoy, “Xoossa keehatethi taani bessaana mela Saa7ola keethafe attida asi baawee?” yaagis. Siibi, “Nam7u tohoy silida Yoonataana naytape issoy hanno gakanaw paxa de7ees” yaagis.
9.4: Kawoy, “I awun de7ii?” yaagis. Siibi, “Lodobaara geetetiya bessan Ami7eela na7aa Makira son de7ees” yaagis.
9.5: Kawoy Dawiti Lodobaarape Ami7eela na7aa Makira soope Mempiboste ehisis.
9.6: Saa7ola na7aa Yoonataana na7ay Mempibostey Dawitako yidi, Dawita sinthan ziggidi bonchis. Dawiti, “Mempiboste” yaagidi xeegis. I, “Abe ta godaw, ta ne aylliya” yaagis.
9.7: Dawiti, “Yayyofa; ne aawa Yoonataana gisho taani new keehana. Ne aawa aawa Saa7ola gadiya ubbaa taani new zaarana; qassi neeni ubba wode ta gaytape maana” yaagis.
9.8: Mempibostey ziggidi, “Hayqida kana daaniya tana neeni wudada xeellanaw ne aylley taani oonee?” yaagis.
9.9: Kawoy Saa7ola aylliya Siiba xeegidi, “Saa7olabaanne iya soo asaaba gididaba ubbaa taani ne godaa na7aa na7aas immas.
9.10: Ne godaa na7aa na7ay maana mela neeni, ne naytinne ne aylleti iya gadiya goyidi, kaxida kathaa iyaw ehite. Gidoshin, ne godaa na7aa na7ay Mempibostey ubba wode ta gaytape maana” yaagis. Siibas tammanne ichashu adde naytinne laatamu aylleti de7oosona.
9.11: Siibi, “Neeni ta goday, kawoy ne aylliya kiitida ubbaa taani ne aylley oothana” yaagis. Hessa gisho, Mempibostey kawa naytape issuwa mela kawo gaytape mees.
9.12: Mempibostes Mika geetetiya guutha na7i de7ees. Siiba son de7iya asa ubbay Mempibostes aylle gididosona.
9.13: Nam7u tohoti silida Mempibostey ubba wode kawa gaytape mishe Yerusalaamen de7is.

10.1: Hessafe guye, Amooneta kawoy hayqin iya na7ay Hanuni iya bessan kawotis.
10.2: Dawiti, “Iya aaway taw keehidaysada Na7oosa na7aa Hanunas taka keehana” yaagis. Hessa gisho, iya minthethanaw Dawiti ase iyako kiittis. Dawiti kiitida asay Amoone biitta gakida wode,
10.3: Amoone halaqati banta godaa Hanunako, “Dawiti ha asaa kiittiday ne aawa bonchidi nena minthethanaw koyida gisho daanii? I ase kiittiday ha katamaa wochi be7idi olanaasa” yaagidosona.
10.4: Hanuni Dawiti kiitida asata oykidi, enta buuchaafe baggaa meedis; enta ma7uwa garsafe dulle gakanaw qanxidi enta yeddis.
10.5: Dawiti hessa si7idi, enti yeellatida gisho, “Hinte buuchay diccana gakanaw Iyaarkon de7ishite; hessafe guye, haa yiite” yaagidi ase kiittis.
10.6: Amooneti Dawiti enta morkidaysa erida wode Beet-Rehoobanne Suubban de7iya Araame asaape laatamu mukulu toho olanchota, Xoobape tammanne nam7u mukulu asatanne Maka kawuwape issi mukulu asata shammidosona.
10.7: Dawiti hessa si7ida wode Iyo7aaba kumetha olanchotara enta bolla yeddis.
10.8: Amooneti keyidi, katamaa pengiyan olas salpidosona; Suubbafenne Rehoobape yida Araame asati, Xooba asatinne Maka asati denban dumma salpidosona.
10.9: Iyo7aabi bana oli sintharanne guyera teqidaysa be7idi, Isra7eele olanchotape minota dooridi Soore asata sinthan essis.
10.10: Attida asata ba ishaa Abisi kiittana mela oothidi Amooneta sinthan salpisis.
10.11: Iyo7aabi Abisako, “Soore asati ta bolla wolqaamiko ne yada tana maadda; Amoone asati ne bolla wolqaamiko ta bada nena maaddana.
10.12: Hiza minna! Nu asaa gishonne nu Xoossaa katamata gisho, ane minni oletoos. Goday bana lo77iyaba ootho” yaagis.
10.13: Iyo7aabinne iyara de7iya olanchoti Soore asata olanaw keyidosona; Soore asati iya sinthafe baqatidosona.
10.14: Soore asati baqatidaysa Amoone asati be7ida wode entika Abisa sinthafe baqatidi, katama gelidosona. Iyo7aabi Amooneta oleysa aggidi, Yerusalaame simmis.
10.15: Soore asati Isra7eele asay enta xoonidaysa erida wode banta olanchota ubbaa shiishidosona.
10.16: Kawoy Hadadizeri Soore asata Efraxiisa Shaafa hefinthafe kiittidi ehisin, Elama bidosona. Adraazara tora moconay Shobaaki enta kaalethees.
10.17: Dawiti hessa si7ida wode, Isra7eele olanchota shiishidi, Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi Elama gakis. Soore asati besse oykidi, giigidi, Dawitara oletidosona.
10.18: Shin Soore asati Isra7eeleta sinthafe baqatidosona. Dawiti Soore olanchotape para gaare laagiya laapun xeetu asatanne oytamu mukulu toho olanchota wodhis. Enta toora mocona Sobaakika he bessan shocetidi hayqis.
10.19: Adrazaras haaretidi de7iya kawoti Isra7eeleti enta xoonidaysa erida wode Isra7eeletara sigetidi, entaw haaretidosona. Hessafe simmin, Soore asati Amoone asata maaddanaw yayyidosona.

11.1: Laytha laamen kawoti olas keyiya wode Dawiti ba asaaranne Isra7eele olanchotara issife Iyo7aaba olas yeddis. Enti Amoone olidi, Raaba katamaa teqidosona. Shin Dawiti Yerusalaamen attis.
11.2: Issi gallas omarsi Dawiti ba hiixape dendidi, keethaa bolla de7iya bessaa keyidi hemetishe bolla meecetiya issi maccasi be7is; he maccasiya daro mala lo77o.
11.3: Dawiti iya ooneko eranaw koyidi ase kiittis. Kiitetida addey, “Iya Eliyaaba na7iw, Hite addiya Ooriyoona machiw Barsaabo” yaagis.
11.4: Dawiti ase kiittidi, iyo ehisis, iira aqis. He wode iya kushe metoy aadhin, geeyada de7awusu. Iya ba soo simmada basu.
11.5: Guyepe iya qanthatidaysa erida wode Dawitako, “New qanthatas” yaagasu.
11.6: Dawiti, “Hite addiya Ooriyoona haa yedda” yaagidi Iyo7aabako kiittis. Iyo7aabi Ooriyoona Dawitako yeddis.
11.7: Ooriyooni yin Dawiti, “Iyo7aabi ay melee? Olanchoti ay melee? Olay waanii?” yaagidi oychis.
11.8: Dawiti Ooriyoonako, “Soo bada shempa” yaagin, Ooriyooni kawo gadhope keyidi bis. Kawoy Ooriyoona guyera kathi yeddis.
11.9: Shin Ooriyooni soo boonna kawo gadho dirsa pengiyan ba godaa aylletara aqis.
11.10: Ooriyooni ba soo boonnaysa Dawiti si7idi, “Neeni haahosoope yadasa gidikii? Ne soo ayis babikii?” yaagidi oychis.
11.11: Ooriyooni Dawitako, “Taabotey, Isra7eele asay, Yihuda asay, ta halaqay Iyo7aabinne kawa asay denban dunkaanen de7oosona. Yaatin ta waanada soo bada mo, uyo, qassi ta machera waanada aqo? Ne shempoy ero! Taani haysa melaba oothike” yaagidi zaaris.
11.12: Dawiti, “Issi gallas haysan gam7a; wonto nena guye yeddana” yaagis. Ooriyooni he gallasinne wontetha gallas Yerusalaamen gam7is.
11.13: Dawiti shoobbin Ooriyooni iyara mis; I mathotana gakanaw Dawiti iya ushshis. Shin he wode omarsi Ooriyooni ba soo boonna, ba hiixa hiixidi ba godaa aylletara aqis.
11.14: Wontethe Dawiti Iyo7aabas dabdaabe xaafidi, Ooriyoona bolla yeddis.
11.15: Dawiti ba dabdaabiyan, “Ooriyoona olay goobiya bessan sintha bagga aatha. I shocetidi hayqana mela iya matape haakite” yaagis.
11.16: Iyo7aabi he katamaa teqida wode I eriya mino morke olanchoti de7iya bessan Ooriyoona essis.
11.17: Katamaa asati keyidi Iyo7aabara oletidosona. Dawita olanchotape guutha asati hayqidosona; Ooriyooni Hite addeyka hayqis.
11.18: Iyo7aabi olan hanidaba ubbaa Dawitas kiittis.
11.19: Iyo7aabi kiitetidi biya addiyako, “Olan hanidaba ne kawas oda wursida wode,
11.20: kawoy shenetidi, ‘Hinte entara oletanaw katamaako ayis shiiqidetii? Enti gimbiya bolla eqidi dongen dukanaysa ereketii?
11.21: Gediyoona na7ay Abimelekey waanidi hayqidaako akeekeketii? Mayde gimbiya bollara duge holada Tebesa geetetiya bessan wodhiday issi maccas gidekee? Yaatin, hinte gimbiyako ayis shiiqidetii?’ yaagidi oychiko, neeni, ‘Ne aylley, Hite addey Ooriyoonika hayqis’ ” yaaga.
11.22: Kiitetidaysi bidi Iyo7aabi kiittidaba ubbaa Dawitas odis.
11.23: Addey, “Nu morketi nuupe wolqaamidosona; nuura oletanaw katamaa gaxan de7iya demba bessaa keyidosona. Shin nu enta katama pengiya gakanaw guye zaaridi yedethida.
11.24: Hessafe guye, dongen dukeysati gimbiya bolla gididi ne aylleta dongen dukidosona. Kawaw, ne asatape guuthati hayqidosona; ne aylley, Hite addey Ooriyoonika hayqis” yaagis.
11.25: Dawiti kiitetidaysako, “Neeni Iyo7aabako haysada yaaga; ‘Toori gedeka haaka miya gisho haysas azzanopa; katamaa olada oykanaw minna’ yaagada iya minthetha” yaagis.
11.26: Ooriyoona machiya ba azinay hayqidaysa si7ida wode iyaw yeekasu.
11.27: Iya kayo wotha simmin, Dawiti kiittidi iyo ba soo ehis. Iya iyaw macho gidada adde na7a yelasu. Shin Dawiti oothida oosoy iita gidiya gisho Goday ufaytibeenna.

12.1: Goday nabiya Naatana Dawitako kiittin, Naatani iyako yidi, “Issi kataman nam7u asati de7oosona; entafe issoy dure; qassi hankoy manqo.
12.2: Dure addiyas daro dorsinne mehey de7ees.
12.3: Shin manqo addiyas shammidi heemmiya issi dorsa mareepe attishin, hari baawa. He dorsiya iya son iya naytara issife diccasu. I ba miya kathaafe muzees; ba uyaa ushshafe ushshees; iya iya ki7one zin7awusu. He dorsiya iyaw macca na7a mela.
12.4: “Issi gallas issi imathi duriya soo yis. Durey ba dorsaafe woyko ba mehepe shukidi, imathe mokanaw koybeenna. Shin I he manqo addiya dorsiw ekidi, he imathaas miyaba giigisis” yaagis.
12.5: Dawiti he dure addiya bolla shene eexidi, “De7o Goday eriya mela, haysa oothida addey hayqanaw bessees.
12.6: Qassi qadhey bayna I hessa oothida gisho, he dorsa mare gisho oyddu kushe zaaranaw koshshees” yaagis.
12.7: Naatani Dawitako, “He addey nena! Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; ‘Taani nena Isra7eele bolla tiyada kawothas; Saa7ola kushiyape nena ashshas.
12.8: Taani ne godaa, Saa7ola keethaa new immas; ne godaa macheta ne ki7on yeggas. Isra7eele asaanne Yihuda asaa taani new immas. Ha ubbay guuxis giiko, taani new haraa guja immanashin.
12.9: Haysa mela iitabaa Godaa sinthan oothada, ayis Godaa qaala kadhadii? Hite addiya Ooriyoona mashshan wodhadasa; iya machiw ne ekadasa. Amoone asata mashshan iya wodhadasa.
12.10: Neeni tana kadhada, Hite addiya Ooriyoona machiw ekida gisho ne soo asaape mashshi shaaketenna’ ” yaagees.
12.11: Goday haysada yaagees; “Taani ne soo asaa giddofe ne bolla iita ehana; ne macheta neeni xeellishin denthada, new matiya addiyas immana; seeta gallas he addey ne machetara zin7ana.
12.12: Neeni hessa geeman oothadasa; shin taani seeta gallas Isra7eele asa ubbaa sinthan oothana” yaagis.
12.13: Yaatin, Dawiti, “Taani Godaa bolla nagara oothas” yaagis. Naatani, “Goday ne nagaraa atto gis; neeni hayqaka.
12.14: Shin ne haysa oothada, Godaa morketi iya kadhana mela oothida gisho yeletida na7ay tuma hayqana” yaagis.
12.15: Naatani ba soo bidaape guye, Ooriyoona machiya Dawitas yelida na7aa Goday shocin I hargis.
12.16: Dawiti ba na7aa gisho Xoossaa woossis; Dawiti xoomis; ba kifiliya gelidi qamma qamma sa7an zin7i aqees.
12.17: Iya soo cimati iya sa7ape dendana mela iya matan eqidi woossidosona; shin I dendonna ixis; I entara kathi mibeenna.
12.18: Laapuntha gallas na7ay hayqis. Dawita aylleti na7aa hayquwa odanaw yayyidi, “Na7ay paxa de7ishin nuuni Dawita odisin, si7onna ixis. Yaatin, na7ay hayqidaysa nuuni waatidi iyaw odanee? Ooni eri, I bana qohanekoshii?” yaagidosona.
12.19: Ba aylleti issoy issuwara kalkasheysa Dawiti si7ida wode na7ay hayqidaysa eris. Dawiti, “Na7ay hayqidee?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Ee hayqis” yaagidosona.
12.20: Yaatin, Dawiti sa7ape dendidi meecetis; qibaate tiyetis; ba ma7uwa laammidi, Godaa keethi gelidi goyinnis. Hessafe guye ba soo bidi, kathi oychin, enti iya sinthe aathin mis.
12.21: Iya aylleti, “Neeni haysada ayis hanadii? Na7ay paxa de7ishin xoomadasanne yeekadasa; shin na7ay hayqin dendada, kathi madasa” yaagidosona.
12.22: Dawiti, “Na7ay paxa de7ishin taani xoomasinne yeekas; Goday tana maarin, na7ay paxanekonne” gada qopas.
12.23: Shin, “Na7ay hayqin, taani ayis xoomo? Taani na7aa guye zaaranaw danda7iyana? Taani iyako baana, I taako yeenna” yaagis.
12.24: Hessafe guye, Dawiti ba machiw Barsaabo minthethis. Dawiti iiko gelidi iira aqis; iya iyaw adde na7a yelasu. Na7aa Solomone gidi sunthis; Goday he na7aa dosis.
12.25: Goday na7aa dosida gisho, iya sunthaa “Yididiya” gidi sunthana mela nabiya Naatana kiittis.
12.26: He wode Iyo7aabi Amooneta katama Raaba olidi kawo miixaa oykis.
12.27: Iyo7aabi Dawitako, “Taani Raaba katama olada, haathe duuqiya bessaa oykas.
12.28: Ha77i attida olanchota shiishada katama olada oyka. Hessi hanonna ixiko, taani katamaa oykada ta sunthan xeegetana mela oothana” yaagis.
12.29: Dawiti ba olanchota ubbaa shiishidi, Raaba katama bidi, olidi oykis.
12.30: Enta kawa kallachaa iya huuphepe ekis. He worqa kallachay hastamanne ichashu kilo giraame deexees. Iya giddon inqo geetetiya al7o shuchi de7ees. He kallacha Dawiti huuphen wothis. Dawiti katamaape daro di7o di77is.
12.31: He kataman de7iya asaa kessidi, magaazen, birata konteninne birata kaltan oothana mela oothis. Qassi enti xuube medhana mela oothis. Amoone katama ubban de7iya asaa I haysada oothis. Hessafe guye, Dawitinne iya olanchoti Yerusalaame simmidosona.

13.1: Issi wode haysada hanis. Dawita na7aa Abeseloomes Timaaro geetetiya issi mala lo77o micha de7awusu. Dawita na7ay Amnooni Timaaro dosis.
13.2: Amnooni ba michiw Timaaro dosida gisho iyo qopishe daro gilqis. Iya geela7o gidida gisho iyo aykoka oothanaw danda7etonnaba iyaw daanis.
13.3: Shin Amnoonas Dawita ishaa Saama na7aa Iyonadaaba geetetiya laggey de7ees; Iyyonadaabi daro eca asi.
13.4: Iyyonadaabi, “Neeni kawo na7a gidashe wonta wonta ayis gilqay? Neeni taw ayis odikii?” yaagidi Amnoona oychis. Amnooni, “Ta ishaa Abeseloome michiw Timaaro taani dosas” yaagis.
13.5: Iyyonadaabi, “Hargetiya asada hanada hiixan zin7a. Ne aaway nena be7anaw yaa wode, ‘Ta michiya Timaara yada taw miyaba immo; taani iyo be7ishin ta sinthan kathada tana barso’ yaagada oycha” yaagis.
13.6: Amnooni hargetida asada hanidi hiixan zin7is. Kawoy iya be7anaw yaa wode Amnooni, “Ta michiya Timaara yada, ta be7ishin ta sinthan uythi uukada tana ba kushera barso” yaagis.
13.7: Dawiti, kawo gadhon de7iya Timaariko kiittidi, “Ne ishaa Amnoona soo bada iyaw kathi katha” yaagis.
13.8: Timaara ba ishaa Amnoona soo basu; he wode I hiixan zin7is. Timaara guutha dhiille munuqada Amnooni be7ishin uythi uukasu.
13.9: Timaara uythaa bashepe kessada iyaw aathasu; shin I moonna ixis. Amnooni, “Asa ubbaa kare kessite” yaagin, asa ubbay iya matape keyis.
13.10: Hessafe guye, Amnooni, “Taani ne kushepe maana mela kathaa haa qol7a ekada ya” yaagis. Timaara ba uukida uythaa ekada, ba ishaa Amnoona sinthe shiishasu.
13.11: Timaara kathaa iyako shiishiya wode iyo oykidi, “Ta miche, haaya! Taara zin7a” yaagis.
13.12: Iya, “Ta ishaw, akay hanenna! Tana wolqanthofa! Haysa melabay Isra7eelen hani erenna; haysa mela borsoba oothofa.
13.13: Ta pokuwa taani waatada genthanaw danda7iyana? Qassi neka Isra7eele giddon kawusha asi gidana. Hayyana kawa oycha; taani nena gelanaysa I diggenna” yaagasu.
13.14: Shin I iyo si7onna ixis. I wolqaama gidiya gisho, iyo wolqan oykidi iissis.
13.15: Hessafe guye, Amnooni iyo daro ixis; kase iyo dosidaysafe aathidi ixis. Amnooni, denda, “Keya! Keyada ba!” yaagis.
13.16: Iya, “Neeni tana keyada ba geysi kase ne ta bolla oothida iitaape aadhees” yaagasu. Shin I iyo si7onna ixis.
13.17: Amnooni ba aylliya xeegidi, “Ha maccasiw ta sinthafe kessa; iyo kare kessada wulaa gorda” yaagis.
13.18: Aylley iyo kare kessidi wulaa gordis. Geela7o gidida kawo macca nayti ma7iya alleeqo ma7o ma7asu.
13.19: Timaara bido ba huuphen qolada, ba ma7ida alleeqo ma7uwa daakada; ba huuphiya oykada, waaso goochashe basu.
13.20: I ishaa Abeseloomey iyo be7ida wode, “Ne ishay Amnooni nena iissidee? Ta miche, neeni ha77i si77i ga. I ne ishaa; ha odaa ne ulon oykofa” yaagis. Yaatin, Timaara azzanashe, asan keyonna ba ishaa Abeseloome son de7asu.
13.21: Kawoy Dawiti ha odaa si7ida wode daro yilotis.
13.22: Abeseloomey Amnoonako camma mal7a pogibeenna. Ba michiw Timaaro iissida gisho Amnoona morkis. Abeseloomey Amnoona Wodhis
13.23: Nam7u laythafe guye, Efreema zawa matan Haxoora geetetiya bessane Abeseloomey dorsa ikise meedees. Kawa adde nayti ubbay he bessaa yaana mela Abeseloome enta xeegis.
13.24: Abeseloomey kawako bidi, “Taani ne aylley ta dorsata ikisiya meedisayis; nenne ne moorinnati nuura yedherketii?” yaagis.
13.25: Kawoy, “Akay, ta na7aw! Nu ubbay biiko, new tooho gidana” yaagis. Abeseloomey kawa daro shoobbinka kawoy boonna ixis; shin Abeseloome anjis.
13.26: Abeseloomey, “Neeni boonna ixiko, ta ishaa Amnooni nuura boo” yaagis. Kawoy, “I neera ayis bii?” yaagis.
13.27: Shin Abeseloomey shoobbidi aggonna ixin, Dawiti Amnoonanne ba adde nayta iyara yeddis.
13.28: Abeseloomey ba aylletako, “Amnooni woyne uyidi mathotiya wode taani hintena, ‘Amnoona shocite’ yaagada kiittiya wode iya wodhite. Yayyofite! Hintena kiittey tana. Minnite! Xaalite!” yaagidi kiittis.
13.29: Abeseloome aylleti I kiittidaysada Amnoona wodhidosona. Hessafe guye, kawa adde nayti ubbay dendidi, banta baquluwa baquluwa toggidi baqatidosona.
13.30: Enti buroo oge bolla de7ishin, “Abeseloomey kawa nayta ubbaa wursis; entafe issoyka attibeenna” geetetiya worey Dawita gakis.
13.31: Kawoy dendi eqidi, azzanidi, ba ma7uwa daakidi biittan zin7is. Iya aylleti ubbay banta ma7uwa daakidi, iya matan eqidosona.
13.32: Dawita ishaa Saama na7ay Iyyonadaabi, “Ta godaw, kawo nayti ubbay hayqidosona gada qopofa; Amnoona xalaali hayqis. Amnooni ba michiw Timaaro iissida gallasape doomin, Abeseloomey iya bolla oothanaw qopidabay hanis.
13.33: Hiza hayqiday Amnoona xalaala gidiya gisho, ‘Kawa adde nayti ubbay hayqidosona’ giya woriya kawoy tuma goopo” yaagis.
13.34: He wode Abeseloomey baqatis. Naagiya addey dhoqu gidi xeelliya wode wuloha baggara de7iya ogiyara dere lanqiya oykidi daro asay yeysa be7idi kawas odis.
13.35: He wode Iyyonadaabi, “Heko, taani ne aylley odidaysada kawa adde nayti yidosona” yaagis.
13.36: I odi wursiya wode kawa adde nayti gelidi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi waassidosona. Qassi kawoynne iya moorinnati ubbay yibbata yeeho yeekidosona.
13.37: Abeseloomey baqatidi, Geshura kawo gidida Amhuda na7aa Talmayako bis. Shin kawoy Dawiti ba na7aas daro gallas yeekis.
13.38: Abeseloomey baqatidi Geshura biitta bidaape guye yan heedzu laythi de7is.
13.39: Kawoy Dawiti Amnoona hayquwan gakida azzaniyape minnida gisho, Abeseloome be7anaw laamotis.

14.1: Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi Kawoy Dawiti Abeseloome laamotidaysa eris.
14.2: Hessa gisho, Iyo7aabi Tequhe katamaa kiittidi, issi cinca maccas ehisis. Iiko, “Neeni kayotiya asada hana; kayo ma7o ma7a; qibaate tiyettofa; daro wodepe doomidi, hayqida asas kayotiya maccasada hana.
14.3: Kawako bada ha qaala iyaw oda” yaagis. Iyo7aabi iya kawas odanaba iw odis.
14.4: Tequhe maccasiya kawako bada biittan gufannada, “Kawaw, tana maaddarki!” yaagasu.
14.5: Kawoy, “Nena aybe metiday?” yaagidi oychis. Iya, “Taani azini hayqida maccas.
14.6: Taw ne ayllees nam7u adde nayti de7oosona. Enti issoy issuwara denban wadhetidosona; enta shaakanaw asi dhayin, issoy issuwa shocidi wodhis.
14.7: Ta dabboti ubbay ta bolla dendidi, ‘Ba ishaa I wodhida gisho nuuni iya wodhana mela ba ishaa wodhida uraa nuus hamma; yaatidi nuuni laattiya asi dhaysana’ yaagidosona. Enti taw laatas attida issi duncha toysoosona; ta azinaa sunthaanne iya kochaa biittafe dhaysoosona” yaagasu.
14.8: Kawoy maccaseeko, “Ne soo ba; ta ne gisho kiittana” yaagis.
14.9: Shin Tequhe maccasiya, “Ta godaw, kawaw, gomey tananne ta aawa soo asaa oyko; shin kawoynne iya araatay geeshshi gido” yaagasu.
14.10: Kawoy, “Ne bolla doona pogiya oonaka taako eha; I nena nam7antho bochenna” yaagis.
14.11: Maccasiya, “Suuthu zaariya uray qoho bolla qoho ehonadanne ta na7aaka wodhonnaada kawoy Godaa, ba Xoossaa sunthan taw caaqo” yaagasu. Kawoy, “De7o Goday eriya mela, ne na7aa binaanape issoyka sa7an wodhenna” yaagis.
14.12: Maccasiya zaarada, “Ta godaw, ta kawaw, ta issiba odeto” yaagasu. Kawoy, “Haasaya” yaagis.
14.13: Maccasiya, “Yaatin, neeni Xoossa deriya bolla haysa mela qoho ayis oothadii? Kawoy dhayida ba na7aa guye zaaribeenna. Ba odida qaalan kawoy bala gidennee?
14.14: Nu ubbay hayqana; gukida haathi simmonnaysada nu simmoko. Shin Xoossay shempo dhayo dosenna; dogetida asi kumethi dhayonna mela iyaw oge giigisees.
14.15: “Tana asay yashisiya gisho ta godaa, kawas, haysa odanaw ha77i yas. ‘Taani ne aylliya, taani kawas odana; ooni eri, taani iya aylliya oychidaba kawoy oothonna aggenna.
14.16: Kawoy si7idi, Xoossay nuus immida laatape tananne ta na7aa dhaysanaw koyiya asaa kushepe ashshana’ gada qopas.
14.17: Hessadaka kawoy lo77onne iita shaakanaw Xoossa kiitancho mela gidiya gisho, ta godaa kawa qaalay tana shempiso. Goday, ne Xoossay neera gido” yaagasu.
14.18: Kawoy, “Taani nena oychana; neeni taape qottofa” yaagis. Maccasiya, “Ta goday, kawoy odeto” yaagasu.
14.19: Kawoy maccasiw, “Haysa ubban Iyo7aaba kushey neera de7ii?” yaagidi oychis. Maccasiya, “Ta godaw, kawaw, ne shempoy ero! Neeni ta goday, kawoy, odida ubbaafe ushachi woyko haddirsi gaanaw danda7iya asi baawa. Ee, haysa tana kiittiday, ne aylle doonan haysa wothiday ne aylliya Iyo7aaba.
14.20: Ne aylley Iyo7aabi haysa oothiday ha77i de7iya hanota laammanaasa. Kawaw, new Xoossa kiitancho mela cinca gidiya gisho biittan haniyaba ubbaa eraasa” yaagasu.
14.21: Kawoy Iyo7aabako, “Lo77o! Taani haysa oothana! Bada he na7atetha Abeseloome ekada ya” yaagis.
14.22: Iyo7aabi kawa sinthan gufannidi, “Ta godaw, kawaw, ba aylley oychidaba oothanaw ero gida gisho, ne sinthan saba demmidaysa ne aylley hachi eris” yaagis.
14.23: Hessafe guye, Iyo7aabi dendidi Geshura bidi Abeseloome Yerusalaame ekidi yis.
14.24: Shin kawoy, “Abeseloomey ba soo baanaw bessees; I ta som7on keyopo” yaagis. Abeseloomey ba soo bis; kawa som7uwa be7ibeenna.
14.25: Isra7eele giddon mala lo77otethan Abeseloome mela sabetida asi baawa. Huuphepe toho gakanaw iyan boriyabay baawa.
14.26: I bana deexiya wode ba huuphiya qanxisees. Ba huuphiya qanxisiya wode ubban mizaanen mazzanees; iya binaanay kawo mizaane liken nam7u kilo giraamepe aadhees.
14.27: Abeseloomes heedzu adde na7inne issi macca na7i yeletidosona; macca na7e sunthay Timaaro; iya mala lo77o na7a.
14.28: Abeseloomey nam7u laythi kumethi kawa som7o be7onna Yerusalaamen de7is.
14.29: Abeseloomey, “Taani nena kawako kiittanaw koyiya gisho taako haaya” yaagidi Iyo7aabako kiittis; shin Iyo7aabi yoonna ixis. Nam7antho kiittis; shin Iyo7aabi ha77ika yoonna ixis.
14.30: Abeseloomey ba aylletako, “Heko, ta gadiya matan Iyo7aabas gadey de7ees; iyan bangi de7ees. Bidi iyan tama yeddite” yaagis. Abeseloome aylleti Iyo7aaba bangan tama yeddidosona.
14.31: Iyo7aabi Abeseloome soo bidi, “Ne aylleti ta bangan ayis tama yeddidonaa?” yaagidi oychis.
14.32: Abeseloomey, “Ta xeegin ne yoonna ixida gishosa. Neeni kawako bada, ‘Taani Geshurape ayis yadina? Taani hanno gakanaw yan de7idaako lo77oshin’ yaagees gada taw oychana mela koyas. Ha77i taani kawa som7o be7anaw koyayis; taani bala gidiko, I tana wodho” yaagis.
14.33: Iyo7aabi kawako bidi, Abeseloomey gidaysa odis. Kawoy Abeseloome xeegisis; Abeseloomey soo gelidi, kawa sinthan gufannidi ziggis; kawoy Abeseloome yeeris.

15.1: Hessafe guye, Abeseloomey issi para gaare, paratanne ba sinthan woxanaw ishatamu asata giigisis.
15.2: Abeseloomey guura dendidi, katamaa pengiyan eqees. Mootoy de7iya ay asika kawa sinthe pirdas biya wode Abeseloomey xeegidi, “Neeni awu katamape yay?” yaagidi oychees. He uray, “Ta ne aylley Isra7eele zare issuwafe yas” yaagidi iyaw zaarees.
15.3: Abeseloomey, “Heko, ne oday lo77onne suure; shin kawa baggafe nena si7anay baawa” yaagees.
15.4: Abeseloomey gujidi, “Ta Isra7eele bolla pirdanaw shuumetidaba gidarkinashin. Hessi hanidaako, mootoy woyko odi de7iya oonika taako yin, taani iyaw suure pirda pirdanashin” yaagees.
15.5: Oonika iyako yidi iyaw ziggiya wode Abeseloomey ba kushiya yeddidi he addiya oykidi yeerees.
15.6: Pirdetanaw kawako yaa Isra7eele ubbaas Abeseloomey hessada hanidi Isra7eele asaa wozanaa ekis.
15.7: Oyddu laythafe guye, Abeseloomey, “Taani Godaas qangida qangetha gathanaw Kebroona baana.
15.8: Taani ne aylley Soore biittan Geshura kataman de7ashe, ‘Tana Goday Yerusalaame guye zaariko, Godaas goyinnana’ yaagada qangas” yaagis.
15.9: Kawoy, “Saro ba” gin, I dendidi Kebroona katamaa bis.
15.10: Shin Abeseloomey Isra7eele zare ubbaas qosan kiita yeddidi, “Moyze puno hinte si7ida wode, ‘Abeseloomey Kebroonan kawotis’ yaagite” yaagis.
15.11: Abeseloomey xeegin, Yerusalaamepe iyara bida asata tayboy nam7u xeeta. Enti he hanotaba aykoka eronna ashketethan bidosona.
15.12: Abeseloomey yarsho yarshiya wode Dawita zoriya asaape issuwa Akxoofela Gilo katamaape xeegisis. Kawa bolla dendida maqoy goobis; Abeseloome kaalliya asaa tayboy guji guji bis. Dawiti Baqatis
15.13: Issi kiitetida asi yidi Dawitako, “Isra7eele asaa wozanay Abeseloomera de7ees” yaagis.
15.14: Dawiti baara Yerusalaamen de7iya ba moorinnatako, “Dendite! Nuuni baqatoos! Yaanona ixiko, nu giddofe ay asika Abeseloomepe kessi ekenna. Nuuni ellesidi baanaw koshshees; hankoode, I ellesi yidi nuna dhaysana; nu katama mashshan buthana” yaagis.
15.15: Kawa moorinnati, “Nu goday, kawoy doorida ubbaa nuuni ne aylleti oothanaw giigidi uttida” yaagidosona.
15.16: Kawoy keydi tohora bis; iya soo asaynne iya moorinnati ubbay iyara bis; shin ba gadhuwa naagana mela tammu laggethota son ashshis.
15.17: Kawoy keyin asa ubbay iyara haahon de7iya issi keetha matan eqidosona.
15.18: Iya asati ubbay iyape sinthara salpidi aadhidosona; enta kaallidi kawa naageysati salpidosona. Qassi enta kaallidi Gaate katamaape yida usupun xeetu asati, kawa sinthara salpidi aadhidosona.
15.19: Kawoy Gaate addiya Itayako, “Neeni nuura ayis yay? Guye simmada, kawa Abeseloomera de7aasha. Neeni asa biitta asi; ne di7etada yida asi.
15.20: Neeni zine yadasa; taani ta huuphen biya soo eronna de7ashe, nena waatada daaburso? Guye simma; ne biitta asi neera efa. Goday new keehonne ammaneto!” yaagis.
15.21: Shin Itayi, “De7o Goday eriya mela, ta goday kawoy eriya mela, ta goday kawoy de7iya awunka, paxan gidin hayqon taani ne aylley neepe shaaketike” yaagis.
15.22: Dawiti, “Lo77o! Ba, aadha” yaagis. Gaate addey Itayi asaaranne naytara asa ubbaara bis.
15.23: He asa ubbay biya wode he biitta asay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona. Kawoy Qediroona zangaara pinnis; asa ubbay mela biittako simmidi bis.
15.24: Kahiney Saadoqi he bessan de7ees; Xoossa caaqo Taabotiya tookiya Leewetinne kahiniya Abyataari yan de7oosona. Asa ubbay katamaape keyidi wurana gakanaw Xoossa Taabotiya sa7an shempisidosona.
15.25: Hessafe guye, kawoy Saadoqako, “Xoossa Taabotiya katama guye zaara. Goday tanan ufaytiyaba gidiko, issi gallas guye zaaridi ba Taabotiyanne ba keethaa bessaana.
15.26: Shin i, ‘Nenan ufaytike’ giiko, I bana lo77iyaba ootho; taani giigeta uttas” yaagis.
15.27: Qassi kawoy kahiniya Saadoqako, ane akeeka “Neeni ne na7aa Akmaasanne Abyataara na7aa Yoonataana ekida katamaa saro ba.
