15.28: Hinte taw kiittana gakanaw taani mela biittan de7iya shaafa pinuwan de7ashshana” yaagis.
15.29: Hessa gisho, Saadoqinne Abyataari Xoossa Taabotiya Yerusalaame guye efidi yan de7idosona.
15.30: Shin Dawiti yeekishe Shamaho deriya bolla keyis. I azzanon ba huuphiya guuluntidi mela tohon hemetis; iyara de7iya asati guuluntidi yeekishe pude keyidosona.
15.31: Akxoofeli Abeseloomera maqetidaysa Dawiti si7ida wode “Godaw, Akxoofela zoriya eeyatethi laamma” yaagidi woossis.
15.32: Dawiti asay Xoossaa goyinniya zumaa huuphe gakida wode, Arkaya addiya Kuussi ba ma7uwa daakidi, ba huuphiyan baana qolidi, Dawitara gahetanaw yis.
15.33: Dawiti, “Neeni taara biiko taw tooho gidana.
15.34: Shin neeni katamaa guye simmada Abeseloomeko, ‘Kawaw, haysafe kase taani ne aawa aylle gididaysada ha77i newuka aylle gidana’ yaagiko, Akxoofela zoriya laallada tana maaddana.
15.35: Kahineti Saadoqinne Abyataari neera yan de7oosona gidokona? Neeni kawo gadhon si7iyaba ubbaa entaw oda.
15.36: Saadoqa na7aa Akmaasinne Abyataara na7aa Yoonataani yan entara de7oosona; neeni si7iyaba ubbaa enta bolla taw kiitta” yaagis.
15.37: Abeseloomey Yerusalaame gelishin, Dawita laggey Kuussi katama gakis.

16.1: Dawiti deriya huuphiyara hefinthi aadhishin, Siiba geetetiya Mempiboste aylley iyara gahetis. Nam7u xeetu uythu, issi xeetu zabibe nuka, issi xeetu tiya ayfe, issi ogoro woyne ushshu nam7u haretan caanis.
16.2: Kawoy, “Haysa ayis ehadii?” yaagidi oychis. Siibi, “Hareta, kawa soo asay toggana mela, uythaanne tiyiya ayfiya asay maana melanne woyne ushshay bazzon daaburiya asati uyana melasa” yaagis.
16.3: Kawoy, “Ne godaa na7aa na7ay awun de7ii?” yaagidi oychis. Siibi, “ ‘Isra7eele asay ta aawa kawotethaa hachi taw zaari immana’ yaagidi Yerusalaamen uttis” yaagis.
16.4: Kawoy, “Mempibostes de7iyaba ubbay new gido” yaagis. Siibi, “Abeeti godaw, kawaw! Taani ne sinthan teemo demmayis” yaagidi biittan gufannida ziggayis. Dawitanne Saami
16.5: Kawoy Dawiti Biraqima katama yaa wode Saa7ola dabbo gidida issi addey yaape keyis. Iya sunthay Geera na7aa Saami. I Dawita baaddishe keyis.
16.6: Olanchotinne kawa naageysati ushacharanne haddirsara Dawita teqidi de7ishin, Saami Dawita bollanne kawa moorinnata bolla shuchu holis.
16.7: Saami Dawita baaddishe, “Kicha; ha iitay kicha! Asa suuthu gussiya ha pathonaysi kicha.
16.8: Neeni Saa7ola bessan kawotadasa; neeni gussida Saa7ola soo asaa suutha ubbaa Goday ne bolla zaaris. Goday kawotethaa ne na7aa Abeseloomes immis; neeni suuthu gussida asi gidiya gisho, new dhayo wodey gakis” yaagis.
16.9: Hessafe guye, Xaruya na7ay Abisi, Kawako, “Ha bawuta kanay, ta godaa kawa ayis baaddii? Taani bada iya qoodhiya qanxana” yaagis.
16.10: Kawoy, “Hinteno, Xaruya nayto, hintera taara aybi gathii? Goday, ‘Dawita baadda’ yaagida gisho I baaddiyaba gidiko, ‘Neeni ayis hessa oothay?’ yaagidi oychanaw danda7ey oonee?” yaagis.
16.11: Hessafe guye, Dawiti Abisanne ba moorinnata, “Ta na7ay, ta ashoy, tana wodhanaw koyees; yaatin, ha Biniyaame addey waati aggane! Goday iya kiitida gisho I baaddees, iya bochofite.
16.12: Ooni eri, Goday ta metuwa be7idi, taani hachi ekiya baadetha gisho taw keeha qopaneeko” yaagis.
16.13: Hessafe guye, Dawitinne iya asay ogiya oykidi boosona. Saami zumaa miyara bishe Dawita baaddees; shuchu holees; iya bolla biitta laallees.
16.14: Kawoynne iyara de7iya asati banta biya bessa daaburidi gakin kawoy yan shempis. Abeseloomenne Iya Moorinnata
16.15: Abeseloomeynne Isra7eele asa ubbay Yerusalaame gelidosona; Akxoofeli entara de7ees.
16.16: Dawita laggey Arkaya kochay Kuussi Abeseloomeko yidi, “Kawoy birata tuussu gido! Kawoy mukulu laythi kawoto!” yaagis.
16.17: Abeseloomey, “Neeni ne laggiya dosiya dosoy haysee? Ne laggiyara ayis babikii?” yaagis.
16.18: Kuussi, “Akay! Goday, ha asaynne Isra7eele asay dooridaysas taani aqana; taani iyara attana.
16.19: Hiza taani ta godaa na7aas oothonna ooddes oothanee? Taani ne aawas oothidaysada ha77i newuka oothana” yaagis.
16.20: Abeseloomey Akxoofelako, “Neeni ane nuna zora; nuuni ay oothino?” yaagis.
16.21: Akxoofeli, “Kawo gadho naaganaw son attida ne aawa laggethotara bada zin7a. Neeni ne aawa kawushidaysa Isra7eele asa ubbay si7ana; neera de7iya ubbaa kushey minnana” yaagis.
16.22: Kawo keethaa pooqiya bolla Abeseloomes dunkaane tokidosona; asa ubbay xeellishin Abeseloomey gelidi ba aawa laggethotara zin7is.
16.23: He wode Akxoofeli zoriya zorey issi asi Godaa oychidi ekiya zore mela. Dawitinne Abeseloomey Akxoofela zoriya hessada oothidi ekidosona.

17.1: Hessafe guye, Akxoofeli, “Hachi qamma taani tammanne nam7u mukulu asata doorada Dawita yedethada oykana.
17.2: I daaburidi wolqa dhayidi de7ishin taani iya bolla wodhana. Taani iya daganthana; yan iyara de7iya asa ubbay baqatiya wode taani kawa xalaala shocana.
17.3: Yaatada taani asa ubbaa neeko zaarana. Neeni issi asa xalaala wodhanaw koyaasa; hanko asay saro attana” yaagis.
17.4: Akxoofela zorey Abeseloomenne Isra7eele cimata ubbaa ufaysis.
17.5: Abeseloomey, “Qassi Arkaya kocha Kuussa xeegite; I giyaba ane si7oos” yaagis.
17.6: Kuussi iyako yida wode Abeseloomey, “Akxoofeli zorida zorey haysa; nuuni I giyaba oothanaw bessii? Bessonnaba gidiko, ne qofay aybee?” yaagis.
17.7: Kuusi, “Akxoofeli zorida zorey ha wodiyan lo77o gidenna.
17.8: Ne aawaynne ne aawa asati mino olanchota gideysanne ba marata bonqetida maahe mela yashsheyisata gideysa neeni eraasa. Ne aaway ola meezetida asi; I qamma ba olanchotara aqena.
17.9: I hannoode gongolo giddon woyko hara bessan qosetidi uttis. I hinte cugata koyrottidi qohiko, hessa si7ida oonika, ‘Abeseloome kaallidi bida asay shocetidosona’ yaagana.
17.10: Ne aaway toora qara gideysanne iyara de7iya asay mino gideysa Isra7eele asa ubbay eriya gisho, hari attoshin gaammoda minota wozanay til7ana.
17.11: “Shin taani nena zorey haysa; abba gaxan de7iya shafe mela darida, Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw de7iya Isra7eele ubbaa neeko shiisha; yaatada neeni enta olas kaaletha.
17.12: Nuuni iya demmida bessa awunka shocana; aki sa7an wodhiyada nuuni iya bolla wodhana. Iya gidin woyko iyara de7iya asaa gidin issoyka paxa attenna.
17.13: I katamaa gelikoka, Isra7eele asa ubbay wodoro ehidi, katamaa giddon issi shuchi aggonna he katamaa goochidi zangaaran yeggana” yaagis.
17.14: Abeseloomeynne Isra7eele asa ubbay, “Arkaya kocha Kuussa zorey Akxoofela zoriyape lo77o” yaagidosona. Goday Abeseloome bolla iitabaa ehanaw qopidi gisho Akxoofela zoriya ekonnaada oothis.
17.15: Kuussi kahineta Saadoqanne Abyataara, “Akxoofeli Abeseloomenne Isra7eele cimata haysa haysa gidi zoris; taanika enta haysa haysa gada zoras.
17.16: Ha77i Dawitako eeson kiittidi, ‘Bazzon de7iya shaafa gaxan hachi qamma aqopa; hefinthi pinna kicha! Hessi hanonna ixiko, kawoynne iyara de7iya asa ubbay dhayana’ yaagidi odite” yaagis.
17.17: Yoonataaninne Akimaasi qoncen katamaa gelishin enta asi be7onna mela Aynogeela geetetiya bessan uttidi naagoosona. Issi macca aylliya yada entaw odin, enti bidi kawa Dawitas odoosona.
17.18: Shin issi panthay enta be7idi Abeseloomes odis. Hessa gisho, enti nam7ay he bessaafe eeson kichidi Biraqima kataman issi addiya soo gakidosona. He addiya soo matan haatha olli de7ees; enti he ollan gelidosona.
17.19: He addiya machiya oonika eronnaada ollaa doona kammada iya bolla kathi miccasu.
17.20: Abeseloome aylleti addiya soo yidi machiw, “Akmaasinne Yoonataani awun de7oona?” yaagidi oychidosona. Machiya, “Enti shaafa pinnidi bidosona” yaagasu. Enti koyin, bentonna ixin, Yerusalaame simmidosona.
17.21: He asati bidaape guye, nam7u asati ollafe keyidi, kawa Dawitas odanaw bidosona. Dawitako, “Akxoofeli hinte bolla haysa haysa oothana gidi zori wothida gisho eeson dendidi, shaafa pinnite” yaagidosona.
17.22: Dawitinne iyara de7iya asa ubbay Yordaanose pinnidi bidosona. Sa7i wontiya wode ubbay pinnidi wuridosona.
17.23: Akxoofeli ba zorey eketiboonaysa erida wode ba hariya kooridi ba de7iya katamaa bis. Akxoofeli ba soo giigisidi suletidi, hayqidi ba aawa duufon moogetis.
17.24: Abeseloomeynne iyara de7iya asa ubbay Yordaanose pinniya wode Dawiti Mahanayma katamaa gakis.
17.25: Abeseloomey ba olanchota bolla Iyo7aaba bessan Amasaya shuumis. Amasayi Isra7eele addiya Yotora na7a. Yotori Na7oosa na7iw, Iyo7aaba aayiw Xaruya michiw Abigiya ekis.
17.27: Dawiti Mahanayma katamaa gakiya wode Amoone biittan Raabape yida Na7oosa na7ay Shoobi, Lodobaara katamape yida Ami7eela na7ay Makirinne Orogalma katamape yida Galada addey Barziley,
17.28: hiixiyabata, keretanne shaateta ehidosona. Qassi enti giste, banga, dhiille, shaashshi, qom7olonne misire,
17.29: eessi, pila, meqa maathinne dorse Dawitinne iya asay maana mela ekidi yidosona. Hessa enti ehiday, “Asay bazzon koshatis, daaburis, saamotis” gidi qopida gishosa.

18.1: Dawiti baara de7iya asaa taybidi shaalaqatanne mato halaqata enta bolla shuumis.
18.2: Dawiti asa heedzu cugan shaakis; issi cugaa Iyo7aabi, nam7antho cugaa Iyo7aaba ishay, Xaruya na7ay Abisi, heedzantho cugaa Gaate addey Itayi kiittees. Kawoy asaako, “Tuma ta hintera issife baana” yaagis.
18.3: Shin asay, “Neeni baanaw bessenna! Nuuni baqatiyako enti nuna koyokona; hari attoshin nuupe baggay hayqiyakoka nubaa wuda gookona. Shin neeni ne xalaala tammu mukulupe daraasa. Hessa gisho, neeni kataman uttada nuus maado kiittiko lo77o” yaagis.
18.4: Kawoy, “Hintena lo77iyaba ta oothana” yaagis. Dawiti dirsa pengiya matan eqidi, asa ubbay xeetaninne mukulan salpidi keyishin be7is.
18.5: Kawoy Iyo7aaba, Abisanne Itaya, “Ta gisho gidi, he na7atetha addiya Abeseloome qohopite” yaagidi kiittis. Kawoy hessa halaqatas odiya wode olanchoti ubbay si7idosona.
18.6: Dawita olanchoti Isra7eeletara oletanaw Efreema woran salpidosona.
18.7: He bessan Dawita olanchoti Isra7eele olanchota xoonidosona. He gallas daro asi wuris, laatamu mukulu asi hayqis.
18.8: Olay gaxare ubbaa gakis; he gallas wori wursida asay mashshi wursida asaape daro.
18.9: Abeseloomey qoponna de7ishe Dawita asaara gahetis. Abeseloomey ba baquluwa toggidashin daashsha wola garsi baquloy gelin, Abeseloome huuphey mithan oyketis. I toggida baquloy iya tohuwa garsafe bin, Abeseloomey carko bolla kaqatidi attis.
18.10: Asaape issoy hessa be7idi, “Abeseloomey issi wola bolla kaqetidaysa ta be7as” yaagidi Iyo7aabas odis.
18.11: Iyo7aabi baw odida addiya, “Yee, be7as gay? Yaatin ayis iya wodhabikii? Ne hessa oothidaba gidiyako, taani new tammu bira santimenne issi saqe immanashin” yaagis.
18.12: Addey zaaridi, “Neeni mukulu bira santime ta kushen wothiyakoka taani kawa na7aa bolla ta kushiya denthike! Nuuni ubbay si7ishin, kawoy nena, Abisanne Itaya, ‘Ta gisho gidi, na7atetha Abeseloome qohopite’ yaagidi kiittis.
18.13: Taani kawa kiitta ixada Abeseloome wodhidaba gidiyako, kawoy ubbaa si7eysada hessa si7anaysi attenna. He wode neeni haaki eqiya asaape issuwa gidana” yaagis.
18.14: Iyo7aabi, “Taani neera odetashe wode wursike” yaagidi heedzu toora ekidi, Abeseloomey wolaa bolla kaqetidi, paxa de7ishin wozana ayfen caddis.
18.15: Iyo7aaba ola miishiya tookiya tammu asati Abeseloome yuushuwa teqidi iya shocidi wodhidosona.
18.16: Hessafe guye, Iyo7aabi olaa essanaw moyze punnin asay Isra7eeleta yedetheysa aggis.
18.17: Enti Abeseloome efidi woran de7iya gita ollan yeggidi, gita shuchu iya bolla dooridosona. He wode Isra7eele asa ubbay ba soo soo baqatis.
18.18: Abeseloomey paxa de7ishe, “Ta sunthan xeegetiya adde na7i taw baawa” yaagidi, bana qofisiya shuchu massida hawulte kawo zangaaran essidi he hawultiya ba sunthan xeegis. Hachi gakanaw he hawultey “Abeseloome hawultiya” geetetees. Dawiti Abeseloomes Yeekis
18.19: Hessafe guye, Saadoqa na7aa Akimaasi Iyo7aabako, “Iya morketa kushepe Goday iya ashshida mishiraachuwa sissanaw taani kawako woxa bada odana” yaagis.
18.20: Iyo7aabi, “Akay! Hachi neeni mishiraacho odiya gallas gidenna; hara gallas odanaw danda7aasa. Kawa na7ay hayqida gisho hachi odanaw koshshenna” yaagis.
18.21: Iyo7aabi Tophe asi gidida issi addiya xeegidi, “Bada, ne be7idaba kawas oda” yaagis. He addey Iyo7aabas gufanni ziggidi woxis.
18.22: Saadoqa na7ay Akimaasi nam7antho Iyo7aabako, “Aybika hano; taani ha Tophe addiya geedo woxana” yaagis. Iyo7aabi, “Ta na7aw, new woytoy baynaban ayis woxanaw koyay?” yaagis.
18.23: Akimaasi, “Aybika hano; taani woxanaw koyayis” yaagis. Iyo7aabi, “Yaako woxa” yaagis. Hessa gisho, Akimaasi demba ogiya oykidi woxishe bidi Tophe addiya yeggidi aadhis.
18.24: Dawiti soo pengiyafenne kare pengiyafe giddon uttidashin, naagiya uray keethaa bolla keyidi, issi addey barka woxishe yeysa be7is.
18.25: Naagiya uray kawa xeegidi odis. Kawoy, “I barka de7iko, mishiraacho ekidi yees” yaagis. Woxiya addey entako matishe yis.
18.26: Naageysi hara woxiya asi be7idi pengiya naagiya addiyako, “Hara asika barka woxishe yees” yaagis. Kawoy, “Ha addeyka qassi mishiraacho ekidi yees” yaagis.
18.27: Naageysi, “Koyro addiya wothay Saadoqa na7aa Akmaasa wotha taw daanees” yaagis. Kawoy, “I lo77o asi; I lo77o odara yees” yaagis.
18.28: Akimaasi kawa xeegidi, “Ubbabay lo77o!” yaagis. Kawa sinthan gufanni ziggidi, “Ta godaa, kawa bolla banta kushiya denthida asata new aathidi immida Goday, ne Xoossay galatetto” yaagis.
18.29: Kawoy, “Na7atethay, Abeseloomey saro?” yaagidi oychis. Akimaasi, “Iyo7aabi tana kiittana haniya wode wolqaama waaso si7as, shin I aybeko taani erabike” yaagis.
18.30: Kawoy, “Yaa shiiqa eqa” yaagin I haakidi eqis.
18.31: Hessafe guye, Tophe addey gakidi, “Ta godaw, kawaw, ta new mishiraacho odayis! Ne bolla dendiya ubbaa kushepe Goday hachi nena ashshis” yaagis.
18.32: Kawoy Tophe addiyako, “Na7atetha addey Abeseloomey saro?” yaagidi oychis. Tophe addey, “Ta godaw, kawaw, ne morketinne ne bolla iitabaa oothanaw dendeysati ubbay he na7atetha addiyada hanona” yaagis.
18.33: Kawoy daro azzanis; pengiyafe qommo baggan de7iya keethaa gelidi yeekis. Kawoy, “Yii, ta na7aw Abeseloome taassa! Ta na7aw taassa! Ne gisho ta hayqarkina! Yii, ta na7aw Abeseloome taassa!” yaagidi yeekis.

19.1: Kawoy, “Ba na7aa Abeseloomes yeekesinne zeleeles” yaagidi Iyo7aabas odidosona.
19.2: Kawoy ba na7aas yeekeysa si7ida gisho, he gallas enti ubbay xoonida xoonoy yeehon laametis.
19.3: Olape baqatidi yeellan guye simmida olanchoda he gallas asay doona pogonna katama gelidosona.
19.4: Kawoy guuluntidi, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Yii, ta na7aw Abeseloome! Yii, ta na7aw! Abeseloome yii!” yaagidi zeleelis.
19.5: Hessafe guye, Iyo7aabi kawa soo bidi, “Nena, ne adde nayta, ne macca nayta, ne machetanne ne laggethota ashshida ne asa ubbaa hachi neeni kawushadasa.
19.6: Nena ixeyisata neeni dosaasa; nena doseyisata neeni ixaasa. Ne olanchotinne enta halaqati new aykoka gidonnaysa neeni hachi qoncisadasa. Nuuni ubbay hayqin, Abeseloomey hachi paxa attidaako neeni ufaytanaysa ta be7as.
19.7: Ha77i denda! Kare keyada ne asaa minthetha. Ta Godaa sunthan caaqayis; neeni keyonna ixiko, hachi qamma neera issi asika attenna. Na7atethafe hachi gakanaw nena gakida iita ubbaafe haysi new aadhida iita gidana” yaagis. Dawiti Yerusalaame Simmis
19.8: Hessa gisho, kawoy dendidi pengiya matan uttis. Kawoy pengen uttidaysa asa ubbay si7ida wode kawako yidosona. He wode Isra7eele asa ubbay banta soo soo baqatidosona.
19.9: Isra7eele kochati ubbay issoy issuwara haysada yaagidi palamidosona; “Kawoy Dawiti nuna nu morketa kushepe ashshis; nuna Filisxeemeta kushepe wosisis; shin I ha77i Abeseloome gaason biitta aggidi baqatis.
19.10: Nu bolla kawotanaada nuuni tiyida Abeseloomey olan hayqis. Yaatin, kawa guye ehanaba hinte ayis si77i gidetii?” yaagidosona.
19.11: Kawoy Dawiti kahineta Saadoqanne Abyataara kiittidi, Yihuda cimatako haysada yaagis; “Isra7eele asa ubbay odetiya oday kawa gakis. Yaatin, kawa iya gadho zaari ehanaw hinte ayis guye atteetii?
19.12: Hinte ta ishata; hinte ta ashonne ta suuthu. Yaatin, kawa guye zaari ehanaw hinte ayis haratape guye atteetii?” yaagis.
19.13: Qassi Dawiti Amaasako, “Neeni ta ashonne ta suuthu gidikii? Hachife doomin, taani nena Iyo7aaba bessan ta tora mocona oothonna ixiko, Xoossi tana pirdo” yaagis.
19.14: I Yihuda asa ubbaa wozanaa issino oothidi shammis. Hessa gisho, enti kawako kiittidi, “Neera ne asaara ubbay haa simmite” yaagidosona.
19.15: Kawoy simmidi, Yordaanose shaafa gakanaw yis. Yihuda asay kawa Yordaanose shaafa pinthanaw Galgala bidosona.
19.16: Biraqima addey, Biniyaame kochay, Geera na7ay Saami Dawita mokanaw ellesidi Yihuda asaara bis.
19.17: Iyara Biniyaame koche gidida mukulu asay, Saa7ola aylley Siibi, tammanne ichashu iya naytinne laatamu aylleti iyara de7oosona. Enti kawoy de7iya bessaa Yordaanose shaafa dirgishe bidosona.
19.18: Kawa soo asaa ehanawunne kawa ufaysiyabaa oothanaw pinniya bessaara pinnidosona. Geera na7ay Saami Yordaanose shaafa pinnida wode kawa sinthan gufannidi,
19.19: “Kawaw ta nagaraa taybopa. Ta goday, kawoy, Yerusalaamepe keyiya wode taani ne aylley qohida qohuwa hassayopa. Hesaa ne ulon oykofa.
19.20: Ne aylley taani nagara oothidaysa erayis; shin ta godaa, kawa mokanaw Yoosefa soo asa ubbaafe koyrottada taani hachi yas” yaagis.
19.21: Xaruya na7ay Abisi, “Saami Goday tiyida kawa baaddida gisho hayqanaw besseneyee?” yaagis.
19.22: Dawiti Abisako, “Hinteno, Xaruya nayto, hintena gathiyabay aybee? Hinte hachi taw morke gideeti! Hachi Isra7eelen ay asika hayqenna! Hachi Isra7eele kawoy tana!” yaagis.
19.24: Qassi Saa7ola na7ay Mempibostey kawa mokanaw duge wodhis. Kawoy bida gallasape doomidi I saron guye simmiya gallas gakanaw Mempibostey ba tohuwanne ba ma7uwa meeccibeenna; ba buuchaa meedibeenna.
19.25: Mempibostey kawuwara gahetanaw Yerusalaamepe yida wode kawoy, “Mempiboste, neeni taara ayis babikii?” yaagidi oychis.
19.26: Mempibostey, “Ta godaw kawaw, taani ne aylley sila gidiya gisho ‘Taani toggada kawuwara baana mela ta hariya koora’ yaagas. Shin ta aylley Siibi tana cimmis.
19.27: Ta godaa, kawas wordo odidi ta sunthaa iissis. Neeni ta goday, kawoy Xoossa kiitancho mela gidiya gisho nena lo77idaba ootha.
19.28: Ta aawa soo asa ubbay hayqanaw bessees, shin taani ne aylley ne gaytape meysatara maana mela taw besse immadasa. Yaatin, hessafe aadhiyaba kawa oychanaw taw ay maati de7ii?” yaagis.
19.29: Kawoy zaaridi, “Neeni darobaa odetanaw koshshenna. Neera Siibara gadiya shaaketidi ekana mela kiittas” yaagis.
19.30: Mempibostey, “Ta goday, kawoy saro soo simmaafe attishin, ubbay Siibas gido” yaagis.
19.31: Galada addey Barziley kawuwara issife Yordaanose pinnidi iya moyzanaw Roogalimape yis.
19.32: Barziley laythi hospun tammu gidida cima asi. I daro dure gidiya gisho kawoy Mahanayma kataman de7iya wode kawas koshshiyaba immis.
19.33: Kawoy iyako, “Neeni taara Yerusalaame yedha; taani new koshshiyaba immana” yaagis.
19.34: Shin Barziley, “Taani hizape daro laythi de7ike; taani kawuwara Yerusalaame ayis boo?
19.35: Taani ha77i hospun tammu laytha asi; taani iitanne lo77o shaakada eranaw danda7iyana? Taani ne aylley ta miyabaanne uyaaba mal7uwa shaakada eranaw danda7iyana? Taani addenne macca yethi shaakada si7anaw danda7iyana? Yaatin, taani ne aylley, ta godaw kawaw ayis tooho gido?
19.36: Taani ne aylley nena Yordaanose pinthana. Shin kawoy taw kushe zaaranaw ayis koshshii?
19.37: Taani ta aawanne ta aaye duufuwa matan ta kataman hayqana mela simmayis. Ne aylley Kimihaami haysish; ta godaa, kawuwara I boo; nena ufaysiyabaa iyaw ootha” yaagis.
19.38: Kawoy, “Kimihaami taara pinno; nena ufaysiyabaa taani iyaw oothana. Qassi neeni tana oychiyaba ayba gidikoka taani new oothana” yaagis.
19.39: Hessafe guye, asa ubbay Yordaanose pinnidosona; kawoyka pinnis. Kawoy Barzile yeeridi anjis; Barziley ba soo simmis.
19.40: Kawoy Yordaanose pinnidi Galgala biya wode Kimihaami iyara issife bis. Yihuda olanchoti ubbaynne Isra7eele olanchotape baggati kawuwara bidosona.
19.41: Isra7eele ubbay kawako bidi, “Nu ishati, Yihuda asay kawanne iya soo asaa qosidi, iya asaara issife Yordaanose ayis pinthidona?” yaagidosona.
19.42: Yihuda asay, “Nuuni hessa oothiday kawoy nuus mata dabbo gidiya gishosa. Yaatin, hinte hessas ayis yilotetii? Nuuni kawuwape ayko mido? Woyko nuuni iyape ayko ekido?” yaagidosona.
19.43: Isra7eele asay, “Kawuwape tammu kushey nuusa; Dawita matan nuus hintefe aadho maati de7ees! Yaatin, hinte nuna ayis kadhidetii? Kawa guye zaaridi ehanaw koyrottidi odiday nuna gidoko?” yaagidosona. Shin Isra7eele asaape Yihuda asay daro wolqanthidi haasayidosona.

20.1: Biniyaame koche gidida Bikira na7ay Saabe7a geetetiya meto medhiya addey yan de7ees. He addey moyze punnidi, “Nuus Dawitara gishoy baawa! Isseye na7aara nuus laati baawa! Isra7eele asaw, ubbay hinte soo soo gelite!” yaagis.
20.2: Isra7eele asa ubbay Dawita aggidi, Bikira na7aa Sabe7erara bidosona. Shin Yihuda asay Yordaanosepe Yerusalaame gakanaw aggonna banta kawa kaallidosona.
20.3: Dawiti Yerusalaamen de7iya ba gadho simmida wode, kawo gadho naagana mela ashshida tammu laggethota efidi issi keethan naagisidi wothis. Entaw koshshiyaba immis, shin entara aqibeenna. Enti he keethan naagetidi, hayqana gakanaw am7o gididi de7idosona.
20.4: Kawoy Amaasako, “Yihuda asa ubbaa heedzu gallasan taw xeegada shiisha; neka entara shiiqa” yaagis.
20.5: Amaasi Yihuda asaa xeeganaw bis; shin kawoy gida gallasan simmanaw danda7ibeenna.
20.6: Dawiti Abisako, “Ha77i Bikira na7aa Saabe7i Abeseloomepe aathidi nuna qohana. Ne godaa olanchota ekada neeni iya geedo kaalla. Hessi hanonna ixiko I gimbetida katamata demmidi nuupe kessi ekana” yaagis.
20.7: Iyo7aaba asay, kawa naageysatinne mino olanchoti ubbay Abisara Bikira na7aa Saabe7a geedo kaallanaw Yerusalaamepe keyidi bidosona.
20.8: Enti bidi Gaba7oonan de7iya wogga zaalla gakiya wode Amaasi entara gahetanaw yis. Iyo7aabi ola ma7uwa ma7i uttis; ba xeessan mashsha dancis. I tangishin iya mashshay shoohuwape kessi ekidi wodhis.
20.9: Iyo7aabi, “Ta ishaw, ne saro de7ay?” yaagidi, Amaasa yeeranaw ba ushacha kushiyan iya buuchaa oykis.
20.10: Shin Amaasi Iyo7aaba haddirsa kushiyan de7iya mashshaa be7iboona gisho, iyape naagetibeenna. Iyo7aabi iya uluwan caddidi maraaciya biittan zaazis. Amaasi issi cachan hayqida gisho zaari caddibeenna. Iyo7aabinne iya ishaa Abisi Bikira na7aa Saabe7a geedo kaallidosona.
20.11: Iyo7aaba asaape issoy Amaasa aha matan eqidi, “Iyo7aaba doseynne Dawitaba gidiya oonika Iyo7aaba kaallo” yaagis.
20.12: Amaasi suuthan iitidi ogiyas giddon kundidi zin7is. Olanchoti ubbay yidi, he bessan eqidaysa he addey be7idi, Amaasa aha ogiyape shooqan goochi kessidi, iya bolla ma7o yeggis.
20.13: Amaasa ogepe diggidaape guye, Bikira na7aa Saabe7a geedo kaallanaw olanchoti ubbay Iyo7aabara bidosona.
20.14: Saabe7i Isra7eele kochata biittara kanthidi, Abeel-Beet-Ma7ika katamaa gakis. Berata biittara kanthishin, asa ubbay shiiqidi iya kaallidosona.
20.15: Iyo7aabara de7iya asay gakidi, Saabe7i de7iya Abeel-Beet-Ma7ika katama teqidosona. Enti katamaa gimbiyas guye baggara biitta dooridosona. Iyo7aabara de7iya asay gimbiya laallanaw qoxoosona. Enti qoxishin,
20.16: katamaape issi cinca maccasi enta xeegada, “Si7ite! Si7ite! Bidi, Iyo7aaba xeegite. Taani iyaw odanabay de7ees” yaagasu.
20.17: I maccaseeko yin, iya, “Neeni Iyo7aabee?” yaagada oychasu. Iyo7aabi, “Ee, tana” yaagis. Maccasiya, “Taani ne aylliya giyaba si7a” yaagasu. Iyo7aabi, “Taani si7ayis” yaagis.
20.18: Maccasiya, “Beni wode asay, ‘Ne oyshaas Abi7eela katamaa ba’ giiko odi wurees.
20.19: Isra7eele giddon saronne ammanthiya asi nuna. Isra7eele biittan aayo gidida katamiw neeni dhaysanaw qopaasa. Neeni Godaa laata biitta ayis dhaysanaw koyay?” yaagasu.
20.20: Iyo7aabi, “Hessi taape haako! Katamaa dhaysoy woyko laalethi taape haako!
20.21: Nu qofay hessa gidenna. Derey dariya Efreema biittan Bikira na7aa Sabe7a geetetiya addey kawa Dawita bolla dendis. He addiya taw immite; taani katamaa yeddada baana” yaagis. Maccasiya, “Iya huuphiya gimbiya bollara new holana” yaagasu.
20.22: Hessafe guye, maccasiya ba cinca zoriyara asaako basu. Asay Bikira na7aa Saabe7a qoodhepe qanxidi huuphiya Iyo7aabas holidosona. Yaatin, Iyo7aabi moyze punnin asa ubbay katamaape keyidi, ba soo soo bin, Iyo7aabi kawako Yerusalaame simmis.
20.23: Iyo7aabi Isra7eele olanchota ubbaa halaqa gidishin, Yoodahe na7ay Banayasi Dawita naageysata halaqa.
20.24: Adoniraami wolqa ooso ootheyisata halaqa gidishin, Ahiluda na7ay Iyosaafxi hanidaba xaafeysa.
20.25: Suusi waanna xaafe gidishin, Saadoqinne Abyataari kahine.
20.26: Qassi Ya7ira addey Irki Dawita kahinetape issuwa.

21.1: Dawita kawotetha laythan biittay heedzu laythi kumethi koshatis. Hessa gisho, Dawiti Godaa oychin, Goday, “Hessi haniday Saa7olinne iya soo asay Gaba7oona asaa wodhida gisho suuthaa gomey enta gakis” yaagis.
21.2: Yaatin kawoy Gaba7oona asaa xeegidi odisis. Gaba7oona asati Isra7eele zare gidonashin, enti Amoore asaape attidaysata. Isra7eeleti enta ashshanaw entara caaqidosona; shin Saa7oli Isra7eelesinne Yihudas mishetida gisho, enta kumethi dhaysanaw koyis.
21.3: Dawiti Gaba7oona asaa, “Taani hintew ay ootho? Godaa laata hinte anjana mela taani hintena ay acco?” yaagis.
21.4: Enti zaaridi, “Nuuni Saa7olape woyko iya soo asaape worqa woyko bira oychoko. Qassi Isra7eele giddofe issi asika wodhanaw nuus maati baawa” yaagidosona. Dawiti, “Yaatin, taani hintew ay oothana mela koyeetii?” yaagidi oychis.
21.5: Enti, “Saa7oli nuna dhaysis; nuupe ay asika Isra7eele biittan awunka paxa doonna mela maqetis.
21.6: Hessa gisho, Saa7ola kochaafe laapun addeta nuus imma. Goday dooridi iya kawothida Saa7ola kataman, Gib7an, Godaa sinthan nuuni enta kaqana” yaagidosona. Kawoy, “Taani enta hintew aathada immana” yaagis.
21.7: Saa7ola na7ay Yoonataaninne Dawiti Godaa sinthan caaqida caaquwa gisho, Saa7ola na7aa, Yoonataana na7aa Mempiboste kawoy ashshis.
21.8: Shin kawoy Dawiti Iyoheela na7iya Raxifa Saa7olas yelida nam7u adde nayta, Armoonanne Mempiboste, qassi Saa7ola na7iya Merooba, Mahoola addiya Barzile na7aa Adir7eelas yelida ichashu adde nayta ekis.
21.9: Gaba7oona asaas aathidi immin, enti Godaa sinthan zumaa huuphen kaqidosona; laapunay issife hayqidosona. Enti banga caka doomiya wode hayqidosona.
21.10: Iyoheela na7iya Raxifa kayo afila ekada zaalla bolla baw hiixada, kathi cakiya wodiyape bidi ahata bolla iri bukana gakanaw gallas kafoy, qamma do7i bochonaada naagasu.
21.11: Saa7ola laggethiya, Iyoheela na7iya Raxifa oothidaysa Dawiti si7is.
21.12: Dawiti bidi, Saa7ola meqethaanne iya na7aa Yoonataana meqethaa Galadan de7iya Yaabesa asaape ekis. Filisxeemeti Saa7olanne iya nayta Gilbo7a deriya bolla wodhidi, Beet-Saana gutarape Yaabesa asay kaysotidi ekidosona.
21.13: Dawiti Saa7ola meqethaanne iya na7aa Yoonataana meqethaa he bessaafe ehis. Qassi kaqetida laapun asata meqethaaka shiishis.
21.14: Saa7ola meqethaanne iya na7aa Yoonataana meqethaa Biniyaame biittan Xela kataman iya aawa Qiisa duufuwan moogidosona. Kawoy kiittidaba ubbaa enti polidosona. Hessafe guye, enti he biitta gisho woossida woosa Xoossay si7is. Filisxeemetara Oletida Ola (1 Taari 20:4-8)
21.15: Filisxeemeta giddoninne Isra7eele asaa giddon zaaridi oli dendin, Dawiti ba asaara bis. Filisxeemetara oletidi Dawiti daaburis.
21.16: Rafaya yaraape Yishibibinooba geetetiya addey de7ees. Naase biratape oosetida, I oykiya tooray heedzu kilo giraamenne bagga; I ooratha mashshi dancidi, Dawita wodhanaw qopidi de7ees.
21.17: Shin Xaruya na7ay Abisi Dawita ashshis; I Filisxeeme addiya wodhis. Hessafe guye, Dawita asay, “Isra7eele xompey to7onnaada neeni zaarada nuura olaa baaka” yaagidi caaqidosona.
21.18: Gooba geetetiya bessan Filisxeemetara hara oli dendis. He wode Kusata addey Sabaki, Raafa yara gidida Saafa geetetiya uraa wodhis.
21.19: Qassika he bessan Filisxeemetara hara oli dendin, Beetelemepe yida Ya7ira na7aa, Elhanaani, toora toomay wandaraashe mela gidida Gaate addiya Gooliyada wodhis.
21.20: Qassika Gaaten hara oli dendis. He bessan issi adussa addey de7ees. He addiyas issi issi kushiyaninne issi issi tohuwan usupun, woli bolla laatamanne oyddu biradheti de7oosona. Ika Raafa yaraape gidida asi.
21.21: He addey Isra7eele bushayida wode Dawita ishaa Saama na7ay Yoonataani iya wodhis.
21.22: Ha oyddati Gaaten de7iya Raafa yarata. Enta Dawitinne iya asay wodhidosona.

22.1: Goday Saa7ola kushepenne iya morketa ubbaa kushepe ashshida gallas Dawiti Godaas ha mazmuriya yexis.
22.2: Goday ta zaalla; taw miixaa; I tana ashsheysa.
22.3: Ta Xoossay taani baqatada attiya zaalla; I ta gondalliya; I ta atotetha wolqaa. I taani baqatada attiya bessi; ne tana makallanchota kushepe ashshaasa.
22.4: Galati bessiya Godaa taani xeegana; taani ta morketape attana.
22.5: Hayqo zuley tana teqis; dhayo di7oy tana daganthis.
22.6: Si7oole wodoroy tana qachana hanees; hayqoy xiheda tana oykis.
22.7: Tana metoy un7ethin Godaa xeegas; tana maaddana mela ta Xoossaako waassas. I ba keethan ta qaala si7is; ta waassida waasoy iya haythan wodhis.
22.8: Xoossay hanqetida gisho, biitti qaaxis; buqetis; salota xaphoy kokoris; qaaxis
22.9: Iya siidhiyape cuyay keyis; iya doonape tama lacoynne xuuggiya bonqoy keyis.
22.10: Saluwa phalqidi duge wodhis; iya tohuwape garsara sakana dhumi de7ees.
22.11: Kiruubetan uttidi paallis; carko qefiya bolla uttidi bis.
22.12: Bana dhuman teqis; iya dunkaaney irara siketida shaara.
22.13: Iya sinthan de7iya poo7uwape tama bonqoy keyees.
22.14: Goday salope guummis; Ubbaafe dhoqa Xoossay ba qaala sissis.
22.15: Ba dongiya dukidi, ba morketa laallis; wol7antha poo7o kiittidi, enta yedethis.
22.16: Goday seerida wodenne hanqetidi peenuqida wode, abba giddon biittay bentis; Sa7aa baasoyka qoncis.
22.17: Goday bollafe kushe yeddidi, tana oykis; ciimmo haathaafe tana kessis.
22.18: I tana ta wolqaama morketape, ta wolqaafe bolla gidida tana ixeysatape ashshis.
22.19: Ta metuwa gallas enti ta bolla dendidosona; shin Goday tana zempiseysa.
22.20: I tana dalga bessi kessis; tanan ufaytida gisho tana ashshis.
22.21: Ta xillotethaada Goday taw qanxis; ta kushe geeshshatethaada taw zaaris.
22.22: Ayis giiko taani Godaa ogiya kaallas; qassi ta Xoossaa aggada iita oothabike.
22.23: Taani iya higgiya ubbaa naagas; iya wogaa polanaysa aggabike.
22.24: Taani iya sinthan suure de7as; tana nagarape naagas.
22.25: Goday taw ta xillotethaadanne ta geeshshatethaada zaaris.
22.26: Neeni keehatas keeha; suuretas neeni suure.
22.27: Geeshshatas neeni geeshshi; shin geellatas neeni morke.
22.28: Bantana kawusheyisata ashshaasa; shin otoranchota kawushaasa.
22.29: Abeeti Godaw, ta xompey nena; Goday ta dhumaa poo7isis.
22.30: Ne maaduwan ta morketa yedhada baana; ta Xoossan gimbe dirsa gupa aadhana.
22.31: Xoossaa ogey suure; Godaa qaalay geeshshi; iyako baqatiya ubbaas I gondalle.
22.32: Goday attishin, hara xoossi oonee? Nu Xoossay attishin, hara zaalli oonee?
22.33: Xoossay taw mino miixaa; I ta ogiya polo oothees.
22.34: I ta tohuwa gen7e tohoda minthees; tana dhoqa bessan minthidi essees.
22.35: I ta kushiya olas loohisees; ta qesey naase birata donge dukees.
22.36: Tana ashshiya ne gondalliya taw immadasa; ne katisoy tana gitayees.
22.37: Ta hemethaa dalgisaasa; ta gaadiya minthaasa.
22.38: Ta morketa yedethada mentherethas; enti dhayonna de7ishin guye simmike.
22.39: Enti zaaridi dendonna mela shocas; ta tohuwape garsan kundidosona.
22.40: Olas taw wolqa dancisadasa; ta morketa taw gulbatisadasa.
22.41: Ta morketa ta sinthafe baqatisadasa; tana ixeyisata dhaysas.
22.42: Maade koyidi waassidosona; shin oonika enta ashshibeenna. Godaa enti xeegidosona; shin I entaw koybeenna.
22.43: Taani enta baanada liiqisas; oge urqada enta yedhas.
22.44: Makalla ta asaape tana ashshadasa; kawotethata bolla tana shuumadasa; ta eronna asay taw haaretis.
22.45: Allaga derey tana aaddashees; ta woriya si7idi taw kiitetoosona.
22.46: Enti wolqa dhayidosona; banta miixape kokorishe keyidi yoosona.
22.47: Goday de7on de7ees! Ta zaallay anjeto. Tana ashshiya zaallay dhoqu dhoqu go.
22.48: I ta haluwa keyiya Xoossaa; kawotethata taape garsan haarisees.
22.49: Ta morketape tana ashshees; ta morketa bolla tana dhoqu dhoqu oothaasa; Oda medhiya asape tana ashshaasa.
22.50: Abeeti Godaw taani kawotethata giddon nena galatana; ne sunthaa yexana.
22.51: Xoossay ba kawas gita xoono immees; ba tiyida Dawitasinne iya kochaas, merinaa siiquwa bessees.

23.1: Haysi Dawiti wursetha haasaya. Isseye na7aa Dawita wuresethay haysa; I Yayqooba Xoossan tiyetidaysa; Xoossay iya dhoqu dhoqu oothidaysa; Isra7eelen lo77o mazmure yexeysa.
23.2: “Godaa Ayyaanay ta baggara odees; iya qaalay ta inxarsan de7ees.
23.3: Isra7eele Xoossay taw odis; Isra7eele Zaallay haysada yaagis. ‘Xillotethan haariya kawoy, Xoossa yashshan aysiya kawoy,
23.4: I shaari bayna guura doliya xalqe poo7o mela. I iri bukidi aadhin, biittafe maata dolisiya booqalsa mela.’
23.5: Tuma ta keetha asay Xoossa sinthan suure; I taara merinaw caaqis; ha caaqoy giigidi, minnidinne naagetidi de7ees. Xoossay taw xoono immana; ta amotidaba ubbaa I tuma polana.
23.6: Shin iita asati ubbay kushen shiishanaw hanonna agunthada wora holetana.
23.7: Agunthu bochiya oonika wale woyko xam7a ba kushen oykanaw koshshees; hessi ba de7iya bessan eexana” yaagis. Dawitara De7iya Mino Asata (1 Taari 11:10-41)
23.8: Mino Dawita asata sunthay haysafe kaallidi de7eyisata. Koyroy, Takmoona yeleta gidida Yoseeb-Bestibeete geetetees; I heedzata halaqa; issi toho olan ba tooran hospun xeetu asi wodhis.
23.9: Heedzatape issoy, iya kaalliya nam7anthoy, Ahoha sheeshi gidida Dodo na7aa Alaazara. Issi gallas inne Dawiti olas shiiqida Filisxeemeta mandidosona; Isra7eele asay guye simmis.
23.10: Shin I ba bessan minni eqidi, iya kushey argaacidi mashshaara oyketana gakanaw Filisxeemeta shocis. He gallas Goday gita xoono immis. Olay eqin, olanchoti Alaazarako simmidi yidosona; shin enti hayqida Filisxeemetape ola ma7o qaaridosonape attishin, haraba oothibookona.
23.11: Iyape kaalley qassi Arooda yeleta gidida Aga na7aa Saama. Issi gallas Filisxeemeti misirey kumida shooqan, Leehi geetetiya bessan shiiqin, Isra7eeleti enta sinthafe baqatidosona.
23.12: Shin Saami shooqa giddon murti eqidi oletis. Filisxeemeta wodhis; he gallas Goday wolqaama xoono immis.
23.13: Katha caka wode hastamu mino asatape heedzati Adulaama gongoluwa Dawitako bidosona. He wode Filisxeeme olanchoti Raafayme zangaaran dunkaanidosona.
23.14: He wode Dawiti miixan de7ees; Filisxeeme olanchota cugay qassi Beetelemen olla kambe de7ees.
23.15: Dawiti haathe uyanaw amotidi, “Beeteleme katamaa pengiya matan de7iya olape haathe tana oone ushshanay” yaagis.
23.16: Ha heedzu mino asati Filisxeeme olanchota gutaa kanthidi, Beeteleme katama pengen de7iya ollafe haathe duuqidi Dawitas ehidosona. Shin I uyonna ixidi, Godaa sinthan tigidi,
23.17: “Abeeti Godaw, haysa uyanaysi taape haako! Ha haatha banta shempuwa bayzidi ehida asata suuthu gidennee?” yaagidi uyonna ixis. Ha heedzu mino asati haysa oothidosona.
23.18: Xaruya na7aa Iyo7aaba ishay Abisi hastamata halaqa; I heedzu xeetu asata ba tooran olidi wodhis; ika heedzatada eretis.
23.19: I hastamatape aadhidi bonchetida asi; I heedzata mela eretida asi gidonna ixikoka hastamatas halaqa.
23.20: Qabxi7eela yeleta gidida Yoodahe na7ay Banayasi mino ooso oothida gita asi. I nam7u eretida Moo7abe asata wodhis. Issi wode shachi wodhiya gallas ollan wodhidi gaammo wodhis.
23.21: Qassi issi gita Gibxe addiya wodhis; Gibxe addey toora oykis; shin I xam7a oykidi iyako bidi, iya kushepe toora dafi ekidi, iya toorara iya wodhis.
23.22: Yoodahe na7ay Banayasi haysa oothis; iya sunthay heedzataysada eretis.
23.23: I hastamata giddon daro bonchetida asi, shin I heedzata taybuwan deenna. Dawiti iya bana naagiya wotaadaretas tora mocona oothis.
23.24: He hastamata giddon de7eysati, Iyo7aaba ishaa Asaheela, Beeteleme yeleta gidida Dooda na7aa Eliyaana,
23.26: Falxa yara gidida Selesa, Taqoha addiya Esika na7aa Irasa,
23.27: Anatoote yeleta gidida Abi7ezera, Kuussa yeleta gidida Mabunaya,
23.29: Naxoofa yeleta gidida Mahirayanne Ba7ana na7aa Heleba. Biniyaame biittan, Gib7a yeleta gidida Ribaaya na7aa Itaya,
23.30: Phir7atoona yeleta gidida Banaya, Ga7aasa zangaara matape yida Hidaya,
23.31: Araba yeleta gidida Abalboona, Barhuuma addiya Azmoota,
23.32: Sha7alboona yeleta gidida Eliyaaba, Asana nayta, Yoonataana,
23.33: Arooda yeleta gidida Saamanne Shaara na7aa Ahi7aama,
23.34: Ma7ika yeleta gidida Ahasbaya na7aa Elfalaxa, Gilo yeleta gidida Akxoofela na7aa Eli7aama,
23.35: Qarmeloosa yeleta gidida Hexira, Araba yeleta gidida Pa7aara,
23.36: Suubba yeleta gidida Naatana na7aa Yigi7aala, Gaade yeleta gidida Baana,
23.37: Amoone yeleta gidida Seleqa, Xaruya na7aa Iyo7aaba ola miishiya tookiya Ba7eroota yeleta gidida Nahiraya,
23.39: Hite addiya Ooriyoona. Enti kumethi hastamanne laapuna.

24.1: Godaa hanqoy qassika Isra7eele bolla eexis; Goday Dawita enta bolla denthethidi, “Bada Isra7eelenne Yihuda asaa tayba” yaagis.
24.2: Hessa gisho, kawoy tora moconata Iyo7aabanne baara de7eysatako haysada yaagis; “Isra7eele kochata Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw taani erana mela Isra7eele asaa bidi taybite” yaagis.
24.3: Shin Iyo7aabi, “Goday ne Xoossay ha de7iya asaa bolla xeetu kushe gujo! Hessa ta godaa, kawa ayfey be7o! Shin ta goday, kawoy ayis hessa melaba oothanaw koyii?” yaagis.
24.4: Shin kawa qaalay Iyo7aabanne tora moconata xoonin, enti kawa sinthafe keyidi, Isra7eele asaa taybanaw bidosona.
24.5: Enti Yordaanose pinnidi dugeha baggan de7iya, zangaara giddon de7iya Aro7eera kataman dunkaanidosona; yaape Gaade kanthidi Iyazeera gakidosona.
24.6: Yaape enti Galadanne Hiteta biittan de7iya Qaadesa bidosona; yaape qassi Daane bidosona; yaara Sidoona gakidosona.
24.7: Yaape dendidi, Xiroosa miixanne Hiwetanne Kanaaneta katamaa ubbaa bidosona. Wursethan Yihuda Negeban de7iya Barsaabe bidosona.
24.8: Enti biitta ubbaa yuuyishe uddufun ageenanne laatamu gallas gam7idi, Yerusalaame simmidosona.
24.9: Iyo7aabi asaa taybuwa kawa erisis; Isra7eelen mashshan oletanaw danda7iya hospun xeetu mukulu mino olanchoti, Yihudan qassi ichashu xeetu mukulu olanchoti de7oosona.
24.10: Asaa taybidaape guye, Dawita wozanay hirgin, Dawiti, “Taani ha oosuwan gita nagara oothas. Shin ha77i abeeti Godaw, taani nena woossayis; ta nagaraa, ne aylliya nagaraa atto ga. Taani daro boozaba hanas” yaagis.
24.11: Wontetha gallas Dawiti hiixape dendiya wode Dawitas qoncethi be7iya, nabiya Gaadeko Godaa qaalay yis.
24.12: “Bada, Dawitako, ‘Taani nena heedzubaape issuwa doorana mela bessayis; taani ne bolla polanaw entafe issuwa doora’ yaagees Goday” yaagis.
24.13: Gaadi Dawitako bidi, “Heedzu laythi ne biitta bolla kosha ehoyee? Woyko ne morketi nena yedethin, heedzu ageena enta sinthafe baqataneyee? Woyko ne biitta bolla heedzu gallas gadoy yaanaysa dooray? Ane ha77i qopada taani tana kiittidaysas zaaranaba oda” yaagis.
24.14: Dawiti Gaadeko, “Taani daro un7etas. Godaa maarotay gita gidiya gisho, nuuni iya kushen kundana; tana asa kushen yeggofo” yaagis.
24.15: Hessa gisho, wontafe bidi I gida gallasay gakanaw Goday Isra7eele biittan gado kiittis. Isra7eele biittan Daanepe bidi Barsaabe gakanaw laapun tammu mukulu asi hayqis.
24.16: Yerusalaame dhaysanaw kiitanchoy ba kushiya miccida wode asaa bolla gakida gadoy Godaa azzanthida gisho, asaa shociya kiitanchuwako, “Gidana! Ne kushiya zara” yaagis. Godaa kiitanchoy he wode Yaabuse addiya Orna wudumman de7ees.
24.17: Asaa shociya kiitanchuwa Dawiti be7ida wode Godaako, “Nagaraa oothiday tana; ta balas! Ha dorsati ay oothidona? Hayyana, tananne ta aawa soo asaa ne seerana mela taani woossayis” yaagis. Dawiti Yarsho Bessi Giigisis
24.18: He gallas Gaadi Dawitako yidi, “Bada, Yaabuse addiya Orna wudumman Godaas yarsho bessi giigisa” yaagis.
24.19: Dawiti, Goday Gaade baggara kiittidaysada oothanaw pude bis.
24.20: Orni duge xeelliya wode, kawoynne iya asati baako yeysa be7is. I gaxa keyidi, gufannidi kawas ziggis.
24.21: Orni, “Ta goday kawoy ba aylliyako, ayis yidee?” yaagis. Dawiti, “Asaa bollafe gadoy simmana mela taani Godaas yarsho bessi giigisanaw ne wudumma shammanaw yas” yaagis.
24.22: Orni, “Ta goday, kawoy ba koydaba ekidi yarsho! Xuussa yarshos boorati de7oosona; eeso mithas qassi kathi bukiya miisheynne boora qambari de7ees.
24.23: Kawaw, haysa ubbaa Orni kawas immis” yaagis. Gujidi Orni, “Goday ne Xoossay ne yarshuwa eko” yaagis.
24.24: Shin kawoy, “Akay, taani ta miishen shammana. Ta Godaa, Xoossaas xuussa yarsho gatey bayna yarshike” yaagis. Hessa gisho, kawoy wudummaanne boorata Ornafe ishatamu bira santimen shammis.
24.25: Dawiti he bessan yarsho bessi giigisidi xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho Godaas yarshis. Goday biitta gisho woosetida woosa si7idi, gaduwa Isra7eelepe diggis.

1.1: Kawoy Dawiti daro cimidi wode sugis. Iya aylleti ma7o iya bolla doorinka iya ho77onna ixis.
1.2: Hessa gisho, iya moorinnati, “Kawa matan daana melanne iya heemmana mela issi geela7o nu new koyana. Nu godaa kawa ho7ethanaw iya matan zin7anaw danda7awusu” yaagidosona.
1.3: Enti Isra7eele biitta ubban koyidi Abisa geetetiya issi mala lo77o geela7o Sunaama katamaape demmidi, kawas ehidosona.
1.4: He geela7iya daro mala lo77o. Iya kawa heemmasunne iyaw oothasu; shin kawoy iira aqi erenna.
1.5: Haagita na7ay Adooni, “Ta kawotanaw koyayis” yaagidi dendis; para gaareta, paratanne ba sinthan woxiya ishatamu asata giigisis.
1.6: Iya aaway, “Ne haysa ayis oothay?” gidi iya oychi erenna. Adoniyaasi daro mala lo77o; I Abeseloome kaallidi yeletis.
1.7: Adoniyaasi Xaruya na7aa Iyo7abaranne kahiniya Abyataarara zoretin, enti iya maaddanaw giigidosona.
1.8: Shin kahiniya Saadoqi, Yoodahe na7ay Banayi, nabiya Naatani, Saami, Resimnne Dawita naageysati Adoniyaasara dookona.
1.9: Issi gallas Adoniyaasi Enrogeela pultuwa matan Zoheleta Zaalla geetetiya bessan dorsata, mehetanne marata yarshis. Kawo nayta ba ishata ubbaanne kawas oothiya Yihuda asata ubbaa ba yarsho bessa xeegis.
1.10: Shin nabey Naatana, Banaya, kawa naageysatanne ba isha Solomone xeegibeenna.
1.11: Hessafe guye, Naatani Solomone aayiw Barsaabeko bidi, “Nu goday, Dawiti eronna de7ishin, Haagita na7ay Adoniyaasi kawotidaysa ne si7abikii?
1.12: Ne ne shempuwanne ne na7aa Solomone shempuwa waatada ashshaneko ta nena zorayis.
1.13: Kawa Dawitako gelada, ‘Ta godaw, Kawaw tuma, taape guye ne na7ay Solomoney kawotana; I ta araatan uttana’ yaagada taw ne ayllees caaqabikii? Yaatin, Adoniyaasi waanidi kawotidee?
1.14: Neeni kawuwara haasayishin ta gelada, ne oday tuma gideysa odana” yaagis.
1.15: Barsaaba kawa haasayisanaw I de7iya keethaa gelasu; Sunaamape yida Abisa kawa heemmawusu.
1.16: Barsaaba kawa sinthan bonchon som7uwa sa7a gathada ziggasu. Kawoy, “Ay koyadii?” yaagidi oychis.
1.17: Iya, “Ta godaw, taw ne ayllees, ‘Taape guye ne na7ay Solomoney kawotana; I ta araatan uttana’ gada Godan, ne Xoossan, taw caaqadasa.
1.18: Heko, ha77i Adoniyaasi kawotis; ne ta goday, kawoy hessa eraka.
1.19: I daro meheta, maratanne dorsata yarshidi, kawa nayta ubbaa, kahiniya Abyataaranne toora mocona Iyo7aaba xeegis; shin ne aylliya Solomone xeegibeenna.
1.20: Ta godaw kawaw, ta godaape kawuwape guye ooni ne araatan uttaneeko eranaw Isra7eele asa ubbaa ayfey nena xeellees.
1.21: Hessi hanonna ixiko ta goday kawoy hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetiya wode tanne ta na7ay Solomoney daafaba oothida asada taybetana” yaagasu.
1.22: Barsaaba buroo kawuwara haasayishin, nabey Naatani kawo keethi gakis.
1.23: Nabey yidaysa asay kawas odidosona. Naatani kawa sinthe aadhidi, ba som7uwa sa7a gathidi ziggis.
1.24: Naatani, “Ta godaw kawaw, neepe guye Adoniyaasi kawotanaysanne ne araatan uttanaysa odadii?
1.25: Hachi I daro meheta, maratanne dorsata yarshidi, kawa nayta ubbaa, toora moconatanne kahiniya Abyataara xeegis. Enti ha77i iyara mishenne uyishe, ‘Kawoy Adoniyaasi birata tuussi gido’ yaagishe de7oosona.
1.26: Shin tana ne aylliya, kahiniya Saadoqa, Yoodahe na7aa Banayanne ne aylliya Solomone xeegibeenna.
1.27: Haysi ta godaa kawuwape guye iya araatan ooni uttaneeko ba aylleta erisonna de7ishe ta goday kawoy oothidabayee?” yaagis. Dawiti Solomone Kawothis
1.28: Kawoy Dawiti, “Barsaabo taw xeegite” yaagin kawoy de7iya bessaa gelada iya sinthan eqasu.
1.29: He wode kawoy, “Tana meto ubbaafe ashshida Goday eriya mela.
1.30: Godan, Isra7eele Xoossan ta new caaqida caaquwa tuma hachi polana; taape guye ne na7ay Solomoney kawotana; ta araatan, I ta bessan uttana” yaagidi caaqis.
1.31: Barsaaba kawa sinthan ba som7uwa sa7a gathada ziggada, “Ta goday, Kawoy Dawiti merinaw kawoto!” yaagasu.
1.32: Hessafe guye Kawoy Dawiti, “Taw kahiniya Saadoqa, nabiya Naatananne Yoodahe na7aa Banaya xeegite” yaagin, enti gelidi, kawa sinthan eqidosona.
1.33: Kawoy “Ta aylleta hintera ekidi bidi, ta na7aa Solomone ta toggiya baquluwa togisidi, Giyoone pultuwako efite.
1.34: Yan kahiniya Saadoqinne nabiya Naatani iya tiyidi Isra7eele bolla kawoyo. Moyze punnishe, hinte qaala dhoqu oothidi, ‘Kawoy Solomoney birata tuussu gido’ yaagite.
1.35: Hinte iya ajabidi iyara biite; I ta araatan uttidi, ta bessan kawoto. Taani Isra7eelenne Yihuda haariya asi oothada iya shuumas” yaagis.
1.36: Yoodahe na7aa Banayi zaaridi, “Amin7i! Goday, ta godaa kawa Xoossay hessa polo!
1.37: Goday ta godaara kawuwara gididaysada Solomonera gido; iya araata ta godaa Kawa Dawita araatape aathidi gitayo” yaagis.
1.38: Hessa gisho, kahiney Saadoqi, nabey Naatani, Yoodahe na7ay Banayinne kawa naageysati Solomone Kawoy Dawiti toggiya baquluwa togisidi, Giyoone efidosona.
1.39: Kahiney Saadoqi Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape zayte kacen tigi ekidi, Solomone tiyidi kawothis. Enti moyze punnin, asa ubbay ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Kawoy Solomoney merinaw kawoto!” yaagidosona.
1.40: Asa ubbay iya kaallidi bidosona; enti biitti qaaxana gakanaw suusul7e punnishenne durishe daro ufaytidosona.
1.41: Adoniyaasinne iyara de7iya imathati gibira midi wursishe hessa si7idosona. Iyo7aabi Moyze puno si7idi, “Ha kataman si7etiya wocama girsay aybee?” yaagidi oychis.
1.42: I buroo odetishin, kahiniya Abyataara na7ay Yoonataani gaki wodhis. Adoniyaasi, “Ane haa gela. Ne mela lo77o asi lo77o wore ehonna aggenna” yaagis.
1.43: Yoonataani, “Akay, taani lo77o wore ehabike! Nu goday Kawoy Dawiti Solomone kawothis.
1.44: Iya ajabana mela kawoy kahiniya Saadoqa, nabiya Naatana, Yoodahe na7aa Banayanne kawa naageysata iyara yeddis; enti kawoy toggiya baquluwa iya togisidosona.
1.45: Kahiney Saadoqinne nabey Naatani, Giyoone pultuwa matan iya tiyidi kawothidosona; enti ililishenne durishe bidosona; kataman si7etiya girsay hessa.
1.47: Hessa bollaka, kawa moorinnati nu godaa Kawa Dawitako shiiqidi, ‘Ne Xoossay Solomone sunthaa neysafe aathidi kesso; iya araata neysafe aathidi gitayo!’ yaagidi anjidosona. Kawoy ba algan de7ishe hokidi Xoossa goyinnis.
1.48: Gujidika, ‘Ta bessan kawothidi, ta araatan utisidi, tana hachi ta ayfen bessiya Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto!’ ” yaagis.
1.49: Adoniyaasa imathati ubbay hessa si7ida wode dagammidi, laaletidosona.
1.50: Adoniyaasi Solomone yayyidi, yarsho bessa kaceta oykidi woossis.
1.51: Asay Solomone, “Adoniyaasi Kawa Solomone yayyidi, yarsho bessa kaceta oykidi, ‘Kawoy Solomoney tana ba aylliya mashshan wodhike gidi hachi taw caaqo’ ” yaagees gidi odidosona.
1.52: Solomoney zaaridi, “I ba hanuwa loythiko, hari attoshin iya huuphe binaanape issoyka boshetenna; shin iyan iitatethi bentiko I hayqana” yaagis.
1.53: Kawoy Solomoney, Adoniyaasa yarsho bessaafe ehana mela ase kiittis. Adoniyaasi yidi, Solomones ziggis; Solomoney iyako, “Ne soo ba” yaagis.

2.1: Dawitas hayqiya wodey matin, ba na7aa Solomone haysada yaagidi kiittis;
2.2: “Ta hayqiya wodey matis. Hessa gisho, minna; ase gida.
2.3: Goday ne Xoossay kiittidaba naaga; iya ogiyan hemeta; Muse maxaafan xaafetida iya awaajuwa, iya kiitaa, iya higgiyanne iya wogaa naaga. Hessa ne oothiko, ne oothiyaba ubbaynne ne biya bessa ubbay new injetana.
2.4: Goday, ‘Ne kochati banta de7uwan naagetidi de7iko, enti ta sinthan banta kumetha wozanapenne banta kumetha shempuwafe ammanetidi hemetiko, Isra7eele araatan uttiya asi new dhayenna’ ” yaagida ufaysa qaala taw polana.
2.5: Gujidika, “Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi Isra7eele nam7u toora moconata Neera na7aa Abeneeranne Yetera na7aa Amaasa wodhidi, I oothidaba ne eraasa. Hessika, oli baynashin saro wode enta wodhidi, he suuthan ba xeessaa saqiyanne ba tohuwa caammaa tiyis.
2.6: Ne iya ne cincatethaada ootha; I ceeggidi saro hayqanaada oothofa.
2.7: “Shin taani ne isha Abeseloomepe baqatiya wode enti taw miye gidida gisho, Galada biittan de7iya Barzile naytas keehaba ootha; enti ne gaytape miya asaara mo.
2.8: “Taani Mahanayma katama bida wode tana iita baadethi baaddida Biniyaame biittan Biraqima katamape yida Geera na7aa Saami neera de7eysa qopa. I taara gahetanaw Yordaanose Shaafa yida wode, ‘Ta nena wodhike’ gada Godan iyaw caaqas.
2.9: Shin ha77i neeni iya xillo asada taybopa. Ne cinca asi gidiya gisho ay oothaneko eraasa. Ne he cima addiya suuthara mooga” yaagis.
2.10: Dawiti hayqidi, ba mayzatan gahetis; ba kataman moogetis.
2.11: Dawiti Isra7eele bolla oytamu laythi kawotis; Kebroonan laapun laythi, Yerusalaamen hastamanne heedzu laythi kawotis.
2.12: Solomoney ba aawa Dawita araatan uttis; iya kawotethay daro minnis. Solomone Araatay Minnis
2.13: Haagita na7ay Adoniyaasi, Solomone aaye Barsaabiko bin Barsaaba, “Ne taako saro yadii?” yaagada iya oychasu. I, “Ee; saro yas” yaagidi zaaris.
2.14: Gujidika, “Taani nena oychiyabay de7ees” yaagis. Iya, “Oycha” yaagasu.
2.15: Adoniyaasi, “Kawotanaw bessey tana gideysanne Isra7eele asa ubbay tana bantaw kawoda xeelleysa neeni, ne huuphen eraasa. Shin hanoy Xoossafe gidida gisho oday laametin kawotethay ta ishaako yuuyis.
2.16: Ha77i taani nena issiba oychana. Hayyana tana yeellayopa” yaagis. Iya, “Oycha” yaagasu.
2.17: I, “Kawoy Solomoney nena ixas geenna; hessa gisho, Sunaama maccasiw Abiso taw macho oothada ekana mela hayyana taw iya oycharki” yaagis.
2.18: Barsaaba, “Daro lo77o; ta hessa kawas odana” yaagasu.
2.19: Hessa gisho, Barsaabey Adoniyaasa kiitaa odanaw Solomoneko gelin, kawoy dendi eqidi, iw ziggis. Ba araatan uttis; ba aayes hara araata ehisidi, baape ushacha baggan utisis.
2.20: Barsaaba, “Ta nena issi guuthaba oychiyabay de7ees; hayyana tana yeellayopa” yaagasu. Kawoy zaaridi, “Ta aaye, oycha. Ta nena yeellayike” yaagis.
2.21: Iya, “Sunaama maccasiw Abiso ne ishay Adoniyaasi macho oothidi ekanaw koyiya gisho iyaw immarki” yaagasu.
2.22: Kawoy Solomoney zaaridi, “Sunaama maccasiw Abiso ne Adoniyaasi ayis oychay? I ta bayraa gidennee? Neeni iyaw kawotethi ayis oychikii? Qassi kahiniya Abyataarinne Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi iyara de7oosona gidokona?”
2.23: Kawoy Solomoney Godan caaqidi, “Adoniyaasi haysa oychida gisho taani iya wodhonna ixiko, Goday tana pirdo!
2.24: Tana, ta aawa Dawita araatan utisidi, ta kawotethaa minthi essidi, ta kochatas ba qaala polida Goday eriya mela, Adoniyaasi hachi hayqana!” yaagis.
2.25: Kawoy Solomoney Yoodahe na7a Banaya kiittin, I bidi Adoniyaasa shocidi wodhis.
2.26: Hessafe guye, kawoy Solomoney, kahiniya Abyataarako, “Neeni ne biitta Anatoota ba. Neeni hayqanaw bessaasa, shin ta nena wodhike. Neeni ta aawa Dawita sinthan Ubbaa Haariya Godaa Taabotiya tookadasa; qassi ta aawa metuwa ubbaa iyara ekadasa” yaagis.
2.27: Solomoney, Abyataari Godaa kahine gidida bessaafe diggidi, Goday Seelon Eele soo asaas odida qaala polis.
2.28: Abeseloome ixidi, Adoniyaasa maaddida Iyo7aaba ha oday gakin, baqatidi Godaa Dunkaaniyako bidi, yarsho bessa kaceta oykis.
2.29: Iyo7aabi baqatidi Godaa Dunkaaniyako bidi, yarsho bessa matan de7eysa kawa Solomoney si7ida wode, Yoodahe na7aa Banaya, “Bada iya wodha” gidi kiittis.
2.30: Banayi Godaa Dunkaaniya giddo gelidi Iyo7aabako, “Kawoy nena ha bessaafe keya gees” yaagis. Shin I zaaridi, “Keyike! Ta haysan hayqana” yaagis. Banayi, bidi Iyo7aabi gidaysa kawas odis.
2.31: Kawoy, “I gidaysada iya ootha; iya wodhada mooga! Iyo7aabi xillo asaa suuthu gussida daafape tananne ta aawa soo asaa geeshshaasa.
2.32: I gussida suuthaa acuwa Goday iyaw qanxana. I, ta aawa Dawiti eronnashin, baape xillo gidida nam7u asata mashshan wodhis. Isra7eele toora moconay, Neera na7ay Abeneerinne Yihuda toora moconay Yetera na7ay Amaasi, suure asi shin wodhis.
2.33: Iyo7aabi ha asata wodhida gisho, enta suuthaa acoy merinaw Iyo7aaba bollanne iya kochaa bolla wodho. Dawita bollanne iya soo asaa bolla, iya kochaa bollanne iya araata bolla merinaw Godaa saroy gido” yaagis.
2.34: Hessa gisho, Yoodahe na7ay Banayi keyidi, Iyo7aaba shocidi wodhin, I mela biittan de7iya ba gaden moogetis.
2.35: Kawoy Yoodahe na7aa Banaya Iyo7aaba bessan toora mocona oothidi shuumis; qassi Abyataara bessan kahiniya Saadoqa shuumis.
2.36: Hessafe guye, Kawoy Solomoney Saama xeegidi, “New Yerusalaamen keethe keexada, yan de7a; hara soo awuka boopa.
2.37: Ne katamaape keyada, Qediroona Zangaara pinnida gallas hayqanaysa era. Ne suuthaa gomey nena oykana” yaagis.
2.38: Saamii zaaridi, “Neeni geysi lo77o; taani ne aylley ne ta goday kawoy gidaysada oothana” yaagis. Saamii Yerusalaamen daro wode de7is.
2.39: Shin heedzu laythafe guye, Saami aylletape nam7ati Ma7ika na7aa, Gaate kawa Ankusako bidi, “Ne aylleti Gaaten de7oosona” gidi Saamas odidosona.
2.40: I ba hariya kooridi, ba aylleta koyanaw Ankusako Gaate bidi, yaape ba aylleta zaaridi ehis.
2.41: Saamii Yerusalaamepe Gaate bidi simmiidaysa Solomoney si7ida wode,
2.42: Saama xeegidi, “Neeni Yerusalaamepe hara soo bida wode hayqanaysa era” gada ta nena Godan caaqisabikina? He wode neeni, “Ne geysi lo77o; ero, ta kiitetana” gadasa.
2.43: Yaatin, “Godan caaqida caaquwanne ta kiitaa ayis naagabikii?
2.44: Ta aawa Dawita bolla ne oothida iita ooso ubbaa ne wozanay erees. Ne oothida iita oosuwa Goday new zaarana.
2.45: Shin Kawoy Solomoney anjetana; Dawita araatay Godaa sinthan merinaw saro daana” yaagis.
2.46: Kawoy, Yoodahe na7aa Banaya kiittin, I bidi, Saami shocidi wodhis. Yaatin, kawotethay Solomone kushen minnidi attis.

3.1: Solomoney Gibxe kawara bollotidi, iya na7iw baw macho ekis. Ba kawo gadho, Xoossa keethaanne Yerusalaame yuushuwa dirsa gimbidi ongana gakanaw iyo Dawita Kataman wothis.
3.2: Godaa sunthan Xoossa keethay buroo keexetiboonna gisho asay he wode dhoqa goyinno bessan yarshishe gam7is.
3.3: Solomoney Godaa dosiya ba aawa Dawita wogan hemetis. Shin dhoqa goyinno bessan yarshishenne ixaane cuyisishe gam7is.
3.4: Kawoy yarsho yarshanaw Gaba7oona bis; he bessay hara ubbaafe aadhidi koshshiya dhoqa goyinno bessi. Solomoney mukulu mehe ehidi, he yarsho bessan xuussa yarsho yarshis.
3.5: Goday Solomones Gaba7oonan qamma amuhon qoncidi, “Ta new ay immana mela koyay?” yaagis.
3.6: Solomoney, “Ne aylley, ta aaway Dawiti new ammanetida, xillonne suure asi gidida gisho, neeni iya dosadasa. Neeni ha keehatethan, hachi iya araatan uttiya adde na7aa iyaw immadasa.
3.7: “Abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw, neeni tana ne aylliya, ta aawa Dawita bessan kawothadasa. Shin taani guutha na7a gidiya gisho, asaa waatada kaalethaneeko erike.
3.8: Taani, ne aylley ne doorida asaa giddoninne tayboy bayna asaa giddon de7ayis.
3.9: Hessa gisho, taani ne asaa aysanaw lo77onne iita shaakada erana mela taw ne aylliyas akeeka wozana imma. Hessi hanonna ixiko, ha ne gita asaa ooni kaalethanaw danda7ii?” yaagis.
3.10: Solomoney hessa oychida gisho, Goday ufaytis.
3.11: Xoossay iyako, “Neeni new laythi aduqana mela woyko dure gidanaw woyko ne morketi hayqana mela oychonashin, ha asaa suure pirdan aysiya cincatethi oychida gisho,
3.12: Heko, ne oychidaysa ta new immana. Haysafe kase ne meli baynaysada hizape guye ne mali dendonnaada cincatethinne akeeka wozana new immana.
3.13: Qassi ne oychonabaaka ta new immana; neeni de7ida laytha ubban hara kawoy demmonna duretethaanne bonchuwa ta new immana.
3.14: Ne aaway Dawiti hemetidaysada ta ogiyan ne hemetiko, ta woganne ta kiitaa naagiko, ta ne laytha adussana” yaagis.
3.15: Solomoney dhiskofe barkidi, Heko, Xoossay iyaw amuhon odidaysa akeekis. I, Yerusalaame simmidi, Godaa caaqo taabotiya sinthan eqidi, xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho yarshis. Yaatidi, ba moorinnatas gibira giigisis. Solomoney Suure Pirdis
3.16: Issi gallas nam7u layma maccasati kawa Solomoneko yidi, iya sinthan eqidosona.
3.17: Entafe issinniya, “Ta godaw, taaninne ha asiya issi keethan de7oos. Yan iya taara issife de7ishin, ta issi na7a yelas.
3.18: Ta na7ay yeletida heedzantho gallas ha maccasiyaka issi na7a yelasu. He keethan nuupe, nam7aafe hara asi oonika baawa.
3.19: “Issi qamma iya bana na7aa bolla zin7ida gisho, ha maccase na7ay hayqis.
3.20: Iya qamma dendada, taani, ne aylliya dhiskidashin, ta na7aa ta miyepe ekada, ba ki7on wothada, ba hayqida na7aa ta ki7on wothasu.
3.21: Wonta taani ta na7aa dhanthanaw dendiya wode, Heko hayqis. Shin taani wonta poo7on tishshi oothada xeelliya wode, Heko, ta na7aa gidenna” yaagasu.
3.22: Hanko maccasiya, “Akay, paxa de7eysi ta na7aa; hayqidaysi ne na7aa” yaagasu. Shin koyro maccasiya zaarada, “Akay, hayqidaysi ne na7aa; paxa de7eysi ta na7aa” yaagasu. Hessada gidi enti kawa sinthan palamidosona.
3.23: Kawoy Solomoney, “Ha maccasiya, ‘Paxa de7iya na7ay taysa; hayqidaysi neysa’ yaagawusu; hankiyaka, ‘Akay, ne na7ay hayqidaysa; ta na7ay paxa de7eysa’ yaagawusu” yaagis.
3.24: Kawoy, “Taw mashsha ekidi yiite” yaagin, enti iyaw mashsha ehidosona.
3.25: Kawoy, “Paxa de7iya na7aa nam7u kessidi qanxidi; issi baggaa hannis immite; issi baggaa hinnis immite” yaagis.
3.26: Paxa de7iya na7ay ibaa gidida maccasiya ba na7aas mishetada, “Ta godaw, paxa de7iya na7aa iw imma! iya wodhopa” yaagasu. Shin hankiya, “Tawka newuka gidopo; nam7u keyidi qanxeto” yaagasu.
3.27: Kawoy, “Na7aa wodhopite; ha paxa de7iya na7aa ha koyro maccasees immite; na7aa aayiya iyo” yaagidi pirdis.
3.28: Isra7eele asa ubbay kawoy pirdida pirdaa si7ida wode, enti kawa daro bonchidosona. Asaas xillotethan pirdanaw iyaw cincatethi Xoossafe imetidaysa be7idosona.

4.1: Kawoy Solomoney Isra7eele biitta ubbaa bolla kawotis.
4.2: I shuumida asay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; Saadoqa na7ay Azaariyasi kahine;
4.3: Shiisha nayti Elihorefinne Akiyi waanna xaafeta; Ahiluda na7ay Iyosaafexi taarike xaafe;
4.4: Yoodahe na7ay Banayi toora mocona; Saadoqinne Abyataari kahineta.
4.5: Naatana na7ay Azaariyasi deriya ayseysata halaqa; Naatana na7ay kahiney, Zabuudi kawa zoreysa;
4.6: Ahisaari kawo gadho halaqa; Abda na7ay Adonraami madda ootheyisata halaqa.
4.7: Qassi Solomones Isra7eele biittan tammanne nam7u dere aysiya halaqati de7oosona; enti kawasinne kawa son de7iya asa ubbaas miya katha eheyisata. Entafe issoy issoy laytha giddon issi issi ageena kathi ehees.
4.8: Enta sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetis. Benihuuri derey dariya Efreema biitta ayseysa.
4.9: Banxeqaari Maqaxa, Sha7albima, Beet-Sameesanne Elon-Beet-Hana katamata ayseysata.
4.10: Benihesedi Aruboota biitta ayseysa; Sooko biittaynne Hefeera biittay ubbay iyabaa.
4.11: Ben-Aminadaabi, Benafoota Doora biitta ayseysa; I Solomone na7iw Xaafato ekis.
4.12: Ahiluda na7ay Ba7ana, Tanakanne Magido katamata, Izira7eelepe garsan Xartaana matan de7iya Beet-Saana biitta ubbaa, Beet-Saanape bidi Abeel-Maholara kanthidi, Yoqima7aama pinthi gakanaw de7iya katamata aysees.
4.13: Bengibeeri Galadan Raamota katama, Galadan Minaase na7aa Ya7ira katamata, Baasanen Argoba biittanne yuushon gimbeynne gimbe pengetas naase birata liyooti de7iya usupun tammu katamata aysees.
4.14: Ido na7ay Ahinadaabi Mahanayma biitta aysees.
4.15: Akmaasi Niftaaleme biitta aysees; I Solomone na7iw Basmaato ekis.
4.16: Kuusa na7ay Ba7aani Aseera biittanne Baalota katamaa aysees.
4.17: Paruha na7ay Iyosaafexi Yisakoora biitta aysees.
4.18: Ela na7ay Saami Biniyaame biitta aysees.
4.19: Ure na7ay Gabeeri, Galada biittan Amoore kawoy Sihooninne Baasane kawoy Oogey kawotida biitta aysees; he biittata aysey iya xalaala. Solomone Duretetha
4.20: Yihuda asaynne Isra7eele asay abba gaxan de7iya shafeda daridosona; enti mishenne uyishe ufaytidi de7idosona.
4.21: Solomoney Efraxiisa Shaafape doomidi Filisxeeme biitta gakanaw, yaape kanthidi Gibxe zawa gakanaw de7iya kawotethata ubbaa haaris. He biitta asati iyaw giira giiridosona; iya de7o laytha ubban iyaw haaretidosona.
4.22: Solomones gallas gallas shiiqiya kathi; ishatamu kuntaale lo77o dhiille, xeetu kuntaale coo dhiille,
4.23: dhiiketida tammu sangata, yedan mida laatamu mehenne xeetu dorsata; qassi cofoshota, gaarata, gen7etanne orde kuttota koshshees.
4.24: Solomoney Efraxiisa Shaafape doloha baggara de7iya kawotethata ubbaa Tifisa katamaape doomidi Gaaza katamaa gakanaw haaris; ba yuushuwan de7iya biitta ubbaara saro de7is.
4.25: Iya de7o laytha ubban Yihuda asaynne Isra7eele asay Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw, ubbay ba woyne garsaninne balase garsan saro de7idosona.
4.26: Solomones ola para gaareta goochiya oytamu mukulu gaaxata paratinne tammanne nam7u mukulu para asati de7oosona.
4.27: He deriya ayseysati ageenan ageenan kawoy Solomoneynne iya gibira maanaw yida asa ubbay miyaba shiishosona. Enti iyape aybaka pacisokona.
4.28: Enti gaare paratinne hanko parati maanaw banganne peedhen enta gakida dalaa ehidi iya minja keethan wothidosona.
4.29: Xoossay Solomones cincatethi, akeekanne dalga wozana immis.
4.30: Solomone cincatethay doloha baggara de7iya asaa cincatethaafenne Gibxeta cincatethaafe aadhees.
4.31: I asa ubbaafe aadhiya cinca; iya cincatethay, Ezirahe addiya Etaanape, Mahoola nayta Hemaanape, Kalkolapenne Darda7ape aadhees. Iya sunthay yuushuwan de7iya kawotethata ubbaa gakis.
4.32: I heedzu mukulu leemisota odis; iya mazmureti issi mukulunne ichasha.
4.33: Solomoney Libaanose zigape doomidi, gimbe keetha bolla doliya hisoophe mithaa gakanaw leemisidi odis. Hessadaka, mehetaba, do7ataba, kafotaba, sa7ara gooshetiya medhetethataba molotaba tamaarsis.
4.34: Iya cincatethaa si7ida sa7an de7iya kawoti ubbay kiittin, kawotetha ubbaafe asay Solomone cincatethaa si7anaw yoosona.

5.1: Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami Dawitara sigan gam7ida gisho, Solomoney ba aawa Dawita bessan kawotanaw tiyetidaysa si7idi, ase Solomoneko kiittis.
5.2: Solomoney zaaridi,
5.3: “Goday iya morketa iya tohuwape garsan haarisana gakanaw, ta aawa Dawita bolla dendida olaa gaason, Godaa ba Xoossaa sunthaas Xoossa keethi keexiboonnaysa ne eraasa.
5.4: Shin ha77i Goday ta Xoossay taw shempo immis; taw ayba morkey woyko iitabaa oothey baawa.
5.5: Goday ta aawa Dawitas, ‘Taani ne bessan, ne araatan kawothiya ne na7ay ta sunthaas keethe keexana’ gidaysada taani Godaa ta Xoossa sunthaas keethi keexanaw halchas.
5.6: Hessa gisho, Libaanosepe ziga massiya asata yedda; ta asati ne asatara oothana. Ne asatas ne qanxa gidaba ta qanxana. Sidoona asatada mithaa masetha hiilla nu asay eronnaysa ne eraasa” yaagis.
5.7: Kiraami Solomone kiitaa si7idi daro ufaytis; “Ha gita kawotethaa haarana mela Dawitas ha cinca na7aa immida Goday galatetto” yaagis.
5.8: Hessafe guye Kiraami Solomoneko haysada yaagidi kiittis; “Ne kiitida kiitay tana gakis. Neeni koydaba taani oothana; ziganne xiidda ta new shiishana.
5.9: Ta asay duruma ciinetha Libaanosepe abbaako gaazana. Taani qashisada, abba bollara tooketidi ne koyiya bessi gathanaada oothana; yan enti birshidi ne asaas immana. Hessafe guye, neeni ne baggara ta kawo keethan de7iya asaas miyaba kiittada ta amuwa polana” yaagis.
5.10: Hessada oothidi Kiraami Solomoney koyida keena ziganne Xiidda immis.
5.11: Solomoney kawo keethan de7iya asay maana mela 20,000 kuntaale gistenne 400,000 litiro shamaho zayte laythan laythan paconna Kiraamas immis.
5.12: Goday Solomones immana gidaysada, iyaw cincatethi immis. Kiraaminne Solomoney banta giddon saro de7idosona; enti nam7ay banta giddon caaqidosona.
5.13: Kawoy Solomoney Isra7eele 30,000 madda ootheyisata dooridi kessis.
5.14: Adonraama geetetiya addiya enta bolla halaqa oothidi shuumis. He oosanchota tammu tammu mukulan shaakidi, heedzu cuga kessis; issi issi cugay taran taran bidi, issi ageena Libaanosen oothanaadanne nam7u ageena banta son daanada oothis.
5.15: Solomones tooho tookiya 70,000 asatinne shuchu qoo7iya 80,000 asati gezze biittan de7oosona.
5.16: Enta bolla halaqa gididi oosisiya 3,300 asata shuumis.
5.17: Kawa Solomone kiitan, Xoossa keethaa baasuwas gidana mela gita shuchata qoo7idi giigisidosona.
5.18: Solomone asaynne Kiraama asay kushe hiilla ereysati, Gebaala asaara gididi, Xoossa keethaa keexanaw mithi qanxidi, shuchaa qoo7idinne massidi giigisidosona.

6.1: Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida 480 laythan, Solomoney Isra7eele bolla kawotida oyddantho laythan, Ziifa geetetiya nam7antho ageenan, Solomoney Godaa Xoossaa keethi keexanaw doomis.
6.2: Solomoney keexida Xoossa keethay adussatethay usupun tammu wadha; gompay laatamu wadha; geesay hastamu wadha.
6.3: Xoossa keethi geliya bessan de7iya barandaa gompay Xoossaa keethaa gompaa mela laatamu wadha; keetha adussatethay Xoossa keetha geliya bessa gakanaw tammu wadha.
6.4: Xoossa keethaas soo baggara dalga, kare baggara xuuntha maskooteti de7oosona.
6.5: Xoossa keethaa matan, Geeshsha Bessaanne Ubbaafa Geeshsha Bessaa yuushuwan hara pooqe keexis; he yuushuwan kifileta keexis.
6.6: Koyro pooqiya gompay ichashu wadha; nam7antho pooqiya gompay usupun wadha; heedzantho pooqiya gompay laapun wadha. Issi issi pooqiya goday garsa baggara de7iya godaape lee7o. Geeshsha bessaa kanthidi gelonna mela xoossa keethaa godaas kare baggara teqe wothis.
6.7: Xoossa keethay shucha qoo7iya bessan masetida shucha xalaalan gimbetis; Xoossa keethay gimbetiya wode naariqa, kalta, woyko hara ay birata girsi Xoossa keethan si7etibeenna.
6.8: Garsara de7iya pooqiya geliya pengey Xoossa keethaafe dugeha baggara de7ees; he bessaafe nam7antho pooqiyanne heedzantho pooqiya baanaw yedhidi keyiya dethati de7oosona.
6.9: Hessada oothidi, Solomoney keetha keexidi wursis; kornisiya masetida ziga mithan kammis.
6.10: Xoossa keetha yuushuwan pooqeta keexidi ongis; enta issuwa issuwa geesay ichashu wadha gididi, godaara ziga mithan oyketis.
6.11: Goday Solomoneko,
6.12: “Ha neeni keexiya Xoossa keethan, neeni ta awaajuwa kaalliko, ta wogaa oothiko, ta kiita naagikonne ta kiitaa kiitetiko, taani ne aawa Dawitas immida ufaysa qaala ne baggara polana.
6.13: Taani Isra7eele asaa giddon daana; taani ta asaa Isra7eele aggike” yaagis.
6.14: Solomoney Xoossa keetha keexidi ongis.
6.15: Xoossaa keetha gaatha bagga godaa, wuygepe bidi kaara gakanaw masetida ziga mithan kammis; wuygiyan masetida xiidda mithi hiixis.
6.16: Xoossa keetha giddon Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa medhanaw guye baggara laatamu wadha gidiya besse shaakidi, wuygepe kaara gakanaw masetida ziga godaa essis.
6.17: He Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaafe sintha baggara de7iya wuygiya adussatethay oytamu wadha.
6.18: Xoossa keetha soo baggay gosenne ciishsha misiliya medhida masetida ziga mithan kametis; ubbay zigape oosetis; ay shuchika bentenna.
6.19: Solomoney Godaa caaqo taabotiya wothanaw Xoossa keetha giddon Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa giigisis.
6.20: Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessay laatamu wadha adusse, laatamu wadha dalganne laatamu wadha dhoqa. Solomoney he Ubbaafe Geshsha bessaa gaatha baggaa walahi bayna worqen lanxis; yarsho bessay masetida ziga mithan kametis.
6.21: Solomoney Xoossa keetha gidduwa walahi bayna worqen lanxis; worqan lanxetida qol7a geliya pengiya bolla yaanne haanne gakiya worqa santhalaata tolidi alleeqisis.
6.22: Keetha giddo baggaa worqan lanxis; Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa sinthan de7iya yarsho bessa worqan lanxis.
6.23: Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessan wothanaw issoy issoy tammu wadha aduqiya shamahope oosetida nam7u kiruube misileta massidi giigisis.
6.24: Koyro kiruubiya qefey, issoy ichashu wadha; nam7anthoy ichashu wadha; koyro qefiya xeerape bidi nam7antho qefiya xeera gakanaw tammu wadha.
6.25: Nam7antho kiruubey tammu wadha; nam7u kiruubeta hanotaynne medhoy issi mela.
6.26: Issi kiruubiya geesay tammu wadha; nam7antho kiruubiya geesay hessa mela.
6.27: Solomoney Xoossa keethan de7iya Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessan kiruubeta wothis. Enta qefey micetidi uttis; issi kiruubiya qefey issi bagga godaa bochiya wode, hanko kiruubiya qefey hanko bagga godaa bochees; enta nam7aa qefey soo giddon issoy issuwa bochoosona.
6.29: Qol7anne wuyge godaa ubbaa kiruubeta, zambanne ciishsha misilen alleeqisis.
6.30: Xoossa keetha giddo kifiliya wuygiya kare bagga kifiliya wuygiya worqan lanxis.
6.31: Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessa geliya pengiyan shamaho mithafe sanqa giigisis. Penge gobanetas ichashu baggara maazaney de7ees.
6.32: Shamaho mithafe oosetida nam7u sanqata bolla kiruubeta, zambanne ciishsha misile giigisidi sanqata, kiruubetanne zamba worqan lanxis.
6.33: Hessadaka, Xoossa keethaa geliya pengiya shamahope oosetida oyddu maazanera de7iya sanqa giigisis.
6.34: I he pengiya issi issi sanqay giddon dakotidi dooyetiya nam7u sanqata kessis.
6.35: Kiruubeta, zambanne ciishsha misileta enta bolla wothis; enta bolla worqa issi gina oothidi lanxis.
6.36: Soo baggara de7iya dabaaba gimbis; he gimbiya bolla masetida heedzu shuchu, issuwa issuwa bolla wothidi, issi masetida ziga enta bolla wothidi gimbis.
6.37: Xoossaa keethaa baasoy Solomoney kawotida oyddantho laythan, Ziifa geetetiya nam7antho ageenan baasetis.
6.38: Solomoney kawotida tammanne issintho laythan, Bula geetetiya hospuntho ageenan Xoossa keethay halchidaysa mela keexetidi wuris. Solomoney Xoossa keethaa laapun laythan keexidi wursis.

7.1: Solomoney ba gadhuwa tammanne heedzu laythan keexidi wursis.
7.2: “Libaanose Woraa Keethaa” geetetiya keethaa Solomoney keexis; he keetha adussatethay xeetu wadha; gompay ishatamu wadha; geesay hastamu wadha. Ziga tuuqeti oyddu maaran eqidosona; masetida ziga mithati enta bolla wodhidosona;
7.3: ziga mithati heedzu maaran, issi issi maaran tammanne ichashu mithati de7oosona; enti kumethi oytamanne ichasha.
7.4: He keethaas maskooteti heedzu maaran de7oosona; enti issoy issuwa sinthan de7oosona.
7.5: Pengetinne maskooteti oyddu maazanera de7oosona; maskooteti heedzu maaran gididi, issoy issuwa sinthan de7oosona.
7.6: Solomoney, “Tuuqey Kumida Keethi” geetetiya keethi keexis; he keetha adussatethay ishatamu wadha; gompay hastamu wadha. He keetha sinthan daro tuuqen zempidanne bollara kaaran kametida barandi de7ees.
7.7: Solomoney pirda araatay de7iya “Pirda Keethi” keexis; he keethay wuygepe bidi kaara gakanaw zigan kametidi uttis.
7.8: Pirda Keethaafe guye baggara de7iya hara dabaaban baw daanaw kawo gadho hanko keethatada oothidi keexis. Ba mache, Gibxe kawa na7ees, he keetha mela hara keethe keexis.
7.9: Ha keethati ubbay, karepe doomidi dirsaafe soora de7iya gita gutaraa gakanaw, baasuwape doomidi kaara gakanaw, likidi massidanne sooranne karera giigisida lo77o shuchan oosetidosona.
7.10: Gimbey hiixetiday tammu wadha woyko hospun wadha gidiya lo77o masetida gita shuchana.
7.11: Bolla baggara liketidi masetida lo77o shuchinne ziga mithi de7ees.
7.12: Gita dabaaba yuushuwan de7iya gimbey Xoossa keethadanne barandada masetida heedzu shuchu, issuwa issuwa bolla wothidi, issi masetida ziga enta bolla wothidi gimbis. Xoossa Keetha Miisheta
7.13: Kawoy Solomoney, Kiraama geetetiya addiya Xiroosape ehis.
7.14: Kiraama aayiya am7o; iya Niftaaleme koche. Iya aaway Xiroosa asi. Kiraami naase birata qoxiya hiilli de7iya ase; I naase birata qoxidi oothiyaban daro loohida asi; I Solomoneko yidi iya ooso ubbaa oothis.
7.15: Kiraami issuwa issuwa geesay tammanne hospun wadha aduqidi, yuushoy tammanne nam7u wadha dalgida nam7u tuussata naase birata seerisidi kessis. He tuussa ordetethay oyddu biradhe. Nam7antho tuuqeyka hessa mela.
7.16: Hessadaka, tuussata huuphen wothanaw nam7u gumbota naase birata sheeshidi, medhis; issi issi gumboy ichashu wadha aduqees.
7.17: Tuussaa huuphen de7iya issi issi gumbota giteda oothida laapun santhalaata oothis.
7.18: Tuussata xeeran de7iya gumbota alleeqisanaw nam7u maaran oromaane misile alleeqisis.
7.19: Barandan eqida tuussata bolla de7iya gumboti ciishsha medhon alleeqetidosona; enta geesay oyddu wadha.
7.20: Nam7u tuuqeta huuphen de7iya gumbotan gerto gididi uttida bessaafe bolla baggara, santhalaata gitiya kaallidi, nam7u xeetu oromaane misileti nam7u maaran yuuyi aadhidi de7oosona.
7.21: Kiraami he nam7u tuussata Xoossaa keethaa barandaa matan essis. Ushacha baggara eqida tuussaa Yakina gidi sunthis; haddirsa baggara eqida tuussaa Boo7eza gidi sunthis.
7.22: Tuussata huuphen de7iya gumboti ciishshe daanidi medhetidosona. Hessada hanidi tuussata oosoy poletis.
7.23: Kiraami Abba Saaniya geetetiya issi daro gita saaniya naase birata sheeshidi medhis. He Abba Saaniya doonay ha gaxape ya gaxa gakanaw tammu wadha; geesay ichashu wadha; yuushoy hastamu wadha.
7.24: Abba Saaniya doonan kare baggara ziqi gidi, iyara oyketidi medhetida gose misileti de7oosona; he goseta misileti nam7u maaran, issi issi wadhan tammay tammay yuuyi aadhidi shuuyetidosona.
7.25: Abba Saaney naase biratape medhetida tammanne nam7u boorata misileta zokuwan uttis. Boora misiletape heedzati pudeha bagga, heedzati doloha bagga, heedzati dugeha bagga, heedzati wuloha bagga simmidi xeelloosona. Abba Saaney enta bolla uttis.
7.26: Abba Saaney oyddu biradhe orde; iya doonay wanca doona mela; ciishshe daanees. Abba Saaney oytamanne ichashu mukulu litiro gidiya haathe oykees.
7.27: Kiraami tammu gaareta naase biratape medhis. He gaareti issoy issoy oyddu wadha adusse; oyddu wadha dalganne heedzu wadha dhoqa.
7.28: He gaareti haysada oosetidosona; pude eqida oyddu birata bolla piddi gida loche naase biratati oyketidi uttidosona.
7.29: He birata bolla gaammo, boorinne kiruube misileti de7oosona; gaammonne boora misiletape huupheranne tohora de7iya biratata bolla qoxidi medhida ciishsha encursa misileti de7oosona.
7.30: Issi issi gaariyas naase biratape oothida oyddu gertotinne gertota gathidi waaxiya naase birata kasoti de7oosona. Hessadaka, oyddu maazanen keriya zempisiyabati de7oosona. He zempisiyabati ciishsha encursa misiletan alleeqetidi uttidosona.
7.31: Gaariya zempisiya miisheta huuphen gertoti uttida dooya bessi de7ees; he dooyay gaariya xeerape pude issi wadha dhoqu gidi, duge takadho ziqi gidi medhetis. He dooya bessaa doona yuushoy misilen alleeqetis.
7.32: Gertota geesay issi wadhanne takadho; gertoti loche naase biratatas garsa baggara de7oosona. Gertoti oyketidi uttida kasoti gaariyara oyketidi uttidosona.
7.33: Gertoti ola para gaare gertota mela medhetidosona; gertota gathidi oykiya kasoti, macaratinne enta oykiya miisheti ubbay naase biratape oosetidosona.
7.34: He gaareta ubbaa maazanetas enta tohosoora tohosoora entara isso gididi oyketida naase biratape oosetida zempoti de7oosona.
7.35: Issi issi gaariya huuphe bagga yuushuwan takadho aduqiya kirkiroy de7ees; zempotinne loche naase biratati gaariyara oyketidi, isso gididi oosetidosona.
7.36: Ha zempotapenne loche naase biratatape giddon de7iya dooya bessa ubbay kiruuben, gaammoninne zamba misileten alleeqetidi uttidosona; enta yuushoy ciishsha encursa misilen alleeqetidi uttis.
7.37: Hiza tammu gaareti haysada oosetidosona; enta lanxida miishey issino gidiya gisho enta geesaynne enta medhoy issi mela.
7.38: Kiraami meecetiya tammu kereta naase biratape medhis; issi issi keriya gompay oyddu wadha dalga gididi, hospun xeetu litiro haathe oykees; tammu gaaretas huuphen huuphen issi issi meecetiya kerey de7ees.
7.39: Kiraami ichashu gaareta Xoossa keethaafe pudeha baggara, ichashu gaareta Xoossa keethaafe dugeha baggara wothis; naase biratape oosetida Abba Saaniya Xoossaa keethaafe dugeha doloha bagga zaaridi essis.
7.40: Kiraami qapheta, akaafatanne xaarota medhis; yaatidi kawa Solomones Xoossa keetha oosuwa oothidi polis.
7.41: I oothida oosoti, nam7u tuussata, tuussata huuphen de7iya saane daaniya nam7u gumbota, tuussata bolla de7iya nam7u gumbota alleeqisiya nam7u santhalaatata,
7.42: issi issi gumbuwa bolla nam7u maaran naase biratape oosetida issi issi xeetu oromaane misileta, kumthi oyddu xeetu oromaane misileta,
7.43: Tammu gaareta, gaareta bolla uttiya tammu meecha kereta,
7.44: Abbaanne iya katisiya tammanne nam7u boora misileta,
7.45: Kereta, akaafatanne xaarota. Kiraami kawa Solomones Xoossa keetha oosuwas medhida miisheta ubbaa qushetida naase biratape medhis.
7.46: Kawoy Solomoney Sukotapenne Xartaanape giddon, Yordaanose denban de7iya, naase birata sheeshiya bessan haysata oosisis.
7.47: Naase biratape oosetida miishey daro gidida gisho, Solomoney iya mazzanisibeenna; hessa gisho, ay mela deexiyako likey eretibeenna.
7.48: Solomoney Xoossa keethaa giddon de7iya miisheta ubbaa worqafe medhisis. Hessatika, worqafe oosetida yarsho bessa, Godaa sinthan wothiya uythay uttiya xarpheeza,
7.49: Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaafe sinthan ushacha baggaranne haddirsa baggara eqida ichashu ichashu xompe wothiya kocata, ciishshata, xompetanne qapheta,
7.50: xuu7ata, xompe toysiyabata, xaarota, ixaane cuyisiyabata, tama ekiya miisheta, Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa qol7a pengetanne Xoossa keetha kare bagga pengeta oykida maxaafeta. Ha miisheti ubbay walahi bayna worqafe oosetidosona.
7.51: Kawoy Solomoney Xoossa keetha oosuwa ubbaa polidaape guye, iya aaway Dawiti Godaas dummayidi wothida bira, worqanne hara miisheta ubbaa ehidi, Xoossa keetha shalo minjiya keethan wothis.

8.1: Hessafe guye, kawoy Solomoney Godaa taabotiya Dawita katamaape, Xiyoonepe kessidi, Xoossa keethi ehanaw Isra7eele cimata, kochata halaqatanne Isra7eele soo asata kaaletheyisata Yerusalaame kataman shiishis.
8.2: Etaanima geetetiya laapuntha ageenan, Shaqara Ba7aaley bonchetiya wode Isra7eele asa ubbay kawa Solomoneko shiiqidosona.
8.3: Isra7eele cimati ubbay shiiqin, kahineti Taabotiya denthidosona.
8.4: Leewetinne kahineti, Godaa taabotiya, Dunkaaniyanne iya giddon de7iya geeshsha miisheta ubbaa tookidi ehidosona.
8.5: Kawoy Solomoneynne iyara de7iya Isra7eele asay Taabotiya sinthan shiiqidi, taybanaw danda7etonna daro dorsenne mehe yarshidosona.
8.6: Hessafe guye, kahineti Godaa caaqo taabotiya Xoossa keethan Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessa ehidi, kiruubeta qefetape garsa baggara wothidosona.
8.7: Micetidi uttida kiruubeta qefeti taabotiyanne taabotiya tookiya kasota kammidosona.
8.8: Kasoti daro adusse gidiya gisho enta xeeray Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessa sinthan qoncen bentoosona. Shin Geeshsha bessaafe karera bentanaw danda7enna. Enti hachi gakanaw he bessan de7oosona.
8.9: Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida wode Goday entara caaqida Koreeba zuman Musey wothida nam7u loche shuchata xalaalape attishin, Taabotiya giddon harabay aybika baawa.
8.10: Kahineti Xoossa keethafe keyida wode Xoossa keethay shaaran kumis.
8.11: He shaara gaason kahineti banta oosuwa oothanaw danda7ibookona; Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keetha kumis.
8.12: Hessafe guye, Solomoney, “Abeeti Godaw, neeni, ‘Taani dhuma shaaran daana’ yaagadasa.
8.13: Taani new boncho keethi, merinaw neeni yan daana bessi keexas” yaagis.
8.14: Isra7eele maabaray kumethi yan eqidashin, kawoy entako simmidi, haysada yaagidi entaw woossis.
8.15: “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto! Ta aawa Dawitas ba doonan odida ufaysa qaala ba kushen polis. I odida ufaysa qaalay,
8.16: ‘Taani ta asaa, Isra7eele Gibxefe kessida gallasape doomin, ta sunthay iyan daana mela keethe keexanaw Isra7eele kochata giddon issi katamaka doorabike. Shin ta asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela taani Dawita dooras’ yaagis.
8.17: “Ta aaway Dawiti, Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sunthaas keethe keexanaw ba wozanan qopis.
8.18: Shin Goday, ta aawa Dawitako, ‘Neeni ta sunthaas keethe keexanaw ne wozanan qopida gisho lo77oba oothadasa.
8.19: Gidoshin, keethe keexanay nena gidaka; ta sunthaas keethe keexanay ne gulbatape yeletana ne na7aa’ yaagis.
8.20: “Goday gelida ba ufaysa qaala polis. Goday kase gelida ufaysa qaalada taani ta aawa Dawita bessan kawotas; Isra7eele kawotetha araatan uttas. Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sunthaas keethe keexas.
8.21: Goday nu aawata Gibxefe kessida wode entara caaqida caaqo taabotiya wothana bessi giigisas” yaagis. Solomone Woosaa (2 Taari 6:12-42)
8.22: Hessafe guye, Solomoney Godaa yarsho bessa sinthan, kumetha Isra7eele maabara giddon eqidi, ba kushiya miccidi,
8.23: haysada yaagidi woossis; “Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, bolla saluwan garsa sa7an ne mela xoossi baawa. Neeni ne caaquwa naagasa. Ba kumetha wozanan ne sinthan hemetiya ne aylleta ne merinaa siiquwan dosadasa.
8.24: Ne aylliyas, ta aawa Dawitas, neeni oothana gada gelida qaala naagadasa. Neeni kase ne doonan odidaysa hachi ne kushen poladasa.
8.25: “Ha77ika Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, neeni ne aylliyas, ta aawa Dawitas, ‘Neeni ta sinthan hemetidaysada ne naytika ta sinthan hemetidi banta ogiya naagiko, ta sinthan Isra7eele kawotetha araatan uttiya asi neeni dhayaka’ yaagida qaala pola.
8.26: Abeeti Isra7eele Xoossaw, neeni ne aylliyas, ta aawa Dawitas gelida ne qaala ha77ika pola.
