8.27: “Shin Xoossay tuma sa7an daaneyee? Heko, saloti, ubbaafe dhoqa saloyka nena oykanaw danda7enna. Yaatin, taani keexida keethay new ay mela guuxandesha!
8.28: Gidoshin, abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw, taani ne aylley hachi woossiya woosanne waasuwa si7a.
8.29: ‘Ta sunthay he bessan daana’ gida ha keethaa ne ayfey qammanne gallas xeello. Taani ne aylley ha bessaako simmada woossiya woosa si7a.
8.30: Taani ne aylleynne ne asay Isra7eeley, ha Xoossa keethaako simmidi, woossiya woosa si7a. Ne de7iya bessan salon si7ada nuus atto yaaga.
8.31: “Issi asi ba laggiya qohidi, qohabike gidi kaddin, iya caaqisanaw Xoossa keethi ehin, iya giddon de7iya yarsho bessa sinthan I caaqiko,
8.32: neeni salon si7ada ootha. Ne aylleta giddon pirda. Naaqida uraa bolla pirdada, I oothidaba iya bolla zaara; xilluwas pirdada iya xillotethaa qoncisa.
8.33: “Ne asay Isra7eeley ne bolla nagara oothida gisho banta morketan xoonetidi, neeko simmidi ne sunthaa xeegiko, ha keethan nena woossikonne neeko waassiko,
8.34: neeni salon si7a. Ne asaa Isra7eele nagaraa atto ga; yaatada neeni kase enta mayzatas immida biitta enta guye zaara.
8.35: “Ne asay ne bolla nagara oothida gisho saloy gordetin, iri bukonna ixin, enti ha bessaa simmidi, woossikonne neeni enta un7ethida gisho ne sunthaa xeegidi, banta nagaraape simmiko neeni salon si7a.
8.36: Ne aylleta, Isra7eele nagaraa atto ga. Enti hemetanaw bessiya lo77o ogiya enta tamaarsa; ne asaa laatisida biittan ira bukisa.
8.37: “Biitta bolla koshi woyko gadoy yaa wode, carkoy kathaa shocidi woyko harmey dhaysiya wode, booley woyko gumburoy biitta bolla yaa wode, morkey enta katamata teqiya wode, gadoynne hargey yaa wode,
8.38: ne asa Isra7eelepe oonika nena woossikonne neeko waassiko qassi ay asika ba wozanan un7etidi ha Xoossa keethaako simmidi ba kushiya micciko,
8.39: ne de7iya bessan salon si7a. Enta nagaraa atto ga; enta maadda. Neeni asa wozana ereysada asa ubbaas iya oosuwada oosuwada imma. Asa ubbaa wozana erey ne xalaala.
8.40: Yaaniko, neeni nu mayzatas immida biittan de7iya wode ubban enti new yayyana.
8.41: “Ne asaa Isra7eelepe gidonashin, allaga biitta asay, ne gita sunthaa gisho haaho biittafe yida asi de7iko,
8.42: ne gita sunthaa si7idi, haaho biittafe yidi, ha Xoossa keethaako simmidi nena woossiko,
8.43: neeni de7iya bessan salon si7a. Ne asati, Isra7eeleti ereysada sa7an de7iya asa ubbay ne sunthaa erana melanne new yayyana mela, taani keexida ha Xoossa keethay nena goyinniya bessi gideysa enti erana mela allaga biitta asay woossiyaba entaw pola.
8.44: “Ne asati banta morketa olana mela ne kiitida bessaa bidi, enti neeni doorida ha katamaakonne taani ne sunthaas keexida keethaako simmidi Godaa nena woossiko,
8.45: enta woosanne waasuwa salon si7ada entaw xoono imma.
8.46: “Nagara oothonna asi bayna gisho enti ne bolla nagara oothin, neeni enta hanqetada morketas aathada immin, morketi enta di77idi, haaho gidin mata bessi efikoka,
8.47: enti he di7etida biittan de7ishe, banta wozanan nagarape simmiko, he di7etida biittan de7ishe, ‘Nuuni nagara oothida; nuuni balida; nuuni iita hanida’ yaagidi neeko waassiko,
8.48: entana di77idi efida morketa biittan de7ishe, banta kumetha wozananinne banta kumetha qofan neeko simmiko, neeni enta mayzatas immida enta biittako, ne doorida katamaakonne taani ne sunthaas keexida keethaako simmidi, nena woossiko,
8.49: enta woosanne enta waasuwa ne de7iya bessan salon si7ada entaw pirda.
8.50: Ne asay ne bolla oothida nagaraanne qohida qohuwa atto ga; enta di77idi efida asati entaw qadhetana mela ootha.
8.51: Enti, birata seerisiya cooce tamada xuuggiya Gibxe biittafe neeni kessida ne asatanne ne buzo laatata.
8.52: “Taani ne aylleynne ne asay Isra7eeley woossiya woosa ne ayfey xeello. Enti waassiya wode awudeka neeni enta alla.
8.53: Abeeti Godaw, Xoossaw, neeni kase nu aawata Gibxefe kessiya wode ne aylliya Muse baggara odidaysada enta sa7an de7iya kawotethata ubbaa giddofe new buzo oothanaw dummayida dere” yaagidi woossis.
8.54: Solomoney woosa polidaape guye, ba kushiya miccidi yarsho bessa sinthan gulbatida bessaafe dendi eqis.
8.55: Isra7eele maabara ubbaa ba qaala dhoqu oothidi haysada yaagidi anjis;
8.56: “Ba gelida qaalada ba asa Isra7eele shempisida Goday galatetto; I ba aylliya Muse baggara immida lo77o ufaysa qaala ubbay poletis.
8.57: Goday nu Xoossay kase nu aawatara de7idaysada nuuraka de7o; I nuna kumethi aggenna; yeggenna.
8.58: Nuuni iya ogetan hemetana melanne I nu aawatas immida kiitaanne wogaa naagana mela nu wozanaa baako zaaro.
8.59: Gallas gallas nuus koshshiyaba immanaw Goday tana ba aylliyanne ba asaa Isra7eele maaddana mela, taani Godaa sinthan woossida woosati qammanne gallas Godaako, nu Xoossaako, shiiqo.
8.60: Hessan, sa7an de7iya asa ubbay Goday Xoosse gideysanne iyape attishin, hara xoossi baynaysa erana.
8.61: Hachi hinte oothidaysada hinte iya wogaada iyaw kiitetanaw hinte wozanay Godaas, nu Xoossaas ammaneteysa gido” yaagidi anjis. Xoossa Keetha Anjiso (2 Taari 7:4-10)
8.62: Hessafe guye kawoynne Isra7eele asa ubbay issife Godaa sinthan yarsho yarshidosona.
8.63: Solomoney Godaas issifetetha yarsho yarshanaw 22,000 booratanne 120,000 dorsata shiishis. Hessada oothidi kawoynne Isra7eele asa ubbay Godaa keethaa anjisidosona.
8.64: Kawoy Solomoney Xoossa keetha sinthan de7iya dabaaba giddo kifiliya he gallas dummayis. He bessan xuussa yarsho, katha yarshonne issifetetha yarshuwafe modhuwa yarshis. I hessa oothiday Godaa sinthan de7iya naase biratape oosetida yarsho bessay xuussa yarsho, katha yarshonne issifetetha yarshuwafe modhuwa yarshanaw guuxida gishosa.
8.65: He wode Solomoneynne Isra7eele asa ubbay laapun gallas Shaqara Ba7aale bonchidosona; Isra7eele zawan Hamaata Pinuwape bidi Gibxe shaafa gakanaw de7iya daro asay Godaa sinthan ba7aale bonchanaw shiiqis.
8.66: Wontetha gallas kawoy asaa moyzis; asay kawa anjidi, Goday ba aylliya Dawitasinne ba asaa Isra7eeles oothida keehatethan wozanape ufaytishe ba soo ba soo bis.

9.1: Solomoney Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadho keexidi wursida wode ba wozanan oothanaw amotida ubbaa polidaape guye,
9.2: Gaba7oonan kase qoncidaysada Goday zaaridi iyaw qoncis.
9.3: Goday, “Neeni ta sinthan woossida woosaanne waasuwa taani si7as. Neeni keexida keethay merinaw ta sunthay iyan xeegetana mela oothada geeshshas. Ta ayfeynne ta wozanay ubba wode yan daana.
9.4: Shin neeni ne aaway Dawiti hemetidaysada borey bayna suuretethan ta sinthan hemetiko, ta kiita ubbaa oothikonne ta wogaanne ta higgiya naagiko,
9.5: taani ne aawa Dawitas, ‘Isra7eele kawotetha araatan uttiya asi neeni kumethi dhayaka’ ” gidaysada ne araata Isra7eele bolla merinaw minthada essana.
9.6: “Shin ne woyko ne nayti tana kaalo aggidi guye simmiko, taani hintena kiitida ta kiitaanne ta wogaa naagonna ixidi allaga xoossata goyinniko,
9.7: Isra7eele asaa taani kase entaw immida biittafe shoddana; taani ta sunthaas geeshshida ha keethaa aggana. Isra7eeleti asa ubbaa giddon kadhesinne miichas attana.
9.8: Ha malaalsiya Xoossa keethay laaletidi laaletha doore gidana. Matara aadhiya asa ubbay dagammidi, ‘Goday ha biittanne ha Xoossa keethaa ayis haysada oothidee?’ yaagana.
9.9: Asay zaaridi, ‘Enta mayzata Gibxefe kessida, Godaa banta Xoossaa enti aggidi, allaga xoossata kaallida gishonne enta goyinnida gisho Goday enta bolla ha iitabaa ubbaa ehis’ ” yaagidi zaarana. Solomone Hara Oosota (2 Taari 8:1-18)
9.10: Solomoney ha nam7u keethata, Xoossa keethaanne ba kawo gadho keexida laatamantho laytha wursethan,
9.11: Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami xiidda, ziganne worqa ubbaa immida gisho, Galilan de7iya laatamu katamata Solomoney iyaw immis.
9.12: Shin Kiraami Xiroosape keyidi, Solomoney iyaw immida katamata be7anaw bida wode katamati iya ufaysibookona.
9.13: Kiraami Solomoneko, “Ta ishaw, haysati ne taw immida katamati ayba katamee?” yaagis. Hessa gisho, I he katamata, “Pathonna biitta” yaagidi sunthis. He heeray hachi gakanaw he sunthan xeegetees.
9.14: Kiraami 4,000 kilo giraame worqaa kawa Solomones kase yeddis.
9.15: Xoossa keethaa, kawo gadho, Miilo, Yerusalaame katama gimbiya, Haxoora, Magidonne Gezera gimbanaw kawa Solomones oosanchoti de7oosona.
9.16: Gibxe kawoy kase Gezera oykidi taman xuuggis. Kataman de7iya Kanaane asata wodhis; Solomoney ekida ba na7iw woyto oothidi immis.
9.17: Solomoney Gezeranne garsa Beet-Harona zaaridi keexis.
9.18: Ba7ilaata, Yihuda mela de7iya Tamaara,
9.19: buqura minjiya katamata ubbaa, ba paratanne para gaareta naagiya katamata, Yerusalaamen, Libaanoseninne I haariya biitta ubban keexanaw koyida ubbaa keexis.
9.20: Amooretape, Hitetape, Parzetape, Hiwetapenne Yaabusetape attida asati ubbay Isra7eele ase gidokona.
9.21: Enti Isra7eele asay biittafe wursidi dhaysanaw danda7onna ixin he biittan attida asaa kochata. Solomoney enta aylle oothin, enti hachi gakanaw aylletethan oothosona.
9.22: Shin Solomoney Isra7eele asaape oonaka aylle oothibeenna. Enti iyaw moorinnata, olanchota, toora mocona, para gaare laagiya asaas halaqanne para asi gididi oothidosona.
9.23: Enti Solomoney oosisiya keethaa keexeyisata halaqata; enti ichashu xeetanne ishatama.
9.24: Gibxe kawa na7iya Dawita katamaape Solomoney iw keexisida keetha yidaape guye, I Miilo katamaa gimbis.
9.25: Solomoney Godaas gimbida yarsho bessan xuussanne issifetetha yarsho laythan heedzu toho yarshees. Godaa sinthan ixaane cuyisees; hessan Xoossa keethay poletis.
9.26: Hessafe guye, kawoy Solomoney Edoome biittan Zo7o Abbaa gaxan, Eloota matan de7iya Exiyoon-Gabiran markabeta oothis.
9.27: Kawoy Kiraami Solomone asaara oothana mela markabe laagon loohida ba asata kiittis.
9.28: Enti Ofira biitta bidi 14,000 kilo giraame worqaa kawa Solomones ekidi yidosona.

10.1: Saaba kawiya Goday Solomones qoncisida malaalsiya cincatetha woriya si7ada, deexo oyshata ekada iya paacanaw basu.
10.2: Sawuwa, daro worqanne al7o shuchu caanida daro gimale cugara daro ajaban Yerusalaame gakada Solomone sinthe shiiqasu. Ba wozanan de7iya ubbaa Solomone oychasu.
10.3: Solomoney iya oychidaba ubbaa zaaris; iw birshonnashin, iyape geemmidi attidabay aybika baawa.
10.4: Saaba kawiya Solomone cincatetha, I keexida kawo gadhuwa,
10.5: iya gaytan shiiqiya kathaa, iya moorinnati uttiya utethaa, iya aylleti oothiya oosuwa, enti ma7iya ma7uwa, eessi duuqeysatanne Xoossa keethan shiishiya xuussa yarshuwa be7ida wode I wozanay daro malaaletis.
10.6: Iya, kawa Solomoneko, “Nebaanne ne cincathaba taani ta biittan de7ashe si7idaysi tuma.
10.7: Shin taani yada, ta ayfen be7ana gakanaw enti taw odidaba ammanabike. Heko, asay taw odidaysi bagga gakenna; ne cincatethaynne ne duretethay taani si7idaysafe daro aadhees.
10.8: Ubba wode ne sinthan eqidi, ne cincatetha si7iya ne asatinne ne moorinnati ay mela qaadara de7iya ase!
10.9: Nenan ufaytidi, nena Isra7eele kawotetha araatan utisida Goday ne Xoossay galatetto! Goday Isra7eele asa merinaw siiqida gisho neeni suure pirdanne xillotethi oothana mela I nena kawothis” yaagasu.
10.10: Saaba kawiya 4,000 kilo giraame worqa, daro sawonne al7o shuchu kawa Solomones immasu. Saaba kawiya kawa Solomones immidaysa mela daro sawo hessafe simmin oonika ehibeenna.
10.11: (Kawa Kiraama markabeti, Ofirape worqa ehidaysati yaape daro sandale mithinne al7o shuchu ehidosona.
10.12: Kawoy Solomoney he sandalepe Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadho tuuqeta, zammaaretas diithinne maasinqo oosisis. Hessa mela sandaley he wodepe simmin yidi erenna; benti erenna.)
10.13: Kawoy Solomoney immanaw bessiya imotatape haraa, Saaba kawiya amottada iya oychidaba ubbaa iw immis. Hessafe guye, Saaba kawiya ba ajabara dendada ba biitta simmasu. Solomone Bonchuwa (2 Taari 9:13-28)
10.14: Solomoney laythan laythan ekiya worqay 23,000 kilo giraame.
10.15: Hessi zal7anchotape ekiya qaraxa, Arabe kawotapenne Isra7eele biittan haareysatape ekiya giira gujenna.
10.16: Solomoney nam7u xeetu gita gondalleta worqafe qoxidi oosisis. Issi issi gondalliyan usupun kilo giraame gidiya worqey gelis.
10.17: Qassi heedzu xeetu guutha gondalleta worqafe qoxidi oosisis. Issi issi guutha gondalliyan nam7u kilo giraame gidiya worqey gelis. Kawoy he gondalleta “Libaanose Woraa” geetetiya ba kawo gadhon wothis.
10.18: Qassi kawoy issi gita araata dangarsa zaalepe oosisidi geeshsha worqan lanxisis.
10.19: Araatay de7iya bessa pude keyanaw yedhiya usupun dethati de7oosona. He araatas guye baggara huuphiya bolla gertoy de7ees. Araatas nam7u baggara qese zempisiya bessati de7oosona; he nam7u bessata miyen eqida issi issi gaammo misiley de7ees.
10.20: He araata bolla keyiya usupun dethatas ya baggaranne ha baggara issi issi gaammo misiley, kumethi tammanne nam7u misileti de7oosona. Hessa mela araati hara kawotethan awunka oosetibeenna.
10.21: Kawoy Solomoney ushshu uyaa miishe ubbay worqafe oosetis; “Libaanose Wora” geetetiya kawo gadhon de7iya miishe ubbay walahi bayna worqafe oosetis. Solomone wode biras go77i bayna gisho birape oosetidabay baawa.
10.22: Kawa Kiraama markabetara zal7iya gita markabeti abban de7oosona. He markabeti worqa, bira, dangarsa zaale, geleshsho, qaarenne ayyaana kafo caanidi heedzu laythafe issi toho simmoosona.
10.23: Kawoy Solomoney duretethaninne cincatethan sa7an de7iya kawota ubbaafe aadhees.
10.24: Sa7an de7iya asi ubbay iyako yaanawunne Xoossay iya wozanan wothida cincatethaa si7anaw koyees.
10.25: Laythan laythan yaa ubbay iyaw worqa, bira, ma7o, ola miishe, sawo, paranne baqulo imota ekidi yoosona.
10.26: Solomoney para gaaretanne parata shiishis; iyaw 1,400 para gaaretinne 12,000 parati de7oosona. I enta para gaareta katamataninne baara Yerusalaamen wothis.
10.27: Kawoy Yerusalaamen biri shuchada, zigi zuma xaphon dicciya boobbada daranaada oothis.
10.28: Solomone parati Gibxefenne Qaawe biittafe yoosona. Kawa zal7anchoti enta Qaawepe shammidi ehoosona.
10.29: Enti issi issi para gaare usupun xeetu bira santimen, issi issi para xeetanne ishatamu bira santimen Gibxefe shammidi ehoosona. Enti Hiteta kawotasinne Soore kawotas bayzoosona.

11.1: Kawoy Solomone daro allaga biitta maccasata dosis. Hessati Gibxe kawa na7epe haraa Moo7abeta, Amooneta, Edoometa, Sidoonatanne Hiteta maccasata.
11.2: Goday Isra7eele asaas, “Enti hinte wozana balethidi banta eeqatako zaariya gisho ha asatara ekoninne gelon walaketofite” yaagidi kase odis. Shin Solomone enta siiquwan qashetis.
11.3: Solomones kawo na7a gidida laapun xeetu machetinne heedzu xeetu laggethoti (qubaateti) de7oosona. He macheti iya Xoossafe haassidosona.
11.4: Solomoney cimishe biya wode iya macheti iya wozanaa hara xoossatako zaaridosona. Iya aawa Dawiti kumetha wozanan Godaas haaretidaysada I ba Godaa Xoossaas haaretibeenna.
11.5: Solomoney Astarooto geetetiya Sidoonata xoosseesinne Moloka geetetiya ixetida Amooneta eeqa goyinnis.
11.6: Solomoney Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; iya aawa Dawiti kaallidaysada Godaa polo kaallibeenna.
11.7: Solomoney Kamoosha ixetida eeqasinne Moloka geetetiya Amooneta eeqas Yerusalaamepe wuloha baggan de7iya dere huuphen dhoqa goyinno bessata keexis.
11.8: Allaga biittafe ekida ba machetas hessada giigisin, enti banta eeqatas yan ixaane cuyidosonanne yarsho yarshidosona.
11.9: Iyaw nam7u toho qoncida Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaafe Solomone wozanay haakida gisho, Goday iya hanqetis.
11.10: Hara xoossata kaallonnaada Goday Solomone kiittis, shin Solomoney Godaa kiitaa naagibeenna.
11.11: Hessa gisho, Goday Solomoneko, “Neeni haysada hanida gishonne ta caaquwanne ta wogaa ne naagonna gisho taani ne kawotetha neepe ekada ne aylletape issuwas immana.
11.12: Gidoshin, ne aawa Dawita gisho taani haysa ne de7o laythan oothike, ne na7aa kushepe ekana.
11.13: Hessi hanikoka, kawotetha ne na7aa kushepe ubbaa ekike; ta aylliya Dawita gishonne taani doorida Yerusalaame gisho issi koche iyaw immana” yaagis. Solomone Morketa
11.14: Hessafe guye, Goday Edoome biitta kawota koche gidida, Edoome addiya Hadaada Solomone bolla morke oothidi denthis.
11.15: Kase Dawiti Edoome asatara oletida wode hayqidaysata mooganaw bida toora moconay Iyo7aabi Edoomen de7iya addeta ubbaa wodhidi wursis.
11.16: Edoomen de7iya addeta ubbaa dhaysana gakanaw Iyo7aabinne Isra7eele asa ubbay yan usupun ageena uttidosona.
11.17: Shin he wode guutha na7a gidida Hadaadi, ba aawas oothida Edoome moorinatape guuthatara Gibxe baqatis.
11.18: Enti Midiyaamepe dendidi Paarana bidosona; Paraanepe bantara ase ekidi Gibxe kawako bidosona. Kawoy Hadaadas issi keethinne gade immidi kathi iyaw yeddis.
11.19: Hadaadi kawa daro ufaysin, kawoy ba mache, Xafinaasi michiw iyaw macho oothidi immis.
11.20: Iya Ganubaata geetetiya na7a iyaw yelasu. Xafinaasa iya kawo gadhon dichasu; Ganubaati yan kawa naytara issife de7is.
11.21: Hadaadi Gibxen de7ishe Dawitinne iya toora moconay Iyo7aabi hayqidaysa si7idi, kawako, “Taani ta biitta simmana mela tana yedda” yaagis.
11.22: Kawoy iya, “New haysan aybi pacin, ne biitta baanaw koyay?” yaagidi oychis. Hadaadi, “Taw aybika pacibeenna, shin taani baana” yaagis.
11.23: Qassika Xoossay Eliyaada na7aa Razoona Solomone bolla morke oothidi denthis. Razooni Suubba kawa Adraazarape baqatis.
11.24: Dawiti Suubba olanchota dhaysida wode Razooni baw ase shiishidi paannota halaqa gidis. Paannoti Damasqo bidi, oykidi yan uttidi Razoona kawothidosona.
11.25: Hadaadi medhida metuwa bolla gujidi, Solomoney de7ida laytha ubban Razooni Isra7eeletas morke gidis. Razooni Sooren kawotidi Isra7eele asaas morke gidis. Iyorbaami Solomone Bolla Dendis
11.26: Hessadaka Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami Solomone bolla makallidi dendis. I Solomone aylletape issuwa. I Efreema biittan de7iya Xareedape yida asi; iya aaye sunthay Xiru7a; iya am7o.
11.27: Kawa bolla I makallidi dendida taarikey haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. He wode Solomoney Miilo gimbeesinne ba aawa Dawita katamaa gimbe dirsaa yuushuwan de7iya ollaa kunthees.
11.28: Iyorbaami mino asi; Solomoney ha na7atethay ba oosuwa waatidi loythi oothiyako be7idi, Yoosefa biittan oothiya madda oothiya asaa bolla halaqa oothidi shuumis.
11.29: Issi gallas Iyorbaami Yerusalaamepe keyidi bishin, Seelope yida nabey Akiyi ooratha ma7o ma7idi iyara ogen gahetis. Denban enta nam7aa xalaali de7oosona.
11.30: Akiyi ba ma77ida ooratha ma7uwa oykidi, tammanne nam7a kessidi daakis.
11.31: Iyorbaamako, “Tammu daakethaa new eka. Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; ‘Heko, taani kawotethaa Solomone kushepe ekada tammu kochata new immana.
11.32: Shin ta aylliya Dawita gishonne Isra7eele zare ubbaa giddofe taani doorida Yerusalaame gisho issi koche iyaw aggana.
11.33: Taani hessa oothiya gaasoy, Solomoney tana aggidi Sidoona xoossiw Astarooto, Moo7abe xoossa Kamooshanne Amoone xoossaa Moloka goyinnida gishosa. Qassi ta ogiyan hemetonna ixida gishonne iya aaway Dawiti kiitetidaysada ta wogaanne ta higgiya naagonna ixida gishosa.
11.34: “ ‘Gidoshin, taani kawotethaa Solomone kushepe wursa ekike. Taani dooridaysa gishonne ta kiitaanne ta wogaa naagida ta aylliya Dawita gisho Solomoney de7on de7ishin hessa oothike.
11.35: Taani kawotethaa iya na7aa kushepe ekada tammu kochata new immana.
11.36: Ta sunthay yan xeegetana mela taani doorida Yerusalaamen, ubba wode ta aylliya Dawita kochay kawotana mela taani issi koche iya na7aas immana.
11.37: Taani nena ekana; ne wozanay dosida ubbaa neeni haarana; neeni Isra7eele bolla kawotana.
11.38: Taani nena kiittiyaba neeni oothiko, ta ogiyan hemetikonne ta aylley Dawiti naagidaysada ta wogaanne ta kiitaa naagada, ta sinthan suureba oothiko, ta neera gidana. Dawitas oothidaysada ne kochati kawotethan minnanaada oothana; Isra7eele new immana.
11.39: Solomone nagaraa gisho taani Dawita kochaa seerana; shin merinaw seerike’ ” yaagis.
11.40: Solomoney Iyorbaama wodhanaw koyis; shin Iyorbaami Gibxe kawa Shishaaqako baqatidi, Solomoney hayqana gakanaw Gibxen gam7is. Solomone Hayquwa (2 Taari 9:29-31)
11.41: Solomone hanida harabay, I oothidabay, iya cincatethay Solomone Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
11.42: Solomoney Isra7eele bolla Yerusalaamen oytamu laythi kawotis.
11.43: Hessafe guye, Solomoney hayqidi, ba mayzan gahetis; ba aawa Dawita Kataman moogetis. Iya na7ay Robi7aami iya bessan kawotis.

12.1: Isra7eele asa ubbay Orobi7aama kawoyanaw Seekema bida gisho ika yaa bis.
12.2: Kawa Solomonepe baqatidi, Gibxen de7iya Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami hessa si7ida wode Gibxefe simmidi yis.
12.3: Isra7eele asay Iyorbaama kiittidi xeegisin, inne Isra7eele maabara ubbay Robi7aamako bidi,
12.4: “Ne aaway nuna deexo qambara toossis; shin ha77i I nuna oosisiya wolqaama oosuwanne deexo qambara nuus kawusharki. Yaatiko, nuuni new haaretana” yaagidosona.
12.5: Robi7aami entako, “Bidi heedzantho gallas simmidi taako yiite” yaagin asay bidosona.
12.6: Hessafe guye, kawoy Robi7aami, iya aaway Solomoney de7on de7iya wode, Solomone zoriya cimata, “Ha asaas woygada zaara geetii?” yaagidi zore oychis.
12.7: Cimati zaaridi, “Hachi neeni ha asaas aylle gidada oothikonne enta oyshaas lo77o qaala zaariko, ubba wode enti new aylle gidana” yaagidosona.
12.8: Shin Robi7aami cimati zorida zoriya aggidi, iyara diccidi iyaw oothiya na7atethata zore oychis.
12.9: I entako, “Hinte tana ay zoretii? ‘Ne aaway nuna toossida deexo qambara nuus kawusharki’ giya ha asaas woygada zaaro?” yaagidi oychis.
12.10: Na7atethati zaaridi, “ ‘Ne aaway nuna deexo qambara toossis; shin neeni nuus kawusharki’ giya asaas, ‘Ta guutha biradhey ta aawa xeessaafe ordees.
12.11: Ta aaway hintew qambara deexethis; shin taani iyape aathada deexethana. Ta aaway hintena lisson garaafis; shin taani hintena korneda dukiya lisson garaafana’ yaagada zaara” yaagidosona.
12.12: Kawoy, “Heedzantho gallas simmidi taako yiite” gidaysada Iyorbaaminne asa ubbay heedzantho gallas Orobi7aamako simmidi yidosona.
12.13: Kawoy cimata zoriya aggidi entaw hanqon zaaris.
12.14: Na7atethati zorida zoriya kaallis. I entako, “Ta aaway hinte qambara deexethis; shin taani iyape aathada deexethana. Ta aaway hintena lisson garaafis; shin taani hintena korneda dukiya lisson garaafana” yaagidi zaaris.
12.15: Goday Seelope yida Akiya baggara kase Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaamas odida qaalay poletana mela hessi Godaape hanida gisho kawoy asay giyaba si7onna ixis.
12.16: Isra7eele asa ubbay kawoy enti geysa si7onna ixidaysa be7idi haysada yaagidosona; “Dawitape nuna gakiya gishoy aybee? Isseye na7aape nuuni laattiyabay aybee? Isra7eele asaw, hinte soo hinte soo simmite. Dawita, ne keethaa naaga” yaagidi, Isra7eele asa ubbay banta soo banta soo simmidosona.
12.17: Shin Robi7aami Yihudan de7iya Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotis.
12.18: Kawoy Robi7aami madda ootheyisata halaqaa Adoniraama Isra7eele asaako kiittin, enti shuchan caddidi wodhidosona. Yaatin, kawoy Robi7aami ba para gaariyan gelidi Yerusalaame baqatis.
12.19: He wodepe doomidi hachi gakanaw tammu Isra7eele kochati Dawita kochaafe kawotida kawota bolla makallidosona.
12.20: Iyorbaami Gibxefe simmidaysa Isra7eele asa ubbay si7ida wode iya banta maabaraako xeegidi Isra7eele bolla kawothidosona. Dawita kochaafe kawotida kawotas ammanetiday Yihuda kochaa xalaala.
12.21: Solomone na7ay Robi7aami Yerusalaame gakida wode, Isra7eele asaara oletidi, kawotethaa baw zaarana mela Robi7aami Yihudapenne Biniyaamepe dooretida 180,000 olanchota shiishis.
12.22: Shin Xoossa qaalay Xoossa asi gidida Samayeko haysada yaagidi yis.
12.23: “Solomone na7aa, Yihuda kawa Orobi7aamas, Yihudas, Biniyaamesinne attida asa ubbaas haysada yaaga;
12.24: Goday hinteko, ‘Hinte dabbotara, Isra7eeletara oletanaw boopite. Haysa taani oothida gisho hinte ubbay hinte soo hinte soo simmite’ yaagada oda” yaagis. Enti Godaa qaala si7idi soo bidosona. Worqa Marata
12.25: Hessafe guye Iyorbaami derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya Seekema miixa oothi gimbidi, yan de7is; yaape keyidi bidi Phin7eela gimbis.
12.26: Iyorbaami ba wozanan, “Kawotethay Dawita kochaas simmana.
12.27: Ha asay Xoossa keethan yarsho yarshanaw Yerusalaame biyaba gidiko, enti banta godaako, kawa Robi7aamako simmana. Enti tana wodhidi, Yihuda kawa Robi7aamako simmana” yaagidi qopis.
12.28: Kawoy zoretidaape guye worqafe nam7u mara misileta medhidi, asaako, “Hinte hizape Yerusalaame buussay gidana. Hinteno Isra7eele asaw, Heko, hintena Gibxefe kessida hinte xoossati haysata!” yaagis.
12.29: Entafe issuwa Beetelen, issuwa Daanen wothis.
12.30: Ha hanotay entaw nagara gidis; asay he mara misiliya goyinnanaw Daane gakanaw bidosona.
12.31: Iyorbaami dere huuphen dhoqa goyinno bessata giigisidi Leewe koche gidonna ixikoka oonaka kahine oothidi shuumis.
12.32: Yihudan boncheysada hospuntho ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasan ba7aale bonchanaada Iyorbaami qamma qachidi yarsho yarshis. I haysada hanidi Beetele bidi, ba medhida mara misiliyas yarsho yarshis. Ba medhida dhoqa goyinno bessatan kahineta Beetelen shuumis.
12.33: I ba huuphen doorida hospuntho ageenan, tammanne ichashantho gallas Beetele bidi he gallasay Isra7eele asaas ba7aale gidana mela awaajis. Ixaane cuyisanaw yarsho bessa keyis.

13.1: Heko, Iyorbaami yarsho shiishanaw yarsho bessa matan eqidashin, Goday kiitida, Xoossa asi gidida issi nabey Yihudape yis.
13.2: Goday kiittin he yarsho bessa bolla haysada yaagidi waassis; “Yarsho bessaw, yarsho bessaw, Goday neeko yaagees. Heko, Dawita keethaas Iyosyaasa geetetiya issi na7i yeletana. He na7ay ha77i haysan dhoqa yarsho bessan yarshishe de7iya kahineta ne bolla yarshana; asaa meqethaa ne bolla xuuggana” yaagis.
13.3: He gallas Xoossa addey haysada yaagidi malaata immis; “Goday odida malaatay haysa; Heko, ha yarsho bessay phalqetana; iya bolla de7iya bidoy laaletana” yaagis.
13.4: Kawoy Iyorbaami Xoossa addey Beetelen de7iya yarsho bessa bolla waassida waasuwa si7ida wode yarsho bessaafe ba kushiya mallidi, “He addiya oykite!” yaagis. Shin I, addiya mallida kushey bessan melidi attin, ba kushiya guye zaaridi ekanaw danda7ibeenna.
13.5: Xoossa addey Godaa qaalan immida malaatan yarsho bessay phalqetidi wodhin, iya bolla de7iya bidoyka laaletis.
13.6: Kawoy Iyorbaami Xoossa addiya, “Ta kushey kaseysada hanana mela taw gaannata; Godaa ne Xoossaa woossa” yaagis. Xoossa addey kawas gaannatidi Godaa woossin, kawa kushey simmidi kaseysada hanis.
13.7: Kawoy nabiyako, “Taara ta soo yedha; kathi ma; ta new imota immana” yaagis.
13.8: Shin Xoossaa addey, “Hari attoshin neeni ne aquwape baggaa taw immiyakoka, taani neera biike; haysan kathi miike, haathe uyike.
13.9: Godaa qaalay, ‘Neeni kathi moopa, haathe uyopa, ne yida ogiyara simmada boopa’ yaagis gidi kawas zaaris.”
13.10: Hessa gisho, I hara ogera bis; I Beetele yida ogiyara simmidi bibeenna.
13.11: He wode Beetelen issi cima nabey de7ees. He gallas Xoossaa addey Beetelen oothidaba ubbaa he cima addiya nayti yidi iyaw odidosona. Qassi he addey kawas odida qaala enti banta aawas odidosona.
13.12: Aaway, “I awu baggara bidee?” yaagin, Yihudape yida Xoossa addey bida ogiya mallidosona.
13.13: I ba naytako “Taw elle hare koorite” yaagin, enti iyaw hare koorin toggis.
13.14: Xoossa addiya geedo kaallidi bis. Issi wolaa kuyan uttidaysa demmidi, “Yihudape yida Xoossa addey nenee?” yaagidi oychis. Addey, “Ee tana” yaagis.
13.15: Cima nabey, “Kathi maanaw taara ta soo yedha” yaagis.
13.16: Xoossa addey zaaridi, “Taani guye simmada neera baanaw woyko ha bessan neera kathi maanaw woyko haathe uyanaw danda7ike.
13.17: Godaa qaalay taako ‘Neeni he bessan kathi moopa, haathe uyopa, ne yida ogiyara simmada boopa’ yaagis” yaagis.
13.18: Cima nabey, “Taka needa nabe. Goday kiitida kiitanchoy taako, ‘Kathi maana melanne haathe uyana mela iya zaarada neera ne soo ekada ya’ ” yaagis. Shin cima addey iyaw wordo odis.
13.19: Hessa gisho, Xoossa addey simmidi iyara iya soo bidi misinne uyis.
13.20: Enti gayta bolla uttidashin, Godaa qaalay iya guye zaarida ehida cima nabiyako yis.
13.21: Yihudape yida Xoossa addiyas ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Neeni Godaa qaala kiitetabaaka; Goday ne Xoossay nena kiitida kiitaa naagabaaka.
13.22: He bessan moopa woyko uyopa’ gida bessaa guye simmada yan kathi madasa; haathe uyadasa. Hiza ne ahay ne aawata duufon moogetenna” yaagis.
13.23: Xoossa addey midi uyidi simmin iya guye zaaridi ehida cima nabey ba hariya iyaw kooris.
13.24: I ogiya bishin gaammoy keyidi iya wodhin, ahay ogiyan kundis; hareynne gaammoy nam7ay aha matan eqidosona.
13.25: Heko, he ogiyara aadhiya asay ahi ogen kundidaysanne gaammoy aha matan eqidysa be7idi, bidi cima nabey de7iya kataman odidosona.
13.26: Iya guye zaarida cima nabey hessa si7ida wode haysada yaagis; “Hessi Godaa qaalas kiitetonna ixida Xoossa addiya. Godaa qaalay iyaw koyrottidi odidaysada Goday gaammon iya gathis; yaatin, gaammoy iya mentherethidi wodhis” yaagis.
13.27: Hessafe guye, cima nabey ba nayta, “Taw hare koorite” yaagin enti iyaw hare kooridosona.
13.28: I keyidi biya wode ogiyan kundida aha, aha matan eqida hariyanne gaammuwa demmis. Gaammoy aha mibeenna woyko hariya menthibeenna.
13.29: Cima nabey Xoossa addiya aha denthidi, hariya zokon wothidi, yeekanawunne mooganaw guye ba katama ekidi bis.
13.30: Baw giigisidi wothida duufon aha moogis. Iyaw, “Ta ishaw taassa! ta ishaw taassa!” yaagidi yeekis.
13.31: Iya moogi simmidi ba naytako haysada yaagis; “Ta hayqiya wode Xoossa addey moogetida duufon tana moogite. Ta meqethaa iya meqethaa matan wothite.
13.32: Beetele kataman de7iya yarsho bessa bollanne Samaare kataman de7iya dhoqa goyinno bessata bolla Goday kiittin, he addey waassidi odida tinbitey tuma poletana” yaagis.
13.33: Hessi haninka Iyorbaami ba iita ogiyape simmibeenna. Dhoqa goyinno bessatas Leewe koche gidonna oonaka kahine oothidi shuumis. Kahine gidanaw koyiya oonaka dhoqa goyinno bessan shuumees.
13.34: Iyorbaama keetha asaa dhaysanawunne biitta bollafe quchanaw gathida nagaray hessa.

14.1: He wode Iyorbaama na7ay Abiyi hargetis.
14.2: Iyorbaami ba machiw, “Denda; neeni Iyorbaama macho gideysa oonika eronna mela ne ma7uwa laammada Seelo ba. Heko, taani ha asaa bolla kawotanaysa taw odida nabey Akiyi yan de7ees.
14.3: Tammu uythu, guutha daabbonne issi oto eessi iyaw ekada ba. Ha hargida na7aba I new odana” yaagis.
14.4: Iyorbaama machiya I gidaysada oothada Akiya soo Seelo basu. Akiyi cimida gisho iya ayfey xeellanaw danda7enna.
14.5: Shin Goday Akiyako, “Heko, Iyorbaama machiya hargetida ba na7aba oychanaw neeko yawusu. Neeni iw haysa haysa yaagada oda. Iya neeko gakiya wode hara maccas daanana” yaagis.
14.6: Akiyi pengen toho girsi si7idi haysada yaagis; “Iyorbaama mache, ane haa gela. Neeni ayis haysa mela hara asi daanadii? Taani iita kiita new odana.
14.7: Neeni Iyorbaamako bada, Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees yaaga; ‘Taani nena asaa giddofe dhoqu oothas; ta asaa Isra7eele bolla nena kawothas.
14.8: Dawita kochaafe kawotethaa ekada new immas; shin neeni ta aylliya Dawita mela gidaka. I ta kiitta naagis; ta sinthan suureba xalaala oothishe ba kumetha wozanan tana kaallis.
14.9: Neepe kase de7iya ubbay oothidaysafe aadhiya iitaba neeni oothadasa. Neeni new hara xoossatanne birape medhida eeqata medhadasa. Yaatada tana hanqethadasa; taw zoko zaaradasa.
14.10: Hessa gisho, taani Iyorbaama keetha asaa bolla iitabaa ehana. Isra7eele biittan Iyorbaama keetha asaape aylle gidin womaanno issi addeka ashshona dhaysana. Kem7eley taman xuugetidi wureysada taani Iyorbaama keethaa xuuggada wursana.
14.11: Iyorbaama koche gididi kataman hayqiya oonaka kanati maana; gaxaren hayqeyisata salo kafoti maana. Taani Goday haysa odas!’ ” yaagis.
14.12: Iyorbaama macheko, “Neeni dendada ne soo ba. Ne tohoy katamaa geliya wode na7ay hayqana.
14.13: Isra7eele ubbay na7aas yeekidi moogana. Iyorbaama keethan Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sinthan iyan lo77obay bentida gisho, Iyorbaama keethaafe iya xalaali moogetana.
14.14: Qassi Iyorbaama keethaa dhaysiya kawo Goday baw Isra7eele bolla denthana.
14.15: Goday Isra7eele shocana; haatha giddon mayrey qaaxeysada Goday he wode Isra7eele qaathana. Asheera geetetiya xoosse misile essidi, Godaa hanqethida gisho, enta aawatas I immida lo77o biittafe enta shoddana; enta Efraxiisa shaafape hefinthan laallana.
14.16: Iyorbaami oothida nagaraa gishonne Isra7eele asaa nagaraa oosisida gisho Goday Isra7eele aggana” yaagis.
14.17: Iyorbaama machiya bada Tirsa gakada, penge yedhiya wode na7ay hayqis.
14.18: Ba aylliya nabiya Akiya baggara Goday odidaysada iya moogidosona; Isra7eele asa ubbay iyaw yeekidosona.
14.19: Iyorbaami oothida harabay, I oletida olaynne iya ayso maaray, heko, Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetidi de7ees.
14.20: Iyorbaami laatamanne nam7u laythi kawotidi hayqis. Iya bessan iya na7ay Naadabi kawotis. Yihuda Kawa Orobi7aama (2 Taari 11:5—12:15)
14.21: Solomone na7ay Robi7aami Yihudan kawotis; Robi7aami kawotiya wode iyaw laythi oytamanne issino. Goday ba sunthay xeegetana mela Isra7eele kochata biitta ubbaa giddofe doorida Yerusalaame kataman, Robi7aami tammanne laapun laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Na7imo; iya Amoone biitta asi.
14.22: Yihuda asay Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothidosona. Banta oothida nagaran banta aawatape aadhidi Godaa hanqethidosona.
14.23: Qassi enti dhoqa goyinno bessata, eeqa shuchatanne Asheero geetetiya xoosse misileta dere bollanne irxa mithata garsan essidosona.
14.24: Hari attoshin, enta dhoqa goyinno bessan, goyinno woga oothidi addey addera gahetees. Goday Isra7eele sinthafe kessida kawotethati oothiya ixetida oosota ubbaa Isra7eele asay oothidosona.
14.25: Robi7aami kawotida ichashantho laythan Gibxe kawoy Shishaaqi Yerusalaame katamaa bola ola denthis.
14.26: Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadhon de7iya shaluwa, Solomoney qoxisida worqa gondalleta ubbaa bonqidi ekis.
14.27: Yaatin, kawoy Robi7aami he gondalleta gisho naase biratape hara gondalleta oosisis. Enti naagetana mela kawo gadho pengiya naageysata halaqatas immis.
14.28: Kawoy Xoossa keethi biya wode naageysati gondalleta oykoosona; I simmidi biya wode enti zaaridi naageysata keethan wothoosona.
14.29: Robi7aami hanida harabaynne I oothida ubbay Yihuda kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
14.30: Robi7aaminne Iyorbaami ubba wode olan de7idosona.
14.31: Robi7aami hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis; Dawita Kataman de7iya ba aawata duufon moogetis. Iya aaye sunthay Na7imo; iya Amoone biitta asi; Orobi7aama bessan iya na7ay Abiyi kawotis.

15.1: Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan Abiyi Yihudan kawotis.
15.2: Abiyi Yerusalaamen heedzu laythi kawotis. Iya aayiya Abeseloome na7a; I sunthay Ma7iko.
15.3: Iyape kase, iya aaway oothida nagara ubbaa oothis. Iya wozanay iya aawa aaway Dawita wozanay polo gididaysada Godaa, ba Xoossaa sinthan polo gidenna.
15.4: Gidoshin, iyape guye Yerusalaamen kawotana melanne Yerusalaame sarotethaa naagana mela Goday iya Xoossay, Dawita gisho Abiyas issi adde na7aa immis.
15.5: Goday hessa oothiday, Dawiti Hite addiya Ooriyoona bolla nagara oothidaysafe attishin, ba de7o laytha ubban Godaa kiitaape issibaaka balibeenna.
15.6: Abiyi de7ida laytha ubban Robi7aaminne Iyorbaami oletishe de7idosona.
15.7: Abiyi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis. Abiyinne Iyorbaami oletishe de7idosona.
15.8: Abiyi hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis; I Dawita Kataman moogetis; iya bessan iya na7ay Asi kawotis. Yihuda Kawa Asa (2 Taari 15:16—16:6)
15.9: Isra7eele kawoy Iyorbaami kawotida laatamantho laythan Asi Yihudan kawotis.
15.10: Asi Yerusalaamen oytamanne issi laythi kawotis. Iya wogga aaye sunthay Ma7iko; iya Abeseloome na7a.
15.11: Asi ba mayzay Dawiti oothidaysada, Godaa sinthan suureba oothis.
15.12: Goyinno woga oothidi addey addera laymatesata Asi biittafe dhaysis. Iyape kase de7iya kawoti medhida eeqa misileta ubbaa mentherethis.
15.13: Iya wogga aayiya Ma7ika Asheera geetetiya xoossees tuna eeqa misile medhida gisho, kawo aayo geetetiya boncho bessaafe iyo diggis. Asi he eeqa misiliya qanxerethidi Qediroona Zangaaran xuuggis.
15.14: Asi dhoqa goyinno bessata ubbaa dhaysona aggikoka, I ba de7ida laytha ubban Xoossas ammanetiya asi gididi de7is.
15.15: Inne iya aaway Xoossas dummayidi wothida bira, worqanne hara miisheta ehidi, Xoossa keethan wothis.
15.16: Yihuda kawoy Asinne Isra7eele kawoy Ba7oosi, banta laytha ubban olan de7idosona.
15.17: Isra7eele kawoy Ba7oosi Yihuda bolla dendidi, Yihuda kawa Asa biittafe oonika gelonna melanne keyonna mela teqanaw Rama yuushuwa gimbis.
15.18: Hessa gaason kawoy Asi Xoossa keethaninne kawo gadhon de7iya worqanne bira ubbaa kessidi ba moorinnata kushen wothis. Heziyoona na7aa na7aa, Xabirmoona na7aas, Damasqon de7iya Araame kawa Ben-Hadaada imota oothidi yeddishe haysada yaagis;
15.19: “Kase ta aawaranne ne aawara caaqidaysada, ane taaranne neera caaqoos. Heko, taani ha biraanne worqaa taani new imota oothada yeddas. Isra7eele kawoy Ba7oosi ba olanchota ta biittafe kessana mela neeni kase iyara caaqida caaquwa mentha” yaagis.
15.20: Ben-Hadaadi kawoy Asi gidaysa ekidi, ba toora moconata Isra7eele katamata olanaw yeddis. Enti Iyoona, Daanenne Abeel-Beet-Ma7ika katamata, Galila Abbaa matan de7iya biittanne Niftaaleme biittara gathidi oykidosona.
15.21: Kawoy Ba7oosi hessa si7idi, Rama gimbeysa aggidi Tirsa bis.
15.22: Hessafe guye kawoy Asi Yihudan de7iya asa ubbaa kiittin, issoyka attonna dendidi, Ba7oosi yan go7etiya shuchaanne mithaa Ramape gaazidosona. Kawoy Asi Mixiphaninne Biniyaamen de7iya Gib7a gimbis.
15.23: Asi hanida harabay, iya minotethay ubbay, I oothidaba ubbaynne I keexida katamati Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis. Shin I cimida wode ba tohuwa saketis.
15.24: Asi hayqidi, ba mayzatan gahetidi ba mayza Dawita Kataman moogetis. Iya na7ay Iyosaafexi iya bessan kawotis. Isra7eele Kawa Nadaaba
15.25: Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida nam7antho laythan Iyorbaama na7ay Naadabi Isra7eelen kawotis; I Isra7eele biittan nam7u laythi kawotis.
15.26: Naadabi kase ba aawa ogiyaninne Isra7eele asaa oosisida iya nagara ogiyan hemetidi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
15.27: Yisakoora koche gidida Akiya na7ay Ba7oosi Nadaaba bolla maqetis. He wode Naadabeynne iya olanchoti Filisxeemen de7iya Gibatoona katamaa yuushon de7oosona.
15.28: Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida heedzantho laythan Ba7oosi Nadaaba wodhidi iya bessan I baw kawotis.
15.29: Ba7oosi kawoto doomida mela Iyorbaama soo asa ubbaa wodhidi wursis. Goday Seelope yida ba aylliya, nabiya Akiya baggara odidaysada Iyorbaama keetha asa ubbay hayqi wuris.
15.30: Hessi haniday, Iyorbaami ba huuphen oothida nagaraninne Isra7eele asaa I oosisida nagaran Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa hanqethida gishosa.
15.31: Naadabi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
15.32: Yihuda kawoy Asinne Isra7eele kawoy Ba7oosi banta kawotetha laytha ubban oletida mela de7idosona. Isra7eele Kawa Ba7oosa
15.33: Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida heedzantho laythan Akiya na7ay Ba7oosi Isra7eele bolla kawotis; I Tirsa kataman uttidi laatamanne oyddu laythi kawotis.
15.34: Iyorbaami Isra7eele asaa nagara oosisidaysada ika he ogiyan hemetidi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.

16.1: Hanaana na7aa gidida, Iyyu baggara Godaa qaalay Ba7oosaba haysada yaagis;
16.2: “Taani nena baanape denthada ta asaa Isra7eele bolla halaqa oothas; shin neeni Iyorbaama ogiyan hemetadasa. Qassi ta asaa Isra7eele nagara oosisada enta nagaran tana hanqethadasa.
16.3: Heko, taani Ba7oosanne iya soo asaa pittana hanayis. Ba7oosa, taani ne soo asaa Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaama soo asaada oothana.
16.4: Ba7oosa koche gididi kataman hayqiya oonaka kani maana; qassi gaxaren hayqiya oonaka salo kafoti maana” yaagis.
16.5: Ba7oosi hanida harabay, I oothidabaynne iya minotethay Isra7eele kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
16.6: Ba7oosi hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetidi, Tirsa kataman moogetis. Iya na7ay Eli iya bessan kawotis.
16.7: Gujidika, Goday, nabiya Iyyu baggara Ba7oosa bollanne iya soo asaa bolla tinbite odida gaasoy, Ba7oosi oothida nagara gishonne Iyorbaaminne iya soo asay oothidaysada iitabaa oothidi, Godaa hanqethida gishosa. Qassi I Iyorbaama soo asa ubbaa wodhidi wursida gishosa. Isra7eele Kawa Ela
16.8: Yihuda Kawoy Asi kawotida laatamanne usupuntho laythan, Ba7oosa na7ay Eli Isra7eelen kawotis. Tirsa kataman uttidi nam7u laythi kawotis.
16.9: Kawa toora moconatape issuwa gididi, iya para gaaretape baggaa kiittiya Zimiri kawa bolla maqetis. Kawoy Eli he wode Tirsan de7iya kawo gadho aawatethan aysiya Arxa son mathotidi uttis.
16.10: Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida laatamanne laapuntha laythan Zimiri, Arxa soo gelidi kawa wodhidi iya bessan baw kawotis.
16.11: Zimira kawotida mela Ba7oosa soo asa ubbaa wodhis. Ba7oosi dabbo gidin lagge gidin issi addeka paxa ashshibeenna.
16.12: Nabiya Iyyu baggara Goday Ba7oosa bolla odida qaalada Zimiri Ba7oosa soo asa ubbaa wodhidi dhaysis.
16.13: Hessi haniday Ba7oosinne iya na7ay Eli banta eeqa goyinnidi oothida nagaraa gaasoninne Isra7eele asa oosisida nagaraa gaason, Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa hanqethida gishosa.
16.14: Eli hanida harabaynne I oothidabay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis. Isra7eele Kawa Zimira
16.15: Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida laatamanne laapuntha laythan Zimiri Tirsan laapun gallasa xalaala kawotis. He wode Isra7eele olanchoti Gibatoona geetetiya Filisxeeme katamaa yuushuwa teqidosona.
16.16: Isra7eele asay Zimirii kawa bolla maqetidi iya wodhidaysa si7ida wode toora mocona Omira he gallas he bessan Isra7eele kawo oothidi kawothidosona.
16.17: Omirinne Isra7eele asay Gibatoonape keyidi Tirsa katamaa teqidosona.
16.18: Katamay oyketidaysa be7ida wode Zimiri kawo gadho giddon de7iya gimbiya gelidi kawo gadho taman oythis; ika hayqis.
16.19: Hessi haniday Iyorbaami oothida nagaranne Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraa kaallidi Zimiri Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothida gishosa.
16.20: Zimiri hanida harabaynne I maqida maqoy Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis. Isra7eele Kawa Omira
16.21: He wode Isra7eele asay nam7u keyidi shaaketis. Asaape baggay Ginata na7aa Tibina kawothanaw koyin, baggay qassi Omira kawothanaw koyis.
16.22: Shin Omira maaddiya asay Ginata na7aa Tibina maaddiya asaape minnida gisho Tibini hayqin Omiri kawotis.
16.23: Yihuda Kawoy Asi kawotida hastamanne issintho laythan, Omiri Isra7eele bolla kawotidi tammanne nam7u laythi haaris; iyape usupun laytha Tirsan haaris.
16.24: Omiri Samaariya zuma Samira geetetiya addiyafe 6,000 bira santimen shammidi, yan katama keexis. He katamaa he zuma godaa sunthan Samaare gidi sunthis.
16.25: Shin Omiri Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; I kase de7ida kawota ubbaafe aathidi nagara oothis.
16.26: Omiri Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami oothida nagaraanne Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraa kaallis; he pathonna eeqa gaason Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaa hanqethis.
16.27: Omiri hanida harabay, I oothidabaynne iya minotethay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
16.28: Omiri hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetidi, Samaaren moogetis. Iya na7ay Akaabi iya bessan kawotis. Isra7eele Kawa Akaaba
16.29: Yihuda Kawoy Asi kawotida hastamanne hospuntho laythan, Omira na7ay Akaabi Isra7eelen kawotis. Omira na7ay Akaabi Samaaren Isra7eele bolla laatamanne nam7u laythi kawotis.
16.30: Omira na7ay Akaabi baape sinthe kawotida kawota ubbaafe aadhiya iitabaa Godaa sinthan oothis.
16.31: Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami oothida nagaraa laafaba gidi qofo xalaala gidonashin, Sidoona kawa Etbaala na7iw Elzabeelo baw macho ekidi, Ba7aale eeqas oosonne goyinno doomis.
16.32: Samaaren I keexisida Ba7aale Eeqa Keethan yarsho bessi keexis.
16.33: Qassi Akaabi Asheera geetetiya xoosse misiliya essidi, baape sinthe de7ida kawota ubbaafe aathidi Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa hanqethiya nagara oothis.
16.34: Akaaba kawotethaa wode Beetelepe yida, Hi7eela addey Iyaarko zaaridi keexis. Nawe na7aa Iyyasu baggara Goday odidaysada, Hi7eeli Iyaarko keexanaw baasiya wode Abeero geetetiya bayra na7ay hayqis. Qassi sanqa aathiya wode Saguba geetetiya kaalo na7ay hayqis.

17.1: Galadan Tesibape yida nabey, Eeliyaasi kawa Akaaba haysada yaagis; “Taani iyaw oothiya Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay ero! Kaallidi yaana laythatan, taani odonna de7ishin, sa7an iri bukenna woyko xaasatenna” yaagis.
17.2: Hessafe guye, Godaa qaalay Eeliyaasako yidi haysada yaagis;
17.3: “Haysafe dendada doloha bagga ba; yan Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggara de7iya Koraata zangaaran qosetta.
17.4: Neeni he shaafape haathe uyana; quuroti nena he bessan kathi muzanaada ta enta kiittas” yaagis.
17.5: Eeliyaasi Goday gidaysada oothis; Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggara de7iya Koraata zangaara bidi yan uttis.
17.6: Wontanne omarsi quuroti uythinne asho Eeliyaasas ehoosona; I shaafape haathe uyis.
17.7: Biittan iri bukonna gisho, guutha wodepe guye shaafay melis. Eeliyaasanne Sarapta Am7iw
17.8: Hessafe guye, Godaa qaalay Eeliyaasako haysada yaagis;
17.9: “Ha bessaafe dendada, Sidoona matan de7iya Sarapta bada yan de7aasha. Heko, issi am7iya kathi nena muzana mela taani kiittas” yaagis.
17.10: Eeliyaasi dendidi Sarapta bidi katama pengiya gakiya wode, Heko, issi am7iya mithi mixawusu. Eeliyaasi maccasiw xeegidi, “Hayyana, taw haathe uyanaw bulera ekada ya” yaagis.
17.11: Maccasiya haathe ehanaw bishin I xeegidi, “Hayyana guutha baso uythika ekada ya” yaagis.
17.12: Maccasiya zaarada, “Goday, ne de7o Xoossay ero! Taw uythi baawa. Taw oton issi kuuca dhiilleynne guutha zayte xalaali xaaron de7ees. Taani haysa yiday guutha mithi mixada, soo simmada, hinno tawunne ta na7aas issi toho uukidi midi hayqana” yaagasu.
17.13: Eeliyaasi zaaridi, “Aykoy baawa, yayyofa; bada ne kathaa katha. Shin koyro ne dhiilliyafe guutha uythi laqada taw ekada ya; hessafe guye, newunne ne na7aas uuka.
17.14: Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, ‘Sa7aa bolla iri bukana gakanaw dhiilley otuwape zaytey xaaruwape wurenna’ yaagees” yaagis.
17.15: Hessa gisho, maccasiya bada, Eeliyaasi gidaysada oothasu; hessada hanin, Eeliyaasi, maccasiyanne I soo asay daro wodes gidiya kathi demmidosona.
17.16: Goday Eeliyaasa baggara odida qaala naagidi, otuwape dhiilley xaaruwape zaytey wuribeenna.
17.17: Guutha wodepe guye he maccase na7ay hargis; hargey goobishe bin, wursethan na7ay hayqis.
17.18: Maccasiya Eeliyaasako, “Xoossa addiyaw, ne ta bolla haysada ayis oothadii? Ne ta nagaraa hassaysada ta na7aa wodhanaw yadii?” yaagasu.
17.19: Eeliyaasi, “Ne na7aa haa ekada ya” yaagis. Na7aa I ki7uwape ekidi, pude ba de7iya pooqiya efidi ba arsan zin7isis.
17.20: Yaatidi Godaako haysada yaagidi waassis; “Abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw, ha taani de7iya am7e na7aa wodhada, haysa mela meto I bolla ayis ehay?” yaagis.
17.21: Hessafe guye, na7aa bolla heedzu toho zaqullidi, “Abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw, ha na7aa patha” yaagidi woossis.
17.22: Goday Eeliyaasa woosa si7is. Na7aa shempoy simmin, na7ay paxis.
17.23: Eeliyaasi na7aa ekidi pooqiyape duge wodhis; na7aa aayes immidi, “Heko ne na7ay paxis” yaagis.
17.24: Maccasiya, “Neeni Xoossa asi gideysanne ne doonape keyiya Godaa qaalay tuma gideysa taani ha77i eras” yaagasu.

18.1: Iri bukonna aggin heedzantho laythan, Goday Eeliyaasako, “Bada kawa Akaabas qonca. Ta biittan ira bukisana” yaagis.
18.2: Eeliyaasi Akaabas qoncanaw dendidi bis. He wode Samaaren wolqaama koshi keyis.
18.3: Akaabi ba kawo gadhuwa aawatethan aysiya Abdiyu xeegis. Abdiyuy Godaa minthidi ammaniya asi.
18.4: Elzabeela Godaa sunthan nabeta wodhida wode Abdiyuy entafe xeetata ekidi, ishataman ishataman shaakidi, gongolo giddon qosidi, kathinne haathe immishe gam7is.
18.5: Akaabi Abdiyu xeegidi, “Maata demmidi paratanne baqulota hayqope ashshanaw biittan pultoy de7iya bessinne shaafa gaxan ubbaa ba” yaagis.
18.6: Enti biittan awu bagga baaneko shaaketidi ekin, Akaabi issi ogiya oykidi barka bis; Abdiyuy hara oge oykidi barka bis.
18.7: Abdiyuy ba ogiya oykidi bishin, Heko, Eeliyaasi iyara gahetis. Abdiyuy Eeliyaasa eridi ba som7uwan gufannidi, “Ta godaw Eeliyaasa, haysi nenee?” yaagis.
18.8: Eeliyaasi, “Ee tana; neeni bada, heko, Eeliyaasi haysan de7ees yaagada ne godaas oda” yaagis.
18.9: Abdiyuy zaaridi, “Ta nena ay qohin ne tana ne aylliya hayqo gada Akaaba kushen aathada immay?
18.10: Goday, ne de7o Xoossay ero! Ta goday nena koyana mela kiitiboonna biitti woyko kawotethi baawa. Enti, ‘Eeliyaasi haysan baawa’ giya wode ne yan baynaysi tuma gideysa eranaw Akaabi deriya ayseysata caaqisees.
18.11: Ha77i neeni, ‘Bada, Eeliyaasi haysan de7ees’ yaagada oda” yaagasa.
18.12: “Ta nena aggada biya wode Godaa Ayyaanay nena denthidi, ta eronna bessi efana. Ta Akaabas odin, I nena demmona ixiko, tana wodhana. Taani ne aylley na7atethafe doomada Godaa yayiya asi.
18.13: Elzabeela Godaa nabeta wodhida wode, taani entafe xeeta ekada, ishataman ishataman shaakada issi gongolon qosada, kathinne haathe immas. Yaatin, taani oothidabay new ta godaas odetibeennee?
18.14: Ha77i neeni, ‘Bada, heko, Eeliyaasi haysan de7ees’ yaagada oda yaagasa. Ta odiko I tana wodhana” yaagis.
18.15: Eeliyaasi, “Taani iyaw kiitetiya, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday ero! Tuma taani hachi Akaabas qoncana” yaagis.
18.16: Abdiyuy Akaabako bidi Akaabas odin, Akaabi Eeliyaasara gahetanaw bis.
18.17: Akaabi Eeliyaasa be7ida wode, “Isra7eele biitta buqey nenee?” yaagis.
18.18: Eeliyaasi zaaridi, “Isra7eele biitta buqey tana gidonashin, Godaa kiita aggidi, Ba7aale eeqata goyinnidi, biitta buqey nenanne ne aawa soo asaa.
18.19: Ha77i, Isra7eele asa ubbaa Qarmeloosa zuma bolla taako shiisha. Elzabeeli gibira miya oyddu xeetanne ishatamu Ba7aale nabetanne oyddu xeetu Asheera nabeta issife ha bessaa shiisha” yaagis.
18.20: Hessa gisho, Akaabi kiittidi, Isra7eele asa ubbaanne nabeta Qarmeloosa zuma bolla shiishis.
18.21: Eeliyaasi shiiqida asaako bidi, “Awude gakanaw nam7u wozanan daanee? Goday Xoosse gidiko iya goyinnite; Ba7aaley Xoosse gidiko iya goyinnite” yaagis. Gidoshin, asay iyaw issi qaalaka zaaribeenna.
18.22: Hessafe guye, Eeliyaasi, “Godaa nabetape ta xalaali attas; shin Ba7aale nabeti oyddu xeetanne ishatama.
18.23: Ane nuus nam7u kormata imeto. He kormatape issuwa enti dooro; kormaa shukidi qanxeretho; ashuwa mitha bolla wotho; shin tama eethofo. Taani nam7antho korma giigisada, mitha bolla wothana; taka tama eethike.
18.24: Hinte, hinte xoossaa sunthaa xeegite; taka Godaa sunthaa xeegana. Si7idi yarshuwa miya tama kiittiya xoossay, i, Xoosse gido” yaagis. Asay, “Ne giya qofay lo77o” yaagidosona.
18.25: Hessa gisho, Eeliyaasi Ba7aale nabetako, “Hinte daro gidiya gisho, issi korma dooridi koyrottidi giigisite. Hinte xoossaa sunthaa xeegite; shin iyan tama eethofite” yaagis.
18.26: Enti bantaw imetida kormaa ekidi giigisidosona. Wontafe seeta gallas gakanaw Ba7aale sunthaa xeegidi, “Ba7aale, nuna si7a” yaagidi woossidosona. Shin si7etiya girsi baawa; zaariya asi bentibeenna. Banta giigisida yarsho bessa yuushuwan duridosona.
18.27: Sa7i seeta gallasa gidin, Eeliyaasi, “Hinte qaala dhoqu oothidi woossite! I Xoosse gidenne! Ooni eri, I qofan gelidaako woyko iyaw oosoy daridaako woyko mandaridaako woyko dhiskidaba gidiko denthanaw koshshees” yaagidi qelqisis.
18.28: Enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi woossidosona. Kase banta goyinniya wogaada banta asatethara suuthi goggana gakanaw tooraninne mashshan bantana caddidosona.
18.29: Omarsi yarsho shiishiya wodey gakanaw enti tinbite odidosona; shin si7etiya girsi baawa; entana hayzidi zaaro immiya asi dhayis.
18.30: Hessafe guye, Eeliyaasi, “Haa taako shiiqite” yaagis. Asay iyako shiiqin, laaletida Godaa yarsho bessaa zaaridi gimbis.
18.31: Godaa qaalay Yayqoobako, “Ne sunthay Isra7eele gidana” yaagidi odida, Yayqooba nayta kochata taybuwan tammanne nam7u shuchata ekis.
18.32: Godaa sunthan he shuchata keelidi, yarsho bessi gimbidi, tammanne oyddu litiro haathe oykiya olla yarsho bessa yuushon bookis.
18.33: Hessafe guye, yarsho bessan mithi wothidi, kormaa ashuwa iya qommuwan qommuwan qanxerethidi, mithaa bolla wothis. Asaako, “Oyddu baathe haathe kunthidi, yarshuwa bollanne mithaa bolla gussite” yaagis; enti gussidosona.
18.34: Qassika, Eeliyaasi, “Nam7antho gujite” yaagis; enti nam7antho gujidosona. Qassika, Eeliyaasi, “Heedzantho gujite” yaagis; heedzantho gujidosona.
18.35: Haathay yarsho bessa yuushuwan goggidi, ollan kumis.
18.36: Omarsa yarsho shiishiya wode nabey Eeliyaasi yarsho bessaako shiiqidi haysada yaagidi woossis; “Abeeti Godaw, Abrahaame Xoossaw, Yisaaqa Xoossaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, neeni Isra7eele biittan Xoosse gideysa, taani ne aylle gideysanne taani haysa ubbaa ne qaalan oothidaysi hachi ereto.
18.37: Abeeti Godaw, taw koya. Neeni, Goday Xoosse gideysanne enta wozanaa neeko zaarey nena gideysa ha asay erana mela taw koya!” yaagis.
18.38: Godaa tamay salope wodhidi, xuussa yarshuwa, mithaa, shuchaanne biitta mis; ollan de7iya haatha laacis.
18.39: Asa ubbay hessa be7ida wode, banta som7ora sa7an gufannidi, “Goday Xoosse! Godaa xalaali Xoosse!” yaagidosona.
18.40: Eeliyaasi, “Ba7aale nabeta oykite; entafe issi asika kessi ekofo” yaagis. Asay enta oykidosona; Eeliyaasi enta Qisoona Shaafa efidi wodhis. Goday Ira Buksis
18.41: Eeliyaasi Akaabako, “Keyada ba; ma; uya; taani, wolqaama ira guunthi si7ayis” yaagis.
18.42: Hessa gisho, Akaabi maanawunne uyanaw bis. Shin Eeliyaasi Qarmeloosa zuma bolla keyidi, ba som7uwa ba gulbata giddo gelsidi hokis.
18.43: Eeliyaasi ba aylliyako, “Ane bada, abbaako simmada xeella” yaagis. Iya aylley bidi xeellidi, “Aybika bentenna” yaagis. Eeliyaasi ba aylliya laapun toho, “Qassika bada xeella” yaagis. Iya aylley laapun toho xeellis.
18.44: Laapunthon, “Kushe qaaqape daronna guutha shaari abbafe keyishin be7as” yaagis. Eeliyaasi, “Bada, ‘iri nena buussu diggonna mela ne para gaariyan uttada ne soo ba’ yaagada Akaabas oda” yaagis.
18.45: Guutha wodepe guye saloy kareetha shaaran dulkis; carkoy carkis; wolqaama iri bukis. Akaabi para gaariyan uttidi Izra7eela katamaa bis.
18.46: Godaa wolqay Eeliyaasa bolla wodhis. Eeliyaasi ba ma7uwa xeessan pude siqidi, Izra7eela katamaa gakanaw Akaaba sinthan woxis.

19.1: Eeliyaasi oothidaba ubbaanne Ba7aale nabeta ubbaa mashshan wodhidaysa Akaabi Elzabeelis odis.
19.2: Elzabeela, “Neeni he nabeta bolla oothidaysada wonto hannoode taani ne bolla oothonna ixiko, xoossati tana pirdo” yaagada Eeliyaasako kiittasu.
19.3: Eeliyaasi ba shempuwas yayyidi, ba aylliya ekidi, Yihuda biittan de7iya Barsaabe bis.
19.4: Issi gallasa oge mela biittan hemetis. I hemethaa aggidi issi sankara kuya garsan uttidi, “Abeeti Godaw, taw gidana; taani ta mayzatape aadhidike; ta shempuwa eka” yaagidi hayqo woossis.
19.5: Hessafe guye, sankara kuya garsan zaqullidi dhiskis. I dhiskidashin, Heko, issi kiitanchoy iya bochidi, “Denda; ma” yaagis.
19.6: I dendidi xeelliya wode, Heko, shucha mishan uuketidi, kaxida uythinne oto haathi iya huupheson be7is. I midi uyidaape guye simmidi dhiskis.
19.7: Godaa kiitanchoy nam7antho yidi, “Eeliyaasa, neeni baana ogey daro adusse gidiya gisho, dendada ma” yaagis.
19.8: Eeliyaasi dendidi mis, uyis. He I mida kathaa wolqan Xoossa Zumaa Koreeba gakanaw oytamu gallasinne oytamu qamma hemetis.
19.9: I yaa gakidi, gongolo giddo gelidi aqis. Goday, “Eeliyaasa, haysan ay oothay?” giya Xoossa qaalay iyako yis.
19.10: Eeliyaasi, “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa Xoossaas taani daro mishetas. Isra7eele asay neera caaqida caaquwa menthis; ne yarsho bessa laallidosona; ne nabeta mashshan wodhidosona. Taani tarka attas; ha77i enti ta shempuwa wodhanaw koyoosona” yaagis.
19.11: Goday, “Haysafe keyada deriya huuphen ta sinthan eqa” yaagis. Eeliyaasi eqidashin, Heko, Goday iya matara aadhis. He wode wolqaama carkoy zumaa phalqerethis; zaallata tincherethis; shin Goday he carkuwa giddon baawa. Carkuwafe guye biitti qaaxis; shin Goday he biitta qaaxuwan baawa.
19.12: Biitta qaaxuwape guye tami keyis; shin Goday tama giddon baawa. Tamape guye kalkashi si7etis.
19.13: Eeliyaasi he kalkashaa si7ida wode ba som7uwa afilan kammidi, kare keyidi gongoluwa pengen eqis. Heko, issi girsi Eeliyaasako, “Eeliyaasa, haysan ay oothay?” yaagis.
19.14: Eeliyaasi, “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa Xoossaas taani mishetas. Isra7eele asay neera caaqida caaquwa menthidosona; ne yarsho bessa laallidosona; ne nabeta mashshan wodhidosona. Taani tarka attas; enti ta shempuwa ekanaw koyoosona” yaagis.
19.15: Goday iyako, “Neeni yida ogiyara guye simmada Damasqo mela biitta ba. Neeni yaa gakiya wode Azaheela, Soore bolla kawo oothada tiya.
19.16: Namisa na7aa, Iyyu Isra7eele bolla kawo oothada tiya. Ne bessan nabe oothada Abeel-Mahoola addiya Safaaxa na7aa Elsa tiya.
19.17: Azaheela mashshafe kessi ekiya ubbaa Iyyuy wodhana; Iyyu mashshafe kessi ekiya ubbaa Elsi wodhana.
19.18: Shin Ba7aale eeqa goyinnona woyko banta doonan Ba7aale eeqa yeeronna 7,000 asaa taani Isra7eelen taw ashshana” yaagis. Eeliyaasi Elsa Xeegis
19.19: Eeliyaasi he bessaafe dendidi bishe Safaaxa na7ay Elsi tammanne nam7u waaxa booran gade goyishin demmis; Elsi tammanne nam7antho waaxan goyees. Eeliyaasi iya matara aadhishe ba afila iya bolla yeggis.
19.20: Elsi boorata essidi, Eeliyaasa geedo woxi bidi, “Taani ta aawanne ta aayiw yeera sarothada yaana; yaape simmada nena kaallana” yaagis. Eeliyaasi, “Ero ba; ta nena diggike” yaagis.
19.21: Hessa gisho, Elsi guye simmidi waatha boorata shukis; boora miishiya qeridi ashuwa kathidi, asaas aathin asay midosona. Hessafe guye, dendi bidi, Eeliyaasas kiitetis.

20.1: Soore kawoy Ben-Hadaadi ba olanchota ubbaa shiishis. Hastamanne nam7u kawotan, enta parataninne para gaaretan maadetidi, Samaare katamaa teqidi; iya olis.
20.2: Isra7eele kawa Akaabako ase kiittidi haysada yaagis;
20.3: “Ne biraynne ne worqay tabaa; ne machetinne ne naytape lo77oti tabaa” yaagis.
20.4: Isra7eele kawoy zaaridi, “Ee, ta godaw kawaw, ne gidaysa mela; taka taw de7iyaba ubbay nebaa” yaagis.
20.5: Qassika, kiitetida asati nam7antho bidi, “Ben-Hadaadi haysada yaagees; ‘Ne biraanne ne worqaa, ne machetanne ne nayta taw sheedha’ gada kiittas.
20.6: Shin wonto hannoode ne kawo gadhuwanne ne moorinnata keethaa pilgana mela ta oosanchota yeddana. Enti ne lo77oba gada wothidaba ubbaa efana” yaagidosona.
20.7: Isra7eele kawoy biitta cimata ubbaa shiishidi, “Ha addey nuna dhaysanaw koyeysa be7ite. I ta machetanne ta nayta, ta biraanne ta worqaa ekanaw kiittin, ta ixabike” yaagis.
20.8: Cimatinne asa ubbay, “I odiyaba si7opa! Woyko iyaw ero goopa” yaagidosona.
20.9: Hessa gisho, Akaabi Ben-Hadaadi kiitida asatako, “Hinte ta godaa kawa, ‘Neeni koyro kiitida kiitaa ta polana; shin ha nam7antho kiita polanaw danda7ike’ yaagees gidi odite” yaagis. Kiitetida asati bidi hessa Ben-Hadaadas odidosona.
20.10: Ben-Hadaadi, “Tana kaalliya asaas Samaare kataman issi kuuca biitti gakiko xoossati tana pirdo” yaagis.
20.11: Isra7eele kawoy kiitetidi yidaysatako, “ ‘Tuma olanchoy olape simmishe gayresipe attishin, buroo bishe gayrenna’ yaagidi odite” yaagis.
20.12: Ben-Hadaadinne kawoti, banta dunkaaniya giddon ushshu uyishe hessa si7ida wode kawoy ba olanchotako, “Olanaw salpite” yaagidi kiittin, enti katamaa olanaw salpidosona.
20.13: Heko, issi nabey Isra7eele kawa Akaabako, “Goday ‘Ha daro olanchota ubbaa be7a? Taani hachi enta ne kushen aathada immana; ta Godaa gideysa neeni he wode erana’ yaagees” yaagis.
20.14: Akaabi, “Olaa doomanay oonee?” yaagis. Nabey, “Awuraja haareysati kiittiya na7atetha olanchoti doomo” yaagis. Kawoy, “Attiya olanchota ooni kiittanee?” yaagis. Nabey, “Neeni kiitta” yaagis.
20.15: Hessa gisho, Akaabi awuraja haareysati kiittiya na7atetha olanchota, 232 shiishis. Qassi 7,000 attida Isra7eele asaa shiishis.
20.16: Ben-Hadaadi bana maaddida hastamanne nam7u kawotara issife dunkaaniyan uttidi ushshan mathotidashin, seeta gallas Isra7eele olanchoti olas keyidosona.
20.17: Awuraja haareysati kiittiya na7atetha olanchoti koyro keyidi bidosona. Ben-Hadaadi xomoosana mela kiitida asati, “Samaarepe asay keyidi yuussaa bolla de7ees” yaagidi odis.
20.18: Ben-Hadaadi, “Enti sigetanaw yin, woyko oletanaw yin, enta paxa oykite” yaagis.
20.19: Awuraja haareysati kiittiya na7atetha olanchoti salpidi, katamaape gaxa keyidosona; Isra7eele olanchoti enta kaallidi keyidosona.
20.20: Issoy issoy baara ola gahetida morkiya wodhidosona. Soore asay baqatin, Isra7eele asati kaallidi yedethidosona. Qassi Soore Kawoy Ben-Hadaadi ba para asatara ba paran kessi ekidi bis.
20.21: Isra7eele kawoy olas keyidi, paratanne para gaareta di77is; Soore asaaka wodho buthis.
20.22: Hessafe guye, nabey Isra7eele kawako bidi, “Bada nena mintha. Oothanaw bessiyaba akeekada ootha. Wonto laythi bone Soore kawoy nena nam7antho olanaw yaana” yaagis.
20.23: Soore kawa moorinnati iya haysada yaagidi zoridosona; “Enta xoossati dere xoossata; enti nuna xooniday hessa gishosa. Shin nu entara denban oletiyako tuma nu enta xoonana.
20.24: Neeni issiba ootha; hastamanne nam7u kawota kiittiya halaqatethafe denthada enta bessan hara halaqata shuuma.
20.25: Nuuni Isra7eeletara denban oletidi xoonanaw danda7ana mela new kase wurida olanchota bessan olanchota, parata bessan parata, para gaareta bessan para gaareta wothada giigisa” yaagidosona. Kawoy Ben-Hadaadi enta zoriya ekidi hessada oothis.
20.26: Kaalliya laythi bone Ben-Hadaadi Soore olanchota shiishidi, Isra7eeletara oletanaw Afeeqa bis.
20.27: Isra7eele olanchoti shiiqidi, shinqenne ola miishe ekidi, entara oletanaw nam7u cuga gididi keyidosona. Isra7eeleti nam7u guutha deesha wude daanidi, entako simmidi uttidosona; shin Sooreti gaxariya ubbaa ma7idosona.
20.28: Issi Xoossa nabey Isra7eele kawako bidi, “Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Soore asay, Xoossay dere Xoossefe attishin, demba Xoossi gidenna yaagida gisho, ha daro olanchota taani ne kushen aathada immana. He wode taani Godaa gideysa neeninne ne asay erana’ ” yaagis.
20.29: Sooretinne Isra7eeleti woliko simmi salpidi, laapun gallas takidosona. Laapuntha gallasan ola gahetidosona. Isra7eeleti issi gallasan Soore asaape 100,000 toho asaa wodhidosona.
20.30: Entafe attidaysati kessi ekidi, Afeeqa katamaa gelidosona. Gelidaysatape 27,000 asaa bolla katamaa dirsa gimbey kundidi wodhis. Ben-Hadaadi katamaa giddo baqatidi, issi keetha qol7an qosetis.
20.31: Iya moorinnati, “Heko, Isra7eele kawoti, maariya kawota gideysa nu si7ida. Nuuni kayo ma7o ma7idi, nu xeessan wodoro dancidi, Isra7eele kawako boos; ooni eri, I nena paxa ashshona aggenna” yaagidosona.
20.32: Enti kayo ma7o ma7idi, wodoro banta xeessan dancidi, Isra7eele kawako bidosona. Iyako “Ne aylley Benihadad, tana wodhopa yaagidi woossees” yaagidosona. Kawoy, “I hanno gakanaw paxa de7ii? I ta ishaa” yaagis.
20.33: Akaabi lo77o malla haasaya daanin, asati iya odaa ellesi ekidi, “Ee, ne ishay Benihadad paxa de7ees” yaagidosona. I entako, “Bidi iya haa ekidi yiite” yaagis. Benihadad yin, Akaabi iya ba para gaariya bolla kessidi utisis.
20.34: Benihadad Akaabako, “Ta aaway ne aawape ekida katamata ta new zaarana. Ta aaway Samaaren giya essidaysada neka Damasqon giya essa” yaagis. Akaabi zaaridi, “Taani ha caaquwa gaasoyada nena yeddana” yaagis. Iyara caaqidi iya yeddis. Akaaba Bolla Odetida Tinbite
20.35: Nabeta cugaape issi addey, Goday kiittin, issi ba lagge nabiyako, “Tana shoca” yaagis; shin he nabey shoconna ixis.
20.36: He nabey iyako, “Neeni Godaa kiitaa ixida gisho, Heko, ne taape shaaketada biya wode nena gaammoy wodhana” yaagis. Nabey iyape shaaketidi biya wode gaammoy keyidi iya wodhis.
20.37: Nabey hara issi adde demmidi, “Tana shoca” yaagis. Addey iya shocin, nabey madunxis.
20.38: Nabey iya oonatethay eretonna mela guuluntidi kawa naagishe oge doonan eqis.
20.39: Kawoy aadhiya wode, nabey kawa xeegidi, “Taani ne aylley olan de7ishin, Heko, issi addey taako yidi, ‘Ha di7etida addiya naaga. Ha addey dhayiyaba gidiko, ne shempoy iya shempuwara gade woyko 3,000 bira santime qanxaasa’ yaagis.
20.40: Taani ne aylley oosoy darin, yaa haa gishin, addey kessi ekidi dhayis” yaagis. Isra7eele kawoy, “Neeni ne bolla pirdadasa” yaagis.
20.41: Nabey ba guulunthaa qaari yeggiya wode nabetape issuwa gideysa kawoy eris.
20.42: Nabey kawako, “Goday, ‘Taani, I hayqanaw bessees yaagida addiya ne yeddida gisho, ne shempoy iya shempuwa bessan, ne asay iya asaa bessan gidana’ ” yaagis.
20.43: Isra7eele kawoy yilotishenne azzanishe Samaaren de7iya ba gadho simmis.

21.1: Samaare Kawa Akaaba gadho matan Naabutes Izira7eelen woyne gadey de7ees.
21.2: Akaabi Naabuteko, “Ta gadhuwa matan de7iya gisho, ta atakilte tokiya bessi oothanaw ne woyne gadiya taw imma. Iya gisho new ta hara lo77o woyne gade immana; woyko ne dosiko iya gatiya ta new qanxana” yaagis.
21.3: Naabutey zaaridi, “Taani ta aawatape laattida gade new imisiyabaape Goday tana asho” yaagis.
21.4: Izira7eele addey Naabutey, “Taani ta aawatape laattida gade new immike” gida gisho, Akaabi yilotishenne azzanishe ba soo bidi, godaako simmi zin7idi, kathika moonna ixis.
21.5: Iya machiya Elzabeela iyako gelada, “Nena haysada yiloyiday aybee? Ayis kathi moonna ixay?” yaagada oychasu.
21.6: Akaabi, “Izira7eele addey Naabutey, ‘Ne woyne gadiya taw bayza woyko ne dosiko iya gisho ta new hara woyne gade immana’ yaagin, I, ‘Ta woyne gadiya new immike’ yaagin, ta hessa gisho yilotis” yaagis.
21.7: Elzabeela, “Ne Isra7eele bolla kawo gida uttada haysada hanay? Dendada ma! Wozanape ufayta! Izira7eele addiya Naabute woyne gadiya taani new imisana” yaagasu.
21.8: Hessa gisho, iya Akaaba sunthan dabdaabe xaafada, iya bolla maatame wothasu. Naabutera issife kataman de7iya cimatasinne gita asatas kiittasu.
21.9: Dabdaabe haysada yaagada xaafasu; “Issi gallas xooma awaajite; asaa issife shiishite; Naabute boncho bessan utisite.
21.10: Naabutey, ‘Xoossaanne kawa cayis’ yaagidi markatiya nam7u markata shiishidi, markatanaada oothite. Hessafe guye, katamaape gaxa kessidi, shuchan caddidi wodhite” yaagada xaafasu.
21.11: Hessa gisho, Naabutera issife kataman de7iya cimatinne gita asati Elzabeela entaw xaafida dabdaabiyan gidaysada oothidosona.
21.12: Enti xooma awaajidi, Naabute asaa giddon boncho bessan utisidosona.
21.13: Nam7u wordo markati yidi, iyako simmi uttidi, asaa sinthan, “Naabutey Xoossaanne kawa cayis” yaagidi wordo markatidosona. Naabute katamaape gaxa kessidi, shuchan caddidi wodhidosona.
21.14: Cimati Elzabeeliko, “Naabutey shuchan cadetidi hayqis” yaagidi kiittidosona.
21.15: Naabutey shuchan cadetidi hayqidaysa Elzabeela si7ida wode, “Izira7eele addiya Naabutey new miishen bayzanaw ixida woyne gadiya bada eka. I ha77i hayqis” yaagasu.
21.16: Izira7eele addey Naabutey hayqidaysa Akaabi si7idi, Naabute woyne gadiya baw ekanaw dendidi bis.
21.17: Hessafe guye, Tesiba addiya Eeliyaasako Godaa qaalay yidi,
21.18: “Samaaren kawotida Isra7eele Kawa Akaabara gahetanaw ba. Heko, I Naabute woyne gadiya ekanaw bidi, yan de7ees.
21.19: Goday haysada yaagees gada iyaw oda; ‘Addiya wodhada iya gadiya new ekadasa gidikii?’ yaaga. Qassi Goday, ‘Naabute suutha kanati laaccida bessan ne suuthaaka kanati laaccana’ ” yaagis.
21.20: Akaabi Eeliyaasa be7ida wode, “Ta morkiyaw, tana demmadii?” yaagis. Eeliyaasi, “Ee, nena demmas. Neeni Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothanaw nena nagaras bayzadasa.
21.21: Goday neeko haysada yaagees; ‘Heko, taani ne bolla iitabaa ehana. Taani ne kochata dhaysana; taani Isra7eele biittan Akaaba soo asaape aylle gidin womaanno gidin, issi addey attonna dhaysana.
21.22: Neeni Isra7eele asaa nagara oosisada tana hanqethida gisho, ta ne soo asaa Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaama soo asaadanne Akiya na7aa Ba7oosa soo asaada oothana.’
21.23: Qassi Goday Elzabeeliba odishe, ‘Izira7eele katama gimbe dirsaa lanqen kanati Elzabeelo maana’ yaagees.
21.24: Akaaba koche gididi kataman hayqiya oonaka kani maana; gaxariyan hayqiya oonaka salo kafoti maana” yaagis.
21.25: Ba machiya Elzabeela denthethin, Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothanaw bana nagaras bayzida Akaaba mela asi baawa.
21.26: Akaabi, Goday Isra7eele asaa sinthafe gooddidi kessida Amooreta eeqa goyinnidi daro ixetidaba hanis.
21.27: Akaabi hessa si7ida wode ba ma7uwa daakidi, kayo ma7o ma7idi xoomis. Kayo ma7o ma7idi dhiskees; azzanishe hemetees.
21.28: Hessafe guye Godaa qaalay Tesiba addiya Eeliyaasako yidi,
21.29: “Akaabi bana ta sinthan waatidi kawushidaako be7adii? I ta sinthan bana kawushida gisho, taani dhayuwa iya wode ehike. Shin taani iya na7aa woden iya soo asaa bolla ha dhayuwa ehana” yaagis.

22.1: Sooreynne Isra7eeley oletonna heedzu laythi saro de7idosona.
22.2: Heedzantho laythan, Yihuda kawoy Iyosaafexi Isra7eele kawa be7anaw bis.
22.3: Isra7eele kawoy ba moorinnatako, “Galadan de7iya Raamota katamay nubaa gideysanne nuuni hanno gakanaw he katamaa Soore kawuwape ekanaw aykoka oothonaysa ereketii?” yaagis.
22.4: I, Iyosaafexa, “Galadan de7iya Raamota katamaa olanaw taara baanee?” yaagidi oychis. Iyosaafexi zaaridi, “Ee, neeni olaa baanaw giigiya wode ta neera baana. Ta olanchoti ne olanchota; ta parati ne parata” yaagis.
22.5: Qassi, Iyosaafexi Isra7eele kawa, “Gidoshin, sinthatada Godaa oycha” yaagis.
22.6: Isra7eele kawoy oyddu xeetu nabeta issife shiishidi, “Galadan de7iya Raamota katama olanaw booye boopo” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Ba; Goday he katamaa kawa kushen aathidi immana” yaagidosona.
22.7: Shin Iyosaafexi, “Nuuni Godaa oychanaw danda7iya hara nabey haysan baawee?” yaagis.
22.8: Isra7eele kawoy zaaridi, “Nuuni iya baggara Godaa oychanaw danda7iya issi addey de7ees. I, Yimila na7aa Mikiyaasa. Shin I ubba wode tabaa iitabaape attishin, lo77oba odonna gisho ta iya ixayis.” Iyosaafexi, “Kawoy hessa goopo!” yaagis.
22.9: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele kawoy ba moorinatape issuwa xeegidi, “Yimila na7aa Mikiyaasa elle ekada ya” yaagis.
22.10: Isra7eele kawoynne Yihuda kawoy Iyosaafexi banta kawotetha ma7uwa ma7idi, Samaare katamaa geliya pengiya matan de7iya wudumman banta kawotetha araatan uttidosona; nabeti ubbay enta sinthan tinbite odoosona.
22.11: Entafe issoy, Kanaane na7ay Sedeqiyaasi birata kaceta giigisidi, “Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Sooreti dhayana gakanaw ne enta ha kacetan qaycana’ ” yaagis.
22.12: Hara nabeti ubbay, “Galadan de7iya Raamota katamaa bada ola; xoona. Goday he katamaa, kawa kushen aathidi immana” yaagidi odidosona.
22.13: Mikiyaasa xeeganaw kiitetidi bida addey, “Heko, nabeti ubbay issi doona gididi, ‘Kawoy ha olaa xoonana’ yaagidi odidosona. Hessa gisho, hayyana ne odayka entaysa mela gido; ne lo77oba oda” yaagis.
22.14: Shin Mikiyaasi, “Goday eriya mela, Goday taw odiyaba ta odana” yaagis.
22.15: Mikiyaasi kawako yida wode, kawoy, “Mikiyaasa, nu Galadan de7iya Raamota katamaa olanaw biino boopo” yaagidi oychis. Mikiyaasi, “Bada ola; ne xoonana. Goday he katama kawa kushen aathidi immana” yaagis.
22.16: Kawoy, “Ne Godaa sunthan taw tuma odana mela ta nena aapun toho caaqetho?” yaagis.
22.17: Mikiyaasi, “Isra7eele olanchoti ubbay henthanchoy bayna dorsada deriya bolla laaletidaysa ta be7as. Goday, ‘Haysatas godi baawa. Enti ubbay banta soo soo saro boo’ ” yaagis.
22.18: Isra7eele kawoy Iyosaafexako, “I tabaa iitabaa odeesipe attishin, lo77oba odi erenna gada, ta new odabikina?” yaagis.
22.19: Mikiyaasi gujidi, “Hiza Goday giyaba si7a! Goday ba araatan uttin, salo kiitanchoti ubbay iya ushachaninne haddirsan eqidashin be7as.
22.20: Goday, ‘Akaabi Galadan de7iya Raamota katamaa bidi, yan hayqana mela balethanay oonee?’ yaagis. Issoy haysada giya wode hankoy qassi hessada gees.
22.21: Wursethan issi ayyaani keyidi Godaa sinthan eqidi, ‘Ta iya balethana’ ” yaagis.
22.22: Goday, “Ne waata balethanee?” yaagis. Ayyaanay, “Ta bada, iya nabeta ubbaa doonan wordo ayyaana gidana” yaagis. Goday, “Ne iya balethana; new hessi hanana. Bada baletha” yaagis.
22.23: Mikiyaasi gujidika, “Heko, Goday ne bolla dhayo ehanaw qachida gisho ne nabeta ubbaa doonan wordo ayyaana wothis” yaagis.
22.24: Hessafe guye, Kenaana na7ay Sedeqiyaasi shiiqidi, Mikiyaasa baqidi, “Godaa Ayyaanay tana aggidi waanidi new odanaw bidee?” yaagis.
22.25: Mikiyaasi, “Heko, neeni qosetanaw qol7a geliya gallas hessa demmana” yaagis.
22.26: Isra7eele kawoy ba olanchotape issuwa, “Mikiyaasa oykada katama haariya Amoonesinne ta na7aa Iyo7aasas efada imma.
22.27: Kawoy simmana gakanaw ha addiya qasho keethan wothite. Taani saro simmana gakanaw, guutha uythafenne haathaafe haraba aykoka iyaw immopite” yaagis.
22.28: Mikiyaasi, “Tuma ne saro simmiyaba gidiko, Goday taw odibeenna” yaagis. Qassika, Mikiyaasi, “Asa ubbay ta odidaysa akeekite” yaagis. Akaaba Hayquwa (2 Taari 18:28-34)
22.29: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele kawoynne Yihuda kawoy Iyosaafexi Galadan de7iya Raamota katamaa bidosona.
22.30: Isra7eele kawoy Iyosaafexi, “Ta ma7uwa laammada, hara asi daanada olaa gelana; shin neeni ne kawo ma7uwa ma7a” yaagis. Isra7eele kawoy ma7uwa laammidi, hara asi daanidi olaa gelis.
22.31: Soore kawoy ba para gaareta kiittiya hastamanne nam7u asatako, “Kawa xalaali attishin, hara ooderaka oletofite” yaagidi kiittis.
22.32: Para gaariya kiitteysati Iyosaafexa be7ida wode, “Tuma haysi Isra7eele kawa” yaagidosona. Iyara oletanaw simmin Iyosaafexi waassis.
22.33: Para gaareta kiitteysati, I Isra7eele kawa gidonnaysa be7idi, iya yedetheysa aggaagidosona.
22.34: Gidoshin, issi addey coo ba dongiya bolla dukidi, Isra7eele kawa olaa ma7oy gahetiya bessaara caddin, Isra7eele kawoy ba gaariya laagiya addiyako, “Gaariya guye zaarada, tana olaa giddofe kessa; taani iita cache cadetas” yaagis.
22.35: He gallas olay goobiya wode, Isra7eele kawoy Akaabi ba para gaariya giddon zempidi, Sooreta sinthan takis. Iya suuthay para gaariya giddo gukin, I omarsi hayqis.
22.36: Away wullanaw matishin, “Asa ubbay ba katamaa katamaa boo! Asa ubbay ba biitta biitta boo!” giya kiiti si7etis.
22.37: Enti kawa Samaare katamaa efidi yan moogidosona.
22.38: Layma maccasati meecetiya, teqetidi uttida Samaare haathan gaariya meeccidosona. Goday kase odida qaalada iya suuthaa kanati laacidosona.
22.39: Akaabi hanida harabay, I oothidaba ubbay, dangarsa zaalen kawo gadho keexidabaanne gimbida katamatabay ubbay Isra7eele kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
22.40: Akaabi hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis; iya bessan iya na7ay Akaziyaasi kawotis. Yihuda Kawa Iyosaafexa (2 Taari 20:31—21:1)
22.41: Isra7eele kawoy Akaabi kawotida oyddantho laythan Asa na7ay Iyosaafexi Yihudan kawotis.
22.42: I kawotiya wode laythi iyaw hastamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen laatamanne ichashu laythi kawotis. Iya aayiya Shiliha na7iw Azuubo.
22.43: Iyosaafexi ba aawa Asa ogiyan hemetis; I he ogiyape gede haa gibeenna; Godaa sinthan suureba oothis. Gidoshin, dhoqa goyinno bessata dhaysibeenna; asay he bessan yarshonne ixaane cuyisethi aggibeenna.
22.45: Iyosaafexi hanida harabay, iya minotethaynne I oletida olay Yihuda kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
22.46: Iya aaway Asi kawotida wodiyape doomin, attida addera addera laymateyisata biittafe diggis.
22.47: He wode Edoome biittan kawoy baawa; he biittan shuumetida halaqi haaris.
22.48: Ofira biittafe worqa ehana mela Iyosaafexi gita markabeta oosisis; shin he markabeti Exiyoon-Gabiran meqeretidosonape attishin, kumthi bibookona.
22.49: He wode Akaaba na7ay Akaziyaasi, “Ta oosanchoti ne oosanchotara issife markabiyan boo” yaagis; shin Iyosaafexi ixis.
22.50: Iyosaafexi hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis. Ba mayza Dawita Kataman moogetis. Iya bessan iya na7ay Iyoraami kawotis. Isra7eele Kawa Akaziyaasa
22.51: Yihuda kawoy Iyosaafexi kawotida tammanne laapuntho laythan, Akaaba na7ay Akaziyaasi Isra7eele bolla Samaaren kawotis; Isra7eele bolla nam7u laythi kawotis.
22.52: Akaziyaasi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; ba aawanne ba aaye ogiyaninne Isra7eele asa nagara oosisida, Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaama ogiyan hemetis.
22.53: Akaziyaasi Ba7aale eeqas oothis; iya goyinnis. Iya aaway kase oothidaysada, Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa hanqethis.

1.1: Akaabi hayqidaape guye, Moo7abe asay Isra7eele bolla dendidosona.
1.2: He wode kawoy Akaziyaasi Samaare katama bolla de7iya pooqiya barandaafe kundidi deshetis. Hessa gisho, asatako, “Bidi, taani ha hargiyafe paxaneko paxonnaako Eqroona xoossaa Bi7eel-Zebuula ane oychite” yaagidi kiittis.
1.3: Shin Godaa kiitanchoy Tesiba addiya Eeliyaasa haysada yaagis; “Pude bada, Samaare kawoy kiitida asatara gahetada, ‘Hinte Eqroona xoossaa Bi7eel-Zebuula oychanaw biday, Isra7eelen Xoossi dhayineyee?’
1.4: Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Kawaw, neeni hayqanaape attishin, ha zin7ida hiixape dendaka’ yaagees” yaaga. Hessa gisho, Eeliyaasi bidi entaw odis.
1.5: Kiitetida asati kawako guye simmin, “Ayis simmidetii?” yaagidi enta oychis.
1.6: Enti, “Issi addey nuura gahetanaw yidi, hintena kiitida kawako simmidi, haysada yaagidi odite. Goday neeko, ‘Eqroona xoossa Bi7eel-Zebuula oychanaw neeni ase kiittey, Isra7eelen xoossi dhayneyee? Hessa gisho, neeni hayqanaape attishin, ha zin7ida hiixape dendaka’ yaagees” yaagidosona.
1.7: Kawoy, “Hintera gahetanaw yidi, haysa hintew odida addey ay mela asee?” yaagidi oychis.
1.8: Enti, “Ikisepe oosetida ma7o ma7idi, ba xeessan dafo dancees” yaagidi zaaridosona. Kawoy, “Hessi Tesiba addiya Eeliyaasa” yaagis.
1.9: Hessafe guye, kawoy issi toora mocona ishatamu wotaadaretara kiittis. Toora moconay dere huuphen uttida Eeliyaasako keyidi, “Xoossa aso, kawoy nena, duge wodhada haaya” yaagees.
1.10: Shin Eeliyaasi toora moconaako, “Taani Xoossaa asi gidiko, tami salope wodhidi, nenanne ne wotaadareta mo” yaagidi zaaris. Tami salope wodhidi, iyanne iya wotaadareta mis.
1.11: Kawoy hara toora mocona ishatamu wotaadaretara Eeliyaasako kiittis. Tora moconay Eeliyaasako, “Xoossa aso, kawoy nena duge wodhada haaya” yaagees.
1.12: Eeliyaasi, “Taani Xoossaa asi gidiko, tami salope wodhidi, nenanne ne wotaadareta mo” yaagis. Xoossa tami salope wodhidi, iyanne iya wotaadareta mis.
1.13: Kawoy heedzantho hara tora mocona ishatamu wotaadaretara Eeliyaasako kiittis. tora moconay Eeliyaasako bidi, iya sinthan gulbatidi, “Xoossa aso, hayyana tawunne taara de7iya asaas qadheta; nu shempuwa hayqope ashsha.
1.14: Heko, tami salope wodhidi, kase nam7u toora moconatanne enta wotaadareta mis. Shin ha77i taw qadheta!” yaagidi woossis.
1.15: Godaa kiitanchoy Eeliyaasako, “Yayyofa! Iyara duge wodha” yaagis. Eeliyaasi dendidi, iyara kawako duge bis.
1.16: “Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Isra7eelen Xoossi dhayine, neeni Eqroona xoossaa Bi7eel-Zebuula oychanaw ase kiittiday? Neeni haysa oothida gisho, hayqana! Ne zin7ida hiixape dendaka’ ” yaagees.
1.17: Eeliyaasi odida Xoossaa qaalada Akaziyaasi hayqis; Akaziyaasas adde na7i bayna gisho, iya ishay Iyoraami iya bessan kawotis. Hessi haniday Iyosaafexa na7ay Iyoraami Yihudan kawotida nam7antho laythana.
1.18: Akaziyaasi oothida haraba ubbay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetidi de7ees.

2.1: Goday Eeliyaasa goten salo efanaw haniya wode, Eeliyaasinne Elsi Galgalape dendidi bidosona.
2.2: Eeliyaasi Elsako, “Goday tana Beetele kiitida gisho, hayyana neeni haysan gam7aasha” yaagis. Shin Elsi, “Goday eriya mela, ne shempoy ero! Taani neepe shaaketike” yaagis. Enti duge Beetele wodhidosona.
2.3: Beetelen de7iya nabeta cugay Elsako keyidi, “Goday hachi ne godaa neepe shaakidi efana haneysa eray?” yaagidi oychidosona. Elsi, “Ee erayis; shin hinte si77i giite” yaagidi zaaris.
2.4: Eeliyaasi Elsako, “Goday tana Iyaarko kiitida gisho, hayyana neeni haysan gam7aasha” yaagis. Shin Elsi, “Goday eriya mela, ne shempoy ero! Taani neepe shaaketike” yaagidi zaaris. Hessa gisho, enti Iyaarko bidosona.
2.5: Iyaarkon de7iya nabeta cugay Elsako keyidi, “Goday hachi ne godaa neepe shaakidi efana haneysa eray?” yaagidi oychidosona. I, “Ee erayis; shin hinte si77i giite” yaagidi zaaris.
2.6: Eeliyaasi Elsako, “Goday tana Yordaanose Shaafa kiitida gisho, hayyana neeni haysan gam7aasha” yaagis. Elsi, “Goday eriya mela, ne shempoy ero! Taani neepe shaaketike” yaagis. Enti nam7ay issife bidosona.
2.7: Nabetape ishatamu asati enta kaallidi, Yordaanose Shaafa gakanaw bidosona. Eeliyaasinne Elsi shaafa doonan eqidashin, nabeti entafe guuthu haakidi eqidosona.
2.8: He wode Eeliyaasi ba afilaa ekidi xaaxidi, iyara haatha shocin, haathay yaanne haanne shaaketin mela biittara pinnidosona.
2.9: Eeliyaasi Elsako, “Taani neepe eketanaape sinthe, new ay oothana mela koyay?” yaagis. Elsi, “Ne ayyaanay ta bolla nam7u kushe gidana mela, taani nena woossayis” yaagidi zaaris.
2.10: Elsi, “Neeni waaysiya oysho oychadasa. Shin taani neepe eketiya wode neeni tana xeelliyaba gidiko, hessi new hanana. Ne be7onna ixiko hanenna” yaagis.
2.11: Enti issife odetishe hemetishin, tama paratinne tama gaareti enta nam7aafe giddon gelidi, shaakis. Eeliyaasi goten salo keyis.
2.12: Elsi hessa be7idi, “Ta aawaw, ta aawaw! Isra7eele paratonne para gaareto!” yaagidi waassis. Hessafe simmin, I Eeliyaasa zaaridi be7ibeenna. Elsi azzanidi, ba ma7uwa nam7a kessidi, daakis.
2.13: Eeliyaasape wodhida ma7uwa denthidi, guye simmidi, Yordaanose Shaafa doonan eqis.
2.14: Eeliyaasape wodhida ma7uwa ekidi, iyara haatha shocidi, “Goday Eeliyaasa Xoossay awun de7ii?” yaagis. Elsi haatha shocida wode, haathay yaanne haanne shaaketin, shaafa pinnis.
2.15: Iyaarko yida nabeta cugay Elsa be7ida wode, “Eeliyaasa ayyaanay Elsa bolla shempis” yaagidosona. Enti iyara gahetanaw yidi, iya sinthan gufannidosona.
