19.28: Neeni ta bolla yilotida gishonne ne otoruwaka taani si7ida gisho, taani ne siidhiyan dafo aathana; ne doonan bixaala barsana. Yaatada ne yida ogiyara taani nena guye zaarana” yaagis.
19.29: Isayaasi kawa Hizqiyaasako haysada yaagis; “Haysi poletanaysas malaatay haysa; ha laythi hinte aasebo kaxida kathi maana; laythi qassi ha laythi kaxida aasebo maana. Shin kaalliya laythi hinte, hintew zeritenne cakite; woyne tokitenne iya miite.
19.30: Yihuda asaape attidaysati xapho yeddidi, ayfe ayfiya mitha mela gidana.
19.31: Attidaysati Yerusalaamepe keyana, palahidaysati Xiyoonepe yaana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa mishay hessa oothana.
19.32: “Hessa gisho, Asoore kawuwaba Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Asoore kawoy ha katama gelenna; woyko haysan ba donge dukenna. I ba gondalliya oykidi, ha katama sinthe aadhenna; woyko katama yuushuwa biitta dooren teqetenna.
19.33: Asoore kawoy ba yida ogiyara guye simmana; I ha katama gelenna. Taani Goday haysa odas.’
19.34: Taani ta bonchuwa gishonne ta aylliya Dawita gisho, ha katama teqada ashshana” yaagis.
19.35: He qamma Godaa kiitanchoy keyidi, Asoore asay dunkaanida bessan issi xeetanne hospun tammanne ichashu mukulu addeta wodhis. Yaatin asay wonta dendidi be7iya wode, Heko, ahi heeran kumis.
19.36: Asoore kawoy Sanakreemi dendidi, guye simmi bidi, Nanawe kataman uttis.
19.37: Issi gallas Sanakreemi ba xoossaa Nasaraaka Eeqa Keethan goyinnishin, iya nayti Adramelekinne Sarsari mashshan iya wodhidi, Araraate biitta baqatidosona. Iya na7ay Asradooni iya bessan kawotis.

20.1: He wode kawoy Hizqiyaasi hargidi, hayqanaw matis. Amoxe na7ay nabey Isayaasi iyako bidi, “Goday, ‘Neeni ne hargiyafe paxaka; ne hayqana; hessa gisho, ne keetha giigisa’ ” yaagis.
20.2: Hizqiyaasi godaako simmidi, Xoossaa woossis.
20.3: “Abeeti Godaw, taani ne sinthan tumatethan, kumetha wozanan hemetidaysanne nena ufaysiyabaa oothidaysa neeni qopana mela taani ne woossayis” yaagidi, daro cametidi, yeekidi woossis.
20.4: Isayaasi kawa sinthafe keyidi, kawo gadho dabaaba kanthidi boonna de7ishin, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe iyako yis.
20.5: “Guye simmada bada ta asaa kaalethiya Hizqiyaasas haysada yaagada oda. Goday, ne mayza Dawita Xoossay haysada yaagees; ‘Taani ne woosa si7as; ne afuthaa be7as. Heko, taani nena pathana; heedzu gallasape guye, neeni Xoossa keethi baana.
20.6: Ne laytha bolla taani new tammanne ichashu laythi gujana. Taani nenanne ha katamaa Asoore kawa kushepe ashshana. Taani ta bonchuwa gishonne ta aylliya Dawita gisho, ha katamaas oletada ashshana’ yaagees” yaagis.
20.7: Isayaasi, “Balase teera daaxidi, iya kixa bolla wothite; I paxana” yaagis.
20.8: Hizqiyaasi Isayaasa, “Goday tana pathanaysanne taani heedzantho gallas Xoossa keetha baanaysas malaatay aybee?” yaagidi oychis.
20.9: Isayaasi, “Goday ba gida qaala polanaw new malaata immana. Hiza neeni haysatape awusa dooray? Kuyay tammu dethaa sintha baana mela koyayee? Tammu dethata guye baana mela koyay?” yaagidi oychis.
20.10: Hizqiyaasi, “Kuyay sinthe baanaysi metenna; kuyay guye simmanaada ootha” yaagis.
20.11: Nabey Isayaasi Godaa woossin, Goday Kawoy Akaazi gimbisida dethaa bolla shempida kuyay tammu dethaa guye zaaris. Babiloonepe Kiitetida Asata (Isa 39:1-8)
20.12: He wode Baldaana na7ay, Babiloone kawoy, Marodaaki Baldaani Hizqiyaasi hargidaysa si7ida gisho, dabdaabenne imota Hizqiyaasas yeddis.
20.13: Hizqiyaasi kiitetidi yida asata mokis. Ba shalo minjiya keethan de7iya bira, worqaa, sawuwa, al7o zaytiya, ba ola miishiyanne ba shalo minjiya keethan de7iyaba ubbaa enta bessis. Ba son woyko ba gadhon de7iyaba ubbaafe Hizqiyaasi enta bessonna aggidabay aybika baawa.
20.14: Nabey Isayaasi kawa Hizqiyaasako bidi, “Ha asati woygidona? Enti awupe yidona?” yaagidi oychis. Hizqiyaasi, “Enti taako haaho biittafe, Babiloonepe yidosona” yaagis.
20.15: Isayaasi, “Enti ne son ay ay be7idonaa?” yaagis. Hizqiyaasi, “Enti ta gadhon de7iya ubbaa be7idosona; ta shalo minjiya keethan de7iyabaape taani enta bessaboonabay baawa” yaagis.
20.17: ‘Heko, ne gadhon de7iyaba ubbaynne ne mayzati hachi gakanaw shiishidaba ubbay di7etidi, Babiloone biitta baana gallas yaana; iyape aybika attenna.
20.18: Qassi new yeletana, ne ashonne ne suuthu gidida ne adde nayti di7etidi bidi, Babiloone kawo gadhon shuufa gididi oothana’ ” yaagis.
20.19: Hizqiyaasi zaaridi, “Neeni odida Godaa qaalay lo77o” yaagis. Hizqiyaasi, “Taani de7ida laythan saroynne wopatethi daana gidenne” yaagidi qopis. Hizqiyaasa Hayquwa (2 Taari 32:32-33)
20.20: Hizqiyaasi hanida harabay, iya minotethaynne haatha zeeridi, biitta giddora haathe katama gelsidabay Yihuda kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
20.21: Hizqiyaasi hayqidi, ba mayzatan gahetis; iya bessan iya na7ay Minaasey kawotis.

21.1: Minaasey kawotiya wode iyaw laythi tammanne nam7a; I Yerusalaamen ishatammanne ichashu laythi kawotis; iya aaye sunthay Hefseebo.
21.2: Goday Isra7eele asa sinthafe gooddidi kessida asata de7uwa wogaa kaallidi, Minaasey Godaa sinthan iitaba oothis.
21.3: Iya aaway Hizqiyaasi laallida, dhoqa goyinno bessata I zaaridi keexis; Isra7eele kawoy Akaabi oothidaysada, Ba7aale xoossaas yarsho bessatanne Asheera xoosse misileta medhis. Qassi salo xoolintota ubbaa goyinnis; entana haggaazis.
21.4: Goday, “Taani ta sunthaa Yerusalaamen xeegisana” yaagidi odida Xoossa keethan hara xoossatas yarsho bessata giigisis.
21.5: Xoossa keethan de7iya nam7u dabaabatan salo xoolintota ubbaas yarsho bessata giigisis.
21.6: Ba na7aa tama giddora aathis. I ba huuphen bitanchonne murunniya asi gididi, marotanne moytilleta zore oychis. Godaa sinthan daro iitabaa oothidi, iya hanqethis.
21.7: Masetidi keyida Asheera xoosse misiliya ehidi, Xoossa keetha giddon essis. He Xoossa keethay, Goday Dawitanne iya na7aa Solomone, “Isra7eele zare ubbaa giddofe taani doorida ha Xoossa keethan Yerusalaamen taani ta sunthaa merinaw xeegisana.
21.8: Isra7eele asa taani kiitida kiita ubbaanne ta aylley Musey entaw immida higgiya ubba naagidi oothiko, taani enta mayzatas immida biittafe enta denthada dhaysike” yaagida Xoossa keetha.
21.9: Shin asay si7onnan ixis; Goday Isra7eele asaa sinthafe dhaysida hara kawotethatape aadhidi iita oothana mela Minaasey enta balethis.
21.10: Goday ba aylle gidida nabeta baggara haysada yaagis;
21.11: “Yihuda kawoy Minaasey ha tuna oosuwa oothis; baape kase de7ida Amoore asa ubbaa nagaraape aadhiya iita nagara oothis. Yihuda asa ba medhida eeqa misiliya goyinnisidi, nagara oosisis.
21.12: Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; ‘Heko, si7iya asa ubbaa haythas iitiya dhayo Yerusalaame bollanne Yihuda bolla ehana hanayis.
21.13: Samaare bolla yeggida wadha wodoruwa, Yerusalaame bolla yeggana; Akaaba soo asaa bolla yeddida tumbiya, Yerusalaame bolla yeddana. Issi asi kere meeccidi gufanthidi meliseysada, taani Yerusalaame quchada gufanthana.
21.14: Ta asaape attidaysata taani yegga aggana; taani enta enta morketa kushen aathada immana. Enta morketi ubbay enta oykananne bonqana.
21.15: Enta mayzati Gibxefe keyoosope hachi gakanaw, enti ta sinthan iitabaa oothida gishonne tana hanqethida gisho, taani haysa oothana’ ” yaagis.
21.16: Minaasey Yihuda asaa, Godaa sinthan nagara oosisidaysa bolla gujidi, xillo asaa wodhis; Yerusalaame gaxape gaxa gakanaw, suuthan kunthis.
21.17: Minaasey hanida harabay, I oothidabay, I oothida nagaray Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
21.18: Minaasey hayqidi, ba mayzatan gahetis; ba gadhuwa matan de7iya Oza gaden moogetis; iya bessan iya na7ay Amooni kawotis. Yihuda Kawa Amoone (2 Taari 33:21-25)
21.19: Amooni kawotiya wode, iyaw laythi laatamanne nam7a; I Yerusalaamen nam7u laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Masulaamo; iya Yooxiba addiya Haruse na7a.
21.20: Iya aaway, Minaasey oothidaysada, Amooneyka Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
21.21: I ba aaway hemetida ogiyan hemetis; ba aaway oothida eeqatas ika oothis; enta goyinnis.
21.22: Godaa, ba mayzata Xoossaa aggis; Godaa ogiyan I hemetibeenna.
21.23: Amoone shuumati iya bolla maqetidi, kawo gadhon iya wodhidosona.
21.24: Hessafe guye, Yihuda asay Kawa Amoone bolla maqetida ubbata wodhidosona. Amoone bessan iya na7aa Iyosyaasa kawothidosona.
21.25: Amooni hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
21.26: Amooni Oza gaden ba duufuwan moogetis; iya bessan iya na7ay Iyosyaasi kawotis.

22.1: Iyosyaasi kawotiya wode, iyaw laythi hospuna; I Yerusalaamen hastamanne issi laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Yidida; iya Baxuroota addiya Adaya na7a.
22.2: Iyosyaasi Godaa sinthan suureba oothis; ushachi haddirsi goonna ba mayza Dawita ogiyan hemetis. Higge Maxaafay Bentis (2 Taari 34:8-28)
22.3: Kawoy Iyosyaasi ba kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan, Masulaama na7aa na7aa, Ezalaasa na7aa, waanna xaafiya Safaana, Xoossa keethan haysada yaagidi kiittis.
22.4: “Asay Xoossa keethi ehin, Xoossa keetha pengiya naageysati asaape shiishida miishiya taybanaada, kahine halaqa Kalqeko ba.
22.5: Kahine halaqay miishiya Xoossa keetha oorathanaw halaqatas immana mela oda. Entika Xoossa keetha oorathiya oosanchotas,
22.6: anaaxetas, gimbeysatsinne shuchu masseysatas qanxo. Qassi Xoossa keetha oorathanaw, mithinne qoo7etida shuchu shammeysatas qanxo.
22.7: Oosuwa aawatethan xeelleysati ammanthiya asi gidiya gisho, enta kushen gelida miishiyan ay ay oothidaako, enta oychanaw koshshenna” yaagis.
22.8: Hessafe guye, kahine halaqay Kalqey waanna xaafiya Saafanako, “Higge Maxaafa Xoossa keethan demmas” yaagis. Maxaafa Saafanas immin Safaani ekidi nabbabis.
22.9: Waanna xaafey Safaani kawako bidi, “Xoossa keethan de7iya miishiya ne shuumati ekidi, Xoossa keetha oorathanaw halaqatas immidosona” yaagis.
22.10: Kaallidi, waanna xaafey Safaani, “Kahiney Kalqey taw immida maxaafaa haysa be7a” yaagidi kawa sinthan maxaafaa nabbabis.
22.11: Nabbabin Kawoy Higge Maxaafan de7iya qaala si7ida wode, azzanidi ba ma7uwa daakis.
22.12: Kawoy, kahiniya Kalqe, Safaana na7aa Akqaama, Mikiyaasa na7aa Akboora, waanna xaafiya Saafananne kawa oosanchuwa Asaya haysada yaagidi kiittis.
22.13: “Bidi, ta gisho, ha asaa gishonne Yihuda ubbaa gisho, ha bentida maxaafa qaalaba ane Godaa oychite. Nuuni xaafetida ubbaba oothanaw, nu mayzati ha maxaafa qaalas kiitetiboonna gisho, nu bolla suullida Godaa hanqoy daro” yaagis.
22.14: Yaagin kahiney Kalqiyaasi, Akqaami, Akboori, Safaaninne Asayi macca nabiw Hildaana oychanaw bidosona. Hildaana Harihaasa na7aa Tiqiwa na7a, Xoossa keetha ma7uwa naagiya Saleema macho. Iya Yerusalaamen nam7antho gutan de7awsu. He bida asati iira odetidosona.
22.15: Hildaana, “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; hintena taako kiitida addiyas odite.
22.16: Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Yihuda kawoy nabbabida maxaafan xaafetida iita qaala ubbaa taani ha bessaaninne iyan de7iya asaa bolla ehana hanayis.
22.17: Enti tana aggidi, hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisidosona; enti banta kushen oothidaba ubban tana hanqethidosona. Hessa gisho, ta hanqoy ha bessaa bolla eexis; to7anaw danda7enna’ yaagees.
22.18: Godaa oychanaw hintena kiitida kawako haysada yaagite; ‘Goday Isra7eele Xoossay neeni si7ida qaalaba haysada yaagees.
22.19: Taani ha bessaanne iyan de7iya asa baadethasinne dhayos aathada immana gida qaala si7ida wode, ne wozanay shuggin, ta sinthan nena kawushida gishonne ne ma7uwa daakada, ta sinthan yeekida gisho, taani ne woosa si7as.
22.20: Hessa gisho, taani nena saron ne mayzatan gathana; neeni saro moogetana. Taani ha bessaa bollanne ha bessan de7iya asaa bolla ehana iitaba ne ayfey be7enna’ yaagees” yaagasu. Enti bidi, ha odetidaba kawas odidosona.

23.1: Kawoy Iyosyaasi Yihuda cimatanne Yerusalaame cimata ubbaa shiishis.
23.2: Kawoy pude Xoossa keethi keyis; Yihuda asay, Yerusalaamen de7iya asay, kahinetinne nabeti, guuthafe gita gakanaw ubbay iyara issife pude Xoossa keethi keyidosona. Xoossa keethafe bentida caaqo qaala maxaafa ubbaa kawoy entaw nabbabis.
23.3: Kawoy tuussa matan eqidi, enti Godaa ogiyan hemetananne, iya higgiya, iya wogaanne iya kiita kumetha wozananine kumetha qofan naaganaw, qassi ha maxaafan xaafetida caaquwa oothanaw Godaa sinthan caaqis. Asa ubbayka iyara caaqidosona.
23.4: Kawoy kahine halaqa Kalqe, iyape garsara de7iya kahinetanne penge naageysata Ba7aale, Asheeranne salo xoolintota goyinnanaw giigisida miisheta ubbaa Xoossa keethafe kessanaada kiittis. Kawoy hessata Yerusalaamepe gaxa kessidi, Qediroona Zangaaran xuuggidi, biduwa Beetele efis.
23.5: Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame yuushuwan de7iya dhoqa goyinno bessa ubban ixaane cuyisanaw Yihuda kawoti sunthida eeqata kahineta ubbaa oosope kessis. Ba7aales, awas, ageenas, xoolintotasinne salon de7iya hara medhetethatas ixaane cuyiseyisata ubbaa diggis.
23.6: Asheera xoosse misiliya Xoossa keethafe kessidi, Yerusalaame katamaape gaxa efidi, Qediroona Zangaara efidi, yan xuuggis. Xuugetidaysi gaaccidi, dhiille kessis; baana deriya duufo bolla laallis.
23.7: Xoossa keetha giddon goyinno woga oothidi, addey addera laymatiya keethata laallis; he keethatan maccasati Asheera xoossees geshe suqoosona.
23.8: Iyosyaasi kahineta ubbaa Yihuda katamatape ehidi, kase kahineti ixaane cuyisiya dhoqa goyinno bessata, Gib7ape bidi Barsaabe gakanaw de7eyisata tunisis. Katamaa haariya Iyyasu Pengiyafe haddirsa baggara de7iya dhoqa goyinno bessaaka laallis.
23.9: Dhoqa goyinno bessaa kahineti Yerusalaamen Godaa yarsho bessa pude yookona; shin enti hara kahinetara issife irshoy geliboonna daabbo moosona.
23.10: Kawoy Iyosyaasi Henooma zangaaran de7iya Toofeta yarsho bessa tunisis. Moloka xoossas issi asika ba adde na7aa woyka macca na7a tama giddora aathona mela diggis.
23.11: Yihuda kawoti Xoossa keethaa geliya pengiyan awas dummayidi wothida parata diggis. Awa parati Naatan-Meleka halaqaa kifiliya matan de7iya dabaaban de7oosona. Hessafe guye, awas dummayidi wothida para gaareta Iyosyaasi taman xuuggis.
23.12: Akaaza keethaa pooqiya bolla Yihuda kawoti giigisida yarsho bessatan Minaasey Xoossa keethan de7iya nam7u dabaabata giddon giigisida yarsho bessata Kawoy Iyosyaasi laallis. Enta he bessaafe diggidi tincherethidi, Qediroona Zangaaran holis.
23.13: Kawoy Yerusalaame katamaape doloha baggara, tunatetha zumaape dugeha baggan de7iya dhoqa goyinno bessata tunisis. He dhoqa bessati Isra7eele kawoy Solomoney, tuna xoossata, Sidoona xoosse Astarooto, Moo7abe xoossaa Kamooshanne Amoone xoossaa Moloka goyinnanaw giigisida dhoqa bessata.
23.14: Kawoy Iyosyaasi goyinno shucha tuussataka mentherethidi, Asheera xoosse misiletaka qanxerethis. Enti eqida bessan hayqida asa meqethi kunthis.
23.15: Isra7eele asaa, nagara oosisida Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami Beetelen dhoqa bessan giigisida yarsho bessa Kawoy Iyosyaasi laallis. Laallidi he yarsho bessa shuchataka mentherethidi, dhiille kessis; Asheeri misiliyaka xuuggis.
23.16: Hessafe guye, Iyosyaasi yuushuwa xeellidi, zumaa lanqen de7iya duufota be7is; meqethata duufotape kessidi, yarsho bessa bolla wothidi, taman xuuggis. Yaatidi yarsho bessa tunisis. Hessi haniday Xoossa asi kase awaajida Godaa qaala maarana.
23.17: Hessafe guye kawoy, “Ha benteysi oodde duufo?” yaagidi oychis. Beetele asay, “Yihudape yidi, Beetele yarsho bessa bolla ha77i neeni oothidabay poletanaysa kasetidi odida nabiya duufo” yaagidosona.
23.18: Kawoy, “De7o giite; oonika iya meqetha haysafe qaathofo” yaagis. Hessa gisho, Samaarepe yida nabeti addiya meqethaara issife iya meqetha bochonna aggaagidosona.
23.19: Isra7eele kawoti Samaare katamatan oosisidi, Godaa hanqethida, dhoqa goyinno bessata Iyosyaasi diggis; Beetelen oothidaysada, enta bollaka oothis.
23.20: I goyinno dhoqa bessan oothiya kahineta ubba yarsho bessa bolla wodhis; qassi he yarsho bessa bolla asaa meqethaa xuuggis. Hessa ubbaa oothidi, Yerusalaame simmis. Iyosyaasi Paasika Ba7aale Bonchis (2 Taari 35:1-19)
23.21: Kawoy asa ubbaa, “Ha caaqo Maxaafan xaafetidaysada Godaas, hinte Xoossaas Paasika Ba7aale bonchite” yaagidi kiittis.
23.22: Isra7eele haariya daynnata wodepe doomidi, Isra7eele kawota wodenne Yihuda kawota wode ubban haysa mela Paasika Ba7aale kumethi boncheti erenna.
23.23: Shin Kawoy Iyosyaasi kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan Yerusalaame kataman Godaa bonchanaw Paasika Ba7aaley bonchetis.
23.24: Kahine halaqay Kalqiyaasi Xoossa keethan bentida maxaafan xaafetida higgiya qaala minthanaada, tuna ayyaana xeegeysatanne marota, soo giddo eeqa misileta, eeqa miishetanne Yihuda biittaninne Yerusalaame kataman bentida hara ixetidabata ubbaa Iyosyaasi dhaysis.
23.25: Muse higgiyada ba kumetha wozanan, ba kumetha shempuwaninne, ba kumetha wolqan Godaako simmida Iyosyaasa mela kawoy, iyape kase gidin, iyape guye dendibeenna.
23.26: Minaasey Godaa hanqethanaw oothida iita ooso ubbaa gisho, Goday Yihuda bolla hanqetida ba sheniyape simmibeenna.
23.27: Goday, “Taani Isra7eele ta sinthafe diggidaysada, Yihudaka ta sinthafe diggana; taani doorida katama, Yerusalaamenne ‘Ta sunthay haysan daana’ gida ha keethaa diggana” yaagis. Iyosyaasa Kawotetha Wursetha (2 Taari 35:20—36:1)
23.28: Iyosyaasi hanida harabaynne I oothidabay ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
23.29: Iyosyaasa wode Gibxe Kawoy Naakoy, Asoore kawa olan maaddanaw Efraxiisa Shaafa bis. Kawoy Iyosyaasi iyara oletanaw ba olanchota ekidi keyis. Shin kawoy Naakoy iyara Magidon gahetidi, iya wodhis.
23.30: Aylleti iya aha para gaare bolla wothidi, Magidope Yerusalaame ehidi, iya buzo duufuwan moogidosona. He biitta asay Iyosyaasa na7aa Iyo7akaaza dooridi, iya aawa bessan iya tiyidi kawothidosona. Yihuda Kawa Iyo7akaaza (2 Taari 36:2-4)
23.31: Iyo7akaazi kawotiya wode, laythi iyaw laatamanne heedza; I Yerusalaamen heedzu ageena kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Hamuxaalo; iya Libina katama de7iya Ermiyaasa na7a.
23.32: Iya mayzati oothidaysada, Iyo7akaazi Godaa sinthan iitaba oothis.
23.33: Iyo7akaazi Yerusalaamen kawotennaada Gibxe Kawoy Naakoy Hamaata biittan Irbilan iya qachidi heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame deexiya biranne hastamanne oyddu kilo giraame deexiya worqa Yihuda asaa giirisis.
23.34: Kawoy Naakoy Iyosiyaasa na7aa Eliyaqeeme iya aawa bessan kawothis; iya sunthaa Iyo7aqeema yaagidi laammis. Shin Iyo7akaaza Gibxe efin, I yan hayqis. Yihuda Kawa Iyo7aqeema (2 Taari 36:5-8)
23.35: Iyo7aqeemi, kawoy Naakoy oychida biranne worqa giira iyaw immis. He giira qanxanaw Iyo7aqeemi he biitta asay demmiya keena birapenne worqafe giira shiishis.
23.36: Iyo7aqeemi kawotiya wode laythi iyaw laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen tammanne issi laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Zabido; iya Ruuma kataman de7iya Padaya na7a.
23.37: Iyo7aqeemi ba mayzati oothidaysada, Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.

24.1: Iyo7aqeema wode Babiloone Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Yihuda bolla dendis. Iyo7aqeemi iyaw heedzu laytha haaretidaape guye, Nabukadanaxoora bolla makallis.
24.2: Goday Kaldaaweta paannota, Soore paannota, Moo7abe paannotanne Amoone paannota Iyo7aqeema bolla yeddis; ba aylleta nabeta baggara Goday kase odidaysada, Yihuda biitta dhaysanaada haysata yeddis.
24.3: Kawoy Minaasey oothida nagara gaason Goday Yihuda asaa ba sinthafe digganaw ha dhayuwa yeddis.
24.4: I xillo asa suuthu gussidi, Yerusalaamen kunthida gisho, Goday Minaases he nagaraa atto gaanaw koybeenna.
24.5: Iyo7aqeemi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
24.6: Iyo7aqeemi hayqidi, ba mayzata gakis; iya bessan iya na7ay Yo7akini kawotis.
24.7: Gibxe kawoy nam7antho ba biittafe dendidi, olas yibeenna; Gibxe Shaafape doomidi, bidi Efraxiisa Shaafa gakanaw, Gibxe kawoy haarida biitta ubbaa Babiloone kawoy ekis. Yihuda Kawa Yo7akina (2 Taari 36:9-10)
24.8: Yo7akini kawotiya wode laythi iyaw tammanne hospuna; Yo7akini, Yerusalaamen heedzu ageena kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Nasta; iya Yerusalaame addiya Elnaatana na7a.
24.9: Yo7akini ba aaway oothidaysada, Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
24.10: He wode Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora olanchoti Yerusalaame yidi, katama teqidosona.
24.11: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori he katama yis.
24.12: Yihuda kawoy Iyo7akina, iya aayiya, iya aylleti, iya halaqatinne kawo gadho shuumati ubbay Babiloone kawas kushe immidosona. Yo7akini kawotida hospuntho laythan, Babiloone kawoy Yo7akina qachis.
24.13: Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadhon de7iya shaluwa ubbaa he bessaafe denthidi efis. Goday kase odidaysada kawoy Solomoney Xoossa keethan giigisida worqa miisheta ubbaa Babiloone kawoy qanxerethis.
24.14: Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaame asa, halaqata ubbaa, olanchota ubbaa, kushe hiillanchotanne birata qoxeyisata ubbaa, 10,000 asaa Yerusalaamepe di77idi efin, biittan manqo asa xalaali attis.
24.15: Nabukadanaxoori Iyo7akina di77idi, iya aayiw, iya macheta, iya moorinnatinne biittan de7iya gita asa ubbaa Babiloone efis.
24.16: He asape 7,000 asati olanchota; 1,000 asati dumma dumma kushe hiillanchota; enti ubbay minonne olaa oletanaw danda7eyisata.
24.17: Hessafe guye, Babiloone kawoy Yo7akina bessan iya aawa ishaa Mataana kawothis; iya sunthaa Sedeqiyaasa yaagidi laammis. Yihuda Kawa Sedeqiyaasa (2 Taari 36:11-12; Ermi 52:1-3)
24.18: Sedeqiyaasi kawotiya wode, laythi iyaw laatamanne issino; I tammanne issi laythi Yerusalaamen kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Amxaalo; iya Libana kataman de7iya Ermiyaasa na7a.
24.19: Iyo7aqeemi oothidaysada, Sedeqiyaasi Godaa sinthan iitaba oothis.
24.20: Goday hanqetida gisho, Yerusalaame asa bollanne Yihuda asaa bolla haysi hanis; wursethan enta I ba sinthafe diggis. Sedeqiyaasi Babiloone kawa bolla makallis.

25.1: Sedeqiyaasi kawotida uddufuntho laythi, tammantho ageenan, tammantho gallas, Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori ba olanchota ubbaa ekidi, Yerusalaame teqis; iya yuushuwan biitta dooridi teqis.
25.2: Sedeqiyaasi kawotida tammanne issintho laythi gakanaw, katamay teqetidi gam7is.
25.3: Hessa gaason biittan koshi suullin, he laythi oyddantho ageenan, uddufuntho gallasan asas miyabay dhayis.
25.4: Katamaa yuusho gimbey issi baggara meqin, Kaldaaweti yuuyi aadhidi naagikoka, Yihuda kawa olanchoti kumethi qamma kawo gade efiya ogiya oykidi, nam7u dirsa gimbeti gahetiya pengiyara keyidi baqatidosona. Enti Yordaanose dilbaako simmidi baqatidosona.
25.5: Shin Babiloone olanchoti kawa yedethidi, Iyaarko demba gathishe oykidosona. Iya olanchoti ubbay iyape shaaketidi laaletidosona.
25.6: Hessafe guye, enti iya Rabila kataman de7iya Nabukadanaxoorako efidosona. Babiloone kawoy Sedeqiyaasa bolla pirdis.
25.7: Sedeqiyaasa nayta, Sedeqiyaasi xeellishin wodhidosona. Iya ayfeta wooci kessidi, santhalaatan qachidi, Babiloone biitta efidosona. Xoossa Keetha Laaletethi (Ermi 52:12-33)
25.8: Nabukadanaxoori Babiloonen kawotida tammanne uddufuntho laythan, ichashantho ageenan, laapuntho gallasan, kawa moorinatape issoy, kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani Yerusalaame gelis.
25.9: Xoossa keethaa, kawo gadhonne Yerusalaamen de7iya keetha ubbaa, gita keethi geetetiya ubbaa xuuggis.
25.10: Babiloone olanchoti ubbay kawa naageysata halaqaa kiitan Yerusalaame katama yuushuwan de7iya dirsa gimbiya ubbaa laallidosona.
25.11: Nabuzardaani katamaninne Yihudan attida asata, kaddidi Babiloone olanchotan gahetida asata ubbaa oykidi, di77idi efis.
25.12: Shin Nabuzardaani wursetha manqotape guuthata woyne tokanaadanne gade goyanaada Yihudan ashshis.
25.13: Babiloone asati Xoossa keethan de7iya naase biratape medhida tuussata, caana gaaretanne gita kereta mentherethidosona; naase birata ubbaa Babiloone efidosona.
25.14: Kereta, akaafata, xompe xeera pittiyabata, cilpatanne yarsho wode go7etiya naase birata miisheta ubbaa efidosona.
25.15: Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani worqafe oosetida miisheta worqatho, birape oosetida miisheta biratho oothi ekidi, ixaane cuyisiya shaatetanne xaarota ubbaa efis.
25.16: Kawoy Solomoney Xoossa keetha oosos giigisida nam7u tuussata, gita keretanne caana gaareta, naase birata mizaanen likanaw danda7etibeenna.
25.17: Nam7u tuussati issi mela gididi, issuwa issuwa geesay tammanne hospun wadha; qassi issi issi tuussa huuphen de7iya gumboti heedzu wadha adusse. He gumbota yuushoy naase birata giteninne oromaane teera misilen alleeqetis. Yihuda Asaa Di7etethi (Ermi 52:24-27)
25.18: Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani, kahine halaqaa Saraya, iya kaalliya kahiniya Sofoniyaasanne penge naagiya hara heedzu asata oykis.
25.19: He wodey gakanaw, kataman de7iya asape Yihuda toora mocona, kawa zoreysatape ichashu asata, toora moconata xaafiya, olanchota dooriya hara usupun tammu asata efis.
25.20: Halaqay Nabuzardaani enta ubbaa, Babiloone kawako Rabila katama efis.
25.21: Babiloone kawoy enta ubbaa Hamaata biittan Rabila kataman wodhis. Hessada hanidi, Yihuda asay banta biittafe di7etidi bidosona.
25.22: Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Safaana na7aa na7aa, Akqaama na7aa Godoliya Yihudan attida asaa bolla shuumis.
25.23: Kushe immiboona Yihuda toora moconatinne olanchoti hessa si7ida wode, Mixiphan de7iya Godoliyara gahetidosona. He halaqati Naatana na7aa Isma7eela, Qareya na7aa Yohaana, Naxoofa addiya Tanhumeta na7aa Sarayanne Makata addiya Yazaana na7aa.
25.24: Godoliya entawunne enta olanchotas “Haysatasinne enta halaqatas yayyofite. Ha biittan de7ite; Babiloone kawas haaretite; hessa hinte oothiko ubbabay hintew injetana” yaagidi entaw caaqis.
25.25: Shin laapuntho ageenan, kawo kochi gidida Elisaama na7aa Naatana na7ay Isma7eeli tammu asara Mixipha bidi, Godoliya, Yihuda asaanne iyara de7iya Babiloone asa ubbaa wodhis.
25.26: Hessafe guye, Babiloone asaas yayyidi, Yihuda asay, guuthi giti attonnashin, toora moconati ubbay Gibxe biitta baqatidosona. Yo7akini Qashope Biletetha (Ermi 52:31-34)
25.27: Yo7akini di7etidi bida hastamanne laapuntho laythan, tammanne nam7antho ageenan, laatamanne laapuntho gallasan, Yoor-Marodaaki kawotida laythi, Yihuda kawa Yo7akina maaridi qashope billis.
25.28: Yoor-Marodaaki, Yo7akinara lo77o qaala odetidi, Babiloonen di7on de7iya hara kawota ubbaafe aathidi, iya bonchis.
25.29: Hessa gisho, Yo7akini qasho keethan ma7ida ma7uwa laammidi, attida ba de7o laytha ubban kawo gaytape mis.
25.30: Gallas gallas iyaw koshshiyaba ubbaa Babiloone kawoy immis.

1.1: Addaamey Seeta yelis; Seeti Henoosa yelis; Henoosi Qaynana yelis;
1.2: Qaynani Malal7eela yelis; Malal7eeli Yaareda yelis;
1.3: Yaaredi Heenoke yelis; Heenokey Matusaala yelis; Matusaali Laameha yelis;
1.4: Laamehi Nohe yelis; Nohey Seema, Kaamanne Yaafeta yelis.
1.5: Yaafeta adde nayti Gamera, Maagoge, Madaya, Yawaana, Tobeela, Mosahanne Tirasa.
1.6: Gamera adde nayti Askanaaza, Irfatanne Tegarma.
1.7: Yawaana adde nayti Elisa, Tarsesa, Kiximanne Rooda.
1.8: Kaama adde nayti Kuusha, Mixirayma, Fuuxanne Kanaane.
1.9: Kuusha adde nayti Saaba, Ewulaaxe, Sabita, Ra7imanne Sabqata. Ra7ima adde nayti Saabanne Didaana.
1.10: Kuushi Namiruude yelis. Namiruudey biitta bolla wolqaama olancho gidis.
1.11: Mixiraymi Luudeta, Anamimeta, Lahabeta, Naftuheta,
1.12: Patroosata, Filisxeemeta, mayza gidida Kasluheematanne Qaftooreta kochata mayza.
1.13: Kanaaney bayra na7aa Sidoonanne iya kaaluwa Heeta yelis.
1.14: Kanaaney Yaabuseta, Amooreta, Gergeseta,
1.15: Hiweta, Arketa, Siinata,
1.16: Ardaaweta, Samaaretanne Hamaateta yelis.
1.17: Seema adde nayti Elama, Asoore, Arfakisaade, Luude, Araama, Uxi, Hula, Geteranne Mosaha.
1.18: Arfakisaadi Saala yelis; Saali Eboora yelis.
1.19: Eboori nam7u nayta yelis; issoy yeletida wode sa7i shaaketida gisho iya sunthay Faleqa geetetis; iya ishaa sunthay Yoqxaana.
1.20: Yoqxaani Almodaada, Salefa, Hazarmoota, Yaraha,
1.21: Hadoraama, Uzaala, Diqila,
1.22: Obaala, Abmaala, Saaba,
1.23: Ofira, Awulaxanne Yobaaba yelis. Haysati Yoqxaana kochata.
1.24: Seemape Abrahaame gakanaw de7iya yeletay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; Seema, Arfakisaade, Saala,
1.25: Eboora, Faleqa, Raga,
1.26: Saruga, Nakoora, Taaranne
1.29: Enta yeletay haysafe kaallidi xaafetis. Isma7eela bayra na7ay Nabayoota; hessafe kallidi, Qedaare, Adbeela, Mibsaama,
1.31: Ixura, Nafisanne Qedima yelis. Haysati Isma7eela nayta.
1.32: Abrahaamey Keexurape yelida adde nayti Zimiraana, Yoqsaana, Madaane, Midiyaame, Yasboqanne Siwa. Yoqsaana adde nayti Saabanne Didaana.
1.33: Midiyaame adde nayti Gefera, Efera, Henooha, Abidanne Elda. Haysati Keexura kochata. Eesawe Sheeshi (Medhe 36:1-19)
1.34: Abrahaamey Yisaaqa yelis. Yisaaqa adde nayti Eesawenne Isra7eele.
1.35: Eesawe adde nayti Elfaaza, Ragu7eela, Ye7usa, Ya7ilamanne Qore.
1.36: Elfaaza adde nayti Temaana, Omaara, Sifo, Gotoma, Qeneza, Timinanne Amaaleqa.
1.37: Ragu7eela adde nayti Nahoota, Zaara, Saamanne Miza. Edoomen De7ida Sayre Asata (Medhe 36:20-30)
1.38: Edoomen koyro de7ida Sayre adde nayti Looxane, Sobaala, Ziba7oona, Ana, Disoona, Exeranne Disaana.
1.39: Looxane adde nayti Hooranne Hemaama; Looxane michiya Timnaa7o.
1.40: Sobaala adde nayti Aliwa, Manahoota, Ebaala, Sifanne Onaama. Xiba7oona adde nayti Ayanne Ana.
1.41: Ana na7ay Disoona. Disoona adde nayti Hemdaana, Esbaana, Yitraananne Kaarana.
1.42: Exera adde nayti Bilihaana, Zawananne Aqana. Disaana adde nayti Uxanne Arana. Edoome Kawota (Medhe 36:31-43)
1.43: Isra7eelen kawoy kawotanaape kase Edoome biittan kawotida kawoti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Bi7oora na7ay Balaaqi kawotis; iya katamaa sunthay Dinaaba.
1.44: Balaaqi hayqin, Baasora addey Zaara na7ay Yobaabi iya bessan kawotis.
1.45: Yobaabi hayqin, Temaana addey Husami iya bessan kawotis.
1.46: Husami hayqin, Moo7abe biittan Midiyaameta xoonida Badada na7ay Hadaadi iya bessan kawotis; iya katamaa sunthay Awiita.
1.47: Hadaadi hayqin, Masreeqa addey Samili iya bessan kawotis.
1.48: Samili hayqin, shaafa matan de7iya Rehoboota addey Saa7uli iya bessan kawotis.
1.49: Saa7uli hayqin, Akboora na7ay Ba7al-Hanani iya bessan kawotis.
1.50: Ba7al-Hanani hayqin, Hadaadi iya bessan kawotis; iya katamaa sunthay Paa7u. Iya machiya Mezahaaba na7e Maxireedi na7iw Mahexabeelo. Hessafe guye, Hadaadi hayqis.
1.51: Edoome kochata halaqati haysata; Timnaa7a, Aliwa, Yeteta,

2.1: Isra7eele adde nayti haysata; Robeela, Simoona, Leewe, Yihuda, Yisakoora, Zabloona,
2.2: Daane, Yoosefa, Biniyaame, Niftaaleme, Gaadenne Aseera.
2.3: Kanaane maccase Sewape Yihudi yelida heedzu adde nayti Era, Onaananne Seela. Yihuda bayra na7ay Eri Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothida gisho Goday iya wodhis.
2.4: Yihudi ba na7aa mache Timaaripe Faaresanne Zaara yelis. Yihudas ichashu adde nayti de7oosona.
2.5: Faaresa adde nayti Hesiroomanne Hamuula.
2.6: Zaara adde nayti Zimira, Etaana, Hemaana, Kalkolanne Dara; enti kumethi ichasha.
2.7: Zaara koche gidida Karma na7ay Akaani Xoossas dummatida di7uwape kaysotidi Isra7eele asaa un7ethidaysa.
2.8: Etaana na7ay Azaara. Esroomepe Dawita Gakanaw
2.9: Hesrooni yelida nayti Yiram7eela, Araamenne Kaaleba.
2.10: Araami Amnadaabe yelis. Amnadaabey Yihuda kochata halaqa Na7asoona yelis.
2.11: Na7asooni Salmoona yelis; Salmooni Boo7eza yelis;
2.12: Boo7ezi Iyyobeda yelis; Iyyobedi Isseye yelis.
2.13: Isseyey ba bayra na7aa Eliyaaba, kaalo na7aa Amnadaabe, heedzantho na7aa Saama,
2.14: oyddantho na7aa Natina7eela, ichashantho na7aa Radaya,
2.15: usupuntho na7aa Asama, laapuntho na7aa Dawita yelis.
2.16: Isseye macca nayti Xaruyonne Abigiya. Xaruyi nayti heedzati Abisaya, Iyo7aabanne Asaheela.
2.17: Abigiya Amaasa yelasu; Amaasa aaway Isma7eela addiya Yetera. Esroome Sheesha
2.18: Hesiroona na7aa Kaalebas Azuubonne Yir7ooto geetetiya nam7u macheti de7oosona. I Azuubipe Yesaara, Sobaabanne Ardoona yelis.
2.19: Azuubi hayqin, Kaalebi Efraato ekis; Efraata Huura yelasu.
2.20: Huuri Ure yelis; Urey Basli7eela yelis.
2.21: Hesiroonas laythi usupun tammu gidin, Galada aawa Makira na7iw ekidi Saguba yelis.
2.22: Sagubi Ya7ira yelis. Ya7iri Galada biittan de7iya laatamanne heedzu katamata haaris.
2.23: Shin Geshuranne Soore kawoti Ya7ira katamata Qanaatanne iya yuushuwan de7iya usupun tammu katamata olidi oykidosona; yan de7iya asa ubbay Galada aawa Makira koche.
2.24: Hesrooni Kaaleba Efraata geetetiya bessan hayqidaape guye, Hesiroona machiya Abiya Tequhe aawa Ashihuura yelasu. Yirma7eela Sheeshi
2.25: Hesiroona bayra na7aa Yirama7eela bayra na7ay Rama; kaaloti Buna, Orena, Oxeemanne Akiya.
2.26: Yirahim7eelas Ataaro geetetiya hara macha de7awusu; Ataara Onaama aayiw.
2.27: Yirama7eela bayra na7aa Rama nayti Ma7asa, Yaaminanne Eqera.
2.28: Onaama nayti Shamayanne Yada. Samaye nayti Naadabenne Abisura.
2.29: Abisura machiya Abikaala Ahbaananne Molida yelasu.
2.30: Nadaaba adde nayti Selidanne Afayma; Selidi na7a yelonna hayqis.
2.31: Afayma na7ay Yishi7a; Yishi7a na7ay Soosana; Soosana na7ay Ahilaya.
2.32: Shamaya ishaa Yada nayti Yeteranne Yoonataana; Yeteri na7a yelonna hayqis.
2.33: Yoonataana nayti Felitanne Zaaza. Haysati Yirama7eela kochata.
2.34: Soosanas macca na7ape attishin, adde na7i baawa. Soosanas Iyoheela geetetiya Gibxefe aylley de7ees.
2.35: Soosani ba na7iw ba aylliya Iyoheelas immin, Ataya na7a yelasu.
2.36: Atayi Naatana yelis; Naatani Zabada yelis;
2.37: Zabadi Eflaala yelis; Eflaali Obeeda yelis;
2.38: Obeedi Iyyu yelis; Iyyuy Azaara yelis;
2.39: Azaariyasi Kelesa yelis; Kelesi El7aasa yelis;
2.41: Sisimayi Salooma yelis; Saloomi Yiqaama yelis; Yiqaami Elisaama yelis. Kaaleba Sheeshi
2.42: Yirama7eela ishaa Kaaleba bayra na7ay Moosa. Moosa na7ay Ziifa; Ziifa na7ay Mereesa; Mereesa na7ay Kebroona.
2.43: Kebroona nayti Qoraha, Tefuwa, Reqeemanne Shamaya.
2.44: Shamayey Yorqa7aama aawa Rahaama yelis. Reqeemi Shamaya yelis.
2.45: Shamaya na7ay Ma7oona. Maa7oni Beet-Xura yelis.
2.46: Kaaleba laggethiya Efa, Harana, Moodanne Gazeeza yelasu; Haraani Gazeeza geetetiya hara adde na7a yelis.
2.47: Yahidaya nayti Regema, Iyo7atama, Geshana, Falexa, Efanne Shafa.
2.48: Kaaleba laggethiya Ma7ika Sheberanne Tirihaana yelasu.
2.49: Qassika Medmaana aawa Shafanne Makibeenanne Gib7a aawa Susana yelasu. Kaaleba macca na7e sunthay Akiso.
2.50: Kaaleba nayti harati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidosona. Kaalebi ba bayra na7aa Huura ba mache Efraatape yelis. Huura nayti Qiriyat-Yi7aarima aawa Sobaala,
2.51: Beeteleme aawa Salmonanne Beet-Gadera aawa Hareefa.
2.52: Qiriyat-Yi7aarima aawa Sobaala yarati Haro7eetatanne Manuhoota yaratape baggata.
2.53: Qiriyat-Yi7aarima yarati Yatireta, Puuteta, Shumaatetanne Mishireta. Xor7atinne Eshta7ooleti haysatape yeletidosona.
2.54: Beeteleme aawa Salmoona yarati Naxoofata, Axiroot-Beeteyo7abeta, Manuhoota yaratape baggatanne Xor7ata.
2.55: Yaabexa kataman de7iya xaafeta yarati Tir7eta, Shim7atanne Sukata. Haysati Rekaabata aawa Hamaatape yeletida Qeenata.

3.1: Kebroona kataman Dawiti yelida nayti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; Izira7eele maccase Aknahoomipe yelida bayra na7ay Amnoona. Qarmeloosa maccase Abigiyape yelida nam7antho na7ay Daanela.
3.2: Geshura kawa Talmaya na7iya Ma7ika yelida heedzantho na7ay Abeseloome. Agita yelida oyddantho na7ay Adoniyaasa.
3.3: Abixaala yelida ichashantho na7ay Safaaxa. Egila yelida usupuntho na7ay Yitirhaama.
3.4: Dawiti ha usupun nayta Kebroonan yelis. Dawiti Kebroonan laapun laythinne usupun ageena kawotis. Yerusalaamen hastamanne heedzu laythi kawotis.
3.5: Dawiti Yerusalaamen Ami7eela na7e Barsaabepe yelida oyddu nayti Saamusa, Sobaaba, Naatanenne Solomone.
3.6: Qassi hara uddufun adde nayti Iyabhaara, Elishu7a, Elfalaxa,
3.7: Noga, Nefeqa, Yafaya,
3.8: Elsama, Eldahenne Elfalaxa.
3.9: Ha adde nayta ubbaa bolla Dawitas laggethotape yeletida hara adde nayti de7oosona; Timaaro geetetiya micha entaw de7awusu. Yihuda Kawota
3.10: Kawa Solomone yeletay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Solomone na7ay Orobi7aama; Orobi7aama na7ay Abiya; Abiya na7ay Asa; Asa na7ay Iyosaafexa;
3.11: Iyosaafexa na7ay Iyoraama; Iyoraama na7ay Akaziyaasa; Akaziyaasa na7ay Iyo7aasa;
3.12: Iyo7aasa na7ay Amasiyaasa; Amasiyaasa na7ay Azaariyasa; Azaariyasa na7ay Iyo7atama;
3.13: Iyo7atama na7ay Akaaza; Akaaza na7ay Hizqiyaasa; Hizqiyaasa na7ay Minaase;
3.14: Minaase na7ay Amoxe; Amoxe na7ay Iyosyaasa.
3.15: Iyosyaasa na7ay bayray Yohaanana; nam7anthoy Iyo7aaqeme; heedzanthoy Sedeqiyaasa; oyddanthoy Salooma.
3.16: Iyo7aaqeme nayti Ikoniyaananne Sedeqiyaasa. Kawota Yeleta Susa
3.17: Di7etidi Babiloone bida Ikoniyaana adde nayti Salatiyaala,
3.18: Malkiraama, Padaya, Shenaxaara, Yiqaama, Hoshamanne Nadaaba.
3.19: Padaya adde nayti Zarubaabelanne Same7a. Zarubaabela adde nayti Masulaamanne Hanaana; enta michiya Salomito.
3.20: Hayisata bolla hara ichashu adde nayti Zarubaabelas de7oosona; entika Hashuba, Oheela, Baraka, Hasadiyanne Yoshab-Heseda.
3.21: Hanaana adde nayti Palaxanne Yeshaya. Yeshaya na7ay Rafaya; Rafaya na7ay Arnaana; Arnaana na7ay Abdiyu; Abdiyu na7ay Sakana;
3.22: Sakana na7ay Shamaya. Shamaya nayti ichashati Haxusa, Yigi7aala, Bariha, Na7aranne Shaafaxa.
3.23: Na7ara nayti heedzati Eliyo7ana, Hizqiyaasanne Aziriqaama.
3.24: Eliyo7ana nayti laapunati Hodawa, Eliyaseeba, Palaya, Aquba, Yohaanana, Dalayanne Aneena.

4.1: Yihuda kochati Paaresa, Hesiroona, Karma, Hooranne Sobaala.
4.2: Sobaala na7ay Rayi Yahaata yelis; Yahaati Ahumayanne Lahada yelis. Haysati Xor7ata yarata.
4.3: Exaama adde nayti Izira7eele, Yishmanne Yidibaasha; enta michiya Haxilelpoono.
4.4: Panu7eeli Gadoora yelis. Exeri Husha yelis. Huuri ba aaye Efraatas bayra na7a; Huuri Beeteleme aawa. Haysati Huura yarata.
4.5: Tequhe aawa Ashihuuras Heelonne Na7ira geetetiya nam7u macheti de7oosona.
4.6: Na7ira Ahuzama, Hefeera, Teminanne Ashitaara Ashihuuras yelasu; haysati Na7iri nayta.
4.7: Heela adde nayti Dereta, Yixhaaranne Etnaana.
4.8: Qooxe adde nayti Anuba, Xobebanne Aharheela.
4.9: Yaabexi ba ishatape aadhidi bonchetida asi. Iya aayiya, “Taani iya iita iqethan yelida gisho, iya sunthay Yaabexa” gada xeegasu.
4.10: Yaabexi Isra7eele Xoossaa xeegidi, “Abeeti Xoossaw, tana anja; ta zawa dalgisa. Ne kushey taara gido; tana azzanthonna mela qohiyabaape naaga” yaagidi woossin Xoossay iya woosa si7is.
4.11: Shuha ishay Kaluba Mahira yelis; Mahiri Eshtoona yelis.
4.12: Eshtooni Beet-Raafa, Pasehanne Irnahasha aawa Tahina yelis. Tahini Nahaasa katamaa asaa yelis. Haysati Reka biittan de7idosona.
4.13: Qeneza adde nayti Gotoniyalanne Saraya; Gotoniyala adde nayti Hatatanne Ma7onotaya.
4.14: Ma7onotayi Ofira yelis. Sarayi Iyo7aaba yelis. Iyo7aabi Kushe Hiillata Zangaara geetetiya bessan de7iya asaa yelis.
4.15: Yoofone na7aa Kaaleba nayti Ira, Eelanne Na7aama. Ela na7ay Qeneza.
4.16: Yihali7eela nayti Ziifa, Zifaha, Tirayanne Asar7eela.
4.17: Ezira adde nayti Yetera, Mereeda, Eferanne Yaalona. Mereedi Gibxe kawa na7iw Bitiya ekin iya Mayraamo, Shamayanne Yishiba yelasu. Yishibi Eshtamoo7a yelis.
4.18: Yihuda biittafe ekida machiya Gadoora aawa Yereda, Sooko aawa Hebeeranne Zanoha aawa Yaqit7eela yelasu.
4.19: Nahama miche, Hodiya mache nayti Gariman de7iya Qa7ila aawanne Ma7ikan de7iya Eshtamoo7a aawa.
4.20: Shimoona nayti Amnoona, Irna, Benihananne Tiloona. Yishi7a nayti Zoheetanne Benzoheeta.
4.21: Yihuda na7aa Seela kochati Leeka aawa Era, Mareesa aawa Le7adanne Beet-Ashibe7a kataman de7iya liino ma7o daddeyisata yarata.
4.22: Harati qassi Yoqima, Iyo7aasa, Yashubileheema, Moo7abe haarida Sarafanne Kozeba kataman de7iya asata. Ha yeletaa mazgabey benipe doomidi de7ees.
4.23: Haysati Naxa7imaninne Gadeeran de7iya meqa miishe medhiya asata. Enti kawa ooso oothanaw iyara issife de7idosona. Simoona Sheeshi
4.24: Simoona nayti Nemu7eela, Yamina, Yariba, Zaaranne Saa7ula.
4.25: Saa7ula na7ay Saluma; Saluma na7ay Mibsaama; Mibsaama na7ay Masmaa7a;
4.26: Masmaa7a na7ay Hamu7eela; Hamu7eela na7ay Zakura; Zakura na7ay Same7a.
4.27: Same7i tammanne usupun adde naytanne usupun macca nayta yelis. Shin iya ishati daro na7a yelibookona. Yihuda kochaada Simoona kochay daribookona.
4.28: Simoona kochati Barsaabe katamaninne Molada, Haxar-Shu7aala,
4.31: Beet-Markaboota, Hoxar-Susima, Beet-Biranne Sha7aarima katamatan de7idosona. Dawiti kawotana gakanaw haysati katamata gididi de7idosona.
4.32: Qassi enta gutati Exaama, Ayna, Irmoona, Tokenanne Ashshana. Enti kumethi ichashu katamata.
4.33: Ba7aale gakanaw ha katamata yuushuwan de7iya gutati ubbay entan gujetoosona. Haysati enti de7iya bessatanne banta yeletaa maara mazgaben xaafidi oykidosona.
4.34: Simoona yarata halaqati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Enti Mashobaaba, Yamileka, Amasiyaasa na7aa Iyosiya,
4.35: Iyyu7eelanne Yoshiba na7aa Iyyu. Iyyu aawa aaway Asa7eela na7a Saraya.
4.36: Hara halaqati qassi Eliyo7ana, Yayqooba, Yashohaya, Asaya, Adi7eela, Yasmi7eela, Banayanne
4.37: Ziiza. Ziizi Shifa na7a; Shifi Aloona na7a; Alooni Yadaya na7a; Yadayi Shimira na7a; Shimiri Shamaya na7a.
4.38: Simoona yarata halaqati haysata. Enta aawata kochay darishe bis.
4.39: Enti banta mehiyas heemmiya bessi koyishe Gadoora geliya bessaa matan de7iya zangaarape doloha baggara de7iya bessaa gakanaw bidosona.
4.40: Yan araddanne lo77o heemmiya bessi demmidosona; he biittay wopatethinne saroy kumida dalga biitta. Beni wode he biittan de7idaysati Kaama kochaa.
4.41: Haysafe qommon sunthay xaafetida Simoona kochati Yihuda kawa Hizqiyaasa wode Gadoora biitta bidi yan de7iya Kaama kochaanne Ma7uuna asata olidi dhaysidosona. He biittan enta mehiyas heemmiya bessi de7iya gisho, Simoona kochati hachi gakanaw yan uttidosona.
4.42: Simoona kochaafe ichashu xeetu asay Sayre zuma bidosona. Enta halaqati Yishi7a nayta Palaxa, Naara, Rafayanne Uzi7eela.
4.43: Baqatidi attida Amaaleqa asaa dhaysidi enti hachi gakanaw he biittan de7oosona.

5.1: Isra7eele bayra na7aa Robeela yeletay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Robeeli bayra na7a; shin ba aawa hiixa tunisida gisho, bayratetha maatay Isra7eele na7aa Yoosefa naytas imetis. Hessa gisho, iya yeletay bayratetha maara naagidi xaafetibeenna.
5.2: Yihudi ba ishatape aadhidi mino; bayratethay Yoosefas imetidaba gidikoka, Isra7eele asaa haareysi Yihudape keyis.
5.3: Isra7eele bayra na7aa Robeela adde nayti Henooha, Pala, Hesiroonanne Karma.
5.4: Iyyu7eela na7ay Shamaya; Shamaya na7ay Googa; Googa na7ay Same7a;
5.5: Sama7a na7ay Mika; Mika na7ay Raya; Raya na7ay Bi7eela.
5.6: Bi7eela na7ay Asoore kawoy Telgeltelfelisoorii di77idi efida Bi7eera; Bi7eeri Robeela kochata halaqa.
5.7: Bi7eera dabboti, banta yeleta mazgaben xaafida Robeela yarata halaqati Iyyu7eelanne, Zakaryaasa.
5.8: Bi7eeli Azaaza na7a; Azaazi Shama7a na7a; Shama7i Iyyu7eela koche. Iyyu7eela kochati Aro7eera kataman, Nebo biittaninne Ba7aal-Ma7oona biittan de7idosona.
5.9: Robeela kochatas mehey Galadan darida gisho, enti yaape doloha bagga bidi, Efraxiisa shaafa gakanaw de7iya mela biittan uttidosona.
5.10: Saa7ola laythan Aggaara yaratara Robeela yarati oletidi xoonidosona. Galadape doloha baggara de7iya Aggaara yarata biittan uttidosona. Gaade Sheesha
5.11: Gaade kochati Robeela kochatape pudeha baggan, Salka gakanaw de7iya Baasane biittan uttidosona.
5.12: Iyyu7eeli koyro yaratas halaqa; Safaami nam7antho yaratas halaqa. Yanaynne Safaami Baasanen uttida yaratas halaqa.
5.13: Enta dabboti, banta soo asan asan, Mika7eela, Masulaama, Saaba, Yoraya, Yaqkana, Zu7enne Ebeera. Enti kumethi laapuna.
5.14: Haysati Abikaala nayti Buza kochata. Buzi Yedaya yelis; Yedayey Iyesaya yelis; Iyesayi Mika7eela yelis; Mika7eeli Galada yelis; Galadi Idaya yelis; Idayi Huura yelis; Huuri Abihaala yelis.
5.15: Enta soo asaa halaqay Guna na7aa na7aa Abdi7eela na7aa Aka.
5.16: Enti Galadaninne Baasanen, yan de7iya katamataninne Saarona biittan mehey heemetiya bessatan uttidosona.
5.17: Hayisata yeletay Yihuda kawa Iyo7atama wode Isra7eele kawa Iyorbaama wode mazgaben xaafetis.
5.18: Robeela kochaafe, Gaade kochaafenne Minaase kochaa baggaafe gondalle oykeysati, mashshe danceysatinne donge dukeysati minonne olan loohidaysati 44, 760.
5.19: Enti Aggaara yaraara, Ixura yaraara, Nafesaranne Nodabaara oletidosona.
5.20: Enti he asaara oletishe Xoossako waassida gisho, maado demmidosona. Enti Xoossan ammanetida gisho, I entaw woosetis. Hessa gisho, Aggaara yaratinne entara de7iya harati enta kushen gelidosona.
5.21: Banta morketape ishatamu mukulu gimaleta, nam7u xeetanne ishatamu mukulu dorsata, nam7u mukulu haretanne xeetu mukulu asaa di77idi efidosona.
5.22: Olay Xoossaba gidida gisho daroti hayqidosona. Di7etetha wodey gakanaw he biittan de7idosona. Minaase Kochaafe Bagga
5.23: Minaase kochaafe bagga yaray Baasanepe doomidi, Ba7aal-Armoona, Saniranne Armoona zumaa gakanaw de7iya biittan uttidosona; enti he biittan daridosona.
5.24: Enta soo halaqati Efera, Yish7a, Eli7eela, Azri7eela, Ermiyaasa, Hodawanne Iyodi7eela. Haysati enta soo asan eretidaysata, xaalanne wolqaama.
5.25: Shin banta mayzata Xoossaas ammanetibokona; Xoossay enta sinthafe dhaysida he biitta xoossata goyinnidosona.
5.26: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele Xoossay Asoore kawa Pooha (hessika Telgeltelfelisoora) ayyaana denthethidi Robeela kochaa, Gaade kochaanne Minaase kochaafe baggaa di77idi, Halaha, Habooranne Haara biittanne Gozaana Shaafa efis. Enti hachi gakanaw yan de7oosona.

6.1: Leewe adde nayti Gedisoona, Qahaatanne Maraara.
6.2: Qahaata adde nayti Amraama, Yisihaara, Kebroonanne Uzi7eela.
6.3: Amraama adde nayti Aarona, Musenne Mayraamo. Aarona adde nayti Nadaaba, Abyooda, Alaazaranne Itamaara.
6.4: Alaazari Pinihaasa yelis; Pinihaasi Abisu yelis; Abisuy Buuqa yelis;
6.5: Buuqi Oza yelis;
6.6: Ozi Zara yelis; Zarahi Marayoota yelis;
6.7: Marayooti Amaare yelis; Amaarey Akxooba yelis;
6.8: Akxoobi Saadoqa yelis; Saadoqi Akmaasa yelis;
6.9: Akimaasi Azaariyasa yelis; Azaariyasi Yohaana yelis;
6.10: Yohaani Azaariyasa yelis. Solomoney Yerusalaamen keexisida Xoossa keethan oothida kahiney Azaariyasa.
6.11: Azaariyasi Amaare yelis; Amaarey Akxooba yelis;
6.12: Akxoobi Saadoqa yelis; Saadoqi Saluma yelis;
6.13: Salumi Kalqe yelis; Kalqey Azaariyasa yelis;
6.14: Azaariyasi Saraya yelis; Sarayi Iyosadeqa yelis.
6.15: Goday Yihudanne Yerusalaame Nabukadanaxooran di7etana mela oothida wode Iyosadeqi di7etidi bis.
6.16: Leewe adde nayti Gedisoona, Qahaatanne Maraara.
6.17: Gedisoona adde nayta sunthay Libinanne Same7a.
6.18: Qahaata adde nayti Amraama, Yisihaara, Kebroonanne Uzi7eela.
6.19: Maraara adde nayti Mahilanne Muse. Banta soo asan asan xaafetida Leewe yaray haysa.
6.20: Gedisoona na7ay Libina; Libina na7ay Yahaata; Yahaata na7ay Zamata.
6.21: Zamata na7ay Yo7aaka; Yo7aaka na7ay Ado; Ado na7ay Zaara; Zaara na7ay Yatira.
6.22: Qahaata na7ay Amnadaabe; Amnadaabe na7ay Qore; Qore na7ay Aseera;
6.23: Aseera na7ay Helqaana; Helqaana na7ay Abisaafa; Abisaafa na7ay Aseera;
6.24: Aseera na7ay Tahata; Tahata na7ay Uri7eela; Uri7eela na7ay Ooziyana; Ooziyana na7ay Saa7ola.
6.26: Akmoota na7ay Helqaana; Helqaana na7ay Xofaya; Xofaya na7ay Nahaata;
6.27: Nahaata na7ay Eliyaaba; Eliyaaba na7ay Yirohaama; Yirohaama na7ay Hilqaana.
6.28: Sameela bayra na7ay Iyyu7eela; kaaloy Abiya.
6.29: Maraara adde nayti Mahila; Mahila na7ay Libina; Libina na7ay Same7a; Same7a na7ay Ooza;
6.30: Ooza na7ay Sam77a; Sam77a na7ay Hagiya; Hagiya na7ay Asaya. Xoossa Keetha Zammaareta
6.31: Dawiti Taabotiya Yerusalaame ehidaape guye, Godaa keethan shuumida zammaareta halaqati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata.
6.32: Solomoney Yerusalaamen Godaa Xoossaa keetha keexana gakanaw, Godaa Taabotey de7iya Dunkaaniya sinthan issoy issoy ba maaran maaran mazmure yexishe Godaas oothidosona.
6.33: Banta adde naytara yexidaysati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Qahaata yaraape zammariya Hemaana; Hemaani Iyyu7eela na7a; Iyyu7eela Sameela na7a;
6.34: Sameeli Helqaana na7aa; Hilqaani Yirohaama na7a; Yirohaami Eli7eela na7a; Eli7eeli Toha na7a;
6.35: Tohi Xofaya na7a; Xofaya Helqaana na7a; Hilqaani Mahaata na7a; Mahaati Amasaya na7a;
6.36: Amasayi Helqaana na7a; Helqaani Iyyu7eela na7a; Iyyu7eela Azaariyasa na7a; Azaariyasi Sofoniyaasa na7a;
6.37: Sofoniyaasi Tahata na7a; Tahati Aseera na7a; Aseeri Abisaafa na7a; Abisaafi Qore na7a;
6.38: Qorey Yisara na7a; Yisari Qahaata na7a; Qahaati Leewe na7a; Leewey Isra7eele na7a.
6.39: Hemaana dabboy Asaafi iya ushacha baggara eqidi oothees. Asaafi Baraka na7a; Baraka Sim7a na7a;
6.40: Shim7i Mika7eela na7a; Mika7eeli Ba7asaya na7a; Ba7aasi Malkiya na7a;
6.41: Malkey Etaana na7a; Etaani Zaara na7a; Zaari Adaya na7a;
6.42: Adayi Etaana na7a; Etaani Zamata na7a; Zamati Same7a na7a;
6.43: Same7i Yahaata na7a; Yahaati Gedisoona na7a; Gedisooni Leewe na7a.
6.44: Entafe haddirsa baggara enta dabboti, Maraara yarati eqoosona. Etaani Qiisa na7a; Qiisi Abdi na7a; Abdi Maluka na7a;
6.45: Maluki Hashabaya na7a; Hashabaya Amasiyaasa na7a; Amasiyaasi Kalqe na7a;
6.46: Kilqey Ameesa na7a; Ameesi Baana na7a; Baani Samara na7a;
6.47: Samari Mahila na7a; Mahili Muse na7a; Musi Maraara na7a; Maraari Leewe na7a.
6.48: Enta dabo gidida Leeweti Xoossa Dunkaaniyan oothanaw sunthetidosona. Aarona Sheeshi
6.49: Shin Aaroninne iya kochati ixaane cuyisoosona; yarsho bessan xuussa yarsho yarshoosona. Xoossa aylley Musey kiitidaysada Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessan goyinniya goyinno ubbaasinne Xoossay Isra7eele nagaraa atto yaagisiya yarshuwa yarshanaw aawatethi entaw de7ees.
6.50: Aarona yeletay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Aarona na7ay Alaazara; Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasa; Pinihaasa na7ay Abisu;
6.51: Abisu na7ay Buuqa; Buuqa na7ay Oza; Oza na7ay Zaraha.
6.52: Zaraha na7ay Marayoota; Marayoota na7ay Amaare; Amaare na7ay Akxuuba;
6.53: Akxuuba na7ay Saadoqa; Saadoqa na7ay Akmaasa.
6.54: Aarona kochati daana mela entaw imetida bessati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Koyro saamay Qahaata yaraas keyida gisho
6.55: Yihudan de7iya Kebroona katamaanne iya yuushuwan de7iya hentha bessata entaw immidosona.
6.56: Shin Kebroona goshsha gadetanne iya yuushuwan de7iya gutata Yoofone na7aa Kaalebas immidosona.
6.57: Aarona naytas baqatidi attiya katamata, Kebroona, Yatira, Libina, Eshtamoo7anne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata.
6.58: Holona, Dabiranne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata,
6.59: Asana, Beet-Sameesanne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata immidosona.
6.60: Qassi Biniyaame biitta zawape Gib7a, Galemata, Anatootenne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata entaw immidosona. Aarona naytas imetida katamati kumethi tammanne heedza.
6.61: Minaase yaraa baggaa biittafe tammu katamata attida Qahaata yaraas immidosona.
6.62: Yisakoora, Aseera, Niftaalemenne Baasanen de7iya Minaase yaraa biitta zawape tammanne heedzu katamata Gedisoona yaraas immidosona.
6.63: Robeela, Gaadenne Zabloona biitta zawape tammanne nam7u katamata Maraara yaraas immidosona.
6.64: Hessada oothidi, Isra7eele asay Leewetas ha katamatanne enta heeran de7iya hentha biitta immidosona.
6.65: Yihudape, Simoonapenne Biniyaame biitta zawape haysafe qommon xaafetida katamata entaw immidosona.
6.66: Qahaata yaraape guuthati Efreema biitta zawape katamatanne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata ekidosona.
6.67: Entaw asay baqatidi attiya katamata, derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya Seekema, Gezera,
6.69: Eloona, Gaat-Rimoonanne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata immidosona.
6.70: Minaase kocha baggaafe Aneera, Bil7aamanne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata, attida Qahaata yaraas immidosona.
6.71: Minaase kocha baggaafe Baasanen de7iya Goolana, Astarootanne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata Gedisoona yaraas immidosona.
6.72: Yisakoora kochaafe Qaadesa, Dabiraatenne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata,
6.73: Raamota, Anemananne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata immidosona.
6.75: Huqooqa, Rehoobanne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata immidosona.
6.76: Niftaaleme kochaafe Galilan de7iya Qaadesa, Hamoona, Qirataymanne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata immidosona.
6.77: Attida Maraara yaraas Zabloona kochaafe Irmoona, Taaborenne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata immidosona.
6.78: Robeela kochaafe Iyaarkofe hefinthan Yordaanosepe doloha baggara, dhoqa denban de7iya Boosora, Yaasane,
6.79: Qidimoota, Mefaatanne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata immidosona.
6.80: Gaade kochaafe Galadan de7iya Raamota, Mahanayma,
6.81: Haseboona, Iyazeeranne enta heeran de7iya hentha bessata immidosona.

7.1: Yisakoora oyddu adde nayti Tola, Puuwa, Yasuubanne Shimiroona.
7.2: Tola adde nayti Oza, Rafaya, Yir7eela, Himaya, Yibsaamanne Shimu7eela; haysati Tola soo asaa halaqata. Enti wolqaamanne mino asi. Dawita wode enta tayboy 22,600.
7.3: Oza na7ay Yizraaha. Yizraaha nayti Mika7eela, Abdiyu, Iyyu7eelanne Yishiya; ha ichashati soo asaa halaqata.
7.4: Banta soo asaa yeletada Oza yaraape olanchoti 36,000; entaw daro machetinne nayti de7oosona.
7.5: Yisakoora kochaafe olanchoti banta yeletaa mazgaben taybetidi, kumethi 87,000 gididosona. Biniyaame Sheeshi
7.6: Biniyaame heedzu adde nayti Beella, Bekeranne Yidi7eela.
7.7: Beella adde nayti Eseboona, Oza, Uzi7eela, Iyarmootanne Ira; ha ichashati soo asaa halaqata. Enti wolqaamanne mino asi. Banta yeletada taybetida olanchoti 22,034 gididosona.
7.8: Bekera adde nayti Zamira, Iyo7aasa, Alaazara, Eliyo7ana, Omira, Iyarmoota, Abiya, Anatootanne Alemeeta.
7.9: Banta yeletaa mazgaben taybetida wolqaamanne mino asati 20,200 gididosona.
7.10: Yidi7eela na7ay Bilihaana. Bilihaana adde nayti Yi7uusa, Biniyaame, Ehuuda, Kin7ana, Zetana, Tarsesanne Aksaara;
7.11: haysati banta soo asaa halaqa; wolqaamanne mino asi. Banta yeletada taybetida olanchoti 17,200.
7.12: Sufiminne Hufimi Ira nayta. Hushimi Ahere na7a. Niftaaleme Sheesha
7.13: Niftaaleme nayti Yahixi7eela, Guna, Yexeranne Shilema; haysati Baala kochata. Minaase Sheeshi
7.14: Minaase kochati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Minaase Soore laggethefe yelida adde nayti Asiri7eelanne Galada aawa Makira.
7.15: Makiri Hufimapenne Safimape issi issi macho ekis. Makira miche sunthay Ma7iko. Makira na7ay kaaloy Selophaada; Selophaadi macca na7a xalaala yelis.
7.16: Makira machiya Ma7ika Pareesanne Suroosa geetetiya nam7u adde nayta yelasu. Paaresa nayti Ulamanne Raqeema.
7.17: Ulama na7ay Badaana. Haysati Minaase na7aa na7a Makira na7aa Galada kochata.
7.18: Galada michiya Hamoleketa, Isude, Abi7ezeranne Mahila yelasu.
7.19: Shamida adde nayti Ahiya, Seekema, Liqanne Ani7aama. Efreema Sheeshi
7.20: Efreema na7ay Shutula; Shutula na7ay Bareda; Bareda na7ay Tahata; Tahata na7ay Elada; Elada na7ay Tahata;
7.21: Tahata na7ay Zabada; Zabada na7ay Shutula. Efreemas Ederanne Elada geetetiya hara nam7u nayti de7oosona. Enti Geete asaa mehe kaysin asay enta wodhis.
7.22: Hessa gisho, enta aaway Efreemi daro wode azzanin iya ishati iya minthethanaw yidosona.
7.23: Hessafe guye, I ba machera aqis; iya qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Efreema soo gakida iita metuwa gisho I ba na7aa Bari7a gidi sunthis.
7.24: She7ira geetetiya Efreema na7iya de7awusu; Garsan Beet-Horona, Qommon Uzen-Sheera geetetiya katamata keexasu.
7.25: Efreema adde na7ay Raafa; Raafa na7ay Resheefa; Resheefa na7ay Teela; Teela na7ay Tahana;
7.26: Tahana na7ay Laadana; Laadana na7ay Amhuda; Amhuda na7ay Elsama;
7.27: Elsama na7ay Nawe; Nawe na7ay Iyyasu.
7.28: Efreema kochati ekidi bantaw daana bessi oothida biittay, Beetelenne iya yuushuwan de7iya gutata; doloha baggan Na7ara, wuloha baggan Gezeranne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutata, Seekema, Ayanne enta yuushuwan de7ya gutata ubbaa oykees.
7.29: Minaase biitta zawan de7iya Beet-Saananne iya yuushuwan de7iya gutata, Tanakanne iya yuushuwan de7iya gutata, Magidonne iya yuushuwan de7iya gutata, Dooranne iya yuushuwan de7iya gutata. Isra7eele na7aa Yoosefa kochati ha katamatan de7idosona. Aseera Sheeshi
7.30: Aseera adde nayti Yimina, Yesuwa, Yisiwanne Beri7a; enta michiya Saraho.
7.31: Beri7a adde nayti Hebeeranne Berzaaweta aawa Malka7eela.
7.32: Hebeeri Yaafilexa, Sameera, Hotama yelis; enta miche sunthay Soosano.
7.33: Yaafilexa adde nayti Pasaka, Bimihaalanne Asita.
7.34: Sameera adde nayti Aka, Rooga, Yahuubanne Araame.
7.35: Hotama adde nayti Xoofa, Yimina, Selesanne Amala.
7.36: Xoofa adde nayti Suha, Harnefera, Sogala, Beera, Yimira,
7.37: Bexera, Hoda, Saama, Selisa, Yitiraananne Bi7eera.
7.38: Yetera adde nayti Yorona, Pispanne Ara.
7.39: Ula adde nayti Era, Han7eelanne Irxa.
7.40: Haysati ubbati Aseera kochata. Enti banta soo asaa halaqatanne dooretida wolqaamanne mino asi. Banta yeletada taybetida olanchoti 26,000 gididosona.

8.1: Biniyaame bayra na7ay Beella; kaaloy Asbeela; heedzanthoy Ahira;
8.2: oyddanthoy Nohe; ichashanthoy Raafa.
8.3: Beella adde nayti Adaare, Geera, Abhuuda,
8.4: Abisu Na7imaane, Ahoha,
8.5: Geera, Safufaamanne Kiraama.
8.6: -7 Ehuuda adde nayti Na7imaane, Akiyanne Geera. Enti Gib7an de7idanne guyepe Manahaata biitta di7etidi bida banta soo asaa halaqata. Enta yaa kaalethidi efiday Ozanne Ahuda aawa Geera.
8.8: Shaharaami ba macheta Hushimonne Ba7iira yeddidaape guye Moo7abe biittan adde nayta yelis.
8.9: Shaharaami ba mache Hodishipe Yobaaba, Dibaya, Meesa, Malkaama,
8.10: Ye7uxa, Sakiyaanne Mirma yelis. Iya nayti ubbay banta soo asaa halaqata gididosona.
8.11: I ba mache Hushimipe, Abixubanne Elfa7aala yelis.
8.12: Elfa7aala adde nayti Ebeera, Mashemanne Shameda. Shamedi Ononne Looda katamatanne enta heeran de7iya gutata keexis.
8.13: Shaharaami Beri7anne Shem77a yelis. Enti Eloona kataman de7iya banta soo asaa halaqata. Enti Geete kataman de7iya asaa gooddidosona.
8.14: Beri7a adde nayti Shaharaama, Ahiya, Shashaqa, Yiremoota.
8.15: Zabada, Arada, Edera,
8.16: Mika7eela, Yishphanne Yooha.
8.17: Elfala7a adde nayti Zabada, Masulaama, Hizqa, Hebeera,
8.18: Yishmaraya, Yuzilanne Yobaaba.
8.19: Same7a adde nayti Yaqma, Zikira, Zibada
8.20: Elanaya, Xiltaya, Elela,
8.21: Adaya, Birayanne Shimirata.
8.22: Shashaqa adde nayti Yishphana, Ebeera, Eli7eela,
8.26: Yirohaama adde nayti Shemshiraya, Shehaara, Ataala,
8.28: Haysati banta yeletan Yerusalaamen uttida banta soo asaa halaqata.
8.29: Gaba7oona aaway Yi7eeli Gaba7oona kataman de7is; iya mache sunthay Ma7iko.
8.30: Iya na7aa bayray Abdoona; hara iya adde nayti Xuraya, Qiisa, Ba7aala, Neeranne Nadaaba,
8.32: Maqloota. Maqlooti Shim7a yelis. Haysati Yerusalaamen de7iya banta dabbota matan de7idosona.
8.33: Neeri Qiisa yelis; Qiisi Saa7ola yelis. Saa7oli Yoonataana, Malkisa, Abinadaabenne Asba7eela yelis.
8.34: Yoonataana na7ay Marba7aala yelis; Marba7aali Mikiyaasa yelis.
8.35: Mikiyaasa adde nayti Pitoona, Meleka, Tare7anne Akaaza.
8.36: Akaazi Yaho7ada yelis. Yaho7aadi Alemeeta, Azmaawetanne Zimira yelis. Zimiri Mooxa yelis;
8.37: Mooxi Bin7a yelis; Bin77i Raafa yelis; Raafi El7aasa yelis; El7aasi Axeela yelis.
8.38: Axeelas usupun adde nayti de7oosona. Enta sunthay Azirqaama, Bokeera, Isma7eela, Sha7aara, Abdiyunne Hanaana.
8.39: Axeela ishaa Esheqas heedzu nayti de7oosona. Iya na7ay bayray Ulama; kaaloy Yi7uusa; heedzanthoy Elfalaxa.
8.40: Ulama nayti wolqaamanne mino asi; enti dongen dukeyisata. Ulamas xeetanne ishatamu gidiya naytinne nayta nayti de7oosona. Haysati ubbay Biniyaame kochata.

9.1: Isra7eele asa ubbay ba yeletan yeletan, Isra7eele kawota maxaafan xaafetidi de7ees. Yihuda asay Godaas ammanetibona gisho Babiloone biitta di7etidi bidosona.
9.2: Koyro simmidi banta biittaninne banta katamatan uttiday guutha Isra7eele asata, kahineta, Leewetanne Xoossa keetha oosanchota.
9.3: Yihudape, Biniyaamepe, Efreemapenne Minaasepe guutha asati yidi Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
9.4: Yihuda na7aa Paaresa yaraape Utayi Yerusalaamen de7eysatas halaqa. Utayi Amhuda na7a; Amhudi Omira na7a; Omiri Imira na7a; Imiri Baana na7a.
9.5: Yihuda na7aa Seela yaraape Asayinne iya nayti Yerusalaamen de7eysatas halaqa.
9.6: Yihuda na7aa Zaara yaraape Yi7u7eeli Yerusalaamen de7eysatas halaqa. Yihuda kochaa tayboy usupun xeetanne uddufun tamma.
9.7: Biniyaame yaraa halaqati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Masulaama na7aa Saalu, Hodawa na7aa Masulaama, Hasenaa7u na7aa Hodawa,
9.8: Yirohaama na7aa Yibinaya, Oza na7aa Ela, Mikira na7aa Oza, Safaaxa Masulaama, Ra7uula na7aa Safaaxa, Yibina na7aa Ragu7eela.
9.9: Biniyaame kochaa tayboy uddufun xeetanne ishatammanne usupuna. Haysati ubbay banta soo asaa halaqata.
9.10: Yerusalaamen de7ida kahineti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Enti Yodaha, Yoraba, Yakinanne
9.11: Xoossa keethan aawatiya Azaariyasa. Azaariyasi Kalqe na7a; Kalqey Masulaama na7a; Masulaami Saadoqa na7a; Saadoqi Mariyoota na7a; Mariyooti Akxooba na7a.
9.12: Harati qassi Yirohaama na7aa Adayanne Adi7eela na7aa Ma7iseya. Yirohaami Paskora na7a; Paskori Malkiya na7a. Adi7eeli Yahizeera na7a; Yahizeeri Masulaama na7a; Masulaami Mashilmoota na7a; Mashilmooti Imera na7a.
9.13: Banta soo asaas halaqa gidida kahineta tayboy 1,760. Haysati Xoossa keethan oothanaw danda7iya asata.
9.14: Yerusalaamen de7iya Leeweti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Hashuba na7ay Shamayey Maraara yara. Hashubi Aziriqaama na7a; Aziriqaami Hasabaya na7a.
9.15: Harati qassi Baqbaqara, Hereesa, Galaalanne Mataana. Mataani Mika na7a; Miki Zikira na7a; Zikiri Asaafa na7a.
9.16: Harati qassi Naxoofata gutan uttiday Abdiyunne Baraka. Abdiyuy Shama7iya na7a; Shama7ey Galaala na7a; Galaali Yedutuuna na7a; Baraki Asa na7a; Asi Elqaana na7a.
9.17: Kawo pengiya naageysati, Saluma, Aquba, Talmoona, Ahimaananne enta ishata; salumi enta halaqa.
9.18: Enti wuloha baggara de7iya, Kawo Pengiya naagidosona. Haysafe kase enti Leeweti dunkaanida gutaa naagoosona.
9.19: Abisaafa na7aa na7ay Qore na7ay Salumi Qore yara. Qore yaray kase Godaa Dunkaaniya naagidaysada Saluminne Qore koche gidida iya dabboti Xoossa keetha pengiya naagoosona.
9.20: Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasi kase Qore yaraa halaqa; Goday iyara de7ees.
9.21: Masulaama na7ay Zakariyasi Dunkaaniya giddo geliya pengiya naagees.
9.22: Pengiya naaganaw dooretidaysati kumethi nam7u xeetanne tammanne nam7a; hessati banta gutan gutan taybetidi xaafetidosona. Enta yaras ha aawatetha immiday kawa Dawitanne nabiya Sameela.
9.23: Hessa gisho, entinne enta nayti Xoossa keetha pengiya naagoosona.
9.24: Oyddu baggara dolohan, wulohan, pudehan dugehan issi issi pengey de7ees; he pengeta naageysati de7oosona.
9.25: He gutan de7iya enta dabboti laapuntha gallasan gallasan laametidi, naagidi enta maaddoosona.
9.26: Pengiya naagiya oyddu Leeweti halaqa; enti Xoossa keethaa kifiletanne kifileta giddon de7iya miisheta aawatethan aysoosona.
9.27: Xoossa keethaa naageynne wonta guura kariya dooyey enta gidiya gisho yan aqoosona.
9.28: Leewetape guuthati goyinno wode go7etiya miisheta naagoosona; he miisheta kare kesseynne soo gelsey enta.
9.29: Entafe issoti issoti Xoossa keethan go7etiya hara miisheta, dhiille, woyne ushshu, zayte, ixaanenne sawota aawatethan aysoosona.
9.30: Shin kahineta naytape baggati sawuwa walakoosona.
9.31: Qore kochaafe Saluma bayra na7ay Mataatas yarsho uytha uukisiya aawatethi de7ees.
9.32: Qahaata yara gidiya enta dabbotape baggati Sambaatan Sambaatan xarpheeza bolla wothiya uythaa giigisiya aawatethi ekidosona.
9.33: Leewe kochaafe guutha halaqati Xoossa keethan yexeyisata. Qammanne gallas enti oothiya gisho hara ooso oothonna Xoossa keetha dirsa giddon de7iya keethatan de7oosona.
9.34: Haysati ubbay Leewe soo asaa halaqata; enti Yerusalaamen de7idosona. Kawa Saa7ola Sheeshi
9.35: Gaba7oona aaway Yi7eeli Gaba7oona kataman de7is; iya mache sunthay Ma7iko.
9.36: Iya na7ay bayray Abdoona; iya nayti harati Xuraya, Qiisa, Ba7aala, Neera, Nadaaba,
9.38: Miklooti Sim7a yelis. Haysati Yerusalaamen de7iya banta dabbota matan de7idosona.
9.39: Neeri Qiisa yelis; Qiisi Saa7ola yelis. Saa7oli Yoonataana, Malkisa, Abinadaabenne Eshba7aala yelis.
9.40: Yoonataana na7ay Marba7aala yelis; Marba7aali Mikiyaasa yelis.
9.41: Mikiyaasa nayti Pitoona, Meleka, Tare7anne Akaaza.
9.42: Akaazi Ya7ira yelis. Ya7iri Alemeeta, Azmaawetanne Zimira yelis. Zimiri Mooxa yelis;
9.43: Mooxi Bin7a yelis; Bin7i Rafaya yelis; Rafayi El7aasa yelis; El7aasi Axeela yelis.
9.44: Axeelas usupun adde nayti de7oosona. Enta sunthay Azirqaama, Bokeera, Isma7eela, Sha7aara, Abdiyunne Hanaana.

10.1: Filisxeemeti Isra7eele asaara oletidosona. Isra7eeleti Filisxeemeta sinthafe baqatidosona. He wode daro Isra7eele asay Gilbo7a deriya bolla hayqidosona.
10.2: Filisxeemeti Saa7olanne iya adde nayta gooddi efidi Saa7ola nayta Yoonataana, Abinadaabanne Malkisa wodhidosona.
10.3: Olay Saa7ola teqidi un7ethis; dongen dukeysati Saa7ola demmidi madunxisidosona.
10.4: Saa7oli ba ola miishiya tookeysako, “Ha qaxaretiboona Filisxeemeti tana kaa7onna mela ne mashshan tana wodha” yaagis. Shin iya ola miishiya tookeysi daro yayyida gisho ixis; hessa gisho, Saa7oli ba mashsha sa7an essidi iya bolla kundidi hayqis.
10.5: Iya ola miishiya tookeysi Saa7oli hayqidaysa be7idi, ika ba mashsha sa7an essidi iya bolla kundidi hayqis.
10.6: Hessada hanidi Saa7oli, iya heedzu naytinne iya soo asa ubbay he gallas hayqidosona.
10.7: Zangaaran de7iya Isra7eeleti ubbay banta olanchoti baqatidaysa, Saa7olinne iya nayti hayqidaysa be7ida wode banta katamata aggidi baqatidosona. Filisxeemeti yidi he katamatan de7idosona.
10.8: Wontetha gallas Filisxeemeti ahata bollafe ola miisheta qaari ekanaw yidi, Saa7olinne iya nayti Gilbo7a deriyan hayqidi, zin7idaysata demmidosona.
10.9: Enti Saa7ola qoodhiya qanxidi iya ola miishiya qaari ekidosona. Yaatidi banta eeqata keethaninne banta asaa giddon xoonuwa awaajana mela Filisxeeme biitta ubbaas ase kiittidosona.
10.10: Enti Saa7ola ola miishiya banta xoossata keethatape issuwan wothidosona; iya huuphiya banta Xoossa Daagona eeqa keethan kaqidosona.
10.11: Filisxeemeti Saa7ola bolla oothidaba ubbaa Galadan de7iya Yaabesa katamaa asay si7ida wode,
10.12: mino asati ubbay bidi, Saa7ola ahaanne iya nayta aha ekidi Yaabesa katama ehidosona. Yaabesan de7iya wolaa garsan enta moogidosona; yaatidi laapun gallas xoomidosona.
10.13: Saa7oli Godaas ammanetibona gisho hayqis. Godaa qaala I naagibeenna; Godaa zore oycheysa aggidi,
10.14: moytille xeegiya asi zore oychis. Hessa gisho, Goday iya wodhidi iya kawotetha Isseye na7aa Dawitas aathidi immis.

11.1: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asa ubbay issife Kebroonan de7iya Dawitako bidi, “Nuuni ne suuthunne ne asho.
11.2: Kase Saa7oli kawo gididi de7iya wodeka, Isra7eele asaa olas kaalethiday nena. Goday ne Xoossay, ‘Ta asaa Isra7eele neeni heemmana; enta bolla neeni kawotana’ ” yaagis.
11.3: Isra7eele cimati ubbay kawa Dawitako yida wode I entara Kebroonan Godaa sinthan caaqis. Goday Sameela baggara odida qaalada Dawiti Isra7eele bolla kawotanaada enti iya tiyidosona.
11.4: Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay Yerusalaame katamaa bidosona. He wode Yaabuse asay he bessan de7iya gisho he katamay Yaabuse geetetees.
11.5: Yaabuseti Dawitako, “Neeni ha katamaa gelanaw danda7aka” yaagidosona. Gidoshin, Dawiti Xiyoonen de7iya enta miixaa oykin, Xiyooney Dawita Katama geetetis.
11.6: Dawiti ba olanchota, “Yaabuseta koyrottidi oliya oonika toora mocona gidana” yaagis. Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi koyrottidi olidi halaqa gidis.
11.7: Dawiti he miixan de7ida gisho he katamay Dawita Katama geetetis.
11.8: Dawiti Miilope doomidi he katamaa zaaridi keexis; attida baggaa Iyo7aabi zaaridi keexis.
11.9: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday iyara de7iya gisho Dawiti minni minni bis. Mino Gidida Dawita Asata (2 Same 23:8-39)
11.10: Mino gidida Dawita asati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidosona. Goday Isra7eeles gida qaalada Dawiti kawotana mela ha asati Isra7eele asaara daro maaddidosona. Qassi iya kawotethaa minthidosona.
11.11: Mino gidida Dawita asati haysafe kaallidi de7eyisata. Entafe heedzati daro eretidaysata. Heedzatape koyroy Hakmoona addiya Yashobi7aama; I issi toho olan heedzu xeetu asaa ba tooran wodhis.
11.12: Iya kaalley, heedzu mino asatape issoy Ahoha addiya Dooda na7a Alaazara.
11.13: Filisxeeme asay oletanaw Pasdamima geetetiya bessaa shiiqida wode Alaazari Dawitara de7ees. Isra7eele olanchoti Filisxeeme asata sinthafe baqatiya wode Alaazari banga gaden de7ees.
11.14: Inne iya asati gadiya giddon Filisxeeme asaara oletin, Goday gita xoono immidi enta ashshis.
11.15: Filisxeeme olanchoti Raafayme zangaaran dunkaanida wode hastamu halaqatape heedzati Dawiti de7iya Adulaama gongoluwan de7iya zaallako bidosona.
11.16: He wode Dawiti miixan de7ees; Filisxeeme olanchotape issi cugay Beeteleme olidi oykis.
11.17: Dawiti haathe uyanaw amotidi, “Beeteleme pengiya matan de7iya pulto haathaafe tana ushshanay oone!” yaagis.
11.18: Heedzu mino asati Filisxeemeti dunkaanida bessaa kanthi bidi Beeteleme pengiya matan de7iya pulto haathaafe duuqidi Dawitas ehidosona. Shin Dawiti uyonna ixidi haatha Godaa sinthan tigis.
11.19: “Ha haatha ushshi taape haako! Banta shempuwa bayzidi ehida ha asata suuthaa taani uyo? Enti banta shempuwa aathidi immidi ehidosona” yaagis. Hessa gisho, Dawiti haatha uybeenna. Heedzu mino asati hessa oothidosona.
11.20: Iyo7aaba ishay Abisi hastamu olanchotas halaqa. I ba tooran heedzu xeetu asaa wodhidi, ika ha heedzatada eretida asi gidis.
11.21: Abisi heedzatara taybetonna ixikoka, I heedzatape aadhidi bonchetida asi; I entaw halaqa gidis.
11.22: Qabxeela addey Yoodahe na7ay Banayi mino asi; I mino ooso oothis. I nam7u eretida Moo7abe asata wodhis. Qassi shachi wodhida issi gallas olla giddo gelidi gaammo wodhis.
11.23: Banayi ichashu wadha gidiya Gibxe addiya wodhis. Gibxe addiya kushen wandaraashe mela toori de7ees; shin Banayi xam7a oykidi addiyako bidi iya kushiyan de7iya toora dafi ekidi iya tooran iya wodhis.
11.24: Yoodahe na7ay Banayi haysa oothis. Iya sunthay he heedzataysada eretis.
11.25: I hastamata giddon daro bonchetis; shin I heedzata taybuwan deenna. Dawiti iya bana naageysata halaqa oothis.
11.26: Mino asati Iyo7aaba ishaa Asaheela, Beeteleme addiya Dooda na7aa Eliyaana,
11.27: Harooda addiya Samoota, Piloona addiya Selesa,
11.28: Tequhe addiya Esika na7aa Ira, Anatoota addiya Abi7ezera,
11.29: Kusata addiya Sabaka, Ahoha addiya Elaya,
11.30: Naxoofa addiya No7eeranne Banaha na7aa Heleda,
11.31: Biniyaamen de7iya Gib7a addiya Rabaya na7a Etaya, Pir7atoona addiya Banayasa,
11.32: Ga7aasa Zangaara matape yida Uraya, Araba addiya Abi7eela,
11.33: Barhuuma addiya Azmoota, Sa7alboona addiya Abi7eela,
11.34: Gizoona addiya Hasema, Harara addiya Shaage na7a Yoonataana,
11.35: Harara addiya Sakara na7a Ahi7aama, Ure na7aa Elfala,
11.36: Makeera addiya Hefeera, Piloona addiya Akiya,
11.37: Qarmeloosa addiya Hexira, Ezbaya na7aa Na7iraya,
11.38: Naatana ishaa Iyyu7eela, Hagira na7aa Mibhaara,
11.39: Amoone addiya Xeleqa, Xaruya na7aa Iyo7aaba ola miishiya tookiya Ba7eroota addiya Nahiraya,
11.41: Hite addiya Ooriyoona, Ahilaya na7aa Zabada,
11.42: Robeela koche gidida Shiiza na7aa Adina. I Robeela kochata halaqa; hastamati iyara issife de7oosona.
11.43: Hara mino asati Ma7ika na7aa Hanaana, Mitaane addiya Iyosaafexa,
11.44: Astaroota addiya Ooziyana, Aro7eera addiya Hotama nayta Shama7anne Yi7eela,
11.45: Shimira na7aa Yidi7eelanne iya ishaa Tiixa addiya Yooha,
11.46: Mahaawa addiya Eli7eela, Elnaama nayta Yiribayanne Yoshawa, Moo7abe addiya Yitima,

12.1: Dawiti Qiisa na7aa Saa7olape baqatidi Xiqilaagan uttida wode iyako yida asati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Enta kase Dawita olan maaddida mino asata giddon de7oosona.
12.2: Enti dongen dukeyisata; qassi ushacha kusheninne haddirsa kushen yambaranawnne donge dukanaw danda7oosona. Enti Biniyaame koche gidida Saa7ola kochata.
12.3: Enta halaqay Ahi7ezera; iyape kaallidi Iyo7aasa; enti Gib7a addiya Shama7a na7a. Harati qassi Azmaawe nayta gidida Yizi7eelanne Palaxa, Baraka, Anatoote addiya Iyyu,
12.4: hastamata giddon wolqaama gididi, enta kaalethiya Gaba7oona addiya Yishima7iya, Ermiyaasa, Yahazi7eela, Yohaana, Gedaara addiya Yozabaata,
12.5: Eluzaya, Yarmoota, Balaya, Samara, Harifa addiya Safaaxa,
12.6: Qore koche gidida Elqaana, Yishiya, Azari7eela, Yoo7ezeranne Yashobi7aama,
12.7: Gadoora addiya Yirohaama nayta Yo7eelanne Zabada.
12.8: Dawiti bazzon de7iya miixan de7ishin, Gaade kochaafe guutha asati iyako yidosona. Enti minonne olas giigidaysata; gondallenne toora oykanaw danda7eyisata. Enta som7oy gaammo som7o mela; enti dere huuphera gupiya gen7e mela eesotoosona.
12.9: Enta halaqay Exera; nam7anthoy abdiyu; heedzanthoy Eli7aaba;
12.10: oyddanthoy Mismaana; ichashanthoy Ermiyaasa;
12.11: usupunthoy Ataya; laapunthoy Eli7eela;
12.12: hospunthoy Yohaana; uddufunthoy Elzabaada;
12.13: tammanthoy Ermiyaasa; tammanne issanthoy Makibanaya.
12.14: Haysati Gaade kochaa olanchotas halaqata. Entafe ziqay mato halaqa; dhoqay qassi shaalaqa gidis.
12.15: Yordaanose shaafay, gaxape gaxa gakidi kixida koyro ageenan pinnidaysati haysata. Enti zangaaran dolohanne wuloha baggan de7iya asaa ubbaa yedethidosona.
12.16: Biniyaame kochaafenne Yihuda kochaafe guutha asati Dawiti de7iya miixa bidosona.
12.17: Dawiti entara gahetanaw keyidi, “Hinte tana maaddanaw saro taako yidaba gidiko ta wozanay hintera gidana. Shin hinte tana ta morketas aathidi immanaw yidaba gidiko, hintena erite! Taani oothida iitabay bayna gisho nu aawata Xoossay hessa be7o; I hintena pirdo!” yaagis.
12.18: Hessafe guye, hastamata halaqa Amasaya bolla Xoossa Ayyaanay wodhin, “Dawita, nuuni neyisata! Isseye na7aw, nuuni neera de7oos! Saroy new gido! Nena maaddeysatas saroy gido! Ne Xoossay nena maaddana” yaagis. Dawiti enta ekidi ba olanchotas halaqa oothis.
12.19: Dawiti Filisxeemetara gididi Saa7ola olanaw bida wode, Minaase kochaafe guutha asati Dawitara gahetidosona. Shin Filisxeemeta halaqati Dawitinne Dawita asay bantara boonnada diggidosona. Dawitinne Dawita asay, enta kawa Saa7olas aathidi immaneko gidi yayyida gisho Filisxeemeti zoretidaape guye enta guye zaaridosona.
12.20: Dawiti Xiqilaaga simmida wode Minaase kochaafe Dawita maaddanaw keyida asati Adina, Yozabaata, Yidi7eela, Mika7eela, Yozabaata, Elihanne Xiltaya. Haysati kase Minaase biittan shaalaqa.
12.21: Enti ubbay minonne wolqaama asi gidiya gisho Dawita zugidi oliya asaa olidi iya maaddidosona.
12.22: Dawita olanchoti, Xoossa olanchoda darana gakanaw iya maaddiya asay gallas gallas guzhetees.
12.23: Goday iyaw gidaysada Saa7ola kawotethaa Dawitako zaaranaw dancetidi Dawitako Kebroona bida olanchota tayboy haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata.
12.24: Gondallenne toora oykidi olas giigida Yihuda kochay 6,800.
12.25: Simoona kochaafe olas giigida minonne wolqaama olanchoti 7,100.
12.27: Aarona kochaa halaqay Yoodahe; Yoodahera issife 3,700 asati de7oosona.
12.28: Saadoqi na7atethi, minonne wolqaama asi; Saadoqa soo asaape laatamanne nam7u halaqati iyara de7oosona.
12.29: Biniyaame koche gidida Saa7ola dabboti 3,000. Shin Biniyaame kochaafe dariya baggay Saa7ola soo asaas he wode gakanaw ammanetidosona.
12.30: Efreema kochaafe banta soo asan eretida minonne wolqaama asati 20,800.
12.31: Dawita kawoyanaw baanaw dooretida Minaase kochaafe baggati 18,000.
12.32: Isra7eele asay ay oothanaw bessiyako wodiyaba shaakidi eriya akeekancho asati, Yisakoora kochaa halaqati, nam7u xeeta; enta dabboti ubbay entaw kiitetoosona.
12.33: Ola miishe ubbaa oykidi banta kumetha wozanan Dawita maaddanaw giigida olanchotan Zabloona kochay 50,000.
12.34: Niftaaleme kochaafe 1,000 halaqatinne gondallenne toora oykiya 37,000 asati entara de7oosona.
12.36: Olas keyanaw Aseera kochaafe giigida asati 40,000.
12.37: Yordaanose shaafape hefintha doloha baggan de7iya Robeela kochaafe Gaade kochaafenne Minaase koche baggaafe ola miishe ubbaa oykidi yida asati 120,000.
12.38: Ha ubba olanchoti Dawita Isra7eele bolla kawothanaw banta qofaa qachidi, Kebroona katamaa yidosona. Qassi Isra7eelepe attidaysati Dawita kawothanaw issi wozanan gididosona.
12.39: Enta dabboti entaw koshshiyaba giigisida gisho mishenne uyishe Dawitara heedzu gallas uttidosona.
12.40: Isra7eele asaas ufaysi gidiya gisho, pudeha baggan de7iya Yisakoorape, Zabloonapenne Niftaalemepe daro asay dhiille, balase nuka, woyne teera, woyne ushshunne zayte haren, baqulon, gimaleninne booran caanidi ehidosona; qassi enti mehenne dorse shukidi maanaw ehidosona.

13.1: Dawiti shaalaqataranne mato halaqatara zoretis.
13.2: Isra7eele asa ubbaa, “Hintew lo77o daaniyaba gidikonne Godaa nu Xoossaa shene gidiko, Isra7eele biitta gaxan de7iya nu dabboti, hessadaka banta katamataninne hentha bessatan de7iya kahinetinne Leeweti nuuko shiiqana mela ase kiittoos.
13.3: Saa7ola kawotethaa wode qeli geetetida nu Xoossaa Taabotiya ane zaaridi ehoos” yaagis.
13.4: Dawita oday lo77o gidida gisho asa ubbay ma7is.
13.5: Hessa gisho, Dawiti Xoossa Taabotiya Qiriyaat-Yi7aarimepe ehana mela Gibxe zawape doomidi Hamaata Pino gakanaw de7iya Isra7eele asa ubbaa shiishis.
13.6: Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay kiruubetape giddon ba araata bolla uttida Godaa sunthay xeegetida Xoossa Taabotiya ehanaw Yihuda biittan de7iya Baala geetetiya Qiriyat-Yi7aarima bidosona.
13.7: Xoossa Taabotiya ooratha para gaaren wothidi, Amnadaabe soope ehidosona; Oozinne Ahiyoy gaariya laaggoosona.
13.8: Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay diithinne maasinqo kaa7ishe, karaabo baqishe, daala giirsishe, zaye punnishe banta kumetha wolqan Xoossa sinthan ufaytidi, yexishe Xoossaa bonchidosona.
13.9: Enti Kidoona wudumma gakiya wode boorati dhubetida gisho Oozi Taabotiya oykanaw ba kushiya yeddis.
13.10: Ooza kushey Taabotiya bochida gisho, Godaa hanqoy Oza bolla eexis. Hessa gisho, Goday iya xadikin, I he bessan Xoossa sinthan hayqis.
13.11: Goday hanqetidi Ooza wodhida gisho, Dawiti yilotis. Hachi gakanaw he bessay Oozi dhuketida bessaa geetetees.
13.12: He gallas Dawiti Xoossaa yayyida gisho, “Xoossa Taabotiya taako waata ehanaw danda7iyana?” yaagis.
13.13: Dawiti Taabotiya Yerusalaame efanaape gidi Gaate addiya Abdaara soo efis.
13.14: Xoossa Taabotey Abdaara son iya soo asaara heedzu ageena gam7is. Goday iya soo asaanne iyaw de7iya ubbaa anjis.

14.1: Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami Dawitas gadho keexana mela kiitetiya asata, shuchu masseysatanne anaaxeta ziga mithara yeddis.
14.2: Goday Isra7eele bolla iya kawo oothidi minthidaysanne ba asaa Isra7eele gisho iya kawotethaa bonchidaysa Dawiti eris.
14.3: Hessafe guye, Dawiti Yerusalaamen hara macho ekidi adde naytanne macca nayta yelis.
14.4: Dawiti Yerusalaamen yelida adde nayti Samuusa, Sobaaba, Naatana, Solomone,
14.5: Yibhaara, Elisu7a, Elfalaxa,
14.6: Noga, Nafega, Yafaya,
14.7: Elisaama, Eldaana, Elfalaxa. Dawiti Filisxeemeta Xoonis (2 Same 5:17-25)
14.8: Dawiti Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawo gididi tiyetidaysa Filisxeemeti si7ida wode ubbay Dawita olidi oykanaw keyidosona. Dawiti hessa si7idi entara oletanaw keyis.
14.9: Filisxeemeti Raafayme zangaara yidi oykidosona.
14.10: Dawiti, “Taani Filisxeemeta olo? Neeni enta taw aatha immanee?” yaagidi Xoossaa oychis. Goday, “Bada ola; taani enta new aatha immana” yaagis.
14.11: Dawitinne iya asay Ba7al-Parasime geetetiya bessaa bidi yan enta xoonidosona. Dawiti, “Haathi dhuusidi keyeysada Xoossay ta morketa giddora tana kanthisis” yaagis. He bessaa sunthay Ba7al-Parasime geetetis.
14.12: Filisxeemeti banta eeqata he bessan yeggidi bin, Dawiti kiittidi enta eeqata xuugisis.
14.13: Filisxeemeti zaari he zangaara yidi olidosona.
14.14: Dawiti Xoossaa zaaridi oychis. Xoossay, “Enta guyera yuuya aadhada wolaa matan eqada olape attishin, sintha baggara keyopa.
14.15: Wola huuphen salpe girsi neeni si7iya wode olanaw keya. Hessi Filisxeeme olanchota shocanaw Xoossay neepe sinthe aadhidaysas malla” yaagis.
14.16: Xoossay kiitidaysada Dawiti oothis. Gaba7oonape Gezera gakanaw Isra7eele asay Filisxeeme olanchota wodhidosona.
14.17: Dawita sunthay biitta ubbaa gakis. Kawotetha ubbay Dawitas yayyana mela Goday oothis.

15.1: Dawiti ba kataman baw keethe keexis; Xoossa Taabotiyas besse giigisidi, dunkaane essis.
15.2: Dawiti, “Xoossa Taabotiya tookanaadanne merinaw Xoossas oothanaada Goday dooriday Leeweta gidiya gisho hari oonika Xoossa Taabotiya tookanaw bessenna” yaagis.
15.3: Dawiti Godaa Taabotiyas giigisida bessaa Taabotiya ehana mela Isra7eele asa ubbaa Yerusalaame shiishis.
15.4: Kaallidi Dawiti Aarona kochatanne Leeweta xeegidi shiishis.
15.5: Qahaata yaraape halaqay Uri7eelinne issi xeetanne laatamu iya dabboti yidosona.
15.6: Maraara yaraape halaqay Asayinne nam7u xeetanne laatamu iya dabboti yidosona.
15.7: Gedisoona yaraape halaqay Iyyu7eelinne xeetanne hastamu iya dabboti yidosona.
15.8: Elzafaana yaraape halaqay Shama7inne nam7u xeetu iya dabboti yidosona.
15.9: Kebroona yaraape halaqay Eli7eelinne hospun tammu iya dabboti yidosona.
15.10: Uzi7eela yaraape halaqay Amnadaabeynne xeetanne tammanne nam7u iya daboti yidosona.
15.11: Dawiti kahineta Saadoqanne Abyataara, Leeweta Uri7eela, Asaya, Iyyu7eela, Shama7a, Eli7eelanne Amnadaabe xeegis.
15.12: Entako, “Hinte Leewe kochaas halaqata. Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa Taabotiya taani giigisida bessaa ehanaw hintenne hinte dabboti geeyite.
15.13: Hinte Leeweti koyro Xoossa Taabotiya tookiboonna gishonne nuuni iya woga mela waati efaneko Xoossaa oychiboona gisho, Goday nu Xoossay nuna seeris” yaagis.
15.14: Godaa Isra7eele Xoossa Taabotiya ehanaw kahinetinne Leeweti bantana geeshshidosona.
15.15: Goday Muse baggara kase kiitidaysada Leeweti Xoossaa Taabotiya banta hashiyan kasora tookidosona.
15.16: Diithi, maasinqonne daala kaa7ishe ufaysa yethi yexana mela banta dabbo gidida Leewetape zammaareta shuumana mela Dawiti kiittis.
