15.17: Leeweti Iyyu7eela na7aa Hemaana, iya dabbotape Baraka na7aa Asaafanne enta dabbotape Maraara yaraa Qusaya na7aa Etaana shuumidosona.
15.18: Qassi nam7antho dethan Zakariyasa, Yazi7eela, Shamramoota, Yi7eela, Una, Eli7aaba, Banaya, Ma7iseya, Matita, Elfala, Miqineyanne penge naagiya Abdiyunne Yi7eela shuumidosona.
15.19: Naase daala qaathana mela Hemaani Asaafinne Etaani shuumetidosona.
15.20: Qassi Zakariyasi, Ya7izi7eeli, Shamramooti, Yi7eeli, Uni, Eli7aabi, Ma7iseynne Banayi maasinqo kaa7oosona.
15.21: Matita, Elfali, Miqineyi, Abdiyuy Yi7eelinne Azaazey diithi diixoosona.
15.22: Leeweta halaqay Kanaaney mazmure eriya gisho enta kaalethanaw shuumetis.
15.23: Barakinne Elqaani Taabotiya dunkaaniya pengiya naaganaw dooretidosona.
15.24: Kahineti Sabaani, Iyosaafexi, Natina7eeli, Amasayi, Zakariyasi, Banayinne Alaazari Xoossa Taabotiya sinthan moyze punnanaw dooretidosona. Obeed-Edoomeynne Yihey Taabotiya naaganaw dooretidosona.
15.25: Dawiti, Isra7eele cimatinne shaalaqati Godaa caaqo Taabotiya Abdaara soope ehanaw ufaytishe bidosona.
15.26: Godaa caaqo Taabotiya tookida Leeweta Xoossay maaddida gisho enti laapun kormanne laapun maraze yarshidosona.
15.27: Dawiti, Taabotiya tookida Leeweti, mazmure yexeysatinne enta halaqay Kanaaney liinope oosetida ma7o ma7idosona. Dawitika liinope oosetida efuude ma7is.
15.28: Hessada oothidi, Isra7eele ubbay ufaytidi moyzenne zaye punnishe, daala qaathishe, diithinne maasinqo kaa7ishe Godaa caaqo Taabotiya ehidosona.
15.29: Godaa caaqo Taabotey Dawita katamaa gelida wode Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola kawoy Dawiti ufaytidi durishininne kaa7ishin maskootera be7ada ba wozanan kadhasu.

16.1: Enti Xoossa Taabotiya ehidi Dawiti Taabotiya wothanaw essida dunkaaniya giddon wothidi, xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho Xoossas yarshidosona.
16.2: Dawiti xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho yarshidi polidaape guye Godaa sunthan asaa anjis.
16.3: Isra7eele asa ubbaas maccasinne addes, huuphen huuphen issi muume uythi, issi qanxo ashonne issi woyne nuka gishis.
16.4: Godaa Taabotiya sinthan oothana melanne Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sabbana mela, galatana melanne bonchana mela guutha Leeweta Dawiti shuumis.
16.5: Leeweta halaqay Asaafa; Asaafa kaallidi Zakariyasa. Zakariyasa kaallidi de7ey Yi7eela, Shamramoota, Yi7eela, Matita, Eli7aaba, Banayanne Obeed-Edoome. Enti maasinqonne diithi diixanaw shuumetidosona; shin Asaafi daala girsanaw shuumetis.
16.6: Kahiney Banayinne Yahazi7eeli Xoossa caaqo Taabotiya sinthan ubba wode moyze punnanaw shuumetidosona.
16.7: He gallas Dawiti Asaafinne iya dabboti Godaa sabbana mela ha mazmuriya koyro kiittis. Galata Mazmure (Maz 105:1-15; 96:1-13; 106:1, 47-48)
16.8: Godaa galatite; iya sunthaa xeegite; Iya oosuwa kawotethata giddon odite.
16.9: Iya sabbite; galata mazmuriya iyaw yexite; Malaalisiya iya ooso ubbaa odite.
16.10: Iya geeshsha sunthan ceeqetite; Godaa koyeyisata wozanay ufayto.
16.11: Godaanne iya wolqaa be7ite; ubba wode iya sinthaa koyite.
16.12: -13 Hinteno, Isra7eele kochato, dooretida Yayqooba nayto, Iya malaata, I immida pirdaanne malaalsiyabata hassayite.
16.14: I Godaa nu Xoossaa; iya pirday biitta ubbaa bollana.
16.15: Iya caaquwa merinaw mukulu yeletethaa gakanaw, iya qaala naagite.
16.16: Abrahaamera caaqida caaquwa naagees; Yisaaqas gelida qaala minthees.
16.17: Yayqoobas wogaa, Isra7eeles merinaa caaquwa, oothidi minthis.
16.18: “Taani new Kanaane biitta immana; I ne kochaas laata gidana” yaagis.
16.19: Hessi hinte taybon guuthanne Kanaanen bete gididi de7iya wode hannis.
16.20: Issi deriyape hara dere pinnidosona; issi kawotethaafe hara kawotethi yuuyidosona.
16.21: Xoossay enta oonika naaqana mela immibeenna; enta gisho kawota seeris.
16.22: “Taani tiyidaysata bochofite; ta nabeta qohopite” yaagis.
16.23: Sa7an de7iya asa ubbay Godaas yexite; iya ashuwa gallas gallas odite.
16.24: Kawotethata giddon iya bonchuwa, malaalsiya iya oosuwa asa ubbaa giddon awaajite.
16.25: Goday gita; aadho galatay iyaw bessees; xoossata ubbaafe aadhidi bonchetanaw bessees.
16.26: Hara kawotethata xoossati ubbay eeqata; shin Goday salota medhida Xoossaa.
16.27: Iya sinthan bonchoynne teemi de7ees; minotethinne ufaysi I de7iya bessan de7ees.
16.28: Hinteno, biitta kawotethato, Godaa bonchonne wolqa immite.
16.29: Iya sunthaas bessiya boncho immite; yarsho ekidi iya sinthe yiite; iya geeshshatetha teeman Godaa goyinnite.
16.30: Biittan de7iya asa ubbay iya sinthan kokorite; Sa7ay minni eqida gisho qaaxenna.
16.31: Saloti ufayto; sa7i hashshu go! Kawotethata giddon enti “Goday kawotis!” yaago.
16.32: Abbaynne iya giddon de7iya ubbay guummo; gadeynne iyan de7iya katha ubbay ufayto.
16.33: He wode woran de7iya mitha ubbay ufaysan Godaa sinthan yexana. I sa7aa bolla pirdanaw yees.
16.34: Goday keeha gidiya gishonne iya siiqoy merinaasa gidiya gisho, Godaa galatite.
16.35: “Abeeti nuna ashshiya Xoossaw nuna ashsha; Nuuni ne geeshsha suntha galatana melanne ne bonchuwan nu bonchetana mela, kawotethata giddofe shiishada nuna ashsha” yaagite.
16.36: Goday Isra7eele Xoossay, merinaape merinaa gakanaw galatetto! Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” gidi, Godaa galatidosona.
16.37: Godaa caaqo Taabotiya sinthan gallas gallas goyinnoos koshshiyaba ubba wode enti oothana mela Dawiti Asaafanne iya dabbota wothis.
16.38: Qassi Obeed-Edoomenne usupun tammanne hospun iya dabbota entara oothana mela wothis; Yedutuuna na7aa Obeed-Edoomenne Hosa pengiya naagana mela wothis.
16.39: Kahiney Saadoqinne iyara oothiya kahineti Gaba7oonan de7iya dhoqa bessan, Dunkaaniya sinthan oothana mela enta yan aggis.
16.40: Goday Isra7eeles immida higgiyan xaafetidaysada enti wontanne omarsi ubba wode xuussa yarsho yarshana mela oothis.
16.41: Iya siiqoy merinaasa gidiya gisho Godaa mazmuren galatana mela Hemaana, Yedutuunanne dooretida harata Dawiti entara issife wothis.
16.42: Hemaaninne Yedutuuni moyze punnoosona, daala giirsoosona galata mazmure yexishe kaa7iya hara miisheta kaa7oosona. Yedutuuna adde nayti pengiya naaganaw shuumetidosona.
16.43: Hessafe guye asa ubbay ba soo soo bis. Dawitika ba soo asaa anjanaw simmis.

17.1: Dawiti ba gadhon uttidaape guye nabiya Naatanako, “Taani zigape keexetida keethan de7ayis; shin Godaa caaqo Taabotey dunkaane giddon de7ees” yaagis.
17.2: Naatani Dawitako, “Goday neera de7iya gisho ne wozanay qopidaba ubbaa ootha” yaagis.
17.3: Shin he qamma Godaa qaalay Naatanako haysada yaagishe yis;
17.4: “Bada ta aylliya Dawitako haysada yaaga; ‘taani daana keethe keexanay nena gidaka.
17.5: Taani Isra7eele Gibxefe kessida wodepe doomada hachi gakanaw keethan de7abike; taani dunkaanepe dunkaane, bessafe bessi yuuyashe de7as.
17.6: Taani Isra7eele asa ubbaara yuuyida bessa ubban, ta asaa heemmana mela taani shuumida asaape oona Taw ziga keethi ayis keexabikii?’ gada oychabike” yaagees.
17.7: “Hessa gisho, ta aylliya Dawitako bada Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Taani nena dorse heemmiya bessape denthada ta asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela ehas.
17.8: Neeni bida besse ubban taani neera gidas; ne morketa ubbaa ne sinthafe diggas. Hiza taani ha sa7an eretida gita asaada ne sunthaa gitayana.
17.9: Taani ta asaa Isra7eeles besse immada, enta he bessan tokana. Hessa gisho, enti banta bessan de7ana; enti zaaridi waabaqokona. Kase taani ta asaa Isra7eele bolla daynnata shuumada wode morketi naaqidaysada,
17.10: zaaridi iita asati enta naaqokona. Taani ne morketa ubbaa new haarsana. “ ‘Hessa bolla Goday ba huuphen new keethe keexanaysa odees.
17.11: Ne hayqada ne mayzatan gahetiya wode taani neepe guye ne naytape issuwa denthada iya kawotethaa minthana.
17.12: Taw keethe keexanay iya; taani iya araata merinaw mintha essana.
17.13: Taani iyaw aawa gidana; ika taw na7a gidana. Neepe sinthe kawotida Saa7olape ta maarotetha ekidaysada taani iyape ekike.
17.14: Taani iya ta asaa bollanne ta kawotethaa bolla merinaw shuumana; iya araatay merinaw minni eqana’ ” yaagis.
17.15: Naatani Xoossay iyaw qoncisida qaala ubbaa Dawitas odis. Dawita Woosa (2 Same 7:18-29)
17.16: Hessafe guye, kawoy Dawiti dunkaaniya giddo gelidi, Godaa sinthan uttidi, haysada yaagidi woossis; “Abeeti Godaw, Xoossaw neeni haysa ubbaa taw oothanaw taani oonee? Ta soo asayka aybee?
17.17: Abeeti Godaw, hessi ne ayfiya sinthan guutha daanin, ne aylliya soo asaas sinthafe hananaba odadasa. Neeni tana gita asi oothada xeelladasa.
17.18: Neeni tana ne aylliya bonchida gisho, Dawiti ay gaanaw danda7ii? Neeni tana ne aylliya eraasa.
17.19: Abeeti Godaw, ne aylliya gishonne ne wozanaa qofaada ha gitaba ubbaa oothada, ha gita ufaysa qaala ubbaa tana erisadasa.
17.20: Abeeti Godaw, ne meli oonika baawa. Nuuni nu haythan si7idaysada neepe attishin, hara xoossi baawa.
17.21: Neeni ne ase oothanaw wozida ne asaa Isra7eele daaniya hara kawotethi sa7a bolla baawa. Neeni oothida gitanne malaalsiya oosota gaason ne sunthay biittan eretis. Neeni Gibxefe wozida ne asaa sinthafe kawotethata goodda kessadasa.
17.22: Neeni ne asaa Isra7eele merinaw nebaa oothadasa. Abeeti Godaw, neeni enta Xoosse gidadasa.
17.23: “Abeeti Godaw, neeni ne aylliyasinne iya soo asaas odidabay merinaw minnidi de7o; neeni oothana gidaysada ootha.
17.24: ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay tuma Isra7eele Xoosse’ asay gaanada ne sunthay merinaw minnidi daananne gita gidana. Ne aylliya Dawita soo asay ne sinthan minnidi daana.
17.25: “Abeeti ta Xoossaw, neeni ne aylliyas keethe keexana gada qoncisadasa. Hessa gisho, taani ne aylley ha woosa woossanaw minnas.
17.26: Abeeti Godaw, neeni Xoosse! Neeni ha lo77o ufaysa qaala taw ne aylliyas oothana gadasa.
17.27: Ne sinthan merinaw daana mela ne aylliya soo asaa anjanaw koyadasa. Abeeti Godaw, ne anjidaysi merinaw anjetidaysa gidana” yaagidi woossis.

18.1: Hessafe guye, Dawiti Filisxeemeta xoonidi haaris; Geete katamaanne iya gutata Filisxeemeta kushepe ekis.
18.2: Dawiti Moo7abe asaa xoonin, enti iyaw haaretidi giiridosona.
18.3: Hamaata katamaa matan de7iya Suubba kawoy Adraazari, ba kawotetha Efraxiisa shaafa gakanaw aassanaw bishin Dawiti iya olis.
18.4: Dawiti Adraazarape issi mukulu para gaareta, laapun mukulu para asatanne laatamu mukulu toho asata di77is. Dawiti xeetu gaaretas gidiya parata ashshidi hara parata ubbaas gedaa xaphuwa qanxis.
18.5: Damasqo kataman de7iya Sooreti Suubba kawa Adraazara maaddanaw yida wode Dawiti entafe 22,000 asaa wodhis.
18.6: Hessafe guye, Soore biittan Damasqo kataman ola miixa medhis. Soore asati Dawitas haaretidi giiridosona. Dawiti bida bessa ubban Goday iyaw xoono immis.
18.7: Dawiti Adraazara oosanchoti tookida worqa gondalleta ekidi Yerusalaame efis.
18.8: Qassi Dawiti Adraazari haariya Xebahanne Kuna katamatape daro naase birata ekis. Hessafe guye, Solomoney he naase biratape oosetida kereta, tuussatanne dumma dumma miisheta oothis.
18.9: Dawiti Suubba kawa Adraazara olanchota ubbaa xoonidaysa Hamaata kawoy Toyi si7is.
18.10: Toyi Adrazaarara oletishe gam7ida gisho Dawiti Adraazara olidi xoonida gisho iya hashshu gaanawunne sarothanaw ba na7aa Hadoraama kawa Dawitako kiittis. Hadoraami worqafe, birapenne naase biratape oosetida miisheta imota ekidi bis.
18.11: Kawoy Dawiti Edoomepe, Moo7abepe, Amoonepe, Filisxeemetapenne Amaaleqatape di77idi ekida biraanne worqa ha miishetara gathidi Godaas dummayidi wothis.
18.12: Xaruya na7ay Abisi Edoome asaape 18,000 asaa, Maxine Zangaaran wodhis.
18.13: Dawiti Edoomen ola miixa medhis; yaatin, he biitta asa ubbay Dawitas haaretis. Dawiti bida bessa ubban Goday iyaw xoono immis.
18.14: Hessada oothidi, Dawiti Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawotidi ba asa ubbaa xillotethaninne suure pirdan aysis.
18.15: Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi toora mocona; Ahiluda na7ay Iyosaafexi taarike xaafe.
18.16: Ahixuuba na7ay Saadoqinne Abyataara na7ay Abimelekey kahine; Sarayi waanna xaafe.
18.17: Yoodahe na7ay Banayi Dawita naagiya asaa halaqa; Dawita adde nayti iya kawotethan dhoqa bessa oykida halaqata.

19.1: Hessafe guye, Amoone kawoy Na7oosi hayqin iya na7ay iya bessan kawotis.
19.2: Dawiti, “Iya aaway Na7oosi taw keehida gisho taani iya na7aa Hanunas keehana” yaagis. Hanuna aaway hayqida gisho Dawiti iya minthethanaw ase kiittis. Dawiti kiitida asati Hanuna minthethanaw Amoone gakida wode,
19.3: Amoone moorinnati Hanunako, “Dawiti ne aawa bonchidi nena minthethanaw ha asata kiittis gada na qopay? I ha asaa kiittiday ha katamaa wochidi, olanaasa” yaagidosona.
19.4: Hanuni Dawiti kiitida asata oykidi, enta buuchaa meedis; enta ma7uwa garsafe dulle gakanaw qanxidi enta yeddis.
19.5: Hessa gisho, asati daro yeellatidosona. Dawiti hessa si7idi, entara asi kiittidi, “Hinte buuchay diccana gakanaw Iyaarko kataman de7ite; hessafe guye haa yiite” yaagis.
19.6: Amooneti banta kushen Dawiti enta morkana mela oothidaysa erida wode Masephexoomeninne Sooren de7iya Ma7ikanne Suubba katamatape para gaaretanne parata garxanaw 34,000 kilo giraame bira santime yeddidosona.
19.7: 32,000 para gaareta, parata, Ma7ika kawanne iya olanchota miishen garxin yidi Medaban dunkaanidosona. Qassi Amooneti banta katamaape keyidi olas giigetidosona.
19.8: Dawiti hessa si7ida wode Iyo7aabanne olanchota yeddis.
19.9: Amooneti keyidi katamaa pengen olas salpidosona. Enta maaddanaw yida kawoti banta bessaa oykidi denban shiiqidosona.
19.10: Iyo7aabi oli sintharanne guyera teqidaysa be7ida wode Isra7eeleta giddofe mino olanchota dooridi, Soore olanchota sinthan salpisis.
19.11: Attida asaa ba ishaa Abisa aawatetha garsan wothis; enti Amooneta sinthan salpidosona.
19.12: Iyo7aabi ba ishaa Abisako, “Soore asati ta bolla wolqaamiko, neeni yada tana maadda. Amoone asati ne bolla wolqaamiko, taani yada nena maaddana.
19.13: Hiza minna! Nu asaa gishonne nu Xoossaa katamata gisho ane minnidi oletoos. Goday bana lo77iyaba ootho” yaagis.
19.14: Hessafe guye, Iyo7aabinne iyara de7iya asay Soore olanchotara oletanaw keyidosona. Yaatin, Soore asay iya sinthafe baqatidosona.
19.15: Soore asay baqatidaysa Amoone asay be7ida wode entika iya ishaa Abisaya sinthafe baqatidi katama gelidosona. Hessafe guye, Iyo7aabi Yerusalaame simmis.
19.16: Soore asay Isra7eele asay enta xoonidaysa erida wode ase kiittidi Efraxiisa shaafape hefinthara de7iya Soore asaa ehidosona. Toora moconay Adraazari, Shofaaki enta kaalethees.
19.17: Dawiti hessa si7ida wode Isra7eele olanchota shiishidi, Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi Soore asaara oletanaw enta sinthan salpidosona. Dawiti entara oletanaw salpin entika iyara oletidosona.
19.18: Soore asay Isra7eeleta sinthafe baqatidosona; Dawiti Soore asaape para gaare laagiya 7,000 asaanne 40,000 toho asaanne enta toora mocona Shoofaka wodhis.
19.19: Adraazara olanchoti Isra7eeletan xoonetidaysa erida wode Dawitara sigetidi, iyaw haaretidosona. Hessafe guye, Soore asay Amoone asaa maaddanaw dosibookona.

20.1: Laytha laamen kawoti olas keyiya wode Iyo7aabi olanchota kaalethidi Amoone biitta olidi Raaba katamaa oykis. Shin Dawiti Yerusalaamen attis; Iyo7aabi Raaba katamaa olidi dhaysis.
20.2: Hessafe guye, Dawiti yidi enta kawa worqa kallachaa iya huuphepe ekis. Kallacha deexoy hastamanne oyddu kilo giraame gidis; iya giddon al7o shuchi de7ees. He kallachaa ekidi Dawiti ba huuphen wothis. Qassi Dawiti he katamaape daro di7o di77is.
20.3: Kataman de7iya asaa kessidi magaazen, konteninne kaltan oosisis. Amoonen de7iya asa ubbaa hessada oosisis. Hessafe guye, Dawitinne iya asa ubbay Yerusalaame simmis. Filisxeemetara Oletida Ola (2 Same 21:15-22)
20.4: Hessafe guye, Filisxeemera Gezeran oli dendin, Kusata addey Sabaki, Raafayme yara gidida Sifaya wodhis. Yaatin, Filisxeemeti xoonetidosona.
20.5: Filisxeemetara dendida hara olan qassi Ya7ira na7ay Eliyaani, toora toomay wandaraashe mela gidida, Geete addiya Gooliyada ishaa, Lahima wodhis.
20.6: Qassi hara oli Geeten dendis. He bessan issi wogga adussa addey de7ees. He addiyas issi issi kushiyaninne issi issi tohuwan usupun, woli bolla laatamanne oyddu biradheti de7oosona. Ika Raafa yara.
20.7: He uray Isra7eeletara qeeletida wode Dawita ishaa Sam7a na7ay Yoonataani iya wodhis.
20.8: Haysati Geeten de7iya Raafa yarata; enti Dawita kusheninne iya asaa kushen hayqidosona.

21.1: Xalehey Isra7eele bolla meto ehanaw koyidi, Dawiti Isra7eele asaa taybana mela denthethis.
21.2: Dawiti Iyo7aabakonne toora moconatako, “Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw bidi, Isra7eele asaa taybite. Yaatidi, asaa tayboy aapuneko tana erisite” yaagis.
21.3: Shin Iyo7aabi, “Goday, ha de7iya ba asaa bolla xeetu kushe gujo! Ta godaw, kawaw, enti ubbay ta godaa aylleta gidokonaayee? Ta goday hessa melaba oothanaw ayis koyii? Isra7eele bolla ayis bala oothay?” yaagis.
21.4: Shin kawa qaalay Iyo7aaba xoonin, Iyo7aabi keyidi Isra7eele biitta ubbaa yuuyidi Yerusalaame simmis.
21.5: Iyo7aabi taybida asaa taybuwa Dawitas immis. Isra7eele biitta ubban mashshan oletanaw danda7iya issi 1,100,000 asati de7oosona. Qassi Yihuda biittan mashshan oletanaw danda7iya 470,000 asati de7oosona.
21.6: Iyo7aabi kawa kiitta dosiboonna gisho Leewetanne Biniyaame kochata taybeenna.
21.7: Xoossay hessan ufaytiboonna gisho Isra7eele seeris.
21.8: Dawiti Xoossaako, “Taani haysan gita nagara oothas. Shin ha77i nena woossayis; ne aylliya nagaraa atto ga; taani daro eeyaba hanas” yaagis.
21.9: Goday Dawita qoncethi be7iya Gaadeko haysada yaagis;
21.10: “Bada Dawitako, Goday, ‘Taani nena heedzu dooro bessayis; taani ne bolla oothana mela entafe taw issuwa doora’ yaagees” yaaga.
21.11: Gaadi Dawitako bidi, “Goday haysatape issuwa doora yaagees;
21.12: heedzu laytha kosha woyko heedzu ageena ne morketa kushen aadhada imetanaysa woyko heedzu gallas Godaa mashshay ne biitta shocanaysanne gado Isra7eele bolla ehiya hayqo kiitancho kiitteysafe awusa dooray? Tana kiittidaysas odanaba taw oda” yaagis.
21.13: Dawiti Gaadeko, “Taani daro un7etas. Godaa maarotay gita gidiya gisho taani iya kushen kundana; asa kushen kundike” yaagis.
21.14: Hessa gisho, Goday Isra7eele bolla gado yeddin, 70,000 Isra7eele asati hayqidosona.
21.15: Xoossay Yerusalaame dhaysanaw kiitancho kiittis. Shin kiitanchoy Yerusalaame dhaysanaw doomida wode Goday azzanis. Dhaysiya kiitanchuwako, “Agga! Hiza gidana!” yaagis. He wode Godaa kiitanchoy Yaabuse addiya Orna wudumma matan eqis.
21.16: Kiitanchoy ba mashsha ba kushen oykidi Yerusalaame dhaysanaw sa7apenne salope giddon eqidaysa Dawiti be7is. He wode Dawitinne cimati kayo ma7o ma7idi, sa7an gufannidosona.
21.17: Dawiti, “Asay taybetana mela oothiday tana gidikina? Naaqidaynne iitabaa oothiday tana. Shin ha dorsati ay oothidona? Abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw, hayyana ne kushey tananne ta soo asaa seero. Ne kushey ne asaa seeropo!” yaagis.
21.18: Godaa kiitanchoy Gaadeko haysada yaagis; “Dawiti Yaabuse addiya Orna wudumma bidi Godaas yarsho bessi gimbana mela oda” yaagis.
21.19: Godaa sunthan Gaadi odidaysa si7idi Dawiti bis.
21.20: He wode Orninne iya oyddu adde nayti wudumman giste qoxoosona. I guye simmidi kiitancho be7is; iyara de7iya oyddu nayti be7idi qosetidosona.
21.21: Dawiti Ornako yida wode Orni iya be7idi, wudummaafe gaxa keyidi ziggidi sarothis.
21.22: Dawiti, “Gadoy asaa bollafe kichana mela taani Godaas yarsho bessi keexana mela ne wudumma taw bayza. Taani new kumetha gatiya qanxana” yaagis.
21.23: Orni, “Eka; ta goday kawoy bana ufaysiyabaa ootho. Heko, boorat xuussa yarshos, katha bukiya miishiya eethanaw, giste kathaa yarshos immana. Taani ha ubbaa new immana” yaagis.
21.24: Shin kawoy Dawiti, “Akay, taani kumetha gate qanxada shammana. Taani nebaanne ta miishen shammonnaba ekada xuussa yarsho oothada Godaas yarshike” yaagis.
21.25: Dawiti wudumma usupun xeetu worqa santimen shammis.
21.26: Dawiti yan Godaas yarsho bessi keexis. Yaatidi xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho yarshis. Godaa woossin, Goday xuussa yarshuwa bolla salope tama yeddidi iyaw zaaris.
21.27: Goday kiitanchuwa kiittin, kiitanchoy ba mashsha shoohuwan zaaris.
21.28: Dawiti, Goday iya woosa zaaridaysa be7idi, Yaabuse addiya Orna wudumman zaaridi yarshis.
21.29: Musey mela biittan giigisida, Godaa Dunkaaneynne xuussa yarsho bessay he wode Gaba7oonan goyinniya dhoqa bessan de7ees.
21.30: Shin Dawiti Godaa kiitanchuwa mashsha yayyida gisho Xoossaa oychanaw he bessaa baanaw danda7ibeenna.

22.1: Hessafe guye, Dawiti, “Godaa Xoossaa keethaynne Isra7eele asay xuussa yarsho bessay haysan gidana” yaagis. Xoossa Keethi Keexanaw Giigetethi
22.2: Dawiti Isra7eele biittan de7iya bete asata shiishana mela kiittis. Xoossa keetha keexanaw shuchu masseysati massidi loythana mela enta giddofe dooris.
22.3: Dawiti, dirsa pengiya giigisanaw misimaarenne maxaafe qoxanaw daro biratanne zawi bayna naase birata giigisis.
22.4: Sidoonanne Xiroosa asati Dawitas ziga ehiya gisho Dawiti, tayboy bayna ziga giigisis.
22.5: Dawiti, “Ta na7ay Solomoney yooganne eratethan loohibeenna. Godaas keexetiya keethay biitta ubban eretidanne bonchetida lo77o keethe gidanaw bessees. Hessa gisho, iyaw koshshiyaba taani giigisana” yaagis. Dawiti hayqanaape sinthe darobaa giigisidi wothis.
22.6: Hessafe guye, Dawiti ba na7aa Solomone xeegidi, Godaas Isra7eele Xoossaas keethe keexana mela kiittis.
22.7: Dawiti Solomoneko, “Ta na7aw, taani Godaa ta Xoossaa sunthaas keethi keexanaw ta wozanan qopas.
22.8: Gidoshin, Godaa qaalay, ‘Neeni daro suuthi gussadasa; daro ola oletadasa. Neeni ha sa7aa bolla ta sinthan daro suuthi gussida gisho ta sunthaas keethe keexaka.
22.9: Gidoshin, saronne shempo gidida na7i yeletana; Iya yuushuwan de7iya morketape taani iya shempisana. Iya sunthay Solomone; taani iya kawotetha laythan Isra7eele asaas sarotethinne wopa immana.
22.10: I ta sunthaas keethe keexana. I ta na7a gidana; taani iyaw aawa gidana. Iya araata Isra7eelen merinaw minthada essana’ ” yaagis.
22.11: “Hiza ta na7aw, Goday neera gido. Godaa ne Xoossaa keetha keexana mela Goday kase odidaysada nena poliso.
22.12: Goday nena Isra7eele asaa bolla kawo oothiya wode, Godaa ne Xoossaa higgiya naagana mela Goday new cincatethinne akeeka immo.
22.13: Goday Muse baggara Isra7eele immida wogaanne kiitaa neeni naagiko ubbay new hanana. Minna; yayyofa; dagammofa, ufaysi qanxofa!
22.14: Taani taw danda7etida mela Godaa keetha keexanaw 3,400 kilo giraame worqa, 34,000 kilo giraame bira, zawi bayna naasenne birata shiishas; hessadaka mithinne shuchu giigisas. Neka ne baggara hessa bolla haraa gujanaw koshshees.
22.15: Ne matan daro oosanchoti shuchu qoo7eysatinne masseysati, anaaxetinne ubba ooso oothanaw danda7iya hiillanchoti de7oosona.
22.16: Worqa, bira, naasenne birata oothiya asaas zawi baawa. Hiza neeni oosuwa dooma; Goday neera gido” yaagis.
22.17: Isra7eele kaaletheysati ubbay ba na7aa Solomone maaddana mela Dawiti haysada yaagidi kiittis;
22.18: “Goday, hinte Xoossay ha77i gakanaw hintera de7eneyee? I hintena ubba baggara shempisibenneyee? Ha biittan de7iya asaa I ta kushen aathidi immida gisho ha biittay Godaasinne iya asaas haaretis.
22.19: Hiza Godaa hinte Xoossaa koyanaw hinte wozanaanne hinte shempuwa immite. Godaa sunthaas keexetida keethaa giddon Godaa caaqo Taabotiyanne Xoossaa geeshsha miisheta ehidi wothana mela dendidi Godaa Xoossaa keethaa keexite” yaagis.

23.1: Dawiti cimida wode ba na7aa Solomone Isra7eele bolla kawothis.
23.2: Dawiti Isra7eele kaaletheyisata ubbaa, kahinetanne Leeweta issife shiishis.
23.3: Laythi hastamanne iyape bolla gidida Leeweti taybetidi kumethi 38,000 gididosona.
23.4: Entafe Godaa keetha aawatethan aysiya 24,000 leeweta kawoy wothis; 6,000 leeweta halaqatanne pirda daynnata oothidi wothis.
23.5: 4,000 leeweta penge naageysata oothidi wothis. Qassi Godaa galatanaw Dawiti giigisida yetha miishen Godaa galatiya 4,000 leeweta wothis.
23.6: Dawiti Leewe adde nayta Gedisoona, Qahaatanne Maraara enta yaran yaran heedzu cugan shaakis. Gedisoonata
23.8: La7idane heedzu adde nayti Yi7eela, Zetaamanne Iyyu7eela.
23.9: Same7a heedzu adde nayti Salomoota, Hazi7eelanne Harana; haysati La7idane yaraa halaqata.
23.10: Sama7a oyddu adde nayti Yahaata, Ziiza, Usanne Bar7a.
23.11: Usi bayraa, Ziizi kaalo. Shin Usasinne Bar7as nayti daronna gisho enti issi yarada taybetidosona. Qa7aateta
23.12: Qahaata oyddu adde nayti Anbaraama, Yisihaara, Kebroonanne Uzi7eela.
23.13: Anbaraama adde nayti Aaronanne Muse. Aaroninne iya kochay ubbaafe geeshshi gidana mela dummatidosona. Enti Godaa sinthan ixaane cuyisanaw, Godaas oothanawunne Godaa sunthan asaa anjanaw merinaw dummatidosona.
23.14: Xoossa ase gidida Muse nayta Leewe kochatara gathidi taybidosona.
23.17: Alaazara na7ay Rahaaba. Alaazaras hara na7i baawa; shin Rahaabas nayti daro.
23.19: Kebroona na7ay bayray Yiriya; kaaloy Amaare; heedzanthoy Yahazi7eela; oyddanthoy Yaqim7aama.
23.20: Uzi7eela bayra na7ay Mikiyaasa; kaaloy Yishiya. Maraarata
23.21: Maraara nayti Mahilanne Musa. Mahila nayti Alaazaranne Qiisa.
23.22: Alaazari macca na7ape attishin, adde na7a yelonna hayqis. Hessa gisho, enta aawa ishaa Qiisa nayti enta machidosona.
23.23: Musa heedzu nayti Mahila, Ederanne Yiremoota.
23.24: Leewe yeletan banta kochaaninne soo asan banta sunthan mazgabetida Leewe kochati haysata. Laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida Leewe kochati ubbay Godaa Xoossaa keethan oothidosona.
23.25: Dawiti, “Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay ba asaa shempisis. Goday Yerusalaamen merinaw daana.
23.26: Leeweti Dunkaaniyanne iya giddon go7etiya miisheta hizape guye tookanaw bessenna” yaagis.
23.27: Dawita wursetha kiitan, laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida Leeweti taybetidosona.
23.28: Enti Godaa Xoossa keethan oothiya Aarona kochata maaddoosona. Godaa Xoossa keethan kareranne soora oothosona; geeshsha miishe ubbaa tunonna mela naagoosona.
23.29: Enti Xoossa sinthan wothiya uythaa, katha yarshos shiishiya dhiilliya, irshoy bayna uythaanne zaytera munuqetiya dhiilliya aawatethan aysoosona; Xoossa keethan maketiyabanne likeyabaa ubbaa aawatethan xeelloosona.
23.30: Qassi enti ubba gallas wontanne omarsi Godaa galatanawunne sabbanaw eqoosona.
23.31: Sambaata gallas, ageena xeeron, wogay kiittiya hara ba7aale gallasay gakiya wode Godaas xuussa yarsho yarshoosona. Entaw imetida taybuwadanne kiitaada ubba wode Godaa sinthan oothosona.
23.32: Dunkaaniyanne Godaa Xoossa keetha naagana melanne banta isha gidida, Aarona adde nayta, maaddana mela aawatethi Leewetas imetis.

24.1: Aarona kochati banta ooso maaran haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Aarona adde nayti Nadaaba, Abyooda, Alaazaranne Itamaara.
24.2: Shin Naadabeynne Abyooda na7a yelonna banta aawape sinthe hayqidosona. Hessa gisho, Alaazarinne Itamaari kahine gididosona.
24.3: Dawiti Alaazara yaraape Saadoqa, Itamaara yaraape Abimeleke ekidi Aarona kochata enta oosuwa maaran cugan cugan shaakis.
24.4: Alaazara yarata halaqati Itamaara yarata halaqatape dari bentida gisho Alaazara yarati tammanne usupun cugan shaaketin Itamaara yarati hospun cugan shaaketidosona.
24.5: Alaazara yarata giddoninne Itamaara yarata giddon Xoossa keetha halaqatinne Xoossa oosuwas bessiya halaqati de7iya gisho oosoy entaw saaman shaaketees.
24.6: Alaazara yaratinne Itamaara yarati banta maaran maaran saama kessidosona. Leewe koche gidida Natina7eela na7ay xaafey Shamayey enta mazgabees. Kawoynne iya moorinnati, kahiney Saadoqinne Abyataara na7ay Abimelekey, kahinetanne Leeweta yarata halaqati ubbay hessas marka.
24.7: Koyro saamay Yo7aaribas keyis; nam7anthoy Yadayas keyis.
24.8: Heedzanthoy Harimas keyis. Oyddanthoy Sa7oorimas keyis.
24.9: Ichashanthoy Malkiyas keyis. Usupunthoy Miyaaminas keyis.
24.10: Laapunthoy Aqoosas keyis; Hospunthoy Abiyas keyis.
24.11: Uddufunthoy Iyyasus keyis. Tammanthoy Sakanas keyis.
24.12: Tammanne issinthoy Eliyaseebas keyis. Tammanne nam7anthoy Yaqinas keyis.
24.13: Tammanne heedzanthoy Hupas keyis. Tammanne oyddanthoy Yeshebas keyis.
24.14: Tammanne ichashanthoy Bilgas keyis. Tammanne usupunthoy Imeras keyis.
24.15: Tammanne laapunthoy Heziras keyis. Tammanne hospunthoy Hafixeexas keyis.
24.16: Tammanne uddufunthoy Patahas keyis. Laatamanthoy Yezekelas keyis.
24.17: Laatamanne issinthoy Yakinas keyis. Laatamanne nam7anthoy Gamulas keyis.
24.18: Laatamanne heedzanthoy Dalayas keyis. Laatamanne oyddanthoy Maazas keyis.
24.19: Goday Isra7eele Xoossay enta mayza Aarona kiittin, I entaw wothida wogaatho, banta Xoossa keetha geliya wode, enti oothana maaray haysa. Hara Leeweta
24.20: Hara Leewe kochata halaqati, haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Yehidayi Sabu7eela baggara Amraama koche.
24.23: Yiriyey, Amaarey, Yahazi7eelinne Yiqam7aami Kebroona koche.
24.25: Zakariyasi Mikiyaasa ishaa Yishiya baggara Uzi7eela koche.
24.27: Ya7iza heedzu adde nayti Shohaama, Zakuranne Ibara.
24.28: Mahila nam7u adde nayti Alaazaranne Qiisa. Alaazaras adde na7i baawa.
24.29: Qiisa Yirahima7eela geetetiya adde na7i de7ees.
24.30: Musa heedzu adde nayti Mahila, Ederanne Yiremoota. Haysati Leewe kochata halaqata.
24.31: Kase enta dabboti Aarona koche gidida kahineti oothidaysada haysatika kawoy Dawiti, Saadoqi, Abimelekey, kahinetanne Leeweta halaqati de7iya bessan saama yeggidosona. Bayraa ishaa soo asaasinne kaalo ishaa soo asaas issi gina saami wodhis.

25.1: Dawitinne Leeweta halaqati, Asaafa, Hemaananne Yedutuuna naytape suusul7en, diithaninne daalan tinbite odana mela dummayidosona. Ha oosuwas dummatida asaa sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa.
25.2: Asaafa nayti Zakura, Yoosefa, Naatananne Asar7eela. Asaafa nayti Asaafape garsara oothosona; Asaafi kawa kiitan tinbite odees.
25.3: Yedutuuna nayti Gadaaliya, Xaara, Yashaya, Sam7a, Hasabayanne Matita. Ha usupunati maasinqon Godaa galatishenne bonchishe banta aawa, nabiya Yedutuunape garsara kiitetoosona.
25.4: Hemaana nayti Buqaya, Mataana, Uzi7eela, Sabu7eela, Yarmoota, Hanaaniya, Hanaana, Eli7aata, Gidalta, Oromanti7ezera, Yoshbaqaasha, Maalota, Hotiranne Mazi7aata.
25.5: Haysati ubbay kawas qoncethi be7iya Hemaana nayta. Xoossay immana gidaysada Hemaana dhoqu dhoqu oothana mela ha tammanne oyddu adde naytanne heedzu macca nayta iyaw immis.
25.6: Haysati ubbay Xoossa keethan daala qaathanaw, diithinne maasinqo kaa7idi goyinnanaw banta aawape garsara de7oosona. Asaafi, Yedutuuninne Hemaani kawuwape garsara de7oosona.
25.7: Hessati banta dabbotara gididi Xoossas shiiqiya mazmuren loohidaysata; enti kumethi 288.
25.8: Enti banta oosuwa shaakidi eranaw na7i cimi, astamaarey tamaarey shaahoy bayna saama yeggidosona.
25.9: Koyro saamay Asaafa na7aa Yoosefas keyis. Nam7antho saamay Gadallas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.10: Heedzantho saamay Zakuras keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.11: Oyddantho saamay Xaras keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.12: Ichashantho saamay Nataanas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.13: Usupuntho saamay Buqayas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.14: Laapuntha saamay Yishira7eelas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.15: Hospuntho saamay Yashayas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.16: Uddufuntho saamay Matanas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.17: Tammantho saamay Sam7as keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.18: Tammanne issintho saamay Uzi7eelas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.19: Tammanne nam7antho saamay Hasabayas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.20: Tammanne heedzantho saamay Sabu7eelas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.21: Tammanne oyddantho saamay Matitas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.22: Tammanne ichashantho saamay Yarmootas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.23: Tammanne usupuntho saamay Hanaana keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.24: Tammanne laapuntho saamay Yoshibaqaashas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.25: Tammanne hospuntho saamay Hanaaniyas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.26: Tammanne uddufuntho saamay Maalotas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.27: Laatamantho saamay Eli7aatas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.28: Laatamanne issintho saamay Hotiras keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.29: Laatamanne nam7antho saamay Gidaltas keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.30: Laatamanne heedzantho saamay Mahzi7aata keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.
25.31: Laatamanne oyddantho saamay Oromanti7ezeras keyis; I, iya naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne nam7a.

26.1: Xoossaa keetha pengiya naageysati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Koyroy Qore kochaafe Asaafa adde naytape Qore na7a Masulaama.
26.2: Masulaami laapun adde nayta yelis; enti banta yeletaa maaran Zakariyasa, Yidi7eela, Yozobaata, Yatini7eela,
26.4: Xoossay Obeed-Edooma anjida gisho, I hospun adde nayta yelis. Enti banta yeletaa maaran Shamaya, Yozabaata, Iyo7aasa, Sakara, Natina7eela,
26.6: Obeed-Edooma na7ay Shamayey usupun adde nayta yelis; enti mino asi gidida gisho, banta aawa soo asaas halaqa gididosona.
26.7: Shamaya nayti Otina, Rafa7eela, Yobeedanne Elzabaada; enta ishati Elihuynne Samaki qara asata.
26.8: Haysati ubbay Obeed-Edooma kochata; enti, enta naytanne enta dabboti oosos mino. Obeed-Edooma kochati kumethi usupun tammanne nam7a.
26.9: Masulaamas mino naytinne mino dabboti de7oosona; enti kumethi tammanne hospuna.
26.10: Maraara yaraape Hosa geetetiya addiyas oyddu adde nayti de7oosona. Shimiri bayra na7a gidenna, shin iya aaway iya halaqa oothis.
26.11: Iya ishati Kalqe, Zabalanne Zakariyasa. Hosa naytinne iya dabboti kumethi tammanne heedza.
26.12: Xoossa keetha pengiya naageysati banta soo asaa halaqata cugan cugan shaaketidosona. Hara Leewetada entaka Xoossa keetha oosoy shaahon gakis.
26.13: Issi issi pengiya naaganaw banta soo asan asan na7a cima goonna saama yeggidosona.
26.14: Doloha Pengiya naaganaw saamay Salamas keyis. Lo77o zore zoriya iya na7aa Zakariyasa pudeha Pengiya naaganaw saami keyis.
26.15: Obeed-Edoomas dugeha pengiya naaganaw saami keyis. Iya naytas buqura minjiya keethaa naaganaw saami keyis.
26.16: Wuloha pengiyanne qommo baggara de7iya Shalekota pengiya naaganaw saami Sufimasinne Hosas keyis. Naagoy maaran maaran gakees.
26.17: Gallas gallas doloha baggara usupun, pudeha baggara oydda, dugeha baggara oyddu Leeweti naagoosona. Qassi buqura minjiya keethaa nam7u nam7u Leeweti naagoosona.
26.18: Wuloha baggara dabaabako efiya ogiya oyddu, qassi dabaaba nam7u Leeweti naagoosona.
26.19: Hiza Qoresinne Maraara kochaas imetida penge naago oosoy haysa. Minja Keetha Shuumata
26.20: Akiya geetetiya Leewey Xoossa keethan de7iya buquranne Xoossas dummayi wothida imotata naaganaw shuumetis.
26.21: Gedisoona na7aa Laadanna yaraape Yi7eeli dumma dumma soo asaas aawates.
26.22: Yi7eela nayti Zetaamanne iya ishaa Iyyu7eela; enti Xoossa keethan de7iya buqura naaganaw shuumetidosona.
26.23: Amraama, Yisihaara, Kebroonanne Uzi7eela yaratas oosoy shaaketidi imetis.
26.24: Muse na7aa Gedisoona yara gidida Sabu7eeli Xoossa keethan de7iya buqura naageysata halaqata bolla shuumetis.
26.25: I Gedisoona ishaa Alaazara baggara Salomootas dabbo. Al77azari Rahaabiya yelis; Rahaabi Yeshaya yelis; Yeshayi Yoraama yelis; Yoraami Zikira yelis; Zikiri Salomita yelis.
26.26: Salomootinne iya dabboti kawoy Dawiti, iya soo asaa halaqati, shaalaqati, mato halaqatinne toora moconata Xoossas dummayida miishe ubbaa bolla shuumetidosona.
26.27: Ha asati olan di7etidi yida miishetape baggaa Xoossa keethan dummayidi wothidosona.
26.28: Qoncethi be7iya Sameeli, Qiisa na7ay Saa7oli, Neera na7ay Abeneerinne Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi kase dummayidi wothida imota ubbaa Salomootinne iya dabboti naagoosona.
26.29: Yisihaara yaratape Kanaaneynne iya nayti Xoossa keethafe karera de7iya ooson Isra7eele asaa aysanawunne daynnatanaw shuumetidosona.
26.30: Kebroona yaratape Hashabinne iya dabboti 1,700 mino asati, Godaa oosuwasinne kawa oosuwas Yordaanosepe wuloha baggara de7iya Isra7eele asaa bolla shuumetidosona.
26.31: Kebroona yarata mazgabiya maaran Yiriyi enta halaqa. Dawiti kawotida oytamantho laythan mazgaben koyin enta asaa giddofe mino asati Galada biittan Ya7izeera geetetiya bessan bentidosona.
26.32: Enta soo asaas halaqa gidida Yiriya dabboti minoti 2,700. Kawoy Dawiti Xoossa oosuwasinne kawa oosuwas Robeela, Gaadenne Minaase kochatape baggata bolla enta shuumis.

27.1: Banta cugan cugan kawotethaa aysiya Isra7eele soo asaa halaqati, shaalaqatinne mato halaqati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Issi issi cugan 24,000 asati de7oosona. Issi issi cugay laythan issi ageena maaran maaran kawotetha ooso oothanaw keyees.
27.2: Koyro ageenan keya cugaa kaalethey Zabdi7eela na7aa Yashobi7aama; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees.
27.3: Yashobi7aami Paaresa koche; I koyro ageenas tora moconata.
27.4: Nam7antho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Ahoha addiya Dodaya; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees. He cugaa kaalethiya nam7antho halaqay Mikloota.
27.5: Heedzantho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey kahiniya Yoodahe na7aa Banaya; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees.
27.6: Banayi hastamu eretida asata giddon mino asi; qassi hastamata halaqa. Iya bessan iya na7ay Amzabadi halaqa gidis.
27.7: Oyddantho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Iyo7aaba ishaa Asaheela; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees. Iya bessan iya na7ay Zabadi halaqa gidis.
27.8: Ichashantho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Yisihaara yaraape Shamhuuta; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees.
27.9: Usupuntho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Tequhe addiya Iska na7aa Ira; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees.
27.10: Laapuntha ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Efreema koche gidida Piloona addiya Selesa; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees.
27.11: Hospuntha ageenan keyiya cuga kaalethey Husha addiya Sibakaya; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees. Sibakayi Yihuda kochenne Zaara yara.
27.12: Uddufuntho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Biniyaame koche gidida Anatoote addiya Abi7ezera; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees.
27.13: Tammantho ageenan keyiya cuga kaalethey Naxoofa addiya Zaara yara gidida Mahira; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees.
27.14: Tammanne issintho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Efreema koche gidida Pir7atoona addiya Banaya; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees.
27.15: Tammanne nam7antho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Gotoniyala yaraape gidida Naxoofa Heldaya; iya cugan 24,000 asi de7ees. Isra7eele Moorinnata
27.16: Isra7eele kochata aysanaw shuumetidaysati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Robeela kochaa aysey Zikira na7aa Alaazara. Simoona kochaa aysey Ma7ika na7aa Safaaxa.
27.17: Leewe kochaa aysey Qamu7eela na7aa Hasabaya. Aarona kochaa aysey Saadoqa.
27.18: Yihuda kochaa aysey Dawita ishaa Elihu. Yisakoora kochaa aysey Mika7eela na7aa Omira.
27.19: Zabloona kochaa aysey Abdiyu na7aa Yashimaya. Niftaaleme kochaa aysey Azri7eela na7aa Yarmoota.
27.20: Efreema kochaa aysey Azaaza na7aa Hose7a. Minaase kochaafe baggaa aysey Padaya na7aa Iyyu7eela.
27.21: Galadan de7iya Minaase kochaafe baggaa aysey Zakariyasa na7aa Ido. Biniyaame kochaa aysey Abeneera na7aa Ye7isi7eela.
27.22: Daane kochaa aysey Yirohaama na7aa Azari7eela. Haysati Isra7eele kochaa ayseysata.
27.23: Goday Isra7eele asaa salo xoolintoda darsana gida gisho Dawiti laatamu laythinne iyape garsara de7eyisata taybon gelsibeenna.
27.24: Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi asaa taybo doomidi wursonna aggis. Asaa taybida gisho Goday Isra7eele asaa bolla hanqetida gisho enta tayboy kawa Dawita taarike mazgaben xaafetibeenna. Kawa Buqura Aysiya Asata
27.25: Kawo buqura minjiya bessaa aawatethan aysiya asaa sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Adi7eela na7aa Azmooti kawo keetha buqura aawatethan aysees. Ooziyana na7ay Yoonataani gaxaren, katamaninne gutan de7iya kawo keetha miisheta aawatethan aysees.
27.26: Kaluba na7ay Iziri goshshanchota aawatethan aysees.
27.27: Rama addey Same7i woyne gadeta aawatethan aysees. Safaama addey Zabdi woyne ushsha minjiya keethaa aawatethan aysees.
27.28: Gadara addey Ba7al-Hanani zuma bolla de7iya zayte shamahuwanne boobba aawatethan aysees. Zayte wothiya keethaa aawatethan aysey Iyo7aasa.
27.29: Saarona denban heemetiya mehiya aawatethan aysey Saarona addiya Saxira. Zangaaran heemetiya mehiya aawatethan aysey Adilaya na7aa Shaafaxa.
27.30: Gimaleta aawatethan aysey Isma7eela addiya Ubisa. Hareta aawatethan aysey Meronoota addiya Yehidaya.
27.31: Dorsatanne deeshata aawatethan aysey Agara addey Yaziza. Haysati ubbay Dawita shaluwa bolla aawateyisata.
27.32: Dawita aawa ishay, xaafey Yoonataani akeekanne kawa zoriya asi. Hakmoona na7ay Yi7eeli kawa nayta tamaarsees.
27.33: Akxoofeli kawa zoreysa. Arka addey Kuussi kawa lagge.
27.34: Akxoofeli hayqin, iya bessan Banaya na7ay Yodaaheynne Abyataari kawa zoriya asi gididosona; Iyo7aabi kawa toora mocona.

28.1: Isra7eele halaqati ubbay Yerusalaamen shiiqana mela kawoy Dawiti kiittis. Hessa gisho, issi issi kochaa halaqati, kawo moorinnati, shaalaqati, mato halaqati, kawuwasinne kawa naytas de7iya shaluwanne mehiya ayseysati, kawo gadhon ootheysati, eretidanne mino asati ubbay Yerusalaamen shiiqidosona.
28.2: Kawoy Dawiti dendi eqidi haysada yaagis; “Ta ishato, ta asaw, si7ite! Godaa caaqo Taabotiya wothiyanne nu Xoossaa tohoy shempiya keethaa keexanaw ta wozanan qopas; koshshiyaba ubbaa giigisas.
28.3: Shin Xoossay, ‘Neeni olanchonne suuthi gussida asi gidiya gisho ta sunthaas keethe keexaka’ yaagis.
28.4: Taani Isra7eele bolla merinaw kawotanaada, Goday Isra7eele Xoossay ta aawa soope tana dooris. Kaalethanaada koyro Yihuda kochaa dooris; Yihuda kochaafe ta aawa soo asaa dooris; ta aawa nayta giddofe tana dooridi Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawoyanaw dosis.
28.5: Goday taw daro nayta immis; ta nayta ubbaafe Godaa kawotetha araatan uttidi Isra7eele bolla kawotanaada ta na7aa Solomone dooris.
28.6: “Goday, ‘Ta keethaanne ta dabaaba keexanay ne na7aa Solomone. I taw na7a gidana mela taani iya dooras; taani iyaw aawa gidana.
28.7: I ha77i ootheysada ta kiitaanne ta higgiya minnidi naagiko taani iya kawotethaa merinaw minthana’ yaagis.
28.8: Hiza Godaa shiiqo gidida Isra7eele asa ubbay be7ishin, nu Xoossay si7ishin, Godaa hinte Xoossaa kiita ubbaa hinte minthidi naagana mela taani hintew odayis. Yaatiko, hinte ha lo77o biitta laattana; hinte naytaka merinaw laatisana.
28.9: “Solomone, ta na7aw, Xoossay asa wozananne qofa ubbaa eriya gisho ne aawa Xoossaa era; kumetha wozananinne shenen iyaw ootha. Neeni iya koyiko I new bentana; shin neeni iya aggiko I nena merinaw aggana.
28.10: Xoossaa keetha keexana mela Goday nena dooridaysa dogopa; ooso ubbaa minnada ootha” yaagis.
28.11: Hessafe guye, Dawiti ba na7aa Solomones Xoossa keethaa, barandaa, buqura minjiya keethaa, pooqiyanne giddo kifileta, hessadaka nagara atotetha kama wothiya kifiliya halchuwanne qofaa immis.
28.12: Dawiti Godaa keetha dabaaba keexanaw ba wozanan de7iya qofaa, iya yuushuwan de7iya ubba kifileta halchuwanne Xoossa keethaa buqura wothiya kifiliyanne Godaas dummatida imotata wothiya kifileta oosuwa qofaa immis.
28.13: Hessadaka Dawiti kahinetanne Leeweta ooso maara, Xoossa keetha ooso maaranne Xoossa keetha miisheta naagiya maara odiya qofaa iyaw immis.
28.14: Dumma dumma oosos go7etiya miisheta oothanaw maaddiya worqanne bira mizaanen likisidi Solomones immis.
28.15: Hessika xompe wothiya worqa kocatanne iya xompeta, xompe wothiya bira kocatanne iya xompeta,
28.16: Godaa sinthan uythu wothiya worqa xarpheezata, bira xarpheezata,
28.17: worqa qapheta, worqa kereta, worqa wancata, worqa xaarota, bira xaarota
28.18: ixaane cuyisiya geeshsha worqa saaxine, Godaa caaqo Taabotiya bolla banta qefiya miccidi kammiya kiruubeta wothiya worqa gaariya giigisiya halchuwa iyaw immis.
28.19: Dawiti, “Goday ba kushiya ta bolla wothidi ha xaafetida qofa ubbaa tana erisis” yaagis.
28.20: Dawiti ba na7aa Solomoneko, “Hiza minna! Oosuwa ootha! Goday ta Xoossay neera de7iya gisho yayyofa; dagammofa! Xoossa keetha oosoy poletana gakanaw Xoossay nena yeggennanne aggenna.
28.21: Xoossa keethan de7iya ooso ubbaas kahinetinne Leeweti shuumetidosona. Kushe hiilli de7iya asa ubbay nena ooso ubban maaddana. Halaqatinne asa ubbay new kiitetana” yaagis.

29.1: Hessafe guye, Kawoy Dawiti shiiqida asa ubbaa haysada yaagis; “Xoossay doorida ta na7aa Solomoney yooganne eratethan loohibeenna. Ha keexetana keethay asa keethi gidonashin Godaa Xoossaa keethi gidiya gisho oosoy gita.
29.2: Taani taw de7iya wolqa mela ta Xoossa keethaas worqan oosetiyabas worqaa, biran oosetiyabas bira, naase biratan oosetiyabas, naase birata, biratan oosetiyaba biratanne mithan oosetiyabas mithi giigisa wothas. Qassi margide, ibnebarade, dumma dumma mali de7iya alleeqo shuchata, al7o shuchatanne hara shuchata giigisada wothas.
29.3: Xoossa keetha taani daro dosiya gisho, taani ta Xoossa keethaas giigisidaysafe hara ta buzo shaluwape worqanne bira immas.
29.4: Keethaa godaa lanxanaw 100,000 kilo giraame Ofira worqanne 240,000 kilo giraame walahi bayna bira immas.
29.5: Kushe hiillanchoti oothana ooso ubbaas worqan oosetiyabas worqaa, biran oosetiyabas bira immas. Yaatin, hachi hintefe ba shenen bana Godaas dummayey oonee?” yaagis.
29.6: Isra7eele kochata soo asaa halaqati, kochata halaqati, shaalaqati, mato halaqatinne kawo moorinnati banta shenen bantaw de7iyaba dosan immidosona.
29.7: Enti Xoossa keetha oosuwas 170,000 kilo giraame worqaa, 340,000 kilo giraame bira, 620,000 kilo giraame naase biratanne 3,000,000 kilo giraame birata immidosona.
29.8: Al77o shuchi de7iya asa ubbay buqura aysiya Gedisoona yara gidida Yi7eela baggara Godaa Xoossa keetha buqura minjiya keethaas immis.
29.9: Asay ba shenen ba kumetha wozanan Godaas immida gisho ufaytis; kawoy Dawitika daro ufaytis. Dawita Woosa
29.10: Hessa gisho, Dawiti deriya ubbaa sinthan haysada yaagidi Godaa galatis; “Abeeti Godaw, nu aawa Isra7eele Xoossaw neeni merinaape merinaw galateta.
29.11: Abeeti Godaw, saloninne sa7an de7iya ubbay nebaa! Gitatethi, wolqi, bonchoy, xoonoynne angi nebaa! Abeeti Godaw, maati nebaa; neeni ubbaafe bollanne huuphe.
29.12: Duretethinne bonchoy neepe yees; neeni ubbaba haarasa. Wolqinne minotethi ne kushena; neeni asa ubbaa gitanne mino oothanaw danda7aasa.
29.13: Ha77ika nu Xoossaw, nuuni nena galatoos; ne boncho sunthaa sabboos.
29.14: “Nuuni haysa mela immanaw tanne ta asay oonee? Ubbay neepe yees; nuuni ne kushepe ekidaba new zaaridi immida.
29.15: Kase nu aawatada nuka ne sinthan bete asinne imathe. Ha sa7an nu de7o laythay ufaysi bayna kuya mela.
29.16: Abeeti Godaw, nu Xoossaw, ne geeshsha sunthaas nuuni keethe keexanaw shiishida ubbay ne kushepe yidaba; ubbay nebaa.
29.17: “Ta Xoossaw neeni wozanaa paaceysanne suuretethi doseysa taani erayis. Taani ta wozana suuretethan ta shenen hessa ubbaa immas. Ha bessan de7iya ne asay new ba shenen ufaysan immidaysa taani be7as.
29.18: Abeeti Godaw, nu mayzata Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Isra7eele Xoossaw, ne asaa wozanan ha gita siiquwa merinaw naaga; enta wozanaa neeko zaara.
29.19: Ne wogaa, ne kiitaanne ne higgiya naagana melanne taani qopada giigisadaban Xoossa keetha keexana mela ta na7aa Solomones kumetha wozana imma” yaagidi woossis.
29.20: Hessafe guye, Dawiti deriyako, “Godaa hinte Xoossaa galatite” yaagis. Dere ubbay Godaa banta aawata Xoossaa galatidosona. Sa7an gufannidi Godaa goyinnidosona; kawuwasika boncho immidosona. Solomoney Kawo Gideysi Eretis
29.21: Wontetha gallas asay yarshonne xuussa yarsho Godaas yarshidosona. Hessika issi mukulu kormaa, issi mukulu maraze, issi mukulu dorsa urge, ushsha yarshonne hara daro yarsho yarshidosona.
29.22: Asay he gallas Godaa sinthan daro ufaytidi misinne uyis. Yaatidi asay kawa Dawita na7aa Solomone nam7antho zayte tiyidi iya kawotethan minthis. Saadoqa kahine gidana mela Godaa sinthan tiyidosona.
29.23: Hessafe guye, Solomoney ba aawa Dawita bessan Godaa kawotetha araatan uttis. Iyaw ubbabay injetis; Isra7eele ubbay iyaw kiitetidosona.
29.24: Halaqati, mino asatinne kawa Dawita nayti kawa Solomones kiitetanaw qaala gelidosona.
29.25: Goday Solomone Isra7eele asa ubbaa sinthan dhoqu dhoqu oothis; kase Isra7eele kawotas imetiboonna boncho Solomones immis. Dawita Hayquwa
29.26: Isseye na7ay Dawiti Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawotis.
29.27: Dawiti Isra7eele bolla oytamu laythi kawotis; Kebroonan laapun laythi, Yerusalaamen hastamanne heedzu laythi kawotis.
29.28: Dawiti daro laythi de7idi, duretidi, bonchetidi, lo77o cimidi hayqis. Iya bessan iya na7ay Solomoney kawotis.
29.29: Dawiti koyrope doomidi wursethi gakanaw oothidabay, qoncethi be7iya Sameela, nabiya Naatananne qoncethi be7iya Gaade taarike maxaafan xaafetis.
29.30: I waati haaridako, waanida wolqaama aseeko, I oothidabay, Isra7eele asaynne heeran de7iya kawotethati ubbay hanidabay he maxaafatan xaafetis.

1.1: Goday iya Xoossay iyara de7iya gishonne iya daro gitayida gisho Dawita na7ay Kawoy Solomoney ba kawotethaa minthis.
1.2: Solomoney Isra7eele ubbaa, shaalaqata, mato halaqata, daannata, Isra7eele asaa kaalethiya ubbaanne soo asaa halaqata xeegidi shiishis.
1.3: Hessafe guye, Solomoneynne shiiqida asa ubbay Gaba7oonan de7iya dhoqa goyinno bessaa bidosona. Godaa aylley Musey mela biittan oothida Dunkaaney yan de7ees.
1.4: Kase Dawiti Taabotiyas Yerusalaamen dunkaane tokidi, Qiriyaat-Yi7aarimepe I giigisidi wothida bessaa ehis.
1.5: Huura na7aa Ure na7ay Baxal7eeli naase biratape oothida yarsho bessay, Gaba7oonan Godaa Dunkaaniya sinthan de7ees. Solomoneynne shiiqida asay Godaas yan goyinnidosona.
1.6: Solomoney Dunkaaniya sinthan de7iya naase biratape oosetida yarsho bessaako, Godaa sinthe bidi, issi mukulu xuussa yarsho yarshis.
1.7: He gallas qamma Xoossay Solomones qoncidi, “Ta new ay immana mela koyay?” yaagis.
1.8: Solomoney, “Ne ta aawa Dawita gita siiqon dosadasa; tana iya bessan kawothadasa.
1.9: Abeeti Godaw, Xoossaw, ne ta aawa Dawitas kase gida qaalay poleto. Ne tana sa7an de7iya baanada darida asaa bolla kawothida gisho,
1.10: ta ha asaa kaalethana mela taw cincatethinne akeeka imma. Hessi hanonna ixiko, ha gita asaa ooni aysanaw danda7ii?” yaagis.
1.11: Xoossay Solomoneko, “Ne duretethi woyko shalo demmanaw woyko bonchetanaw woyko ne morketi hayqana mela woyko ne laythay aduqana mela oychonashin ta nena kawothida ta asaa aysanaw cincatethinne akeeka oychida gisho,
1.12: new cincatethinne akeeka immana. Qassi neepe kase de7ida kawotas woyko neepe guye dendana kawotas bayna duretethi, shalonne boncho new immana” yaagis.
1.13: Solomoney Dunkaaney Gaba7oonan de7iya, dhoqa goyinno bessaafe simmidi, Yerusalaame bidi Isra7eele bolla kawotis.
1.14: Solomoney para gaaretanne parata shiishis. Iyaw issi mukulunne oyddu xeetu para gaaretinne tammanne nam7u mukulu parati de7oosona. I enta para gaareta katamataninne baara Yerusalaamen wothis.
1.15: Kawoy worqaynne biray Yerusalaamen shuchada dooretanaada, gadhan boobbi dicciya mela ziga mithi darana mela oothis.
1.16: Solomone parati Gibxefenne Qaawe biittafe yidosona. Kawa zal7anchoti enta Qaawepe miishen shammidi ehoosona.
1.17: Enti issi issi para gaariya usupun xeetu bira santimen, issi issi para issi xeetanne ishatamu bira santimen Gibxefe shammidi, Hiteta kawota ubbaasinne Soore kawotas bayzoosona.

2.1: Solomoney Godaa sunthaas keethenne baw gadho keexanaw halchis.
2.2: Solomoney toohos laapun tammu mukulu asaanne gezze biittan shuchu qoo7anaw hospun tammu mukulu asaa dooris. Qassi enta wochiya heedzu mukulunne usupun xeetu asata enta bolla shuumis.
2.3: Solomoney Xiroosa Kawa Kiraamas kiita kiittidi, “Ta aaway Dawiti ba gadho keexana mela neeni ziga yeddidaysada tawka yedda.
2.4: Heko, ha77i ta Godaa, ta Xoossaa sunthaas keethe keexanaw hanayis. Ta yan sawo tonku giya ixaane cuyisanaw, ubba wode Godaa sinthan uythaa wothanawunne wontanne omarsi, Sambaata gallasan, ageeni xeeriya wodenne Godaa nu Xoossaa ba7aale gallasatan xuussa yarsho yarshanaw, Xoossa keethaa dummayana. Isra7eele asay merinaw oothana mela kiitetida oosoti haysata.
2.5: “Nu Xoossay hara xoossata ubbaafe gita gidiya gisho, ta keexanaw haniya Xoossaa Keethay gita.
2.6: Shin iyaw keethe keexanaw danda7ey oonee? Salope dhoqa saloy iyaw gidenna! Yaatin, ta iya sinthan ixaane cuyisanawnne ta iyaw keethe keexanaw oonee?
2.7: “Hiza alleeqo ooso, worqa, bira, naasenne birata seerisiya oosuwanne zo7o ma7uwa, ocha teera daaniya ma7uwanne kaalose ma7uwa giigisiya eratethi de7iya ase taw yedda. Ta aaway Dawiti Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya kushe hiillanchota doori wothis; I entara issife oothana.
2.8: Libaanosen de7iya ne asati mithaa waati qanxiyaako ereysa ta erayis. Hessa gisho, neeni taw Libaanosepe zigaa, xiiddanne xaytha mithi yedda. Ta asati ne asatara gididi,
2.9: daro mithaa giigisana. Taani keexiya Xoossaa keethay gitanne malaalsiyaba.
2.10: Mithi qanxiya ne aylleta taani laatamu mukulu kuntaale gistenne laatamu mukulu kuntaale banga, oyddu xeetu mukulu litiro woynenne oyddu xeetu mukulu litiro shamaho zayte immana” yaagis.
2.11: Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami Solomoneko dabdaabe yeddishe, “Goday ba asaa dosiya gisho, I nena enta bolla kawothis.”
2.12: Kiraami gujidi, “Xoossa keethaanne baw gadho keexana mela cinca, akeekanne hiilla na7aa kawa Dawitas immida, salo sa7aa medhida Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto.
2.13: “Taani Kiraam-Abi geetetiya hiillanchonne akeeka addiya new yeddas.
2.14: Iya aayiya Daane koche; iya aaway Xiroosa biitta asa. I worqaa, bira, naase birata, birata, shuchunne mithi oothiya asi; ocha teera daaniya ma7o, kaalose ma7o, zo7o ma7onne liino ma7o giigisiya ooso erees. I dumma dumma alleeqota kessidi, odeysada ubbaa oothanaw danda7ees. I kushe hiillan loohida ne asaaranne kase ne aawa, Dawitas oothida asaara iya oosisa.
2.15: Hiza ne ta goday immana gida gistiyanne banga, zaytiyanne woyniya yedda.
2.16: Neeni Libaanosepe koyida mithi nu qanxidi qachidi, abba bollara tooketidi, neeko Yoophe baanada oothana. Yaape neeni Yerusalaame gakanaw efisana” yaagis.
2.17: Iya aaway Dawiti kase taybidaysada, Solomoney Isra7eele biittan de7iya kare biitta asaa ubbaa taybis. Enti xeetanne ishatammanne heedzu mukulunne usupun xeeta gididosona.
2.18: Solomoney he asaape laapun tammu mukulu asaa toohos, hospun tammu mukulu asaa gezze biittan shucha qoo7anaw dooris; enta kalanaw heedzu mukulunne usupun xeetu asaa shuumis.

3.1: Solomone aaway Dawiti xoossaa keethay keexetana bessaa More deriyan Yerusalaamen giigisis. He bessay Goday Dawitas qoncida Yaabuse addiya Orna wudumma.
3.2: Solomoney ba kawotida oyddantho laythan, nam7antho ageenan Xoossa keethaa keexanaw doomis.
3.3: Solomoney Xoossa keethaa keexanaw baasida baasuwa adussatethay usupun tammu wadha; gompay laatamu wadha.
3.4: Xoossa keetha geliya bessan de7iya barandaa gompay Xoossa keethaa gompaada laatamu wadha; adussatethay laatamu wadha.
3.5: Penge godaa xiidda xalaalan licidi kammis; geeshsha worqan tiyis; zamba misilenne santhalaata misilen alleeqisis.
3.6: Xoossa keethaa al7o shuchan alleeqisis; I alleeqisida worqay Parwayma biittafe yida worqaa.
3.7: Godata, tuuqeta, gobanetanne pengeta worqan tiyis; godaa bolla kiruube misile medhis.
3.8: Solomoney Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa keexis. He bessaa adussatethaa Xoossa keethaa gompaada laatamu wadha; gompaay laatamu wadha. He bessaa godaa laatamu mukulu kilo giraame muruuto worqan tiyis.
3.9: Enti go7etida misimaarey ichashu xeetanne laapun tammu giraame worqafe medhetis. Pooqen de7iya kifiletaka worqan tiyis.
3.10: Solomoney Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessan nam7u kiruube misileta giigisidi worqan tiyis.
3.11: He kiruubeta qefey micetidi, laatamu wadha; koyro kiruubiya koyro qefey ichashu wadha gididi, Xoossa keetha godaa bochees; nam7antho qefey ichashu wadha gididi, hara kiruubiya qefiya bochees.
3.12: Nam7antho kiruubiya koyro qefey ichashu wadha gididi, Xoossa keetha godaa bochees; nam7antho qefey ichashu wadha gididi, koyro kiruubiya qefiya bochees.
3.13: Ha nam7u kiruubeta qefey micetidi, laatamu wadha gidis; enti banta som7uwa Geeshsha bessaako zaaridi, banta tohon eqidosona.
3.14: Solomoney kaalose ma7uwa, ocha teera daaniya ma7uwapenne, zo7o ma7uwape liinope dadetida ma7uwape magarajo oothidi, iya bolla kiruubeta misile medhis.
3.15: Solomoney Xoossa keethaa sinthan issuwa issuwa adussatethay hastamanne ichashu wadha gidida nam7u tuussata oosisidi, enta huuphen ichashu wadha gumbota wothis.
3.16: Qassi santhalaata giteda medhisidi, tuussata huuphen wothis; xeetu oromaane teera misileta medhisidi, santhalaata bolla wothis.
3.17: Tuussatape issuwa Xoossa keethaa sinthan ushacha baggara, nam7anthuwa qassi haddirsa baggara essis. Ushacha baggara de7iya tuussaa Yakina sunthidi, haddirsa baggara de7iya tuussaa Boo7eza sunthis.

4.1: Hessafe guye, Solomoney adussatetha laatamu wadha, gompay laatamu wadha, dhoqatethay tammu wadha gidiya yarsho bessa naase biratape oosisis.
4.2: Qassi naase birata seerisidi, doonay ya gaxape ha gaxaa gakanaw tammu wadha, adussatethay ichashu wadhanne yuushoy hastamu wadha gidiya Abba saane medhisis.
4.3: Abba Saane doonan kare baggara yuuyi aadhidi, iyara oyketidi medhetida misileti de7oosona; he misileti nam7u maaran de7iya boorata misileta.
4.4: He Abba Saane naase biratape medhetida tammanne nam7u boorata misiletas zokuwan uttis. Booratape heedzati pudeha bagga, heedzati wuloha bagga, heedzati dugeha bagga, heedzati qassi doloha bagga simmidi xeelliyaba daanosona. Abba Saane enta bolla uttis; entaasi guye baggay giddoko simmi uttis.
4.5: Abba Saaney issi takadho mela orde; iya doonay wanca doona mela; suufe ciishshi daanees. He Abba Saaney usupun tammu mukulu litiro gidiya haatha oykeysa.
4.6: Solomoney meecetiya tammu kereta; oosisidi, ichashaa ushacha garsa baggara, ichashaa haddirsa baggara wothis. Entan xuussa yarsho ashoy meecetees; shin Abba Saane haathan kahineti meecetoosona.
4.7: Hessafe guye, Solomoney entaw imetida halchuwada xompe wothiya tammu kocata worqafe oothidi, ichashaa ushacha baggara, ichashaa haddirsa baggara Xoossa keethan wothis.
4.8: Tammu xarpheezata oothidi, ichasha ushacha baggara, ichasha haddirsa baggara Xoossa keetha giddon wothis. Qassi xeetu disteta worqafe oothis.
4.9: Solomoney kahinetas giddo dabaaba, kare bagga gita dabaaba giigisis; dabaabas pengeta giigisidi, pengeta naase biratan lanxis.
4.10: Abba Saaniya Xoossa keethafe garsan doloha baggan wothis.
4.11: Kiraami kereta, akaafatanne xaarota medhis; Kiraami kawa Solomones Xoossaa keethan ooso oothidi polis.
4.12: I oothida oosotika nam7u tuussata, tuussata huuphen wothiya saane mela nam7u gumbota, tuussata bolla de7iya nam7u gumbota alleeqisiya nam7u gite daaniya santhalaata,
4.13: issi issi tuuqiya bolla nam7u maaran naase biratape oosetida issi issi xeetu oromaane teera misileta, kumethi oyddu xeetu oromaane teera misileta,
4.14: oydetanne oydeta bolla uttiya meecha tammu kereta,
4.15: Abba Saaneynne iyape garsan de7iya tammanne nam7u boora misileta,
4.16: kereta, akaafata, qaphetanne hara miisheta ubbaa. Kiraam-Abi kawa Solomones Xoossa keethaa oosuwas medhida ha miisheta ubbaa geeshsha naase biratape medhis.
4.17: Kawoy Solomoney Sukotapenne Xareedape giddon, Yordaanose denban de7iya naase birata sheeshiya bessan ha ubbaa oosisis.
4.18: Naasepe medhetida ha miishe ubbay daro gidida gisho, ay mela deexiyako likey eretibeenna.
4.19: Solomoney Xoossa keethan de7iya miisheta ubbaa worqafe oosisis. Hessika worqafe oosetida yarsho bessa, Godaa sinthan wothiya uythay uttiya xarpheeza,
4.20: wogaa mela Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa sinthan poo7ana mela xompe wothiya worqa kocaa, worqa xompeta,
4.21: walahi bayna worqafe oosetida ciishsha misileta, xompetanne qapheta,
4.22: xompe toysiyabata, xaarota, ixaane cuyisiyabatanne tama ekiya qapheta. Ha miisheti ubbay geeshsha worqafe oosetidosona. Xoossaa keethas kare bagga pengetanne Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa geliya pengeta worqan tiyis.

5.1: Solomoney Xoossa keetha ooso ubbaa polidaape guye iya aaway Dawiti Godaas dummayidi wothida bira, worqanne hara miisheta ubbaa ehidi, Xoossa keetha buqura minjiya bessan wothis. Taabotey Xoossa Keethi Gelis (1 Kawo 8:1-9)
5.2: Hessafe guye, Kawoy Solomoney Godaa Qaala caaqo Taabotiya Dawita Katama gidida Xiyoonepe ehana mela Isra7eele cimata, Isra7eele kochatanne soo asaa halaqata Yerusalaame shiishis.
5.3: Isra7eele asa ubbay laapuntho ageenan, Shaqara Ba7aaley bonchetiya wode kawako shiiqidosona.
5.4: Isra7eele cimati ubbay gakin, Leeweti Taabotiya denthidosona.
5.5: Leewetinne kahineti Taabotiya, Dunkaaniyanne iya giddon de7iya geeshsha miisheta ubbaa tookidi ehidosona.
5.6: Kawoy Solomoneynne iyara de7iya Isra7eele maabara ubbay Taabotiya sinthan shiiqidi, taybanaw danda7etonna daro dorsenne mehe yarshidosona.
5.7: Kahineti Caaqo Taabotey Xoossaa keethaa Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa ehidi, kiruubeta misileta qefetape garsara wothidosona.
5.8: Micetidi uttida kiruubeta qefeti Taabotiyanne Taabotiya tookiya kasota kammidosona.
5.9: Kasoti daro adusse gidiya gisho, enta xeeray Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa sinthan de7iya Geeshsha bessan eqida asi be7anaw danda7ees; shin Geeshsha bessaafe karera bentenna. Enti hachi gakanaw he bessan de7oosona.
5.10: Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida wode Goday entara caaqida Koreeba zuman Musey wothida nam7u loche shuchatape attishin, Taabotiya giddon harabay baawa.
5.11: He bessan de7iya kahineti ubbay banta oothiya bessan bessan shaaketonna de7ishe bantana Godaas dummayidosona.
5.12: Mazmure zammariya Leeweti ubbay, Asaafi, Hemaaninne Edotape, enta naytinne enta dabboti liino geetetiya ma7o ma7idosona. He ma7uwa ma7idi, daala, diithinne maasinqo oykidi, yarsho bessaafe doloha baggara eqidosona.
5.13: Xeetanne laatamu kahineti moyze punnanaw entara eqidosona. Enti ubbay moyze punnishe, daala qaathishe, diithi diixishenne hara miisheta kaa7ishe, “Goday keeha! iya siiqoy merinaasa” yaagidi Godaa sabboosona.
5.14: Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumida gisho, shaara gaason kahineti banta oosuwa oothanaw danda7ibookona.

6.1: Solomoney, “Abeeti Godaw, ‘Ta dhuma shaaran daana’ yaagadasa.
6.2: Shin taani neeni yan merinaw daana lo77o keethe new keexas” yaagis.
6.3: Isra7eele shiiqoy yan eqidashin, kawoy entako simmidi, enta haysada yaagidi anjis;
6.4: “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto! Ta aawa Dawitas ba doonan odida ufaysa qaala ba kushen polis. He I odida ufaysay,
6.5: ‘Taani ta asaa Isra7eele Gibxefe kessada ehida wodepe doomin, ta sunthay iyan xeegetana mela taw keethe keexanaw Isra7eele kochata giddon ay katamaka doorabike; woyko I ta asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela oonaka doorabike.
6.6: Shin ha77i ta sunthay Yerusalaamen xeegetana mela taani Yerusalaame dooras; qassi ta asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela Dawita dooras.’
6.7: “Ta aaway Dawiti Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sunthaas keethe keexanaw ba wozanan qopis.
6.8: Shin Goday ta aawa Dawitako, ‘Neeni ta sunthaas keethe keexanaw ne wozanan qopida gisho lo77o oothadasa.
6.9: Gidoshin, taw keethe keexanay nena gidaka; ta sunthaas keethe keexanay ne gulbatape keyana ne na7aa.’
6.10: “Goday ba gida ufaysa qaala polis. Goday kase immida ufaysada taani ta aawa Dawita bessan kawotada Isra7eele kawotetha araatan uttas. Qassi Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sunthaas keethe keexas.
6.11: Goday Isra7eelera caaqida caaqoy xaafetida loche shuchati de7iya Taabotiya iya giddon wothas” yaagis. Solomone Woosa (1 Kawo 8:22-53)
6.12: -13 Solomoney adussatethay ichashu wadha, gompay ichashu wadhanne dhoqatethat heedzu wadha gidida madirake naase biratape oothidi dabaaba giddon wothis. Solomoney Godaa yarsho bessa sinthan, Isra7eele maabaray de7iya bessan eqidi, ba kushiya miccidi Isra7eele shiiquwa sinthan gulbatis.
6.14: I haysada yaagidi woossis: “Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, salon woyko sa7an ne mela xoossi baawa. Neeni ne ufaysa qaala naagasa; banta kumetha wozanaape ne sinthan hemetida ne aylleta merina siiquwan dosadasa.
6.15: Ne aylliya, ta aawa Dawitas neeni oothana gada odida qaala naagadasa. Neeni kase ne doonan odidaysa ne kushen hachi poladasa.
6.16: Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw neeni ne aylliya, ta aawa Dawitas, ‘Neeni ta sinthan hemetidaysada ne naytika ta higgiyan hemetanaw banta ogiya naagiko, Isra7eele araatan uttiya ase dhayaka’ yaagida qaala pola.
6.17: Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, neeni ne aylliya Dawitas odida ne ufaysa qaalay poleto.
6.18: “Shin Xoossi tuma, asara sa7an de7iyee? Heko, saloy, ubbaafe dhoqa saloy nena oykanaw danda7enna. Yaatin, ha ta keexida keethay new ay mela guuxandesha!
6.19: Gidoshin, abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw, ta woosa, ne aylliya woosaanne xeessaa si7a. Taani ne aylley ne sinthan woossiya woosaanne waasuwa si7a.
6.20: Neeni, ‘Ta sunthay he bessan xeegetana’ gida ha Xoossa keethako, ne ayfey qamma gallas xeello. Taani ne aylley ha keethako simmada woossiya woosa si7a.
6.21: Taani ne aylleynne ne asay Isra7eeley ha ne keethako simmidi woossiya woosa si7a. Ne de7iya bessan salon si7ada nuus atto yaaga.
6.22: “Issi asi ba shooruwa qohidi akay gin, iya caaqethanaw ha ne keethaa ehin, iya giddon de7iya yarsho bessa sinthan I caaqiko,
6.23: neeni salon si7ada ootha. Ne aylleta giddon pirda. Qohida uraa bolla pirdada, I oothidaba iya bolla zaara; xilluwa xoonisada iyaw iya xillotethaada zaara.
6.24: “Ne asay Isra7eeley ne bolla nagara oothidi, morken xoonetidi, neeko simmidi, ne sunthaa xeegidi, ha keethan nena woossiko,
6.25: ne salon si7a. Ne asaa Isra7eele nagaraa atto yaaga; ne kase entawunne enta mayzatas immida biitta enta zaara.
6.26: “Ne asay ne bolla nagaraa oothin, saloy gordetiko, iri bukonna ixin, enti ha bessaa simmidi, woossiko ne enta un7ethida gisho, ne sunthaa xeegidi, banta nagaraape simmiko,
6.27: ne salon si7a. Ne aylleta nagaraa, ne asaa Isra7eele nagaraa atto yaaga. Enti hemetanaw bessiya lo77o ogiya enta tamaarsa; neeni ne asaas immida biittan ira bukisa.
6.28: “Biittaa bolla koshi woyko boshi woyko leegey woyko booley woyko gondoy dhaysin woyko morkey enta katamata teqin woyko dhayoy woyko hargey yin,
6.29: ne asaa Isra7eelepe oonika woyko ne asa ubbay nena woossiko, ay asika ba wozanan un7etiyabanne azzaniyaba eridi, ha Xoossa keethako simmidi, ba kushiya micciko,
6.30: ne de7iya bessan salon si7a. Enta nagaraa atto yaaga; entaw ootha. Neeni asa wozana ereysada asa ubbaas iya oosuwada oosuwada imma. Asa ubbaa wozanaa erey ne xalaala.
6.31: Hessika ne nu mayzatas immida biittan banta de7o laytha ubban new yayyana melanne ne ogiyan hemetana melasa.
6.32: “Isra7eele gidonna hara biitta asi ne gita sunthaa gishonne neeni ne asaas oothida malaalsiya oosota gisho haaho biittafe yidi, ha Xoossa keethako simmidi woossiko,
6.33: ne de7iya bessan salon si7a. Hara biitta asay oychiyaba ubbaa ootha. Ha alamiyan de7iya asa ubbay ne sunthaa eranaadanne ne ase gidida Isra7eeleda new yayyanaada ta keexida ha keethay ne goyinnetiya bessi gideysa enti eranaada hara biitta asay nena woossiyaba ubbaa ootha.
6.34: “Enti banta morketa olana mela ne kiittiya wode ne doorida ha katamaakonne ta ne sunthaa gisho keexida ha keethaako simmidi nena woossiko,
6.35: enta woosaanne enta oysha salon si7a; enta oysha zaara.
6.36: “Nagara oothonna asi bayna gisho ne ase gidida Isra7eeley nagara oothidi nena qohiko neeni shenetada morketas aatha immin morketi enta di77idi haaho woyko mata biitta enta efin,
6.37: enti he di7etida biittan de7ishe banta wozanan nagarape simmiko, ‘Nuuni nagara oothida; nuuni qohida; nuuni iitabaa hanida’ yaagidi nena woossiko,
6.38: bantana di7idi efida morketa biittan de7ishe enti banta kumetha wozanaaninne kumetha qofan neeko simmiko, neeni enta mayzatas immida biittako, neeni doorida katamaakonne taani ne sunthaa gisho keexida keethako simmidi nena woossiko,
6.39: enta woosaanne oysha ne de7iya bessan salon si7a; entaw pirda; enta nagaraa atto” yaaga.
6.40: “Abeeti ta Xoossaw, ha bessan woossiya woosa ne ayfey xeello; ne haythay si7o.
6.41: “Abeeti Godaw, Xoossaw, denda; wolqaama ne Taabotiyara ne shempo bessaa gela. Abeeti Godaw, Xoossaw, ne kahineti atotethi eko; ne geeshsha asati ne keehatethan ufayto.
6.42: Abeeti Godaw, Xoossaw, neeni tiyida kawa aggofa; Ne aylliya Dawitas ne caaqida merinaa siiquwa qopa” yaagis.

7.1: Solomoney woosa polida wode salope tami wodhidi xuussa yarshuwanne hara yarshuwa mis. Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumis.
7.2: Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumida gisho kahineti Xoossa keethaa gelanaw danda7ibookona.
7.3: Isra7eele asa ubbay tami salope wodhishininne Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumishin be7ida wode banta som7uwa sa7a gathidi goyinnidosona. “Goday keeha! iya siiqoy merinaasa” yaagidi Godaa galatidosona.
7.4: Kawoynne asa ubbay Godaa sinthan yarsho yarshidosona.
7.5: Kawoy Solomoney laatamanne nam7u mukulu kormatanne xeetanne laatamu mukulu dorsata yarshis. Hessada oothidi, kawoynne asa ubbay Xoossa keethaa Godaas dummayidosona.
7.6: Kahineti bantaw giigida bessan eqin, Leeweti kawoy Dawiti Godaa sabbanaw kase oothida mazmure yexiya miisheta oykidi enta sinthan eqidi, “Iya siiqoy merinaasa” yaagidi yexishe Godaa galatidosona. Kahineti Leeweta sinthan eqidi moyze punnin Isra7eele asa ubbay eqis.
7.7: Solomoney xoossaa keethaa sinthan de7iya giddo dabaaba dummayis. He bessan xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarshuwafe modhuwa yarshis. I hessa oothiday, Godaa sinthan de7iya naase biratape oosetida yarsho bessay, xuussa yarshuwa, katha yarshuwanne issifetetha yarshuwafe modhuwa yarshanaw guuxida gishosa.
7.8: He wode Solomoneynne Isra7eele asa ubbay laapun gallas ba7aale bonchidosona. Isra7eele asay Hamaatape bidi Gibxe shaafa gakanaw de7iya daro asay he bessan shiiqidosona.
7.9: Asay yarsho bessa anjisiya ba7aale laapun gallas qassi Shaqara Ba7aale hara laapun gallas bonchidosona. Hospuntha gallas wursetha shiiqo shiiqidosona.
7.10: Solomoney laapuntha ageenan, laatamanne heedzantho gallasan asaa moyzis. Asay, Goday Dawitas, Solomonesinne ba asaa Isra7eeles oothida keehatethan ufaytishe ba soo soo bidosona. Xoossay Solomones Qoncis
7.11: Solomoney Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadho keexidi wursis. Solomoney Xoossa keethaninne ba gadhon oothanaw ba wozanan qopidaba ubbaa polis.
7.12: Goday Solomones qamma qoncidi, “Taani ne woosa si7as; taani ha Xoossa keethaa yarsho bessi gidana mela dooras.
7.13: Iri bukonna mela ta saluwa gordiya wode woyko kathi maana mela boole kiittiya wode woyko ta asaa bolla gado yeddiya wode
7.14: ta sunthan xeegetida ta asay banta asatethaa kawushidi woossiko, tana koyiko, banta iita ogiyape simmiko, ta salon enta woosa si7ana; enta nagaraa atto gaana; enta biitta pathana.
7.15: Ha77i ha bessan woosetiya woosa ta ayfey xeellana; ta haythay si7ana.
7.16: Ha77i ta sunthay merinaw iyan daana mela ha keetha doorasinne geeshshas. Ta ayfeynne ta wozanay ubba wode ha keethan daana.
7.17: “Ne aaway Dawiti oothidaysada neeni ta sinthan hemetiko, ta kiitaa ubbaa oothiko, ta wogaanne ta higgiya naagiko,
7.18: taani ne aawa Dawitara, ‘Ne kochaafe Isra7eele bolla kawo gidiya asi dhayaka’ yaagada caaqidaysada ne araata minthada essana.
7.19: “Shin hinte tana aggidi ta hintew immida wogaanne higgiya aggiko, hara xoossata goyinnikonne entaw oothiko,
7.20: taani kase hintew immida biittafe hintena dhoqollana; ta sunthaas dummayida ha keethaaka aggaagana. Ta ha keethaa kawotetha ubbaa giddon miichasinne qelqisethas oothana.
7.21: Ha Xoossa keethay daro malaalsiyaba gidikoka, iya matara aadhiya ubbay malaaletidi, ‘Goday ha biittanne ha Xoossa keethaa ayis haysada oothidee?’ ” yaagana.
7.22: Asay zaaridi, “Haysa ubbaa enta bolla ehiday, entana Gibxefe kessida enta mayzata Xoossaa aggidi hara xoossata kaallida gishonne enta goyinnida gishosa” yaagana.

8.1: Solomoney Xoossa keethaanne baw gadho keexida laatamantho laytha wursethan,
8.2: Kawoy Kiraami immida katamata Solomoney zaari keexidi Isra7eele asaa he katamatan wothis.
8.3: Solomoney Hamaatanne Suubba geetetiya biitta bidi oykis.
8.4: Yaatidi mela biittan de7iya Tadmoora katamaanne shalo minjiya katamata Hamaata biittan keexis.
8.5: Hessadaka, Solomoney Qommo Beet-Horonanne garsa Beet-Horona geetetiya katamata zaaridi keexis. He katamati dirsi, pengeynne kobey de7iya diretidi uttida katamata.
8.6: Balata katamaa, buqura minjiya katamata ubbaa, ba paratanne para gaareta wothiya katamata ubbaanne I keexanaw amotida ubbaa Yerusalaamen, Libaanoseninne ba haariya biitta ubban keexis.
8.7: Isra7eele gidonashin hara biitta asatape attida Hiteta, Amooreta, Parzeta, Hiwetanne Yaabuseta,
8.8: Isra7eele asay wursidi dhaysona aggida asaa wolqa ooso oothana mela Solomoney dooris; hachi gakanaw enti oothosona.
8.9: Shin Solomoney Isra7eele asaape oonaka aylle oothidi oosisibeenna. Enti iya olanchota, toora moconata, para gaare laaggeyisata halaqatanne para asata gididi oothidosona.
8.10: Enta giddofe nam7u xeetanne ishatamu asati kawa Solomone oosuwa aawatethan oosisosona.
8.11: Solomoney, “Godaa Taabotey gelida bessay geeshshi gidiya gisho, ta machiya, Faarona na7iya, Isra7eele kawa Dawita gadhon daanaw bessuku” yaagidi, Gibxe kawa na7iw Dawita katamaape denthidi iw keexetida keethan wothis.
8.12: Solomoney he wode Xoossa keethaa sinthan Godaas keexida yarsho bessan xuussa yarsho Godaas yarshis.
8.13: Muse higgey kiitteysada gallas gallas xuussa yarsho yarshees. Solomoney Sambaatan gallas, ageena xeeroninne laythan heedzu toho bonchetiya ba7aaletan, hessika Uytha Ba7aalen, Saaminta Ba7aaleninne Shaqara Ba7aalen Godaas yarsho yarshees.
8.14: Iya aaway Dawiti kase kiittidaysada kahineta enta ooson ooson shaakidi shuumis; gallas gallas mazmuren sabbana melanne kahineta maaddana mela Leeweta shaakidi shuumis. Xoossa asi gidida Dawiti kiittidaysada penge naagiya asata issi issi pengiya naagana mela shuumis.
8.15: Hessadaka, kase Dawiti buqura minjiya bessaanne hara allaletaba kahinetanne Leeweta kiittidaysada issoyka attonna ubbay poletis.
8.16: Solomoney qopida ooso ubbay oosetidi wuris; Xoossa keethay baasetida wodiyape doomidi poletana gakanaw ooso ubbay lo77o oosetis.
8.17: He wode kawoy Solomoney Edoome biittan Zo7o Abbaa doonan de7iya Exiyoon-Gabiranne Eloota bis.
8.18: Kawoy Kiraami markabetanne markabiya laagon loohida asata Solomones yeddis. Enti Solomone asatara issife Ofira biitta bidi yaape 15,000 kilo giraame worqaa kawa Solomones ehidosona.

9.1: Saaba kawiya Solomone woriya si7ada, sedhemenken iya paacanaw sawo, daro worqanne al7o shuchu caanetida daro gimalera, daro azhaban Yerusalaame basu. Ba wozanan de7iyaba ubbaa Solomones odasu.
9.2: Solomoney iya oychidaba ubbaas zaaro immis; I iw birshonna iyape geemmidi attidabay aybika baawa.
9.3: Saaba kawiya Solomone cincatetha, I keexida gadhuwa,
9.4: iya gaytan shiiqiya kathaa, iya moorinnati uttiya utethaa, iya oosanchoti oothiya oosuwanne ma7iya ma7uwa, iya ushsha tigiya asati ma7iya ma7uwanne Godaa keethan I yarshiya xuussa yarshuwa be7ida wode I wozanay daro malaaletis.
9.5: Iya kawako, “Nebaanne ne cincatethaa taani ta biittan de7ashe si7idaysi tuma.
9.6: Shin ta yada ta ayfen be7ana gakanaw enti taw odidaba ammanabike. Ne cincatetha gitatethaas baggaaka taw odibookona; ta si7idaysafe ne daro gitataasa.
9.7: Ubba wode ne sinthan eqidi ne cincatethaa si7iya ne asatinne ne moorinnati ay mela anjetidona!
9.8: Nenan ufaytidi, nena ba kawotetha araatan utisida Goday ne Xoossay galatetto! Ne Xoossay Isra7eele siiqida gishonne merinaw minthi essanaw koyida gisho neeni suure pirdaanne xillotethaa oothana mela I nena enta bolla kawo oothis” yaagasu.
9.9: Kawiya oyddu mukulu kilo giraame worqa, daro sawonne al7o shuchu kawa Solomones immasu; Saaba kawiya kawa Solomones immida shittuwa mela shittoy baawa.
9.10: Qassi Ofirape worqa ehida Kiraamanne Solomone asati yaape sandale mithinne al7o shuchu ehidosona.
9.11: Kawoy sandale mithaa Xoossa keethasinne kawo gadhos dethe medhanaw, hessadaka zammaaretas maasinqonne diithi oothanaw go7etis. Hessa mela yetha miisheti haysafe kase Yihuda biittan bentibeenna.
9.12: Kawoy Solomoney Saaba kawiya koyidabaanne oychidaba ubbaa iw immis. Iya, iyaw ehidaysafe aathidi iw immis. Hessafe guye, Saaba kawiya ba azhabaara dendada ba biitta simmasu. Solomone Aquwa (1 Kawo 10:14-25)
9.13: Solomoney laythan laythan ekiya worqay laatamanne heedzu mukulu kilo giraame.
9.14: Hessika zal7anchotape ekiya qaraxa, Arabe biitta kawotapenne Isra7eele biittan haareysatape ekiya worqanne bira gujonnashina.
9.15: Kawoy Solomoney issi issi gondalley laapun kilo giraame gidiya nam7u xeetu wogga gondalleta worqafe oosisis.
9.16: Issoy issoy heedzu kilo giraame gidiya heedzu xeetu guutha gondalleta worqafe oosisis. Kawoy he gondalleta “Libaanose Woraa” geetetiya kawo gadhon wothis.
9.17: Kawoy dangarsa zaalepe issi gita araata oosisidi walahi bayna worqan lanxis.
9.18: Araatay de7iya bessaa keyanaw yedhiya usupun dethati de7oosona. Araatara oyketidi uttida worqafe oosetida toho yedhiya bessi de7ees. Araatas nam7u baggara kushe shempisiya zempoti de7oosona; he zempota matara ya bagganinne ha baggan eqida issi issi gaammo misiley de7ees.
9.19: He araatay de7iya bessaa keyiya usupun dethata bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara eqida tammanne nam7u gaammo misileti de7oosona. Hessa mela araati hara kawotethan awunka oosetibeenna.
9.20: Kawoy Solomoney ushshu uyaa miishe ubbay worqafe oosetis; “Libaanose Woraa” geetetiya kawo gadhon de7iya miishe ubbay walahi bayna worqafe oosetis. Solomone wode biri darida gisho taybon gelenna.
9.21: Kawas Kiraama asati laagiya zal7e markabeta de7oosona. He markabeti worqanne bira, dangarsa zaale, qaaretanne geleshshota caanidi heedzu laythafe issi toho ehoosona.
9.22: Kawoy Solomoney duretethaninne cincatethan sa7an de7iya kawota ubbaafe aadhees.
9.23: Sa7an de7iya kawoti ubbay Xoossay iya wozanan wothida cincatethaa si7anaw koyoosona.
9.24: Laythan laythan iyako yaa ubbay iyaw worqanne bira, ma7ota, ola miishe, shitto, paranne baqulota imota ehoosona.
9.25: Solomone paratasinne gaaretas oyddu mukulu zadaloti de7ees; tammanne nam7u mukulu para asati de7oosona. Solomoney hessata dumma dumma katamataninne Yerusalaamen wothis.
9.26: Solomoney Efraxiisa shaafape doomidi, Filisxeeme biittanne Gibxe zawa gakanaw de7iya kawota ubbaa haaris.
9.27: Kawoy Yerusalaamen biri shuchada keeletanaada ziga mithi Yihuda zumata xaphon dicciya boobbada darana mela oothis.
9.28: Solomoney parata Gibxefenne hara biitta ubbaafe ehisees. Solomone Hayquwa (1 Kawo 11:41-43)
9.29: Koyrope wursethi gakanaw Solomone taarikey nabiya Naatana taarike maxaafan, Seelo addiya nabiya Akiya maxaafaninne Nabaaxa Na7aa Iyorbaama wode gakanaw de7iya nabiya Ido qoncetha maxaafan xaafetis gidennee?
9.30: Solomoney Isra7eele bolla Yerusalaamen oytamu laythi kawotis.
9.31: Hessafe guye, Solomoney hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis; ba aawa Dawita kataman moogetis. Iya na7ay Robi7aami iya bessan kawotis.

10.1: Isra7eele asa ubbay Orobi7aama kawoyanaw Seekema bida gisho ika yaa bis.
10.2: Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami kawa Solomonepe baqatidi Gibxen de7eysi, hessa si7ida wode Gibxefe yis.
10.3: Isra7eele asa ubbay Iyorbaamas kiittidi xeegisin, inne shiiqida Isra7eele asa ubbay Orobi7aamako bidi,
10.4: “Ne aaway nuna deexo qambara toossis; shin ha77i I nuna oosisiya wolqaama oosuwanne deexo qambara nuus kawushisa; yaatiko, nu new haaretana” yaagidosona.
10.5: Robi7aami, “Heedzantho gallas simmidi, taako yiite” yaagis. Asay simmidi bidosona.
10.6: Hessafe guye, kawoy Robi7aami iya aaway Solomoney paxa de7iya wode Solomone zorida cimata, “Ha asaas woygada zaara geetii?” yaagidi entana zore oychis.
10.7: Cimati Orobi7aamako, “Ne ha asaas keehiko, enta ufaysikonne entaw lo77o qaala zaariko enti ubba wode new haaretana” yaagidosona.
10.8: Shin Robi7aami cimati zorida zoriya aggidi iyara diccidi, iyara oothiya yalagata zore oychis.
10.9: I entako, “Hinte tana zoriyabay aybee? ‘Ne aaway nuna toossida deexo qambara nuus kawushisa’ giya ha asaas woygada zaaro?” yaagidi oychis.
10.10: Iya laggeti zaaridi, “ ‘Ne aaway nuna deexo qambara toossis; shin ne nuus kawusharki’ giya asaas, ‘Ta gil7a biradhey ta aawa xeessaafe orde.
10.11: Ta aaway hintena deexo qambara toossis; shin ta iyape aathada deexethana. Ta aaway hintena lisson wadhis; shin ta hintena korneda dukiya lisson wadhana’ yaagada zaara” yaagidosona.
10.12: Kawoy, “Heedzu gallasape guye simmidi taako yiite” gidaysada Iyorbaaminne asay simmidi yidosona.
10.13: Kawoy Robi7aami cimati zorida zoriya aggidi entaw iita zaaro zaaris.
10.14: Iya laggeti zorida zoriya kaallidi, “Ta aaway hintena qambara toossis; shin taani iyape aathada deexethana. Ta aaway hintena lisson wadhis; shin taani hintena korneda dukiya lisson wadhana” yaagidi zaaris.
10.15: Goday Seelo addiya nabiya Akiya baggara Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaamas odida qaalay poletana mela Xoossafe hanida gisho kawoy asay geysa si7onna ixis.
