34.7: Iyosyaasi yarsho bessata laallis; Asheera eeqa misiletanne hara eeqa misileta tincherethis; Isra7eelen de7iya ixaane cuyisiya bessata qanxerethis. Hessafe guye, Iyosyaasi Yerusalaame simmis.
34.8: Iyosyaasi kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan biittanne Xoossa keethaa geeshidaape guye, Xoossa keethaa oorathana mela Axala na7aa Safaana, Yerusalaame katamaa haariya Ma7iseyanne Iyo7akaaza na7aa waanna xaafiya Iyo7akina kiittis.
34.9: Enti kahine halaqaa Kalqiyaasako bidosona. Penge naagiya Leeweti Minaasepe, Efreemape, attida Isra7eele asaa ubbaafe Yihudape, Biniyaamepenne Yerusalaamen de7iya asaape kase shiishidi Xoossa keethi ehida miishiya Kalqes immidosona.
34.10: Enti Xoossa keethaa oorathiya halaqatas immin enti Xoossa keethaa oorathanaadanne zaaridi keexana mela oosanchotas immidosona.
34.11: Yihuda kawoti laallida Xoossa keethaa loythanaw mithinne masetida shuchu shammana mela anaaxetasinne gimbeysatas miishe immidosona.
34.12: Asay ammanetidi oosuwa polidosona. Enta bolla shuumetida oyddu Leeweti, Maraara yaraape Yahaatanne Abdiyu, Qahaata yaraape Masulaamanne Zakariyasa. Yetha miishe ka7i eriya Leeweti ubbay,
34.13: wolqa ooso oothiya asata bollanne dumma dumma ooso ootheyisata bolla shuumetidosona. Qassi hara Leeweti xaafe, halaqanne penge naageysata gididosona. Higge Maxaafay Bentis
34.14: Enti Xoossa keethaa yida miishiya kessiya wode kahiney Kalqey Goday Muse baggara immida higge maxaafaa demmis.
34.15: Kalqey waanna xaafiya Saafanako, “Taani Xoossa keethafe higge maxaafaa demmas” yaagis. He maxaafaa Saafanas immis.
34.16: Safaani maxaafaa kawako efidi, “Ne shuumati ne kiitaa ubbaa oothidosona.
34.17: Xoossa keethan de7iya miishiya ekidi, oosuwa kaalliya halaqatasinne oothiya asaas immidosona” yaagis.
34.18: Waanna xaafey Safaani kawako, “Kahiney Kalqey taw maxaafaa immis” yaagidi maxaafaa kawa sinthan nabbabis.
34.19: Kawoy higge qaala si7ida wode azzanidi ba ma7uwa pheedhis.
34.20: Kawoy, Kalqe, Safaana na7aa Akqaama, Mikiyaasa na7aa Abdoona, waanna xaafiya Saafananne kawo shuuma Asaya haysada yaagidi kiittis;
34.21: “Bidi ta gishonne Isra7eeleninne Yihudan attida asata gisho ha bentida maxaafan xaafetidaba Godaa oychite. Ha maxaafan xaafetida ubbaa oothanaw nu mayzati Godaa qaala naagiboonna gisho Goday nu bolla ba hanquwa gussis” yaagis.
34.22: Kalqeynne kawoy kiitida asati Xoossa keethan ma7o naagiya Hasira na7a, Tiquwa na7a, Selema macho gidida Hulda geetetiya nabeko bidi iyo oychidosona. Iya Yerusalaamen nam7antho kataman de7awusu.
34.23: Hulda entako, “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay, ‘Hintena taako kiitida uraas haysada yaagidi odite’ yaagasu.
34.24: Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Yihuda kawa sinthan nabbabetida maxaafan xaafetida iita baadetha ubbaa ha bessan de7iya asaa bolla ehana hanayis.
34.25: Enti tana aggidi hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisidosona; enti banta kushen oothidaban tana hanqethidosona. Hessa gisho, ta hanqoy ha bessan tigetana; teqetenna.’
34.26: Godaa oychanaw hintena kiitida Yihuda kawako, ‘Goday Isra7eele Xoossay neeni si7ida qaalaba haysada yaagees;
34.27: Ha bessaaninne ha bessan de7iya asaa bolla Xoossay odetidaba neeni si7ida wode ne wozanay boshetin, ta sinthan nenatethaa kawushida gishonne ne ma7uwa peedhada ta sinthan yeekida gisho taani ne woosa si7as.
34.28: Heko, ta nena ne mayzata gathana; ne saro moogetana. Ta ha bessaaninne ha bessan de7iya asaa bolla ehana iitabaa ne ayfey be7enna’ yaagite” yaagasu. Enti bidi ha qaala kawas odidosona.
34.29: Hessafe guye, kawoy Iyosyaasi Yihuda cimatanne Yerusalaame cimata ubbaa shiishis.
34.30: Kawoy Xoossa keethi keyis; Yihuda asay, Yerusalaame asay, kahinetinne Leeweti, guuthafe gita gakanaw ubbay iyara issife keyidosona. Xoossa keethan bentida caaqo maxaafa qaala ubbaa kawoy entaw nabbabis.
34.31: Kawoy ba bessan eqidi, Godaa ogen hemetanawunne iya higgiya, iya wogaanne iya kiitaa ba kumetha wozanaaninne ba kumetha shempuwan naaganaw, qassi ha maxaafan xaafetida caaquwa oothanaw Godaa sinthan caaqis.
34.32: Yerusalaameninne Biniyaamen de7iya asa ubbay eqidi caaqana mela oothis; Yerusalaamen de7iya asay Xoossaa, banta mayzata Xoossaa caaqoy geysada oothidosona.
34.33: Iyosyaasi Isra7eele zawan de7iya ixetidaba ubbaa diggis. Isra7eelen de7iya ubbay Godaa, banta Xoossaa goyinnana mela oothis. Iyosyaasi de7ida laytha ubban enti Godaa, banta mayzata Xoossaa kaalo aggibokona.

35.1: Iyosyaasi Yerusalaamen Godaa Paasika Ba7aale bonchis. Koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallas Paasika dorsaa shukidosona.
35.2: Iyosyaasi kahineta ooson shuumidi, enta Xoossa keetha ooson minthethis.
35.3: Bantana Godaas dummayida, Isra7eele ubbaa tamaarsiya Leeweta haysada yaagis; “Geeshsha Taabotiya Dawita na7ay, Isra7eele kawoy Solomoney keexida Xoossa keethan wothite. Hizape guye Taabotiya hinte hashen tookanaw koshshenna. Ha77i Godaas, hinte Xoossaasinne, iya asaa Isra7eeles oothite.
35.4: Isra7eele kawoy Dawitinne iya na7ay Solomoney xaafidaysada hinte cugan cuganinne hinte soo asan asan hintena giigisite.
35.5: Leeweti hinte dabbota, Isra7eele kochata maaddanaw hinte yaran yaran Xoossa keethan eqite.
35.6: Goday Muse baggara odida qaala Isra7eele asay, hinte dabboti naagana mela gigisite; hinteka hintenatethaa geeshshite Paasika dorsaa shukite” yaagis.
35.7: Iyosyaasi he bessan de7iya asaas, Paasika yarsho gidana mela 30,000 dorsenne deeshe immis; qassi 3,000 kormata immis. He ubbaa kawoy ba shaluwape immis.
35.8: Kawo shuumati banta shenen asaas, kahinetasinne Leewetas yarsho mehe immidosona. Xoossa keetha halaqati Kalqey, Zakariyasinne Yi7eeli Paasika yarshos gidiya nam7u mukulunne usupun xeetu marazeta, heedzu xeetu kormata immidosona.
35.9: Leeweta halaqati Konaaneynne iya ishati, Shamayeynne Natina7eeli, qassi Hashabi, Yi7eelinne Yozabaati Paasika yarshos haniya ichashu mukulu marazetanne koleta, ichashu xeetu kormata immidosona.
35.10: Paasika Baaliyas ubbabay giigis; kawa kiitan, kahineti banta bessan bessan, Leeweti banta cugan cugan eqidosona.
35.11: Paasika dorsati shuketidosona; Leeweti galbaa qaaridosona; kahineti suuthaa yarsho bessa bolla dharcoosona.
35.12: Muse maxaafan xaafetidaysada asay Godaas yarshana mela xuussa yarshos giigida dorsata ashuwa Leeweti banta soo asan asan shaaketidi uttida Isra7eele yaratas immidosona; kormataka hessada oothidosona.
35.13: Leeweti wogay kiitteysada shuketida Paasika dorsaa ashuwa taman caacidosona; geeshsha yarshota xaaron, otoninne disten doysidi, Isra7eele asa ubbaas eeson shaakidi shaakidi immidosona.
35.14: Hessafe guye, Leeweti bantawunne Aarona koche gidida kahinetas Paasika yarsho giigisidosona. Hessa enti oothiday, kahineti xuussa yarshonne modhuwa yarshishe qamma gakanaw oothiya gishosa.
35.15: Dawiti, Asaafi, Hemaaninne kawa nabey Editaami kase kiittidaysada Asaafa yarati, mazmure yexeysati banta bessan de7oosona. Penge naageysati banta bessan de7oosona. Enta dabboti, Leeweti entaw giigisida gisho enti banta oosuwa aggibokona.
35.16: Godaas oothiya ooso ubbay, Paasika Ba7aale bonchoynne xuussa yarshoy, kawoy Iyosyaasi kiittidaysada hanidi he gallas giigis.
35.17: Yan shiiqida Isra7eele asay he gallas Paasika Baaliya bonchidosona; enti Uytha Ba7aale laapun gallas bonchidosona.
35.18: Nabiya Sameela wodiyape doomin, hessa mela Paasika Ba7aaley Isra7eelen bonchetibeenna. Iyosyaasi, kahineti, Leeweti, Yihuda asay, Isra7eele asaynne Yerusalaame asay bonchidaysada Paasika Ba7aale kase Isra7eele kawotape bonchida issoyka baawa.
35.19: Paasika Ba7aaley Iyosyaasi kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan bonchetis. Iyosyaasa Wursetha (2 Kawo 23:28-30)
35.20: Iyosyaasi Xoossa keethaa giigisidaape guye Gibxe kawoy Naakoy Efraxiisa shaafa matan de7iya Karkamishan oletanaw bis. Iyosyaasi iya teqanaw keyis.
35.21: Shin Naakoy Iyosyaasako ase kiittidi, “Yihuda kawaw, tananne nena kachiyabay aybee? Taani yiday ta morketa olanaasafe attishin, nena olanaasa gidenna. Ta morketa taani eeson olanaada Xoossay tana kiittis. Xoossay nena dhaysonaada taara de7iya Xoossara eqeteysa agga” yaagis.
35.22: Gidoshin, Iyosyaasi Goday Nako baggara odidaysa si7onnanne guye simmonna ixis. Ba kawo ma7uwa laammidi Magido denban oletanaw bis.
35.23: Dongen dukeysati kawa Iyosyaasa caddin, kawoy ba aylletako, “Taani iita cadetida gisho tana olaa giddofe kessite” yaagis.
35.24: Iyosyaasa para gaariyape wodhisidi, iya para gaariyan wothidi, iya Yerusalaame ehidosona. I yan hayqidi ba mayzata duufon moogetis. Yihuda asaynne Yerusalaame asa ubbay iyaw yeekidosona.
35.25: Nabey Ermiyaasi Iyosyaasas zelelsi kessidi xaafis. Zeleelidi yeekiya maccasaynne adde ubbay hachi gakanaw Iyosyaasas qopoosona. He zelelsay Isra7eele Yeeho zelelsa maxaafan xaafetis.
35.26: Iyosyaasi oothida harabay, Godaa higgen maxaafan xaafetidaysa mela I oothida lo77o oosoynne
35.27: koyrope wursethi gakanaw I oothida ubbay, Heko, Isra7eele kawotanne Yihuda kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetis.

36.1: He biitta asay Iyosyaasa na7aa Iyo7akaaza dooridi iya aawa bessan Yerusalaamen kawothidosona.
36.2: Iyo7akaazi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne heedza; I Yerusalaamen heedzu ageena kawotis.
36.3: Gibxe kawoy Iyo7akaaza kawotethaafe wothis; heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame biranne hastamanne oyddu kilo giraame worqa Yihuda asay giirana mela oothis.
36.4: Gibxe kawoy, Naakoy, Iyo7akaaza ishaa Eliyaqeeme Yihuda bollanne Yerusalaame bolla kawothidi iya sunthaa Iyo7aqeema yaagidi laammis. Yaatidi Iyo7aqeema ishaa Iyo7akaaza Gibxe efis. Yihuda Kawa Iyo7aqeema (2 Kawo 23:36—24:7)
36.5: Iyo7aqeemi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen tammanne issi laythi kawotis. Ba Godaa Xoossaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
36.6: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori iya olidi, Babiloone efanaw naase birata santhalaatan qachis.
36.7: Qassi Nabukadanaxoori Xoossa keetha miishiya ekidi Babiloone efidi, ba kawo gadhon wothis.
36.8: Iyo7aqeemi oothida harabay, oothida tunabaynne oothida iitaba ubbay, Heko, Isra7eele kawotanne Yihuda kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetis. I hayqin, iya bessan iya na7ay Yo7akini kawotis. Yihuda Kawa Yo7akina (2 Kawo 24:8-17)
36.9: Yo7akini kawotiya wode iyaw laythi hospuna; I Yerusalaamen heedzu ageenanne tammu gallas kawotis. I Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
36.10: Laytha laamen, kawoy Nabukadanaxoori ase kiittidi, Yo7akinanne Xoossa keethan de7iya al7o miisheta iyara issife Babiloone ehis. Yaatidi iya aawa ishaa Sedeqiyaasa Yihudanne Yerusalaame bolla kawothis. Yihuda Kawa Sedeqiyaasa (2 Kawo 24:18-20; Ermi 52:1-3)
36.11: Sedeqiyaasi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne issino; I Yerusalaamen tammanne issi laythi kawotis.
36.12: Ba Godaa Xoossaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; qassi Godaa qaala odiya nabiya Ermiyaasa sinthan bana kawushibeenna.
36.13: Sedeqiyaasi, ammanetana mela bana Xoossa sunthan caaqisida Nabukadanaxoora bolla makallis. Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaako simmonna ixis; ba wozana Xoossa bolla minthis.
36.14: Qassi, Yihuda asaynne enta kaalethiya kahineti, ammanetona ixidosona. Enti hara kawotethati oothiya ixetida oosota kaallidi, Goday Yerusalaamen geeshshida Xoossa keethaa tunisidosona. Yerusalaame Kundethaa (2 Kawo 25:1-21; Ermi 52:3-11)
36.15: Goday, enta mayzata Xoossay ba asaasinne ba keethas qadhetiya gisho, ba nabeta entaw zaari zaari kiittis.
36.16: Shin Godaa hanqoy enta bolla wodhana gakanawunne enti kessi ekiyaso dhayana gakanaw Xoossaa kiitanchota qelqisidosona; iya qaala kadhidosona; nabeta bolla miicidosona.
36.17: Hessa gisho, Goday Kaldaaweta kawa enta bolla denthin, I enta yalaga addeta Xoossa keethan mashshan wodhis. I yalaga addetas woyko geela7otas woyko cimatas woyko ceegatas qadhetonna wursis. Xoossay enta ubbaa Nabukadanaxoora kushen aathidi immis.
36.18: Babiloone kawoy Xoossa keethan de7iya miisheta ubbaa, gitaanne guuthaa, Xoossa keethan de7iya buqura, kawo buquranne iya moorinnata buqura ubbaa ekidi Babiloone efis.
36.19: Enti Xoossa keethaa taman xuuggidi, Yerusalaame gimbe dirsaa laallidosona. Kawo gadhuwa taman xuuggidi, yan de7iya al7o miishe ubbaa dhaysidosona.
36.20: Mashshafe attidaysata kawoy di77idi Babiloone efis. Farse kawotethay dendana gakanaw enti iyawunne iya naytas aylle gididosona.
36.21: Goday nabiya Ermiyaasa baggara odida qaalay poletis. Wursethan biittay laapun tammu laythi asi bayna bessi gididi shempis. Biittay Sambaata shempo demmis.
36.22: Farse kawoy Qiroosi kawotida koyro laythan nabiya Ermiyaasa baggara Goday odidaysa polis. Farse kawoy Qiroosi ba kawotethan ubban haysada yaagidi awaajana melanne xaafidi wothana mela Goday iya ayyaana denthethis.
36.23: Farse kawoy Qiroosi, “Goday, salo Xoossay ha sa7aa kawotethata ubbaa taw immis. Qassi Yihudan de7iya Yerusalaamen ta iyaw Xoossa keethi keexana mela tana shuumis. Xoossa asi gidida oonika yaa boo. Goday iya Xoossay iyara gido” yaagis.

1.1: Farse kawoy Qiroosi kawotida koyro laythan, nabiya Ermiyaasa baggara Goday odidaba polis. Farse kawoy Qiroosi ba kawotethaa giddon haysada yaagidi awaajana melanne he awaajuwa xaafidi wothana mela Goday iya wozana denthethis.
1.2: Farse kawoy Qiroosi haysada yaagees; “Goday, salo Xoossay ha sa7aa kawotethata ubbaa taw immis. Qassi Yihudan de7iya Yerusalaamen iyaw keethe keexana mela tana shuumis.
1.3: Xoossa asi gidida oonika yaa boo; iya Xoossay iyara gido! Hinte Yihudan de7iya Yerusalaame bidi, yan Yerusalaamen Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaa keethaa zaaridi keexo.
1.4: Dumma dumma biittan de7iya asa ubbay Ayhudetape attidaysati bira, worqa, dumma dumma miishetanne mehe immidi maaddo; qassi Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossaa keethaa banta dosan immiya imota bolla gujidi immo” yaagees.
1.5: Hessafe guye, Yihudanne Biniyaame koche halaqati, kahinetinne Leeweti, qassi Xoossay enta wozanaa denthethida ubbay Yerusalaamen Godaa Xoossaa keethaa keexanaw baanaw dendidosona.
1.6: Qassi enta shooron de7eysatika banta dosan immidaba bolla gujidi, birapenne worqafe oosetida miisheta, hara dumma dumma miishetanne mehe immidi, enta maaddidosona.
1.7: Hessa bolla kawoy Qiroosi Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaamepe efidi ba eeqa keethan wothida Godaa keethaa miisheta immis.
1.8: Farse kawoy Qiroosi miisheta wothiya keetha halaqaa Mitirdaaxu taybisidi, Yihuda haariya Sesabisaara kushen wothis.
1.9: Simmida miisheta tayboy haysa; hastamu worqa shaate, mukulu bira shaate, laatamanne uddufun pil7o,
1.10: hastamu worqaa kere, oyddu xeetanne tammu bira kere mukulu hara dumma dumma miishe.
1.11: Worqa miishetanne bira miisheta tayboy kumethi ichashu mukulunne oyddu xeeta; Seesabisari Babiloonepe Yerusalaame simmiya wode di7ope simmida asaara ekidi yis.

2.1: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori di77idi, ba biitta efida asaape guye, Yerusalaamenne Yihuda banta katamaa katamaa simmida asay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata.
2.2: Enta halaqati Zarubaabela, Iyyasu, Nahime, Saraya, Ra7ila, Mardikiyoosa, Bilisaana, Masefaara, Baguwaya, Rehuumanne Ba7ana. Di7ope simmida asaa tayboy haysa.
2.3: Faroosa yaray 2,172;
2.4: Safaaxa yaray 372;
2.5: Era yaray 775;
2.6: Iyyasunne Yo7aaba koche gidida Fahat-Moo7abe yaray 2,812;
2.7: Elama yaray 1,254;
2.8: Zata yaray 945;
2.9: Zakaya yaray 760;
2.10: Baana yaray 642;
2.11: Bebaya yaray 623;
2.12: Azgada yaray 1,222;
2.13: Adonqaama yaray 666;
2.14: Beguwaya yaray 2,056;
2.15: Adina yaray 454;
2.16: Hizqiyaasa koche gidida Axeera yaray 98;
2.17: Basaya yaray 323;
2.18: Yoora yaray 112;
2.19: Hasuma yaray 223;
2.20: Gibara yaray 95;
2.21: Beeteleme asay 123;
2.22: Naxoofa asay 56;
2.23: Anatoota asay 128;
2.24: Azmoota asay 42;
2.25: Qiriyat-Yi7aarima, Kafiranne Bi7eroota asay 743;
2.26: Ramanne Gib7a asay 621;
2.36: Di7ope simmida kahineta soo asaa tayboy haysa. Iyyasu koche gidida Yadaya yaray 973;
2.40: Di7ope simmida Leeweta tayboy haysa; Hodawa koche gidida Iyyasunne Qadimeela yaray 74;
2.42: Xoossa keetha penge naagiya Salooma, Axeera, Xalmoona, Aquba, Haxixanne Sobaya yaray 139.
2.43: Haysati di7ope simmidi, Xoossa keethan oothiya asaa yarata; Xiha yara, Hasufa yara, Xaba7oota yara,
2.44: Keraasa yara, Siha yara, Fadoona yara,
2.45: Libana yara, Agaba yara, Aquba yara,
2.46: Agaba yara, Samila yara, Hanana yara,
2.47: Gadalla yara, Gahaara yara, Raya yara,
2.48: Ra7asoona yara, Naqooda yara, Gasaama yara,
2.49: Oza yara, Faseeha yara, Besaya yara,
2.50: Asina yara, Me7unima yara, Nifuseesima yara,
2.51: Baqibuuqa yara, Haqufa yara, Harhura yara,
2.52: Basiluuta yara, Mahida yara, Harsa yara,
2.53: Barqoosa yara, Sisaara yara, Teema yara,
2.55: Haysati di7ope simmida Solomone oosanchota yarata; Soxaya yara, Sofeereta yara, Faruuda yara,
2.56: Ya7ila yara, Darqoona yara, Gadalla yara,
2.57: Safaaxa yara, Haxeela yara, Fakiraata yara, Haxaboyma yaranne Ama yara.
2.58: Di7ope simmidi, Xoossa keethan oothiya asa yaratinne Solomone aylleta yarata tayboy 392.
2.59: Haysafe kaalleysati qassi Talmela, Telaresa, Karuba, Adaananne Imera katamatape Yerusalaame simmidosona. Shin enti woyko enta aawati Isra7eele sheeshi gideysa erisanaw enti danda7ibookona.
2.61: Kahinetape Abaya yaray, Aqoosa yaraynne Barzile yaray simmidosona. Barziley ha sunthan xeegetanaw danda7iday Galada biitta asi gidida Barzile na7iw macho ekida gishosa.
2.62: Haysati banta yeleta xaphuwa eranaw yeleta maxaafan koydosona, shin demmibookona. Hessa gisho, enti tuna geetetidi kahinetethan oothonna mela digetidosona.
2.63: Uriimeninne Tumiimen shaakidi pirdiya kahiney dendana gakanaw, enti geeshsha kathaafe maanaw danda7onaysa Ayhudeta ayseysi entaw odis.
2.64: Di7ope Yihuda simmida asaa tayboy kumethi 42,360.
2.65: Hessika 7,337 addenne macca aylleta gujunna de7ishina. Enta giddon 200 addenne macca zammaareti de7oosona.
2.68: Enti Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keetha gakida wode issi issi soo asaa halaqati Xoossa keethay kase ba bessan keexetana mela banta dosan imota immidosona.
2.69: Issoy issoy baw danda7ida mela Xoossa keetha oosuwas imota immis; imotay 500 kilo giraame worqa, 2,800 kilo giraame biranne 100 kahineta ma7o immidosona.
2.70: Hessafe guye, kahineti, Leewetinne guutha asay Yerusalaamen uttidosona; zammaareti, Xoossa keetha penge naageysatinne Xoossa keethan oothiya oosanchoti Yerusalaame yuushon de7iya katamatan uttidosona; attida asa ubbay banta katamatan katamatan uttidosona.

3.1: Laapuntha ageenan Isra7eele asay banta de7iya katamatape issi asi gididi Yerusalaame shiiqidosona.
3.2: Iyosadeqa na7aa Iyyasunne iyara oothiya kahineti, Salatiyaala na7aa Zarubaabelinne iya dabboti Xoossaa asi gidida Muse higgiyan xaafetidaysada xuussa yarsho yarshanaw, Isra7eele Xoossaas yarsho bessi giigisidosona.
3.3: He biittan de7iya asaa ixuwape dendoysan yayyikoka, yarsho bessi kase bessan keexidi, xuu yarsho Godaas ubba wode wontanne omarsi shiishidosona.
3.4: Kase xaafetidaysada Shaqara Ba7aale bonchidosona; xuussa yarsho issi issi gallas koshsheysada pacisonna yarshidosona.
3.5: Qassi ubba wode shiiqiya xuussa yarsho, ageena xeero yarshonne Godaa geeshsha ba7aaletan yarshiya yarsho ubbaa yarshidosona. Hesaa bollaka asay ba dosan Godaas immida imota ubbaa yarshidosona.
3.6: Xoossa keetha baasoy buroo doometonaba gidikoka Laapuntha ageenan koyro gallas enti Godaas xuussa yarsho shiisho doomidosona. Xoossa Keethay Zaaridi keexetis
3.7: Hessafe guye, shuchu masseysatasinne anaaxetas miishe immidi ooso oykidosona. Farse kawoy Qiroosi entaw kiitida gisho, Libaanoosape ziga abba pinthidi, Yoophe ehanaw Sidoonanne Xiroosa asaas kathi, ushshinne zayte immidosona.
3.8: Enti Yerusalaame simmida nam7antho laythan nam7antho ageenan, Salatiyaala na7ay Zarubaabeli, Iyosadeqa na7aa Iyyasuynne enta dabboti, kahineti, Leewetinne di7ope simmida asa ubbay Xoossa keetha kase bessan keexo doomidosona. Qassi Xoossa keetha oosuwa aawatethan xeellana mela laatamu laythi gididaysatanne laatamu laythafe aadhida Leeweta shuumidosona.
3.9: Leewe koche gidida Iyyasu, iya naytanne iya dabboti, Hodawa soo asi gidida Qadimi7eelinne iya nayti issife gididi, Xoossa oosuwa oosisana mela aawatethi ekidosona; Enhadada koche gidida Leeweti enta maaddidosona.
3.10: Anaaxeti Xoossa keethaa baasuwa yegethi oykiya wode, kahineti banta ma7o ma7idi moyze oykidi, Asaafa koche gidida, Leeweti daala oykidi, Isra7eele kawa Dawita wogaa mela Godaa galatanaw eqidosona.
3.11: Enti Godaa galatishenne issoy issuwa kaali kaali mazmuren sabbishe, haysada yaagidi zammaridosona. “Goday keeha; Isra7eeles de7iya iya siiqoy merinaasa” yaagidosona. Xoossa keetha baasoy yegetiya gisho, asa ubbay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi ililishe Godaa galatidosona.
3.12: Shin kase Xoossaa keetha be7ida cima kahinetape, Leewetapenne kochata halaqatape daroti ha77i Xoossa keetha keexanaw yegetida baasuwa be7ida wode banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona; harati qassi ufaytishe bonchidosona.
3.13: Oonika Ufaysa ililisaanne yeeho waasuwa shaakanaw danda7ibeenna; asay waassiya waasoy wolqaama gidiya gisho waasoy haahon si7etees.

4.1: Yihudasinne Biniyaames morke gidida asay, di7ope simmidaysati Godaas, Isra7eele Xoossas keethe keexeysa si7idosona.
4.2: Zarubaabelakonne Isra7eele yara halaqatako yidi, “Asoore kawoy Asiradooni nuna ha bessaa ehida gallasape doomidi, nuka hinte Xoossa goyinnoos, iyaw yarshoos. Hessa gisho, nuka hintera keexana” yaagidosona.
4.3: Shin Zarubaabeli, Iyyasuynne Isra7eele yara halaqati, “Nu Xoossaa keetha keexanaw nuusinne hintew gishoy baawa. Shin Farse kawoy Qiroosi kiittidaysada Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossa keetha nuuni nu xalaala keexana” yaagidosona.
4.4: Hessafe guye, he biittan de7iya asay, Yihuda asay Xoossa keetha keexonna mela ufaysi qanxisanawunne yashisanaw dendidosona.
4.5: Farse kawa Qiroosa laythafe bidi Daariyosa kawotetha gakanaw enti Yihuda asaa zoreta laallana mela ase shammidosona. Arxekisisas Xaafetida Dabdaabe
4.6: Arxekisisi kawotida wode Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaa mootanaw payle dooyidosona.
4.7: Arxekisisa kawotetha laythan, Bishilaami, Mitridaati, Xabeelinne enta bagga gididi, Farse kawa Arxekisisas dabdaabe xaafidosona; he dabdaabey Aramike pidaleninne doonan xaafetis.
4.8: Biitta aysiya Rehuuminne xaafey Simsayi Yerusalaameba haysada yaagidi, kawa Arxekisisas dabdaabe xaafidosona;
4.9: “Ha dabdaabey biitta aysiya Rehuumape, xaafiya Simsayape, Beteraplesape, Farsepe, Arkafe, Babiloonepe Suusapenne Elama biittan de7iya daynnatapenne biitta ayseysafe,
4.10: qassi gitanne bonchetida kawa Asnafaari di77idi Samaareninne Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan wothida asa ubbaafe xaafetis” yaagidosona.
4.11: Enta dabdaabey haysada yaagees; “Kawa Arxekisisas, Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan de7iya ne moorinatape yedetida dabdaabe.
4.12: “Kawaw, ne matape nuuko yida Ayhudeti Yerusalaame yidi, ha makallanne iita katamiw zaaridi keexo bolla de7eysa era. I gimbe dirsa oorathosona; I baasuwa yeggoosona; I xaphuwa minthoosona.
4.13: Hessa bolla qassi, ha katamiya keexetikonne I dirsa gimbey ooraxiko enti giiranne qaraxa qanxonnaysa era; kawo keethi geliya miishey guuxanaysa akeeka.
4.14: Nuuni kawoy shuumin ootheyisata gidiya gishonne kawoy kawuyishin be7anaw koyonna gisho haysa ne erana mela gidi odoos.
4.15: Hessa gisho, kase ne aawata taarike maxaafay koyetidi xeeleto; he xaafetidabape ha katamiya makallanne kawotasinne biittatas meto medhashe de7idaysa eranaw danda7aasa; hessa gaason iya laaletasu.
4.16: Ha katamiya keexetiyanne I dirsa gimbey ooraxiyaba gidiko, Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan de7iya biittay ne kushepe keydaysa era” yaagidosona.
4.17: Kawoy haysada giya zaaro entaw yeddis; “Biitta aysiya Rehuuma, xaafiya Simsaya, Samaareninne Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan de7iya entara issifida asaa saro gayis.
4.18: Hinte taw yeddida dabdaabey birshetidi nabbabetin si7as.
4.19: Ta kiitan, kase taarikey koyetidi xeeletiya wode, ha katamiya benipeka kawotas makallanne meto medhashe de7iya biitta gideysi eretis.
4.20: Yerusalaamen wolqaama kawoti kawotidosona; Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan de7iya Biittafeka he kawoti giiranne qaraxa ekidosona.
4.21: Hessa gisho, taani entaw ha kiita immana gakanaw, ha asati he katamiw keexeysa essana mela odite.
4.22: Hinte ha oda qelli goonna mela naagetite; kawotas meto darsanaw koshshenna” yaagidi kiittis.
4.23: Kawa Arxekisisa dabdaabey Rehuumas, xaafiya Simsayasinne entara de7iya ubbaas nabbabetida wode Yerusalaamen de7iya Ayhudetako ellesi bidi, enti keexeysa wolqan essidosona.
4.24: He wodepe doomidi Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossaa keetha oosoy Daariyosi kawotida nam7antho laythi gakanaw eqis.

5.1: He wode nam7u nabeti Haggeynne Zakaryaasi Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya Ayhude asaas Isra7eele Xoossa sunthan tinbite odidosona.
5.2: Salatiyaala na7ay Zarubaabelinne Iyosadeqa na7ay Iyyasuy dendidi, Yerusalaamen de7iya Godaa keethaa zaaridi keexanaw doomidosona. Xoossaa nabetika enta maaddishe entara de7idosona.
5.3: He wode Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan de7iya biitta aysiya Tantani, Satarbuzaninne entara de7eysati Yerusalaame yidi, “Ha keetha hinte keexana mala hintew maata immiday oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
5.4: Qassi, “Ha keetha keexiya asata sunthay oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
5.5: Shin Xoossa ayfey Yihuda cimata bolla de7iya gisho, ha oday Daariyosako gakin, dabdaabey yaana gakanaw enta oonika ooso digibenna.
5.6: Efraxiisa Shaafape hefintha biitta aysiya Tantanaya, Satarbuzaninne entara oothiya kawa Daariyosas xaafida dabdaabey haysa.
5.7: Enti iyaw yeddida dabdaabey haysada yaagidi nabbabetees. Kawa Daariyosa, saroy new gido.
5.8: Nuuni Yihuda biittan de7iya gita Xoossaa keetha bidi be7idaysa kawoy ero. He Xoossa keethay gita shuchan keexetis; gimbe tuussati keyidosona; oosoyka gita akeekaninne eeson oosetishe de7ees.
5.9: “Nuuni, Ha keetha keexana mala hintew maata immiday oonee?” yaagidi cimata oychida.
5.10: Qassi entana kaalethiya asata sunthay ooneko xaafidi nena erisanaw enta oychida.
5.11: Enti haysada yaagidi zaaridosona: “Nuuni salonne sa7a Xoossaa aylleta; nuuni daro laythafe kase gita Isra7eele kawoy keexidi polida keetha zaaridi keexoos.
5.12: Nu aawati salo Xoossaa hanqethida gisho, I enta Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora kushen aathidi immis. I ha keethaa laallis; asaa di77idi Babiloone biitta efis.”
5.13: “Shin Babiloone kawoy Qiroosi ba kawotida koyro laythan, Xoossaa keethaa zaari keexana mela awaajo kessis.
5.14: Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethaafe eki efidi, Babiloone biittan de7iya ba kawo gadhon wothida worqanne bira miishetaka Qiroosi zaaridi yeddis. He miisheti kawoy Qiroosi Yihuda biitta aysana mela doorida Sesabisaara kushen imetis.
5.15: Kawoy, ‘Ha miisheta eka efada Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethan wotha; Xoossa keethayka kase de7iya bessan keexeto’ yaagin,
5.16: Sesabisaari yidi, ‘Xoossa keethaa keexiya bessan Yerusalaamen baasis. I ha77i gakanaw wuribeenna; he wodepe doomidi, keexetishe de7ees’ ” yaagidosona.
5.17: “Hiza ha oday kawa ufaysiyaba gidiko, ane kawoy Qiroosi ha Xoossa keethaa Yerusalaamen keexana mela, tumaka awaajuwa kessidaako eranaw kase aadhida Babiloone kawota taarike mazgabey koyetidi xeeleto. Hessafe guye, kawoy ha oda waatanaw qopidaako nuna eriso” yaagidi xaafidosona.

6.1: Hessa gisho, kawoy Daariyosa kiitan, Babiloone de7iya miishe wothiya keethan de7iya taarike mazgabeta koydosona.
6.2: Meedona awurajan Ahimata kataman issi xaatha maxaafi bentis; he maxaafan xaafetidabay haysada yaagees:
6.3: “Kawoy Qiroosi ba kawotida koyro laythan, Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossaa keethaa gisho, haysada giya awaajo kessis. Xoossaa keethay yarsho shiishiya bessi gididi zaari keexeto; iya baasoyka yegeto. He keetha adussatethay usupun tammu wadha, dalgatethay usupun tammu wadha gido.
6.4: Heedzu toho gita shuchan yuushsho, issi toho mitha tuussati yuuyo. Hessas koshshiya miishe ubbay kawo shalo minjiya keethaafe imeto.
6.5: Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethaafe ekidi, Babiloone ehida Xoossa keetha worqanne bira miisheti banta bessaa guye Yerusalaame simmidi; Xoossaa keethan de7o” yaagis.
6.6: Hessafe guye, Daariyosi xaafida dabdaabey haysada yaagees. “Hinteno Efraxiisa Shaafape hefintha biitta aysiya Tatanaya, Satarbozinyanne entara ootheysato, ha Xoossa keethako shiiqopite.
6.7: Ha Xoossaa keetha oosuwas dhube gidopite. Ayhudeta halaqatinne Ayhude cimati Xoossa keetha kase bessan zaaridi keexo.”
6.8: Hessa bolla qassi, “Ha Ayhude cimati Xoossa keetha keexiya wode, enti oothiya oosoy eqonna mela entaw koshshiya miishe ubbaa Efraxiisa Shaafape hefintha biittafe shiishida kawa giira miishiyape entaw immana mela taani kiittas.
6.9: Yerusalaamen de7iya kahineti salo Xoossas xuussa yarsho yarshanaw koshshiya wofaano gidin, maraze gidin woyko dorsa urge gidin entaw immite. Qassi aybaka pacisonna enti koyiya giste, maxine, woynenne zayte entaw gallas gallas immite.
6.10: Hessa hinte immey enti salo Xoossaa ufaysiya yarsho yarshanaasanne kawuwasinne iya naytas woossanaasa.
6.11: Ha awaajuwa laammiya oonika de7iko, iya keethaa tuussaa shoddidi, he tuussaa bolla iya kaqo; iya keethayka pito yeggiya besse gido.
6.12: Ha kiita laammanaw woyko Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossaa keethaa laallanaw kushe denthiya ay kawoy woyko asi gidin, ba sunthay xeegetana mela Yerusalaame doorida Xoossay iya dhayso. Taani Daariyosi haysa kiittas. Ha ubbay minotethan poleto” yaagis. Xoossa Keethi Anjiso Ba7aale
6.13: Hessafe guye, Efraxiisa Shaafape hefintha biitta aysiya Tatanaya, Satarbuzaninne entara oothiya ubbay kawoy Daariyosi kiittidaysada minotethan oothidi polidosona.
6.14: Ayhude cimati banta oosuwa aggonna oothidosona; qassi nabey Haggeynne Ido na7ay Zakaryaasi odida qaalan minetidosona. Isra7eele Xoossay kiittidaysada Farse kawoti Qiroosi, Daariyosinne Arxekisisi awaajidaysada Xoossa keetha keexidi wursidosona.
6.15: Daariyosi kawotida usupuntho laythan Adaare geetetiya ageenan heedzantho gallasan, Xoossaa keetha oosoy poletis.
6.16: Isra7eele asay, kahineti, Leewetinne di7ope simmida asa ubbay Xoossa keethaa anjisiya ba7aale ufaysan bonchidosona.
6.17: He ba7aaley bonchetiya wode enti issi xeetu korma, nam7u xeetu maraze, oyddu xeetu dorsa urgeta yarshidosona. Qassi nagara yarshos tammanne nam7u Isra7eele kochata taybon tammanne nam7u kole yarshidosona.
6.18: Muse Maxaafan xaafetidaysada, Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossaa keethan oothana mela kahinetinne Leeweti enta maarada maarada wothidosona. Paasika Ba7aale
6.19: Di7ope simmida asay koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallas Paasika Ba7aale bonchidosona.
6.20: Kahinetinne Leeweti bantana geeshshidosona; enti ubbay wogada geeydosona. Leeweti di7ope simmida ubbaas, kahinetasinne bantaw Paasika dorse shukidosona.
6.21: Di7ope simmida Isra7eele asaynne Ayhude gidonna asay oothiya tunatethaafe bantana shaakidi, Godaako, Isra7eele Xoossaako simmida asa ubbay Paasika midosona.
6.22: Goday Asoore kawa qofa laammidi Isra7eele Godaa, Xoossa keethaa keexidi polana mela maaddida gisho, enti laapun gallas Uytha Ba7aale ufaysan bonchidosona.

7.1: Daro wodepe guye, Farse kawua Arxekisisi kawotida wode Izira geetetiya issi asi de7is. Iziri Saraya na7a; Azaara na7a; Kalqe na7a;
7.2: Saluma na7a; Saadoqa na7a; Akxuuba na7a;
7.3: Amaare na7a; Azaara na7a; Marayoota na7a;
7.4: Zaraha na7a; Oza na7a; Buqa na7a;
7.5: Abisu na7a; Finihaasa na7a; Finihaasi Alaazara na7a; kahine halaqa Aarona na7a.
7.6: Haysi Iziri Babiloonepe bis. Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay immida Muse higgiya eriya asi. Godaa, Xoossaa kushey iya bolla de7iya gisho, I oychidaba ubbaa kawoy iyaw immis.
7.7: Kawoy Arxekisisi kawotida laapuntha laythan Isra7eele asaape guuthatara, kahineti, Leeweti, zammaareti, penge naageysatinne Xoossaa keetha oosanchoti Izirara issife Yerusalaame bidosona.
7.8: Kawoy kawotida laapuntha laythan ichashantho ageenan Iziri Yerusalaame gakis.
7.9: Xoossaa lo77o kushey iya bolla de7iya gisho koyro ageenan koyro gallassi Babiloonepe keyidi, ichashantho ageenan koyro gallas Yerusalaame gakis.
7.10: Iziri Godaa higgiya xanna7on, ooso bolla peeshoninne Isra7eele asaa iya wogaanne iya higgiya tamaarsanaw ba wozanaa giigisis. Arxekisisi Iziras Xaafida Dabdaabe
7.11: Goday Isra7eeles immida higgiyanne wogga, loythi eriya kahinenne xaafe gidida Iziras kawoy Arxekisisi xaafida dabdaabey haysa.
7.12: “Kawota Kawa Arxekisisape, kahinenne salo Xoossa higge loythi eriya Iziras, saroy new gido!
7.13: “Ta kawotetha giddon de7iya Isra7eele asaape oonika, kahine woyko Leewe gidin, Yerusalaame baanaw koyiya asay neera baana mela taani kiittas.
7.14: Taaninne taara zorettiya laapun asati issife gididi, ne kushen de7iya Xoossaa higgiyada, bada Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya hanotethay ay meleko oychana mela nena kiittoos.
7.15: Yerusalaamen de7iya Isra7eele Xoossaas, taaninne taara zorettiya asati nu dosan immida worqanne bira imota ekada ba.
7.16: Hessa bolla qassi neeni Babiloone biitta kumethaafe demmida biraanne worqaa ubbaa, qassi Isra7eele asaynne kahineti Yerusalaamen de7iya banta Xoossaa keethas dosan immida imota ekada ba.
7.17: Ha miishiyan kormata, marazeta, dorsa urgetanne, katha yarshosinne ushsha yarshos koshshiyaba shammada, Yerusalaamen de7iya hinte Xoossaa keethan yarsho bessan yarsha.
7.18: “Hessafe palahida biraanne worqaa neeninne neera de7iya Ayhude gidida ne ishati hinte Xoossa shenen, hinte oothanaw koiyaba oothite.
7.19: Qassi nuuni hinte Xoossa keethaas, immida miisheta ubbaa Yerusalaame Xoossaa sinthan shiisha.
7.20: Hessafe harabay Xoossaa keethas koshshiyabay aybika de7iko, kawo miishe minjiya keethaafe ekanaw danda7aasa.
7.21: “Taani kawoy Arxekisisi Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan biittan de7iya miishe keethan aawatethay de7iya ubbatas ha kiita immas. Kahinenne Salo Xoossaa higgiya loythi eriya Iziri hintena oychiyabay ayba gidikoka iyaw immite.
7.22: Heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame bira, issi xeetu kuntaale giste, nam7u mukulu litiro woyne ushshi, nam7u mukulu litiro shamaho zaytenne koshshiya mela maxine iyaw immite.
7.23: Kawa bollanne kawa nayta kawotetha bolla hanqoy yoonna mela salo Xoossay ba keethas koyiyaba ubba immite.
7.24: Kahinetape, Leewetape, zammaaretape penge naageysatape, Xoossa keetha oosanchotapenne Xoossaa keetha giddon dumma dumma ooso oothiya asaape hinte giiranne qaraxa ekanaw hintew maati baawa.
7.25: “La Izira, neeni, new Xoossay immida cincatethan Efraxiisa Shaafape hefintha biittan de7iya ne Xoossaa higgiya eriya asaa bolla pirdana mela daynnatanne ayseysata shuuma. Higgiya eronna asi de7iko neeni enta tamaarsa.
7.26: Ne Xoossaa higgiyanne kawa higgiya kiitetonna oonika de7iko, I qadhey bayna hayqo woyko gadepe goodeto woyko iya shaloy bonqeto woyko qashon seereto” yaagis.
7.27: Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethaa haysada bonchetana mela kawa wozanan ha qofaa wothida Godaa, nu aawata Xoossaa galati gako!
7.28: Kawa, kawuwara zoreteysatanne iyara oothiya wolqaama halaqata sinthan ba teema taw immida Xoossaas galati gido! Godaa, ta Xoossaa kushey taara de7iya gisho, Isra7eele halaqatape eretidaysata doorada Yerusalaame eka baana mela I taw minotethi gidis.

8.1: Kawoy Arxekisisi kawotida wode taara issife Babiloone biittafe simmida soo asaa halaqati haysata;
8.2: Finihaasa yarape Gersoona, Itamaara yarape Daanela, Dawita yarape Sakana na7aa Haxusa,
8.3: Paroosa yarape Zakaryaasanne enta yeleta maaran xaafetida hara issi xeetanne ishatamu addeta.
8.4: Pahati-Moo7abe yarape Zaraha na7aa Eliho7enayanne iyara de7iya nam7u xeetu addeta.
8.5: Zata yarape Yahazi7eela na7a Sakananne iyara de7iya heedzu xeetu addeta.
8.6: Adina yarape Yoonataana na7aa Ebeedanne ishatamu addeta.
8.7: Elama yarape Gotola na7a Yishayanne iyara de7iya laapun tammu addeta.
8.8: Safaaxa yarape Mika7eela na7a Zibaadanne iyara de7iya hospun tammu addeta.
8.9: Iyo7aaba yarape Yi7eela na7a Abdiyunne iyara de7iya nam7u xeetanne tammanne hospun addeta.
8.10: Baana yarape Yosifiya na7a Salomitanne iyara de7iya issi xeetanne usupun tammu addeta.
8.11: Bebaya yaraape Bebaya na7aa Zakariyasanne iyara de7iya laatamanne hospun addeta,
8.12: Azgada yarape Haqaxaana na7a Yohaananne iyara de7iya issi xeetanne tammu addeta.
8.13: Adonqaama yarape wursethan simmidaysati, Elfalaxa, Yi7u7eela, Shamayanne entara de7iya usupun tammu addeta.
8.14: Bigiwaya yarape Utaya, Zakuranne entara issife hara laapun tammu addeta.
8.15: Taani Ahawako goggiya shaafa matan enta shiishas. Nuuni he bessan dunkaanidi, heedzu gallas takida. Taani he bessan de7iya asaanne kahineta taybiya wode Leewe yarape issi asika demmabike.
8.16: Hessa gisho, Alaazara, Ar7eela, Shamaya, Elnaatana, Yariba, Elnaatana, Naatana, Zakaryaasanne Masulaama geeteteysatanne cinca asi gidida Yoyaaribanne Elnaatana xeegas.
8.17: Enta Kasfiya geetetiya bessan Leewetas halaqanne Xoossa keetha oosancho gidida Adosinne iya dabotas odanaba akeekisada nu Xoossa keethan oothiya ase ehana mela kiittas.
8.18: Nu Xoossa lo77o kushey nu bolla de7iya gisho, Isra7eele na7a Leewe yara Mahila yaranne daro cinca asi gidida Sarebaya geetetiya addiya tammanne hospun iya naytanne iya ishata, nuus yeddidosona.
8.19: Hessadaka, Hashaba, Maraara yara gidida Yashaya, iya naytanne laatamu gidiya iya ishatara yeddidosona.
8.20: Hessa bolla kase aawati Leeweta maaddana mela Dawitanne iyara oothiya halaqati shuumida Xoossa keetha oosanchotape nam7u xeetanne laatamu asata yeddidosona. Hessati ubbay banta sunthan xaafetidosona.
8.21: Nu Xoossaa sinthan nu huuphiya kawushidi, ogey nuus, nu naytasinne nu shalo ubbaas saro gidana mela woossana mela yan Ahawa Shaafa matan xooma awaajas.
8.22: Kase nuuni kawas, “Nu Xoossaa lo77o kushey iya koyeyisata bolla de7ees; shin iya wolqaama hanqoy iya aggeyisata bolla de7ees” yaagidi odida gisho, nuuni biya ogiyan de7iya morketape nuna naagana mela wotaadarenne parata immanaada kawa oychanaw yeellatas.
8.23: Hessa gisho, nuuni xoomidi, Xoossa woossida; ika nu woosa si7is.
8.24: Kahine halaqatape Sarebaya, Hasabayanne hara enta dabbo gidida tammu asata dooras.
8.25: Kawoy, iyara zoreteysati, iya shuumatinne Isra7eele ubbay nu Xoossaa keethas immida bira, worqanne, hara miisheta ubbaa likada enta kushen wothas.
8.26: Taani entaw immidabay haysa; laatamanne nam7u mukulu kilo giraame bira, heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame birape oosetida miisheta, heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame worqa,
8.27: hospun kilo giraamenne oyddu xeetu giraame worqafe oosetida laatamu saanetanne worqada al7onne muruuto gidida naase biratape oosetida nam7u saaneta.
8.28: Hessafe guye, taani entako haysada yaagas; “Hintenne ha miisheti Godaas dummatideta; ha biraynne worqay, asay ba dosan Godaas, hinte aawata Xoossaas immida imota.
8.29: Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethan miishe minjiya keethaa gakidi, kahine halaqata sinthan, Leeweta sinthaninne Isra7eele yarata halaqata sinthan immana gakanaw, ha miisheta loythidi naagite” yaagas.
8.30: Hessa gisho, kahinetinne Leeweti Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethi efanaw bira, worqanne hara miisheta ubbaa mizaanen likidi aawatethan ekidosona.
8.31: Koyro ageenan tammanne nam7antho gallasan Yerusalaame baanaw Ahawa Shaafa matape dendida. Nu bolla de7iya nu Xoossaa lo77o kushey nu biya ogen de7iya morketapenne pangatape nuna ashshis.
8.32: Nuuni Yerusalaame gakidi, yan heedzu gallas shempida.
8.33: Oyddantho gallas bira, worqanne hara miisheta ubbaa likidi, Uraya na7aa kahiniya Maremootas immida. Finihaasa na7aa Alaazari, Leewe gidida Iyyasu na7aa Yozabaatinne Biniya na7a No7aadi iyara issife de7oosona.
8.34: Ubbabay he wode taybeti liketidi xaafetis.
8.35: Hessafe guye, di7ope simmida asay, Isra7eele Xoossaas, tammanne nam7u korma, uddufun tammanne usupun marazenne laapun tammanne laapun dorsa urgeta xuussa yarsho oothidi, qassi tammanne nam7u kole nagara yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshidosona. Hessi ubbay xuussa yarsho gididi Godaas shiiqis.
8.36: Kawoy kiitida kiittaka kawuwape garsara biitta ayseysatasinne Efraxiisa Shaafape hefintha biitta ayseysatas immidosona; enti Isra7eele asaanne Xoossa keethaa oosuwa maaddidosona.

9.1: Ha ubbay hanidaape guye, deriya kaaletheysati taako yidi, haysada yaagidosona; “Isra7eele asay, hari attoshin, kahineti, Leeweti, banta heeran de7iya, Kanaaneta, Hiteta, Parzeta, Yaabuseta, Amooneta, Moo7abeta, Gibxetanne Amooreta tunaape bantana shaakibookona.
9.2: Bantawunne banta naytas Ayhude gidonna macca naytape macho ekidosona; hessa gaason geeshsha zeretha Ayhude gidonna asaara walakidosona. Ha balan koyro gididay kaaletheysatanne halaqata” yaagidosona.
9.3: Taani ha oda si7ida wode ta ma7uwanne ta qamisiya daakas; ta huuphiyanne ta buuchaa sikas; daro dagammada utta aggas.
9.4: Di7ope simmida asay oothida nagaraa gisho, Isra7eele Xoossay odida qaalas yayyida asa ubbay taani de7iya bessaa taako shiiqidosona. Omarsa yarsho yarshiya wode gakanaw dagammada uttida bessaafe dendabike.
9.5: Shin omarsa yarshoy shiiqiya wode, ta ma7oynne ta qamisey daaketidi de7ishin, taani azzanada uttida bessaafe dendas. Gulbatada Godaako, ta Xoossaako, ta kushiya denthada, haysada yaagada woossas.
9.6: “Abeeti ta Xoossaw, nu nagaray dooretidi nu huuphiyape aadhida gishonne nu naaqoy salo gakida gisho taani ta som7uwa neeko denthanaw yayyaysinne yeellatayis.
9.7: Nuuni nu mayzata wodepe doomin, hachi gakanaw, nena daro naaqida. Nu nagaraa gaason nuuni, nu kawotinne nu kahineti ha77iysada allaga kawota kushen kundida; mashshas, do7os, bonqeesinne yeellas aadhidi imetida.
9.8: “Shin ha77i Goday nu Xoossay nuupe guutha asi ashshanawunne ba keethan nuus besse immanaw koyidi guutha wodes marotethi immis. Hessa gisho Xoossay nu ayfiya dooyis; nu aylletethan de7ishin guutha wodes shempo immis.
9.9: Nuuni aylle gidikoka, nu Xoossay nuna aylletethan aggibeenna; nu de7uwa oorathis. Nu Xoossaa keethaa keexana mela, laaletidaysa oorathana melanne Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen saro daana mela Farse kawota sinthan nuus teemo immis.
9.10: “Shin nu Xoossaw, ha77i yaatin, nuuni woyganee? Heko ha77ika ne kiita toochida.
9.11: Nu toochiday ne aylle gidida nabeta baggara ‘Hinte laattanaw geliya biittay, in de7iya asan tunidaaro; ha gaxape hini gaxaa gakanaw enta iita oosuwaninne tunatethan kumasu.
9.12: Hessa gisho, hinte mino gidana mela, he biitta ayfiya maana melanne merinaw hinte naytas laatisana mela, hinte macca nayta enta adde naytas immofite; enta macca nayta hinte adde naytas ekofite. Enti sarotethaninne duretethan daana mela amottofite’ yaagadasa.
9.13: “Nu bolla gakida iitaba ubbay nu iita oosuwanne nu gita nagara gaasona. Gidoshin, neeni nu Xoossay nu nagara darotethaa mela nuna pirdabaaka; shin nuupe guuthata ashshadasa.
9.14: Nuuni haysa mela tunabaa oothiya asaara ekoninne gelon walaketidi, waanidi ne kiita ixas gaanee? Ha attida guutha kochay dhayana gakanaw ne hanqoy nu bolla dareneyee?
9.15: Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, neeni xillo; nuuni ha77i gakanaw attidi de7on de7oos. Nu nagaraa gaason nuupe issoyka ne sinthan eqanaw danda7ey baawa; attidaysati hachi haysan ne sinthan de7oos” yaagas.

10.1: Iziri Xoossa keetha sinthan kundidi yeekishe woossiya wodenne nagaraa paaxiya wode macci, addeynne na7i de7iya Isra7eele asay iyako shiiqidi, yibbata yeeho iyara yeekidosona.
10.2: Elama yara gidida Yi7eela na7ay Sakan haysada yaagis; “Nuuni nu yuushon de7iya allaga maccasata ekidi, nu Xoossaas ammanetiboko. Gidoshin, ha77ika Isra7eeles ufaysi de7ees.
10.3: Ta godaw, neeninne nu Xoossa kiita naageysati zoridaysada nuuni ha maccasaanne entafe yeletida nayta ubbaa yeddanaw qaala geloos. Hessi ubbay Godaa higgey geysada poleto.
10.4: Izira ha oosoy ne kushen de7ees, denda; nuuni nena maaddana; minna!” yaagis.
10.5: Iziri dendi eqidi, kahineta, Leewetanne Isra7eele asaa ubbaa ha geetetidaysata oothana mela caaqisis; entika caaqidosona.
10.6: Iziri Xoossa keetha sinthafe dendidi, Eliyaseeba na7ay Yohaani de7iya kifile gelis. Yan di7ope simmida asay nagaras yeekishe aqida gisho, he bessan kathi mibeenna; haatheka uybeenna.
10.7: Di7ope simmida asay Yerusalaame shiiqana mela, Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen awaajidosona.
10.8: Ha heedzu gallasata giddon he bessan shiiqonna oonika de7iko, iyaw de7iyabay ubbay eketana melanne ika di7ope simmida asa shiiquwape kurettana mela halaqatinne cimati oda kuuyidosona.
10.9: He geetetida heedzu gallasata giddon, uddufuntho ageenan laatamantho gallasan Yihudanne Biniyaame asa ubbay Yerusalaame shiiqidosona. Ha deexo odaanne wolqaama ira gaason, kokorishe, Xoossaa keetha sinthan de7iya dabaaban uttidosona.
10.10: Kahine Iziri dendiidi haysada yaagis; “Hinte ammanetonna ixideta; allaga maccasata macho ekidi, Isra7eele naaquwa bolla naaqo gujideta.
10.11: Hinte nagara Godaas, hinte aawata Xoossas paaxite; iya ufaysiyaba oothite. He biittan de7iya Ayhude gidonna asaapenne hinte ekida Ayhude gidonna hinte machetape shaaketite” yaagis.
10.12: Shiiqida asay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, haysada yaagidosona. “Ne giyaba ubba nuuni oothana!
10.13: Shin haysan shiiqida asay daro; hessa bolla wolqaama iri bukees. Nuuni irape attiya bessi haysan baawa. Ha nagaran qohida asay daro gidida gisho, issi gallasan woyko nam7u gallasan ha oda polanaw danda7oko.
10.14: Ha shiiqida asaa sunthan nu halaqati Yerusalaamen gam7idi, koshshiyaba ootho. Hessa gaason dendada Xoossaa wolqaama hanqoy nuupe simmana gakanaw, nu katamatan de7iya Ayhude gidonna maccasata ekida ubbay keerida qamman katamata cimatinne daynnatara issife Yerusalaame yo.
10.15: Asaheela na7ay Yoonataaninne Tequwa na7ay Yahizi enta qofaa phalqidosona; Masulaaminne Leewe gidida Sabati entana maaddidosona” yaagidosona.
10.16: Di7ope simmida asay gidaysada oothidosona. Kahiney Iziri ubba kochatape halaqata dooridi, ubbaa enta sunthan sunthan xaafis. Tammantho ageenan koyro gallasan halaqati oda pilgidi be7o doomidosona.
10.17: Koyro ageenan koyro gallasay gakanaw, Ayhude gidonna maccasata ekida asata ubbaa pilgidi wursidosona. Allaga Macho Ekida Asata
10.18: Kahine kochata giddofe allaga maccasata ekidaysati haysata; Iyosadeqa na7a Iyyasu kochatapenne iya ishata giddofe Ma7iseya, Alaazara, Yaribanne Godoliya.
10.19: Enti banta macheta yeddanaw qaala gelidosona; banta nagara gisho, wudiyape issi issi maraze naaqo yarsho oothidi yarshidosona.
10.20: Imera yarape Allaga macheta ekidaysati Hanaananne Zabada.
10.21: Harima yarape Ma7iseya, Eeliyaasa, Shamaya, Yi7eelanne Ooziya.
10.22: Paskora yarape Eliyo7anaya, Ma7iseya, Isma7eela, Natina7eela, Yozabaatanne Elsi.
10.23: Leewetape, Yozabaata, Same7a, Qalixa geetetiya Qelaya, Fataya, Yihudanne Alaazara.
10.24: Zammaaretape, Eliyaseeba. Penge naageysatape, Saluma, Xelemanne Ure.
10.25: Isra7eeletape, Faroosa yarape Ramiya, Yizaya, Malkiya, Mayamina, Alaazara, Malkiyanne Banaya.
10.26: Elama yarape Mataana, Zakaryaasa, Yi7eela, Abda, Yiremootanne Ela.
10.27: Zata yarape Eliyo7ana, Eliyaseeba, Mataana, Yiremoota, Zabadanne Aziiza.
10.28: Babaya yarape Yohaana, Hanaana, Zabayanne Atilaya.
10.29: Baana yarape Masulaama, Maluka, Adaya, Yasuuba, Shaalanne Yiremoota.
10.30: Pahati-Moo7aba yarape Adina, Kalala, Banaya, Ma7iseya, Mataana, Basili7eela, Binuyanne Minaase.
10.31: Karima yarape Alaazara, Yisheya, Malkiya, Shamaya, Simoona,
10.33: Hasuma yarape Mataana, Mataata, Zabada, Elfalaxa, Yeremaya, Minaasenne Same7a.
10.43: Nabo yarape Yi7eela, Matita, Zabada, Zabina, Yadaya, Iyyu7eelanne Banaya.
10.44: Ha ubbay Ayhude gidonna macheta ekidaysata; issoti issoti na7aka yelidosona.

1.1: Hakaliya na7aa Nahime qaalay haysa. Arxekisisi Farse biittan kawotin laatamantho laythan, Kisile geetetiya ageenan, taani Nahimey waanna katama gidiya Suusan de7ayis.
1.2: Ta ishatape issoy, Hanaani, hara asatara issife Yihudape taako yin, taani Yerusalaamebanne Babiloone di7etonna attida Ayhudetaba enta oychas.
1.3: Enti zaaridi, “Babiloone di7etonna attida asaynne di7etidi simmida Ayhudeti gita metoninne kawushan de7oosona. Yerusalaame gimbe dirsay laaletis qassi gimbiya pengeti taman xuugetidosona” yaagidosona.
1.4: Ta haysa ubbaa si7ida wode uttada yeekas. Daro gallas azzanoninne xooman salo Xoossaa haysada yaagada woossas.
1.5: “Abeeti Godaw, salo Xoossaw, gitaw, bonchetidayso, nena doseysatasinne ne kiita naageysatas ne merina siiqo caaquwa naagasa.
1.6: Taani ne aylley, ne aylle gidida Isra7eele asaa gisho qammanne gallas woossiya woosa si7anaw ne haythay hayzo; ne ayfey tana xeello. Nu Isra7eele asay oothida nagaraa ubbaa new paaxayis; tuma taaninne ta mayzati nena naaqida.
1.7: Nuuni ne bolla daro iita nagara oothida; neeni ne aylliya Muse baggara nuus immida kiitaa, wogaanne higgiya naagibooko.
1.8: Ne aylliya Muses ne odida qaala hayyana qopa; neeni, ‘Hinte taw ammanetona ixiko, taani hintena Ayhude gidonna biittatan laallana.
1.9: Shin hinte taako simmidi, ta kiita naagiko, hinte hari attoshin sa7aa gaxaa gakanaw laaletikoka, ta sunthay xeegetana mela doorida bessaa zaarada ehana’ gidaysa qopa.
1.10: “Neeni ne gita wolqaaninne ne mino qesiyan woza ekida ne aylletanne ne asata.
1.11: Abeeti Godaw, taani ne aylley woossiya woosaanne nena bonchanaw dosiya, ne aylleta woosa ne haythay si7o. Ta ne aylley hachi oothanaw koyidabay taw ushacanaada, kawa sinthan taw saba imma” yaagas. Taani he wode kawas woyne ushsha tigiya asi.

2.1: Arxekisisi kawotida laatamantho laythan, Nisaane geetetiya ageenan, issi gallas kawa sinthan woyne ushsha shiishas. He gallasepe attishin, kase kawa sinthan azzana erike.
2.2: Hessa gisho, kawoy, “Nena sakiyabay baawa, shin haysa mela ayis azzanadii? Hessi ne wozanay issiban azzanidaysa bessees” yaagis. Yaagin, taani daro yayyada, kawako,
2.3: “Kawoy merinaw kawoto! Ta mayzati moogetida katamay laaletidi dhayin, qassi he katamaa dirsa pengeti taman xuugetin ayis azzanikina?” yaagas.
2.4: Kawoy zaaridi, “Yaatin, ha77i ta new ay oothana mela koyay?” yaagis. Taani salo Xoossaa woossa simmada,
2.5: kawako, “Kawaw, ta ne sinthan saba demmidaba gidikonne ta oyshay ufaysiyabaa gidiko, Yihuda biitta, ta mayzati moogetida katamaa bada zaara keexana mela tana yeddarki” yaagas.
2.6: He wode kawiya, Kawa Arxekisisa matan uttida de7ishin, kawoy zaaridi, “Ne ogey ay mela wode ekanee? Ne awude simmanee?” yaagidi tana oychis. Taani ta simmana wodiya iyaw odin, kawoy ufaytidi tana yeddis.
2.7: Qassi, “Kawa, nena ufaysiyabaa gidiko, ta Yihuda gakanaw he biittara kanthada aadhana mela Efraxiisa shaafape wuloha baggara de7iya biitta haareysatas dabdaabey xaafeto” yaagada kawa woossas.
2.8: Hessadaka, “Xoossa keetha pengiya giigisanaw, katamaa gimbe dirsaa diranawunne ta daana keethaa keexanaw taw mithi immana mela kawo wora naagiya Asaafas dabdaabey xaafeto” yaagada oychas. Xoossaa lo77o kushey taara de7iya gisho kawoy taani oychidaba ubba immis.
2.9: Kawoy taara guutha toora moconatanne para toggeyisata yeddis. Taani entara issife Efraxiisa shaafape wuloha bagga biitta gakada kawoy yeddida dabdaabiya he biitta haareysatas immas.
2.10: Shin Horoona katama asi gidida Sanbalaaxinne Amoone biitta halaqa gidida Xoobbey, “Isra7eele asaas lo77oba oothiya asi yis” geetetidaysa si7ida wode daro yilotidosona. Nahimey Yerusalaame Gimbe dirsa Be7is
2.11: Taani Yerusalaame gakada heedzu gallas yan gam7as.
2.12: Yerusalaames taani oothana mela Xoossay ta wozanan wothida qofaa oodeska odabike. Hessafe guye, taara de7iya asaape guuthata ekada qamma dendada bas. He wode taani toggida mehiyape hara toga mehey nuus baawa.
2.13: Taani bilahe dendada Zangaara Pengiyara kanthada, Dawe Pulto geetetiya bessaara aadhada, Pito Penge geetetiya bessaa gakanaw bas. Yaara aadhashe laaletida Yerusalaame gimbiyanne taman xuugetida gimbe pengeta be7as.
2.14: Hessafe simmada Pulto Pengiyakonne kawa teqe haathay de7iya bessaa bas. Gidoshin, ta toggida mehey aadhiya oge demmabike.
2.15: Hessa gisho, qamma Qediroona Zangaara giddora aadhada gimbiya be7as. Wursethan, guye simmada Zangaara Pengiyara katamaa gelas.
2.16: Yan de7iya halaqatape oonika taani awu bidaako, woyko ay oothidaako eribeenna. Ayis giiko, taani Ayhudetas, kahinetas, bonchetida asatas, halaqatasinne oosuwa oothanaw de7iya asaape oodeska ta qofaa odabike.
2.17: Hessefe guye, entako, “Nuuni ay mela meton de7iyako be7eeta; Yerusalaame katamay laaletis; gimbe pengeti taman xuugetidosona. Ha yiite, Yerusalaame gimbiya zaaridi gimboos; nuna gakida yeella ane diggoos” yaagas.
2.18: Qassi Xoossaa lo77o kushey taara de7eysanne kawoy taw odidaba ubbaa entaw odas. Enti zaaridi, “Ane dendoos; zaaridi gimboos” yaagidi banta kushiya lo77o oosos minthidosona.
2.19: Shin Horoona katamaa asi gidida Sanbalaaxi, Amoone biitta asi gidida Xoobeynne Araba biitta asi gidida Geesamey hessa si7ida wode, nu bolla qelqisidi miicidosona. “Haysi hinte oothiyabay ayibee? Woyko kawa bolla makallanaw koyeetii?” yaagidi oychidosona.
2.20: Taani zaarada, “Salo Xoossay nuna polisana; nuuni iya aylleti dendidi oothana. Shin Yerusalaamen hintew gishoy woyko hintena gathiyabay woyko hintena qofisiyabay baawa” yaagas.

3.1: Kahine halaqay Eliyaseebinne hara kahineti Dorsa Pengiya zaari gimbidi Xoossas dummayidosona; sanqa aathidosona. Enti Xeeta geetetiya gimbe shakuwafe bidi Hanaani7eela geetetiya gimbe shakuwa gakanaw gimbidi Xoossas dummayidosona.
3.2: Enta lanqen de7iya bessaa Iyaarko asay gimbin, kaallidi de7eysa Imira na7ay Zakuri gimbis.
3.3: Hasinaa7a nayti Molo Pengiya gimbidosona. Enti gobane essidi, sanqa aathidosona; sanqa gordiya kasuwanne kasuwa gelsiya sagaayuwa giigisidosona.
3.4: Enta kaallidi de7iya bessaa Haqooxa na7a gidida Uraya na7ay Maremooti gimbis. Iyape kaallidi de7iya bessaa Masezabeela na7a Baraka na7ay Masulaami gimbis. Iyape kaallidi de7iya bessaa Ba7ana na7ay Saadoqi gimbis.
3.5: Iya matan de7iya bessaa Taqoha katamaa asati gimbidosona. Shin he katamaa halaqati bantaw imetida oosuwa oothonna ixidosona.
3.6: Paseha na7ay Yodaaheynne Baasodiya na7ay Masulaami Gal7a Pengiya gimbidosona. Enti gobane essidi, sanqa aathidosona; sanqa gordiya kasuwanne kasuwa gelsiya sagaayuwa giigisidosona.
3.7: Enta lanqen de7iya bessaa Gaba7oona katamaa asi gidida Malaaxinne Meronoota katamaa asi gidida Yadooni gimbidosona. Gaba7oonanne Mixipha katamaa asay entara issife gididi, Efraxiisa shaafape wuloha bagga biitta haareysi de7iya keethaa gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbidosona.
3.8: Worqa sheeshiya Harihaya na7ay Uzi7eeli enta matan de7iya bessaa gimbis. Qassi iya matan de7iya bessaa shitto oothiya Hanaani gimbis. Enti nam7ay issife Yerusalaame Dalga Gimbiya geetetiya bessaa gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbidosona.
3.9: Enta matan de7iya bessaa Huura na7ay, Yerusalaame woradaas baggaa haariya Rafayi gimbis.
3.10: Haruma na7ay Yadayi ba keethaafe sintha baggara de7iya bessaa gimbis. Iya matan de7iya bessaa Asebaana na7ay Hatushi gimbis.
3.11: Harima na7ay Malkeynne Pahati-Moo7aba na7ay Hashubi iya matan de7iya bessaanne Itoone Shako gimbiya gimbidosona.
3.12: Enta matan de7iya bessaa Haloheesa na7ay, Yerusalaame woradaas nam7antho baggaa haariya Saluminne iya macca nayti gimbidosona.
3.13: Hanuninne Zanoha kataman de7iya asay issife Zangaara Pengiya gimbidosona. Enti gobane essidi, sanqa aathidosona; sanqa gordiya mithaanne mithaa gelsiya sagaayuwa giigisidosona. Pito Pengiya gakanaw issi mukulu wadha adussa gimbiya gujidi gimbidosona.
3.14: Rakaaba na7ay, Beet-Hakareema woradaa haariya Malkey Pito Pengiya gimbis. Enti gobane essidi, sanqa aathidosona; sanqa gordiya kasuwanne kasuwa gelsiya sagaayuwa giigisidosona.
3.15: Kolihaaza na7ay, Mixipha woradaa haariya Salumi Pulto Pengiya zaaridi gimbis. I pengiyas kama giigisidi sanqa aathis; sanqa gordiya kasuwanne kasuwa gelsiya sagaayuwa giigisis. Qassi, Selaha teqe haathay de7iya baggara kawa atakilte bessaafe doomidi, Dawita Katamaape dugethe wodhisiya dethaa gakanaw de7iya gimbiya gimbis.
3.16: Beet-Xura woradaas baggaa haariya Azibuuqe na7ay Nahimey gimbis. I Dawita duufuwape sintha baggara de7iya bessaa gakanaw, asi oothida teqe haathay de7iya bessaa gakanaw, olanchota keethaa gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbis.
3.17: Haysafe kaalleysa Baana na7aa Rehuuma aawatetha garsan de7iya Leeweti gimbidosona. Enta matan de7iya bessaa Qi7aala woradaas baggaa haariya Hashabi ba woradaa sunthan gimbis.
3.18: Iyape kaallidi Henadaada na7ay, Qi7aala woradaas nam7antho bagga haariya Bawi gimbidosona.
3.19: Enta matan de7iya bessaa Iyyasu na7ay, Mixipha woradaa haariya Ezeri gimbis. I ola miishe wothiya keethaafe sintha baggara gimbiya maazaniya gakanaw de7iya bessa gimbis.
3.20: Iyape kaalleysa Zabaya na7ay Baaroki, gimbiya maazaniyape bidi, kahine halaqaa Eliyaseeba keethaa pengiya gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbis.
3.21: Iyape kaalleysa Haqooxa na7aa gidida Uraya na7ay Maremooti Eliyaseeba keetha pengiyafe doomidi, wursethi gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbis.
3.22: Iyape kaallidi de7eysa heeran de7iya kahineti gimbidosona.
3.23: Entafe kaallidi Biniyaameynne Hashubi banta keethaa sinthan de7iya bessaa gimbidosona. Entafe kaallidi Ananiya na7a gidida Ma7iseya na7ay Azaari ba keethaa sinthan de7iya bessaa gimbis.
3.24: Iyape kaallidi Azaara keethaafe bidi, gimbiya maazaniya gakanaw de7iya bessaa Henadaada na7ay Benuyi gimbis.
3.25: Uzaya na7ay Palali gimbiya maazaniyape doomidi, I naageysata dabaaba matan de7iya qommo bagga kawo gadho naago gimbiya gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbis. Iyape kaallidi de7eysa Paanose na7ay Padaynne
3.26: Ofeela deriya bolla de7iya Xoossa keethaa aylleti gimbidosona. Enti Haatha Pengiya matan doloha baggan de7iya bessaanne naago gimbiya gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbidosona.
3.27: Entafe kaallidi Taqoha katamaa asay gimbiya sinthan de7iya bessaafe bidi, Ofeela matan de7iya gimbiya gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbidosona.
3.28: Para Pengiyafe qommo baggan, banta keethaa sinthan de7iya bessaa kahineti gimbidosona.
3.29: Entafe kaallidi Imera na7ay Saadoqi ba keethaa sinthan de7iya bessaa gimbis. Iyape kaallidi Doloha Pengiya naagiya Sakana na7ay Shamayey gimbis.
3.30: Iyape kaallidi Salama na7ay Hananinne Zalafa usupuntho na7a gidida Hanunra gimbidosona. Entafe kaallidi Baraka na7ay Masulaami ba kifiliyape sinthan de7iya bessaa gimbis.
3.31: Iyape kaallidi Xomooso Pengiya sinthan de7iya Xoossa keetha oosanchotanne zal7anchota keethaa gakanaw de7iya bessaa worqa sheeshiya Malkey gimbis. Qassi I gimbe maazaniyas bolla baggara de7iya bessaaka gimbis.
3.32: Maazaniyas qommo bagga kifiliyapenne Dorsa Pengiyafe giddon de7iya bessaa worqa sheesheysatinne zal7anchoti gimbidosona.

4.1: Nuuni dirsa gimbe oosuwa doomidaysa Sanbalaaxi si7ida wode yilo eexidi nuna leqis.
4.2: Ba laggetanne Samaare olanchota sinthan, “Ha pathonna Ayhudeti ay oothanaw qopoona? Dirsa gimbiya zaari gimbanaw koyoonayee? Yarsho yarshanaw koyoonayee? Enti issi gallasan oosuwa oothidi wursana daanii? Enti gimbees haniya shuchata xuugetidi dooretidaysa giddofe kessanaw danda7oona?” yaagis.
4.3: Iya matan eqida Amoone biitta asi gidida Xoobbey, “Enti waanida gimbe gimbanaw danda7oona? Enti gimbiya bolla workani keyako laaletana” yaagidi leqis.
4.4: Taani haysada yaagada woossas; “Nu Xoossaw, enti nuna waati leqisiyako, haysa be7a! Enti nuna cayiya cashshay entaw gido. Banta aquwa bonqetidi allaga biittan di7etida asi gido.
4.5: Enti gimbeyisata cashshan kawushida gisho, enta naaqoy geemmofo; enta nagaraa ne sinthafe quchofa” yaagas.
4.6: Nuuni gimbiya oosuwa qanxonna oothida. Asay oosuwa minni oothida gisho gimbiya oosoy ellesidi bagga gakis.
4.7: Sanbalaaxi, Xoobbey, Arabe asay, Amoone asaynne Ashdooda asay Yerusalaame gimbe oosoy lo77o oosetishe de7eysanne dooya bessati gordetidaysa si7ida wode daro yilotidosona.
4.8: Hessa gisho enti issife Yerusalaame yidi nuna olanawunne meto medhanaw maqetidosona.
4.9: Shin nuuni nu Xoossaa woossida; enta teqanaw qammanne gallas naageysata wothida.
4.10: He wode Yihuda asay, “Toohoy nuna daabursis; buroo dendanaw koshshiya dooretida daro shuchi de7ees; yaaniya gisho, nuuni gimbiya gimbanaw danda7oko” yaagidosona.
4.11: Nu morketi, “Enti nu oothiyaba eranaapenne be7anaape sinthe nu enta giddo gelidi enta wodhana; enta oosuwaka essana” yaagidosona.
4.12: Nu morketa heeran de7iya Ayhudeti tamma simmidi nu morketi nuna ubba baggara olanaw giigetoysa nuus odidosona.
4.13: Hessa gisho, nu asaape mashshe, tooranne donge oykida asaa enta soo asan asan giigisada oosoy wuriboona heeran gimbiyas guyera garsa baggan naagana mela oothas.
4.14: Asay daggamidaysa taani be7ida wode denda eqada, asaako, enta kaaletheysatakonne halaqatako, “Nu morketa yayyofite! Gitaanne yashshiya Xoossaa qopite. Hinte ishatas, hinte adde naytasinne macca naytas, hinte machetasinne hinte keethaas oletite” yaagas.
4.15: Nu morketi nuna qohanaw maqetidaysa nuuni eridaysa enti si7idosona. Qassi Xoossay enta maquwa hada kessidaysa akeekidosona. Hessafe guye, nu ubbay simmidi, gimbe oosuwa doomida.
4.16: He wodepe doomidi ta asaape baggay oosuwa oothiya wode, baggay xurure ma7idi, toora, gondallenne donge oykidi naagana mela oothas. Qassi halaqati Yihuda asa ubbaafe guyera eqidi minthethoosona;
4.17: gimbiya gimbeysatinne koshshiyaba tookeysati issi kushen ola miishe oykidi, issi kushen ooso oothosona.
4.18: Gimbiya oothiya issoy issoy mashshe ba xeessan dancidi de7ees. Moyze punneysi ubba wode taape shaaketidi erenna.
4.19: Kaaletheysatako, halaqatakonne asa ubbaako, “Gimbiya oosoy gitanne dalga gidiya gisho nuuni issoy issuwafe haakidi de7oos.
4.20: Hessa gisho, hinte moyze puno si7iya wode he bessaa taako haa shiiqite. Nu Xoossay nu gisho oletana” yaagas.
4.21: Hessa gisho, wonta gontey zo7o wadhiya wodepe doomidi omarsi xoolintoy keyana gakanaw baggay oothiya wode baggay toora oykidi naagees.
4.22: He wode taani asaako, “Qamma nuna naaganawunne gallas oosuwa oothanaw hinte ubbay hintena maaddeysatara Yerusalaamen aqite” yaagas.
4.23: Tana gidin, ta ishata gidin, ta asaa gidin, woyko tana naageysata gidin, nu ubbay nu ma7uwa kessonna aqoos; nu ola miishey nuupe shaaketenna.

5.1: Issi wode addetinne enta macheti banta koche gidida Ayhudeta bolla waassidosona.
5.2: Entafe issoti issoti, “Nuus, daro adde naytinne macca nayti de7iya gisho nu shempuwa ashshanaw nuus kathi koshshees” yaagidosona.
5.3: Harati qassi, “Nuna gakida iita koshaape dendoysan kathi demmana gidi, nu goshsha gadiya, nu woyne gadiyanne nu keethaa oythida” yaagidosona.
5.4: Qassi attidaysati, “Kawo giira giiranaw miishe dhayidi nu goshsha gadiyanne nu woyne bessaa oythidi miishe tal7ida.
5.5: Ayhude kochatara nuuni issi ashonne issi suuthi; nu nayti enta nayta mela. Shin nuuni nu yelida nayta aylletethas aathidi immanaw un7etida; nu macca naytape issoti issoti aylletethas bayzetidosona. Nu goshshanne nu woyne gadiya nuupe eketida gisho nu wolqa dhayida” yaagidosona.
5.6: Taani enta waasuwanne oysha si7ida wode daro yilotas.
5.7: Ta wozanan oothanaba qopidaape guye, kaaletheysatanne halaqata xeegada, “Hinte, hinte ishatas yelora tal7ishe un7etheeta” yaagada enta kaccas. He metuwaba entara odetanaw deriya shiishada,
5.8: “Ayhude gidonaysatas bayzetida Ayhude koche gidida nu ishata wozanaw nuus danda7etidaba ubbaa oothida. Shin hinte isha gidida Ayhudeti banta koche gidida hintew, bantana bayzana mela ootheeta; nu enta zaari wozanaw koshshees” yaagas. Kaaletheysati zaaranaba dhayidi si77i gidoosona.
5.9: Taani kaallada, “Hinte oothiyabay woga gidenna; Ayhude gidonna nu morketi nuna qelqisonna mela hinte nu Xoossaas yayyanawunne suureba oothanaw bessennee?
5.10: Taani, ta ishatinne ta oosanchoti asaas miishenne kathi tal7ida; gidoshin, entafe yelo ekeysi atto.
5.11: Enta goshsha, woynenne shamaho zayte gadiyanne keethaa ubbaa entaw zaarite. Qassi miishepe, kathafe, woynepenne zaytepe hinte entafe ekida xeetape issi kushe yelo ekidaysa elle zaarite” yaagas.
5.12: Enti zaaridi, “Nuuni ekidaba ubbaa entaw guye zaarana; enti nuupe tal7idaysa zaaro gidi achoko; ne nuna kiitidaysada oothana” yaagidosona. Taani kahineta taako xeegada kaaletheysati banta gida qaala polana mela caaqisanaada oothas.
5.13: Taani ta ma7uwa qaarada qoqofashe, “Hintefe oonika ba gida qaala polonna ixiko, Xoossay iya, iya keethaafenne iya aquwape haysada qoqofidi mela kushe asho” yaagas. Shiiqida asa ubbay issi qaalan, “Amin7i” yaagidi Godaa galatidosona. Asa ubbay caaqidaysada oothidosona.
5.14: Arxekisisi kawotida laatamantho laythafe doomidi hastamanne nam7antho laythi gakanaw taani Yihuda biitta haaras. He tammanne nam7u laytha giddon tana gidin woyko ta ishati shuumas bessiya katha damooze ekibooko.
5.15: Shin taape kase shuumetidaysati asaas deexo tooho gididi, gallas gallas kathasinne woyne ushshas oytamu bira qanxisidosona. Hari attoshin shuumata aylleti asaa bolla godaa gididi un7ethidi gam7idosona. Shin taani Xoossas yayyida gisho, hessada oothabike.
5.16: Taw de7iya wolqa ubbaa Yerusalaame gimbe oosuwas immas; ta oosanchotika taara issife he oosuwa bolla gam7idosona; nu aybi biittaka shammibooko.
5.17: Nu heeran de7iya kawotethatape yida asay attishin, gallas gallas taara miya Ayhudetinne kaaletheysati xeetanne ishatama.
5.18: Gallas gallas issi boori, usupun modho dorsatanne daro kuttota shukidi asaas shiishosona; qassi tammu gallasape issi toho daro baatha woyne ushsha aggoosona. Shin asaa bolla de7iya deexo toohuwa ta eriya gisho biitta shuumas bessiya katha damooze oychabike.
5.19: Ta Xoossaw, ta ha asaas oothida keehatetha ubbaa qopada taw keeha.

6.1: Sanbalaaxi, Xoobbey, Arabe biitta asi gidida Geesameynne hanko nu morketi nuuni gimbiya oothidi polidaysanne dooya bessi baynaysa si7idosona. Gidoshin, ta gimbe pengetas sanqa aathabike.
6.2: Sanbalaaxinne Geesamey, “Ono Demban de7iya gutatape issuwan yada nuura gaheta” yaagidi kiita yeddidosona. Hessi enti tana qohanaw maqida maqo.
6.3: Taani entaw, “Taw gita oosoy de7iya gisho hessa aggada hinte gida bessaa baanaw danda7ike. Taani yaa bin, oosoy ayis dhubetii?” yaagada zaaras.
6.4: He kiitaa zaari zaari oyddu toho kiittidosona; shin taani issi qommo zaaro entaw immas.
6.5: Ichashantho Sanbalaaxi ba aylletape issuwa dooya de7iya dabdaabe oythidi taako kiittis. Dabdaabey haysada yaagidi xaafetis;
6.6: “Neeninne ne koche gidida Ayhudeti makallanaw qopidaysanne hessa gaason gimbiya gimbeysa shooro biittan de7iya asa ubbay odeteysa Geesamey taw odis. Qassi neeni nena kawo kessanaw koyeysanne
6.7: neeni Yihuda kawo gideysa Yerusalaamen awaajana mela nabe wothidaysa taw odis. Ha woriya kawoy si7anaysi attenna. Hessa gisho, taara gahetada zorettanaw haaya” yaagees.
6.8: Taani, “Ha neeni giya oda ubbay tuma gidonnabaanne ne neepe medhidaba” yaagada zaaras.
6.9: Nu oothiya oosoy poletonna mela, “Enta kushey argaacana; oosoyka poletonna eqi attana” yaagidi nuna yashisanaw qopidosona. Shin taani, “Xoossaw, ha77i ta kushiya minthetha” yaagada woossas.
6.10: Taani issi gallas soope keyonna mela gordi wothida Mahexabeela na7aa na7aa Dalaya na7aa Shamayako bas. I taako, “Qamma yidi enti nena wodhanaw danda7iya gisho neera taara Xoossa keethi gelidi, pengiya gordidi qosetana” yaagis.
6.11: Shin taani, “Ta mela asi yayyidi qosetii? Woyko tana daaniya asi ba shempuwa ashshanaw Xoossa keethi gelii? Ta hessa hanike” yaagas.
6.12: Ta qopa be7iya wode Shamayey Xoossay kiitida nabe gidonashin Xoobeynne Sanbalaaxi iya miishen shammidi yeddin ta bolla wordo tinbite odeysa akeekas.
6.13: I miishen shametida gaasoy tana yashisanaasa; ta hessa oothada nagaran gelana melanne tana borisiyabaa demmidi tana kawushanaassa.
6.14: Taani, “Ta Xoossaw, Xoobeynne Sanbalaaxi oothidaba ubbaa be7a. No7aado geetetiya macca nabiyanne hara wordo nabeti tana yashisanaw oothidaba ubba be7a” yaagada woossas.
6.15: Gimbe oosoy doometin ishatammanne nam7u gallasape guye Eluule geetetiya ageenan laatamanne ichashantho gallasan oosoy poletis.
6.16: Nu yuushuwan de7iya kawotethatan de7iya nu morketi hessa si7ida wode yayyidosonanne yeellatidosona. Ayis giiko, oosoy nu Xoossaa maaden poletidaysa akeekidosona.
6.17: He wode Yihuda shuumati Xoobbiyas dabdaabe xaafishe gam7idosona; ika entaw zaarishe gam7is.
6.18: Era na7ay Sakani, Xoobbiya bollo gidiya gishonne iya na7ay Yohaanani Baraka na7aa Masulaama na7iw ekida gisho, Ayhudetape daroti iyara caaqidi de7oosona.
6.19: He asati Xoobbey oothida lo77oba ubbaa ta sinthan nashidi haasayoosona; taani giyaba iyaw odoosona. Hessa gisho, Xoobbey ubba wode tana yashisanaw dabdaabe xaafo aggibeenna.

7.1: Gimbiya oosoy wurin, sanqayka gelis; pengiya naageysati, zammaretinne Leeweti banta oosuwa oykidosona.
7.2: Taani Yerusalaame katamaa aysiya maata ta ishaa Hananesinne miixa naageysata halaqaa Anaanas immas. Hanaani haratape aadhida tumanchonne Xoosse yayiya asi.
7.3: Taani entako, “Wonta away keyidi ho77ana gakanaw Yerusalaame gimbe pengeta dooyopite. Qassi omarsi naageysati banta oosuwa ongidi baanape sinthe pengeta minthi gordanaada oothite. Hessadaka, Yerusalaamen de7iya asaape dooridi baggati banta ooso bessan, harati qassi banta keethaa heeran naagana mela oothite” yaagas. Di7ope Simmida Asaa Sunthu
7.4: He wode Yerusalaame katamay daro dalganne gita; shin iya giddon de7iya asaa tayboy daro guutha; qassi daro keethati buroo keexetibeenna.
7.5: Hessafe guye, asa kaaletheyisata, halaqatanne asa ubbaa shiishada enta soo asan asan mazgabana mela Xoossay tana qofisis. Di7etethaafe sinthe simmida asaa enta soo asan asan xaafetida maxaafaka demmas; he maxaafan xaafetiday haysa.
7.6: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori di7idi, ba biitta efida asape guye banta katamaa Yerusalaamenne Yihudan de7iya banta katamata simmida asay haysafe kaallidi de7eyisata.
7.7: Enta halaqati Zarubaabela, Iyyasu, Nahime, Azaara, Rama, Nahamane, Mardikiyoosa, Bilshana, Mispereta, Bigiwaya, Nahumanne Baana. Di7ope simmida Isra7eele asaa tayboy haysa;
7.8: Paroosa yarati 2,172;
7.9: Safaaxa yarati 372;
7.10: Era yarati 652;
7.11: Iyyasunne Iyo7aaba koche gidida Pahati-Moo7aba yarati 2,818;
7.12: Elama yarati 1,254;
7.13: Zaatu yarati 845;
7.14: Zakaya yarati 760;
7.15: Binuya yarati 648;
7.16: Bebaya yarati 628;
7.17: Azgada yarati 2,322;
7.18: Adonqaama yarati 667;
7.19: Bigiwaya yarati 2,067
7.20: Adina yarati 655;
7.21: Hizqiyaasa yara gidida Axeera yarati 98;
7.22: Hashuma yarati 328;
7.23: Besaya yarati 324;
7.24: Harifa yarati 112;
7.25: Gaba7oona yarati 95;
7.26: Beetelemeninne Naxoofan de7iya asay 188;
7.39: Haysafe kaallidi de7eysati di7etethaafe simmida kahineta. Iyyasu yara gidida Yadaya yarati 973;
7.43: Haysafe kaallidi de7eysati di7etethaafe simmida Leeweta; Hodawa yara gidiya Iyyasunne Qadimi7eela yarati 74;
7.45: Pengiya naagiya Saluma, Axeera, Talmoona, Aquba, Hatitanne Shobaya yarati 138.
7.46: Haysafe kaallidi de7eysati Xoossa keethan oothiya oosanchota yarata; Xiha yarata, Hasufa yarata, Xaba7oota yarata,
7.47: Keroosa yarata, Sii7a yarata, Padoona yarata,
7.48: Libana yarata, Hagaba yarata, Samala yarata,
7.49: Hanana yarata, Gidela yarata, Gahaara yarata,
7.50: Raya yarata, Raxina yarata, Naqooda yarata,
7.51: Gazama yarata, Oza yarata, Paasa yarata,
7.52: Besaya yarata, Ma7unima yarata, Nafusesima yarata,
7.53: Baqibuuqa yarata, Haqufa yarata, Harhura yarata,
7.54: Baasilota yarata, Mahida yarata, Harsha yarata,
7.55: Barqoosa yarata, Sisaara yarata, Teema yarata,
7.57: Haysafe kaallidi de7eysati Solomone aylleta yarata; Soxaya yarata, Sofeereta yarata, Parida yarata,
7.58: Ya7ila yarata, Darqoona yarata, Gidela yarata,
7.59: Safaaxa yarata, Haxila yarata, Pokereet-Haxabayma yaratanne Amoone yarata.
7.60: Di7etethaafe simmida Xoossa keethan ootheysatinne solomone aylleta tayboy 392.
7.61: Talmela, Telharsha, Karuba, Adaananne Imera katamatape Yerusalaame simmidosona. Shin enti woyko enta aawati Isra7eele sheeshi gideysa erisanaw danda7ibookona.
7.62: Enti Dalaya, Xoobbiyanne Naqooda yarata; enta tayboy 642.
7.63: Kahinetape Hobaya yarati, Haqooxa yaratinne Barzile yarati Yerusalaame simmidosona. Barzile geysi Galada biitta asi gidida Barzile na7iw ekidi, ba bolluwa sunthaa ekis.
7.64: Enti banta yeletaa susa eranaw yeleta maxaafan koydosona, shin demmibookona. Hessa gisho, enti tunada taybetidi kahinetethan oothonna mela digetidosona.
7.65: Uriimeninne Tumiimen shaakidi pirdiya kahiney dendana gakanaw enti geeshsha kathaafe maanaw danda7onnaysa Yihuda haareysi entaw odis.
7.66: -67 Di7etethaafe Yihuda biitta simmida 7,337 addenne macca aylleta gujonna de7ishin, kumetha asaa tayboy 42,360. Qassi entara 245 addenne macca zammaareti simmidosona.
7.70: Yarata halaqatape guuthati oosuwas imota immidosona. Biittaa haareysi 8 kilo giraame worqa, 50 distenne 530 kahine ma7ota immis.
7.71: Yarata halaqati 168 kilo giraame worqanne 1,250 kilo giraame bira immidosona.
7.72: Attida asay 168 kilo giraame worqa, 140 kilo giraame biranne 67 kahine ma7ota immidosona.
7.73: Hessafe guye kahineti, Leeweti, naageysati, zammaareti, asaape issoti issoti, Xoossa keetha oosanchotinne hara Isra7eele asay banta kataman kataman uttidosona.

8.1: Laapuntho ageenay geliya wode Isra7eele asay banta kataman kataman uttidosona. He ageenan enti ubbay issife Haatha Penge sinthan de7iya dabaaban shiiqidosona. Enti Goday Muse baggara Isra7eele asaas immida Higge Maxaafa ehana mela xaafiya Izira oychidosona.
8.2: Yaatin, kahiney Iziri, laapuntho ageenan koyro gallasan, addey, maccinne akeekanaw danda7iya asi ubbay shiiqida bessaa Higge Maxaafa ehis.
8.3: Haatha Penge sinthan de7iya dabaaban eqidi, addes, maccasinne akeekanaw danda7iya ase ubbaas Higge Maxaafa wontafe gallas gakanaw nabbabis. Asayka hayzidi si7idosona.
8.4: Xaafey Iziri, nabbabanaw mithafe oosetida dhoqa bessan keyidi eqis. Iyape ushacha baggara Matita, Shamaya, Anaya, Uraya, Kalqenne Ma7iseya geetetiya asati eqidosona. Haddirsa baggara Padaya, Misa7eela, Malkiya, Hasuma, Hashibada, Zakariyasanne Masulaama geetetiya asati eqidosona.
8.5: Iziri asa ubbaafe dhoqiya bessan eqiya wode ubbay iya loythidi xeellishin, enta sinthan Higge Maxaafa dooyis. I dooyiya wode enti ubbay uttida bessaafe dendi eqidosona.
8.6: Iziri Godaa, gita Xoossaa galatis. Asa ubbay banta kushiya denthidi, “Amin7i! Amin7i!” yaagidosona. Enta som7oy sa7a bochana gakanaw gufannidi Godaa goyinnidosona.
8.7: Enti banta eqida bessan de7ishin, Leeweti, Iyyasuy, Baani, Saraba, Yamina, Aquba, Sabata, Hoda, Maseya, Qalixa, Azaara, Yozabaata, Hananinne Palahi higgiya asay akeekanaada birshethaa qoncisidosona.
8.8: Enti Xoossaa Higge Maxaafa nabbabidosona; qassi nabbabeteysi woygiyako asay erana mela birshethaa qoncisidosona.
8.9: Asay higge qaala si7ida wode yeekida gisho, biitta haariya Nahimey, kahinenne xaafe gidida Izirinne asaas maxaafa birshiya Leeweti, “Ha gallasay Godaas, hinte Xoossaas geeshsha gallas gidiya gisho, yeekofite woyko afuxofite” yaagidosona.
8.10: Nahimey, “Bidi dooretida kathaa miite; mal7iya ushshi uyite; qassi aykoy baynaysatas hinteysafe shaakidi immite. Hachi gallasay nu Godaas geeshsha gallas. Godaa ufaysay hintew wolqa gidiya gisho azzanopite” yaagis.
8.11: Leeweti, “Hachi gallasay geeshsha gallas gidiya gisho, azzanopite; si77i giite” yaagidi asa si77i oothidosona.
8.12: Nabbebetida qaala birshethay entaw gelida gisho, asay ufaysan maanaw, uyanawnne aykoy baynaysatas shaakidi immanaw soo bidosona.
8.13: He ageena nam7antho gallasan kochata halaqati, kahinetine Leeweti higge qaala entaw birshana mela Izirako yidosona.
8.14: Enti tamaariya wode laapuntha ageenan Shaqara Ba7aale bonchiya wode Isra7eele asay shaqara garsan uttidi bonchana mela Xoossay Muse baggara kiitidaysa demmidosona.
8.15: Shaqara Ba7aale bonchanaw katamataninne Yerusalaamen haysada yaagidi awaajidosona; “Shaqara shaqaranaw dere bolla keyidi zayte shamaho, wora shamaho, barseneete mitha, zamba haythinne mitha ubbaafe higgen xaafetidaysada tashe ehite” yaagidosona.
8.16: Hessa gisho, asay bidi mitha tashe ehidi banta pooqe keetha bolla de7iya denban, banta zabban, Xoossa keetha dabaaban, Haatha Pengiya dabaabaninne Efreema Pengiya dabaaban shaqara shaqaridosona.
8.17: Di7etethafe simmida asa ubbay shaqara shaqaridi iya garsan uttidosona. Nawe na7aa Iyyasu wodepe haa simmin enti haysa mela ba7aale bonchi erokona. Hessa gisho, enti ubbay daro ufaytidosona.
8.18: Ba7aaley doometidi wurana gakanaw gallas gallas Iziri Xoossaa Higge Maxaafape asaas nabbabees. Baaliya laapun gallas bonchidaape guye hospuntho gallasan higgey kiiteysada geeshsha duulatta oothidosona.

9.1: He ageenan laatamanne oyddantho gallasan Isra7eele asay issife shiiqidi, kayo ma7o ma7idi, banta huuphen baana qolidi xoomidosona.
9.2: Bantana allaga dere asaape shaakidosona. Hessefe guye dendi eqidi entinne enta aawati oothida nagaraa ubbaa paaxidosona.
9.3: Enti yan eqidi de7ishin heedzu saate kumethi Godaa enta Xoossaa Higge Maxaafay entaw nabbabetis. Qassi hara heedzu saate banta nagaraa paaxishe Godaa banta Xoossaa goyinnidosona.
9.4: Leeweti, Iyyasuy, Baani, Qadimi7eeli, Sabana, Buni, Saraba, Bananinne, Kenaani madirake bolla keyidi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi Godaa, banta Xoossaa woossidosona.
9.5: Leeweti, Iyyasuy, Qadimi7eeli, Baani, Asabaani, Sarabi Hodi, Sabaninne Patahi, “Dendi eqidi, merinaape merinaa gakanaw de7iya Godaa hinte Xoossa galatite!” “Iya boncho sunthaa anjite; galatapenne anjofe aadhiya iya sunthaa sabbite.”
9.6: Xoossaw, ne xalaali Godaa! Neeni salotanne dhoqa salotan de7iya medhetethata, sa7aanne iya bolla de7iya medhetethata, abbatanne enta giddon de7iya medhetethata ubbaa medhadasa. Ubbaas de7o immadasa; salo medhetethati new goyinnoosona.
9.7: Godaw, neeni Xoosse! Neeni Kaldaaweta biitta Uurepe Abrame doorada kessadasa. Iya sunthaa laammada Abrahaame gada sunthadasa.
9.8: I new ammanthiya asi gideysa be7ada, Kanaaneta, Hiteta, Amooreta, Parzeta, Yaabusetanne Gergeseta biitta iya kochaas laata biitta oothada immanaw iyaw caaqadasa. Neeni xillo gidiya gisho ne gida qaala poladasa.
9.9: Neeni nu mayzata Gibxe biittan gakida un7aa be7adasa; qassi Zo7o Abbaa matan de7ishe enti waassida waasuwa si7adasa.
9.10: Gibxe kawoy, iya shuumatinne he biitta asa ubbay Isra7eele asaa bolla otortida gisho enta bolla mallatanne malaalsiyabata oothadasa. Hessa oothada hachi gakanaw ne sunthay bonchon xeegetanaada oothadasa.
9.11: Abbaa shaakada ne asaa mela biittara pinthadasa. Shin shuchi ciimmo haathan holin, miteteysada enta goodiya morketa abban mitisada dhaysadasa.
9.12: Isra7eele asaa gallas shaara tuussan, qamma tama tuussan enta ogiya poo7isada kaalethadasa.
9.13: Neeni salope wodhada ne asaa Siina zuma bolla odisadasa. Suure pirdaanne tuma gidida higgiya, lo77o wogaanne kiita entaw immadasa.
9.14: Geeshsha ne Sambaata enti bonchana mela enta tamaarsadasa. Ne aylliya Muse baggara entaw kiita, wogaanne higge immadasa.
9.15: Enti koshatida wode salope kathi immadasa; qassi enti saamotida wode zaallafe haathe pultisadasa. Neeni entaw immana gada caaqida biitta enti gelidi laattana mela kiittadasa.
9.16: Shin nu mayzati otortidosona; si7onna ixidi new kiitetibookona.
9.17: Kiitetonna ixidosona; neeni entaw oothida malaalsiyaba ubbaa hassaybookona. Enti si7onna asi gididosona; banta geellatethan aylletethas Gibxe biitta guye kaalethana mela halaqa bantaw dooridosona. Gidoshin, neeni atto giya Xoossi, keehanne maariya Xoossi; siiqon kumidaysanne hanqos ellesonna Xoossi gidiya gisho enta aggabaaka.
9.18: Enti mara malan eeqa medhidi, “Hintena Gibxe biittafe kessida hinte xoossay haysa” yaagidi nena gita cashshe cayidosona.
9.19: Ne daro maarotethan neeni enta mela biittan aggabaaka. Enti biya ogiya poo7isana mela gallas shaara tuussan, qamma tama tuussan enta kaalethadasa.
9.20: Enta tamaarsana mela ne lo77o Ayyaana entaw immadasa. Maanaw manna, uyanaw haathe entaw immadasa.
9.21: Oytamu laythi kumethi mela biittan hemetiya wode entaw koshshiyabaape issibaaka pacisabaaka. Enta ma7oy wuribeenna; enta tohoy kixibeenna.
9.22: Ne enta kawotethatanne dereta hari attoshin haahon de7iya biittata xoonidi oykana mela oothadasa. Kawoy Sihooney haariya Haseboona biittanne kawoy Oogey haariya Baasane biitta entana laatisadasa.
9.23: Enta kochaa taybuwa salo xoolintoda darsadasa. Enta mayzatas immana gada caaqida biitta enta laatisadasa.
9.24: Enta nayti Kanaane biitta laattidosona. He biittan de7iya Kanaane asaa enta sinthan neeni kawushadasa. Enti Kanaane asaa bolla, enta kawota bollanne biittan de7iya asaa bolla dosidaba oothana mela enta kushen aatha immadasa.
9.25: Enti yuushoy gimbetida katamatanne aradda biitta xoonidi ekidosona. Lo77oba ubbay kumida keethata, booketida haatha ollata, woyne bessata, shamahonne hara ayfe ayfiya daro mithata laattidosona. Iyape midi kallidi ordidosona; ne gita keehatethan ufaytidosona.
9.26: Gidoshin, enti kiitetonna ixidi, ne bolla makallidosona; ne higgiya bolla zoko zaaridosona. Neeko simmanaada entaw minthidi odida ne nabeta wodhidosona. Daro iita cashshi nena cayidosona.
9.27: Hessa gisho, enta un7ethiya morketa kushen aatha immin, morketi enta un7ethida wode neeko waassidosona. Enta waasuwa salon gidada si7adasa; ne maarotethaa daruwan enta, enta morketa kushepe ashshiya asata kiittadasa.
