9.28: Shin enti shempo demmi simmidi zaaridi ne sinthan nagara oothidosona. Ne zaarada enta morketa kushen aathada immin, enta morketi enta haaridosona. Shin ha77ika enti neeko waassin, enta waasuwa salon gidada si7adasa. Ne maarotethan enta zaara zaaradaka ashsha ekadasa.
9.29: Ne higgiyako enti simmana mela entaw minthada odadasa, shin enti otortidosona; new kiitetonna ixidosona. Asi kiitetidi de7o demmiya ne higgiya menthidosona. New zoko zaaridi si7onna ixidosona; kiitetonna ixidosona.
9.30: Gidikoka ne enta daro laythi danda7adasa; ne Ayyaanan nabeta baggara entaw odadasa, shin enti si7ibookona. Hessa gisho, shooro kawotethati enta haarana mela aatha immadasa.
9.31: Shin neeni keehanne maariya Xoossi gidiya gisho, ne gita maarotethan enta aggabaaka; burxora dhaysabaka.
9.32: Hiza nu Xoossaw, gitaw, wolqaamanne yayetida Xoossaw, ne merinaa siiqo caaquwa naageyso, beni Asoore kawotethaafe hachi gakanaw nu bolla, nu kawota bolla, nu halaqata bolla, nu kahineta bolla, nu nabeta bolla, nu mayzata bollanne ne asa ubbaa bolla gakida metoy ne sinthan laafaba daanopo.
9.33: Nuna gakidaba ubban neeni xillo. Nuuni nena naaqikoka ne ammanetetha aggabaaka.
9.34: Nu kawoti, nu halaqati, nu kahinetinne nu mayzati ne higgiya naagibookona. Qassi ne entaw immida kiitaanne naagisuwa si7ibookona.
9.35: Ne enta kawotethan entaw gita anjuwa immadasa; dalganne aradda biitta entaw immadasa. Shin enti nena goyinnibookona; banta iita oosuwape simmibokona.
9.36: “Hiza, hachi nuuni aylle gideysa be7a. Nu mayzati he biitte ayfiyanne iya immiya anjuwa ubbaa maana mela ne immida biittan nu hachi aylle gidida.
9.37: Nu nagaraa gisho, ne nu bolla denthida kawoti biittay immiya ayfiya ubbaa go77etoosona. Nu bollanne nu mehiya bolla banta koydaba oothosona; nuuni gita meto giddon de7oos” yaagidosona.
9.38: Hanidaba ubbaa gisho, nuuni haasayidi, he haasaya xaafidi qoncisanaw qofa qachida. Xaafetida xuufiya bolla nu halaqati, nu Leewetinne nu kahineti banta maatame wothidosona.

10.1: Maatame wothida asaa sunthay, biitta aysiya Nahimey, Hakaliya na7ay, Kahinetape, Sedeqiyaasa,
10.2: Saraya, Azaara, Ermiyaasa,
10.3: Paskora, Amaare, Malka,
10.4: Haxusa, Sabana, Maluka,
10.5: Harima, Maremoota, Obaada,
10.6: Daanela, Ginetoona, Baaroka,
10.7: Masulaama, Abiya, Miyamina,
10.8: Ma7aaza, Belgayanne Shamaya.
10.9: Leewetape, Aznaata na7aa Iyyasu, Henadaada kochi gidida Binuya, Qadimi7eelanne
10.10: entara oothiya Sabana, Hodiya, Qalixa, Palaya, Hanaana,
10.11: Mika, Rahooba, Hasabaya,
10.12: Zakura, Saraba, Sabana,
10.13: Hodiya, Bananne Banina.
10.14: Halaqatape, Paroosa, Pahati-Moo7aba, Elama, Zata, Baana,
10.15: Buna, Azgada, Bebaya,
10.16: Adoona, Bigiwaya, Adina,
10.17: Axeera, Hizqiyaasa, Azuura,
10.18: Hodiya, Hasuma, Besaya,
10.19: Harifa, Anatoota, Nebaya,
10.20: Magiphaasa, Masulaama, Ezira,
10.21: Masezabeela, Saadoqa, Yadu7a,
10.22: Palaxa, Hanana, Anaya,
10.28: Attida asay, kahineti, Leeweti, pengiya naageysati, zammaareti, Xoossa keetha oosanchoti, Xoossa higgiyas kiitetanaw bantana Ayhude gidonna deretape shaakida ubbay, enta macheti, akeekanaw danda7iya enta adde naytinne macca nayti,
10.29: bantana kaaletheysatara issife caaqidosona. Enti Xoossa aylliya Muse baggara Xoossay immida nu Godaa, Xoossaa kiitta, higgiyanne wogaa naaganaw qangethaninne caaqon qaala gelidosona.
10.30: Enti haysada yaagidi caaqidosona; “Nu macca nayta Ayhude gidonna adde naytas immoko; enta macca nayta nu adde naytas macho oothidi ekooko.
10.31: “Ayhude gidonna asati kathi gidin woyko haraba Sambaata gallas woyko hara ba7aale gallas bayzanaw ehiko entafe shammoko. Laapuntha laythi gakiya wode wode nu biitta goyoko; nuuni tal7ida acuwa achoko.
10.32: “Xoossa keetha oosuwas oyddu giraame bira laythan laythan qanxonna immana.
10.33: Hessika, Godaa sinthan wothiya uythaas, gallas gallas yarshetiya katha yarshuwas, xuussa yarshuwas, Sambaata gallasan, ageena xeeron, laythan de7iya hara ba7aaletan, geeshsha yarshotas, Isra7eele asa nagaraa atotethas yarshetiya yarshuwasinne nu Xoossa keetha oosuwas koshshiya ubbaa kunthanaasa.
10.34: “Nu, kahineti, Leewetinne hara asa ubbay, laythan laythan oosetiya gallasan, higgiyan xaafetidaysada Godaa, nu Xoossaa yarsho bessan eexiya mithaa issi issi kochay awude ehanaw bessiyako eranaw saama yeggida.
10.35: “Katha nu shiishiya wodenne dumma dumma mitha ayfiya nu maxiya wode bayraa Xoossa keethi ehana.
10.36: “Higgiyan xaafetidaysada nuuni koyro yeletiya nu adde nayta, qassi nu miizati, nu dorsatinne nu deeshati yeliya koyro marata Xoossa keethan oothiya kahinetako ehidi Xoossas dummayana.
10.37: “Nuuni nu biittan kaxida kathaafe koyruwa, nu mitha ubbaa ayfiya, woyniyanne zaytiya imota oothidi, Xoossa keethan oothiya kahinetako ehana. Leeweti nu de7iya katamata goshshan ayfiyabape asraata ekiya gisho, nu biittay ayfiyabape asraata ehana.
10.38: Leeweti asraata shiishiya wode, Aarona yara gidida kahineti entara issife gidanaw bessees. Leeweti asraata shiishidaape guye, asraatape asraata kessidi nu Xoossa keethi ehidi, miishe wothiya kifiliyan wotho.
10.39: Isra7eele asaynne Leeweti kathaa, woyniyanne shamaho zayte imota geeshsha miisheti uttiya bessaanne kahineti, pengiya naageysatinne zammaareti shempiya kifiliya eho. “Nuuni Xoossa keethaa ubbaka aggoko” yaagidi caaqidosona.

11.1: Asaa kaaletheysati Yerusalaamen de7idosona. Hanko asay tammaafe issoy geeshsha kataman Yerusalaamen de7ana mela saama yeggidi dooridosona. Shin hara uddufun kushe asay banta kataman kataman de7idosona.
11.2: Ba shenen Yerusalaamen de7anaw dosida asa ubbaa asay anjidosona.
11.3: Hara katamatan de7iya Isra7eele asay, kahineti, Leeweti, Xoossa keetha oosanchoti, Solomone aylleta sheeshati ubbay banta kataman kataman de7iya gadiya oykidi de7idosona. Haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysati, Yerusalaamen de7anaw yida biitta shuumata;
11.4: Yihuda kochaafe yida asay Paaresa yara gidida Atayanne Seela yara gidida Ma7iseya. Atayi Ooziyana na7a; Ooziyani Zakaryaasa na7a; Zakaryaasi Amaare na7a; Amaarey Safaaxa na7a; Safaaxi Malal7eela na7a.
11.5: Ma7iseyi Baaroka na7a; Baaroki Kolihooza na7a; Kolihoozi Ooza na7a; Oozi Adaya na7a; Adayi Yoyaariba na7a; Yoyaaribi Zakaryaasa na7a. Haysati Seela kochata.
11.6: Paaresa yarape wolqaama gidida 468 asati Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
11.7: -8 Biniyaame kochaafe yida asay Saala, Gabayanne Salaya. Saalu Masulaama na7a; Masulaami Yo7eeda na7a; Yo7eedi Padaya na7a; Padayey Qolaya na7a; Qolayi Ma7iseya na7a; Ma7iseyi Iti7eela na7a; Iti7eeli Yeshaya na7a. Biniyaame zariyape 928 asay Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
11.9: Zikira na7ay Iyyu7eeli enta halaqa; qassi Hasanu7a na7ay Yihudi kataman nam7antho halaqa.
11.10: Kahinetape yida asay Yoyaariba na7aa Yadaya, Yakina na7aa;
11.11: Saraya; Sarayi Kilqiya na7a; Kilqey Masulaama na7a; Masulaami Saadoqa na7a; Saadoqi Marayoota na7a; Marayooti Xoossa keetha halaqa gidida Ahixuuba na7a.
11.12: Entara issife Xoossa keethan oothiya oosanchoti kumethi 822. Adayi Yirohaama na7a; Yirohaami Palala na7a, Palali Amoxe na7a; Amoxey Zakaryaasa na7a; Zakaryaasi Paskora na7a; Paskora Malkiya na7a.
11.13: Adayara issife de7iya asaynne enta soo asaa halaqati kumethi 242. Amasasayi Azari7eela na7a; Azari7eeli Ahizaya na7a; Ahizayi Mashilmoota na7a; Mashilmooti Imera na7a.
11.14: Amasayara issife de7iya olanchoti kumthi 128. Hagidolima na7ay Zabdi7eeli kahineta ayseysa.
11.15: Leewetape yida asay Shamaya; Shamayey Hashuba na7a; Hashubi Aziriqaama na7a; Aziriqaami Hasabaya na7a; Hashabey Buna na7a.
11.16: Leeweti Sabatinne Yozabaata Xoossa keethafe karera oosetiya oosuwas halaqa.
11.17: Mataani Mika na7a; Miki Zabida na7a; Zabidi galata woosa kaalethiya Asaafa na7a; Asaafi iya nam7antho halaqa gidida Baqibuuqa na7a; Baqibuuqi Samusa na7a; Samusi Galaala na7a; Galaali Yedutuuna na7a.
11.18: Leewetape 284 asay geeshsha kataman Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
11.19: Pengiya naageysatape, Aquba, Talmoonanne entara issife oothiya oosanchota tayboy 172.
11.20: Attida kahineti, Leewetinne Isra7eele asa ubbay banta laata biittan Yihuda katamatan de7idosona.
11.21: Shin Xoossa keetha oosanchoti Yerusalaame kataman de7iya Ofeela deriya bolla de7idosona. Sihanne Gishipa geetetiya nam7u asati enta halaqata.
11.22: Yerusalaamen de7iya Leeweta halaqay Oza. Ozi Baana na7a; Baani Hasabaya na7a; Hashabey Mataana na7a; Mataani Mika na7a. Ozi Xoossa keetha zammaareta halaqa gidida Asaafa na7a.
11.23: Zammaareti gallas gallas yexana mazmuriya kawoy enta kiittees.
11.24: Yihuda na7aa Zaraha yaraape yeletida Masezabeela na7aa Pataha Isra7eele asaas doona gididi, kawa matan de7ees.
11.25: Yihuda asaape guuthati goshsha gadetaninne gutatan, Qiriyaat-Arbaninne iya gutatan, Diboonaninne iya gutatan, Yaqabxi7eelaninne iya gutatan de7idosona.
11.26: Qassi Iyyasun, Molaadan, Beet-Phalexan,
11.27: Haxar-Shu7aalaninne iya gutatan, Barsaabeninne iya gutatan,
11.30: Zanohan, Adulaamaninne enta gutatan, Laakisoninne iya heeran de7iya goshsha gadiyan, Azeeqaninne iya gutatan de7idosona. Hessada hanidi Yihuda asay Barsaabepe bidi Hinooma Zangaara gakanaw de7iya bessan de7idosona.
11.31: Biniyaame kochati Gib7an, Mikmaasan, Ayan, Beeteleninne enta gutatan,
11.35: Loodan, Ononinne Kushe Hiillata Zangaara geetetiya bessan de7idosona.
11.36: Yihudan de7ida Leewetape baggati Biniyaame asaara daanada oosetidosona.

12.1: Salatiyaala na7aa Zarubaabelaranne kahine halaqaa Iyyasura di7ope simmida kahinetinne Leeweti haysata: Saraya, Ermiyaasa, Izira,
12.2: Amaare, Maluka, Haxusa,
12.3: Sakana, Rehuuma, Maremoota,
12.4: Ida, Ginetoona, Abiya,
12.5: Miyamina, Ma7ada, Belga,
12.6: Shama7a, Yoyaariba, Yadaya,
12.7: Saala, Amoka, Hilqiyaanne Yadaya. Haysati Iyyasu laythan kahinetasinne yaratas halaqa gididaysata.
12.8: Entara issife simmida Leeweti Iyyasu, Binuya, Qadimi7eela, Saraba, Yihudanne galata mazmure zamareyisata halaqa gidida Mataana.
12.9: Entara issife zamariya Baqbuqeynne Unoy entafe sinthara haa simmi eqidi yexoosona.
12.10: Iyyasuy Yoyaaqima yelis; Yoyaaqimi Eliyaseeba yelis; Eliyaseebi Yoyada yelis;
12.11: Yoyadi Yoonataana yelis; Yoonataani Yadu7a yelis.
12.12: Yoyaaqimi kahine halaqa gididi de7iya laythi, haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysati kahineta yarata halaqata. Saraya yaraa halaqay Maraya. Ermiyaasa yaraa halaqay Hananiya.
12.13: Izira yaraa halaqay Masulaama. Amaare yara halaqay Yehohanana.
12.14: Maluka yaraa halaqay Yoonataana. Sabana yaraa halaqay Yoosefa.
12.15: Harima yaraa halaqay Adina. Marayoota yaraa halaqay Hilqaya.
12.16: Ido yaraa halaqay Zakaryaasa. Ginetoona yaraa halaqay Masulaama.
12.17: Abiya yaraa halaqay Zikira. Miniyaminanne Ma7ada yaraa halaqay Pilxaya.
12.18: Bilga yaraa halaqay Samu7a. Shamaya yaraa halaqay Yoonataana.
12.19: Yoyaariba yaraa halaqay Matanaya. Yadaya yaraa halaqay Oza.
12.20: Salaya yaraa halaqay Qalaya. Amoka yaraa halaqay Ebeera.
12.21: Kelqe yaraa halaqay Hasabaya. Yadaya yaraa halaqay Natina7eela.
12.22: Leeweta halaqati Eliyaseebi, Yoyada, Yohaaninne Yadu7i kahine halaqa gidida dumma dumma laythan enti xaafetidosona. He mazgabey giigiday Farse biitta kawa Daariyosa laythana.
12.23: Gidoshin, Leeweta yarata halaqati mazgaben xaafetiday Eliyaseeba na7aa na7a gidida Yohaani hayqana gakanaw de7iya wode xalaalana.
12.24: Leeweta halaqati Hasabaya, Sarabanne Qadimi7eela na7aa Iyyasu. Enti Xoossa asi gidida kawoy Dawiti kiittidaysada, nam7an shaaketi eqidi, taran taran Xoossaa bonchoosonanne galata mazmure yexoosona.
12.25: Xoossa keetha gimbe dirsaa pengiya matan keexetida dumma dumma miishe wothiya keethaa naageysati Mataana, Baqbuuqa, Abdiyu, Masulaama, Xalmoonanne Aquba.
12.26: Haysati Yoxedeqa na7aa na7aa gidada Iyyasu na7aa Yoyaaqimey, biitta aysiya Nahimeynne kahinenne xaafe gidida Iziri de7ida laythan oothidosona. Yerusalaame Gimbe Dirsaa Anjiso Ba7aale
12.27: Yerusalaame gimbe dirsay gimbetidi wurida ba7aale bonchiya wode Leeweti banta de7iya bessaafe koyetidi, daalan, diithan, maasinqon, galata mazmure yexishe ufaysan ba7aale bonchanaw Yerusalaame yidosona.
12.28: Ha baaliya bonchanaw zammaareti Yerusalaame heeran de7iya Naxoofata gutatape,
12.29: Beet-Gelgalape, Gib7apenne Azmaawetape shiiqidosona. Enti Yerusalaame heeran bantaw gutata keexidosona.
12.30: Kahinetinne Leeweti bantana wogada geeshidaape guye asaa, pengetanne gimbe dirsaa geeshshidosona.
12.31: Taani Yihuda halaqata gimbe dirsaa bolla kessas. Nam7u gita mazmure koyreta galata mazmure yexana mela oothas. Issi koyrey gimbiya huuphesoora ushachi simmidi, Pito Penge bagga bis.
12.32: Hoshayanne Yihuda halaqatape baggati entana kaallidosona.
12.33: Entara de7iya harati Azaara, Izira, Masulaama,
12.35: moyze punniya guutha kahineti kaallidosona. Entana kaallidi yiday Zakaryaasa; Zakaryaasi Yoonataana na7a; Yoonataani Shama7a na7a; Shama7i Mataana na7a; Mataani Mikaya na7a; Mikayey Zakura na7a; Zakuri Asaafa na7a.
12.36: Zakaryaasa yara gidida Shama7ey, Azari7eeli, Milaala, Gilaalay, Ma7ayey, Natina7eeli, Yihudinne Hanaani Xoossa asi gidida Dawiti zammariya wode go7etiya mazmure miishiya ubbaa ekidi, Zakaryaasa kaallidosona. Enta kaalethey xaafiya Izira.
12.37: Pulto Pengiya gakidaape guye Dawita Katamaako simmidi, gimbiya bolla keyidi, Dawita keethaafe pude baggara aadhidi, doloha baggara de7iya Haatha Pengiyako bidosona.
12.38: Nam7antho koyrey gimbiya huuphiya oykidi haddirsi simmidi bis. Taani asaape baggara gidada entafe guyera kaallas. Itoone Adussa Gimbiya aadhidi, Dalga Gimbiya bessaa gakida.
12.39: Yaape simmidi, Efreema Pengiya, Yeshaana Pengiya, Molo Pengiya, Hanaani7eela Adussa Gimbiyanne Xeetata Adussa Gimbiya gakanaw bida. Wursethan Dorsa Pengiya matara aadhidi Naageyisata Pengiya gakidi eqida.
12.40: Galata mazmure yexiya nam7u koyreti Xoossa keethan banta besse besse oykidosona. Qassi taka taara de7iya halaqatara yaa gakas.
12.41: Hessadaka, kahineti Eliyaqeemi, Ma7iseyi, Miniyamini, Mikayey, Eliyo7ani, Zakaryaasinne Hanaani banta moyziya oykidi,
12.42: Ma7iseyi, Shamayey, Alaazari, Uzi, Yehohanani, Malkiyey, Elaaminne Exeri banta bessaa bessaa oykidosona. Yizira enta kaalethin banta qaala dhoqu oothidi mazmure yexidosona.
12.43: He gallas daro yarsho yarshidosona. Xoossay entaw gita ufaysi immida gisho daro ufaytidosona. Maccasay nayti ubbay ufaytidosona. Yerusalaamen asay ufaytiya ufaysa kooshinchay haahon si7etees.
12.44: He gallas asay immiya imotata, asraatanne laythan kaxiya katha ayfiyape koyruwa shiishidi wothiya keetha naagiya halaqata dooridosona. Ha dooretida asati dumma dumma katamatan de7iya goshshatape higgey kiitteysada kahinetasinne Leewetas bessiya kathaa shiishosona. Ayis giiko, Yihuda asay kahinetinne Leeweti oothiya oosuwan daro ufaytidosona.
12.45: Enti Xoossay kiitidaysa oothidosona; geeshsho wogaa polidosona. Enta xalaala gidonashin zammaretinne naageysati Dawitinne iya na7aa Solomoney kiitida oosuwa polidosona.
12.46: Beni Dawita wodenne Asaafa wode zammaretinne Xoossas shiiqiya galata mazmureta kaalethiya halaqati de7oosona.
12.47: Zarubaabela laythaninne Nahime laythan Isra7eele asa ubbay zammaretasinne naageysatas bessiya kathaa gallas gallas immoosona. Leewetaska bessiya kathaa immoosona. Leeweti qassi Aarona yara gidida kahinetas bessiya kathaa immoosona.

13.1: He gallas asa ubbay si7ishin, Muse Maxaafay nabbabetis; he wode enti, “Moo7abe asaynne Amoone asay Xoossaa asaara merinaw gahetanaw bessenna” giya bessaa maxaafan demmidosona.
13.2: Ayis giiko, Isra7eele asay Gibxefe keyidi, Kanaane biya wode Moo7abenne Amoone biitta asay entaw kathinne haathe immidi mokanaysa aggidi, Isra7eele asaa baaddana mela Balaamas miishe immidi shammidosona. Gidoshin, nu Xoossay baadetha anjon laammis.
13.3: He higgiya Isra7eele asay si7ida wode allaga asaa banta giddofe shaakidosona.
13.4: Hessafe kase Xoossa keetha miisheta wothiya keethaas halaqa gidida kahiney, Eliyaseebi Xoobara dabbotethi medhis.
13.5: Hessafe gaason Eliyaseebi, katha imotata, ixaane, Xoossa keetha geeshsha miisheta, kathaa woyniyanne zaytiya, Leewetas, zammaretasinne naageysatas immiya asraatanne kahinetas immiya kathaa wothiya wogga kifiliyan Xoobbey daana mela immis.
13.6: Ha ubbay haniya wode ta Yerusalaamen de7ike. Arxekisisey Babiloone biittan kawotida hastamanne nam7antho laythan taani simmada Babiloone biitta kawako bas. Gidoshin, guutha wodepe guye kawa oychada,
13.7: Yerusalaame simmada yas. Xoossa keetha zabban Eliyaseebi Xoobbiyas daana kifile giigisidi wothida iitabaa si7as.
13.8: Daro yilotada, Xoobbiya soo miishe ubbaa kifiliyape kessada kare holas.
13.9: Kifilya wogaada geeshshana mela kiittas. Xoossa keetha miisheta, kathaa, imotatanne ixaaniya zaarada keethaa gelsas.
13.10: Qassi asay Leewetas bessiya kathaa immiboona gisho Leewetinne zammaareti banta Xoossa keetha oosuwa aggidi goshshas guye bidaysa be7as.
13.11: Hessa gisho, taani halaqatako, “Xoossa keetha oosuwa ayis yeggi aggidetii?” yaagada hanqetas. Hessafe guye, Leeweta xeegada ubbaa enta oosuwan oosuwan zaaras.
13.12: Yaatin Yihuda asay kathaafe, woyniyape, zaytiyape immiya asraata wothiya keethaa zaaridi eho doomis.
13.13: Taani kahiniya Salama, xaafiya Saadoqanne Leewiya Padaya miishe wothiya keethaas halaqa oothada shuumas. Qassi Mataana na7aa na7aa Zakura na7ay Hanaani enta maaddeysa. Haysati ubbay koshshiyaba ubbaa banta ishatas shaaki shaaki imon ammanetidaysata gididosona.
13.14: “Ta Xoossaw tana qopa; qassi ne keetha oosoy giigana mela taani oothida lo77o oosuwa dogopa” yaagas.
13.15: He wode taani Yihudan de7iya asay Sambaata gallas woyne gum7ishin be7as; harati kathi, woyne ushsha, woyne ayfiya, balase ayfiyanne harabata banta haren caanidi, Sambaata gallas Yerusalaame ehishin be7as. Hessa gisho, enti Sambaata gallasa zal7onaada taani entaw minthada odas.
13.16: Hessa bolla qassi Yerusalaamen de7iya Xiroosa asay molonne hara issi issi zal7e miisheta ehidi Sambaata gallas Yihuda asaasinne Yerusalaamen bayzoosona.
13.17: Taani Yihuda halaqata, “Haysa mela iita ooso oothidi Sambaata ayis tuniseetii?
13.18: Xoossay nu bollanne nu katamaa bolla haysa mela meto ehiday, kase hinte aawati hessa mela iitabaa oothida gisho gidennee? Ha77i hinte Sambaata tunisidi, Isra7eele asaa bolla hara hanqo ehanaw haneeta” yaagada hanqetas.
13.19: Hessafe guye, Sambaati gelanaape sinthe Yerusalaame gimbiya pengeti gordetanaadanne Sambaati aadhonashin dooyetonna mela kiittas. Qassi Sambaata gallasan ayba toohoyka gelonnaada naagana mela ta oosanchotape issota issota gimbe pengiya bolla essas.
13.20: Hessa gisho, dumma dumma zal7e miisheta ehiya zal7anchoti issi toho woyko nam7u toho Yerusalaame gimbiyafe kare baggara aqidosona.
13.21: Shin taani entako, “Gimbiyafe karera waananaw aqeetii? Hinte nam7antho haysada oothiko taani wolqan hintena teqana” yaagada hanqetas. He gallasape simmin nam7antho Sambaata gallas yibookona.
13.22: Taani Leeweti banta huuphiya geeshshana mela, pengeta naagana melanne Sambaata gallasaa geeshshi oothana mela kiittas. “Ta Xoossaw, ha ubbaa gisho tana qopa; ne merinaa siiquwa gisho taw qadheta” yaagada woossas.
13.23: He wode taani Yihuda adde asape issoti issoti Ashdooda, Amoonenne Moo7abe biittafe macho ekidaysa be7as.
13.24: Enta naytape baggay Ashdooda biitta woyko hara biitta doona haasayoosona; banta biitta, Yihuda doona odetanaw danda7okona.
13.25: Taani entara ooyetas; enta baaddas; entafe issota issota dechada, enta huuphiya binaana shoddas. Hessa xalaala gidonashin, enti banta macca nayta enta adde naytas immonnaada, enta macca nayta bantawunne banta adde naytas ekonnaada Xoossaa sunthan caaqisas.
13.26: Qassi entako, “Kawoy Solomoney nagara oothiday allaga biitta maccasata ekoysana gidennee? Solomone mela kawoy hara biitta kawota giddon baawa; Xoossay iya dosida gisho, Isra7eele asa ubbaa bolla kawoyis. Shin, hara attoshin iyaka allaga biitta maccasati haysa mela nagara oosisidosona.
13.27: Yaatin, nuka hintena si7idi, allaga maccasa ekidi hessa mela iitabaa oothidi Xoossaa naaqaneyee?” yaagas.
13.28: Kahine halaqaa Eliyaseeba naytape issoy Yoyada. Shin iya naytape issoy Beet-Horona katama asi gidida Sanbalaaxa na7iw macho ekis. Yaatin, taani Yoyada Yerusalaame katamaape gooddas.
13.29: “Ta Xoossaw, haysati kahinetetha wogaanne kahinetaranne Leewetara caaqida caaquwa waati tunisidaako be7a” yaagada woossas.
13.30: Enta allaga biitta tunatethaafe geeshidaape guye kahinetasinne Leewetas enta oosuwa oosuwa immas.
13.31: Yarshos eethiya mithay woden woden yaana melanne asay baw ayfidabape koyro ayfiya imota oothidi ehana mela wogaa wothas. “Ta Xoossaw, ne keehatethan tana qopa” yaagada woossas.

1.1: Kawoy Arxekisisi Hinde biittafe Tophe biitta gakanaw de7iya, xeetanne laatamanne laapun biitta aysiya wode hanidaba.
1.2: Kawoy ba araatan uttidi aysiya waanna katamay Suusa geetetees.
1.3: I kawotida heedzantho laythan, baape garsara daynnatasinne biitta ayseysatas gita gibira giigisis. He gibira bessan Meedonanne Farse toora moconati, biitta haareysatinne ayseysati bentidosona.
1.4: Kawoy issi xeetanne hospun tammu gallas kumethi ba kawotethaa duretethaanne ba yashshiya bonchuwa ubbaa enta bessis.
1.5: He gallasatape guye, kawoy qassi hara laapun gallas gam7iya gibira, Suusa kataman, durepe manqo gakanaw de7iya asa ubbaas giigisis. He gibiray kawo gadhoy de7iya atakilte bessan giigis.
1.6: He bessan de7iya dabaabay, liinope oosetida boothinne kaalose geshetan alleeqis. Gesheti ocha teera daaniya al7o liino kiren aathin, ibnebarade geetetiya shuchafe oosetida tuuqiya bolla de7iya bira migiddotan kaqetidi uttidosona. Qassi worqafenne birape oosetida arsati, dumma dumma mali de7iya al7o shuchatape oosetida baasuwan maaran yegetidosona.
1.7: Issoy issuwafe dumma gidida worqa burcukon woyne ushshi asa ubbaas imetis. Kawoy daro keeha gidida gisho, woyne ushshas zawi baawa.
1.8: Issi issi asi ba koyida mela uyees; hessa kawoy koyrottidi ba aylletas odis.
1.9: He wode Kawiya Asxiina maccasa ubbaas gibira kawo gadhon giigisasu.
1.10: Gibiray doometida laapuntha gallas, kawoy Arxekisisi woyne ushsha alidi ufaytida wode, ba aylleta Mehumana, Bizita, Harboona, Bigita, Abagita, Zataranne Karkasa geetetiya laapun shuufata xeegidi,
1.11: “Kawiw Asxiino kawotetha kallacha wothidi haa ekidi yiite” yaagidi kiittis. Iya daro mala lo77o gidiya gisho, halaqatinne asa ubbay iyo be7ana mela kawoy koyis.
1.12: Shin kawa kiitaa iw odin, kawiya Asxiina kawa sinthe yoonna ixasu. Hessi kawa daro hanqethis.
1.13: He biitta higgiyanne de7o wogaa eriya asaa zore oyshoy kawa matan meezetidaba gidiya gisho, wodiyaba shaakidi eriya cinca asatara odetis.
1.14: Kawoy gita maati de7iya laapun Farsenne Meedona shuumata, Arqesiyoosa, Shetara, Adimata, Tarshesha, Mareesa, Marsananne Memukaana xeegisis.
1.15: Kawoy enta, “Taani, kawoy Arxekisisi, ta shuufata kiittin, Kawiya Asxiina ta kiitaa polonna ixasu. Hessa gisho, higgey odiya maaran iyo waatanaw bessii?” yaagidi oychis.
1.16: Entafe issoy, Memukaani kawa sinthaninne halaqata sinthan haysada yaagis; “Kawiya Asxiina kawa xalaala gidonashin, iya halaqata ubbaanne iya kawotetha giddon de7iya asa ubbaa naaqasu.
1.17: Ha kawotetha giddon de7iya maccasi ubbay kawiya Asxiina oothidaysa si7idi, banta azinata kadho doomana. Enti, ‘Kawoy Arxekisisi baako yaana mela xeegisin, kawiya Asxiina ixabekeyee?’ yaagana.
1.18: Hessa xalaala gidonashin, Farsenne Meedona halaqata maccasay hessa si7ida wode, hachi awi wullana gakanaw banta azinata hessada gidi kadhana. Hessa gaason macheta giddoninne azinata giddon ooshshi keyana.
1.19: Hessa gisho, kawaw, neeni dosiko, kawiya Asxiina nam7antho ne sinthe aadhona mela teqiya awaajo kessa. He awaajoy nam7antho laametonna mela Farsenne Meedona higgiya giddon xaafeto. Hessafe guye, kawotetha bonchuwa iipe ekada hara lo77o maccasas imma.
1.20: Ha neeni aathida awaajoy ha gita kawotetha ubban odetiya wode issi issi maccasi dure gidin manqo gidin, shaakonna ba azinaa bonchana” yaagis.
1.21: Kawoynne iya halaqati ha zoriyan ufaytidosona. Hessa gisho, Memukaani gidaysada kawoy oothis.
1.22: I ba kawotethaa giddon de7iya dumma dumma biittatas enta pidaleninne enta doonan xaafidi, dabdaabe yeddis. He awaajoy, issi issi azini ba keethaa keethaa aysiya halaqa gideysa odees.

2.1: Hessafe guye, kawa Arxekisisa hanqoy dochin, kawiya Asxiina oothidabaanne I bolla keyida awaajuwaba qopis.
2.2: He wode kawa matan haggaaziya na7atethata addeti haysada yaagidosona; “Mala lo77o geela7ota koyidi, kawas ehana mela,
2.3: ne kawotethaa giddon de7iya biitta ubban halaqata shuuma. Enti mala lo77o geela7o dooridi, Suusa katamaa ehidi, maccasas giigida keethan wotho. Yan he maccasa keethaas kaapo gidida kawo shuufa Hegaya kushen enti de7ishin, enta malaa loythiyaba ubbay entaw imeto.
2.4: Hessafe guye, ubbaafe aadhada kawa ufaysiya geela7iya Asxiini bessan kawo macho gido” yaagidosona. Ha zorey kawa ufaysida gisho, kawoy hessada oothis.
2.5: Yan Suusa kataman issi Mardikiyoosa geetetiya Ayhude asi de7ees. I Ya7ira na7a; Ya7iri Same7a na7a; Same7i Biniyaame koche gidida Qiisa na7a.
2.6: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Yihuda kawa Yo7akinanne hara Ayhude asaa olan di77idi efida wode Mardikiyoosi entara bis.
2.7: I ba aawa ishaa na7iw, Ibraawetho doonan Hadaso geetetiya Astiro baara wothidi dichees. Astira medhoninne geesan daro mala lo77o. I aawaynne aayiya hayqidaape guye, Mardikiyoosi iyo efidi, ba na7a oothidi dichis.
2.8: Kawoy kessida awaajuwanne kiitaa maaran, Suusa katama yida dooretida daro geela7otape issinniya Astiro. Iya yada, maccasas giigida keetha kaapo gidida Heega aawatetha garsan de7asu.
2.9: Heegi Astiro be7ida wode in daro ufaytis; iyo dumma xeellis. Ellesidi maanaw dumma kathinne bolla tiyetiyaba iw immis. Qassi iyo matan haggaazana mela kawo gadhope dooretida laapun na7atethi, maccasata giigida keethan, kifile ubbaafe aadhidi lo77iya kifilen iyonne entana wothis.
2.10: Mardikiyoosi iw koyrottidi odidaysada, Astira Ayhude asi gideysa oodeska odabuuku.
2.11: Qassi Mardikiyoosi Astira waana de7iyakonne iw haniyaba be7anaw, maccasa keetha sinthara gallas gallas gedenne haa hemetees.
2.12: Geela7oti kawako gelanaape koyrottidi, issi laythi kumethi banta malaa loythishe gam7oosona. Hessika, koyro usupun ageena karbe zayten gorpetishe gam7idi, nam7antho usupun ageena qassi, lo77o sawiya shitton gorpetoosona.
2.13: Hessafe guye, issi geela7iya kawako geliya wodey gakiya wode, ba koyida ma7uwa ma7a lo77ada, maccasa keethafe keyada, kawoy de7iya bessa gelawusu.
2.14: Qamma gelada, kawuwara aqidaape guye, wonta guura keyiko, maccasati de7iya hara keethi iyo efoosona. He keethaas kaapo gidida kawo shuufay Shashagaazi iyo naagees. Kawoy dosidi I sunthaa xeegidi, “Ebelto ehite” goonna ixiko, iya nam7antho kawako gelanaw danda7uku.
2.15: Hessi hanishin, kawako geliya tari Astiro gakis. Astira Mardikiyoosa aawa ishaa Abikaala na7iw; Mardikiyoosi ba na7a oothidi dichidaaro. Iya maccasas giigida keethaas kaapo gidida kawo shuufa Hegayi zoridaysada ma7o ma7asu. Iyo be7ida ubbay I malaa nashshis.
2.16: Arxekisisi kawotida laapuntha laythan, Tebeeta geetetiya tammantho ageenan Astira kawoy de7iya bessaa gelasu.
2.17: Iya Gelida wode, kawoy hara maccasa ubbaafe aathidi, iyo dosis; qassi hara geela7ota ubbaafe in ufaytis. Hessa gisho, kawotetha kallachaa I huuphen wothidi, iyo Asxiini bessan kawo macho oothis.
2.18: Hessafe guye, kawoy Astiri bonchuwas gita gibira giigisidi, halaqatanne biitta ayseysata xeegis. Qassi ba kawotethaa giddon ufaysa ba7aaley bonchetana mela awaajis. Biitta ubbaas issi laytha giira maaris. Imotaka ba keehatetha mela huuphen huuphen immis. Mardikiyoosi Maquwa Laallis
2.19: Geela7oti nam7antho shiiqidi de7ishin, Mardikiyoosi kawa dabaaban uttiya asape issuwa gidis.
2.20: Mardikiyoosi, “Neeni Ayhude gideysa oodeska odopa” gida gisho, Astira ha77i gakanaw oodeska odabuuku. Kase na7atethan kiiteteysada, ha77ika iyaw kiitetawusu.
2.21: Mardikiyoosi kawo keethan oothishe de7iya wode, kawoy de7iya kifileta geliya pengiya naagiya kawo shuufatape nam7ati, Gabatinne Taari kawa Arxekisisa ixidi, wodhanaw maqetidosona.
2.22: Enta maquwa Mardikiyoosi si7idi, kawe Astiris odin, iyaka Mardikiyoosa sunthan kawas odasu.
2.23: Kawoy hanidaba pilgidi xeelliya wode, oday tuma gididi bentin, he nam7u asata kaqidi wodhis. Ha hanotay kawa Arxekisisa Taarike xaafiya maxaafan xaafetis.

3.1: Hessafe guye, kawoy Arxekisisi Haama geetetiya baara ootheysa shuumatetha dhoqisidi, ba halaqata halaqa oothidi shuumis. Haama aaway Hamadaati Agaaga koche.
3.2: Kawoy kiittidi wothida gisho, kawo gadho pengen oothiya halaqati ubbay Haami aadhiya wode gulbatidi iya bonchoosona. Gidoshin, Mardikiyoosi Haamas gulbatonanne iya bonchona ixis.
3.3: He wode kawo gadho pengen oothiya halaqati Mardikiyoosa, “Ayis kawa kiitaa polonna ixay?” yaagidi,
3.4: gallas gallas iyaw odoosona. Shin I enti odeysa si7anaw koybeenna. Ubba qassi, “Taani Ayhude asi gidiya gisho, Haama gulbatanawunne iya bonchanaw danda7ike” yaagis. Hessafe guye, “Mardikiyoosi odiya gaasuwa si7idi, Haami waanandeesha!” yaagidi iyaw odidosona.
3.5: Mardikiyoosi baw gulbatonaysanne bana bonchonaysa Haami erida wode hanqo eexis.
3.6: Hessa bolla qassi, Mardikiyoosi Ayhude asi gideysa eridi, iya xalaala wodhoy laafaba gidi qopida gisho, Arxekisisa kawotethan de7iya Ayhude kocha ubbaa dhaysanaw qopis.
3.7: Arxekisisi kawotida tammanne nam7antho laythan, Nisaane geetetiya koyro ageenan, Ayhudeta wodhiya ageenanne gallasa eranaw, Purima geetetiya saamaa iya sinthan yeggana mela Haami kiittis. He saamay wodhida maaran, Adaare geetetiya tammanne nam7antho ageenan, tammanne heedzantho gallas Ayhudeti wuriya gallas gideysi qashetis.
3.8: Hessafe guye, Haami kawa Arxekisisako haysada yaagis; “Ne kawotethaa giddon ubba bessan laaletidi de7iya issi kochay de7ees. Enta de7o maaray hara asaysafe dumma; hessa xalaala gidonashin, enti kawo higgiyas haaretokona. Hessa gisho, neeni enta de7o gada si77i giiko, hessi lo77o gidenna.
3.9: Hessa gisho kawaw, ha qofay nena ufaysiko, ha asata wodhidi dhaysana mela awaajo kessa. Hessa ne oothiko, taani heedzu xeetanne oytamu mukulu kilo giraame bira kawo buqura minjiya keetha gelsanaada, ne kawotethaa ayseysatas immana” yaagis.
3.10: Kawoy ba maata erisanaw awaajuwa bolla wothiya migiddo maatame ba biradhiyafe kessidi, Ayhudeta morke gidida, Agaaga kochaas, Hamadaata na7aa Haamas immis.
3.11: Kawoy Haama, “Neeni immana gida biray ne matan de7o; shin ha asata bolla ne dosidaba ootha” yaagis.
3.12: Hessa gisho, koyro ageenan, tammanne heedzantho gallasan, Haami kawa xaafeta ubbaa xeegidi, he awaajoy biitta ubban de7iya asaas dumma dumma doonaninne dumma dumma pidalen xaafetidi, kawope garsara biitta haareysatas, awuraja haareysatasinne dere halaqata ubbaas kiitetanaada kiittis. Awaajoy kawa Arxekisisa sunthan xaafetidi, migiddo maatamey iya bolla wosetin,
3.13: kiitetidaysati iya kawotethaa ubbaa gathanaada kiitetidosona. He awaajoy, “Adaare geetetiya tammanne nam7antho ageenan tammanne heedzantho gallasan, Ayhude ubbaa, yalaga, cima, macca, addiyanne, nayta ashshona issi gallas wursidi wodhidi; enta shaluwaka bonqite” yaagees.
3.14: Hessa gisho, he qashetida gallasay gakiya wode asi ubbay giigetanaada, he awaajoy biitta ubbaa kiitetisinne asa ubbaas awaajetis.
3.15: Kawoy kiitidaysati biitta ubbaa kiitaa gathidosona. Qassi Suusa katamanka odetis. Yaatin, Suusa katamaa asa ubbay daggamis. Shin kawuwaranne Haamara issife uttidi, woyne ushsha uyoosona.

4.1: Mardikiyoosi ha hanidaba ubbaa si7ida wode, azzanidi ba ma7uwa peedhidi, kayo ma7o ma7idi, ba huuphen bido qolis. Ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, yibbata yeeho yeekishe, katamaa giddon yuuyis.
4.2: Kayo ma7o ma7idi kawo keethi gelanaw oonika danda7onna gisho, I kawo keethi geliya pengiya gakanaw bis.
4.3: Kawa awaajoy si7etida biitta ubban Ayhudeta giddon gita kayoy, xoomi, yeehoynne zelelsi doometis. Entafe daroti qassi kayo ma7o ma7idi, kayotanaw bido bolla uttidosona.
4.4: Astiri dangirixetinne iyo naagiya shuufati yidi, Mardikiyoosaba iw odida wode iya daro azzanasu. Mardikiyoosi kayo ma7uwa qaaridi, hara ma7o ma7ana mela iyaw ma7o yeddasu; shin I ekonna ixis.
4.5: Hessafe guye Astira, kawoy iw kiitetana mela wothida Hataka geetetiya shuufa xeegada, Mardikiyoosa metoy aybeko qassi I ayis kayotiyako erana mela iyako kiittasu.
4.6: Hataki kawo keethi geliya pengiya matan katamaa dabaaban de7iya Mardikiyoosako bis.
4.7: Mardikiyoosi, ba bolla gakidaba ubbaa qoncisidi, iyaw odis. Qassi Ayhudeta kumethi wursanaw Haami kawo buqura minjiya keethaas immanaw qopida miishiya likiyara ubbaa ashshona geeshshidi odis.
4.8: Hessa xalaala gidonashin, Ayhudeta wursanaw Suusa kataman keyida awaajoy xaafetida worqatiya Astiris immana melanne haniyaba ubbaa iw odana mela odis. Qassi Astira kawako gelada, ba asay wuronnaada gaannatana mela Hatakas odis.
4.9: Hataki yidi, Mardikiyoosi gidaba ubbaa Astiris odis.
4.10: Astira, Hataka zaarada, Mardikiyoosako haysada yaagada kiittasu.
4.11: “Macca gidin, adde gidin, oonika xeegetonna de7ishe, kawuwara gahetanaw kawo gadhos giddo dabaaba geliko, hayqo. Shin I xeegetonna kawako geliya wode kawoy ba worqa xam7aa xeeraa iyako zaaridi bessiko, he uraa xalaali paxa attees. Ha higgiya kawa zoreysatape bidi, coo asaa gakanaw de7iya asi ubbay erees. Shin taani hastamu gallas gidoosape kawako gelanaw xeegeta erike” yaagasu.
4.12: Mardikiyoosi Astira kiitida kiitaa si7idaape guye,
4.13: haysada yaagidi iiko kiittis; “Taani kawo gadhon de7iya gisho, hara Ayhudetape attishin, tana bochiyabay baawa gada qopofa!
4.14: Neeni haysa mela woden si77i giiko, Ayhudetas maadoy harasoope yaana. Enti tuma attana; shin neeninne ne aawa keethaa asay hayqana. Neeni kawo macho gidada yiday haysa mela wodeseko ooni erii?” yaagis.
4.15: Astira Mardikiyoosako haysada yaagada zaarada kiittasu;
4.16: “Bada Suusa kataman de7iya Ayhudeta ubbaa shiisha; xoomidi taw woossite. Heedzu gallasinne heedzu qammi wurana gakanaw, kathi moopite; haathe uyopite. Taani tana haggaaziya maccatara hessada xoomana. Hessafe guye, higgiyan digetidaba gidikoka, kawoy de7iya bessaa taani gelana. Taani hayqikoka hayqana” yaagasu.
4.17: Mardikiyoosi bidi, Astira iya kiittidaysada ubbaa oothis.

5.1: Xoomay doometin heedzantho gallas Astira kawotetha ma7o ma7ada, kawo gadhon giddo dabaaba gelada eqasu. Kawoy kawo keethi geliya pengiyan de7iya ba araatan uttis.
5.2: Astira gelada, giddo dabaaban eqidaaro kawoy be7idi in ufaytida gisho, ba worqa xam7aa iiko miccis. Iya shiiqada xam7aa xeeraa bochasu.
5.3: Kawoy iiko, “Kawe Astire, neeni taako ayis yadii? Qassi neeni tana oychiyabay aybee? Hari attoshin ta kawotethaafe baggaa gidikoka, ta new immana” yaagis.
5.4: Astira zaarada, “Kawaw, nena ufaysiyabaa gidiko, taani new giigisida gibira maanaw neera Haamara nam7ay hachi omarsi yaako dosayis” yaagasu.
5.5: Hessafe guye kawoy, “Nuuni Astira giigisida gibiras baanaw Haama ellesidi ehite” yaagis. Hessa gisho nam7ay he bessaa bidosona.
5.6: Enti issife woyne ushsha uyishin, kawoy nam7antho Astiro, “Neeni tana woossiyabay aybee? Taani new immana. Qassi neeni tana oychiyabay aybee? Hari attoshin ta kawotethaafe baggaa gidikoka, ta ne oysha polana” yaagis.
5.7: Astira zaarada ta oycheynne ta woossey haysa;
5.8: “Kawaw, neeni tanan ufaytiyaba gidiko, qassi taani woossiyaba immanawunne ta oysha polanaw neeni dosiyaba gidiko, wonto ta giigisiya hara gibiras neera Haamara yaana mela oychayis. Taani ay koyaako he wode new qoncisana” yaagasu. Haami Mardikiyoosa Wodhisanaw Maqis
5.9: Haami gibira bessaafe keyidi biya wode, daro ufaytida gisho, ba wozanan ufaysi noocu gishe bis. Shin I kawo keethi geliya pengiya matara aadhidi biya wode yan uttida Mardikiyoosa be7is. Iyaw dendiboonaysanne yayyidi kokoriboonaysa be7idi Haami yilo eexis.
5.10: Gidoshin, ba yiluwa danda7idi bidi ba soo gakis. Hessafe guye, ba laggetanne ba machiw Zosaara xeegisidi,
5.11: Haami ba duretetha likiya, ba adde nayta taybuwa, kawoy bana bonchida bonchuwanne hara halaqatapenne kawo moorinatape aadhiya shuumatethi immidi, waatidi iya bonchidaako nashetis.
5.12: Gujidika Haami, “Hari attoshin kawiya Astiraka ba giigisida gibiras kawuwara baana mela taape attishin, hara oonaka xeegabuuku. Qassi wontoka kawuwara baana mela tana xeegasu.
5.13: Shin Ayhude gidida Mardikiyoosi kawo keethi geliya pengen uttidaysa be7iya wode ha ubbayka tana ufaysenna” yaagis.
5.14: He wode iya machiya Zosaaranne iya laggeti ubbay haysada yaagidosona; “Neeni ishatamu wadha mithi esisada wonto guura Mardikiyoosi kaqetana mela kawa oycha. Hessafe guye, ufaytashe gibira maanaw ba” yaagidosona. Haama ha qofay ufaysida gisho, enti gidaysada kaqa mithi giigisis.

6.1: He wode qamma kawa dhiskoy ekonna ixis. Hessa gisho, kawoy kawo taarike xaafiya maxaafaa ehidi, kase hanida taariketa iyaw nabbabana mela kiittis.
6.2: Nabbabetida taariketape issoy Mardikiyoosi oothidaba. Hessika, kawoy de7iya kifiliya naagiya, Gabatanne Taara geetetiya nam7u shuufati kawa wodhanaw maqida maquwa Mardikiyoosi qoncisis.
6.3: Kawoy, “Yaatin, I hessa oothida gisho iyaw imetida shuumatethay woyko woytoy aybee?” yaagis. Kawa aylleti zaaridi, “Iyaw aykoy oosetibeenna” yaagidosona.
6.4: Kawoy zaaridi, “Kare dabaaban de7ey oonee?” yaagis. He wode ba giigisida mithan Mardikiyoosa kaqanaw, kawa oychanaw, Haami kare dabaaba gelishe de7ees.
6.5: Kawa aylleti, “Haami kare dabaaban eqis” yaagidosona. Kawoy zaaridi, “Haa gela giite” yaagis.
6.6: Haami gelidaape guye kawoy, “Kawoy bonchanaw dosiya asas ay oothanaw koshshii?” yaagidi oychis. Haami, “Kawoy taape haraa oona bonchanaw dosii?” yaagidi ba wozanan qopis.
6.7: Hessa gisho, Haami kawas yaagidi zaaris; “Kawoy bonchanaw dosiya asaas,
6.8: kawoy ba kawotetha ma7uwa ehiso; ba toggiya para huuphen guche wotho.
6.9: Hessafe guye, kawoy ba moorinatape issi daro bonchetidaysa xeegisidi, kawotetha ma7o iya mayzanaadanne kawa para bolla iya utisidi, katamaa dabaaba kessanaada kiitto. Yaatiko he daro bonchetida moorinnay iya sinthan hemetishe, ‘Kawoy bonchanaw dosiya uraas haysada oothees’ yaagidi awaajo” yaagis.
6.10: Kawoy zaaridi, Haama haysada yaagidi kiittis; “Hiza ellesa dendada kawotetha ma7uwanne ta para ekada, ne gidaysada Ayhude gidida Mardikiyoosas ootha. I kawo keethi geliya pengen de7ees. Ne gidaysafe issibaaka ashshofa” yaagis.
6.11: Hessa gisho, Haami Mardikiyoosa kawotetha ma7o mayzidi, kawa para bolla utisis. Qassi katamaa dabaaban iyape sinthara hemetishe, “Kawoy bonchanaw dosiya uraas haysada oothees” yaagidi awaajis.
6.12: Hessafe guye, Mardikiyoosi kawo keethi penge guye simmidi bis. Shin Haami daro azzanida gisho, guuluntidi, ellesishe ba soo bis.
6.13: Bana gakidaba ubbaa ba mache Zosaarisinne ba laggetas odis. Enti iyako, “Iya sinthan neeni kawuyanaw doomida ha addey, Mardikiyoosi, Ayhude asi gidiko, ne iyara eqetada, iya xoonanaw danda7aka; tuma I nena dhaysana” yaagidosona.
6.14: Enti buroo hessa odetishin, kawa shuufati gakidi, Haama Astira giigisida gibiras ellesidi efidosona.

7.1: Kawoynne Haami Astiri gibira maanaw bidosona.
7.2: He nam7antho gallas gibiras bidi, enti woyne ushsha uyishin, kawoy, “Kawe Astire, neeni woossiyabay aybee? Taani new immana. Neeni tana oychiyabay aybee? Hari attoshin ta kawotethaafe baggaa gidikoka, taani ne oysha polana” yaagidi oychis.
7.3: Kawiya Astira zaarada, “Kawaw, neeni tanan ufaytidaba gidiko, qassi ta oyshaaka polanaw dosiyaba gidiko, ta woosaynne ta oyshay tanne ta asay hayqonna attana melasa.
7.4: Tanne ta asay issoyka attonna ubbay hayqos bayzetida. Nuuni bayzetiday macca ayllenne adde aylle gididi de7anaasa gidiyako, taani si77i gaana. Hessa mela metoy kawa waaysanaw bessiyaba gidenna” yaagasu.
7.5: Kawoy Arxekisisi zaaridi, “Hessa oothanaw xaltaamiday oonee? I he addey awun de7ii?” yaagidi kawiw Astiro oychis.
7.6: Astira, “Nu morkey, nuna dhaysanaw koyey, ha iita addiya Haama” yaagasu. He wode Haami kawa sinthaninne kawe sinthan daro dagammis.
7.7: Kawoy daro hanqetidi, ba uttida bessaafe dendi, kawo gadho atakilte bessaa bis. Shin Haami kawoy iya bolla iitabaa ehanaw qopidaysa erida gisho, Astira iya hayqope ashshana mela woossanaw guye attis.
7.8: Kawoy atakilte bessaafe simmidi geliya wode, Haami kawiiw Astiro maarota woossanaw, iya uttida arsa bolla gufannidaysa be7is. Kawoy yilo eexidi, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “La ha addey haysan kawo keethan, ta sinthan, kawiw kawushanaw koyiyee?” yaagis. Kawoy buroo hessa haasayishin, kawo shuufati yidi, Haama som7uwa goozidosona.
7.9: Entafe issoy, Harboona geetetiya shuufay, “Kawaw, Haami nena hayqope ashshida Mardikiyoosa kaqanaw essida ishatamu wadha mithi iya son de7ees” yaagis. Kawoy zaaridi, “Haama efidi, he mithan kaqite” yaagidi kiittis.
7.10: Hessa gisho, Mardikiyoosa kaqana gidi giigisida mithan Haami kaqetis. Hessafe guye, kawa hanqoy dochis.

8.1: Ayhudeta morkey Haami kaqetida gallas kawoy Arxekisisi Haama shaluwa ubbaa kawe Astiris immis. Qassi Mardikiyoosi iw mata dabbo gideysa Astira kawas odasu. Hessa gisho, he wodepe doomidi, Mardikiyoosi kawako gelanaw danda7is.
8.2: Kawoy Haamape guye ekida ba migiddo maatamiya kessidi, Mardikiyoosas immis. Astira Mardikiyoosa Haama shaluwa bolla aawayada shuumasu.
8.3: Hessafe guye, Astira yeekashe, kawa toho bolla kundada, Agaaga koche gidida Haami Ayhudeta bolla tukida iita maqoy ooson pee7onna mela kawa woossasu.
8.4: Yaatin, kawoy ba worqa xam7aa iw miccin, iya denda eqada,
8.5: “Kawaw, neeni tanan ufaytidaba gidiko, qassi ta oyshaaka polanaw neeni dosidaba gidiko, ne kawotethaa giddon de7iya Ayhude ubbaa kumethi wodhana mela, Agaaga koche gidida Hamadaata na7ay Haami kessida awaajuwa shaariya hara awaajo kessanaada woossayis.
8.6: Ha ubba dhayoy ta asaa bollanne ta dabbota bolla gakiya wode taani si77i gada waanna xeello?” yaagasu.
8.7: Hessafe guye, kawoy Arxekisisi, kawiw Astironne Ayhude gidida Mardikiyoosa haysada yaagis; “Haami Ayhudeta wodhanaw awaajo kessida gisho, taani mithan iya kaqisidaysanne iya shaluwa ubbaa kawe Astiris immidaysa hinte ereeta.
8.8: Gidoshin, kawo gadho maatame wothin, kawa sunthan keyida awaajoy laametanaw danda7enna. Hessa gisho, hinte hinte baggara Ayhudeta maaddanaw koydaba xaafite. Hessa ta sunthan xaafidi, kawo maatamiya iya bolla wothite” yaagis.
8.9: Nisaane geetetiya heedzantho ageenan, laatamanne heedzantho gallasan, Mardikiyoosi kawa xaafeta ubbaa xeegidi, Hindefe bidi Tophe gakanaw de7iya xeetanne laatamanne laapun biittatan kawope garsara haareysatas, awuraja ayseysatasinne biitta halaqatas yeddiya awaajo xaafisis. Awaajoy dumma dumma doonaninne dumma dumma pidalen xaafetis; qassi Ayhudetaska enta doonaninne enta pidalen xaafetis.
8.10: Mardikiyoosi he awaajuwa ubbaa kawa Arxekisisa sunthan xaafisidi, kawo maatame wothidi, kawo gaaxatan dhiiketida, eesotiya parata toggiya asata bolla biitta ubbaa yeddis.
8.11: Kawoy kessida awaajoy, katamatan de7iya Ayhudeti issife shiiqanawunne banta bolla yaaba oletidi zaaranaw danda7ana mela maata immees. Qassi ola miishiya oykidi, ay biittafeka, enta olanaw yeyisata, enta naytaranne enta machetara ubbaa issuwaka ashshona wodhanawunne enta shaluwa bonqidi ekanaw maata immees.
8.12: Ayhudeti kawa Arxekisisa kawotethan hessa oothanaw qachida gallasay, Adaare geetetiya tammanne nam7antho ageenan, tammanne heedzantho gallasaana.
8.13: Kawa awaajuwa biittata ubban de7iya asay eranaada, higge gididi awaajetis. Hessika Ayhudeti banta morketa bolla halo keyanaw bantana giigisanaw danda7isees.
8.14: Kiiteteysati kawo keetha parata toggidi, kawa kiitaa gathanaw ellesidi bidosona. Qassi Suusa kataman ha awaajoy asa ubbaas odetis.
8.15: Mardikiyoosi kaalosenne bootha kawotetha ma7o ma7idi, ocha teera daaniyanne liinope oosetida kaaba bollara ma7is; qassi gita worqa kallachaa wothidi, kawa sinthafe keyis. Suusa katamay ililisaninne ufaysan noocu gis.
8.16: Hessi Ayhudetas gita ufaysi, ililsinne boncho wode gidis.
8.17: Hessa gisho, kawa awaajoy nabbabetida biittaninne katamaa ubban de7iya Ayhudeti gita ba7aale kessidi, ufaytishenne gibira mishe pee7idosona. Hessa gaason Ayhudetas yayyidi, yan de7iya hara zare asaape daroti Ayhude gididosona.

9.1: Adaare geetetiya tammanne nam7antho ageenan tammanne heedzantho gallasay gakis. He gallas, kawoy koyro kessida awaajuwa maaran morketi Ayhudeta xoonana gida qopida gallasaa. Shin oday shireti wodhin, Ayhudeti banta morketa xoonidosona.
9.2: Kawa Arxekisisa kawotethan de7iya Ayhudeti ubbay bantana qohanaw koyiya ubbaa dhaysanaw banta kataman kataman issife shiiqidosona. Hara zare gidida asay entaw yayyida gisho, entara ay asika eqetanaw danda7ibeenna.
9.3: Enti Mardikiyoosas yayyida gisho, kawope garsara biitta haareysati, awuraja ayseysatinne biitta halaqati ubbay Ayhudeta maaddidosona.
9.4: Mardikiyoosi kawo gadhon gita maati imetidanne wolqan guji guji biya asi gideysi he kawotethan de7iya biitta ubban eretis.
9.5: He gallas Ayhudeti banta morketa ubbaa mashshan goyridi wursidosona; bantana ixiya ubbaa bolla koydaba oothidosona.
9.6: Waanna katama gidida Suusa xalaalan ichashu xeetu asaa wodhidosona.
9.7: Enti Parshandata, Dalfoona, Aspata,
9.8: Porata, Adala, Ardata,
9.9: Parmashita, Arsaya, Ardayanne Wayzata wodhidosona.
9.10: Enti Ayhudeta morke gidida Haama nayta. Shin enti enta shaluwa bonqibookona.
9.11: Ayhudeti Suusa kataman wodhida asaa tayboy aapuneko he gallas kawas odetis.
9.12: Yaatin, kawoy kawiw Astiro, “Ayhudeti waanna katama gidida Suusa xalaalan ichashu xeetu asaanne tammu Haama nayta wodhidosona. Hessi hessa gidiko, kawa biittatan enti wodhiday aapuna gidandesha! Qassi ha77i neeni woossiyabay aybee? Taani new immana. Neeni tana oychiyabay harabay aybee? Taani new polana” yaagis.
9.13: Astira zaarada, “Kawa ha qofay ufaysiko, Suusa kataman de7iya Ayhudeti hachi oothidaysada wontoka ootho. Qassi tammu Haama nayta ahaa mitha bolla kaqanaada kiitta” yaagasu.
9.14: Kawoy hessa oothana mela kiittis. Awaajoy Suusa kataman nam7antho awaajetin, tammu Haama nayta ahay kocaa bolla kaqetis.
9.15: Adaare geetetiya ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallasan, Suusa kataman de7iya Ayhudeti issife shiiqidi, hara heedzu xeetu asaa wodhidosona; shin ha77ika enta shaluwa bonqibookona.
9.16: He wode Suusa katamaape gaxara de7iya kawa biittatan de7iya Ayhudeti issife shiiqidi, banta morketa ubbaa olidosona. Enti laapun tammanne ichashu mukulu asaa wodhidaape guye banta morketape shempidosona. Shin enta shaluwa bonqibookona.
9.17: Haysi ubbay haniday Adaare geetetiya ageenan tammanne heedzantho gallasaana. Tammanne oyddantho gallasan enti shempidosona; gibira mishe, uyishenne ufaytishe pee7iya gallas oothidosona. Purima Ba7aale
9.18: Shin Suusa kataman de7iya Ayhudeti tammanne heedzanthonne tammanne oyddantho gallasan wodhishe pee7idi, tammanne ichashantho gallasan shempidosona. Enti he gallasaa mishe, uyishenne ufaytishe pee7iya gallas oothidosona.
9.19: Hessa gisho, guutha katamatan de7iya Ayhudeti hachi gakanaw Adaare geetetiya ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallasaa ba7aale gallas oothidi bonchoosona. He gallasan moosonanne uyoosona; qassi issoy issuwas imota immoosona.
9.20: Mardikiyoosi ha hanida taarike ubbaa xaafidi, kawa Arxekisisa biitta ubban, haahoninne matan de7iya Ayhude ubbaas yeddis.
9.21: He dabdaabiyan Mardikiyoosi Adaare ageenan tammanne oyddanthonne tammanne ichashantho gallasata, Ayhudeti laythan laythan ba7aale gallas oothidi bonchana mela entaw odis.
9.22: He gallasati Ayhudeti banta morketape shempo demmida gallasata. Qassi he ageenay enta azzanoynne yeehoy ufaysaninne gibira muussan laametida ageena. Hessa gisho, enti muussaninne ushshan ufaytishe, issoy issuwasinne manqotas katha imota immishe bonchana mela entaw odis.
9.23: Ayhudeti Mardikiyoosi immida kiitaa ekidi, enti bonchanaw doomida baaliya, laythan laythan aggonna bonchanaw ma7idosona.
9.24: Agaaga kochay, Hamadaata na7ay Haami, Ayhudeta ubbaa morkey, enta dhaysanaw kase maqetidi enta wodhiya ageenanne gallasa eranaw Purima geetetiya saama yegisis.
9.25: Shin Astira kawako gelidaape guye, Haami Ayhudeta bolla maqida iita maqoy ubbay guye simmidi, iya bolla poletanaada kawoy xuufen kiittis. Yaatin, Haaminne iya tammu nayti ahay mithan kaqetis
9.26: Hessa gisho, ha nam7u gallasati Purima Ba7aale geetetoosona. Ha dabdaabiyan entaw xaafetidaba ubbaa gaason, enti banta ayfen be7idaba gaasoninne enta bolla gakidaba gaason
9.27: Ayhudeti bantaw, banta kochatasinne Ayhude gidanaw koyiya ubbaas, ha baaliya woga oothidi bonchidosona. Hessika laythan laythan aggonna ha nam7u gallasata bonchana melasa.
9.28: He gallasati yeleta ubban, katamata ubban, Ayhudeta keetha ubbaninne biitta ubban bonchetana mela qashetis. Hessika, Ayhudeti awude gidikoka, ha Purima gallasata bonchanawunne he gallasatan hanidabay enta kochan dogetonna mela qopanaw bessees.
9.29: Hessafe guye, Abikaala na7iya, kawiya Astiranne Ayhude addey Mardikiyoosi, Purima Baaliyaba kase xaafida dabdaabiya minthanaw haysa nam7antho dabdaabiya kumetha maatan xaafidosona.
9.30: He dabdaabeti Arxekisisa kawotethan, xeetanne laatamanne laapun biittan de7iya Ayhudeta ubbaas saroynne wopatethi gido giya sarotara xaafetidi kiitetidosona.
9.31: Qassi enti kase xoomanawunne kayotanaw wogaa kessidaysada, ha77i enta gidin, sinthafe yaana enta kochata gidin, ha Purima gallasata laythan laythan woga oothidi bonchana mela he dabdaabeti qoncisosona. Hessi Ayhude addey Mardikiyoosinne kawiya Astira issife zoretidi kessida kiita.
9.32: Kawe Astiri kiitay Purima Ba7aale wogaa minthis; ika maxaafan xaafetis.

10.1: Kawoy Arxekisisi ba kawotethan gaxape gaxa gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay giira qanxana mela wolqan kiittis.
10.2: I oothida gitanne malaalsiya oosoti ubbay, Mardikiyoosaka dhoqu oothidi waati bonchidaako qoncisiya taarikey Meedonanne Farse kawotetha taarike maxaafan xaafetis.
10.3: Maatan gidiko, Mardikiyoosi kawa Arxekisisape nam7antho. I Ayhudetanka daro bonchetidanne dosetida asi. I ba ase gidida Ayhudeti, sarotethaninne hirgi bayna daana mela daro daaburida asi.

1.1: Uxe biittan Iyyoba geetetiya issi asi de7ees; I borey bayna asi, suure asi, Xoosse yayyiyanne iitabaape haakida asi.
1.2: Iyaw laapun adde naytinne heedzu macca nayti de7oosona.
1.3: Iyaw laapun mukulu dorsati, heedzu mukulu gimaleti, ichashu xeetu waatha boorati, ichashu xeetu macca haretinne daro aylleti de7oosona. Doloha bagga biittan de7iya asa ubbaafe I aadhida dure asi.
1.4: Iya adde nayti banta son son gibira giigisidi, banta heedzu micheta xeegidi issife moosonanne uyoosona.
1.5: Gibira gallasati poletiya wode Iyyobi ba nayta xeegisidi, “Ooni eri ta nayti banta wozanan Xoosse baaddidi nagara oothonna aggokona” gidi wonta guura dendidi, entana geeshshanaw ba nayta issuwa issuwa sunthaa xeegidi xuussa yarsho yarshees. Iyyobi hessa ubba wode oothees. Iyyoba Koyro Paacetetha
1.6: Issi gallas kiitanchoti Godaa sinthan bentanaw yidosona; Xalaheyka qassi entara yis.
1.7: Goday Xalahiyako, “Neeni awupe yadii?” yaagis. Xalahey, “Taani sa7a ubban yaanne haanne yuuyashe gam7as” yaagidi zaaris.
1.8: Goday Xalahiyako, “Yaatin, neeni ta aylliya Iyyoba loytha be7adii? Sa7a bolla iya mela borey bayna asi, suure asi, Xoosse yayyiyanne iitabaape haakida asi baawa” yaagis.
1.9: Xalahey zaaridi, “Tuma Iyyobi Xoossas coo yayyii?
1.10: Iyanne iya soo asaa, iyaw de7iyaba ubbaa neeni dirada naagabikii? I oothiya ooso ubbaa neeni anjida gisho iya mehe wudey biitta ubbaa bolla daris.
1.11: Shin neeni ne kushiya yeddada, iyaw de7iya aquwa ubbaa shociyako, tuma I nena som7on baaddana” yaagis.
1.12: Goday Xalahiyako, “Ero lo77o, iyaw de7iyaba ubbay ne kushena, shin iya bochofa” yaagis. Hessafe guye, Xalahey Godaa sinthafe keyidi bis.
1.13: Issi gallas Iyyoba adde naytinne macca nayti banta bayra ishaa son moosonanne woyne ushshi uyoosona.
1.14: Issi kiitetida asi Iyyobako yidi, “Nuuni boorata waaxidi goyishin, haretika nu matan mishin,
1.15: Saaba biitta asati akeekona yidi ola kessidi, ubbaa bonqidi ekidosona; qassi aylletaka mashshan wodhidosona. Yaatin, taani ta xalaala attada ha hanidaba new odanaw yas” yaagis.
1.16: I buroo odishin hara asi yidi, “Salope tami wodhidi dorsatanne heemmeyisata mis. Yaatin, taani ta xalaala attada ha hanidaba new odanaw yas” yaagis.
1.17: I buroo odishin hara asi yidi, “Kaldaaweti heedzu cugan shaaketidi yidi, nuna olidi gimaleta ubbaa eki bidosona; aylletaka mashshan wodhidosona. Yaatin, taani ta xalaala attada ha hanidaba new odanaw yas” yaagis.
1.18: I buroo odishin, hara asi yidi, “Ne adde naytinne macca nayti banta bayra ishaa son misheenne woyne ushshi uyishee de7ishin,
1.19: wolqaama gotey akeekona mela biittafe dendidi, keethaa shocin, keethay enta bolla kundidi nayta wodhis. Yaatin, taani ta xalaala attada ha hanidaba new odanaw yas” yaagis.
1.20: Hessafe guye, Iyyobi dendidi, kayos ba ma7uwa pheedhis; ba huuphiya buluusis; biittan gufannidi goyinnishe,
1.21: “Taani ta aaye ulope kallo yeletas; hayqasheka taani kallo baana; Goday immis; Goday zaaridi ekis; Godaa sunthay galatetto” yaagis.
1.22: Ha ubbanka Iyyobi nagaraa oothibeenna; Xoossaa bolla iitaba odetibeenna.

2.1: Hara gallas kiitanchoti Godaa sinthan bentanaw yidosona; Xalaheyka qassi entara issife iya sinthan bentanaw yis.
2.2: Goday Xalahiyako, “Neeni awupe yadii?” yaagis. Xalahey Godaako, “Taani sa7a ubban yaanne haanne yuuyashe gam7as” yaagis.
2.3: Goday Xalahiyako, “Neeni ta aylliya Iyyoba loythada be7adii? Sa7a bolla iya mela borey bayna asi, suure asi, Xoosse yayyiyanne iitabaape haakida asi baawa. Gaasoy bayna taani iya dhaysana mela ne tana denthethinka ha77i gakanaw I ba suuretethan minnidi eqis” yaagis.
2.4: Xalahey zaaridi, “Ne shempoy atto” asi geysada asi ba shempuwa gisho baw de7iyaba ubbaa immees.
2.5: Shin, “Neeni ne kushiya yeddada iya asatethaa bochiyako, I nena tuma som7on baaddana” yaagis.
2.6: Goday Xalahiyako, “Ero lo77o, iya wodhopafe attishin, iya bolla ne koydaba oothanaw danda7aasa” yaagis.
2.7: Hessafe guye, Xalahey Godaa sinthafe keyidi, Iyyoba tohope huuphe gakanaw iita madunthan kaa7etana mela oothis.
2.8: Iyyobi bido bolla uttidi kon7an bana goodis.
2.9: Iya machiya, “Ha77i gakanawuka neeni ne suuretetha mintha oykadii? Xoossaa baaddada hayqaaga” yaagasu.
2.10: Iyyobi zaaridi, “Neeni eeya maccasada waanada odetay? Nuuni Xoossaafe lo77oba eki gam7idi, iitabay gakiya wode ekokoyee?” yaagis. Ha waaye ubban Iyyobi Xoossa bolla iitabaa odetibeenna. Heedzu Iyyoba Laggeta
2.11: Heedzu Iyyoba laggeti, Temaana biittafe Elfaazi, Shuuha biittafe Beldadoosinne Na7ima biitta asi gidida Soofari Iyyoba bolla gakida metuwa si7ida wode iyaw qadhetanawunne minthethanaw issife iyako yidosona.
2.12: Enti iya haahon eqidi xeelliya wode I Iyyoba gideysa eribookona. Guyepe iya gideysa erida wode banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona; banta ma7uwa peedhidi, banta huuphen baana qolidosona.
2.13: Enti iyara laapun gallasinne laapun qamma biittan uttidosona. Enti iya waayey keehi daro gideysa be7ida gisho oonika iya odisibeenna.

3.1: -2 Hessafe guye, Iyyobi ba doona dooyidi, ba yeletida gallasaa haysada yaagidi baaddis.
3.3: “Taani qanthatida qammaynne yeletida gallasay baadetidaba gido!
3.4: He gallasay dhuman laameto! Salo Xoossay he gallasaa qopofo; iya bolla poo7oyka poo7opo.
3.5: Sakana dhuminne caagani iya goozo; iya shaarii kammo; iya poo7uwa dhumi qoso.
3.6: He gallasaa qamma sakana dhumi oyko. Laytha giddon de7iya gallasatan taybetofo; ageenata taybonka gelopo.
3.7: He qammay mayno; ufaysa ililsi iyan si7etofo.
3.8: Leewataane denthanaw danda7eysatinne gallasata baaddeysati he gallasaa baaddo.
3.9: He qamman bakali poo7opo; poo7o naagidi demmofo; wonta xalqey iyaw dolopo.
3.10: He gallasay taani ta aaye ulon qanthatonna melanne ha waayiya be7onna mela ashshiboona gisho baadetidaysa gido.
3.11: “Taani ta aaye ulon haatha gidida gidarkina! Ta aaye ulope yeleta wodhida mela hayqida gidarkina!
3.12: Ta aayiya tana ayis ba ki7on ekadesha? Ba dhanthaaka tana ayis dhanthadesha?
3.13: He wode taani hayqidaba gidiyako, ha77i taani shempada dhiskana shin!
3.14: Ha77i laaletida bessata bantaw keexida, ha sa7aa kawotaranne zoreysatara,
3.15: enta keethan worqaynne biray kumida halaqatara issife duufon zin7anashin!
3.16: Woyko bosha gididi yeletida na7ada, gallasa poo7o be7iboona yooga na7ada biitta giddon ayis qosetabikina?
3.17: Duufon iitati banta iita ooso aggoosona; yan daaburanchoti shempoosona.
3.18: He bessan qasho asati shempidi ufaytoosona; enta un7etheyisata waasuwa yan si7okona.
3.19: Gitinne guuthi yan de7ees; aylletika aylletethafe yan la77a keyoosona.
3.20: “Meton de7eysatas, shempoy cametidaysatas, poo7oy ayis imetidee?
3.21: Hayqo amotidi demmonaysatas, qottidi wothida shalope aathidi koyeysatas, de7oy ayis imetidee?
3.22: Duufo gakiya wode ufayteysatas, de7oy ayis imetidee?
3.23: Ogey dhayida uraas, Xoossay iya yuushuwa dirida uraas, poo7oy ayis imetidee?
3.24: Ooley taw kathi gidis; ta waasoy goggiya haathi gidis.
3.25: Taani yayyidabay ta bolla gakis; taani dagammidabay taw hanis.
3.26: Taw metope attishin, saroy, wopinne shempoy baawa” yaagis.

4.1: Temaanape yida Elfaazi zaaridi,
4.2: “Issi asi xaltaamidi neera odetiko neeni lancanee? Shin haasayonna agganay oonee?
4.3: Heko, neeni darota tamaarsadasa; argaacida kusheta minthethadasa.
4.4: Ne qaalay dhubetidaysata koolidi essis; daaburida gulbatata minthis.
4.5: Shin ha77i metoy nena gakin ufaysi qanxadasa; un7i nena teqin dagammadasa.
4.6: Ne Xoossaas yayyeysi nena ammanthidi wothibeennee? Ne suure hemethay new ufaysi gidibeennee?
4.7: “Ane qopa; geeshsha asi gididi dhayday oonee? Suure asi gididi shodetidi dhayday oonee?
4.8: Ta be7idaysada, iitatethi goyidi meto zereysati, iya zaaridi buucana.
4.9: Enti Xoossaafe keya shempon punetidi dhayana; iya hanquwa lacuwan meetetana.
4.10: Iitati gudiya gaammo mela xaaggoosona; shin enta achay meqeretis.
4.11: Shankatidi miyaba dhayida gaammoy hayqeysada, enta naytika laaleteysada iitata nayti laaletana.
4.12: “Issi gallas issi xuuray taako yis; he xuura kalkashan ta si7as.
4.13: Wolqaama dhiskoy ase oykida wode un7ethiya qamma amuho giddon,
4.14: yashshinne kokorsi tana oykis; ta meqethati kokoridosona.
4.15: Carkoy ta som7uwa baqidi aadhis; ta dagammin ta asatethaa ikisey eqis.
4.16: I ta sinthan eqis; shin I aybeko shaakada erabike. Hessafe guye, si77i gida bessafe haysada giya girsaa si7as.
4.17: ‘Hayqiya asi Xoossaa sinthan xillo gidanaw danda7ii? Woyko asi bana medhidaysa sinthan geeshshi gidanaw danda7ii?
4.18: Xoossay ba aylletan ammanetonaba gidiko, ba kiitanchotanka bala demmiyaba gidiko,
4.19: Yaatin, urqa keethan de7eysati, enta de7uwa baasoy biitta gididaysati, guxunepe eeson hayqeysati waananee?
4.20: Wonta bentidi omarsi hayqoosona; oonika hassayonna merinaw dhayoosona.
4.21: Dhishey shodetida dunkaane mela cincatethi bayna hayqoosona.’ ”

5.1: “Iyyoba, new koyana asi de7iko ane xeega! Kiitanchotape oodeko ne xeellanee?”
5.2: Eeya uraa lancey wodhees; akeeki bayna uraa qanaatey dhaysees.
5.3: Eeya uray minnidi de7ishin be7as; shin qoponna iya keethay baadetis.
5.4: Iya nayti saroy bayna daana; pirda dabaaban entaw eqiya asi bayna gisho enti qohetana.
5.5: I shiishida kathaa koshatida asay maana; hari attoshin aguntha giddon dolidaysaka aggokona. Saamotidaysati iya shaluwa ekanaw amottoosona.
5.6: Metoy sa7ape keyenna; waayey biittafe dolenna.
5.7: Tami pinxidi wodheysada, asi metos yeletis.
5.8: “Ta nena gidiyako ta Xoossako shiiqana; ta mootuwaka iya sinthan wothana.
5.9: I taybetonna malaatata, pilgetonna wolqaamabata oothees.
5.10: Ira biittan bukisees; goshsha gadiyas haathe yeddees.
5.11: Kawushata dhoqu dhoqu oothees; kayoteyisata minthethidi ufaysees.
5.12: Enta qofay poletonna mela, genanchota halchuwa hada oothees.
5.13: Cincata enta gene oosuwan oykees; genanchota maquwa aathidi yeggees.
5.14: Gallasay entaw dhuma gidana; seeta gallas dhuman hemetiya asada tattafana.
5.15: Manqota enta morketa mashshafe ashshees; enta wolqaamata kushiyape wothi ekees.
5.16: Hessa gisho, manqotas ufaysi de7ees; geellatethi si77i oothees.”
5.17: “Xoossay seeriya asi anjetidaysa; hessa gisho, Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa seera kadhopa.
5.18: I menthees, shin zaaridi koolees; I madunxisees, shin iya kushey dhallees.
5.19: Usupun qommo qohotape I nena ashshana; laapunthoy nena bochenna.
5.20: Kosha laythi hayqope, ola wode mashshafe nena ashshees.
5.21: I nena iita inxarsafe naagana; boshi gakiya wode yayyaka.
5.22: Bosha bollanne kosha bolla ne miicana; bazzo do7atas yayyaka.
5.23: Ne goshsha biittan shuchi deenna; bazzo do7atara ne saron daana.
5.24: Ne dunkaaney saro gideysa ne erana; ne daraa ne xomoosiya wode aybika pacenna.
5.25: Ne yeletay daranaysanne ne kochay maata mela gidanaysa ne erana.
5.26: Kathi wode naagidi caketeysada, neeni cimatethi kaallada duufo baana.
5.27: “Iyyoba, nuuni hessa ubbaa pilgidi xeellida. Hessi tuma gidiya gisho akeekada eka” yaagis.

6.1: Hessafe guye Iyyobi zaaridi,
6.2: Ta waayeynne ta azzanoy ubbay mizaanen liketidi be7etiyako,
6.3: Abba gaxan de7iya shafiyape aadhidi deexana; Hessa gisho, ta qaalay nena malaalsenashin.
6.4: Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa dongeti tana caddidosona; ta asatethay enta yiishsha uyees; Xoossaa daganthoy ta bolla salpis.
6.5: Harey woyko boori maati de7ishin waassiyee?
6.6: Mal7onna kathi maxiney gelonna meetetiyee? Woyko phuuphulle haathi mal7iyee?
6.7: Hessa mela kathi tana suukeyenna; hessa mela kathi ta miiko tana sakees.
6.8: Ta woosa Xoossi si7iyako aybee? Ta amuwaka taw kunthiyako aybee?
6.9: Xoossaa shene gidin I tana mentherethiyako, I ba kushiya yeddidi tana dhaysiyako,
6.10: Ta Geeshsha Xoossaa qaala kaddaboonna gisho, waayey darikoka ufaysan ta gupana.
6.11: Ta paxa daanaw taw ayba wolqi de7ii? Taw ayba ufaysi de7ishin danda7iyana?
6.12: Ta wolqay shucha meleyee? Woyko ta ashoy naase birata meleyee?
6.13: Taani tana maaddanaw ayba wolqi taw de7ii? maado demmanaw xeelliya bessika baawa.
6.14: Meton de7iya asi Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossas yayyeysa aggikoka, iya laggeti iyaw keehatethi bessanaw koshshees.
6.15: Shin ta ishati hinte iri bukonna wode meliya shaafa mela tana cimmeeta.
6.16: Balgo ageenan ha shaafay shachan kumees.
6.17: Shin boney gakiya wode shachay til7ees; shaafayka melees.
6.18: Caana mehe laaggishe biya zal7anchoti, haathe koyanaw banta ogiyape gaxa keyidi, mela biittan toylatishe dhayoosona.
6.19: Teema biitta zal7anchoti haathe koyoosona; Saaba biitta oge asati ufaysi qanxokona.
6.20: Enti ammanetidi koyidi dhayida gisho yilotidosona, he bessaa gakidi yeellatidosona.
6.21: Hinteka taw he shaafata mela gidideta; tana gakida metuwa be7idi yayyideta.
6.22: Hanoshin ta hintena, “Taw issiba immite” woyko, “Hinte shaluwara tana wozite” gadinaa?
6.23: “Tana ta morketa kushepe ashshite” woyko, “Qadhey bayna asaa kushepe tana wozite” gadinaa?
6.24: “Ta si77i gaana; hinte tana tamaarsite; ta ay balidaako ane tana bessite.
6.25: Tuma odi cammikoka eketees! shin hinte oday aybiska maaddenna.
6.26: Hinte ta haasaya carko mela hada ootheeta; Yaatin, ufaysi qanxidaysas taw ay zaaro immanaw koyeetii?
6.27: Aawi bayna na7a bolla saama yeggeeta; hinte laggiya bayzanaw washiseeta.
6.28: Ane shama ayfen tana xeellite; ta hinte sinthan wordotiyana?
6.29: Hayyana, ane zaarethidi qopite; taani xillo ta bolla coo pirdofite.
6.30: Ta inxarsan wordoy de7ii? Ta doonay wordonne tumaa shaakanaw danda7ennee?”

7.1: Asa de7oy sa7a bolla wolqaama baaxe gidenneyee? Iya laythay une oothiya asa de7o mela gidenneyee?
7.2: Wulliya awa amotiya gaacha mela, woyko ba damooziya ekanaw naagiya oosanchoda,
7.3: hessada taw mela ageenati meto qammati imetidosona.
7.4: Taani zin7iya wode awude barkandinasha gayis; Shin qammay taw aduqees; sa7i wontana gakanaw hiixan shireta shireta wodhayis.
7.5: Ta asatethay guxuntis; ta madunthay giishshi goggees.
7.6: Ta laythay dorze mooqepe aadhidi ellesees; ufaysi baynashin ta laythay wurees.
7.7: Abeeti Xoossaw, ta laythay issi shempo mela gideysa qopa! Ta ayfey zaaridi keehaba be7enna.
7.8: Ha77i be7ey zaaridi be7enna; tana koyana shin zaari demmenna.
7.9: Shaari laaletidi dhayeysada, duufo wodhiya asi simmidi keyenna.
7.10: Ba soo simmidi yeenna; iya eriya asayka dogees.
7.11: “Hessa gisho, ta si77i giike; ta ayyaana un7etetha odana; ta shempuwa cametethaa gisho zuuzumana.
7.12: Hessa mela neeni tana ayis naagay? Ta new abba woyko abban de7iya iita do7a gadiyee?
7.13: ‘Ta hiixay tana minthethana; ta arsay tana zuuzunthafe shempisana!’ gada qopas;
7.14: Shin neeni tana amuhon yashisaasa; qoncethan tana daganthaasa.
7.15: Taani ha waayey kumida asatethaa tookada daanape, suletada hayqiyako dosayis.
7.16: Taani ta de7uwa shaatettas; daanaw koyke; ta laythay issi shempo mela gidiya gisho tana aggarki.
7.17: Ne iya gitayada xeellanaw asi aybee? Ne iyaw qopanaw asi aybee?
7.18: Wonta wonta ne iya xomoosasa; woden woden ne iya paacasa.
7.19: Ne ta bolla ayfe wotheysa aggikii? Cuchu mittiya wode taw immikii?
7.20: Abeeti ase kaalleyso, ta nagaraa oothin nena ay qohidee? Ne ayis tana cadda oykay? New ta tooho gidadinaayee?
7.21: Ta naaquwa ayis aggikii? Ta nagara ayis atto giikii? Ta duufo geliya wodey gakis; ne tana koyana, shin hizape demmaka” yaagis.

8.1: Shuha biittafe yida Beldadoosi zaaridi,
8.2: “Neeni hessa awude gakanaw odetay? Ne doonape keya qaalay wolqaama gote mela.
8.3: Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay xillo pirdennee?
8.4: Ne nayti Xoossaa bolla nagaraa oothida gisho, I enta enta nagaraa gisho seeris.
8.5: Shin neeni Xoossaako simmiko, Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa woossiko,
8.6: neeni geeshshinne suure gidiko, I ne gisho dendidi nena maaddana; I kase ne de7uwa zaaridi woytana.
8.7: Ne doomethay guutha daanikoka, ne wursethay daro aadhidi darana.
8.8: Kase yeletaa ane oycha; nu mayzati ay tamaaridaako pilgada demma.
8.9: Nuuni zine nayta aybaka eroko; nu ha sa7an de7iya laythay kuya mela.
8.10: Enti nena tamaarseynne new odey, banta wozanan wothidabaape gidenneyee?
8.11: Carey bayna bessan palki dolanaw danda7ii? haathi bayna bessan mayrey cil7anaw danda7ii?
8.12: Buroo diccidi qanxetonna de7ishe, cil7o maatapeka eeson melees.
8.13: Xoossaa dogiya asaa ubbaa wursethay hessa mela; Xoosse eronna asaa ufaysay dhayana.
8.14: I ammanetiyabay meqiyaba; I ceeqetiyabayka shango haada mela.
8.15: I ba shango haada bolla zempana, shin eqenna; I iya oykana, shin duuxi wodhana.
8.16: I awa wode haathe uyidi cil7iya atakilte mela; ba xaphuwa biitta ubban yeddida mitha mela.
8.17: Ba xaphuwa keelan yeddees; gita shucha bolla ba xaphuwa xaaxees.
8.18: Shin I ba bessaafe shodetiko, he bessay, ‘Ta nena be7abike’ yaagana.
8.19: Iita asata ufaysay hessa mela; harati yidi enta bessaa oykana.
8.20: “Xoossay borey bayna asaa yeggi aggenna; iita ootheyisata maaddenna.
8.21: I zaaridi nena miichananne ililsana.
8.22: Nena ixeysati yeella ma7ana; iitata keethay dhayana” yaagis.

9.1: Iyyobi zaaridi,
9.2: “Ee, hinte geysi tuma gideysa ta erayis; shin asi Xoossa sinthan waanidi xillo gidanaw danda7ii?
9.3: Iyara ooni palamanaw danda7ii? I oychiya mukulu oyshatape issuwaka zaaranaw danda7enna.
9.4: Xoossay cincanne wolqaama; iyara eqetanaw danda7ey oonika baawa.
9.5: Qoponna de7ishin dereta enta bessaafe diggees; ba hanquwan aathidi yeggees.
9.6: I biitta iya bessaafe qaathees; biitta tuuqetaka yiggees.
9.7: Away keyonna mela oothees; xoolintoti poo7onna mela diggees.
9.8: I barka salota miccis; abba hobbiya bolla hemetees.
9.9: Xoossay Biire, Ooriyoona, Pilaadisa geetetiya xoolintotanne, dugeha baggara de7iya xoolinto koceeta medhis.
9.10: I asi pilgid eranaw danda7onna gitabata, taybetonna malaalsiyabata oothees.
9.11: I ta matara aadhiya wode ta be7anaw danda7ike; I taako shiiqiya wode eranaw danda7ike.
9.12: I bonqiko digganaw danda7ey oonee? ‘Waatay?’ yaagidi iya oychanay oonee?
9.13: Xoossay ba hanquwa teqenna; Ra7aaba geetetiya do7a maaddeysati iya tohuwa garsan kundoosona.
9.14: Yaatin, iya oysha zaaranaw, iyara mootetanaw taani oonee?
9.15: Taani xillo gidikoka, pirdiya Xoossay tana maaranaada woossanaape attishin, taani iyaw zaaro immike.
9.16: Ta iya xeegin, I taw koyaakoka, tana si7ees gada ammanike.
9.17: Tana goten mentherethees; gaasoy bayna ta madunthaa darsees.
9.18: Tana shempo diggees; ta de7uwa camethees.
9.19: Wolqaba gidiko, I wolqaama. Xillo pirdaba gidiko, iya pirda keethi shiishanay oonee?
9.20: Taani tana xillo giikoka ta doonay tana bala kessees; tanan borey baawa ta giikoka ta inxarsay tana geella kessees.
9.21: Taani borey bayna asi gidikoka tabaa qopike; taani ta de7uwa kadhayis.
9.22: Xoossay borey baynaysanne iita issife dhaysees; ta dummatethi baawa gey hessa gishosa.
9.23: Gadoy gelidi asaa qoponna wodhiya wode, I xillo asaa waayan miicees.
9.24: Ha sa7ay iita asaa kushen wodhiya wode, I pirdeyisata ayfiya goozees. Hessa ubbaa oothey iya gidonna ixiko, hari oonee?
9.25: Ta de7o laythati woxiya uraape aadhidi ellesoosona; enti lo77oba be7onna piradhidi dhayoosona.
9.26: Ta de7o laythay palka wogoloda woxees; arganthi miyaba oykanaw salope duge paalleysada paallees.
9.27: ‘Ta zuuzuntha dogana; som7o tukeysa aggada poo7isana giyako,’
9.28: Neeni tana geeshshi goonnaysa taani eriya gisho, tana gakana waaye ubbaa taani yayyayis.
9.29: Yaatin, taani bala gideysi attonna ixiko, coo mela ayis daaburayna?
9.30: Taani ta asatethaa hari attoshin saamunan meecetiyakoka, ta kushiya dummabaara meecetiyakoka,
9.31: ta ma7oyka tana shaatettana gakanaw, neeni tana urqa ollan holana.
9.32: Ta iyaw zaaro immanaw Xoossay ta mela ase gidenna; gidiyako nu nam7ay daynna sinthan eqana.
9.33: Shin nu nam7aa bolla ba kushe wothidi, nuna sigethiya asi nu giddon de7eerenne!
9.34: Iya teemoy tana daganthonna mela, issi asi Xoossaa xam7aa taape digereneshin!
9.35: Yaaniko, taani iyaw yayyonna odetana; shin ha77i taani danda7ike.

10.1: Tana duussi shaattis! Hessa gisho, ta zuuzumanaape attishin, si77i giike; ta shempuwa seela kessana.
10.2: Taani Xoossaako haysada gaana; ta bala taw odape attishin, ta bolla pirdofa.
10.3: Neeni iitata qofaa ufaysan ekashe, tana un7ethanaw bessii? ne kushen medhida uraa kadheysi wogee?
10.4: Ne ayfey asa ayfe meleyee? neeni asi xeelleysada xeellayee?
10.5: Ne de7o laythay asa de7o laytha meleyee?
10.6: Yaatin, ta bala ayis koyay? Ta nagaraa ayis kaallay?
10.7: Taani bala gidonaysanne ne kushepe tana oonika ashshanaw danda7onnaysa ne eraasa.
10.8: Tana ne kushey giigisidi medhis; shin ha77i he kushey simmidi tana menthees.
10.9: Neeni tana biittafe medhidaysa hassaya Yaatin, ha77i tana zaarada baana oothanaw koyay?
10.10: Tana maathada ta aaye ulon tigidaynne meqa maathada Irkisiday nena gidikii?
10.11: Neeni tana ashonne goga mayzadasa; shayaninne meqethan waaxadasa.
10.12: Neeni taw de7onne merinaa siiqo immadasa; ne naagoy tana paxa wothis.
10.13: Shin neeni he wodepe doomada ne wozanan tana qohanaw qopada de7eysa ta erayis.
10.14: Ta naaquwa ne be7aasa; ta nagara oothiko seeronna aadhaka.
10.15: Taani balikoka tana ayye! Ta xillo gidikoka ceeqetanaw danda7ike. Ne tana yeella mayzadasa; waayen wothadasa.
10.16: Ta otoriko tana gaammoda shankatada oykaasa; tana qohanaw ne malaalsiya wolqaa zaara zaara bessaasa.
10.17: Neeni ta bolla ooratha markata ehaasa; ne hanquwa ta bolla darsaasa; tana olanaw ooratha olanchota giigisaasa.
10.18: Yaatin, tana ta aaye ulope ayis kessadii? Oonika tana be7onna hayqidaako taw lo77oshin!
10.19: Taani medhetonna attidaako, woyko ta aaye ulope keyashe duufo gelidaako lo77oshin!
10.20: Ta guutha de7o laythay wurees gidenneyee? Ha guutha laythan ufaytana mela tana aggarki!
10.21: Ta simmonna bessaa boonna de7ishin, leelida dhuma biitta gakonna de7ishin,
10.22: iya poo7oy dhuma gidida bessaanne hayqoy kawotida bessaa, maari bayna bessaanne leelida dhuma biitta boonna de7ishin, tana aggarki!”

11.1: Na7ima biittafe yida Soofari zaaridi,
11.2: “Ha hada haasaya ubbaas zaaro immiya asi baawee? Woyko hessa odida uray tuma gidanaw danda7ii?
11.3: Ne hada oday ase si77i oothiya daanii? Ne qelqisiya wode nena seeriya asi baawee?
11.4: Neeni, ‘Ta timirtey tuma; taani Xoossaa sinthan geeshshi’ ” gaasa.
11.5: Xoossay new odiyako, ba doona dooyidi odetiyako aybe!
11.6: Cincatethas daro ogey de7iya gisho, Xoossay new cincatetha xuura qoncisiyako aybe! He wode ne seeretida seeray, besseysafe guutha gideysa eranashin.
11.7: “Ciimmo gidida Xoossaa xuuraa eranaw danda7ay? Woyko Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaba pilgada gakanaw danda7ay?
11.8: Enti salotape dhoqa; ne ay oothanaw danda7ay? Enti Si7oolepeka aadhida ciimmo; ne eranaw danda7aka.
11.9: Xoossaa cincatethay biittafe dalgees; abbafeka aadhidi ciimmotees.
11.10: I yidi nena qasho keethan yeggiyako, pirda keethi shiishiko, iya digganay oonee?
11.11: Xoossay pathonna asaa erees; iitabaa be7iya wode si77i gidi aggenna.
11.12: Eeya asi cinca gideysafe, wora harey ase gididi yeletanaysi mata.
11.13: Neeni ne wozanaa suure oothiko, ne kushiya iyako micciko,
11.14: nagaraa ne kushepe haassiko, ne keethan iitabay doonna mela oothiko,
11.15: He wode neeni dhoqu gada yeelli bayna ubbaba be7an; yashshi bayna minnada eqana.
11.16: Neeni ne metuwa ubbaa dogana; goggidi aadhida di7oda zaara hassayaka.
11.17: Ne de7oy seeta gallasa awape aadhidi poo7ana; ne de7uwa dhumay wonta xalqeda poo7ana.
11.18: New ufaysi de7iya gisho neeni hirgonna daana; Xoossay nena naagiya gisho wopu gada daana.
11.19: Neeni yashshi bayna dhiskana; daro asay nenan nashetanaw koyana.
11.20: Shin iitati meto be7ishe akeekokona; iyape baqatidi attanaw danda7okona; Enta ufaysay hayqo” yaagis.

12.1: Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris.
12.2: Ee, hinte tumaka ase; cincatethi hintera hayqana!
12.3: Shin taka hinteda akeeki de7iya asi; taani hintefe guuxike; Ha hinte odetidaba eronnay oonee?
12.4: Taani Xoossaa woossin I tana si7ida asi gidikoka, ha77i ta laggetas miichas attas; taani xillonne borey bayna asi gidikoka qelqisethas attas.
12.5: Metootidi be7iboona asi hara asa meton miicees; hinte kundanaw gandigariya asi sugeeta.
12.6: Bonqeyisata keethay saro de7ees; Xoossaa yiloyeysati hirgi bayna de7oosona; banta wolqaa bantaw xoosse oothosona.
12.7: Ane meheta oycha; enti nena tamaarsana; Woyko salo kafota oycha; enti new odana.
12.8: Woyko sa7a medhetethatas oda; enti nena tamaarsana; abba molotika new odana.
12.9: Godaa kushey hessa oothidaysa eronnay oonee?
12.10: De7oy de7iya medhetethi ubbaynne asa shempoy iya kushena.
12.11: Inxarsi kathi shaakidi ereysada, haythi oda shaakidi erenneyee?
12.12: Cincatethi dondzida asaa matan deneyee? daro laythi de7ida asaa matan akeeki benteneyee?
12.13: Cincatethinne wolqi Xoossasa; zoreynne akeeki iya matan bentees.
12.14: Xoossay laallidaba zaari keexanay oonee? I qachida uraa birshanay oonee?
12.15: Xoossay ira teqiko biittay melees; ira bukisiko di7oy biitta dhaysees.
12.16: Minotethinne xoonoy Xoossasa; cimeteysinne cimmeysi nam7ayka iyape garsan de7ees.
12.17: Zoreysatape cincatethaa qaari ekees; halaqataka eeya kessees.
12.18: I kawota araatape wothidi aylle kessees.
12.19: Kahinetape bonchuwa qaari ekees; adussa wode xapho yeddida wolqaamata shiri yeggees.
12.20: Ammanetida zoreyisata si77i oothees; cimatapeka akeeka yegisees.
12.21: Bonchetidaysata kawushshees; minota danco bilisees.
12.22: Dhuman de7iya xuura qonce kessees; leelida dhumaa poo7o kessees.
12.23: Xoossay kawotethata gitayees; zaaridi dhaysees; Kawotethata dalgisees; zaaridi laallees.
12.24: Alamiya kawota akeeka diggees; ogey bayna mela biittan toylatana mela oothees.
12.25: Poo7oy bayna dhuman tattafoosona; mathotida asada gandigaroosona.

13.1: Ha ubbaa ta ayfey be7is; ta haythay si7idi akeekis.
13.2: Hinte ereysa taka erayis; taani hintefe guuxike.
13.3: Shin taani Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossara odetanaw koyayis; taani ta metuwaba iyara mootetanaw amottayis.
13.4: Shin hinte wordon kammeyisata; hinte ubbayka pathonna aakimeta.
13.5: Hinte si77i gidaba gidiyako, cinca gidi bentanashin!
13.6: Ha77i ta mootuwa si7ite; ta doonape keya palama hayzite.
13.7: Hinte Xoossaa gisho wordo odeteetii? Iya gisho gidi cimon odeteetii?
13.8: Hinte iya maaddiyabay de7ii? Woyko iyaw xabaqa eqidi mootetetii?
13.9: I hintena pilgi xeelliyako hintefe lo77oba demmanee? Hinte ase cimmeysada iya cimmanaw danda7eetii?
13.10: Hinte geeman asa som7o be7idi maaddiko, I tuma hintena seerana.
13.11: Iya bonchoy hintena daganthennee? Iya teemay hintena yashshennee?
13.12: Hinte odida leemisoy bidintha mela pathonnaba; hinte mootoy biittafe medhetida gondalle mela.
13.13: Ane si77i giite; ta odetana; hizape hanidabay hano.
13.14: Taani tanatethaa ayis meton yeggiyana? Ta de7uwa ayis ta kushen oykiyana?
13.15: Xoossay tana wodhikoka taani iya danda7an naagana; taani ta metuwa iya sinthe shiishana.
13.16: Nagarancho asi iya sinthe shiiqanaw danda7onna gisho; ooni eri ta xaalatethay atotethas gaaso gidanaw danda7ees.
13.17: Ta haasaya akeekidi si7ite; ta oday hinte haythan gelo.
13.18: Ha77i taani ta metuwa eka shiiqas; I taw pirdanaysa erayis.
13.19: Tana mootana asi de7ii? De7iko taani si77i gada hayqana.
13.20: Xoossaw ne taw ha nam7ubata ootha; yaatiko ta ne sinthafe geemmike.
13.21: Ne seera kushiya taape dentha; tana dagantheysa agga.
13.22: Hessafe guye, tana xeega; ta koyana; Woyko ta odana, ne taw zaara.
13.23: Ta balaynne nagaray aapunee? Ane ta naaquwanne ta nagaraa tana bessa.
13.24: Neeni ayis ne som7uwa taape genthay? ne morkeda ayis tana taybay?
13.25: Carkoy efiya kaliya ayis un7ethay? melida punuwa ayis yedethay?
13.26: Neeni ta bolla xaafida mootoy camo; ta na7atetha balaka aggabaaka.
13.27: Neeni ta tohuwa duxadasa; ta tanguwa ubbaa wochaasa; ta tohoy yedhiyasuwa kaallasa.
13.28: Hessa gisho, taani wooqida mithada; bili mida afilada wurayis.

14.1: “Maccasape yeletida asas laythi qanthi; ika qassi meton kumis.
14.2: Ciishshada bentidi ellesidi qoqofetees; kuyada gam7onna eeson aadhees.
14.3: Yaatin, neeni hessa mela asi kaallayee? pirdas ne sinthe shiishayee?
14.4: Tunabaape geeshshaba kessanaw danda7ey oonee? Oonika baawa.
14.5: Asi daana laythas zawi de7ees; I daana ageena neeni tayba wothadasa; neeni wothida zawape aadhey oonika baawa.
14.6: Une oothiya asi ba oosuwa polidi shempeysada, I shempana mela ne ayfiya iyape denthada iya aggaaga.
14.7: Qanxetida mithas ufaysi de7ees; zaaridi aacees; ooratha tashe kessidi diccees.
14.8: Mithaa xaphoy biitta garsan cimikoka, durumay biittan wooqikoka,
14.9: haathe demmidi aacees; ooratha dolada tashe kessees.
14.10: Shin asi hayqees; hessi iyaw wursethi; iya shempoy keyape guye I awun de7ii?
14.11: Abbaa haathi meleysada, shaafa haathi wureysada,
14.12: hessada asika hayqees; simmidi dendenna; saloti aadhana gakanaw asi baarkenna; ba dhiskuwafeka dendenna.
14.13: Neeni tana duufon genthidaako aybe! Ne hanqoy aadhana gakanaw qottidaako aybe! Ne taw qamida he gallas tana hassaydaako aybe!
14.14: Asi hayqiko simmidi de7on daanee? Ta shempiya wodey yaana gakanaw, ha meto wode ubbaa danda7an naagana.
14.15: He wode ne tana xeegana taka koyana; ne medhida tana be7anaw laamotiya wodey yaana.
14.16: He wode neeni tuma ta tanguwa wochana; shin ta nagaraa kaallaka.
14.17: Ta balay ogoron yiicetana; ta nagaraa neeni kammana.
14.18: Zumi woddeysada, zaalli dhoqalleteysada,
14.19: haathi shucha xapho bookeysada, di7oy biitta meeccidi efeysada, neeni asa ufaysi dhaysaasa.
14.20: Neeni iya merinaw xoonasa; I simmenna; iya malaa laammada ne sinthafe diggaasa.
14.21: Iya nayti bonchetiko I erenna; enti kawuyiko I be7enna.
14.22: Shin iya asatethaa seelay iya xalaalas si7etees; I ba xalaalas yeekees” yaagis.

15.1: Temaana biittafe yida Elfaazi haysada yaagis;
15.2: “Cinca asi carkoda oyketonnaba odeetii? Woyko doloha bagga carkuwan ba uluwa coo kunthii?
15.3: Pathonna qaalan zuuzumii? Woyko gatey bayna odan mootetii?
15.4: Neeni Xoossas yayyeysa aggadasa; harati Xoossaa goyinnona mela dhubbadasa.
15.5: Ne iitatethay ne odan eretees; shin ne cinca oday nena genthees.
15.6: Ne doonay ne bolla pirdees tana gidike; ne inxarsay ne bolla markatees.
15.7: “Asape koyro yeletiday nenee? Neeni dereti medhetanaape kase yeletadii?
15.8: Neeni Xoossaa xuura duulatan de7ay? asa cincatethi ne xalaalas de7iyee?
15.9: Nuuni eronnabay neeni eriyabay aybee? Nuus geemmidi new qoncida ayba cincatethi de7ii?
15.10: Ne aawape bayratiya asati, cimidi puulumida asati nuura de7oosona.
15.11: “Xoossay new immida minthethoy gidenneyee? nuuni kahaamatethaba odida qaalay guutheyee?
15.12: Ne wozanay nena ayis wora efii? Ne ayfey ayis dereeqidi xeellii?
15.13: Yaatada neeni Xoossaa bolla hanqetadasa; iita qaala ne doonape kessadasa.
15.14: Asi Xoossa sinthan geeshshi gidanaw danda7ii? Woyko maccafe yeletida asi xillo gidanaw danda7ii?
15.15: Xoossay ba kiitanchotan ammanetena; hari attoshin saloti iya sinthan geeshshi gidokona.
15.16: Iitanne tuna gidida asi, nagara haathada uyaa asi waanidi ammanetanee?
15.17: “Ane si7a, qoncisada ta new odana, taani be7idaba ubbaa new odana.
