15.18: Cincati banta aawatape ekidaysa, ta new genthonna odana.
15.19: Biittay enta xalaalas imetis; hara biitta asi entara walaketibeenna.
15.20: Ase un7ethishe de7iya iita asi, ba de7o laytha ubban waayetishe de7ees.
15.21: Daganthiyabay iya haythan si7etees; I saro de7ayis gishin dhayseysati iya bolla keyana.
15.22: Dhumape kessi ekoy iyaw hanenna; iya qaaday mashshan dhayo.
15.23: Iya ahay anko quma gidana; baw dhuma gallas matatidaysa I erees.
15.24: Metoynne un7i iya bolla yaana; olanaw keyida kawo mela iya bolla goobana.
15.25: Hessika I ba kushiya Xoossaa bolla denthida gishosa; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa bolla xaalida gishosa.
15.26: I eqetanaw minonne dalga gondalle oykis; otoron Xoossaako hordofees.
15.27: “Iya kilahoy muumida gisho, iya xeessay kumida gisho,
15.28: I laaletida katamatan, kaysa keethaninne, kundanaw gakida keethan de7ees.
15.29: I ba duretethan daro gam7enna; iya zaway aakenna.
15.30: Dhumape kessi ekenaw danda7enna; tashiya tami labida mithadanne carkoy ciishsha qoqofida mithada gidana.
15.31: Pathonnaban ammanetidi bana cimmofo; iyape aykoka demmonna attana.
15.32: Wodey gakonna iya ubbay melidi tasheyka aaconna mitha mela gidana.
15.33: I teeronna qawu7e de7ishe qoqofetiya woyne mela; ciishshan de7ishe qoqofetiya shamaho mela.
15.34: Xoossas yayyonna asaa kochay dhayana; wodhaafen keexetida keethay taman meetetana.
15.35: Enti iitatethi qanthatidi meto yeloosona; enta uluwan geney kumis” yaagis.

16.1: Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
16.2: “Taani hessa mela haasaya daro si7as; hinte minthethoy tana salethis.
16.3: Go77i bayna hinte odaas wursethi baawee? taara hintena hessada palanthiya gaasoy aybee?
16.4: Hinte ta bessan, taani hinte bessan gididaba gidiyako, taani ta huuphiya qaathashe, ha77i hinte giyaba ubbaa hinte bolla loythada gaanashin!
16.5: Ta zoriyan ta hintena minthethanashin! Ta doonape keyiya oday hintena minthethanashin!
16.6: “Shin ta haasaykoka ta sahoy decenna; ta si77i gada danda7ikoka taape kichenna.
16.7: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne tana ta asatethafe kessadasa; ta keethaa asa ubbaa dhaysadasa.
16.8: Shuuqida ta gogay taw marka gidis; ta gilqatethay tana nagarancho kessis.
16.9: Xoossay hanqetidi ta asatethaa qanxerethis; tana ixidi ba acha ta bolla garcis; ta morkey ba ayfiya ta bolla kessis.
16.10: Asay ta yuushon shiiqidi tana qelqisidosona; tana leqidi baqidosona.
16.11: Xoossay tana nagarachotas aathidi immis; iitata kushen tana yeggis.
16.12: Taani kase saro de7as; shin Xoossay tana tincherethis; ta mirgaciya oykidi tana mentherethis; cache loohisiya malla oothis.
16.13: Iya tooranchoti banta dongen tana teqidosona; qadhey bayna ta kilahuwa muxerethidosona; ta ciyaa sa7an gussidosona.
16.14: I tana zaari zaari madunxisis; olanchoda toollidi caddis.
16.15: Taani kayo ma7o ma7as; ta wolqay wurin baanan uttas.
16.16: Yeehon ta som7oy gabbis; ta ayfey zo77is.
16.17: Shin he ubban ta balidabay baawa; ta geeshsha wozanan woossayis.
16.18: Biittaw, tana gakida qohuwa kammofa; ta waasoy shempiya soo demmofo.
16.19: Heko ta markay salona; ta xabaqay bollana.
16.20: Ta laggeti tana kadhidi xeelloosona; ta ayfey Xoossa sinthan afuthi tigees.
16.21: Ase asara sigethiya asi de7eysada, tana Xoossara sigethiya asi de7idaba gidernishin.
16.22: Ta laythay wurana hanees; guutha wodepe guye ta simmonna soo baana.

17.1: Ta shempoy keyees; ta laythay qaammis; taw duufoy giigis.
17.2: Ta bolla qelqiseysati ta yuushuwan de7oosona; enti tana yiloyida mela aysidosona.
17.3: Abeeti Xoossaw, neepe hari tana maaddey bayna gisho, ne taw waase gida.
17.4: Enti akeekona mela enta qofaa gordadasa; Hessa gisho, ne entaw xoono immofa.
17.5: Miishe demmana gidi, ba laggeta aathidi immiya uraa nayta ayfey qooqana.
17.6: Xoossay tana asas miichas aggis; asi cuttishe aadhiya asi gidas.
17.7: Ta daro kayotida gisho ta ayfey eeyis; ta asatethay laafidi eesho gidis.
17.8: Keeha asati tana be7idi dagammidosona; suureti Xoossaa ammanonayisata bolla yilotidosona.
17.9: Gidoshin xilloti banta ogiyape deshokona; suureti wolqa guji guji boosona.
17.10: Shin zaaridi ubbay taako haa yiite! ta hinte giddofe issi cinca asi demmike.
17.11: Ta de7o laythay wuris; ta halchoy hada gidis; ta wozanaa amoy coo attis.
17.12: Ta laggeti qamma gallas goosona; dhuma be7ishe ‘Poo7ana hanees’ yaagosona.
17.13: Ta ufaysan naagiya keethay duufo; ta hiixa dhuman hiixayis.
17.14: Duufoko, ‘Ne ta aawa’ yaagana; guxuneko, ‘Ne ta aayo woyko ta micho’ yaagana.
17.15: Yaatin, taw ay ufaysi de7ii? taw ufaysi gidiyaba ooni demmanay?
17.16: Ta ufaysay taara duufo bandee? Nu issife biittan duge gelanee?” yaagis.

18.1: Hessafe guye, Shuuha biittafe yida Beldadoosi zaaridi,
18.2: “Iyyoba, ne odaas wursethi baawee? Ane akeeka; nu odiyaba si7a.
18.3: Ne nuna ayis miizi oothay? Ayis nuna tulle kessay?
18.4: Ne hanqetada nena qohaasa; Ne hanquwan biittay kallo attanee? Woyko zaallay ba bessaafe qaaxennee?
18.5: Nagaranchota xompey to7ana; iya tama lacoy dhayana.
18.6: Enta keethan de7iya xompey dhayana; enta poo7oyka dhumana.
18.7: I tangiya tangoy qaammees; iya iita qofay iya zaaridi mees.
18.8: Iya hemethay iya xihen gelsees; iya tohoti gitetana.
18.9: Xihey iya ginde oykana; diizi iya qaaxo diggana.
18.10: Yurde wodoroy sa7an iyaw geemmi uttees; I hemetiya ogiyan gitey de7ees.
18.11: Dagami iya teqidi oykees; iya guyera kaallidi iya yedethees.
18.12: Iya wolqaa koshi wursis; dhayoy iya miyen naagees.
18.13: Hargey iya laafethees; hayqoy iya mokidi ekees.
18.14: Hirgi bayna de7iya ba keethaafe goodetees; enti iya hayqo geetetiya kawako efoosona.
18.15: Iya keethay taman oyketana; I de7iyasuwan diinney laaletana.
18.16: Garsara xaphoy melana; bollara haythi qoqofetana.
18.17: Iya qopiya asi biittafe dhayana; iya sunthay sa7an hassayetonna attana.
18.18: I poo7ope dhuman goodettana; alamiyape dhayana.
18.19: Iyaw na7i woyko kochi dhayana; I de7ida bessan issi asi paxa attenna.
18.20: Wuloha bagga asay, iya gakida metuwan dagammidosona; doloha bagga asay yashshan kokoridosona.
18.21: Iita asaa wursethay awudeka hessa mela; Xoossaa eronna asaa qaaday hessa mela” yaagis.

19.1: Iyyobi zaaridi haysada yaagis;
19.2: Hinte tana awude gakanaw madunxiseetii? Awude gakanaw hinte qaalan tana caddetii?
19.3: Hinte tana tammu toho cayideta; tana kawushishe yeellateketa.
19.4: Tuma ta balidaba gidiko, ta balay tana oychana.
19.5: Hinte hintena dhoqu dhoqu oothidi, ta kawusha tana mootanaw go7etiko,
19.6: ha metuwa ta bolla ehiday Xoosse gideysanne ba gitiyan tana gelsiday iya gideysa erite.
19.7: Ta qohetas gada waassin, tana alley baawa; ta qaala dhoqu oothada waassinka tana si7ey baawa.
19.8: Ta kanthada boonnada Xoossay ta ogiya diris; ta hemetiya ogiya dhuman gordis.
19.9: Ta bonchuwa taape qaaris; ta kallachaa ta huuphepe ekis.
19.10: I tana mentherethi yeggis; ta ufaysa xaphora shodetida mitha mela oothis.
19.11: Iya hanqoy ta bolla eexi keyis; I tana morkeda taybees.
19.12: Tana olanaw ba tooranchota kiittees; enti tana olanaw miixa keexidi, ta dunkaaniya yuushuwan uttidosona.
19.13: Xoossay ta ishata taape haassis; tana ereysati taw allaga gididosona.
19.14: Ta dabboti taape haakidosona; ta laggeti tana dogidosona.
19.15: Ta son moketiya imathati tana dogidosona; ta macca aylleti tana oge asada xeellidosona.
19.16: Ta aylliya ta xeegin taw koyenna; ta woossin taw ero geenna.
19.17: Ta machiya ta doona peenuwa shaatetasu; ta ishati tana uufidosona.
19.18: Hari attoshin guutha nayti tana kadhoosona; tana be7idi leqoosona.
19.19: Ta mata laggeti ubbay tana uufosoona; ta doseysati taw zoko zaaridosona.
19.20: Ta meqethay ta gogaara oyketis; taani hayqa kichada attas.
19.21: Ta laggeto, Xoossaa kushey tana dechida gisho, taw qadheterketi.
19.22: Xoossay tana yedetheysada, hinte tana ayis yedetheetii? ha77i gakanaw hinte tana waaysidaysi gidennee?
19.23: “Ha77i gakanaw ta odetida qaalay mazgabetidaako, maxaafan xaafetidaako ta dosayis shin.
19.24: Merinaw daana mela maarisaninne irsaasen zaalla bolla woocetidi xaafetida gideerenne!
19.25: Tana Wozidaysi de7on de7eysanne wursethan biitta bolla I eqanaysa ta erayis.
19.26: Ta gogay meetetidi wurikoka, taani ta ashuwape shaaketada Xoossaa be7anaysa erayis.
19.27: Hara asi gidonna taani ta huuphen, ta ayfen iya be7ana; ta wozanay he qamma laamotees.
19.28: “Ha metuwas gaasoy iya, nu iya waati yedethino gidi hinte qopiya gidiko,
19.29: Mashshas yayyite! Xoossa hanqoy mashshara yaana; pirdi de7eysa erite” yaagis.

20.1: Na7ima biitta asi gidida Soofari haysada yaagidi zaaris;
20.2: “Ne oday tana lancisida gisho, ta ellesada ne odaas zaaro immana.
20.3: Ne oday ta bonchuwa qaariya gisho, ta akeekay new zaaro immana mela tana denthethees.
20.4: Asi biitta bolla de7ida wodepe doomidi, benipe hanidaba eraasa.
20.5: Iita asa ceeqoy qantha wodesa; Xoossaa eronna asaa ufaysay guutha wodesa.
20.6: Iita asa otoroy salo gakanaw dhoqu giikoka, iya huuphey shaara gakidi bochikoka,
20.7: I baana mela pitetidi dhayana; Iya kase eriya asay ‘I awun de7ii?’ yaagana.
20.8: Elmoda paallidi dhayana; simmidi bentenna; qamma amuhoda coo dhayana.
20.9: Iya kase be7ida ayfeti zaaridi iya be7okona; I ba de7iya bessaafe tim7i gidi dhayana.
20.10: Aaway bonqi ekida miishe, iya nayti banta kushen guye zaarana.
20.11: Iya meqethaa kumida na7atetha wolqay iyara issife biittan zin7ana.
20.12: “Iitatethi iya doonan mal7iko, I ba inxarsaafe garsan qosiko,
20.13: wuronnaada ba doonan oykidi, wothi aggiko,
20.14: iya uluwan camo gidana; wodhiya shoosha marze gidana.
20.15: Iita asi mitida shaluwa zaari cuttana; iya uluwan de7iya ubbaa Xoossay cooshshana.
20.16: Iita asi miyabay iyaw marze gididi, iya wodhana.
20.17: Eessinne maathi haathada goggishin, I be7onna attana.
20.18: Ba daabura ayfiya moonna haras immana; zal7idi wodhisida wodhiyan ufaytenna.
20.19: Hessi haniday I manqota un7ethida gishonne hara asi keexida keethaa bonqida gishosa.
20.20: “Iya iita amoy shempo diggis; shiishida shaloy iya ashshanaw danda7enna.
20.21: Iya shaloy wuriya gisho, iya duretethay gam7enna.
20.22: Iyaw aqoy kumidi de7ishin, metoy akeekona iya bolla gaki wodhana.
20.23: Iya uloy kaalliya wode, Xoossay wolqaama hanquwa iya bolla gussana.
20.24: Birata mashshafe I baqatana; shin naase birata dongey iya caddana.
20.25: He dongey iya zokora kanthi keyana; phooliya xeeray iya tiriya kanthi aadhana; dagami iya wozanaa waabaqisana.
20.26: I shiishida aqoy sakana dhuman dhayana; asi oythiboonna tami iya maana; iya keethan attida shalo ubbaa xuuggana.
20.27: Saloti iya nagaraa qoncisana; sa7ika iyaw morke gidana.
20.28: Xoossaa hanqo gallasan, iya keethaanne iyaw de7iyaba di7oy efana.
20.29: Xoossay geellatas wothida qaaday, iita asaas giigisida gatey haysa” yaagis.

21.1: Yaatin Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
21.2: Ane ta oda akeekidi si7ite; hessi hinte tana minthethida mela gido.
21.3: Taani issi toho odetana mela taw wode immite; taani haasaya simmiko tana qelqisite.
21.4: Taani mootetey asara gidenna. Yaatin, danda7ay wuriko hessi malaalsiyee?
21.5: Ane tana xeellidi malaaletite; hinte kushiya hinte doona bolla wothite.
21.6: Ta hessa qopiya wode tana daganthees; ta asatethay kokorees.
21.7: Iita asati ayis paxa de7oona? Enta laythay ayis aduqii? Enta wolqay ayis dari dari bidee?
21.8: Enta naytinne nayta nayti, diccishininne injen de7ishin enti ayis be7oona?
21.9: Enta soy hirgi bayna saro de7ees; Xoossaa xam7ay enta gakenna.
21.10: Enta miizati biraysi ekidi koxokona; yelishe awucayokona.
21.11: Banta nayta dorsaa wudeda kessoosona; enta nayti duroosona.
21.12: Karaabo baqishe diithi diixishe, suusul7e punnishe ufaysan yexoosona.
21.13: Enti banta de7o laytha injen de7idi, duufo sarora boosona.
21.14: Gidoshin, enti Xoossaako “Nuupe haaka! Nuuni ne ogiya eranaw koyoko” yaagosona.
21.15: “Nu iya goyinnanaw Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay oonee? Nu iya woossidi ay go7etanee?” yaagosona.
21.16: Enti duretetha banta minotethan demmida goosona; shin taani enta qofaa ekike.
21.17: “Hanoshin, iita asaa xompey to7ii? Entana boshi gaki erii? Xoossay ba hanquwan enta seeri erii?
21.18: Carkoy enta kaleda efida wodey, Gotey enta baanada denthida wodey de7ii?
21.19: Hinte, ‘Xoossi aawata bala gisho enta nayta seerees’ yaageeta. Ane Xoossay nagaranchota enta huuphen seero; yaatiko enti banta naaquwa erana.
21.20: Nagaranchoti banta seera bantaw eko; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa hanqoy enta bolla wodho.
21.21: Asi hayqidaape guye, ba naytabaa ay erii?
21.22: “Dhoqa bessan de7eyisata pirdiya Xoossaa, eratethi tamaarsanaw danda7iya asi de7ii?
21.23: Issi issi asi kumetha wolqaynne saroy de7ishin, inje duussu de7ishe hayqoosona.
21.24: Enta asatethay orde shin, enta meqethaa kolizey shica de7ishin hayqoosona.
21.25: Shin harati lo77oba be7onna, meton un7etidi kayotida mela hayqoosona.
21.26: Nam7ayka hayqidi biittan moogetosona; enti guxuntoosona.
21.27: “Hinte tana qohanaw qopidi, hinte wozanan qopida qofaa ta loythada erayis.
21.28: Hinte, ‘He gita uraa keethay awunee? Iita oothiya uray de7iya soy awunee?’ yaageeta.
21.29: Oge asata oychibeeketii? Enta markatethaa ammanibeketii?
21.30: Enti, ‘Iita asay dhayo gallas qohetokona; Xoossaa hanqoy qonciya gallas enti attana’ yaagosona.
21.31: Iita asi iya iitatethaa gisho kaccanay oonee? Iya oosuwa gisho iya seeranay oonee?
21.32: I hayqin, iya aha duufo efoosona; iya duufoy bonchon naagetees.
21.33: Zangaara biittay iyaw injetees; daro asay iya sinthan boosona; tayboy bayna asay iya kaalloosona.
21.34: Yaatin, hinte tana pathonna qaalan waati minthethanee? Hinte ta oyshaas zaariya zaaro ubbay wordo” yaagis.

22.1: Hessafe guye, Temaana biittafe yida Elfaazi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
22.2: “Asi Xoosse go77anaw danda7ii? Hari attoshin cinca gidikoka, bana go77anaape attishin, Xoosse go77enna.
22.3: Neeni xillo gidiko hessi Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa ufaysiyee? Ne ogey borey baynaba gidiko hessan I ay wodhe demmii?
22.4: “I nena seereynne pirdey, Neeni iyaw yayya gishoyee?
22.5: Ne iitatethay daro gidenneyee? Ne nagaraas zawi baawa gidennee?
22.6: Gaasoy bayna ne ishata waase xeegisadasa; asaa ma7uwa qaara ekada enta kallo yeddadasa.
22.7: Saamotidaysata haathe ushshabaaka; koshatidaysata kathi muzabaaka.
22.8: Neeni wolqaama, durenne bonchetida asi gidada de7ashe,
22.9: Am7eta mela kushe yeddadasa; yi7otas wolqa dhaysadasa.
22.10: Ne yuushoy gitetiday, akeekona yashshi nena kokorsey hessasa.
22.11: Ne be7onna mela dhumiday, qassi kixa haathan ne muuketiday hessasa.
22.12: “Xoossay dhoqa saluwan uttidi, dhoqan de7iya xoolintota duge xeellees.
22.13: Shin neeni, ‘Xoossi ay erii? Sakana dhumaa giddora kanthidi, pirdanaw danda7ii?
22.14: Salo gufantho bolla I simeretiya wode, I be7onna mela siketida shaaray iya goozees’ yaagasa.
22.15: Nagaranchoti hemetida beni ogiyara baanaw qofaa qachadii?
22.16: Entaw wodey gakonna de7ishin hayqidosona; enta de7o baasoy di7on meecetidi dhayis.
22.17: Enti Xoossaako, ‘Nuupe haaka! Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay nuus ay oothanaw danda7ii?’ yaagidosona.
22.18: Gidikoka, enta keetha lo77oban kunthiday Xoossaa; Hessa gisho, iita asaa qofaa ta ekike.
22.19: “Iita asati seeretiya wode, xilloti ufaytoosona; suure asati haysada yaagidi, enta bolla qelqisoosona.
22.20: ‘Nu morketi dhayidosona; enta duretethay tamas attis’ yaagosona.
22.21: “Iyyoba, ha77ika Xoossara giiga; iyara saro de7a; yaatiko neeni anjetana.
22.22: Iya timirtiya si7a; iya qaala ne wozanan wotha.
22.23: Neeni Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaako simmiko; new sa7i simmana; iita ooso ubbaa ne soope digga;
22.24: Ne worqaa sa7an hola; ne Ofira worqaa shaafan yegga.
22.25: Yaatiko Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay, new worqanne dooretida bira gidana.
22.26: He wode ne Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossan ufaytana; yeellatonna Xoossako pude xeellana.
22.27: Neeni iya woossana, I nena si7ana; ne qangetha iyaw gathana.
22.28: Ne qopidabay poletana; ne hemetiya ogey poo7o gidana.
22.29: Xoossay otoreyisata kawushshees; shin ashketa ashshees.
22.30: Ne kushey geeshshi gidiko, bala asay ne gaason maarota ekananne attana” yaagis.

23.1: Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
23.2: Hachika ta cametada zuuzumayis; ta ooley mino gidikoka iya kushey ta bolla deexeysa aggibeenna.
23.3: Iya demmana bessaa ta erida gidarkina; I de7iya bessaa ta gakarkina!
23.4: Taani ta metuwa iya sinthan wothanashin! Ta doona mooton kunthanashin!
23.5: I taw zaaranay aybeko eranashin, I ay giyako be7anashin!
23.6: I ba gita wolqan taara eqetanesha? Akay, I tana si7ana.
23.7: Yan suure asi iyara mootetanaw danda7ees; ta daynnay tana merinaw shatinthana.
23.8: Shin taani doloha biiko I yan deenna; taani wuloha biiko iya yan demmike.
23.9: I pudehan oothiya wode taani iya be7ike; dugeha bagga simmiya wode taani iya demmike.
23.10: Shin I ta tanguwa ubbaa erees; I tana paaciya wode taani worqada geeyada keyana.
23.11: Ta tohoy iya tanguwa kaallidi bees; iya ogiyape haddirsi ushachi simmabike.
23.12: Iya doonape keyiya kiitaape taani shaaketabike; iya qaala ta wozanan wothas.
23.13: Xoossay laametenna; Iyara eqetanay baawa, I koydaba oothees.
23.14: I ta bolla qopidaysa polis; hessa mela hara daro halchoti iyaw de7oosona.
23.15: Hessa gisho, iya sinthan eqanaw daro yashshees; hessa ubbaa qopiya wode kokorayis.
23.16: Xoossay ta wozanay doccana mela oothis; Ubbaa danda7iya Xoossay tana daganthis.
23.17: Sakana dhumay ta som7uwa goozikoka, tana he dhumay haasaya diggibeenna.

24.1: Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay pirda wode ayis qanxennee? Iya ereysati he wodiya ayis coo naagonna?
24.2: Iita asati zawan de7iya shuchaa denthoosona; kaysi ehida dorsata yan heemmoosona.
24.3: Yi7o nayta hareta bonqoosona; am7e booraa acos oykidi ekoosona.
24.4: Manqota shaatetidi ogepe gooddosona; banta sinthafe qosetana mela oothosona.
24.5: Bazzon de7iya wora hare mela, manqoti banta naytas miyaba koyishe daaburoosona.
24.6: Enti hara asa gaden kathi cakoosona; iita asaa woyne gaden budhe maxoosona.
24.7: Enti qamma kallo aqoosona; meegos bolla yeggiyabay entaw baawa.
24.8: Zuma bolla bukiya iran enti suuruxoosona; geliya bessi dhayidi shucha hom7on aqoosona.
24.9: Aawi bayna na7a aaye ki7ope dafi ekoosona; manquwa na7a acos oykoosona.
24.10: Manqoti ma7o dhayidi kallo hemetoosona; enti bantaw koshatishe hara asa mirqe tookosona.
24.11: Enti bantaw saamotishe, zayte kessanaw hara asa gaden shamaho ayfe maxoosona; woyne ushsha gum7anaw woyne ayfe qoroosona.
24.12: Kataman kataman hayqana haniya asay oolosona; deshetidi madunxida asay maado koyidi waassoosona; shin Xoossay enta metuwa xeellenna.
24.13: Poo7o ixiya asati, iya ogiya eronna asatinne; iyan eqona asati de7oosona.
24.14: Sa7i qammiya wode shempo wodheysi dendidi, manqotanne metootanchota wodhees; qammi qassi kaysos boosona.
24.15: Laymatiya asi sa7i lem7anaysa naagees; oonika be7onna mela ba som7uwa kammees.
24.16: Kaysoti qamma keethe bookidi kaysotanaw geloosona; shin gallas qosetidi pee7osona.
24.17: Daganthiya dhumara enti dabbotiya gisho, sakana dhumay entaw seeta gallasa mela.
24.18: “Shin iita asati haatha goponto mela; enta laata biittay baadetidaysa; oonika enta woyne gade beenna.
24.19: Shachi maayin, haathi melidi dhayeysada, nagaranchoti hayqidi biittafe dhayoosona.
24.20: Yelida aayeti enta dogana; Guxuney enta ashuwa maana; iita asay hassayetokona; mithada meqana.
24.21: Enti na7i bayna mayntha maccasa naaqidosona; am7eta qadhetonna ixidosona.
24.22: Xoossay ba wolqan minota dhaysis; entaw sa7i injetida daanikoka, kundonna attokona.
24.23: Xoossay enti saro daanada oothikoka, enta ogiya wochees.
24.24: Iita asati guutha wodes dhoqu dhoqu goosona; shin ellesidi sharaafada shullidi dhayoosona; kathada caketoosona.
24.25: Hessi hanenna gidi kaddiya asi de7ii? taani odida qaala wordo gaana asi de7ii?” yaagis.

25.1: Hessafe guye, Shuuha biittafe yida Beldadoosi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
25.2: “Xoossay haareysanne yashsheysa; I dhoqa saluwa sarotethan haarees.
25.3: Iya olanchota taybanaw danda7iya asi de7ii? Xoossa poo7oy gakonna bessi de7ii?
25.4: Yaatin, asi Xoossaa sinthan xillo gidanaw danda7ii? Maccasape yeletida asi geeshshi gidanaw danda7ii?
25.5: Xoossaa sinthan ageenika kumetha poo7o gidenna; iya sinthan xoolintotika geeshshi gidokona.
25.6: Yaatin, Xoossaa sinthan wooqanne guxune gidida asi ay mela laafee?” yaagis.

26.2: “Neeni wolqi baynaysa ayba maaddadii? Daaburanchuwa waata ashshadii?
26.3: Cincatethi pacidaysas ay zore immadii? Ay mela eratethi qoncisadii?
26.4: Neeni ha qaala odetana mela nena maaddiday oonee? Ne odan mela nena denthethiday oodde ayyaanee?” yaagis. Baldadoosa Haasaya
26.5: Beldadoosi zaaridi, “Hayqida asaa ayyaanati, garsan haatha giddon de7eysati kokoroosona.
26.6: Xoossa sinthan Si7ooley qonce; aybika iya genthanaw danda7enna.
26.7: Xoossay pudeha salota coo miccis; sa7aa kaqoy bayna bessan kaqis.
26.8: I shaaratan haathe kunthees; haatha deexuwan shaarati daaketokona.
26.9: I ba shaara miccidi, kumtha ageena kammees.
26.10: Poo7o dhumape shaakanaw, abba gaxan Xoossay zawa wothis.
26.11: I hanqetiya wode, salo tuuqeti dagaman kokoroosona.
26.12: Ba wolqan abba si77i oothees; ba cincatethan Ra7aaba geetetiya do7aa dhaysees.
26.13: I ba shempuwan salota geeshshees; iya kushey xongetiya shooshaa caddees.
26.14: Haysati Xoossay oothiya oosotape guuthata; nu iya kalkashaa xalaala si7oos; iya wolqaa deshuwa akeekanaw danda7ey oonee?” yaagis.

27.2: “Suure pirdaa tana diggidi, ta de7uwa camo oothida, Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossan taani caaqayis.
27.3: Ta shempoy de7ishin, ta siidhey shempishin
27.4: ta doonay wordo odetenna; ta inxarsay cimo odetenna.
27.5: Hinte oday like gada ta ekike; hayqana gakanaw ta tana suure geysa aggike.
27.6: Ta xillotethaa mintha oykanaape attishin, aggike; ta de7ida laytha ubban ta kahay tana mootenna.
27.7: “Ta morketi nagaranchoda, taara eqeteysati bala gido.
27.8: Xoossay enta shempuwa entafe ekiya wode, enta laytha qaamisiya wode, iitatas de7iya ufaysay aybee?
27.9: Enta bolla metoy gakiya wode, Xoossay enta waasuwa si7ii?
27.10: Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossan enti ufaytanee? Enti ubba wode Xoossaa xeeganee?
27.11: “Taani hintena Xoossaa wolqaaba tamaarsana; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa qofaa ta hintefe qottike.
27.12: Hinte ubbay hessa be7ideta; yaatin, haysa mela coo haasaya ayis odeteetii?
27.13: Xoossay iita asatas giigisida qaaday, Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaafe ekiya woytoy haysa.
27.14: Enta nayti ay darikoka olan wurana; enta kochay miyaba dhayidi koshatana.
27.15: Hessafe attidaysati gadon wurana; enta am7eti entaw yeekokona.
27.16: Iita asati bira biittada shiishikoka, ma7o urqada shiishidi doorikoka,
27.17: enta bira xillo asati shaaki ekana; enta ma7uwa geeshshati ma7ana.
27.18: Enti keexiya keethati shango haada melanne gaabba mela laaletana.
27.19: Iita asati dure gididi hiixan zin7oosona; shin enti dhiskofe barkiya wode aykoyka baawa.
27.20: Dagami di7o haathada qoponna enta bolla yaana; qamma gotey enta denthidi efana.
27.21: Doloha carkoy enti de7iyasuwape pitidi efana.
27.22: Enti kessi ekanaw baqatishin, qadhey bayna enta bolla wodhana.
27.23: Ba kushiya baqidi enta bolla qelqisana ba suyqethan enta sugi yeddana.

28.1: “Bira bookidi kessiya bessinne worqaa seerisiya bessi de7ees.
28.2: Birati biittafe keyees; naase birati shuchu seerisin keyees.
28.3: Asay xompe ekidi dhumaa poo7isees; biitta gaathi gakanaw gelees; sakana dhuman he shuchaa koyees.
28.4: Asay de7iya bessaafe haakidi, asa tohoy yedhi eronna soo gakidi, yan gita olla bookees. Wodoron yaanne haanne kuullotishe, asaape koxetidi de7ees.
28.5: Kathi biittafe mokees; shin iya giddoy taman seeridi, shireti shireti wodhees.
28.6: He zaallafe sanpare geetetiya al7o shuchay keyees; iya biittafe worqay bentees.
28.7: He shuchaa bookiya bessa xiloy erenna; phircoyka be7ibeenna.
28.8: Iita do7ati he bessaa yedhi erokona; gaammoy yaara aadhibeenna.
28.9: Asi mino zaalla mentherethees; deriya bookidi xaphuwape aathidi yeggees.
28.10: Zaalla lukidi kanthiya oge kessees; he al7o shuchaa demmees.
28.11: Haathi he bessaara goggonna mela zeeres; geemmidabata poo7o kessees.
28.12: “Shin cincatethi awupe bentanaw danda7ii? Akeeki de7iya awee?
28.13: Asi iya gatiya erenna; I de7on de7iya medhetethati de7iya biittan bentenna.
28.14: Abbaa ciimmoy, ‘Cincatethi ta giddon baawa’ yaagees.
28.15: Cincatethi worqan shametenna woyko biran bentenna.
28.16: Cincatethi Ofira worqan, margidenne sanpare geetetiya al7o shuchan shametenna.
28.17: Worqinne mastootey iyara liketenna; worqafe oosetida al7o miishen laametenna.
28.18: Cincatetha gatey zaagolepe, almaazepenne al7o shucha ubbaafe aadhees.
28.19: Toophaze geetetiya Tophe inqoy iyara liketenna; walahi bayna worqan I shametenna.
28.20: “Yaatin, cincatethi awupe yii? Akeeki awupe bentii?
28.21: De7on de7iya medhetetha ubbaafe geemmidi de7ees; salo kafoti iya demmokona.
28.22: Gadoynne hayqoy, ‘Nuuni cincatethaba haythan si7ida’ yaagosona.
28.23: “Cincatethako efiya ogiyanne I de7iya bessaa erey Xoossaa xalaala.
28.24: Xoossay sa7aa gaxa ubbaa xeellees; salope garsan de7iyaba ubbaa be7ees.
28.25: Xoossay carkos wolqaa immida wode, haatha makida wode,
28.26: iri bukana woga immida wode, dadas oge wothida wode,
28.27: Xoossay cincatetha be7is; be7idi bonchis; paacidi essis.
28.28: He wode Xoossay asako, ‘Cincatethi Xoossas yayyeysa; akeeki iitaape haakeysa’ yaagees” yaagis.

29.2: Ha77i ta de7iya duussay, Xoossay beni tana naagida wodiyatho gideerenne!
29.3: He wode iya xompey ta bolla poo7ees; iya poo7uwan dhumaa kanthada bayis.
29.4: He wodey Xoossay ta keethaa anjin, taani ta na7atetha wolqara de7ida wode.
29.5: He wode Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay taape shaaketibeenna; ta nayti ta yuushon de7oosona.
29.6: He wode taani ta kushiya maathan meeccayis; shucha biittan toketida shamahoy, shaafa haathada goggiya zayte immees.
29.7: Taani katamaa pirda keethaa bida wode, shangotara issife uttayis.
29.8: He wode na7atethati tana be7idi oge yeddoosona; cimati tana bonchanaw dendi eqidosona.
29.9: Halaqati oda aggaagidosona; banta kushiya banta doona bolla wothidosona.
29.10: He kataman de7iya gita asati si77i gidoosona; enta inxarsay enta kottonuwa baqidi oykis.
29.11: Tabaa si7ida ubbay nashshees; tana be7ida ubbay bonchees.
29.12: Hessi haniday, taani manqota waasuwa si7ada ashshida gishonne, yi7o nayta maaddida gishosa.
29.13: Hayqana haniya asati tana anjidosona; am7eti ta maaduwan ufaytidosona.
29.14: Xillotethaa ma7oda ma7as; suure pirdaa afilada ma7as; barneexada wothas.
29.15: Taani qooqetas ayfe, wobbetas toho gidas.
29.16: Manqotas aawa gidas; oge asas xabaqa gidas.
29.17: Taani iitata gacuwa menthas; enti bonqidaysa enta doonape yegisas.
29.18: Taani ta wozanan, “Ta laythay shafeda darin, ta son bonchon hayqana” gada qopas.
29.19: Taani xaphuwa haathan yeddida, tashiya bolla aki kumida mitha melashin!
29.20: Ta bonchetida mela de7as; ta wolqay ubba wode oorathishin!
29.21: Ta haasaya wode si77i gidi si7ees; ta zoriya ufaysan ekoosona.
29.22: Ta entana alliya gisho, ta oda simmin taape guyera odiya asi baawa.
29.23: Goshshanchoy ira naageysada, enti ta haasaya si7anaw hakankidi naagoosona.
29.24: Enti hirgan de7ishin ta som7uwa pashkisayis; ta miichay enta minthethees.
29.25: Taani enti daana ogiya doorada entaw halaqa gidas. Ba olanchota giddon de7iya kawoda ta enta giddon de7as; enti azzaniya wode minthethas.

30.1: Shin ha77i taape na7attiya asati tana qelqisoosona. Enti ta dorsa wudiya heemmiya kanatara pee7onna mela taani diggida aawata nayta.
30.2: Enta aawati wolqi ixidaysatanne gilqata gidiya gisho tana aykoka maaddibokona.
30.3: Metoynne koshi un7ethin, biitta bazzo bidi xapho coommosona.
30.4: Cumadhenne bonco maxidosona; mal7onna sankara xapho midosona.
30.5: Asi waassishe kayso gooddeysada, entana asaa giddofe gooddidosona.
30.6: Enti zangaaran, gongoloninne zaalla qophon de7idosona.
30.7: Enti woran do7ada waassishe yuuyidosona; aguntha giddon shiiqidi issife de7idosona.
30.8: Enti biittafe goodetidosona; sunthi bayna eeyata gididi de7idosona.
30.9: Ha77i enta nayti tana yethan caddoosona; taani enta giddon hayses attas.
30.10: Enti tana shaatetidi taape haakoosona; yeellatonna ta som7on cuttoosona.
30.11: Xoossay ta wolqaa laafethidi tana kawushida gisho, enti tana qohanaw yeda para gididosona.
30.12: Seeri bayna diccida nayti ta bolla dendidosona; ta tohuwas xihe wothidosona; enti tana dhaysanaw teqidosona.
30.13: Enti ta ogiya gordidi tana dhaysanaw koyoosona; enti hessa oothonna mela teqiya oonika baawa.
30.14: Olanchoti katama dirsaa menthidi geleysada, enti ta bolla yidosona.
30.15: Taani gita dagama dagammas; ta bonchoy carkoy efiyada bis; ta saro duussay shaarada dhayis.
30.16: Ta shempiya daro un7etasu; metoy tana cuucummidi oykis.
30.17: Qamma qamma sahoy ta meqetha coommees; seelay taw shempo immenna.
30.18: Xoossay ba gita wolqan ta ma7uwa shiishidi oykis; qoodhe oykiya ma7oda tana cuullis.
30.19: Xoossay tana urqan holis; taani baananne bidinthe gidas.
30.20: Abeeti Xoossaw, taani neeko waassayis; shin neeni tana allabaka. Eqada nena woossas; shin neeni ta woosa si7abaka.
30.21: Neeni taw wozana mino gidadasa; ne gita wolqan tana yedethaasa.
30.22: Neeni tana carkora denthada gooddadasa; goten tana harqadasa.
30.23: Asa ubbaas wursethi gidida, hayqos ne tana aatha immanaysa erayis.
30.24: Meqida asi, “Tana maaddarki” gidi waassin, iyaw qadhetonna asi de7ii?
30.25: waayen de7eysatas ta yeekabikina? manqotas ta qadhetabikina?
30.26: Lo77oba demmana gada amotas shin iitabay gakis; Taw sa7i keehana gada naagas shin gallasi taw dhumis.
30.27: Ta wozanay hirga aggibeenna; taani wopa demmabike; un7a qammi ta bolla gakis.
30.28: Ta asatethay awa suulon gidonashin azzanon kareexis; taani deriya shiiquwan eqada maade koyayis.
30.29: Taani worakanatas isha, diidinthas lagge gidas.
30.30: Ta gogay kareexidi poqeti poqeti wodhees; ta asatethay mishan xuugetees.
30.31: Ta ufaysi qoncisiya diithinne suusul7ey, ha77i ta zelelsas gidis.

31.1: “Geela7o xeellada amottonna mela, taani ta ayfiyara caaqetas.
31.2: Bollan de7iya Xoossaa matape asas imetida qaaday aybee? Salon de7iya Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay asas immiya gishoy aybee?
31.3: Iitata bolla boshi, bala ootheyisata bolla gadoy gakanaysi eretidaba gidenneyee?
31.4: Xoossay ta ogiya ubbaa be7eneyee? ta tanguwa ubbaa taybeneyee?
31.5: “Taani wordon de7idaba gidiko, ase cimmidaba gidiko,
31.6: Xoossay tana like mizaanen mazzano; yaatidi ta xillo gideysa be7o.
31.7: Ta hemethay ogepe keydaba gidiko, ta wozanay ta ayfey xeellidaba amotidaba gidiko, ta kushey nagaran tunidaba gidiko,
31.8: ta dolay shodetidi dhayo; ta zeridaysa hari mo.
31.9: “Ta wozanay hara maccas amotidaba gidiko, woyko taani ta shooruwa machiw geeddidaba gidiko,
31.10: ta machiya hara asas gaacco; iira hara addey aqo.
31.11: Hessi yeellayiya nagaras koshshiya gita pirda.
31.12: Ha nagaray tamada xuuggiyaba gidiya gisho, ta aquwa ubbaa dhaysanashin.
31.13: “Ta adde woyko ta macca aylleti abeeti gin, entaw pirdonna ixidaba gidiko,
31.14: Xoossa sinthan ta pirdas shiiqiya wode waananee? I tana oychiya wode taani woyga zaaranee?
31.15: Tana medhida Xoossay enta I medhibeneyee? Nuna ubbaa nu aaye ulon medhiday issi iya gidenneyee?
31.16: “Taani manqoti woossidaba diggidaba gidiko, woyko am7eta minthethonna aggidaba gidiko,
31.17: yi7o nayti mela aqiya wode be7ashe, taani tarka midaba gidiko,
31.18: Taani enta ta na7atethafe doomada enta aawada dichas; ta yeletoosope doomada am7eta maaddas.
31.19: Ma7oy dhayin meegoy wodhiya uraa, woyko kallo de7iya metootanchuwa be7ada,
31.20: ta dorsata ikisepe oosetida ma7o mayzin, tana anjona biday de7iko,
31.21: Taani mooton enta shatimmanaysa erada, yi7o nayta naaqidaba gidiko,
31.22: ta qesey kuriyape me77o; ta kushey hashiyape kareti wodho.
31.23: Xoossaa hanquwa yayyida gisho hessa oothanaw danda7ike.
31.24: “Taani worqan ammanetidaba gidiko, woyko walahi bayna worqaa ‘Ta ceeqoy nena’ gidaba gidiko,
31.25: Ta duretetha darotethan, ta kushey demmida wodhen ufaytidaba gidiko,
31.26: Awa phoolethi be7ada, woyko ageena lo77otethi xeellada,
31.27: ta wozanay geeman enta nashshibeenna, woyko ta enta yeerada goyinnabike.
31.28: Hessi pirda ehiya nagara gidiya gisho Xoossaa kaddas guussu.
31.29: “Ta morketa kundethan ufaytabike; enta gakida metuwan hashshu gabike.
31.30: ‘Ta morkey dhayo’ yaaga baaddada, nagara oothabike.
31.31: Ta soo asay, ‘Iya son kathi midi kallonnay oonee?’ yaagidi markatoosona.
31.32: Ta soy ubba wode dooya gidiya gisho, oge asi karen aqi erenna.
31.33: Harati ootheysada, ta nagaraa ta wozanan genthabike.
31.34: Asa pokos yayyada, enta boriyas dagammada, soo gelada qosetida wodey deenna.
31.35: “Tana si7iya asi de7eerenneshin, Ta oday tuma gideysa paramayis; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay taw zaaro immo Ta morkey ba mootuwa xaafidi shiishin ta be7arkinashin.
31.36: Be7iyako woytoda qoodhen aathada ma7anashin, Kallachada ta huuphen wothanashin!
31.37: Taani maati de7iya asada xoossaako shiiqada, ta oothidaba ubbaa iyaw qoncisanashin!
31.38: “Ta goshsha biittay ta bolla waassidaba gidiko, daasatika afuthan laakidaba gidiko,
31.39: he biittan kaxidaba miishe qanxonna ekidaba gidiko, woyko he biitta ootheyisata koshan wodhidaba gidiko,
31.40: taw he biittan giste gisho agunthi, banga gisho sharaafi dolo” yaagis. Iyyoba oday hessan poletis.

32.1: Iyyobi, “Taani xillo asi” gida gisho, ha heedzu asati iyaw zaaro imo aggaagidosona.
32.2: Iyyobi Xoossaafe aathidi bana xillo oothida gisho, Rama yarape gidida Buza biittafe yida Barkela na7ay Elihuy Iyyoba bolla hanqetis.
32.3: Enti iya coo bala gidi pirdidi, iyaw bessiya zaaro immanaw danda7iboona gisho Elihuy ha heedzu laggeta bollaka hanqetis.
32.4: Elihuy entafe kaalotiya gisho enti ubbay haasaya wursana gakanaw naagis.
32.5: Ha heedzu asati Iyyobas bessiya zaaro immanaw danda7iboonaysa be7idi I daro yilotis.
32.6: Buza biittafe yida Barkela na7ay Elihuy haysada yaagidi haasaya doomis. “Taani hintefe na7atayis; hinte taape bayrateta; Hessa gisho, taani ta qofaa hintew odanaw yayyas.
32.7: Taani, ‘Cimati odeto; banta daro laythan demmida cincatethaa tamaarsonna’ ” gada qopas.
32.8: Shin asa giddon aqidi cincatethi immey, Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa Ayyaana.
32.9: Ase cinca oothey cimatethi gidenna, woyko asas akeeka immey laytha darotethi gidenna.
32.10: Hessa gisho, si7ite; taka ta qofaa hintew odana.
32.11: Hinte haasaya wode, taani si77i gada hayzas; hinte odana qaala koyishin naagas.
32.12: Hinte geysa ubbaa wursada si7as; shin hintefe oonika Iyyoba bala gidi ammanthibena; hintefe oonika iya palamas bessiya zaaro immibeenna.
32.13: Iyyoba odaas kalsiya zaaro immanaw danda7ey, Xoossefe attishin, ase gidonna gisho, hinte, “Nuus cincatethi de7ees” goopite.
32.14: Iyyobi palamiday taara gidonashin hintera; taani hinte odada iyaw zaaro immike.
32.15: Enti dagammidi, gaanaba dhayida gisho, zaaro immanaw danda7ibookona.
32.16: Yaatin enti odetiyaba dhayidi si77i gidi eqiko, taani naaganaw koshshii?
32.17: Gidenna, taani odiyabay de7ees; taka ta qofaa qoncisana.
32.18: Ta odanabay daroy de7iya gisho, ta giddon de7iya ayyaanay tana oda gidi sugees.
32.19: Ta gaathay goozetida manaaceda, woyko mal7anto woyne ushshi kumida ogoroda dhuuqana hanees.
32.20: Ta odada kessanaw bessees; ta doona dooyada zaaro immanaw koshshees.
32.21: Ha odan taani oonaka maaddike, woyko oonaka coo sabbike.
32.22: Ase coo sabbiyabay taw eretenna; ta hessa oothiyako tana medhidaysi pirdanashin.

33.1: Iyyoba, ha77i ta odaa si7a; ta giyaba ubbaa hayza.
33.2: Taani ta doona dooyas; ta qaalati ta inxarsaa xeeran de7oosona.
33.3: Ta qaalati ta wozana suuretetha qoncisosona; ta ereysa ta inxarsay tumatethan odees.
33.4: Tana medhiday Xoossaa Ayyaana; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa shempoy taw de7o immis.
33.5: Ne danda7iko taw zaaro imma; nena giigisada taara palama.
33.6: Taani Xoossaa sinthan ne mela; taanika urqafe medhetas.
33.7: Neeni taw yayiya gaasoy baawa; taani nena naaqike.
33.8: “Ne haasaya ubbaa taani si7ashe gam7as; ne doonape keyida qaalata hayzas.
33.9: Taani geeshshinne borey bayna asi; taani xillonne nagara oothaboonna asi.
33.10: Shin Xoossay tana seeranaw gaaso koyees; I tana ba morkeda taybees.
33.11: Ta tohuwa duxis; ta tango ubbaa I wochees” yaagadasa.
33.12: “Iyyoba, ne oday like gidenna; ta new odayis, Xoossay asape aadhees.
33.13: ‘Xoossay asa odaas zaaro immenna’ gada, ayis iyara palamay?
33.14: Asi akeekennafe attishin, Xoossay dumma dumma ogera odees.
33.15: Asi qamma hiixan zin7idi, dhisko eeyidi de7iya wode, Xoossi amuhoninne qoncethan odees.
33.16: He wode asay si7anaada haythe dooyees; ba seeran enta daganthees.
33.17: Yaatidi asi nagara oothonna mela teqees; otoro asape diggees.
33.18: Xoossi ase dhayope ashshees; hayqopeka naagees.
33.19: Asi hargetidi hiixan de7ishin, iya meqethaa garsan qanxonna saho yeddidi seerees.
33.20: Hessada hanidi hargida uray kathi ixees; daro mal7o kathi iya shaatees.
33.21: Iya ashoy gilqidi wurees; iya asatethay melin meqethi taybetees.
33.22: Iya shempoy duufoko, iya de7oy hayqo kiitanchotako matees.
33.23: “Asas suure ogiya bessiya mukulun taybetiya kiitanchotape issoy iya maaddanaw danda7ees.
33.24: Iyaw qadhetidi, ‘I duufo gelonna mela iya ashsha; taani iya woziyaba demmas; iya aggaaga’ yaagidi hayqos odees.
33.25: Hessa gisho, iya asatethay na7a asatethi gidana; iya yalagatetha wolqay iyaw simmana.
33.26: He wode I Xoossaa woossana; Xoossay iya woosa si7ana; Xoossay iyaw iya xillotethaa zaariya gisho, I ufaysan Xoossaa goyinnana.
33.27: He wode asa sinthan I haysada yaagidi yexana; ‘Taani nagaraa oothas; suureba geellayas; shin Xoossay ta hanuwa taw qanxibeenna.
33.28: Ta duufon gelonna mela tana ashshis; ha77i paxa de7ada poo77o be7ayis’ yaagana.
33.29: “Heko, Xoossi asas hessa ubbaa zaari zaari oothees.
33.30: I de7o poo7o be7ana mela, iya shempuwa duufope ashshees.
33.31: “Iyyoba, taani odeysa hayzada si7a; ane ne si77i ga; taani odetana.
33.32: Ne odanaw koyaabay de7iko oda; taani ne xillo gideysa be7anaw koyayis.
33.33: Atto giiko si77i gada, ta haasaya si7a; ta nena cincatethi tamaarsana” yaagis.

34.2: “Hinteno, cincato ta haasaya si7ite; hinteno, eranchoto tana hayzite.
34.3: Inxarsi mal7o kathi shaaki ereysada, haythi oda shaakidi erees.
34.4: Ane nuuni suureba shaakidi, lo77oba tamaaridi eroos.
34.5: “Iyyobi, ‘Taani xillo; shin Xoossi tana suure pirdaa diggis.
34.6: Taani tuma shin wordancho gidas; tanan bali baawa shin, paxonna madunthi madunxisis’ yaagis.
34.7: Iyyobada Xoossa bolla, qelqisiya asi de7ii?
34.8: I iita ootheysatara laggetees; nagaranchotara hemetees.
34.9: I, ‘Asi Xoosse ufaysana gidi oothiyabay aykoka maaddenna’ yaagees.
34.10: “Hessa gisho, hinteno, akeekancho asato si7ite, iita oosoy Xoossaafe, Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaafe bala oosoy haako.
34.11: Xoossay asas iya oosuwada immees; iya ogiyada iyaw qanxees.
34.12: Xoossay tuma iita oothenna; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay suure pirdaa geellayenna.
34.13: Sa7a bolla iyaw maata immiday oonee? biitta ubbaa bolla iya shuumiday oonee?
34.14: Xoossay ba Ayyaananne ba de7o shempuwa zaaridi baako ekiyako,
34.15: asho ma7ida ubbay issife dhayana; asi biitta simmanashin.
34.16: “New akeeki de7iko haysa si7a; ta haasaya hayza.
34.17: Suure pirdaa ixey haaranaw danda7ii? Neeni xillonne wolqaama Xoossaa pirday?
34.18: Xoossay kawotako, ‘Hinte pathonayisata’; qassi biitta haareysatako, ‘Hinte iita’ yaagees.
34.19: Enti ubbay iya kushe oosota gidiya gisho, Halaqata som7o xeellidi maaddenna; dureta manqotape aathidi xeellenna.
34.20: Enti gidi bilahe akeekona hayqana; ubbay kokorishe dhayana; wolqaamati asa kushey bochonna kichana.
34.21: “Xoossay asa hemethaa xeellees; iya tango ubbaa wochees.
34.22: Iita ootheyisata, genthanaw danda7iya sakana dhumi baawa.
34.23: Asay iya sinthe pirdas shiiqana mela, Xoossay qaxaro immenna.
34.24: Oyshi bayna wolqaamata mentherethees; enta bessan harata shuumees.
34.25: I enta oosuwa eriya gisho, enta issi qamman maatape wothidi dhaysees.
34.26: Enta iitatethaa gisho, nagaranchota asa sinthan seerees.
34.27: Hessa I oothey, enti iya kaallonna ixida gishonne iya kiitaa aggida gishosa.
34.28: Enti manqota un7ethidi Xoossako waassana mela oothidosona; Xoossay manqota waasuwa si7is.
34.29: Xoossay si77i giiko iya oone mootanay? I ba som7uwa qosiko iya be7anay oonee? I asaapenne kawotethaafe bolla.
34.30: Hessi haniday geellay deriya haaronna melanne enta sinthan xihe wothonna melasa.
34.31: “Asi Xoossako yaagiyako Lo77o; kase ta nagara oothidaba gidiko zaarada oothike.
34.32: Ta be7onnaysa tana tamaarsa; nagara oothidaba gidiko zaarada oothike.
34.33: Yaatin neeni paaxike gashe, ne doseysa mela Xoossay new woytaneyee? Hiza qofa qachanay nenape attishin, tana gidike; hessa gisho, ne ereysa taw oda.
34.34: Akeeka asay haysada yaagosona; cincati yaagosona;
34.35: ‘Iyyobi eri bayna odetees; Iya odan ayfey baawa.’
34.36: Iyyobi iita asada zaaro immida gisho, wursethi gakanaw paacetida gideerenne!
34.37: I ba nagaraa bolla geellatethi gujis; nu sinthan Xoossaa bolla qelqisis; Xoossa bolla daro odetis” yaagis.

35.2: “Iyyoba, neeni, ‘Taani Xoossaa sinthan xillo’ geysi likee?
35.3: ‘Taani nagaraa oothonna aggada ay go7etiyana? ay wodhe demmanee?’ yaagada ne Xoossaa oychanaw danda7aasa.
35.4: Taani newunne ne laggetas zaaro immana.
35.5: Dhoqu gada salota xeella; neepe bollara de7iya shaara akeekada be7a.
35.6: Ne nagara oothiko Xoossaa aybin qohanee? Ne balay dariko hessi iyaw ay oothii?
35.7: Ne xillo gidiko iyaw ay immanee? Woyko ne kushepe I ay ekanee?
35.8: Ne nagaraa oothiko ne mela ase qohaasa; qassi xillikoka ase go77aasa.
35.9: “Un77i dariya wode asay waassees; wolqaamata kushepe kessi ekiya asi koyidi wobbatoosona.
35.10: Shin oonika, ‘Qamma mazmure immiya, tana medhida Xoossay awun de7ii?
35.11: Do7atape aathidi tamaarseysi, kafotape aathidi cinca ootheysi awun de7i’ yaagenna.
35.12: Enti waassoosona; shin Xoossay enta otoruwa gaason, entaw zaaro immenna.
35.13: Coo waasuwa Xoossi tuma si7enna; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay hessa hayzenna.
35.14: Neeni ta Xoossaa be7anaw danda7ike yaagikoka, ne mootoy iya sinthan de7iya gisho, ne iya danda7an naaganaw bessees.
35.15: Xoossay ase pirdonnabaanne nagara aggidi aadhana gada qopay?
35.16: Hessa gisho, neeni ne doona coo dooyasa; eri bayna haasaya darsaasa” yaagis.

36.2: “Xoossaa doona gidada ta new odiyabay de7iya gisho, guuthu danda7ada si7a.
36.3: Taani ta eraa haaho soope ehana; tana Medhidaysi xillo gideysa qoncisana.
36.4: Taani wordo haasayike; kumetha eri de7iya asi neera de7eysa ammana.
36.5: “Xoossay tuma wolqaama; shin I oonaka kadhenna. I ba akeekan mino.
36.6: I iitati de7on daana mela oothenna; shin un7etidaysatas suure pirdees.
36.7: Xoossay ba ayfiya xillota bollafe denthenna; enta kawotara utisidi, merinaw dhoqu dhoqu oothees.
36.8: Shin asay santhalaatan qashetiko, woyko meto wodoron oyketiko,
36.9: I enta oosuwanne otoron oothida nagaraa enta bolla qoncisees.
36.10: Seera si7anaada enta haytha dooyees; nagarape simmana mela enta kiittees.
36.11: Enti si7idi iyaw kiitetiko, banta laytha saroninne ufaysan wursana.
36.12: Shin enti si7onna ixiko mashshan wurana; enti era dhayida gisho hayqana.
36.13: “Xoossaa ammanonna asati banta wozanan yilotida mela de7oosona; I enta pirdiya wode maade koyidi woossokona.
36.14: Enti oothiya tuna oosuwan dhayana; banta na7atethan hayqana.
36.15: Shin waayeteyisata enta waayiyape ashshees; enta metuwa baggara entaw odees.
36.16: “Xoossay nena meto wodorope, un7i bayna dalga bessi, dooretida kathi kumida gaytaako kessana.
36.17: Shin ha77i iitata bolla gakiya pirday ne bolla gakin; xillo pirdan oyketadasa.
36.18: Oonika nena duretethi bessidi cimmonna mela, wodhaafe daroy balethonna mela naageta.
36.19: Ne duretethay woyko ne dafetethay nena metope ashshanee?
36.20: Asay banta bessaafe dhayiya qammay, yaana mela amottofa.
36.21: Ha meto ubbay nena gakiday hessa gaasona; hessa gisho, iita oothonna mela naageta.
36.22: “Xoossay ba wolqan dhoqu dhoqu gis; iya mela astamaarey oonee?
36.23: Xoossaa, ‘Haysa ootha’ gidi kiittey, woyko, ‘Neeni iita ooso oothadasa’ yaaganaw danda7ey oonee?
36.24: Asay mazmuren sabbida iya oosuwa, neka mazmuren sabba.
36.25: Asa koche ubbay Xoossaa oosuwa be7is; asay haahon eqidi xeellidosona.
36.26: Xoossay gita! Iya gitatetha nu akeekanaw danda7oko; iya laytha darotethaas zawi baawa.
36.27: “Xoossay haathe abbafe pude salo efees; duge zaaridi ira oothidi bukisees.
36.28: He iray shaarape keyidi, asa bolla bukana mela oothees.
36.29: Xoossi shaara waatidi micciyako, Xoossay de7iya saluwan waanidi guummiyako, oonika erenna.
36.30: I ba yuushon wol7antha poo7uwa laallees; abba ciimmuwa waatidi kammiyako be7a.
36.31: Yaatidi Xoossay deriya aysees; kathaa darsidi immees.
36.32: I wol7anthi ba kushen oykees; ba mallida bessaa caddana mela kiittees.
36.33: Dadi dhuuqidi uushoy yaanaysa bessees; meheyka uushoy yaanaysa erees.

37.1: “Iya uushuwan ta wozanay dirgees; ba bessan qaaxees.
37.2: Iya doonape keyiya qaala si7ite; dadada guummiya iya girsaa hayzite.
37.3: I salo garsan ba wol7antha laallees; biitta gaxape gaxa gakanaw kiittees.
37.4: Hessafe guye, iya guunthay si7etees; ba yashshiya girsaa sissees. Iya girsay si7etiya wode, ba wol7antha teqenna.
37.5: Xoossaa malaalsiya ogen ba guuntha sissees; nuuni akeekanaw danda7onna gitaba I oothees.
37.6: I shachako, ‘Sa7an wodha’ yaagees; wolqaama iraako, ‘Buka’ yaagidi kiittees.
37.7: I medhida asa ubbay iya oosuwa erana mela, asay banta oosuwa aggana mela oothees.
37.8: He wode do7ati banta bessaa geloosona; banta gongoluwan qosetoosona.
37.9: Wolqaama gotey dugehape dendees; irxa carkoy pudehape yees.
37.10: Xoossaa de7o shempoy shachi medhees; dalga haathata shuchada minthees.
37.11: Shaari haathe tookana mela oothees; ba wol7antha shaara giddon laallees.
37.12: Shaarati iya kiitan biitta gaxaa yuuyosona; I kiittiya kiita ubbaa poloosona.
37.13: Xoossay ira bukisey biitta irxisanaasa, woyko asaa seeranaasa, woyko ba siiquwa bessanaasa.
37.14: “Iyyoba, hessa si7a; Xoossay oothiya malaalsiya oosuwa taki gada akeeka.
37.15: Xoossay shaarata waatidi kiittiyako, ba wol7antha waatidi wol7amisiyako eray?
37.16: Shaarati salon waanidi uttiyako, eran polo gidida Xoossay oothiya malaalsiya oosuwa neeni eray?
37.17: Dugeha carkoy carkidi biitta mishisiya wode, neeni wolqaama bazzo seelan til7ana.
37.18: Xoossay saluwa til7ida mastooteda micciya wode, neeni iya maaddanaw danda7ay?
37.19: Nuuni era paca gidiya gisho, Xoossas woygidi odetaneko ne nuna tamaarsa.
37.20: Xoossara odetana gada taani oychanaw koshshii? tana dhaysana mela ta ayis iya denthethanee?
37.21: Carkoy salope shaara geeshshiya wode, salon phooliya awa oonika be7anaw danda7enna.
37.22: Pudeha baggara worqaa daaniya poo7oy bentees; Xoossay yashshiya teeman qoncees.
37.23: Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaako shiiqanaw danda7oko; iya wolqay gita. I ba tuma pirdaaninne ba gita xillotethan ase qohenna.
37.24: Hessa gisho, asay iyaw yayyees; bantana cinca geyisata I kadhees” yaagis.

38.1: Hessafe guye, Goday gote giddon gididi Iyyobas haysada yaagidi zaaris.
38.2: Eri bayna odan ta zoriya dhumisey I hessi oonee?
38.3: Ane addeda danceta; ta nena oychana, taw zaara.
38.4: Taani alamiya medhiya wode neeni awun de7ay? Ane ne akeekiyako taw oda.
38.5: Ne eriko, ha sa7aa dalgatethaas zawa wothiday oonee? Wadha wodoruwa sa7a bolla yeggiday oonee?
38.6: Ha sa7aa tuussata kundonna mela minthidi oykiday aybee? Ha sa7aa baasuwas koyro shuchaa wothiday oonee?
38.7: Wonta bakalati issife yexiya wode, kiitanchoti ubbay ufaysan ilili giya wode ne eray?
38.8: Abba haathi biittafe dhuuqidi keyiya wode, iya pengeta gordiday oonee?
38.9: Abbaa shaara mayzas; sakana dhuman gooziday tana.
38.10: Abbay kanthonna mela zawa medhiday, iyaw pengenne teqe wothiday tana.
38.11: “Haysa gakanaw ya; shin haysafe aadhofa; ne wolqaama hobbey hessan eqo” yaagiday tana.
38.12: Iyyoba, ne yeletoosope wonti wontana mela kiita eray, away dolana bessaa malla eray?
38.13: Wonta poo7oy biitta ubban poo7ana mela, iita asata qosetida bessaafe qonce kessana mela, neeni wonta kiitta eray?
38.14: Wonta poo7oy zumatanne zangaarata, dakoydi wothida ma7oy eqidi benteysada bessees; oto bolla wothida maatameda qoncees.
38.15: Iitata poo7oy eketana; enta makalla qesey meqana.
38.16: Ciimmo abba giddo gelada pultuwa be7adii? Woyko iya baasuwa gakada iya olla simeretadii?
38.17: New hayqo pengeti bentidona? Woyko sakana dhumaa pengeta be7adii?
38.18: Sa7ay ay mela giteeko ne eray? Hessa ubbaa ne eriya gidiko taw oda.
38.19: Poo7oko efiya ogey awunee? dhumi awun de7iyako eray?
38.20: Poo7onne dhuma enta bessaa bessaa efanaw danda7ay? Enti de7iya bessaa efiya ogiya eray?
38.21: Neeni sa7i medhetiya wode yeletida gishonne daro laythi de7ida gisho hessa eronna aggaka!
38.22: Shachi minjetiya keethaa geladii? woyko shachi dooretida bessaa be7adii?
38.23: Taani enta meto wodes, ola wodesinne toora gallasas minja wothas.
38.24: Wol7anthi keya bessaa efiya ogey awun de7ii? Woyko doloha carkoy awupe keyidi carkii?
38.25: Iri wodhiya bessaa giigisiday, dadas oge kessiday oonee?
38.26: Asi doonna mela biittan ira bukisey oonee?
38.27: Melida mela biittay iran laakidi, purco maatay dolana mela oothiday oonee?
38.28: Iras aawi de7ii? Woyko aka yeliday oonee?
38.30: Haathay shuchada minthees; abba baasoy shachada uuketees.
38.31: Pilaadisa geetetiya xoolintota issife gathada qachanaw danda7ay? Ooriyoona geetetiya xoolintoti qashetida wodoruwa billanaw danda7ay?
38.32: Cugan cugan de7iya xoolintota enta woden woden kessanaw danda7ay? Biire geetetiya xoolintota enta naytara kaalethanaw danda7ay?
38.33: Saloti ay higgen aqiyako ne eray? He higgey sa7aa haarana mela oothanaw danda7ay?
38.34: Di7oy nena muukana mela ira bukisanaw, ne qaala dhoqu oothada shaarata sissanaw danda7ay?
38.35: Wol7anthi kiittanaw danda7ay? Enti neeko yidi, “Heko, ay oothino?” goonna?
38.36: Wozanas cincatethi, kahas akeeka immiday oonee?
38.37: -38 Ba cincatethan shaarata taybanaw danda7ey oonee? Baana munuqidi, urqa kessidi minthanaw, salo otota gedi oothidi haathe tiganaw danda7ey oonee?
38.39: Shankatada macca gaammos miyaba eha eray? koshatida gaammo marata muza eray?
38.40: Enti gongolon qoseti naagoosona; bazzon zin7idi pee7osona.
38.41: Quuroti koshatidi daaburiya wode, enta nayti miyaba demmanaw taako waassiya wode, entaw miyaba immey oonee?

39.1: “Woshi7ey awude yeliyako neeni eray? Baachoti bannakidi banta marata yeliya wode be7adii?
39.2: Enti ay mela ageena gam7iyako, awude yeliyako ne eray?
39.3: Enti gulbati eqetidi, banta marata yeley awudeko eray?
39.4: Enta marati bazzon diccidi minnoosona; banta aayeta aggidi boosona; nam7antho guye simmokona.
39.5: “Wora hareti yeda daanada oothiday oonee? Qashope enta birshidi yeddiday oonee?
39.6: Entaw bazzuwa de7iya bessi oothada immas; maxine biittan enti daanada oothas.
39.7: Katama waasuwape haakidi de7oosona; laaggeysta qodethi si7okona.
39.8: Enti dereta bolla bantana heemmoosona; yan miya purco maata qoroosona.
39.9: “Menthi new oothanaw ero gandee? Woyko ne zadalon qamma aqandee?
39.10: Goyana mela ne iya waaxanee? Woyko waaxada goyanaw danda7ay?
39.11: Neeni iya wolqaa minotethan ammanetanee? deexo ooso I oothana mela iyaw yegga agganee?
39.12: Neeni kathaa shaalen qolana mela, woyko wudumman shiishana mela iya ammanay?
39.13: “Yanchoy ba qefiya ellesada qaathawusu; shin haatha kafoda piradhanaw danda7uku.
39.14: Yanchoy ba phuuphulliya biittan phuuphulawusu; shafen ho7ana mela aggaagawusu.
39.15: ‘Tohoy menthana, bazzo do7ati yedhana’ gada qopuku.
39.16: Nayti babaa gidonnaada oothada entaw daro iitawusu. I daabura ubbay mela atteysi iw aykoka daanenna.
39.17: Hessada oothada iyo cincatethi diggidaynne akeeka dhaysiday tana.
39.18: Shin dendada iya woxiya wode, baara gaadetiya para bollanne paraawa bolla miiccawusu.
39.19: “Iyyoba, paratas wolqaa immiday, woyko parata morgen cimba mayziday nenee?
39.20: Parati booleda gupanaadanne garmamidi daganthanaada oothiday nenee?
39.21: Parati banta wolqan ammanetidi dhiskoosona; oletanaw ola demba gaallaboosona.
39.22: Yashshi erokona; enta aybika daganthenna; enta bolla mashsha shoddikoka guye simmokona.
39.23: Enta toggiya olanchoti oykida ola miisheti, phoolishe issoy issuwara gahetidi giiroosona.
39.24: Shin parati biitta kaashishenne yashisishe gaallaboosona; Moyze girsi si7iya wode si77i gidi eqanaw danda7okona.
39.25: Moyzey punetiya wode ufaysan garmamoosona; ola peeno haahon ekoosona; toora mocona kiitaanne olanchota ceequwa si7oosona.
39.26: “Xiloy ba qefiya dugeha bagga miccidi, paallanaw danda7ey ne cincatethanee?
39.27: Arganthi pude keyidi, ba keethaa dhoqa dereta bolla keexey ne kiitanee?
39.28: Arganthi aafo doonan ba keethaa keexidi de7ees; zaalla qophoti iyaw qol7a gididosona.
39.29: Yan uttidi baw miyaba wochees; iya ayfey haahon geeshshidi demmees.
39.30: Argantha nayti suuthi uyoosona; gawuxi de7iya bessan shiiqoosona” yaagis.

40.2: “Iyyoba, asi Ubbaa Danda7iya Godaara mootetidi, lathanaw danda7ii? Ane Xoossara mootetiya uray iyaw zaaro” yaagis.
40.3: Hessafe guye, Iyyobi zaaridi, haysada yaagis;
40.4: “Godaw, taani pathonna laafa asi; ta doona bolla kushe wothada si77i gaanape attishin, new ay zaaro immanaw danda7iyana?
40.5: Taani issi toho odas; shin taw zaariyabay baawa; nam7antho odas haraa gujike” yaagis.
40.6: Hessafe guye, Goday gote giddon giddon gididi Iyyobako haysada yaagis.
40.7: Addeda ne xeessaa dancada dendada, ta oyshaas zaaro imma.
40.8: Ne tana bala asi kessana hanayee? New xillo gidanaw tana wordancho kessayee?
40.9: Xoossa wolqaa mela wolqi new de7ii? Xoossay guummeysada ne guummanaw danda7ay?
40.10: Hessa gidiko, ne bonchuwanne gitatetha ma7a; ne wolqaanne teemuwa gixa.
40.11: Ne hanquwa gussa; ane otoranchota xeellada kawusha.
40.12: Ane loytha xeellada otortiya ubbaa yeellaya; iitata ubbaa enti de7iya bessaafe dhaysa.
40.13: Enta ubbaa biittan mooga; duufon yeggada enta bolla gorda.
40.14: He wode ne wolqay nena ashshanaw danda7eysa ta markatana.
40.15: Taani nena medhidaada medhida Bihemoota geetetiya do7a be7a; I boorada maata mees.
40.16: Iya xeessan de7iya wolqaynne iya uluwa kammida shayaa minotethay daro.
40.17: Iya goynay zigada bollan qaaxees; iya gedaa xaphoti minon dooqetidosona.
40.18: Iya meqethay naase birata mela; iya geday birata kure mela.
40.19: Xoossay medhida medheta ubbaa garsan I aadhees; taape attishin, hari iya xoonanaw danda7ey baawa.
40.20: Do7i gupiya derey, iyaw miyaba dolisees.
40.21: Mitha kuya garsan zin7ees; caren maqa giddon qosetees.
40.22: Mithati banta kuyan iya genthoosona; shaafa gaxan dicciya mithati iya kammoosona.
40.23: Shaafay kixidi goggey wode dagammenna; Yordaanose shaafay qoodhe gakanaw kumikoka I hirgenna.
40.24: Iya ayfiya toysidi, iya oykanaw danda7iya asi de7ii? Iya siidhiya lukidi oykanaw danda7ey oonee?

41.1: “Neeni Leewataane geetetiya abba do7aa manxaqon oykanaw, woyko iya inxarsaa wodoron ancafanaw danda7ay?
41.2: Iya siidhiya lukada dafo aathanaw danda7ay? Woyko iya gacuwa wospen lukanaw danda7ay?
41.3: I nena, ‘Hayyana tana aggarki’ yaagidi woossii? Woyko new mal7o qaala odii?
41.4: Ne iya merinaw aylle oothada haarana mela, I new ero gidi caaqanee?
41.5: Asi kafo loohiseysada ne iya loohisanaw danda7ay? Woyko iya qachada ne macca naytara kaa7ana mela oothanee?
41.6: Molo zal7anchoti iya gatiya bolla palamona? Woyko iya qanxerethidi bayzoona?
41.7: Neeni iya galbaa tooran, woyko iya huuphiya mashshan caddanaw danda7ay?
41.8: Ane iya ne kushen bocha; ne iyara butetida butiya dogaka; nam7antho iyara butetanaw qopaka.
41.9: He do7aa oykanaw paacey mela waaye; hari attoshin iya be7ida ubbay yashshan kokorees.
41.10: I zin7ida bessaafe iya denthanaw oonika xaalenna; yaatin, ta sinthan eqanaw danda7ey oonee?
41.11: Taani iyaw zaarana mela koyro taw tal7iday oonee? Salope garsan de7iyaba ubbay tabaa.
41.12: “Taani Leewataane tohotaba, iya gita wolqaabanne lo77iya iya asatethaba qoncisonna aggike.
41.13: Iya galbaa qaaranaw danda7ey oonee? Iya gacuwa pooqidi bixaala barsanay oonee?
41.14: Yashshiya achay de7iya iya gacuwa pooqanaw danda7ey oonee?
41.15: Iya zoko galbay issoy issuwa bolla dooretidi; shuchada minnida gondalle daanees.
41.16: Enti issoy issuwas daro matatida gisho, enta giddora hari attoshin carkoy kanthanaw danda7enna.
41.17: Issoy issuwara gahetidi de7iya gisho, enta aybika shaakenna.
41.18: I hadhishiya wode poo7oy pol7u gees; iya ayfeti wonta xalqeda caddees.
41.19: Iya doonape tama lacoy keyees; pinxiya tami bentees.
41.20: Iya siidhiyape cuyay, tama bolla de7iya otope keya pento mela.
41.21: Iya siidhera keya shempoy kenchikelo bonqisees; tama lacoy iya doonape keyees.
41.22: Iya morgiyan wolqay de7iya gisho, I daro yashshees.
41.23: Iya ashoy issife oyketidi de7iya gisho, iya asatethay biratada minnees.
41.24: Iya wozanay shuchada mino; gaacha woxa mela mino.
41.25: I dendiya wode minoti yayyoosona; dagammidi baqatoosona.
41.26: Iya gakiya mashshay aykoka oothenna; toori woyko dongey woyko mashshi iya qohenna.
41.27: I birata xinqa maatada, naase birata wooqida mithada mentherethees.
41.28: Dongey iya betisenna; yambarsha shuchi iyaw suulla mela.
41.29: Gumba xam7i iyaw xinqo mela; toora xongiya wode qelqisidi miicees.
41.30: Iya uluwa bolla de7iya galbay meqida kun7a mela qara; urqara I biya wode marasha mela biitta phalqees.
41.31: Abbaa pentida haatha mela tumbul tumbul oothees; xaaron pentiya zayte mela shiri shiri yeggees.
41.32: Iya biya ogey poo7ees; abba haatha goponto laammees.
41.33: I yashshi eronna gisho, biitta bolla iya mela medhetethi hari baawa.
41.34: I daro gita medhetethata ubbaa kadhees; do7a ubbaas I kawo” yaagis.

42.1: Hessafe guye, Iyyobi Godaako haysada yaagidi zaaris;
42.2: “Ne ubbaba oothanaw danda7eysanne ne qofaa teqanaw danda7ey baynaysa taani eras.
42.3: Ne, ‘Eri bayna ta zoriya qosey oonee?’ yaagada tana oychadasa; tuma taani taw geliboonnaba, ta eraape bolla gidida malaalsiyaba odetas.
42.4: “Neeni taako, ‘Taani odiya wode hayza; taani oychiya wode zaara’ yaagadasa.
42.5: Taani kase nebaa haythan si7as; shin ha77i ta nena ayfen be7as.
42.6: Hessa gisho, ta odan yellatada, bido bollanne baana bolla uttada paaxayis” yaagis. Kuusha Haasaya
42.7: Goday hessa Iyyobas odidaape guye, Temaanape yida Elfaazako haysada yaagis. “Ta aylliya Iyyobada hinte tabaa like odetiboonna gisho, ne bollanne ne nam7u laggeta bolla ta hanqoy eexis.
42.8: Hessa gisho, ha77i laapun kormatanne laapun marazeta ekidi ta aylliya Iyyobako bidi, xuussa yarsho hinte balas yarshite. Ta aylliya Iyyobi hintew woossana; taani iya woosa si7ada hinte hanuwa mela hintena seerike. Hinte ta aylliya Iyyobada tabaa like odibeketa” yaagis.
42.9: Hessafe guye, Temaanape yida Elfaazi, Shuuhape yida Beldadoosinne Na7imape yida Soofari bidi, Goday enta kiittidaysada oothidosona. Goday Iyyoba woosa s7is. Iyyobi Dako Woytetis
42.10: Iyyobi ba laggetas woossidaape guye, Goday iya zaaridi dureyis; iyaw kaseysa gisho nam7u kushe immis.
42.11: Hessafe guye, iya ishati, iya michetinne kase iya ereysati ubbay iyako yidi, iya son iyara gibira midosona. Iyaw azzanidosona; Goday iya bolla ehida meto ubban iya minthethidosona; qassi iyaw biranne worqa sagaayo immidosona.
42.12: Goday Iyyoba wursetha laytha koyro laythaafe aathidi anjis. Iyyobas tammanne oyddu mukulu dorsati, usupun mukulu gimaleti, issi mukulu waaxa booratinne issi mukulu macca hareti de7oosona.
42.13: Qassi iyaw laapun adde naytinne heedzu macca nayti yeletidosona.
42.14: Bayra macca na7iw Yimimo, nam7anthiw Qaxi7o, heedzanthiw Qerenhafuko yaagidi sunthis.
42.15: Iyyoba macca naytada mala lo77o macca na7i awu biittan bentibeenna. Enta aawa entaw enta ishatara laata biitta immis.
42.16: Hessafe simmin, Iyyobi xeetanne oytamu laythi de7is. Ba naytanne ba nayta nayta oyddantho yeletethaa gakanaw be7is.
42.17: Iyyobi daro wode de7idi, lo77o cima cimidi hayqis.

1.1: Iitata zoriyan boonnay, nagaranchota ogen eqonnay, qelqiseyisata shiiqon uttonnay, I anjetidaysa.
1.2: Shin I Godaa higgiyan ufaytees; iya higgiya gallasinne qamma qopees.
1.3: I goggiya haatha xaphon toketidi, woden woden ayfe immiya, iya haythay qolettonna mitha mela. I oothiya ubbay iyaw poletees.
1.4: Shin iitati hessa mela gidokona; carkoy pitidi efiya suulla mela.
1.5: Iitati xillo pirda bessan eqokona; nagaranchoti xillota duulatan bentokona.
1.6: Goday xillota ogiya erees; shin iitata ogey dhayana.

2.1: Kawotethati ayis dendoona? asay ayis coo maqetoona?
2.2: Kawoti Godaa bollanne I tiyidaysa bolla dendidosona; deriya haareysati enta bolla shiiqidosona.
2.3: “Enta santhalaata duuthoos; enta qasho wodoruwa holoos” yaagidosona.
2.4: Salon uttidaysi enta bolla miicees; Goday enta qelqisees.
2.5: I ba hanquwan enta daganthees; ba yiluwan enta yashisees.
2.6: “Ta geeshsha zuma Xiyoone bolla ta kawa kawothas” yaagees goday.
2.7: Taani Godaa higgiya awaajana; Goday tana, “Neeni ta na7aa; taani hachi new aawa gidas.
2.8: Ne tana oycha; ta new kawotethata immana; sa7a ubbay nebaa gidana.
2.9: Neeni birata xam7an enta menthana; meqa miisheda enta tincherethana” yaagis.
2.10: Hiza, kawoto eeyopite; ha sa7aa haareysato akeekite.
2.11: Godaa yashshan goyinnite; kokoridi kiitetite.
2.12: Goday hanqetin ogen hinte dhayonnaada iya tumatethan goyinnite. Iya hanqoy eeson eexi keyana; iyan qosetidi attida ubbay anjetidaysata.

3.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta morketi ay mela daridona! Ta bolla dendeysati aapune!
3.2: Daroti, “Xoossay iya ashshena” yaagidi, tabaa haasayoosona. Salah
3.3: Shin abeeti Godaw, ne taw gondalle; ta bonchoynne tana dhoqu oothey nena.
3.4: Ta qaala dhoqu oothada Godaako waassayis. I ba geeshsha zumaape taw zaarees. Salah
3.5: Goday tana naagiya gisho, ta zin7asinne dhiskas hirgi bayna barkas.
3.6: Ubba bessara ta bolla dendida, daro mukulu asaas yayyike.
3.7: Abeeti Godaw, denda! Abeeti ta Xoossaw tana ashsha! Ta morketa gacuwa shoca; iitata acha mentha.
3.8: Xoonoy Godaasa; Godaw, neeni ne asaa anja. Salah

4.1: Abeeti tana xillisiya Xoossaw, taani nena xeegiya wode taw koya. Taani un7etida wode ne tana la77a kessadasa; taw qadheta; ta woosa si7a.
4.2: Hinteno asaw, hinte awude gakanaw ta bonchuwa kawushsheetii? Awude gakanaw pathonnaba doseetii? Awude gakanaw wordo kaalleetii? Salah
4.3: Goday ammanetiya asata baw dummayidi wothidaysa erite; taani Godaa xeegiya wode I tana si7ees.
4.4: Hanqetite, shin nagara oothopite; hinte zin7iya wode hinte wozanaa qorite; si77i giite. Salah
4.5: Godaas like yarsho yarshite; iyan ammanetite.
4.6: “Nuna lo77oba bessanay oonee?” yaagidi daroti oychoosona; Abeeti Godaw, ne nuna keeha ayfen xeella.
4.7: Daro gistefenne woyne ushshafe ne ta wozanan wothida gita ufaysay aadhees.
4.8: Abeeti Godaw, ne xalaali tana saro wothiya gisho, taani zin7ada wopu gada dhiskayis.

5.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta qaala si7a; ta ooliya qopa.
5.2: Ta kawaw, ta Xoossaw ta waasuwa si7a; ta maade koyada woossiya woosaa hayza.
5.3: Abeeti Godaw, wonta wonta ta qaala si7aasa. Wonta wonta ta woosa ne sinthe shiishayis; ta ne zaaruwa naagayis.
5.4: Neeni iitatethan ufaytonna Xoosse; iitabay neera deenna.
5.5: Otoranchoti ne sinthan eqokona; iitabaa oothiya ubbaa ne ixaasa.
5.6: Wordo odeteyisata ne dhaysaasa; Goday suuthu gusseysatanne cimmeyisata ixees.
5.7: Shin ta ne gita maarotethan ne keethaa gelana; ne geeshsha bessaako simmada nena bonchon goyinnana.
5.8: Abeeti Godaw, ta morketa gisho gada, tana ne xillotethan kaaletha; ne ogiya ta sinthan suurisa.
5.9: Enta mettershan tumi baawa; enta wozanan dhaysoy kumis. Enta doonay dooyetida duufo mela; enti banta inxarsan cimmoosona.
5.10: Enti ne bolla makallida gisho, abeeti Xoossaw, enta pirda; Enta tobbay enta ekidi boo; enta daro nagaraa gisho enta yedetha.
5.11: Shin neeko baqatidi attida ubbay ufayto; enti merinaw ufaysan yexo. Ne sunthaa dosiya ubbay nenan ufaytana mela; neeni enta merinaw naaga.
5.12: Abeeti Godaw, neeni xillota anjaasa; gondallen ashsheysada ne keehatethan iya ashsha.

6.1: Abeeti Godaw, ne yiluwan tana seeropa; ne sheniyan tana hanqofa.
6.2: Abeeti Godaw, taani daaburancho gidida gisho tana maara; abeeti Godaw, ta wozanay argaacida gisho tana mintha.
6.3: Ta shempiya daro un7etasu; tana maaddanaw awude gakanaw gam7ay?
6.4: Abeeti Godaw, neeni simmada tana ashsha; ne keehatetha daruwan tana kessa eka.
6.5: Hayqida asaa giddofe nena hassayey baawa; duufon gididi nena galatey oonee?
6.6: Taani oolen daaburas; qamma kumethi yeekashe ta hiixa irxisas; ta arsa afuthan wooqisas.
6.7: Ta morketa gaason ta ayfey mulcatis; taani afuxida gisho demmonna ixis.
6.8: Goday ta yeehuwa si7ida gisho, hinteno, iita ootheysato taape haakite.
6.9: Goday ta waasuwa si7is; ta woosa ekis.
6.10: Ta morketi ubbay yeellatidosona; dagammidosona; qoponna guye simmidi kawuyidosona.

7.1: Abeeti Godaw ta Xoossaw, ta nenan qosetayis; tana yedethiya ubbaafe tana ashsha.
7.2: Neeni tana ashshonaba gidiyako, enti tana gaammoda zaazana; ashshiya asi bayna mentherethanashin.
7.3: Abeeti Godaw ta Xoossaw, ta haysa melaba oothidaba gidiko, taani ase naaqidaba gidiko,
7.4: ta laggetas lo77o gisho iitaa zaaridaba gidiko, gaasoy bayna ta morkiya bonqidaba gidiko,
7.5: ta morkey tana yedethidi oyko; tana sa7an yeggidi yedho; tana baanan gondorsidi kawusho. Salah
7.6: Abeeti Godaw, ne hanquwan dendada, eexiya ta morketa hanquwa bolla eqa; ta Xoossaw, ta gisho barka; neeni xillo pirda koyaasa.
7.7: Asay ne yuushon shiiqo; neeni entafe bollara haara.
7.8: Goday kawotethata bolla pirdees; abeeti Godaw, ta xillotethaadanne ta suuretethaada pirda.
7.9: Qofanne wozanaa shaakada eriya xillo Xoossaw, iitata geella hanota neeni teqa; shin xilluwa saron naaga.
7.10: Wozana suureta ashshiya, Xoossay taw gondalle.
7.11: Xoossay xillo pirdeysa; I ubba wode iitata bolla hanqetiya Xoossaa.
7.12: Iitati banta iitatethaafe simmonna ixiko, Xoossay ba mashsha leefes; ba dongiya giigisees.
7.13: I ba wodhiya ola miisheta giigisees; laxiya ba donge toora pitees.
7.14: Iitati qoho qanthatidi, gene wodexidi, wordo yeloosona.
7.15: Hara asas olla bookida asi ba bookida ollan baw kundees.
7.16: Iya geney iya huuphen simmees. Iya geellatethay iya mees.
7.17: Iya xillotethaa gisho taani Godaa sabbana; Ubbaafe Dhoqa Godaa sunthaas taani galata mazmure yexana.

8.1: Abeeti Godaw nu Xoossaw, ne sunthay biitta ubban waanidi bonchetide! Neeni ne bonchuwa salope bollara dhoqu dhoqu oothadasa.
8.2: Neeni ne morketa gisho ne morkiyanne nena mandeysa si77i oothanaw, guutha nayta doonan dhammiya nayta doonan galata kunthadasa.
8.3: Neeni ne biradhen medhida ne salota, iya bessan bessan neeni wothida ageenanne xoolintota taani be7iya wode,
8.4: neeni asaba qopanaw asi aybee? Woyko neeni iya xomoosanaw I aybee?
8.5: Iya ne neepe guuthara guuthadasa; bonchonne gitatetha kallacha iya huuphen wothadasa.
8.6: Ne medhida medhetetha ubbaa, haarana mela ne iya shuumadasa; ubbaa iya tohuwape garsara wothadasa.
8.7: Dorsatanne meheta, wora do7ata ubbaa,
8.8: salo kafota, abba molotanne haatha garsan qaaxiya ubbaa iyaw haarisadasa.
8.9: Abeeti Godaw nu Xoossaw, ne sunthay biitta ubban waanidi bonchetide!

9.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta nena ta kumetha wozanaape galatana; neeni oothida malaalsiya ooso ubbaa odana.
9.2: Taani nenan ufaytana hashshu gaana. Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaw, taani ne sunthaas galata mazmure yexana.
9.3: Ta morketi guye simmiya wode, ne sinthafe dhubetidi dhayana.
9.4: Ne araatan uttada taw xillo pirdaasa; ta mootuwa ne xillotethan oykadasa.
9.5: Neeni kawotethata seeradasa; iitata dhaysadasa. Neeni enta sunthaa merinaw quchadasa.
9.6: Morketi merinaw dhayidosona; enta katamata kumethi laalladasa; enti kumethi dogetidosona.
9.7: Shin Goday merinaw kawotidi de7ees; I ba araata pirdas giigisis.
9.8: Ha sa7aa xillotethan pirdana; dereta suuretethan aysana.
9.9: Goday un7etidaysatas attiya bessi; meto wode gelidi attiya qota.
9.10: Nena ereysati nenan ammanetosona; Godaw, nena koyeyisata yegga aggaka.
9.11: Xiyoonen kawotida Godaa galatite; I oothida oosuwa asa ubbaas odite.
9.12: Halo keyiya Xoossay gukida xillo suuthaa dogenna; boretidaysata waasuwa qelli geenna.
9.13: Abeeti Godaw, taw qadheta; ta morketi ta bolla ehiya metuwa be7a; hayqope tana ashsha.
9.14: Xiyoone asaa giddon taani eqada, ne galataa odana; ne atotethan ufaytana.
9.15: Kawotethati banta bookida ollan bantaw kundidosona; enti wothida xihey enta tohuwa oykis.
9.16: Goday ba xillo pirdan eretis; iita asay banta iita oosuwan oyketidosona. Salah
9.17: Iitati duufo baana; Xoossaa dogiya kawotethati ubbay entada hanana.
9.18: Manqoy ubba wode dogetidi attenna; metootanchuwa ufaysay merinaw dhayenna.
9.19: Abeeti Godaw denda; asi xoonopo! Kawotethati ne sinthan pirdeto.
9.20: Abeeti Godaw enta neeni yashisa; kawotethati ase gideysa ero. Salaha.

10.1: Abeeti Godaw, ayis haakada eqay? Meto wode ayis neeni geemmay?
10.2: Ba otoruwan iita asi manquwa yedethees; enti banta maquwan bantaw oyketidosona.
10.3: Iita asi ba iita amuwan ceeqetees; ba uuziyan Godaa cayeesinne kadhees.
10.4: Iitati banta otoruwan Xoossaa koyokona; banta qofan Xoossas besse immokona.
10.5: Iyaw ubba wode injetees; ne higgey iyaw gelenna; ba morketa I qelqisees.
10.6: Ba wozanan, “Tana aybika qaathenna tana metoy gakenna” yaagidi qopees.
10.7: Iya doonan baadethi, wordoynne mandethi kumis. Geneynne iitatethi iyan inxarsan de7ees.
10.8: Gutatan zugidi uttees; suure asata wodhanaw qosetidi naagees; wolqi bayna daaburanchota wochees.
10.9: Ba qosetida bessan geemmidi, manquwa oykanaw gaammoda zugees; iya oykidi ba xihiyan goochidi efees.
10.10: Wolqi bayna manquwa shocidi yeggees; iya tohuwa garsan I kundees.
10.11: I ba wozanan, “Xoossay dogis. Ba som7uwa genthidi be7enna” yaagees.
10.12: Abeeti Godaw, denda! Xoossaw, ne wolqaama kushiya dentha; manqota dogopa.
10.13: Iita asati Xoosse ayis kadhoona? Banta wozanan, “Xoossay nuna seerenna” ayis yaagona?
10.14: Shin Xoossaw, ne metuwanne un7aa be7aasa; neeni maaddanaw giiga uttadasa. Neeni yi7otas maade, qohetiday ne maaddana mela bana new aathidi immees.
10.15: Gene asata wolqaa mentha; iita asata seera; zaaridi enta giddon iitatethi bentofo.
10.16: Goday merinaw kawotidi de7ees; hara kawotethati iya biittafe dhayana.
10.17: Abeeti Godaw, neeni ashketa amuwa kunthaasa; enta minthetha; enta woosa si7a.
10.18: Yi7otanne un7etidaysata qohonna mela, sa7an de7iya oonika enta yashisonna mela, neeni entaw pirda.

11.1: Goday taani qosetada attiya bessi; yaatin ayis “Kafoda zumako baqata” yaagetii?
11.2: Nagaranchoti xillota dhuman caddanaw, banta dongiya waaxidi uttidosona.
11.3: Baasoy woddida wode, xillo asi ay oothanaw danda7ii?
11.4: Goday ba geeshsha bessan de7ees; salon ba araatan uttidi asaa xeellees; Godaa ayfey asaa pilgees; wochees.
11.5: Goday xilluwanne worduwa pilgees; iitatethi doseyisata ixees.
11.6: Goday iitata bolla eexiya tama bonqonne diinne bukisana; dhaysiya goten enta seerana.
11.7: Goday xillo gidida gisho, xillotethi dosees; suure asati iya som7uwa be7ana.

12.1: Xoossa asi biittafe wurida gisho, asa giddon ammanetethi bayna gisho, Godaw nuna maaddarkii?
12.2: Ubbay wordo haasayoosona; issoy issuwa cimmiya inxarsan nam7u wozanan odetoosona.
12.3: Abeeti Godaw, cimmiya doona gorda; otoron ceeqetiya inxarsaa teqa.
12.4: Enti, “Nu inxarsan nu xoonana; nu doonay nuusa; nuus godi oonee?” yaagosona.
12.5: “Manqota un7aa gishonne, metootanchota ooliya gisho, ha77i taani dendana; enti amotiya sarotethaa entaw immana” yaagees Goday.
12.6: Godaa qaalay geeshshi; taman laapun toho seerida birada geeshshi.
12.7: Abeeti Godaw neeni enta naaga; haysa mela asape merinaw enta ashsha.
12.8: Iiti asaa giddon bonchetiya wode, geella asati ceeqetishe simeretoosona.

13.1: Abeeti Godaw awude gakanaw tana dogay? Awude gakanaw neeni taape geemmay?
13.2: Ta shempiya awude gakanaw un7etanee? Ta wozanay azzanon awude gakanaw daanee? Ta morkey ta bolla awude gakanaw goobanee?
13.3: Godaw ta Xoossaw, ha77i tana xeellada taw zaara. Ta ayfiya poo7isada, tana hayqope ashsha.
13.4: Ta morketi, “Nuuni iya xoonida”, yaagidi ceeqetonnaada teqa; ta kundethan enti ufaytonnaada digga.
13.5: Shin taani ne maarotethan ammanetayis; neeni tana ashshiya gisho ufaytayis.
13.6: Ne taw keehida gisho, Godaw, ta new yexana.

14.1: Eeyati banta wozanan, “Xoossi baawa” yaagosona; enta de7oy iitis. Enti ixetidaba oothosona; lo77oba oothiya asi baawa.
14.2: Akeekeynne Xoosse koyey de7iyako be7anaw, Goday salope duge ase xeellees.
14.3: Shin ubbay zoko zaaridosona; ubbay go77onnaba gididosona. Lo77oba oothiya oonika baawa; hari attoshin issi asika baawa.
14.4: Asi kathi meysada, enti ta asaa bonqidi moosona; ha iita asati aybaka erokona; enti Xoossaa woossokona.
14.5: Shin Xoossay xillo asaara de7iya gisho, iita asati yashshan kokoroosona.
14.6: Hinte manqota qofaa laalleeta; shin Goday manqoti qosetidi attiya besse.
14.7: Isra7eeles atotethi Xiyoonepe yeerenne! Goday enta duussa zaariya wode, Yayqooba kochay ufaytana; Isra7eele asay hashshu gaana.

15.1: Abeeti Godaw, ne dunkaaniyan gam7anay oonee? Ne geeshsha zuma bolla daanay oonee?
15.2: Suure de7o de7ey, xillobaa oothey, ba wozanaape tuma odetey,
15.3: hara asa sunthi iissonnay, ba laggiya bolla iitabaa oothonnay, ba laagiya zigironnay,
15.4: iita asata kadhey, Godaa yayiya asata bonchey, qohetidika ba caaquwa poley,
15.5: ba miishiya yelon tal7onnay, xillo asi qohanaw wodhaafe ekonnay, haysata oothiya uray merinaw qaaxenna.

16.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, ta neeko baqatiya gisho tana naaga.
16.2: Taani Xoossaa, “Neeni ta Godaa; neepe attishin, hari lo77obay taw baawa” yaagas.
16.3: Sa7an de7iya geeshshati ay mela bonchetidonaa! Ta entara issife ufaytayis.
16.4: Hara xoossata kaalleysati banta bolla meto darsoosona. Shin taani hara xoossatas suuthi yarshike; taani enta sunthaa xeegike.
16.5: Ta Godaw ta laatay nena; taw koshshiya ubbaa taw immaasa; ta de7uwa saamay nena.
16.6: Tana gakida saamay ay mela lo77o! Ee ta laatay tuma lo77o!
16.7: Tana zorida Godaa galatayis; qamma ta wozanay tana tamaarsees.
16.8: Taani ubba wode Godaa ta sinthan be7ayis; I ta ushachan de7iya gisho dagammike.
16.9: Hessa gisho, ta wozanay ufaytees; ta inxarsay galatees; ta asatethay hirgi bayna de7ees.
16.10: Ta shempiw si7oolen aggaka; ne Geeshshaa wooqana mela oothaka.
16.11: Tana de7o ogiya bessaasa; ne sinthan kumetha ufaysi de7ees; ne ushachan merinaa injey de7ees.

17.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta xillo maggannuwa si7a; taani neeko waassiya waasuwa hayza. Cimon gidonashin tuman, woossiya woosa zaara.
17.2: Ne xillo pirday taw qonco; ne ayfey tumaa xeello.
17.3: Neeni qamma tana xomoosadasa; ta wozanaa paacadasa. Shin paacadaka ta bolla aykoka demmabaaka; ta inxarsayka baletibeenna.
17.4: Taani hara asatada iitabaa haasayike; taani ne qaala naagiya gisho, gene ogiya kaallabike.
17.5: Ta tohoy dhubetonna mela, ta tangoy ne ogiyape gaxa keybeenna.
17.6: Abeeti Xoossaw ta woosa ne si7iya gisho, taani nena woossayis. Ne haythaa taako zaarada, ta qaala si7a.
17.7: Banta morketape baqateyisata, ne ushacha kushen qottada ashsheyso, ne keehatetha malaalsiya ogen bessa.
17.8: Ne ayfe na77e mela tana naaga; ne qefiya garsan tana qosa.
17.9: Tana un7ethiya iitatape; teqidi oykida morketape ashsha.
17.10: Entaw qadhey baawa; otoron haasayoosona.
17.11: Tana gooddidi oykidosona; teqidosona; tana biittan holidi yegganaw xeelloosona.
17.12: Enti miyaba koyiya gaammo mela; qosetidi naagiya wodala gaammo mela.
17.13: Godaw, denda; ta morketara eqetada enta sa7an yegga; ne mashshan iitata kushepe tana ashsha.
17.14: Godaw, haysa mela asape tana qosa; enta qaaday sa7aba gidida asape ne kushen tana ashsha. Ne minjida seeran enta kalsa; he seeray enta naytas gididi, enta nayta naytas palaho.
17.15: Shin taani xillotethan ne som7uwa be7ana; ta barkiya wode ne malaa be7ada ufaytana.

18.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta wolqaw, taani nena dosayis.
18.2: Goday ta zaalla; ta miixa; tana ashsheysa; ta Xoossay ta iyako baqatiya ta zaalla. I taw gondalle; tana ashshiya wolqa; taani qosetada attiya besse.
18.3: Galata bessiya Godaa ta xeegayis; ta morketape taani attana.
18.4: Hayqo wodoroy tana cuullis; dhayo di7oy tana daganthis.
18.5: Duufo wodoroy ta bolla xaaxetis; hayqo xihey tana oykis.
18.6: Ta un7an Godaa xeegas; tana maaddana mela ta Xoossaako waassas. Ba keethan gididi ta girsaa si7is; ta waasoy iya haythan wodhis.
18.7: Xoossay hanqetida gisho, biittay qaaxis; dereta xaphoy kokoris.
18.8: Iya siidhiyape hanqo cuyay keyis; iya doonape miya tama lacoy keyis; I xuuggiya bonqo cuttis.
18.9: Saluwa phalqidi wodhis; iya tohuwape garsan dhuma shaari de7ees.
18.10: Kiruubeta bolla uttidi paallis; carko qefen pude dendis.
18.11: Bana dhuman kammis; iya dunkaaney iran kumida shaara.
18.12: Iya sinthan de7iya gita poo7uwape shachinne tama lacoy keyidi dhuma shaara kanthidi bis.
18.13: Goday dadada salope guummis; Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay ba girsaa sissis; wol7anthaninne tama lacon qoncis.
18.14: Ba dongiya dukidi ba morketa laallis; wol7antha poo7o kiittidi enta yedethis.
18.15: Abeeti Godaw, neeni seerida wode, shenetada peenuqida wode, Abbay zin7ida biittay bentis; sa7a baasoy qoncis.
18.16: Goday bollafe kushiya yeddidi tana oykis; ciimmo haathaafe tana dafidi kessis.
18.17: Ta bolla daro wolqaamida ta morketapenne tana ixeysatape ashshis.
18.18: Ta metootida wode enti ta bolla dendidosona; shin Goday tana katisis.
18.19: I tana dalga bessi kessis; tanan ufaytida gisho tana ashshis.
18.20: Ta xillotethaada Goday taw qanxis; ta kushe geeshshatethaada I taw zaaris.
18.21: Taani Godaa ogiya kaallas; ta Xoossaa aggada kare keyabike.
18.22: Taani iya higgiya ubbaa naagas; iya kiitaa polo aggabike.
18.23: Taani iya sinthan suure de7as; tana nagarape naagas.
18.24: Goday ta xillotethaadanne ta kushe geeshshatethaada taw zaaris.
18.25: Ammaneteysatas ne ammanetaasa; suuretas ne suure.
18.26: Geeshshatas ne geeshshi; shin geellatas ne geella.
18.28: Abeeti Godaw, ne taw xompaasa; ta Xoossay ta dhumaa poo7isaasa.
18.29: Ne maaduwan ta morke toora bolla dendayis; ta Xoossan miixaa xeerara gupada aadhayis.
18.30: Xoossaa ogey polo; Godaa qaalay geeshshi; iyako baqatiya ubbaas I gondalle.
18.31: Godaape attishin, hara xoossi oonee? nu Xoossaafe attishin, hara zaalli oonee?
18.32: Taw wolqa immeynne ta ogiya saro oothey Xoossaa.
18.33: I ta tohuwa gen7e tohoda minthees; dhoqa bessan hirgi bayna essees.
18.34: Ta kushiya ola tamaarsees; naase birata dongiya dukana mela ta qessiya minthees.
18.35: Tana ashshiya ne gondalliya taw immadasa; ne ushacha kushey tana zempisees; ne lo77o oykethay tana gitayees.
18.36: Ta hemetiya bessaa dalgisadasa; ta tohuwa harchuchi ekibeenna.
18.37: Ta morketa yedethada oykas; enta dhaysona guye simmike.
18.38: Enti zaari dendonnaada shocas; enti ta tohuwa garsan kundidosona.
18.39: Olas tana dancisadasa; taara gaaddeteyisata taw gulbatisadasa.
18.40: Ta morketa ta sinthafe guye zaaradasa; tana ixeyisata dhaysas.
18.41: Maade koyidi waassidosona, shin oonika enta ashshibeenna. Godaa enti xeegidosona, shin I entaw koybeenna.
18.42: Carkoy pitidi efiya baanada enta liiqisas; oge urqada enta yedhas.
18.43: Gene asape tana ashshadasa; tana kawotethata bolla shuumadasa; ta eronna asay taw haaretidosona.
18.44: Enti tabaa si7idi taw kiitetoosona; allaga derey ta sinthan ziggees.
18.45: Enti kaha dhayidosona; banta miixape kokorishe yoosona.
18.46: Goday de7ees! Xoossay, ta zaallay galatetto! Tana ashshiya Xoossay dhoqu dhoqu go!
18.47: I taw halo kessiya Xoossaa; kawotethata ta garsan haariseysa.
18.48: Ta morketape tana ashsheysa; tana ixeyisata bolla dhoqu dhoqu oothaasa; iitatape tana ashshaasa.
18.49: Hessa gisho, Godaw kawotethata giddon taani nena galatana; ne sunthaa sabbana.
18.50: I ba kawas xoono immees; ba tiyidaysas, Dawitasinne iya kochaas, ba keehatetha bessees.

19.1: Saloti Xoossaa bonchuwa haasayoosona; salo gufanthoy iya kushe oosuwa awaajees.
19.2: Issi gallasi hara gallassas hessa odees; issi qammi hara qammas eratethi qoncisees.
19.3: Odi woyko qaali baawa; enta girsay si7etenna.
19.4: Gidoshin enta oday sa7a ubban laaletis; enta qaalay biitta gaxaa gakis. Awi de7iya bessi Xoossay salon giigisis.
19.5: Ba soope keyiya mishirada, gaadde woxanaw ufaytidi giigida asada, away wonta wonta keyees.
19.6: Issi bagga salo gaxape keyidi, hara bagga salo gaxa gakanaw bees; iya suulape geemmiyabay baawa.
19.7: Godaa higgey suure; shempo zaarees. Godaa kiitay ammanetidaysa; akeeki pacidaysata cinca oothees.
19.8: Godaa wogay like; wozana ufaysees. Godaa kiitay geeshshi; ayfe poo7isees.
19.9: Godaas yashshi geeshshi; merinaw eqidi de7ees. Godaa pirday kumethi tumanne xillo.
19.10: Worqafe aadhidi koyetees; walahi bayna worqafe aadhidi lo77o. Eessafe aadhidi lo77o ililo eessafe aadhidi mal7o.
19.11: Ne aylley naagetana mela zorees; ne higgiya naagoy daro go77ees.
