19.12: Ba qohuwa demmey oonee? Abeeti Godaw, geemmida nagarape tana geeshsha.
19.13: Tana ne aylliya, erishe oothiya nagarape naaga. Nagari tana haaronna mela maadda; he wode taani suure gidana, gita balape geeyana.
19.14: Abeeti Godaw, ta zaallaw, tana wozeyso; ta doonape keyiya qaalaynne ta wozanaa qofay nena ufaysiyabaa gido.

20.1: Meto wode Goday nena si7o; Yayqooba Xoossaa sunthay nena naago.
20.2: Ba keethaafe new maado kiitto; Xiyoonepe nena katiso.
20.3: I ne yarsho ubbaa hassayo; ne xuussa yarshuwan ufayto. Salaha
20.4: Ne wozanaa amuwa new immo; ne qofaa ubbaa polo.
20.5: Ne xoonuwan nuna ufayso; nu Xoossa sunthan nu bandira dhoqu oothana; ne woosa ubbaa Goday new zaaro.
20.6: Goday ba doorida kawas, xoono immidaysa taani buroo erayis. I ba geeshsha saluwan si7ana; ba ushacha kushen gita xoono iyaw immana.
20.7: Issoti issoti banta ola para gaariyan, harati banta paran ceeqetoosona; shin nuuni Godaa nu Xoossaa wolqan ceeqetoos.
20.8: Enti dhubetidi kundana; shin nuuni dendidi minni eqana.
20.9: Abeeti Godaw, kawas xoono imma; nuuni nena xeegiya wode si7a.

21.1: Godaw, kawoy ne wolqan ufaytees; ne immida xoonuwan hashshu gees.
21.2: Iya Wozanaa amuwa iyaw immadasa; iya mettersha woosa iya diggabaaka. Salaha
21.3: Lo77o anjora iya mokaasa; walahi bayna worqa kallacha iya huuphen wothaasa.
21.4: I nena de7o oychis; daro laythinne adussa de7o immadasa.
21.5: Neeni iyaw xoono immida gisho, iya bonchoy daris; gitatethinne teema iyaw immadasa.
21.6: Merinaa anjuwa iyaw immadasa; ne bentuwan iya ufaysaasa.
21.7: Kawoy Godan ammanetees; Ubbaafe dhoqa Xoossaa maarotay, iyara de7iya gisho I dagammenna.
21.8: Ne kushey ne morketa, ne ushacha kushey nena ixeyisata demmana.
21.9: Ne qonciya wode cooce tamada enta xuuggana; Goday ba hanqo suulon enta mittana; iya tamay enta maana.
21.10: Neeni enta nayta biittafe, enta kochaa asaa giddofe dhaysana.
21.11: Ne morketi ne bolla tobboosona; iitabaa maqetoosona, shin polokona.
21.12: Neeni enta ne dongiyan dukana; enta guye zaarada gooddana.
21.13: Godaw, ne minotethan dhoqu dhoqu ga; ne wolqaa gisho galata mazmure yexoos.

22.1: Ta Xoossaw, ta Xoossaw, tana ayis aggadii? Tana maadda gada ta nena woossiya wode, ayis taape haakay?
22.2: Ta Xoossaw, gallas kumethi ta neeko waassas; shin ne tana allaka. Qamma ubban neeko waassayis, shin wopatethi demmike.
22.3: Gidoshin neeni geeshshi; Isra7eele galatay ne araata yuushon de7ees.
22.4: Nu aawati nenan ammanetidosona; nenan ammanetin, ne enta ashshadasa.
22.5: Neeko waassidi attidosona; nenan ammanetidi yeellatibookona.
22.6: Shin ta ase gidike; guxune; ta asan kadhetidaysanne boretidaysa.
22.7: Tana be7iya ubbay qelqisoosona; banta huuphiya qaathishe dereeqosona.
22.8: “I Godan ammanetis; ane iya asho; Goday iya dosiko, ane iya asho” yaagosona.
22.9: Gidoshin taani ta aaye ulope suure yeletanaada oothiday nena. Ta aaye dhantha dhammiya wodeka tana naagiday nena.
22.10: Ta yeletoosope doomada nenan diccas; ta aaye ulope doomin ne ta Xoossaa.
22.11: Metoy taako matiya gishonne tana maaddiya asi bayna gisho, ha77i neeni taape haakofa.
22.12: Daro morketi qayciya boorada tana teqidosona; qayciya Baasane kormatada tana oykidosona.
22.13: Mentherethidi gudiya gaammoda banta doona ta bolla dooyosona.
22.14: Taani haathada goggas; ta meqethay ba kesuwape keyis; ta wozanay oysada ta gaathan til7is.
22.15: Ta qoodhey kun7ada melis; ta inxarsay kottonuwara oyketis; ne tana hayqida asada baanan yeggadasa.
22.16: Kanati tana teqidosona; iita asati ta yuushuwa oykidosona; ta kushetanne ta tohota caddoosona.
22.17: Ta meqethati taybetoosona; ta morketi tana dereeqosona.
22.18: Ta ma7uwa shaakidi ekoosona; ta adussa ma7uwa bolla saama yeggoosona.
22.19: Ta Godaw, ne ta matay taape haakofa; Ta wolqaw, tana maaddanaw ellesada haaya.
22.20: Tana mashshafe kessa eka; ta al7o de7uwa kanatape ashsha.
22.21: Gaammota doonape tana ashsha; qayciya bazzo boorata kacepe tana naaga.
22.22: Taani ne sunthaa ta ishatas odana; enta shiiquwan nena galatana.
22.23: Hinteno, Godaa yayyesato, iya galatite; hinteno, Yayqooba zareto, iya bonchite. Hinteno, Isra7eele kochato, yashshan iya dhoqu dhoqu oothite.
22.24: I un7etidaysa kadhenna; enta qohuwa be7ishe qelli geenna. Ba som7uwa entafe genthenna; enti iyako waassiya wode, entaw zoko zaaribeenna.
22.25: Ta ne lo77o oosuwa gisho gita shiiqon galatana; ta qangetha new yayiya asaa sinthan gathana.
22.26: Manqoti midi kallana; Godaa koyeysati iya galatana; enti merinaw ufaysan daana.
22.27: Sa7a gaxa gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay, akeekan Godaako simmana; asa zare ubbay iya goyinnana.
22.28: Maati ubbay Godaasa; I kawotethata haarees.
22.29: Sa7an de7iya dure ubbay iya goyinnana; bantanan hayqope ashshanaw danda7onaysatinne biitta simmiya ubbay iyaw gulbatana.
22.30: Yaana yeletay iyaw kiitetana; sintha yeletas Godaaba odana.
22.31: Buroo yeletiboona asaska, iya geeshshatetha odana.

23.1: Goday ta henthanchuwa; taw aybika pacenna.
23.2: Tana aaca qooron shempisees; wopu gida haathaako laaggees.
23.3: Ta de7uwa ooraxisees; ba sunthaa gisho gidi, tana xillotetha ogiya kaalethees.
23.4: Ne ta Goday taara de7iya gisho, ta sakana dhumaa giddora biikoka, iitaba yayyike. ne xam7aynne ne guufey tana minthethoosona.
23.5: Ta morketa sinthan taw gibira giigisaasa; tana mokashe, ta huuphen zayte tiyaasa; ta wancay kumidi goggana gakanaw kunthaasa.
23.6: Ne keehatethaynne ne maarotethay ta de7o laytha ubban tana kaallana; taani Godaa keethan merinaw daana.

24.1: Sa7aynne sa7an de7iya ubbay Godaaba; alameynne iyan de7iya asa ubbay iyassa.
24.2: I sa7aa gita abba bolla hiixis; ciimmo haatha bolla minthidi essis.
24.3: Godaa zuma bolla keyanaw danda7ey oonee? Iya geeshsha bessan eqanay oonee?
24.4: Iya kusheynne iya wozanay geeshshi gididaysa; eeqa goyinnonnaysa, wordo caaqonnaysa.
24.5: I Godaape anjo ekana; ashshiya Xoossaafe xillo pirdaa demmana.
24.6: Xoossaako xeelliya asinne Yayqooba Xoossaa som7uwa koyiya asi hessa mela ase. Salaha
24.7: Boncho kawoy gelana mela, hinteno pengeto dooyetite; beni pengeti iya ufaysan mokite.
24.8: He boncho kawoy oonee? Minonne wolqaama gidida Godaa; olan wolqaama gidida Godaa.
24.9: Boncho kawoy gelana mela, hinteno pengeto dooyetite; beni pengeti iya ufaysan mokite.
24.10: Ha boncho kawoy oonee? Ha boncho kawoy salo medhetethata Godaa! Salaha.

25.1: Abeeti Godaw, shempofe ta nena woossayis.
25.2: Abeeti ta Xoossaw, ta nenan ammanetayis; tana yeellayopa; ta morketas tana aathada immofa.
25.3: Nenan ufaysi ootheysati yeellatokona; shin gaasoy bayna geneysati yeellatana.
25.4: Abeeti Godaw, tana ne ogiya bessa; ne geedo tana kaaletha.
25.5: Tana ashshiya Xoossay nena gidiya gisho, ne tumatethaa tana kaalethanne tamaarsa; gallas kumetha ta nenan ufaysi oothayis.
25.6: Abeeti Godaw, benipe de7iya ne qadhiyanne ne keehatetha hassaya.
25.7: Ta na7atetha nagaraanne iitaba hassayopa; abeeti Godaw, ne keehatethaanne lo77otetha hassaya.
25.8: Goday keehanne suure gidiya gisho; nagaranchota ba ogiya tamaarsees.
25.9: Ashketa suuretethan kaalethees; entana ba ogiya tamaarsees.
25.10: Godaa caaquwanne iya kiitaa naageysatas iya oge ubbay tumanne keeha.
25.11: Abeeti Godaw, ta nagaray daro; gidoshin ne sunthaa gisho taw atto ga.
25.12: Godaa yayiya asi oonee? I kaallanaw bessiya ogiya Goday iya tamaarsana.
25.13: I ubba wode duretethan daana; iya nayti biitta laattana.
25.14: Goday yayyeysatas ba xuuraa genthenna; I entaw ba caaquwa erisees.
25.15: Goday ta tohuwa xihepe naagiya gisho, ta ayfey maado ekanaw ubba wode iyako xeellees.
25.16: Godaw, taani bizzanne metootida asi gidiya gisho, taako simma; ne maarotethaa tana bessa.
25.17: Taw hirgi daris; ta metuwape tana ne ashsha.
25.18: Ta metuwanne ta waayiya be7a; ta nagara ubbaa atto ga.
25.19: Ta morketi ay mela daridaako be7a; enti tana ay mela ixiyako xeella.
25.20: Ne tana naaga; ne tana ashsha; ta neeko baqatiya gisho tana yeellayopa.
25.21: Ta nenan ufaysi oothida gisho, suuretethinne tumatethi tana naago.
25.22: Abeeti Xoossaw, Isra7eele asaa enta meto ubbaafe ne woza.

26.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta suuretethan hemetida gishonne sidhey bayna nenan ammanetida gisho, taw pirda.
26.2: Abeeti Godaw, tana paaca; tana pilgada be7a; ta wozanaa xomoosa.
26.3: Ne siiqoy ta sinthan de7iya gisho, ta ubba wode ne tuma ogiyan hemetayis.
26.4: Cimmiya asaara ta uttike; cubbota maabaran gelike.
26.5: Iitata duulata ta ixayis; makallachotara issife uttike.
26.6: Abeeti Godaw, ta xillotethaa bessanaw ta kushiya meeccayis; ne yarsho bessa yuuyayis.
26.7: Galata mazmure yexashe ne malaalsiya ooso ubba odana.
26.8: Abeeti Godaw, ne keethaanne, ne bonchoy aqiya bessaa ta dosayis.
26.9: Tana nagaranchotara issife pittofa; asa suuthu gusseysatara ta shempuwa dhaysofa.
26.10: Enta kushen iita halchoy de7ees; enta ushacha kushen wodhaafey kumis.
26.11: Shin ta suuretethan hemetana; tana woza; taw qadheta.
26.12: Ta tohoy demba bessan eqis; gita shiiquwan Godaa galatana.

27.1: Goday taw poo7onne tana ashsheysa; yaatin, ta oona yayiyanee? Goday, ta de7oy naagetiya miixaa; yaatin, ta ayis dagammanee?
27.2: Iita asati, tana ixeysatinne ta morketi tana wodhanaw hordofiya wode, bantaw dhubetidi kundana.
27.3: Morke toori tana teqiko ta wozanay yayyenna. Oli ta bolla dendiyakoka, taani Godan ammanetayis.
27.4: Ta Godaa issiba oychas; hessika, ta de7o laytha ubban Godaa keethan de7anaasa; Godaa lo77otetha be7anaasanne iya keethan iya koyanaasa.
27.5: Meto gallas tana ba de7iya bessan genthana; ba dunkaaniyan tana qosana; tana dhoqa zaalla bolla essana.
27.6: He wode taani tana teqida ta morketape aadhada, dhoqu dhoqu gaana. Taani iya dunkaaniyan ufaytashe yarsho yarshana; Godaa mazmuren galatana.
27.7: Abeeti Godaw, ta nena xeegiya wode ne taw koya; taw qadheta; tana si7a.
27.8: Neeni, “Ta som7uwa koyite” gadasa, ta wozanay Abeeti Godaw, “Ta ne som7uwa koyana” yaagis.
27.9: Ne som7uwa taape genthofa; tana maaddeyso; ne shenetada tana ne aylliya guye zaaropa. Abeeti tana ashshiya Xoossaw, tana yeggofa; aggofa.
27.10: Ta aawaynne ta aayiya tana aggikoka Goday tana shiishidi ekana.
27.11: Abeeti Godaw, tana ne ogiya tamaarsa; ta morketa gisho tana suure oge kaaletha.
27.12: Tana mandiya wordo markati ta bolla wolqan dendida gisho, tana ta morketa amuwas aathada immofa.
27.13: Taani de7on de7ashe, Godaa keehatetha be7anaysa ammanayis.
27.14: Godan ufaysi ootha; minna, yayyofa; Godan ufaysi ootha.

28.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta zaallaw, ta nena xeegayis; ne taw si77i goopa. Ne si77i giiko, ta duufo gelida asi gidayis.
28.2: Maade koyada ta waassiya wode; ubbaafe geeshsha dunkaaniyako, ta kushiya micciya wode ta woosa si7a.
28.3: Iita oothiya iita asatara tana gathada oykofa; enti banta wozanan gene qopishe, banta doonan sarotethi haasayoosona.
28.4: Enta oosuwada enta seera; enta iitatethaada entaw qanxa. Enta kushe oosuwada enta pirda; entaw bessiya iitaa entaw zaara.
28.5: Enti Godaa oosuwanne iya kushe medhuwas, besse immonna gisho Goday enta laallana; zaaridi enta keexenna.
28.6: Ta woosa si7ida gisho Goday galatetto.
28.7: Goday taw wolqanne gondalle; ta wozanay iyan ammanetees; ta iyan maadetas. Ta wozanay iyan ufaytees; ta iya mazmuren sabbana.
28.8: Goday ba asaas wolqa; ba dooridi kawa ashshiya miixa.
28.9: Godaw, ne asaa ashsha; nebaa gididaysata anja. Enta heemmey nena gida; enta merinaw tooka.

29.1: Hinteno salo medhetethato, bonchoynne wolqay Godaasa giite.
29.2: Godaa boncho sunthaa galatite; iya geeshshatetha teema gisho Godaa goyinnite.
29.3: Godaa guunthay haathata bolla si7etees; boncho Xoossay dadada dechees; Goday gita haathata bolla guummees.
29.4: Godaa kooshinchay wolqaama; Godaa girsay teemara de7ees.
29.5: Godaa girsay zigaa menthees; Libaanosen de7iya zigaa menthees.
29.6: Libaanose dereta galo marada buraaqisees; Siriyoona deriya menthada gufisees.
29.8: Godaa girsay mela biittaa qaathees; Goday Qaadesa mela biittaa kokorsees.
29.9: Godaa girsay wolaa qaathees; mitha haythaa qoqofees. Iya keethan de7iya ubbay, “Bonchoy Godaas gido” yaagees.
29.10: Goday di7o haatha bolla ba araata wothidi uttis; Goday ba araatan uttidi merinaw kawotis.
29.11: Goday ba asaas wolqa immees. Goday ba asaa sarotethan anjees.

30.1: Abeeti Godaw, ne tana ollafe kessida gishonne ta morketi ufaytonna mela oothida gisho, ta nena dhoqu dhoqu oothana.
30.2: Abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw tana maaddana mela, ta nena xeegin ne tana pathadasa.
30.3: Abeeti Godaw, duufo gelonnaada tana naagadasa; ollan wodhonnaada tana paxa ashshadasa.
30.4: Hinteno Xoossaa asaw, Godaas yexite; iya geeshsha sunthaa sabbite.
30.5: Iya hanqoy guutha wodesa, shin iya keehatethay de7o laytha ubbaasa. Qamma yeekishe aqiko, wonta zawi bayna ufaysi gidees.
30.6: Ta naagetada de7eysa erida wode “Hiza ta qaaxike” yaagas.
30.7: Abeeti Godaw, ne taw keehida wode, zumada tana minthada essadasa. Shin ne som7uwa hara soo zaarida wode, ta dagammas.
30.8: Abeeti Godaw, ta nena xeegas; nena maarota woossas;
30.9: “Ta duufo geliko nena ay go77ii? Biitta giddo gelida asi waatidi nena galatanaw danda7ii? Ne ammanetetha waatidi markatanee?
30.10: Abeeti Godaw, ne tana si7a; taw qadheta. Abeeti Godaw, ne taw maado gida” yaagas.
30.11: Ta yeehuwa yethan laammadasa; kayo ma7uwa taape qaarada, tana ufaysi mayzadasa.
30.12: Hessa gisho, ta nena sabbana; si77i giike. Abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw, ta nena merinaw galatana.

31.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta neeko baqatayis; awudeka tana yeellayopa; ne xillotethan tana ashsha.
31.2: Ne haythaa taako zaara; ellesada tana ashsha. Neeni, taw geemmiya zaalla; tana ashshiya mino miixa gida.
31.3: Ee, ne taw zaallanne miixa; ne sunthaa gisho tana kaaletha; ogiya bessa.
31.4: Ne taw geemmiya besse gidiya gisho, enti qotidi wothida xihepe tana naaga.
31.5: Abeeti Godaw, tuma Xoossaw, ta shempuwa ne kushen wothayis; ne tana woza.
31.6: Pathonna eeqata goyinneyisata ta ixayis; gidoshin taani Godan ammanetayis.
31.7: Ta metuwanne ta un7a ne be7ida gisho taani merinaw ne siiquwan ufaytana.
31.8: Ne tana morke kushen aathada immabaaka; ta tohota dalga bessan essadasa.
31.9: Abeeti Godaw, taani meton gelida gisho taw qadheta; Ta daro azzanida gisho ta ayfey mulcatis; ta ashoynne ta shempoy daaburis.
31.10: Ta de7oy azzanon, ta laythay oolen wuris; waaye darotethan ta wolqay wuris; ta meqethati argaacidosona.
31.11: Ta morketa ubbaas qidhes attas; ta shoorotas yeella gidas. Ta laggetas daganthiyaba gidas; tana be7eysati taape haakidosona.
31.12: Ta hayqida asada dogetas; meqa miisheda wora yegetas.
31.13: Taani darota kalkashaa si7as; ubba bessara dagami de7ees. Enti ta bolla tobboosona; tana wodhanaw maqetoosona.
31.14: Shin Godaw, ta nenan ammanetana; neeni ta Xoossaa.
31.15: Ta de7o laythay ne kushiyana; tana yedethiya ta morketa kushepe tana ashsha.
31.16: Ne aylliya bolla ne som7uwa poo7isa; ne maarotethan tana ashsha.
31.17: Abeeti Godaw, ta nena xeegiya gisho, tana yeellayopa. Shin iitati yeellato; duufon gelidi si77i go.
31.18: Otoroninne boren xillota bolla minnidi haasaya gisho, enta wordo inxarsaa si77i ootha.
31.19: Nena yayyeysatas ne minjida, neeko baqateysatas ne giigisida, keehatethay ay mela daro!
31.20: Neeni enta ne sinthan, geema bessan gentha wothadasa; asaa iita maquwafe ashshaasa; iita inxarsafe ne dunkaaniyan qosadasa.
31.21: Morkey teqida katamaa giddon, malaalsiya ba maarotethaa tana bessida, Goday galatetto.
31.22: Ta dagammada, “Ne sinthafe haakas” gas; shin ta maado koyada neeko waassida wode, ta waasuwa ne si7adasa.
31.23: Hinteno, Xoossa asaw, Godaa dosite; Goday ammaneteyisata naagees; shin otoranchotas enta gatiya qanxees.
31.24: Hinteno, Godan ufaysi ootheysato, minnite; gencite.

32.1: Iya nagaray atto geetetidaynne iya nagaray kametida uray anjetidaysa.
32.2: Goday iya iitatethaa taybonna asi, iya qofan cimoy bayna asi anjetidaysa.
32.3: Taani ta nagaraa paaxonna aggada, kumetha gallas oolidaysi, ta asatethaa daabursis.
32.4: Gallasinne qamma ne kushey tana deexis; haathi dhayin bone awan melidibada, ta wolqay wuris. Salaha
32.5: Taani ta nagaraa new paaxas; ta naaquwa neepe genthabike. “Ta nagaraa Godaas paaxana” yaagas; tana deexida nagaraa atto gadasa. Salaha
32.6: Hessa gisho, xillo asi oonika, ne bentiya wode nena woosso; iita di7oy yaa wode he uraa gakenna.
32.7: Ne taw qosetiya bessi; ne tana metope naagasa. Atotetha yethi yexiya asaa ta yuushuwan wothadasa. Salaha
32.8: Xoossay, “Ta nena tamaarsana; ne baana ogiya bessaana; ta nena zorananne naagana” yaagees.
32.9: Bixaalaninne puulon oyketonna; kiitetonna wozani bayna baquloda woyko parada hanopite.
32.10: Iitatas waayey darana; shin Godan ammaneteyisata siiqoy kammana.
32.11: Hinteno, xilloto, Godan ufaytitenne hashshu giite; hinteno, wozana suureto, ililite.

33.1: Hinteno, xilloto Godaas ufaysan ililite; suure asati iya galatanaw bessees.
33.2: Maasinqon Godaa galatite; tammu shayan waaxetida diithan yexite.
33.3: Ooratha yethi iyaw yexite; diithi loythidi diixishe ililite.
33.4: Godaa qaalay tuma; iya ooso ubbay ammaneteysa.
33.5: Goday xillotethinne tuma pirda dosees; iya maarotay sa7aa kumis.
33.6: Godaa qaalan saloti medhetidosona; iya doonape keyiya shempuwan salon de7iya medhetethati yeletidosona.
33.7: Abba haatha issi bessan eelisis; ciimmo haatha minja keethan wothis.
33.8: Sa7a ubbay Godaa yayyo; asa ubbay Godaa boncho.
33.9: Iya odan ubbay hanis; I kiittin minnidi eqis.
33.10: Goday kawotethata halchuwa hada oothees; enta qofaa laallees.
33.11: Godaa halchoy merinaw eqidi de7ees; iya wozanaa qofay yeletetha ubbaasa.
33.12: Xoossay entaw Godaa gidida kawotethay, I babaa oothidi doorida asay anjetidaysata.
33.13: Goday salon uttidi xeellees; asa koche ubbaa be7ees.
33.14: Goday ba araatan uttidi, sa7an de7iya ubbaa be7ees.
33.15: Enta wozanaa medhiday iya; enti oothiyaba ubbaa I erees.
33.16: Kawoy ba wotaadare darotethan attenna; olanchoy ba wolqaa minotethan kessi ekenna.
33.17: Paran xoonana gidi naagoy hada; I ba minotethan ashshanaw danda7enna.
33.18: Godaa ayfeti iyaw yayyanne iya maarotan ufaysi oothiya asaa be7oosona.
33.19: Hessika enta hayqope ashshanaasanne kosha wode enta naaganaassa.
33.20: Nuuni Godaa ufaysan naagoos; nuna maaddeynne nu gondalley iya.
33.21: Iya geeshsha sunthan nuuni ammanetiya gisho, nu wozanay iyan ufaytees.
33.22: Godaw, nuuni nenan ufaysi oothidaysada, ne maarotay nu bolla gido.

34.1: Taani ubba wode Godaa galatana; iya galatay ta doonape pacenna.
34.2: Taani Godan ceeqetayis; aadati hessa si7idi ufayto.
34.3: Taara Godaa bonchite; iya sunthaa issife dhoqu dhoqu oothoos.
34.4: Taani Godaa koyin, I taw zaaris; ta yayyiyaba ubbaafe tana ashshis.
34.5: Iyako xeelliya ubbay poo7osona; enta som7oy yeellatenna.
34.6: Ha manqoy waassis; Goday iya waasuwa si7is; iya meto ubbaafe iya ashshis.
34.7: Godaa kiitanchoy iyaw yayyeyisata naagees; enta yuushon gididi enta ashshees.
34.8: Goday keeha gideysa laacidi be7ite; iyako baqatiya asi anjetidaysa.
34.9: Hinteno, geeshsha asaw, Godaas yayyite; iyaw yayyeysatas aykoyka pacenna.
34.10: Gaammoti miyaba dhayidi koshatoosona; shin Godaa koyeysatas lo77obay pacenna.
34.11: Nayto, haa yiite; si7ite; ta hintena Godaa yashshi tamaarsana.
34.12: Lo77o de7o daanawunne keehaba be7anaw adussa laythi daanaw, amottey oonee?
34.13: Ne inxarsay iitabaa odetonaada, ne doonay cimmonnaada teqa.
34.14: Iitape haaka; lo77oba ootha; sarotethi koya; kaalla.
34.15: Godaa ayfey xillota xeellees; iya haythay enta waasuwa si7ees.
34.16: Enta qofisiyaba biittafe dhaysanaw, Goday iita ootheyisata ba hanqo ayfen xeellees.
34.17: Xilloti waassoosona; Goday enta waasuwa si7ees; I enta meto ubbaafe ashshees.
34.18: Wozani meqidaysatas Goday matana; I ufaysi qanxidaysata ashshees.
34.19: Xillo asas metoy daro; shin Goday iya he ubbaafe ashshees.
34.20: Goday iya meqethata naagiya gisho, entafe issoyka meqenna.
34.21: Iitata enta iitatethay wodhana; xillota ixeysati pirdetana.
34.22: Goday ba aylleta wozees; iyako baqatiya oonika pirdetenna.

35.1: Godaw, taara baaxeteysatar ne baaxeta; tana oleyisata ne ola.
35.2: Gondallenne toora oykada, tana maaddanaw denda.
35.3: Tana gooddeyisata bolla ne tooranne mashsha dentha; taako “Ta nena ashsheysa” yaaga.
35.4: Ta shempuwa wodhanaw koyeysati, yeellato; kawuyo. Ta bolla iitabaa maqeteysati, kawuyidi guye simmo.
35.5: Godaa kiitanchoy enta yedethiya wode, enti carkon laaletiya suullada hano.
35.6: Godaa kiitanchoy enta gooddiya wode, enta ogey dhumanne hallithi gido.
35.7: Gaasoy bayna tana oykanaw xihe wothoosona; tana kundisanaw olla bookosona.
35.8: Eronna de7ishin enta bolla dhayoy yo; enti wothida xihey enta oyko; enti bookida ollan kundidi dhayo.
35.9: He wode taani Godan ufaytana; I ashshida gisho hashshu gaana.
35.10: Ta kumetha asatethay nena, “Godaw, ne meli oonee? Manquwa wolqaamaa kushiyape kessa ekaasa; metootanchuwanne un7etidaysa, bonqeyisata kushepe ashshaasa” yaagana.
35.11: Wordo markateysati ta bolla dendoosona; ta eronnaban tana mootosona.
35.12: Ta lo77o oothida gisho iita zaaridosona; tana bizza oothidosona.
35.13: Shin enti hargida wode taani kayo ma7o ma7as; ta asatethaa xooman daabursas; ta woosay zaaro demmonna attis.
35.14: Tana kawushada dabbos woyko ishas yeekeysada yeekas. Issi asi ba aayes kayoteysada ta huuphiya oykada yeekas.
35.15: Shin taani dhubetida wode ufaytidi shiiqidosona; gaasoy bayna tana wadhidi, aggonna ixidosona.
35.16: Iita asati ootheysada enti tana qelqisidosona; yilotidi banta acha garcidosona.
35.17: Godaw, neeni awude gakanaw, si77i gada xeellay? Enta iita oosuwape tana ashsha; ta al7o shempuwa ha gaammotape wosisa eka.
35.18: He wode gita shiiqon ta nena galatana; daro asay de7iya bessan nena bonchana.
35.19: Gaasoy bayna tana morkeysati ufaytofo; tana coo ixeysati ta bolla qam7otopo.
35.20: Enti saroba haasayokona; si77i gidi de7iya asaa bolla oda xaaxosona.
35.21: Enti banta doona ta bolla dooyidi, “Haysa be7a, ne oothidaysa nuuni nu ayfen be7ida” yaagosona.
35.22: Godaw, neeni hessa be7adasa; si77i goopa. Godaw, taape haakofa.
35.23: Ta Xoossaw, ta Godaw ta gisho, denda; barka; ta doona gidada mooteta.
35.24: Ta Godaw, ta Xoossaw, xillotethan taw pirda; ta morketa ufaysofa.
35.25: Enti banta wozanan, “Hashshu, nu amoy poletis; nuuni iya mittida” gaana mela oothofa.
35.26: Ta waayan ufayteysati, yeellato, kawuyo; ta bolla ceeqeteysati yeellanne kawushe ma7o.
35.27: Ta xoonuwa doseysati ufayto; ililo; hashshu yaago. “Ubba wode ba aylliya sarotethan, ufaytiya Goday dhoqu dhoqu go” yaago.
35.28: Ta inxarsay ne xillotethaanne ne galataa, gallasa kumethan odees.

36.1: Iita asi ba wozanan iitabaa qopees; I ba wozanan Xoossas yayyenna.
36.2: I bana daro nashshiya gisho; ba nagaraa be7anaw woyko ixanaw danda7enna.
36.3: Iya doonan geneynne wordoy kumis; Cincatethinne lo77oba ooso aggis.
36.4: Ba hiixan zin7idi gene qopees; bana lo77o gidonna ogen kaalethees; iitabaa ixenna.
36.5: Godaw, ne siiqoy salota gakees; ne tumatethay shaarape aadhees.
36.6: Ne xillotethay dhoqa deretape aadhees; ne pirday abba ciimmuwafe ziqa; Godaw, neeni asenne do7a naagasa.
36.7: Xoossaw, ne siiqoy ay mela al7o! Asay ne qefiya garsan qosetidi attees.
36.8: Enti ne gibiraape midi kalloosona; ne keehatetha shaafape uyidi aloosona.
36.9: De7o pultoy neepe keyees; ne poo7uwan nuuni poo7o be7oos.
36.10: Nena ereysatas ne siiqoy, wozana suuretas ne xillotethay qanxetenna.
36.11: Otoranchota tohoy tana yedhofo; nagaranchota kushey tana yedethofo.
36.12: Iita asata kundethaa be7ite; enti kundidosona; dendanaw danda7okona.

37.1: Iitaa ootheyisata gaason yilotopa; nagara ootheyisata qanaatopa.
37.2: Enti maatada eeson melana; boncoda shullidi qoqofetana.
37.3: Godan ammaneta; lo77oba ootha; biitta bolla utta; palahin de7a.
37.4: Godan ufayta; I ne wozanaa amuwa immana.
37.5: Ne ogiya hadara Godaas imma; iyan ammaneta; I new oothana.
37.6: I ne xillotethaa wonta xalqeda, ne pirdaa seeta gallasa awada poo7isana.
37.7: Godaa sinthan si77i gada de7a; danda7an naaga; Iita asata halchoy poletin be7ada yilotopa.
37.8: Hanqo agga; yilo teqa; hessi meton yeggees.
37.9: Iita ootheysati dhoqolletidi dhayana; shin Godan ufaysi wotheysati biitta laattana.
37.10: Iita ootheysati guutha wodepe guye de7okona; ne enta koyada demmaka.
37.11: Shin aadati biitta laattana; sarotethan ufaytidi daana.
37.12: Iita asi lo77o asi dhaysanaw maqetees; ba acha enta bolla garcees.
37.13: Shin Goday iitata bolla miicees; entaw dhayo gallasi yeysa erees.
37.14: Iita asati manqotanne metootanchota wodhanaw, suure hemeteyisata shukanaw, banta mashsha shoddoosona; banta dongiya waaxoosona.
37.15: Shin enta mashshay enta wozanan gelana; enta dongey meqana.
37.16: Xillo asas de7iya guuthabay, iita asas de7iya darobaape lo77o.
37.17: Ayis giiko, iitata wolqay meqana; shin Goday xillota zempisees.
37.18: Suure asata ogiya Goday erees; enta laatay merinaw entaba gidana.
37.19: Iita wode suure asati yeellatokona; kosha wode enti kallidi maana.
37.20: Shin iita asati hayqana; Godaa morketi ciishshada qoqofetana; cuyada ayfepe geemmana.
37.21: Iita asi tal7idi zaarenna; shin xillo asi keehatethan immees.
37.22: Godan anjetidaysati biitta laattana; shin I baaddidaysati dhayana.
37.23: Asa ogey Godaa ufaysiko, Goday iya tanguwa kaalethees; minthees.
37.24: I dhubetikoka kundenna; Goday iya kushiya oykidi katisees.
37.25: Taani paamas; ha77i cimas; shin xillo asi yegetin, iya nayti kathi woossishin be7abike.
37.26: I ubba wode keehatethan immees; coo tal7ees; iya nayti haratas anjo gidana.
37.27: Iitape haaka; lo77o ootha; ne adussa laythi daana.
37.28: Goday xillo pirda dosees; ammaneteyisata I yeggenna. Enti merinaw naagetoosona; shin iitata kochay dhayana.
37.29: Xilloti biitta laattana; yan merinaw daana.
37.30: Xillo asa doonape cincatethi keyees; iya inxarsay xillo odetees.
37.31: Xoossa higgey iya wozanan de7ees; iya tohoy dhubetenna.
37.32: Iita asi xillo asi geeddees; iya wodhanaw koyees.
37.33: Shin Goday iya kushen aathidi immenna; pirdetanaw eqiya wode iya bolla pirdisenna.
37.34: Godan ufaysi ootha, iya kiitaa naaga; nena biitta laatisidi gitayana; iita asati dhayishin ne be7ana.
37.35: Nagaranchoy Libaanose zigada, diccidi dhoqu dhoqu gin ta be7as.
37.36: Shin ta simmada yan demmabike; koyinka bentibeenna.
37.37: Borey bayna asi be7a; suure asi akeeka; saro asas wursethay lo77o gidana.
37.38: Shin nagaranchoti dhayana; enta wursethay dhoommana.
37.39: Xillota atotethay Godaape yees; I meto wode enti naagetidi attiya besse.
37.40: Goday xillota maaddees; ashshees; enti iyako baqatida gisho, I enta iitatape ashshees; naagees.

38.1: Abeeti Godaw, ne sheniyan tana seeropa; ne yiluwan tana hanqofa.
38.2: Ne donge tooray tana caddis; ne kushey tana deexis.
38.3: Ne hanqida gisho ta asatethay qohetis; ta nagaraa gaason ta meqethay liiqis.
38.4: Ta balay tana muukis; dendonna gita toohoda tana deexees.
38.5: Ta eeyatethan oothida nagara gisho, ta madunthay xinqis.
38.6: Ta sa7a xeellas; hokas; gallas kumethi azzanashe pee7as.
38.7: Ta ashoy xuuggees; ta asatethay paxa gidenna.
38.8: Ta daaburas; liiqas; ta wozanay dirgiya gisho oolas.
38.9: Abeeti Godaw, ta wozanaa amo ubbaa eraasa; ta ooley neepe geemmibeenna.
38.10: Ta wozanay dirgees; ta wolqay hitti gis; ta ayfiya poo7oy dhayis.
38.11: Ta madunthaa gaason ta shoorotinne ta laggeti haakidi eqidosona; ta dabboti taape haakidosona.
38.12: Tana wodhanaw koyeysati banta xihiya taw yeggoosona. Tana qohanaw koyeysati, “Nu nena demmana” yaagidi, mandoosona; gallas kumethi ta bolla tobboosona.
38.13: Ta tulle asa mela si7ike; muume asa mela doona pogike.
38.14: Tuma haythi si7onna asi, inxarsi odidi zaaronna asi gidas.
38.15: Godaw, ta nena ufaysan naagayis; ta Godaw, Xoossaw ne taw zaaro imma.
38.16: Taani, “Ta tohoy dhubetin, enti hashshu gaanadanne ta bolla ceeqetanaada oothofa” yaagas.
38.17: Ta kundana hanayis, ta sakoy tana aggonna ixis.
38.18: Ta nagara paaxayis; ta naaquwa gaason azzanayis.
38.19: Ta morketi gitane wolqaama; tana coo ixeysati daro.
38.20: Taani lo77oba oothin iita zaareysati, ta lo77oba kaalliya gisho taara eqetoosona.
38.21: Godaw, tana yeggofa; ta Xoossaw, taape haakofa.
38.22: Tana ashshiya ta Godaw, tana maaddanaw ellesa.

39.1: Taani, “Ta inxarsan nagara oothonna mela, ta ogiya naagana. Iita asati ta de7iya wode, ta doona barana” yaagas.
39.2: Shin doona muumeda si77i gas; hari attoshin lo77oba odeteysa aggas; shin ta waayey haa daris.
39.3: Ta wozanay ta gaathan teellis; ta qofay tamada eexis; yaatin ta inxarsan haasaya doomas.
39.4: Godaw, ta de7uwa wursethaanne ta daanaw attida gallasaa tana bessa; ta de7oy ay mela qantheko tana erisa.
39.5: Neeni ta laytha takadhada wothadasa; Ta laythay ne sinthan baynaba mela; tuma asi ubbay issi shempo mela. Salaha
39.6: Tuma asi aadhiya eesho mela; I coo daaburees; shalo shiishees; shin ooni go7etaneko erenna.
39.7: Godaw, ha77i ta naagey oonee? Taani nenan ufaysi oothayis.
39.8: Ta bala ubbaafe tana ashsha; eeyatan tana tooshisopa.
39.9: Hessa ubbaa oothiday nena gidiya gisho taani muumas; doonaka pogabike.
39.10: Ne xam7a ta bollafe dentha; mino ne kushiya gaason ta daaburas.
39.11: Ase iya nagaraa gisho seerasa; iya al7o de7uwa bilada wursaasa; tuma asi ubbay issi shempo mela. Salaha
39.12: Godaw, ta woosa si7a; tana maaddanaw ta waasuwa hayza. Ta afuthaa be7ada si77i goopa; taani ta aawatada bete asinne imathe gidada neera de7ayis.
39.13: Ta shaaketanapenne baanape sinthe taani ufaytana mela tana agga.

40.1: Taani Godaa danda7an naagas; I taako simmidi ta waasuwa si7is.
40.2: Dhayo ollafe, silimo urqafe tana kessis; ta tohuwa zaalla bolla essis; ta hemethaa minthis.
40.3: Ta doonan ooratha yethi wothis; hessika nu Xoossay galatetto yaageysa; daroti be7idi yayyana; Godan ammanetana.
40.4: Godan ammanetiya, otoranchota xeellonnay, wordotara hemetonnay, anjetida asi.
40.5: Godaw, ta Xoossaw, neeni daro malaalsiyaba oothadasa; neera liketey oonika baawa! Neeni nuus qopida lo77o qofaa, oonika taybanaw danda7onna; Hessi taani odin wuriyaba gidenna.
40.6: Neeni yarshonne imo koyabaaka; shin nena si7ana mela ta haythaa dooyadasa; xuussa yarshonne nagara yarsho koyabaaka.
40.7: Hessa gisho taani, “Xaatha maxaafan tabay xaafetidaysada taani yas.
40.8: Ta Xoossaw, taani ne sheniya oothanaw dosayis; ne higgey ta wozanan de7ees” yaagas.
40.9: Gita shiiqon, ne xillotetha odana; Godaw neeni ereysada, taani markateysa aggike.
40.10: Ta ne xillotethaa ta wozanan qosabike; ne ammanetethanne ne ashuwa odas. Ne siiquwanne ne tumatethaa, gita shiiquwan genthabike.
40.11: Godaw, ne maarotethaa taape haassofa; ne siiqoynne ne tumatethay, tana ubba wode naago.
40.12: Tayboy bayna iitabay tana teqis; ta balay tana goozis; ta xeellanaw danda7ike Ta nagaray ta huuphe binaanape daris; ta wozanay ta giddon til7is.
40.13: Godaw, tana ashshanaw ero ga; ta Godaw, tana maaddanaw ellesa.
40.14: Tana wodhanaw koyeysati yeellato, kawuyo; Ta qohetetha amotteysati kawuyidi guye simmo.
40.15: Taako, “Iyaw hashshu, hashshu” geysati xoonetidi yeellato.
40.16: Shin nena koyiya ubbay, nenan ufayto; hashshu go. Ne atotetha dosiya ubbay, “Goday gita” yaago.
40.17: Taani manqonne metootancho; shin Goday tabaa qopo! Tana maaddey ashshey nena; ta Xoossaw, gam7ofa.

41.1: Manquwas qopiya asi anjetidaysa; meto gallas Goday iya ashshees.
41.2: Goday iya naagees, de7on wothees; biitta bolla Goday iya anjees; Goday iya, iya morketa amuwas aathidi immenna.
41.3: I saketidi hiithan de7ishin Goday maaddees; hargiyafe iya pathees.
41.4: Taani, “Godaw, ta nena naaqida gisho, tana maara; ta hargiyafe tana patha” yaagas.
41.5: Ta morketi iitabaa ta bolla haasayidi, “I awude hayqandee? iya sunthay awude dogetandee?” yaagosona.
41.6: Tana be7anaw yaa oonika wordo odees; ba wozanan tana zigiriyabaa shiishees; kare keyidi ta sunthaa iissees.
41.7: Tana ixiya ubbay issife tana zigiroosona; iitabay iya gakees gidi qopoosona.
41.8: “Iya iita hargey oykis; I hiza hiixape dendenna” yaagosona.
41.9: Hari attoshin ta ammanetiya laggey, taara midaysi taw zoko zaaris.
41.10: Shin Godaw tana maara; ta entaw kushe zaarana mela, harge hiixape tana dentha.
41.11: Ta morkey tana xoononna gisho, ne tanan ufaytanaysa ta erayis.
41.12: Ne tana ta suuretetha gisho katisaasa; ne sinthan tana merinaw wothaasa.
41.13: Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, merinaape merinaa gakanaw galatetto. Amin7i! Amin7i!

42.1: Gaari pulto haathi laamoteysada, Xoossaw, ta shempiya nena laamotawusu.
42.2: “Ta shempiya Xoossaa, de7o Xoossaa be7anaw saamotawusu; awude gakada iya som7uwa be7o” yaagawusu.
42.3: Asay, “Ne Xoossay awun de7ii?” giya wode, gallasinne qammi taw afuthi kathi gidis.
42.4: Taani enta ba7aale bonchanaw shiiqida, daro asaa kaalethada, galata yethaninne ililisan xoossa keethi beysa qopiya wode, ta wozanay azzanon meqees.
42.5: Ta shempe, ayis azzanay? ayis un7etay? Ne Xoossan ufaysi wotha; tana ashshiya, ta Xoossaa taani buroo galatana.
42.6: Ta wozanay azzanis; hessa gisho taani Yordaanose biittan, Armoona dhoqan, Mizaare zuman, eqada nena qopana.
42.7: Ne soossuwa guunthan ciimmoy ciimmuwa xeegees; ne beetaynne ne zuley ta bollara aadhis.
42.8: Goday ba siiquwa gallas taw kiittees; qamma galata yethay taara de7ees; ta de7o Xoossaa woossana.
42.9: Xoossaa, ta zaallako, “Tana ayis dogadii? Ta morketi tana un7ethin, yeekashe ayis hemeto” yaagana.
42.10: Ta morketi, “Ne Xoossay awun de7ii?” yaagidi cayiya wode ta meqethay meqees.
42.11: Ta shempe ayis azzanay? ayis un7etay? Xoossan ufaysi wotha; tana ashshiya, ta Xoossaa ta buroo galatana.

43.1: Xoossaw taw pirda; nena eronna deretara ta gisho mooteta; Cimmiya iita asatape tana ashsha.
43.2: Xoossaw, neeni, taani qosetada attiya miixa; ne tana ayis aggadii? Ta morkey tana un7ethin, ayis yeekashe boo?
43.3: Ne poo7uwanne ne tumaa taw kiitta; enti tana kaalethidi ne geeshsha deriya, ne de7iya bessaa tana gatho.
43.4: He wode taani Xoossaa yarsho bessaako; tana ufaysiya Xoossaako baana. Xoossaw ta Godaw, taani diithan nena sabbana.
43.5: Ta shempe ayis azzanay? ayis un7etay? Xoossan ufaysi wotha; tana ashshiya, ta Xoossaa ta buroo galatana.

44.1: Xoossaw, beni wode ne oothidaba nu si7ida; nu aawata wode ne oothidaba nuus odidosona.
44.2: Kawotethata ne kushen goodda kessadasa; nu aawata enta biittan tokadasa. Hara kawotethata seeradasa; shin nu aawata aakisadasa.
44.3: Enti banta mashshan olidi he biitta laatibookona; enti banta minotethan xoonibookona. Shin neeni enta dosida gisho, enta ne ushacha kushey, ne qeseynne ne som7uwa poo77oy xoonisis.
44.4: Yayqooba kochaas xoono kiittiya, ta kawoynne ta Xoossay nena.
44.5: Nenan gididi nu morketa xoonana; ne sunthan nuna ixeyisata yedhana.
44.6: Taani ta tooran ammanetike; ta mashshay tana ashshena.
44.7: Shin ne nuna nu morketape ashshaasa; nuna ixeyisata neeni kawushaasa.
44.8: Nuuni ubba wode Xoossan ceeqetana; ne sunthaa merinaw galatana. Salaha.
44.9: Shin ha77i nuna aggadasa; kawushadasa; nu olanchotara issife olas keyaka.
44.10: Nu morketa sinthafe nuna baqatisadasa; nu ixeysati nuna bonqidosona.
44.11: Nuna dorsada shuhas aatha immadasa; kawotethata giddon nuna laalladasa.
44.12: Neeni ne asaa laafa gaten bayzadasa; ay wodheka demmabaaka.
44.13: Nu shooroti nuna boranaada oothadasa; nu heeran de7eysati nuna qilqisanaadanne nu bolla miicanaada oothadasa.
44.14: Nuna kawotethata giddon hayses aggadasa; enti banta huuphiya nu bolla qaathana mela oothadasa.
44.15: Gallas kumethi taani tooshetas; ta som7uwa yeelli kammis.
44.16: Hessi haniday tana cayeysatanne boreyisata gaasoninne, ta morketanne tana mandeyisata gaasona.
44.17: Nuuni nena dogonna de7ishin, ne caaquwa menthonna de7ishin, ha ubbay nuna gakis.
44.18: Nu wozanay nena aggibeenna; nu tohoy ne ogiyape kare keybeenna.
44.19: Shin neeni nuna mentherethada do7a ollan yeggadasa; sakana dhuman kammadasa.
44.20: Nu, Xoossaa sunthaa dogidaba gidiyako, hara xoossatako nu kushiya miccidaba gidiyako,
44.21: Wozana xuuraa Xoossay eriya gisho, I haysa xeellidi demmennee?
44.22: Gidoshin, ne gisho ubba gallas hayqoos; shukanaw efiya dorsada taybetida.
44.23: Godaw, denda, Ayis dhiskay? Denda, merinaw nuna aggofa.
44.24: Ne som7uwa nuupe ayis genthay? Nu qohuwanne nu un7aa ayis dogay?
44.25: Nuuni baanan yegetida; nu asatethay biittara oyketis.
44.26: Godaw, denda, nuna maadda; ne siiquwa gisho gada nuna woza.

45.1: Taani ta yethaa kawas sissana; ta wozanay lo77o qofa pultees; ta inxarsay lo77o xaafiya asa bi7ire mela.
45.2: Asa ubbaafe neeni mala lo7o; ne mettershay aadho keehatetha qaalan kumis; Xoossay nena merinaw anjis.
45.3: Wolqaama kawaw, ne mashshaa danca; bonchonne teema ma7a.
45.4: Ne tumatethaa, ne aadatethanne ne xillotetha gisho, ne teema ma7ada xoonanaw denda; ne ushacha kushey malaalsiyaba besso.
45.5: Ne toorati qara; enti kawa morketa wozanaa caddo; kawotethati ne tohuwa garsan kundo.
45.6: Xoossaw, ne araatay merinaw de7ees; ne kawotethaa xam7ay xillotetha xam7aa.
45.7: Neeni xillotethi dosada geellatethi ixaasa; Hessa gisho, Xoossay, ne Xoossay, ne laggetape aathidi, nena ufaysa zayten tiyis.
45.8: Godare uuthan, karbeninne burguden walaketida shitton, ne ma7oy puuketis. Dangarsa zaalen alleeqetida, ne kawo gadhon diixetiya diithay nena ufaysees.
45.9: Kawo keethan de7iya maccasata giddon; kawota macca nayti de7oosona. Kawiya Ofira worqan alleeqetada, neepe ushacha baggan eqasu.
45.10: Ta naatte, si7a; wozanan wotha; ne haytha haa zaara; ne deriyanne ne aawa keethaa doga.
45.11: Kawoy ne malan ufaytis; ne godaa gidiya gisho iya boncha.
45.12: Xiroosa asay new woyto ekidi yaana; dureti nena aaddashana.
45.13: Kawa na7iya, kawo keethan waanna lo77ay! I yaagano ma7oy worqan alleeqetis.
45.14: Ba alleeqo ma7uwa ma7ada, kawako moyzetasu. I geela7o laggeti iyo kaallidi, iya sinthe ekidi yidosona.
45.15: Enti ufaytishe yidi, kawo gadho geloosona.
45.16: Kawaw, ne aawata bessaa ne nayti laattana; biitta ubban ne enta shuumana.
45.17: Ta ne sunthaa yeleta ubban, hassayetanaada oothana. Hessa gisho, asay merinaw nena galatana.

46.1: Xoossay nu qosetidi attiya, bessenne nu wolqaa. Nuna metoy gakiya wode, I nuna maaddanaw ubba wode nu matan de7ees.
46.2: Hessa gisho, biittay qaaxiyakoka, dereti abban kundiyakoka, nuuni yayyoko.
46.3: Abbay guummidi gopontikoka, iya wolqaama zuliyan dereti kokoriyakoka, nuuni dagammoko. Salaha.
46.4: Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay de7iya, Xoossaa katamaa, geeshsha bessaa, ufaysiya issi shaafi de7ees.
46.5: Xoossay iya giddon de7iya gisho, he katamay qaaxenna; wonta guura Xoossay iya maaddana.
46.6: Derey dagammis; kawotethati qaaxoosona; Xoossay ba qaala sissis; biittay til7is.
46.7: Ubbaafe wolqaama Goday nuura de7ees; Yayqooba Xoossay nu qosetidi attiya besse. Salaha
46.8: Haa yiite; Godaa oosuwa xeellite; biitta waatidi dhaysidaako be7ite.
46.9: I biitta bolla de7iya olaa ubbaa teqees; dongenne toora menthees; gondalliya taman xuuggees.
46.10: Wopu giite; taani Xoosse gideysa erite; taani kawotethata giddon dhoqu dhoqu gaana; biitta bollaka dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
46.11: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday nuura de7ees; Yayqooba Xoossay nu qosetidi attiya besse. Salaha.

47.1: Dere ubbay hinte kushiya baqite; qaala dhoqu oothidi Xoossaa galatite.
47.2: Ubbaafe dhoqa Goday waani yashshii? biitta ubban I gita kawo.
47.3: Dereta nuupe garsara, kawotethata nu tohuwape garsan haarisees.
47.4: I nuus laata biitta dooris; I dosiya Yayqoobi he biittan ceeqetees. Salaha.
47.5: Xoossay ufaysaninne ililsan pude dendis, Goday moyze punon ba araatan keyis.
47.6: Xoossaas zammarit; ee, iyaw zammarit; iyaw kawas zammarit; ee, iyaw zammarit.
47.7: Xoossay biitta ubbaa kawo gidiya gisho, galatan sabbite.
47.8: Xoossay ba geeshsha araatan uttis, Xoossay kawotethata haarees.
47.9: Kawotethata halaqati, Abrahaame Xoossaa asaara shiiqoosona. Biittan de7iya wolqaama ubbay Xoossaba gidiya gisho I ubbaafe dhoqu dhoqu gis.

48.1: Goday gita; nu Xoossaa kataman iya geeshsha zumaa bolla gita galati iyaw bessees.
48.2: Biitta ubbaa ufaysi gidida, pudeha baggara de7iya Xiyoone derey, dhoqanne lo77o; I gita kawa katama.
48.3: Xoossay he gimbiya giddona; ika iyaw geshe gideysa erisis.
48.4: Kawoti banta tooranchotara shiiqidosona; Xiyoone olanaw yidosona.
48.5: Iya be7idi dagammidosona; guye simmidi baqatidosona.
48.6: Enti yan de7ishe yashshan kokoridosona; iqethi oykida maccasada inxaxidosona.
48.7: Doloha bagga wolqaama carkon meqiya Tarsesa markabeta mela gididosona.
48.8: Nu si7idaysada, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa kataman, nu Xoossaa kataman I oothidaba be7ida; Xoossay he katamaa merinaw minthidi naagees. Salaha
48.9: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne keethan merinaa ne siiquwa qopoos.
48.10: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne sunthada ne galatay sa7aa gaxaa gakis; ne ushacha kushey xillotethan kumidaysa.
48.11: Ne pirdaa gaason Xiyoone asay ufayto; Yihuda kumethay ufaysan ililo.
48.12: Xiyoone yuushuwan hemetite; I dirsa yuuyite; I shakota taybite.
48.13: Yaa yeletas odana mela iya gimbiya akeekite; miixata wochite.
48.14: Hinte, “Merinaw Xoossay nu Xoossaa; I nuna hayqana gakanaw kaalethana” yaagidi odite.

49.1: Asa ubbay haysa si7ite; biitta bolla de7eysato, ubbay haysa hayzite.
49.3: Ta wozanaa qofay akeeka immees; ta doonay cincatetha qaala odetees.
49.4: Ta haythaa leemisoko zaarana; diithi diixashe, ta qan7ishiya birshana.
49.5: Meto gallasay yaa wodenne cimmiya morketi; tana teqiya wode ta ayis babbayna?
49.6: Banta shaluwan ammaneteysatanne banta duretethan ceeqetiya ta morketa ayis babbayna?
49.7: Ay asika bana wozanaw, woyko ba shempuwa gatiya Xoossas qanxanaw danda7enna.
49.8: Asa shempo gatey daro al7o; Ay gate qanxinka gidenna.
49.9: I hayqonnaadanne duufo gelonnaada, woyko I hayqonnaada oothanaw gakenna.
49.10: Eeyatinne pathonna asati hayqeysada, cincati banta shaluwa haratas yeggidi beysa asa ubbay be7ees.
49.11: Enti banta biitta bantaba giikoka, duufoy merinaw entaw keethe gidana.
49.12: Asi ay gitatikoka ba gitatethaara kanthenna; I do7ada hayqees.
49.13: Bantarka banta huuphen ammaneteyisata qaadaynne enti gidaba tuma giya eeyata wursethay haysa. Salaha
49.14: Shukas giigetida dorsatada, hayqoy enta duufo kaalethees. Suureti enta duufuwa bollara hemetana; enta asatethay duufon wooqana; keethafe keyidi haakidi si7oolen attana.
49.15: Shin Xoossay ta shempuwa wozana; I tana hayqo wolqafe ashshana. Salaha
49.16: Asi duretiya wodenne iya bonchoy dariya wode yayyofa.
49.17: I hayqiya wode aykoka ekidi beenna; iya shaloy iyara issife duufo gelenna.
49.18: Asi paxa de7iya wode taw kumis giiko, ubbabay iyaw injetida gisho galatetikoka,
49.19: simmidi poo7o be7onna, ba mayzatan gahetees.
49.20: Eratethi bayna duretida asi do7ada coo dhayana.

50.1: Wolqaama Goday, Xoossay odees; dolohape wuloha gakanaw biitta ubbaa xeegees.
50.2: Medhon polo yegelsi gidida Xiyoonepe Xoossay poo7ees.
50.3: Nu Xoossay yaana; si77i geenna; eexiya tamay iya sinthana; wolqaama gotey iya yuushuwana.
50.4: Xoossay ba asaa pirdiya wode, salotanne sa7aa xeegees.
50.5: “Yarshon taara caaqida, ta geeshshata taako shiishite” yaagis.
50.6: Xoossay pirdiya gisho, saloti iya xillotethaa awaajosona. Salaha
50.7: “Ta asaw, si7ite; ta hintew odayis; Isra7eele asaw, ta ne bolla markatana; taani Xoossay, ne Xoossaa.
50.8: Ne yarshuwa gishonne ne xuussa yarshuwa gisho, nena borike.
50.9: Ne daraape kormata, ne girbiyafe kole ekanaw koyke.
50.10: Woran de7iya do7ati ubbay tabaa; mukulu zumaa bolla de7iya mehetika taassa.
50.11: Taani dhoqa deriyan de7iya kafota ubbaa erayis; denban de7iya medhetethati tayisata.
50.12: Tana koshaykoka nena oychike; sa7inne sa7an kumidaba ubbay tabaa.
50.13: Taani kormata ashuwa maynayee? woyko deeshata suuthaa uyanayee?
50.14: Xoossas galata yarsho imma; Ubbaafe dhoqa Xoossaas ne qangetha gatha.
50.15: Meto gallas tana xeega; ta nena ashshana; neka tana bonchana” yaagees.
50.16: Shin Xoossay iita asaa haysada yaagees; “Ta higgiya ne nabbabanaw new ay maati de7ii? Woyko ta caaquwa ne doonan qoncisanaw new ay maati de7ii?
50.17: Neeni ta timirtiya ixadasa; ta qaala guye yeggadasa.
50.18: Kaysuwa be7ida wode neeni iyara dabbotadasa; laymateyisata maabaran geladasa.
50.19: Ne doona iitabaa odetanaw billa yeddadasa; Ne inxarsay wordo haasaya meezetis.
50.20: Uttada ne ishaa zigiradasa; ne aaye na7aa bolla iitaba odetadasa.
50.21: Ne haysa ubbaa oothiya wode, taani si77i gida gisho tana ne mela gada qopadasa. Shin ha77i ta nena hanqana; ne nagaraa ne sinthan taybana.
50.22: Hinteno, Xoossaa dogeysato, haysa akeekite; hessi hanonna ixiko ta hintena mentherethana; he wode hintena ashshanay baawa.
50.23: Taw galata yarshey tana bonchees; ba ogiya suurisida asas taani Xoossaa atotetha bessaana” yaagees.

51.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne merinaa siiquwada tana maara; ne qadheta daruwa mela ta nagaraa qucha.
51.2: Ta iitatethaafe tana meecca; ta nagaraape tana geeshsha.
51.3: Taani ta qohuwa erayis; ta nagaray ubba wode ta sinthana.
51.4: Taani nena, ne xalaala qohas; ne sinthan iitabaa oothas. Hessa gisho, ne hanquwan ne like; ne pirdanka ne xillo.
51.5: Heko ta yeletiya wode nagarancho; ta aaye ulon buroo attiya, wodepe doomada taani nagarancho.
51.6: Neeni asa wozanape tumatethi koyaasa; ta gaatha asatethaa cincatethi tamaarsa.
51.7: Hisoophe boncon tana wurxa; ta geeyana; tana meecca; ta shachafe aadhada booxana.
51.8: Ne tana ufaysinne lo77oba sissa; ne mentherethida ta meqethaa zaarada ufaysa.
51.9: Ne som7uwa ta nagaraape hara soo zaara; ta bala ubbaa qucha.
51.10: Abeeti Xoossaw, geeshsha wozana tanan medha; qaaxonna ayyaana ta giddon ooratha.
51.11: Tana ne sinthafe yeggofa; ne Geeshsha Ayyaana taape ekofa.
51.12: Ne atotetha ufaysaa taw zaara; ta new kiitetana mela tana zempisa.
51.13: Ta he wode higge mentheyisata ne ogiya tamaarsana; nagaranchotika neeko simmana.
51.14: Abeeti Xoossaw, tana ashshiya Xoossaw, suuthu gussiya nagarape tana ashsha; he wode ta inxarsay ne xillotetha yexana.
51.15: Abeeti Godaw, ta doona dooya; ta inxarsay ne galataa awaajana.
51.16: Ne yarshon ufaytiyako, ta new yarshanashin, ne xuussa yarshon ufaytaka.
51.17: Xoossaa yarshoy aada ayyaana; Xoossaw, ne meqidanne kawuyida wozanaa kadhaka.
51.18: Abeeti Xoossaw, dosan Xiyoones keeha; Yerusalaame gimbeta gimba.
51.19: He wode ne xillotetha yarshoninne xuussa yarshon ufaytana. pollo shiqiaya mehe yarshon ne ufaytana; kormati ne yarsho bessan yarishetana.

52.1: Neno, wolqaama uraw, iitatethan ayis otortay? neno Xoossan kadhetidayso ubba wode ayis ceeqetay?
52.2: Neno, wordo odeteyso, ne harata dhaysanaw maqetaasa; ne inxarsay qara maqla mela.
52.3: Ne lo77o aggada iita dosaasa; tuma aggada wordo odetaasa. Salaha
52.4: Neno, wordanchuwaw, ne bosha qaala ubbaa dosaasa.
52.5: Xoossay nena merinaw menthana; Xoossay nena mentherethananne ne keethaafe dafidi kessana; nena de7on de7eyisata giddofe shoddidi yeggana. Salaha
52.6: Xilloti hessa be7idi yayyana; enti haysada yaagidi, ne bolla miicana;
52.7: “Xoossaa baw geshe oothiboonna, ba duretethan ammanetida, iita ooson minnida, addiya haysa be7ite” yaagana.
52.8: Shin taani Xoossaa keethan aaciya shamaho mela; iya siiquwan taani merinaw ammanetayis.
52.9: Ne oothida gisho merinaw ta nena galatana; neeni lo77o gidiya gisho ne sunthan ufaysi oothana; geeshshata sinthan ta nena sabbana.

53.1: Eeyati banta wozanan, “Xoossi baawa” yaagosona; enta de7oy iitis; enti tunabaa oothosona; lo77oba oothiya asi issoyka baawa.
53.2: Xoossaa koyiya cinca asi de7iyako be7anaw, Goday salope asaa xeellees.
53.3: Enti ubbay Xoossaafe haakidosona; ubbay issife tunidosona. Lo77o oothiya asi deenna; hari attoshin issi asika baawa.
53.4: Asi kathi meysada ta asaa meysati, ha iita oothiya asati erokona? enti Xoossaa xeegokona?
53.5: Enti dagammi eronna dagama dagammana; Xoossay ba asaa morketa meqethaa laallana; Xoossay enta kadhida gisho enti yeellatana.
53.6: Isra7eele atotethay Xiyoonepe yeerenne! Xoossay ba asaa di7uwa zaariya wode, Yayqooba zareti ufayto; Isra7eele asay ufaysan hashshu go.

54.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne sunthan tana ashsha; ne wolqan taw pirda.
54.2: Abeeti Xoossaw, ta woosa si7a; ta doona qaala hayza.
54.3: Allaga asati ta bolla dendidosona; daganthiya asati tana wodhanaw koyoosona; enti Xoossaa qopokona. Salaha
54.4: Xoossay taw maade; Goday taw zempo.
54.5: Abeeti Xoossaw, ta morketa iitatethaa enta bolla zaara; ne tumatethaa gisho enta dhaysa.
54.6: Abeeti Godaw, taani ta dosan new yarshana; ne keeha gidiya gisho ne sunthaa galatana.
54.7: Ne tana, ta meto ubbaafe ashshadasa; ta morketa xoonetethaa ta ayfen be7as.

55.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, ta woosa si7a; ta magannuwa qelli goopa.
55.2: Tana si7a; ta woosaas zaaro imma; ta qofay tana waaysin, ta un7etas.
55.3: Ta morketa girsa si7ada dagammas; iitata mandiya gaason kokoras. Enti ta bolla meto ehoosona; yilon dendidi tana morkoosona.
55.4: Ta wozanay dirgees; hayqo hirgay tana wodhees.
55.5: Tana yashshinne kokorsi oykis; iita dagami ta bolla wodhis.
55.6: Holleda taw qefey de7iyako, paallada shempoy de7iya bessi gakanashin.
55.7: Taani haakada baanashin; bazzon aqanashin. Salaha
55.8: Taani gotepenne carkofe baqatada, ta qosetiya bessi demmanashin.
55.9: Abeeti Godaw, katamaa giddon ooshshinne gene be7ida gisho iitata odaa laalla.
55.10: Iitati gallasinne qamma katamaa gimbe dirsaa yuuyosona; waayeynne metoy katamaa giddon de7ees.
55.11: Dhayoy iya giddon de7ees; naaqoynne cimoy iya dabaabape shaaketenna.
55.12: Tana cayey ta morkiya gidenna; iya gidiyako ta danda7anashin. Ta bolla ceeqetey tana ixeysa gidenna; iya gidiyako ta iyape qosetanashin.
55.13: Shin hessa oothey nena, ta laggiya; ta dabbuwanne ta siiquwa.
55.14: Nu issoy issuwara ulo oda odetida; Xoossa keethan dabaaban asaara issife simeretida.
55.15: Enta wozanan iitatethi de7iya gisho, ta morketi qoponna hayqo; enti paxa de7ishe duufo gelo.
55.16: Shin taani Xoossaa xeegana; Goday tana ashshana.
55.17: Wonta, gallasinne omarsi waassana; ta metuwa iyaw odana; I tana si7ana.
55.18: Daroti tana morkikoka, I tana toorape ashshees.
55.19: Benipe ba araatan uttida Xoossay, banta ogiya laammonna gishonne iyaw yayyonna gisho tana si7idi enta kawushana. Salaha
55.20: Ta laggey ba dabbota qohis; entara caaqida caaquwa menthis.
55.21: Iya doonay oysape liiqo; shin ba wozanan ola denthees. Iya inxarsay zaytepe aadhida shugo; shin qanxanaw giigida qara mashsha mela.
55.22: Ne toohuwa Xoossa bolla yegga; I nena katisana. Xoossay xilloti, dagammana mela oothenna.
55.23: Shin Abeeti Xoossaw, iita asata wolqaama ollan holana. Suuthu gusseysatinne cimmeysati, banta laythaafe baggaaka de7okona; shin taani nenan ammanetana.

56.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, asay tana un7ethiya gishonne ubba wode ta morketi tana yedethiya gisho taw qadheta.
56.2: Ta morketi kumetha gallas tana yedhoosona; otoron tana oliya asay daro.
56.3: Tana yashshiya wode ta nenan ammanetayis.
56.4: Taani Xoossan ammanetayis; yayyike; iya qaala galatiya Xoossan ammanetayis; asi tana ay oothanee?
56.5: Kumetha gallasan ta morketi bala koyoosona; tana qohanaw ubba wode tobboosona.
56.6: Enti ta bolla maqetoosona; tana qohanaw geeddosona. Ta tango ubba kaalloosona; tana wodhanaw koyoosona.
56.7: Enti ay ogeraka kessi ekana mela oothofa; ne hanquwan he kawotethata kawusha.
56.8: Ta waayiya tayba; ne ta afuthaa makadasa; enti ne mazgabiyan de7okona?
56.9: Ta nena xeegiya wode, ta morketi guye simmana; Xoossay ta bagga gideysa ta hessan erayis.
56.10: Ta iya qaala galatiya Xoossan, ta iya qaala galatiya Godan,
56.11: ta he Xoossan ammanetayis; yayyike. asi tana ay oothannee?
56.12: Abeeti Xoossaw ta new qangidabay de7ees; hessa galataa yarsho oothada ta new immana.
56.13: De7on de7eyisata bolla poo7iya poo7uwan Xoossaa sinthan simeretana mela, ta shempuwa hayqope, ta tohuwa dhubepe ashshadasa.

57.1: Tana maara; abeeti Xoossaw, tana maara; ta neeko baqatayis. Dhayoy aadhana gakanaw, ne qefiya garsan qosetayis.
57.2: Taani Ubbaafe dhoqa Xoossako, ba qofaatho oothiya Xoossako waassayis.
57.3: Xoossay salope maado kiittidi tana ashshana; tana yedheyisata kawushana; Xoossay ba siiquwanne ba ammanetetha taw kiittana. Salaha
57.4: Taani ta morketape giddon, ase miya gaammotape giddon de7ayis. Enta achay tooranne donge toora mela; enta inxarsay qara mashsha mela.
57.5: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne salope aadhada dhoqu dhoqu ga; ne bonchoy sa7a ubbaa kammo.
57.6: Enti ta tohuwas xihe wothidosona; taani un7etada hokas. Enti ta ogiyan olla bookidosona; shin he ollan bantaw kundidosona. Salaha
57.7: Ta wozanay mino; abeeti Xoossaw, ta wozanay mino; taani nena mazmuren sabbana.
57.8: Ta shempe, barka; diithinne maasinqoy dendite; taani guura barkana.
57.9: Abeeti Godaw, ta nena asaa giddon galatana; kawotethata giddon nena sabbana.
57.10: Ne siiqoy salotape dhoqa; ne ammanetethay shaarape bolla.
57.11: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne salope aadhada dhoqu dhoqu ga; ne bonchoy sa7a ubbaa kammo.

58.1: Deriya haareysato, tuma hinte like odeteetii? Asa ubbaas xillo pirdeetii?
58.2: Gidenna, hinte wozanan iitabaa halcheeta; hinte kushey biitta bolla geellaba oothees.
58.3: Iita asi aaye ulope doomidi halees; yeletida gallasape doomidi, baleesinne wordo odetees.
58.4: Enti shooshada yiishshara de7oosona; enti tulle gopeda si7okona.
58.5: Biteysi ay cinca gidikoka, Gopey iya xeessi si7enna.
58.6: Abeeti Xoossaw, gaammo achi daaniya enta achaa mentha; Godaw enta sakiliya dhuka.
58.7: Enti gukida haathi gido; banta dongiya dukiya wode, donge toora ayfey dhayo.
58.8: Enti maaydi dhayiya dhaadhe saassoda hano; aaye ulope hayqidi wodhiya, awa poo7o be7onna boshada hano.
58.9: Enti agunthi gididi daayanape kase, enti buroo puuto gididi de7ishin, enta ba hanquwan dhaysana.
58.10: Nagaranchota bolla halo keyiya wode xilloti ufaytana; iitata suuthan banta tohuwa meecetana.
58.11: He wode asay, “Tuma xillotas woytoy de7ees; sa7a bolla pirdiya Xoossi de7ees” yaagana.

59.1: Abeeti ta Xoossaw, ta morketape tana ashsha; ta bolla dendeysatape tana naaga.
59.2: Iita ootheysatape tana ashsha; suuthu gussiya asatape tana ashsha.
59.3: Abeeti Godaw, enti tana wodhanaw zugidi naageysa be7a. Abeeti Godaw, ta naaquwa gisho woyko ta nagaraa gisho gidonashin coo ta bolla tobboosona.
59.4: Ta ay balaka oothonna tana qohanaw giigidosona; hessa be7a; tana maaddanaw denda.
59.5: Abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw, Godaw, Isra7eele Xoossaw, kawotethata ubbaa pirdanaw barka; iita ootheyisata maaropa. Salaha
59.6: Enti katamaa giddon yuuyishe pee7idi, kanatho laawishe simmoosona.
59.7: Enta doonape keyeysa be7a; enta inxarsay mashsha mela; asi entana si7eysa qopokona.
59.8: Shin abeeti Godaw, ne enta bolla miicaasa; kawotethata ubbaa leqisaasa.
59.9: Xoossaw, ne ta miixaa gidiya gisho, ta ne wolqan ammanetayis.
59.10: Ta Xoossay ba siiquwan taako yaana; ta Xoossay ta morketa xoonetethaa tana bessaana.
59.11: Ta asati dogonna mela ne enta wodhopa. Abeeti Godaw, nu gondalliyaw, ne wolqan enta laallanne kawusha.
59.12: Enta doonape keyiya nagaraa gisho enta inxarsaafe pultiya qaala gisho, banta otoruwan oyketo; enta baadethanne worduwa gisho,
59.13: ne hanquwan enta dhaysa; enta kumethi digga. Hessan Xoossay Yayqooba zeretha haareysanne sa7aa gaxaa gakanaw haareysi eretana. Salaha
59.14: Enti katamaa giddon yuuyishe pee7idi, kanatho laawishe simmoosona.
59.15: Enti miyaba demmanaw toylatoosona; kallona attida laawiya kana gidoosona.
59.16: Shin taani ne wolqaa sabbana; wonta ne siiquwa yexana. Neeni taw ta waayiya gallas, ta baqata attiya bessenne miixa.
59.17: Abeeti taw wolqa gidida Xoossaw, ta nena sabbana. Ta qosetada attiya bessaynne siiquwa tana bessiya Xoossay nena.

60.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne nuna aggadasa; nuna mentherthadasa. Ne nuna hanqetadasa; shin ha77i nuna zaara; mintha essa.
60.2: Ne biitta qaathadasanne za7isadasa; biittay kokoriya gisho, ne iya za7uwa kuntha.
60.3: Neeni ne asaa meto bessadasa; nuna gandigarsiya woyne ushshadasa.
60.4: New yayyeysati banta morke dongefe attana mela malla immadasa. Salaha
60.5: Ne siiqeysati attana mela, ne ushacha kushen nuna ashsha; nuna alla.
60.6: Xoossay ba geeshsha bessan haysada yaagis; “Taani xoonada Seekema biitta shaakana; Sukota zangaara wadhana.
60.7: Galadi tabaa; Minaaseyka taassa; Efreemey ta huuphe ashshiya birata qoobe; Yihudi ta kawota xam7aa.
60.8: Moo7abey ta meecetiya kere; Edoomey tabaa gideysa erisanaw, ta caammaa iya bolla wothayis; taani Filisxeeme xoonada gereerayis” yaagis.
60.9: Gimbetida katamaako tana oone efanay? Edoome gakanaw tana oone kaalethanay?
60.10: Abeeti Xoossaw, nuna aggiday nena gidikii? Abeeti Xoossaw neeni nu olanchotara olas keyaka.
60.11: Asa maadoy pathonna gisho, morketara oletanaw ne nuna maadda.
60.12: Xoossaa wolqan nu morketa xoonana; I nu morketa yedhana.

61.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne ta woosa si7a; ta woosa hayza.
61.2: Taani biitta gaxan de7ishin, ta wozanay ufaysi qanxida wode, ta nena xeegayis. Taape dhoqa zaallako, tana kaaletha.
61.3: Ne taw qotanne ta morketape naagetiya mino miixa.
61.4: Taani ne dunkaaniyan merinaw darkinaashin! Taani ne qefiya hapha garsan saro attarkinaashin! Salaha
61.5: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne ta qangetha si7adasa; ne suntha yayyeysatara issife taw laata immadasa.
61.6: Kawa laytha adussa; I yeletethaafe yeletethaa gakanaw de7o.
61.7: I Xoossaa sinthan merinaw kawoto; ne siiquwaninne ne tuman iya naaga.
61.8: Hessa gisho ta qangetha gallas gallas gathana; ne sunthaa ubba wode sabbana.

62.1: Xoossaa xalaalan ta shempo demmas; ta atotethay iyape yees.
62.2: Iya xalaali ta zaallanne ta atotetha; I ta qosetiya attiya bessi gidiya gisho dagammike.
62.3: Woddana haniya godaanne qaaxiya dirsi daaniya uraa wodhanaw, hinte awude gakanaw dendetii?
62.4: Enti iya boncho bessaafe denthanaw koyoosona; enti wordon ufaytoosona. Banta doonan anjoosona; shin banta wozanan baaddoosona. Salaha
62.5: Ta shempete! Xoossaa xalaala si77i gada naaga; ta ufaysay iyape yees.
62.6: Iya xalaali ta zaallanne ta atotetha; taani qosetiya bessi gidiya gisho dagammike.
62.7: Ta atotethaynne ta bonchoy Xoossana; I ta mino zaallanne ta miixaa.
62.8: Asaw, ubba wode Xoossan ammanetite; I hintew geshe gidiya gisho, hinte qofaa iyaw odite. Salaha
62.9: Asi, issi toho shempiya carko mela; gooba asi ubbay maaddonna hada. Mizaanen wothin enti carko mela; enti issi toho shempiya carkofe kawuyoosona.
62.10: Bonqen ammanetofite; kaysoti shiishidi duretethan otortofite. Hinte duretethay darikoka, hinte wozana iya bolla wothofite.
62.11: Xoossay issi toho odis; taani nam7u oda si7as; wolqi xoossasa.
62.12: Merinaa siiqoy Xoossaba; Abeeti Godaw, ne asa ubbaas iya oosuwada oosuwada immana.

63.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne ta Xoossaa; ta wozanay nena laamotees; ta ashoyka nena amottees. Haathi dhayidi phalqetida biittada, ta asatethay nena saamotees.
63.2: Ta nena geeshsha bessan xeellas; ne wolqaanne ne bonchuwa taani be7as.
63.3: Ne siiqoy de7ope lo77iya gisho, ta inxarsay nena bonchana.
63.4: Ta de7o laythan nena galatana; ne sunthan ta kushiya pude miccana.
63.5: Asi lo77o kathi midi kalleysada ta nenan kallana. Taani ta inxarsan ufaysa yethan nena galatana.
63.6: Taani ta hiixan nena hassayayis; qamma kumethan nebaa qopayis;
63.7: Ne tana maaddiya gisho, Ta ne qefiya kuyan uttada ufaysan yexana.
63.8: Ta shempiya neera oyketasu; ne ushacha kushey tana oykidi naagees.
63.9: Shin tana wodhanaw koyeysati, biitta garsan moogetana.
63.10: Enti mashshas aadhidi imetana; enti suudhumes kaho gidana.
63.11: Shin kawoy Xoossan ufaytana. Xoossaa sunthan caaqiya ubbay iya galatana; shin wordanchota doonay gordetana.

64.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, ta un7a woosa si7a; ta morketa mandethafe; tana ashsha.
64.2: Nagaranchota maqofenne iitata duulataape tana gentha.
64.3: Enti banta inxarsaa mashsha mela leefidosona; iita qaalata donge toorada mallidi yeddoosona.
64.4: Enti qosetidi xillo asi banta dongiyan qohoosona; akeeki bayna dukoosona; yayyokona.
64.5: Enti banta iita maquwas issoy issuwa minthethoosona. Banta xihiya wothana bessa koyoosona; enti, “Nuna ooni be7anee?” yaagosona.
64.6: Enti iitabaa maqetishe, “Nuuni lo77o maqo maqetida” yaagosona; Hessi asa wozana qofi ciimmo gideysa bessees.
64.7: Shin Xoossay enta ba dongiyan dukana; enti akeekona madunxana.
64.8: Enta maquwa I enta bolla zaarana; enta be7iya ubbay huuphe qaathana.
64.9: He wode asa ubbay Xoossas yayyana; iya oosuwa odananne zaari zaari qopana.
64.10: Xilloti Godan ufayto; iyako baqatidi atto; wozana suureti ubbay iya galato.

65.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, Xiyoonen new galati bessees; nuuni nu qangetha new gathana.
65.2: Neeni woosa si7iya gisho, asa ubbay neeko yoosona.
65.3: Nu nagaray nuna muukida wode, ne nuus atotethi immadasa.
65.4: Ne dooridaysatinne ne dabaaban daana mela neeko shiishida asi anjetidaysa. Nuuni ne son, ne geeshsha dunkaaniyan de7iya lo77oban kalloos.
65.5: Abeeti nu atotethaw, malaalsiya ne xillo oosuwan nuus zaara. Sa7aa gaxape gaxaa gakanaw, haahon de7iya ubbaas ne ufaysi.
65.6: Neeni ne wolqan dereta minthadasa; ne wolqaa dancadasa.
65.7: Neeni abba girsaanne beeta guntha si77i oothaasa; yarkiya asaa waasuwa irxisaasa.
65.8: Ne oothida malaata gisho, sa7aa gaxaa gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay new yayyana; dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya asa ubbaa ufaysadasa.
65.9: Ne ira immada biitta naagasa; daro dureyasa; asaas kathay dolana mela Xoossa shaafay haathan kumidaysa; hessada oothada ne giigisadasa.
65.10: Goshshas haathe immaasa; biitta shugisada ollaa kunthaasa. Ne iran zaarada irxisaasa; kathay dolana diccana mela anjaasa.
65.11: Laytha kalo laythi oothaasa; ne aadhiya bessa ubbay kumidi palahana.
65.12: Hentha bessata maatan kunthaasa; zumata ufaysi mayzaasa.
65.13: Ne hentha bessata dorsata kunthaasa; zangaara biittan kathi kunthaasa; enti ufaysan ililishe yexoosona.

66.1: Biitta ubbay hinte qaala dhoqu oothidi, ufaysan Xoossaa galatite.
66.2: Xoossaa sunthaas bonchon yexite; boncho galataa iyaw immite.
66.3: Xoossaas haysada yaagite; “Ne oosoti waanidi malaalsii? Ne wolqay darida gisho, ne morketi yashshan ne sinthan kokoroosona.
66.4: Biitta ubbay nena goyinnees; nena sabbees; ne sunthaas galatan yexoosona” yaagite. Salaha
66.5: Haayite; Xoossay oothidaba be7ite; asaa giddon malaalsiya ooso oothis.
66.6: I abba haatha shaakidi, kase nu aawati Yordaanose shaafa banta tohon yedhidi mela biittara pinnidosona. Hessan I oothidaban nuuni ufaytida.
66.7: I ba wolqan merinaw haarees. Kawotethata ba ayfen xeellees; hessa gisho, makalleysati iya bolla dendofo. Salaha
66.8: Asaw, nu Xoossaa galatite; hinte iya galatiya galatay si7etto.
66.9: I nuna paxa wothis; nu kundonna mela naagis.
66.10: Abeeti Xoossaw ne nuna paacadasa; biri taman paacetidi geeyeysada ne nuna geeshshadasa.
66.11: Ne nuna xihen gelsadasa; nu zokon deexo toho wothadasa.
66.12: Morketi nu huuphera toggidi aadhanada oothadasa; Nu haatha giddoranne tama giddora aadhida; shin ha77i nuna inje bessi ehadasa.
66.13: Ta xuussa yarsho ekada ne keethaa gelana, ta qangetha gathana.
66.14: Ta metootida wode ta doonay gida qaala, ta inxarsaafe keyida qangetha gathana.
66.15: Ta new modhuwa, xuussa yarsho oothada shiishana. Marazeta sawo tonku giya yarsho oothada shiishana; Kormanne koleta new yarshana. Salaha
66.16: Hinteno, Xoossas yayyeysato, ubbay haa yidi, si7ite; Xoossay taw oothidaba ta hintew odana.
66.17: Ta qaala dhoqu oothada woossas; ta inxarsan iya galatas.
66.18: Taani wozani erishin nagara genthidaba gidiyako, Goday tana si7enna.
66.19: Shin Xoossay tuma tana si7is; ta oysha zaaris.
66.20: Xoossay ta woosa ixiboonna gisho, ba merinaa siiquwa tana diggiboonna gisho galatetto.

67.1: Xoossay nuus qadheto; nuna anjo; iya som7oy nu bolla poo7o. Salaha
67.2: Ne ogey biitta bolla, ne atotetha wolqay, kawotethata ubban ereto.
67.3: Abeeti Xoossaw, asay nena galato; asa ubbay nena galato.
67.4: Kawotethay malaaletidi ufaysan yexo; ayis giiko, neeni asaas xillotethan pirdaasa; sa7an de7iya kawotethata kaalethaasa. Salaha
67.5: Abeeti Xoossaw, asay nena galato; kawotethati ubbay nena galato.
67.6: Biittay kathi immana; Xoossay, nu Xoossay nuna anjis.
67.7: Xoossay nuna anjida gisho, biitta gaxaa gakanaw de7iya asay iya yayyo.

68.1: Xoossay dendo; iya morketi laaleto; Iya ixeysati iya sinthafe baqato.
68.2: Cuyay carkora dendidi dhaysiya mela, muqaadi taman til7eysada, iitati Xoossaa sinthafe dhayo.
68.3: Shin xilloti hashshu go; Xoossaa sinthan ufayto; ufaysan ililo.
68.4: Xoossaas yexite; iya sunthaa sabbite; shaaran beysas oge kessite; iya sunthay Godaa; iya sinthan ufaytite.
68.5: Xoossay ba de7iya geeshsha bessan, yi7otas aawa; am7etas daynna.
68.6: Xoossay bizzatas soo asi immees; qasho keethan de7eyisata birshidi, duretethan wothees; shin makallanchoti qaaqa biittan de7oosona.
68.7: Abeeti Xoossaw, neeni ne asaa kaalethida wode, ne entara mela biitta kanthida wode, Salaha
68.8: Siina Xoossaa yuussaninne, Isra7eele Xoossaa qoncethan biittay qaaxis; saloy ira immis.
68.9: Abeeti Xoossaw neeni ira darsada bukisadasa; laddida biitta zaarada oorathaasa.
68.10: Ne asay yan duussu oykis; abeeti Xoossaw, ne keehatethan manqotas koshshiyaba giigisada immadasa.
68.11: Goday kiittis; daro Maccasati he kiitaa markatidosona.
68.12: Kawotinne enta olanchoti baqatidi guye simmidosona; son attida maccasati di7o shaaketidosona.
68.13: Phooliya worqa qefera de7iya, birape medhetida holle misile di77idi demmiya wode hinte dorsa kelen ayis zin7ideti?
68.14: Ubbaa danda7iya Xoossay kawota laallida wode, Xalmoona zumaa bolla shacha bukisis.
68.15: Baasane zumaw, daro xeeri de7iya Baasane zumaw,
68.16: Daro xeerati de7iya zumato, Xoossay doorida zumaa hinte ayis qanaatidi xeelleetii? Goday iyan merinaw daana.
68.17: Xoossaa ola para gaareti tammu mukulu toho tammu mukulan taybetees; Goday Siina zumaape ba geeshsha bessaa yis.
68.18: Di7etida darota ekidi, dhoqa keyis; asaape, hari attoshin makallanchotape imo ekis; Goday Xoossay yan daana.
68.19: Gallas gallas nu toohuwa tookiya Goday galatetto; Xoossay nuna ashsheysa. Salaha
68.20: Nu Xoossay nuna ashshiya Xoossaa gidennee? Hayqope ashshiya Xoossay iya.
68.21: Xoossay tuma ba morketa huuphiya tinchana; nagara ogen hemetiya asa, binaanan kametida enta liiphiya menthana.
68.22: “Taani hinte morketa Baasanepe zaarada ehana; ta enta ciimmo abbafe kessada guye ehana.
68.23: Hessika, ne morketa suutha ne tohoy yedhana melanne ne kanatika morke suuthaafe banta gishuwa laaccana melasa” yaagees Goday.
68.24: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne salpey, ta Xoossay ta kawoy salpey, Xoossa keethi geliya wode ubbaas bentees.
68.25: Yexeysati sinthana; diixeysati guyena; qassi karaabo baqiya geela7oti giddona.
68.26: Hinte “Xoossa gita shiiqon galatite; hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, Godaa galatite” yaagosona.
68.27: He salpiyan ubbaafe kaalo gidida Biniyaame kochay koyro taybetoosona. Kaallidi Yihuda halaqati banta cugan de7oosona; wursethan Zabloona halaqatinne Niftaaleme halaqati taybetoosona.
68.28: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne wolqaa qoncisa; kase ne nuus oothidaysada, ne minotetha bessa.
68.29: Hessa gisho, Yerusalaamen de7iya ne keetha kawoti yidi, new imota immana.
68.30: Do7ada maqa giddon de7iya Gibxe asata neeni seera; boorunne mara wude daaniya kawotethata ne hanqeta. Enti gulbatidi, banta bira new immana gakanaw, neeni enta seera; oletanaw yeemotiya asata laalla.
68.31: Kiitetida halaqati Gibxefe yaana; Tophey ba kushiya Xoossako miccana.
68.32: Hinteno, sa7aa kawotethato, Xoossas yexite. Salaha
68.33: Benipe de7iya salotape bollara beyisas; ba wolqaama girsan ba guntha sisseysas yexite.
68.34: Xoossaa wolqaaba awaajite; iya gitatethay Isra7eele bollana; iya wolqayka salona.
68.35: Xoossay ba geeshsha asaa bolla malaalsees; Isra7eele Xoossay ba asas minotethinne wolqa immees. Xoossay galatetto.

69.1: Haathi taw qoodhe gakida gisho, abeeti Xoossaw, tana ashsha.
69.2: Eqiya bessi bayna ciimmon mitettas; ciimmo haatha giddo gelas; haatha zuley ta bollara aadhis.
69.3: Maado demmanaw waassashe daaburas; ta kottonoy melis. Ta Xoossaa xeellishin, ta ayfey teljumis.
69.4: Tana coo ixeysati ta huuphe binaanape daro; Wordon tana morkeysatinne dhaysanaw koyeysati daro; ta kaysotonnaba zaara gidoosona.
69.5: Abeeti Xoossaw, ta eeyatetha ne eraasa; ta balay neepe geemmibeenna.
69.6: Abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, nena ufaysan naageysati ta gaason yeellatopo. Abeeti Isra7eele Xoossaw, nena minthidi koyeysati ta gaason kawuyofo.
69.7: Ta ne gisho cashshe danda7as; ta som7oy yeella ma7iday ne gishosa.
69.8: Taani ta ishatas imathe, ta aaye naytas allaga gidas.
69.9: Taani ne keethas mishetiya mishay tana tamada xuuggees; nena cayiya cashshay ta bolla wodhis.
69.10: Taani xooman tana kawushida wode, tana cayidosona.
69.11: Taani kayo ma7o ma7ida wode, entaw kaassas attas.
69.12: Katama pengen utteysatas zigrisas attas; mathoteysati tabaa yethi kessidosona.
69.13: Shin Godaw, ta nena woossayis; abeeti Xoossaw, ne dosiya wode, ne merinaa siiquwan, ne atotethan taw zaaro imma.
69.14: Silimon mitettonnaada tana ashsha; ta morketape tana ashsha, ciimmo haathan mitetethafe tana ashsha.
69.15: Di7o haathay tana muukofo; ciimmo haathay tana mittofo; ziqa ollay ba doona ta bolla gordofo.
69.16: Abeeti Godaw, ne merina siiquwa lo77otethan, taw zaaro imma; ne gita maarotan taako simma.
69.17: Ne aylliyafe ne som7uwa genthofa; taani un7an de7iya gisho taw elle zaaro imma.
69.18: Taako shiiqa; tana woza; ta morketape tana la77a kessa.
69.19: Ta cashshaa, yeellaanne kawushatethaa ne eraasa; ta morketa ubbaa ne be7aasa.
69.20: Cashshay tana hargancho oothis; taw qadhetiya asi koyas. Shin issi asika demmabike; tana minthethiya asi xeellas; shin bentibeenna.
69.21: Ta kathan ciiye walakidosona; ta saamuwas caala ushshi immidosona.
69.22: Enta gaytay entaw xihe gido; enta yarshoy entaw xihe gido.
69.23: Xeellonnaada enta ayfey goozeto; enta zokoy kuuno.
69.24: Ne hanquwa enta bolla tiga; suulliya ne sheney enta yedetho.
69.25: Enta kambey kaysi gido; enta dunkaaniyan de7iya asi dhayo.
69.26: Ne seeridaysata enti yedethidosona; ne madunxisidaysata enti yeessosona.
69.27: Enti nagaraa bolla nagara gujana mela aggaaga; ne maarotethaafe enta aybika gakofo.
69.28: Enti de7o maxaafape qusheto; xillo asaara mazgabetofo.
69.29: Ta waayeninne un7an de7ayis; abeeti Xoossaw, tana ashshada, saro bessan wotha.
69.30: Taani Xoossaa sunthaa mazmuren galatana; galata imon iya gitayana.
69.31: Hessi boora yarshofe, woyko kacaama korma yarshofe, aadhidi, Godaa ufaysees.
69.32: Naaqetidaysati hessa be7ana; ufaytana; hinteno, Xoossaa koyeysato, hinte wozanay minetto.
69.33: Goday manqota si7ees; qasho keethan de7iya ba asaa kadhenna.
69.34: Saloy, sa7inne abbay, iya giddon de7iya woxi qaaxiya ubbay Godaa galato.
69.35: Xoossay Xiyoone ashshana; Yihuda katamaa zaaridi keexana; asay yan daananne biittayka entaba gidana.
69.36: Iya aylleta nayti he biitta laattana; iya sunthaa doseysati yan daana.

70.1: Abeeti Xoossaw tana ashshanaw haa simma; abeeti Godaw, tana maaddanaw ellesa.
70.2: Tana wodhanaw koyeysati, yeellatonanne haniyaba dhayo. Ta qohetetha amotteysati, kawuyidi guye simmo.
70.3: Taako iyaw “hashshu! hashshu!” gidaysati xoonetida gisho yeellato.
70.4: Nena koyiya ubbay nenan ufaytonne malaaleto. Qassi ne atotetha dosiya ubbay, “Xoossay gitato” yaago.
70.5: Taani manqonne metootancho; abeeti Xoossaw, ellesada taako haaya. Ta maadeynne tana ashshey nena gidiya gisho; abeeti Godaw, gam7ofa.

71.1: Godaw, taani neeko baqatada attiya gisho, awudeka tana yeellayopa.
71.2: Ne xillotethan tana naaga; ne haytha taako zaara; tana ashsha.
71.3: Neeni ta ubba wode geemmada attiya zaalla taani geemmada attana mela mino miixaa gida; ee, neeni ta zaallanne ta miixa.
71.4: Ta Xoossaw, iitata kushepenne, qadhey bayna asatape tana ashsha.
71.5: Abeeti Godaw, ta na7atethafe doomada, neeni ta ufaysaanne ta ammanetetha.
71.6: Ta yeletida wodepe doomada nenan zempas; ta aaye ulope tana kessiday nena; taani ubba wode nena galatana.
71.7: Neeni ta qosetada attiya bessi gidida gisho, ta de7oy daro asaas leemiso gidis.
71.8: Gallasa ubban ta doonay ne galataninne ne bonchuwan kumis.
71.9: Taani cimida wode tana yeggofa; ta wolqay ixida wode tana aggofa.
71.10: Ta morketi ta bolla tobboosona; Tana wodhanaw koyeysati ta bolla maqetoosona.
71.11: Enti, “Xoossay iya aggis; yedethidi oykoos; iya ashshanay oonika baawa” yaagosona.
71.12: Xoossaw, taape haakofa ta Xoossaw, tana maaddanaw ellesa.
71.13: Tana mooteysati yeellatidi dhayo; Tana qohanaw koyeysati, yeellanne kawushe ma7o.
71.14: Shin taani ubba wode ufaysan nena naagana; zaara zaaradaka nena galatana.
71.15: Ne oothidaba ta taybanaw xoonetikoka, ta doonay gallas ubban ne xillotethaanne ne atotethaaba odana.
71.16: Taani Ubbaa Haariya Godaa wolqan yada; ne xalaala xillo gideysa awaajana.
71.17: Xoossaw, neeni ta na7atethafe doomada tana tamaarsadasa; ha77ika ne malaalsiya oosuwa ta odana.
71.18: Xoossaw ne wolqaanne ne minotethan yaa yeleta ubbaas odana gakanaw, taani cimada puulumikoka tana aggofa.
71.19: Xoossaw, ne xillotethay salo gakis; gitaba oothida Xoossi, ne meli oonee?
71.20: Neeni ta bolla daro meto ehadasa; gidoshin ta de7uwa zaarada ooraxisadasa; neeni tana biitta garsafe kessadasa.
71.21: Neeni ta bonchuwa darsadasa; tana zaarada minthethadasa.
71.22: Ta Xoossaw, ne tumatethaa gisho, ta nena diithan galatana. Abeeti Isra7eele geeshshaw, ta nena maasinqon sabbana.
71.23: Ta mettershay ufaysan dhoqu oothidi yexees; neeni tana ashshida gisho taani nena sabbana.
71.24: Tana qohanaw koyeysati yeellatida gishonne kawuyida gisho ta inxarsay ne xillo maaduwaba gallas ubban odana.

72.1: Xoossaw, ne suure pirdaa kawas, nu xillotethaa kawa na7aas imma.
72.2: I ne asaas xillotethan pirdana; qohetidaysatas suuren daynnatana.
72.3: Dereti duretethi, zumati xillotetha ayfe ne asaas ayfo.
72.4: Kawoy qohetidaysata gisho mooteto; manqota ashsho; un7etheyisata mentho.
72.5: Xoossaw, I awadanne ageenada de7o; yeletethaafe yeletethaa gakanaw de7o.
72.6: Kawoy goshshan bukiya ira melanne biitta kalsiya puuse ira mela gido.
72.7: Iya laytha ubban xillo asati daayo; ageeni dhayana gakanaw sarotethi daro.
72.8: Abbaafe abba gakanaw, Efraxiisa shaafape sa7aa gaxa gakanaw I haaro.
72.9: Bazzon de7iya asati iya goyinno; iya morketi baana laaco.
72.10: Tarsesanne yuushoy abban teqetida biittata, kawoti iyaw giira giiro; Arabenne Tophe kawoti iyaw imota eho.
72.11: Kawoti ubbay iyaw gulbato; kawotethati ubbay iyaw kiiteto.
72.12: Iyako waassiya manqota, qohetidaysatanne maadoy baynayisata I ashshana.
72.13: Manqotasinne daaburanchotas I qadhetees; manqota shempuwa hayqope ashshees.
72.14: Enta suuthay iya sinthan al7o gidiya gisho, I, enta qohopenne iitape wozana.
72.15: Kawoy daro laythi gam7o; Arabe biitta worqay iyaw yo. Asay iya gisho ubba wode woosso; gallas ubban I anjeto.
72.16: Biittan kathi palaho; dereti kathan kametto. Libaanose deriya bolla kathi ayfiyada ayfo; denbi maatan kumiyada asay katamaa kumo.
72.17: Kawa sunthay merinaw de7o; awada ubba wode xeegetishe gam7o. Asa ubbay iya baggara anjetana; kawotethati iya “anjetidaysa” yaagana.
72.18: Malaalisiyaba barka oothiya Goday, Xoossay Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto.
72.19: Iya boncho sunthay merinaw galatetto; iya bonchoy sa7a ubbaa kumo. Amin7i! Amin7i!
72.20: Isseye na7aa Dawita woosay haysan poletis.

73.1: Tuma Xoossay Isra7eeles lo77o; wozana geeshshatas I keeha.
73.2: Shin ta tohoy dhubetanaw guuthu attis; ta tangoy hallixanaw matis.
73.3: Hessi haniday iita asatinne otoranchoti, duretishin taani be7ada qanaatida gishosa.
73.4: Enta waayey gakonna gisho, enta asatethay payyanne mino.
73.5: Enti hara asada waayetokona; hara asada meton shocetokona.
73.6: Hessa gisho, otoroy entaw qoodhe alleeqo mela; buqethi afilada ma7idosona.
73.7: Enta wozanay iitabaa pultees; enta qofay iita halchon kumis.
73.8: Enti qelqisoosona; iitabaa haasayoosona; banta otoruwan harata un7ethoosona.
73.9: Banta doona Xoossaa bolla dooyosona; banta inxarsaa asa bolla adussosona.
73.10: Hari attoshin, Xoossaa asay entako simmana; enti odiyaba eeson ammanana.
73.11: Enti, “Xoossi ayko erii? Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaas eratethi de7ii?” yaagosona.
73.12: Hiza iitati haysa mela; ubba wode injetin de7oosona; enti guji guji duretoosona.
73.13: Hiza taani ta wozanaa geeshshatethan naagiday, xillotethi bessanaw ta kushiya meecetiday mela.
73.14: Gallasa kumethi taani meton shocetas; wonta wonta seeretas.
73.15: Taani iita asatada odetidaako, ne asaas ammanetona attanashin.
73.16: Taani ha ubbaa eranaw qopiya wode, taw deexo gidis.
73.17: Hessika taani Xoossa keethaa gelana gakanawunne iita asata wursetha qaada akeekana gakanaasa.
73.18: Tuma neeni enta hallixiya bessan utisadasa; enti kundidi dhayana mela oothaasa.
73.19: Enti ellesidi dhayidosona; dagaman issoy attonna wuridosona.
73.20: Amuhoy barkiya wode baleteysada, abeeti Godaw, neeni dendiya wode, enti dogetana.
73.21: Taani yilotida wodenne ta wozanan cametida wode,
73.22: akeekona eeya asi gidas; ne sinthan mehe gidas.
73.23: Shin taani ubba wode neera de7ayis; ta ushacha kushiya neeni oykadasa.
73.24: Ne zoriyan tana kaalethaasa; wursethan tana bonchon ekaasa.
73.25: Taw salon neepe attishin, hari ooni de7ii? Taani neepe attishin, sa7an haraa amotike.
73.26: Ta wolqaynne ta wozanay daaburanaw danda7ees; shin Xoossay ta wozanaa minotethaanne merinaw tana gakida saamaa.
73.27: Neepe haakeysati dhayana; nena kaddeyisata ubbaa ne wursana.
73.28: Shin taw Xoossaako shiiqoy lo77o; iya ooso ubbaa taani odana mela, Ubbaa Haariya Godaa qosetidi attiya besse oothas.

74.1: Xoossaw neeni nuna ayis merinaw aggadii? Ne qooruwan de7iya ne dorsata bolla ne hanqoy ayis eexidee?
74.2: Neeni beni doorida asaa, new buzo oothada wozida kochata hassaya; neeni de7ida Xiyoone zuma qopa.
74.3: Laaletida ne keethaa yada xeella; morketi yan de7iyaba ubbaa dhaysidosona.
74.4: Ne morketi ne keethan, “Nu xoonida” yaagidi gereeridosona. Xoono malaata gidida banta bandira essidosona.
74.5: Enti mithi qanxanaw wora giddon eqidi, banta kalta denthida asata daanosona.
74.6: Enti kushe hiillan alleeqida oosota ubbaa, banta kaltaaninne naariqan mentherethidosona.
74.7: Ne keetha taman xuuggidi dhaysidosona; ne sunthay xeegetiya bessaa tunisidosona.
74.8: Banta wozanan, “Nu kumethi dhaysana” yaagidosona; biittan de7iya asi Xoosse goyinniya bessata taman xuuggidosona.
74.9: He wode malaati nuus imetenna; nabeyka deenna. Hessi awude gakanaw gam7aneko, eriya asi nu giddon baawa.
74.10: Xoossaw, ne morketi awude gakanaw, ne bolla qelqisanee? Enti ne sunthaa merinaw cayanee?
74.11: Ne ushacha kushiya ayis shiisha ekay? Ne ushacha kushiya ne afilaa giddofe kessada enta dhaysa.
74.12: Gidoshin, abeeti Xoossaw, neeni benipe ta kawa; ne daro wode ashshadasa.
74.13: Ne gita wolqan abba shaakadasa; iya giddon de7iya do7aa huupheta doncadasa.
74.14: Leewataane geetetiya dawiya huupheta doncada, iya ashuwa bazzon de7iya medhetethatas kathi oothada immiday nena.
74.15: Neeni pultota dooya yeddadasa; ubba wode goggiya shaafata melisadasa.
74.16: Gallasay nebaa; qammayka nebaa; awanne ageena enta bessan wothiday nena.
74.17: Biittas zawa wothiday, balgonne bone medhiday nena.
74.18: Abeeti Godaw, ne morketi nena waati qelqisidaako, eeya asati ne sunthaa waati cayidaako hassaya.
74.19: Ne holliya shempuwa do7aas aathada immofa; metootanchota merinaw dogopa.
74.20: Nu biittan de7iya dhuma bessi ubbay makallanchotan kumida gisho, ne nuus caaqida caaquwa qopa.
74.21: Qohetidaysata yeellayopa; manqotinne metootanchoti ne sunthaa galato.
74.22: Abeeti Xoossaw, denda; mooteta; gallas kumethi eeyati nena qelqiseysa hassaya.
74.23: Ne morketi ne bolla waassiya waasuwanne nena ixeysati ceeqetiya ceequwa akeeka.

75.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, new galata immoos; ne sunthay mata gidiya gisho nena galatoos; asay ne malaalsiya oosuwa odoosona.
75.2: Xoossay haysada yaagees; “Taani pirda immiya wode dooras; suure pirdey tana.
75.3: Biittaynne iyan de7iya ubbay qaaxikoka, iya tuussaa mintha essey tana. Salaha
75.5: ‘Hinte kaciya salo denthofite; qoodhe qaathidi haasayopite’ ” yaagana.
75.6: Bonchoy dolohape woyko wulohape woyko mela biittafe yeenna.
75.7: Shin suure pirdey Xoossaa; I issuwa bolla pirdees; hankuwa shatinthees.
75.8: Xoossaa kushen issi wanci de7ees; he wancay Xoossaa hanqo woyne ushshan kumidi uttis. I he ushshafe tigin, sa7an de7iya iita asati hessa uyana; enti orcuwa ashshona xiiphidi uyana.
75.9: Shin taani Yayqooba Xoossaaba odana; iya merinaw sabbana.
75.10: I, iita asata kaciya menthana; shin xillota kacey dhoqu dhoqu gaana.

76.1: Xoossay Yihudan eretis; iya sunthay Isra7eelen gita.
76.2: Iya dunkaaney Saalemana; I de7iya bessay Xiyoonena.
76.3: Yan xongetiya morke dongiya, gondalle, mashshenne ola miisheta mentherethis. Salaha
76.4: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne bonchoy ay mela gite! Neeni ne morketa xoonada zumaape simmiya wode, ne teemay ay mela yashshi!
76.5: Gooba tooranchoti bonqetidosona; enti wolqaama dhisko dhiskidosona; entafe issoyka ba kushiya denthibeenna.
