76.6: Abeeti Yayqooba Xoossaw, ne seerida wode, para asatinne parati kundidi attidosona.
76.7: Shin abeeti Xoossaw, neeni yashshaasa; ne hanqoy suulliya wode, ne sinthan oone eqanay?
76.8: Neeni pirdaa salope sissida wode, biittay dagaman si77i gis.
76.9: Neeni biittan qohetida asaa ashshanawunne entaw pirdanaw dendiya wode hessi hannis. Salaha
76.10: Ne ase hanqikoka new boncho gidees; Olape attida asati ne ba7aale bonchana.
76.11: Godaas hinte Xoossaas qangethi gathite; hinteno iya matan de7iya kawotethato, yashshiya iyaw imota ehite.
76.12: I halaqata ayyaana kawushshees; wolqaama kawotaka daganthees.

77.1: Taani Xoossaa maggannayis; tana si7a gada iyako waassayis.
77.2: Ta metuwa gallasan Godaa koyas; qamma kumethi shempoy bayna ta kushiya miccas; gidoshin, ta shempiya minnanaw danda7abuku.
77.3: Taani Xoossaba qopiya wode oolayis; taani wotha denthida wode ta shempoy daaburees. Salaha
77.4: Qamma kumethi tana dhisko diggada aysadasa; ta un7etida gisho odetanaw danda7abike.
77.5: Taani aadhida gallasata qopas; kase laythata hassayas.
77.6: Taani qamma gita qofan aqas; ta wozanan wotha denthashe, haysada yaagada tana oychas;
77.7: “Xoossay nuna merinaw aggideyee? hizape guye I nuus keeheneyee?
77.8: Iya siiqoy attideyee? I odida qaala merinaw poleneyee?
77.9: Xoossay ba maarota dogideyee? Ba qadhiya hanqon laammideyee?” yaagada oychas. Salaha
77.10: Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaw, tana un7ethiday, ne ushacha kushiyan nuna maado aggidaysa.
77.11: Godaa oosota taani qopana; I beni oothida malaalsiya oosota hassayana.
77.12: Ne oosota taani zaara zaarada qopana; ne wolqaama oosota taani wotha denthana.
77.13: Abeeti Xoossaw, ne ogey geeshshi; ne mela gita Xoossi oonee?
77.14: Neeni malaalsiyaba oothiya Xoossaa; asaa giddon ne wolqaa qoncisaasa.
77.15: Ne asaa, Yayqoobanne Yoosefa kochaa ne qesiyan wozadasa. Salaha
77.16: Abeeti Xoossaw, haathati nena be7idi yayyidosona; abba ciimmotika kokoridosona.
77.17: Shaarati haathe duge tigidosona; daday salon guummis; ne wol7anthay yan han wol7amis.
77.18: Ne dadaa guunthay uushuwa giddon guummis; ne wol7anthay sa7aa poo7isis; biittay qaaxis; kokoris.
77.19: Neeni abba giddora hemetaasa; ciimmo abba giddora kanthaasa; shin ne tohoy yedhida bessay bentenna.
77.20: Muse kushennine Aarona kushen ne asaa dorsa wudeda kaalethadasa.

78.1: Ta asaw, ta timirtiya si7ite; ta doonape keyiya qaala hayzidi si7ite.
78.2: Taani ta doona leemison dooyana; benipe geemmida xuura qoncisana.
78.3: Nuuni si7idaysanne eridaysa, nu aawati nuus odidaysata odana.
78.4: Hessata nuuni enta naytape qosoko; Godaas bessiya galataa, iya wolqaanne malaalsiya iya oosuwa, yaana yeletas odana.
78.5: I Yayqooba zerethaas kiitaa, Isra7eele asaas higgiya immis. Kase nu aawati banta nayta he higgiya tamaarsana mela kiittis.
78.6: Kaalliya yeletay hessa erana mela, enta naytika banta naytas buroo yeletana naytas erisanaasa.
78.7: He wode enti Xoossan ammanetena; I oothidaba balokona; iya kiitaa naagana.
78.8: Enti kase banta aawatada wozana muume yeleta, geellanne ammanetona yeleta, Xoossan minnidi eqenna yeleta gidokona.
78.9: Efreema asay donge dancikoka, ola gallas guye simmidosona.
78.10: Enti Xoossaa caaquwa naagibookona; iya higgiyan hemetonna ixidosona.
78.11: Enti I oothida oosuwanne I bessida malaata dogidosona.
78.12: I enta aawata sinthan Gibxe biittan, Xo7aane Denban malaata oothis.
78.13: Abbaa shaakidi giddora enta pinthis; haatha shaakidi yan han godada essis.
78.14: I enta gallas shaaran, qamma tama poo7on kaalethis.
78.15: I mela biittan zaalla phalqidi, abbada daro haathi enta ushshis.
78.16: Zaallafe haathe pultisidi, shaafa haathada gogisis.
78.17: Shin enti iya bolla nagara gujidi oothidosona; Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa bolla mela biittan makallidosona.
78.18: Banta amotida kathaa oychidi, Xoossaa erishe paacidosona.
78.19: Enti Xoossaa bolla haysada yaagidi haasayidosona; “Mela biittan Xoossay nuus kathi giigisanaw danda7ii?
78.20: Zaalla shocin pultoy keyidi shaafa haathi goggis; shin I nuus kathi immanaw danda7ii? Woyko ba asaas asho immanaw danda7ii?” yaagidosona.
78.21: Goday hessa si7ida wode daro hanqetis; Yayqooba kochata bolla tami eexis; Isra7eele bolla iya hanqoy daris.
78.22: Hessika enti Xoossan ammanibookona; woyko iya ashuwan ammanetibokona.
78.23: Gidoshin, dhoqa saluwa kiittis; salo pengiya dooyis.
78.24: Enta muzanaw manna bukisis; salo kathaa entaw immis.
78.25: Kiitanchota kathi asay mis; Xoossay entaw miyaba darsidi immis.
78.26: Doloha carkoy carkana mela oothis; ba wolqan dugeha carkuwa denthis.
78.27: I asaas asho biitta kessis; paalliya kafota abba gaxa shafeda bukisis.
78.28: Enti de7iya bessan, dunkaaniya yuushon wodhisis.
78.29: Enti amotidaysa entaw immis; midi banta ganjiya gathidosona.
78.30: Shin enti banta amuwa aathona de7ishin, ashoy enta doonan buroo de7ishin,
78.31: Xoossaa hanqoy enta bolla wodhis; enta giddofe wolqaama asata wodhis; Isra7eelepe na7atethata dhukis.
78.32: He ubbay haninka nagara ooso aggibokona; daro malaata oothinka ammanibookona.
78.33: Hessa gisho, I enta gallasata hada oothis; enta laythata dagaman ongis.
78.34: Xoossay entafe baggaa wodhiya wode iya koydosona, banta nagaraa paaxidi iyako simmidosona.
78.35: Xoossay enta zaalla gideysa, Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay enta wozeysa, gideysa hassayidosona.
78.36: Shin enti banta inxarsan wordotidosona; banta doonan cimmidosona.
78.37: Enta wozanay Xoossan minnidi eqenna; iya caaquwas ammanetokona.
78.38: Shin I enta maaris enta nagaraa atto gis; enta dhaysibeenna. Daro wode ba hanquwa teqis; ba gaduwa kumethi enta bolla yeddibeenna.
78.39: Enti hayqiya asho gideysanne keyidi simmonna shempo gideysa akeekis.
78.40: Enti mela biittan iya bolla aapun toho makallidona! Mela biittan iya aapun toho lancisidonaa!
78.41: Enti zaari zaaridi Xoossaa paacidosona; Isra7eele Geeshshaa yiloyidosona.
78.42: Entana morketa kushepe ashshida gallasaa, un7ethiya asaape wozida wolqaa dogidosona.
78.43: I Gibxen oothida malaata, Xo7aane Denban oothida malaalsiya oosuwa hassaybookona.
78.44: Enta shaafa haathata suuthu laammis; hessa gisho, Gibxe asay shaafatape uyanaw danda7ibookona.
78.45: Enta waaysiya udunxetanne enta biitta dhaysiya shodheta kiittis.
78.46: Dolida kathaa duggos, enti daaburida ayfiya booles immis.
78.47: Enta woyniya shachan, enta balasiya carkon dhaysis.
78.48: Enta meheta shachan wodhis; enta dorsata dadan wursis.
78.49: Dhaysiya kiitancho cugara, ba suulliya hanquwa, yiluwa, ixuwanne gaduwa enta bolla yeddis.
78.50: Ba hanquwas oge giigisis; enta dhayos aathidi immis; enta hayqope ashshibeenna.
78.51: Gibxe bayra nayta ubbaa shocis; Kaama dunkaanen koyro nayta wodhis;
78.52: Shin ba asaa dorsada kessis; wudeda mela biittan heemmis.
78.53: I enta saro kaalethida gisho babibookona; shin enta morketa abbay mittis.
78.54: I enta ba geeshsha biitta, ba ushacha kushen xoonidi oykida zuma bolla ehis.
78.55: I enta sinthafe kawotethata gooddis; enta biitta Isra7eele kochatas laata oothidi shaakis; ba asaas enta keethaa immis.
78.56: Gidoshin, Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa bolla makallidosona; iya paacidosona; iya higgiya kiitetibookona.
78.57: Enti banta aawatada geellatanne minnidi eqonna asi gididosona; wobe toorada wora wodhidosona.
78.58: Dhoqa goyinno bessatan iya yiloyidosona; banta eeqatara iya qanaatisidosona.
78.59: Xoossay hessa si7ida wode shenetis; Isra7eele ubbaa kadhis.
78.60: Seelon I de7iya ba bessaa, asaa giddon I de7iya ba dunkaaniya aggis.
78.61: Xoossa wolqaasinne bonchuwas malaata gidida Taabotiya morketa kushen aathidi immis.
78.62: I ba asaa bolla shenetis; enta mashshas aathidi immis.
78.63: Na7atethati ubbay taman meetetidosona; geela7oti azina gelonna attidosona.
78.64: Enta kahineti mashshan wuridosona; enta macheti yeekonna mela digetidosona.
78.65: Goday dhiskofe barkiya asada dendis; woyne ushsha mathoy aadhida asada hanis.
78.66: I ba morketa guye zaaridi shocis; enta merinaw yeellayis.
78.67: Yoosefa dunkaaniya kadhis; Efreema kochaa dooribeenna.
78.68: Shin Yihuda kochaanne I dosiya Xiyoone deriya dooris.
78.69: Ba keethaa saloda dhoqu oothidi keexis; sa7ada merinaw essis.
78.70: Ba aylliya Dawita dooridi, dorse heemmiya bessaafe ekis.
78.71: Dorse heemmiya bessafe denthidi, ba asaa Yayqooba, ba laata Isra7eele henthanaw ehis.
78.72: Dawiti enta suure wozanan heemmis; ba cincatethan kaalethis.

79.1: Xoossaw, ayhude gidonna asay, ne biitta bolla dendidosona; Ne geeshsha keethaa tunisidosona; Yerusalaame laallidosona.
79.2: Ne aylleta aha salo kafotas, ne geeshshata ashuwa sa7a do7atas immidosona.
79.3: Enta suuthaa Yerusalaame yuushon haathada gussidosona; enta aha moogiya asi dhayis.
79.4: Nu shoorotas nuuni miichas, nu heeran de7iya asaas qelqisethas attida.
79.5: Godaw, hessi awude gakanaw hananee? Neeni nu bolla merinaw hanqetadii? Ne hanqoy tamada eexishe daaneyee?
79.6: Nena eronna dereta bolla, ne sunthaa xeegonna kawotethata bolla ne hanquwa zaara.
79.7: Hessika enti Yayqooba mida gishonne enti de7iya bessaa dhaysida gishosa.
79.8: Nuuni daro metootida gisho, nu mayzata iitatethaa nu bolla taybopa; eeson ne maarota nuus kiitta.
79.9: Abeeti nuna ashshiya Xoossaw, ne boncho sunthaa gisho nuna maadda. Ne suntha gisho nuna ashsha; nu nagaraa atto ga.
79.10: Dereti, “Enta Xoossay awun de7ii?” ayis gaanee? Ne aylleta suuthaa enti gussida gisho; neeni halo keyeysa nu xeellishin, enta giddon qoncisa.
79.11: Qasho asaa ooley ne sinthe gako; hayqo pirdetidaysata ne wolqaa gitatethan ashsha.
79.12: Godaw, nu shooroti nena toochida gisho, laapun kushe halo keyada enta ki7on idintha.
79.13: He wode nuuni ne asay, ne dorsati, merinaw nena galatana. Yeletethaafe yeletethaa gakanaw, ne peeshsha odana.

80.1: Yoosefa dorsa wudeda kaaletheyso, Isra7eele henthanchuwaw nuna si7a. Kiruubeta bolla de7iya araatan uttidayso, ne poo7uwan qonca.
80.2: Efreema, Biniyaamenne Minaase sinthan benta; ne wolqaa qaathada nuna ashshanaw haaya.
80.3: Xoossaw nuna zaara; nu attanaada ne som7uwa nuus poo7isa.
80.4: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw Xoossaw, ne asaa woosa bolla awude gakanaw shenetay?
80.5: Neeni enta yeeho kathada muzadasa; afuthu haathada ushshadasa.
80.6: Nu shooroti nu biitta ekanaw banta giddon oyaana mela oothadasa; nu morketi nu bolla miicidosona.
80.7: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw nuna zaara; nu attanaada ne som7uwa nuus poo7isa.
80.8: Gibxefe woyne ehadasa; kawotethata yedethada, enta biittan iya tokadasa.
80.9: Neeni biitta qeexadasa; I xapho yeddidi, daayidi biitta gakis.
80.10: Dereti iya kuyan, Libaanose zigati iya tashiyan kametidosona.
80.11: Ba tasheta Medetiraane Abbaa gakanaw, ba xeerata Efraxiisa shaafa gakanaw yeddis.
80.12: Yaatin, ogera aadhiya ubbay iya ayfiya duuthanaada, iya yuushon de7iya gimbiya ayis laalladii?
80.13: Bazzo gudunthoy iya bolla gupis; wora do7ati iya midosona.
80.14: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw nuuko simma; salora duge xeellada; ha woyniya naaga.
80.15: I ne ushacha kushey tokida xapho; neeni new dichida puute.
80.16: Ne morketi ne woyniya qanxidosona; taman xuuggidosona; enta ne hanquwan dhaysa.
80.17: Ne kushey ne ushachan de7iya asaa, neeni new dichida asaa naago.
80.18: Hiza nuuni guye simmoko; Nuna paxa wotha; ne sunthaa galatana.
80.19: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw Xoossaw, nuna zaara; nu attanaada ne som7uwa nuus poo7isa.

81.1: Nuus wolqa gidida Xoossaas ufaysan yexite; Yayqooba Xoossaas ililite.
81.2: Yethi doomite; karaabo baqite; diithaninne maasinqon yexite.
81.3: Ageeni xeeriya wode, qassi dhuma uttiya wode, ba7aale gallasan moyze punnite.
81.4: Hessi Isra7eele biittan higge; Yayqooba Xoossay immida woga.
81.5: I Gibxe biitta shocida wode, Yoosefa kochaas ha wogaa awaajis. Eronna doonan haysada yaagishin si7as;
81.6: “Hinte hashiya toohope, hinte kushiya keeshepe shempisas.
81.7: Hinte metuwan tana xeegideta; ta hintena ashshas; taani dechiya shaara giddofe hintena allas; Mariba pultuwa matan ta hintena paacas.” Salaha
81.8: “Ta asaw, ta hintena seereysa si7ite; Isra7eele asaw hinte tana si7iko aybee?
81.9: Hinte giddon allaga xoossi de7opo; hara xoosse goyinnofite.
81.10: Gibxe biittafe hintena kessida, taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa; Ne doona loythada hakanka; taani iyan kunthana.
81.11: “Shin ta asay tana si7ibookona; Isra7eeley taw kiitetibeenna.
81.12: Hessa gisho, enti banta qofaa kaallana mela, simmonna enta wozanaas aathada immas.
81.13: Ta asay tana si7idaako aybe; Isra7eeley ta ogiya kaallidaako aybi de7i;
81.14: Taani enta morketa eeson xoonanashin; enta ixeyisata bolla ta kushiya denthanashin.
81.15: Godaa ixeysati iya sinthan hokana; enta seeray merinaw gidana.
81.16: Taani hintena lo77o giste muzana; zaallafe keyiya eessan hintena kalsana.”

82.1: Xoossay salo shiiquwa giddon, xoossati shiiqida bessan haysada yaagidi pirdees.
82.2: “Hinte awude gakanaw wobbe pirdanee? awude gakanaw iitata bagga gidanee?” Salaha
82.3: Metootanchotasinne aawi baynaysatas mootetite; manqotanne qohetida asaa maata naagisite.
82.4: Daaburanchotanne metootanchota ashshite; iitata kushepe enta yegisite.
82.5: Hintew eratethinne akeeki baawa; enti dhuman simeretoosona; biitta baasoti qaaxidosona.
82.6: Taani, “Hinte xoossata; ubbay Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa nayta.
82.7: Gidoshin hinte asi hayqeysada hayqana; hara halaqati kundeysada kundana” yaagas.
82.8: Xoossaw, denda; biitta bolla pirda; kawotethati ubbay nebaa.

83.1: Abeeti Xoossaw, si77i goopa; Xoossaw sirphi goopa; muumopa.
83.2: Ne morketi ne bolla dendeysa, nena ixeysati ne bolla makalleysa be7a.
83.3: Enti ne asaa bolla geeman duulatoosona; neeni dosiya asaa bolla maqetoosona.
83.4: “Haayite, enta kawotethaa dhaysoos; Isra7eele geetetiya sunthay merinaw hassayetonna mela oothoos” yaagosona.
83.5: Enti issi wozanan gididi maqetoosona; ne bolla dendanaw caaqidosona.
83.6: Enti, Edoomenne Isma7eela asaa, Moo7abenne Aggaari kochata;
83.7: Gebaalanne Amoone asaa, Amaaleqa, Filisxeemenne Xiroosa asaa.
83.8: Asooreti entara gahetidosona; Asooreti Looxe asaas wolqaama maado gididosona. Salaha
83.9: Neeni, Midiyaame, Sisaaranne Yabina bolla Qisoona shaafan oothidaysada enta bolla ootha.
83.10: Enti Endooran dhayidosona; enta ahay denban wooqidi attis.
83.11: Enta halaqata Oreebanne Zebada ootha; enta haareyisata Zabheelanne Silmanada dhaysa.
83.12: Enti, “Nuuni Xoossaa asaa laata nuus buzo oothana” yaagidosona.
83.13: Ta Xoossaw, enta baanada laalla; carkoy efiya suullada ootha.
83.14: Tami wora meysada, tama lacoy deriya xuuggeysada,
83.15: ne uushuwan enta yedetha; ne gotiyan enta dagantha.
83.16: Godaw, asay ne sunthaa koyana mela, enta som7uwa yeella mayza.
83.17: Enti merinaw yeellato; hirgo; kawuyidi dhayo.
83.18: Ne sunthay Godaa gidida ne xalaali, Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay, sa7a ubbaa haareysa enti ero.

84.1: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, ne de7iya bessay waani lo77i!
84.2: Taani Godaa keetha dabaaba laamotayis; ta kumetha asatethay de7o Xoossaas ufaysan yexees.
84.3: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, ta kawaw, ta Xoossaw, ne yarsho bessa matan buube kafoy baw de7iya bessi demmasu; holleyka ba nayta wothiya keethe keexasu.
84.4: Ne keethan de7eysatinne merinaw nena sabbeysati anjetidaysata. Salaha
84.5: Nena banta minotethi ootheysati, banta wozanaa Xiyoone ogiya bolla, wotheysati anjetidaysata.
84.6: Enti yeeho zangaarara aadhiya wode, he bessay pultoy keyiya bessi gidis; torche iray bukidi ollaa kunthees.
84.7: Enti wolqa bolla wolqa guji guji baana; issoy issoy Xoossa sinthan Xiyoonen bentana.
84.8: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw Xoossaw, ta woosa neeni si7a; Yayqooba Xoossaw hayza. Salaha
84.9: Xoossaw, nu gondalliya be7a; ne doorida kawa keeha ayfen xeella.
84.10: Taani hara bessan mukulu gallas daanape, ne dabaaban issi gallas de7eysi taw lo77o. Iitata dunkaaniyan daanape, Xoossa keetha penge naagoy taw lo77o.
84.11: Godaa Xoossay nuus gondallenne poo7o; nuus bonchonne keehatethi immees; suuretethan hemeteyisata lo77oba diggenna.
84.12: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, nenan ammaneteysati anjetidaysata.

85.1: Godaw, neeni ne biittas keehadasa; Yayqooba kochaa di7ope guye zaaradasa.
85.2: Ne asaa naaquwa atto gadasa; enta nagaraa ubbaa kammadasa. Salaha
85.3: Ne yiluwa aggadasa; suulliya ne hanquwafe simmadasa.
85.4: Abeeti nuna ashshiya Xoossaw, nuna guye zaara; nu bolla lancidaysa agga.
85.5: Neeni nu bolla merinaw shenetayee? Ne hanquwafe simmikiyee?
85.6: Nuuni nenan ufaytana mela, nuna zaarada oorathikiyee?
85.7: Abeeti Godaw, ne merina siiquwa nuna bessa; nuna ashsha.
85.8: Godaa Xoossay odiyaba taani si7ana; enti banta eeya ogiyako simmonna ixiko, I ba geeshsha deriyas sarotethi odees.
85.9: Iya bonchoy nu biittan daana mela, Xoossaa yayyeyisata ashshanaw I matan de7ees.
85.10: Siiqoynne tumatethi gahetidosona; Xillotethinne sarotethi idimetidosona.
85.11: Tumatethi sa7aape pude keyees; xillotethi salope duge xeellees.
85.12: Xoossay lo77oba nuus immana; nu biittay daro kathi ayfana.
85.13: Xillotethi Godaa sinthan hemetana; iya ogiya giigisana.

86.1: Godaw, taani manqonne metootancho gidiya gisho, ta woosa si7ada tana alla.
86.2: Ta new dummatida asi gidiya gisho, tana de7on wotha; nenan ammanetiya tana, ne aylliya ashsha; neeni ta Xoossa.
86.3: Godaw, gallas kumethi ta neeko waassiya gisho, taw qadheta.
86.4: Godaw, ta shempoy neeko waassiya gisho, tana, ne aylliya ufaysa.
86.5: Godaw, neeni keehanne atto geysa; nena xeegiya ubbaas ne siiqoy daro.
86.6: Abeeti Godaw, ta woosa si7a; ta waasuwa hayza.
86.7: Ne ta woosaas zaaro immiya gisho, ta metuwa gallasan ta neeko waassana.
86.8: Godaw, xoossata giddon ne meli baawa; ne oosuwara giney baawa.
86.9: Godaw, neeni medhida kawotethati yidi, ne sinthan gulbatana; ne sunthaa bonchana.
86.10: Neeni gita; ne malaalsiya ooso oothiya gisho Xoossi ne xalaala.
86.11: Godaw, ta ne tuman hemetana mela, tana ne ogiya tamaarsa. Taani ne sunthaas yayyana mela, taw issi wozanaa imma.
86.12: Godaw ta Xoossaw, taani nena ta kumetha wozanan galatana; ne sunthaa merinaw bonchana.
86.13: Ne siiqoy taw daro; tana duufope ashshadasa.
86.14: Xoossaw, otoranchoti ta bolla dendidosona; iita asata cugay tana wodhanaw koyees; enti nena wuda gookona.
86.15: Shin abeeti Godaw, neeni qadhetiyanne maariya Xoosse. Neeni hanqetanaw gam7aasa; siiqoynne ammanetethi daridaysa.
86.16: Taako simmada taw qadheta; ne aylliyas wolqa imma; ne gadhinde na7aa tana ashsha.
86.17: Godaw, ne keehatetha malaata tana bessa; ne tana maaddeysanne minthetheysa be7iya wode, ta morketi yeellatana.

87.1: Godaa katamay, geeshsha deriya bolla keexetis.
87.2: Goday Xiyoone pengeta, Yayqoobi de7iya hara bessatape aathidi dosees.
87.3: Neno Xoossaa katamaw, ne gisho malaalsiyabata haysada yaagidi odis. Salaha
87.4: “Tana eriya kawotethata giddofe, taani Raabanne Babiloone mazgabana. Filisxeemey, Xiroosinne Tophey, yan yeletidosona.”
87.5: Xoossay Xiyoones, “Ya derey ha derey Xiyoonen yeletis; Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay iyo minthana” yaagees.
87.6: Goday asaa mazgaben xaafiya wode, “Haysi Xiyoonen yeletis” yaagana. Salaha
87.7: Enti yexishenne durishe, “Nu anjo ubbay Xiyoonepe pultees” yaagana.

88.1: Godaw, tana ashshiya Xoossaw, taani gallas neeko waassayis; qamma ne sinthan yeekayis.
88.2: Ta woosay ne sinthe gako; ne haythay ta waasuwa si7o.
88.3: Ta shempoy meto kallida gisho, ta de7oy duufoko matis.
88.4: Duufo geliya asaara taybetas; wolqi bayna asi gidas.
88.5: Taani ahata giddon yegetida asa mela; hayqidi duufon zin7ida asa mela. Hizape neeni hassayonna asinne neepe duuxida asa mela gidas.
88.6: Neeni tana ciimmon, dhuma ollan yeggadasa.
88.7: Ne hanqoy tana deexees; ne hanquwa beetay tana muukis. Salaha
88.8: Neeni ta dabbota taape haassadasa; enti tana shaatettana mela oothadasa. Tana teqidosona; kessa ekanaw danda7ike.
88.9: Godaw, azzanon ta ayfey teljumis; Ubba gallas taani neeko waassayis; ta kushiya neeko miccas.
88.10: Hayqidaysatas ne malaalsiyaba oothayee? Enti dendidi nena galatonayee? Salaha
88.11: Merinaa ne siiqoy duufon, ne ammanetethay dhayo bessan odetiyee?
88.12: Ne malaalsiya oosoy dhuman, ne xillotethay dogetida biittan eretiyee?
88.13: Godaw, ta neeko waassayis; wonta wonta ta woosay ne sinthe gakees.
88.14: Godaw, ne tana ayis ixay? Ne som7uwa taape ayis genthay?
88.15: Na7atethafe doomada taani un7etas; hayqos matas; ne tana daganthin ufaysi qanxas.
88.16: Ne suulliya hanqoy ta bolla uushis; ne daganthoy tana dhaysis.
88.17: Enti gallas kumethi di7oda tana teqidosona; issife shiiqidi tana oykidosona.
88.18: Ta laggetanne taw mata asata taape haassadasa; taw dabboy dhuma xalaala.

89.1: Godaw, ne siiquwaba taani merinaw yexana; ne ammanetetha yeleta ubbaas awaajana.
89.2: Ne siiqoy merinaw eqidaysanne tumatethaa neeni salon minthada essidaysa odana.
89.3: Neeni, “Ta dooridaysara qaala gelas; Ta aylliya Dawitas haysada yaagada caaqas;
89.4: ‘Taani ne kochaa merinaw kawothana; ne araata yeleta ubban minthana’ ” yaagadasa. Salaha
89.5: Godaw, saloti ne malaalsiya oosuwa awaajo; geeshshata shiiqoy ne ammanetetha odo.
89.6: Salon Godaara liketanaw danda7ey oonee? Salo medhetethata giddon Godaa meli oonee?
89.7: Geeshshata shiiquwan Xoossay yashisees; iya yuushuwan de7iya ubbaafe aadhidi daganthees.
89.8: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw Xoossaw, ne mela wolqaami oonee? Godaw, neeni ubbaban ammanetaasa.
89.9: Neeni guummiya abba wolqaa kiittasa; dendiya zuliya si77i oothaasa.
89.10: Ra7aaba geetetiya do7a mentherethadasa; ne morketa ne wolqaama qesiyan laalladasa.
89.11: Saloynne sa7i nebaa; alamiyanne iyan de7iya ubbaa medhiday nena.
89.12: Pudehanne dugeha ne medhadasa; Taaborenne Armoona zumati, ufaysan ne sunthaa sabboosona.
89.13: New wolqaama qesey de7ees; ne kushey mino; ne ushacha kushey dhoqu gis.
89.14: Xillotethinne suure pirdi ne araatas baaso; siiqoynne tumatethi ne sinthan boosona.
89.15: Godaw, ufaysan ilileysatnne ne som7uwa poo7uwan hemeteysati anjetidaysata.
89.16: Ne sunthan gallas kumethi ufaytoosona; enti ne xillotethaa dhoqu dhoqu oothosona.
89.17: Enti ceeqetiya wolqay nena; ne teeman nu kacey dhoqu dhoqu gis.
89.18: Nu gondalley nu Godaa kushena; nu kawoyka Isra7eele geeshshaa kushena.
89.19: Beni neeni, ne ammanetida asaas qoncethan haysada yaagadasa. “Taani issi olanchuwa maaddas; asaa giddofe dooretidaysa dhoqu dhoqu oothas.
89.20: Ta aylliya Dawita demmas; ta geeshsha zaytiya tiyada iya kawothas.
89.21: Ta kushe iyara daana; ta qesey iya minthana.
89.22: Iya ay morkeyka giirisenna; ay iita asika iya haarenna.
89.23: Iya morketa ta iya sinthan tincherethana; iya ixeyisata shoca yeggana.
89.24: Ta tumatethaynne ta siiqoy iyara gidana; ta sunthan iya kacey dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
89.25: Taani iya kawotethaa Medetiraane Abbaa, iya zawa shaafata gakanaw aassana.
89.26: I tana, ‘Neeni ta aawa, ta Xoossaa; tana ashshiya zaalla’ yaagidi xeegana.
89.27: Taani iya bayra na7a oothana; sa7an de7iya kawota ubbaafe iya gitayana.
89.28: Taani ta siiquwa merinaw iyaw naagana; taani iyara caaqida caaquwa minthana.
89.29: Taani iya kochaa merinaw minthada essana; iya araata saloda gam7isana.”
89.30: “Shin iya kochati ta higgiya aggiko, enti ta wogaada hemetonna ixiko,
89.31: ta awaajuwa shaariko, ta kiita naagonna ixiko,
89.32: taani enta nagaraa gisho xam7an, enta iitatethaa gisho lisson seerana.
89.33: Shin taani ta siiquwa iyape ekike; taani iyaw merinaw ammanetana.
89.34: Taani entara caaqida caaquwa menthike; ta doonape keyida qaala laammike.
89.35: Taani issi toho ta geeshshatethan caaqida gisho, Dawitas wordotike.
89.36: Iya kochay merinaw daana; iya araatay ta sinthan awada gam7ana.
89.37: Salon ammanetiya marka gidida ageenada, iya kawotethay merinaw minnidi daana” yaagadasa. Salaha
89.38: Shin ha77i ne tiyida kawa bolla hanqetadasa; iya ixadasa; aggadasa.
89.39: Ne aylliyara caaqida caaquwa menthadasa; iya kallachaa baanan holada tunisadasa.
89.40: Iya katamaa gimbe dirsa laalladasa; iya miixaa dhaysadasa.
89.41: Ogera aadhiya ubbay iya bonqidosona; I ba shoorotas miichas attis.
89.42: Iya morketas xoono immadasa, enta ubbaa ufaysadasa.
89.43: Iya mashshaa xeeraa qalam7adasa; iya olan maaddabaaka.
89.44: Iya kawota xam7aa iya kushepe ekadasa; iya araata biittan holadasa.
89.45: Iya yalagatetha wodiya qaamisadasa; iya yeella mayzadasa. Salaha
89.46: Godaw, neeni awude gakanaw gam7ay? Neeni merinaw geemmanee? Ne hanqoy tamada awude gakanaw eexanee?
89.47: Ta laythay ay mela qantheko qopa; asa ubbaa coo mela medhadi!
89.48: Hayqope attanaw danda7iya asi de7ii? Duufo gelonna daanaw danda7ey oonee? Salaha
89.49: Godaw, neeni ne tumatethan Dawitas caaqida, ne siiqoy awun de7ii?
89.50: Godaw, ne aylley ay mela boretidaako be7a; asa ubbaa boriya waata danda7idaako hassaya.
89.51: Godaw, ne morketi qelqisidaysa, ne tiyida kawa tangon tangon boreysa be7a.

90.1: Godaw, neeni yeletape yeletaa gakanaw, nuuni de7iya bessi gidadasa.
90.2: Dereti medhetanaape kase, sa7i oosetanaape kase, merinaape merinaa gakanaw ne Xoosse.
90.3: Neeni, “Asa nayto, guye biittako simmite” yaagada, enta medhetida biittako guye zaarasa.
90.4: Mukulu laythi zine aadhida gallasa mela; woyko issi qamma giddon issi saate mela.
90.5: Neeni asaa qoponna di7oda efaasa; enti amuho mela; wonta wonta doliya maata mela.
90.6: Maati wonta diccidi ciyees; omarsiya wode shullidi melees.
90.7: Nuuni ne yiluwan wurida; ne hanquwa suulon dagammida.
90.8: Nu iita oosuwa ne sinthan wothadasa; nu geemmida nagaraa ne som7uwa poo7uwan wothadasa.
90.9: Nu gallasa ubbay ne hanquwan aadhis; nu laytha oolen wursoos.
90.10: Nu de7o laythay laapun tamma; woyko dariko hospun tamma. Hessika metoynne waayey kumidaysa; nu laythay eeson wurees; nuka eeson aadhoos.
90.11: Ne hanquwa wolqaa erey oonee? ne hanquwa suuloy wolqaama.
90.12: Nu laytha maara ogen nu go7etana mela, nuna cincatethi tamaarsa.
90.13: Godaw, ne hanqoy awude gakanaasee? hayyana ne aylletas qadheta.
90.14: Nu laytha ubban nu ufaytanaadanne yexanaada, wonta wonta ne siiquwa nuna kalsa.
90.15: Ne nuna metoothida gallasata keena, nuuni un7etida laythata keena nuna ufaysa.
90.16: Nuus ne aylletas ne oosoy qonco; ne bonchoy enta naytas bento.
90.17: Godaa nu Xoossaa keehatethay nu bolla gido; nu kushe ooso ubba nuus ayfisa; Ee, nu kushe ooso ubbaa ayfisa.

91.1: Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossan naagetidi de7ey, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaa kuyan aqees.
91.2: I Godaa, “Neeni taw miixanne qosetta attiya bessi, neeni tana ammanthiya ta Xoossaa” yaagana.
91.3: I nena shankanchota xihepe, wodhidi ongiya gadope ashshana.
91.4: I ba baalletan nena kammana; iya qefiya garsan neeni qosetada attana; iya ammanetethay new gondallenne kate.
91.5: Neeni qamma daganthiyabas, woyko gallas xongetiya tooras yayyaka.
91.6: Neeni dhuman oykiya harge, woyko gallasa seetan ongiya gado hirgaka.
91.7: Mukulay ne miyen, tammu mukulay ne ushachan kundana; shin nena aybika bochenna.
91.8: Iitati seeretishin, neeni ne ayfe xalaalan be7ana.
91.9: Neeni Godaa new qosetada attiya bessi oothida gishonne, Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa ne de7iya bessi oothida gisho,
91.10: iitabay nena bochenna; gadoy ne keethaako shiiqenna.
91.11: Ne oge ubban nena naagana mela, Xoossay ba kiitanchota kiittana.
91.12: Ne tohoy shuchan dhubetonna mela, kiitanchoti banta kushen nena denthana.
91.13: Neeni gaammonne shoosha bolla hemetana; wodala gaammonne iita shooshaa yedhana.
91.14: Xoossay, “I tana siiqida gisho taani iya ashshana; ta sunthaa eriya gisho taani iya naagana.
91.15: I tana xeegiya wode taani iyaw koyana; meto wode taani iyara gidana; taani iya ashshananne bonchana.
91.16: Taani iya laytha adussana; ta atotetha iya bessaana” yaagees.

92.1: Godaa galatoy lo77o; Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaw, ne suntha saboy lo77o.
92.2: Wonta wonta ne siiquwa odoy, qamma ne ammanetetha awaajoy lo77o.
92.3: Tammu shayan waaxetida diithan maasinqo kaa7ishe nena galatoy lo77o.
92.4: Taani ne oosuwan ufaytida gisho, ne kushe oosuwa gisho nena galatayis.
92.5: Godaw, ne oosoy ay mela gite! Ne qofay ay mela ciimmo!
92.6: Eeya asi eranaw danda7enna; wozani bayna asi akeekanaw danda7enna.
92.7: Iitati maatada diccikoka, iita ootheysati daaykoka, enti merinaw dhayana.
92.8: Shin abeeti Godaw, neeni merinaw ubbaafe dhoqa.
92.9: Abeeti Godaw, tuma ne morketi dhayana; iita oothiya ubbay piski gaana.
92.10: Ta kaciya mentha kaceda dhoqu oothadasa; lo77o zayte ta huuphen tiyadasa.
92.11: Ta morketi xoonetishin ta ayfen be7as; tana un7etheysati waassishin ta haythan si7as.
92.12: Xilloti zambada diccana; Libaanose zigada daayana.
92.13: Enti Godaa keethan toketida mitha mela; enti nu Xoossaa dabaaban daana.
92.14: Enti ceeggidika ayfana; enti irxanne cil7o gididi daana.
92.15: Enti, “Goday suure; I ta zaalla; iyan iitatethi baawa” yaagana.

93.1: Goday kawotis! Xoossay boncho ma7is; wolqa dancis; sa7i minnidi eqis; qaaxenna.
93.2: Ne araatay benipe eqidi de7ees; neeni merinaw de7aasa.
93.3: Godaw, shaafay guummis; haathay ba guuntha dhoqu oothis haatha zuliya girsay si7etis.
93.4: Salon de7iya Goday, daro haatha guunthaafe, abba zuliyape aadhidi wolqaama.
93.5: Abeeti Godaw, ne higgey ammanetidaysa; ne keethay merinaw geeshshatethan alleeqana.

94.1: Godaw, neeni halo keyiya Xoossi; kushe zaariya Xoossaw, ne bonchuwa bessa.
94.2: Abeeti sa7aa pirdiya Xoossaw denda; otoranchotas bessiya seera imma.
94.3: Godaw, awude gakanaw gam7ay? Iitati awude gakanaw ufaytanee?
94.4: Iita ootheysati otoro qaala haasayoosona; enti coo ceeqetoosona.
94.5: Godaw, enti ne asaa liiqisoosona; enti ne laata naaqoosona.
94.6: Am7etanne betanchota wodhoosona; aawi bayna nayta muucosona.
94.7: Enti, “Goday nuna be7enna; Yayqooba Xoossay akeekenna” yaagosona.
94.8: Hinteno, asaa giddofe eeyato, akeekite! hinteno, eeyato hinte cinca gidanay awudee?
94.9: Haythe oothida Xoossay si7ennee? Ayfe medhida Goday be7ennee?
94.10: Kawotethata seeriya Xoossay seerennee? Ase eratethi tamaarsiya i, erennee?
94.11: Goday asa qofi pathonnabaanne hada gideysa erees.
94.12: Abeeti Godaw, neeni seeriya asinne ne higgiya tamaarsiya asi anjetidaysa.
94.13: Iitati kundiya ollay booketana gakanaw, meto gallas neeni iya shempisaasa.
94.14: Xoossay ba asaa yeggenna; I ba laata aggenna.
94.15: Pirdi simmidi xillotetha bolla eqana; wozanaa suureti ubbay xillo pirdaa kaallana.
94.16: Makallanchota bolla ta gisho dendey oonee? Iita ootheysatara ta gisho eqetey oonee?
94.17: Goday tana maaddonnaako, taani eeson duufo gelada attanashin.
94.18: Taani, “Ta tohoy hallixis” gida wode, ne siiqoy tana katisis.
94.19: Ta wozanan un7etethi kumida wode, neeni tana wopu oothada ufaysaasa.
94.20: Higge shaariya geella daynnatara geella asara neeni hashetay?
94.21: Xillota wodhanaw enti tobboosona; suureta bolla hayqo pirdoosona.
94.22: Gidoshin Goday ta miixaa; ta Xoossay taani qosetada attiya zaalla.
94.23: Enta iitatethaa gisho I enta seerana; enta nagaraa gisho I enta dhaysana; Goday nu Xoossay enta dhaysana.

95.1: Haayite; ane Godaa sabboos; nuna ashshiya zaallas ufaysan ililoos.
95.2: Iya sinthe galatara shiiqoos. Galata mazmure ufaysan yexoos.
95.3: Goday wolqaama Xoosse; xoossata ubbaa bolla gita kawo.
95.4: Biitta ciimmoti iya qaaqan de7oosona; deriya xeerati iyabaa.
95.5: I medhida gisho abbay iyabaa; mela biittaa iya kushey oothis.
95.6: Haayite; ane gufannidi iya goyinnoos; nuna medhida Godaa sinthan gulbatoos.
95.7: I nu Xoossaa; nuuni iya qooron de7iya dereta; nuuni I heemmiya iya dorsata. Goday geysa hachi hinte si7iko,
95.8: Kase hinte mayzati Mariban hanidaysada, he gallas Maasan banta wozanaa minthidaysada, hinte, hinte wozanaa minthofite.
95.9: Enti ta malaalsiya oosuwa be7idika, tana paacidosona; taara eqetidosona.
95.10: Taani he yeletaa bolla oytamu laythi shaatettas; “Enti ubba wode banta wozanan baliya asata; enti ta ogiya erokona” yaagas.
95.11: Hessa gisho, “Enti ta shempo bessaa gelokona” yaagada ta hanquwan caaqas.

96.1: Godaas ooratha mazmure yexite; sa7an de7iya asa ubbay Godaas yexite.
96.2: Godaas yexite; iya suntha sabbite; Iya ashuwa gallas gallas odite.
96.3: Kawotethata giddon iya bonchuwa, asa ubbaa giddon iya malaalsiya oosuwa awaajite.
96.4: Goday gita gidiya gisho iyaw gita galatii bessees; xoossata ubbaafe aadhidi yayetanaw bessees.
96.5: Hara kawotethata xoossati ubbay eeqata; shin Goday salota medhida Xoossaa.
96.6: Bonchoynne sabi iya yuushon de7ees; minotethinne puulatethi iya keethan de7ees.
96.7: Biittan de7iya asa zare ubbay Godaaba odite; bonchoynne wolqi Godaaba giite.
96.8: Iya sunthaas bessiya bonchuwa Godaas ehite; Yarsho ekidi iya dabaaba gelite.
96.9: Iya geeshshatetha teemuwan Godaa goyinnite; biittan de7iya asaw ubbay iya sinthan kokorite.
96.10: Kawotethata giddon, “Goday kawotis! Sa7ay minnidi eqis; qaaxenna; I asaa bolla suure pirdana” yaagite.
96.11: Saloti ufayto; sa7ika hashshu go; abbaynne iya giddon de7iya ubbay guummo.
96.12: Goshshaynne iyan de7iya ubbay ufayto! Woran de7iya mitha ubbay ufaysan yexo.
96.13: Goday yaa gisho iya sinthan yexo; I sa7a bolla pirdanaw yees. I ha sa7aa bolla xillotethan, asaa bolla tumatethan pirdana.

97.1: Goday kawotida gisho sa7an de7iya asay ufayto; yuushoy abban teqetida biittati ufayto.
97.2: Shaarinne sakana dhumi iya yuushuwan de7ees; Xillotethinne tumatethi iya araata baaso.
97.3: Tami iya sinthara bees; iya yuushuwan de7iya morketa xuuggees.
97.4: Iya wol7anthay bitta ubbaa poo7isees; biittay hessa be7idi kokorees.
97.5: Dereti Godaa sinthan, sa7aa ubbaa Godaa sinthan muqaadada til7idosona.
97.6: Saloti iya xillotethaa awaajosona; asa ubbay iya bonchuwa be7oosona.
97.7: Eeqata goyinneysatinne entan ceeqeteysati ubbay yeellato; eeqati ubbay Godaas gulbato.
97.8: Abeeti Godaw, Xiyooney ne xillo pirdaa si7idi ufaytees; Yihuda macca naytika hashshu goosona.
97.9: Abeeti Godaw, neeni sa7a ubba bolla dhoqa; xoossata ubbaafe neeni dhoqu gadasa.
97.10: Godaa doseysato, iitaa ixite; iyan ammaneteyisata shempuwa I naagees; iitata kushepe enta ashshees.
97.11: Xillota bolla poo7oy poo7ees; wozana suuretas ufaysi de7ees.
97.12: Hinteno xilloto, Godan ufaytite; iya geeshsha sunthaa galatite.

98.1: Goday malaalsiyaba oothida gisho, iyaw ooratha mazmure yexite. Iya ushacha kushey, iya geeshsha qesey iyaw xoono immis.
98.2: Goday ba xoonuwa erisis; ba xillotethaa kawotethatas qoncisis.
98.3: I Isra7eele asaa siiqeysanne entaw ammaneteysa hassayis. Sa7aa gaxaa gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay nu Xoossaa atotetha be7idosona.
98.4: Sa7a bolla de7iya asaw, Godaas ufaysan yexite; ufaysan ililishe sabbite.
98.5: Godaas diithi diixite; diithaninne mazmuren Godaa sabbite.
98.6: Suusul7enne moyze punnishe, ufaysan Godaa nu kawa sinthan yexite.
98.7: Abbaynne abba giddon kumida ubbay guummo; Sa7aynne sa7aa bolla de7iya ubbay yexo.
98.8: Shaafati banta kushiya baqo; zumati issife Godaa sinthan ufaysan yexo.
98.9: Goday sa7aa bolla pirdanaw yees; I ha sa7aa bolla xillotethan asaa bolla suuretethan pirdana.

99.1: Goday kawotida gisho kawotethati kokoro; araata bolla Kiruubeta giddon uttida gisho; biittay qaaxo.
99.2: Goday Xiyoonen gita; kawotethaa ubbaafe I dhoqu dhoqu gis.
99.3: Yashshiya iya gita sunthaa ubbay galato; I geeshshi.
99.4: Neeni, wolqaama kawoy suure pirda dosaasa. Neeni Yayqooba suuretethan minthadasa. Xillotethi essadasa.
99.5: Godaa, nu Xoossaa dhoqu dhoqu oothite; iya tohoy yedhiya bessan iya goyinnite; I geeshshi.
99.6: Museynne Aaroni iya kahineta giddofe koyrota; Sameeli iya woossidaysatape issuwa. Enti Godaako waassidosona; I enta si7is.
99.7: I shaara tuussaa giddora entaw haasayis; I immida higgiyanne wogaa naagidosona.
99.8: Abeeti Godaw, nu Xoossaw, ne enta woosa si7adasa. Ne entana maaradasa; gidoshin, enta nagara gisho enta seeradasa.
99.9: Goday nu Xoossay, geeshshi gidiya gisho, iya dhoqu dhoqu oothite; iya geeshsha zumaa bolla iya goyinnite.

100.1: Biittan de7iya asa ubbay, Godaas ufaysan ililite.
100.2: Godaas ufaysan haggaazite; ufaysa yethara iya sinthe shiiqite.
100.3: Goday Xoosse gideysa erite; nuna medhiday iya; nu iyabaa; nuuni iya asenne iya qooron heemetiya dorsata.
100.4: Iya pengiya galatara gelite, iya dabaaba sabara biite; iya galatitenne iya sunthaa anjite.
100.5: Goday keeha; iya siiqoy merinaasa; iya ammanetethay yeletape yeletaa gakanaasa.

101.1: Ta ne siiquwabaanne ne xillo pirdaba yexana; Godaw, ta nena mazmuren galatana.
101.2: Taani suure ogiyan daana; neeni taako awude yaanee? Taani ta keethan suuretethan hemetana.
101.3: Taani ta ayfey iitabaa xeellenna; Xoossafe haakida asaa oosuwa ixayis; enti taara gahetokona.
101.4: Wozanaa geellatethi taape haako; iitatethaas besse immike.
101.5: Geeman ba laggiya zigiriya uraa si77i oothana; otortiyanne ceeqetiya asi taani danda7ike.
101.6: Enti taara daana mela, biitta bolla de7iya ammanetiya asata Taani keeha ayfen xeellayis; suuretethan hemetiya asi taw kiitetees.
101.7: Cimmiya asi ta keethan deenna; wordo haasaya asi ta sinthan eqenna.
101.8: Biittan de7iya iita asaa, taani gallas gallas si77i oothana. Iitaa ootheyisata ubbaa taani Godaa katamaape shoddana.

102.1: Godaw, ta woosa si7a; ta waasoy neeko gako.
102.2: Ta waayiya gallas ne som7uwa taape genthofa; ne haytha taako zaara; taani neeko waassiya wode, tana eeson alla.
102.3: Ta laythay cuyada dhayees; ta meqethay tamada eexees.
102.4: Ta wozanay buucidi yeggida maatada melis; kathika taw meetetenna.
102.5: Taani ta qaala dhoqu oothada oolida gisho; ta gogay meqethaara oyketis.
102.6: Taani woran de7iya solo mela, kaysa keethan de7iya gutto mela.
102.7: Taani zin7in dhiskoy yeenna; taani keetha huuphen barka uttida kafo gidas.
102.8: Ta morketi gallas kumethi tana cayoosona; tana qelqiseysati ta sunthan baaddoosona.
102.9: Bidoy taw kathi gidis; ta afuthay ta ushshara Walaketis.
102.10: Hessi haniday ne hanqoynne ne yiloy, tana denthadi wora holida gishosa.
102.11: Ta laythay omarsa kuya mela ellesidi aadhees; taani maatada shullayis.
102.12: Shin Godaw, neeni ne araatan merinaw uttadasa; ne sunthay yeletaape yeletaa gakanaw hassayetana.
102.13: Neeni iyo maariya wodey gakida gisho; dendada Xiyoones qadheta; neeni doorida wodey gakis.
102.14: I shuchati ne oosanchotas al7o; I biittayka enta qadhethees.
102.15: Kawotethati Godaa sunthaas yayyana; sa7aa kawoti iya bonchuwas dagammana.
102.16: Goday Xiyoone zaaridi keexana; ba gitatetha bessana.
102.17: I manqota woosa si7ana; enta oysha kadhenna.
102.18: Buroo yeletana asay Godaa galatana mela, haysi yaa yeletas xaafeto.
102.19: Goday dhoqan de7iya ba geeshsha bessaafe xeellis; salon gididi sa7aa xomoosees.
102.20: Hessika qashetida asaa waasuwa si7anawunne hayqo pirdetida asaa birshanaasa.
102.21: Hessa gisho, Godaa sunthay Xiyoonen odetana; iya galatay Yerusalaamen awaajettana.
102.22: Dereynne kawotethay shiiqidi, Godaas he wode goyinnana.
102.23: Taani na7atethan de7ishin, ta wolqaa ixisis; ta laytha qaamisis.
102.24: Taani, “Ta Xoossaw, ta laytha giddo zawan tana dhukofa” yaagayis. Godaw, neeni yeletape yeletaa gakanaw de7aasa.
102.25: Neeni beni sa7aa medhadasa; saloyka ne kushe ooso.
102.26: Haysati ubbay dhayana; shin neeni daana; enti ubbay afilada wurana. Neeni enta curqa afilada laammana; entika aadhana.
102.27: Shin neeni nena; ne laythay wurenna.
102.28: Ne aylleta nayta neeni saro wothaasa; enta kochay ne sinthan minnidi daana.

103.1: Ta shempe Godaa galata! Ta kumetha asatethaw, iya geeshsha suntha galata.
103.2: Ta shempe Godaa galata! I new oothida keehatetha ubbaa dogopa.
103.3: I ne nagaraa ubbaa atto gees; ne harge ubbaafe nena pathees.
103.4: I nena hayqope ashshees; siiqoninne maarotan nena anjees.
103.5: Ne yalagatethay arganthada ooraxana mela, ne de7uwa lo77oban kalsees.
103.7: I ba ogiya Muse, ba oosuwa Isra7eele asaa erisis.
103.8: Goday qadheteysanne maareysa; hanqetanaw eesotenna; iya siiqoy daro.
103.9: I ubba wode seerenna; merinaw hanqetenna.
103.10: I nuus nu nagaraada oothenna; nu iitatethaa mela zaarenna.
103.11: Saloy sa7ape dhoqeysada, Godaa yayyeysatas iya siiqoy gita.
103.12: Dolohape wulohi haakeysada, Goday nu nagara nuupe haassees.
103.13: Aawi ba naytas qadheteysada, Goday baw yayyeysatas qadhetees.
103.14: Nuuni aybipe medhetidaako I erees; nuuni biitta gideysa I akeekes.
103.15: Asi baw maata mela; I bazzo ciishshada ciyees.
103.16: Carkoy iya bolla carkiya wode dhayees; I dolida bessay zaaridi eretenna.
103.17: Shin Godaas yayyeysatas iya siiqoy merinaape merinaa gakanaasa; iya xillotethay na7a na7a gakanaasa.
103.18: Hessi haney iya caaquwa naageysatanne iya kiitaa polanaw minneysatasa.
103.19: Goday salotan ba araata essis; iya kawotethay ubbaa haarees.
103.20: Hinteno, iya kiitanchato, iya kiita naagiya wolqaamato, I odiyaba si7eysato, Godaa galatite!
103.21: Hinteno salon de7iya minoto, iya sheniya poleysato, Godaa galatite!
103.22: Hinteno, I haariya bessa ubban, de7iya medhetethato, Godaa galatite! Ta shempe Godaa galata!

104.1: Ta shempe, Godaa galata; abeeti Godaw, ta Xoossaw ne gita; neeni bonchonne teema ma7adasa.
104.2: Poo7o afilada guuluntadasa; neeni saluwa dunkaaneda toladasa.
104.3: Ne keethaa salo bolla keexaasa; shaara para gaare kessaasa; carko qefe bolla uttada baasa.
104.4: Carkoy new kiitancho, tama laco new oosancho oothaasa.
104.5: Ne, sa7aa iya baasuwa bolla essadasa; hessa gisho, merinaw qaaxenna.
104.6: Ciimmo abbay afilada biitta kammis; haathay gita dereta kammis.
104.7: Ne hanqetin haathati baqatidosona; ne deshuwa si7ida wode qosetidosona.
104.8: Enti dereta bollanne zangaarata giddo, ne entaw giigisida bessaa goggidosona.
104.9: Haathati simmidi biitta kammonnaada, enti aadhanaw danda7onna zawa wothadasa.
104.10: Neeni, pultoti zangaaran gogganaada oothadasa; shaafa haathati dereta giddora goggoosona.
104.11: Bazzo do7ati ubbay iyape uyoosona; bazzo hareti iyape saamo aloosona.
104.12: Salo kafoti he haatha matan banta keethaa keexidi, tashiya giddon yexoosona.
104.13: Ne gita dereta bolla salope ira buksaasa; iya kushe ooso ayfen biittiya kallasu.
104.14: Neeni mehes maata, asas kathi dolisaasa; hessan asay biitta oothidi, kathi shiishees.
104.15: Asa wozana ufaysiya woyne, som7o cil7isiya zaytenne wolqa immiya kathi dolisaasa.
104.16: Godaa mithati, I tokida Libaanose zigati, daro ira demmoosona.
104.17: Kafoti banta keetha yan keexoosona; xiloti xiidda bolla keexidi de7oosona.
104.18: Dhoqa dereta bolla gaarati de7oosona; gupalleti shucha qophon qosetoosona.
104.19: Wode taybuwa erisana mela, ne ageena medhadasa; away ba wulliya wodiya erees.
104.20: Neeni dhumaa medhadasa; qamma oothadasa; he dhuman wora do7i ubbay keyees.
104.21: Wodala gaammoti shankatishe gudoosona; enti bantaw miyaba Xoossafe koyoosona.
104.22: Awi doliya wode guye simmoosona; banta bessaa gelidi zin7oosona.
104.23: He wode asi ba oosos keyees; sa7i qammana gakanaw oothees.
104.24: Abeeti Godaw, ne oosoy ay mela daro; ne cincatethan ne enta ubbaa medhadasa; sa7i ne medhidaban kumis.
104.25: Heko, Abbay gitanne dalga; tayboy bayna qaaxiya medhetethan, gitatanne guutha medhetethan kumidi de7ees.
104.26: Iya bolla markabeti boosona; ne medhida Leewataane geetetiya dawey iyan kaa7ees.
104.27: Ne entaw koshshiya wodiyan miyaba immana mela, enti ubbay nena xeelloosona.
104.28: Ne entaw immin enti maxoosona; neeni ne kushiya miccin, enti lo77oba kalloosona.
104.29: Neeni ne som7uwa genthiya wode dagammoosona; neeni shempuwa ekiya wode hayqidi, banta biitta simmoosona.
104.30: Shin neeni ne shempuwa immiya wode, enti medhetoosona; biitta ooraxisaasa.
104.31: Godaa bonchoy merinaw de7o; Goday ba oosuwan ufayto.
104.32: I biitta xeelliya wode biittay qaaxees; I dereta bochiya wode dereti cuyoosona.
104.33: Ta de7o laytha ubban Godaas yexana; ta paxa de7iya wode ubban ta Xoossaa zammarana.
104.34: Taani Godan ufaytiya gisho, ta qofay iya ufayso.
104.35: Nagaranchoti biittafe dhayo; iita ootheysati de7opo. Ta shempe, Godaa galata; Goday galatetto.

105.1: Godaa galatite; iya suntha xeegite; I oothidaba kawotethatas odite.
105.2: Iya sabbite; galata mazmure yexite; malaalsiya iya ooso ubbaa odite.
105.3: Iya geeshsha sunthan ceeqite; Godaa koyeyisata wozanay ufayto.
105.4: Godaanne iya wolqan ammanetite; ubba wode iya koyite.
105.5: -6 Hinteno, iya aylliya Abrahaame zareto, dooretida Yayqooba nayto, I oothida malaalsiyabata, iya malaatanne suure pirdaa hassayite.
105.7: I Godaa, nu Xoossaa; iya pirday biitta ubbaa bollana.
105.8: I ba caaquwa merinaw, ba gelida qaala mukulu yeleta gakanaw naagees.
105.9: I Abrahaamera caaqida ufaysa qaala, Yisaaqas gelida ufaysa qaala,
105.10: Yayqoobas woga, Isra7eeles merinaa caaquwa oothidi minthis.
105.11: I, “Kanaane biitta new immana; I ne kochaa gakida laata gidana” yaagis.
105.12: Xoossa asati taybon guuthanne Kanaane biittan bete asi gididi de7iya wode,
105.13: Issi deriyape hara deriya, issi kawotethaafe hara kawotethi yuuyidosona.
105.14: Xoossay oonika enta un7ethana mela oothibeenna; enta gisho kawota seeris.
105.15: “Ta tiyidaysata bochofite; ta nabeta qohopite” yaagis.
105.16: Goday biittan kosha yeddidi, enta kathaa ubbaa dhaysis.
105.17: Shin I ba asaa ashshanaw, issi addiya Gibxe kiittis; he uray aylle gididi bayzetida Yoosefa.
105.18: Iya tohoti biratan duxetidosona; I santhalaatan qashetis.
105.19: I kase odidaysi tumattana gakanaw, Godaa qaalay iya paacis.
105.20: Hessafe guye Gibxe kawoy ase yeddidi, iya qasho keethafe kessis.
105.21: Iya ba keethaa bolla godaa oothis; baw de7iya ubbaa bolla shuumis.
105.22: Ba moorinnata zorana mela, ba cimata cincatethi tamaarsana mela shuumis.
105.23: Isra7eeley Gibxe bis; Yayqoobi Kaama biittan uttis.
105.24: Goday ba asaa darsis; enta morketape aathidi enta minthis.
105.25: Ba asaa ixana mela Gibxe asaa wozanaa laammis; ba aylleta cimmana mela oothis.
105.26: Ba aylliya Musenne ba doorida Aarona entako kiittis.
105.27: Enti Gibxe asaa sinthan malaata, Kaama biittan malaalsiyaba oothidosona.
105.28: Goday dhumaa kiittidi, biitta dhumisis; shin Gibxe asay iya kiita polibookona.
105.29: Enta haatha suuthi laammidi, molota wodhis.
105.30: Enta biitta ubbaa, kawo gadhoka shodhe kunthis.
105.31: I kiittin, udunxenne biinne enta biitta ubbaa bolla biinney wodhis.
105.32: Ira gisho enta biitta bolla shachi, dadanne wol7anthi bukisis.
105.33: I enta woyniyanne balasiya shocis; enta biittan de7iya mithaa mentherethis.
105.34: I kiittin, booleynne tayboy bayna duggoy keyis.
105.35: Enta biittan dolida katha ubbaa mis; gaden de7iya cil7oba ubbaa dhaysis.
105.36: Goday Gibxe asaa bayra nayta ubbaa wodhis; koyro yeletida ubbaa dhaysis.
105.37: Hessafe guye, Isra7eele asaa worqanne bira alleeqora kessis; enta kochaa giddofe guye attiday oonika baawa.
105.38: Gibxe asay entaw yayyida gisho, enta kessan ufaytidosona.
105.39: Goday enta kammanaw shaara miccis; qamma entaw poo7isanaw tama giigisis.
105.40: Enti miyaba oychida wode, kuraacho daaniya kafota entaw yeddis; enta salo kathi kalsis.
105.41: I shuchaa phalqin, haathi pultis; mela biittan shaafada goggis.
105.42: I ba aylliya Abrahaames, gelida geeshsha qaala hassayis.
105.43: I ba asaa ufaysan, ba dooridaysata ililsan kessis.
105.44: I entaw allaga kawotethata biitta immis; Harati daaburida goshsha laattidosona.
105.45: I hessa oothiday enti iya wogaa iya higgiya naagananne oothana melasa. Goday galatetto!

106.1: Godaa galatite! I keeha gidiya gishonne iya siiqoy merinaasa gidiya gisho, Godaa galatite.
106.2: Goday oothida wolqaama ooso odanaw, woyko iya galataa ubbaa qoncisanaw danda7ey oonee?
106.3: Pirdaa naageysatinne ubba toho xillobaa ootheysati anjetidaasaata.
106.4: Abeeti Godaw, neeni ne asaas keehiya wode tana qopa; enta neeni ashshiya wode tana alla.
106.5: Hessika ne doorida asaa dichaa ta be7ana mela, ne asaa ufaysan taani ufaytana melanne ne asaara issife taani galatana melasa.
106.6: Nuuni nu aawatada nagara oothida; nu balida; iitabaa oothida.
106.7: Nu aawati Gibxen de7iya wode, malaalsiya ne oosuwa qopibookona. Ne siiquwa darotethaa enti hassaybookona; Zo7o abba matan iya bolla makallidosona.
106.8: Gidoshin, I ba sunthaa gisho, ba gita wolqaa erisanaw enta ashshis.
106.9: I Zo7o abba kiittin, abbay melis; mela biittara kanthidi aadhiyada, ciimmo giddora enta kaalethidi pinthis.
106.10: I enta ixeyisata kushepe ashshis; morketa kushepe enta wozis.
106.11: Enta morketa haathay mittis; entafe issoyka attibeenna.
106.12: He wode enti iya ufaysa qaala ammanidosona; iya mazmuren sabboosona.
106.13: Gidoshin, enti I oothidaba dogidosona; I zoriya ogiya naagidi baanaw dosibookona.
106.14: Mela biittan de7ishe daro amotidosona; mela biittan Xoossaa paacidosona.
106.15: Enti woossidaysa I immis; shin iita harge enta giddo kiittis.
106.16: Mela biittan dunkaanen de7ishe Musenne Godaas dummatida Aarona qanaatidosona.
106.17: Biittay dooyetidi Daatane mittis; Abeero iya keetha asaara moogis.
106.18: Enta maabara giddon tami eexis; lacoy he iita asata xuuggis.
106.19: Koreeba zuman worqafe mara misile medhidosona; he misiliya goyinnidosona.
106.20: Enti, banta boncho Xoossa maata miya mehe misilen laammidosona.
106.21: Enti Gibxen gita ooso oothidanne entana ashshida Xoossaa dogidosona.
106.22: Kaama biittan oosetida malaalsiyabanne Zo7o Abban hanida malaata oothidaasaa.
106.23: Hessa gisho, Xoossay enta dhaysana gis; shin dhaysonna mela iya hanqo zaaranaw, Xoossay doorida Musey giddon eqis.
106.24: Hessafe guye, enti iya qaala ammanonna gisho, he lo77o biitta kadhidosona.
106.25: Enti banta dunkaaniya giddon zuuzumidosona Godaa qaalas kiitetibookona.
106.26: Hessa gisho, I enta bazzon yegganaw, ba kushiya denthidi caaqis.
106.27: Enta kochaa kawotethata giddon, yegganawunne biitta bolla laallanaw caaqis.
106.28: Hessafe guye, enti Bi7eel-Fagoora eeqa goyinneysatara issife gahetidosona; shempoy bayna eeqatas yarshetida yarshuwa midosona.
106.29: Banta oosuwan Godaa hanqethidosona; hessa gaason enta giddon iita hargey wodhis.
106.30: Shin Pinihaasi dendidi, enta nagaraa pirdin, iita hargey enta bollafe kichis.
106.31: Hessika, iyaw, yeletethaafe yeletethaa gakanaw merinaw xillotetha gididi taybetis.
106.32: Mariba pultuwa matan Godaa hanqethidosona; enta gaason Muse bolla metoy gakis.
106.33: Enti iya yiloyidosona; Muse doonape bessonna qaalay keyis.
106.34: Goday dhaysite gin, enti Kanaane asata dhaysibookona.
106.35: He palabaape, enti he asatara walaketidosona; enta de7o woga kaallidosona.
106.36: Xoossa asati enta eeqa goyinnidosona; hessi entaw xihe gidis.
106.37: Enti banta addenne macca nayta tuna ayyaanatas yarshidosona.
106.38: Enti xillo suuthu Kanaane eeqatas yarshidi, banta addenne macca nayta suutha gussidosona; he suuthan biittay tunis.
106.39: Hessada enti banta ooson tunidosona; banta hanotan banta layma kessidosona.
106.40: Hessa gisho, Godaa hanqoy iya asaa bolla eexis; I ba laata shaatetis.
106.41: I enta allaga kushen aathidi immis; enta morketi enta haaridosona.
106.42: Enta morketi enta un7ethidosona banta shenen enta aysidosona.
106.43: I enta daro wode ashshis; shin enti banta makalla aggonna ixidosona; banta nagaraa gaason dhayidosona.
106.44: Gidoshin, I enta waasuwa si7is; enta waayiya qopis.
106.45: I enta gisho, ba ufaysa qaala hassayis; ba siiquwa daruwan enta maaris.
106.46: Enta di77ida ubbay, entaw qadhetana mela oothis.
106.47: Nuuni ne geeshsha sunthaa galatana mela Abeeti Godaw, nu Xoossaw, nuna ashsha. Ne bonchuwan nu ceeqetana mela, kawotethata giddofe nuna shiisha.
106.48: Isra7eele Goday, Xoossay, merinaape merinaa gakanaw galatetto! Asa ubbay, “Amin7i” yaago. Godaa galatite!

107.1: I keeha gidiya gishonne iya siiqoy merinaasa gidiya gisho; Godaa galatite
107.2: Goday ashshidaysati, morke kushepe kessi ekidaysati haysada yaagidi odeto.
107.3: Enti Dolohapenne wulohape, pudehapenne dugehape biitta ubbaafe shiiqidaysata.
107.4: Entafe issoti issoti mela biittan yuuyidosona. Banta de7iya katamaa biya ogiya demmanaw danda7ibookona.
107.6: Enti metootida wode, Godaako waassidosona; I enta waayiyape enta ashshis.
107.7: Enti daana katama gakanaw, enta suure ogen kaalethis.
107.8: Merina iya siiquwa gishonne I entaw oothida malaalsiya oosuwa gisho enti Godaa galato.
107.9: I saamotidaysata alisees; koshatidaysata lo77oba kalsees.
107.10: Issoti issoti sakana dhuman uttidosona; birata santhalaatan waayidosona.
107.11: Hessi haniday enti Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa, kiita bolla makallida gishonne iya zoriya kadhida gishosa.
107.12: I enta waaye ooson daaburisis; enta maaddiya asi dhayin kundidosona;
107.13: Enti metootida wode, Godaako waassidosona; I enta waayiyape enta ashshis.
107.14: I enta sakana dhumape kessis; enti qashetida santhalaata duuthis.
107.15: Iya siiquwa gishonne I entaw oothida malaalsiya oosuwa gisho enti Godaa galato.
107.16: I naase birata pengeta menthis; birata kasota qanxis.
107.17: Issoti issoti eeya gididosona; banta oothida nagara gaason banta iitatetha gaason metootidosona.
107.18: Enti kathi ixida gisho hayqos gakidosona.
107.19: Enti metootida wode, Godaako waassidosona; I enta waayiyape enta ashshis.
107.20: I ba qaala kiittidi enta pathis; duufope enta ashshis.
107.21: Iya siiquwa gishonne I entaw oothida malaalsiya oosuwa gisho enti Godaa galato.
107.22: Enti iyaw galata yarsho shiisho; ufaysa yethan iya oosuwa odo.
107.23: Issoti issoti markaben abba bollara bidosona; abba bolla banta oosuwa oothidosona.
107.24: Enti Godaa oosuwa be7idosona; ciimmo abban oothida malaalsiyaba xeellidosona.
107.25: I kiitida wode gotey dendis; abba zuley qaaxis.
107.26: Enti pude dendidosona; duge ciimmon wodhidosona; iita metoy gakin enta wozanay til7is.
107.27: Enti mathotida asada dhubetidi gandigaridosona; enta eray maayis.
107.28: Enti metootida wode, Godaako waassidosona; I enta waayiyape enta ashshis.
107.29: I gotiya si77i oothis; abba beeta sirphi oothis.
107.30: Si77i gida gisho ufaytidosona; enti koyida katamaa Goday gathis.
107.31: Iya siiquwa gishonne I entaw oothida malaalsiya oosuwa gisho enti Godaa galato.
107.32: Deriya shiiquwan iya gitatetha awaajo; cimata duulatan iya galato.
107.33: Goday shaafata melisis; pultoti goggonnaada teqis.
107.34: He bessan de7iya asaa iitatethaa gisho, aradda biitta quu7e kessis.
107.35: I mela biittan haathe eelisis; mela biittan pultoy dhuuqanaada oothis.
107.36: Koshatida asaa he bessan wothis; bantaw daana katamaa yan keexidosona.
107.37: Enti banta goshshan zeridosona; woyne tokidosona; daro muruuto shiishidosona.
107.38: I enta anjin enti daridosona; enta mehiya taybuwa guuthibeenna.
107.39: Enti xoonetiya wodenne un7etiya wode, metoninne azzanon kawuyiya wode,
107.40: Goday enta halaqata kawushis; mela biittan toylatana mela oothis.
107.41: Shin manqota metope kessis; enta soo asaa dorsa wudeda darsis.
107.42: Suure asay hessa be7idi ufaytoosona; shin iita asay yeellatidi si77i goosona.
107.43: Cincati haysa ubbaa akeeko; Godaa siiquwa qopo.

108.1: Ta wozanay minnidi de7ees; abeeti Xoossaw, ta wozanay minnidi de7ees. Ta new yexana; nena sabbana.
108.2: Ta shempe, barka; diithinne maasinqoy denda; Ta wonta guura dendana.
108.3: Abeeti Godaw, ta nena asaa giddon galatana; kawotethaa giddon nena sabbana.
108.4: Ne merinaa siiqoy salope dhoqa; ne ammanetethay shaarape dhoqa.
108.5: Abeeti Xoossaw, salope bollara ne dhoqu dhoqu ga; ne bonchoy sa7a ubbaa bolla gido.
108.6: Ne doseysati attana mela, ne ushacha kushen nuna ashsha; neeni ta woosa si7a.
108.7: Xoossay ba geeshsha bessan haysada yaagis; “Ta xoonada Seekema shaakana; Sukota zangaara gishana.
108.8: Galadinne Minaasey tabaa; Efreemi ta huuphen wothiya uke; Yihudi ta kawota xam7aa.
108.9: Moo7abey ta meecetiya gabate; Edoomey tabaa gideysa erisanaw ta caammaa iya bolla wothana. Filisxeeme xoonada gereerana” yaagis.
108.10: Godaw, gimbetida katamaako, tana efanay oonee? Edoome gakanaw tana kaalethanay oonee?
108.11: Abeeti Xoossaw, nuna aggiday nena gidikii? Abeeti Xoossaw, ne nu tooranchotara olas keyaka.
108.12: Asa maadoy pathenna gisho, morkiya olanaw ne nuna maadda.
108.13: Xoossaa wolqan nu morketa xoonana; nu morketa kawushanay iya.

109.1: Abeeti ta nena galatiya Xoossaw, ne taw si77i goopa.
109.2: Iita asatinne wordanchoti, banta doona ta bolla dooyidosona; banta wordo inxarsan ta bolla haasayoosona.
109.3: Ixon ta yuushuwa teqidosona; gaasoy bayna tana olidosona.
109.4: Ta enta dosaysinne entaw woossayis; gidoshin, enti tana mootosona.
109.5: Ta lo77o oothin, taw iita zaarosona; ta enta dosin, enti tana ixoosona.
109.6: Ta morkiya bolla iita daynna shuuma; mootanchoy iya ushachan eqo.
109.7: Iya pilgiya wode I bala gididi bento; iya woosay iyaw gome gido.
109.8: Iya laythay qaammo; iya shuumatetha hari eko.
109.9: Iya nayti yi7o gido; iya machiya am7o gido.
109.10: Iya nayti woosancho gididi toylato; banta de7iya humpa keethaafe goodeto.
109.11: Iya shalo ubbaa acoy oyko; I daaburidi kessidaba ubba allagi bonqo.
109.12: Oonika iyaw keehopo; iya naytas qadhetiya asi bentofo.
109.13: Iya nayti ubbay hayqidi wuro; kaalliya yeletethan iya sunthay dogeto.
109.14: Iya aawata nagaray Godaa sinthan qofeto; iya aaye nagaray qushetofo.
109.15: Goday enta nagara ubba wode qopo; enti sa7a bolla hassayetofo.
109.16: I keeha oothanaw polo qopibeenna; manqota, metootanchota, qohetidaysata gooddidi wodhis.
109.17: I baaddanaw dosida gisho, I baadetidaysa gido. I anjanaw dosonna gisho, iya anjoy iyape haakis.
109.18: Baadethi iya afilada ma7is; iya baadethi haathada iya bolla laakisis; zayteda iya meqethaa giddo gelo.
109.19: Afilada iya kammo; dancoda ubba wode iya xeessan de7o.
109.20: Ha tana mooteysanne ta bolla iita odeteyisata Goday hessada oothidi seero.
109.21: Shin abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, ne suntha gisho tana maadda. Ne merinaa siiquwanne ne keehatetha gisho tana ashsha.
109.22: Taani manqonne metootancho asi; ta wozanay madunxis.
109.23: Ta omarsa kuyada dhayana hanayis; ta booleda qoqofetas.
109.24: Xooman ta gulbatay daaburis; ta asatethay laafin meqethi attis.
109.25: Tana mooteysatas qelqisethas attas; tana be7idi, banta huuphiya qaathosona.
109.26: Abeeti Godaw ta Xoossaw, tana maadda; merinaa ne siiquwada tana ashsha.
109.27: Ne kushey haysa oothidaysanne, ne haysa oothidaysa ta morketi ero.
109.28: Enti tana baaddoosona, shin ne tana anjana; tana gooddeysati yeellato; shin ne tana ufaysa.
109.29: Tana mooteysati yeella ma7o; banta kawushaa afilada ma7o.
109.30: Taani ta inxarsan Godaa galatana; deriya shiiquwan iya sabbana.
109.31: I manqota gisho mootetees; hayqos pirdetidaysata ashshees.

110.1: Goday ta godaa, “Ta ne morketa ne tohoy yedhiya bessi oothana gakanaw, haysan taape ushacha baggan utta” yaagis.
110.2: Godaw ne minotetha xam7a Xiyoonepe yedda; “Ne morketa haara” yaagana.
110.3: Ne haariya gallas ne derey dosidi new haaretana; ne geeshsha ma7uwa ma7ada, wonta xalqeda ne kumetha wolqan phoolana.
110.4: Goday, “Malkexaadeqi kahine gididaysada, ne merinaw kahine gidana” yaagidi caaqis; iya caaqoy laametenna.
110.5: Goday ne ushachan de7ees; ba hanquwa gallas kawota tincherethana.
110.6: I kawotethata bolla pirdana; ola denbata aha xalaala oothana; biitta ubban de7iya kawota dhaysana.
110.7: Kawoy oge lanqen de7iya pultuwafe uyidi, I ba huuphiya dhoqu oothana.

111.1: Godaa galatite; Suureta shiiqon ta kumetha wozanan Godaa galatana.
111.2: Godaa oosoti ay mela gite! Entan ufaytiya ubbay enta qopees.
111.3: Iya oosoti bonchoninne teeman kumis; iya xillotethay merinaw de7ees.
111.4: Iya malaalsiya oosoy hassayetishe daanada oothis; I keehanne qadhetiya Godaa.
111.5: Baw yayyeysatas kathi immees; ba caaqo qaala merinaw baletenna.
111.6: Allagata biitta ba asaas aathidi immidi, ba gita wolqaa ba asaa bessis.
111.7: Iya kushe oosoti tumanne suure; iya woga ubbay ammanetidaysa.
111.8: Enti merinaw eqidi de7oosona; tumatethaninne suuretethan imetidosona.
111.9: I ba asaa wozis; caaqo entara merinaw essis; iya sunthay geeshshinne yashsheysa.
111.10: Cincatethas koyroy Godaas yashshi; iya wogaa naageysatas lo77o akeeki de7ees. Goday merinaw galatetto!

112.1: Godaa galatite; Godaas yayeysinne iya kiita naageysi anjetidaysa.
112.2: Iya nayti biittan wolqaama gidana; suure asaa yeletay anjetana.
112.3: Shaloynne duretethi iya keethan de7ees; iya xillotethay merinaw daana.
112.4: Keeha, xillonne qadhetiya asas, dhuma giddon poo7oy poo7ees.
112.5: Keehatethan coo tal7iya uraas, ba oosuwa suuretethan oothiya uraas keehabay yaana.
112.6: Xillo asi awudeka kundenna; I merinaw hassayetana.
112.7: Iya wozanay hirgonna gishonne I Godan ammanetiya gisho, iitabaa si7ikoka I dagammenna;
112.8: Iya wozanay mino gidiya gisho yayyenna; wursethan iya morketi xoonetin be7ana.
112.9: I manquwas darsidi immees; iya xillotethay merinaw de7ees; iya kacey bonchon dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
112.10: Iita asi hessa be7idi yilotees; mettershe saxishe coo dhayees; iita asa amoy coo attana.

113.1: Godaa galatite; hinteno, Godaa aylleto, Godaa sunthaa galatite.
113.2: Godaa sunthay, hachife merinaa gakanaw galatetto.
113.3: Away doliyasuwape wulliyasuwa gakanaw, Godaa sunthay galatetto.
113.4: Goday kawotetha ubbaa haarees; iya bonchoy saluwape dhoqa.
113.5: Godaa nu Xoossaa meli oonee? I bolla dhoqan ba araatan uttis.
113.6: I salotanne sa7aa be7anaw duge hokees.
113.7: I manquwa baanape dhoqu oothees; metootanchuwa bidope denthees.
113.8: Moorinnatara lagge oothees; halaqatara dhoqa bessan utisees.
113.9: Mayntha maccasiw nayta aayo oothidi, ufaysidi I keethan iyo bonchisees. Godaa galatite!

114.1: Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida wode, Yayqooba sheeshay allaga qaalan, haasaya asaa aggidi bida wode,
114.2: Yihuda asay Godaas geeshsha asi gidis; Isra7eele asay iyaw haaretis.
114.3: Abbay hessa be7idi baqatis; Yordaanose shaafay guye simmis.
114.4: Dereti deeshada gupidosona; zumati dorsa marada dozgidosona.
114.5: Abbaw, ne ayis baqatadii? Yordaanose, ne ayis guye simmadii?
114.6: Dereto, deeshada ayis gupidetii? zumato, dorsada ayis dozgidetii?
114.7: Neno biittaw, Godaa sinthan, Yayqooba Xoossaa sinthan kokora.
114.8: I zaalla eele haathi kessees; mino zaalla haatha pulto oothees.

115.1: Abeeti Godaw, nu gisho gidonashin, ne siiquwanne ne ammanetetha gisho, ne sunthaa boncha.
115.3: Nu Xoossay salon de7ees; ba dosidaba ubbaa oothees.
115.4: Shin enta eeqati ase kushen oosetidosona; enti birapenne worqafe medhetidosona.
115.5: Entaw dooni de7ees, shin haasayokona; ayfey de7ees, shin xeellokona.
115.6: Entaw haythi de7ees, shin si7okona; siidhey de7ees, shin singokona.
115.7: Entaw kushey de7ees, shin bochi erokona; tohoy de7ees, shin hemetokona; enta siixinathara kooshinchi keyenna.
115.8: Enta medheysatinne enta ammaneteysati enta mela gido.
115.9: Isra7eele asaw, Godan ammanetite; hintena maaddeynne hinte gondalley iya.
115.10: Aarona keetha asaw, Godan ammanetite; hintena maaddeynne hinte gondalley iya.
115.11: Godaas yayyeysato, Godan ammanetite; hintena maaddeynne hinte gondalley iya.
115.12: Goday nuna qopees; I nuna anjana; I Isra7eele asaa anjana; I Aarona keetha asaa anjana.
115.14: Goday hintena darso; hintenanne hinte nayta anjo.
115.15: Saluwanne sa7aa medhida Goday hintena anjo.
115.16: Saloy Xoossaba; shin sa7a asas immis.
115.17: Hayqidaysati Godaa galatokonna; duufon zin7idaysati iya sabbokona.
115.18: Shin nuuni, de7on de7eysati, hachife merinaa gakanaw, Godaa galatoos. Godaa galatite.

116.1: Goday ta waasuwanne ta woosa si7ida gisho, taani iya dosayis.
116.2: I ba haytha taako zaarida gisho, ta de7o laytha ubban iya xeegana.
116.3: Hayqoy xiheda tana teqis; duufo hirgay tana oykis; un7inne metoy tana qachis.
116.4: He wode, “Abeeti Godaw, tana ashsha” yaagada Godaa suntha xeegas.
116.5: Goday keehanne xillo; nu Xoossay qadhetees.
116.6: Goday ashketa naagees; ta metootida wode tana ashshis.
116.7: Goday new keeha gidiya gisho, hiza ta shempe, wopu ga.
116.8: Goday ta shempuwa hayqope, ta ayfiya afuthafe, ta tohuwa dhubepe ashshis.
116.9: Taani de7on de7eyisata giddon, Godaa sinthan hemetayis.
116.10: Taani, “Daro waayetas” gida wode, ta ammanuwa aggabike.
116.11: Taw sa7i haddirida wode, “Asi ubbay wordancho” yaagas.
116.12: I taw keehida keehatetha gisho Godaas ay qanxanaw danda7iyana?
116.13: Goday tana ashshida gisho galatana, xuu7a woyne ushsha yarsho oothada shiishana.
116.14: Iya asaa ubbaa sinthan ta qangetha Godaas gathana.
116.15: Geeshshata hayqoy Godaa sinthan, daro al7o.
116.16: Abeeti Godaw, taani ne aylle; taani ne aylle, ne gadhinde na7aa; tana qashope ne birshadasa.
116.17: Godaw, ta galata yarsho new yarshana; ne sunthaa xeegana.
116.18: Asa ubbaa sinthan ta qangetha Godaas gathana.
116.19: Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethaa dabaaban, ta qangetha gathana. Godaa galatite.

117.1: Kawotethati ubbay Godaa galatite; asa ubbay iya sabbite.
117.2: Iya siiqoy nuus mino; iya ammanetethay merinaasa. Godaa galatite.

118.1: Goday keeha gidiya gisho galatite; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
118.3: Aarona keetha asay, “Iya siiqoy merinaasa” yaago.
118.4: Godaas yayiya ubbay, “Iya siiqoy merinaasa” yaago.
118.5: Ta un7etida wode Godaako waassas; I ta waasuwa si7idi tana la77a kessis.
118.6: Goday taara de7iya gisho ta yayyike; asi tana ay oothanee?
118.7: Goday tana maaddanaw taara de7ees; ta morketa xoonetethaa ta be7ana.
118.8: Asan ammanetanape Godan geemmidi atteysi lo77o.
118.9: Gita asan ammanetanape Godan geemmidi atteysi lo77o.
118.10: Kawotethati ubbay tana teqidi oykidosona; shin Godaa sunthan ta enta xoonas.
118.11: Enti ta yuushuwa teqidosona; shin Godaa sunthan ta enta xoonas.
118.12: Enti ta yuushuwa mathada teqidosona; Shin buurey taman eexeysada eexidi dhayidosona; Godaa sunthan ta enta dhaysas.
118.13: Taani sugetada kundanaw gakas; shin Goday tana maaddis.
118.14: Goday ta minotethaanne yethaa; I tana ashsheysa gidis.
118.15: Xillota dunkaaniyan ola xoonidi, simmiya asaa ufaysas giyaba si7ite; Godaa ushacha kushey gitaba oothis.
118.16: Godaa ushacha kushey xoono immis; Godaa ushacha kushey gitaba oothis.
118.17: Taani hayqike; de7on daana; Goday oothidaba awaajana.
118.18: Goday tana iita seera seeris; shin hayqos aathidi immibeenna.
118.19: Taani gido gelada Godaa galatana mela, xillotetha pengeta taw dooyite.
118.20: Haysi Godaa penge; xilloti iyara geloosona.
118.21: Godaw, ne tana si7ida gishonne taw xoono immida gisho ta nena galatayis.
118.22: Gimbeysati kadhidi yeggida shuchay, godaa xaphuwa minthiya shuchu gidis.
118.23: Haysi Godaa ooso; nu ayfiyas malaalsiyaba.
118.24: Haysi gallasay Goday oothida gallas; ane nuuni iyan ufaytoosinne ililoos.
118.25: Godaw, ha77i nuna ashsha; Godaw, ha77i nuus injeya.
118.26: Godaa sunthan yaa asi anjetidaysa gido; nuuni Xoossa keethaafe hintena anjoos.
118.27: Goday Xoossaa; I nu bolla poo7isis; yarsho bessan de7iya kaciyako keyite; irxa tashe oykidi ba7aale bonchite.
118.28: Neeni ta Xoossaa; ta nena galatana; neeni ta Xoossaa; ta nena sabbana.
118.29: Goday keeha gidiya gisho iya galatite; iya siiqoy merinaasa.

119.1: Banta ogiyan borey baynaysatinne Godaa wogaada hemeteysati anjetidaysata.
119.2: Iya kiitaa naageysatinne banta kumetha wozanan iya koyeysati anjetidaysata.
119.3: Enti bala oothidi erokona; Godaa ogiyan hemetoosona.
119.4: Ne kiita ammanetidi naagana mela, neeni nuna kiittadasa.
119.5: Ne wogaa naagada ta ogey minnana mela koyayis.
119.6: Ne kiita ubbaa akeekada, ta polo yeellatike.
119.7: Ne xillo pirdaa ta tamaarida wode, ta nena suure wozanan galatana.
119.8: Ta ne higgiya naagana; tana polo yeggofa. Beet
119.9: Yalagay ba ogiya waatidi, geeshshatethan naaganaw danda7ii? Ne qaala kiitetiko danda7ees.
119.10: Ta kumetha wozanan nena koyas; ne kiitaape kare keyonnaada tana naaga.
119.11: Taani ne bolla nagara oothonna mela ne qaala ta wozanan qosas.
119.12: Abeeti Godaw, ne galateta; ne awaajuwa tana tamaarsa.
119.13: Ne doonape keyiya pirda ubbaa taani ta inxarsan odana.
119.14: Duretethan ufayteysafe aathada, ta ne higgiyan ufaytayis.
119.15: Ne wogata zaara zaarada qopayis ne ogiya loythada akeekayis.
119.16: Taani ne higgiyan ufaytayis; ne qaala dogike. Gaamel
119.17: Taani de7on daana melanne ne qaala kiitetana mela taw ne aylliyas lo77oba ootha.
119.18: Ne higgiyan de7iya malaalsiya tumatethaa ta be7ana mela ta ayfiya dooya.
119.19: Taani ha sa7an imathe; ne kiita taape genthofa.
119.20: Ta shempiya ubba wode ne pirdaa laamotashe hayqasu.
119.21: Otoreyisata, baadetidaysatanne, ne kiitaape kare keyeyisata ne seerasa.
119.22: Taani neeni odidaysa oothida gisho, enta cashshaanne boriya ta bollafe digga.
119.23: Hari attoshin halaqati shiiqidi, ta bolla maqetikoka, taani, ne oosanchoy, ne awaajuwa zaara zaarada qopana.
119.24: Ne markatethay tana ufaysees; I tana zorees. Daalet
119.25: Taani hayqana hanayis; ne gida qaalada tana ashsha.
119.26: Taani ta ogiyaba new odin, ne tana si7adasa; hiza ne awaajuwa tana tamaarsa.
119.27: Ne wogaa tana akeekisa; malaalsiya oosuwa taani zaara zaarada qopana.
119.28: Azzanoy darida gisho ta shempoy daaburis; neeni gida qaalada tana minthetha.
119.29: Wordo oge taape haassa; ne keehatethan ne higgiya tana tamaarsa.
119.30: Taani tuma oge dooras; ne pirdaa hayzas.
119.31: Abeeti Godaw, ta ne higgiya minthada oykas; hiza tana yeellayopa!
119.32: Ta wozanaa la77a kessida gisho, taani ne higgiya ogiyan woxayis. He
119.33: Abeeti Godaw, ne awaajuwa birshethaa tana tamaarsa; taani wursethi gakanaw iya naagana.
119.34: Taani ne higgiya naagana malanne ta kumetha wozanaape iyaw kittaatan mela, ne taw akeeka imma.
119.35: Taani iyan ufaytiya gisho, ne kiita ogiyan tana kaaletha;
119.36: Ta wozanaa amuwako gidonashin, ne higgiyako tana zaara.
119.37: Pathonnaba xeellonna mela, ta ayfeta teqa; ne ogiyan ta de7uwa ooraxisa.
119.38: New yayyana mela, ne gelida qaala, taw ne aylliyas, pola.
119.39: Tana yashshiya cashsha taape digga; ne pirday ay mela lo77o!
119.40: Taani ne wogaa naaganaw amottayis; neeni xillo gidiya gisho, ta de7uwa ooraxisa. Waw
119.41: Abeeti Godaw, ne siiquwa tana bessa; neeni gelida qaalada tana ashsha.
119.42: Taani ne qaalan ammanetiya gisho, tana cayeyisata zaaranaw danda7ayis.
119.43: Taani ne pirda ufaysi oothida gisho, ta inxarsaafe tumatethaa qaala dhaysofa.
119.44: Taani merii merinaw ne higgiya kiitetana.
119.45: Taani ne woga poliya gisho, aahon hemetana.
119.46: Taani kawota sinthan eqada, neeni gidaba odashe yeellatike.
119.47: Taani ne kiitata dosayis, entan ufaytayis.
119.48: Taani dosiya ne kiita bonchayis; ne awaajuwa zaara zaarada qopana. Zaw
119.49: Neeni taw, ne aylliyas, immida qaala qopa; ne qaalan taani ufaysi oothayis.
119.50: Ne qaalay tana de7on wothees; I meto wode tana minthethees.
119.51: Otoranchoti tana likefe aathidi cayoosona; shin taani ne higgiyafe sher7i giike.
119.52: Abeeti Godaw, benipe de7iya ne pirda taani hassayayis; hessan taani minettayis.
119.53: Iitati ne higgiya kiitetonaysa be7in, tana yiloy wodhis.
119.54: Taani de7iya allaga biittan ne awaajoy taw yethi gidis.
119.55: Abeeti Godaw, taani qamma ne suntha qopayis; ne higgiya naagayis.
119.56: Ta Ne woga naagana; I taw ooso gidis. Heet
119.57: Abeeti Godaw, ta saamay nena; ta ne higgiya naaganaw qanxas.
119.58: Ta kumetha wozanan nena woossayis; ne gelida qaalada taw qadheta.
119.59: Taani ta ogiya akeeka xeellada, ne higgiya kaallanaw simmas.
119.60: Taani ne kiita naaganaw, eesotanaape attishin, gam7ike.
119.61: Iitati taw xihe yeggikoka, taani ne higgiya dogike.
119.62: Ne xillo pirda gisho, nena galatanaw, taani gidi bilahe dendayis.
119.63: Taani new yayyeyisata ubbaasinne ne wogaa naageysata dabbo.
119.64: Abeeti Godaw, sa7i ne siiquwan kumis; ne awaajuwa tana tamaarsa. Xeet
119.65: Abeeti Godaw, ne gelida qaalada taw ne aylliyas keehaba oothadasa.
119.66: Taani ne kiitatan ammanetiya gisho, lo77o pirdanne eratethi tana tamaarsa.
119.67: Taani seeretanaape kase kare hemetas; shin ha77i ne qaalas kiitetayis.
119.68: Neeni keeha; neeni keehaba oothaasa; ne awaajuwa tana tamaarsa.
119.69: Otoranchoti ta sunthaa wordon iissoosona; shin ta ne wogaa ta kumetha wozanan naagana.
119.70: Enta wozanay kumthi doccis; shin taani ne higgiyan ufaytayis.
119.71: Ne higgiya tamaarana mela ne tana seeridaysi taw lo77o gidis.
119.72: Daro worqafenne birape, ne doonape keyiya higgey taw aadhees. Yood
119.73: Tana ne kushey medhis; ne kushey giigisis; ne kiita tamaarana mela taw akeeka imma.
119.74: Taani ne qaalan ufaysi oothida gisho, nena boncheysati tana be7idi ufayto.
119.75: Abeeti Godaw, ne pirday xillo gideysa eras; ne tana seeriday ammanetethan gideysa ta akeekas.
119.76: Taw ne aylliyas gida qaalada, ne siiqoy tana minthetho.
119.77: Ne higgey tana ufaysiya gisho, taani de7on daana mela taw qadheta.
119.78: Otoranchoti tana wordon mootiya gisho yeellato; taani ne wogaa zaara zaarada qopayis.
119.79: New yayyeysatinne ne markatethaa ereysati taako yo.
119.80: Ta yeellatonna mela, ta wozanay ne higgiyan borey baynaysa gido. Kaaf
119.81: Neeni tana ashshana mela, taani naagashe daaburas; taani ne qaalan ufaysi oothayis.
119.82: Neeni gida qaalay poletin be7anaw naagishin ta ayfey teljumis. “Ne tana awude minthethane” yaagas.
119.83: Cuyan kaqetida ogoroda gundas; gidoshin ne awaajuwa balabiike.
119.84: Taani ne aylley awude gakanaw naago? Tana yedetheyisata ne awude pirdanee?
119.85: Ne higgiya naagonna otoranchoti tana oykanaw olla bookosona.
119.86: Ne kiita ubbay ammantheyisata; gaasoy bayna asay tana yedethiya gisho tana maadda.
119.87: Enti tana wodhi diggidi aggidosona; shin ta ne wogaa aggabike.
119.88: Ne siiquwan ta de7uwa naaga; ta ne kiitaa naagana. Laamed
119.89: Abeeti Godaw, ne qaalay merinaasa; I salon minnidi de7ees.
119.90: Yeletape yeletaa gakanaw ne ammanetaasa; ne ha sa7aa minthada essadasa; ika minnidi de7ees.
119.91: Ubbay ne aylle gidiya gisho, hachi gakanaw ubbay ne kiittada minnidi de7ees;
119.92: Ne higgey tana ufaysonnaba gidiyako, ta waayan ta dhayanashin.
119.93: Taani ne wogaa kumethi dogike; neeni iyan tana de7on wothadasa.
119.94: Taani nebaa gidiya gisho tana ashsha; taani ne wogaa naaganaw koyayis.
119.95: Iitati tana dhaysanaw zugidi naagoosona; shin taani neena qopayis.
119.96: Polo geetetidaba ubbaas zawi de7eysa ta be7as; shin polo gidida higgiyas zawi baawa. Meem
119.97: Taani ne higgiya waanada dosiyana! kumetha gallas taani iya qopayis.
119.98: Ne kiitay ubba wode taara de7iya gisho, ta morketape aathidi tana akeeka kessoosona.
119.99: Taani nee higgiya qopiya gisho, ta astamaaretape aadhida cincatethi taw de7ees.
119.100: Taani ne wogaa kiitetiya gisho, cimatape aathada akeekayis.
119.101: Taani ne qaala kiitetanaw koyiya gisho, ta tohuwa iita oge ubbaafe naagas.
119.102: Neeni tana tamaarsida gisho, ta ne higgiyafe gaxa keyike.
119.103: Ne qaalay waanidi mal7i! ililo eessafe aadhidi mal7ees.
119.104: Ne wogaape akeeka demmas; hessa gisho, geella oge ubbaa ixas. Non
119.105: Ne qaalay ta tohuwas xompe, ta ogiyas poo7o.
119.106: Ne xillo pirdada daanaw, ta caaqida caaquwa minthana.
119.107: Abeeti Godaw, ta waayey daro; ne ufaysa qaalada tana de7on wotha.
119.108: Abeeti Godaw, ta galataa yarshuwa eka; tana ne pirdaa tamaarsa.
119.109: Ta shempoy ubba wode meton de7ees; shin taani ne higgiya dogike.
119.110: Iitati taw gite yeggidosona; shin taani ne wogaape kare keyabike.
119.111: Ne higgey taw merinaa shalo; I ta wozanaas ufaysi immees.
119.112: Ta hayqana gakanaw ne awaajuwada oothanaw qofa qachas. Samket
119.113: Taani nam7u qofi de7iya asaa ixayis; shin ne higgiya dosayis.
119.114: Ne taw gondallenne qosetada attiya besse taani ne qaalan ufaysi oothayis.
119.115: Taani ta Xoossaa kiita naagana mela, hinteno, iita oothiya ubbay taape haakite.
119.116: Taani de7on daana mela ne ufaysa qaalada tana minthetha; ta ufaysaa dhumisopa.
119.117: Ta saro daana mela tana zempisa; ta ubba wode ne awaajuwa si7ana.
119.118: Ne awaajuwafe haakeyisata ne koyaka; enta cimoy hada.
119.119: Iitata ubbaa ne pitoda taybaasa; hessa gisho, taani ne kiitaa dosayis.
119.120: Ta asatethay yashshan new kokorees; ta ne higgiya daro yayyayis. Ee
119.121: Ta suurenne xillo oothas; tana ta morketas aathada immofa.
119.122: Tana ne aylliya maaddanaw caaqa; tana otoranchoti un7ethana mela oothofa.
119.123: Ne tana ashshana gada ta xeellishin, ne xillo qaala ta naagishin, ta ayfey teljumis.
119.124: Taw ne aylliyas, ne siiquwada ootha; ne higgiya tana tamaarsa.
119.125: Tana ne aylliya ne siiquwa bessa; ne wogaa erana mela taw akeeka imma.
119.126: Abeeti Godaw, asay ne higgiya menthida gisho, ne pirdana wodey ha77i gakis.
119.127: Taani ne kiita worqafe aathada dosay; ee, walahi bayna worqafe aathada dosayis.
119.128: Hessa gisho, ta ne wogata ubbaa kaallayis; geella oge ubbaa ixas. Pe
119.129: Ne woga ubbay malaalsiyaba; hessa gisho, ta iya kiitetayis.
119.130: Ne qaala birshethay poo7o immees; cincatethi pacidaysatas akeeka immees.
119.131: Taani ne kiitaa saamotada, ta doona dooyas.
119.132: Haa taako simma; nena doseysatas ne ootheysada taw qadheta.
119.133: Ne ufaysa qaalada ta hemethaa suurisa; nagari tana haarana mela oothofa.
119.134: Ta ne wogaa kiitetana mela tana un7etheyisata kushepe woza.
119.135: Ne aylliya ta bolla ne som7uwa poo7isa; ne higgiya tamaarsa.
119.136: Asay ne higgiya menthida gisho, ta afuthay haathada goggees. Xaade
119.137: Abeeti Godaw, ne xillo; ne pirday suure.
119.138: Ne higgey xillo; ay wodeka ammanetees.
119.139: Ta morketi ne qaala toochida gisho, ta mishay tamada eexidi keyis.
119.140: Ne ufaysa qaalay daro ammanetees; ta ne aylley daro dosayis.
119.141: Taani pathonnanne kadhetida asi; gidoshin ta ne wogaa dogike.
119.142: Ne xillotethay merinaw de7ees; ne higgey tuma.
119.143: Metoynne un7i tana gakis; shin ne kiitati tana ufaysoosona.
119.144: Ne wogay merinaw xillo; ta de7on daana mela taw akeeka imma. Qoof
119.145: Abeeti Godaw, ta kumetha wozanaape neeko waassas; tana alla; Ta ne awaajuwa naagana.
119.146: Ta neeko waassas; tana ashsha; ta ne higgiya naagana.
119.147: Xalqey caaronna wonta dendada, tana maadda gada neeko waassayis; ne gelida qaalan ufaysi wothayis.
119.148: Ne qaalaba zaara zaara qopanaw, qamma utta aqayis.
119.149: Abeeti Godaw, ne siiquwa gisho, tana si7a; ne xillo pirdada tana de7on wotha.
119.150: Tana yedethiya iitati tako matoosona; shin enti ne higgiyafe haakoosona.
119.151: Shin abeeti Godaw, ne taw matan de7aasa; ne kiita ubbay tuma.
119.152: Taani benipe doomada, ne higgiya tamaaras; ne iya merinaw minthada essadasa. Rees
119.153: Ta ne higgiya dogonna gisho, ta metuwa be7ada tana ashsha;
119.154: Ta gisho mootetada tana woza; ne ufaysa qaalada tana de7on wotha.
119.155: Ne higgiya enti ekonna gisho, iitati atotethi demmokona.
119.156: Abeeti Godaw, ne qadhey daro; ne xillo pirdada tana de7on wotha.
119.157: Tana ixeysatinne yedetheysati daro; shin ta ne higgiyafe gaxa keyike.
119.158: Enti ne kiita naagonna gisho, ta nena kaddeyisata be7ada shaatettas.
119.159: Abeeti Godaw, ta ne wogaa doseysa be7a; ne siiquwada tana de7on wotha.
119.160: Ne qaalay tuma; ne xillo pirday merinaw de7ees. Saan
119.161: Halaqati tana coo yedethoosona; shin ta wozanay ne qaala yayyees.
119.162: Darobaa di77ida asi ufayteysada, ne ufaysa qaalan ta ufaytayis.
119.163: Taani wordo ixayis; shaatettayis; shin ne higgiya dosayis.
119.164: Ne xillo pirdaa gisho, ta nena gallas laapun toho galatayis.
119.165: Ne higgiya doseysatas polo sarotethi de7ees; enta aybika dhubethanaw danda7enna.
119.166: Abeeti Godaw, ta ne atotetha ufaysan naagayis; ne kiita kaallayis.
119.167: Taani ne higgiya naagayis; ta kumetha wozanaape dosayis.
119.168: Ta oge ubbaa ne be7iya gisho, taani ne higgiyanne ne wogaa naagana; Taw
119.169: Abeeti Godaw, ta waasoy ne sinthe gako; ne ufaysa qaalada taw akeeka imma.
119.170: Ta woosay ne sinthe gako; ne ufaysa qaalada tana ashsha.
119.171: Neeni ne awaajuwa tana tamaarsiya gisho, ta doonape galati pultana.
119.172: Ne kiita ubbay xillo gidiya gisho, ta inxarsay ne qaalaba yexana.
119.173: Taani ne wogaa doorida gisho, ne kushey tana maaddanaw giigidaysa gido.
119.174: Abeeti Godaw, ne ashshana mela ta laamotayis; ne higgey tana ufaysees.
119.175: Taani nena galatana mela, tana de7on wotha; ne pirday tana maaddo.
119.176: Taani dhayida dorsada toylatas; tana ne aylliya koya; ta ne kiita dogike.

120.1: Meto wode taani Godaa xeegin I taw koyis.
120.2: Godaw, wordo doonapenne cimmiya inxarsafe tana ashsha.
120.3: Hinteno, wordanchoto, Goday hintena waatiko lo77o? I hintena waatidi seeriko lo77o?
120.4: I hintena leefetida ola tooran caddana; xiifa bonqon hintena xuuggana.
120.5: Ta Mosahan de7iya gishonne Qedaare dunkaanen uttida gisho tana ayye!
120.6: Sarotethi ixiya asaara taani daro wode de7as.
120.7: Taani saro asi; shin ta sarotethaba haasaya wode, enti olaba haasayoosona.

121.1: Taw maadoy awupe yaane gada, taani deretako xeellas.
121.2: Taw maadoy salonne sa7aa medhida Godaape yees.
121.3: I ne tohuwa harchisenna; nena naageysi dhiskenna.
121.5: Goday nena naageysa; ne ushachan gididi, new kuya gidana.
121.6: Gallas awi nena meenna; qamma ageeni nena qohenna.
