121.7: Goday qohiyaba ubbaafe nena naagana; I nena saro wothana.
121.8: Goday ne kessaane ne geluwa, hachife merinaw naagana.

122.1: Enti tana, “Ane Xoossa keethi boos” yaagin, tana ufaysis.
122.2: Yerusalaame, nuuni ne pengetara gelidi eqida.
122.3: Yerusalaamey danthetada minna keexetida lo77o katama.
122.4: Godaa kiitaa maaran Isra7eele zareti, Godaa galatanaw he katamaa yoosona.
122.5: Dawita kochaafe kawotida ubbay, banta asaas pirdanaw yan uttoosona.
122.6: Yerusalaame sarotethaas haysada yaagidi woossite; “Nena dosiya ubbay anjeto.
122.7: Ne gimbeta giddon saroy gido; ne kawo keethan wopatethi de7o” yaagite.
122.8: Ta ishatanne ta dabbota gisho, “Ne giddon saroy de7o” yaagana.
122.9: Godaa nu Xoossaa keethaa gisho, new lo77oba amottayis.

123.1: Salon, ne araata bolla uttidayso, taani pude neeko xeellayis.
123.2: Adde aylley ba godaa kushe xeelleysada, macca aylliya ba godate kushe be7eysada, neeni nuna maarana gakanaw, nu ayfey Godaako, nu Xoossaako xeellees.
123.3: Nuus kadhey darida gisho, nuna maara; abeeti Godaw, nuna maara.
123.4: Nuuni otoranchota cashshaanne saaphota kadhiya kallida.

124.1: Goday nuura gidonaako, nu waananee? Isra7eeley haysada yaagidi zaaro;
124.2: “Goday nuura gidonnaako, nu bolla asay dendida wode,
124.3: enta hanqoy nu bolla suullin, nuna paxa mittanashin.
124.4: Di7oy nuna efanashin; shaafa haathay nuna mittanashin.
124.6: Nuna nu morketa achas aathidi immiboona Goday galatetto.
124.7: Kafoy shanka gitepe kessi ekeysada, nuuni kessi ekida; xihey meqis, nuuni kessi ekida.
124.8: Salonne sa7aa medhida, Godaa sunthan nuus maadoy yees.

125.1: Godan ammaneteysati qaaxanaw danda7onna, merinaw de7iya Xiyoone zuma mela.
125.2: Dereti Yerusalaame yuushon de7eysada, hachife merinaa gakanaw, Goday ba asaa yuushon de7ees.
125.3: Xilloti banta kushiya iitabas denthonna mela iitata ayso xam7ay xillota biittan gam7enna.
125.4: Abeeti Godaw, keeha asatasinne wozana suure asatas lo77oba ootha.
125.5: Shin neeni iita asata seeriya wode, ne ogiya aggida asaaka seera. Isra7eeles saroy gido.

126.1: Goday di7ope zaaridi nuna Xiyoone ehida wode nuus amuho daanis.
126.2: Nu doonay miichan, nu inxarsay ufaysa yethan kumis. He wode kawotethati banta giddon, “Goday entaw gitaba oothis” yaagidosona.
126.3: Tuma Goday nuus gitaba oothis; nuka daro ufaytida.
126.4: Godaw, Negebe mela biittan ira bukisada, shaafa zaarada kuntheysada, nu duussa ooratha.
126.6: Zerethi tookidi yeekishe bidaysati, ufaysa yethe yexishe, mirqe tookidi simmana.

127.1: Goday keethe keexona ixiko, keexeysati coo daaburoosona. Goday katamaa naagonna ixiko, naageysati coo daaburoosona.
127.2: Duussas koshshiyaba demmanaw, wonta guura dendoy, omarsi daro qamisidi geloy hada. Goday ba doseysatas shempo immees.
127.3: Nayti Godaa imota; yeloti tuma woyto.
127.4: Issi asi na7atethan yelida adde nayti, olancho kushen de7iya toora mela.
127.5: Iya korojoti ha yiishshatan kumida asi anjetidaysa; I ba morketara katama pengen, mootetiya wode shatimmenna.

128.1: Godaas yayyeysatinne iya ogiyan hemeteysati ubbay anjetidaysata.
128.2: Neeni ne daabura ayfe maana; ufaytananne duretana.
128.3: Ne machiya ne son ayfe duurkukida woyne mela gidana. Ne nayti ne gayta yuushon shamaho aaca mela gidana.
128.4: Godaas yayiya asi tuma hessada anjetana.
128.5: Goday nena Xiyoonepe anjo! Neeni de7ida laytha ubban Yerusalaame lo77otetha nena besso!
128.6: Ne nayta nayta be7a! Isra7eeles saroy gido!

129.1: Isra7eeley haysada yaago; “Ta na7atethafe doomidi, ta morketi tana un7ethidosona.
129.2: Ee, enti ta na7atethafe doomidi, tana un7ethidosona; shin enti tana xoonibookona.
129.3: Ta zokuwa xurqafen shocidi, goshsha gade daanisidosona.”
129.4: Shin Goday xillo gidiya gisho iitata wodoruwa duuserethi yeggis.
129.5: Xiyoone ixiya ubbay yeellatidi guye simmo.
129.6: Keetha huuphen dolida, dicconna melida maata mela gido.
129.7: He maata buucanaw kushen dankey woyko mirqanaw oykey baawa.
129.8: Ogera aadheysati, “Goday wolqa immo” gin, cakeysati “Godi anjo” giyabay deenna.

130.1: Godaw, taani meto ciimmon de7ashe, neeko waassayis.
130.2: Godaw, ta waasuwa si7a; ta woosa ne haythay hayzo.
130.3: Xoossaw, nu nagaraa ne xaafa oykidaako, Godaw, ooni pirdafe attanaw danda7ii?
130.4: Shin nuuni new yayyana mela, nu nagaraa atto yaagasa.
130.5: Taani Godaa laamotan naagayis; ta shempiya laamotan naagawusu; taani iya qaalan ufaysi wothayis.
130.6: Sa7i awude wontane gidi, naagiya wotaadarepe aathada, taani Godaa laamotan naagayis.
130.7: Iya siiqoy merinaasa gidiya gishonne iyan kumetha atotethi de7iya gisho Isra7eele, Godan ufaysi ootha;
130.8: Goday Isra7eele, iya nagaraa ubbaafe ashshana.

131.1: Godaw, ta wozanay otortenna; ta ayfeyka otoron xeellenna. Ta qofan gitatana gada koyabike; gahetonnaba ekana gada zaaturabike.
131.2: Dhanthi duuxida na7i ba aaye ki7on si77i geysada ta si77i gas. Wayetho agida na7ada, ta shempoy ta gaathan wopu gis.
131.3: Isra7eele, hachife merinaa gakanaw Godan ufaysi ootha.

132.1: Godaw, Dawitanne I danda7ida metuwa ubbaa qopa.
132.2: Godaas I caaqidaysa, wolqaama gidida Yayqooba Xoossaas, I odidaysa hassaya.
132.3: -5 Godaas besse giigisana gakanaw, Wolqaama gidida Yayqooba Xoossaas, keethe keexana gakanaw, ta soo gelike; ta hiixan zin7ike. Ta ayfey qilim7enna, woyko tana dhiskoy ekenna.
132.6: Nuuni Taabotiyabaa Efraatan si7ida; Yi7aarime biittan iya demmida.
132.7: “Ane I de7iya bessaa boos; iya tohoy yedhiya bessan iya goyinnoos.”
132.8: Godaw, denda! Ne minotethaa malla gidida ne Taabotiyara ne keethaa gela.
132.9: Ne kahineti xillotethi ma7o; ne asay ufaysan yexo.
132.10: Ne aylliya Dawita gisho, neeni tiyida kawa aggofa.
132.11: Goday Dawitas laametonna caaqo haysada yaagidi caaqis; “Ne gulbatape keyida, ne naytape issuwa ne araatan utisana.
132.12: Ne nayti ta caaquwanne ta tamaarsiya timirtiya naagiko, enta nayti ne araatan merinaw uttana” yaagis.
132.13: Goday Xiyoone dooris; baw de7iya bessi oothanaw amotidi, haysada yaagis;
132.14: “Haysi ta merinaw de7iya besse; taani amotida gisho haysan daana.
132.15: Taani daro kathi immada Xiyoone anjana; iyan de7iya manqotaka kathi kalsana.
132.16: Iyan de7iya kahineta atotethi mayzana; iyan de7iya xilloti ufaysan yexana.
132.17: He bessan Dawita zeriyape kawo kessana; taani tiyida kawa kawotethan gam7isana.
132.18: Taani iya morketa yeella mayzana; shin iya huuphen de7iya kallachay phoolana” yaagas.

133.1: Ishati issifethan de7eysi, waani lo77i waani ufaysi!
133.2: Hessi huuphen tigin, buuchaara goggiya, Aarona buuchaara goggidi iya hashiya gakiya al7o zayte mela.
133.3: Hessi Armoona zumaape Xiyoone Dereta gakanaw wodhiya aka mela. Goday yan anjuwanne, de7uwa merinaw immis.

134.1: Hinteno, Godaa aylleto, Godaa keethan qamma ootheysato, ubbay yidi Godaa galatite.
134.2: Xoossa keethan hinte kushiya miccidi, Godaa galatite.
134.3: Saluwanne sa7aa medhida Goday hintena Xiyoonepe anjo.

135.1: Godaa galatite! Hinteno, Godaa aylleto, Godaa sunthaa galatite!
135.2: Hinteno, Godaa keethan, nu Xoossa keethaa dabaaban eqeysato, Godaa galatite!
135.3: I keeha gidiya gisho Godaa galatite! I lo77o gidiya gisho iya sunthaa sabbite!
135.4: Goday Yayqooba babaa, Isra7eele baw buzo oothidi dooris.
135.5: Goday gita gideysanne nu Goday, xoossata ubbaafe aadheysa taani erayis.
135.6: Salon sa7an, abbaninne iya giddon Goday ba dosidaba ubbaa oothees.
135.7: Shaara sa7aa gaxape denthees; wol7anthi irara kiittees; carko ba minja keethaafe kessees.
135.8: Gibxe biittan asape mehe gakanaw, bayra yeletida ubbaa wodhis.
135.9: Neno Gibxe, Paaronanne iya aylleta ubbaa seeranaw malaatatanne malaalsiyabata kiittis.
135.10: I daro kawotethata dhaysis; wolqaama kawota wodhis.
135.11: Amoore kawa Sihoona Baasane kawa Oogenne Kanaane kawota ubbaa wodhis.
135.12: Enta biitta ba asaa, Isra7eele laatisis.
135.13: Godaw, ne sunthay merinaw daana; yeletaape yeleta gakanaw ne hassayetana.
135.14: Goday ba asaas pirdana; I ba aylletas qadhetana.
135.15: Kawotethata eeqati asa kushe oosota; birapenne worqafe medhetidaysata.
135.16: Entaw dooni de7ees, shin haasayokona; ayfey de7ees, shin xeellokona.
135.17: Haythi de7ees, shin si7okona; enta siidhen shempoy baawa.
135.18: Enta medhidaysatinne entan ammaneteysati ubbay entada hano.
135.19: Isra7eele asaw Godaa galatite; Aarona soo asaw Godaa galatite.
135.20: Leewe soo asaw Godaa galatite; Godaa yayyeysato ubbay Godaa galatite.
135.21: Yerusalaamen de7iya Goday Xiyoonen galatetto! Godaa galatite!

136.1: Godaa galatite! I keeha; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.2: Xoossata Xoossaa galatite! Iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.3: Godata Godaa galatite! Iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.4: Iya xalaali gita malaalsiyaba oothees; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.5: Ba cincatethan salota medhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.6: Haatha bolla biitta miccis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.7: Gita poo7ota medhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.8: Awi gallas haarana mela oothis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.9: Ageeninne xoolintoti qamma haarana mela oothis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.10: Gibxe biittan bayrata wodhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.11: Isra7eele asaa Gibxefe kaalethidi kessis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.12: Ba mino kushiyan, ba wolqaama qesiyan haysa oothis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.13: Zo7o Abbaa shaakis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.14: Isra7eele asaa he abba giddora pinthis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.15: Gibxe kawanne iya olanchota Zo7o Abban muukisis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.16: I ba asaa mela biittara kaalethis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.17: Gita kawota shocis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.18: Wolqaama kawota wodhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.19: Amoore kawa Sihoona wodhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.20: Baasane kawa Ooge wodhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.21: Enta biitta ba asaa laatisis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.22: Ba aylliya Isra7eele laatisis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.23: Nu kawuyida wode nuna qopis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.24: Nuna nu morketape ashshis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.25: Medhetetha ubbaas kathi immees; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
136.26: Salo Xoossaa galatite! iya siiqoy merinaasa.

137.1: Babiloone shaafata matan uttidi, Xiyoone qopida wode yeekida.
137.2: He bessan nuuni nu diithaa haatha gaxan dicciya, mithata bolla kaqida.
137.3: Nuna di77ida asati nuuni yexidi, enta ufaysana mela “Xiyoone yethatape issuwa ane nuus yexite” yaagidosona.
137.4: Godaa yethaa nuuni allaga biittan waati yexanee?
137.5: Yerusalaame taani nena dogiko, ta ushacha kushey tana balo.
137.6: Taani nena hassayonna aggiko, ta gita ufaysi gidida Yerusalaame dosonna ixiko, ta inxarsay kottonuwara oyketo.
137.7: Godaw, Yerusalaame di7etiya gallas Edoome asay oothidaysa hassaya; Enti, “Laallite! Laallite! Hirki xaphuwa gakanaw laallite!” yaagidaysa dogopa.
137.8: Babiloone, neeni dhayana! Neeni nu bolla oothida iita oosuwas halo kesseysi anjetidaysa.
137.9: Ne guutha nayta oykidi, zaalla bolla shoceysi anjetidaysa.

138.1: Godaw, ta kumetha wozanan nena galatana; xoossata sinthan nena sabbana.
138.2: Ne geeshsha keethaako simmada nena goyinnana; ne siiquwa gishonne ne tumatethaa gisho galatana. Ne sunthaa gishonne ne qaala dhoqatethaa gisho galatana.
138.3: Taani xeegida wode ne taw koyadasa; ne minotethan tana minthadasa.
138.4: Godaw, ne doonape keyiya qaala si7iya wode, sa7an de7iya kawoti ubbay nena galato.
138.5: Godaa bonchoy gita gidiya gisho, enti Godaa ogiyaba yexo.
138.6: Goday bolla dhoqan de7ikoka, manqota keeha ayfen xeellees; shin otoranchota haahon erees.
138.7: Taani meto giddora hemetikoka, neeni tana naagasa. Ta morketa hanquwa bolla ne kushiya miccaasa; ne ushacha kushiyan tana ashshaasa.
138.8: Goday taw gelida qaala polana; Godaw, ne siiqoy merinaasa; Ne kushe oosuwa yegga aggofa.

139.2: Neeni ta utethaanne ta equwa eraasa; ta qofa ubbaa haahon akeekasa.
139.3: Taani biya bessaanne shempiya bessaa xomoosasa; ta ogeta ubbaa eraasa.
139.4: Godaw, taani ta inxarsan issi qaala odetanaape sinthe, ta qofa ubbaa eraasa.
139.5: Neeni ta yuushuwan de7aasa; ne kushiya ta bolla wothaasa.
139.6: Ne eratethay tana daro malaalsees; ta akeekape dhoqa.
139.7: Ta ne Ayyaanape aw baqatanee? ne sinthafe aw baanee?
139.8: Pude salo keyiko ne yan de7aasa! Duge Si7oole wodhikoka ne yan de7aasa.
139.9: Doloha bagga paallada biiko, woyko wuloha baggan haakada de7iko,
139.10: yan ne kushey tana kaalethees; ne ushacha kushey tana zempisees.
139.11: “Dhumaw tana gentha; gallasaw qamma laameta” yaagiyakoka,
139.12: sakana dhumi new dhumenna; qammi gallasada poo7ees; new dhumi poo7o mela.
139.13: Neeni ta giddo asatethaa medhadasa; ta aaye ulon tana neeni tiladasa.
139.14: Neeni tana malaalsiyabanne yegelsi oothada medhida gisho, taani nena galatayis. Ne oosoti malaalsees! taani hessa loythada erayis.
139.15: Taani geema bessan medhetiya wode, ta meqethay neepe geemmibeenna. Ta asatethay ta aaye ulon ciimmo giddon hiillan alleeqetidi oosetiya wode,
139.16: ne ayfeti giigonna ta asatethaa be7idosona. Buroo issoyka doometonna de7ishin, ne taw buzoyida gallasa ubbay ne mazgaben xaafetidosona.
139.17: Xoossaw, ne taw qopiya qofay waanida boncho! Enta tayboy waanidi daride!
139.18: Taani enta taybiyako shafepe daro; taani barkiya wode ha77ika neera de7as.
139.19: Xoossaw, neeni iitata wodhiyako aybe! Suuthu gussiya asati taape haako!
139.20: Enti ne bolla iitabaa haasayoosona; ne morketi ne suntha iissoosona.
139.21: Godaw, nena ixeyisata ta ixikina? Ne bolla dendeyisata ta shaatetikina?
139.22: Taani enta kumethi ixayis; enta taani ta morkeda taybayis.
139.23: Xoossaw, tana pilgada ta wozanaa era; tana un7ethida ta qofaa be7a.
139.24: Tanan iitabay de7iko xeella; merina ogiyan tana kaaletha.

140.1: Godaw, iitatape tana ashsha; makallanchotape tana naaga.
140.2: Enti iita oothanaw maqetoosona; gallas gallas ola denthoosona.
140.3: Banta inxarsaa shoosha inxarsada qarayoosona; enta doonan wodhiya marzey de7ees. Salaha
140.4: Godaw, iitata kushepe tana ashsha; ta tohuwa qaxanaw qopiya makallanchotape tana naaga.
140.5: Otorancho asati taw xihe wothoosona; gite hiixoosona; tana oykanaw gite yeggoosona. Salaha
140.6: Godaa, “Neeni ta Xoossaa” gaana; Godaw, ta woosa si7a.
140.7: Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, tana ashshiya minuwaw, ola gallas taw gondalle gidadasa.
140.8: Godaw, iitatas enta amuwa immofa; enti otortonna mela enta maquwa polisopa. Salaha
140.9: Ta morketan tana xoonisopa; enta doonape keyiya iitay enta bolla simmo.
140.10: Enta bolla xuuggiya tama bonqoy qoletto; enti tama ollan yegeto; keyanaw danda7onna olla holeto.
140.11: Yooyamati biitta bolla de7opo; buqeyisata iitabay yedethidi oyko.
140.12: Goday manqotas pirdeysanne metootanchotas mooteteysa erayis.
140.13: Xilloti tuma ne sunthaa galatana; suure asati ne sinthan daana.

141.1: Godaw, taani nena xeegayis; tana maaddanaw ellesa; Ta neeko waassiya wode tana si7a!
141.2: Ta woosay ixaaneda ne sinthe shiiqo; ta kushe micethay omarsa yarsho mela gido.
141.3: Godaw, ta doona naagiya asi wotha; ta mettersha pengiya naaga.
141.4: Iita oothiya asatara iita oothonna mela, ta wozanaa iitako zaaropa; enta gibira tana muzopa.
141.5: Xillo asi tana seero, hessi taw keehatethi, I tana hanqeto, hessi ta huuphen zayte tiyo mela. Ta wozanay hessa ixenna; Ta woosay ubba wode enta iita oosuwa bollana.
141.6: Enta daynnati aafo holetiya wode, ta qaalay tuma gideysa enti erana.
141.7: Enti, “Asi biitta goyeysadanne phasha laalleysada, nu meqethay duufo doonan laaletana” yaagosona.
141.8: Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, ta ayfey nena xeellees. Taani neeko baqatayis; tana hayqos aathada immofa.
141.9: Enti taw yeggida gitiyapenne iitaa ootheyisata xihiyape tana naaga.
141.10: Taani saro aadhin, iitati banta wothida gitiyan oyketo.

142.1: Ta qaala dhoqu oothada Godaako waassayis; maarota demmanaw iya woossayis.
142.2: Ta oysha ubbaa iya bessayis; ta metuwa ubbaa iyaw odayis.
142.3: Taani heettida wode ne ta ogiya eraasa; ta ogiyan gite yeggidi wothidosona.
142.4: Taani ta yuushuwa xeelliya wode, tana maaddey issoyka baawa. Taani qosetada attiya bessi baawa; tana naagiya oonika baawa.
142.5: Godaw, taani neeko waassayis; taani, “Ne taw baqatada attiya bessi; de7on de7eyisata biittan ta saamay nena” yaagas.
142.6: Taani daro metootiya gisho, ta waasuwa si7a. Tana yedetheysati wolqaamida gisho, tana entafe ashsha.
142.7: Ta ne sunthaa galatana mela, tana qashope birsha. Neeni taw keeha gidiya gisho, xilloti ta yuushon shiiqana.

143.1: Godaw, ta woosa si7a; maarota demmanaw ta waasseysa hayza. Neeni xillotethaninne ne ammanetethan taw zaaro imma.
143.2: Ne sinthan xillo asi bayna gisho tana ne aylliya pirdas shiishopa.
143.3: Tana ta morkey yedethidi, tincherethidi sa7an yeggis. Beni hayqida asada tana dhuman wothis.
143.4: Hessa gisho taani heettas; ta wozanayka til7is.
143.5: Taani beni wodeta hassayayis; ne oothida ooso ubbaa qopayis; ne kushe ooso ubbaa akeekayis.
143.6: Taani ta kushiya neeko miccas; mela biitti haathe koyeysada, ta shempoy nena saamotees. Salaha
143.7: Godaw, ta wozanay heettida gisho taw zaaro immanaw ellesa. Taani duufon geliya asada hanonna mela ne som7uwa taape genthofa.
143.8: Taani nenan ammanetiya gisho, wonta wonta ne siiquwaba tana bessa. Taani ta shempuwafe nena woossiya gisho, ta baana ogiya tana bessa.
143.9: Godaw, taani new maggannida gisho, ta morketape tana ashsha.
143.10: Neeni ta Xoossaa gidiya gisho, ta ne sheniya oothana mela tana tamaarsa; ne lo77o ayyaanay suure ogiyan tana kaaletho.
143.11: Godaw, ne sunthaa gisho tana ashsha; ne xillotethan tana metope kessa.
143.12: Ne siiquwan ta morketa wodha; ta ne aylle gidiya gisho tana un7etheyisata ubbaa dhaysa.

144.1: Goday, ta zaallay, galatetto! Ta kushiya ola tamaarsees; ta biradheta tooras giigisees.
144.2: I ta siiqo Xoossaanne ta qosetta attiya besse; ta miixanne tana ashsheysa. Ta gondallenne taani baqatada attiya besse; I kawotethati taw haaretana mela oothis.
144.3: Godaw, neeni iyaw qopanaw asi aybee? Ne wozanan iyaw besse immanaw asa na7i aybee?
144.4: Asi issi toho carkiya carko mela; iya gallasati aadhiya kuya mela.
144.5: Godaw, saluwa phalqada duge wodha! dereta bocha; enti cuyo!
144.6: Wol7anthi yeddada ne morketa laalla; ne dongiya yiishshan dukada enta yedetha.
144.7: Bollara ne kushiya yeddada, tana wolqaama haathaafe goochada kessa; allaga asata kushepe tana wosisa.
144.8: Enti tuma haasayidi erokona; banta ushacha kushiya denthidi wordon caaqoosona.
144.9: Xoossaw taani new ooratha mazmure yexana; tammu shayan waaxetida diithan yexana.
144.10: Kawotas xoono immaasa; ne aylliya Dawita ashshaasa.
144.11: Tana iita mashshafe ashsha; allaga asata kushepe tana wosisa. Enta doonay wordon, enta ushacha kushey cimon kumis.
144.12: Nu adde nayti banta na7atethan, lo77o dicciya mitha mela gido. Nu macca nayti kawo gadho alleeqisanaw, oosetida tuuqe mela gido.
144.13: Nu shaaleti dumma dumma katha qommon kumo; heemetiya bessan de7iya nu dorsati mukulaninne tammu mukulan yelo.
144.14: Nu miizati birayso; awucayona yeletidi daro; nu ogetan waasoy si7etofo.
144.15: Ha anjoti gakiya asati tuma anjetidaysata; Xoossay entaw Godaa gidida asati anjetidaysata.

145.1: Ta Xoossaw, ta kawaw, ta nena gitayana; ne sunthaa merinaw galatana.
145.2: Taani nena ubba gallas sabbana; ne sunthaa merinaw galatana.
145.3: Goday gita; aadho galati iyaw bessees; iya gitatethay asa qofape aadhees.
145.4: Issi yeletay hara yeletas ne oosuwa odana; ne malaalsiya oosota awaajana.
145.5: Enti ne bonchuwa, ne teemaanne ne gitatetha odana. Taani ne malaalsiya oosuwa zaara zaarada qopana.
145.6: Malaalisiya gita ne oosuwaba odana; taani ne gitatetha awaajana.
145.7: Enti ne keehatetha darotethaa odana; ne xillotethabaa ufaysan yexana.
145.8: Goday keehanne qadheteysa; hanqetanaw ellesenna; siiqon kumidaysa.
145.9: Goday ubbaas keeha; I ba medhetetha ubbaas qadhetees.
145.10: Godaw, medhetetha ubbay nena galatana; ne asa ubbay nena sabbana.
145.11: Enti ne kawotethaa bonchuwaba odana; ne wolqaaba odana.
145.12: Hessan enti ne wolqaama oosuwabaanne ne kawotethaa boncho teemaba erisana.
145.13: Ne kawotethay merina kawotethi; ne maatay yeleta ubbaa haarees. Goday ba gida qaala ubban ammanetees; ba ooso ubban keeha.
145.14: Goday kundanaw gedgadeyisata katisees; kundidaysata denthees.
145.15: Ubbaa ayfey nena xeellees; entaw koshshiya woden kathi immaasa.
145.16: Neeni ne kushiya miccada, medhetetha ubbaa amo alaasa.
145.17: Xoossay ba oge ubban xillo; ba ooso ubban keeha.
145.18: Goday bana xeegiya ubbaas, tuman bana xeegiya ubbaas matan de7ees.
145.19: I baw yayyeyisata amuwa kunthees; enta waasuwa si7idi ashshees.
145.20: Goday bana doseyisata ubbaa naagees; shin iitata ubbaa dhaysana.
145.21: Taani ta doonan Godaa galatana; Medhetetha ubbay iya geeshsha sunthaa merinaw galato!

146.1: Godaa galatite! Ta shempe Godaa galata!
146.2: Ta de7o laytha ubban Godaa galatana; ta de7ida wode ubban ta Xoossaa sabbana.
146.3: Halaqatan ammanetofite; ashshanaw danda7onna asa na7an ceeqetofite.
146.4: Enta shempoy keyiya wode biittako simmoosona; enta halchoy ubbay he gallas aadhees.
146.5: Yayqooba Xoossay maaddiya asinne Godaa, ba Xoossan ufaysi oothiya asi anjetidaysa.
146.6: Goday salonne sa7aa, abbanne iya giddon de7iya ubbaa medhis; Xoossay merinaw ammanetees.
146.7: Goday un7etidaysatas pirdees; koshatidaysatas kathi immees; Goday qashetidaysata birshees;
146.8: Goday qooqeta xeelisees. Goday kundidaysata denthees; Goday xillota dosees.
146.9: Goday bete asata naagees; Am7etanne yi7o nayta maaddees; shin iitata ogiya dhaysees.
146.10: Goday merinaw kawotana; Xiyoone, ne Xoossay, yeletethafe yeletethi gakanaw kawotana. Godaa galatite!

147.1: Godaa galatite! Nu Xoossaa saboy lo77o; iya saboy ufaysiyabaanne bessiyaba.
147.2: Goday Yerusalaame oorathana; Isra7eelepe di7etidaysata shiishana.
147.3: Wozani meqidaysata koolees; enta madunthaa pathees.
147.4: I xoolintota taybuwa erees; enta ubbaa enta sunthan sunthan xeegees.
147.5: Nu Goday gita; I wolqaama; iya akeekas zawi baawa.
147.6: Goday aadata zempisees; shin iitata sa7an yeggees.
147.7: Godaas galata yethi yexite; nu Xoossaas diithan yexite.
147.8: I saluwa shaara mayzees; biittas ira immees; zumata bolla maata dolisees.
147.9: Mehetas kathi, Koshatidi waassiya quuro naytas miyaba immees.
147.10: I parata wolqaninne tooranchota minotethan ufaytenna.
147.11: Shin Goday baw yayyeysataninne iya maarotan ammaneteysatan ufaytees.
147.12: Yerusalaame, Godaa galata! Xiyoone, ne Xoossaa galata!
147.13: I ne pengiya kobeta minthana; ne giddon de7iya ne asaa anjana.
147.14: I ne zawa sarotethan naagana; nena lo77o gisten kalsana.
147.15: I ba kiitaa biittas yeddees; iya qaalay eeson gakees.
147.16: I shachi bullukoda miccees; caagana bidoda laallees.
147.17: I shacha shuchada holees; iya meeguwan oonika eqanaw danda7enna.
147.18: I ba qaala kiittidi shacha maaysees. I carkuwa kiittin haathi goggees.
147.19: I ba qaala Yayqoobas, ba higgiyanne wogaa Isra7eeles awaajees.
147.20: I hara kawotethatas hessa oothibeenna; enti iya higgiya erokona. Godaa galatite!

148.1: Godaa galatite! Salope Godaa galatite; bolla dhoqan iya galatite.
148.2: Iya kiitanchoti ubbay iya galatite; Salon de7iya iya olanchoti ubbay iya galatite.
148.3: Away, ageenay iya galatite; poo7iya xoolintoti ubbay iya galatite.
148.4: Dhoqa saloti iya galatite; Salope bollara de7iya haathati iya galatite.
148.5: Enti ubbay Godaa sunthaa galato; I kiittin enti medhetidosona.
148.6: I enta merinaw enta bessan bessan wothis; shaaretonna higge entaw immis.
148.7: Sa7ape Godaa galatite! abban de7iya gita medhetethato; abba ciimmoto ubbay iya galatite.
148.8: Wol7anthaw, shachaw, shaaraw, caaganaw, iya kiita poliya carkuwaw, ubbay iya galatite.
148.9: Dereto, zumato, meetetiya ayfe ayfiya mithato, zigato, ubbay iya galatite.
148.10: Meheto, do7ato, sa7ara gooshetiya medhetethato, paalliya kafoto ubbay iya galatite.
148.11: Kawoto, kawotethato, halaqato, deriya haareysato, ubbay iya galatite.
148.12: Panthato, geela7oto, cimato, nayto, ubbay iya galatite.
148.13: Iya sunthay ubbaafe dhoqa gidiya gishonne iya bonchoy salotapenne sa7ape dhoqa gidiya gisho, enti ubbay Godaa sunthaa galato.
148.14: Iyaw mata gidida Isra7eele, I dhoqu dhoqu oothis; iya galatana mela enta minthethis. Godaa galatite!

149.1: Godaa galatite! Godaas ooratha yethi yexite! xillota shiiquwan iya sabbite!
149.2: Isra7eeley bantana medhidaysan ufayto; Xiyooney banta kawan hashshu go.
149.3: Durishe, karaabo baqishe, diithi diixishe iya sunthaa sabbo.
149.4: Goday ba asan ufaytees; aadatas xoono immidi enta bonchees.
149.5: Ne asay banta xoonuwan ufayto; qamma kumethi ufaysan yexo.
149.6: Enta doonan Xoossaa galatay, enta kushiyan nam7u bagga qara mashshi de7o.
149.7: Hessan enti kawotethata bolla halo keyana; asaa seerana.
149.8: Enta kawota santhalaatan, enta moorinnata biratan qachana.
149.9: Enta bolla xaafetida pirdaa polana; Hessi Xoossaa asata ubbaas xoono. Godaa galatite!

150.1: Godaa galatite! Iya geeshsha keethan Xoossaa galatite; dhoqa salon iya galatite.
150.2: Iya wolqaama oosota gisho iya galatite; ubbaafe aadhiya iya gitatethaas iya galatite.
150.3: Moyze punnishe iya galatite; diithaninne maasinqon iya galatite.
150.4: Karaabo baqishenne durishe iya galatite; diithi diixishe, suusul7e punnishe iya galatite.
150.5: Daala qaathishe iya galatite; wolqaama daala girsan iya galatite.
150.6: Shempora de7iya ubbay Godaa galatite! Goday galatetto!

1.1: Haysati Isra7eele kawa Dawita na7aa Solomone leemisota.
1.2: Leemisoti asay cincatethi, seeranne era haasaya akeekanaw maaddoosona.
1.3: Enti cincatethi, xillotethi, suure pirdinne suure wozani daana mela tamaarsoosona.
1.4: Eeyatas akeeka immees; na7atethatas eratethinne kahaamatethi immees.
1.5: Cincati ha leemisota si7idi, era gujoosona; akeekanchoti lo77o zore ekoosona.
1.6: Hessan leemisotanne enta birshethaa, cincatetha odaanne enta qan7isheta akeekanaw danda7etees.
1.7: Godaas yashshi cincatethas doomethi; shin eeyati cincatethinne seera kadhoosona. Cincatethi New Miishe Ootha
1.8: Ta na7aw, ne aawa zoriya si7a; ne aaye timirtiya kadhopa.
1.9: Hessi ne huuphiyas boncho kallacha; ne qoodhiyas gozda gidana.
1.10: Ta na7aw, nena nagaranchoti cimmiko ero goopa.
1.11: Enti, “Nuura yedha; ase wodhanaw hokidi naagoos; xillota wodhanaw qosetoos.
1.12: Si7ooley mitteysada nuka enta paxa mittoos; nu enta ollan yegetiya asada oothana.
1.13: Nuuni al7o miishe ubbaa demmana; nu keethaa bonqe miishen kunthana.
1.14: Nuura laggeta; nu demmidaba issife shaaketana” yaagana.
1.15: Ta na7aw, entara hemetofa; enta ogiyara baanaw ne tohuwa denthofa.
1.16: Enti iitabaa oothanaw woxoosona; asa suuthi gussanaw yaa haa goosona.
1.17: Kafoy xeellishin, iya oykanaw gite yegethi maaddenna.
1.18: Shin enti banta suuthi gussanaw hokosona; banta shempuwa wodhanaw qosetoosona.
1.19: Genen go77a demmiya asa wursethi hessa mela; enti shiishida shaloy enta shempuwa ekees. Cincatethi Xeegees
1.20: Cincatethi daggala bolla eqada xeegawusu; dabaaban ba qaala dhoqu oothada sissawusu.
1.21: Cincatethi asi shiiqiya bessan eqada xeegawusu; katamaa geliya pengen eqada haysada yaagawusu.
1.22: “Hinteno, akeeki pacidaysato, hinte awude gakanaw eeya gididi daanee? Qelqiseysato, awude gakanaw ufaytanee? Eeyato, awude gakanaw eratethi ixanee?
1.23: Ta seera hinte si7idaba gidiyako, taani ta eraa hinte bolla gussana; ta qaalaka hintena tamaarsana.
1.24: Shin ta xeegida wode hinte koyonna ixida gisho; taani kushe miccin oonika akeekibona gisho;
1.25: Ta zoriya hinte kadhida gisho; ta seeraka ekiboonna gisho;
1.26: Hintena metoy gakiya wode ta miicana; hinte dagaman kokoriya wode ta qelqisana.
1.27: Gadoy uushoda hinte bolla yaa wode, metoy goteda hinte bolla eqiya wode, un7inne waayey hinte bolla gakiya wode, taani hintena qelqisana.
1.28: “He wode enti tana xeegana; shin ta koyke; enti tana minthidi koyana; shin demmokona.
1.29: Enti eratethi ixida gisho; Godaa yashshi dooriboonna gisho,
1.30: Ta zoriya ekiboonna gisho; ta seera kadhida gisho;
1.31: Enti banta oosuwa ayfiya maana; banta qofaa ayfiya kallana.
1.32: Akeeki pacidaysata cincatethafe haakeysi wodhees; eeyata qelli guussi dhaysees.
1.33: Shin ta odiyaba si7iya ubbay saro daana; meto hirgafeka shempana.”

2.1: Ta na7aw, ta timirtiya ne ekiko; ta kiitaa ne wozanan wothiko;
2.2: ne haythaa cincatethako zaariko; ne wozanaa akeekako zaariko;
2.3: Eratethi xeegiko; akeeka dhoqu oothada xeegiko;
2.4: Bira woyko geemmida miishe koyeysada, neeni eratethi koyko,
2.5: He wode neeni Godaas yashshi guussi aybeko erana; Xoossaa loythada erana.
2.6: Goday cincatethi immees; iyape eratethinne akeeki bentees.
2.7: I suuretas maaddiya zore minjees; borey baynaysatas gondalle gidees.
2.8: Suure pirda ogiya naagees; iyaw ammaneteyisata ogiya minthees.
2.9: He wode neeni xillotethi, suure pirdaa, suure ogenne lo77o oosoy aybeko akeekana.
2.10: Cincatethi ne wozana giddo gelana; eratethi new ufaysi gidana.
2.11: Shaakidi eroy nena naagana; akeeki nena kammana.
2.12: Cincatethi nena iita asata ogiyape naagana; geella odape nena ashshana.
2.13: Enti nagara dhuman daanaw, xillotetha ogiya aggidosona.
2.14: Iita ooson ufaytoosona; geellatethan hashshu goosona.
2.15: Enta oosoy mirqethi; enta de7oy geella.
2.16: Cincatethi layma maccasape, qaalan cimmiya laggethofe nena ashshana.
2.17: Iya ba na7atetha azina aggaagasu; Xoossa sinthan caaqida caaquwa dogasu.
2.18: I soo ogey hayqoko gathees; iiko buussi moytilletako gathees.
2.19: Iiko biya oonika guye simmenna; de7o oge demmenna.
2.20: Hessa aggada, lo77o asata leemisuwa kaalla; xillo asata hemethaa naaga.
2.21: Suure asatinne borey baynaysati, biittan adussa laythi daana.
2.22: Shin iitati biittafe shodetana; ammanetonaysati dhayana.

3.1: Ta na7aw, ta timirtiya dogopa; ta kiitaa ne wozanan wotha.
3.2: Enti ne laytha adussana; injenne sarotethi new gujana.
3.3: Siiqoynne tumatethi neepe haakofo; enta ne qoodhen qacha; ne wozanan xaafa.
3.4: Hessa oothiko ne Xoossanne asa sinthan sabetananne nashetana.
3.5: Ne kumetha wozanan Godaa ammaneta; ne akeekan zempofa.
3.6: Ne ooso ubban iya sinthaya; I nena suure oge kaalethana.
3.7: Nena ne huuphen cinca oothofa; Godaa yayya; iitape haaka.
3.8: Hessi ne asatethaas payyatethi ehana; ne meqethaaka xaalisana.
3.9: Ne shaluwan Godaa boncha; koyro ayfida kathaafe bayraa immada iya boncha.
3.10: Hessa ne oothiko, ne shaaliyan kathi kumana; ne daalloy woyne ushshan kumidi palahana.
3.11: Ta na7aw, Godaa seera kadhopa; I nena seeriya wode lancofa.
3.12: Aaway ba dosiya na7a seereysada, Goday ba dosiya uraa seerees.
3.13: Cincatethi demmeynne, akeeka baw miishe oothiya uray anjetidaysa.
3.14: Cincatethi birape aadhidi go77ees; worqafe aadhidi maaddees.
3.15: Cincatethi worqafe aadhidi al7o; ne demmanaw amotiya ubbay cincatethara ginenna.
3.16: Cincatethi ushacha kushen adussa laythi, haddirsa kushen duretethinne boncho oykasu.
3.17: I ogeti ufaysiya ogeta; I horogay saro horoga.
3.18: Iya bana oykeysatas de7o mithi; iyo minthidi oykiya ubbay anjetidaysata.
3.19: Goday ba cincatethan sa7aa medhis; ba akeekan salota minthis.
3.20: Iya eratethan shaafati goggoosona; shaaratape iri bukees.
3.21: Ta na7aw, suure pirdanne shaakidi ero minthada oyka enti neepe shaaketofo.
3.22: Enti new de7o gidana; injenne ufaysi immana.
3.23: He wode ne hirgi bayna hemetana; ne tohoy dhubetenna.
3.24: Neeni zin7iya wode yayyaka; qamma kumethi mal7o dhisko dhiskana.
3.25: Akeekona gakiya gados yayyaka; iitati dhayiya dhayuwan dagammaka.
3.26: Goday new zempo gidana; ne tohoy xihen oyketonnaada I naagana.
3.27: New wolqi de7ishin, metootida uraas lo77oba ooso aggofa.
3.28: Ha77i maaddanaw danda7ashe ne shooruwa, “Simmada ya; ta new wonto immana” yaagopa.
3.29: Nena ammanetidi, ne matan de7iya, ne shooruwa bolla gene oothofa.
3.30: Nena qohonna de7ishin, ase coo mootopa.
3.31: Gene oothiya asata qanaatopa; enta iita oosuwa kaallofa.
3.32: Goday iita oothiya asata ixees; shin suureta dosees.
3.33: Goday iita oothiya asaa keethaa baaddees; shin suureba oothiya asaa keethaa anjees.
3.34: Otoron qelqiseyisata Goday qelqisees; shin bantana kawusheyisata sabbees.
3.35: Cincati boncho demmana; shin eeyati kawuyana.

4.1: Ta nayto, hinte aawa zoriya si7ite; loythi si7ite; hinte akeeka demmana.
4.2: Ta hintew lo77o timirte immiya gisho, ta timirtiya kadhopite.
4.3: Taka ta aawas na7a; ta aayes iya dosiya issi na7a.
4.4: Ta aaway tana haysada yaagidi tamaarsis; “Ta oday new gelo; ta kiita naaga; neeni hessa oothiko de7on daana.
4.5: Cincatethinne akeeka demmanaw minna; ta new odiyaba dogopa; iyape kare keyopa.
4.6: Cincatethas zoko zaaropa; iya nena ashshana; iyo dosa; iya nena naagana.
4.7: Cincatethi aadhiya gisho iyo demma; new de7iyaba wursidi ekikoka akeeka demma.
4.8: Ne iyo boncha; iya nena dhoqu dhoqu oothana; ne iyo oykiko, iya nena bonchana.
4.9: Iya ne huuphiyas saba gidana; boncho kallacha immana” yaagis.
4.10: Ta na7aw, si7a; ta odeysa eka; ne laythay aduqana.
4.11: Taani nena cincatetha oge kaalethana; suure horoga bessaana.
4.12: Ne hemetiya wode dhubiyabay deenna; woxiyakoka dhubetaka.
4.13: Ta timirtiya loytha naaga; yeddofa; timirtey new de7o immiya gisho loytha naaga.
4.14: Nagaranchota ogiyara boopa; iita asata ogiyan hemetofa.
4.15: Iyape haaka; iyan hemetofa; guye simma; ne ogiyan ba.
4.16: Enti iitaba oothonna de7ishin dhiskoy ekenna; enti ase dhubbonna de7ishin dhiskoy efenna.
4.17: Enti nagara kathada moosona; geellatethi ushshada uyoosona.
4.18: Xillota ogey seeta gallas gakanaw, guji guji poo7iya wonta xalqe mela.
4.19: Shin geellata ogey sakana dhuma mela; enti aybin dhubetiyakoka erokona.
4.20: Ta na7aw, ta odeysa si7a; ne haythaa taako zaara.
4.21: Ne ayfiya sinthafe haassofa; ne wozanan naaga.
4.22: Enta demmiya ubbaas enti de7o; enti asatethas payyatethi immoosona.
4.23: De7oy iyape pultiya gisho, ubbaafe aathada ne wozanaa minthada naaga.
4.24: Ne doonape iita haasaya digga; wordo haasaya ne matape haassa.
4.25: Sitti gada sinthe xeella; ne ayfey ne sinthan de7iyaba tishshi oothidi xeello.
4.26: Ne tohuwa ogiya giigisa; suure oge xalaalan hemeta.
4.27: Suure ogepe ushachi haddirsi goopa; ne tohoy iita oge boonnada naaga.

5.1: Ta na7aw, ta cincatetha hayza si7a; ne haythaa ta timirtiyako zaara.
5.2: Hessi nena wozanaama oothana; ne oday ne eratethaa qoncisana.
5.3: Layma maccasa inxarsafe ililo eessi xokees; I oday oysape aadhidi looxikees.
5.4: Shin wursethan iya godare uthada cammawusu; nam7u baggara qanxiya mashshada qara.
5.5: I tohoy hayqoko bees; I tangoy duufo gathees.
5.6: Iya de7o oge qopuku; I ogey geella; shin geella gideysa iya eruku.
5.7: Ta na7aw, tana si7a; ta odeysafe keyopa.
5.8: Layma maccasa heera boopite; I keetha pengiyako shiiqopite.
5.9: Hessi hanonna ixiko hinte bonchuwa harati ekana; na7atethan wozana mino asa kushen hinte hayqana.
5.10: Hinte aquwa allagati ekana; hinte daaburadi shiishidabay hara asas gidana.
5.11: Wursethan hinte ashoynne hinte asatethay wurin hinte yeekana.
5.12: Hinte yaagana; “Ta ayis timirte ixadina? Ta wozanay seera ayis kadhidee?
5.13: Taani ta astamaareta si7abike; tana zoreyisata zoriya ekabike.
5.14: Hesaa gisho, ta asay shiiqida shiiquwan, kawuyanaw matas” yaagana.
5.15: Neeni ne pultuwafe haathe uya; ne mache xalaala siiqa.
5.16: Ne pultuwa dabaaban, ne olla haatha denban ayis gussay?
5.17: Enta new buzo ootha; hara allaga uraara koxofa.
5.18: Ne pultoy new anjeto; ne na7atetha machera ufayta.
5.19: Lo77iya gaaredaninne ufaysiya gen7eda I dhanthay ubba wode nena alo; ubba wode I siiqoy nena di77o.
5.20: Ta na7aw, layma maccasan ayis di7etay? Hara asa macho ayis qoommay?
5.21: Asi oothiyaba ubbaa Goday be7ees; I hemetiya horoga ubbaa xeellees.
5.22: Nagaranchuwa I oothida nagaray oykees; Iya nagaraa gitey iya qachees.
5.23: I ba eeyatethan dhayis; bana naagiboonna gisho hayqis.

6.1: Ta na7aw, miishe tal7ida ne shooruwas waase gelidaba gidiko, hara asas kushe baqada caaqidaba gidiko,
6.2: ne caaqida ne caaquwan xihen gelidaba gidiko, ne doonape keyida qaalan oyketidaba gidiko,
6.3: hiza ne shooruwa kushen geladasa. Hessa gisho, ta na7aw, iyape keyanaw koyko, ne shooruwa soo bada waasetetha ne bollafe wothana mela aaddashada iya woossa.
6.4: Hessa oothonna de7ashe zin7ofa; dhiskoyka nena ekofo.
6.5: Shankafe gen7ey kessi ekiyada, gitepe kafoy attiyada nena ashsha.
6.6: Neno azallaw, zimadoko ba; iyape cincatethi tamaara.
6.7: Zimaddota kiittey baawa, halaqi woyko enta haarey baawa.
6.8: Shin bantaw maanaba bone minjoosona; kathi cakiya wode bantaw koshshiya kathaa shiishosona.
6.9: Neno azallaw, ne awude gakanaw dhiskay? Ne dhiskofe awude barkanee?
6.10: Neeni “guuthu zin7ana; guuthu dhiskana; kushe shiisha ekada guuthu shempana” yaagasa.
6.11: He wode manqotethi pangada, paci ola miishe oykida asada ne bolla yaana.
6.12: Laafanne iita asi yuuyidi oda mirqees;
6.13: I ba ayfen qam7otees; ba tohon bessees; ba biradhen mallees.
6.14: Iya ulon geellatethi de7ees; iitabaa qopees; ubba wode ooshshu medhees.
6.15: Hessa gisho dhayoy akeekona iya bolla yaana; I hassayonna meqana; zaaridi paxenna.
6.16: Goday ixiya usupun qommoti de7oosona; I shaatetiya qommoti laapuna;
6.17: kadhidi xeelliya ayfe, wordotiya inxarsi, xillo asata wodhiya kushe,
6.18: iitaba maqiya wozanaa, iitabaako woxanaw eesotiya toho,
6.19: Wordo bolla wordo gujiya wordo marka, ishata giddon ooshshi medhiya asi. Laymatethafe Naageta
6.20: Ta na7aw, ne aawa kiita pola; ne aaye timirtiya aggofa.
6.21: Enta ubba wode ne wozanan oyka; ne qoodhiyan qacha.
6.22: Ne hemetiya wode enti nena kaalethana; ne zin7iya wode, enti nena naagana; ne barkiya wode enti nena zorana.
6.23: Godaa kiitay xompe; iya timirtey poo7o; iya seeray de7oko efiya oge.
6.24: Ha timirteti iita maccafenne hara cimmiya maccasa inxarsafe nena naagana.
6.25: I mala lo77otethay nena qadhethofo; I qam7otoy nena di77ofo.
6.26: Issi addey guutha miishen layma maccas demmanaw danda7ees; shin hara asa macho laggethoy shempo ekees.
6.27: Tama idimmin iya ma7oy meetetonna attey de7ii?
6.28: Tama bonqo yedhin, iya tohoy xuugetonna attey de7ii?
6.29: Asa macho laggethiya uray hessa mela; iyo bochiya ubbay seerettonna attenna.
6.30: Kaysoy koshatidi maanaw kaysiko, asi iya borenna.
6.31: Shin I oyketiyabaa gidiko, laapun kushe qanxana; ba son de7iya miishe ubbaa immana.
6.32: Shin maccasara laymatiya asi wozani bayna asi; he uray ba shempuwa dhaysees.
6.33: Deshethinne kawushi iya qaada; yeelli iyape qushetenna.
6.34: Qanaatey azinas yilo denthethees; halo kessiya wode iw qadhetenna.
6.35: I ay acaka ekenna; ay mela imotika iya hanquwa doshisenna.

7.1: Ta na7aw, ta qaala naaga; ta kiitaa ne wozanan wotha.
7.2: De7on daanaw ta kiita ootha; ta timirtiya ne ayfe na77eda naaga.
7.3: Ne kushen enta qacha; ne wozanan enta xaafa.
7.4: Cincatethi ne michida, akeeka ne mata dabboda xeella.
7.5: Enti nena layma maccasapenne ba qaalan cimmiya hara maccasape naagana.
7.6: Issi gallas ta maskootera kare xeellas.
7.7: Eratethi pacida na7atethata be7as; enta giddofe issoy daro eeya.
7.8: He na7atethay ogera bishe, issi layma maccase keethaa matara aadhees; I soo efiya ogiya simmidi I sooko bis.
7.9: He wode sa7i laadees.
7.10: Maccasiya iya demmasu; iya layma gideysa I ma7oy erisees; iya asa cimmanaw halchada keyasu.
7.11: Iya xaltaamanne yeelli bayna maccas; son wopu gada uttuku.
7.12: Iya issi toho ogen, issi toho giyan, issi toho dabaaban eqada naagawusu.
7.13: Iya he na7atetha qoommada yeerasu; iya tishshi oothada xeellashe haysada yaagasu;
7.14: “Taani ta yarshuwa yarshada, ta qangetha hachi gathas.
7.15: Yaatada nena mokanaw keyas; nena daro koyas; hiza nena demmas.
7.16: Taani Gibxefe yida, alleeqetida afila hiixas.
7.17: Taani ta hiixa, karbefe, almunepenne qarafape, oosetida shittuwa puukas.
7.18: Haaya; wontana gakanaw siiqo aloos; qoometidi ufaytoos.
7.19: Ta azinay son deenna; haaho biitta bis.
7.20: Miishe karxiita kunthidi bida gisho, ageena kumonna soo simmenna” yaagasu.
7.21: Ba mal7o odan iya balethasu; ba liiqo inxarsan iya cimmasu.
7.22: Boori shukettanaw beysada, gaari eesotidi xihen geleysada, I iyo kaallidi bis.
7.23: Toori iya wozanaa caddidaada hanis; gite giddo gelida kafo daanis; hessi ubbay iya shempuwa dhaysanaw haneysa eribeenna.
7.24: Hiza ta na7aw, tana si7a; ta doonape keyiya qaala hayza.
7.25: Ne wozanay maccasa geedo boopo; I ogiyan gelada dhayopa.
7.26: Iya cadda yeggidaysati daro; iya wodhidaysati guutha gidokona.
7.27: I soy duufoko efiya oge; hayqoko kaalethiya horoga.

8.1: Cincatethi xeegawusu; si7ite; akeeki ba qaala dhoqu oothida sissawusu.
8.2: Oge doonan de7iya zumata bollanne daggala ogiyan iya eqawusu.
8.3: Dirsa penge matan, katamaa geliya pengen eqada, ba qaala dhoqu oothada haysada yaagawusu.
8.4: Asaw, ta hintena xeegayis; asa koche ubbaa xeegayis.
8.5: Hinteno eratethi baynaysato eratethi tamaarite; hinteno eeyato, akeeka demmite.
8.6: Taani lo77oba odiya gisho si7ite; taani doonape suurebay keyees.
8.7: Taani tuma odetayis; wordoy ta matan ixetidaba.
8.8: Ta oday tuma; geella woyko mirqethi gidenna.
8.9: Akeeki de7iya uraas ta oday like; eri de7iya uraas ta oday qonce.
8.10: Birape aathidi ta zoriya doorite; geeshsha worqafe aathidi eratethi doorite.
8.11: Cincatethi zo7o al7o shuchafe aadhees; ne amotiya ubbay iira liketenna.
8.12: Taw, cincatethas akeeki de7ees; eratethinne shaakidi eroy tabaa.
8.13: Godaas yashshi iitatethi ixo; taani otoronne ceeqetethi ixayis; iita ogenne wordo oda dosike.
8.14: Zoreynne lo77o eray tabaa; akeekinne wolqi taw de7ees.
8.15: Kawoti ta baggara kawotoosona; haareysati suure higge ta baggara kessoosona.
8.16: Halaqati ta maaddin deriya haaroosona; biitta aysiya gita asata ta maaddayis.
8.17: Tana doseyisata ta dosayis; tana minthidi koyeysati demmana.
8.18: Duretethinne bonchoy taara de7oosona; wuronna shaloynne injey ta matana.
8.19: Hinte taape demmiya go77ay, geeshsha worqafenne birape aadhees.
8.20: Ta xillotetha ogen hemetayis; suure pirda ogiyara kanthayis.
8.21: Tana doseysatas ta shalo immana; enta keethaa duretethan kunthana.
8.22: “Goday tana ubbaafe koyro medhis; benipeka iya oosuwas doomethay tana.
8.24: Abbay bayna wode, pultoti dhuuqonna de7ishin ta yeletas.
8.25: Deretinne zumati medhetanaape sinthe ta yeletas.
8.26: Goday sa7aanne sa7an de7iya ubbaa medhanaape sinthe woyko koyro kophe biittay oosetanaape sinthe ta yeletas.
8.27: Goday salota miccida wode, abbatape bollara salo gufantho giigisida wode, taani yan de7ayis.
8.28: Goday shaarata bollara wothida wode, abba pultota dhuusida wode,
8.29: abba haathati imetida zawape pinnidi, bolla aadhonada, I enta kiitida wode sa7aa baasuwa minthida wode, taani yan de7ayis.
8.30: He wode ta iya matan waanna oosancho; ubba wode ta iya ufaysayis; tawuka iya sinthan ufaytayis.
8.31: I medhida alamiyan ufaytayis; asa naytika tana ufaysoosona.
8.32: “Hiza ta nayto, si7ite; ta odeysada ootheysati anjetidaysata.
8.33: Ta timirtiya si7ite; cinca gidite; si7idaba dogopite.
8.34: Taani odidaba si7iya uray, gallas gallas ta pengiyan bentiya uray, ta pengiyan naagiya uray anjetidaysa.
8.35: Tana demmiday de7o demmees; Godaape saba ekees.
8.36: Shin tana demmonna uray bana qohees; tana ixiya ubbay hayqo dosees.”

9.1: Cincatethi ba keethaa keexasu; laapun tuussata ba keethaas essasu.
9.2: Iya ba giigisiya gibiras modho mehe shukasu; woyne aggasu; gayta asaa sinthe aathasu.
9.3: Asaa xeeganaw ba aylleta kiittasu; oosanchoti katamaa dhoqa bessan eqidi,
9.4: Hinteno, eri pacidaysato haa gelite! Eeyatako haysada yaagasu.
9.5: “Haa yiite; ta kathaa miite; ta aggida woyniya uyite.
9.6: Hinte eeyatethi aggidi de7on de7ite; akeekidi hemetite” yaagasu.
9.7: Qelqisiya uraa seeriya asi cashshe ekees; iita uraa zoriya asi baw qohetees.
9.8: Qelqisiya uraa zoropa; I nena ixana; cinca uraa zora; I nena dosana.
9.9: Cincatethi uraa tamaarsa; I cinca gidana; Xillo uraa tamaarsa; I era gujana.
9.10: Godaas yashshi cincatethas doomethi, Geeshsha Godaa eroy akeeka.
9.11: Ta gaason ne laythay darana; ne de7o laythay aduqana.
9.12: Ne cinca gidiko, go7etey nena; Ne qelqisiya asi gidiko nena qohaasa.
9.13: Eeyo maccasi waaso darawusu; iw yeelli baawa; iya aykoka eruku.
9.14: Iya ba karen woyko katamaa dhoqa bessan uttawusu.
9.15: Banta ogiya biya asaa xeegada,
9.16: “Hinteno, eri pacidaysato taako haa yiite” yaagasu. Eri baynaysatako,
9.17: “Kaysidi uyaa haathi mal7ees; geeman miya kathi lo77ees” yaagasu.
9.18: Shin hayqida asay yan de7eysa, I imathatika duufon de7eysa I erenna.

10.1: Haysati Solomone leemisota. Cinca na7i ba aawa ufaysees; shin eeya na7i ba aayiw azzanthees.
10.2: Nagaran demmida miishey go77enna; shin xillotethi hayqope ashshees.
10.3: Goday xillota koshaysenna; shin nagaranchota amuwa polisenna.
10.4: Azallatethi manqisees; shin minnidi oosoy dureyees.
10.5: Cinca asi ba kathaa bone shiishees; shin kathi cakiya wode dhiskiya asi kawuyees.
10.6: Xillo asi anjetees; shin nagarancho asi ba makallatethaa doonan genthees.
10.7: Xilluwa sunthay anjon xeegetishe de7ees; shin nagaranchota sunthay elle dogetees.
10.8: Cinca asi kiittidaba oothees; shin eeya asi dhayoko bees.
10.9: Suure asi saro de7ees; shin geella asi ba gomen oyketees.
10.10: Gene ayfen qam7otiya asi meto ehees; shin yayyonna seeriya asi sarotethi medhees.
10.11: Xillo asa odi de7o pulto; shin nagarancho asa odi makalla genthees.
10.12: Ixoy palama denthethees; shin siiqoy bala ubbaa kammees.
10.13: Wozanaama asi cincatethan odees; shin eeya asa zokoy xam7as attees.
10.14: Cincati eratethi dagayoosona; shin eeyata doonay dhayo dafees.
10.15: Dure asa miishey diretida katamada naagees; shin manqotethi manqota dhaysees.
10.16: Xillo asa oosoy iya de7o; shin iita asa wursethay dhayo.
10.17: Seerin simmiya asi de7o ogen hemetees; shin seerin ixiya asi balees.
10.18: Ixo kammiya asi wordancho; zigirsi laaliya asi eeya.
10.19: Daro haasaya giddon nagari dhayenna; shin ba doona shiishiya asi cinca.
10.20: Xillo asa inxarsi geeshsha bira mela; shin iita asa wozani iitaban kumis.
10.21: Xillo asa odi daro asaa go77ees; shin eeyati banta paca wozanan hayqoosona.
10.22: Godaa anjoy dure kessees; he duretetha bolla meto gujenna.
10.23: Eeya uraas iitabaa oosoy kaassa mela; shin wozanaama asi cincatethan ufaytees.
10.24: Iita asi hirgidabay iya bolla gakana; shin xilloy amotidabay imetana.
10.25: Gotey aadhiya wode nagaranchoy bentenna; shin xilloti merinaw minnidi daana.
10.26: Caalabay ache, cuyi ayfe qoheysada, azalla asi kiittidaysa yiloyees.
10.27: Godaas yashshi laythi adussees; shin nagaranchota laythay qaammees.
10.28: Xillo asi ufaysi yaana gidi naagees; shin nagaranchota ufaysay dhayana.
10.29: Godaa ogey xillotas baqatidi attiya besse; shin iita oothiya asaas dhayo.
10.30: Xilloti ubba wode qaaxokona; shin iitati biitta bolla dookona.
10.31: Xillo asi cincatethan odees; shin geellaba odetiya inxarsi qanxetana
10.32: Xillo asa inxarsi bessiya haasaya erees; shin iita asaa oday wobbe.

11.1: Goday wordo mizaane ixees; shin like mizaanen ufaytees.
11.2: Otoroy yaa wode kawushatethi yees; shin ashketethan cincatethi yees.
11.3: Xillota enta suuretethay kaalethees; shin iita asata enta geellatethay dhaysis.
11.4: Hanqo gallas duretethi go77enna; shin xillotethi hayqope ashshees.
11.5: Borey bayna uraa ogiya xillotethay suurisees; shin iita uray ba iitatethan kundees.
11.6: Suureta enta xillotethay ashshees; shin ammanetonayisata enta amoy xihe gididi oykana.
11.7: Iita asi hayqiya wode, I naagiya ufaysay iyara issife hayqees; I ba wolqan ceeqetiyabay ubbayka dhayees.
11.8: Xilloy metope attees; iya gisho iitaa bolla metoy yees.
11.9: Xoossaa kaddida asi ba doonan asa dhaysis; shin xilloti eran kessi ekoosona.
11.10: Xilloti bonchetiya wode, katamay ufaytees; qassi iitati hayqiya wode, hashshu gees.
11.11: Xillota anjuwa gaason katamay diccees; shin iita uraa odi katamaa dhaysis.
11.12: Ba shooruwa kadhiya uraas wozani baawa; shin akeekancho uray si77i gees.
11.13: Zigiriya asi xuuraa laallees; shin ammanetiya asi xuuraa genthees.
11.14: Kaalethiyabay dhayiko, kawotethay kundees; shin daro zoreysati de7iko, saroy de7ees.
11.15: Erenna uraas waase gidiya asi tumape metootana; hessafe waase gidonna ixeysi lo77o.
11.16: Ulo keeha maccasi bonchetawusu; shin iita asi duretetha xalaala duretees.
11.17: Keeha asi baw lo77oba oothees; shin wozana mino asi bana qohees.
11.18: Iita asi demmiya miishey cimo; shin xillotethaa zeriya uray tuma woyto cakana.
11.19: Xillotethan minnidi de7iya uray paxa de7ana; shin iitatethaa kaalliya uray hayqana.
11.20: Goday iita qofay de7iya asata ixees; shin suure hemeteysatan ufaytees.
11.21: Iita asi seerettonna attenna; shin xillota kochay attana.
11.22: Qofi bayna mala lo77o macca puulatethay guduntho sidhen aathida worqaa mela.
11.23: Xillota amuwas poloy lo77o xalaala; shin iitata amuwas poloy hanqo xalaala.
11.24: Issi issi asati banta miishe asas coo keehosona; shin enta aqoy haa darees. Hara asati qassi banta miishas pala uuzettoosona; shin enta aqoy yaa pacees.
11.25: Keeha asi duretana; harata maaddiya asi maadetana.
11.26: Kathi al77in bayzanaw minjiya uraa asay baaddees. Shin ba kathaa asay koyiya wode bayziya uraa anjees.
11.27: Lo77oba minthidi koyiya uray ufaysaa demmees; shin iitabaa koyiya uraa iitabay demmees.
11.28: Ba duretetha ammanetiya asi kundana; shin xilloti balgo mithada.
11.29: Ba soo asaa bolla buqethi denthiya uray go7etiyabay aybika baawa. Eeyatika cincatas aylle gidana.
11.30: Xillo asi de7o ayfe ayfiya mitha mela; shempo ashsheysati cincata.
11.31: Xilloti sa7an banta ooso gate ekiyaba gidiko, iitatinne nagaranchati banta oosuwas ekana gatey waanidi darandeesha!

12.1: Seera dosiya uray eratethi dosees; shin seera ixiya uray eeya.
12.2: Lo77o asi Godaape saba demmees; shin Goday genanchota pirdees.
12.3: Asi iitatethan minnidi eqenna; shin xillota xaphoy qaaxenna.
12.4: Wozanaama machiya ba azinaas kallacha mela; shin ba azina kawushiya machiya meqethi miya ajaaje mela.
12.5: Xilluwa qofay suure; shin iitata zorey cimo.
12.6: Iitata zoretay asa qohanaasa; shin xillota zoretay enta ashshanaasa.
12.7: Iita asati kundana; entaw zerethika attenna; shin xillota kochay minnidi de7ana.
12.8: Asi ba cincatetha mela galatetees; shin geella qofay de7iya asi kadhetees.
12.9: Dure asi daanidi, meton de7iya asaape coo asa daanidi, oothiiddi ba de7o sugiya asi keeha.
12.10: Xillo asi ba mehes qadhetees, shin wozana mino asas qadhey baawa.
12.11: Ba biitta minthi oothiya uray kathi kallees; shin pathonnaba yedethiya uray akeeki pacidaysa.
12.12: Iitati nagarancho asata di77anaw amottoosona; shin xillota xaphoy daayidi de7ana.
12.13: Iita asa iya doonape keyida odi xihe gididi oykees; shin xilloy metope kessi ekees.
12.14: Asi ba doonape keyiya qaalan lo77oba kallees; ba oothida ooso gatiya ekees.
12.15: Eeya asi biya buussay aw iya huuphen like daanees; shin cinca asi zore si7ees.
12.16: Eeya uraa hanqoy ellesidi eretees; shin cinca asi cashshe wuda geenna.
12.17: Tumaa haasayiya asi suureba odees; shin wordo markay wordo odees.
12.18: Akeekona odetiya odi mashshada caddees; shin cinca inxarsay pathees.
12.19: Wordo odi guutha wodesa; shin tuma odi merinaw de7ana.
12.20: Iita qopiya asaa wozanan cimoy de7ees; shin saroba zoreteyisata wozanan ufaysay kumees.
12.21: Xillota metoy gakenna; shin iitatas metoy darana.
12.22: Goday wordanchota ixees; shin tumancho asatan I ufaytees.
12.23: Cinca asi ba eraa qottees; shin eeyati banta eeyatetha odoosona.
12.24: Minnidi oothiya uray dere haarees; shin azalla asi haaretees.
12.25: Un7an kumida wozani azzano ehees; shin keeha odi iya ufaysees.
12.26: Xillo asi ba shooruwa zoridi, suure oge kaalethees; shin iitati oge tumaape haassees.
12.27: Azalla asi shankatidi ehida asho kathenna; shin minnidi oothiya uray ba miishiyas mishetees.
12.28: Xillotethaa ogen de7oy de7ees; he ogen hayqoy baawa.

13.1: Erancho na7ay ba aawa seera si7ees; shin qelqiseysi seera ekenna.
13.2: Asi ba doonape keyiya qaalan lo77oba ekees; shin ammanetonaysati makallaba amottoosona.
13.3: Ba doona naagiya uray ba shempuwa naagees; shin eeson haasaya uray bana dhaysees.
13.4: Azallay amottees; amotikonne aybaka demmenna; shin minnidi ootheysati kallana.
13.5: Xillo asati wordo oda ixoosona. Shin iita asata odi yeellayeesinne kawushshees.
13.6: Suure de7uwa de7iya uraa iya xillotethay naagees; shin nagarancho iya nagaray ongees.
13.7: Bana dure daanisiya asi de7ees; shin iyaw aybinne baawa; qassi bana manqo daanisiya asi de7ees; shin iyaw daro aqoy de7ees.
13.8: Asi ba miishen ba shempo wozanaw danda7ees; shin manquwa yashisiyabay baawa.
13.9: Xillota poo7oy phoolees; shin iitata xompey to7ana.
13.10: Otoroy ooshshi yelees; shin zore ekeysati cincata.
13.11: Daaburi bayna demmida miishey eeson dhayees; shin minni oothidi demmida aqoy, dari daridi bees.
13.12: Koyiyabay poletonna gam7eysi azzanthees; shin amotidabay poleteysi ufaysees.
13.13: Zore kadhiya uray meton gelees; shin kiita bonchiya uray saro de7ana.
13.14: Cincatethi immiya timirtey de7o pulto; higgey ase hayqo xihepe kessi ekanaw maaddees.
13.15: Akeeki de7iya uray bonchetees; shin ammanetona ixoy qohos gathees.
13.16: Cinca asi ubbay eran oothees; shin eeyi ba eeyatetha qoncisees.
13.17: Iita asati kiitetidi, meton geloosona; shin ammanthiya asati kiitetidi, sarotethi ehoosona.
13.18: Seera ixiya asi manqeesinne yeellatees; shin seera ekiya uray bonchetees.
13.19: Amotidabay poleteysi daro ufaysees; shin iitati iitabaape haakanaw koyokona.
13.20: Cinca asara hemetiya asi cinca gidees; shin eeya asara hemetiya asi meton gelees.
13.21: Nagaranchota iita qaaday kaallees; shin duretethi xillota woyto.
13.22: Lo77o asi ba nayta nayta laatisees; shin nagaranchuwa aqoy xilluwas dagayetees.
13.23: Manquwa goshshay daro kathi ayfenaw danda7ees; shin suure pirda pacan dhayees.
13.24: Pircon seeranaw dosonna asi ba na7aa ixees; shin ba na7aa siiqiya uray minnidi seerees.
13.25: Xilloy, uloy kallana gakanaw mees; shin nagaranchoy ubba wode koshatana.

14.1: Cinca maccasi ba keethaa keexawusu; shin eeya maccasiya ba keethaa ba kushen laallawusu.
14.2: Suure hemetiya asi Godaa yayyees; shin ba oge geellayiya asi Godaa kadhees.
14.3: Eeya odi iya zokuwas xam7a ehees; shin cincata inxarsay enta naagees.
14.4: Boori bayna ixiko shaaley kaysi gidees; shin goshsha boori de7iko, ne shaaley kathan kumees.
14.5: Ammanetiya marki ubba wode tuma odees; shin wordo marki wordo xalaala odetees.
14.6: Qelqisiya asi cincatethi koyees, shin demmenna; akeeki de7iya asi eratethi demoy waaysenna.
14.7: Eeya asape haaka; neeni iya odape eratethi demmaka.
14.8: Cinca asi cinca gidiya ba oothiyaba erees; shin eeya asa eeyatethay iya balethees.
14.9: Eeyati nagara oothishe, qiirotanaysa aggidi qelqisoosona; shin suureti banta nagaray atto geetetanaw koyoosona.
14.10: Issi issi wozani ba azzanuwa erees; iya ufaysa oonika iyara koxenna.
14.11: Iitata keethay laaletana; shin suureta keethay minnidi daana.
14.12: Asas like daaniya ogey de7ees; shin iya wursethay hayqoko gathees.
14.13: Miicha wodeka wozanan azzanoy de7ees; ufaysa wursethay azzano gidanaw danda7ees.
14.14: Iita asi ba iita oosuwa gate ekana; lo77o asika ba lo77o oosuwa gate ekana.
14.15: Eeya asi ubbaba ammanees; shin cinca asi akeekidi tangees.
14.16: Cinca asi Godaa yayyees; iitape haakees; shin eeya asi eesotesinne iitape naagetenna.
14.17: Elle hanqetiya asi eeya ooso oothees; shin cinca asi danda7ancho.
14.18: Akeeki bayna asi ba eeyatetha gatiya ekoosona; shin cinca asi eratethi kallachada goxoosona.
14.19: Iitati lo77ota sinthan gulbatana; nagaranchati xillota pengen hokana.
14.20: Manqoy ba shooruwan ixetees; shin duretas daro laggeti de7oosona.
14.21: Ba shooruwa kadhiya asi nagara oothees; shin manquwa maaddiya asi anjetidaysa.
14.22: Iitabaa maqeteysati baloosona gidokona? shin lo77oba oothanaw halcheysati ammanetethinne siiqo demmoosona.
14.23: Minnidi oothiya ooso ubban wodhey de7ees; shin coo odi manqotethi ehees.
14.24: Cincatas enta duretethay entaw kallacha; shin eeyati guji guji eeyoosona.
14.25: Tuma marki shempo ashshees; shin wordo marki balethees.
14.26: Godaa yayiya asas mino miixay de7ees; iya naytas baqatidi attiya bessi de7ees.
14.27: Godaa yashshi de7o pulto; hayqo xihepe ase ashshees.
14.28: Kawo gitatethi I haariya asaa darotethaana; shin haaretiya asi dhayiko ika pathenna.
14.29: Danda7ancho asas gita akeeki de7ees; shin elle hanqetiya asi ba eeyatetha qoncisees.
14.30: Saro wozani asatethas payyatethi immees; shin qanaatey asatethas ajaaje harge mela.
14.31: Manqota naaqiya asi enta medhidaysa cayees; shin metootanchotas keehiya asi Xoossaa bonchees.
14.32: Iitati banta iita ooson kundana; shin xillotas hayqope attiya miixi de7ees.
14.33: Akeekancho asa wozanan cincatethi kumis; shin eeyati cincatethi aybeko erokona.
14.34: Xillotethi issi kawotetha dhoqu dhoqu oothees; shin nagari ay asika kawushshees.
14.35: Erancho aylletanan kawoy ufaytees; shin yeellaya aylley kawa hanqethees.

15.1: Liiqo inxarsi hanqo zarbisees; shin dom7ethiya qaali hanqo denthethees.
15.2: Cincata inxarsay era puulayees; shin eeyata doonay eeyatethi pultisees.
15.3: Godaa ayfeti ubba bessi xeelloosona; iitatanne lo77ota shaakidi be7oosona.
15.4: Lo77o odi de7o mitha mela; shin geella odi ayyaana menthees.
15.5: Eeyi ba aawa seera kadhees; shin ba aawa seera ekiya asi cinca.
15.6: Xillo uraa keethan daro miishey de7ees; shin iitata soo geliya miishey meto ehees.
15.7: Cincata doonay era zerees; shin eeyata wozanay hessa mela gidenna.
15.8: Goday iitata yarshuwa ixees; shin suureta woosan I ufaytees.
15.9: Goday iita asata ogiya ixees; shin xillotethi kaalleyisata I dosees.
15.10: Like ogiya aggida asi pirdi naagees; seera ixiya asi hayqees.
15.11: Duufoynne dhayoy Godaa sinthan qonce; yaatin, asa wozana qofay waani iyape geemmanee?
15.12: Qelqisiya asi seera dosenna; cincatape zore oychenna.
15.13: Wozani ufaytin, som7oy poo7ees; shin wozani azzaniko, ayyaani meqees.
15.14: Akeeka wozani de7iya asi eratethi koyees; shin eeyati banta eeyatethan ufaytoosona.
15.15: Manqota de7oy ubba wode baaxe; shin ufaytiya asi ubba wode alees.
15.16: Ooshshara de7iya gita aqope Godaa yashshara de7iya guuthabay keeha.
15.17: Ooshshi de7iya bessan modho asho maanape siiqoy de7iya bessan santhi keeha.
15.18: Hanqoy ooshshi kessees; shin danda7i ooshshi irxisees.
15.19: Azalla asa ogey agunthan diretis; shin suure asa ogey giiga.
15.20: Cinca na7i ba aawa ufaysees; shin eeya na7i ba aayiw kadhees.
15.21: Wozani bayna asi ba eeyatethan ufaytees; shin wozanaama asi bessiya ba oothees.
15.22: Zorey dhayiko, qopidabay haddirees; daro zorey de7iya bessan qopidabay poletees.
15.23: Oyshas bessiya zaaro imoy he uraa ufaysees; ba woden odetiya odi ay mela ufaysi!
15.24: Garsan de7iya si7oolepe attana mela de7o ogey akeeka uraa pude kaalethees.
15.25: Goday otoranchota keetha laallana; shin am7e zawa naagees.
15.26: Goday iitata qofaa ixees; shin geeshsha qaalan I ufaytees.
15.27: Wordon wodhe demmanaw aaliya asi ba soo asaa bolla meto ehees; shin wodhaafe ixiya asi de7on daana.
15.28: Xillo asi odetanape sinthatidi qopees; shin iitata inxarsaape iitabay pultees.
15.29: Goday iitatape haakees; shin xillota woosa si7ees.
15.30: Som7oy pashkin wozani ufaytees; mishiraachoy meqethi minthees.
15.31: De7o immiya zore si7iya asi cincatethara issife daana.
15.32: Seera ixiya asi bana qohees; shin seera ekiya asi akeeka demmees.
15.33: Godaas yashshi cincatethi tamaarsees; ashketethi bonchofe sinthatees.

16.1: Asi ba wozanan halchees; shin like zaaroy Godaape bentees.
16.2: Asi oothiya ooso ubbay iyaw like daanees; shin Goday dendo qofaa be7ees.
16.3: Ne ooso ubbaa Godaas hadara imma; neeni qopidabay poletana.
16.4: Goday ubbabay qopidaysatho bana mela oothees; hanikoka, makallanchota wursethay dhayo.
16.5: Goday otoranchota ixees; enti seerettonna attokona.
16.6: Siiqoninne ammanetethan nagari atto geetetees; Godaas yayyidi asi iitabaape attees.
16.7: Asa hemethi Godaa ufaysiyabaa gidiko, I ba morketara saro daanada oothees.
16.8: Xillotethan bentiya guuthabay, wordon demmiya daro wodhepe lo77o.
16.9: Asi wozanan ba oothanaba halchees; shin halchoy Godaa maaden poletees.
16.10: Kawoy Xoossaafe ekida maatan pirdees; iya inxarsay suure pirdees.
16.11: Gina mizaanetinne maka miisheti Godaaba; bayziyaba ubban geney doonna mela Goday koyees.
16.12: Kawoti iita ooso ixoosona; enta araatay xillotethan eqees.
16.13: Kawoti xillo inxarsan ufaytoosona; tumaa haasaya uraa dosoosona.
16.14: Kawa hanqoy hayqo kiitancho mela; shin cinca asi hanquwa irxisees.
16.15: Kawa som7oy poo7iko de7oy de7ees; Iya lo77otethay ira ehiya shaara mela.
16.16: Cincatethi demoy worqa demope aadhees; akeeka demoy bira demope lo77o.
16.17: Suureta ogey iitape haako; ba hemethaa naagiya uray ba shempuwa naagees.
16.18: Otoroy dhayo kaalethees; ceeqetethi kundethi ehees.
16.19: Otoranchotara di7o shaaketanaape, ashke gididi manqidi de7eysi lo77o.
16.20: Zore si7iya uraas I oothiyaba ubbay injetana; Godan ammanetiya uray anjetana.
16.21: Ba qofan cinca gidida asi akeekancho geetetees; lo77o qaali eratethi gujees.
16.22: Cinca asas eratethi de7o pulto mela; shin eeyata seeroy coo wode wursees.
16.23: Cinca asi odetanaape sinthe qopees; iya mettershay eratethi gujees.
16.24: Lo77o qaali eessa ililoda mal7ees; shempos mal7o; meqethas paxo gidees.
16.25: Asas suure daaniya ogey de7ees; shin wursethan hayqoko gathees.
16.26: Asi minnidi oothana mela oothey katha amo; koshi minnidi oothana mela denthethees.
16.27: Kawusha asi iitabaa halchees; iya oday tamada xuuggees.
16.28: Wobe asi ooshshi denthethees; zigirsi ammanetiya laggeta shaakees.
16.29: Gene asi ba shooruwa cimmees; lo77o gidonna oge kaalethees.
16.30: Ba ayfen qam7otiya asi geellaba qopees; ba mettersha saxidi mandiya asi iitabaa oothees.
16.31: Puulumida huuphey boncho kallacha; hessika bentey xillo de7o de7ina.
16.32: Wolqaama asi gidanaape danda7a asi gidoy lo77o, daro katamata olidi oykanaape bana haaroy aadhees.
16.33: Asi saama yeggees; shin wursetha zaaroy Godaape bentees.

17.1: Ooshshi de7iya bessan de7iya gita gibiraape saroynne wopi de7iya bessan uytha poqoy lo77o.
17.2: Cinca aylley pathonna ba godaa na7aa haarees; iya ishatara issife laata shaaketees.
17.3: Worqinne biri taman paaceteysada; Goday asa wozana paacees.
17.4: Iita asi iita haasaya si7ees; wordanchoy wordo haasaya hayzees.
17.5: Manqota bolla qelqisiya asi enta medhida Xoossaa cayees; hara asi gakiya meton ufaytiya asi seerettonna attenna.
17.6: Na7a na7i cima asas kallacha; aawati banta naytas boncho.
17.7: Lo77o odi eeya asas giigenna; hessadaka wordo odi ayseysas giigenna.
17.8: Wodhaafe immeysas wodhaafey bita mela; I biya bessa ubbay iyaw injetees.
17.9: Qoho genthiya uray siiqo koyees; shin oda zaaridi zaaridi woociya uray, ammanetiya laggeta shaakees.
17.10: Eeyay xeetu toho lisson shocin ereysafe; akeeki de7iya asas coo hanqoy era immees.
17.11: Iita asi ubba wode geella; qadhey bayna asi iya bolla kiitetana.
17.12: Eeyara iya eeyatethan gahetanaape marati eketida maahera gahetethi lo77o.
17.13: Lo77o oothidaysas iita kushe zaariya uraa soope iitabay kichenna.
17.14: Ooshshi doomishe haatha dhawa mentheysa mela; hessa gisho ooshshi doomanaape koyrottada palama agga.
17.15: Nagaranchuwa xillisoynne xilluwa bolla pirdoy, nam7ayka Goday ixiya ooso.
17.16: Cincatethi demmanaw amoy bayna de7ishin, eeya kushen de7iya miishey ay iya maaddii?
17.17: Laggey ubba wodeka lagge; ishi meto wode maaddanaw yeletees.
17.18: Akeeki bayna asi eronna uraa acuwa qanxanaw waase gidees.
17.19: Ooshshu dosiya asi nagara dosees; ubba wode ceeqetiya asi ba bolla dhayo xeegees.
17.20: Wobe qofi de7iya asi lo77oba demmenna; ba inxarsan cimmiya asi meton gelees.
17.21: Eeyaa na7a yelida aawi azzanees; eeya na7a aawas ufaysi deenna.
17.22: Ufaytiya wozani asas lo77o dhale; shin meqida wozani asas wolqa dhaysees.
17.23: Iita asi pirda geellayanaw geeman wodhaafe ekees.
17.24: Akeeka asi cincatethi ba sinthafe haassenna; shin eeya asa ayfey sa7a gaxa yuuyees.
17.25: Eaya na7i ba aawa azzanthees; ba aayiwuka camisees.
17.26: Xillo asi seeroy bessenna; suure asi shocoy lo77o gidenna.
17.27: Guutha qaala haasaya asi erancho; wopa ayyaani de7iya asi akeekancho.
17.28: Eeya asi si77i giiko cinca daanees; ba doona dooyonna ixiko erancho daanees.

18.1: Shaahetethi koyiya asi ba amuwa kaallees; suure qofa ubbaa ixees.
18.2: Eeya asi ba qofaa xalaala qoncisanaw dosees; hara asape era ekanaw dosenna.
18.3: Iitatethi yaa wode kadhey yees; kawushatethi yaa wode yeelli yees.
18.4: Asa doonape keya odi, ciimmo haatha mela; cincatethi goggiya pulto mela.
18.5: Naaqida uraa maaddidi, xilluwa pirdaa geellayeysi lo77o gidenna.
18.6: Eeya asa odi ooshshu denthethees; iya doonay wadho xeegees.
18.7: Eeya asa odi bana qohees; iya oday xihe gididi iya oykees.
18.8: Zigirsi mal7o katha mela; ufaysishe duge ganje gakees.
18.9: Azalla asi dhaysiya asape aybaka dummatenna.
18.10: Godaa sunthay mino gimbe mela; xillo asi yaa woxidi saro attees.
18.11: Dure asata duretethay gimbetida katama mela; enta qofan enta duretethay mino dirsada enta naagiyaba daanees.
18.12: Otoroy kundethafe sinthatees; ashketethi boncho ehees.
18.13: Si7onna de7ishe zaaro imoy, he uraas eeyatethinne yeella.
18.14: Daana gidi qopiko, iya ayyaanay harge danda7isees; shin ufaysi qanxiko iya maaddey baawa.
18.15: Akeeka asi eratethi koyees; cinca asa haythi cincatethi si7ees.
18.16: Imoti immeysas oge dooyees; gita asatara erisees.
18.17: Daynna sinthan koyro shiiqidi mootiya uray, iya morkey yin, iya oychana gakanaw, ubba wode bana xillo gidi qopees.
18.18: Saama yegethi palama teqees; nam7u palamiya asata shaakees.
18.19: Qohetida ishay gimbetida katamape aadhidi minnees; iya palamay birata gorde mela.
18.20: Asi ba doona odan ba ulo kunthees; ba inxarsaa ayfen kallees.
18.21: Hayqoynne de7oy inxarsana; neeni ne inxarsaa ayfiya maana.
18.22: Macho demmiday lo77oba demmis; i, Godaape teema demmees.
18.23: Manqo asi aaddashidi odetees; shin dure asi otoron zaarees.
18.24: Daro laggey de7iya asi ba bolla meto ehees; shin ishape aadhidi matatiya laggey de7ees.

19.1: Ba doonan wordotiya eeya asape ba de7uwan borey bayna manqoy lo77o.
19.2: Eri bayna dafetethi lo77o gidenna; eeso daroy oge balethees.
19.3: Asi ba eeyatethan ba de7uwa iissees; yaatidi Godaa bolla yilotees.
19.4: Duretethi daro lagge shiishees; shin manqotethi de7iya laggeta duuthees.
19.5: Wordo marki seerettonna attenna; wordo odetey kessi ekenna.
19.6: Daro asay shuuma som7o koyoosona; imota immiya asara asi ubbay dabbotees.
19.7: Manqo asi hari attoshin iya ishati ixoosona; iya laggeti iyape haakoosona; I enta aaddashinka enti iya koyokona.
19.8: Cincatethi demmiya asi ba shempuwa dosees; eratethi minthidi oykiya uraas injetees.
19.9: Wordo marki seerettonna attenna; wordo odetey dhayana.
19.10: Eeya asas inje de7oy bessenna; aylley halaqata haaroy daro iita.
19.11: Cincatethi ase danda7a tamaarsees; qoho kadhidi aadhethi bonchisees.
19.12: Kawa hanqoy gaammo gudetha mela; shin iya nashshoy maata aacisiya aka mela.
19.13: Eeya na7i ba aawa dhaysees; doonama macha xokiya keetha mela.
19.14: Asi keethenne shalo aawupe laattees; shin akeeka macho Goday immees.
19.15: Azallatethi dhisko ehees; ooso oothonna asi koshatees.
19.16: Kiita naagiya asi ba shempuwa naagees; shin qelli giya asi hayqees.
19.17: Manqos keehiya asi Godaas tal7ees; Goday he lo77o oosuwa gisho woytees.
19.18: Simo ufaysi de7ishin ne nayta seera; seeronna ixiko, ne enta dhaysaasa.
19.19: Elle shenetiya asi ba gatiya ekanaw bessees; neeni iya issi toho ashshiyaba gidiko, hara wodeka ne iya hessada ashshanaysi attenna.
19.20: Zore si7a; tamaaranaw koya; neeni wursethi gakanaw cinca gidana.
19.21: Asi darobaa halchees; shin Goday gidabay poletees.
19.22: Asape koyetey ammanetethi; wordo gidanaape manqo gideysi lo77o.
19.23: Godaas yashshi de7oko kaalethees; iya yayiya asi kallidi de7ees; iiti iya bochenna.
19.24: Issi issi asi daro azalla; hari attoshin woxen tushkida uythaa pude baaranaw waayetees.
19.25: Neeni qelqisiya asi shociko, akeeki pacidaysi cincatethi tamaarana; akeeka asi ne hanqetiko, I eratethi demmana.
19.26: Ba aawa bonqiya na7ay, ba aayiw yedethiya na7ay, yeellanne kawushatethi ehiya na7a.
19.27: Ta na7aw, ne zore si7onna ixiko, era ogiyape haakaasa.
19.28: Wordo marki suure pirda bolla qelqisees; iita asa dooni iitatethi mittees.
19.29: Qelqisiya asas pirda eeyatas wadho koshshees.

20.1: Mathoya ushshi eeyanne ooshancho oothees; ushshan baletiya asi cinca gidanaw danda7enna.
20.2: Kawo hanqoy gaammo gudetha mela; iya yiloyiya asi ba shempuwa bolla pirdees.
20.3: Palamape haakeysi boncho; shin eeya asi ooyetanaw ellesees.
20.4: Azalla goshshanchoy wode naagidi goyenna; kathi cakiya wode I woossanaw koyees; shin aybaka demmenna.
20.5: Asa wozana halchoy ciimmo haatha mela; shin wozanaama asi duuqidi kessees.
20.6: Daro asati banta lo77otetha odoosona; shin tuma ammanetiya asi demmanay oonee?
20.7: Xillo asi borey bayna de7o de7ees; iya kaalliya iya nayti anjetidaysata.
20.8: Kawoy pirdanaw ba araatan uttiya wode, iita ubbaa ba ayfen harqidi kessees.
20.9: “Ta wozanay geeshshi; tanan nagari baawa” gaanaw danda7iya asi daanesha?
20.10: Goday wordo mizaanenne gina gidonna maka miishen go7eteyisata ixees.
20.11: Na7i geeshshinne suure gideysi I oothiya ooson eretees.
20.12: Si7iya haythinne xeelliya ayfe, Goday medhis.
20.13: Dhiskon ne wode wursiko ne manqana; minnada oothiko ne kathi kallana.
20.14: Shammiya asi, “Qohees! Qohees!” yaagees; shin bidaape guye, “Gelan shammas” yaagidi ceeqetees.
20.15: Worqey kumis; al7o shuchika bentees; shin eri kumida inxarsi ubbaafe aadhida alleeqo.
20.16: Eronna asas waase geliya uraa ma7uwa qaari ekite; imatha asas waase geliya uraa ma7o oykite.
20.17: Wordon demmida kathi mal7ees; shin aqidi pee7ishe doonan aceda hanees.
20.18: Zore ekada ne qofaa qacha; zore ekonna de7ashe ola boopa.
20.19: Zigiriya asi xuura genthenna; hessa gisho, coo haasaya asape haaka.
20.20: Ba aawa woyko ba aayiw baaddiya asa, de7o xompey sakana dhuman to7ana.
20.21: Koyrora eeson shiiqida shaloy wursethan anjetenna.
20.22: Nena qohida uraa qohada zaarana goopa; Godan ammaneta; I nena ashshana.
20.23: Goday nam7u qommo mizaane ixees; wordo mizaaney iya ufaysenna.
20.24: Asay baana ogiya Goday kaalethees; yaatin, asi ba de7on baana ogiya waatidi akeekanaw danda7ii?
20.25: Eeson, “Haysa taani Xoossas immas” guussinne guyepe qiirotethi asas xihe.
20.26: Cinca kawoy geellata shaakidi erees; I enta qadhetonna seerees.
20.27: Asa ayyaani Godaas xompe; iya gaatha asatethaa ubbaa pilgidi xeellees.
20.28: Siiqoynne ammanetethi kawa naagoosona; iya araatay tuma pirdan minnees.
20.29: Yalagata bonchoy enta wolqaa; cimata bonchoy enta puulunthaa.
20.30: Mino seeri iitatethi shoddees; wadhoy iita wozana laammees.

21.1: Kawo wozani Godaa kushena; iya wozanaa dhawa haathada ba koyida soo zaarees.
21.2: Asi oothiyaba ubbay iyaw like daanees; shin Goday iya wozanaa qofaa paacees.
21.3: Yarsho yarshanaape aathidi, xillonne suure ootheysa Goday dosees.
21.4: Iitati otoroninne ceeqetethan eretoosona; hessi qassi nagara.
21.5: Mino oothiya asa halchoy dureyees; shin eesotiya ubbay manqees.
21.6: Wordon dagayida shaloy pentoda dhayees; hessa koyeysati hayqo koyoosona.
21.7: Iitati suureba oothanaw koyonna gisho, enta geella oosoy enta ekidi bees.
21.8: Nagaranchoti geella ogen hemetoosona; shin geeshshati suureba oothosona.
21.9: Doonatiya machira issi keethan daanape kare darmachan duussi lo77o.
21.10: Iitati iitaba oothanaw amottoosona; banta shoorotas qadhetokona.
21.11: Qelqisiya asi seeretiya wode wozani bayna uray cincatethi tamaarees; wozanaama uray era demmees.
21.12: Xillo Xoossay iitata son oosetiyaba ubbaa be7ees; enta shiri yeggidi dhaysees.
21.13: Manqota waasuwa si7anaape gidi, ba haythaa tucciya uray, ika waassana; I waassin alliya asi dhayana.
21.14: Geeman immiya imoy hanqo doshisees; qosan immida wodhaafey hanqo irxisees.
21.15: Suure pirdi pirdetiya wode, xilloti ufaytoosona; shin iita ootheyisata daganthees.
21.16: Akeeka ogiya haakiya uraa hayqoy naagees.
21.17: Injetin daana giya uray manqees; woynenne zayte dosiya uray duretenna.
21.18: Xoossa asata ashshanaw iita asati seeretosona; ammanetona asati suure asata gisho seeretosona.
21.19: Doonatiyanne yilotiya machira daanape bazzon de7oy lo77o.
21.20: Wozanaama uraa son mal7o quminne oysi minjettees; shin eeya asi de7iyaba ubbaa midigees.
21.21: Xillotethinne siiqo koyiya uraa laythay aduqees; he uray xillotethinne boncho demmees.
21.22: Wozanaama asi wolqaama olanchota katamaa olidi oykees; enti ammanetiya mino miixaa laallees.
21.23: Ba doonanne ba inxarsaa naagiya asi bana metope naagees.
21.24: Otoreynne ceeqetey qelqisiya asi; I otorancho gidida gisho asas qopenna.
21.25: Oothanaw koyonna gisho azalla amoy wodhees.
21.26: Azalla asi ubba wode darobaa demmanaw amottees; shin xilloy baw ashshona immees.
21.27: Goday iitata yarshuwa ixees; enti iyaw iita qofan shiishiya yarshuwa aathidi ixees.
21.28: Wordo marki dhayana; shin tuma marki eqidi daana.
21.29: Iita asi bessona xaala xaalees; shin suure asi yuushshi qopees.
21.30: Asi ba cincatethan, akeekaninne zoren Godaara eqetanaw danda7enna.
21.31: Olas para kooranaw danda7etees; shin xoonoy Godaaba.

22.1: Lo77o sunthi daro duretethafe aadhees; bonchoy birapenne worqafe aadhees.
22.2: Durenne manqo Goday medhis; hessan enti nam7ay issino.
22.3: Cinca asi iita be7idi qosetidi attees; shin akeeki bayna asi meton gelidi qohetees.
22.4: Ashketethinne Godaa yashshi, duretethi, bonchonne de7o immees.
22.5: Iitata ogen agunthinne xihey de7ees; shin bana naagiya asi entafe haakees.
22.6: Na7i waanidi daanaw bessiyako tamaarsa; I cimiya wodeka iyape haakenna.
22.7: Durey manquwa haarees; tal7e ekiday tal7e immidaysas aylle gidees.
22.8: Nagara zeriya uray waaye cakees; iya hanqo xam7ay meqana.
22.9: Ba kathaa manqotas shaakiya gisho keeha asi anjetana.
22.10: Qelqisiya asi diggiko, palami, ooshshinne cashshi attana.
22.11: Wozani geeshshi gidida asinne lo77o oda dosiya asi kawora dabbotees.
22.12: Godaa ayfey eratethi naagees; shin wordanchota qaala shiri yeggees.
22.13: Azalla asi, “Karen gaammoy de7ees; tana ogen maana” yaagees.
22.14: Layma maccasa dooni wolqaama olla mela; Goday hanqetidaysati iyan kundoosona.
22.15: Eeyatethi na7a wozanan de7ees; shin pircoy iyape haassees.
22.16: Shalo shiishanaw manquwa naaqeynne dure asas imota immiya nam7ay manqana. Hastamu Cinca Zoreta (22:17—24:22)
22.17: Ne haytha zaarada cincata qaala si7a; ne wozanaa ta timirtiyako zaara.
22.18: Enta ne wozanan wothikonne ne doonan enta haasayiko, ne ufaytana.
22.19: Ne ammanoy Godan gidana mela, taani nena hachi tamaarsayis.
22.20: Taani new zorenne eratethi kumida hastamu leemisota xaafas.
22.21: Nena kiittidaysas like zaaro zaarana mela, taani nena tumatethi tamaarsas. 1
22.22: Manqotas aybika bayna gisho, enta bonqofa; pirdan enta maata dhaysofa.
22.23: Goday enta gisho mootetana; enta bonqidaysata I bonqana. 2
22.24: Yilotiya uraara laggetopa; elle shenetiya uraara hemetofa.
22.25: Neeni iya yiluwara meezetiko, guyepe agganaw danda7aka. 3
22.26: Asa aco ta qanxana gada waase gidopa.
22.27: Ne qanxiyaba dhayiko, ne zin7iya hiixay attonna, new de7iyaba ubbay eketana. 4
22.28: Ne mayzati tokida beni zawa shoddofa. 5
22.29: Ba oosuwan loohida asi be7adii? I coo asatas gidonashin kawotas oothees.

23.1: Halaqara kathi maanaw uttiya wode, neera de7eysa akeeka.
23.2: Neeni daro yaramba asi gidiko naageta.
23.3: I nena paacanaw danda7iya gisho, mal7o kathas yaaretopa. 7
23.4: Duretana gada daaburopa; ne qofaa haaranaw cinca gida.
23.5: Hessa mela duretethi ne xeellishin dhayana; qefe kessidi arganthada salo paallana. 8
23.6: Uuze asa kathi moopa; iya mal7o kathay nena amoyopo.
23.7: Qoodhepe qommon “Ma; uya” gees; shin iya wozanay neera gidenna.
23.8: Ne mida guutha kathaaka cooyana; ne galatay mela gidana. 9
23.9: Ne cincatetha haasaya kadhiya gisho, eeya asas paxaba haasayopa. 10
23.10: Beni zawa shoddofa; yi7o nayta zawa sugopa.
23.11: Enta ashshiya Goday mino gidiya gisho; i, enta gisho neera mootetana. 11
23.12: Ne wozanaa zore qaalako, ne haytha timirteko zaara. 12
23.13: Na7a seeronna aggofa; ne iya pircon shociko I hayqenna.
23.14: Ne iya pircon shociko, iya shempuwa hayqope ashshaasa. 13
23.15: Ta na7aw, ne wozanay cinca gidiko, ta wozanay ufaytana.
23.16: Ne inxarsay suureba haasaya wode, ta gaatha asatethay ufaytees. 14
23.17: Nagaranchota qanaatopa; shin ubba wode Godaa yayya.
23.18: Yaatiko new sintha de7oy suurana; ne ufaysay dhayenna. 15
23.19: Ta na7aw, si7a; cinca gida; ne wozanaa suure ogiyan naaga.
23.20: Daro woyne ushshu uyeysataranne asho maanaw yaareteysatara hemetofa.
23.21: Mathoteysatinne yarambati manqana; dhisko daroy curqa mayzees. 16
23.22: Nena yelida ne aaway odiyaba si7a; ne aayiya cimida wode kadhopa.
23.23: Tumaa, cinca, seeranne akeeka shammafe attishin, bayzopa.
23.24: Xillo na7a aawi daro ufaytees; wozanaama na7a yelida asi iyan ceeqetees.
23.25: Ne aawaynne ne aayiya nenan ufayto; nena yelidaara hashshu go. 17
23.26: Ta na7aw, ne wozanaa taw imma; ne ayfeti ta ogiya kallo.
23.27: Layma maccasi ciimmo haatha mela; laggetho maccasi xuntha olla mela.
23.28: Iya paannoda zugada naagawusu; ammanetona addeta darsawusu. 18
23.29: Waasoy oossee? Azzanoy oossee? Ooshshi oossee? Zuuzunthi oossee? Gaasoy bayna madunxethi oossee? Ayfe zo7oy oossee?
23.30: Woyne ushshu uyishe wode ongeysatasa gidennee? Walahetida woyne ushsha ganxidi be7eysatasa gidennee?
23.31: Woyne ushshi zo7ida wode, iya malay birille giddon phooliya wode, uyin mal7ishe geliya wode iya xeellofa.
23.32: Wursethan shooshada I dukees; iita shooshada ba marziya puukees.
23.33: Ne ayfey be7i eronnabaa be7ana; ne wozanay suure qopanaw danda7enna.
23.34: Neeni abba giddon zin7ida, markabiya tuussa bolla katida ase daanasa.
23.35: Neeni, “Enti tana dechidosona; shin ta qohetabike. Enti tana wadhidosona; shin taw eretibeenna. Hara ushshu uyanaw taani awude dendanee?” yaagana.

24.1: Ta na7aw, iita asata qanaatopa; entara laggetanaw amottofa.
24.2: Enti ubba wode iitabaa maqetoosona; banta inxarsan gene haasayoosona. 20
24.3: Keethi cincatethan keexetees; akeekan minnees.
24.4: Eri de7iko, qol7i al7obaaninne lo77oban kumees. 21
24.5: Cinca asi wolqaama asape aadhees; era asi mino asape lo77o.
24.6: Olas keyanaape koyro halchanaw koshshees; daro zore zoriya asatan xoonoy bentees. 22
24.7: Eeya asi cincatethi akeekanaw danda7enna; shiiqo bessan I odiyabay aybika baawa. 23
24.8: Iita oothanaw qopiya asi gene asi geetetees.
24.9: Eeya asa qofi nagara; qelqisiya asi ixetees. 24
24.10: Meto wode ne dol7iko, ne wolqay guutha. 25
24.11: Pirdi bayna hayqos beyisata ashsha; shukettanaw biya wode si77i gada xeellofa.
24.12: Ne, “Ta hessa erike” giiko, wozana eriya i, be7ennee? Ne de7uwa naageysi erennee? Asa ubbaas iya oosuwada oosuwada zaarennee? 26
24.13: Ta na7aw, eessi lo77o gidiya gisho, eessi ma; ililo eessi mal7ees.
24.14: Cincatethika hessada ne shempuwas mal7o gideysa era. Neeni iya demmiyaba gidiko, sinthara yaana keehay nebaa; ne ufaysay dhayenna. 27
24.15: Xillo asa keethi bonqanaw naagopa; iya aquwa dhaysanaw dendofa.
24.16: Xillo asi laapun toho kundikoka dendees; shin iitati gadon dhayana. 28
24.17: Ne morkey kundiya wode ufaytofa; I dhubetiya wode hashshu goopa.
24.18: Goday hessa be7idi ufaytenna; iya hanqetonna aggaagana. 29
24.19: Iita ootheyisata gaason hirgofa; enta mela gidarkina gada qopofa.
24.20: Iita asas sinthara yaana keehi baawa; iitata xompey to7ana. 30
24.21: Ta na7aw, Godaanne kawa yayya; enta bolla makalleysatara hemetofa.
24.22: Hessa mela asata qoponna metoy gakees; kawuwapenne Godaape yaana meto oone erey? Hara Cinca Zoreta
24.23: Cincati gujidi haysada yaagidosona; Som7o be7idi pirdoy lo77o gidenna.
24.24: Qohidaysa lo77o oothadasa giya daynna, asi baaddana; kawotethati iya ixana.
24.25: Qohidaysa ne bala giya daynnati lo77oba ekana daro anjo demmana.
24.26: Tuma zaaro zaariya asi, tuma lagge mela.
24.27: Kasetada ne gadiya goya; kathi zera; hessafe guye, ne keethaa keexa.
24.28: Ne shooruwa bolla gaasoy bayna markatofa; ne doonan cimmofa.
24.29: “I taw oothidaysada ta iyaw oothana; ta iyaw kushe zaarana” yaagopa.
24.30: Taani booza asa goshshara aadhas; azalla addiya woyne gadera kanthas.
24.31: Agunthinne sharaafi goozi wothis; yuushon de7iya dirsayka laaletis.
24.32: Taani iya be7ida wode qopas; iyape timirte ekas.
24.33: Neeni guuthu liipha; guuthu dhiska; ne kushiya shiishada guuthu shempa.
