24.34: Shin manqotethi paannoda yaana; duussa waayey ola miishe oykida asada puttu gaana.

25.1: Haysati Yihuda kawa Hizqiyaasa asati duuqidi xaafida Solomone leemisota.
25.2: Xuura genthoy Xoossas boncho; xuura pilgidi kesoy kawotas boncho.
25.3: Saloy dhoqu gidaysadanne sa7i ziqa gididaysada kawota qofaa asi eranaw danda7enna.
25.4: Birape qita digga; hessafe guye, hiillanchoy loythana.
25.5: Kawo sinthafe iita asata digga; iya araatay xillotethan minnidi eqana.
25.6: Kawo sinthan eqiya wode ceeqetofa; gita asata giddon new besse koyopa.
25.7: Neepe gitatiya asas besse immanaw halaqay nena denthin, kawuyeysafe, I nena, “Ha dhoqa bessan utta” geysi lo77o.
25.8: Ne ayfen be7idaba markatanaw daynna sinthe baanaw ellesopa. Ne markata simmin hara asi ne markatethay bala gideysa qoncisiko, ne yeellatana.
25.9: Ne giddoninne ne shooruwa giddon palami medhetiko, iyara odetada ne palama wursa; hara asa xuura qoncisopa.
25.10: Hessi hanonna ixiko ne odeysa si7ida asi nena kawushana; ne sunthay zaaridi simmonnaada iitana.
25.11: Bessiya wode odetida like qaali, bira miishe bolla tigetida worqa alleeqo mela.
25.12: Era asi zoriya zore si7iya haythas, hessi worqafe woyko geeshsha worqafe oosetida alleeqo mela.
25.13: Katha cakiya wode irxa haathi uyin aleysada, ammanthiya kiitanchoy bana kiittoysa ufaysees.
25.14: Immonnaba immana gidi ceeqetiya asi iri bayna shaaranne carko mela.
25.15: Danda7a asi halaqa odidi mayzees; liiqo qaali meqethi kanthi gelees.
25.16: Eessi demmiko kallana gakanaw ma; shin darsiko nena cooshshana.
25.17: Nena uufishe ixonnaada, ne shooruwa soo ubba wode boopa.
25.18: Ba shooruwa bolla wordon markatiya asi, xam7i, mashshinne toori qoheysada qohees.
25.19: Meto wode ammanetona asan zempoy, qaaxiya achan coommiyanne silida tohon hemeteysa mela.
25.20: Azzanida asas yethi yexiya asi, meego wode ma7o qaariyanne maduntha bolla caalaba tigiya asa mela.
25.21: Ne morkey koshatiko muza; saamotiko ushsha.
25.22: Ne hessa oothiko iya huuphen tama bonqo kaashidi qoleysa mela; Goday nena woytana.
25.23: Doloha bagga carkoy ira eheysada, zigirsi hanqo ehees.
25.24: Doonatiya machira issi keethan daanape kare barandan duussi lo77o.
25.25: Daaburida asi irxa haathi uyidi aleysada, haaho biittafe yaa lo77o odi ufaysees.
25.26: Iita asa sinthan gulbatiya xillo asi, buullotida pultonne iitida olla haatha mela.
25.27: Daro eessi muussi lo77o gidenna; hessadaka, ba boncho koshshi bonchisenna.
25.28: Bana haaronna asi dirsi laaletida katama mela.

26.1: Bone shachi, kathi cakiya wode iri koshshonaysada, eeyas boncho koshshenna.
26.2: Kafoti yaanne haanne piradhishe ase qohonnaysada, gaasoy bayna baaddiya baadethi ase gakenna.
26.3: Paras lisso, hares bixaala koshsheysada eeya zokos xam7a koshshees.
26.4: Eeya asas iya eeyatethaada zaaropa; zaariko ne iya mela gidana.
26.5: Eeya asas iya eeyatetha qoncisada zaara; hessi hanonna ixiko I bana cinca gidi qopana.
26.6: Eeya asa bolla kiita yedoy, ba toho qanxi yeggeysa mela woyko wodhiyaba uyeysa mela.
26.7: Eeya asa leemisoy, silida toho mela maaddenna.
26.8: Eeya asas boncho imoy, shuchu yambarshan qachi wothidi yambaranaw paaciya asa mela.
26.9: Eeya asa leemisoy mathotida asi ba kushe caddida agunthu kessanaw baaxeteysa mela.
26.10: Eeya asa woyko ba oge biya asi une oosisanaw qaxariya asi ba toora shaaran xongiya asa mela.
26.11: Kani ba cooshshako guye simmidi laaceysada, eeya asi ba eeyatetha zaari zaari qoncisees.
26.12: Bana cinca oothidi xeelliya asape eeya asas lo77o qaadi de7ees.
26.13: “Azalla asi ogen gaammoy de7ees; yashshiya gaammoy ogen yuuyees” yaagees.
26.14: Sanqi maxaafe bolla yaanne haanne qaaxeysada, azalla asi ba hiixan yaanne haanne shiretees.
26.15: Issi issi azalla asi hari attoshin, woxen tushidi baaranaw waayetees.
26.16: Azalla asi markara odiya laapun cincatape bana aadhida cinca gidi qopees.
26.17: Bana gathiyabay baynaban palamiya asi ogera biya kana haythi oykiya asa mela.
26.18: -19 Ba shooruwa, “Taani kaasse gayis” yaagidi cimmiya asi, gooyidi bonqo tama holiya, woyko wodhiya donge toora dukiya asa mela.
26.20: Mithi wuriko tami to7ees; zigirsi dhayiko ooshshi attees.
26.21: Xiifi bonqo darseysadanne mithi tama darseysada palama darsiya asi ooshshu darsees.
26.22: Zigirsa qaali mal7o katha mela ufaysishe duge ganje bees.
26.23: Wozanan iitabay de7ishin, ba inxarsan cimo qaala haasaya asi biran lanxetida urqa miishe mela.
26.24: Gene asi ba wozanan de7iya iitatethaa ba inxarsan genthees.
26.25: Iya wozanan laapun tunati kumida gisho, I lo77o qaala haasaykoka iya ammanopa.
26.26: Ba morketetha I genthikoka, I oothiya iitay dabaaban qoncana.
26.27: Haratas olla bookiya asi he ollan baw kundana; harata bolla shuchu gondorsiya asa bolla he shuchay simmidi gondoretana.
26.28: Wordotiya inxarsi ba qohida asata ixees; cimo odi kundethi kaalethees.

27.1: Wontoy ehanaba ne eronna gisho wontoban ceeqetofa.
27.2: Hara asi nena galatope attishin neeni nena galatopa; asi ne gisho markatofe attishin, neeni ne keehatethabaa odopa.
27.3: Shuchi gita tooho; shafey deexo; shin eeya asi medhiya ooshshi nam7aafeka deexees.
27.4: Hanqos qadhey baawa; yiloy dhaysiya di7o mela; shin qanaatey ubbaafe iita.
27.5: Geemmida siiqope baliya wode qoncen hanqetethi lo77o.
27.6: Morkey nena tammu toho yeeranaape siiqoy nena madunxiseysi lo77o.
27.7: Kallida asi ililo eessi shaattees; shin koshatida uraa cammiyabay mal7ees.
27.8: Ba soo aggidi yuuyiya asi, ba keethaa aggada paalliya kafo mela.
27.9: Shittoynne sawiya ixaaney ase ufayseysada siiqo lagge zorey hessada ufaysees.
27.10: Ne laggetanne ne aawa laggeta aggofa; ne metootida wode ne ishaa soo boopa; haahon de7iya ishape matan de7iya shooroy lo77o.
27.11: Ta na7aw, cinca gida; tana ufaysa; tana kadhiya asaas ta zaaro immana.
27.12: Cinca asi metoy yaa wode be7idi qosetees; shin akeeki bayna asi bidi meton gelees; yaatidi guyepe qiirotees.
27.13: Eronna asas waase geliya uraa ma7uwa qaari ekite; imatha asas waase gelida uraa ma7uwa oykite.
27.14: Wonta guura ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, ba shooruwa sarotey iya baaddiya asa mela.
27.16: Carko teqanaw, zayte kuucidi oykanaw danda7etonaysada, iyo si77i oothanaw danda7etenna.
27.17: Birati birata posheysada, asi issoy issuwafe tamaarees.
27.18: Balase mithi loythidi naagiya asi iya ayfe maana; ba halaqaa kaaboya oosanchoy bonchetana.
27.19: Haathi mastooteda som7o besseysada, asa wozani iya oonatetha bessees.
27.20: Hayqoynne Duufoy kalli eronnaysada, asa ayfey kallidi erenna.
27.21: Birinne worqey taman paacetidi geeyeysada, asi ba ekiya galatan paacetees.
27.22: Kathi udulan caddeysada, eeya asi udulan caddiyakoka iyape eeyatethay kichenna.
27.23: Ne dorsata hanota loythada era; ne wudiyaka akeekada heemma.
27.24: Ayis giiko, duretethi merinaw deenna; kallachika yeletethafe yeletethaas aadhenna.
27.25: Mela maatay buucetin, aaca maati keya wode, deriya bolla de7iya maatay shiiqidaape guye,
27.26: dorsata ikisepe ne new ma7o kessana; deeshata bayzada gade shammana.
27.27: Attida deeshata maathay new, ne soo asaasinne ne macca aylletas kathi gidana.

28.1: Iitati oonika yedethonna baqatoosona; shin xilloti gaammo mela yayyonna de7oosona.
28.2: Issi kawotethay makalliko, haareysati daroosona; shin kaaletheysi cincanne akeekancho gidiko, sarotethinne wopi de7ees.
28.3: Manqota un7ethiya kawoy kathi dhaysiya wolqaama ira mela.
28.4: Higge bonchona asi iita asaa sabbees; shin higge bonchiya asi iita asaa ixees.
28.5: Iita asatas suure pirdi gelenna; shin Godaa goyinniya asi ubbaa akeekes.
28.6: Dure gididi cimmiya asi gidanaape, suure asi gididi manqo gideysi lo77o.
28.7: Higge naagiya na7ay akeeka na7a; shin pathonna asara hemetey ba aawa yeellayees.
28.8: Mishe yelon tal7eynne ase bonqidi duretiya asi he aquwa manqotas keehiya asas shiishees.
28.9: Higge si7anaape gidi ba haytha tucciya, uraa woosay Godaa sinthan ixetidaba.
28.10: Suureta iita ogen kaalethiya uray ba bookida ollan kundana; shin geeshshati lo77oba laattana.
28.11: Dure asi bana cinca gidi qopees; shin akeeki de7iya manqoy iya paacees.
28.12: Xilloti xooniya wode asa ubbay ufaytees; shin iitati maata oykiya wode asay qosetees.
28.13: Ba nagaraa genthiya asi aacenna; shin paaxeynne nagara aggey maarota ekana.
28.14: Godaa ubba wode yayiya asi anjetidaysa; shin ba wozana minthiya asi meton gelana.
28.15: Manqo asaa haariya iita halaqay, gudiya gaammonne koshatida babantha mela.
28.16: Akeeki bayna kawoy ba deriya qohees; shin ase qohonna halaqi daro laythi haarana.
28.17: Ase wodhiya asi hayqana gakanaw baqatishe de7ees; iya oonika maaddenna.
28.18: Borey bayna hemetiya asi qohetenna; shin geella asi akeekona kundana.
28.19: Minnidi oothiya asi kathi kallees; shin pathonna amo kaalliya asi manqotethi laattana.
28.20: Ammanetiya uray daro anjetana; shin duretanaw woxiya asi meto be7ana.
28.21: Som7o be7idi pirdoy lo77o gidenna; shin asi baso uytha gisho gidi qohees.
28.22: Yaare asi duretanaw baqetees; manqotethi akeekona oykanaysa erenna.
28.23: Ase coo sabbiya asape hanqetiya asi guyepe galatetees.
28.24: Ba aawanne ba aayiw kaysotidi, “Nagara oothabike” giya asinne demmidaba dhaysiya asi issino.
28.25: Uuze asi ooshshi denthees; shin Godan ammanetiya asi kallees.
28.26: Banan ammanetiya asi eeya; shin cincatethan hemetiya asi saro de7ees.
28.27: Manqos immiya asi metootenna; shin enta be7anaape gidi qilim7ey baadetana.
28.28: Iita asati shuumetiya wode asay qosetees; shin enti dhayiya wode xilloti daroosona.

29.1: Daro wode seeretidi simmonna asi hassayonna meqana; he uraas paxoy baawa.
29.2: Xillo asati shuumetiya wode asay ufaytees; shin iitati biitta haariya wode asay un7etees.
29.3: Cincatethi dosiya asi ba aawa ufaysees; shin layma maccasa heeran yuuyiya asi ba miishiya wursees.
29.4: Tuma pirdan kawoy ba kawotethaa wopu oothees; shin wodhaafe ekiya kawoy ba kawotethaa dhaysees.
29.5: Ba shooruwa cimon sabbiya asi, ba tohos xihe yeggees.
29.6: Iita asi ba nagaran oyketees; shin xillo asi ufaytees; yexees.
29.7: Xillo asi manqotas suure pirdees; shin iita asati hessa erokona.
29.8: Cayiya asati kataman ooshshu denthoosona; shin cinca asati hanqo irxisoosona.
29.9: Cinca asi eeya asa pirda keethi efiko, eeyay hanqetees; qidhees; iyaw saroy baawa.
29.10: Suuthu gussanaw saamotiya asati suure asi ixoosona; xillo asaa wodhanaw koyoosona.
29.11: Eeya asi ba hanquwa yeddi bessees; shin cinca asi bana haarees.
29.12: Shuumay wordo oda si7iyaba gidiko, iya moorinnati ubbay iita gidoosona.
29.13: Manqoynne ase naaqiya asi issiba koxoosona; enta nam7aas ayfe immiday Godaa.
29.14: Kawoy manqotas suure pirdiko, I ba araatan gam7ana.
29.15: Pircon seeri naytas cincatethi immees; shin yedan diccida na7i ba aayiw kawushshees.
29.16: Iita asati dariya wode nagari darees; shin xilloti enta kundethaa be7ana.
29.17: Ne na7aa seera; I new saro immana; I nena ufaysana.
29.18: Qoncethi bayna ixiko derey yeda gidees; shin higge naagiya asi anjetidaysa.
29.19: Aylley coo oda xalaalan seeretenna; iyaw geliyakoka I kiitetenna.
29.20: Eeson haasaya asi be7a eray? Iyape eeya asas ufaysi de7ees.
29.21: Ne aylliya na7a yeda dichiko, iya wursethay azzano gidana.
29.22: Hanqetiya asi ooshshu denthethees; elle yilotiya asi daro nagara oothees.
29.23: Otoroy ase kawushshees; shin ashke ayyaani de7iya asi bonchetees.
29.24: Kaysora laggetiya asi bana ixiya asi; I dabaaban tuma odiko seeretees; I tumaa odonna ixiko Godan baadetana.
29.25: Asas yashshi he uraas xihe gidees; shin Godan ammanetiya asi saro de7ees.
29.26: Daroti maati de7iya asape made koyoosona; shin suure pirdi Godaape bentees.
29.27: Xilloti nagaranchota shaatettoosona; iitati suure asaa ixoosona.

30.1: Yaaqe na7aa Agura leemisoti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Aguri Iti7eelasinne Ukaalas haysa haasayis.
30.2: Taani asa ubbaafe aadhida eeya; asas de7iya akeeki taw deenna.
30.3: Taani cincatethi tamaarabike; Geeshsha Xoossabaaka erike.
30.4: Salo pude keyidi duge wodhiday oonee? Carko ba kushen oykiday, haathe ba afilan yiiciday, sa7aa gaxaa minthidi essiday oonee? Iya sunthay oonee? Iya na7aa sunthay oonee? Iya eriya gidiko ane taw oda?
30.5: Xoossa qaalan borey baawa; ubbay tuma iyan ammanetiya ubbaas I gondalle.
30.6: Iya qaala bolla aybaka gujofa; gujiko I nena seerana; ne wordancho gideysa I qoncisana.
30.7: Godaw, ta nena nam7ubba oychayis; ta hayqana gakanaw enta tana diggofa.
30.8: Ta ase cimmonna melanne wordo haasayonna mela tana naaga; taw koshshiya kathi immafe attishin, tana dure woyko manqo oothofa.
30.9: Dure gidada, “Goday oonee?” gada nena kaddana; manqo gidada, kaysada ta Xoossaa sunthaa cayisana.
30.10: Nena baaddonna melanne iya baadethay new gome gidonna mela, aylliya iya godaara zigropa.
30.11: Ba aawa baaddiyanne ba aayiw anjona yeletethi de7ees.
30.12: Daro tuna gidi uttidi bantana geeshshi oothiya asati de7oosona.
30.13: Otoron kumida asatinne ase kadhidi xeelliya asati de7oosona.
30.14: Enta achay mashshe gidin, enta gaccoy toora gidin, manqotanne metootanchota naaqidi, entaba bonqiya asati de7oosona.
30.15: Ullathas nam7u macca nayti de7oosona; enti, “Hamma! Hamma!” yaagidi waassoosona. Kallidi eronna heedzubati de7oosona; oyddanthoy qassi “Gidana” gidi erenna.
30.16: Hessati, duufo, maynnida maccas, haathe kallidi eronna mela biittanne, “Gidana!” gidi eronna tama.
30.17: Ba aawa leqiya na7aa ayfiya, ba aayiya cimin kadhiya na7aa ayfiya, zangaaran de7iya quuroti woocana; iya ashuwa ankoti maana.
30.18: Tana heedzubati malaalsoosona; oyddanthoy ubba taw gelenna.
30.19: Hessati, salora paalliya arganthi, zaalla bollara kolxiya shooshi abba bollara biya markabenne geela7ora shiiqo oyketida adde.
30.20: Layma maccasi haniya hanoyka hessa mela; Iya masu; shin ba doona quchada, “Taani aykoka balabiike” yaagawusu.
30.21: Heedzuban biitti qaaxees; oyddanthuwa ubba tookanaw danda7etenna.
30.22: Hessatika, aylley kawotida wode, eeya asi kathi kallida wode,
30.23: asi ixida maccasi azina gelida wodenne macca aylliya ba godatiw laattida wode medhetiya hanota.
30.24: Sa7a bolla oyddu guutha medhetethati de7oosona; shin enti aadhida cinca.
30.25: Hessatika, Cuncalley wolqi bayna medhetethi; shin bantaw miyaba bone shiishidi, minjoosona.
30.26: Gupaleti wolqi baynayisata; shin banta keetha zaalla qophon keexoosona.
30.27: Booletas kawoy baawa; shin enti ubbay maaran zattoosona.
30.28: Zareti kushen oyketoosona; shin kawo gadhon de7oosona.
30.29: Banta maata bessishe hemetiya heedzu medhetethati de7oosona; oyddanthoy lo77o hemethi hemetees.
30.30: Hessika, do7a ubbaafe minonne yashshi eronna gaammo.
30.31: Macca kuttota giddon hemetiya adde kutto, wude kaalethiya deesha kole; ba olanchota giddon qoncen eqiya kawa.
30.32: Neeni eeyada otortidaba gidikoka, iita oothanaw halchidaba gidiko, ane taki gada qopa.
30.33: Maathi bukey oysu kesseysada, siidhe dichin suuthi yeysada, hanqo denthethoy ooshshu ehees.

31.1: Haysafe kaallidi xaafetida leemisoy, kawa Limu7eela aayiya kawa Limu7eela tamaarsidaysa.
31.2: Ta na7aw, ta ulope wodhidayso, taani qangetada yelidayso,
31.3: maccasan ne wolqaa wursofa; kawota dhaysiya maccasatan ne minotethaa dhaysofa.
31.4: “Limu7eela, woyne ushshi kawotas bessenna; mathoyiya ushshi shuumatas bessenna.
31.5: Enti uyaa wode higge baloosona; naaqetida asaa maata qelli goosona.
31.6: Mathoyaa ushshu hayqana haniya uraasinne sa7i iitida uraas immite.
31.7: Enti banta manqotethaanne banta waayiya doganaw uyo.
31.8: Banta gisho odetanaw danda7onna asaa gisho ne odeeta; maaddiya asi baynayisata gisho ne eqa.
31.9: Enta miyen eqada entaw suure pirda; manqotanne metootanchota maata naaga” yaagada tamaarsasu. Wozanaama Macho
31.10: “Wozanaama macho ooni demmanaw danda7ii? I gatey zo7o al7o shuchafe aadhees.
31.11: I azinay iyo ammanetees; iyaw koshshiyabaape aybika pacenna.
31.12: Iya ba de7o laytha ubban, iyaw lo77obaape attishin, iitaba oothuku.
31.13: Suufenne liino koyada, ufaytashe ba kushen oothawusu.
31.14: Iya zal7anchota markabe mela; ba kathaa haaho biittafe shiishawusu.
31.15: Iya ba soo asaas kathi giigisanawunne ba macca aylletas ooso immanaw, sa7i wontonna de7ishin dendawusu.
31.16: Lo77o gade koyada shammawusu; ba kushen oothada demmida miishen woyne tokawusu.
31.17: Iya ba xeessa minthada dancawusu; ba qesiya oosos minthawusu.
31.18: Iya wodhe demmanaw minnada zal7awusu; iya oothashe qamisiya gisho I xompey to7enna.
31.19: Iya ba hindziritiya oykawusu; ba biradhen loythada suqawusu.
31.21: I soo asa ubbay ho77iya ma7o ma7iya gisho, shachi bukikoka iya hirguku.
31.22: Alga bolla hiixiya ma7o sikawusu; liinope oosetida ocha teera daaniya ma7o ma7awusu.
31.23: Biitta cimati shiiqiya dubbushan I azinay bonchetida asi.
31.24: Liinope ma7onne danco oothada, zal7anchotas bayzawusu.
31.25: Iya minonne boncho asi; yaana laytha ubban ufaytada de7awusu.
31.26: Cincatethan ba doona dooyawusu; ammanthiya zorey I inxarsan de7ees.
31.27: Iya ba soo asaa de7uwa injeyanaw ubba wode oothawusu; azallatethi I bolla bentidi erenna.
31.28: I nayti dendidi, iyo nashshoosona; I azinay iyo yaagidi galatees;
31.29: Lo77oba oothiya daro maccasati de7oosona; shin ne enta ubbaafe aadhasa” yaagees.
31.30: Mali cimmees; yegelssatethi dhayana. Shin Godaa yayiya maccasiya, iya anjetidaaro.
31.31: Iya oothidaba ubbaas iyo woytite; I ooso ubbay dabaaban iyo galatiso.

1.1: Haysi, Dawita na7aa, Yerusalaamen kawotida cinca uraa qaala.
1.2: He cincay, “Ubbabay hada; ubbabay hadape hada; ubbabay kumethi hada” yaagis.
1.3: Ba de7iya bessan ubban, asi daaburidi oothiyaba ubban iyaw wodhey aybee?
1.4: Issi yeletethi aadhiya wode, hara yeletethi bessaa oykees. Shin ha biittay merinawuka laametonna de7ees.
1.5: Awi dolees wullees; nam7antho dolanaw yaa doliya bessaa ellesees.
1.6: Carkoy issi toho duge issi toho pude carkees; qassi yuuyi yuuyi aadhidi, simeretidi yees.
1.7: Goggiya haathi ubbay abban gelees; shin abbay kumi erenna. He haathay simmidi gogganaw, guye ba pultiya bessaa bees.
1.8: Ubbabay salethiyaba; I ay mela salethiyako odi wursanaw danda7etenna. Ayfey xeellidi kalli erenna; haythi si7idi, taw gidis geenna.
1.9: Kase hanidabay wontoka simmidi I hanana; qassi ha77i hanishe de7eysi kase hanidaba. Hessa gisho, salo gufanthon oorathabay aybika baawa.
1.10: Oonika, “Heko, haysi oorathaba” giiko, hessi oorathi gidenna; hessi nuuni yeletanaape kase hanidaba.
1.11: Kase aadhida wodetan hanidabata zaaridi hassayabay baawa; guyepe hananabata entafe guye oonika hassayenna. Cincatethi Hada
1.12: Taani cincay, Yerusalaamen Isra7eeles kawo gidada de7as.
1.13: Taani sa7an de7iyaba ubbaa shaakada eranawunne cincatethan pilgada xeellanaw qofa qachas. Yaatada asa ubbaas Xoossay immida de7oy daro daabursiyabaanne ufaysonnaba gideysa akeekas.
1.14: Salope garsan hanidaba ubbaa taani be7as; shin ubbayka hada; carko oykanaw yedetheysa mela.
1.15: Geelli suuranaw danda7enna; baynaba taybanaw danda7etenna.
1.16: Taani ta wozanan haysada yaagada qopas; “Taape kase Yerusalaame haarida ubbatape taani gitanne cinca gidas. Cincatethinne era guussi I aybeko paacada eras” yaagas.
1.17: Taani cincatethafe, gooshshatethafenne eeyatethafe giddon de7iya dummatethi aybeko eranaw daro daaburas. Shin wursethan hessika carko oykanaw yedetheysa mela hada gideysa eras.
1.18: Cincatethi dariya wode azzanthiyabay darees; eri dariya wode qassi metoy darees.

2.1: Taani taako, “Haaya, ta nena ufaysi aybeko erisanaw lo7oba bessaana” yaagas; shin hessika hada.
2.2: Miichi eeyatethi gideysa, qassi miikoynne ufaysi aykoka go77onnaysa akeekas.
2.3: Ha7ika ta wozanay cincatethan tana kaalethishin, tana woyne ushshan ufaysanaw, eeyaka gidanaw paacas. Asi ba qantha woden salope garsan de7iyaba bolla ay oothiko go77aneko eranaw koyas.
2.4: Issi gitaba oothas; ta daana keethata keexas; woyne tokas.
2.5: Dumma dumma atakiltiyanne ayfe ayfiya mithata tokas; asi shempiya bessaa giigisas. He bessan dumma dumma ayfe ayfiya mithata tokas.
2.6: He mithata ushshanaw, haathe dagaaya bessi zeerada giigisas.
2.7: Addenne macca aylleta shammas; qassi ta son yeletida hara aylletika taw de7oosona. Taape kase Yerusalaamen de7ida asaape aadhiya mehe, deeshenne dorse haaras.
2.8: Ta haariya dumma dumma biittatapenne kawotape bonchetida buqura ehisada, daro worqanne bira taw dagayaas. Qassi, tana sabbidi yexiya addenne macca shiishas; hessa bolla, asas ufaysi immiya daro maccasata shiishas.
2.9: Taani kase Yerusalaamen de7ida oodefeka aadhada gita asi gidas. Ta cincatethayka taara wursethi gakanaw de7is.
2.10: Ta ayfey xeellidabaanne ta wozanay amotidaba ubbaa demmas; ta asatethay koyiya ufaysi ubbaa diggabike. Taani oothida ooso ubban ufaytas; ta daabura wodhey hessa.
2.11: Gidoshin, hessa ubbaa ootha simmada taani akeekiya wode, daro taani iyaw daaburida ubbay hada gideysa be7as. Salope garsan go77iyabay aykoy baawa; ubbay carko oykanaw yedethiya mela. Cincatethinne Eeyatethi Hada
2.12: Hessafe guye, taani cincatethi, eeyatethinne gooshshatethi ayibeko paacada eranaw qofaa doomas. Awude gidinka kawoy oothanaw danda7ey iyape kase kawotida kawoy oothidaysafe harabay aybi de7ii?
2.13: Poo7oy dhumape, cincatethi eeyatethafe lo77o gideysa taani be7as.
2.14: Cinca asa ayfeti iya huuphiya giddon de7oosona; shin eeyati dhuman hemetoosona. Gidoshin, enta nam7aa wursethay issino gideysa akeekas.
2.15: Taani taako, “Eeya gakeya qaaday tanaka gakees; yaatin, taani cinca gideysi tana ay maaddii?” yaagada qopas. Qassi taani ta wozanan, “Haysika hada” yaagas.
2.16: Eeya gidin cinca, hayqope guye, iya hassayey baawa; sinthafe yaa laythan nuuni ubbay dogetidi attana. Eeyay hayqeysada, cincayka hayqees. Ooson Daaburi Hada
2.17: Metope attishin, go77iyabay bayna gisho, ha de7oy tana shaattis. Hessika hada; carko oykanaw yedethiya mela.
2.18: Salope garsan taani daro daaburada demmida ta shaluwa ubbaa taape guyera yaa uraas aggada biya gisho, taani daaburida ubbay tana shaattis.
2.19: Taape guyera yaa addey cinceko eeyeko ooni erii? Shin I oona gidinka, taani daro daaburidabaanne ta cincatethan demmidaba ubbaa baw ekidi, godaa gidana; hessika hada.
2.20: Hessa gisho, salope garsan ta daaburidaba bolla ta wozanay ufaysi qanxis.
2.21: Asi ba de7ida laythan baw de7ida cincatethan, eraninne hiillan daaburidi demmidaba ubbaa aykoka daaburonaysas yeggidi bees. Hessika hadanne gita qoho.
2.22: Yaatin, salope garsan asi daro daaburidi oothidaba ubbaafe ay go77a demmii?
2.23: I ba de7o laythan daaburiya daaburi ubbay azzanopenne muudethafe attishin, hari aybika iyaw gujenna; hari attoshin qammaka iya huuphey qofape shempenna; he ubbayka hada.
2.24: Hiza asas go77a gidiyabay aybe giiko, asi midi uyidi ba daaburan ufaytanaysa. He ufaysay qassi Xoossaa kushiyape imetidaba gideysa taani akeekas.
2.25: Iya shene gidonna, min uyin asas ufaysi awun de7ii?
2.26: Xoossaa ufaysiya uraas Xoossay cincatethi, eratethinne ufaysi immees; nagaranchuwas I daaburidi shiishana mela, daabura immees. Shin I shiishidaysa Xoossay ekidi, baw yayiya haras immees. Hessa gisho, ha ubbay hadanne carko oykanaw yedetho mela.

3.1: Ubbabaas wodey de7ees; salope garsan oosetiyaba ubbaas wodeynne qammi de7ees.
3.2: Yeletanaw wodey de7ees; hayqanaw wodey de7ees. Tokanaw wodey de7ees; Shoddanaw wodey de7ees.
3.3: Wodhanaw wodey de7ees; pathanaw wodey de7ees. Laallanaw wodey de7ees; keexanaw wodey de7ees.
3.4: Yeekanaw wodey de7ees; miiccanaw wodey de7ees. Kayotanaw wodey de7ees; yexanaw wodey de7ees.
3.5: Shuchu laallanaw wodey de7ees; shuchu shiishanaw wodey de7ees. Qoometanaw wodey de7ees; duuxanaw wodey de7ees.
3.6: Koyanaw wodey de7ees; koshshi agganaw wodey de7ees. Shiishi oykanaw wodey de7ees; laallanaw wodey de7ees.
3.7: Peedhanaw wodey de7ees; sikanaw wodey de7ees. Si77i gaanaw wodey de7ees; odetanaw wodey de7ees.
3.8: Dosanaw wodey de7ees; ixanaw wodey de7ees. Olas wodey de7ees; saro daanaw wodey de7ees.
3.9: Yaatin, oosanchoy ba daaburida daaburaape ay wodhe demmii?
3.10: Taani qassi, asa na7i daaburidi oothana mela, Xoossay immida toohoy daro deexo gideysa be7as.
3.11: Xoossay ubbaba iya wodiyan wodiyan loythidi oothis. Xoossay asa wozanan merinatethi wothis; gidikoka, Xoossay oothidaba ubbaa koyrope wursethi gakanaw, asi kumethi eranaw danda7enna.
3.12: Asi ba de7ida laythan lo77iyaba ootheysafenne, ufayteysafe aadhiyabay aybika baynaysa taani akeekas.
3.13: Qassi, asas oothi daaburidi demmiya daaburas gatey, midinne uyidi ufayteysi Xoossaafe iyaw imetida imota.
3.14: Xoossay oothidaba ubbay merinaw de7eysa taani eras; I oothidaba bolla gujanaw woyko iyape denthanaw oodesika danda7etenna. Xoossi hessa oothey, asi iya yayyidi bonchana melasa.
3.15: Ha77i hanishe de7iyabay woyko sinthafe hananaw de7iyaba ubbay kase hanidaba; Xoossay kase hanidabay zaari hananaada koyees. Pirda Geellatethi
3.16: Qassi taani, salope garsan xillo pirda bessan iitatethi, xillotetha bessan geney de7eysa be7as.
3.17: Ta wozanan, “Xoossay xilluwanne worduwa nam7aaka pirdas shiishana; Xoossay hanidaba ubbaasinne ooso ubbaas wode qanxi wothis” yaagada qopas.
3.18: Taani taako, “Asi do7ape duumatonaysa enti akeekana mela Xoossay enta paacees” yaagas.
3.19: Ase gidin, do7a gidin, enta qaaday issino; issoy hayqeysada, hankoyka hayqees. Nam7ay issi carko shempoosona; hessa gisho, asi do7ape dummatenna; hessika hada.
3.20: Enti nam7ay issi bessi boosona; nam7ay biittafe medhetida gisho, biitta simmoosona.
3.21: Yaatin, asa shempoy salo pude keyeysanne do7a shempoy biitta duge wodheysa shaakidi erey oonee?
3.22: Asi ba oothida ooson ufayteysafe lo77iya harabay iyaw baynaysa be7as. Iyaw de7iya lo77o qaaday hessa xalaala. Asi hayqi simmin iyape guye haniyaba bessanaw, iya guye ehanaw danda7ey oonee?

4.1: Taani zaarada, salope garsan ay mela naaqoy de7iyako be7as. Naaqeteysati minthetho dhayidi yeekosona. Naaqeyisata kushen maati de7iya gisho naaqeteyisata maaddey baawa.
4.2: Taani, “Ha77i paxa de7eysatape kase hayqidaysati lo77o” yaagas.
4.3: Gidoshin, ha nam7atape aadhidi yeletiboonaysatanne salope garsan oosetiya naaquwa be7onayisata qaaday lo77o.
4.4: Asa daaburinne amotidaba demoy, asas ba laggiya bolla de7iya qanaatepe pulteysa be7as. Hessika hada; carko oykanaw kaalo mela.
4.5: Ba kushe idimmidi uttiya azallay koshan hayqees.
4.6: Daaburaninne carko kaalon demmiya dakobaape wopan demmiya issi kushey lo77o.
4.7: Salope garsan hada gididaba haraba be7as.
4.8: Hessika na7i woyko ishi bayna issi bizza addey de7ees. Shin iya daaburas zawi baawa; baw de7iyaban alenna. I bana, “Ta haysa ooddes daaburayna? Taani tana ayis ufaysi diggadina?” yaagidi oychis. Hessika qassi hadanne meto de7o.
4.9: Banta oosuwan lo77o ayfe demmiya gisho issino gideysafe nam7a gideysi lo77o.
4.10: Nam7aafe issoy kundiko issoy denthees; shin barka de7iya uray kundiko iya denthey bayna gisho iya ayye!
4.11: Nam7ay issife zin7iko ho77ees; shin barka zin7iya uraa waanidi ho77anaw danda7ii?
4.12: Issi asi barka teqanaw danda7onna metuwa nam7u asati teqanaw danda7oosona. Heedzu ayfen dooqetida wodoroy elle duuxenna. Asape Aadhidi Bentoy Hada
4.13: Zore ekonna eeyanne ceega kawuwape manqonne cinca gidida na7atetha kawoy lo77o.
4.14: He na7atethay qasho keethafe keyidi woyko manqotethafe dendidi kawo gidanaw danda7ees.
4.15: Salope garsan de7iyanne simeretiya asa ubbay kawa laattiya na7atetha kaalleysa be7as.
4.16: Issi kawoy haariya asaa tayboy daro gidanaw danda7ees. Shin kaalliya yeletethay iya kawotethan ufaytibeenna. Hessika hada; carko oykanaw kaalo mela.

5.1: Xoossa keethi geliya wode akeekada tanga. Enti banta iita oosuwa eronna gisho, si7anaw shiiqoy eeyata yarshuwafe aadhees.
5.2: Odetanaw eesotopa; Xoossa sinthan odetanaw ne wozanan dirgofa. Xoossay salona, neeni sa7ana; hessa gisho, ne qaalay guutha gido.
5.3: Qofi dariya wode amuhoy darees; oda daroy eeyatethi qoncisees.
5.4: Xoossas gepidaba polanaw gam7ofa; eeyatan Xoossay ufaytenna. Hessa gisho, neeni gepidaba ubbaa pola.
5.5: Issiba gepidi polonna agganaape koyro geponna agoy lo77o.
5.6: Nagaran nena gelsonna mela ne inxarsa yeda oothofa. Xoossa keethan ootheysako, “Koyro haysa taani akeekona gepas” goopa. Hessi Xoossa daro hanqethiya gisho, ne kushe ooso ubbaa I ba hanquwan dhaysanaw danda7ees.
5.7: Daro amuhoynne daro odi hada. Hessa gisho, Xoossaa yayya. Duretethi Hada
5.8: Issi biittan manqoti naaqetishin, pirdi geellatishin neeni be7iko malaaletofa. Issi issi halaqaas iyape bollara shuumetidi iya xeelliya hara halaqi de7ees. Qassi entafe bollara shuumetidi enta xeelliya hara halaqati de7oosona.
5.9: Biittafe bentiya wodhey ubbaasa; hari attoshin, kawoyka goshshafe go7etees.
5.10: Bira dosiya uraas biri gidi erenna; duretethi siiqiya uray miishe kalli erenna; he ubbay hada.
5.11: Duretethi dariya wode miya asi darees. Ba shaluwa coo ayfen xeellidi, “Taani dure” gaanape haraba ay maaddii?
5.12: Ooso oothiya asi guuthu min daro min, saro dhisko dhiskees; shin durey ba duretethaas ubba wode un7etiya gisho dhisko dhayidi de7ees.
5.13: Salope garsan daro azzanthiyaba haraba taani be7as. Hessika iita wode bana asho gidi minjida shalo,
5.14: woyko issi iitabay gakin dhayida duretethi. I na7a yelidaba gidikoka na7aa laatisiyaba dhayidi mela attees.
5.15: Asi ubbay kallo yeletidaysada mela kushe simmidi baana. Ay mela I daaburidi oothikoka ekidi biyabay baawa.
5.16: Asi kallo yeletidi kallo guye simmeysi daro azzanthiya iitabaa. Iya daabura ubbay carko oykiyabada hada gidiko iya ay maaddii?
5.17: I ba laytha ubbaa dhuma de7on, azzanon, yeellan, hargeninne yilon wursees.
5.18: Hiza, taani akeekida issi lo77obay, salope garsan Xoossi asas immida qantha laythan, asi ba daaburaape midi uyidi ufayteysi lo77onne bessiyaba; iya qaaday hessa.
5.19: Xoossi asas duretethinne shalo immey, ba daabura gatiya demmidi, midi uyidi ufaytana melasa; hessika Xoossaafe iyaw imetida imota.
5.20: Xoossi iya wozanan ubba wode ufaysi kunthiya gisho I ba de7o laythaba daro qopenna.

6.1: Salope garsan asa bolla gakiya daro iitabaa taani be7as.
6.2: Xoossi asas shalo, duretethinne boncho immees; iyaw koshshiyabaape issibaaka pacisenna. Shin iyaw imetida shaluwaninne duretethan ufaytana mela kumetha maata immenna. Hessa xalaala gidonashin I daaburidi demmidaban hari ufaytana mela oothees; hessika hadanne azzanthiya iitabaa.
6.3: Issi asi xeetu na7a yelidi, adussa laythi de7idi cimanaw danda7ees. Shin I baw imetidaban ufaytonnanne wursethan bonchon moogetonna attiko iyape boshi lo77o gayis.
6.4: He boshay coo yeletidi oonika hassayonna dhumaa biya gisho iya sunthay dhuman kametidi attees.
6.5: I, awa poo7o be7onna woyko aybibaaka eronna attikoka he uraape aadhidi iyaw shempoy de7ees.
6.6: Hessa gisho, ufaysi bayna nam7u mukulu laythi de7iya asape he bosha qaaday lo77o. Wursethan nam7ay issi bessi boosona.
6.7: Asi daaburidi oothiya ubbay baw miyaba demmanaasa; shin iya amoy ali erenna.
6.8: Yaatin, cinca asi eeya asape aybin dummatii? Manqoy daro cincidi, harata sinthan waanidi daaneko eroy iya ay maaddii?
6.9: Amon xuugetanaape ayfen be7oy lo77o; hessika carko oykanaw kaalo mela hada.
6.10: Haniyaba ubbay koyrottidi eretidi de7ees. Issi issi asi waananaw de7iyako adussa wodepe kase eretidi uttis. Ay asika baape minneysara baaxetanaw danda7enna.
6.11: Odi dariya wode hadabay darees; yaatin hessi ase ay maaddii?
6.12: Hada gididi kuyada coo aadhiya ba guutha laytha asi waatidi aathanaw koshshiyako erey oonee? Asi hayqidi aggin salope garsan hananaw de7iyaba asas odanaw danda7ey oonee?

7.1: Al77o shittofe lo77o sunthi aadhees; yeletiya gallasape hayqo gallas lo77o.
7.2: Asa ubbaa wursethay hayqo gidida gisho, gibira keethi beysafe yeeho keethi beysi lo77o; de7on de7iya asi hessa ba wozanan wothanaw koshshees.
7.3: Azzanoy som7o kareethikoka, wozana poo7isiya gisho miichafe azzanoy lo77o.
7.4: Cinca asa wozani yeeho son de7ees; shin eeya asa wozani ufaysa son de7ees.
7.5: Eeyata yethi si7anaape cincata seera sissi lo77o.
7.6: Eeya asa miichi agunthan tama yeddin dhuuqeysa mela; hessika hada.
7.7: Gene oosoy cinca asi eeya kessees; wodhaafe ekoy wozana iissees.
7.8: Doomethafe wursethi lo77o; otorope danda7i lo77o.
7.9: Eeyata hanqoy enta ki7on de7iya gisho, neeni ne shempuwan hanqos ellesopa.
7.10: “Ha77i wodiyape kase wodey ayis lo77o gididee?” gada oychofa; hessa mela oyshoy cinca asi oychiya oysho gidenna.
7.11: Ha sa7an de7iya asi ubbay cinca gidanaw koshshees; cincatethi demoy laatape lo77o.
7.12: Miishey ase iitape kammidi ashsheysada cincatethika ashshees. Shin cincatethi miishepe aadhey asa de7o naaganaw danda7iya gishosa.
7.13: Ane Xoossi oothidaba akeeka! Xoossi geellayidaba ooni suurisanaw danda7ii?
7.14: Sa7i giigida wode ufayta; metoy gakiya wode akeeka. Ufaysi gidin meto gidin Xoossi yeddiya woden yees. Shin awusi koyrottidi yaaneko neeni eraka.
7.15: Ha hada gidida ta laythan darobaa be7as. Hessika, geellay ba geellatethan adussa laythi de7iya wode xilloy qantha laythan hayqees.
7.16: Hessa gisho, neeni elle dhayonnaada daro xillo woyko daro cinca gidopa.
7.17: Neeni wodey gakonna hayqonnaada aadhida iita gidopa; aadhada eeya gidopa.
7.18: Ha ubban Xoosse yayya; asi meto ubbaa xoonon keyanaw danda7iya gisho neeni daro iita woyko daro xillo gidonashin giddo asi gida.
7.19: Cincatethi cincaas immiya wolqay issi katama haariya tammu asata wolqafe aadhees.
7.20: Xillobaa xalaala oothidi nagara oothonna de7iya asi ha sa7aa bolla baawa.
7.21: Asi haasaya qaala ubbaa si7ada polana goopa; neeni ubbaa si7ana giiko ne aylley nena baaddishin si7ana.
7.22: Qassi neeni ne huuphen harata baaddiyaba ne wozanay erees.
7.23: Hessa ubbaa taani cincatethan pilgada be7as. Yaatada, “Taani cinca gidana” yaagas. Shin taani gidaysada hanibeenna.
7.24: Cincatethi ubba wode haahon de7iyabaanne ciimmoba; yaatin, iya koyidi demmanaw danda7ey oonee?
7.25: Taani pilgada xeellanaw cincatethinne oda ubbaa wursethaa eranaw qopas. Nagari eeyatethi, eeyatethi gooshshatethi gideysa eranaw gakas.
7.26: Taani hayqope aadhidi cammiya haraba demmas. Hessika, I wozanay gite, I kushey santhalaata gididi xiheda oykiya issi maccas be7as. Xoosse yayiya asi iipe kessi ekana; shin nagaranchuwa iya ba xihiyan xaaxada oykana.
7.27: Astamaarey haysada yaagis; “Taani pilgada demmidabay haysa.
7.28: Hessika, taani hachi gakanaw koyada demmaboonnaba. Mukulu adde asa giddofe bonchoy bessiya issi adde xalaala demmas; shin macca asaa giddofe issinnoka demmanaw danda7abike.
7.29: Taani pilgada demmida harabay, Xoossi ase suure qofara medhis; shin asi daro gene oge koyidi bis” yaagis.

8.1: Cinca asi daaney oonee? Ubbabaas birshethaa erey oonee? Cincatethi pashkisidi, dhumida som7uwa poo7isees. Kawos Kiitetta
8.2: Kawos kiiteta; kase neeni kiitetana gada Xoossa sinthan caaqadasa.
8.3: Kawa sinthafe ellesada keyopa; kawoy ba koydaba oothanaw danda7iya gisho iita ooso oothanaw dendofa.
8.4: Ubbabaa oothanaw kawas maati de7iya gisho, “Ayis haysa oothadii?” yaagidi iya oychanaw danda7ey oonee?
8.5: Iya kiitaa poliya asi qohetenna; cinca asi like wodiyanne oothiya ogiya erees.
8.6: Ase deexo metoy gakikoka ubbabaas wodeynne ogey de7ees.
8.7: Sinthafe hananaba eriya asi baawa; “Haysi hanana” gidi odanaw danda7ey oonee?
8.8: Shempoy shaaketidi biya gallas oykidi teqanaw danda7iya asi baawa; woyko hayqoy ba gallasan yoonnaada digganaw danda7iya asi baawa. Ola wode oonika oletike gaanaw danda7onnaysada iitatethi iita oothiya uraa yeddenna.
8.9: Salope garsan haniyaba ubbaa taani akeekada qopiya wode asi baw de7iya maata hara asi qohanaw go7eteysa be7as.
8.10: Iita asati bonchon moogetishin be7as. Enti iitatetha oothida katamaa asay shiiqidi enta sabbishin si7as; hessi ubbay hada.
8.11: Asi qopidi iitabaa oothiya gaasoy, iitabaa oothida asata ellesidi seerey bayna gishosa.
8.12: Nagaranchoy xeetu toho iitabaa oothishin iya barey aduqikoka, Xoosse yayyeysatasinne boncheysatas sa7i lo77anaysa ta erayis.
8.13: Iitati Xoosse yayyonna gisho sarotethi entaw baawa; enti Xoosse yayyonna gisho enta barey kuyada qaammana. Asi Xoossa Oge Erenna
8.14: Ha sa7an oosetiya hara hadabay de7ees. Hessika, geeshsha asati, nagaranchoti ekanaw bessiya seera ekiya wode nagaranchoti geeshshati ekanaw bessiya lo77oba ekeysa; hessi ubbay hada.
8.15: Asi miyabaape, uyabaapenne bana ufaysiyabape aadhidi lo77obay salope garsan hari bayna gisho, asi ba de7on ufaytiko lo77o gas. Xoossi iyaw immida laythan I daaburidi demmidaban ufaytanaw danda7ees.
8.16: Taani cincatethi aybeko eranawunne asi ha sa7a bolla daaburiya daabura akeekanaw halchas; wursethan asi dhisko dhayidi oothiya oosoy de7eysa be7as.
8.17: Taani Xoossi oothidaba ubbaa be7as. Salope garsan oosetida ooso asi pilgidi eranaw danda7onnaysa eras. Asi ay mela daaburidi pilgi xeellikoka, iya birshethaa eranaw danda7enna. Qassi cinca asi haysa erayis gaanaw danda7enna.

9.1: Ha ubbaa ta wozanan qopidaape guye cincatinne xilloti, enta oosoti Xoossa kushen de7oosona gada kuuyas. Shin siiqo gidin woyko ixo aybi iya naagiyako oonika erenna.
9.2: Dummatethi bayna ubbaa gakiya qaaday issino; xillo gidin geella, lo77o gidin iita, tuna gidin tuna gidonna ixin, yarsho yarsheysa gidin yarshonaysa ubbaa qaaday issino. Lo77o asas nagaranchuwafe lo77iya qaadi baawa; caaqo yayyeysi yayyonnaysafe dummatenna.
9.3: Asa ubbaa qaaday issino gideysi, ha sa7an de7iya hara iitatethaa mela daro iita. Asi de7on de7ida laytha ubban iya wozanay iitatethaninne gooshshatethan kumidi de7ees; wursethan hayqidi aggees.
9.4: Hayqida gaammofe paxa de7iya kani lo77o; de7on de7eysatara de7iya uraas ufaysi de7ees.
9.5: De7on de7iya asati issi toho hayqanaw de7eysa eroosona; shin hayqidaysati issibaaka erokona. Enti dogetidaysata gidiya gisho aykoka maaddokona.
9.6: Enta siiqoy, ixoynne qanaate ubbay entara issife dhayees. Hizape guye salope garsan haniyaba ubban merinaw entaw qaadi baawa.
9.7: Ba, ne kathaa ufaysan ma; ne woyne ushsha ne wozanay ufaytin uya. Xoossay hessa new kasepe giigisidi wothis.
9.8: Ubba wode ne ma7oy boothi gido; ne huuphen zayte tiya.
9.9: Salope garsan Xoossay new immida ha hada de7uwan, hada gidida ne qammatan ne siiqiya ne machera ufaytada de7a. Neeni salope garsan daaburada oothidaba ubbaafe nena gakiya saamay hessa.
9.10: Ne kushey oothanaw demmidaba ubbaa ne kumetha wolqan ootha; neeni baana duufuwan oosoy woyko halchoy woyko eri woyko cincatethi baawa.
9.11: Taani salope garsan haraba be7as. Hessika, eeson woxeysati ubba wode xoonokona; mino olanchoti ubba wode olan kanthokona; cincati ubba wode kathi demmokona; hiillanchoti ubba wode duretokona; tamaarida asati ubba wode sabetokona. Shin ubbaa qaadinne wodey gathidaysada hanees.
9.12: Gidoshin he wodey awude yaaneko eranaw danda7iya asi baawa. Kafoy xihen geleysada woyko moloy giten oyketeysada asi ubbay qoponna gakiya iita woden oyketees. Cincatethinne Eeyatethi
9.13: Salope garsan taani be7idaba harabay de7ees. Hessika cincatethi gita leemiso gideysa.
9.14: Guutha asi de7iya issi guutha katamiya de7awusu. He katamiw issi wolqaama kawoy olanaw dendis; iyo teqidi oykis.
9.15: He katamen manqo gidida issi cinca addey de7ees; I ba cincatethan he katamiw ashshis. Shin he manqo addiya zaaridi hassayday baawa.
9.16: Taani, “Cincatethi wolqaafe aadhees” yaagas. Gidoshin, cinca gidikoka manqo asi kadhetees; I odiyaba si7ey baawa.
9.17: Hessi hanikoka, deriya haareysi eeyata shiiqon waassiya waasuwa si7anaape loddara odetiya cinca asa qaala si7eysi lo77o.
9.18: Cincatethi ola miishepe aadhees; shin issi nagaranchoy daro lo77oba dhaysees.

10.1: Hayqida udunxeti sawiya shittuwa xinqisoosona; hessadaka, guutha eeyatethi cincatethinne gita bonchuwa iissees.
10.2: Cinca asa wozanay iya ushachi kaalethees; shin eeya asa wozani haddirsi kaalethees.
10.3: Eeya asi oge hemetiya wode iyaw akeeki baawa; I eeya gideysa asi ubbay erees.
10.4: Ne halaqay ne bolla hanqetiko ne bessaa yeddofa; si77i gidi danda7oy gita nagaraa atto giisees.
10.5: Salope garsan taani be7ida hara iitabay de7ees. Hessika deriya haareysati oothiya naaquwa.
10.6: Eeyati daro dhoqa shuumatetha oykidi de7iya wode dureti ziqa bessan uttidosona.
10.7: Taani aylleti haareysatada para toggidi bishin qassi haareysati aylletada tohon hemetishin be7as.
10.8: Olla bookiya asi he ollan kundees; gimbe dirsi laaliya uraa shooshi dukees.
10.9: Shuchu denthiya asi he shuchan, mithi qeriya asi he mithan deshetees.
10.10: Dun7ida kalta leefonna qeriko daro wolqaa wursees; shin cincatethan oothiya oosuwas ayfey de7ees.
10.11: Shooshi duki aggin shooshu doqiya dhale wotheysi he uraa aykoka maaddenna.
10.12: Cinca asa odi iyaw boncho imisees; shin eeyay ba doonape keyida qaalan baw meton gelees.
10.13: Eeyay ba haasaya eeya qaalan doomidi, iitatethaninne gooshshatethan polees.
10.14: Eeya asi darobaa odetees. Gidoshin, sinthafe hananaw de7iyaba oonika erenna. Asi hayqi aggin, haniyaba iyaw odanaw danda7ey baawa.
10.15: Eeya asi ba ooson daaburees; I ba soo biya ogiya erenna.
10.16: Na7a gidida kawoynne wonta guura gibira miya halaqati de7iya biitte nena ayye!
10.17: Bonchetida kawoynne mathotanaw gidonashin wolqanne minotethi demmanaw maaran miyanne uyaa halaqati de7iya biittiya anjetidaaro.
10.18: Addey azalla gidiko iya kaaray woddees; iya kushey oothonnaba gidiko, iya keethay xokees.
10.19: Kathi muussaninne woyne ushshan ufaysi bentees; shin miishey ubbaba shammees.
10.20: Si7iya asi baawa gada ne wozanan kawo cayopa; woyko ne zin7iya kifiliyan dure uraa baaddofa. Ne gidaysa salo kafoy bidi entaw odanaw danda7ees.

11.1: Ne kathaa haatha bolla yegga; daro gallasape guye neeni zaarada demmana.
11.2: New de7iya shaluwa laapun woyko hospun bessan shaakada wotha. Sinthafe ha sa7aa bolla ay iitabay yaaneko neeni eraka.
11.3: Shaari ira tookiko biitta bolla iri bukees. Mithi pude kundin duge kundin ba kundida bessan de7ees.
11.4: Carko naagiya oonika kathi zerenna; shaari dendana gakanaw naagiya oonika ba kathaa cakenna.
11.5: Carkoy biya ogiyanne na7i ba aaye ulon waanidi medhetiyako ne eronnaysada ubbaba medhida Xoossay ba oosuwa waati oothiyako eranaw danda7aka.
11.6: Guura gidin omarsi ne zerethi zereysa aggofa; wontaysi woyko omarsaysi lo77aneko neeni eraka. Ne Na7atetha Woden Xoossa Qopa
11.7: Poo7oy ufaysiyabaa; awa ayfe be7oy lo77oba.
11.8: Asi adussa laythi ha sa7an de7iko he laythan ufayto. Shin ha alamiyabay hada gideysanne yaana dhuma wodey merinaw daanaysa qopo.
11.9: Neno na7atethaw, na7atethi daro lo77oba gidiya gisho ne na7atetha laythan ufayta; ne wozanayka ufayto. Ne ayfey be7idabaanne ne wozanay amotidaba ubbaa pola. Shin he neeni oothidaba ubbaa gisho nena Xoossay pirdanaw de7eysa dogopa.
11.10: Na7atethinne goobatethi hada gidiya gisho ne wozanaape azzano, ne asatethafe iitatethi digga.

12.1: Ne na7atetha laythan nena medhidaysa qopa. Un77a gallasati yoonna de7ishin, “Haysi tana ufaysenna” geetetiya wodeti gakonna de7ishin,
12.2: awinne poo7oy, ageeninne xoolintoti dhumonna de7ishin, iri bukidi aadhin, shaari simmonna de7ishin, nena medhidaysa qopa.
12.3: He wodey keethe naageysati kokoriya wode, mino asi kuuniya wode, gaacceysati taybon guuxida gisho gaache aggiya wodenne maskootera xeelleysati daaburiya wode gidana.
12.4: He wodey, wogga ogiyako simmida pengeti gordetiya wode, gaacciya woxa girsay ziqi giya wode, kafo waasoy ase dhiskofe barkisiya wode, macca nayta yetha girsay lepiya wode gidana.
12.5: He wodey, dere keyanaw xoonetiya wode, dalga ogetara hemetanaw yashshiya wode, lawuze mithi ciiyiya wode, booley qaaxanaw xoonetiya wode, amoyabay aggiya wode gidana. He wodey, asi ba merinaa keethaa biya wode, yeekeysati dalga ogiyara yeekishe yuuyiya wode gidana.
12.6: Bira santhalaatay duuxonna de7ishin, worqa kerey meqonna de7ishin, haatha otoy pultuwa matan meqonna de7ishin, haathe ollafe goochi kessiya wodoroy duuxonna de7ishin,
12.7: biittay biittako simmonna de7ishin, shempoy bana immida Xoossaako simmonna de7ishin, nena medhidaysa qopa.
12.8: Astamaarey, “Hada! Hada! Ubbabay hada” yaagis. Kuusha Qofata
12.9: Astamaarey cinca xalaala gidonashin eraka gidiya gisho deriya tamaarsis. I daro leemisota pilgidi issuwa issuwa iya maaran maaran dummayidi wothis.
12.10: Astamaarey like gidida qaala demmanaw koyis; hessa gisho, I xaafidabay suurenne tuma.
12.11: Cincata qaalay henthanchoy wude laagiya xeera oco xam7a mela. Issife shiiqida leemisoti gathi oythiya mismaare mela.
12.12: Ta na7aw, ha ubbaafe bollara neeni naagetanaw koshshiyabay de7ees. Maxaafa xaafidi wursanaw danda7etenna. Qassi darobaa pilgidi aggonna ixoy asatethi daabursees.
12.13: Heko ubbabay odetis; ubbabaas kuushshay haysa; Xoosse yayiya; iya kiitaa naaga; hessi asas waanna ooso.
12.14: Xoossay ooso ubbaa qassi geemmida ubbaa lo77o gidin iitaa pirdanaw de7ees.

1.1: Mazmure ubbaafe aadhiya Solomone mazmurey haysa. Geela7iw
1.2: Ne siiqoy woynepe aadhidi ufaysiya gisho tana zaara zaara yeera.
1.3: Ne tiyetiya shittoy waanidi sawii! Ne sunthay goggiya shitto mela; Geela7oti nena siiqey hessasa.
1.4: Tana neera ekada ba; ane issife woxoos! Kawaw, tana ne quruxuwan gelsa. Yerusalaame maccasata Nenan nu ufaytoos; ne siiquwa woyne ushshafe aathidi nashshoos. Maccasi ubbay nena siiqeysa bessa. Geela7iw
1.5: Hinteno, Yerusalaame maccasato si7ite; taani kareethi gidikoka mala lo77o. Ta kareethatethay Qedaare dunkaane mela; shin ta malay Solomone magarajota mela.
1.6: Ta malaa kareethiday awa; taani kareethi gidida gisho tana boropite. Ta ishati, ta aaye nayti taara ooyetidi, tana woyne gade naagisidosona; hessa gisho ta woyniya naagabike.
1.7: Ta siiquwaw, ane taw oda; ne dorsaa wudiya awun heemmay? Seeta gallas enta awun shempisay? Nena demmanaw ne laggeta wudiya kaallada, ayis guuluntada biya maccas gido? Panthaa
1.8: Maccasa ubbaafe lo77iyare, Bessaa eronna ixiko dorsata geedo kaalla. Ne deesha marata henthanchota dunkaaniya matan heemma.
1.9: Ta siiqe! Gibxe kawo para gaareta goochiya, parata giddon de7iya magaayeda lo77aasa.
1.10: Ne haythan de7iya alleequwara shiiqidi, ne shakalay waanidi lo77i! Ne qoodhey al7o shuchan alleeqetis.
1.11: Nuuni new biran cadetida, worqa alleequwa oosisana. Geela7iw
1.12: Kawoy gayta bolla uttidashin, ta shittuwa sawoy keethan tonku gis.
1.13: Ta siiqoy ta dhanthata giddon de7iya, xuntetida sawiya karbe daanees.
1.14: Ta siiqoy, Engaada woyne gaden, dolida heena ciishsha mela. Panthaa
1.15: Ta siiqe, neeni waana lo77ay! Neeni waana lo77ay! Ne ayfeti holle ayfeda lo77oosona. Geela7iw
1.16: Ta siiquwaw, neeni waanna lo77ay! Ayba ufaysay; nu arsay cil7o maata mela ufaysees.
1.17: Nu keethaa tuussay ziga; nu kaaray xiiddan oyketis.

2.1: Taani Saaronan doliya ciishshanne zangaaran doliya suufe ciishsha mela. Panthaa
2.2: Ta siiqiya maccasa giddon be7iya wode, aguntha giddon bentiya suufe ciishsha mela. Geela7iw
2.3: Ta siiqoy hara panthata giddon xeelliya wode woran de7iya apile mithaa mela. Tana daro ufaysin, iya kuyaa giddon uttas; iya ayfey min tana mal7ees.
2.4: I tana gibira miya keethi gelsis; ba siiquwa bandirada ta bolla dhoqu dhoqu oothis.
2.5: Taani iya siiquwan oyketada hargida gisho, zabibe ayfe muzidi tana gashtisite; apile muzidi ta wolqaa minthite.
2.6: Ba haddirsa kushiya tana borkotisis; ba ushacha kushiyan tana qoommis.
2.7: Hinteno, Yerusalaame yalaga maccasaw, siiqoy baw dosidi dendana gakanaw, iya hinte barkethonna mela, ta hintena gen7eninne wora woshi7en ammatayis.
2.8: Ta siiquwa girsay deriya bollara gupishenne, zumaa bollara xongetishe yeysi si7etees.
2.9: Ta siiqoy woshi7e woyko gen7e mari daanees; Heko, nu keethaa matan eqis; maskootera soo xeellees; magarajuwa giddora xeellees.
2.10: Ta siiqoy, haysada yaagees; “Ta siiqe, denda! Ta yegelsse, haaya, issife ane boos.
2.11: Heko, balgoy aadhis; irayka eqis.
2.12: Biittan ciishshi ciiyis; yethi yexiya ageenay gakis; holle yethi nu biittan si7etis.
2.13: Balase mithay ayfe doomis; woyney ciiyis; ciishsha sawoy biittan tonku gees. Ta siiqe, denda; ta yegelsse, haaya; ane issife boos.” Panthaa
2.14: Aafo doonan zaalla qophon, qosetida holle daaniyare; ane issi toho tana ne som7uwa bessa; ne girsa sissa. Ne qaalay tana mal7ees; ne som7oy daro lo77ees. Yerusalaame Geela7ota
2.15: Nu woyney ciiyis; nu woyne gadiya iissiya workanata, he guutha butaleta xihen oykite. Geela7iw
2.16: Ta siiqoy tabaa; taanika iyabaa; ciishshata giddon I ba wudiya heemmees.
2.17: Sa7i geeyana gakanaw, kuyay dhayana gakanaw, ta siiquwaw, gen7eda woyko woshi7e marada, aafotiya deriyara woxashe haa simma.

3.1: Qamma kumethi hiixan zin7ada, ta siiquwa demmanaw amottas; minthada koyas; shin demmabike.
3.2: Katamaa giddon de7iya dalganne xuntha ogeta ubban yuuyas. Ta siiquwa demmanaw koyas; minthada koyas; shin demmanaw danda7abike.
3.3: Katamaa yuuyidi naageysati tana demmidosona; taani, “Ta siiquwa be7idetii?” yaagada oychas.
3.4: Enta aggada aadhida mela ta siiquwa demmas; I taape kessi ekonnaada minthada oykas. Ta aaye soo efas; ta yeletida kifiliya gelsas.
3.5: Hinteno Yerusalaame macca nayto, siiqoy baw dosidi dendana gakanaw, iya hinte barkisonna mela taani hintena gen7eninne woshi7en ammatayis. Yerusalaame Geela7ota
3.6: Zal7ancho ixaanedanne karbeda sawiyara, cuya tuussu daaniyara, hanna mela biittafe yaara iya oonee?
3.7: Heko, Solomone para gaariya yawusu; he para gaariw Isra7eelepe dooretida, usupun tammu wolqaama tooranchoti ajabidosona.
3.8: Enti ubbay mashsha oythan meezetidosona; olanka paacetidosona. Qamma gakiya metuwa teqanaw, enti mashshe dancidi giigidosona.
3.9: Kawa Solomoney para gaare giddon, baw uttiya araata giigisis; iya araatay Libaanosepe yida mithan oosetis.
3.10: Araata tuussay biran lanxetis; zempoy worqan alleeqetis. Oydey ocha teera daaniya qacinan kametis; gaathay Yerusalaame geela7ota siiqon alleeqetis. Geela7iw
3.11: Hinteno, Xiyoone geela7oto, kawa Solomone be7anaw haayite. I daro ufaytida iya yaaganuwa gallas iya aayiya iya huuphen wothida kallacha wothis.

4.1: Ta siiqe, neeni waana lo77ay! Neeni waanida yegelsse! Ne ayfeti guulunthaa giddora be7iya wode, holleda lo77oosona. Ne binaanay Galada zumaape wodhiya deesha wude daanees.
4.2: Ne achay meedetidi haathan meecetida, ubbay mente yeliya, enta giddon awucayey bayna dorsa wude mela.
4.3: Ne mettershay zo7o qacina daanees; ne haasaya wode daro ufaysoosona. Ne nam7u shakalay guulunthaa giddora xeelliya wode, nam7a kessidi phalqida oromaane daanosona.
4.4: Ne qoodhey loythi oothida, iya bolla olanchota gondalley de7iya, mukulu mino olanchota gondalley kaqetida, Dawita adussa gimbiya daanees.
4.5: Ne nam7u dhanthati mente yeletida, lo77o ciishshata giddon miya woshi7e marata daanosona.
4.6: Sa7i geeyanaape sinthe, dhumay kichanaape sinthe, karbe deriyanne ixaane zuma bada shempana.
4.7: Ta siiqe, ne asatethay kumethi lo77o; nenan boretiyabay baawa.
4.8: Ta mushurate, Libaanosepe haaya; Gaammoy pee7iya, maahey aqiya, Amaana zumaape, Sanira liiphepe Armoona huuphiyape wodha.
4.9: Ta siiqe, micho gidida ta mushurate; ne ayfiya xeeloynne ne qoodhiya alleeqoy, ta wozanaa ufaysan gooshshis.
4.10: Ta siiqo micho gidida ta mushurate! Ne siiqoy tana waani ufaysi! Ne siiqoy woyne ushshafe aadhidi ufaysees; ne shittoy ubbaafe aadhidi sawees.
4.11: Ta mushurate, ne mettershafe ililo eessi xokees; Ne doonape eessinne maathi pultees; ne ma7oy Libaanose shittoda sawees.
4.12: Ta siiqo micho gidida ta mushurate, ne yuushoy diretidi naagetiya atakilte bessa mela; ne haratas gordetida, taw dooyetida pulto mela.
4.13: Neeni atakilte giddon, oromaaney, dooretida atakilte ayfeti, nardoose geetetiya ayfeti de7iya bessa mela.
4.14: Nardoosey, laadey, sawiya maati, qarafin, ixaanada sawiyabati de7oosona. Karbey, godare uutha ciishshinne dumma dumma qimame atakilteti doloosona.
4.15: Neeni atakilte bessa ushshiya pulto mela; de7o haathi bentiya olla mela; Libaanose zumaape goggiya shaafa mela. Geela7iw
4.16: Pudeha bagga carkuwaw, denda! dugeha bagga carkuwaw, haaya! Ta atakiltiya bolla carka! iya sawoy tonku go. Ta siiqoy ba atakiltiya giddo yo; daro mal7iya ayfeta mo.

5.1: Ta miche, ta mushurate, taani ta atakiltiya giddo gelas. Ta karbiyanne ta shitto ciishsha qoras; taani eessa uythi mas; ta woyniyanne ta maatha uyas. Yerusalaame Geela7ota Iya laggeto, miite uyite; siiqo alana gakanaw uyite. Geela7iw
5.2: Taani dhiskas; shin ta wozanay barkis; ta siiqoy haysada yaagidi pengiya qonkishin si7as. “Ta miche, ta siiqe, ta yegelsse; borey bayna ta holle, taw pengiya dooya. Ta huuphey akan laakis; ta binaanay qamma puusen irxis.”
5.3: Ta ma7uwa qaaras, zaarada ma7oyee? Ta tohuwa meecetas, zaarada qitayoyee?
5.4: Ta siiqoy ibitha xoo7era ba kushiya soo yeddis; ta wozanay iya gisho seellees.
5.5: Ta siiquwas dooyanaw dendas; pengiya dooyanaw kobiya oykiya wode, ta kushiyape karbey, ta biradhiyafe shittoy xokees.
5.6: Ta siiquwas kariya dooyas, shin I deenna; iya qaala si7anaw daro amottas. Minthada koyas, shin iya demmabike; xeegas, shin taw koybeenna.
5.7: Katamaa naageysati tana demmidi, wadhidosona; madunxisidosona. Katamaa dirsaa naageysati, ta laxana qaari ekidosona.
5.8: Hinteno, Yerusalaame geela7oto, ta siiquwa demmiko, taani iya siiquwan hargidaysa, hadara iyaw odite. Yerusalaame Geela7ota
5.9: Neno, maccasa ubbaafe lo77iyara, ne laggey haratape waanidi dummatii? Neeni nuna hadara gey, I haratape aybin dummatii? Geela7iw
5.10: Ta siiqoy mala lo77onne ayanta; tammu mukulu addeta giddon iya meli baawa.
5.11: Iya huuphey al7o worqa daanees; iya binaanay lo77onne quuro mela kareethi.
5.12: Iya ayfey shaafa matan eqida, maathan meecetida holleta daanees.
5.13: Iya shakalay sawiya qimamey toketida madabeda lo77ees; iya mettershay karbe shittoy xokiya wora ciishshada lo77ees.
5.14: Iya qesey al7o shuchan alleeqetida worqa xam7ada lo77ees; iya asatethay sanpare al7o shuchan alleeqetida dangarsa zaale mela.
5.15: Iya tohoti worqa baason eqida salo shucha tuussi daanosona; iya malay zigan alleeqetida Libaanose zuma mela.
5.16: Iya doonay eessada mal7ees; iya kumetha asatethay lo77ees. Hinteno Yerusalaame geela7oto, ta siiqoynne ta laggey haysa daannes.

6.1: Maccasa ubbaafe lo77iyare, ne laggey awu bidee? Nu neera koyana mela I bida gina nuus oda. Geela7iw
6.2: Ta siiqoy dorsa wude heemmanaw, lo77o ciishsha shiishanaw, shitto maatay de7iya atakiltiya giddo bis.
6.3: Taani ta siiquwaba; ta siiqoy tabaa; I ciishsha giddon wude heemmees. Panthaa
6.4: Ta siiqe, ne Tirsa katameeda lo77aasa; Yerusalaameda daro lo77aasa. Bandira oykidi salpiya, olanchoda yashshaasa.
6.5: Enti tana un7ethida gisho, hayyana ne ayfiya taape dentha. Ne binaanay Galada zumaape wodhiya, deesha wude daanees.
6.6: Ne achay meecetidi keyiya, ubbay mente yeliya, enta giddon awucayey bayna dorsa wude mela.
6.7: Ne nam7u shakalay guulunthaa giddora xeelliya wode, nam7u kessidi phalqida oromaane daanosona.
6.8: Usupun tammu macca kawoti, hospun tammu laggethoti, tayboy bayna geela7oti de7oosona.
6.9: Shin borey bayna ta holliya taw dumma; iya ba aayes issinno. Iyo yelida aayiya ubbaafe aathada iyo dosawusu; Geela7oti iyo be7idi, “Hanna anjetidaaro” yaagosona; macca kawotinne laggethoti iyo sabboosona. Yerusalaame Geela7ota
6.10: Hanna wonta xalqeda doliyara, ageenada poo7iyara, xalqeda caddiyara, bandira oykidi salpe keyida, olanchoda yashshiyara hanna oonee? Panthaa
6.11: Taani zangaaran toketida mithata be7anaw, woyney aacidako oromaaney ayfidaako xeellanaw, duge ocholone gade wodhas.
6.12: Ta qoponna de7ishin ta amoy tana efidi, kawa asaa para gaareta giddon tana utisis. Yerusalaame Geela7ota
6.13: Neno Sulaamape yidaare, haaya; haa simma; Nu nena loythidi xeellana mela haa simma. Geela7iw Daro asaa sinthan yexiya asada, tana ayis xeelleetii?

7.1: Kawo na7ada lo77iyare, Laxana caamma aathida ne tohoti waani lo77i! Ne sheechey hiillanchoy qoxidi, alleeqisida al7o shuchu daanees.
7.2: Ne gul7ay woyney kumida birille daanees; ne xeessa yuushoy ciishshan qashetida giste mirqe daanees.
7.3: Ne dhanthati mente yeletida, gen7e mari daanosona.
7.4: Ne qoodhey dangarsa zaalen alleeqetida adussa shako mela. Ne ayfey gita Haseboona katama pengiya matan, de7iya zeero haatha daanees. Ne siidhey Damasqoko zaaridi gimbida, Libaanose gimbiya daanees.
7.5: Ne huuphey Qarmeloosa zuma daanees; ne binaanay qacina xaathi daanees; ne huuphiya dathay kawa ufaysees.
7.6: Ta siiqe, ne waanna lo77ay! Ne waanida yegelsse! Ne siiqoy tana waani ufaysi!
7.7: Ne geesay zamba daanees; ne dhanthay zamba mor77e daanees.
7.8: Taani, “Zamba bolla keyana; iya ayfiya maxana” yaagas. Ne dhanthay woyne mor7e mela; ne siidhiyara keya peenoy apileda sawees.
7.9: Ne doonape keyiya peenoy lo77o woyne mela. Geela7iw Hiza lo77iya woyne ushshay, ne siiqe mettershafenne achafe giddora, lepi gidi goggo. Geela7iw
7.10: Taani ta siiquwaba; ika tana amottees.
7.11: Ta siiquwaw, haaya; katamaape keyidi gaxare boos; nam7ay qamma yan aathana.
7.12: Wonta guura woyne atakiltiya giddo boos; woyney ciiyidaako, ayfe aathidako, oromaaney ayfidaako ane be7oos. Taani ta siiquwa nena yan bessaana.
7.13: Inkoye ayfe sawoynne dumma dumma ufaysiya atakilte ayfey nu karen kumis. Ta siiquwaw! Ha ayfetape teeridaysanne oorathi maxidaysa new wothas.

8.1: Ne taw ta aaye dhanthi dhammida ta isha gididaako aybe! Ta nena ogen demmada yeeridaako, tana oonika borennashin.
8.2: Taani nena kaalethada, tana tamaarsida ta aaye soo gelsarkinashin. Mal7iya Oromaane gum7ethaanne lo77iya woyne ushsha ta nena yan ushsharkina.
8.3: Tana ne haddirsa kushey borkotisees, ne ushacha kushey tana qoommes.
8.4: Hinteno, Yerusalaame geela7oto, ta siiqoy ba wode dendana gakanaw, koyrottidi hinte iya denthonaada hadara gayis. Yerusalaame Geela7ota
8.5: Ba siiquwa hashen zempada, mela biittafe yaara hanna oonee? Geela7iw Beni ne aayiya nena iqetada yelida, apile mithaa garsan ne zin7idashin, nena ta barkisas.
8.6: Merina siiquwan tana ne wozanan attama; ne qesiyan maatameda ta xalaala oyka. Siiqoy hayqo mela mino; qanaatey si7oole mela iita; iya lacoy Xoossaa tama laco mela.
8.7: Daro haathi siiqo tama toysanaw danda7enna; di7oyka meeccidi efanaw danda7enna. Asi siiqo shammanaw baw de7iya ubbaa immikoka, siiqoy miishen shametonna gisho, asi iya kadhees. Geela7e Ishata
8.8: Dhanthi tiran uttiboona micha nuus de7awusu; azini iyo oychiko, nu iw ay oothanee?
8.9: Iya gimbe dirsi gidiyako, nuuni I bolla adussa bira gimbe gimbana; iya dirsa penge gidiyako ziga ibithe medhana. Geela7iw
8.10: Taani dirsa gimbe; ta dhanthay gimbe bolla de7iya shako mela; taani ta siiquwara de7iya wode I tanan ufaytees.
8.11: Solomones Ba7aal-Hamoonan woyne gadey de7ees; he woyne gadiya une ootheysatas immis. Kera ekidaysati ayfiya gisho, issoy issoy mukulu bira iyaw ehoosona.
8.12: Shin taw ta buzo woyne gadey de7ees; Solomone, neeni mukulu bira eka; une ekidi ootheysati nam7u xeetu bira eko. Panthaa
8.13: Neno, atakiltiya giddon de7iya ta siiqe, ne laggeti ne qaala si7anaw koyoosona; ne qaala tanaka sissa. Geela7iw
8.14: Ta siiquwaw, taako elle ya! shitto maatay doliya dereta bollara, gupiya gen7e woyko woshi7e marada hana.

1.1: Ooziyani, Iyo7atami, Akaazinne Hizqiyaasi Yihudan kaalli kaallidi kawotida wode Amoxe na7ay Isayaasi Yihudabaanne Yerusalaameba be7ida qoncethay haysa. Si7onna Dere
1.2: Saloto si7ite; sa7aw hayza si7a; Goday haysada yaagees; “Ta nayta yelada dichas; shin enti taw makallidosona.
1.3: Boori ba godaa erees; hareyka bana haaridaysa zadaluwa erees. Shin Isra7eeley erenna; ta asay akeekenna.
1.4: Hinteno, nagarancho kawotethato, bala ooson deexidaysato, iitaa oothiya yeletethato, tuna oosos imetida nayto, Godaa aggidaysato, hintena ayye! Isra7eele Geeshshaa kadhideta; iyaw zoko zaarideta.
1.5: Makalla bolla makalla ayis gujeetii? Ayis zaari zaari shoceteetii? Hinte huuphey hargetis; hinte wozanay daaburis.
1.6: Huuphe binaanape toho xugunthi gakanaw payyatethi baawa; madunthi, kixinne dhuusi ma7is. Enti giiybookona, woyko meecetidi qashetibookona woyko zayten tiyetidi looxikbookona.
1.7: “Hinte biittay oxis; hinte katamati taman xuugetidosona. Hinte be7ishin hinte goshsha allagati ekana; imatha asati hinte biitta quu7e kessana.
1.8: Yerusalaamey woyne gaden de7iya shaqarada, leehe giddon de7iya gaabbadanne morken teqetida katamada hanada attana.
1.9: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday nuus guutha koche ashshonaako nuuni Soodomenne Gamoora katamaada hananashin” yaagis.
1.10: Hinteno, Soodome halaqato, Godaa qaala si7ite! Hinteno, Gamoora asaw, nu Xoossa higgiya si7ite!
1.11: “Hinte yarsho daroy taw ay oothii? Hanno gakanaw hinte taw shiishida urge dorsaanne modho mehe xuussa yarshoy taw gidana. Taani kormata, dorsa urgetanne deeshata suuthan ufaytike.
1.12: Hinte ta sinthan bentanaw yaa wode ta keethaa dabaaba hinte yedhana mela oone oychiday?
1.13: Hada yarshuwa eheysa aggite! Hinte cuyisiya ixaaney tana shaattees. Ageena xeeron hinte bonchiya gallasa, Sambaatanne iitatethan hinte shiiqiya shiiquwa taani ixayis.
1.14: Ageena xeeron hinte bonchiya gallasaanne hinte ba7aale gallasata taani ixas; enti taw tooho gididosona; taani enta tookanaw danda7ike.
1.15: Hinte kushe miccidi tana woossiya wode taani ta ayfiya hintefe genthana. Hinte kushey suuthan kumida gisho hinte darsi woossikoka taani si7ike.
1.16: Meecetite; hintena geeshshite; hinte iita oosuwa ta sinthafe diggite; gene hanuwa aggite.
1.17: Lo77oba ooso tamaarite; xillo pirdaa koyite. Un7etidaysata ashshite; yi7otas eqite; am7etas mootetite” yaagees Goday.
1.18: “Haayite; ane woli ammanthoos. Hinte nagaray baara biittada zo7ikoka, shachada booxana; suuthada zo7ikoka puutoda booxana.
1.19: Hinte ero gidi taw kiitetiko biitta anjuwa maana.
1.20: Shin hinte ixas gidi makalliko, mashshan meetetana” yaagees Goday ba doonan.
1.21: Ammanetida katamiya waanada layma gidadee? Kase suuretethinne xillotethi I giddon kumis, shin ha77i shempo wodheysati I giddon de7ees.
1.22: Ne biray baltis; ne mal7o woyney haathan yeletis.
1.23: Hinte halaqati makallanchotanne kayso lagge gididosona; enti ubbay wodhaafe doseysatanne kushe xeelleyisata. Yi7otas suure pirdokona; am7eta waasuwa si7okona.
1.24: Hessa gisho, Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, Isra7eele Wolqaamay, haysada yaagees; “Ha77i taani ta morketa bolla ta hanquwa gussana; taara eqeteyisata halo keyana.
1.25: Taani ta kushiya ne bolla zaarana; ne baltetha geeshshana; ne tunatetha ubbaa neepe diggana.
1.26: Taani beniysada ne halaqata, koyroysada ne zoranchota denthana. Hessafe guye, neeni ammanetida biitta; xillotetha Katama geetetana” yaagees.
1.27: Xiyooney suure pirdan, banta nagara paaxeysatika xillotethan wozetana.
1.28: Shin makallanchotinne nagaranchoti issife meqana; Godaa aggeysati dhayana.
1.29: Hinte ufaytida yarsho wolan yeellatana; hinte doorida kooran kawuyana.
1.30: Hinte haythi qoqofetidi wurida woladanne haathi dhayida atakilte bessada gidana.
1.31: Bana mino gey buuxa gidana; iya oosoyka pol7u gidi to7iya tama gidana; enti issife xuugetana; he tama toysana asi baawa.

2.1: Amoxe na7ay Isayaasi Yihudabaanne Yerusalaameba be7idaysi haysa.
2.2: Wursetha gallasatan Godaa keethay keexetida zumay, zumata ubbaafe dhoqu gidi bentana; zuma ubbaafe bollara dhoqu gaana. Kawotethati ubbay iyako baana.
2.3: Higgey Xiyoonepe, Godaa qaalay Yerusalaamepe keyiya gisho, daro asay yidi, “Ane haayite! Godaa zumako, Yayqooba Xoossa keethaako keyoos. Nuuni iya ogiyan baana mela I nuna ba ogiya tamaarsana” yaagana.
2.4: I kawotethata giddon pirdana; daro asata palama shaakana. Enti banta mashshaa marasha, banta toora baaca kessana. Kawotethati kawotethata bolla mashsha denthokona; hizape enti ola timirte tamaarokona.
2.5: Hinteno, Yayqooba kochato, haayite! Ane Godaa poo7uwan hemetoos. Godaa Gallasa
2.6: Godaw, ne asaa, Yayqooba kochata aggadasa. Enti doloha bagga asaa Bitaaninne Filisxeeme asaa murunnuwan kumidosona; allaga asaara issifidosona.
2.7: Enta biittan birinne worqey kumis; enta miishiyas zawi baawa. Enta biittan pari kumis; enta para gaariyas zawi baawa.
2.8: Enta biittan eeqi kumidosona; enti banta kushe oosuwa goyinnoosona.
2.9: Hessa gisho, asa ubbay tooshettananne kawuyana. Enta nagaraa atto goopa.
2.10: Godaa daganthuwafenne yashshiya bonchuwafe attanaw zaallako biite; biitta giddon qosetite!
2.11: Otoranchoti kawuyana; ceeqeteysati guuxana; he gallas Godaa xalaali dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
2.12: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, issi gallas otoranchota, ceeqeteysatanne bantana dhoqu dhoqu ootheyisata kawushana.
2.13: Adussa Libaanose zigatanne Baasane wola ubbaa dhaysana;
2.14: Dhoqa deretanne zumata dembayana.
2.15: Katamaa naagiya adussa shakotanne mino dirsa gimbeta ziqi oothana.
2.16: Goday gitanne lo77o markabeta haathan mitisana.
2.17: Asa otoroy ziqi gaana; iya ceeqetethay dhayana. He gallas Godaa xalaali dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
2.18: Eeqa ubbay polo dhayana.
2.19: Goday biitta qaathanaw dendiya wode iya daganthuwafenne iya yashshiya bonchuwafe attanaw asay shucha gongoloninne biitta ollan qosetana.
2.20: He gallasay asay goyinnanaw medhida banta bira misiletanne banta worqa misileta girotasinne shirshiqotas yeggana.
2.21: Goday biitta qaathanaw dendiya wode iya daganthuwafenne iya yashshiya bonchuwafe attanaw enti gongolo giddonne shucha za7o giddo baqatana.
2.22: Hiza shempoy siidhen de7iya, ha hayqiya asan ammanetofite. Asi ay maaddii?

3.1: Heko, Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, minjanne maado ubbaa, katha minjanne haatha minja ubbaa Yerusalaamepenne Yihudape diggana.
3.2: Minotanne olanchota, daynnanne nabiya, biteysanne cima,
3.3: toora moconanne deriya ayseysa, zoreysa, hiillanchuwanne qara marota ubbaa diggana.
3.4: Taani yooga nayta enta halaqa oothana; guutha nayti enta haarana.
3.5: Asay asa bolla, shooroy shooruwa bolla dendidi, issoy issuwa sugana. Na7atethay cima bolla, kadhetidaysi bonchetidaysa bolla dendana.
3.6: Issi asi ba aawa keethan de7iya ba ishatape issuwa oykidi, “New ma7oy de7ees; neeni nuus halaqa gida; ha laaletida bessaa aawatethan eka” yaagana.
3.7: He gallas, I ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Taani maaddike; ta son kathi woyko ma7oy baawa; hinte bolla tana shuumopite” yaagana.
3.8: Yerusalaamey gandigarasu; Yihudi kundanaw matasu; enti banta odaaninne banta oosuwan Godaa bolla dendidi, iya bonchuwa toochidosona.
3.9: Enta som7oy enta bolla markatees; enti banta nagaraa Soodome asaa mela awaajosona; banta nagaraa qottokona. Enti banta bolla dhayo ehida gisho enta ayye!
3.10: Enti banta oosuwa ayfiya maana gisho, xillotas lo77o gidana gada oda.
3.11: Enti banta kushe oosuwa gatiya ekana gishonne dhayoy enta bolla yida gisho iitata ayye!
3.12: Na7atethati ta asaa un7ethoosona; maccasati enta haaroosona. Ta asaw, hintena kaaletheysati balethoosona; hinte biya ogiyape kare kessoosona.
3.13: Goday ba araatan uttis; asaa bolla pirdanaw giigetis.
3.14: Goday deriya cimatanne kaaletheyisata pirdanaw shiishidi, “Ta woyne gadiya dhaysiday hintena; manqotape bonqidaysi hinte son de7ees.
3.15: Hinte ta asaa ayis tincherethetii? Manqota som7uwa ayis kareethetii?” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
3.16: Goday, “Xiyoone maccasati otortidosona; banta qoodhiya adussidi, banta ayfiyan qam7otoosona; banta hemethaa laammidi, banta toho albuwa giirsishe hemetoosona.
3.17: Hessa gisho, Goday Xiyoone maccasa huuphiya dhuusan kunthana; Goday enta huuphiya bo77ayana” yaagees.
3.18: He gallas Goday Xiyoone maccasa alleeqota, hessika, toho albuwa, shaashiya, qoodhe worqaa,
3.19: haytha worqa, kushe ambaare, som7o kama,
3.20: huuphe kama, qese santhalaata, dancuwa, shittuwa, gozdda,
3.21: siidhe worqa, biradhe migiduwa,
3.22: koyse ma7uwa, adussa ma7uwa, kaaba, borsa,
3.23: mastootiya, liinuwa, huuphe alleeqota, sharbiya ubbaa entafe ekana.
3.24: Shitto gisho xinqo, danco gisho wodoro, goofare gisho bo77a, koyse ma7o gisho kayo ma7o, lo77otetha gisho beeta gidana.
3.25: Ne asati mashshan, ne olanchoti olan hayqana.
3.26: Xiyoone pengeti yeekananne zeleelana; kayotada sa7an uttida maccasada hanana.

4.1: He gallas laapun maccasati issi adde oykidi, “Nuuni nu kathi maana; nu ma7o ma7ana. Ne sunthan xeegetana mela oothada nu kawusha nuupe diggarkii?” yaagidi woossana. Xoossa Mitha Tashe
4.2: He wode Godaa tashey, lo77ananne bonchetana; attida Isra7eele asaas biitta kathay ceeqonne boncho gidana.
4.3: Xiyoonen attidaysati, Yerusalaamen dhayope kessi ekidaysatinne de7os xaafetidaysati geeshshata geetetana.
4.4: Goday Xiyoone maccasa qita meeccana; ba pirdaaninne ba ayyaana taman suutha guso Yerusalaamepe diggana.
4.5: Goday Xiyoone zumaa bollanne yan shiiqiya ubbaa bolla gallas shaara cuyanne qamma tama laco medhana; iya boncho ubbaa bolla kama gidana.
4.6: I, gallasa mishape ashshiya kuyanne uushopenne irape qosetiya besse gidana.

5.1: Ta dosiya addiya woyne gadiyaba, siiqo yethi yexana. Taani dosiya addiyas, aradda zuma bolla iyaw woyne gadey de7ees.
5.2: Biitta bookidi, shuchaa qori kessidi, lo77o woyne tokis. Naago shako iya giddon shakis; woyniya gum7iya bessaa giigisis. Hessafe guye, lo77o ayfe ayfana gidi naagis; shin caala ayfe ayfis.
5.3: “Hinteno, Yerusalaamen de7eysato, hinteno Yihuda asaw, taapenne ta woyne gadiya giddon de7iya odaa ane pirdite.
5.4: Taani ta woyne gadiyas oothidaysafe haraa ay oothanabay attidee? Lo77o ayfe ayfana gada naagas, shin ayis caala ayfe ayfidee?
5.5: Ha77i taani ta woyne gadiya bolla oothanaba hintew odana. Taani iya dirsaa diggana; woyney dhayanaada oothana. Taani gimbiya laallana; woyne gadey yedhetana.
5.6: Taani he gadiya quu7e oothana; woyney xintetenna, harmetenna. He bessan kinchoteynne agunthi dolana; Iri iya bolla bukonna mela taani shaara kiittana” yaagis.
5.7: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa woyne gadey Isra7eele asaa. I, ufaytiya atakilte bessay Yihuda asaa. Enta suure pirdoosona gidi naagis; shin suuthi gussidosona. Xillotethi oothosona gidi naagis; shin un7a waasoy darana mela oothidosona. Iitata Ayye!
5.8: Bessi dhayin, hinte xalaala biitta bolla daana gakanaw, keethe keetha bolla, gade gade bolla, gujeysato hintena ayye!
5.9: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada gidi caaqishin ta si7as. “He gita keethati kaysatana; he lo77o keethatan daanaw asi dhayana.
5.10: Tammu waaxan tokida woyniyape, issi oto gum7etha woyne xalaala ekana. Hospun tammu kilo giraame zerida gadepe, tammanne hospun kilo giraame xalaala ekana” yaagis.
5.11: Mathoya ushsha koyanaw wonta guura dendeysatanne woyne ushshay xuuggana gakanaw, yan qamisiya asaa ayye!
5.12: Enta imatuwan maasinqoy, diithi, karaaboy, suusul7eynne woyne ushshi de7ees. Shin enti Godaa oosuwa be7ibookona; iya kushe oosuwa akeekokona.
5.13: Hiza ta asay akeeka dhayida gisho, di7etana; ayseysati koshan hayqana; asay saamon xuugetana.
5.14: Duufoy ba gompaa dalgisis; ba doona zawi bayna dooyis. Yerusalaamen de7iya gita asaa, daro asaa, wocameysatanne ufayteyisata mittana.
5.15: Asi tooshetana; asa koche ubbay kawuyana; otortiya ubbay guuxana.
5.16: Shin Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, ba suure pirdan dhoqu dhoqu gaana; Xoossaa geeshshatethay iya xillotethan qoncana.
5.17: He wode dorsati he bessan heemetana; dorsa urgeti laaletida keetha bessatan maana.
5.18: Cimo wodoron nagara, gaare wodoron iitatethi goocheyisata ayye!
5.19: “Ane Xoossay elleso! Nuuni be7ana mela ba oosuwa eesoyo! Nuuni erana mela Isra7eele Geeshshay qopida qofaa polo” yaageyisata ayye!
5.20: Iitaa lo77o, lo77uwa iita; dhumaa poo7o, poo7uwa dhuma; camuwa mal7o, mal7uwa camo geyisata ayye!
5.21: Bantana cincanne qara geyisata ayye!
5.22: Woyne ushshan eretida asaanne mathoyiya ushshu walakanaw wozani mino gidida asaa ayye!
5.23: Qohida uraa xillisanaw wodhaafe ekidi, xillo asaa suure pirdaa geellayeyisata ayye!
5.24: Enti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa higgiya ixida gishonne Isra7eele Geeshshaa qaala kadhida gisho tama lacoy kale oykeysadanne buurey taman meetetidi dhayeysada enta xaphoy wooqana. Enta ciishshay baanada laaletidi dhayana.
5.25: Hessa gisho, Godaa hanqoy iya asaa bolla eexis; iya kushey dendidi, enta dhaysis. Dereti qaaxidosona; hayqida asaa ahay oge bolla buureda hanis. He ubbanka iya hanqoy simmibeenna; iya kushey ha77ika dendida bessan de7ees.
5.26: Goday haaho son de7iya kawotethatas malla dhoqan essis; sa7aa gaxan de7iya asaa suyqidi xeegis; enti dirgishe puttu goosona.
5.27: Enta giddon daabureynne dhubetey baawa; entafe issoyka dhiskenna woyko zin7enna. Xeessan dancida saqey birshetena; enta caamma wodoroy duuxenna.
5.28: Enta tooray qara; enta dongeyka waaxetidi de7ees. Enta parata tohoy qara shucha mela; enta para gaareta gertoy gote mela.
5.29: Enti gaammo mela guummoosona; wodala gaammo mela gudoosona. Enti sarbuqishe miyaba oykidi, tooki ekidi boosona; entafe wothidi ekey oonika baawa.
5.30: He wode enti gita abba guunthada Isra7eele bolla guummana. Issi asi he biitta xeelliya wode dhuminne waayey be7ana; poo7oy shaaran mitettana.

6.1: Kawoy Ooziyani hayqida laythi Goday dhoqa araataninne boncho bessan uttidaysa be7as; iya ma7oy Xoossa keethaa kumis.
6.2: Surafeela geetetiya kiitanchoti iyape bollara de7oosona; issi issi kiitanchuwas usupun qefeti de7oosona; nam7u qefetan ba som7uwa kammees; nam7u qefetan ba tohuwa kammees; nam7u qefetan piradhees.
6.3: Enti issoy issuwako, “Geeshshay, geeshshay, geeshshay, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa! Sa7a ubbay iya bonchuwan kumis” yaagosona.
6.4: Enta girsa waasuwa gaason Xoossa keethaa baasoy qaaxis; Xoossa keethay cuyan kumis.
6.5: Yaatin, “Taani mettershay tunida asaa giddon de7ayis; ta mettershayka tuna. Taani Kawa, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa ta ayfen be7ida gisho, tana ayye! Ta dhayas!” yaagas.
6.6: He kiitanchotape issoy yarsho bessaafe bonqo tama qaphera ekidi piradhishe taako yis.
6.7: Bonqo taman ta mettersha bochidi, “Heko; ha bonqo tamay ne mettershay bochida gisho ne naaqoy neepe kichis; ne nagaray atto geetetis” yaagis.
6.8: Hessafe guye Goday, “Oona kiitto? Nuus oone baanay?” yaagishin si7as. Taani, “Heko, tana kiitta, taani baana” yaagas.
6.9: Goday taako, “Bada ha asaa, ‘Hinte sissi si7eeta, shin akeekeketa; hinte xeelleta, shin demmeketa’ ” yaagada oda.
6.10: Kaallidika, “Ha asaa wozanaa muumisa; enta haythaa tullisa; enta ayfiya gooza. Hessi hanonna ixiko, enti banta ayfiyan be7idi, banta haythan si7idi, banta wozanan akeekidi, taako simmana; zaaridi paxana” yaagis.
6.11: Taani, “Abeeti Godaw, hessi hananay awude gakanaasee?” yaagas. I zaaridi, “Katamati laaletana gakanaw, keethati kaysa gidana gakanaw, biittay polo dogetana gakanaw;
6.12: asaa haaho bessi yeddana gakanawunne biittay asi bayna mela biitta gidana gakanaasa.
6.13: Tammu asaape issi asi biitta bolla attiko, ika dhayana. Qanxin attida wolanne caca duruma mela gidana; he durumay geeshsha koche gidana” yaagis.

7.1: Ooziyana na7ay Iyo7atama na7ay Akaazi, Yihudan kawotida wode Araame kawoy Razininne Isra7eele kawoy Ramala na7ay Faaquhey Yerusalaame olanaw yidosona; shin xoonanaw danda7ibookona.
7.2: Araame biittay Efreema biittara issife olas caaqidaysa Yihuda kawoy si7ida wode, woran de7iya mithaa carkoy qaatheysada, Akaaza wozanaynne asaa wozanay dagaman qaaxis.
7.3: Goday Isayaasako, “Neeranne ne na7aa Sheer-Yasuubara Akaazara gahetanaw biite; hinte iya ma7o meecciya goshshaako efiya ogiya matan qommo baggan de7iya haatha olaa wursethan hinte iya demmana.
7.4: Iyaw haysada yaagada oda; ‘Naageta; wopu ga; yayyofa. Ha nam7u kawoti tamape attidi cuyaa duruma mela gidiya gisho, Araame kawa Razinanne Ramala na7aa hanquwas yayyofa; ne wozanay dagammofo.’
7.5: Araame biittay, Efreema asaaranne Ramala na7aara ne bolla iitabaa maqetidosona.”
7.6: Enti “Ane Yihuda olidi oykoos; iya mentherethidi nu giddon shaaki ekidi, Xabeela na7aa kawothana yaagosona” yaaga.
7.7: Gidoshin, Ubbaa Haariya Goday, “Ha enta maqoy minnenna; enta zoretay poletenna.
7.8: Damasqoy Araame huuphe; kawoy Razini Damasqo huuphe. Usupun tammanne ichashu laytha giddon Efreemi laaletidi kawotethi gidonna attana.
7.9: Efreema huuphey Samaariya; Ramala na7ay, Faaquhey Samaariya huuphe. Hinte, hinte ammanuwan minnonna ixiko, eqanaw danda7eketa” yaagees.
7.10: Qassika Goday Akaazako,
7.11: “Bolla saluwape woyko garsa sa7aape Goday, ne Xoossay new issi malla immana mela oycha” yaagis.
7.12: Shin Akaazi, “Oychike; oychada Godaa paacike” yaagis.
7.13: Yaatin, Isayaasi, “Hinteno, Dawita soo asaw, si7ite! Hinte asa danda7a paaceysi ay guuxin, qassi ta Xoossa danda7a paacetii?
7.14: Hessa gisho, Goday ba huuphen hintew malla immana; geela7iya qanthatada adde na7a yelana; iya sunthaaka Amanu7eela gada xeegana.
7.15: I, iitaa ixonne lo77o dooro eriya wode meqa maathinne oysi maana.
7.16: Shin na7ay iita ixonne lo77uwa dooro eranaape sinthe, neeni yayiya nam7u kawota biittati baysatana.
7.17: Efreemi Yihudape shaaketoosape doomin haniboonna meto wode Goday ne bolla, ne asaa bollanne ne aawa soo asaa bolla ehana; I ehanayka Asoore kawa” yaagis.
7.18: He gallas Goday, haaho shaafa gaxan de7iya Gibxe udunxetanne Asoore mathata suyqidi xeegana.
7.19: Yaatin, enti ubbay yidi, mela biitta zangaaran, shucha gongolon, agunthi de7iya buureninne haatha ollatan uttana.
7.20: He gallas Goday Efraxiisa shaafa hefintha baggafe garxida shiggiriyan, Asoore kawan, hinte huuphiya buluusana; hinte ikisiyanne hinte buuchaa meedana.
7.21: He gallas issi asas issi miizinne nam7u deesha xalaali attana.
7.22: Gidoshin, enta maathay daro gidiya gisho I meqa maathi ustana; he biittan attida asa ubbay meqa maathinne eessi maana.
7.23: He gallas issi mukulu biran washetiya mukulu woyne tohoti de7iya bessa ubban kinchoteynne agunthi dolana.
7.24: Biitta ubban kinchoteynne agunthi kumida gisho, asay yaa biya wode donge oykidi baana.
7.25: Kase konten oothida zumatan ha77i kinchoteynne agunthi kumida gisho yayyidi, issi asika yaa beenna. Shin meheynne dorsi heemetiya bessi gidana.

8.1: Goday taako, “Gita saleeda ekada, ‘Di7anaw ellesa! Bonqanaw dirga!’ yaagada nabbabetiya pidalen xaafa.
8.2: Kahiniya Urayanne Baraka na7aa Zakariyasa ammanetiya marka oothada taani xeegana” yaagis.
8.3: Hessafe guye, taani nabe gidida ta machera aqas; iya qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Goday taako, “Iya suntha, ‘Mahaar-Shalal-Hash-Baaz’ yaagada xeega.
8.4: Na7ay, ‘Abbo, immo’ gidi xeessi eranaape sinthe Asoore kawoy, Damasqo duretethaanne Samaariya shaluwa ekidi baana” yaagis.
8.5: Qassika Goday taako haysada yaagis.
8.6: “Ha asay loddara goggiya Salihoome haatha ixidi, Razinanne Ramala na7aa ufaytidi ekidosona.
8.7: Hessa gisho, Goday minonne daro gidida Efraxiisa haatha, Asoore kawa, iya olanchotara ehana hanees. I haathi kixidi kumeysada gaxaa ubbaa ma7idi goggana.
8.8: Di77ishe Yihuda gelana; kixay qoodhe gakanaw kumidi yaara kanthana.” Abeeti Amanu7eela, iya qefiya micethay ne biitta ubbaa ma7is.
8.9: Hinteno kawotethato, issife olas shiiqite, shin hinte dhayana. Haaho biittan de7iya asato, si7ite; olas giigite; shin hinte liiqana! Ee, olas giigite; hinte wurana.
8.10: Xoossay nuura de7iya gisho, olas maqetite, shin hinte maqoy kanthenna; halchite, shin hinte halchoy halana. Xoossa Yayya
8.11: “Goday ba mino kushiya ta bolla wothidi, ta ha asaa ogiyan boonna mela taw minthidi odis.
8.12: Ha asaa maqo ubbaa maqo goopite; enti yayyiyaba Yayyofite; dagammopite.
8.13: Hinte geeshshi gaanaw bessey Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa; iyaw yayyanawunne dagammanaw bessees.
8.14: I, geeshsha bessi gidana; shin Yihudasinne Isra7eeles I, dhube shuchinne kundisiya zaalla gidana. Yerusalaamen de7iya asaas I gitenne xihe gidana.
8.15: Entafe daroti dhubetana; kundidi me77ana; xihen oyketidi di7etana” yaagis.
8.16: Ta odeysa naaga; ta tamaareta giddon higgiya attama.
8.17: Taani ba som7uwa Yayqooba zerethafe genthiya Godaa naagana; iyan ammanetana.
8.18: Tananne taw Goday immida nayta be7ite. Nuuni Xiyoone deriyan de7iya Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaape Isra7eele asaas mallanne malaata.
8.19: “Suyqishenne kalkashishe odiya marotanne moytilleta oychite” yaagidi hintena zoriya asay de7oosona. De7on de7eysatas hayqidaysata oycheysafe asay banta Xoossaa oychanaw bessennee?
8.20: Higgiyanne Godaa marka si7ite! He asati ha qaalada haasayonna ixiko entaw sa7i wontenna.
8.21: Asay waayetishenne koshatishe biitta bolla toylatana. Enti koshatida wode yilotidi, pude salo xeellidi banta kawanne banta Xoossaa baaddana.
8.22: Sa7aa duge xeelliya wode waaye, dhumanne yashshiya caagana be7ana; enti sakana dhuman holetana.

9.1: Gidoshin, waayetidaysatas hizape guye dhumenna. Beni wode Goday Zabloona biittanne Niftaaleme biitta kawushis. Shin sinthafe Medetiraane Abbaa ogiyan de7iya biittanne Yordaanose shaafape hefinthan de7iya Ayhude gidonna asay de7iya Galila biitta I bonchana.
9.2: Dhuman hemetiya asay wolqaama poo7o be7is; qassi hayqo dhuman de7eysatas poo7oy poo7is.
9.3: Neeni kawotethaa darsadasa; enta ufaysaa gujadasa. Asi kathi shiishiya wode ufayteysada woyko di7uwa shaakidi ekiya wode ufayteysada ne sinthan ufaytana.
9.4: Neeni Midiyaame biitta xoonidaysada enta deexo qambara, enta gannas giigida xam7anne enta un7etheyisata gumba menthadasa.
9.5: Olanchota caammaynne suuthan munuqetida ma7o ubbay taman xuugetana; tamas oysetho gidana.
