9.6: Nuus na7i yeletis! Adde na7i nuus imetis! Kawotetha maati iya hashiyan gidana; iya sunthay, “Malaalisiya Zorancho, Wolqaama Xoossa, Merinaa Aawa, Sarotethaa Halaqaa” geetetana.
9.7: Iya kawotethaa dalgatethaasinne iya sarotethaas zawi baawa. Hachife doomidi, merinaa gakanaw suure pirdaaninne xillotethan minthanawunne essanaw Dawita araataninne iya kawotethan I kawotana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa qanaatey haysa oothana. Isra7eele Bolla Godaa Hanquwa
9.8: Goday Yayqooba zeretha bolla pirda qaala kiittin, Isra7eele kawotethaa bolla wodhis.
9.9: Efreema asayinne Samaare katamaa asay haysa oothiday Godaa gideysa erishe, otoroninne ceeqon,
9.10: “Xuubepe keexetida keethati laaletidosona; shin nu zaaridi masetida shuchan keexana; boobba mithati qanxetidosona; shin nu enta bessan zigata laammana” yaagidosona.
9.11: Shin, Xoossay Rasoona morketa minthana; enta bolla ehana; entara eqetiya morketa enta bolla denthethis.
9.12: Dolohape Araameta, wulohape Filisxeemeta denthin, enti banta doona dooyidi, Isra7eele mittidosona. He ubban Godaa hanqoy simmibeenna; iya kushey dendida bessan de7ees.
9.13: Gidoshin, asay bantana shocidaysako simmibokona; Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa koybookona.
9.14: Hessa gisho, issi gallas Goday Isra7eelepe huuphenne goynaa, zamba daashshanne maqa qanxana.
9.15: Cimatinne bonchetidaysati huuphe; wordo tamaarsiya nabeti goyna.
9.16: Ha asaa kaaletheysati balethoosona; enta kaalleysatika baloosona.
9.17: Hessa gisho, Goday enta na7atethatan ufaytenna; yi7o naytasinne am7etas qadhetenna. Asi ubbay iitanne Xoosse eronnaysa gidana; ubbay ba doonan iitabaa odetees. He ubban Godaa hanqoy simmibeenna; iya kushey dendida bessan de7ees.
9.18: Tami kinchotenne agunthi meysada iitatethi xuuggees; siketida wori xuugetin, cuyay tuussada keyeysada keyees.
9.19: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa hanquwan biittay xuugetana; asika tama oysethiyaba gidana; oonika ba ishaa ashshanaw qopenna.
9.20: Enti ushacha baggara bonqana, shin koshatana; enti haddirsa baggara maana, shin kallokona; enti banta yelida nayta maana.
9.21: Minaasey Efreema, Efreemika Minaase maana; enti issife gididi Yihuda biitta morkana. He ubban Godaa hanqoy simmibeenna; iya kushey dendida bessan de7ees.

10.1: Iita higgenne un7ethiya awaajo kesseyisata ayye!
10.2: Hessan enti manqota, am7etanne yi7ota pirdaa geellayosona; am7etanne yi7ota aquwa bonqoosona.
10.3: I, haaho biittafe yaa metuwan seeriya wode hinte waananee? Maado demmanaw oodeko baqatanee? Hinte shaluwa awun qottanee?
10.4: Hinte di7etida asaara gooshetana; hayqida asaa giddon zin7ana. He ubban Godaa hanqoy simmibeenna; iya kushey dendida bessan de7ees. Asoorey Pirdetana
10.5: Goday haysada yaagees; “Ta yiluwas pirconne ta hanquwas xam7a gidida Asoore biitta ayye!
10.6: Enta shaluwa di77anaadanne bonqanaada; oge urqada enta yedhanaada Xoosse eronna kawotethaa bolla taani Asoore kiittana; tana hanqethida asaa bolla iya yeddana.
10.7: Shin Asoore kawoy haysa halchibeenna; iya wozanay haysa qopibeenna. I qopiday daro kawotethata dhaysanaasa.
10.8: Hessa gisho, I yaagidi ceeqetees; ‘Ta toora moconati ubbay kawota gidokonaayee?’
10.9: Kalinoy Karkamisha katamaa mela gidenneyee? Hamaati Arfada katamaa mela gidenneyee? Samaarey Damasqo katamaa mela gidenneyee?
10.10: Yerusalaameninne Samaaren de7iya eeqatape dariya eeqata goyinniya kawotethata seeranaw taani ta kushiya yeddas.
10.11: Taani Samaare katamaa bollanne iya eeqa misileta bolla oothidaysada Yerusalaame katamaa bollanne iya eeqa misileta bolla oothikinaayee?” yaagis.
10.12: Goday Xiyoone deriya bollanne Yerusalaame bolla ba oosuwa ubbaa polidaape guye, Asoore kawa iya otoruwasinne ceequwas iya seerana.
10.13: Asoore kawoy haysada yaagees: “Ta kushe minotethan, ta cincatethaaninne ta akeekan haysa oothas. Taani kawotethata giddon de7iya zawata shoddas; enta shaluwa bonqas; ta wolqan kawotethata araatape wodhisas.
10.14: Asi kafo keethan kushe yeddeysada taani kawotethaa shaluwan ta kushiya yeddas. Qassi dogetida phuuphuleta shiisheysada taani biitta ubbaa shiishas. Ba qefiya qaathiday woyko doona phuqiday woyko waassiday issoyka baawa” yaagis.
10.15: Kalti baara qanxiya addiya bolla dendanaw danda7ii? Woyko magaazey banan go7etiya addiya bolla otoranaw danda7ii? Kushey denthonna xam7i bana baw denthii? Guufey oykiya asi bayna baw hemetii?
10.16: Hessa gisho, Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, iya mino olanchota bolla gilqisiya harge yeddana. Iya bonchuwa laxo tami maana.
10.17: Isra7eele Poo7oy tama gidana; enta Geeshshay laco gidana. Iya agunthanne iya kinchotiya issi gallas xuuggananne maana.
10.18: Hargey ase gilqiseysada Goday ba wora mitha bonchuwanne ba aradda biitta bonchuwa dhaysana.
10.19: Woran attiya mithay daro guuthi gidiya gisho, hari attoshin guutha na7ika taybidi wursana. Attida Guuthati Simmana
10.20: He wode Isra7eelepenne Yihudape attida guuthati bantana shocidaysan gidonashin, tuma Godan, Isra7eele Geeshshan zempana.
10.21: Attida Yihuda asay Wolqaama Xoossaako simmana.
10.22: Neno Isra7eele, neeni abba gaxan de7iya shafiya mela darikoka, attida guuthata xalaali simmana. Xillotethi kumida dhayoy iya asaas awaajetis.
10.23: Ee, Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay sa7a ubbaa bolla ehanaw qopida dhayuwa ehana.
10.24: Hessa gisho, Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Xiyoonen de7iya ta asaw, Gibxeti oothidaysada Asooreti hintena xam7an shociya wodenne banta gumba hinte bolla denthiya wode yayyofite.
10.25: Guutha wodepe guye, taani hinte bolla hanqetidaysa aggana; hessafe guye, ta hanqoy enta dhaysanaw dendana” yaagees.
10.26: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Oreeba shuchaa matan Midiyaameta shocidaysada enta lisson shocana. I Gibxen oothidaysada ba xam7a abba bolla denthana.
10.27: He gallas, iya toohoy hinte hashiyape wodhana; iya qambaray hinte morgefe kichana. Hinte ordida gisho qambaray meqana.
10.28: Morkiya wotaadarati Gaye katamaa gelidosona; Migroonara kanthidosona; banta ola miishiya Mikmaasa wothidosona.
10.29: Enti ogiyara kanthi aadhidi, Geeban aqidosona. Raman de7iya asay kokoridosona; Gib7an, kawa Saa7ola kataman de7iya asay baqatidosona.
10.30: Galima asaw, waaso goochite! Laysha asaw, si7ite! Anatoota asaw, oysha zaarite!
10.31: Madimana asay baqatidosona; Gebima asay banta shempuwas qosetidosona.
10.32: Morkiya wotaadarati hachi Nooban de7oosona; enti Xiyoone zuma bolla eqidi, banta kushiya qaathidi, Yerusalaame katamaa babisoosona.
10.33: Heko, Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, tasheta gita wolqan shaqana; aduqida mithati qanxetana; dhoqa gidaysati kawuyana.
10.34: Goday siketida wora kallotana gakanaw qanxana; Libaanosey Wolqaamaa sinthan kundana.

11.1: Isseye durumay aacana; iya xaphuwape ayfiya tashey keyana.
11.2: Godaa Ayyaanay iya bolla shempana; cincatethaanne akeeka Ayyaanay, zoriyanne wolqaa Ayyaanay, eratethaanne Godaas yayiya Ayyaanay, iya bolla shempana.
11.3: Godaas yayyidi ufaytees; ba ayfey be7idaban coo pirdenna; woyko ba haythay si7idaban coo kuuyenna.
11.4: Shin I, manqotas xillotethan pirdana; sa7an de7iya metootanchotas suuretethan kuuyana. I ba inxarsaa xam7an sa7aa shocana; ba doona shempuwan iitata wodhana.
11.5: Xillotethi iya xeessa danco gidana; ammanetethi iya miyaas saqe gidana.
11.6: Suudhumey dorsa marara issife daana; maahey deesha marara issife zin7ana. Mari gaammo butalera issife hemetana; guutha na7i enta heemmana.
11.7: Miizinne babanthi issife heemetana; enta marati issife zin7ana; gaammoy boorada kale maana.
11.8: Dhammiya na7i shoosha ollan kaa7ana; dhanthi duuxida na7i wodhiya shoosha ollan ba kushiya yeddana.
11.9: Ta geeshsha zumaa bolla oonika qohetenna woyko dhayenna. Abbi haathan kumeysada sa7i Godaa eron kumana.
11.10: He wode Isseye xaphoy asaas malla gidana; kawotetha ubbay iya koyana; I de7iya bessay bonchetana.
11.11: He gallas Goday attida ba asaa, Asoorepe, Gibxefe, Phatroosape, Tophefe, Elaamape, Sana7oorepe, Hamaatapenne yuushoy abban teqetida biittafe nam7antho ehanaw ba kushiya zaaridi yeddana.
11.12: I kawotethatas malla dhoqu oothidi denthana; Isra7eelepe laaletidaysata issife gathana; Yihudape sa7aa oyddu baggan zeretidaysata shiishana.
11.13: Hessafe guye, Efreema qanaatey iyape kichana; Yihuda morketethay iyape qanxetana. Efreemi Yihuda qanaatenna; Yihudi Efreema morkenna.
11.14: Enti wuloha baggan de7iya Filisxeeme biitta bolla gupi wodhana; enti doloha baggan de7iya asaa bonqana. Enti Edoome bollanne Moo7abe bolla banta kushiya wothana; Amooneti entaw haaretana.
11.15: Goday Gibxe matan de7iya Zo7o Abbaa melisana; ba melsiya carkuwara ba kushiya Efraxiisa shaafa bolla qaathana. Yaatidi asay mela bessaara pinnana mela laapun guutha shaafa kessidi shaakana.
11.16: Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyiya wode ogey keydaysada, attida iya asay, Asoore biittafe simmiya ogey keyana.

12.1: He wode hinte haysada yaagidi yexana. “Godaw, neeni ta bolla hanqetadasa; shin ha77i ne hanquwafe simmadasa. Tana minthethadasa; hessa gisho, taani nena galatayis.
12.2: Xoossay ta atotetha; taani iyan ammanetayis, yayike. Goday Xoossay, ta wolqaanne yethaa; I ta atotetha” yaagana.
12.3: Atotetha pultuwafe hinte haathe ufaysan duuqana.
12.4: He gallas hinte yaagidi yexana: “Godaa galatite! Iya sunthaa xeegite. Iya oosota kawotethata ubbaas odite; I gita gideysa awaajite.
12.5: Goday gita ooso oothida gisho, iyaw yexite; haysi sa7a ubban ereto.
12.6: Isra7eele Geeshshay hinte giddon gita gidiya gisho, Xiyoone asaw, ililite, ufaysan yexite!” yaagana.

13.1: Amoxe na7ay, Isayaasi Goday Babilooneba qoncisin be7idaysi haysa.
13.2: Aykoy bayna deriya bolla malla essidi, hinte qaala dhoqu oothidi waassite; enti halaqata pengiyara gelana mela wuttite.
13.3: Taani hanqetidaysata seerana mela ta geeshshata kiittas; ta xoonoy ufaysiya ta wolqaamata xeegas.
13.4: Daro asay wocameysada deriya huuphiyan de7iya wocamaa si7ite! Qassi kawotethati issife shiiqidi palamiya palama si7ite! Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday olanchota olas giigisis.
13.5: Godaynne iya hanqo ola miishey biitta ubbaa dhaysanaw haaho biittafe, salo gaxape yoosona.
13.6: Godaa gallasay matida gisho yeekite! He gallasay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaa matape dhaysanaw yaana.
13.7: Hessa gisho, yashshan enta kushey doccana; asa ubbaa wozanay til7ana.
13.8: Enti dagammana; iqethinne un7etethi enta oykana. Yelo keyida maccasada enti inxaxana. Enti dagammidi issoy issuwa xeellana; enta som7oy bido gidis.
13.9: Heko biitta baysa kessanawunne iyan de7iya nagaranchota dhaysanaw yiloninne suullida hanqon Godaa gallasay yaana.
13.10: Salo xoolintotinne xoolinto koceti banta poo7uwa diggana; doliya away dhumana; ageenayka ba poo7uwa immenna.
13.11: Goday, “Taani ha sa7aa iya iitatethaa gisho, iitataka enta nagara gisho seerana. Taani otoranchota otoruwa shaarana; iitata ceequwa kawushana.
13.12: Attidaysati walahi bayna worqafe al7o gidana; asa na7i Ofira worqafe aadhidi boncho gidana.
13.13: Hessa gisho, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa hanquwan, iya hanquwa suulaa gallas, taani salota kokorsana; sa7aaka iya bessaafe qaathana” yaagees.
13.14: Shankafe baqatiya gaarada woyko heemmiya asi bayna dorsa wudeda asi ubbay ba asaako simmana; ubbay ba biitta baqatana.
13.15: Bentida oonika cadetana; oyketida oonika mashshan hayqana.
13.16: Enta guutha nayti enta sinthan busetana; enta keethay bonqetana; enta macheta hara asi iissana.
13.17: Bira koyonnanne worqan ufaytonna Meedona asaa taani enta bolla denthana.
13.18: Enta dongey na7atethata wodhana; yooga naytaka maarokona; enta ayfey naytas qadhetenna.
13.19: Kawotethatas boncho, ba asaas alleeqo gidida Babiloone biitta, Goday Sodoomedanne Gamoorada shiri yeggana.
13.20: He biittan asi uttenna; woyko yeletaape yeletaa gakanaw yan asi deenna. Arabe asay yan banta dunkaaniya tolokona; dorse heemmeysatika yan banta wudiya heemmokona.
13.21: Shin bazzo do7ati yan aqana; workanati enta keethaa kumana; guttoti yan daana; yanchoti yan keexana; bazzo deeshati yan gupana.
13.22: Enta keethatan godarey waassana; enta kawo gadhon workanati boccana. Iya wodey matis; iya gallasayka gam7enna.

14.1: Goday Yayqoobas qadhetana; Isra7eele zaaridi doorana; enta, enta buzo biittan wothana. Betanchoti entara issifana, Yayqooba soo asaara oyketana.
14.2: Kawotethati enta, enta biitta ehana. Isra7eele asay entana maccanne adde aylle oothidi Godaa biittan haarana. Enti bantana di7idaysata di7ana; bantana haaridaysata haarana.
14.3: Goday hintena, hinte un7aafe, metuwapenne hinte haaretida iita aylletethaafe shempisiya wode,
14.4: hinte Babiloone kawa bolla haysada yaagidi qelqisana. Un7etheysi waanidi aggidee? Iya hanquwa suulay waanidi attidee?
14.5: Goday kawotethata xam7aanne haareyisata gumba menthis.
14.6: Enti asaa zawi bayna hanquwan shocidosona; bantana xoonidaysata qanxonna un7ethishe de7idosona.
14.7: Shin biitta ubbay shempidi de7is; ufaysan yexis.
14.8: Hari attoshin, Libaanose zigatinne xiiddati kawa kundethan ufaytidi, “Neeni kawuyada kundidaape guye, nuna qanxanaw yey baawa” yaagosona.
14.9: Neeni yaa wode, Si7ooley nena mokanaw giigis; I kase biitta kaalethida asaa moytilleta, nena sarothana mela denthethees; qassi kase kawo gidida ubbaa enta araatape denthidi essees.
14.10: Enti ubbay haysada yaagana. “Heko neka nuuda wolqa dhayadasa; nu mela gidadasa.”
14.11: Kase diithi diixin sabetiya ne bonchoy ha77i Si7oole gelis. Ollathi neeni zin7iya hiixa; guxuney neeni ma7iya afila gidana yaagana.
14.12: Neno wonta na7aw, guura bakalaw, salope waana kundadii? Neno kawotethata kawushidayso waana qanxetada sa7an wodhadii?
14.13: Neeni ne wozanan, “Taani salo keyana; ta kawotethaa araata Xoossaa xoolintotape bollara wothana; taani pudeha bagga gaxan shiiqo deriya huuphen uttana .
14.14: Taani shaarati de7iya dhoqa bessaafe bolla aadhana; taani, tana Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa daanisana” yaagadasa.
14.15: Shin neeni Si7oolen, hirki ciimmo ollan duge yegetadasa.
14.16: Nena be7idaysati, “Biitta qaathidaysi, kawotethata kokorsidaysi,
14.17: sa7aa biitta bazzo kessidaysi, sa7an de7iya katamata shiri yeggidaysi, ba qasho asata yeddonna ixidaysi haysee?” yaagidi tishshi oothidi xeellana.
14.18: Kawotethata kawoti ubbay ba duufon duufon bonchon zin7ana.
14.19: Shin neeni ixetida tasheda ne duufuwape gaxa holettadasa. Ne ahay mashshan hayqida ahaninne ollan de7iya shuchatako duge wodhidaysata ahan kametis. Neeni tohon yedhetida aha mela gidadasa.
14.20: Neeni ne biitta dhaysida gishonne ne asaa wodhida gisho entara moogetaka. Iitaa sunthay kochay merinaw xeegetofo.
14.21: Enti dendidi biitta laattonna; sa7a ubbaa katama xalaala oothonna mela enta aawata nagaraa gisho, iya nayta wodhanaw giigisite.
14.22: Taani “Enta bolla dendana; enta sunthaa, enta kochaanne enta yeletaa Babiloonepe dhaysana.
14.23: Taani Babiloone quxarey de7iya bessinne haathi eelliya bessi oothana; taani gado piton iya pittana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday. Asoorey Dhayana
14.24: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagidi caaqis: “Taani halchidaysada hanana; taani qopidaysada poletana.
14.25: Taani Asoore asaa ta biittan mentherethana; ta deriya bolla iya yedhana. Iya qambaray enta bollafe, iya toohoy enta hashiyape kichana” yaagis.
14.26: Sa7a ubbaas qofetida qofay haysa; kawotethata ubbaa bolla micetida kusheyka haysa.
14.27: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysa qopida gisho iya digganaw danda7ey oonee? Iya kushey micetis; hessa guye zaaranaw danda7ey oonee? Filisxeemey Dhayana
14.28: Kawoy Akaazi hayqida laythi odetida qaalay haysa:
14.29: Hinteno Filisxeeme asaw, hintena shocida xam7ay me77ida gisho ufaytofite. He shoosha kochaafe hasoy keyana; iya kochay qassi xongetiya shooshi gidana.
14.30: Manqofe manqoti ta qooruwan heemetana; metootanchoti wopu gidi zin7ana. Shin taani ne kochaa koshan wursana; neepe attida guuthata wodhana.
14.31: Neno pengiyaw, yeeka! Neno katamaw, waassa! Hinteno Filisxeeme asaw, hinte ubbay hirgan til7ite! Pudeha baggafe cuyi keyidi yees; he cugaape duuxidi guye attey baawa.
14.32: He kawotethay kiitida asatas woygidi zaaranee? Goday Xiyoone keexin, qohetida asay I giddon qosetidi attiya bessi demmis.

15.1: Moo7abe biittaba Goday odida qaalay haysa: Moo7aben de7iya Era katamaynne Qiira katamay issi qamma laaletidi dhayidosona.
15.2: Diboonan de7iya asay banta eeqa keethan yeekanaw dhoqa bessi keyidosona. Moo7abe asay Nebosinne Medebaas yeekees. Huuphe ubbay buluusetis; buuchi ubbay meedetis.
15.3: Oge bolla kayo ma7o ma7oosona; pooqe bollanne dabaaba ubban yeekoosonanne afuthi dharcoosona.
15.4: Haseboona asaynne Elaala asay waassoosona; enta waasoy Yahaaxa gakanaw si7etees. Hessa gisho, olas dancida Moo7abe wotaadareti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi waassidosona; enta shempoy kokoris.
15.5: Taani Moo7abes wozanape yeekas; iyan de7iya asay Zo7aarenne Egilaat-Shelisha katamaa baqatis. Enti Luhita ogiyan yeekishe boosona; baggati qassi Horonayma biya ogiyan, banta dhayuwa gisho waaso goochidosona.
15.6: Namirima haathati melidosona; maatay miccis; aacay shullis; cil7obay aybika baawa.
15.7: Hessa gisho, enti banta shiishida shaluwanne minja tooki ekidi, Ahaya mithay de7iya zangaarape hefinthi efoosona.
15.8: Moo7abe heera ubbay waaso xalaala gidis; enta waasoy Eglaamanne Bi7eer-Elime gakanaw si7etees.
15.9: Dimoona haathati suuthi gididosona; shin, ha77ika taani Dimoona katamaa bolla kaseysafe aadhiya meto ehana. Moo7abepe kessi ekidi baqateyisata bollanne he biittan attidaysata bolla gaammo yeddada wursana.

16.1: Moo7abe asaw, bazzo biya ogiyan de7iya Seelape urge dorsata imota oothidi, Yerusalaamen de7iya biitta haareysas yeddite.
16.2: Moo7abe maccasay banta keethafe goodetida kafotada Arnoona shaafa pinniya bessan laaletana.
16.3: Moo7abe asay Yihuda asaako, “Nuna zorite; nuna nu morketape ashshite; seeta gallasan mitha kuyada hinte kuyaa nu bolla kuyayte. Goodeteyisata qosite; qosetidaysata aathidi immopite.
16.4: Moo7abepe goodeteysati hinte giddon de7o; enta dhaysanaw koyeysatape qosetidi attiya besse gidite. Enta un7etheysati wuridosona; enta dhayoy attis; otoranchoti biittafe dhayidosona.
16.5: Hessafe guye, siiqon issi kawotetha araatay eqana; he araatan, Dawita kochaafe issi ammanetiya kawoy uttana. I suuretetha koyana; xillotethaa oothanaw ellesana” yaagana.
16.6: Yihuda asay, “Moo7abe asay ay mela otoriyako nu enta otoruwa si7ida; enta ceequwanne enta cashshaa si7ida; shin enta otoroy hada” yaagana.
16.7: Hessa gisho, Moo7abey baw yeeko; asi ubbayka Moo7abes yeeko. Qir-Hereesan hinte de7iya wode mida lo77o kathaa hassayishe yeekite.
16.8: Haseboona goshshaynne Sebama woyne gadey dhayis. Kawotethata halaqati yedherethida tasheti mela biitta kanthidi Ya7izeera gakidosona; enta aacay daayidi, abba pinnis.
16.9: Taani Ya7izeera katamaas yeekidaysada Sebama katamaa woynetas yeekayis. Haseboona katamaasine El7aala katamaas, taani ta afuthaa gussayis. Hinte mithaa ayfiyanne hinte bootida kathaa bolla oli dendis.
16.10: Goshsha gadiyape ufaysinne hashshu guussi eketis. Woyne gadiyan mazmurey yexetenna. Ufaysan woyne gum7iya bessan gum7iya asi baawa; taani gum7eyisata ililsaa dhaysas.
16.11: Hessa gisho, ta wozanay Moo7abes, ta garsa asatethayka Qir-Hereesas yeekees.
16.12: Moo7abey ba zumaa bolla keykoka, bana coo daabursees; I woossanaw ba eeqa keethi gelikoka bana aykoka maaddenna.
16.13: Goday kasetidi Moo7abeba odida qaalay haysa.
16.14: Shin ha77i Goday, “Une oosancho wodey guutha gideysa mela Moo7abe bonchoynne iya darotethay heedzu laytha giddon wurana. Iyan attiya asay pathonaysatanne wolqi baynayisata gidana” yaagees.

17.1: Damasqoba Goday haysada yaagees: “Heko, hizape guye Damasqoy katama gidonnoshin, laaletha doore gidana.
17.2: Aroora katamati asi bayna baysa biitta gidana; yan mehey heemetana; enta yashshiyabay deenna.
17.3: Efreemape Miixati, Damasqofe kawotethay dhayana; Soorepe attida guuthati Isra7eele asaa bonchuwa mela gidana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
17.4: “He wode Isra7eele bonchoy qaaretana; iya ordetethay gilqana.
17.5: Isra7eeley, kathi caki ekidi keyida goshsha gade mela gidana; woyko kathi caki simmin kallotida Raafayme zangaara mela gidana.
17.6: Shamaho qoqofi simmin, xeeran nam7u woyko heedzu ayfeti atteysada woyko issi yangiya bolla oyddu woyko ichashu ayfeti atteysada Isra7eelepe guuthati attana” yaagees Goday Isra7eele Xoossay.
17.7: He gallas asay bantana medhidaysako, banta ayfiyaka Isra7eele Geeshshaako zaarana.
17.8: Enti banta kushen giigisida yarsho bessaako xeellokona; Asheera eeqa misiliyas gidin, ixaane cuyisanaw enti banta kushen medhida yarsho bessa bonchokona.
17.9: He wode Isra7eele asaa gaason Hiwenne Amoore katamati laaletidaysada enta mino katamati laaletana; baysa gidana.
17.10: Hinte hintena ashshiya Xoossaa dogideta; hinte qoseti attiya zaalla qopibeketa. Hessa gisho, neeni lo77o mithaanne kare biittafe yida lo77o atakiltiya tokikoka,
17.11: he gallas enti diccidi gakana mela oothikoka, qassi neeni zerida wontethe enti ciiyakoka neeni ayfe demmaka. Iya bessan paxonna hargenne meto cakana.
17.12: Heko, abba beetada guummiya daro asaa, qassi wolqaama haathada waassiya kawotethata ayye!
17.13: Kawotethati daro haathada guummoosona; shin Goday enta seerana. Enti zumaa huuphen de7iya buure carkoy dentheysadanne gotey baana dentheysada enta denthidi haaho bessi laallana.
17.14: Sa7i qammiya wode enti dagammana; sa7i wontanaape sinthe enti dhayana. Nuna wolqan ekeysatanne bonqeyisata qaaday haysa.

18.1: Tophe shaafatape hefinthan giiriya qefeti de7iya biitta ayye!
18.2: He biittay, kiitetiya asata mayre wogolon wothidi Nayle Shaafa bollara kiittees. Hinteno, eeson kiiteteysato, adusenne liiqo asaako, mataninne haahon yashshiya asaako, wolqaamanne xooniya kawotethaako, shaafan enta zaway shaaketida biittako biite.
18.3: Hinteno, sa7an de7iya ubbato, hinteno, biittan de7eysato, zumaa bolla malli eqiya wode hinte be7ana; moyzey punetiya wode hinte si7ana.
18.4: Goday taako, “Seeta gallas si77i gidi poo7iya awada, qassi kathi cakiya ageenan, hombiya qamman bentiya aka mela taani si77i gada, ta de7iya bessaafe duge xeellana” yaagis.
18.5: Kathaa cakiya wodiyape kase, ciishshay qoletidi simmin, woyne teeriya wode oco baacan xeera qanxeysada I he biitta asaa dhaysana.
18.6: Enti ubbay deriya huuphiyan de7iya, miyaba wochiya kafotasinne do7atas attana. Kafoti balgon, do7ati bonen enta midi shaacana.
18.7: He wode adussenne liiqo asaape, mataninne haahon yashshiya asaape, wolqaamanne xooniya kawotethaafe, zaway shaafan shaaketida biittafe, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaas imoti Xiyoone Zumaa, iya sunthay de7iya bessaa yaana.

19.1: Gibxe bolla Goday haysada yaagidi odis: “Heko, Goday eesotiya shaara toggidi, Gibxe yees. Gibxe eeqati iya sinthan kokorana; Gibxe asaa wozanay yashshan til7ana.
19.2: Gibxe asaa issuwa issuwa bolla denthana. Ishay ishaa bolla, shooroy shooruwa bolla, katamay katamaa bolla, kawotethay kawotethaa bolla dendana.
19.3: Gibxe asay eesho dhayana; taani enta halchuwa hada oothana. Enti banta eeqata, moytillera odeteyisata, bitanchotanne marota zore oychana.
19.4: Taani wozana mino gidida Gibxe kawa kushen aathada immana; I enta haarana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
19.5: Nayle Shaafa guuxi guuxi baana; haathayka melana.
19.6: Dhaway xinqana; Gibxe haathati guuxananne melana; mayreynne maqay shullana;
19.7: Nayle Shaafa gaxan de7iya cil7obay melana; iya heeran zeretida katha ubbay melananne dhayana.
19.8: Molo oykeysati kayotana; Nayle shaafan gitenne molo manxaqo yeggiya ubbay yeekananne doccana.
19.9: Paadetida talbafe liino ma7o ootheysati, bootha ma7o daddiya dorzeti ufaysi qanxana.
19.10: Piiqeysatinne une oothiya ubbay kayotana.
19.11: Xo7aane haareysati eeya; Gibxe kawa zoriya cincati pathonna zore zoroosona. Yaatin, hinte Gibxe kawako, “Nuuni cincata nayta; nuuni beni kawota nayta” gaanaw waanidi danda7eetii?
19.12: Yaatin, ne cinca asati ha77i awun de7oona? Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Gibxe bolla oothanaw halchidaba ane enti new odonne nena erisonna.
19.13: Xo7aane haareysati eeyidosona; Mempisa haareysati cimetidosona. Gibxe zoriya gita asati iya balethidosona.
19.14: Goday enta giddon eeyisiya ayyaana yeddis; enti mathotida asi ba cooshshan gondoreteysada Gibxey ba ooso ubban gondoretana mela oothidosona.
19.15: Zamboy woyko boozi, zamba tashey woyko mayrey Gibxen oothanabay aybika baawa.
19.16: He gallas Gibxe asay maccasa mela gidana. Enti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday enta bolla qaathiya iya kushiya be7idi yashshan kokorana.
19.17: Yihudi Gibxe yashisana; Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday enta bolla oothanaw qopida qofaa gisho Yihudaba si7iya ubbay yayyana.
19.18: He gallas Gibxe biittan de7iya ichashu katamati Kanaane qaalan odeteysatanne Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaas ammanetanaw caaqeyisata gidana. He katamatape issoy, “Awa Katama” geetetidi xeegetana.
19.19: He wode Gibxe biittas gidduwan, Godaas yarsho bessay giigana; qassi Gibxe biitta zawan Godaas tuussi eqana.
19.20: Hessi Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaas Gibxe biittan mallanne marka gidana. Enti bantana un7etheyisata gisho Godaako waassiya wode entaw ashsheysa kiittidi enta ashshana.
19.21: He wode Goday Gibxe biittan eretidaysa gidana; Gibxe asay he gallas Godaa erana. Yarshonne katha yarsho eki yidi iya goyinnana. Enti Godaas qangananne banta qangetha gathana.
19.22: Goday Gibxe biitta shocana; iyo zaaridi pathana. Enti Godaako simmana; I enta woosa si7idi pathana.
19.23: He gallas Gibxefe Asoore gakanaw dalga ogey keyana; Asoore asay Gibxe, Gibxe asay Asoore simeretana; Gibxe asay Asoore asaara issife goyinnana.
19.24: He gallas Isra7eeley Gibxeranne Asoorera heedzantho biitta gididi, sa7aas anjo gidana.
19.25: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday enta haysada yaagidi anjana: “Ta ase gidida Gibxey anjeto; ta kushe ooso gidida Assory anjeto; ta laata gidida Isra7eeley anjeto” yaagana.

20.1: Asoore kawoy Sargooni kiitida toora moconati yidi, Filisxeeme katamaa gidida Ashdooda olidi oykida laythi,
20.2: Goday Amoxe na7aa Isayaasa haysada yaagis: “Ne kayo ma7uwa qaara; ne tohuwape caamma kessa” yaagis. Isayaasi Goday gidaysada oothidi kallonne mela tohon hemetis.
20.3: Yaatin Goday haysada yaagis: “Ta aylley Isayaasi Gibxenne Tophe bolla gakana metuwas malla gidana mela heedzu laythi kallonne mela tohon hemetis.
20.4: Hessa gisho, Asoore kawoy, Gibxetas yeella gidana mela Gibxefenne Tophefe di7etida na7atethatanne cimata kallonne mela toho laaggidi efana.
20.5: Tophen ammaneteysatinne Gibxen ceeqeteysati yayyana; yeellatana.
20.6: He gallas Abbaa gaxan de7iya asay haysada yaagana: ‘Nuna Asoore kawuwape ashshana gidi ufaysi oothidi entako baqatida asaa bolla haysi gakiko, yaatin, nuuni waanidi kessi ekanee?’ yaagana” yaagis.

21.1: Abbaa matan de7iya bazzuwas odetida qaala. Nagebe gotey mentherethishe yeysada olanchoy bazzofe, dhayo biittafe yees.
21.2: Taani issi yashshiya qoncethi be7as; aathid immeysi aathidi immees; di77eysi di77ees. Elama keya! Meedona katamaa oyka! Babilooney gathida waayiya taani diggana.
21.3: Hessa gisho ta asatethay saketis; maccasi eqeteysada taani un7etas. Taani si7iyabay tana kokorsis; taani be7iyabay tana daganthis.
21.4: Tana biicoyees; yashshan kokoras; taani ufaysi wothida omarsay un7an laametis.
21.5: Gibira giigisidosona; uttiya soo giigisidosona; maanawunne uyanaw uttidosona. Hinteno halaqato, dendite! Hinte gondalliya quchite!
21.6: Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Bada haniyaba wochidi new odiya asi wotha.
21.7: Parati gaare goochiya wode, harenne gimale toggeyisata be7iya wode, loythidi xeello; akeekidi be7o” yaagis.
21.8: Wocheysi, “Godaw, gallasinne qamma paci bayna ta shakuwa bolla uttada naagayis.
21.9: Heko, nam7a nam7a gididi para gaare toggida asati yoosona” yaagis. I qassika, “Babilooney kundis; iya xoossata misileti sa7an kundidi gaacetidosona” yaagidi waassis.
21.10: Hinteno, wudumman gaacetida ta asaw, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaape, Isra7eele Xoossaafe si7idaba taani hintew odayis. Edoome Bolla Odetida Tinbite
21.11: Edoomeba Goday haysada yaagis: “Issi asi Sayrepe tana xeegidi, naageyso, sa7i wontanaw ay mali attidee? Naageyso, sa7i geeyanaw ay mali attidee?” yaagees.
21.12: Naageysi zaaridi, “Sa7i wontana hanees; shin zaari qammana. Hinte oychanaw koyko oychite; simmi yidi oychite” yaagis. Arabe Bolla Odetida Tinbite
21.13: Arabe ba Goday haysada yaagees: “Hinteno Daadana zal7anchoto, hinte, hinte caana gimaletara Arabe mela biittan aqana.
21.14: Hinteno, Teeman biittan de7iya asaw, saamotidaysatas haathe ehite; koshatidaysatas kathi immite.
21.15: Enti mashshafe, shohope shodetida mashshafe, dafetida dongefenne mino olape baqatoosona” yaagees.
21.16: Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Une oosancho wodey wureysada, issi laytha giddon Qedaare boncho ubbay wurana.
21.17: Qedaaren de7iya dongen dukiya wolqaama olanchotape guuthati attana; Goday Isra7eele Xoossay hessa odis” yaagis.

22.1: “Qoncetha Zangaara” geetetiya bessaba Goday odida qaala. Hintena ubbaa aybi un7ethin pooqe keetha bolla keydetii?
22.2: Neno waasoy, dirgoyinne wocami kumida katamaw, ne giddon hayqida asati mashshan woyko olan hayqibookona.
22.3: Hinte halaqati ubbay issife baqatidosona; enti dongey bayna coo di7etidosona. Enti haakidi baqatikoka betida ubbay oyketidosona.
22.4: Hessa gisho, “Tana aggaagite; ta asaas misha yeeho afuxada yeekana; ta asaa dhayuwas tana minthethopite” yaagas.
22.5: Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay Qoncetha Zangaaran dagama, yedhetethinne un7a gallas oothis; qassi gimbeti woddiya gallasinne deretako maaddees waassiya gallas oothis.
22.6: Elaami ba para gaaretaranne para asatara ba dongiya oykidi yis; Qiira wotaadareti banta gondalleta giigisidosona.
22.7: Hinte lo77o zangaarati para gaaretan kumidosona; para asati Yerusalaame pengiya sinthan eqidosona.
22.8: I Yihuda miixata qaaris. He gallas Wora Keethan de7iya kawa olaa miisheta be7ideta.
22.9: Dawita Katama giddon laaletha dooriya be7ideta; garsa baggan de7iya ollan haathe kunthideta.
22.10: Yerusalaamen de7iya keethata taybideta; dirsaa zaaridi gimbanaw keethata laallideta.
22.11: Kase gal7a zeeruwan de7iya haatha zaaridi, nam7u gimbetape gidduwan olla giigisideta. Shin hinte hessa medhida Xoossaa akeekibeketa; woyko daro wodepe sinthe hessa halchidaysa hassaybeketa.
22.12: He gallas Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, hintena yeehosinne zelelsas, huuphe buluusanawunne kayo ma7o ma7anaw xeegis.
22.13: Shin hinte hessa aggidi ufaytetanne yexeeta; boorunne dorse shukeeta; ashuwa meeta; woyne uyeeta. Nuuni “Wonto hayqanaw de7iya gisho, hachi maananne uyana” yaageeta.
22.14: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysa taw qoncisis; “Hinte hayqana gakanaw ha nagaray hintew atto geetetenna. Taani Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay haysa odayis” yaagis.
22.15: Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, “Bada kawo gadhon shuumetida Saminasako haysada yaaga;
22.16: Neeni haysan ay oothay? Neeni haysan, zaalla woocada duufo giigisana mela, dhoqa bessan new duufo bookana melanne zaalla woocada new shempo bessi oothana mela oona oychadii?
22.17: Neno mino addiyaw, nena Goday minthidi oykana; cuucummidi wora holana.
22.18: Kooseda nena yuushshidi dalga biittan holana. Neno ne godaa keethaas yeella gidida addiyaw neeni yan hayqana; ne boncho para gaareti yan attana.
22.19: Taani nena ne oosuwape kessana; ne shuumatethaafe shaarana.
22.20: He gallas taani Kalqe na7aa, ta aylliya Eliyaqeeme xeegana.
22.21: Taani ne ma7uwa iya mayzana; ne dancuwa iya dancisana; ne shuumatetha iyaw immana. I, Yerusalaameninne Yihudan de7iya asaas aawa gidana.
22.22: Taani Dawita keethaa qulpiya iyaw immana; I dooyin oonika gordenna; I gordin oonika dooyenna.
22.23: Taani iya ammanthiya bessan dhisheda tolana; I ba aawa keethas boncho araata gidana.
22.24: Qandafe oto gakanaw de7iya soo miisheta, kocan kaqeysada, iya aawa keethaa bonchuwa, naytanne, nayta nayta ubbaa iya bolla kaqana” yaagis.
22.25: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “He gallas ammanthiya bessan dhishida toley kichana; qanxettananne kundana. Iya bolla kaqetida tooho ubbay duuxidi wodhana” yaagees. Goday haysa odis.

23.1: Xiroosa katamaas odetida Godaa qaalay haysa. Xiroosa kataman keethi woyko shempiya soy bayna gisho hinteno Tarsesa markabiya laaggeysato yeekite! Qophiroosa biittafe ha worey hinteko yis.
23.2: Hinteno, abba matan de7iya asaw, hinteno abba bollara hemetiya duretida, Sidoona zal7anchoto, si77i giite!
23.3: Hintew yaa kathay, Nayle shaafape caketida Shihoora biitta kathi; hinte kawotethatas zal7e bessi.
23.4: Neno Sidoona katamaw, abba matan de7iya miixaw, abbay, “Taani iqetabike; yelabike; addenne macca na7a dichabike” yaagidi odida gisho yeellata.
23.5: He worey Gibxe biitta gakiya wode enti Xiroosaba si7idi dagammana.
23.6: Hinteno abba matan de7iya asaw, zeleelishe Tarsesa pinnite.
23.7: Beni wode keexetida katamay, iya tohoy iya haaho biitta efidaynne hinte iyan ufaytiya Xiroosa katamay haysee?
23.8: Kallacha wosisiya katamaa, iya zal7anchoti halaqata gididanne iya giddon bayzeysatinne laammeysati bonchetidaysata gidida Xiroosa katamaa bolla haysa halchiday oonee?
23.9: Otoranchota boncho ubbaa guuthanawunne biitta bolla bonchetida ubbaa kawushanaw Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysa halchis.
23.10: Hinteno, Tarsesa asaw, hintena teqiyabay bayna gisho, Nayle shaafada biitta bolla kumidi goggite.
23.11: Goday abba bolla ba kushiya miccis; iya kawotethaa qaathis. Kanaane miixa laallana mela Goday kiittis.
23.12: Gujidika, “Hinteno, un7etida Sidoona asaw, hinte ufaysan yexiya wodey wuris. Dendidi Qophiroosa pinnite; yanka hinte saro demmeketa” yaagis.
23.13: Babiloone biitta be7ite; he biittay ha77i pathonnaba gidis. Asoore asay he biittan do7i aqanaada oothis. Enti yan de7iya wogga keethata laallidi bantaw miixa gimbidosona; biitta baysa oothidosona.
23.14: Hinteno, Tarsesa markabeto, hinte miixay laaletida gisho, zeleelite.
23.15: Xiroosa katamay issi kawos de7o laythi gidiya laapun tammu laythi dogetidi daana wodey yaana. Laapun tammu laythi wuriya wode layma maccasas yexetiya yetha mela Xiroosa katamaas yexetana.
23.16: Enti, “Neno dogetida layma katamaw, ne diitha ekada katamaara yuuya. Nena asay hassayana mela mal7o qaalan daro yethi yexa” yaagana.
23.17: Laapun tammu laythay poletiya wode, Goday Xiroosa xomoosana. Shin hessafe guye, I beni ba laymatetha oosuwako simmana; sa7an de7iya kawotethata ubbaara laymatana.
23.18: Gidoshin, iya zal7iya wodheynne iya damoozey Godaas dummatidaysa gidana; iya zal7iya wodheynne kathinne lo77o ma7o shammanaw, Godaas oothiya asaas imetanaape attishin, miishe keethan woyko minja keethan uttenna.

24.1: Heko, Goday biitta laallananne baysa kessana; I, biitta dhaysidi iyan de7iya asaa laallana.
24.2: Asi ubbay issino gidana; kahiney asaara issino gidana; aylley godaara issino gidana; gadhindiya godatera issino gidana; shammeysi bayzeysara issino gidana; tal7e immeysi tal7e ekeysara issino gidana; aco acheysi aco ciggeysara issino gidana.
24.3: Biitta ubbay bonqetidi baysa gidana; Goday ha qaala odis.
24.4: Biittay melana, iya aacay shullana; alamey argaacana, daaburana; biittan de7iya wolqaama asay daaburana.
24.5: Biittay banan de7iya asaa gaason tunis. Enti higgiyas kiitetibookona; wogaa naagibookona; merinaa caaquwa menthidosona.
24.6: Hessa gisho, baadethay biitta mees; asay banta nagaraa gaason pirdetanaw bessees. Sa7an de7iya asay xuugetidosona; guutha asi attis.
24.7: Woyney xaphora melis, mal7anto woyney wuris; kase ufaytiya ubbay azzanis.
24.8: Karaabo baqoy attis; yetha waasoy si77i gis; ufaysiya diitha dursay eqis.
24.9: Hizape yexishe woyne ushsha uyokona; ushshayka entaw camo gidana.
24.10: Laaletida katamay baysa gidana; oonika gelonnaada keetha ubbay gordetis.
24.11: Woyne ushshi dhayida gisho asay dabaaban waassees; ufaysi azzanon laametis; ufaysiyabay sa7ape dhayis.
24.13: Shamaho teera qoqofeysada, woyne maxi simmin, poshiley atteysada, biitta bolla de7iya kawotethata bolla hessada hanana.
24.14: Enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, ufaysan yexoosona; wuloha baggara de7iya ubbay Godaa gitatetha odana.
24.15: Hessa gisho, doloha baggara de7eysati, Godaas boncho immana; yuushoy abban teqetida biittati Godaas, Isra7eele Xoossaas boncho immana.
24.16: Nuuni, “Xilluwas bonchoy gido” giya mazmure biitta gaxape si7ida. Shin, “Taani gilqas! Taani laafas! Tana ayye! Aathi immeysi aathidi immees; kaddeysati gujidi aathidi immoosona” yaagas.
24.17: Hinteno, sa7an de7iya asaw, dagami aafoynne xihey hintena naagees.
24.18: Daganthiya girsaafe baqateysi ollan kundana; ollafe keyeysa xihey oykana; salo maskooteti dooyetidosona; biitta baasoti qaaxidosona.
24.19: Biitti za77is; biitti shaaketis; biitti qaaxis.
24.20: Biitti matho asada gandigarees; carkoy sugiya gaabbada yuuyees. Geellata balay daro deexida gisho zaari dendonna mela kundisis.
24.21: He gallas Goday salo wolqata salon, sa7aa kawota sa7an pirdana.
24.22: Ollan de7iya qasho asada enta issife shiishana; qasho keethan enti gordetidi uttana. Daro gallasape guye enti seeretana.
24.23: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Xiyoone zumaaninne Yerusalaamen kawotana; Yerusalaame cimata sinthan ba bonchuwa qoncisana. He wode ageenay dhumana, away yeellatana.

25.1: Abeeti Godaw, neeni ta Xoossaa. Taani nena dhoqu dhoqu oothana; ne sunthaa galatana. Neeni ne polo ammanetethan benipe qofetidi de7iya malaalsiya oosota oothadasa.
25.2: Neeni katamaa laaletha doore oothadasa; mino gimbe dirsay de7iya katamaa laalladasa. Allagata kawo keethay zaaridi katama gidonna mela oothadasa; zaaridi polo keexetenna.
25.3: Hessa gisho, mino asati nena bonchana; wozana mino kawotethata katamati new yayyana.
25.4: Neeni manqoy baqatidi attiya bessi, metootanchoy qosetiya bessi, uushope attiya geshenne awa seelape attiya kuya gidadasa. Wozana mino asaa hanqoy gimbera dom7ethiya uusho melanne
25.5: mela biittan honge mela. Shaara kuyay awa seela irxisiya mela neeni allagata yethaa si77i oothadasa; yaatin wozana mino asaa waasoy si77i gis.
25.6: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday asa ubbaas ha zumaa bolla gita gibira giigisana. He gibira bolla modho ashuwa, lo77o kathinne caalida woyne ushsha giigisis.
25.7: I ha zumaa bolla asa ubbaa kammida magarajuwanne kawotetha ubbaa bolla micetida kamaa dhaysana.
25.8: I merinaw hayqo mittana; Ubbaa Haariya Goday ayfe ubbaafe afuthaa quchana; ba asaa kawusha biitta ubbaafe diggana. Goday haysa odis.
25.9: He gallas enti, “Tuma haysi nu Xoossaa; nuuni iyan ammanetida gisho I nuna ashshis. Nu Goday haysa; nuuni iyan ammanetida; ane iya atotethan ufaytoos; hashshu goos” yaagana.
25.10: Godaa kushey ashshanaw ha zumaa bolla shempana. Shin utulli urqara ollan yedheteysada Moo7abey yedhetana.
25.11: Haathe wadheysi ba kushiya yeddeysada enti banta kushiya yeddana. Shin Goday iya gene kushe oosuwan cimetonna, iya otoruwa kawushana.
25.12: Enti dhoqisidi gimbida mino dirsa gimbiya I wodisananne kawushana; I duge sa7an, ubba hirki baanan holana.

26.1: He gallas Yihuda biittan ha mazmurey yexetana. Nuus mino katami de7ees; Xoossay atotetha iya yuushuwan gimbenne miixa oothis.
26.2: Ba ammanuwa naagiya xillo derey, gelana mela kareta dooyite.
26.3: I nenan ammanetida gisho, ba wozanaa nenan wothida uraa, neeni polo sarotethan naagasa.
26.4: Goday merinaa zaalla gidiya gisho, Godan merinaw ammaneta.
26.5: Dhoqan de7eyisata ziqi oothis; dhoqu gida katamaa kawushis. Iya sa7an duge yeggis; biitta baanan holis.
26.6: Manqoti iya yedhana un7etidaysati iya bollara hemetana.
26.7: Xillota ogey suure; Abeeti Xilluwaw, neeni xillota ogiya giigisaasa.
26.8: Abeeti Godaw, nuuni ne higgiya naaganaw amottoos; ne sunthaa bonchoynne ne teemay nu wozanaa amo.
26.9: Qamma taani nena laamotas; wonta ta ayyaanay nena minthidi koyees. Ne biitta pirdanaw yaa wode, sa7an de7iya asay xillotethi tamaarees.
26.10: Iita asas keehatethi oosetikoka, I xillotethi tamaarenna. Suure biittan iitabaa oothees; Godaa gitatetha erenna.
26.11: Abeeti Godaw, ne kushey dhoqu gis; shin enti be7okona. Ne asaas neeni mishetiya misha be7idi yeellato. Neeni ne morketas giigisida tamay enta midi dhayso.
26.12: Abeeti Godaw, nuus sarotethi immadasa; nu ooso ubbaa ne oothadasa.
26.13: Abeeti Godaw, nu Xoossaw, hara godati nuna haaridosona; shin nuuni ne sunthaa xalaala bonchoos.
26.14: Enti hayqidosona; simmidi de7on dookona. Ne seerin dhayida gisho, zaaridi dendokona. Enta qofisuwa ubbaa quchada dhaysadasa.
26.15: Abeeti Godaw, neeni kawotethaa darsadasa; kawotethaa darsada neeni bonchetadasa; biitta zawa ubbaa dalgisadasa.
26.16: Abeeti Godaw, meto wode enti nena koydosona. Ne enta seerida wode nena kalkashidi woossidosona.
26.17: Abeeti Godaw, qanthatida maccasi, yelo wodey gakin un7etada waasseysada, nuuni ne sinthan hessada hanida.
26.18: Nuuni qanthatida; iqetida; shin carko yelida. Nuuni sa7aas atotethi ehibooko; biittan de7iya asaa yelibooko.
26.19: Hayqida ne asay paxana; enta ahay dendana. Hinteno, biitta garsan de7eysato, dendidi ufaysa mazmure yexite. Hinte akay wonta aka mela; biittiya hayqidaysata zaarada immana.
26.20: Ta asaw, bidi hinte soo gelidi, kariya hinte bolla gordite. Godaa hanqoy aadhana gakanaw, guutha wodes hintena qosite.
26.21: Biitta bolla de7iya asaa, enta nagaraa gisho seeranaw, Goday ba de7iya bessaafe keyidi yees. Biittiya ba bolla gukida suuthaa qoncisana; hayqidaysata zaarada genthuku.

27.1: He gallas Goday ba mino, gitanne wolqaama mashshan Leewataane geetetiya xongetiyanne xaaxetiya shoosha seerana; abban de7iya do7aaka wodhana.
27.2: He gallas haysada geetetana: “Lo77o woyne gadiyas yexite;
27.3: Taani, Goday iya naagayis; taani qanxonna haathe ushshayis; oonika iya qohonnaada qamma gallas naagayis.
27.4: Taani hanqetike; taara oletanaw agunthinne gom7orey ane dendo! Taani enta bolla keyada enta xuugga wursanashin.
27.5: Woyko qosetidi attanaw taako yo; taara sigeto; ee, taara sigeto” yaagetana.
27.6: Yaana wodiyan Yayqoobi xapho yeddana; Isra7eeley aacananne ciiyana; iya ayfey biitta ubbaa kumana.
27.7: Enta shocidaysata shocidaysada Goday Isra7eele asaa shocideyee? Woyko enta wodhidaysata wodhidaysada enti hayqidonaayee?
27.8: Goday ba asaa di7etana mela oothidi seeris; wolqaama doloha bagga gotiyan enta gooddidi kessis.
27.9: Yayqooba naaqoy atto geetetanaynne iya nagaray polo qushetanay, yarsho shucha ubbaa I mentherethidi booqinte shuchada oothiya wodenne Asheera eeqa misiliya woyko ixaane cuyisiya bessaa laaliya wode.
27.10: Diretida katamay baysatis; kase asi de7iya bessay ha77i bazzo mela dogetidi attis. Mehey heemetiya bessi gidida gisho, maatanne mitha haythaa midi marati yan allatoosona.
27.11: Mitha tasheti meliya wode meqeretoosona; maccasay mixidi eethanaw efoosona. Ha asay akeeki bayna asi gidiya gisho, enta medhidaysi entaw qadhetenna; enta maarenna.
27.12: He gallas Efraxiisa shaafape Gibxe shaafa gakanaw Goday kathaa qoxana. Hinte, Isra7eele asay issoy issoy shiiqana.
27.13: He gallas gita moyzey punetana; Asoore biittan dhaydaysatinne Gibxe biitta di7etidaysati yidi, Yerusalaamen geeshsha zumaa bolla Godaa goyinnana.

28.1: Efreeman mathoteysatas qofiso kallacha gididaysa, aradda zangaara huuphiyan uttidaysa, iya bonchuwas alleeqo gidida shullida ciishshanne mathoyiya ushshay entaw nashetethas gidida katamaa ayye!
28.2: Heko, Godaas wolqaamanne mino gidida issoy de7ees. Goday iya shacha uushoda, dhaysiya gotedanne kixida wolqaama haathada mino kushiyan duge sa7an holana.
28.3: He mathotiya Efreema asaa otoruwa kallachay tohon yedhethana.
28.4: Aradda zangaara huuphen de7iya shullida ciishshay, iya boncho alleeqoy wodey gakanaape sinthe teerida balase ayfe mela gidana. Issi asi he balasiya be7iya wode ba kushen oykida mela mi aggees.
28.5: He gallas Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday attida ba asaas boncho kallachanne alleeqo gidana.
28.6: I daynnatas suure pirdiya ayyaana, katamaa pengiyafe ola zaareysatas wolqa gidana.
28.7: Enti woyne ushshan biicotoosona; mathoyiya ushshan gandigaroosona. Kahineynne nabey mathoyiya ushshan biicotees; enti woyne ushshan yarkoosona; mathoyiya ushshan gandigaroosona. Qoncethi be7ishe baletoosona; pirdishe dhubetoosona.
28.8: Enti miya gayta ubbay cooshsha xalaala gidiya gisho, iitiboonna bessi baawa.
28.9: Enti haysada gaana: “I eratethaa oona tamaarsanee? Kiita ooddes qoncisanee? Buroo maathi paahetiya woyko dhanthi duuxida naytaseyee?
28.10: I, kiitta bolla kiitta, kiitta bolla kiitta; woga bolla woga, woga bolla woga; yan guutha han guutha” yaagana.
28.11: Shin Goday allaga qaalaninne imatha doonan ha asaas odana.
28.12: I entako, “Haysi shempo bessi; daaburidaysa shempisite. Haysi shempi ekiya bessi” yaagis. Shin enti si7onna ixidosona.
28.13: Hessa gisho, enti bidi kundana mela, me77ana melanne xihen oyketidi baana mela Godaa qaalay entaw kiita bolla kiita, kiita bolla kiita; woga bolla woga, woga bolla woga; yan guutha han guutha gidana.
28.14: Hinteno, Yerusalaamen de7iya asaa haariya qelqiseysato Godaa qaala si7ite.
28.15: Hinte, “Nuuni hayqora caaqida; Si7oolera giigida; nuuni wordo nuus qota oothida gishonne malte kate oothida gisho, gadoy nuna bochonna aadhana” yaagidi ceeqeteta.
28.16: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday, “Heko, taani al7onne dooretida baaso shuchaa Xiyoonen wothas; iyan ammaniya oonika yeellatenna.”
28.17: Taani suure pirdaa wadha wodoro, xillotethaa tumbe oothana. Hinte, “Nuus qota gida wordo shachay shocana; hinte nuus kate gida bessaa di7oy dhaysana” yaagees.
28.18: Hinte hayqora caaqida caaqoy laaletana; Si7oolera giigida giigoy minnenna. Gadoy yaa wode hinte iyan shocetana.
28.19: He gadoy yaa wode hintena ekidi baana; wonta wonta, qamminne gallas yaara aadhana; he aadhiya wode ubban hintena aggenna. Ha kiita akeekoy hintew dagama xalaala immana.
28.20: Hinte qosetiya bessi hintew baawa; hinte zin7iya arsay hintew gidenna; hinte ma7iya afilay hintena gakenna.
28.21: Paraziima zuma bolla Goday oothidaysada ba oosuwa, ba imatha oosuwa, hessika ba ooratha oosuwa oothanaw dendana. Gaba7oona zangaaran oothidaysada hanqana.
28.22: Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, biitta ubbaa bolla dhayo ehanaw awaajidaysa ta si7ida gisho hinte qashoy minnonna mela qelqiseysa aggite.
28.23: Hinte haytha haa yeggidi, ta odeysa si7ite; ta odaa akeekite.
28.24: Kathi zeranaw goyiya goshshanchoy ubba wode goyishe de7iyee? Qassi ubba wode gaggahiya wodhishenne liiqisishe de7ii?
28.25: Gadiya liiqisidi, kareetha sawanne okashe, banganne giste, banga iya do7uwan, iya bessan bessan zerees gidennee?
28.26: Ha hiilla iya Xoossay iya erisesinne tamaarsees.
28.27: Kareetha sawonne okashe shocu wodhan qoxenna; shin guutha xam7an shocetees.
28.28: Katha ayfey buketeesipe attishin, liiqenna; qassi kathaa bukiya para gaareti iya bollara laagetikoka kathay gaacetenna.
28.29: Ha cincatethaa ubbay ba zoriyaninne ba cincatethan malaalsiya Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaape yees.

29.1: Dawiti de7ida Ar7eela katamaw nena ayye! Laytha bolla laythi guja; ne ba7aaleta zaara zaara boncha.
29.2: Taani Ar7eela katamaa buroo un7ethana; I zeleelidi yeekana. He katamay suuthi kammida yarsho bessa mela gidana.
29.3: Taani ne yuushuwa teqana; adussa gimbiyan nena dirana; ne bolla ola shako essana.
29.4: Neeni gelida ollan gidada odetana; garsa baanape ne girsay yaana. Ne girsay moytille girsada biitta giddofe keyana; baana giddofe ne kalkashana.
29.5: Shin ne morketi baana mela daro; wozana mino asata tayboy carkoy efiya puno mela.
29.6: Qoponna de7ishin, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday dadan, biitta qaaxon, gita girsan, goten, carkoninne tama lacon hintena wochana.
29.7: Ar7eela katamaa oliya daro kawotetha ubbay, he katamaanne iya miixa oliya ubbay, iya un7ethiya ubbay dhisko amuhodanne elmoda hanana.
29.8: Koshatida asi amuhon kathi midi, barkiya wode iya koshay aggonaysada woyko saamotida asi amuhon uyidi, barkiya wode saamuwa alonaysada, Xiyoone deriya oliya kawotethati ubbay hessada hanana.
29.9: Malaaletite; dagammite; qilim7ite; qooqite. Mathotite, shin woyne ushshan gidopo. Gandigarite, shin mathoyiya ushshan gidopo.
29.10: Goday dhisko ayyaana hinte bolla gussis. Nabeto, hinte ayfey goozetis; qoncethi be7eysato, hinte huuphey kametis.
29.11: Ha ubba qoncethay new attametida maxaafa mela gidis. Issi asi, “He7e, haysa nabbaba” yaagidi, issi nabbabo eriya asas immiya wode, I, “Maxaafay attametida gisho, ta nabbabanaw danda7ike” yaagana.
29.12: Maxaafa nabbabi eronna asako, “He7e, haysa nabbaba” yaagidi immiya wode, I, “Taani nabbaba erike” yaagana.
29.13: Goday yaagees: “Ha asay tana banta doonan bonchees; shin enta wozanay taape haahon de7ees. Enti asi medhida wogaa tamaarsishe tana coo goyinnoosona.
29.14: Hessa gisho, taani ha asaa bolla zaara zaara malaalsiyaba oothana. Cincata cincatethaa eeya kessana; eranchota eraa dogisana” yaagis.
29.15: Banta halchuwa Godaape qosanaw ciimmoyeyisata, banta oosuwa dhuman oothishe, “Nuna ooni be7ii? Nuna ooni erii?” yaageyisata ayye!
29.16: Hinte ubbaba shiri yeggeeta. Oto medheysi urqa mela gidi qopeeta! Medhetidaysi medhidaysa, “I tana medhibeenna” giyyee? Otoy bana medhidaysa, “I aykoka erenna” gaanaw danda7ii?
29.17: Libaanose woray aradda gade gidanaw; qassi aradda gadey wora gidanaw guutha wodey attis gidennee?
29.18: He gallas tulleti maxaafaa qaala si7ana; dhuman de7iya qooqeta ayfey xeellana.
29.19: Ashketi Godan ufaytana; manqoti Isra7eele Geeshshan hashshu gaana.
29.20: Ulo iitati wurana; qelqiseysati tim7i gaana; iitabaa oothanaw wochiya ubbay dhayana.
29.21: Ase odan bala ootheysati, mootetidaysa pirda keethan xihen yeggeysatinne wordo markatethan xillo asa pirdaa geellayeysati dhayana.
29.22: Hessa gisho, Abrahaame wozida Goday Yayqooba kochaako haysada yaagees: “Yayqooba kochay hizape guye yeellatenna; iya som7oy yeellatidi sa7a xeellenna.
29.23: Shin enti ta kushe ooso gidida banta nayta banta giddon be7iya wode ta sunthaa geeshshana; enti Yayqooba Geeshshaa, geeshshatetha naagana; Isra7eele Xoossaa yashshatethan bonchana.
29.24: Ayyaanan baleysati akeeka demmana; zuuzumeysati timirte ekana” yaagees.

30.1: Goday, “Geella nayta ayye! Taani halchaboona oothosona; ta Ayyaanan gidonashin banta shenen caaqidi nagara bolla nagara gujeyisata ayye!
30.2: Tana zore oychonna Gibxe wodhoosona. Paarona miixa bantaw teqe, Gibxe bantaw shempiya kuya oothosona.
30.3: Shin Paarona miixay hintew yeella, Gibxe kuyay hintew kawushatethi gidana.
30.4: Enta halaqati Xaanesan de7ikoka, enti kiittidaysati Haneesa katamaa gakikoka,
30.5: yeellafe attishin, hara maaddeynne go77i bayna gisho iyan ammanetiya ubbay kawuyananne yeellatan” yaagees.
30.6: Negeban de7iya do7ataba Goday odiday haysa: kiitetidaysati metoynne un7i de7iya biittara, adde gaammoynne macca gaammoy worara, iitanne xongetiya shooshati de7iya bazzuwara kanthidi baana. Haretanne gimaleta zokon banta duretetha caanidi enta aykoka maaddonna biitta baana.
30.7: Gibxey aykoka maaddenna; hessa gisho, taani iya, “Pathonna Ra7aaba” yaagada xeegana.
30.8: Ha77i bada sinthara yaana wodiyas merinaa malla gidana mela enta sinthan shuchaa woocada xaafa; mazgabenka xaafa.
30.9: Enti geellanne wordancho nayta; enti Goday odiyaba si7anaw koyonna nayta.
30.10: Enti qoncethi be7eyisata, “Qoncethi be7opite” yaagosona. Nabeta, “Ufaysiyabaanne cimmiyaba oditepe attishin, suureba odopite.
30.11: Ogiyape kichite; horogape haakite; Isra7eele Geeshshara nuna som7on gathofite” yaagosona.
30.12: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele Geeshshay haysada yaagees: “Hinte ha qaala ixidi, geneninne cimon ammanetida gisho,
30.13: ha nagaray hintew za77idi woddiya, akeekona ellesidi kundiya adussa gimbe mela gidana.
30.14: Iya meqoy urqafe medhida oto mela dipi gidi meqana. He mequwa giddofe tama kaashiya woyko haathe duuqiya kun7i bentenna” yaagees.
30.15: Isra7eele Geeshshay, Ubbaa Haariya Goday, haysada yaagees. “Simoninne shempon hinte attana; si77i guussaninne ammanetethan hintew wolqa gidana; shin hinte ixideta.
30.16: Hinte, ‘Akay, nuuni para bolla uttidi baqatana’ yaagideta; hessa gisho, hinte baqatana. Qassi hinte, ‘Eesotiya para toggidi baana’ ” yaagideta; shin hintena yedetheysati hintefe aadho eesotana.
30.17: Issi tooranchuwa be7idi hintefe mukulu asay baqatana; ichashu tooranchoti hintena ubbaa yedethana. Zumaa huuphen eqida bandira mithada woyko zuma bolla de7iya mallada hinte hanana gakanaw hintena yedethena.
30.18: Shin Goday hintew keehanaw naagees; Goday xillo pirdiya Xoossi gidiya gisho hintew qadhetanaw dendana. Iya ammanetidi naagiya ubbay anjetidaysata.
30.19: Hinteno, Yerusalaamen de7iya Xiyoone asaw, hizape guye yeekeketa. Xoossay qadhen kumida Xoossi gidiya gisho, hinte maade koyidi iyako waassiya wode hintew zaaro immana.
30.20: Goday hintew meto kathinne un7a haathi immikoka, hinte astamaarey hizape bana qosenna. Shin hinte ayfey hinte astamaariya be7ana.
30.21: Hinte ushachi woyko haddirsi simmiya wode, guyera hintena, “Ogey haysa; iyara biite” giya qaala hinte si7ana.
30.22: Biraninne worqan alleeqetida eeqa misileta hinte tunisana. Tuna curqada hinte enta, “Nuupe haakite” yaagidi wora holana.
30.23: He wode I, hinte biittan zerida kathaas ira bukisana; biittafe doliya kathay daronne muruuta gidana. He gallas hinte mehey dalga denban heemetana.
30.24: Goshsha booratinne hareti gillan punetida geeshsha harquwa maana.
30.25: Asi wuriya wode miixati laaletiya gallas deretanne zumata bollafe pulto haathi goggana.
30.26: He gallas ageena poo7oy awa poo7oda hanana; awa poo7oy kaseysafe laapun kushe darana; laapun gallas poo7uwa mela gidana. He ubbay hananay Goday meqida ba asaa kooliya wodenne I dechin madunxida asaa pathiya wode.
30.27: Heko, Godaa sunthay suulliya hanquwara, dhumida cuyaa shaarara haaho bessaafe yaana. Iya doonan hanqoy kumis; iya inxarsan miya tami de7ees.
30.28: Iya peenoy, qoodhe gakanaw kixidi, ubbaba pittidi efiya haatha kixa mela. I, kawotethata dhayo zarzaren harqana; asaa gapata bixaalidi oge balethana.
30.29: Geeshsha ba7aaley bonchetiya gallas yexeysada, hinte yexana. Godaa zumako, Isra7eele Zaallako biya wode suusul7e punnishe yexiya asay ufayteysada hinte ufaytana.
30.30: Goday ba yashshiya qaala sissana; ba suulliya hanquwan, tama lacuwan, gotiyan, uushuwaninne shachan ba qesiya qoncisana.
30.31: Goday ba girsan Asoore daganthana; iya xam7ay enta shocana.
30.32: Goday enta ba seeriya xam7an enta shociya wode iya asay karaaboranne diithara yexana. Ba qesiya denthidi enta shocana.
30.33: Benipe doomidi Asoore kawoy xuussa Toofeta geetetiya bessi giigis. He bessay ollanne dalga; qassi daro mithi dooretidi de7iya bessi. Godaa peenoy diinne shaafada goggidi, he tama eethana.

31.1: Maado demmanaw Gibxe wodheysatanne paran ammaneteyisata ayye! Para gaareta darotethaaninne para asata minotethan ammaneteyisata ayye! Enti Isra7eele Geeshshaa xeellokona woyko Godaape maado koyokona.
31.2: Shin Goday cinca gidiya gisho gado yeddana; I odidaysa aggenna. Iita asaa bollanne iitabaa oothiya asaa maaddeyisata bolla dendana.
31.3: Gibxeti asepe attishin, xoosse gidokona; enta paratika ashope attishin, ayyaana gidokona. Goday hanqon ba qesiya denthiya wode maaddeysi dhubetana; maadeteysi kundana; enti ubbay issife dhayana.
31.4: Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Gaammoy woyko wodala gaammoy mehe oykidi daariya wode henthanchoti xeegetidi shiiqikoka, I enta waasuwas dagammenna; enta qaalas yayyenna. Hessadaka, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Xiyoone zumanne iya zumata olanaw wodhana.
31.5: Kafoy aaleysada Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Yerusalaame gechana, ashshana, naagana; iya bollara aalidi heemmana.
31.6: “Hinteno Isra7eele asaw, hinte makallidi ixida, iyako simmite.
31.7: He gallas nagari kumida hinte kushiyan birapenne worqafe oothida eeqata wora holana.
31.8: Asoorey asaba gidonna mashshan kundana; asaba gidonna mashshi enta maana. Enti mashsha sinthafe baqatana; enta na7atethati wolqan asas oothana.
31.9: Dagama gaason enta mino miixay laaletana; enta toora moconati dagammidi yeggi dhayana” yaagees, iya tamay Xiyoonen, iya coocey Yerusalaamen de7iya Goday.

32.1: Heko, kawoy xillotethan kawotana; haareysati suuretethan haarana.
32.2: Issi issi asi ba huuphen carkofe geemmiya bessi, gotepe qosetidi attiya bessi gidana. Mela biittan goggiya haatha melanne saamo biittan gita zaalla kuya mela gidana.
32.3: Xeelliya asata ayfey qilim7enna; si7iya asata haythay hayzidi si7ana.
32.4: Eesotiya asaa wozanay erananne akeekana. Dedotiya asaa inxarsay biletana; geeshshidi odetana.
32.5: Hizape guye eeyi asi erancho geetetenna; iita asi bonchetenna.
32.6: Eeyay eeyatethi odetees; iya wozanay nagara qopees. Godaa bolla minoba odetees; iya bolla iitabaa maqetees: koshatidaysas kathi immenna; saamotidaysa haathe diggees.
32.7: Gene asa qofay iita; manqoti suureba odetikoka enta dhaysanaw wordon iita qofa qopees.
32.8: Lo77o asi lo77oba halchees; he lo77o halchuwan minnidi de7ees. Yerusalaame Maccasa
32.9: Hinteno qofi bayna de7iya maccasaw, dendite; ta odeysa si7ite; hinteno ammanetidi de7iya macca nayto, ta hintew odeysa si7ite.
32.10: Laythi kumonna hinte ammanetidi de7eysati kokorana; woyne iya wodiyan maxeketa; tokidabaape ayfe shiisheketa.
32.11: Hinteno injetin de7iya maccasaw kokorite. Hinteno ammanetidi de7iya macca nayto yayyite. Hinte ma7uwa qaaridi kayo ma7o hinte xeessan dancite.
32.12: Lo77o gaden ayfiya woyney dhayida gisho, azzanidi hinte tiraa qoxite.
32.13: Agunthinne kinchotey ta asaa gadiyan dolis. Asay ufaytidi de7ida keethatasinne katamaas yeekite.
32.14: Kawo keethaynne daro asay de7iya katamay baysatana; miixatinne gimbe shakoti merinaw laaletana; wora hareti ufaytiya bessinne dorsa wudey heemetiya bessi gidana.
32.15: Hessi hananay, Ayyaanay nu bolla gukana gakanaw, mela biittay araddana gakanawunne aradda biittay wora gidana gakanaasa.
32.16: Hessafe guye, mela biittan suure pirdi, aradda biittan xillotethi daana.
32.17: Xillotethi sarotethi ehana, wopatethinne ammanetethi merinaw biitta kumana.
32.18: Ta asay saroy kumida keethan, ammanthiya bessaaninne wopu gida son shempidi daana.
32.19: Shachi bukidi wora dhaysiyakoka, qassi katamay kumthi laaletiyakoka,
32.20: shaafata gaxan hinte kathaa zeridi, hinte mehiyasinne hinte haretas hentha bessi demmeysati hinte anjetana.

33.1: Nena dhaysona de7ishin haraa dhayseyso, nena aathidi immonna de7ishin haraa aatha immeyso, nena ayye! Ne dhayso aggida wode nena dhaysana; ne aatha imo aggida wode nena aathidi immana.
33.2: Abeeti Godaw, nuna maara; nuuni nena ufaysan naagoos; wonta wonta nuus wolqa gida; meto wode nuna ashsha.
33.3: Ne girsaa deshuwan derey baqatees; neeni nuna maaddanaw dendiya wode kawotethati laaletoosona.
33.4: Gondoy shiiqeysada hinte di7oy shiiqana; booley dirgeysada asay iya bolla dirgana.
33.5: Goday bolla de7iya gisho, dhoqu dhoqu gis; Xiyoone suure pirdaaninne xillotethan kunthana.
33.6: I hinte wodiyas ammanthiya baaso gidana; hintew atotethi, cincatethinne eratethi gidana; Godaas yashshi ha ubba shaluwas qulpe gidana.
33.7: Heko, goobati oge bolla waassoosona; sigethanaw kiitetidaysati cametidi yeekosona.
33.8: Wogga ogeti kaysatidosona; ogiyara kanthiya asi baawa. Caaqoy laaletis; katamati kadhetidosona; boncho asati boretidosona.
33.9: Biittay azzanis; daaburis; Libaanosey yeellatidi melis; Saarona zangaaray mela biitta gidis. Baasane deriyaninne Qarmeloosa deriyan de7iya mitha haythay qoqofetis.
33.10: Goday haysada yaagees: “Ha77i taani dendana; ha77i taani bonchetana; ha77i taani dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
33.11: Hinte utulla qanthatidi puno yelideta; hinte shempoy hintena tamada maana.
33.12: Asay booqinte shuchada taman xuugetana; qassi agunthada taman eexana.
33.13: Hinteno, haahon de7eysato, ta oothidaysa si7ite; matan de7eysato ta wolqaa akeekite” yaagees.
33.14: Xiyoonen de7iya nagaranchoti dagammidosona; Xoossaa eronnaysati kokoridosona. Enti, “Nu giddofe miya tamaranne merinaw eexiya lacuwara daanaw danda7ey oonee?”
33.15: Xillotethan hemetey, suure odetey, bessonna ogera bentiya go77a ixey, ba kushiya wodhaafe ekonna mela diggey, shempo wodhoba si7onna mela ba haythaa tuccey, iitabaa xeellonna mela ba ayfiya kammey,
33.16: he uray dhoqa bessan daana. I, qosetidi attiya bessay mino zaalla gidana; iya kathay iyaw imetana; I, uyaa haathay pacenna.
33.17: Hinte ayfey kawa, iya yegelssara be7ana; haahon de7iya biitta demmana.
33.18: Hinte, “Halaqay awun de7ii? Giira ekeysi awun de7ii? Gimbe shakota halaqay awun de7ii?” yaagidi hinte wozanan beni yashshiya wodiya qopana.
33.19: Wozana mino asaa, hintew gelonna doonan odetiya asaanne inxarsay dedotiya asaa hizape guye hinte be7eketa.
33.20: Nuuni nu ba7aale bonchiya Xiyoone katamaa be7ite! Wopu gidi de7iya, iya dhishey shodetonna, iya wodoroy duuxonnanne iya dhishey qaaxonna dunkaane mela hanida Yerusalaame katamaa hinte, hinte ayfen be7ana.
33.21: He bessan Goday nuus wolqaa gidana. He bessay dalga safanne goggiya haatha mela gidana. Wogoloy iya bollara baanaw danda7enna; gita markabeti yaara kanthanaw danda7okona.
33.22: Goday nuus pirdeysa; Goday nuus higge immeysa; Goday nu kawa; I nuna ashshana.
33.23: Ne qasho wodoroy dol7ana; markabiya tuussay shuggana; iya sharayka toletibeenna. He wode daro di7o shaaketana; hari attoshin wobbetika di7o ekana.
33.24: Xiyoonen de7iya oonika “Tana sakees” yaagenna; yan de7iya asaa nagaray atto geetetana.

34.1: Hinteno, kawotethato, shiiqidi si7ite! Hinteno, asaw akeekite! Biittaynne biittan de7iyaba ubbay, sa7inne sa7ape keyaaba ubbay si7o.
34.2: Goday kawotethata ubbaa bolla hanqetis; enta tooranchota ubbaa bolla yilotis. I, enta ubbaa dhaysana; enta shukeysatas aathidi immana.
34.3: Enta ahay holetidi, attidi xinqana; dereti enta suuthan kametana.
34.4: Salo xoolintoti ubbay seerana; saloti saleenada xaaxetana. Woyne haythinne balase ayfey qoqofeteysada xoolintoti ubbay qoqofetana.
34.5: Ta mashshay salotan alana gakanaw uyis; Heko Edoome bolla, taani dhaysida asaa bolla pirdanaw wodhana.
34.6: Godaa mashshay suuthan muuketis. Yarshos shuketiya dorsatanne deeshata suuthan mashshi muuketeysadanne enta kilaho modhuwan kameteysada Godaa mashshay suuthan muuketis; modhuwan kametis. Goday Baasora kataman yarsho, Edoome biittan gita shuka giigisis.
34.7: Menthati, wofaanotinne boorati entara kundana. Enta gadey suutha xalaala gidana; enta biittay modhon munuqetana.
34.8: Goday halo keyana gallasinne Xiyoone olida morketa bolla kushe zaariya laythi giigisis.
34.9: Edoome shaafati melidi made gidis; iya baanay diinne laametana; iya biittay eexiya made gidana.
34.10: Qammanne gallas tamay to77enna; iya cuyay merinaw cuyana. Edoome biittay yeletethaafe yeletethaa gakanaw baysa gidana; oonika merinaw yaara kanthenna.
34.11: Shin xiloynne quxarey iya laattana; guttoynne quuroy yan daana. Xoossay Edoome bolla laaletha wadha wodoronne baysatetha tumbe yeddana.
34.12: He biitta aysiya kawoy deenna; halaqati yaape kichana.
34.13: Kawo keethata agunthi, miixata ohi ma7ana; workanati allatiya bessinne yanchoti de7iya soo gidana.
34.14: Bazzo do7ati godaretara gahetana; tuna ayyaanati issoy issuwara xeegetana; qamma qoolleti wodhidi yan daana.
34.15: Guttoti yan keethe keexidi, phuuphullidi qoxana. Banta nayta banta qefeta garsan haphana; phircoti banta laggetara yan shiiqana.
34.16: Godaa maxaafan koyidi nabbabite. Godaa doonay odida gishonne iya ayyaanay shiishida gisho, haysatape issoyka pacenna; qassi issoyka ba laggey bayna deenna.
34.17: I, entaw saama kessis; iya kushey biitta entaw wodoron shaakis; enti iya merinaw laattana; yeletethaafe yeletethaa gakanaw enti yan daana.

35.1: Baysa biittaynne mela biittay ufaytana; aykoy bayna mela biittay ufaytananne ciiyana.
35.2: Mela biittay ciishshe ma7ana; ufaysa mazmure yexana. Libaanose bonchuwa ma7ana; Qarmeloosanne Saarona gitatethay imetana; enti Godaa bonchuwanne nu Xoossaa gitatetha be7ana.
35.4: Yashsha wozani de7eysatako, “Minnite! Yayyofite! Heko, hinte Xoossay halo keyanawunne ba xoossatethan kushe zaaranaw yidi hintena ashshana” yaagite.
35.5: He wode, qooqeta ayfey dooyetana; tulleta haythay si7ana.
35.6: Wobbeti gen7eda gupana; dedoti ufaysan yexana; mela biittan haathi goggana; mela bessan pultoy dhuuqana.
35.7: Xuuggiya shafey eele haathi gidana; mela biittay haathe pultana; workanati allatiya bessan maatinne mayreynne maqi dolana.
35.8: Yaara wogga ogey keyana; ika “Geeshshatetha Oge” geetetana. Tunati he ogiyara bookona; eeyati yan simeretokona; shin geeshshatas gidana.
35.9: Gaammoy woyko yashshiya do7ati yaara kanthokona; yan bentokona; shin wozetidaysata xalaali hemetana.
35.10: Goday wozidaysati simmana; yexish, Xiyoone gelana; merinaa ufaysay enta huuphiyan uttana. Enti ufaytananne hashshu gaana; azzanoynne ooley entafe haakana.

36.1: Hizqiyaasi kawotida tammanne oyddantho laythan, Asoore kawoy Sanakreemi yuushoy gimbetida Yihuda katamata olidi oykis.
36.2: Hessafe guye, Asoore kawoy Laakiso katamaape issi toora mocona daro olanchotara kawa Hizqiyaasako Yerusalaame yeddis. I, bidi Ma7o Meecciya gadiyako efiya ogiyape qommo baggara de7iya eelida haathay goggiya dhawa matan eqis.
36.3: Kawo gadho aysiya Alqa na7ay Eliyaqeemi, xaafey Sheebinne, taarike xaafey, Asaafa na7ay, Yo7aasi iyako kare keyidosona.
36.4: Asoore toora moconay entako, “Hizqiyaasas haysada yaagidi odite: ‘Wolqaama Asoore kawoy, neeko haysada’ yaagees: neeni haysa mela minnanaw aybin ammanetadii?
36.5: Neeni coo qaalan, olaa oletanaw taw cincatethinne wolqi de7ees yaagasa. Shin neeni oonan ammanetada ta bolla haysada makallay?
36.6: Neeni ‘Gibxe kawoy tana maaddana’ gada qopidaba gidiko meqida mayre xam7a guufetiya asa mela. Xam7ay meqin pincoy kushiya caddesinne madunxisees. Gibxe kawoy banan ammanetiya asa ubbaas hessa mela.
36.7: Shin neeni, ‘Nuuni Godan, nu Xoossan, ammanetoos’ yaagiko, Hizqiyaasi Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaa, ‘Hinte Yerusalaamen de7iya yarsho bessan goyinnanaw koshshees’ gidi, Xoossaa goyinniya dhoqa bessatanne yarsho bessata diggiday iya gidennee?
36.8: “Ane ha77i haaya! Ta godaa Asoore kawuwara geedareta. Togganaw danda7iya asi ne demmiko, nam7u mukulu parata ta new immana.
36.9: Neeni, ‘Gibxeti para asatanne para gaareta taw yeddana’ gada ammaniko, ta godaa toora moconatape issi laafaka zaaranaw danda7aka.
36.10: Hessa bollaka, taani ha biitta dhaysanaw tuma Godaa sheney bayna keyadina? Goday ba huuphen tana ‘Bada ha biitta olada dhaysa’ yaagidi kiittis” yaagis.
36.11: Hessafe guye Eliyaqeemi, Sheebinne Yo7aasi Asoore halaqaako, “Nuuni eriya Aramike doonara nuus ne aylletas odape attishin, gimbe dirsa bolla de7iya asay si7ana mela Ibraawetho doonan odopa” yaagidosona.
36.12: Shin halaqay zaaridi, “Ha kiitaa taani hintewunne hinte godaa xalaalas odana mela tana ta goday kiittibeenna. Hintera issife banta shi7a maanawunne banta sheesha uyanaw de7iya, ha gimbe dirsaa bolla de7iya asa ubbaas odana mela kiittis” yaagis.
36.13: Asoore halaqay dendi eqidi, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, Ibraawetho doonan haysada yaagis: “Wolqaama gidida Asoore kawoy giyaba si7ite!
36.14: Kawoy hinteko haysada yaagees; ‘Hizqiyaasi hintena cimmofo’ I hintena ta kushepe ashshanaw danda7enna.
36.15: Hizqiyaasi hintena, ‘Tuma Goday nuna ashshana; ha katamayka Asoore kawa kushen gelenna’ yaagidi, hinte Godan ammanetana mela oothofo.
36.16: “Hinte Hizqiyaasi odiyaba si7opite. Asoore kawoy hintena, ‘Taara sigetite; haa taako yiite. Hessa hinte oothiko, hinte ubbay hinte woynepenne hinte balasepe maana; hinte bookida ollaafeka haathe uyana.
36.17: Taani yada, hintena hinte biitta daaniya biitta ekada efana. He biittay kathinne woyney kumida biitta’ ” yaagis.
36.18: “Hizqiyaasi, ‘Goday hintena ashshana’ yaagidi cimmonnaada naagetite. Hara kawotethata xoossatape ba biitta Asoore kawa kushepe ashshida xoossi de7iyee?
36.19: Hamaata xoossatinne Arfada xoossati awun de7oona? Safarwayma xoossati awu bidonaa? Enti Samaariya ta kushepe wothi ekidona?
36.20: Ha biittata xoossatape ba biitta ta kushepe ashshidi ekiday de7ii? Yaatin hinte, ‘Goday Yerusalaame ta kushepe ashshana’ yaagidi qopeetii?” yaagis.
36.21: Shin kawoy entako, “Iyaw ay zaaroka immopite” yaagidi zorida gisho, asay issi qaalaka iyaw zaaronna si77i gidoosona.
36.22: Hessafe guye kawo gadho aysiya Kalqe na7ay Eliyaqeemi, xaafey Sheebinne taarike xaafey Asaafa na7ay Yo7aasi banta ma7uwa peedhidosona. Hizqiyaasako bidi Asoore halaqay gidaba ubbaa iyaw odidosona.

37.1: Kawoy Hizqiyaasi hessa si7ida wode ba ma7uwa peedhidi, kayo ma7o ma7idi, Godaa keethi gelis.
37.2: Kawo gadho aysiya Eliyaqeemi, xaafey Sheebinne kaalethiya kahineti kayo ma7o ma7idi, Amoxe na7aa nabiya Isayaasako baana mela kiittis.
37.3: Enti Isayaasako bidi, Hizqiyaasi haysada yaagees: “Ha gallasay meto gallas, seera gallasinne yeella gallas. Hessika na7i yeletanaw wodey gakin, bannakada yelanaw wolqi dhayida maccasa mela gidida.
37.4: De7o Xoossaa cayanaada iya goday, Asoore kawoy, kiitida halaqaa qaala Goday ne Xoossay si7onna aggenna. Qassi Goday ne Xoossay he qaala gaason iya seeronna aggenna. Hessa gisho, asaa giddofe attanaysatas woossa” yaagidosona.
37.5: Kawoy Hizqiyaasi kiittidaysa Isayaasi si7ida wode,
37.6: entako, “Hinte godaas haysada yaagidi odite: Goday, ‘Asoore kawa aylleti tana cayishin, neeni si7ida cashsha qaalas yayyofa.
37.7: Heko, I oda si7idi, ba biitta simmana mela, taani iya giddon issi ayyaana yeddana. Yaatada I ba biitta bidi yan mashshan hayqanaada oothana’ yaagees” yaagidi kiittis.
37.8: Asoore kawoy Laakiso katamaape dendidi bidaysa Asoore halaqay si7idi, guye simmidi kawoy Libina kataman oleteysa demmis.
37.9: Kawoy Sanakreemi, “Tophe kawoy Tirihaaqi nena olanaw yis” giya odaa si7idi, Hizqiyaasas haysada yaagidi kiittis.
37.10: “Yihuda kawa Hizqiyaasa, neeni ammanetiya Xoossay, ‘Yerusalaame Asoore kawa kushen yeggenna’ yaagidi cimmofo.
37.11: Asoore kawoti biittata ubbaa waati dhaysidaako neeni si7adasa. Yaatin, neeni attanee?
37.12: Beni ta mayzati dhaysida Gozaana, Kaaranenne Rafeesa biitta xoossatinne Talasaaran de7iya Edene biitta xoossati he biittata dhayope ashshidonaa?
37.13: Hamaata kawoy, Arfada kawoy, Safarwayma kawoy, Heena kawoynne Iwa kawoy awun de7oona?” yaagidi kiittis. Hizqiyaasa Woosa
37.14: Hizqiyaasi dabdaabiya kiitetida asaape ekidi nabbabis. Dabdaabiya Godaa keethi efidi Godaa sinthan miccis.
37.16: “Abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, kiruubetape gidduwan uttida Isra7eele Xoossaw, sa7a kawotethata ubbaa bolla ne xalaali Xoosse. Saluwanne sa7aa neeni medhadasa.
37.17: Abeeti Godaw, ne haytha yeggada haa si7a. Abeeti Godaw, ne ayfiya dooyada haa xeella. Nena, de7o Xoossaa, Sanakreemi cayida cashshaa si7a.
37.18: “Abeeti Godaw, Asoore kawoti kawotethatanne enta biitta dhaysidaysi ee tuma.
37.19: Enta xoossata taman xuuggidi dhaysidosona; Enta xoossati kaseka asa kushey massidi kessida mithinne shuchi gidiya gisho, xoossata gidokona.
37.20: Hiza abeeti Godaw, nu Xoossaw, ne xalaali Godaa gideysa sa7aa kawotethati ubbay erana mela neeni nuna iya kushepe ashsha” yaagidi woossis. Sanakreema Kundethaa (2 Kawo 19:2-37)
37.21: Hessafe guye, Amoxe na7ay Isayaasi Hizqiyaasas haysada yaagidi kiittis: Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Neeni Asoore kawa Sanakreema gaason tana woossida woosa taani si7as” yaagees.
37.22: “Goday Sanakreema haysada yaagis. Xiyoone geela7iya nena kadhasu; leqasu; Yerusalaame na7iya ba huuphiya qaathada nena borasu.
37.23: Neeni cayidaynne toochiday oonee? Ne oodde bolla ne qaala dhoqu oothada odetadii? Ne otoron oona dhoqu gada xeelladii? Hessa ne oothiday Isra7eele Geeshshaa bollana gidennee?
37.24: Neeni kiitida asaa baggara Godaa cayadasa. Haysada yaagadasa: ‘Ta daro para gaaretara dhoqa zumaa huuphiya, Libaanose zuma xeera keyas. Ubbaafe adussa zigatanne ubbaafe lo77o xiiddata qanxas. Dhoqa bessan de7iya xittida wora gakas.
37.25: Taani allaga biittatan haatha olla bookada haathe iyape uyas. Gibxe biittan goggiya haatha ubbaa taani ta tohuwan yedhada melisas’ ” yaagadasa.
37.26: “Daro wodepe sinthe neeni gimbetida katamata laallada, shucha keela kessana mela, ta qofaa qacha wothidaysa ne erabikii? Taani ha77i oothiya oosota beni halcha wothas.
37.27: Hessa gisho, enta asaas wolqay ixin, enti kawuyidosonanne yeellatidosona. Enti maata melanne yooga ciishsha mela. Enti keethaa huuphen doliya maata melanne leegey kundisiya katha mela hanidosona.
37.28: “Shin neeni uttiya, keyiya, geliya bessaanne ta bolla ne hanqetida hanquwa erayis.
37.29: Ne ta bolla hanqetida gishonne, ne otoruwa taani si7ida gisho, taani ne siidhiyan dafo aathana; ne doonan bixaala barsana. Yaatada neeni yida ogiyara nena guye zaarana.”
37.30: Isayaasi kawa Hizqiyaasako haysada yaagis. “Hessi poletanaysas mallay haysa; ha laythinne wonto laythi hinte aasebo kaxida kathi maana. Shin heedzantho laythan hinte, hinte huuphen zeritenne cakite; woyne tokitenne iya ayfiya miite.
37.31: Yihuda asaape attidaysati xapho yeddana; ayfe ayfana.
37.32: Attida guuthati Yerusalaamepenne Xiyoone deriyape yaana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa qanaatey hessa oothana.
37.33: “Hessa gisho, Asoore kawuwaba Goday haysada yaagees. Asoore kawoy ha katamaa gelenna; woyko haysan ba dongiya dukenna; woyko ba gondalliya oykidi, ha katamaa sinthe aadhenna; woyko katamaa yuushuwa teqenna.
37.34: Asoore kawoy ba yida ogiyara guye simmana; ha katamaa gelenna.” Taani Goday haysa odayis.
37.35: “Taani ta bonchuwa gishonne ta aylliya Dawita gisho, ha katamaa ashshana” yaagis.
37.36: He qamma Godaa kiitanchoy keyidi, Asoore asay dunkaanida guta bidi, 185,000 addeta wodhis. Wontetha gallas asay dendidi ahi aha bolla dooretidaysa be7idosona.
37.37: Hessa gisho, Asoore kawoy Sanakreema dendidi, guye simmi bidi Nanawe kataman uttis.
37.38: Issi gallas Sanakreema ba xoossaa Nisirooka keethan goyinnishin, iya nayti Adramelekinne Sarxari mashshan iya wodhidi Araraate biitta baqatidosona. Iya na7ay Asiradooni iya bessan kawotis.

38.1: He wode kawoy Hizqiyaasi hargidi, hayqanaw matis. Amoxe na7ay nabey Isayaasi iyako bidi, Goday, “Ne hayqana haniya gisho ne keetha giigisa” yaagis.
38.2: Hizqiyaasi godaako simmi zin7idi, Godaa woossis.
38.3: “Abeeti Godaw, taani ne sinthan tumatethaninne kumetha wozanan hemetidaysanne nena ufaysiyabaa oothidaysa hassaya” yaagidi cametidi yeekis.
38.5: Bada Hizqiyaasako, Goday ne mayza Dawita Xoossay, “Taani ne woosa si7as; ne afuthaa be7as. Ne laytha bolla taani tammanne ichashu laytha gujana.
38.6: Nenanne ha katamaa Asoore kawa kushepe ashshana; taani ha katamaas oletana” yaaga.
38.7: “Goday ba gida qaala polanaw immida mallay haysa yaagis:
38.8: Akaazi keyanaw giigisida dethan de7iya kuyay tammu tango guye simmidi baana mela taani oothana” yaagis. Kuyay tammu tango guye simmidi bis.
38.9: Yihuda kawoy Hizqiyaasi hargiyafe paxidi xaafida mazmurey haysa:
38.10: Taani, “Ta de7o laythay bagga gakonna de7ishin, hayqo pengera gelana haniyana? Attida laytha bonqetana haniyana?” yaagas.
38.11: “Taani de7on de7eyisata biittan Godaa be7ike; ha sa7an ase be7ike; ha alamiyan de7eysatara zaarada de7ike.
38.12: Dorse heemmeyisata dunkaaniyada, ta de7oy shodetis. Dorzey afila wandaraashen xaaxeysada, ta de7oy xaaxetis. Dorzey afila duuthiyada, ta de7uwa duuthis. Wontafe omarsi gakanaw tana dhaysaasa” yaagas.
38.13: “Qamma kumetha danda7an naagas; gaammoda ta meqetha ubbaa menthadasa; wontafe omarsi gakanaw tana dhaysadasa.
38.14: Taani kaarodanne cilashoda waassas; holleda zuuzumas. Ta ayfey salo xeellishe daaburis; Godaw, taani un7etas; neeni tana ha un7aafe kessa” yaagas.
38.15: Haysa ubbaa oothiday Godaa; taani ay gaanaw danda7iyana? Ta shempoy un7etida gisho, ta laytha ubbaa ashketethan daana.
38.16: Godaw, haysa mela seeran asay de7on de7ees. Ha77i ta payyatetha zaarada, tana de7on wotha!
38.17: Ta un7etethay taw lo77o gidis; neeni ta shempuwa dhayo ollafe ashshadasa; ta nagara ubbaa neeni guye yeggadasa.
38.18: Duufoy nena galatenna; hayqoy nena sabbenna. Ollan wodhidaysati, ne ammanetetha ufaysi oothokona.
38.19: Taani hachi nena galateysada, de7on de7eysati nena galatoosona. Ne ammanetetha aawati banta naytas odoosona.
38.20: Goday tana ashshana; hessa gisho, nuuni nu de7o laytha ubban, Godaa keethan diithan yexana.
38.21: Isayaasi kase, “Balase daaxidi, iya kixa bolla wothite; I paxana” yaagis.
38.22: Hizqiyaasi kase, “Taani paxada Godaa keethi baanaysas mallay aybe” yaagidi Isayaasa oychis.

39.1: He wode, Baldaana na7ay, Babiloone kawoy Mardook-Baldaani, Hizqiyaasi hargidi paxidaysa si7ida gisho, dabdaabenne imota Hizqiyaasas yeddis.
39.2: Hizqiyaasi kiitetidi yida asata mokis. Ba shaluwa minjiya keethan de7iya bira, worqaa, sawuwa, lo77o zayte, ba ola miishetanne ba shaluwa minjiya keethan de7iyaba ubbaa enta bessis. Ba son woyko ba gadhuwan de7iyaba ubbaafe Hizqiyaasi enta bessonna aggidabay baawa.
39.3: Nabey Isayaasi kawa Hizqiyaasako bidi, “Ha asati woygidona? Awupe yidona?” yaagidi oychis. Hizqiyaasi, “Enti taako, haaho biitta Babiloonepe yidosona” yaagis.
39.4: Isayaasi zaaridi, “Enti ne son ay ay be7idonaa?” yaagidi oychis. Hizqiyaasi, “Enti ta gadhon de7iya ubbaba be7idosona; ta shaluwa minja keethan de7iyabaape taani enta bessonnabay baawa” yaagis.
39.5: Yaatin, Isayaasi Hizqiyaasako, “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday giyaba si7a.
39.6: ‘Neeni, kawo gadhon de7iyaba ubbaynne ne mayzati hachi gakanaw shiishidaba ubbay kumthi di7etidi, Babiloone biitta baana wodey yaana; aybika attenna.
39.7: Qassi neepe yeletida ne ashonne ne suuthu gidida ne kochati di7etidi baana; Babiloonen kawo gadhon shuufa gididi oothana’ yaagees” yaagis.
39.8: Hizqiyaasi zaaridi, “Neeni odida Godaa qaalay lo77o. Shin ta laythan saronne wopa gido” yaagidi qopis.

40.1: Hinte Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Ta deriya minthethite! Minthethite!
40.2: I aylletethan de7ida wodey poletis; iya nagaray atto geetetis; ba nagaraa gisho, Goday iya dako seeridaysa, Yerusalaames liiqo qaalan odite; awaajite” yaagees.
40.3: Haysada giya girsay si7etees; “Mela biittan Godaa ogiya giigisite; nu Xoossaas Araba mela biittan horoga sitti oothite.
40.4: Zangaara ubbay dhoqu gaana; dereynne zumay ziqi gaana; iita ogetinne gela kessati dembatana.
40.5: He wode Godaa bonchoy qoncana; asho ma7ida ubbay hessa issife be7ana. Godaa doonay haysa odis” yaagees.
40.6: Issi girsi, “Waassa” yaagishin si7as; taani, “Woygada waasso?” yaagas. “Asi ubbay maata mela; iya boncho ubbay ciishsha mela.
40.7: Godaa iya bolla shempiya wode, maatay melees; ciishshay qoqofetees; asi tuma maata mela.
40.8: Maati melees; ciishshi qoqofetees; shin nu Xoossaa qaalay merinaw eqidi de7ees” yaagada waassa.
40.9: Neno Xiyoones lo77oba odeyso; zuma bolla keya. Neno Yerusalaames lo77oba odeteyso; ne qaala dhoqu oothada waassa. Yayyofa; dhoqu ootha; Yihuda katamatas, “Hinte Xoossay haysish” yaaga.
40.10: Heko, Ubbaa Haariya Goday wolqara yees; iya qesey iyaw haarana. Iya woytoy iyara de7ees; ciggiya gatey iya sinthana.
40.11: I ba wudiya henthanchoda heemmana; Ba dorsa marata ba qesiyan shiishana; enta ba ki7on idimmana; dhantheyisata loddara kaalethana.
40.12: Haathata ba kushe qaaqan, salota takadhon likiday, biitta baana daachon makiday, deretanne zumata mizaanen likiday oonee?
40.13: Godaa Ayyaana eriday, iya zoridi tamaarsiday oonee?
40.14: Iyaw qoncisana mela oona zore oychidee? Suure pirdaa iya tamaarsiday oonee? Iya cincatethi tamaarsiday, iya akeeka bessiday oonee?
40.15: Heko, kawotethati xuggan de7iya issi xoko mela; enti mizaane bolla de7iya baana mela; I yuushoy abban teqetida biittata baanada likes.
40.16: Libaanose mithay yarsho bessan eexanaw gidenna; iyan de7iya do7ati xuussa yarshos gidokona.
40.17: Kawotethati ubbay iya sinthan baynaba mela; enti iya sinthan ubba aykoka gidokona; baynabapeka laafa.
40.18: Yaatin, Xoossaa hinte oodera ginayetii? Ayba misilera gathidi xeelletii?
40.19: Kushe hiillanchoy eeqa misile giigisees; worqa sheesheysi worqan lanxees; bira sheesheysi iya bolla bira santhalaata medhees.
40.20: Miishey bayna manqoy, yarshos xoodhonna mithi doorees. Misiley qaaxonna mela essanaw kushe hiillancho koyees.
40.21: Eribeeketii? Woyko si7ibeeketii? Haysi hintew koyrope odetibeennee? Woyko sa7i medhetoosape haysa hinte akeekibeketii?
40.22: I biitta gertuwafe bolla baggan ba araatan uttees; biittan de7iya asati xaqo mela. Salota gesheda miccees; dunkaaneda de7iya bessi oothidi tolees.
40.23: I, halaqata baynabaada oothees; ha alamiya haareyisata hada kessees.
40.24: Enti toketidi buroo gam7onnashin, zeretidi buroo xapho yeddonnashin, Goday enta bolla carko yeddis; enti melin gotey enta punoda efis.
40.25: Yaatin, tana oodera likeyetii? Tana oodera ginayetii? yaagees geeshshay.
40.26: Hinte ayfiya dhoqu oothidi salo xeellite; ha xoolintota medhiday oonee? I enta olanchoda kaalethees; enta taybuwa erees. I enta ubbaa enta sunthan sunthan xeegees; iya wolqa gitatethaafenne minotethafe dendoysan, entafe issoyka dhayenna.
40.27: Neno Yayqoobaa, neno Isra7eele, Ta ogey Godaape geemmis; ta pirday Xoossaafe qosetis; yaagada ayis odetay?
40.28: Erabikii? Si7abikii? Goday merina Xoossa; biitta ubbaa medhiday iya. I daaburenna; woyko argaacena; oonika iya qofaa eranaw danda7ena.
40.29: I daaburidaysatas wolqa immees; minotethi baynaysas minotethi gujees.
