40.30: Hari attoshin yalaga nayti daaburoosona; argaacosona; na7atethati daaburidi kundoosona.
40.31: Shin Godaa ammanetidi naageysati, banta wolqaa oorathana. Enti arganthada qefen paallana; woxana, shin daaburokona; hemetana, shin argaacokona.

41.1: Hinteno, yuushoy abban teqetida biittato, si77i gidi, taani odeysa si7ite! Derey banta wolqaa ooratho; enti haa shiiqidi, odeto; ane nuuni pirdetanaw issife shiiqoos.
41.2: “Doloha baggafe issuwa denthidi biya bessa ubban xoono immey oonee? I kawotethata iya kushen aathidi immees; kawota iyaw haarisis. I enta ba mashshan bido kessees; ba dongiyan enta puno oothees.
41.3: I enta yedethishe, iya tohoy kase yedhiboona ogiyara saro kanthees.
41.4: Haysa oothidaynne poliday yeletethaaka koyrope xeegiday oonee? Taani Goday, koyruwara de7ayis wursetharaka de7ey tana” yaagees.
41.5: Yuushoy abban teqetida biittati, hessa be7idi yayyidosona; sa7aa gaxan de7eysati kokoridosona. Enti issife shiiqidi taako yidosona.
41.6: Issoy issuwa maaddees; ba ishaa, “Minna” yaagees.
41.7: Kushe hiillanchoy worqa sheesheysa minthethees; naariqan qoxidi lee7iseysi baachan birata seeriseysa, “Minna” gees. I birata dhantheysa, “Lo77o oothaasa” yaagees; eeqay qaaxonna mela mismaaren dhishees.
41.8: “Shin neno Isra7eele, ta aylliyaw, ta doorida Yayqoobaa, ta laggiya Abrahaame kochaw,
41.9: taani nena biitta gaxape ehas; haahosoope xeegada, ‘Neeni ta aylle’ taani nena dooras; taani nena yeggike.
41.10: Yayyofa, taani neera de7ayis; dagammofa, taani ne Xoossaa. Taani nena minthana; nena maaddana; taani nena xooniya ta ushacha kushiyan katisana.
41.11: Ne bolla hanqetiya ubbay yeellatidi kawuyana; neera eqeteysati baynaba gidana.
41.12: Ne morketa neeni koyana; shin enta demmaka; nena oleysati baynaba gidana.
41.13: Taani Goday, ne Xoossay, ne ushacha kushiya oykana; yayyofa, taani nena maaddana.
41.14: Neno guxuniyaw, Yayqooba, hinteno Isra7eele asaw, yayyofite; taani hintena maaddana; hintena woziya Isra7eele Geeshshay tana.
41.15: Heko, taani nena oorathi, qaranne achara de7iya, kathi qoxiya miishe oothas. Neeni dereta qoxada liiqisana; zumataka puno oothana.
41.16: Neeni enta punnana; carkoy enta efana; shin neeni Godan ufaytana; Isra7eele Geeshshan bonchetana.”
41.17: “Manqotinne metootanchoti haathe koyana, shin demmokona; enta qoodhey saamon melana. Gidoshin, taani Goday enta si7ana; taani, Isra7eele Xoossay, enta aggike.
41.18: Taani mela zumata bolla shaafa, zangaaratan pulto dhuusana. Bazzuwa haathi eelliya bessi, mela biitta pultoy keyaso oothana.
41.19: Taani mela biittan, ziga, soqala mithi, barseneete mithaanne shamaho dolisana. Mela biitta xiiddi, maaroynne caci kumida biitta oothana.
41.20: Isra7eele Geeshshay hessa medhidaysanne Godaa kushey hessa oothidaysa asay be7ana, erana, qopananne akeekana mela taani hessa oothas.”
41.21: “Ane hinte mootuwa shiishite” yaagees Goday; “Ane hinte marka haa ehite” yaagees Yayqooba kawoy.
41.22: Ane enti banta eeqata haa eho, aybi hananeeko enta eeqati nuus odo. Nuuni akeekana melanne enta wursethaa erana mela kase hanidabay aybeko nuus odo; woyko sinthafe hananaba nuus qonciso.
41.23: Hinte xoossata gideysa nuuni erana mela sinthafe yaanaw de7iyaba nuus odite. Nuuni dagammana melanne yayyana mela, lo77o gidin iita gidin ane issiba oothite.
41.24: Shin hinte baynaba mela; hinte oosoyka hada; hintena dooriya asayka ixetidaysata.
41.25: Taani pudeha baggafe issuwa denthin, I yees. Ta sunthaa xeegiya issoy dolohape yaana; oto medheysi urqa yedheysada, I kaaletheyisata yedhana.
41.26: Nuuni erana melanne I like gaana mela kasetidi nuus haysa odiday oonee? Hintefe oonika kasetidi haysa qoncisiday, woyko awaajiday woyko ba qaala sissiday baawa.
41.27: Taani haysa kasetada Xiyoones odas; taani Yerusalaames mishiraacho odeysa immas.
41.28: Shin taani xeelliya wode issoyka baawa; taani zore oychiya wode enta eeqata giddofe zaaro immiya issoyka baawa.
41.29: Heko, enti ubbay hada; enta oosoyka pathenna; sheeshidi medhida enta misiletika carko.

42.1: “Taani katisada oykida ta aylley, ta iyan ufayteysi, taani dooridaysi haysa. Taani ta Ayyaana iya bolla wothas; I kawotethatas suure pirda ehana.
42.2: I waassenna; ba qaala dhoqu oothenna ba qaala ogen sissenna.
42.3: Dincetida mayriya I menthenna; lii7i lii7idi eexiya muqaada I toysenna; ammanetethan I suure pirda ehana.
42.4: I biittan suure pirda essenna gakanaw argaacena woyko guye geenna. Yuushoy abban teqetida biittan de7iya asay iya higgiya si7anaw naagees.
42.5: Salota medhidaynne enta micciday, sa7aanne sa7a bolla de7iyaba medhiday, sa7an de7iya asaas shempo immiday, iyan hemetiya ubbaas de7o immiday, Godaa Xoossay haysada yaagees.
42.6: Taani Goday nena xillotethan xeegas; ne kushiya oykada nena naagana. Taani nena asaas caaqo oothana; kawotethatas poo7o oothada immana.
42.7: Neeni qooqe ayfeta dooyana; dhuma ollan, qasho keethan de7eyisata kessana.
42.8: Taani Godaa; hessi ta sunthaa; ta bonchuwa taani haras immike; ta galataa eeqatas immike.
42.9: Heko taani kase odidaba ubbay poletidosona; ha77i taani oorathaba awaajayis; enti hananaape sinthe taani hintew odayis” yaagees. Xoossay Galateto
42.10: Godaas ooratha mazmure yexite; biitta gaxape gaxaa gakanaw iya galata yexite. Abba giddora beysatinne iyan de7eysati, yuushoy abban teqetida biittatinne iyan de7iya ubbay yexo.
42.11: Mela biittan de7iya katamati, Qedaare asay de7iya gutati banta qaala dhoqu oothonna. Sela7a kataman de7eysati ufaysan yexo; deriya huuphen banta ililsaa sisso.
42.12: Enti boncho Godaas immo; iya galata yuushoy abban teqetida biittatan odo.
42.13: Goday mino asada keyana; ba qaala dhoqu oothidi ola awaajana. Ba qaala dhoqu oothidi gereerana; ba morketa xoonana.
42.14: Daro wode si77i gada gam7as; si77i gada danda7as. Shin ha77i iqethi oykida maccasada ta waassana; tooka shempananne peenuqana.
42.15: Deretanne zumata laallana; enta bolla dolidaba ubbaa melisana. Shaafata yuushoy abban teqetida biitta kessana; eele haathata melisana.
42.16: Taani qooqeta enti eronna ogiyara kaalethana; enti eronna horogara efana. Enta sinthan dhumaa poo7o kessana; enta sinthan de7iya ogiya baasana. Ha ubbaa taani entaw oothana; taani enta oothonna aggike.
42.17: “Shin eeqa misiletan ammaneteysati, misileta, ‘Hinte nu xoossata’ yaageysati, yeellan guye simmana.
42.18: Hinte tulleti, si7ite; hinte qooqeti, xeellite, loythidi be7ite.
42.19: Ta aylliyafe hari qooqey oonee? Ta kiittidaysafe hari tulley oonee? Bana Godaas aathidi immida uraape Godaa aylliyafe hari qooqey oonee?
42.20: Darobaa be7adasa, shin akeekaka; ne haythay dooya, shin si7aka” yaagees.
42.21: Goday ba xillotetha gisho, ba higgiya gitayanawunne bonchanaw dosis.
42.22: Shin ha asay bonqetis; de7iyaba eketis. Olla giddon xihen oyketis, qasho keethan enta bolla gordetis. Enti bonqetidosona, shin enta ashshey baawa; di7etidosona, shin oonika “Enta guye zaara” giya asi baawa.
42.23: Hinte giddofe haysa si7ey oonee? sinthafe yaana wodiyaba qopey oonee?
42.24: Yayqooba di7etethas, Isra7eele bonqees aathidi immiday oonee? Nagara oothidi nu qohida, iya ogiya kaallanawunne, iya higgiya kiitetanaw nuuni ixida Godaa gidenneyee?
42.25: Hessa gisho, I enta bolla ba eexiya hanquwa gussis; enta yuushuwa tama lacon teqis, shin enti eribookona; I enta xuuggis, shin enti akeekibokona.

43.1: Shin neno Yayqoobaa nena medhiday, neno Isra7eele, nena giigisiday, Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani nena wozida gisho yayyofa; taani nena ne sunthan xeegas; neeni tabaa.
43.2: Neeni haatha giddora pinniya wode taani neera gidana. Neeni shaafata giddora pinniya wode enti nena mittokona. Neeni tama giddora aadhiya wode xuugetaka; lacoyka nena meenna.
43.3: Taani nena Ashshiysa, Isra7eele Geeshshaa, Godaa ne Xoossaa. Gibxe new wozo oothada, Tophenne Saaba new laame oothada immana.
43.4: Neeni ta sinthan al7onne boncho gidiya gisho, taani nena dosiya gisho, asaa ne gisho, kawotethata ne shempuwa gisho laame oothada immana.
43.5: Taani neera de7iya gisho yayyofa; taani ne nayta dolohape nena wulohape shiishana.
43.6: Taani pudeha baggaa, ‘Enta zaarada eha!’ dugeha baggaa, ‘Enta teqofa’ yaagana. Ta adde nayta haahosoope, ta macca nayta sa7aa gaxape ehana.
43.7: Enti ta sunthan xeegetidaysata, taani ta bonchuwas medhidaysata, taani giigisidaysatanne oothidaysata hammite.”
43.8: Ayfey de7ishin qooqida asata, haythi de7ishin tullida asata kessa.
43.9: Kawotethati ubbay issife shiiqo; asay duulata utto. Enta eeqata giddofe haysa odanaw, kase aadhidabata nuus qoncisanaw danda7ey oonee? Hara asay si7idi, “Haysi tuma” gaana mela, enti like gideysa bessanaw banta markata eho.
43.10: Goday haysada yaagees: “Hinte ta markata; hinte tana erana melanne ammanana mela taani Xoosse gideysa akeekana mela taani doorida ta aylleti hintena. Taape kase hara xoossi medhetibeenna; taape guye hara xoossi deenna.
43.11: Taani Godaa; taape attishin, hari ashshey baawa.
43.12: Ta kasetada odas, ta oothanaba awaajas, ta ashshas. Hinte giddon de7iya allaga xoossatape hessa oothiday baawa. Taani Xoosse gideysas hinte taw markata.
43.13: Merinaape merinaw taani Xoosse; ta kushepe oonika ashshena; ta oothidaba laammanaw danda7ey baawa” yaagees Goday. Xoossa maarotanne Ammanetona Isra7eele
43.14: Goday, hintena Woziya, Isra7eele Geeshshay, haysada yaagees: “Hinte gisho, taani Babiloone bolla olanchota kiittana. Babilooneta ubbaa enti ceeqetiya markabetara betana mela oothana.
43.15: Taani Godaa, hinte Geeshshaa, Isra7eele medhida hinte Kawa” yaagees.
43.16: Abba giddon oge, wolqaama haathata giddora horoga kessida Goday haysada yaagees.
43.17: Para gaaretanne parata, olanchotanne mino asata abban ehidi, enti dendonna mela yeggiday, enta muqaada tamada toysida.
43.18: Goday haysada yaagees: “Kasebata haasayopite; benibata qopofite.
43.19: Heko, ha77i taani oorathaba oothayis; ika ha77i dolana. Hessi hintew bentennee? Taani mela biittan oge, mela biittan shaafata kessana.
43.20: Taani doorida, ta asaas mela biittan haathe, mela biittan haatha shaafata immas. Wora do7ati, workanatinne yanchoti tana bonchana.
43.21: Taani taw medhida dere gidiya gisho, ta galataa awaajana mala ta haysa oothas.
43.22: Shin neno Yayqoobaa, neeni ta sunthaa xeegabaka; neno Isra7eele, neeni tana saletadasa.
43.23: Neeni taw xuussa yarshos dorse ehabaaka; hara yarshonka tana bonchabaaka. Taani nena katha yarsho eha gada waaysabike; ixaane taw cuyiso gada daabursabike.
43.24: Neeni taw sawiya ixaane shammabaaka; ne modho yarshon tana ufaysabaka. Shin neeni ne nagaran tana waaysadasa; ne naaquwan tana daabursadasa.
43.25: “Ta gisho gada ne nagaraa quchey tana; ne nagaraa zaarada qopike.
43.26: Ane tana hassayisa; neeni xillo gideysa erisanaw issife shiiqidi mootetoos.
43.27: Ne koyro aaway nagara oothis; ne astamaareti tana qohidosona.
43.28: Hessa gisho, taani ta keetha halaqata kawushas; Yayqooba gados, Isra7eele cashshas aathada immas.”

44.1: Shin ta aylliya Yayqooba, ta doorida Isra7eele, ha77ika si7a.
44.2: Nena medhida, ne aaye ulon nena giigisida Goday haysada yaagees. Ta aylliya Yayqooba, taani doorida Yishuruuna, yayyofa.
44.3: Taani saamotida biittan haatha gussana; mela biitta bolla shaafa gogisana. Ta Ayyaana ne nayta bolla, ta anjuwa ne kochaa bolla gussana.
44.4: Enti haatha doonan dolida maatada, shaafa lanqen de7iya mithada aacana.
44.5: Issoy bana, taani Godaaba yaagana; hankoy bana Yayqooba sunthan xeegana; haray ba kushiya bolla, “Taani Godaaba” yaagidi caddana; I Isra7eele iya sunthan xeegetana.
44.6: Goday, Isra7eele Kawoynne iya Woziday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Koyroy tana; wursethay tana; taape hara Xoossi baawa.
44.7: Ta meli oonee? De7iko ane awaajo; ane ta sinthan eqidi odo. Benipe doomidi, hanidaba odo; sinthafe hananaba qonciso.
44.8: Yayyofite; dagammopite; taani haysa benipe doomada odabikina? Kasetada erisabikina? Hessas hinte taw marka. Taape attishin, hara Xoossi de7ii? Hara Zaalli baawa; oonika baynaysa ta erayis” yaagees.
44.9: Eeqa misileta medhiya ubbay hada; iyan ufaytiyabati enta go7okona. Enta markati qooqeta entaw eri baawa; enti yeellatana.
44.10: Bana go77onna eeqa Xoossa oothidi giigisiday oonee?
44.11: Eeqa medhey asepe attishin, hara gidenna; inne iya laggeti yeellatana; ubbati issife shiiqidi eqo, yayyo, yeellato.
44.12: Birata qoxeysi eeqa oothanaw ba birata taman seerisidi mala immanaw ba mino kushiyan naariqan qoxees. Hessa giigisishe koshatees; iya wolqay wurees; saamotesinne labbanees.
44.13: Anaaxey wodoron likidi irsaasen iya bolla malla wothees; liiqisiya miishen liiqisees. Lo77o asa malan medhidi ba eeqa keethan wothees.
44.14: I hessa oothanaw ziga qanxees; wola woyko xiidda wora giddofe dooridi diccana mela oothees. Woyko ziga tokidi iran diccana mela naagees.
44.15: Iyape baggaa eethanaw go7etees; iyape baggaa ekidi, eethidi kayees; baggaa eethidi kathi kathees. Attidaysa ekidi xoosse oothidi iyaw goyinnees; eeqa medhidi iya sinthan gufannees.
44.16: Iyape baggaa eethidi kathi kathees; baggan asho caacidi kallidi mees. Qassi tama kayishe, “Eroshsho, tama goopa; waani ho77i” yaagees.
44.17: Qassi attida mithaa massidi, goyinniya xoossa misile kessees. He misiliya sinthan gufannidi, iyaw goyinnees; “Neeni taw xoosse gidiya gisho, tana ashsha” yaagidi woossees.
44.18: Enti aykoka erokona; aykoka akeekokona; enti be7onna mela enta ayfey goozetis; akeekona mela enta wozanay gordetis.
44.19: Eeqa oothiya asaa giddofe ba wozanan, “Iyape baggaa taman eethas; iya bonquwan kathi kathas; iyan asho caacada mas. Iyape attidaysa ixetida eeqa oothada medho? attida cugetha mithas gufannada goyinno?” yaagidi qopiya woyko akeekiya asi baawa.
44.20: I bido mees; iya cimetida wozanay iya hara soo kaalethis. I ba shempuwa ashshanaw danda7enna; “Haysi ta ushacha kushen de7ey wordo gidenna” gaanaw danda7enna.
44.21: Goday haysada yaagees: “Yayqoobaa, haysa akeeka; Isra7eele, neeni ta aylle gidiya gisho haysa hassaya. Taani nena medhas; neeni ta aylle; neno Isra7eele, taani nena dogike.
44.22: Taani ne nagaraa pittada diggas, ne naaquwa caaganada quchas. Taani nena wozida gisho, taako simma” yaagees.
44.23: “Hinteno saloto, Goday haysa oothida gisho, ufaysan yexite; neno biittaw, ilila. Hinteno dereto, worawnne iya giddon de7iya mitha ubbay mazmure yexite. Goday Yayqooba wozis; Isra7eele giddon bonchetis.
44.24: Ne aaye ulon nena medhidaysi, nena wozidaysi Goday haysada yaagees: Ubbabaa Medhiday, salota tarka micciday; sa7aaka tarka hiixiday, taani Godaa.
44.25: Taani wordo nabeta tinbitiya hada oothas; marota kaayowa eeyatethi kessas. Taani cincata cincatethaa shira yeggas; enta eraa eeya oothas.
44.26: Taani ta aylleta qaala minthana; ta nabeta tinbitiya polana. Taani Yerusalaame katamaa, ‘Neeni asay de7iya bessi gidana’ yaagas; Yihuda katamata, ‘Hinte simmidi keexetana; hinte gimbey ooraxana’ yaagas.
44.27: Taani goggiya haathata melisana gisho ciimmo haatha, ‘Ne mela’ yaagana.
44.28: Qiroosako, ‘Neeni ta asaa heemmeysa; neeni ta halchuwa poleysa’ yaagana. I, Yerusalaame katamaa, ‘Neeni simmada keexetana’; xoossa keethaa, ‘Ne baasoy yegetana’ ” yaagana.

45.1: Goday tiyidaysas, kawota danco bilisaana mela, deriya iyaw haarisana mela, pengeti iya sinthan dooyetana mela iya ushacha kushiya oykida Qiroosa Goday haysada yaagees:
45.2: Taani ne sinthara baana; dereta dembayana; naase birata sanqata menthana; birata kobeta qanxana.
45.3: Nena ne sunthan xeegey tana Godaa, Isra7eele Xoossaa gideysa neeni erana mela taani new dhuman de7iya shaluwa, geeman qosetida duretetha immana.
45.4: Ta aylliya Yayqooba gisho, taani doorida Isra7eele gisho, taani nena ne sunthan xeegas. Neeni tana eronna ixikoka, taani nena boncho sunthan xeegas.
45.5: Taani Godaa; taape hara xoosse baawa; neeni tana eronna ixikoka taani new wolqa immana.
45.6: Hessika awi doliyasope wulliyaso gakanaw taape hari baynaysa asay erana melasa; taani Godaa; taape hara xoossi baawa.
45.7: Taani poo7onne dhuma medhas; Sarotethinne dhayo ehayis; ha ubba taani Goday oothayis.
45.8: Hinteno saloto, bollafe xillotethi tigite; shaarati bukiso. Biittay dooyeto, atotethi xillotethay issife dolo; taani Goday haysa medhas.
45.9: Bana Medhidaysara palamiya uraa ayye! I sa7an meqidi wodhida otope issuwa mela. Otoy bana medheysako, Neeni, “Ay oothay?” “New kushey baawa” yaagiyee?
45.10: Ba aawa, “Tana ayis yeladii?” giya, ba aayiw, “Tana haysada ayis bannakadii?” giya uraa ayye!
45.11: Goday, Isra7eele Geeshshay, iya Medhidaysi haysada yaagees: “Sinthafe hananaba, hinte tana ta naytabaa oychanaw, ta kushe oosotaba tana kiittanaw bessetii?
45.12: Taani sa7aa oothas; aseka iya bolla medhas. Salota taani ta kushen miccas; enta bolla xoolintota ubbaa wothas.
45.13: Taani Qiroosa xillotethan denthas; iya ogiya ubbaa suure oothana. Miishe qanxonna woyko woyto immonna I ta katamaa keexana; ta asaa di7ope zaarana” yaagees ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
45.14: “Goday haysada yaagees: Gibxe duretethaynne Tophe zal7ey, geesay adussa gidida Saaba asati neeko yidi, nebaa gidana; enti santhalaatan qashetidi, nena kaallana. Enti new goyinnishe, ‘Xoossi neera de7ees; iyape attishin, hara xoossi baawa’ ” yaagana.
45.15: “Isra7eele Ashshiya Godaa Xoossaw, tuma neeni nena genthiya Xoosse.
45.16: Eeqa medheysati ubbay yeellatananne kawuyana; enti issife yeella ma7ana.
45.17: Shin Goday Isra7eele merinaa atotethan ashshana; hinte merinaw yeellateketa kawuyeketa.
45.18: Salota medhida Goday, biitta giigisidi oothiday, asi daana melape attishin, biitta coo medhiboonna Xoossay haysada yaagees: taani Godaa; taape hari baawa.
45.19: Taani geeman, woyko dhuma biittan uttada odabike. Yayqooba zerethaako, ‘Tana coo bessan koyite’ gabike; taani Goday tumaa haasayis; like gididaba qoncisayis.
45.20: Hinteno kawotethata giddofe attidaysato, issife haa mata shiiqite. Mithafe oosetida eeqa misiliya tooki yuuyeysatas, ashshanaw danda7onna xoossata woosseysatas eri baawa.
45.21: Ane palamit; hinte mootuwas gaaso shiishite; issife zoretite. Daro wodepe kase haysa odiday oonee? Benipe haysa awaajiday oonee? Tana Godaa gidikinaayee? Taape attishin, hara Xoossi baawa. Taape attishin, hari xilloynne ashshiya Xoossi baawa.
45.22: Hinteno biitta gaxape gaxa gakanaw de7eysato, taako simmidi attite; taape attishin, hara Xoossi baawa.
45.23: Taani tanan caaqas; guye simmonna qaali ta doonape xillotethan keyis. Gulbati ubbay taw gulbatana; inxarsi ubbay tanan caaqana.
45.24: Enti tabaa haasayishe, ‘Xillotethinne minotethi Godaa xalaalan de7ees’ yaagana. Iya ixiya ubbay iyako yidi yeellatana.
45.25: Shin Isra7eele zeretha ubbay, Godan, xoononne boncho demmana.

46.1: Beella geetetiya Babiloone eeqay hokis; Nebo geetetiya eeqay gufannis. Enta misileti caana mehe bolla caanetidosona; daaburida mehetas deexo tooho gididosona.
46.2: Deexuwape dendidaysan caana meheti, caanara issife kundidosona. Eeqati bantana ashshanaw danda7onna gisho bantaw di7etidi bidosona.
46.3: Hinteno, Isra7eelepe attidaysato, Yayqooba kochato, hinte qanthatida wodepe doomada naagiday, hinte yeletida wodepe doomada tookiday, taani odeysa si7ite.
46.4: Hinte cimana gakanaw, puulumana gakanaw taani tana; ta hintena maaddana. Taani hintena medhas; ta hintena naagana; ta hintena tookananne ashshana.
46.5: Tana oodera gaaddeyeetii? woyko oodera likiseetii? Enti woli daanees gaanaw tana oodera ginayetii?
46.6: Asay worqanne bira banta qarxiitape qolidi, xoosse oothidi medhana mela worqa sheesheysas immoosona. I oothidi simmin enti eeqa sinthan gufannidi goyinnoosona.
46.7: Enti iya denthidi, banta hashiyan tookidi, iya bessan iya wothin, I he bessan eqi aggees. Ba de7iya bessaafe qaaxenna; asi iyako waassiko iyaw zaaro immenna; iya metuwape iya ashshena.
46.8: Hinteno nagaranchoto, haysa hassayite; qopite; hinte wozanan wothite.
46.9: Beni wode hanidabata hassayite; taape attishin, hara Xoossi baawa; taani Xoosse; ta meli oonika baawa.
46.10: Ta qofay minnana; taani ta halchuwa ubbaa polana. Wursethan hananaba doomethan, sinthafe hananaba koyrottada erisayis.
46.11: Doloha baggafe bonqiya kafo, haaho biittafe ta qofaa poliya asi xeegana. Taani qopidaba polana; taani halchidaba oothana.
46.12: Hinteno wozani muumidaysato, xillotethafe haakidaysato tana si7ite.
46.13: Taani ta xillotethaa matayana; ika haahona gidenna. Ta atotethay gam7enna; ta atotetha Xiyoones, ta bonchuwa Isra7eeles immana” yaagees.

47.1: “Babiloone geela7ee, duge wodhada baana bolla utta. Babiloone naatte, ne araata aggada sa7an utta. Hizape guye neeni saaphotiyaronne baalotiyaro geetetaka.
47.2: Woxa teqada kathi gaacca; ne guulunthaa qaara; ne adussa ma7uwa kessa; ne wodiriya qaarada shaafa pinna.
47.3: Ne kalloy qaaretana; ne pokoy bentana. Taani halo keyana; oodeska qadhetike” yaagees Goday.
47.4: Nuna Woziya Isra7eele Geeshshaa sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa.
47.5: “Babiloone naatte, bada dhuman si77i gada utta; Hizape guye neeni kawotethata kawiw geetetaka.
47.6: Taani ta asaa hanqetas; ta laata tunisas; taani enta ne kushen aathada immas. Neeni entaw qadhetabaaka; cimidaysata bolla ne deexo qambara wothadasa.
47.7: Neeni, ‘Taani merinaw kawo gidana’ yaagadasa; shin ne oothida oosuwanne iya wursethay waananeko qopabaaka.
47.8: “Neno wopu gada uttidaarenne naagetada de7idaare si7a. Ne wozanan, ‘Taape attishin, hari baawa; taani am7o gidike; woyko yelada na7i bayna asi gidike’ yaagadasa.
47.9: Ha nam7ubati qoponna issi gallas ne bolla yaana. Ne bitay ay darikoka, ne murunnoy ay wolqaamikoka neeni ne naytape mela atteysinne am7etethay attenna.
47.10: “Neeni ne iitatethan ammanetada, ‘Oonika tana be7enna’ yaagadasa. Ne eratethaynne cincatethay nena balethin, neeni ne wozanan, ‘Taape attishin, hari baawa’ yaagadasa.
47.11: Shin neeni waatada ne bitan haassaneeko eronna iitay ne bolla yaana. Neeni gate qanxanaw danda7onna dhayoy ne bolla wodhana; qassi neeni aykoka qoponna gadoy ne bolla yaana.
47.12: “Ane neeni ne na7atethafe doomada oothashe de7ida ne bitaanne ne murunnuwa ha77ika ootha. Ooni eri ne qopidaysa mela hananeeko woyko neeni iyara daganthaneeko.
47.13: Neeni ekida zorey ubbay daabursafe attishin, nena aykoka maaddibeenna. Salo xoolinto taybeysatinne iya xeellidi ageenan ageenan hananaba odeysati ane nena asho.
47.14: Enti buure mela; tami enta maana. Enti tama lacuwape bantana ashshanaw danda7okona. Asi kayaa bonqoy woyko asi iya sinthan uttidi ho77iya tama gidenna.
47.15: Neeni entara daaburidaysati, na7atethafe doomidi neera zal7idaysati new hessa mela. Enti issoy issoy ba balan balan oyketana; nena ashshiya oonika baawa.”

48.1: “Hinteno, Yayqooba soo asaw, Isra7eele sunthan xeegetidaysato, Yihuda kochaafe yidaysato, haysa si7ite. Hinte Godaa sunthan caaqeta; Isra7eele Xoossaa xeegeta; shin tumatethaninne xillotethan gidenna.
48.2: Hinte, ‘Nuuni geeshsha kataman de7oos; Isra7eele Xoossan zempoos; iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa’ ” yaagidi ceeqeteta.
48.3: Taani sinthafe hananabata daro wodepe kase odas. ta doonape enti keyin, enti eeson poletana mela oothas.
48.4: Neeni odin si7onnaysa, ne morgey birata mela gideysa ne som7oy naase biratada leeqamonaysa taani erayis.
48.5: Hessa gisho, neeni, “Haysa ta eeqay oothis; ta masetida misileti, ta sheeshada oothida misileti oothidosona” goonnaada, Taani hessa new benipe doomada odas. Enti hananaape sinthe taani enta new erisas.
48.6: “Ta kase odidaysa ne si7adasa; I poletidaysa be7adasa, yaatin iya tumatethaa ekikii? Hizape ne eronna oorathabata ta new odana.
48.7: Enti beni medhetidaba gidonashin ha77i medhetidosona. Neeni, ‘Taani enta erayis’ goonnaada haysafe kase neeni entaba si7abaka.
48.8: Neeni si7abaka; erabaaka; ne haythay benipeka dooyetibeenna. Neeni ay cimmiya aseeko taani erayis; neeni yeletoosape geella geetetada xeegeteysa erayis.
48.9: Ta sunthaa gisho, taani ta hanquwa zaarana; ta bonchuwa gisho nena dhaysona mela ta hanquwa teqana.
48.10: Taani nena paacas; birada gidonashin taani nena meto taman paacas.
48.11: Taani ta gisho, haysa oothana; ta sunthay tooshetana mela koyke; taani ta bonchuwa haras immike.” Babiloonepe Kessi
48.12: “Neno Yayqooba, taani xeegida Isra7eele, taani odiyaba si7a; taani iya; koyroyka tana; wursethayka tana.
48.13: Ta kushey biitta baasuwa medhis; ta ushacha kushey salota miccis. Taani enta xeegiya wode enti issife eqoosona.
48.14: “Hinte ubbay issife shiiqidi si7ite; eeqatape haysi hananaysa sinthatidi odiday oonee? Goday dooridaysi iya qofaa Babiloone bolla polana; iya qeseyka Babiloone biitta bolla gidana.
48.15: Taani, ta huuphen iyaw odas; iya xeegas; ta iya ehana; I oothiyaba ubbay iyaw poletana.
48.16: “Taako haa shiiqidi haysa si7ite; “Taani koyrope doomada geeman odabike; hessi hanida wodepe doomada taani yan de7ayis” yaagees. Ha77ika Ubbaa Haariya Godaynne iya Ayyaanay tana kiittidosona.
48.17: Nena woziya Goday, Isra7eele Geeshshay haysada yaagees: “Nena maaddiyaba tamaarsey ne baanaw bessiya ogiya ne kaalethey, tana ne Godaa, ne Xoossaa.
48.18: Neeni ta kiitaa si7idaba gidiyako, ne sarotethay shaafa haathada gogganashin; ne xillotethay abba beetada hananashin.
48.19: Ne kochay abba shafeda, ne nayti taybetonna baana mela daranashin; enta sunthay ta sinthafe dhayenna; kichennashin” yaagees.
48.20: Babiloone biittafe keyite; Babiloonepe baqatite! Qaala dhoqu oothidi, ufaysan haysada yaagidi waassite. Sa7aa gaxape gaxa gakanaw haysa kiittite; “Goday ba aylliya Yayqooba wozis” yaagidi odite.
48.21: I enta mela biittara kaalethida wode saamotibookona. Zaallafe haathi entaw pultis; I zaalla phalqin haathi dhuuqis.

49.1: Hinteno, yuushoy abban teqetida biittato, taani odeysa si7ite. Hinteno, haahoson de7iya kawotethato akeekite; taani yeletanaape kase Goday tana xeegis; ta aaye ulon de7ishin, ta suntha sunthis.
49.2: Ta inxarsaa qara mashshi oothis; ba kushiya kuyan tana genthis. I tana poshetida donge yiishshi oothidi ba shoohuwan tana qottis.
49.3: I taako, “Isra7eele, neeni ta aylle; taani ta bonchuwa nenan qoncisana” yaagis.
49.4: Shin taani, “Taani coo daaburas; ta wolqaa go77i baynabaninne hadaban wursas. Gidoshin, ta pirday Godaa matana; ta gatey ta Xoossaa matana” yaagas.
49.5: Taani Godaa ayfe sinthan bonchetida gisho, ta Xoossay taw wolqa gidida gisho, Yayqooba iyako zaaranaw Isra7eele iyako shiishanaw, taani iya aylle gidana mela tana ta aaye ulon doorida
49.6: Goday taako haysada yaagees; Neeni Yayqooba kochaa denthanaw Isra7eelepe attida guuthata zaarada ehanaw neeni taw aylle gideysi daro guuthaba. Hessafe aathada, ta atotethay biitta gaxa gakana mela taani nena kawotethatas poo7o oothana.
49.7: Kadhetidaysasinne ixetidaysas qassi kawotethata haariya aylliyas, Isra7eele woziya Goday, Isra7eele Geeshshay haysada yaagees; Ammanthiya Godaa gisho, nena doorida Isra7eele Geeshsha gisho kawoti be7idi dendi eqana; deriya haareysati be7idi goyinnana. Yerusalaamey Ooraxana
49.8: Goday yaagees; “Taani doorida woden ne oysha zaarana; atotetha gallas taani nena maadana. Taani nena naagana; neeni biitta zaarada essana mela; asi doonna biitta neeni laatisana mela taani nena asaas caaqo oothada immas.
49.9: Di7etidaysata, ‘Keyite!’ dhuma qashon de7eyisata, ‘Birshetite!’ gaana mela taani nena oothana. Enti oge matan heemetana; mela dere bolla heemetiya bessi demmana.
49.10: Enti koshatokona woyko saamotokona; enta mela biitta mishay xuuggenna; away enta meenna. Entaw qadheteysi enta kaalethana; pulto haathaako enta laaggana.
49.11: Taani ta dereta ubbaa oge kessana; ta wogga ogeta dhoqu oothana.
49.12: Heko, ta asay haahosoope yaana: pudeha baggaafenne wuloha baggafe, qassi Aswaana biittafe yaana” yaagees.
49.13: Hinteno saloto, ufaysan yexite; neno biittaw ufayta. Hinteno dereto, ililite! Goday ba asa minthethis; ba metootetida ba asaas qadhetis.
49.14: Shin Xiyooney, “Goday tana aggis; Xoossay tana dogis” yaagasu.
49.15: Aayiya ba dhanthiya na7aa doganaw danda7ay? Ba ulope keyida na7as qadhetekee? Iya dogikoka, taani nena dogike!
49.16: Heko, taani nena ta kushe qaaqan xaafa wothas; ne dirsa gimbeti ubba wode ta sinthan de7oosona.
49.17: Nena zaaridi keexeysati ellesidi yaana; nena laallidaysati neepe haakana.
49.18: Ane dhoqu gada ne yuushuwa xeella; ne nayti ubbay issife shiiqidi neeko yaana. Taani Goday, tanan caaqas: neeni enta ubbaa alleeqoda ma7ana; gelanaw haniya maccasi alleeqeteysada neeni entan alleeqetana.
49.19: Neeni laaletada baysa gidikoka, ne biittay dhaykoka, ha77i nenan de7iya asaas daro xuummana; nena laallidaysati neepe haakana.
49.20: Neeni kayotiya laythan new yeletida nayti ne haythan, “Haysi bessay nuus daro xuunthu gidiya gisho, nu daana dalga bessi imma” yaagana.
49.21: Neeni ne wozanan, “Ha nayta ubbaa taw oone yeliday? Taani yelada dhonthu gidas; taani di7etas, ixetas. Yaatin, haysata oone dichiday? Taani tarka attas; yaatin ha nayti ubbay awupe yidona? yaagana.”
49.22: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Heko, taani kawotethata mallata bessaana; asaas ta bandira essana. Enti ne adde nayta idimmidi, ne macca nayta banta hashiyan tookidi ehana.
49.23: Kawoti nena dichiya aawata gidana; enta macca kawoti nena dhanthiya aayo gidana. Enti gufannidi new goyinnana; ne toho baana laaccana. Taani Godaa gideysa neeni hessan erana; tanan ammanetidi naageysati yeellatokona” yaagees.
49.24: Olanchuwafe di7o yegisanaw, wozan iita asa kushepe di7etida asi kessi ekanaw danda7etiyee?
49.25: Shin Goday yaagees: Olancho kushepe di7etida asi kessi ekanaw, wozana mino asape di7o yegisanaw danda7etees. Neera oleteysatara taani oletana; ne naytaka ashshana.
49.26: Nena un7etheysati banta ashuwa maana mela oothana; woyne uyidi mathoteysada enti banta suuthaa uyidi mathotana. He wode asa ubbay taani Godaa, nena Ashshiya, Woziyanne Yayqooba Wolqaamaa gideysa erana.

50.1: Goday yaagees; “Taani hinte aayiw yeddida pirima worqatey awun de7ii? taani ooddes hintena taani bayzadina? Heko, hinte nagaraa gisho hinte bayzetideta; hinte naaquwa gisho hinte aayiya yedetasu.
50.2: Taani yida wode, haysan asi ayis dhayidee? Taani xeegida wode, ‘Yee!’ gaanaw ayis asi dhayidee? Taani hintena wozanaw ta kushey qantheyee? hintena ashshanaw taw wolqi baaweyee? Taani abba seerada melisayis; shaafata mela biitta oothayis. Haathi dhayin entan de7iya moloti wooqosona; saamoy wodhin hayqoosona.
50.3: Taani salota dhuma mayzayis; enta kamay kayo ma7o daanees” yaagis.
50.4: Daaburidaysa taani qaalan minthetho erana mela, Ubbaa Haariya Goday taw tamaarida inxarsi immis. I tana wonta wonta barkisidi, taani tamaareda si7anaada ta haythaa dooyees.
50.5: Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta haythaa dooyis; taani geella gidabike; guye simmabike.
50.6: Taani ta zokuwa shoceysatas, ta buuchaa shoddeysatas ta gacuwa aathada immas. Ta bolla cutteysatapenne tana kawusheysatape ta som7uwa genthabike.
50.7: Ubbaa Haariya Goday tana maaddiya gisho, taani yeellatike. Taani ta som7uwa salo shuchu oothas; taani yeellatonnaysa erayis.
50.8: Taw pirdeysi matan de7ees; yaatin, tana mootey oonee? Ane taara mootetanaw eqo!
50.9: Ubbaa Haariya Goday tana maaddees; yaatin, ta bolla pirdey oonee? Enti ubbay ma7oda cimana; enta bili maana.
50.10: Hinte giddofe Godaa yayyey, iya aylliya qaalas kiitetey oonee? Dhuman hemeteynne poo7oy baynay I oonee? He uray Godaa sunthan ammaneto; ba Xoossan zempo.
50.11: Hinteno tama eethiya ubbato, laco xompe hintew shiisheysato, hinte eethida tama poo7uwan hemetite. Laco xompiyan simeretite; Hinte ta kushepe ekanaw de7ey haysa; hinte wolqaama meto seelan zin7ana.

51.1: Hinteno xillotethi kaalleysato, hinteno Godaa koyeysato si7ite. Hinte phalqetidi eketida shuchaa hinte booketidi keyida ollaa xeellite.
51.2: Hinte aawa Abrahaamenne hintena yelida Saaro xeellite. I barka de7ishin, taani iya xeegada anjasinne taybon darsas.
51.3: “Goday Xiyoonenne laaletida bessan de7iya asa ubbaa minthethana. I mela biitta Edene, kalotida biitta Godaa atakilte gadeda oothana. Yan ufaysinne hashshu guussi daana; galatinne mazmurey si7etana.
51.4: “Ta asaw; ta odiyaba si7ite; ta deriyaw, hinte haythaa taako zaarite. Higgey taape keyees; ta suure pirday kawotethatas poo7o gidana.
51.5: Ta xillotethay ellesidi shiiqana; ta atotethay matis; ta qesey kawotethatas suure pirdaa ehana. Yuushoy abban teqetida biittati ubbay tanan ammanetidi naagana; taani enta ta wolqan ashshanaysa ufaysan naagana.
51.6: Pude dhoqu gidi salota xeellite; duge sa7aaka xeellite. Saloti cuyada laaletidi dhayana; sa7i afilada wurana; iyan de7iya asa ubbay udunxeda hayqana. Shin ta atotethay merinaw daana; ta xillotethay wurenna.
51.7: “Hinteno xillotethaa ereysato, ta higgey hinte wozanan de7eysato, si7ite. Asaa bore yayyofite; enta cashshas dagammopite.
51.8: Bili ma7o, dorsa ikise guxuney meysada, enti meetetana. Shin ta xillotethay merinaw daana; ta atotethay yeletetha ubbaas gidana” yaagees.
51.9: Abeeti Godaw, denda! Denda! Godaa qesiyaw, wolqaa ma7a. Beni wodetaninne yeletethan hanidaysada denda; Ra7aaba geetetiya dawiya qanxerethidaynne caddiday nena gidikiyee?
51.10: Abbaanne gita ciimmo haatha melisiday nena gidikiyee? Ne wozidaysati pinnana mela ciimmo abba oge oothiday nena gidikiyee?
51.11: Goday wozidaysati yexishe simmidi Xiyoone yaana; merinaa ufaysay kallacha mela enta bolla uttana. Enti ufaysinne hashshu giyaba demmana; azzanoynne yeehoy entafe haakana.
51.12: Goday, “Taani, hintena minthethey tana; yaatin, hayqiya asenne maatada shulliya asa na7a yayyanaw hinte oonee?
51.13: Salota miccidanne sa7a baasuwa essida Godaa, hintena medhida Xoossaa dogideta. Enti hintena dhaysanaw un7ethiya asaa hanquwa gaason ubba gallas yashshan de7eeta. Shin hintena un7etheyisata hanqoy awun de7ii?
51.14: Di7etidaysati eeson birshetana; qashetida ollan hayqokona; koshatokona.”
51.15: “Taani Godaa, ne Xoossaa; guummana mela abba qaathey tana; ta sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa.
51.16: Ta qaala ne doonan wothiday, ta kushe kuyan nena genthiday, salota micciday, sa7aa baasuwa essiday, Xiyooneko, ‘Neeni ta ase’ ” yaagiday tana. Xoossa Hanqo Xuu7a
51.17: Neno, Godaa kushepe gandigarsiya hanqo xuu7aa ashshona uyida Yerusalaame, barka! Denda! Denda.
51.18: Iya yelida naytape iyo kaalethiya issoyka baawa; iya dichida naytape I kushiya oykidi efida issoyka baawa.
51.19: Ha nam7ubati ne qaada gididosona; hessati laaletethinne dhayo; koshinne mashshi ne bolla yaana; yaatin, nena ooni minthethanee?
51.20: Ne nayti giten gelida gen7eda oge gaxan kundidi labbanidosona. Enti Godaa hanquwaninne ne Xoossaa seeran kumidosona.
51.21: Hessa gisho, woyne ushshan gidonashin meton mathotidaysato, hinte haysa si7ite.
51.22: “Ba asaas mootetiya ne Goday, ne Xoossay yaagees; Heko, nena gandigarisiya, ta hanqo xuu7aa taani ne kushepe ekas; neeni zaarada he mathoyiya ushsha uyaka.
51.23: Taani hessa nena un7ethiya asaa kushen wothana; Enti neeko, ‘Nuuni ne bollara hemetidi aadhana mela zaqulla’ ” yaagidosona. Neeni enti aadhana gakanaw ne zokuwa entaw biittadanne ogeda oothadasa.

52.1: Neno Xiyoone, barka; barka, minotethi afilada ma7a. Neno geeshsha katame, Yerusalaame, ne boncho ma7uwa ma7a. Hizape guye qaxaretonaynne tuni ne giddo gelenna.
52.2: Neno, di7etida Yerusalaame, ne baana qoqofa; dendada ne araata bolla utta. Neno Xiyoone asaw, ne qoodhen qashetida santhalaata birsha.
52.3: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Hinte kase gatey bayna bayzetideta; ha77i qassi miishe immonna coo wozetana.
52.4: Goday haysada yaagees: Ta asay koyro bete asi gididi Gibxe bis; guyepe Asooreti ta asaa coo un7ethidosona.
52.5: Xoossay haysada yaagidi odees: Ta asay gatey bayna coo di7etidi bin, taw haysan aybe de7ey? Enta haareysati toochoosona; ta sunthay ubba wode cayetees.
52.6: Hessa gisho, ta asay ta sunthaa erana; he gallas haysa odey tana gideysa enti erana; ee, I tana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
52.7: Lo77o mishiraacho ehiya, sarotethaa awaajiya, atotethi odiya, Xiyooneko, “Ne Xoossay kawotis” yaagishe deriya bollara yaa tohoti waani lo77oona.
52.8: Ne katamaa naageysati banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, ufaysan issife yexoosona. Goday Xiyoone simmiya wode enti banta ayfen be7ana.
52.9: Hinteno Yerusalaamen laaletida bessato, issife ufaysan yexite; Goday ba asaa minthethis; Yerusalaame wozis.
52.10: Goday ba geeshsha qesiya kawotethata ubbaa sinthan qoncisis. Biitta gaxaa gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay nu Xoossaa atotetha be7ana.
52.11: Hinteno Godaa miishiya tookeysato, shaaketite, shaaketite, yaape keyite. Tunabaa bochofite; iya giddofe keyite; hintena geeshshite.
52.12: Shin hinte keyishe eeson keyeketa; woyko goodetidi beeketa. Goday hintefe sinthe aadhidi kaalethana; Isra7eele Xoossay guyera gididi hintena naagana. Waaye Ekiya Aylle
52.13: “Heko, ta aylley akeekan oothana; I bonchetidi, dhoqu dhoqu gaana; daro gitatana.
52.14: Iya som7oy asa ubbaafe, iya medhoy asa naytape aadhidi qohetis; iya be7idi daro asay dagammidosona.
52.15: Shin ha77i daro kawotethati ubbay iyaban malaaletana; iya gaason, daro kawoti banta doona oykana. Enti bantaw odetiboonnaba be7ana; si7iboonaba akeekana” yaagees.

53.1: Nuuni odidaba ooni ammanidee? Godaa qesey ooddes qoncidee?
53.2: I iya sinthan mela biittan aacida duruma mela; xapho yeddida dola mela diccis. Nuuni iya loythi xeellonna mela mali woyko teemi baawa. Nuuni iyako shiiqonna mela cuchu mal7o gidenna.
53.3: I asan kadhetis, ixetis; I metopenne azzanope shaaketi eronna asi gidis. Asi iya be7anaape gidi ba som7uwa wora zaariya asada kadhetis; nuuni iya bonchibooko.
53.4: I tuma nu waayiya baw ekis; qassi nu daabura tookis. Shin nuuni, I Xoossan deshetidi kundidadanne madunxidaada qopida.
53.5: Shin I nu nagaraa gisho, cadetidi madunxis; nu qohuwa gisho shocetidi liiqis. Iya seeran nuuni saro demmida; iya madunthan nuuni paxida.
53.6: Nuuni ubbay oge balida dorsada wora bida; nu ubbay nu ogiya ogiya bida. Shin Goday nu ubbaa naaquwa iya bolla wothis.
53.7: I un7etis; qohetis; shin ba doona dooybeenna. Shukanaw efiya urge dorsada laagetis; ba ikisiya meediya uraa sinthan si77i giya dorsa mela aykoka pogibeenna.
53.8: Enti iya un7ethoninne geella pirdan efidosona; I ta asaa nagaraa gisho shocetidi, de7on de7eyisata biittafe kichidaysa iya kochaafe ooni akeekidee?
53.9: Iya doonan bali bayna, I, iitaba oothonna, ba hayquwan iita asatara taybetis; iya duufoy dure asatara gidis.
53.10: Shin iya qohetethaynne iya un7etethay Godaa shene gidis. I bana nagara yarsho oothiya wode ba kochaa be7ana. Iya laythay aduqana; Godaa sheney iya kushen poletana.
53.11: Ba shempuwa waayiyape guye, I de7o poo7o be7ana; ufaytana. Ta xillo aylley ba eratethan darota xillisana; enta qohuwaka tookana.
53.12: Hessa gisho, taani iya gishuwa gita asata giddon immana; minotara I di7uwa shaaketana. I ba shempuwa hayqos aathidi immidi, iitatara paydetis. I daro asaa nagaraa tookis; geellatas gaannatis.

54.1: Naate, yelonna maynthe, yexa! Naate, iqeta eronnaare, ufaysan ilila! Azinara de7iya maccase naytape barka de7iya maccase nayti darana.
54.2: Ne dunkaaniya bessaa dalgisa; dunkaaniya gesheta piddi oothada micca; xuumisopa; wodoruwa adussa; dhishiya mintha.
54.3: Neeni ushachinne haddirsi dalgana; ne kochati kawotethata laattana; baysatida enta katamatan keexidi daana.
54.4: “Yayyofa; neeni yeellataka; dagammofa; neeni kawuyaka. Ne yalagatetha yeella neeni dogana; ne am7etetha boriya hizape guye hassayaka.
54.5: Ne azinay nena Medhidaysa; iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa. Isra7eele Geeshshay nena Wozidaysa; I biitta ubbaa Xoossaa geetetana.
54.6: Azini aggin, dogetada azzaniya maccasada, yalagatethan azina soope keyida, maccasada neeni hanada de7ishin, taani Goday nena zaarada xeegas.
54.7: “Guutha wode taani nena aggas, shin gita qadhen taani nena zaarada ehana.
54.8: Suulliya hanqon taani ta som7uwa neepe guutha wodes genthas. Shin merinaa maarotethan taani new qadhetana” yaagees nena woziya Goday.
54.9: “Haysi taw Nohe wodiya mela; he wode taani dhayo haathan zaarada sa7aa dhaysike gada caaqidaysada, zaarada ne bolla hanqetonna melanne seeronna mela taani caaqas.
54.10: Dereti qaxanaw, zumati banta bessaafe kichanaw danda7oosona; shin ta merinaa siiqoy neepe shaaketenna; ta sarotetha caaqoy neepe kichenna” yaagees new qadhetiya Goday.
54.11: “Neno, metootida katame, gotey yaanne haanne shocidaare, minthethiyabay dhayidare, Heko, taani nena boncho shuchan alleeqisada keexana; ne baasuwa sanpare shuchan hiixana.
54.12: Ne shucha gimbiya qustiya zo7o inqo shuchan, ne pengiya phooliya al7o shuchan, ne dirsa boncho shuchan gimbana.
54.13: Ne nayti ubbay Godaape tamaarana; ne nayta sarotethay darana.
54.14: Neeni xillotethan minnada eqana; geneynne un7ethoy neepe haakana. Nena yashisiyaba deenna; dagami neeko shiiqenna.
54.15: Nena olanaw dendey de7iko, hessi taape gidenna; nena qohanaw koyey de7iko, I kundana.
54.16: “Heko, huben tama hubidi, ba qopida ola miishiya qoxiya uraa taani medhas; dhaysana mela dhayseysa medhiday tana.
54.17: Nena qohanaw oosetida ay miisheyka ne bolla oothenna; nena mootiya inxarsa ubbaas ne zaaro immana. Godaa aylleta laatay haysa; taape enti ekiya xillo haysa” yaagees Goday.

55.1: Hinteno, saamotidaysato, ubbay taako haa yiite; miishey baynaysato, haa yiite. Shammidi miite; haa yidi, miishe qanxonna coo woyne ushshinne maathi shammite.
55.2: Kathi gidonnabaas hinte miishiya ayis kesseetii? Kalsonnaban hinte wolqaa ayis wurseetii? Ane tana si7ite, taani odeysa hayzite; lo77o kathaa miite; lo77o kathan hinte asatethaa ufaysite.
55.3: “Hinte haytha taako zaaridi tana si7ite; de7on daanaw ta odeysa si7ite; taani Dawitas gelida ufaysa qaalan hintena anjana.
55.4: Heko, taani iya kawotethatas marka, kaaletheysanne halaqa oothas.
55.5: Goday, ne Xoossay, Isra7eele Geeshshay nena bonchida gisho, neeni eronna kawotethata xeegana; nena eronna kawotethati ellesidi neeko yaana.”
55.6: “Goday bentiya wode iya koyite; matan de7iya wode iya xeegite.
55.7: Iita asi ba ogiyape simmo; nagaranchoy ba qofaa aggo. Godaako simmo, ika iya maarana; I nu Xoossaako simmo, iyaw atto gaana.
55.8: Ta qofay hinte qofaa mela, ta ogey hinte ogiya mela gidenna” yaagees Goday.
55.9: Saloti sa7aape dhoqeysada, ta ogey hinte ogiyape, ta qofay hinte qofaape dhoqees.
55.10: Irinne shachi salope wodhidi, biitta laakisidi, kathi dolana melanne ayfana mela ootheysada, zereysas zerethi, meysas kathi immonna guye salo simmenna.
55.11: Ta doonape keyiya qaalay hessa mala; I taani halchidaysa polonnanne ta kiittidaysa oothonna taako coo simmenna.
55.12: “Hinte ufaysan keyana; saron moyzetana; deretinne zumati hinte sinthan ufaytidi yexana; bazzo mithati ubbay banta kushiya baqana.
55.13: Aguntha gisho xiidda, gom7ore gisho xaythi dolana. Hessi Godaa qofisiyabaanne merinaw dhayonna malla gidana” yaagees Goday.

56.1: “Suure pirdaa naagite; xillo oothite; ta atotethay ellesidi yaana; ta xillotethay matan qoncana.
56.2: Haysa oothiya uray, Sambaata tunisonna bonchiya uraynne ba kushey iitabaa oothonna mela teqiya uray anjetidaysa” yaagees Goday.
56.3: Godaako shiiqida bete asi, “Goday tana ba asaape shaakana” goopo; shuufay, “Taani melida mithi” goopo.
56.4: “Ta Sambaata bonchiya, tana ufaysiyaba dooreynne ta caaquwa minthidi naagiya shuufatas,
56.5: entaw taani ta keethaninne ta dirsa gimbiya giddon enti hassayetiyaba immana. Enti macca na7anne adde na7a yelidi, demmiya bonchuwafe aadhiya sunthi taani entaw immana; taani merinaw dhayonna sunthi entaw immana.
56.6: Godaa haggaazanaw, Godaa dosanawunne iya aylle gidanaw bantana iyako shiishiya, sambaata tunisonna bonchiyanne ta caaqo qaala minthidi naagiya bete asata,
56.7: taani ta geeshsha zumaa bolla ehada ta woosa keethan enta ufaysana. Enti ta yarsho bessan shiishiya xuussa yarshoynne hara yarshoy eketana; ta keethay asa ubbay Xoossaa woossiya keethi geetetana” yaagees.
56.8: “Shiqidaysata bolla gujada harataka taani shiishana” yaagees Isra7eelepe laaletidaysata shiishiya, Ubbaa Haariya Goday. Xoossay Iitata Mootees
56.9: Hinteno bazzo do7ato, hinteno wora do7ato, ubbay haa yidi miite.
56.10: Isra7eele asaa naageysati qooqe; entaw eri baawa; enti ubbay boccanaw danda7onna butale kanata; enti zin7idi elmotoosona; dhisko dosoosona.
56.11: Enti midi kallonna yaramba kana mela; enti akeeki pacida henthancho. Enti ubbay banta oge bidosona; ubbay banta go77a xalaala koyoosona.
56.12: Enti, “Haa yiite; woyne ushsha ane uyoos; mathoyiya ushsha ane ganoos! Wontoy hachi mela gidana; hachifeka aadhidi lo77ana” yaagosona.

57.1: Xillo asi hayqees; shin hessa qopey baawa. Bantana Xoossas immida asay biittafe eketoosona, shin xillo asi iiti yaanape sinthatidi, eketeysa oonika akeekenna.
57.2: I, bidi sarotethi de7iya bessi gelees; suuretethan hemeteysati hayqidi, shempo demmoosona.
57.3: “Hinteno, maro nayto, hinteno laammiyanne laymatiya zareto, haa yiite.
57.4: Hinte oona qelqiseetii? Hinte oona boreetiii? Hinte inxarsaa oodde bolla kesseetii? Hinte geellatanne wordancho nayta gideketii?
57.5: Hinte wolaa garsaninne daashsha mitha garsan amon xuugeteeta. Hinte nayta zangaaraninne zaalla qophon shukidi yarsheeta.
57.6: Zangaaran de7iya liiqo shuchati hinte xoossata; Hinte entaw ushsha yarsho tigideta. Kathaa yarshoka immideta yaatin, taani haysan hanqetikina?
57.7: Zumaa huuphen hiixa yeggideta; yan yarshanaw keydeta.
57.8: Hinte pengiyafenne gobanetape soo baggara eeqa misileta essideta. Tana aggidi hinte arsa dalgisidi, yaa keydeta; entara caaqideta; yaatidi enta arsa dosideta; enta kalluwa be7ideta.
57.9: Zaytenne shitto ekidi Moloka geetetiya eeqako bideta; hinte kiitanchota haaho soo kiittideta; hari attoshin si7oole gakanaw wodhideta.
57.10: Hinte hara xoossata koyishe daaburideta; shin, ‘Ufaysi baawa’ gibeeketa. Hinte wolqay haa ooraxis; hessa gisho, labbanidi kundibeeketa.
57.11: “Hinte oona yayyidi, taw wordotidetii? Hinte tana qopibeketa; hinte wozanan qopibeketa. Hinte taw yayyonna ixiday taani daro wode si77i gida gisho gidennee?
57.12: Taani hinte xillotethaanne hinte oosota awaajana; shin hintena aykoka go77okona.
57.13: Hinte maado demmanaw waassiya wode hinte shiishida eeqati hintena ashshena! Enta ubbaa carkoy efana; issi toho carkiya carkoy enta punnidi dhaysana. Shin tana baw baqatidi attiya besse oothiya uray biitta laattana; ta geeshsha zumaa ekana” yaagees. Wozani Meqida Asaas Minthetho
57.14: “Baasite, baasite! Oge giigisite; ta asaa ogiyape dhubiyaba ubbaa diggite” yaagees Goday.
57.15: Merinaw de7eysi, gitay, dhoqa bessan de7eysi, iya sunthay Geeshsha geeteteysi, yaagees: “Kawuyida asaa ayyaana denthethanaw, meqida wozani de7eyisata koolanaw, kawuyidanne meqida ayyaani de7eysara daana.
57.16: Ta medhida asa ayyaanaynne shempoy, ta sinthan docconna mela taani merinaw mootike; ubba wode hanqetike.
57.17: Enta nagaraa gaason taani enta hanqetada seeras; ta som7uwa entafe genthas; shin enti ha77ika banta wozanaa qofan bidosona.
57.18: Taani enta ogiya be7as; shin taani enta pathana, kaalethana; iyawunne iya gisho yeekeyisata minthethana.
57.19: Isra7eele biittan yeekeyisata, mettershan galata kunthana. Haahoninne matan de7eysatas, saroy giddo; taani enta pathana” yaagees Goday.
57.20: Shin iitati urqanne silimo kessiya, wopu gaanaw danda7onna abba beeta mela.

58.1: Goday haysada yaagees: “Ne qaala dhoqu oothada waassa; guye goopa; ne qaala moyzeda dhoqu ootha. Ta asaas enta geellatetha, Yayqooba keethaas enta nagaraa oda.
58.2: Shin enti tana gallas gallas koyoosona; ta ogiya kaallanaw dosiya daanosona. Xillo oothidanne Xoossaa kiitaa aggiboonna asada enti tana suure pirda oychoosona; taako Xoossaako shiiqanaw dosiya daanosona.
58.3: Enti Godaako, ‘Nuuni xoomos, shin neeni ayis nuna xeellikii? Nuuni nunatethaa kawushida, shin neeni ayis eronnaada hanadi’ yaagosona. Goday zaaridi, ‘Heko, hinte xoomiya wode hintena ufaysiyabaa ootheeta; hinte oosanchota un7etheeta.’
58.4: Hinte ooshshaninne palaman xoomeeta; qadhey bayna iita deshethi dechanaw xoomeeta. Hessa mela xoomiya hinte woosay bolla saluwan si7etonna mela oothees.
58.5: Taani doorida xoomay haysa mela xoomee? Issi asi banatetha kawushey haysa mela gallasa xalaalanee? Taani koyiya xoomay asi ba huuphiya kaxida gasheda hoksana melanne bido tiyetidi kayo ma7o ma7idi utetheyee? Hinte hessa xooma gidi xeegetiyee? He xooma gallasay Godaa sinthan eketiyee?
58.6: “Taani dooriya xoomay haysa; suure pirda dhayo santhalaata billana melanne qambara menthidi un7etidaysata la77a kessana mela gidenneyee?
58.7: Taani dooriya xoomay koshatidaysa muzana mela, keethi bayna manqota soo ekana mela, kallotidaysa be7ada mayzana melanne maado koyiya hinte dabbuwafe hintena genthonna melasa gidennee?
58.8: Yaatiko, hinte poo7oy wonta xalqeda poo7ana; hinte paxotethay eeson yaana. Hinte xillotethay hintefe sinthara baana; Godaa bonchoy hintefe guyera gididi, hintena naagana.
58.9: He wode hinte xeegana; Goday hintew koyana. Hinte maado koyidi waassana; I, ‘Heko, taani haysan de7ayis!’ yaagana. “Hinte giddofe un7ethiya qambara diggiko, biradhen malleysanne iitaba odeteysa aggiko,
58.10: Koshatidaysa muziko, metootidaysata koshshiyaban maaddiko, he wode hinte poo7oy dhuman poo7ana; hinte qammay seeta gallas gidana.
58.11: Goday hintena ubba wode kaalethana; hintena mela biittan koshshiyaban kalsana; hinte xaphuwa xaalisana. Hinte haathe uyaa gannate melanne meli eronna haatha pulto mela gidana.
58.12: Ne asay beni laaletida bessata zaaridi keexana; daro wodepe kase baasetida baasota keexidi dhoqu oothana. Hinte ‘Laaletida gimbeta gimbeysatanne asay de7iya bessaanne wogga ogey de7iya katamata esseyisata geetetana.’
58.13: “Sambaata gallasaa boncho aggonna ixiko, ta geeshsha gallas hinte go77a yedetheysa aggiko, Sambaata ufaysinne bonchetida, Godaa gallasaa boncho gada xeegiko, hinte hinte ogiya boonna aggidi he gallasaa bonchiko, hintena ufaysiyabaa oothonnanne hadaba odetonna aggiko,
58.14: he wode hinte Godan ufaytana; taani hintena daro bonchetidaysata oothana; hinte aawa Yayqooba laata hinte maana mela oothana. Taani Goday haysa odas” yaagees.

59.1: Heko, Godaa kushey hintena ashshanaw qaammibeenna; iya haythay si7anaw tullibeenna.
59.2: Shin hinte nagaray hintefenne hinte Xoossaafe giddon shaahetethi medhis. I si7onna mela hinte nagaray iya som7uwa hintefe genthis.
59.3: Hinte kushey suuthan, hinte biradhey naaqon tunis; hinte doonay wordo odetees; hinte inxarsay iitaba zuuzumees.
59.4: Xillotethan mootey baawa; suuretethan pirdeyka baawa. Enti coo palaman ceeqetoosona; wordo odetoosona; cimo qanthatidi iitatethi yeloosona.
59.5: Enti shoosha phuuphulle haphoosona; shango haada daddoosona. He phuuphulleta miya asi hayqees; phuuphulliyafe issoy meqiko, iyape shooshi keyees.
59.6: Enti daddida shango haaday ma7os hanenna; iyara banta asatethaa kammanaw danda7okona. Enta oosoy iita; geella oosoy enta kushen kumis.
59.7: Enta tohoti iitabaa oothanaw woxoosona; xillo suuthi gussanaw eesotoosona. Enta qofay iita; enti bida bessa ubban qohoynne boshi de7ees.
59.8: Enti sarotetha oge erokona; enta ogiyan suure pirdi baawa. Enti banta ogiya geellayidosona; he ogiyara hemetiya oonika saro demmenna.
59.9: Hessa gisho, suure pirdi nuupe haakis; xillotethi nuuko shiiqenna. Nuuni poo7o koyoos, shin dhuma gidis; wagagga poo7o koyoos, shin sakana dhuman hemetoos.
59.10: Nuuni qooqeda dirsaa gimbiya bolla tattafoos; seeta gallas, sa7i lem7in hemetiyada dhubetoos; wolqara de7iya asaa giddon nuuni hayqida asa mela gidida.
59.11: Nuuni ubbay babanthada waassos; holleda kayotidi oolos. Nuuni suure pirda koyida, shin demmibooko; atotethi koyida, shin I nuupe haakis.
59.12: Nu balay ne sinthan daris; nu nagaray nu bolla markatees. Nu naaqoy nuura de7ees; nu qohuwa nu eroos.
59.13: Nuuni makallidi, Godaa kadhida; nu Xoossaa aggidi guye simmida. Geellatethinne gene odetida; nuuni wordo qanthatidi wordo yelida.
59.14: Suure pirdi guye sugetis; xillotethi nuupe haakis. Tumatethi dabaaban dhubetees; ammanetethi gelanaw besse dhayis.
59.15: Tumatethi awunka bentenna; iitatethafe haakiya asi qohos aadhidi imetees; Goday suure pirdi baynaysa be7idi azzanis.
59.16: Un7eteyisata maaddiya asinne entaw gaannatiya asi baynaysa Goday be7idi malaaletis. Hessa gisho, iya qesey iyaw atotethi ehis; iya xillotethay iya katisidi oykis.
59.17: I, xillotethi tiran wothiya ola miisheda ma7is; ba huuphiyan atotetha barneexa wothis; halo kessi ma7oda, hanqo afilada ma7is.
59.18: I entaw enta oosuwada oosuwada zaarana; hanquwa ba morketas, seera baara eqeteysatas ciggana; yuushoy abban teqetida biittatas enta oosuwada immana.
59.19: Godaa peenoy wolqaama goteda di77ishe yaana gisho, wuloha baggan de7eysati Godaa sunthaas yayyana; doloha baggan de7eysati iya bonchana.
59.20: “Xiyoonesinne Yayqooba zeretha giddon banta nagarape simmeyisata Wozeysi yaana.
59.21: Taw entara de7iya caaqoy haysa: hinte bolla de7iya ta Ayyaanaynne taani hinte doonan wothida ta qaalay, hachife doomidi, merinaa gakanaw, hinte doonape, hinte nayta doonapenne hinte nayta nayta doonape shaaketenna” yaagees Goday.

60.1: Ne poo7oy yida gisho, dendada poo7isa; Godaa bonchoy ne bolla poo7ana.
60.2: Heko, dhumi sa7aa, sakana dhumi asaa kammana; shin Goday ne bolla dendana; iya bonchoy ne bolla poo7ana.
60.3: Kawotethati ne poo7uwako, kawotika ne wonta xolqethaako yaana.
60.4: Dhoqu gada ne yuushuwa xeella; ubbay issife neeko yaana. Ne adde nayti haahope yaana; ne macca nayti ba7etidi neeko yaana.
60.5: He wode neeni be7ada ufaytana; ne wozanay ufaysan noocu gaana. Abbaa bolla de7iya shaloy neeko yaana; kawotethata duretethay nebaa gidana.
60.6: Midiyaamepenne Efa biittafe yida, gimale wudey ne biitta kammana. Worqanne ixaane eheysati Godaa galataa awaajishe Saabape yaana.
60.7: Qedaarenne Nebayoota dorsa wude ubbay, ta yarsho bessa neeko yaana; taani ta boncho keethaa bonchana.
60.8: “Haysati shaarada woyko holleda banta keethako paalleysati oonee?
60.9: Tuma yuushoy abban teqetida biittati, tanan ufaysi wothana; Isra7eele geeshshay, Goday hinte Xoossay, hintena bonchida gisho, Tarsesa markabeti sinthati keyidi, ne nayta haaho biittafe enta biraranne worqara Xoossaa bonchuwas ehana.
60.10: “Allaga biittati ne dirsaa gimbana; enta kawoti new oothana. Nena taani ta hanquwan kase shocas, shin ha77i ta qadhiyan nena maaras.
60.11: Ne pengeti ubba wode dooya daana; kawotethata duretethaynne enta kawoti di7etidi neeko yaana mela gallasinne qamma gordetokona.
60.12: New oothonna asi woyko kawotethi ubbay dhayana.
60.13: Ta keethaa bessaa loythana mela Libaanose boncho gidida zigay, xiiddaynne xaythay neeko yaana; taani ta tohuwa wothiya bessaa bonchana.
60.14: Nena un7ethida asaa nayti yidi new hokana; nena kadhida ubbay ne sinthan goyinnana. Enti nena, ‘Godaa Katame, Xiyoone, Isra7eele, Geeshsha Katame’ yaagidi xeegana.
60.15: “Haysafe kase oonika ne giddora kanthonna mela yegetadasanne ixetadasa. Shin ha77i taani nena merinaw gita oothana; yeletethaa ubbay nenan ufaytana.
60.16: Neeni kawotethata maatha uyana; kawota dhantha dhammana. Goday, nena Ashsheysa, wozeysanne Yayqooba wolqaama gideysa neeni erana.
60.17: Naase birata gisho worqa, birata gisho bira, mitha gisho naase birata, shucha gisho birata taani new ehana. Taani, sarotethi nena ayseysa, xillotethi new halaqa oothana.
60.18: Geellatethi ne biittan, dhayoy woyko boshi ne zawan si7etenna. Neeni ne dirsa gimbiya, ‘Atotethaa’, ne pengiya, ‘Galata’ yaagada xeegana.
60.19: Gallas awa poo7o, qamma ageena poo7o new koshshenna; Goday new merinaa poo7o, ne Xoossay new boncho gidana.
60.20: Awi nam7antho wullenna; ne ageenay poo7o aggenna. Goday new merinaa poo7o gidana; neeni yeekida gallasati new gidana.
60.21: Ne asa ubbay xillo gidana; enti biitta merinaw laattana. Enti taani ta bonchuwa qoncisanaw tokida puutota; ta kushe oosota.
60.22: Hinte giddon issi keethan de7iya guutha asata darsana; ubbaafe guuthaa gita kawotethi oothana. Taani Godaa; wodey gakiya wode, taani hessa eeson polana” yaagees.

61.1: Ubbaa Haariya Godaa Ayyaanay ta bolla de7ees; manqotas lo77oba odana mela Goday tana tiyis. Wozani meqidaysata koolana mela, di7etidaysata la77a kessana melanne qashetidaysata billana mela Goday tana kiittis.
61.2: Dosetida Godaa laytha odana mela, nu Xoossay halo keyana gallasaa awaajana mela, azzaneyisata ubbaa minthethana mela tana kiittis.
61.3: Xiyoonen kayoteysatas, bido gisho kallacha, yeeho gisho ufaysa zayte, azzano gisho galata ma7o immana mela tana kiittis. Enti Goday ba bonchuwas tokida xillo mitha geetetidi xeegetana.
61.4: Enti beni laaletida bessata zaaridi keexana; beni kundida bessata zaaridi essana. Enti daro yeletethaafe kase laaletidi onida katamata zaaridi keexana.
61.5: Allaga asati hinte dorsa wudiya heemmana; imathati hinte gadiya goyana enti hinte woyne gadiya naagana.
61.6: Asay hintena, “Godaa kahinetanne nu Xoossaa oosanchota” yaagidi xeegana. Hinte kawotethata duretetha maana; enta shaluwan hinte nashetana.
61.7: Ta asay banta yeella gisho nam7u kushe ekana; banta kawusha gisho laatan ufaytana. Hessa gisho, hinte enta biittan dako laattana; hinte ufaysay merinaa ufaysi gidana.
61.8: “Taani, Goday suure pirda dosayis; bonqenne iita ooso ixayis. Taani tuma enta oosuwa gatiya qanxana; Taani entara merinaw caaqana.
61.9: Enta kochati kawotethata giddon, enta nayti dereta giddon eretana; enta be7ida ubbay taani, Goday, enta anjida asi gideysa erana.”
61.10: Taani Godan daro ufaytayis; ta shempiya ta Xoossan hashshu gawusu. Ekeysi ba huuphen kallacha wotheysada, geliyara bana alleeqiseysada, I tana atotetha ma7o mayzis; xillotethi afila bollara gujis.
61.11: Biittafe mithi maati doleysada, gadey tokidaba dicheysada, Ubbaa Haariya Goday xillotethinne galata kawotetha ubbaa sinthan purcisana.

62.1: Xiyoone gisho, taani si77i giike; Yerusalaame xillotethay poo7oda, I atotethay wonta xalqeda keyana gakanaw taani si77i giike.
62.2: Kawotethati ne xillotethaa, kawoti ubbay ne bonchuwa be7ana. Goday sunthiya ooratha sunthan neeni xeegetana.
62.3: Neeni Godaa kushen lo77ida kawotetha kallacha gidana.
62.4: Neeni, “Dogetidaaro” geetetaka; ne biittiya, “Dhonthu” geetetuku. Shin neeni, “Ta ufaysay in de7iyaro”, ne biittiya, “Azina gelidaaro” geetetana. Goday nenan ufaytana; ne biittiyaka azini de7iyaro gidana.
62.5: Panthi geela7o ekeysada, ne nayti nena machana. Ekeysi geliyarin ufayteysada, ne Xoossay nenan ufaytana.
62.6: Neno Yerusalaame, ne dirsa gimbiya bolla wocheyisata taani wothas; enti gallasinne qamma si77i gookona.
62.7: Hinteno, Godaa qofiseysato, I, Yerusalaame keexana gakanawunne biitta ubban nashetida katama oothana gakanaw hinteka shempopite; iyaka shempisopite.
62.8: Goday ba ushacha kushiyaninne ba wolqaama qesiyan haysada yaagidi caaqis: “Taani nam7antho hinte katha hinte morketi maana mela oothike. Hinte daaburida hinte woyne ushsha allagati uyokona.
62.9: Shin banta kathaa cakidaysati midi Godaa galatana; woyne maxeysati ta keethaa dabaaban uyana.
62.10: Aadhite! Pengera keyidi biite! Asaas oge giigisite! Wogga oge kessite. Shuchaa diggite; kawotethati ogiya demmana mela malla essite.
62.11: Goday sa7a gaxas haysada yaagidi awaajis: ‘Xiyoone asaas haysada yaagite; heko, hintena Ashsheysi gakis! Iya gatey iyara de7ees; I immiya woytoy iya sinthan de7ees’ yaagite.
62.12: Hinte, ‘Goday Wozida Geeshsha asata’ geetetidi xeegetana. Yerusalaamey, ‘Koyetiyaronne Yegeta Attaboona Katamiw’ ” geetetana.

63.1: Edoome biittan, Baasora katamaape zo7o ma7o ma7idi yey haysi oonee? Boncho ma7o ma7idi ba wolqaa minotethan sinthe hordofey oonee? “Xillo odeteynne ashshiya wolqi de7ey tana” yaagees Goday.
63.2: Woyne gum7iyason woyne yedhiya asa ma7oda ne ma7oy ayis zo77idee?
63.3: “Taani woyne gum7iyason woyniya tarka yedhas; kawotethatape issi asika taara baawa. Taani enta ta hanquwan yedhas; ta yiluwan enta dirxerethas. Enta suuthay ta ma7uwa bolla dharcetin, ta ma7o ubbay iitis.
63.4: Taani ta asaa woziya gallasaynne enta morketa halo keyiya laythay gakis.
63.5: Taani be7as, shin tana maaddiya issi asika demmabike; maaddey dhayida gisho, taani malaaletas. Hessa gisho, ta qesey taw atotethi ehis; ta hanqoy tana maaddis.
63.6: Taani ta hanquwan kawotethata yedhas; ta yiluwan enta dirxerethas; enta suuthaa biittan gussas” yaagees Goday. Woosanne Galata
63.7: Goday nuus oothida ooso ubbaa, Goday ba maarotethaaninne ba qadhiyan Isra7eele asaas oothida lo77o ooso ubbaanne iya sunthay galatetana mela bessida keehatetha ubbaa taani odana.
63.8: I, “Enti tuma ta asenne ta na7a gidiya gisho, taw wordotokona” yaagis. Hessa gisho, I enta ashsheysa gidis.
63.9: Enta waaye ubbaa I waayetis; iya Sinthaa Kiitanchoy enta ashshis. I enta ba siiquwaninne ba maarotan wozis; kase aadhida wodeta ubban I enta tookis.
63.10: Shin enti makallidosona; iya Geeshsha Ayyaana azzanthidosona. Hessa gisho, I simmidi, entaw morke gidis; enta olis.
63.11: Hessafe guye asay benibaanne ba aylliya Muse wode oothidaba qopidi, haysada yaagidosona: “Ba wudiya henthanchotara issife abba giddora kanthisida Xoossay awun de7ii? He wode ba Geeshsha Ayyaana enta giddon, wothida Xoossay ha77i awun de7ii?
63.12: Baw merinaa sunthu gidana mela enta sinthan haatha shaakidi, ba boncho wolqaama qesey Muses ushacha kushe gidana mela kiittidaysi awun de7ii?
63.13: Biitta bollara pari biyada enti dhubetonna ciimmo haatha giddora pinthidaysi awun de7ii?” yaagidosona.
63.14: Zangaara wodhiya meheda, Godaa Ayyaanay entaw shempo immis. Ne sunthay bonchetana mela hessada oothada ne asaa kaalethadasa.
63.15: Abeeti Godaw, salora duge xeella; neeni de7iya geeshshinne boncho gidida araatape be7a. Ne qinaateynne ne wolqay anee? Ne maarotaynne ne qadhey nuupe haakis.
63.16: Abrahaamey nuna eronna ixikoka, Yayqoobi nuna akeekona ixikoka, abeeti Godaw, neeni nu aawa; benipe doomidi, ne sunthay nuna wozeysa.
63.17: Abeeti Godaw, nuuni ne ogiyape dhayanaadanne new yayyonnaada nu wozanaa ayis muumisadii? Godaw, ne aylleta gisho, ne laata gidida kochata gisho, nuuko simma.
63.18: Ne geeshsha asay ne keetha guutha wodes laattidosona; shin ha77i nu morketi iya yedhidosona.
63.19: Nuuni benipe nebaa; shin enta neeni haarabaaka; ne sunthanka enti xeegetibookona.

64.1: Abeeti Godaw, salota daakada duge wodha; dereti ne sinthan kokoro.
64.2: Tami eexidi haathe pentiseysada duge wodhada, ne suntha ne morketa erisa; kawotethataka ne sinthan kokorsa.
64.3: Kase nuuni naagiboonna malaatata neeni oothida wode wodhadasa; dereti ne sinthan kokoridosona.
64.4: Benipe doomidi, nena ammanetidi, naageysatas malaatata oothiday neepe attishin, hara Xoossi asa haythi si7ibeenna; asa ayfey be7ibeenna.
64.5: Ufaytidi xillotethi ootheysatanne ne ogiya qopeyisata neeni maaddadasa. Shin nuuni nagara ooso aggonna ixida wode neeni hanqetadasa; nuuni waanidi attanee?
64.6: Nuuni ubbay tuna asi gidida; nu xillotetha ooso ubbay tuna curqa mela. Nu ubbay boncoda qoletida; nu nagaray nuna carkoda pitidi efis.
64.7: Neeni ne sinthaa nuupe genthadasa; nu nagaray nuna dhaysana mela aggadasa. Ne sunthaa xeegey deenna; nena minthidi oykanaw koyey baawa.
64.8: Gidoshin, abeeti Godaw, neeni nu aawa; nuuni urqa; ne urqa medhadasa; nuuni ubbay ne kushen medhetida.
64.9: Abeeti Godaw, daro hanqetofa; nu nagaraa merinaw qopofa. Nuuni ubbay ne ase gidiya gisho, nuna be7a.
64.10: Ne geeshsha katamati mela biitta gididosona; Xiyoone katamay mela biitta, Yerusalaamey baysa gidis.
64.11: Nu aawati iyan nena galatida geeshshinne lo77o gidida nu xoossa keethay taman xuugetis; nu lo77o bessa ubbay laaletis.
64.12: Abeeti Godaw, neeni haysa ubbaa be7ashe si77i gaanee? ha ubbay hanin, nuuko simmikii? Neeni si77i gada zawi bayna seeranee?

65.1: “Tana oychiboonaysatas qoncas; tana koyboonaysatas bentas. Ta sunthaa xeegiboonna kawotethas, ‘Yee! Yee!’ yaagada koyas.
65.2: Banta qofaa kaallidi, lo77o gidonna ogiyan hemetiya geella asaas gallas kumethi ta kushiya miccas.
65.3: Ha asay, ta sinthan atakilte gaden yarshishenne xuube yarsho bessan ixaane cuyisishe tana ubba wode hanqethoosona.
65.4: Enti duufon utteyisata, geema bessan aqeyisata, guduntho asho meyisata; enta xaaruwan, tuna asho cambi de7eyisata.
65.5: “Enti, ‘New yan de7a; taani neepe geeshshi gidiya gisho taako shiiqopa!’ yaagosona. Hessa mela asati siidhe tucciya cuyaa mela; gallas kumethi eexiya tama mela.
65.6: “Heko, ta sinthan xaafeti uttis; taani entaw zaarana si77i giike; enta seeranaw dendas.
65.7: Taani enta nagaraanne enta aawata nagaraa acuwa issife entaw qanxana. Enti deriya bolla ixaane cuyisidosona; zumata bolla tana cayidosona. Enti kase oothida oosuwa acuwa taani entaw qanxana” yaagees Goday.
65.8: Goday yaagees: “Iita woyne susa giddon lo77o woyne ayfey de7eysada, asay, ‘Iya giddon lo77o woyne ayfey de7iya gisho ubbaa wora holopite’ geysa mela, Taani ta aylleta haysada oothana; taani enta ubbaa dhaysike.
65.9: Taani Yayqoobape koche, Yihudape ta deriya laatteyisata kessana; ta dooridaysati iya laattana; ta aylleti yan daana.
65.10: Tana minthidi koyiya ta asaas, Saaroni dorsa wudey heemetiya bessi gidana; Akoora zangaaray miiza wudey allatiya bessi gidana.
65.11: “Shin hinteno, Godaa aggidi, ta geeshsha zumaa dogidaysato, ‘Qaada’ geetetiya eeqas gibira giigiseysato, hinte wursethaa eranaw ‘Saama’ geetetiya eeqas walaha woyne ushsha wancan kuntheysato,
65.12: Taani hinte wursethaa mashshas aathada immana; hinte ubbay goyretanaw hokana. Taani hintena xeegin koybeketa; odisin si7ibeeketa. Hinte ta sinthan iitabaa oothideta; taani dosonnaba doorideta.”
65.13: Ubbaa Haariya Goday yaagees: “Ta aylleti maana, shin hinte koshatana; ta aylleti uyana, shin hinte saamotana; ta aylleti ufaytana, shin hinte yeellatana.
65.14: Ta aylleti wozanape ufaytidi yexana, shin hinte wozanape kayotana; hinte ayyaanay meqida gisho, hinte zeleelidi yeekana.
65.15: Hinte, hinte sunthaa ta dooretida deriyas qangethi oothidi immana. Ubbaa Haariya Goday hintena wodhana; shin I ba aylleta dumma sunthan xeegana.
65.16: Kase metoti dogetida gishonne ta ayfiya sinthafe geemmida gisho he biittan anjo koyiya ubbay tuma Xoossaa sunthan woossana. He biittan caaqo caaqiya ubbay tuma Xoossaa sunthan caaqana. Ooratha Salonne Sa7a
65.17: “Heko, taani ooratha salotanne ooratha sa7a medhana; kaseba ubbay hassayetenna; qofetenna.
65.18: Shin taani medhiyaban merinaw ufaytitenne hashshu giite. Taani Yerusalaame ufaysasinne I asaaka galatan kumidaysata oothada medhana.
65.19: Taani Yerusalaamen ufaytana; ta asan hashshu gaana. Hizape guye yeehoynne un7a waasoy yan si7etenna.
65.20: “Yerusalaamen hizape guye, guutha wode de7idi hayqiya na7i, ba laytha wursonna hayqiya cima asi deenna. Xeetu laythara hayqiya uray, na7atethan hayqis geetetana; xeetu laythi gathonna hayqey, baadetida asada taybetana.
65.21: He wode asay keethe keexidi daana; woyne tokidi iya ayfiya maana.
65.22: Enti keexin hari deenna; enti tokin hari meenna. Ta asaa laythay mitha laythada aduqana; taani dooridaysati adussa wode banta kushe oosuwan ufaytana.
65.23: Enti coo daaburokona qaadi bayna na7a yelokona. Enti banta naytara Godan anjetida kochata gidana.
65.24: Enti tana xeeganaape sinthe, taani entaw koyana; enti buroo haasayonna de7ishin taani enta si7ana.
65.25: Suudhumeynne dorsa urgey issife heemetana; gaammoy boorada kale maana; baani shooshas kathi gidana. He wode ta geeshsha zumaa bolla enti qohetokonanne dhayokona” yaagees Godaa Xoossay.

66.1: Goday yaagees; Saloy ta araata, sa7i ta tohoy yedhiya besse. Yaatin hinte taw keexiya keethay, ay mela keethee? Ta shempana bessay awusee?
66.2: Haysa ubbaa ta kushey oothis; entika hanidosona. Shin taani bana ziqi oothiya uraa, ba ayyaanan meqida uraanne ta qaalan kokoriya ura xeellana.
66.3: Korma yarshey ase wodhiya asa mela; urge dorsi yarshey kana yarshiya asa mela; katha yarsho yarshey, guduntho suuthi yarshiya asa mela; qofiso ixaane cuyisey eeqa goyinniya asa mela. Asa ubbay baw injetiya oge dooridosona; enta shempoy enta tunatethan ufaytees.
66.4: Hessa gisho, taani enta metos aatha immana; enti yayyidaba enta bolla ehana. Taani xeegida wode oonika koybeenna; taani odiya wode oonika si7ibeenna. Enti ta sinthan iitabaa oothidosona; tana ufaysonnaba dooridosona.
66.5: Hinteno, Godaa qaalas kokoreysato iya qaala si7ite: “Hintena ixiya hinte ishati, ta sunthaa gisho, hintena kureysati, ‘Hinte ufaytin nuuni be7ana mela ane Goday boncheto’ ” yaagidosona; shin enti yeellatana.
66.6: Katamaape yaa waasuwa si7ite; xoossa keethafe keyiya girsaa si7ite. He girsay ba morketas enta oosuwada kushe zaariya Godaa girsaa.
66.7: “Iqetonna na7a yeliya maccas de7ii? Bannakonna adde na7a yeliya maccas de7ii?
66.8: Haysa melaba oone si7iday? Hessa melaba oone be7iday? Issi derey issi gallas yeletanaw danda7iyee? issi kawotethi qiphi zaaron medhetiyee? Xiyooney buroo iqethi oykonna, ellesada ba nayta yelasu.
66.9: Yelana wode gathiya taani enti yelanaada oothikinaayee? Yelanaada oothiya taani yeliya ulo gordaynaayee? Haysa giday tana, Godaa, ne Xoossaa.
66.10: Hinteno Yerusalaamo dosiya ubbaw, iira ufaytite; I gisho ufaysan noocu giite. Hinteno iw yeekiya ubbaw, iira ufaytite.
66.11: Hinte, iya minthethiya dhantha dhammidi kallana; I daro bonchuwafe loythi uyidi, ufaytana.”
66.12: Goday yaagees; “Taani iw sarotethaa shaafada darsana; iw kawotethata duretetha kixa shaafada ehana. Hinte hessa dhammana; I hashiyan tooketana; I ki7on uttidi baalotana.
66.13: Aayiya ba na7a minthetheysada taani hintena minthethenna; hinte Yerusalaamen minettana.
66.14: Hessa hinte be7iya wode hinte wozanay ufaytana; hinte meqethay maata mela aacana. Godaa kushey iya aylleta bolla de7eysin iya hanqoy iya morketa bolla de7eysi eretana.
66.15: Heko, Goday tamara yaana; iya para gaareti gote mela. Ba sheniya hanqon; ba seeraka tama lacon qoncisees.
66.16: Goday asho ma7ida ubbaa tamaninne mashshan pirdana; daroti Godaa mashshan hayqana.
66.17: “Banta eeqa goyinnanaw atakilte gade baanaw, bantana dummayeysatinne geeshsheysati; guduntho, ecerenne hara tunabata meyisata giddofe issuwa kaallidi beysati ubbay dhayana.
66.18: “Taani enta oosuwanne enta qofaa eriya gisho, kawotethatanne dumma dumma doonan odeteyisata, issife shiishana; enti shiiqidi, ta bonchuwa be7ana.
66.19: Taani enta giddon malaata oothana; entafe attidaysata giddofe ta gitatetha si7iboonanne ta bonchuwa be7iboona kawotethatako, Tarsesako, Liibeko, Liideko, Tubaalako, Yawaanakonne yuushoy abban teqetidi haaho biittatako kiittana; enti ta bonchuwa kawotethata giddon awaajana.
66.20: Isra7eele asay katha yarshuwa geeshsha miishen wothidi xoossa keethi eheysada, enti hinte ishata ubbaa kawotethata giddofe, paratan, para gaaretan, gimaletan, baqulotaninne caane gaaretan utisidi, Godaas imo oothidi ta geeshsha zumaa bolla Yerusalaame ehana.
66.21: Entafe issota issota kahinenne Leewe oothana” yaagees Goday.
66.22: “Taani medhida ooratha salotinne ooratha sa7i ta sinthan minnidi de7eysada, hinte kochaynne hinte sunthay minnidi daana.
66.23: Ageena xeerope bidi ageena xeero gakanaw, Sambaatape bidi Sambaata gakanaw asa ubbay ta sinthan goyinnanaw yaana.
66.24: Enti keyidi bishe, ta bolla makallida asaa aha be7ana. Enta miya guxuney hayqenna; enta xuuggiya tamay to7enna; enti asa ubbaas shaatiyaba gidana” yaagees Goday.

1.1: Biniyaame biittan, Anatoota kataman de7iya kahinetape issuwa gidida Kalqe na7aa Ermiyaasa qaalay haysa.
1.2: Amoone na7ay, Yihuda kawoy Iyosyaasi kawotida tammanne heedzantho laythan Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako yis.
1.3: Iyosyaasa na7ay, Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi kawotida laythatan Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako yis. Qassi Iyosyaasa na7ay, Sedeqiyaasi kawotin, tammanne issi laythi gakanawunne, ichashantho ageenan Yerusalaame asay di7etidi bida wodiya gakanaw Godaa qaalay iyako yis. Ermiyaasa Xeegetethaa
1.4: Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis:
1.5: “Neeni ne aaye ulon medhetanaape sinthe ta nena erayis. Ne yeletanaape sinthe ta nena dummayada wothas; kawotethatas nena nabe oothada shuumas” yaagis.
1.6: Taani, “Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, taani na7a gidiya gisho waatada odetaneko erike” yaagas.
1.7: Shin Goday, “ ‘Taani na7a goopa’; taani nena kiittiya bessaa bada ta kiita ubbaa asaas oda.
1.8: Taani nena ashshanaw neera de7iya gisho entaw yayyofa. Haysa odey Godaa” yaagis.
1.9: Goday ba kushiya yeddidi, ta doona bochidi, “Heko; taani ta qaala ne doonan wothas.
1.10: Shoddanawunne laallanaw, dhaysanawunne shira yegganaw, keexanawunne tokanaw, asaa bollanne kawotethata bolla ta nena hachi shuumas” yaagis.
1.11: Godaa qaalay taako, “Ermiyaasa, neeni ay be7ay?” yaagis. Taani zaarada, “Lawuze mitha xam7a be7ayis” yaagas.
1.12: Goday, “Neeni like be7adasa. Taka ta qaala polanaw haysada be7ayis” yaagis.
1.13: Zaaridi Goday, “Haraa ay be7ay” yaagis. Taani zaarada, “Issi pentiya xaaroy pudeha baggafe issi bagga gedi gidi uttidaysa be7ayis” yaagas.
1.14: Goday, “Pudeha baggafe dhayoy podhidi, biittan de7iya asa ubbaa bolla gukana.
1.15: Taani pudeha bagga kawotethatan de7iya asa ubbaa xeegana hanayis. Enta kawoti yidi, Yerusalaame geliya pengetan, dirsa yuushuwaninne Yihuda katamata ubban banta araata wothana.
1.16: Yihuda asay tana aggidi, iita oothida gisho, hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisida gishonne banta kushen oothida xoossata goyinnida gisho ta pirdaa enta bolla ehas.
1.17: “Shin neeni giigeta! Dendada taani nena kiittiyaba ubbaa entaw oda. Entaw yayyofa; ne entaw yayyiko, ta nena enta sinthan gujada yashisana.
1.18: Hachi ta nena ha biitta bolla, Yihuda kawota bolla, halaqata bolla, kahineta bollanne ha asaa bolla gimbetida katamada, birata tuussadanne naase biratan dirida dirsada oothada minthas.
1.19: Enti neera oletana; shin ta ashshanaw neera de7iya gisho nena xoonokona. Haysa odey Godaa” yaagis.

2.1: Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis:
2.2: “Bada Yerusalaame asa haythan haysada yaagada awaaja. Ne na7atethan taw ay mela ammanetidako, ne buroo meddan de7iya wode tana ay mela siiqidaako, ta akeekayis. Neeni mela biittan zerethi zereti eronna biittan tana kaalladasa.
2.3: He wode Isra7eeley Godaas geeshshi; iyaw bayra katha mela. Iyape mida ubbay bala gidoosona; enta bolla dhayoy yis. Hessa odey Godaa” yaagees.
2.4: Hinteno, Yayqooba nayto, Isra7eele zare, ubbay Godaa qaala si7ite!
2.5: Goday yaagees; kase hinte aawati taape ay bala demmidi taape haakidi bidonaa? Enti pathonna eeqata goyinnidi pathonnaba gididosona.
2.6: Enti, “Nuna Gibxefe kessida, mela biittan kaalethida, aaforanne mela biittara aathida, koshinne sakana dhumi de7iya biittara pinthida, oonika aadhonanne de7onna bessara kaalethida Goday awun de7ii?” yaagidi oychibookona.
2.7: Hinte he biitta ayfiyape lo77uwa maana mela ta hintena aradda biitta ehas. Shin hinte yidi, ta biitta tunisideta; ta laata iisideta.
2.8: Kahineti, “Goday awunee?” yaagidi oychibookona. Ta higgey enta kushen de7iya asati tana eribookona. Deriya ayseysati ta bolla makallidosona. Nabeti Ba7aale eeqa sunthan tinbite odidi pathonna eeqata goyinnidosona.
2.9: “Hessa gisho, ta hintera buroo mootetana; hinte nayta naytara mootetana.
2.10: Ane wuloha bagga bidi, yuushoy abban teqetida biitta Qophiroosa xeellite; doloha bagga bidi Qedaare biitta ase kiittidi xomoosite. Haysa melabay haysafe kase hanidaako be7ite.
2.11: Enti tuma xoossata gidonna ixikoka ba xoossata laammida derey oonee? Shin ta asay entaw boncho gidida tana pathonna eeqatara laammis.”
2.12: “Saloto, haysan malaaletite; dagammidi kokorite” yaagees Goday
2.13: Ta asay nam7u nagara oothidosona; hessika, de7o pulto gidida tana aggis. Haathe oykanaw danda7onna, xoo7e ollata bantaw bookidosona.
2.14: “Isra7eeley shametida aylleyee? woyko son yeletida aylleyee? Yaatin, morketi ayis do7oda shankatoona?
2.15: Iya morketi gaammoda iya bolla gudoosona. Enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi daarosona. Enti iya biitta kaysi kessidosona; iya katamati laaletidi asi bayna soo gididosona.
2.16: Hesaa bollaka Mempisanne Xafinaasa asati iya huuphiya meedidosona.
2.17: Neno Isra7eele, oge ubban nena kaalethiya, Godaa ne Xoossaa aggada haysa ne bolla ehiday nena gidikii?
2.18: Nayle shaafape haathe uyanaw Gibxe buussi nena ay maaddanee? Efraxiisa shaafape haathe uyanaw Asoore buussi nena ay maaddanee?
2.19: Hiza ne iitatethay nena seerana; ne tana kaddidaysi ne bolla pirdana. Ne tana Godaa ne Xoossaa aggidaysi ay mela iitanne camo gidiyako akeeka be7a. Ne taw yayiya yashshay baawa” yaagees Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay.
2.20: “Ta ne qambara daro wodepe kase menthas; ne qashuwa duuthas. Neeni, ‘Ta nena goyinnike’ yaagadasa. Dere bollanne daashsha mitha garsan laymatanaw zin7adasa.
2.21: Ta nena dooretida zerethafe ekada, lo77o woyne gaden tokas. Yaatin, waanada, guye simmada, woran dolida, iita woyne gidadii?” yaagees Goday.
2.22: “Ne sangeenora meecetiyakoka, saamunan gorpetiyakoka ne qitay ta sinthana.
2.23: Neeni waanada, ‘Ta tunabike; Ba7aale eeqa goyinnabike’ gay? Neeni zangaaran hanidaba xeella; ne oothidaba akeeka. Neeni yaanne haanne woxiya ziita keyida gimale mela.
2.24: Neeni bazzo meezetida, ziita wode carko singethiya hare mela. I amoy dendin, ooni iyo teqanaw danda7ii? Iya baw koyada gakiya gisho ay adde hareyka iyo demmanaw daaburenna.
2.25: Neno, Isra7eele, ne caammay wurana gakanaw ne kottonoy melana gakanaw hara xoossata geedo woxofa. Shin neeni, ‘Atto, hessi tana maaddenna. Taani imatha xoossata dosas; taani enta goyinnana’ yaagadasa.
2.26: “Kaysoy oyketida wode yeellateysada Isra7eele asay yeellatidosona; enti, enta kawoti, enta halaqati, enta kahinetine enta nabeti ubbay yeellatana.
2.27: Enti mithaako, ‘Ne ta aawa’ yaagosona; shuchaa, ‘Tana ne yeladasa yaagosona. Enti banta som7uwa aggidi, banta zokuwa zaaridosona. Shin enti meto wode nuna ashsha!’ yaagosona.
2.28: Shin hinte, hintew medhida xoossati awun de7oona? Hinte meton geliya wode hintena ashshanaw danda7iko dendidi hintena asho. Hinteno, Yihuda asaw, hinte xoossati hinte katamata mela daro” yaagees Goday.
2.29: “Hinte taara ayis mootetetii? Hinte ubbay taw makallideta.
2.30: Ta hintena coo seeras; hinte hinte oosuwape simmiyaba gideketa. Koshatida gaammoda hinte mashshay hinte nabeta mis” yaagees Goday.
2.31: Hinteno, ha wodiya yeletaw, Godaa qaala si7ite. Ta Isra7eeletas bazzo woyko sakana dhuman de7iya biitta gidadinaayee? Yaatin, ayis ta asay, “Nuuni nu sheneda baana; neeko simmoko” yaagidona?
2.32: Geela7iya ba alleequwa, mushuriya ba ma7uwa dogay? Shin ta asay tana tayboy bayna gallas dogidosona.
2.33: Neeni ne laggethota geedo wothaa waanada meezetadii? Daro iita maccasati ne ogiya tamaarosona.
2.34: Menthidi gelishin oykida asaa suuthan gidonashin xillo manqota suuthan ne ma7oy iitis. Neeni hessa ubbaa oothadaka,
2.35: Neeni, “ ‘Taani xillo; tuma Goday ta bolla hanqetenna; taani nagara oothabike’ giya gisho ta ne bolla pirdana.
2.36: Neeni ne ogiya laammashe ayis woxay? Nena Asoorey yeellaydaysada Gibxey yeellayana.
2.37: Goday ne ammaneteyisata kawushida gishonne ne entafe maade demmonna gisho ne huuphiya oykada yaape keyana” yaagees Goday.

3.1: “Issi asi ba machiw yeddin, iya bada hara azina geliko, he addey iyo zaarii? Zaariko he biittay tuna gidennee? Shin ne laymatanaw koyada daro laggethotara de7adasa; ha77i neeni taako simmanee? yaagees Goday
3.2: Dhoqu gada aykoy bayna dereta xeella. Laymatanaw ne zin7aboona bessi de7ii? Arabe asi mela biittan utteysada, neeni laggethota naagada oge doonan uttadasa. Ne laymatethaninne ne iitatethan biitta tunisadasa.
3.3: Hessa gisho, torche iray teqetis; sila irayka bukonna ixis. Hessi haninka, new laymatetha medhoy de7ees; ne yeellatonna ixadasa.
3.4: Ha77i neeni, ‘Ta aawaw, ta na7atetha laggiyaw ne tana siiqasa.
3.5: Ne ubba wode yilotay? Ne hanqoy merinaw aggennee?’ yaagasa. Shin ne oothanaw danda7iya iita ubbaa oothaasa” yaagees Goday. Ammanetona Isra7eele
3.6: Kawa Iyosyaasa wode Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Ammanoy bayna Isra7eeley oothidaba ne be7adii? Iya dere bollanne daashsha mitha ubbaa garsi bada yan laymatasu.
3.7: Iya haysa ubbaa oothinka taako simmande gada qopas, shin simmabuuku. I michiya, ammanetona Yihudika hessa be7asu.
3.8: Ammanoy bayna Isra7eele daro wode laymatida gisho pirima immada iyo yeddas. Hessi haninka Isra7eele michiya, ammanetona Yihudi, yayyonnaysa ta be7as; iyaka keyada laymatasu.
3.9: Laymatethay iw laafaba gidiya gisho, mitharanne shuchara laymatada biitta tunisasu.
3.10: He ubban I michiya, ammanetona Yihudi simmidaba daanawusupe attishin, kumetha wozanape taako simmabuuku” yaagees Goday.
3.11: “Ammanetona Yihudape ammanoy bayna Isra7eeley xillo.
3.12: Bada pudeha baggan de7iya asaas haysada yaagada awaaja: ‘Ammanoy bayna Isra7eele, simma! Taani maaroti kumida Godaa gidiya gisho nena iita ayfen xeellike. Merinaw hanqetike’.
3.13: Gidoshin, ‘Taani Godaa, ta Xoossaa bolla makallas. Allaga xoossatara daashsha mitha garsan laymatas. Ne qaala kiitetabike’ gada ne qohuwa ammana” yaagees Goday.
3.14: “Hinteno, ammanetona asaw, ta hintew azina gidiya gisho simmite. Taani issi katamape issinno, issi yarape nam7a doora ekada Xiyoone ehana.
3.15: Ta wozanaada hintena heemmiya henthanchota hintew immana. Enti hintena eratethaninne akeekan heemmana” yaagees Goday.
