3.16: “He gallasatan hinte he biittan dariya wode asay, ‘Godaa caaqo Taabotiya’ gidi odetokona. I entaw qofetenna; hassayetenna; baynaysi entaw eretenna; harika oosetenna.
3.17: He wode enti Yerusalaame, ‘Godaa Araata’ gidi xeegana. Kawotetha ubbaafe asay Godaa sunthaa bonchanaw Yerusalaame shiiqana. Hessafe guye, enti banta wozanaa iitatethaa kaallokona.
3.18: He wode Yihuda asaynne Isra7eele asay gahetidi pudeha bagga biittafe ta hinte aawata laatisida biitta issife yaana” yaagees Goday.
3.19: “Ta hintena na7atho ekada, biitta ubbaafe lo77iyanne aradda biitta hintew immanaw koyas. ‘Ta aawaw’ gidi xeegananne tana kaallana gada qopas.
3.20: Shin Isra7eele asaw, hinte ba azinaas ammanetona machida taw ammanetibeketa” yaagees Goday.
3.21: Enti banta ogiya geellayida gishonne banta Xoossaa aggida gisho manqo zumatape Isra7eele asaa waasoynne yeehoy si7etees.
3.22: “Hinteno, ammanoy bayna asaw, taako simmite. Hinte ammanetana mela ta hintena pathana” yaagees Goday. Hinte, “Neeni, nu Godaa Xoossaa gidiya gisho neeko simmana.
3.23: Dereta bollanne zumata bolla eeqa goyinnoy tuma cimo. Tuma Isra7eele atotethay Godaa, nu Xoossaa.
3.24: Nu na7atethafe doomin, nu aawati daaburidi demmida, enta dorsaanne mehiya, enta maccanne adde nayta yeellayiya eeqati midi dhaysidosona.
3.25: Na7atethafe hachi gakanaw, nunne nu aawati Godaa nu Xoossaa bolla nagara oothida. Godaa nu Xoossaa qaala kiitetibooko. Hessa gisho, nuuni yeellan gufannanaw qassi kawushatethi afilada nuna kammo” yaagosona.

4.1: Goday yaagees, “Isra7eele asaw, simmiko, taako simmite. Hinte tana shaatiya hinte eeqata ta sinthafe diggiko, ta ogiyape kare keyonna ixiko,
4.2: tuman, suuretethaninne xillotethan, ‘De7o Xoossay eriya mela’ gidi caaqiko, he wode kawotethati iyan anjetananne iyan ceeqana.”
4.3: Goday Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaako haysada yaagees: “Hinte othe biitta goyite; aguntha bolla zeropite.
4.4: Hinteno, Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaw, hinte Xoossaas qaxaretite; hinte wozanaa shoohuwa diggite. Hessi hanonna ixiko hinte iitatethaa gisho, ta hanqoy tamada eexana; iya oonika toysanaw danda7enna” yaagees Goday. Pudeha Baggafe Dhayo Yaana
4.5: Yihudan awaajite; Yerusalaamen moyze punnite! Hinte qaala dhoqu oothidi haysada gidi waassite! Issife shiiqidi gimbetida katamatako yedhite.
4.6: Asay Xiyoone baana mela mallite! Hinte shempuwa ashshanaw gam7onna baqatite! Gam7ofite! Ta pudeha baggafe gadonne dhayo biitta bolla ehana hanayis.
4.7: Gaammoy worape keyeysada kawotethata dhayseysi ba bessaafe dendidi hinte biitta dhaysanaw yis. Hinte katamati laaletidi baysa gidana.
4.8: Hessa gisho, kayo ma7o ma7idi, “Woo! Woo!” gidi zeleelitenne yeekite. Godaa suulliya hanqoy nu bollafe kichibeenna.
4.9: “He wode kawanne halaqata wozanay til7ana; kahineti dagammana; nabeti hirgana” yaagees Goday.
4.10: Taani, “Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, mashshi enta qoodhen wodhiya wode ‘Hintew sa7i saro gidana’ yaagada ha asaanne Yerusalaame ayis cimmay” yaagas.
4.11: He wode ha asaasinne Yerusalaames haysada yaagidi odetana: “Mela biittan de7iya aykoy bayna dhoqa deretape michiya carkoy ta asaa bolla carkana; hessi kathi geeshshanaasa gidenna.
4.12: Ta kiitan wolqaama carkoy carkana; ta enta pirdana” gees.
4.13: Heko, morkey shaarada keyees. Iya para gaareti gote mela; iya parati arganthafe aadhidi eesotoosona. Nuna ayye! Nu dhayida!
4.14: “Neno Yerusalaame, attana mela ne wozanaa meeccada iitatethaafe geeya. Iita qofay ne wozanan awude gakanaw gam7anee?
4.15: Daane katamaapenne Efreema zumaape yidaysati iitabaa awaajosona.
4.16: Yihuda katamata bolla ola awaajiya olanchoti haaho biittafe yuussaa bolla de7oosona gidi kawotethatas odite; Yerusalaameska awaajite.
4.17: I ta bolla makallida gisho, gaden de7iya kathaa naageysada olanchoti Yihuda yuushuwa teqana” yaagees Goday.
4.18: Yihuda asaw, hinte hanoynne hinte oosoy haysa ubbaa hinte bolla ehis. Haysi hintew seera. I ay mela cammi! Hinte wozanaa ay mela caddi!
4.19: Tana ayye! Ta haysa waata danda7ane! Ayye ta wozanaa! Ta wozanay kokorees; ta si77i gaanaw danda7ike. Taani moyze punonne ola girsi si7ida gisho si77i gaanaw danda7ike.
4.20: Dhayoy dhayo bolla yees; biittay kumethi dhayis. Ta dunkaaney kundis; ta shaqarayka laaletis.
4.21: Taani awude gakanaw ola malla be7anee? Awude gakanaw moyze puno si7anee?
4.22: “Ta asay eeya; enti tana erokona. Enti qofi bayna nayta mela; entaw akeeki baawa. Enti iitabaa oothanaw cinca; shin lo77oba oothidi erokona” yaagees Goday.
4.23: “Taani sa7aa be7iya wode, sa7i aykoyka bayna baysa gididaysa be7as. Qassi salota xeelliya wode, poo7oy baynaysa xeellas.
4.24: Ta dereta xeelliya wode enti qaaxoosona; taani zumata be7iya wode yaa haa woxoosona.
4.25: Ta xeelliya wode asi baawa; salo kafoti ubbay paallidi baqatidosona.
4.26: Ta xeelliya wode aradda biittay qaa7e gididaysa be7as. Godaa sinthaninne iya suulliya hanquwa sinthan he biitta katamati laaletidosona.
4.27: “Biittay dhayana; shin ta iya kumethi dhaysike.
4.28: Sa7ay yeekana; saloy dhumana. Taani odas; marsike. Taani qofa qachas; aggike” yaagees Goday.
4.29: Para asatanne donge asata waasuwan, asay katama ubbaafe baqatana. Baggati woxidi wora gelana, baggati zaalla bolla keyana. Katama ubbay baysi gidin de7iya asi dhayana.
4.30: Neno, dhayos attidaare ne waanay? Ne zo7o ma7uwa ayis ma7adii? Worqa alleeqo ayis wothadii? Ne ayfiya siphintha ayis tiyay? Neeni coo nena loythaasa; ne laggethoti nena kadhidosona; enti nena wodhanaw koyoosona.
4.31: Taani iqethi oykida maccasi waassiya waasuwa mela si7as. I waasoy koyro na7a yeliya maccasa waaso mela. He waasoy, Yerusalaamey shempo dhayada, ba kushiya miccada, “Tana ayye! Ta dhayas! Tana wodhanaw hanoosona!” yaagada waassiya waasuwa.

5.1: “Ane Yerusalaame ogiya bolla keyite; pudenne duge hemetite; iya yuushuwa xeellitenne akeekite; iya gutaranka koyite. Xillo pirdiyanne tuma koya issi asi hinte demmiko, ta Yerusalaame maarana.
5.2: Enti, ‘De7o Goday eriya mela’ gidi caaqikoka, wordo caaqoosona” yaagees Goday.
5.3: Abeeti Godaw, ne ayfeti tumaa xeellokonaayee? Ne enta shocadasa shin enta sakibeenna. Ne enta mentherethadasa shin enti simmonna ixidosona. Enti banta som7uwa zaallafe aathidi minthidi banta nagaraape simmonna ixidosona.
5.4: Hessafe guye, taani, “Haysati Godaa ogiyanne banta Xoossaa higgiya eronna gisho, manqonne eeya” yaagada qopas.
5.5: Hiza, ta gita asatako bada entaw odana. Godaa ogiyanne banta Xoossaa higgiya eroosona. Shin enti ubbay iya qambara menthidosona; iya qashuwaka duuthidosona.
5.6: Enta makallaynne enta kundethay daro gidiya gisho, gaammoy worape keyidi, enta wodhana. Suudhumey bazzofe keyidi, enta maana. Maahey enta katamata hokidi naagana. He katamatape keyiya ubbay puuzetana.
5.7: “Taani hinte nagaraa ayis atto go? Hinte nayti tana aggidi, wordo xoossatan caaqidosona. Taani enta muzada kalsas, shin enti laymatidosona; enta keethan aqidosona.
5.8: Enti dhiiketida korma parada, hara asa macho laggethanaw singethoosona.
5.9: Tuma ta ha oosota gisho, enta seeranaw bessikina? Haysa mela kawotethaa bolla ta haluwa keyikina?” yaagees Goday.
5.10: “I woyne gadiya giddo gelidi iissite, shin kumethi dhaysofite. Enti Godaaba gidonna gisho I tasheta karidi yeggite.
5.11: Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay kumethi kaddidosona” yaagees Goday.
5.12: Enti haysada gidi Godaa bolla wordo odetidosona: “I aykoka oothenna; qohiyabay aybika nu bolla yeenna. Morke mashshay woyko koshi nuna polo demmenna.
5.13: Nabeti carko mela; entan Xoossaa qaalay baawa. Hessa gisho, enti giyaba ubbay enta gako” yaagosona.
5.14: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele asaako, “Enti ha qaala odida gisho taani ta qaala ne doonan tama oothana; ha asay mithi gidana; tamayka enta maana” yaagees Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay.
5.15: Goday Isra7eele asaako, “Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, ta hinte bolla haaho biittafe issi kawotethi ehana. Enta qaala hinte eronna, enta oday hintew gelonna wolqaamanne beni kawotethi.
5.16: Enta donge pal7e shoohoy dooya duufo mela; enta olanchoti wolqaama.
5.17: Enti hinte kathaanne hinte goshsha ayfiya maana; hinte adde naytanne macca nayta wodhana; hinte dorsaanne mehiya bonqana; hinte woyniyanne balase mithaa dhaysana. Hinte ammanetiya, gimbetida katamata banta mashshan olidi dhaysana” yaagees.
5.18: “Gidoshin, he gallasatan gidikoka, taani ta asaa kumethi dhaysike” yaagees Goday
5.19: Asay nena, “ ‘Goday nu Xoossay nu bolla haysa ubbaa ayis oothidee?’ gidi oychiko, ne entako, ‘Hinte tana aggidi, hinte biittan imatha xoossata goyinnidaysada, hinteka asa biittan haratas haggaazana’ yaaga” yaagis.
5.20: “Haysa Yayqooba asaas oda; Yihuda biittan awaaja.
5.21: Hinteno, ayfey de7ishin be7onaysato, haythi de7ishin si7onnaysato, eeyanne akeekona asaw haysa si7ite!
5.22: Hinte taw yayyanaw bessennee? Hinte ta sinthan kokoranaw koshshennee? yaagees Goday. Abbay aadhidi boonna mela shafe iyaw zawa oothiday tana? Zuley sugikoka iyape aadhanaw danda7enna; hobbey dendikoka kanthidi aadhenna.
5.23: Shin ha asaas muumenne makalla wozani de7ees. Enti hara soo simmidi wora bidosona.
5.24: Enti banta wozanan, ‘Nuus sila iranne torche ira woden woden immiya, kathaa shiishiya wode nuus immiya Godaa ane yayyoos’ yaagibookona.
5.25: Hinte balay hessa teqis; hinte nagaray hintena lo77obaape ashshis” yaagees.
5.26: “Ta asaa giddon iita asati de7oosona. Kafo oykanaw naagiya asada hokidi naagoosona. Enti gite yeggidi asaa oykoosona.
5.27: Kafo keethan kafoy kumidaada, enta keethay cimon kumis; enti wolqaamanne dure.
5.28: Enti ordenne modho gididosona; enta iita oosuwas zawi baawa. Enti yi7o nayta gisho mootetokona; manqotas suure pirdibookona.
5.29: Yaatin, taani hessa gisho enta seeranaw bessennee? Haysa mela kawotetha bolla ta haluwa keyanaw bessennee?” yaagees Goday.
5.31: Nabeti wordo odoosona; kahineti enta zoriyan aysoosona. Ta asayka hessa melaba dosees. Shin wursethan hinte waananee?” yaagees Goday.

6.1: Hinteno, Biniyaame asaw, hinte shempuwa ashshanaw baqatite! Yerusalaamepe keyite! Taquhe kataman moyze punnite! Beet-Hakareeman malla bessite! Pudeha baggafe iitabaynne gita dhayoy yaana hanees.
6.2: Taani lo77iyanne ufaysiya Xiyoone katamata dhaysana.
6.3: Henthanchoti banta wudiya ekidi yaa yaana. Iya yuushuwan banta dunkaaniya tokana; issoy issoy ba wudiya heemmana.
6.4: “Yerusalaame olanaw giigetite! Dendite! Iya seeta gallas oloos. Shin ayye! Sa7i qammees; omarsa kuyay aduqi aduqi bees.
6.5: Hessa gisho, dendite! qamma olidi iya miixaa laalloos” yaagidi maqetoosona.
6.6: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Mithata qanxite. Yerusalaame gimbiya miyen biitta doorite. He kataman naaqoy kumida gisho I seeretanaw bessees.
6.7: Haatha olli haathe pulteysada ika ba iitatetha pultees. Makallinne dhayoy iya giddon si7etees; iya hargeynne madunthay ta sinthana.
6.8: Neno Yerusalaame, ta seera eka. Akay, giiko, ta neepe shaaketananne ne biitta asi bayna baysa kessana” yaagees.
6.9: “Woyne poshiliyada, Isra7eele asaa giddofe attidaysata loythidi poshilite. Woyne qoriya asada, hinte kushiya daashshata giddo zaaridi yeddite” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
6.10: “Ta ooddes odo? Oona seero? Ooni si7anee? Enti si7onna mela enta haythay tullis. Godaa qaalay entaw miichas attis; enti iyan ufaytokona.
6.11: Godaa hanqoy tanan kumis. Ta ha sheniya teqanaw danda7ike. Oge bolla de7iya yooga nayta bollanne shiiqida na7atethata bolla ta hanquwa tiga. Machiya, azinaynne cimida asa ubbay attokona.
6.12: Taani he biittan de7eyisata bolla ta kushiya yeddiya wode enta keethay, enta goshshaynne enta macheti ubbay haratas imetana” yaagees.
6.13: “Guuthafe gita gakanaw ubbay bana go77iyabaa koyees. Nabetinne kahineti ubbay cimmoosona.
6.14: Ta asaa maduntha pathonnaba oothidi guutha dhale wothoosona. Saroy baynashin, ‘Saro; saro!’ yaagosona.
6.15: Enti ha shaatiya oosuwa oothidi yeellatidona? Akay, enti kumethi yeellatibookona; enti yeelli aybeko erokona. Hessa gisho, entika kundidaysata giddon kundana. Taani enta seeriya wode enta kawushana” yaagees Goday.
6.16: Goday haysada yaagees: “Ogiyan eqidi xeellite; beni ogey de7iya bessaa oychite. Lo77o ogey awun de7iyako oychidi iyan hemetite; hinte shempo demmana. Shin hinte, nuuni he ogiyan hemetoko!” yaagideta.
6.17: Taani naageysata hinte bolla shuumada, “Moyze girsaa si7ite” yaagas. Shin hinte, “Nu si7oko” yaagideta.
6.18: “Hessa gisho, kawotethato, si7ite! Taani ta asaa bolla oothanaba akeekite.
6.19: Sa7an de7iya asaw, haysa si7ite! Enti ta qaala si7onna ixida gishonne ta higgiya kadhida gisho ta enta bolla dhayo ehana.
6.20: Saaba biittafe ixaani woyko haaho biittafe yida sawoynne qimamey taw aysee? Hinte xuussa yarshoyka eketenna. Hinte yarshoy tana ufaysenna” yaagees.
6.21: Hessa gisho, Goday, “Taani ha asaa sinthan dhube wothana; aawatinne nayti entan dhubetana; shoorotinne laggeti dhayana” yaagees.
6.22: Goday, “Pudeha bagga biittafe olanchoti yoosona; issi gita kawotethay sa7aa gaxape dendis.
6.23: Enti dongenne toora dancidosona; enti qadhey bayna wozana minotanne maarotethi eronnayisata. Enti paran gaallabiya wode abbada guummoosona. Hinteno, Xiyoone katama asaw, enti hintena olanaw salpidosona” yaagees.
6.24: Nuuni he odaa si7in, nu kushey argaacis; maccasi iqethi oykeysada nuna metoynne un7i oykis.
6.25: Morkey mashsha oykida gishonne yan han dagami de7iya gisho soope keyopite; oge bollaka bentofite.
6.26: Dhayseysi qoponna nu bolla yaana gisho, kayo ma7o ma7idi, bido bolla gondoretidi, asi ba issi na7as yeekiya mela ta asaas yeekite.
6.27: Goday Ermiyaasako, “Neeni enta ogiya xomoosana melanne paacana mela birata paaciya asada ta nena oothas.
6.28: Enti ubbay zigiranaw yuuyosona; odin si7onna makallanchota. Enti naase biratadanne biratada mino; enti ubbay nagara oothosona.
6.29: Birata bolla de7iya shi7a xuuggidi geeshshanaw gilpey punnees. Shin geeshshanaw waayida waayey coo gidis; ta asaa giddon de7iya iitati kichibookona.
6.30: Goday enta yeggidi aggida gisho, enti yegetida bira geetetana” yaagees.

7.1: Godaape Ermiyaasako yida qaalay haysa:
7.2: “Xoossa keetha pengiyan eqada, haysada yaagada awaaja. Hinteno, Godaa goyinnanaw ha pengetara geliya Yihuda asaw, ubbay Godaa qaala si7ite!
7.3: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: hinte ogiyanne hinte oosuwa laammite; ta hintena ha bessan wothana.
7.4: ‘Haysi Xoossa keethi! Haysi Xoossa keethi! Haysi Xoossa keethi’ yaagidi cimo qaalan ammanetofite.
7.5: Hinte, hinte ogiyanne oosuwa tuma laammiko, issoy issuwas xillo pirdiko,
7.6: bete asaa, yi7o naytanne am7eta naaqonna aggiko, ha bessan xillo asa suuthu gussonna aggikonne, hinte qohetonaada hara xoossata goyinnona aggiko,
7.7: ta hinte mayzatas merinaw immida biittan hintena wothana.
7.8: Shin hinte maaddonna cimo qaalan ammaneteta” yaagees.
7.9: “Hinte kaysoteeta, wodheeta, laymateta, wordo caaqidi markateeta, Ba7aale eeqas yarsho yarsheeta, haysafe kase hinte eronna hara xoossata goyinneta.
7.10: Yaatidi, ta sunthan xeegetida Xoossa keethaa yidi, ta sinthan eqidi, ‘Nuuni saro’ yaageeta. Shin ha shaatiya oosuwa ubbaa ootheeta.
7.11: Ta sunthan xeegetida ha Xoossa keethay hintew pangati qosetiya gongolo gidetiyee? Hinte oothiyaba ubbaa taani ta ayfen be7as” yaagees.
7.12: “Taani ta sunthay de7iya bessi oothada koyro doorida, Seelo biite. Ta asaa Isra7eele iitatethaa gisho, taani he bessaa waatidaako be7ite.
7.13: Hinte ha ubbaa oothiya wode ta hintew zaara zaara odas; shin si7onna ixideta. Ta hintena xeegas; shin taw koybeketa.
7.14: Hessa gisho, ta Seelo bolla oothidaysada haysan hinte ammanetiya, ta sunthan xeegetida ha Xoossa keethaa bolla, hintewunne hinte mayzatas immida ha bessaa bolla hessada oothana.
7.15: Hinte dabbota, Efreema kochaa ta diggidaysada ta sinthafe hintenaka diggana” yaagees.
7.16: “Ermiyaasa, ta si7onna gisho, ha asaas woossofa; enta gisho tana oychofa woyko waassofa; entaw gaannatopa.
7.17: Enti Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan oothiyabay aybeko be7ikiyee?
7.18: Nayti mithi mixoosona; aawati tama eethoosona; maccasati, ‘Salo Kawiw’ geetetiya eeqees uythi uukanaw dhiille munuqoosona. Enti tana yiloyanaw ushsha yarsho hara xoossatas gussoosona.
7.19: Enti haysa oothey tuma tana qohanaaseyee? Haysan qohetidi yeellatanay enta gidokonaayee?” yaagees Goday.
7.20: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta hanqoy ha bessaa bolla, asaa bollanne mehiya bolla, gaden de7iya mithaa bollanne biittan de7iya kathaa bolla gukana; I eexana, to7anaw danda7enna.”
7.21: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Hinte xuussa yarshuwa hara yarshota bolla gujidi, ashuwa hintew miite.
7.22: Ta hinte mayzata Gibxe biittafe kessiya wode, xuussa yarshobanne hara yarshotaba odabike woyko kiittabike.
7.23: Shin ta entako, taw kiitetite; ta hinte Xoossaa gidana; hinteka ta ase gidana. Hintew injetana mela ta hintena kiittiya oge ubban hemetite.
7.24: Shin enti tana si7onna woyko taw besse immonna ixidosona. Enti banta iita wozanaa qofaa kaallidi bidosona; sinthe baanaysa aggidi guye bidosona.
7.25: Hinte mayzati Gibxefe keyida wodepe doomidi hachi gakanaw ta aylleta, nabeta wonta wonta hintew kiittas.
7.26: Shin hinte tana si7onna woyko taw besse immonna ixideta. Hinte morgiya minthideta; hinte aawatape aadhidi iitabaa oothideta.
7.27: “Ha ubbaa ne entaw oda; shin enti ne giyaba si7okona. Ne enta xeegana; shin enti koyokona.
7.28: Hessa gisho, Ermiyaasa, ne entako haysada yaaga: ha kawotethay ba Godaa Xoossaa kiitetonna woyko iya zoriya si7onna kawotethi. Tumi dhayis; tumi enta inxarsan deenna.
7.29: Hinte huuphiya meedidi wora holite. Goday bana yiloyida yeleta ixida gishonne yeggidi aggida gisho aybika bayna dhoqa zumaa bolla keyidi zeleelite” yaagis.
7.30: “Yihuda asay ta sinthan iitabaa oothidosona. Enti ta sunthan xeegetida Xoossa keethaa tunisanaw taani ixiya eeqata ehidi iya giddon wothidosona.
7.31: Enti banta adde naytanne macca nayta taman xuuggidi yarshanaw, Hinooma Zangaaran Toofeta geetetiya yarsho bessa gimbidosona. Shin hessi ta enta kiittaboonabanne ta qofan baynaba.
7.32: Hessa gisho, he bessay Hinooma Zangaara woyko Toofeta geetetidi xeegeteysi attidi, Shuka Zangaara yaagetidi xeegetana wodey yaana. Moogiya bessi bayna gisho, Toofeti enti banta aha moogiya bessi gidana.
7.33: He wode he asaa ahay salo kafotasinne sa7a do7atas kathi gidana; enta gooddana asika baawa.
7.34: Taani yethi, ufaysinne yaagano girsi Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan si7etonnaada oothana; biittay baysa gidana” yaagees Goday.

8.1: “He wode Yihuda kawota meqethay, halaqata meqethay, kahineta meqethay, nabeta meqethaynne Yerusalaamen de7iya asaa meqetha ubbay duufope maxetidi keyana.
8.2: Enti siiqida, kiitetida, kaallida, zore oychidanne goyinnida awa, ageenanne salo xoolintota ubbaa sinthan micetana. Enta meqethay shiiqenna woyko moogetenna; shin biitta bolla pito mela yegetana.
8.3: Ta laallida bessatan de7iya, ha iita kawotethaafe attida asa ubbay de7ope hayqo amotana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday. Nagaranne Pirda
8.4: Goday haysada yaagees gada oda: “Issi asi kundiko, simmidi dendeneyee? Woyko issi asi oge baletiko guye simmenneyee?
8.5: Yaatin, ha asay ayis guye simmidee? Yerusalaamey ayis ubba wode oge baleetii? Enti cimo baqidi oykidosona; simmonna ixidosona.
8.6: Ta minthada hayzas; shin enti tuma haasayokona. ‘Ta ay oothadina?’ gidi ba iita nagaraa paaxey issoyka baawa. Ubbay olas gaallabiya parada baw baw woxees.
8.7: Hari attoshin, haatha kafoti banta wodiya eroosona; holleti, kaarotinne masqala kafoti banta simmiya wodiya naagoosona; shin ta asay Godaa woga erokona.
8.8: “Yaatin waanidi, ‘Godaa higgey nuura de7iya gisho nu cinca’ gaanaw danda7eetii? Wordancho xaafeti ta higgiya wordo kessidaysa be7eketii?
8.9: Cincati yeellatana; enti kawuyananne oyketana. Enti Godaa qaala ixin, entaw ay cincatethi de7ii?
8.10: Hessa gisho, ta enta macheta haratas, enta goshsha allaga asas immana. Guuthafe gita gakanaw bessonna go77as yiiqetoosona. Nabetinne kahineti ubbay asaa cimmoosona.
8.11: Enti ta asaa madunthaa laafa gidi, guutha dhale wothoosona. Saroy baynashin ‘Saro, saro!’ yaagosona.
8.12: Ha shaatiya oosuwa oothishe, enti yeellatidona? Akay, enti aykoka yeellatibookona. Enti yeelli aybeko erokona. Hessa gisho, enti kundidaysata giddon kundana; enti seeretiya wode kawuyana.
8.13: Enta goshsha ayfiya ta entafe ekana. Enta woyne ayfey dhayana; balase mithaa ayfey bentenna. Iya boncoy shullana; ta entaw immidaba entafe ekana” yaagees Goday.
8.14: Asay zaaridi haysada yaagosona: “Nu si77i gidi ayis uttanee? Ane shiiqite; gimbetida katamata gelidi yan hayqana. Goday nu Xoossay nuna hayqos aathidi immis. Nu iya bolla nagara oothida gisho, nu wodhiya haathi uyana mela oothis.
8.15: Sarotethi ufaysan naagida; shin lo77obay yibeena. Nu paxo amotida; shin dagama gidis.
8.16: Morke para garmamoy Daane kataman si7etees; enta korma parata caagethan biitti qaaxees. Enti biittanne biittan de7iyaba ubbaa, katamaanne kataman de7iya ase ubbaa midi dhaysanaw yidosona.
8.17: Taani shooshata hinte giddo yeddana. Biti teqanaw danda7onna haso shooshata hinte giddo yeddana; enti hintena dukana” yaagees Goday.
8.18: Ta azzanuwas minthethoy baawa; ta wozanay til7is.
8.19: Ta asay haaho biittan waassiya waasuwa si7ite. Enti, “Goday Xiyoonen baawee? Ha Xiyoone Kawoy zaaridi yan deennee?” yaagidi waassoosona. Goday enta Kawoy, “Enti banta medhida misiletan, banta pathonna allaga eeqatan tana ayis yiloyidona?” yaagis.
8.20: Asay zaaridi, “Heko caka wodey aadhis; boney wuris; nuuni attibooko” yaagidi waassoosona.
8.21: Ta asay madunxida gisho, ta wozanayka madunxis. Ta kayotas; yashshi tana oykis.
8.22: Galadan tiyetiya dhaley baawee? Yan aakimey deennee? Yaatin, ta asaa meqoy ayis paxennee?

9.1: Hayqida ta asaas qammanne gallas yeekana mela ta huuphey haatha olla, ta ayfey pulto haathi gideerenne.
9.2: Enti ubbay makallanne laymatiya asi gidiya gisho, taani ta asaape shaaketada baana mela, oge asi aqiya bessi, taw mela biittan de7ereneshin.
9.3: “Enti banta inxarsan wordo odetanaw ubba wode giigidi de7oosona. Enta biittan tuma gidonashin wordoy kawotis. Enti issi nagarape hara nagaran pinnidosona; tana erokona” yaagees Goday.
9.4: “Ishi cimmeysa, shooroy zigireysa gidiya gisho shooruwape naageto; ishay ishaa ammanetofo.
9.5: Shooroy shooruwa cimmees; tuma odetey deenna. Wordo odetana mela banta inxarsaa tamaarsidosona; nagara oosona bantana daabursidosona.
9.6: Ne cimo giddon de7aasa; enti banta cimuwan tana eronna ixidosona” yaagees Goday.
9.7: “Hessa gisho, ta enta biratada seerisana; enta paacana. Ta asaa gisho, ta haraba ay oothanaw danda7iyana?
9.8: Enta inxarsay wodhiya donge toora mela; enti cimon haasayoosona. Banta doonan issoy issuwara saro qaala haasayoosona; shin banta wozanan xihe wothoosona.
9.9: Yaatin, ta ha hanotaas enta seeranaw bessennee? Taani haysa mela kawotethaa bolla halo keyanaw bessennee?” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
9.10: Taani dhoqa deretas yeekana; enta gisho waassana; bazzon de7iya hentha gadetas zeleelana. Enti dhayidosona; yaara issi asika aadhenna. Mehe waasoy si7etenna; salo kafotinne do7ati baqatidosona.
9.11: “Yerusalaame katamaa laaletida keelanne workanati gupiya bessi oothana. Yihuda katamata oonika doonna baysa kessana” yaagees Goday.
9.12: Haysa akeekanaw danda7iya cinca asi oonee? Hara asas odana mela Goday ooddes qoncisidee? Issi asika iya giddora aadhona mela biittay iitidi bazzoda oniday aybisee?
9.13: “Haysi haniday, entaw ta immida higgiya enti aggida gishosa. Enti taw kiitetonanne ha higgiya kaallonna ixida gishosa.
9.14: Hessa aggidi, enti banta wozanaa muumetetha kaallidosona; enta aawati tamaarsida Ba7aale geetetiya eeqa goyinnidosona” yaagees Goday.
9.15: Hessa gisho, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Taani ha asaa cammiya kathi muzana; wodhiya haathi ushshana.
9.16: Enti woyko enta aawati eronna kawotethata giddon ta enta laallana. Enta dhaysana gakanaw mashshan yedethana” yaagees.
9.17: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Ane qopite. Yeeho yeekiya maccasata xeegite; zelelsi eriya asata ehite.
9.18: Enti ellesidi yidi, nu ayfey afuthu holthu oothana gakanawunne nu ayfiya ciroy haathe pultana gakanaw zelelsi kesso.
9.19: Xiyoonen zelelsa girsi si7etees; ‘Nu dhayida! Nu kawuyida! Nu keethay laaletida gisho, nu biitta aggidi baanaw koshshees’ ” yaagosona.
9.20: Hinteno, maccasato, Godaa qaala si7ite! Hinte haythay iya doonape keyiya qaala hayzo. Hinte macca nayta zelelsi tamaarsite; issoy issuwa yeeho tamaarso.
9.21: Hayqoy yooga nayta ogen, na7atethata dabaaban qeexishe yidi, nu maskooteta gakis; nu miixaa gelis.
9.22: “Asa ahi buureda denban yegetana; cakeysati cakidi guye yeggida katha mela enta oonika shiishenna” yaagees Goday.
9.23: “Cinci ba cincatethan ceeqofo; wolqaami ba wolqan ceeqofo; durey ba duretethan ceeqofo.
9.24: Shin ceeqiya oonika tana eroninne akeekon ceeqo. Maarotethi, suure pirdanne xillotethi sa7a bolla oothiya Godaa, tana eridi ceeqo; hessi tana ufaysees” yaagees Goday.
9.25: “Banta asho xalaala qaxaretida asaa ta seerana wodey yaana.
9.26: Hessatika Gibxe, Yihuda, Edoome, Amoonenne Moo7abe asaanne banta huuphiya yuushuwa meedidi, mela biittan de7iya asa ubbaa. Ha kawotethati ubbay tuma qaxaretibookona; Isra7eele asa ubbayka banta wozanan qaxaretibookona” yaagees Goday.

10.1: Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, Goday odiya qaala si7ite!
10.2: Goday haysada yaagees: “Hara kawotethata ogiya tamaaropite. Enti salo bolla malaata be7idi dagammikoka, hinte dagammopite.
10.3: Enta wogay hada; enti worape mithi qanxoosona; masseysi kaltan massees.
10.4: Enti biraninne worqan alleeqisosona; qaaxonnaada misimaaren dhishidi oythoosona.
10.5: Enta eeqati leehe giddon kafo daganthanaw essiya malla mela. Enti odetokona; enti hemetanaw danda7onna gisho asay enta tookosona. Entas kumthi yayyofite. Enti qohanawuka maaddanawuka danda7onna gisho entaw yayyofite” yaagees Goday.
10.6: Abeeti Godaw, ne mali oonika baawa. Neeni gita; ne sunthayka gitanne wolqaama.
10.7: Abeeti kawotethata Kawaw, nena bonchonay oonee? Cinca asaa giddoninne enta kawotethaa giddon ne meli bayna gisho new boncho bessees.
10.8: Enti eeyanne eri dhayidaysata; enti mithafe massida, pathonna eeqatape ay tamaarona?
10.9: He eeqati Tarsesa biraninne Afeeza worqan alleeqetidosona. Enti ubbay kushe hiillanchotan oosetida woynenne kaalose daaniya ma7uwan kametidosona.
10.10: Shin Goday tuma Xoossaa; I de7o Xoossaanne merinaa kawa. Iya hanquwan biittay qaaxees; kawotethati iya yiluwa danda7okona.
10.11: “Haysati salonne sa7a medhiboonna xoossati sa7apenne salope dhayana” yaagada neeni entaw oda.
10.12: Ba wolqan sa7aa medhiday, ba cincatethan sa7aa essiday, ba akeekan salota micciday, Xoossaa.
10.13: I, ba kooshincha sissiya wode, salon de7iya haathati guummoosona. I shaara sa7a gaxape pude denthees; wol7anthi irara yeddees; carkuwa ba minja keethaafe kessees.
10.14: Asi ubbay era dhayidi eeyis; worqaa sheeshiya ubbay ba eeqan yeellatis. Enti medhida eeqati wordo; entaw shempoy baawa.
10.15: Enti pathonnabaanne hada; enti seeretiya wode dhayana.
10.16: Shin I ubbaa medhida gisho, Yayqooba Saama gidida Xoossay hessa mela gidenna; Isra7eeley, I baw doorida kawotethi; iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa. Yaana Dhayo
10.17: Hinteno, morkey teqidaysato, biittafe keyanaw hintew de7iyaba shiishite.
10.18: “Taani, ha wodiyan, ha biittan de7iya asaa kessada yambarana. Enta qohoy eretana gakanaw enta bolla iitabaa ehana” yaagees Goday.
10.19: Ta madunxas! Ta madunthay paxenna. Shin taani, “Haysi ta harge; ta danda7anaw bessees” yaagas.
10.20: Ta dunkaaney laaletis; iya wodoro ubbay duuxeretis. Ta nayti ubbay taape shaaketidi bidosona; enti baawa. Ta dunkaaniya zaaridi tokanaw woyko ta magarajuwa kaqanaw issi asika attibeenna.
10.21: Henthanchoti eeyidosona; enti Godaa oychibookona. Hessa gisho, entaw injetonna ixis; enta wude ubbay laaletis.
10.22: Ooratha odi yis; si7ite. Pudeha baggan de7iya kawotethan gita dirgoy medhetis. Iya olanchoti yidi, Yihuda katamata baysanne workanati gupiya bessi kessana.
10.23: Abeeti Godaw, asa de7oy iyaw buzo gidonaysanne ba ogiya suurisanaw iya shene gidonnaysa ta erayis.
10.24: Abeeti Godaw, tana seera; shin likera gido. Ta dhayonna mela ne hanquwan ta bolla yoopa.
10.25: Ne sheniya, nena eronna kawotethata bollanne ne sunthaa xeegonna asaa bolla gussa. Enti Yayqooba asaa midosona; enta mittidosona; enta biitta dhaysidosona.

11.1: Godaape Ermiyaasako yida qaalay haysa:
11.2: “Ha caaqo qaala si7ada Yihuda asaasinne Yerusalaame kataman de7iya asaas oda.
11.3: Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees gada oda. ‘Ha caaquwa naagonna asi oonika baadetidaysa gido’.
11.4: Taani kase hinte aawata Gibxe biittafe, birata seerisiya coociyape kessiya wode, ‘Taw kiitetite; ta hintena kiittiyaba ubbaa oothite. Hinte ta ase gidana; taka hinte Xoosse gidana’ yaagada odas.
11.5: Hessadaka, maathinne eessi goggiya biitta kase hinte aawatas immanaw, taani caaqida caaquwa polana.” Taani, “Ero, Godaw, amin77i” yaagas.
11.6: Goday taako, “Ha qaalata ubbaa Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan haysada yaagada awaaja: ‘Ha caaqo qaala si7ite; iya kaallite.
11.7: Kase hinte aawata ta Gibxe biittafe kessida wodiyape hachi gakanaw, zaara zaarada, “Taw kiitetite” gada seeras.
11.8: Shin enti ta qaala si7ibookona woyko taw kiitetibookona. Enti banta iita wozanaa kaallidosona. Ta caaqo qaala enti naagana mela kiittas; shin enti ixidosona. Hessa gisho, he caaquwa baadetha ubbaa enta bolla ehas’ ” yaagis.
11.9: Zaaridika Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Yihuda asaynne Yerusalaamen de7iya asay ta bolla maqetidosona.
11.10: Enti kase ta qaala si7onna ixida banta mayzata nagarako guye simmidosona. Enti hara xoossata goyinnidosona; entaw oothidosona. Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay ta kase enta mayzatara caaqida caaquwa menthidosona.
11.11: Hessa gisho, ‘Enti baqatidi attanaw danda7onna metuwa enta bolla ehana. Enti taako waassinka ta enta si7ike.
11.12: He wode Yihuda asaynne Yerusalaame asay, ixaane cuyisiya banta xoossatako waassana. Shin meto wode he xoossati enta maaddokona.
11.13: Hinteno, Yihuda asaw, hinte xoossati hinte katamata mela daro. Qassi Ba7aale geetetiya yeellaya xoossaas ixaane cuyisanaw hinte giigisiya yarsho bessati Yerusalaame ogeta mela daro’ yaagees Goday.
11.14: “Ermiyaasa, ha asaas tana aykoka woossofa; enta gisho gaannatopa woyko oychofa. Enti banta metuwa gallas tana xeegiya wode ta enta si7ike.
11.15: “Daro asaara ba iita maquwa maqetashe, ta dosiya ta asay, ta keethan bentanaw bessii? Hinte hinte iita oosuwa oothishin, yarshetida mehiya ashoy hintena seerape ashshanee? Hessa gidiyako hinte ufaytanashin” yaagis.
11.16: Goday nena, dicciya, lo77o ayfe ayfiya shamaho yaagidi sunthis. Shin, I he shamahuwa wolqaama dada guunthan, taman xuuggana; iya tasheyka meqana.
11.17: Taani, hintena tokida Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, hinte bolla iitabaa ehanaw awaajas. Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay Ba7aales ixaane cuyisidi tana yiloyidosona. Ermiyaasa Bolla Maqetida Maquwa
11.18: Goday enta maquwa taw qoncisida gisho ta eras. He wode enti oothiya iita oosuwa tana bessis.
11.19: Taani shukas giigida dorsada hanas. Enti, “Ane mithaanne iya ayfiya dhaysoos. Iya sunthay hassayetonna mela iya paxa de7eyisata giddofe shoddidi diggoos” yaagidi maqetidaysa ta erabike.
11.20: Shin abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, xillo pirdeyso, asa wozananne qofaa shaakada ereyso, ne enta bolla ne haluwa keyada tana bessa. Taani ta qohuwa nena bessaas.
11.21: Hessa gisho, “Godaa sunthan tinbite odopa ixiko, ne nu kushen hayqanna” yaagidi, nena wodhanaw koyiya Anatoota asaaba Goday haysada yaagees.
11.22: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta enta seerana; enta panthati mashshan hayqana; enta macca naytinne adde nayti koshan hayqana;
11.23: entafe issoynne attenna. Ayis giiko, taani seeriya laythi Anatoota asa bolla iitaba ehana” yaagees.

12.1: Abeeti Godaw, ta neera mootetiya wode ubbanka ne xillo. Gidoshin, ne xillo pirdaba neera odetanaw koyayis. Iita asati oothiyabay entaw ayis injetii? Gene asati ayis duretidi de7oona?
12.2: Neeni enta tokadasa; enti xapho yeddidosona; diccidi ayfe ayfidosona. Enti nena doonape yeggokona; shin enta wozanaape ne haahon de7aasa.
12.3: Shin abeeti Godaw, ne tana eraasa; tana be7aasa; ta nebaa ay qopiyako paacasa. Shuka dorsada, he iita asata goochada kessa; shuka gallasas enta dummayada wotha.
12.4: Biittay ira dhayidi qohetannay, denban de7iya maatay melanay awude gakanaasee? Asaa iitatethaa gaason, do7inne kafoy wuris. Asay qassi, “Goday nu oothiyaba demmenna” yaagosona. Godaa Zaaruwa
12.5: Goday Ermiyaasako, “Neeni tohon woxiya asatara gaaddetada daaburiko, parara waanada gaaddetanee? Ne saro biittan dhubetiko, Yordaanose wora giddora waanada hemetanee?
12.6: Ne ishati, hinte soo asati nena aathidi immidosona; ne bolla dendidosona. Hessa gisho, lo77oba odikoka enta ammanopa.
12.7: “Ta Isra7eele aggas; ta dooretida kawotetha yeggas; ta siiqiya asaa iya morketa kushen aathada immas.
12.8: Ta doorida asay taw woran de7iya gaammo mela gidis. I ta bolla gudis; hessa gisho, ta iya ixas.
12.9: Ta doorida asay ubba baggara phircoy teqida kafo mela gididosona. Bidi do7ata ubbaa shiishidi iya maana mela ehite.
12.10: “Daro allaga kawoti ta woyne gadiya iissidosona; ta gadiya yedhidosona; ta lo77o goshsha baysa kessidosona.
12.11: He biittay iitidi oxis; ta sinthan melanne baysa gidis. Qadhetey bayna gisho biittay kumethi iitis.
12.12: Mela biittan de7iya aykoka bayna dere kanthidi, bonqeysati yidosona. Godaa mashshay biitta ha gaxape ya gaxaa gakanaw mis. Hessa gisho, oonika saro attanaw danda7enna.
12.13: Enti giste zeridi, agunthu cakidosona; enti daro daaburidosona; shin aykoka demmibookona. Godaa wolqaama sheniya gaason enta kathay dhayis” yaagis.
12.14: “Taani ta asaa, Isra7eeles, immida biitta oykida, iita shooro kawotethata enta biittafe shoddana. Qassi Yihuda asaa enta giddofe kessana.
12.15: Shin enta biittafe shoddidaape guye, zaarada entaw qadhetana. Enta issuwa enta laata biittanne enta kawotethaa zaarada ehana.
12.16: Kase ta asaa Ba7aale sunthan caaqana mela tamaarsidaysada enti ta asaa ogiya tamaarikonne ta sunthan caaqiko enti ta asaa giddon minnidi daana.
12.17: Shin kiitetonna ixida kawotethata taani polo shoddada dhaysana” yaagees Goday.

13.1: Goday taako, “Bada liino qacinape dadetida danco shammada, ne xeessan danca; shin haathan boshisopa” yaagis.
13.2: Hessa gisho, taani Goday kiittidaysada dancuwa shammada ta xeessan dancas.
13.3: Goday nam7antho taako haysada yaagis:
13.4: “Ne shammada dancida dancuwa ekada, Efraxiisa shaafa bada shucha qophon qosa” yaagis.
13.5: Goday taw odidaysada efada, Efraxiisa shaafa lanqen qosas.
13.6: Daro gallasape guye Goday, “Efraxiisa shaafa bada, ta nena, ‘Yan qosa’ gida dancuwa eka” yaagis.
13.7: Taani Efraxiisa shaafa bada, dancuwa moogida bessaafe ekas. Shin he dancoy iitidi aykoka maaddonnaba gidis.
13.8: Hessafe guye, Godaa qaalay taako,
13.9: “Taani Yihuda ceeqetethaanne Yerusalaame otoruwa haysada oothada dhaysana.
13.10: Ta qaala si7onna ixidi, banta wozanaa muumisidi, hara xoossata goyinnanawunne entaw oothanaw biya ha iita asati, ha dancuwada maaddonnaba gidana.
13.11: Dancoy asa xeessi baqidi oykeysada Yihudinne Isra7eeley taara oyketidi, ta sunthaas galatanne boncho gidana melanne ta ase gidana mela oothas; shin enti si7onna ixidosona” yaagees Goday. Woyne Xugga
13.12: Goday taako, “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay, haysada yaagees gada oda yaagis: ‘Issi issi xuggay woyne ushshan kumana’ yaaga. Enti neeko, ‘Nuuni issi issi xuggay woynen kumanaysa erokoyee?’ yaagiko,
13.13: ne entako, ‘Taani ha biittan de7iya asa ubbaa, hari attoshin, Dawita araatan uttiya kawota, kahineta, nabetanne Yerusalaamen de7iya asa ubbaa, enti mathotana gakanaw woyne ushshan kunthana.
13.14: Taani enta, issuwa issuwara, aawa na7aara dom7ethana. Ta enta dhaysana; ta entaw keehike, qadhetike; enta maarike’ ” yaagees Goday. Otoroy Ehiya Meto
13.15: Haysa odey Godaa gidiya gisho hinte otoruwa aggidi si7ite; akeekite.
13.16: I dhuma ehanaape sinthe, hinte tohoy dhumiya deriyan dhubetanaape sinthe, Godaa hinte Xoossaa bonchite. Hinte, “Poo7oy yaana” gidi naageta; shin I sakana dhuman laammana.
13.17: Shin hinte si7onna ixiko, hinte otoruwa gisho ta geeman yeekayis. Godaa wudey di7etidi bida gisho, ta yeekayis; ta ayfey afuthu gussees.
13.18: Goday taako, “Kawuwasinne kawa aayes, haysada yaagada oda: Hinte boncho kallachay hinte huuphiyape kundida gisho, hinte kawotetha araatape duge wodhite.
13.19: Negebe biittan de7iya katamati ubbay gordetidosona. Enta dooyanaw issi asika yan baawa. Yihuda asay kumethi di7etidi bidosona” yaagis.
13.20: Goday, “Ane dhoqu gada, pudeha baggafe yeyisata xeella. New imetida wudey, ne ceeqetida dorsati awun de7oona?
13.21: Neeni, new lagge gidana mela koydaysati nena xoonidi haariya wode woygay? Yelos keyida maccasada iqethi nena oykennee?
13.22: Yerusalaame, neeni ne wozanan, ‘Ha ubbay tana ayis gakidee?’ giiko, ne ma7oy qaaretidaynne ne bonqetiday ne nagaray darida gishosa.
13.23: Tophey ba malaa woyko maahey ba gazzatethaa laammanaw danda7ii? Hessadaka, iita ooson meezetida hinte, lo77o ooso oothanaw danda7eketa” yaagis.
13.24: “Ta hintena bazzo carkoy efiya suullada laallana.
13.25: Hinte tana dogida gishonne wordo xoossatan ammanetida gisho hinte saamaynne ta hintew immiya gishoy haysa.
13.26: Hinte kalloy bentana mela ta hinte ma7uwa qaara yeggana.
13.27: Ne borso oosuwa, korma parada ziitas caageysa, yeelli bayna laymatethi, zuma bollanne denban ne oothiya ixetida oosuwa ta be7as. Yerusalaame, nena ayye! Ne awude gakanaw geeyonna daanee?” yaagees Goday.

14.1: Koshaba Goday Ermiyaasas odida qaalay haysa:
14.2: “Yihuda biittay kayotees; iya katamati labbanidosona. Yan de7iya asati biittan uttidi yeekosona; Yerusalaamepe gita waasoy si7etis.
14.3: Dure asati haathe tikanaw banta aylleta kiittoosona. Enti haatha ollaako boosona; shin haathe demmokona; banta otuwa mela tooki ekidi simmoosona. Haniyaba dhayidi yeellatishe, banta huuphiya guuluntoosona.
14.4: Iri bukonna gisho biittay melidi za77is. Goshshanchoti yeellatidi, banta huuphiya guuluntidosona.
14.5: Maati bayna gisho woshi7ey ba yelida galo mariw denban yeggada bawusu.
14.6: Bazzo hareti aybika bayna dhoqa zumata bolla eqidi, workanada lafettoosona. Entaw miyabay dhayin, enta ayfey xeellanaw daaburis” yaagis.
14.7: Asay haysada yaagidi woossis: “Abeeti Godaw, nu nagaray nu bolla markatikoka, ne sunthaa gisho, nuus issiba ootha. Nu nena aggidi daro wode guye simmida; ne bolla nagara oothida.
14.8: Abeeti Isra7eele ufaysaw, meto wode ashsheyso, ne imathada, issi qamma aqanaw gelida oge asada ayis hanay?
14.9: Ne dagammida asada, ashshanaw danda7onna asada ayis hanay? Abeeti Godaw, ne nu giddon de7aasa! Nuuni ne sunthan xeegetida; nuna aggofa!” yaagis.
14.10: Ha asataba Goday haysada yaagees: “Enti toylatethi daro dosoosona; banta tohuwa teqokona. Hessa gisho, Goday entan ufaytenna. I enta iita oosuwa hassayidi, enta nagaraa gisho enta seerana” yaagees.
14.11: Hessafe guye, Goday taako, “Ha asaa sarotethaas woossofa.
14.12: Enti xoomikoka, ta enta waasuwa si7ike. Xuussa yarshonne katha yarshuwa enti yarshikoka, ta ekike. Taani enta olan, koshaninne gadon dhaysana” yaagis.
14.13: Taani zaarada, “Abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, nabeti ‘Hinte ola be7eketa woyko koshi gakenna. Goday ha biittan polo sarotethi immana’ yaagosona” yaagas.
14.14: Goday zaaridi, “Nabeti ta sunthan wordo odoosona; ta enta kiittabike woyko entaw odabike. Enti hintew odey wordo qoncethi, pathonna kaayonne bantaw medhi kessida wordo haasayoosona.
14.15: Hessa gisho, Godaa sunthan odiya nabeta ta kiittabike. Shin enti, ‘Oli woyko koshi ha biitta bochenna’ yaagosona. He nabeti bantaw olaninne koshan dhayana!
14.16: Qassi tinbitey odetida asay koshanne ola gaason hayqana; enta ahay Yerusalaame ogiya bolla holetana. Enta woyko enta macheta, enta adde naytanne woyko enta macca nayta moogiya asi dhayana. Entaw bessiya waayiya enta bolla tigana” yaagis.
14.17: Ta azzanuwaba ta asaas odana mela Goday tana kiittis. “Ta asay deshetidi, daro madunxida gisho, ta ayfey qammanne gallas qanxonna afuxana.
14.18: Ta demba keyiko, mashshan hayqidaysata be7ayis. Katamaa geliko, koshan qohetidaysata be7ayis. Nabetinne kahineti banta oosuwa oothosona; shin ay oothiyako erokona” yaagas.
14.19: Abeeti Godaw, ne Yihuda aggadii? Xiyoone asaa ixadii? Nu paxonnaada oothada ayis dechadii? Nu “Saro gidana” gidi naagida; shin aybika lo77obay bentibeenna. Nu “Paxana wodey yaana” gidi naagida; shin dagama xalaali gakis.
14.20: Abeeti Godaw, nu iitatethaa erida; nu aawata balaa akeekida; nuuni nagara oothida.
14.21: Ne sunthaa gisho gada nuna kadhopa; ne boncho araata kawushofa. Ne nuura caaqida caaquwa hassaya; ne caaquwa menthofa.
14.22: Kawotethata eeqatape issoy ira bukisanaw danda7ii? Saloy ba shenen puusanaw danda7ii? Danda7enna! Abeeti Godaw, nu Xoossaw, hessa danda7ey nena! Haysa ubbaa oothey nena gidiya gisho nenan ufaysi oothoos.

15.1: Hessafe guye, Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Hari attoshin Museynne Sameeli ta sinthan eqidi woossiyakoka ta wozanay ha asaako simmenna. Enta ta sinthafe digga; enti boo.
15.2: Enti nena, ‘Nu awu baanee?’ gidi oychiko, Goday haysada yaagees gada entaw oda: ‘Hayqos pirdetidaysati hayqos; mashshas pirdetidaysati mashshas; koshas pirdetidaysati koshas; di7etanaw pirdetidaysati di7etanaw boo’ yaagis.
15.3: “Taani oyddu qommo gadota enta bolla ehana yaagees Goday. Hessika, enta wodhanaw mashsha, enta aha goochanaw kanata, enta asho midi dhaysanaw salo kafotanne sa7a do7ata ehana.
15.4: Hizqiyaasa na7ay, Yihuda kawoy Minaasey Yerusalaamen oothida iita oosuwa gisho, ta enta sa7aa kawotetha ubbaas dagama oothana.
15.5: “Yerusalaame asaw, hintew oone qadhetanay? Hintew azzananay oonee? Hinte waanidetii? gidi hintena oychanay oonee?” yaagees Goday.
15.6: “Hinte tana aggideta; hinte guye simmideta. Hessa gisho, taani hinte bolla ta kushiya denthada hintena dhaysas; hizape ta hintew qadhetike.
15.7: Enti banta iita ogiyape simmonna ixida gisho enta katamata pengiyan pithe ekada harqas. Ta enta nayta wodha wursas; ta asaa dhaysas.
15.8: Enta am7eta tayboy abba gaxan de7iya shafiyape daris. Taani seeta gallas na7atethata aayeta bolla dhayo ehana. Qoponna de7ishin, enta bolla dagamanne kokorsi ehana.
15.9: Laapun nayti hayqida aayiya shempanaw xoonetada daaburasu. Iwu gallasi qammis; iya kawuyasunne yeellatasu. Paxa attidaysata enta morketa sinthan mashshan wursana” yaagees Goday.
15.10: Ta aaye, tana ayis yeladii? Tana ayye! Ta biitta ubban de7iya asaara kacciyanne baaxetiya asi gidas. Ta oodeska tal7abike; oodefeka tal7ada ekabike; shin asa ubbay tana baaddees.
15.11: Goday taako, “Tuma ta nena lo77o oosos ashshada ekana. Tuma ne morketi metuwa wodenne waaye wode nena woossana mela oothana.
15.12: Asi birata, pudeha baggafe yaa birata woyko naase birata menthanaw danda7ii?
15.13: Biitta ubban hinte oothida nagaraa gisho, hinte shaluwanne duretetha hinte morketas aathada immana.
15.14: Hintena eronna biittan hinte morketi hintena aylle oothana. Ta hanqoy miya tama gididi merinaw eexana” yaagis.
15.15: Abeeti Godaw, ne eraasa. Tana hassaya; tana maadda; tana yedetheyisata bolla ta haluwa keya. Ne danda7an tana wora yeggofa. Ta ne gisho cayeteysa qopa.
15.16: Abeeti Godaw, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw, ta ne sunthan xeegetida gisho, ne qaalay taako yin mas. Ma simmin tana pashkisis; ta wozanaa ufaysis.
15.17: Qelqiseyisata cugan uttabike; entara ufaytabike. Neeni ne kushiya ta bolla wothida gishonne ta bolla yilotida gisho ta tarka dumma uttas.
15.18: Ta hargey paxonnay, ta madunthay melonnay aybisee? Ne taw eqiya shaafada, meliya pultoda hanayee?
15.19: Hessa gisho, Goday haysada yaagees: “Ne taako simmiko, ta zaarada nena ekana; ne taw oothana. Hada oda aggada, boncho qaala xalaala odetiko, ne ta doona gidana. Enti neeko simmana; shin ne entako simmaka.
15.20: Ta nena ha asaas naase biratan gimbetida gimbe oothana. Enti neera oletana; shin nena xoonokona; ta nena ashshana.
15.21: Iitata kushepe ta nena ashshana; qadhey bayna wozana mino asaape ta nena wozana” yaagees Goday.

16.1: Godaa qaalay, haysada yaagishe taako yis:
16.2: “Neeni macho ekofa; macca na7anne adde na7a ha bessan yelopa.
16.3: Ha bessan yeletiya macca naytabaanne adde naytabaa, enta yeliya aayetanne aawataba Goday haysada yaagees.
16.4: Enti iita hargen hayqana; entaw yeekiya woyko enta moogiya asi bentenna. Enta ahay biitta bolla pito mela yegetana; enti mashshaninne koshan wurana; enta ashoy salo kafotasinne sa7a do7atas kathi gidana” yaagis.
16.5: “Yeeho keethi gelopa; yeekanaw woyko qadhetanaw boopa. Taani ha asaa bollafe ta sarotethaa, ta siiquwanne ta maarotethaa diggas.
16.6: Gitinne guuthi ha biittan hayqana; enti moogetokona. Oonika entaw yeekenna; oonika bana gaarenna woyko huuphe meedetidi kayotenna.
16.7: Yeekiya asaas shochu efidi, entara issife midi uyidi, kayuwa balethiya asi issoyka deenna. Hari attoshin, aayiya woyko aawi hayqida asaaka minthethiya asi baawa.”
16.8: “Entara maanawunne uyanaw gibiri de7iya keethi gelopa.
16.9: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: ‘Taani ufaysinne ililsi, yaagano yethi ha bessaafe diggana. Hessa asay banta laythaninne banta ayfiyan be7ana.’ ”
16.10: “Ne ha qaala ubbaa asaas odiya wode, enti, ‘Goday ayis haysa mela iitabaa nu bolla awaajidee? Nu ay balido? Godaa, nu Xoossaa bolla nu ay nagara oothido?’ ” yaagana.
16.11: He wode ne entako; “Hinte aawati tana aggida gishosa, enti hara xoossata kaallida gishosa, entaw oothidanne goyinnida gishosa, tana aggidi ta higgiya naagonna ixida gishosa.
16.12: Hinte, hinte aawatape aadhidi iita oothida gishosa. Hinte issoy issoy ero goonna hinte iita wozanaa kaallideta; taw kiitetonna ixideta.
16.13: Hessa gisho, ta hintena ha biittafe denthada, hinte woyko hinte aawati eronna biitta holana. Yan hinte hara xoossata gallasinne qamma haggaazana; taani hintew qadhetike” yaagees Goday.
16.14: Asay, “Isra7eele asaa Gibxe biittafe kessida Goday eriya mela” yaagidi caaqonna wodey yaana.
16.15: Hessa aggidi, “ ‘Isra7eele asaa pudeha bagga biittafenne enta laallida biitta ubbaafe zaaridi ehida Goday eriya mela’ yaagidi caaqana. Taani enta kase enta aawatas immida biitta zaarada ehana” yaagees Goday.
16.16: “Ta molo oykiya daro asaa kiittana; enti enta oykana. Hessafe guye, daro shankatiya asaa kiittana; derepe, zumapenne shucha qophope enta shankatidi kessana.
16.17: Ta ayfey enta ogiya bolla de7ees; enti taape qosetibookona; enta nagaray ta sinthafe geemmibeenna.
16.18: Ta enta iitatethaanne enta nagaraa gisho entaw nam7u kushe zaarana. Enti aha daaniya banta ixetida eeqatan ta biitta tunisidosona; shaatiya banta misiletan ta laata kunthidosona” yaagees Goday.
16.19: Abeeti Godaw, ta wolqaw, ta miixaw, meto gallas ta baqatada attiya bessaw, kawotethati sa7aa gaxape neeko yidi, “Nu aawati pathonnanne maaddonna wordo xoossata xalaala laattidosona.
16.20: Asay bantaw xoossata medhanaw danda7oona? Ee, enti medhiyakoka tuma xoossata gidokona!” yaagana.
16.21: “Hessa gisho, ta enta tamaarsana; ta wolqaanne ta gitatetha enta erisana. He wode enti ta sunthay Godaa gideysa erana” yaagees Goday.

17.1: “Yihuda nagaray birata biiren xaafetis; enta wozanaa bollanne yarsho bessan de7iya kaciya bolla almaaze geetetiya shucha xeeran xaafetis.
17.2: Enta nayti irxa mitha garsan, zumata bollanne dereta bolla giigisida yarsho bessan Asheera geetetiya xoossees essida misiliya goyinnoosona.
17.3: Hinte biitta bolla oothida nagaraa acuwa qanxisanaw hinte shaluwanne hinte miishiya hinte morketas immana.
17.4: Hinte merinaw eexiya ta sheniya denthethida gisho, hintena laatisida biittafe shoddana; hinte eronna biittan hinte morketas aylle oothana” yaagees Goday.
17.5: Goday haysada yaagees: “Asan ammanetey, asho ma7ida asan ceeqeteynne ba wozanaa Xoossafe haassey baadetidaysa gido.
17.6: Hessa mela asi bazzon de7iya tushe mela; lo77obay yaa wode I be7enna. I bazzon, mela bessan, asi doonna maxine biittan daana.
17.7: “Godan ammanetiya asi, iya ceeqoy Godaa gidida asi anjetidaysa.
17.8: I haatha matan toketidi, ba xaphuwa goggiya haathan yeddida mitha mela. I awa suulas yayyenna. He mithaa haythay cil7oshin de7ees. Iri bukonna laythan hirgenna; ubba wode ayfe aggenna.
17.9: “Asa wozani ubbaafe aadhidi cimmeesinne iita; iya gaatha qofaa ooni eranaw danda7ii?
17.10: Taani Goday, asa ubbaas iya ogiyadanne iya oosuwada immanaw, asa wozanaa pilgayis; iya kahaa paacayis” yaagees Goday.
17.11: Bessonna ogen shalo shiishiya asi babaa gidonna phuuphulle qoxiya kuraacho mela. Ba laytha bagga zawan aggidi baana; wursethan iya eeyatethay qoncana.
17.12: Nu Xoossa keethay koyrope doomidi, boncho kawotetha araatada dhoqa deriya bolla de7ees.
17.13: Abeeti Godaw, Isra7eele ufaysaw, nena aggida ubbay yeellatana. De7o pulto haatha, nena Godaa enti aggida gisho baanan xaafetida sunthada dhayana.
17.14: Abeeti Godaw, ne ta galataa gidiya gisho, tana patha; ta paxana; tana ashsha; ta attana.
17.15: Asay taako, “ ‘Goday taw odis’ yaagada ne odida qaalay awun de7ii? I ayis poletennee?” yaagosona.
17.16: Taani henthancho gidada nena haggaazo aggabike; enti metootana gallasaa ta amottabike. Ta doonape keyida qaala ne eraasa.
17.17: Tana daganthofa; meto gallas taani baqatada attiya bessay nena.
17.18: Tana yedetheysati yeellato; shin tana yeellayopa. Enta dagantha; shin tana daganthofa. Enta bolla meto eha; enta nam7u kushe seera. Sambaata Bonchite
17.19: Goday taako, “Koyro bada Yihuda kawoti katamaa geliyanne keyiya, asay geliya pengiyaninne hara Yerusalaame pengeta ubban eqa.
17.20: Asaako haysada yaaga: ‘Hinteno Yihuda kawoto, hinteno Yihuda asaw, hinteno Yerusalaame asaw, ha pengetara geliya asaw, ubbay Godaa qaala si7ite.
17.21: Sambaata gallas tooho tookidi Yerusalaame pengiyara gelonna mela naagetite.
17.22: Sambaata gallas hinte keethaafe tooho tookidi kessofite, woyko aybi oosoka oothopite. Kase hinte aawata ta kiittidaysada Sambaata gallas bonchite.
17.23: Gidoshin, enti si7ibookona; banta haythaa taako zaaribookona. Enti tana si7onnanne taape tamaaronna ixidosona.
17.24: Shin hinte taw kiitetiko, Sambaata gallasan tooho tookidi, ha katamaa pengetara gelonna aggiko, Sambaata gallas aykoka oothonna dummayidi bonchiko,
17.25: Dawita araatan uttiya kawoti banta moorinnatara paratanne para gaareta toggidi, ha pengetara gelana. Enti Yihuda asaaranne Yerusalaame kataman de7iya asaara gelana; ha katamay merinaw asi de7iya katama gidana.
17.26: Asay xuussa yarsho, hara yarsho, katha yarsho, ixaanenne galata yarsho ekidi, Yihuda katamatape, Yerusalaame yuushuwan de7iya gutatape, Biniyaame biittafe, gadhape, derey dariya biittafenne, Negebape Godaa Xoossa keethaa yaana.
17.27: Shin hinte Sambaata gallasa dummayidi bonchona aggidi, Sambaata gallasan tooho tookidi, Yerusalaame pengetara gelidi, ta higgiya menthiko, ta he pengetan tama oythana. Yerusalaame kawo keethata maana; he tamay to7enna’ ” yaagees Goday.

18.1: Godaape Ermiyaasako yida qaalay haysa:
18.2: “Dendada urqa medhiya addiya soo ba. Yan ta nena ta qaala sissana” yaagis.
18.3: Taani duge urqa medhiya addiya soo bada, I ba gertuwa bolla urqa medhishin be7as.
18.4: I medhishin, he miishey iya kushen iitis. I he urqa zaaridi munuqidi, bana lo77iya hara miishe kessidi medhis.
18.5: He wode Godaa qaalay, haysada yaagishe taako yis:
18.6: “Isra7eele asaw, urqa medhiya addey ootheysada ta hintena oothanaw danda7ikina? Isra7eele asaw, urqay bana medheysa kushen de7eysada, hinteka ta kushen de7eeta.
18.7: Issi kawotethi woyko issi derey shodetana mela, laaletana melanne dhayana mela ta odida wode,
18.8: he kawotethay ba iitatethaafe simmiko, ta enta bolla ehana gida iitabaa ehonna aggaagana.
18.9: Qassi hara wode issi deriya woyko kawotethaa, ‘Ta hintena keexananne tokana’ gada odida wode,
18.10: he kawotethay ta odeysa si7onna ixidi, ta sinthan iitabaa oothiko, ta oothana gida lo77oba oothonna aggaagana.
18.11: “Hessa gisho, Yihuda asaasinne Yerusalaamen de7iya asaas haysada yaaga. Taani hintew dhayo giigisaysinne iitabaa halchayis. Hinte ubbay hinte iita ogiyape simmite; hinte ogiyanne hinte oosuwa laammite.
18.12: Shin enti, ‘Haysi aykoka maaddenna! Nuuni nu qofaada hanana; nu issoy issoy nu iita wozanaa kaallana’ yaagana” yaagis.
18.13: Hessa gisho, “Goday, ‘Haysa melaba si7i ereetii?’ yaagidi kawotethata oychite. Geela7o gidida Isra7eeley daro shaatiyaba oothasu.
18.14: Libaanose zuma bolla de7iya shachay, zaalla bollafe dhayidi erii? He zumaape goggiya irxa haathi meli erii?
18.15: Shin ta asay tana dogidosona; pathonna xoossatas ixaane cuyisidosona. Banta ogiyape, banta beni ogiyape, gaxa keyidi dhubetidosona.
18.16: Enti banta biitta baysanne kadhetidaba kessidosona. Yaara aadhiya oonika malaaletidi ba huuphiya qaathees.
18.17: Baani doloha bagga carkuwan laaleteysa mela, taani ta asaa morketa sinthan laallana. Enta metuwa gallas ta entaw zoko zaaranaape attishin, ta som7uwa enta bessike” yaagees Goday.
18.18: Asay, “Kahineta matan higgey, cincata matan zorey, nabeta matan qaali dhayonna gisho ane Ermiyaasa bolla maqetoos. Nu inxarsan oykoos; I odiya qaala si7onna ixana” yaagidosona.
18.19: Abeeti Godaw, tana si7a; ta morketi ta bolla giyaba hayza.
18.20: Lo77o oothida asas zaaroy iiteyee? Shin enti taw olla bookosona. Ne hanqoy entafe simmana mela ta enta gisho gaannateysa be7a.
18.21: Hessa gisho, enta nayta koshas aathada imma; enta mashshas aathada imma. Enta macheti na7i baynaysatanne am7o gido. Enta addeti wodhiya hargen gahetonna; enta na7atethati olan wuro.
18.22: Enti tana oykanaw olla bookida gishonne ta tohuwas xihe wothida gisho, qoponna bonqeyisata enta bolla yedda; enta keethan waasoy keyo.
18.23: Shin abeeti Godaw, enti tana wodhanaw maqeteysa ne eraasa. Ne enta iitatethaa atto goopa woyko enta nagaraa ne sinthafe quchofa. Enti ne sinthan xoonetidi kundo; ne shenetiya wode enta haysada ootha.

19.1: Goday taako, “Bada oto medheysafe xugga shamma. Neera guutha biitta cimatanne guutha kahine cimata ekada,
19.2: Kun7a Me7o Pengiya matara aadhada, Hinooma Zangaara ba; yan ta new odiya qaala awaaja.
19.3: ‘Hinteno, Yihuda kawoto, hinteno Yerusalaame katama asaw, Godaa qaala si7ite!’ Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: ‘Si7iya ubbaa haythas iitiya palaba ha biitta bolla ta ehana.’
19.4: Ha asay tana aggidi, enti woyko enta aawati woyko Yihuda kawoti eronna hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisidi ha bessaa tunisidosona. Enti xillo asaa suuthaa ha bessan gussidosona.
19.5: Ta enta kiittonaba woyko entaw odonnaba woyko ta qoponnaba oothidosona; banta adde nayta nagaras taman xuussa yarsho oothidi yarshanaw, dhoqa goyinno bessata gimbidosona.
19.6: Hessa gisho, ha bessay Toofeta woyko Hinooma Zangaara geeteteysi attidi, Shuha Zangaara yaagetidi xeegetana gallasay yaana.
19.7: Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaa halchuwa ta ha bessan laallana. Enti banta morketa mashshaninne bantana wodhanaw koyiya asaa kushen hayqanaada oothana. Enta aha salo kafotasinne sa7a do7atas kathi oothada immana.
19.8: Taani ha katamaa baysanne miichas kessana. Yaara aadhiya ubbay iya dhayuwan malaaletidi, ‘Poora’ yaagana.
19.9: Enti banta macca naytanne adde nayta ashuwa maanada oothana. Enta wodhanaw koyiya morketi enta teqidi waaysiya wode un7etidi enti issoy issuwa ashuwa maana” yaagis.
19.10: “Hessafe guye, neera bida asaa sinthan xuggaa mentha.
19.11: Entako haysada yaaga: xuggay meqidaysadanne zaaridi koolanaw danda7etonnaysada ta ha kawotethaanne ha katamaa mentherethana. Asi aha moogiya bessi bayna gisho Toofetan moogetana.
19.12: Ha bessaaninne iyan de7iya asaa bolla haysa oothana. Ha katamaa Toofetada oothana.
19.13: Yerusalaame asaa keethatinne Yihuda kawota keethati, keethaa bolla dembayidi oothida bessan salo xoolintotas ixaane cuyisidanne hara xoossatas ushsha yarsho gussida keethati ubbay Toofetada tuna gidana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
19.14: “Hessafe guye, Ermiyaasi Goday tinbite odana mela kiitida Toofetape simmidi, Xoossa keetha giddon de7iya dabaaban eqidi asa ubbaako haysada yaagis:
19.15: Enti morgiya gabbisidi, ta odiyaba si7onna ixida gisho ha katamaa bollanne iya heeran de7iya gutata bolla ehana gida iitabaa ubbaa ehana hanayis” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.

20.1: He wode Godaa keethaanne halaqa gidiya, Imera na7aa kahiniya Phaskori Ermiyaasi tinbite odishin si7is.
20.2: Phaskori nabiya Ermiyaasa deshisidi, Qommo Biniyaame Pengiyan Xoossa keethaa geliya pengen gonge luhon qashisis.
20.3: Wontetha gallas Phaskori Ermiyaasa qashope birshin, Ermiyaasi iyaw haysada yaagis: “Hachife doomin, Goday ne sunthaa Phaskori yaagenna; I ne sunthaa ‘Yan Han Dagama’ yaagana.
20.4: Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Taani nena, newunne ne laggeta ubbaas dagama oothana. Enti neeni xeellishin, banta morketa mashshan wurana. Taani Yihuda asa ubbaa Babiloone kawa kushen aathada immana. I enta di7idi, Babiloone efidi, yan mashshan wodhana.
20.5: Hessadaka, ha katama shaluwanne duretetha ubbaa, oyki yedhidaba ubbaa, haaridaba ubbaanne Yihuda kawota miishiya ubbaa taani enta morketas aathada immana; enti enta bonqidi Babiloone efana.
20.6: Qassi neeni Phaskori, ne son de7iya asa ubbay di7etidi, Babiloone baana. Neeni wordo tinbite odida ne laggeta ubbaaraka yan hayqananne yan moogetana’ yaagees” yaagis. Ermiyaasa Mootuwa
20.7: Abeeti Godaw, neeni tana cimmadasa; taanika cimetas. Neeni taape minnada, tana xoonadasa. Gallasa kumetha taani asa miichas attas; ubbay tana qelqisis.
20.8: Taani haasaya wode ubban, “Makallabaynne dhayoy gakis” gada waassayis. Godaa qaalay taw gallas gallas borenne qelqisethi ehis.
20.9: Taani, “Taani GODAABA denthada odike” woyko, “Iya sunthan nam7antho odike” giiko, Godaa qaalay ta meqethaa giddon qum7etidi, eexiya tama mela gididi, ta wozanan michees. Taani giddon oykada ashshona gada daaburas; shin teqanaw danda7abike.
20.10: Taani daro kalkasha si7as; “Yan han dagami de7ees! Ane iya mootite! Nuunika iya mootoos” yaagosona. Taw mata laggeti ubbay ta kundethaa naagidi, “Ooni eri, nuuni iya oykana melanne nu haluwa keyana mela, I cimmanaw danda7ees” yaagosona.
20.11: Shin Goday yashisiya toora qaradan taara de7ees. Hessa gisho, tana yedetheysati dhubetana; enti tana xoonokona. Entaw giigonna gisho, enti gita yeella yeellatana. Enta kawushay kumthi dogetenna.
20.12: Abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw, xillota paaceyso, wozananne kaha be7eyso, neeni ta morketa bolla ne haluwa keyada tana bessa. Ayis giiko, taani ta mootuwa new aathas.
20.13: Godaas yexite! Godaa galatite! ayis giiko, I manqota iitata kushepe ashshees.
20.14: Taani yeletida gallasay baadetidaysa gido! Ta aayiya tana yelida gallasay anjetofo!
20.15: Ta aawas, “New mishiraacho; new adde na7i yeletis!” yaagi odidi, daro ufaysida urayka baadetidaba gido!
20.16: He addey Goday qadhetonna aathidi yeggidi dhaysida katamatada hano. He addey wonta waasuwa, gallas seetan, “Olay gakis!” giya odaa si7o.
20.17: Ayis giiko, ta aayiya taw duufo gidana melanne I uloyka tana merinaw oyki uttana mela, tana ulon wodhibeenna.
20.18: Taani metonne azzano be7anawunne laytha ubbaa yeellatashe wursanaw, ayis ta aaye ulope keyadina?

21.1: Kawoy Sedeqiyaasi Malkiya na7aa Phaskoranne Ma7iseya na7aa kahiniya Sofoniyaasa kiitida wode, Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis:
21.2: Enti, “Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori ba olanchotara ha katamaa teqida gisho nuus Godaa oycha. Ooni eri, Goday beniysada malaalsiya oosuwa nu gisho oothidi, iya guye zaaronna aggenna” yaagidosona.
21.3: Ermiyaasi entaw zaaridi, “Bidi Sedeqiyaasako yaagite:
21.4: ‘Neeni Babiloone kawuwaranne gimbiyafe karera ne katama teqida iya olanchotara oletiyanne ne kushen de7iya ola miishiya ta ne bolla zaarana; enta ubbaa ha katamaa giddo gelsana.
21.5: Taani, ta huuphen seeras micetida kushen, wolqaama qesiyan, yilon, hanqoninne wolqaama gadon nena olana.
21.6: Ta ha kataman de7iya asaanne mehiya shocana; enti iita gadon wurana.
21.7: Hessafe guye, Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasa, iya moorinnata, gadope, mashshafenne koshape attida, ha katama asa ubbaa, Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoorasinne enta wodhanaw koyiya morketas aathada immana. I enta qara mashshan goyrana. I entaw qadhetenna; saletidi aggenna; maarenna’ ” yaagees Goday Isra7eele Xoossay.
21.8: Goday Ermiyaasako, “Gujada asaako haysada yaaga: ta hinte sinthan de7o ogiyanne hayqo ogiya wothas.
21.9: Ha kataman gam7iya oonika mashshan woyko koshan woyko gadon hayqana. Shin katamaape keyidi katamaa teqidi oykida Babiloonetas ba kushiya immiya oonika paxa attana; he uray ba shempuwa ashshana.
21.10: Taani ha katamaa bolla lo77oba gidonashin iitabaa oothanaw dendas. Ta iya Babiloone kawas aathada immana; I ha katamaa taman xuuggana” yaagees Goday.
21.11: Yihuda kawa keetha asaas haysada yaaga: Godaa qaala si7ite!
21.12: Hinteno, Dawita kochato, Goday hinteko haysada yaagees; “Wonta wonta suure pirdite; bonqetidaysata un7ethiya asaa kushepe ashshite. Hessa hinte oothonna ixiko, hinte iita oosuwa gaason ta hanqoy tamada eexana; oonika iya toysenna” yaagees Goday.
21.13: Neno, Yerusalaame, denban de7iya zaallada, zangaarape dhoqu gada bentaasa; shin ta nena olana. Neeni, “Oonika ta bolla xaalenna woyko ta de7iya bessaa gelenna” yaagasa.
21.14: Shin, “Taani Goday nena ne oosuwada seerana. Taani ne kawo keethan tama oythana; ne yuushuwan de7iya ubbaa midi dhaysana” yaagees Goday.

22.1: Goday haysada yaagees; “Duge Yihuda kawa gadho bada, yan ha qaala oda.
22.2: ‘Neno Yihuda kawaw, Dawita araatan uttidayso, neeni, ne moorinnatinne ha pengiyara geliya ne asay Godaa qaala si7ite!
22.3: Suure pirdaa pirdite; xillo oothite. Bonqetidaysa un7ethiya asaa kushepe ashshite. Bete asaas, yi7otasinne am7etas gene oothopite woyko sugopite. Xillo asa suuthu ha bessan gussofite.
22.4: Ha kiitata hinte naagiko, Dawita araatan uttiya kawoti paranne para gaare toggidi, banta moorinnataranne banta asaara ha kawo gadho pengiyara gelana.
22.5: Shin hinte kiitetonna ixiko, ha kawo gadhoy baysa gidana yaagada ta Goday ta huuphen caaqas’ ” yaagees Goday.
22.6: Goday Yihuda kawo gadhuwaba haysada yaagees: “Neeni taw Galada biittanne Libaanose zuma mela gidikoka, ta nena mela biittanne asi doonna katama oothana.
22.7: Taani nena laaliya asaa ola miishe oythada kiittana; enti ne ziga tuuqeta qanxerethidi, taman yeggana.
22.8: “Dumma dumma kawotethatape asay he katamaa matara aadhishe, ‘Goday ayis ha gita katamaa haysada oothidee?’ yaagidi issoy issuwa oychana.
22.9: Enti zaaridi, ‘Godaa banta Xoossara caaqida caaquwa menthidi, hara xoossata goyinnida gishonne oothida gishosa’ ” yaagana.
22.10: Hayqida kawa Iyosiyasas yeekofite woyko kayotofite. Hessa aggidi, di7etidi bida Saalomas seeletidi yeekite. I guye simmenna; ba yeletida biitta zaaridi be7enna.
22.11: Ba aawa bessan Yihudan kawotidi de7ishe, ha bessaafe bida Iyosiyaasa na7a Saloomaba Goday haysada yaagees. “I guye simmenna.
22.12: I di7etidi bida biittan hayqana; simmidi ha biitta be7enna” yaagees Goday.
22.13: Ba keetha genen keexeysa, geella ogen pooqe bolla pooqe gujeysa, ba asaas aykoka immonnanne gate qanxonna oosiseysa ayye!
22.14: He uray, “Taani taw gita pooqey de7iya dalga keethi keexana” yaagdi, ba keethas dalga maskooteta kessidi, ziga mithan alleeqisidi, zo7o qalame tiyees.
22.15: Ne daro zigan keexidaysi nena lo77o kawo kessees gada qopay? Ne aawa Iyosyaasas miyabaynne uyaabay dhayidee? I suure pirda pirdis; xillo oothis. Hessa gisho, iyaw ubbabay injetis.
22.16: I manqotasinne metootanchotas suure pirdiya gisho, ubbabay iyaw injetis. Godaa erees guussay haysa.
22.17: Shin ne ayfeynne ne wozanay shempiday, cimon go77a demo, xillo suuthi guso, genenne un7etho bollana.
22.18: Hessa gisho, Goday Iyosyaasa na7aa, Yihuda kawa Iyo7aqeemaba haysada yaagees: “I hayqiya wode enti iyaw, ‘Woo! Ta ishaw, woo! Ta ishaw’ yaagidi yeekokona. Qassi, ‘Woo! Ta godaw, woo! Ta kawaw’ yaagidi zeleelokona.
22.19: Iya moogoyka hare moogo mela gidana. Iya ahay gooshetidi, Yerusalaame pengetape ya baggan yegetana” yaagees Goday.
22.20: Goday Yerusalaameba haysada yaagees: “Olas neera zupeteysati ubbay xoonetida gisho, pude Libaanose bada, yan waassa. Baasane biittan waaso suulisa; Abariima zuman waassa.
22.21: Ne saro de7iya wode ta new odas; shin ne tana si7onna ixadasa. Ne na7atethafe doomin ne hanoy haysa; ne taw kiitetonna ixadasa.
22.22: Ne henthanchota ubbaa carkoy efana; olas neera zupeteysati di7etidi baana. He wode ne iitatetha ubbaa gisho yeellatananne kawuyana.
22.23: Hinteno, Libaanose zigan keexetida keethan de7eysato, iqethi oykida maccasada un7i hinte bolla puttu giiko hinte waananee?” yaagees.
22.24: Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta de7oy ero! Neeni Iyo7aqeema na7ay, Yihuda kawoy Yo7akini, ta ushacha kushen de7iya ta attamiya migiddo gidiyakoka ta nena kessa yeggana.
22.25: Nena wodhanaw koyeysatas, ne yayiya Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoorasinne iya olanchotas ta nena aathada immana.
22.26: Ta nenanne ne aayiw hinte yeletonna hara biitta holana; hinte nam7ayka yan hayqana.
22.27: Hinte simmanaw laamotiya biitta polo simmeketa” yaagees.
22.28: Ha addey Yo7akini, kadhetidanne meqida xuggee? I, oonika koyonna miishee? Inne iya nayti ayis goodetidi, eronna biittan yegetidi attidonaa?
22.29: Biitte, biitte, biitte, Godaa qaala si7a!
22.30: “Iya kochaafe issuwasika injetonna gishonne Dawita araatan uttiya woyko Yihudan kawotiya asi issoyka bayna gisho, ha addiya, na7i bayna asi, ba laytha ubban de7oy injetonna asi” gada xaafa yaagees Goday.

23.1: “Ta hentha bessan de7iya dorsata dhaysiyanne laaliya henthanchota ayye!” yaagees Goday.
23.2: Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, ba asaa heemmiya henthanchota haysada yaagees: “Hinte ta dorsata laallida gisho, gooddida gisho, naagiboonna gishonne hinte oothida hinte iita oosuwa gisho ta hintena seerana.
23.3: Ta wudiyape attidaysata ta kase laallida biitta ubbaafe ta huuphen shiishana. Enta guye enta hentha bessaa zaarana; enti yan yeletidi darana.
23.4: Enta loythidi heemmiya henthanchota entaw shuumana. Enti zaaridi yayyokona; dagammokona; entafe issoyka dhayenna” yaagees Goday.
23.5: “Dawita kochaafe xillo aaca denthana wodey yaana. I kawotethaa cincatethan aysana; biitta bolla suurenne xillo oothana.
23.6: Iya kawotetha wodiyan Yihudi attana; Isra7eeley saro daana. Iya sunthay, ‘Xoossay nu Xillotethaa’ geetetana” yaagees Goday.
23.7: Hessa gisho, “Asay, ‘Isra7eela asaa Gibxe biittafe kessida Goday eriya mela’ yaagidi caaqanaysa aggidi,
23.8: ‘Isra7eela kochaa pudeha bagga biittafenne enta laallida biitta ubbaafe ehida Goday eriya mela’ yaagidi caaqana wodey yaana. Hessafe guye, enti banta buzo biittan daana” yaagees Goday. Wordo Nabeta
23.9: Nabetaba ta qopiya wode ta wozanay daaburees; ta meqethati kokoroosona. Godaa gishonne iya geeshsha qaala gisho woyney xoonin mathotida asi gidas.
23.10: Biittay laymatethan kumis. Qangetha gisho, biittay yeekees; bazzo hentha bessati melidosona. Nabeti iita ogen hemetoosona; banta maata like gidonna ogen go7etoosona.
23.11: “Nabetinne kahineti tunidosona; hari attoshin ta keethan enti oothiya iitaa ta be7as” yaagees Goday.
23.12: “Hessa gisho, enta ogey hallixana; enti dhuman yegetana, dhubetidi kundana. Enti seeretiya wode enta bolla gado ehana” yaagees Goday.
23.13: “Samaare nabeta giddon iitabaa be7as. Enti Ba7aale sunthan tinbite odoosona; ta asaa Isra7eele balethoosona.
23.14: Qassi Yerusalaame nabeta giddonka haythas deexiyaba be7as. Enti laymatoosona; wordotidi de7oosona. Oonika ba iita oosuwape simmonna mela enti iitaa ootheyisata minthethoosona. Enti ubbay taw Soodoma mela; Yerusalaame asay Gamoora mela” yaagees Goday.
23.15: Hessa gisho, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday nabetaba haysada yaagees: “Yerusalaame nabeta doonape tunabay keyidi, biitta ubban laaletida gisho, ta enta cammiya kathi muzana; enta wodhiya haathi ushshana” yaagees.
23.16: “Nabeti odiyaba si7opite; enti hanonna ufaysan kunthoosona. Goday odonnashin enti bantafe medhi kessidi qoncethi odoosona.
23.17: Tana kadheysatako, ‘Hinte saro daana’ yaagosona; qassi banta wozana iitatethaa kaalleysatako, ‘Hintena iitabay gakenna’ yaagosona” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
23.18: “Shin be7anaw woyko iya qaala si7anaw Goday zoriya bessan entafe oone eqiday? Iya qaala si7iday oonee?
23.19: Godaa gotey hanqon dendana; wolqaama hobbey iitata huuphiya shocana.
23.20: Ba wozanaa qofaa polonna de7ishe, Godaa hanqoy simmenna. Wursetha wodiyan haysa hinte akeekana.
23.21: Ta ha nabeta kiittabike; shin enti banta kiita ekidi woxoosona. Ta entaw odabike; shin enti tinbite odoosona.
23.22: Enti ta zoriya bessan eqidabaa gidiyako, ta qaala, ta asaas odanashin. Enti iita ogiyapenne enta iita oosuwape zaaranashin” yaagees Goday.
23.23: “Ta mata xalaala Xoossee? Haaho Xoossi gidikina?
23.24: Ta be7onnaada, asi geema bessan bana qosanaw danda7ii? Saloninne sa7an kumiday tana gidikina?” yaagees Goday.
23.25: “Ta sunthan wordo tinbite odeysati giyaba si7as. Enti, ‘Ta amuho be7as; ta amuho be7as’ yaagosona.
23.26: Ha nabeti bantaw medhidi kessidi odiya wordo tinbitey enta wozanan awude gakanaw gam7anee?
23.27: Enta aawati Ba7aale eeqa goyinnidi ta sunthaa dogidaysada, enti issoy issuwas odiya amuhuwan, ta asay ta sunthaa dogana mela oothanaw qopoosona.
23.28: Amuho amuhiya nabey ba amuhuwa odo; shin ta qaala si7iya nabey ta qaala ammanetidi odo. Dalinne gistey awun gahetii?
23.29: Ta qaalay tama mela gidennee? Zaalla mentherethiya naariqa mela gidennee?” yaagees Goday.
23.30: “Hessa gisho, ta qaala issoy issuwafe kaysotidi taape ekida daanisidi tinbite odiya nabeta ta ixayis.
23.31: Hessadaka, banta wozanaa qofaa odishe, ‘Goday yaagees’ giya nabetaka taani ixayis.
23.32: Wordo amuhishe tinbite odiya nabeta bolla ta dendana. Enti banta amuhuwan katidi tinbite odiya nabeta taani ixayis. Ta enta kiittonnashin woyko shuumonnashin wordo tinbite odoosona; ta asaa balethoosona. Enti ha asaa aykoka maaddokona” yaagees Goday. Godaa Kiita
23.33: “Goday taako, ‘Ha asay woyko nabey woyko kahiney, Godaa kiitay aybee?’ gidi oychiko, ne entako, ‘Goday, ta hintena holana’ yaagees” gada oda.
23.34: “Nabey woyko kahiney woyko asay, ‘Haysi Godaa kiita’ yaagidi odiko, ta he addiyanne iya soo asaa seerana.
23.35: Hessa aggidi issoy issoy, ‘Goday woygidee? woyko Goday ay odidee?’ yaagidi ba laggetanne ba dabbota oychanaw bessees.
23.36: Hizape oonika, ‘Godaa kiita’ yaagidi zaaridi odetanaw bessenna. Hessa gisho, iya doonape keyiya qaalay iyaw kiita gidiya gisho, de7o Xoossaa, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa, nu Xoossaa qaala hinte mirqeeta.
23.37: Neeni nabetako, ‘Goday hintena woygidee?’ woyko ‘Ay odidee?’ yaagada oychanaw bessees.
23.38: Shin hinte, ‘Haysi Godaa kiita’ giiko, Goday haysada yaagees: taani hintena, ‘Haysi Godaa kiita goopite’ yaaginka hinte, ‘Haysi Godaa kiita’ gideta.
23.39: Hessa gisho, ta hintena dogana; hintenanne hinte aawatas immida katamaa kumethi ta sinthafe diggana.
23.40: Ta hinte bolla merinaa kawushanne dogetonna yeella ehana” yaagees Goday.

24.1: Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori, Iyo7aqeema na7aa, Yihuda kawa Ikoniyaana, Yihuda halaqatara, kushe hiillataranne birata qoxeysatara Yerusalaamepe Babiloone di77idi efidaape guye, Goday tana qoncethi bessis. Goday tana, Xoossa keethas sintha baggara balasey de7iya nam7u keesheta bessis.
24.2: Issi keeshiyan koyro teerida daaniya lo77o balasey de7ees; hanko keeshiyan qassi maanaw giigonna iita balasey de7ees.
24.3: Goday taako, “Ermiyaasa, ne be7ey aybee?” yaagidi oychis. Taani, “Balase be7ayis; lo77o teeray daro lo77o; iita teeray qassi maanaw giigonna daro iita” yaagas.
24.4: Hessafe guye, Godaa qaalay taako yis:
24.5: Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Yihuda biittafe di7on Babiloone biitta yeddida asata, ha lo77o balase teerada lo77o gaana.
24.6: Taani lo77o ayfen enta xeellana; qassi enta zaarada ha biitta ehana. Ta enta keexanape attishin, laallike; enta tokanape attishin, shoddike.
24.7: Taani Godaa gididaysa enti erana mela entaw wozana immana. Enti banta kumetha wozanape taako simmanaw de7iya gisho, enti ta ase gidana; ta enta Xoosse gidana” yaagees.
24.8: Gidoshin, “Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasa, iya moorinnata, ha biittan gidin Yerusalaamen attida asaanne Gibxe biittan de7eyisata maanaw giigonna daro iita balase teerada iita gaana.
24.9: Taani enta gooddada yeddiya biitta ubban, ha sa7a kawotethati enta be7idi dagammana. Taani enta ixetidaysata, cayetidaysata, boretidaysata, leemiseteyisata, qelqiseteyisata, baadetidaysata oothana.
24.10: Ta entawunne enta mayzatas immida biittafe enti polo dhayana gakanaw mashsha, koshanne bosha enta bolla yeddana” yaagees Goday.

25.1: Iyosyaasa na7ay, Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi kawotida oyddantho laythan, Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori kawotida koyro laythan, Yihuda asaabay Ermiyaasako yida qaalay haysa.
25.2: Nabey Ermiyaasi Yihuda ubbaasinne Yerusalaamen de7iya ubbaas haysada yaagis:
25.3: Amoxe na7ay, Yihuda kawoy, Iyosyaasi kawotida tammanne heedzantho laythafe doomidi, hachi gakanaw, laatamanne heedzu laythi Godaa qaalay taako yis. Ta hintew zaara zaara odas; shin hinte si7onna ixideta.
25.4: Goday ba aylleta, nabeta ubbaa zaari zaari hinteko kiittis; shin hinte si7onna ixideta.
25.5: Enti, “Hinte ubbay hinte iita ogiyapenne hinte iita oosuwape simmite. Goday hintewunne hinte mayzatas merinaw immida biittan hinte daana.
25.6: Hara xoossata goyinnanawunne entaw oothanaw kaallopite. Qassi hinte, hinte kushen oothida eeqatan Godaa hanquwa denthethofite. Hessi haniko Goday hintena qohenna” yaagidosona.
25.7: “Hinte ta odidaysa si7onna ixidi, hinte kushey oothidaban tana yiloyideta. Hinte, hintena qohiyaba oothideta” yaagees Goday.
25.8: “Hessa gisho, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: hinte ta qaalas kiitetonna ixida gisho,
25.9: pudeha bagga asa ubbaanne ta aylliya Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora xeegana. Enta ha biitta bolla, ha biittan de7iya asa bollanne heeran de7iya kawotethata ubbaa bolla ehana. Ta ha biitta kumethi dhaysana; qassi be7ida ubbay shaatiyabanne qelqisiyaba oothana” yaagees Goday.
25.10: Enta giddofe ililsinne ufaysa qaala, yaagano girsi, woxa girsinne xompe poo7o dhaysana.
25.11: Ha biittay kumethi laaletidanne baysa biitta gidana; kawotethati Babiloone kawas laapun tammu laythi haaretana.
25.12: “Laapun tammu laythay poletidaape guye, taani Babiloone kawanne iya asaa enta nagara gisho seerana; enta biitta merinaw baysa oothana.
25.13: Ta ha biitta bolla odida ubbaa, Ermiyaasi kawotethata ubba bolla odida tinbitiyanne ha maxaafan xaafetida ubbaa ha biitta bolla ehana.
25.14: Daro kawotethatinne gita kawoti Babiloone asaa haarana. Ta entaw, enta hanuwadanne enta kushe oosuwada zaarana” yaagees Goday. Xoossa Hanqo Xuu7a
25.15: “Ta hanquwan kumida woyne wanca ta kushepe eka. Efada ta nena kiittiya kawotethata ubbaa ushsha.
25.16: Enti uyidi, taani enta giddo yeddiya mashshaa gaason gandigarananne gooyana” yaagees Goday Isra7eele Xoossay.
25.17: Taani Godaa kushepe wanca ekada, I tana kiitida kawotethata ubbaa ushshas.
25.18: Hachi hanidaysada enta ubbaa dhayonne dagama, cashshenne baadethi oothana mela Yerusalaamenne Yihuda katamata, iya kawotanne iya moorinnata ubbaa ushshas.
25.19: Gibxe kawa, iya aylleta, iya moorinnata, iya biitta asa ubbaanne
25.20: yan de7iya allaga asa ubbaa ushshas. Oxa kawota ubbaa ushshas. Filisxeemen de7iya Asqaloona, Gaaza, Eqroonanne Ashdoodape attida kawota ubbaa ushshas.
25.22: Xiroosa kawota ubbaa, Sidoona kawota ubbaanne Medetiraane Abbaafe hefinthan, haahon de7iya kawota ushshas.
25.23: Dedaana, Temaana, Buzanne banta huuphiya gaxa meediya asa ubbaa ushshas.
25.24: Arabe kawota ubbaanne mela biittan de7iya walaka asaa kawota ubbaa ushshas.
25.25: Zimira, Elaamanne Meedona kawota ubbaa ushshas.
25.26: Pudeha biitta kawota ubbaa, haahoninne matan de7iya kawota ubbaa kaallada kaallada sa7aa bolla de7iya kawotethata ubbaa ushshas. Entafe guye Babiloone kawoy uyana.
25.27: Goday taako, “Hessa gisho, ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay hinteko haysada yaagees’ yaaga. ‘Uyitenne mathotite; cooyitenne kundite. Taani hinte giddo yeddiya mashshaa gaason zaaridi dendofite’ yaagis.
25.28: Shin enti ne kushepe wanca ekonnanne uyonna ixiko, entako haysada yaaga. ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday hinteko haysada yaagees: hinte uyanaw bessees.
25.29: Ta sunthan xeegetida katamaa bolla iitabaa oothanaw doomayis. Yaatin hinte seerettona attanaw danda7eetii? Ta sa7an de7iya ubbaa bolla mashsha xeegida gisho hinte seerettonna atteketa’ ” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
25.30: “Hessa gisho, Ermiyaasa, ha qaala ubbay enta bolla poletanaysa entaw oda. Goday dhoqan guummana; Goday ba geeshsha bessaafe ba guntha sissana. I ba biitta bolla xaaggana; woyne gum7eysati waasseysada sa7an de7iya ubbaa bolla waassana.
25.31: Godaas kawotethatara mootoy de7iya gisho iya waasoy sa7a gaxaa gakidi si7etees. Goday asa ubbaara pirdetana; I iitata mashshas aathidi immana” yaagees Goday.
25.32: “Iitabay kawotethaafe kawotethaa laaletis; sa7aa gaxape gotey dendis” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
25.33: He wode Goday wodhidaysata ahay, biitta bolla ha gaxape ya gaxa gakanaw laaletana. Entaw yeeketenna, enta ahay shiiqenna woyko moogetenna; enti biittan pito mela gidana.
25.34: Hinteno, henthanchoto, yeekitenne waassite. Hinteno, wudiya kaaletheysato, bidon gondoretite. Hinte shuketiya wodey gakis; hinte kundananne lo77o urqa miishada meqeretana.
25.35: Henthanchoti baqatidi attiya bessi baawa; wudiya kaaletheysati kessi ekiya bessi baawa.
25.36: Goday enta hentha gadiya dhaysiya gisho, henthanchoti waassiya waasuwanne wudiya kaaletheysati yeekiya yeehuwa si7ite.
25.37: Godaa suulliya sheniya gaason saro biittay baysatana.
25.38: Gaammoy ba de7iya worape keyeysada Goday ba de7iya bessaafe keyana. Enta biittay un7etheyisata mashshaninne Godaa suulliya hanquwan baysa gidana.

26.1: Iyosyaasa na7ay Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi kawotida wode Godaa qaalay yis.
26.2: Goday, “Xoossa keetha dabaaban eqa. Xoossa keethan goyinnanaw Yihuda katamatape yaa ubbaas, ta nena kiitida qaalape issuwaka ashshona oda.
26.3: Enti si7idi, banta iita ogiyape simmaneko ooni eri. Hessa gidiko, taani enta iitatetha gisho dhaysanaw qopidaysa aggaagana.”
26.4: Entako haysada yaaga: “Hinte tana si7onna ixikonne ta hintew immida higgiya kiitetonna ixiko,
26.5: hinte si7onna ixikoka ta zaara zaarada hinteko kiitida, ta aylleta nabeta qaala si7onnan ixiko,
26.6: ta ha xoossa keethaa Seeloda oothana. Ha katamaa sa7an de7iya kawotethata ubbaas baadethi oothana” yaagis.
26.7: Ermiyaasi Xoossa keethan ha qaala odishin, kahineti, nabetinne asa ubbay si7idosona.
26.8: Ermiyaasi, Goday, oda gidi immida kiita odidi ongida wode kahineti, nabetinne asa ubbay iya oykidi, “Ne hayqanaw bessaasa” yaagidosona.
26.9: Neeni, “ ‘Ha xoossa keethay Seeloda hanana; qassi ha katamay dhayana; baysa gidana’ yaagada, Godaa sunthan ayis tinbite odadii?” yaagidi, Xoossa keethan shiiqida asa ubbay Ermiyaasa teqidosona.
26.10: Yihuda halaqati hessa si7ida wode, kawo gadhope keyidi, Xoossa keethi yidosona. Xoossa keethan Ooratha Penge geetetiya pengiyan uttidosona.
26.11: Kahinetinne nabeti halaqatakonne asa ubbaako haysada yaagidosona: “Hinte, hinte haythan si7idaysada, ha addey ha katamaa bolla tinbite odida gisho, I hayqanaw bessees!” yaagidosona.
26.12: Ermiyaasi halaqatakonne asa ubbaako haysada yaagis: “Ha hinte si7ida qaala ubbay ha xoossa keethaa bollanne ha katamaa bolla hanana gada ta odana mela Goday tana kiittis.
26.13: Hiza hinte ogiyanne hinte oosuwa laammite; Godaa hinte Xoossaa qaalas kiitetite. Hessa hinte oothiko, Goday hinte bolla ehana gida iitabaa aggaagana.
26.14: Tana gidiko, ta hinte kushen de7ayis. Hintew lo77onne suure daanidaba ta bolla oothite.
26.15: Taani ha qaala ubbaa hintew odana mela Goday tuma tana kiitida gisho, hinte tana wodhiko, hinte hinte bolla, ha katama bollanne iyan de7iya asaa bolla xillo suutha aco ehanaysa erite” yaagis.
26.16: Halaqatinne asa ubbay, kahinetinne nabeti, “I, Godaa, nu Xoossaa sunthan nuus odida gisho, ha addey hayqanaw bessenna” yaagidosona.
26.17: Biitta cimatape issoti issoti dendi eqidi, shiiqida asaako haysada yaagidosona:
26.18: “Hizqiyaasi Yihudan kawotida laythan Mooreseeta addey Mikiyaasi kase Yihuda asaas haysada yaagidi, tinbite odis: ‘Xiyooney shooqada goyetana. Yerusalaame katamay laaletidi, laaletha doore gidana. Xoossa keethay keexetida derey wora gidana’ yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday” yaagis.
26.19: Yaatin, “Yihuda kawoy Hizqiyaasinne Yihuda asa ubbay iya wodhidona? Akay, Hizqiyaasi Godaas yayyidi, Godaa maarotethi oychibeennee? Godaay enta bolla ehana gida iitabaa aggibeenee? Shin nuuni nu bolla iitabaa ehana hanoos” yaagidosona. Iyo7aqeemi Ooriyoona Wodhisis
