26.20: Qiriyat-Yi7aarima geetetiya bessan, Shamaya na7aa, Ooriyoona geetetiya issi addey de7ees. Ika Ermiyaasi odidaysada, ha katamaa bollanne ha biitta bolla Godaa sunthan kase tinbite odis.
26.21: Kawoy Iyo7aqeemi, iya olanchoti, iya moorinnati, Ooriyooni odidaysa si7ida wode kawoy iya wodhanaw koyis. Ooriyooni hessa si7ida wode yayyidi, Gibxe baqatis.
26.22: Gidoshin, kawoy Iyo7aqeemi Akboora na7aa Elnaatananne hara asata Gibxe kiittis.
26.23: Enti Ooriyoona Gibxefe kessidi, kawa Iyo7aqeemeko efin, iya mashshan wodhisidi derey moogetiya duufon moogidosona.
26.24: Shin Safaana na7ay, Akqaami Ermiyaasa maaddida gisho asay iya wodhanaw aathidi immibookona.

27.1: Iyosyaasa na7ay Sedeqiyaasi, Yihudan kawoto doomida wode ha qaalay Godaape Ermiyaasako yis.
27.2: “Dafo gonne wodorora de7iya qambara medhada ne gannan wotha.
27.3: Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasako Yerusalaame kiitetida asaa baggara, Edoome, Moo7abe, Amoone, Xiroosanne Sidoona kiitta.
27.4: Enti banta godatas odana mela enta kiitta. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees:
27.5: ‘Ta gita wolqaaninne ta micetida kushen sa7aa, sa7an de7iya asaa, mehenne do7ata medhas; taani iya, ta koyiya oodeska immayis.
27.6: Ha77i ta biitta ubbaa ta aylliyas, Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras immas. Qassi ta bazzo do7atika iyaw haaretana mela oothas.
27.7: Iya biittay haratas haaretiya wodey gakanaw kawotethati ubbay iyaw, iya na7aasinne iya na7aa na7aas haaretana. Hessafe guye, daro kawotethatinne gita kawoti iya haarana.’
27.8: “Shin ay biitti woyko ay kawotethi Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras kiitetonna ixikonne iya qambaran gelonna ixiko, he kawotethay iya kushen dhayana gakanaw mashshan, koshaninne boshan seerana.
27.9: Hessa gisho, ‘Babiloone kawas haareteketa’ giya hinte nabeta, hintew kaayeyisata, hinte amuho billeyisata, hinte marotanne moytille xeegeyisata si7opite.
27.10: Enti hintew wordo odoosona; hintena hinte biittafe shoddana; hintena gooddada kessana; hinteka dhayana.
27.11: Shin ay kawotethika Babiloone kawa qambaran gelidi, iyaw haaretiko, ta he kawotethaa iya biittan ashshana; enti he biitta goyana; yan daana” yaagees Goday.
27.12: Taani, Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasaska ha qaala odas; “Babiloone kawa qambaran gelada iyawunne iya asaas haaretiko, ne de7on daana.
27.13: Goday Babiloone kawas haaretonna ixiya kawotethas odidaysada mashshan, koshaninne boshan nenne ne asay ayis hayqeetii?
27.14: Enti odey wordo gidiya gisho, ‘Hinte Babiloone kawas haareteketa’ yaagidi odiya nabeta si7opite.
27.15: Ta enta kiittabike; shin enti ta sunthan wordo tinbite odoosona. Hessa gisho, ta hintena gooddada kessana; hintenne hinte nabeti dhayana” yaagees Goday.
27.16: Hessafe guye, ta kahinetasinne asa ubbaas haysada yaagada odas: “Xoossa keetha miishey Babiloonepe matara simmidi yaana” yaagidi wordo odiya nabeta si7opite.
27.17: Enti giyaba si7onna aggidi, Babiloone kawas haaretite; hinte de7on daana. Ha katamay ayis laaletida bessi gidanee?
27.18: Enti tuma nabe gidikonne Godaa qaalay entan de7iko, Xoossa keethan, Yihuda kawo gadhoninne Yerusalaamen attida miishey Babiloone boonnada Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa Xoossaa woosso.
27.19: “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, xoossa keetha karen eqida nam7u naase birata tuussatabaa, gita keretabaa, caana gaaretabaanne hara miishetaba haysada yaagees:
27.20: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Iyo7aqeema na7aa, Yihuda kawa Ikoniyaananne Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya gita asa ubbaa di77idi efida wode,
27.21: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, Xoossa keethan, Yihuda kawo gadhoninne Yerusalaamen attida miishetaba haysada yaagees;
27.22: Enti Babiloone biitta gaazetana; ta enta gisho yaana wodey gakanaw, enti yan daana. He wode ta enta guye zaarada enta bessan wothana” yaagees Goday.

28.1: He laythi, Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi kawoto doomida oyddantho laythan, ichashantho ageenan Gaba7oona addey, Azuura na7ay nabey Hanaani, Xoossa keethan kahinetanne asa ubbaa sinthan taako haysada yaagis:
28.2: “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, ‘Babiloone kawa qambara menthana.
28.3: Babiloone kawoy, Nabukadanaxoori, Babiloone efida Xoossa keethaa miishe ubbaa ta nam7u laytha giddon zaarada ha bessaa ehana.
28.4: Iyo7aqeema na7aa, Yihuda kawa Yo7akina, Yihudape di7etidi Babiloone bida asa ubbaa zaarada ha bessaa ehana. Taani Babiloone kawa qambara menthana’ ” yaagees Goday.
28.5: Xoossa keethaa giddon eqida kahinetanne asa ubbaa sinthan nabey Ermiyaasi, nabiya Hananako haysada yaagis.
28.6: “Amin7i! Goday ne gidaysada ootho. Xoossa keetha miishetanne di7etidi bida asa ubbaa Babiloonepe zaaridi, ne odiya qaala Goday polo!
28.7: Gidoshin, ta newunne ne asaas odeysa si7a.
28.8: Neepenne taape kase de7ida nabeti, olaba, dhayobanne gadoba gita kawotethata bolla tinbite odidosona.
28.9: Shin, Saroba odiya nabey, tuma Xoossi kiitida nabe gideysi eretey, I odiya tinbitey poletiya wodena” yaagis.
28.10: Hessafe guye, nabey Hanaani, nabiya Ermiyaasa gannaafe qambara ekidi menthis.
28.11: Hanaani asa ubbaa sinthan, “Taani nam7u laytha giddon Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora qambara kawotethata ubbaa gannaafe denthada haysada menthana” yaagees Goday. Hessafe guye, Ermiyaasi dendidi, ba ogiya bis.
28.12: Nabey Hanaani, nabiya Ermiyaasa gannaafe menthida guutha wodepe guye, Godaa qaalay nabiya Ermiyaasako haysada yaagishe yis.
28.13: Bada Hanaanas oda; “Neeni mitha qambara menthadasa; shin neeni iya gisho birata qambara medhana.
28.14: Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras haaretana mela taani ha kawotethata ubbaa gannan birata qambara wothana; entika iyaw haaretana. Taani hari attoshin, bazzo do7atika iyaw haaretana mela oothana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay.
28.15: Hessafe guye, nabey Ermiyaasi, nabiya Hananako haysada yaagis: “Hananiya, si7a! Goday nena kiittibeenna; shin neeni ha asay wordoban ammanetana mela oothadasa.
28.16: Hessa gisho, Goday, ‘Ta nena sa7a bollafe diggana. Neeni ha asay ta bolla makallana mela oothida gisho ne ha laythi hayqana’ ” yaagis.
28.17: He laythi laapuntha ageenan nabey Hanaani hayqis.

29.1: Nabiya Ermiyaasi di7etida asaa giddon de7iya attida cimatas, kahinetas, nabetasinne Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaamepe di77idi, Babiloone efida ubbaas Yerusalaamepe yeddida dabdaabey haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa.
29.2: Haysi haniday, kawoy Ikoniyaani, iya aayiya kawiya, iya moorinnati, Yihudanne Yerusalaame halaqati, kushe hiillanchotinne birata qoxeysati Yerusalaamepe di7etidi bidi simmina.
29.3: Ermiyaasi Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoorako kiitetida Safaana na7aa El7aasanne Kalqqe na7aa Gamaara bolla he dabdaabiya yeddis. Dabdaabey haysada yaagees:
29.4: “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, Yerusalaamepe Babiloone di7etida asa ubbaas haysada yaagees:
29.5: Keethe keexidi yan de7ite. Kathi zeridi ayfiya miite.
29.6: Macho ekidi macca na7anne adde na7a yelite. Hinte adde naytas macho oychidi immite; hinte macca nayta azinas immite. Enti macca adde yelo; yan taybon darite; guuxofite.
29.7: Hinte di7etidi bida katamaas saroy daana mela koyite. He katamaas Godaa woossite. Iyaw saroy de7iko, hintewuka saroy daana.
29.8: Hinte giddon de7iya hinte nabetinne maroti odiyaban cimetofite; enti amuhiya amuhuwa si7opite.
29.9: Enti ta sunthan wordo tinbite odoosona; ta enta kiittabike” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay.
29.10: “Hinte Babiloonen gam7iya laapun tammu laythay poletiya wode ta hinte gisho yada, hintena, hinte biitta zaarada ehana gada gelida qaala polana.
29.11: Taani hintew qopiya qofaa erayis. He qofay, wursethay lo77onne ufaysi de7iya, hintena go77iya qofape attishin, qohiya qofa gidenna.
29.12: Hessafe guye, hinte tana xeegana; taako yaananne tana woossana; taka hintena si7ana.
29.13: Hinte tana koyana; hinte tana hinte kumetha wozanan koyida wode demmana.
29.14: Ta hintew bentana; ta hintena di7etethaafe zaarana. Taani hintena laallida kawotethatapenne dumma dumma bessaafe shiishana. Ta hintena di7on denthida hinte biitta guye zaarada ehana” yaagees Goday.
29.15: Hinte, “Goday nabe nuus Babiloonen denthis” yaagideta.
29.16: Gidoshin, Dawita araatan uttiya kawabanne hinte mela di7etidi boonna attida asaabanne hinte dabbotabaa Goday haysada yaagees.
29.17: “Ta enta bolla mashshe, koshanne gado yeddana. Ta entana meetetanaw danda7etonna iitida balase mitha ayfeda oothana.
29.18: Taani enta mashshan, koshaninne gadon yedethada, enta sa7an de7iya kawotetha ubbaas dagama oothana. Qassi ta enta kessada yeddida biitta ubban baadethas, dagamas, boresinne cashshas oothana.
29.19: Ta aylleta nabeta baggara zaarada zaarada kiitida ta qaala enti si7onna ixidosona. Hinte di7etidi bidaysatika si7onna ixideta.
29.20: Hinteno, Yerusalaamepe Babiloone di7etidi bida asaw, hinte ubbay Godaa qaala si7ite” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
29.21: Ta sunthan wordo tinbite odiya, Qolaya na7aa Akaababanne Maseya na7aa Sedeqiyasaba Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees. “Ta enta Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras aathada immana. Hinte xeellishin, I enta wodhana.
29.22: Hessafe guye, Yihudape di7etidi, Babiloone bida asay issi asi baaddanaw koyiko, ‘Babiloone kawoy taman xuuggida Sedeqiyasadanne Akaabada Goday nena ootho’ yaagana.
29.23: Enti Isra7eelen iita nagara oothidosona. Enti banta shoorota machetara laymatidosona; ta enta kiittonna wordo tinbite ta sunthan odidosona. Hessa erey tana; hessas taani marka” yaagees Goday. Shamayas Xaafetida Dabdaabe
29.24: Nahelame addiya Shamayas haysada yaagada oda:
29.25: “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: ‘Neeni ne sunthan Yerusalaamen de7iya asaas, Ma7iseya na7aa kahiniya Sofoniyasasinne hara kahinetas dabdaabe yeddadasa.’ Ne Sofoniyasas haysada yaagadasa:
29.26: ‘Xoossa keethan halaqa gidana mela Goday nena Yoodahe bessan kahine oothidi shuumis. Bana nabe gidi tinbite odiya gooya oonaka iya tohuwa duthan, iya qoodhiya santhalaatan neeni qachanaw bessees.
29.27: Yaatin bana nabe giya Anatoota addiya Ermiyaasa ayis hessada oothabikii?
29.28: Ermiyaasi, di7etetha laythay daro gidiya gisho Babiloonen keethe keexidi de7ite; kathi zeridi ayfiya miite’ ” yaagidi nuna kiittis.
29.29: Kahiney Sofoniyaasi nabiya Ermiyaasas dabdaabiya nabbabis.
29.30: Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis;
29.31: “Ha kiitaa di7on de7iya asa ubbaas kiitta; Nahelama addiya Samayeba Goday haysada yaagees; Taani kiittonna Shamayey wordo tinbite odidi hinte wordon ammantana mela oothis.
29.32: Ta Nahelama addiya Shamayanne iya soo asaa seerana. I ta bolla makallaba odida gisho ha asaa giddon iyaw issi asika de7on attenna. Taani ta asaas oothana keehatetha I be7enna” yaagees Goday.

30.2: “Ermiyaasa, ta new odida qaala ubbaa xaatha maxaafan xaafa.
30.3: Taani ta asaa Isra7eelenne Yihuda di7ope guye zaariya wodey matatis. Enta mayzatas immida biitta enta zaarana; enti iya laattana” yaagees Goday Isra7eele Xoossay.
30.4: Goday Isra7eelebanne Yihudaba odida qaalay haysa.
30.5: “Ta yashshanne dagama waaso si7as; dagama waasope attishin, saro waaso gidenna.
30.6: Ane oychite; be7ite; addey na7a yelanaw danda7ii? Yaatin, adde ubbay iqethi oykida maccasada, ba kushen ba uluwa oykidashin ta be7eysi aybee? Asa ubbaa som7oy ayis kareexidee?
30.7: He gallasay ay mela un7ethiya gallasee? Hessa mela gallas baawa. He gallasay Yayqooba zerethaas un7a wode gidana. Gidoshin enti he ubbaafe attana” yaagees Goday.
30.8: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “He gallasan ta enta gannaafe qambara menthana; enti qashetida santhalaata duuthana. Hessafe guye, allaga biitta asay enta aylleyena.
30.9: Shin enti Godaas, banta Xoossaas, oothana; ta entaw denthiya kawa Dawitas haaretana.
30.10: “Hessa gisho, ta aylleto, Yayqooba kochato, yayyofite. Hinteno, Isra7eeleto, dagammopite. Hinte haaho bessan de7ishin, ta hintena ashshana; hinte kochata enti di7etida biittafe zaarana. Yayqooba zareti simmidi, saro daana; enta oonika yashisenna.
30.11: Ta hintena ashshanaw hintera de7ayis. Hintena laallida kawotethata ubbaa dhaysana; shin hintena dhaysike. Ta hintena xillo pirdan seerana; shin seeronna hintena coo yeddike” yaagees Goday.
30.13: Hintew mootetey baawa; hinte madunthaas dhaley deenna; hintew paxoy baawa.
30.14: Hinte doseysati hintena dogidosona; enti hintebaa wuda gookona. Hinte balaynne hinte nagaray daro gidiya gisho, ta hintena morkeda shocas; qadhey bayna seeras.
30.15: Paxoy bentonna hinte hargiyasinne hinte madunthaas ayis waassetii? Hinte balaynne hinte nagaray darida gisho ta haysa hinte bolla oothas.
30.16: “Shin hintena gaashidi mida ubbay meetetana; hinte morketi ubbay di7etana. Hintena bonqidaysati bonqetana; hintebaa ekidaysati eketana.
30.17: Enti, ‘Oonika koyonnanne boretida Xiyoone’ gidoosona; shin ta hintew keehana; hinte madunthaa pathana” yaagees Goday.
30.18: “Yayqooba kochata di7etida bessaafe guye zaarada, keexana; enti de7iya bessaasika qadhetana. Yerusalaame katamay kase ba laaletida bessan, kawo gadhoy kase ba bessan simmidi keexetana.
30.19: Yan de7iya asa ubbay galata mazmurenne ufaysa yethi yexana. Ta enta taybuwa darisanape attishin, guuxenna. Taani enta bonchetida dere oothana; enti kawuyokona.
30.20: Enta nayti beni duussaada daana; enta maabaray ta sinthan minnidi daana. Enta un7ethiya ubbaa ta seerana.
30.21: Enta kaalethanay enta giddofe keyana; enta haaranay enta giddofe dendana. Taani iya taw mata ehana; I taako shiiqana. Taani iya shiishonna de7ishin, minnidi taako shiiqanaw danda7ey oonee?” yaagees Goday.
30.22: Hessa gisho, hinte ta ase gidana; taka hinte Xoosse gidana.
30.23: Heko, Godaa hanqoy goteda dendees; shireti shireti wodhishe iitata huuphen wodhana.
30.24: Goday ba wozanaa qofaa wursidi polana gakanaw eexiya iya hanqoy guye simmenna. Hessa sinthafe yaana wodetan hinte akeekana.

31.1: “He wode taani Isra7eele zeretha ubbaas Xoosse gidana; entika ta ase gidana” yaagees Goday.
31.2: “Mashshafe attida asay mela biittan ta sinthan saba demmana. Taani Isra7eele asaas shempo immanaw yaana.
31.3: Taani entaw haaho bessafe qoncas; taani hintena merina siiquwan dosas; ta qadhiyan hintena taako shiishas.
31.4: Geela7o Isra7eele, ta hintena zaarada keexana; hinteka keexetana. Neeni karaabuwa zaara oykada, ufayteysatara neeni yexananne durana.
31.5: Samaare zumaa bolla woyne tokana; tokidaysati iya ayfiyan ufaytana.
31.6: Efreema gezze biittan naageysati, ‘Haa yiite; Godaako, nu Xoossaako, pude Xiyoone boos’ yaagidi xeegiya wodey yaana” yaagees Goday.
31.7: “Yayqooba asaas ufaysan yexite; kawotethata ubbaafe aadhiya Isra7eeles ililite. ‘Isra7eele asaape attidaysata ashsha’ yaagidi galata mazmure yexite.
31.8: Taani enta pudeha bagga biittafe ehana; sa7aa gaxape ta enta shiishana. Qooqeti, wobbeti, wodetha maccasatinne iqethi oykida maccasati entara issife yaana; daro asay banta biitta simmana.
31.9: Ta enta zaarada ehiya wode enti ufaysafe dendoysan yeekishenne woossishe yaana. Taani enta shaafa lanqiyara, enti dhubetonna giigida ogiyara kaalethana. Taani Isra7eeles aawa; Efreemi taw bayra na7a.
31.10: “Hinteno, kawotethato, Godaa qaala si7idi, haaho bessan, yuushoy abban teqetida biittatan, ‘Isra7eele laallidaysi I enta shiishana; henthanchoy ba wudiya heemmeysada I enta heemmana’ yaagidi awaajite.
31.11: Goday Yayqooba kochata wozana; I enta, entafe minneyisata kushepe ashshis.
31.12: Enti yidi Xiyoone zuma bolla ufaysan yexana; enti, Goday immiya keehatethan, kathan, woynen, zayten, dorsaninne mehen ufaytana. Enti haathe loythidi ushshida atakilte bessa mela gidana; enti zaaridi azzanokona.
31.13: He wode geela7oti ufaysan durana; panthatinne cimati ufaytana. Ta enta yeehuwa ufaysan laammana; ta enta minthethana; enta azzanuwa gisho enta ufaysana.
31.14: Taani kahinetas daro kathi immana; ta asay ta keehatetha kaallana” yaagees Goday.
31.15: “Yeehoynne zelelsi Rama kataman si7etis; Raheela ba naytas yeekasu; enti bayna gisho yeeho minthetho ixasu” yaagees Goday.
31.16: “Yeehuwa aggidi, hinte afuthaa quchite. Hinte oothida oosuwas woyto hinte ekana; morke biittafe hinte nayti simmana.
31.17: Hinte nayti banta biitta simmanaw de7iya gisho, hintew ufaysi de7ees” yaagees Goday.
31.18: “Efreema kochata zuuzuntha ta si7as. Enti, ‘Neeni nuna wadhetiboonna wofaanoda wadhadasa; nuka keedida. Neeni Godaa, nu Xoossaa gidiya gisho nuna zaara; nuuni neeko simmana.
31.19: Nu kase neepe haakidi bida; shin ha77i nu nagara paaxida. Ne nuna seerin, yeellatidi nu tiraa baqida. Nuuni nu na7atetha laytha nagaraa gisho, kawuyidanne yeellatida’ yaagidosona.
31.20: “Efreemi taw tuma al7onne ta dosiya na7a gidennee? Taani iya sunthaa denthiya wode ubban iya hassayayis. Hessa gisho, ta wozanay iya laamotees; ta iyaw daro qadhetayis” yaagees Goday.
31.21: “Hinte ogiyan malaata wothite; malaata mithi essite; hinte bida ogiya akeekite. Geela7o Isra7eele, simma; ne katamata gela.
31.22: Hinteno, ammanoy bayna Isra7eeleto, awude gakanaw toylatetii? Goday sa7a bolla oorathaba oothana; hessika maccasi adde yuushon eqana” yaagees Goday.
31.23: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, haysada yaagees: “Taani Isra7eele asaa di7etethaafe zaarada ehiya wode Yihuda biittaninne iya katamatan enti, ‘Neno xillotethi aqiya bessaw, geeshsha deriyaw, Goday nena anjo’ yaagidi zaaridi odetana.
31.24: Yihudaninne Yihudan de7iya katamatan asay daana; goshshanchotinne henthanchoti banta wudiyara yan daana.
31.25: Taani daaburanchota gashtisana; qassi koshatidi gilqidaysata kalsana” yaagees Goday.
31.26: He wode barkada ta yuushuwa xeellas; ta dhiskoy taw mal7o dhisko gidis.
31.27: “Taani Isra7eeleninne Yihudan asenne mehe kunthiya wodey yaana.
31.28: Enta shoddanaw, laallanaw, shira yegganaw, dhaysanawunne gado ehanaw dendidaysada enta zaarada gimbanawunne tokanaw dendana” yaagees Goday.
31.29: “He wode asay, ‘Aawati qaw7e woyne ayfe min, nayta achay doccis’ yaagidi haasaya leemisoy attana.
31.30: Shin issoy issoy ba nagaran hayqana; qaw7e woyne ayfe miya oodeska iya achay doccana” yaagees Goday.
31.31: “Taani Isra7eeleranne Yihudara ooratha caaqo caaqana wodey yaana.
31.32: He caaqoy ta enta Gibxefe kessanaw enta kushiya oykida wode enta mayzatara caaqida caaquwa mela gidenna. Ta entaw azina mela gida uttinka enti ta caaquwa menthidosona” yaagees Goday.
31.33: “Shin taani he wodiyape guye Isra7eelera caaqana caaqoy haysa: taani ta higgiya enta guuggiyan wothana; enta wozanan xaafana. Taani enta Xoosse gidana; entika ta ase gidana.
31.34: Hizape guye, asi ba laggiya woyko ba ishaa, ‘Godaa era’ yaagidi tamaarsenna. Guuthafe gita gakanaw ubbay tana erana. Taani enta naaquwa atto gaana; enta nagaraa zaarada qopike” yaagees Goday.
31.35: Gallas poo7ana mela awa wothiday, qamma poo7ana mela ageenanne xoolinto kiittiday, abba qaathidi, beetay guummanaada oothey, iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa geeteteysi haysada yaagees.
31.36: “Ha eqidi de7iya medhetetha higgey ta sinthafe shaaretiko, he wode Isra7eele kochay ta dere gideysi merinaw attana” yaagees Goday.
31.37: “Bolla salota wadhanaw woyko garsa sa7aa baasoy eretanaw danda7iko, he wode ta Isra7eele zeretha ubbaa, enti oothida nagaraa gisho ta sinthafe diggana” yaagees Goday.
31.38: “Hanaani7eela shako Gimbiyafe doomidi, Maazane Pengiya gakanaw Yerusalaame katamay ta katama gididi, keexetiya wodey yaana.
31.39: He katamaa zaway wuloha baggafe bidi Gaareba zumanne Go7a yuushuwa gakanaw dalgana.
31.40: Aha moogiyanne bido yeggiya zangaaraynne Qediroona Zangaarape qommora doloha baggara bidi, Para Penge maazaniya gakanaw de7iya biitta ubbay Godaas dummatidi, geeshshi gidana. Hizape guye, katamay merinaw shodetenna; laaletenna” yaagees Goday.

32.1: Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi kawotida tammantho laythan, Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan Godaape ha qaalay Ermiyaasako yis.
32.2: He wode Babiloone kawa olanchoti Yerusalaame teqidosona; nabey Ermiyaasi Yihuda kawo gadhon de7iya, naageysata dabaaban iya bolla gordetin de7ees.
32.3: Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi iya haysada yaagidi qachidi wothis: “Ne ayis haysada yaagada tinbite oday? ‘Goday ha katamaa Babiloone kawa kushen aathidi immana; I iya oykana’ yaagada ayis oday.
32.4: Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi Babiloone aadhidi imetana; I Babiloone kawa kushen gelana. Iya sinthan eqidi, iyara odetana; I ba ayfen iya be7ana.
32.5: Nabukadanaxoori Sedeqiyaasa Babiloone efana; ta iyabaa be7ana gakanaw I yan daana. Neeni Babiloonetara oletanaw qopiko, hessi new hanenna” yaagees Goday.
32.6: Ermiyaasi, “Godaa qaalay he wode taako haysada yaagidi yis” yaagis.
32.7: “Ne aawa isha Saluma na7ay, Hanami7eeli neeko yidi, ‘Wozanaw maati de7iya mata dabboy nena gidiya gisho Anatoota kataman de7iya ta gadiya shamma’ yaagana.
32.8: Goday gidaysada, ta aawa ishaa na7ay Hanami7eeli taako naageysata dabaaba yidi, ‘Wozanaw maati de7iya mata dabboy nena gidiya gisho, Biniyaame biittan Anatootan de7iya ta gadiya shamma’ yaagin, taani hessa odiday Godaa gideysa eras.
32.9: “Anatoota kataman de7iya gadiya ta aawa ishaa na7aa Hanami7eelape shammas. Iya gatiya mizaanen likin, tammanne laapun bira santime gidis.
32.10: Shama pirimaa markati de7iya bessan paramas; gordas; maatame iya bolla wothas; miishiya mizaanen likada iyaw immas.
32.11: Hessafe guye, taani zal7iya hanota qoncisiya ashshagetidi attametida shama pirimaanne attametiboona shama pirimaa ekas.
32.12: Ta aawa ishaa na7ay Hanami7eeli, shama pirimaa paramida markatinne naageysata dabaaban uttida Ayhudeti ubbay be7ishin, he shama pirimaa Mahiseya na7aa, Neera na7aa Baarokas immas.
32.13: Enta sinthan ta Baaroka haysada yaagada kiittas:
32.14: ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, haysada yaagees: Daro wode gam7ana mela ha ashshagetidi attametida pirimaanne attametiboona pirimaa efada oton wotha.’
32.15: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, haysada yaagees: ha biittan asay zaaridi keethe, gadenne woyne tokiya bessi shammana” yaagees Goday.
32.16: Taani Neera na7aa Baarokas shama pirimaa warqatiya immidaape guye, haysada yaagada woossas.
32.17: “Abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, ne salotanne sa7aa ne gita wolqaaninne ne micetida kushen medhadasa. New danda7etonnabay baawa.
32.18: Neeni ne siiquwa mukulu asaas bessaasa; shin aawata nagaraa enta nayta bolla zaarasa. Abeeti gitanne wolqaama Xoossaw, ne sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa geetetees.
32.19: Ne halchoy gita; ne oothiya oosoy wolqaama. Asa oge ubbaa ne be7aasa; asa ubbaas iya ogiyadanne iya oosuwada zaarasa.
32.20: “Ne Gibxen malaatanne mallata oothadasa; hachi gakanaw ha mallata Isra7eele asaa giddoninne hara kawotethata ubbaa giddon ooso aggabaaka. Hessafe dendoysan ne sunthay ubba bessan eretis.
32.21: Neeni ne asaa Isra7eele Gibxefe malaataninne mallatan, ne mino qesiyan, ne micetida kushiyaninne gita dagaman kessadasa.
32.22: Enta mayzatas ne immanaw caaqida biitta, maathinne eessi goggiya biitta entaw immadasa.
32.23: Enti he biitta gelidi laattidosona. Shin enti new kiitetibookona; ne higgiya naagibookona; enti oothana mela ne kiitida ubbaa oothibookona. Hessa gisho, ne enta bolla ha gaduwa ubbaa ehadasa.
32.24: “Babiloone asay katamaa oykanaw gimbiya yuushuwan biitta dooridi teqidosona. Olape, koshapenne boshape dendoysan katamay enta oliya Babiloone kushen aadhidi imetis. Ne ha77i be7eysada ne gidaba ubbay poletis.
32.25: Abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, katamay Babiloone asaas imetanaw haniya wodeka ne tana, ‘Marka xeegada, miishen gadiya shamma’ gadasa” yaagada woossas.
32.26: Hessafe guye, Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis:
32.27: “Taani Godaa, asa ubbaa Xoossaa. Taw danda7etonnabay de7ii?” yaagis.
32.28: Taani ha katamaa Babiloone asaasinne Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras aathada immana; enti iya oykana.
32.29: Ha katama teqida Babiloone asay yidi, katamaa taman xuuggana; pooqiya bolla Ba7aale eeqas ixaane cuyisishenne hara xoossatas ushsha yarsho gussishe tana hanqethida asay de7iya keethatika xuugetana.
32.30: “Isra7eeleynne Yihudi banta na7atethafe doomidi, ta sinthan iitabaape attishin, lo77oba, oothibookona; enti banta kushen oothida oosuwan tana hanqethidosona.
32.31: Ha katamay keexetida wodepe hachi gakanaw, ha katamaa asay tana daro hanqethida gisho ha katamaa ta sinthafe dhaysana.
32.32: Isra7eeleynne Yihudi, enta kawotinne halaqati, enta kahinetine nabeti oothida iita ooso ubban tana yiloyidosona.
32.33: Enti banta som7uwa gidonashin, banta zokuwa taw zaaridosona. Ta enta zaara zaarada tamaarsinka, enti si7ibookona woyko seera ekibookona.
32.34: Enti ixetida banta eeqata ta sunthay xeegetida keethan essidi tunisidosona.
32.35: Enti banta adde naytanne macca nayta Moloka eeqas yarshanaw Hinooma Zangaaran Ba7aale eeqas yarsho dhoqa bessata giigisidosona. Enti hessa oothana mela ta kiittabike; Yihuda asay nagara oothana mela hessa enti oothana gada ta naagabike” yaagis.
32.36: “Neeni, ‘Ha katamay olan, koshaninne boshan Babiloone kawa kushen aadhidi imetana’ yaagida ha katamaaba Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees.
32.37: Ta suulliya hanquwaninne gita sheniyan enta laallida biitta ubbaafe shiishada ha bessaa zaara ehada, enti sarotethan daana mela oothana.
32.38: Enti ta ase gidana; ta enta Xoosse gidana.
32.39: Enti taw merinaw yayyana mela, ta entaw issi wozananne issi oge immana; hessi entawunne entafe guye enta naytas lo77o gidana.
32.40: Taani entara merinaw caaqana; he caaquwan ta entaw lo77oba ooso aggike. Enti tana aggidi guye simmonna mela enti taw yayyana mela oothana.
32.41: Ta entaw lo77oba ootheysi tana ufaysees; ta kumetha wozanapenne ta kumetha shempuwafe tuma ha biittan enta tokana” yaagees Goday.
32.42: “Ta ha asaa bolla iita bosha ubbaa ehidaysada ta entaw immana gida lo77oba ubbaa immana.
32.43: Hinte, ‘Ha biittay asaynne mehey bayna baysa biitta gidana; I Babiloonetas imetis’ yaagida biittan asay zaaridi gade shammana.
32.44: Ta enta zaarada ehiya gisho, asay gade shammana; marka sinthan zal7iya hanota qoncisiya pirima paramidi, maatame wothana. Haysi ubbay Biniyaame biittan, Yerusalaame yuushuwan de7iya heeratan, Yihuda katamatan, derey dariya katamatan, gadha katamataninne Negebe mela biittan de7iya katamata ubban hanana” yaagees Goday.

33.1: Ermiyaasi buroo naageysata dabaaban qashetidi de7ishin, Godaa qaalay zaaridi iyako yis.
33.2: Sa7aa medhida Goday, giigisidi iya bessan wothida Goday, iya sunthay Godaa geeteteysi haysada yaagees:
33.3: “Tana xeega; ta new koyana; ne eronna gitabaanne wolqaamaba ta new qoncisana.”
33.4: Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, Babiloone olaa, biitta doorethaanne, di7etetha teqana mela dirsa gimbiya minthanaw laallida ha katama keethatabaanne Yihuda kawota gadhotaba haysada yaagees.
33.5: Enta iitatetha gaason, ta ha katamaa bollafe ta som7uwa denthida gisho, hintera oletanaw taani ta hanquwan shocana asaa ahan ha bessan kunthanaw Babilooneti gelana.
33.6: Gidoshin, “ta ha katamaanne iyan de7iya asaa zaarada pathana; enta payyatetha zaarana; saronne wopa duussu entaw immana.
33.7: Taani Yihuda asaanne Isra7eele asaa di7ope zaarana; enti kase de7idaysada oothada enta gimbana.
33.8: Enti tana oothida nagara ubbaafe ta enta geeshshana; enti naaquwanne enta makalla ubbaa atto gaana.
33.9: Yerusalaame katamay taw ufaysi, bonchonne galata sa7an de7iya kawotethata ubbaa sinthan ehana. Taani Yerusalaame asaas oothiya lo77obaanne katamaas ehiya duretethaanne sarotethaa si7idi, kawotethati ubbay yashshan kokorana” yaagees Goday.
33.10: “Hinte, ‘Asinne mehey bayna baysa’ gida ha bessan, asinne mehey bayna Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan ufaysinne ililsa girsi si7etana.
33.11: Yethinne Yaagano girsi, ufaysa girsi, hessadaka, xoossa keethi galata yarsho ehidi, “I keeha gidiya gisho, iya maarotethay merinaasa gidiya gisho, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa galatite. yaagidi yexishe xoossa keethi galata yarsho ekidi yaa asaa girsay si7etana. Taan enta di7ope zaarana; enti kase de7idaysada oothada wothana” yaagees Goday.
33.12: “Ha asaynne mehey bayna baysa biittaninne iyan de7iya katamatan henthanchoti banta dorsa wudiya heemmiya gadey daana.
33.13: Gezze katamatan, gadha katamatan, Negebe mela biittan de7iya katamatan, Biniyaame biittan, Yerusalaame yuushuwan de7iya bessataninne Yihuda katamatan henthanchoti banta dorsata zaaridi taybana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
33.14: “Taani Isra7eele asaasinne Yihuda asaas gelida qaala poliya wodey yaana.
33.15: He wode taani Dawita kochaafe issi xillo Aaca denthana; I suure pirda pirdana; xillo oothana.
33.16: He wode Yihuda asay attana; Yerusalaame asay wopu gidi de7ana. Ha katamay, ‘Goday nu Xillotethaa’ geetetidi xeegetana.
33.17: Dawita kochaafe Isra7eele araatan uttiya asi dhayenna.
33.18: Hessadaka, xuussa yarsho, katha yarshonne hara yarsho yarshanaw Leewe kochaafe kahine gidiya asi merinaw ta sinthafe dhayenna” yaagees Goday.
33.20: Gallasasinne qammas ta wothida wogaa menthidi, gallasinne qammi banta wodiyan simeretonna mela oothidi ta caaquwa laammanaw hinte danda7iko,
33.21: iya kochaafe araatan uttiya asi dhayonnaada, ta aylliya Dawitara caaqida caaquwa laammana; taw oothiya, Leewe koche gidida kahinetara caaqida caaquwa laammana.
33.22: Taani ta aylliya Dawita kochaanne ta sinthan oothiya Leewe kocha taybanaw danda7etonna salo xoolintotadanne makanaw danda7etonna abba shafiyada darsana” yaagees Goday.
33.23: Godaa qaalay qassika Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis.
33.24: “Ha asay, ‘Goday ba doorida nam7u kawotethata, Isra7eelenne Yihuda aggaagis’ yaagidi odeteysa ne akeekabikii? Enti ta asaa kadhidi, bana danda7ida kawotethi gidokona gidi qopoosona.
33.25: Taani gallasaranne qammara caaqida caaquwanne salonne sa7a higgiya minthaboonnaba gidiko,
33.26: Yayqooba zerethaanne ta aylliya Dawita kochaa aggaagana. Iya naytape Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Yayqooba kochata bolla kawothanaw Dawita kochaa doorike. Taani ta asaa maarana; enta shaluwa zaarana” yaagees Goday.

34.1: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori, iya olanchoti ubbaynne I haariya kawotethatan de7iya asa ubbay, Yerusalaamenne Yerusalaame yuushuwan de7iya katamata ubbaa oliya wode, ha qaalay Godaape Ermiyaasako yis:
34.2: Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagis; “Bada Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasako haysada yaaga: ‘Taani ha katamaa Babiloone kawa kushen aathada immana; I katamaa taman xuuggana.
34.3: Neeni iya kushepe kessa ekaka; neeni oyketana; iyaw aadhada imetana. Neeni ne ayfen Babiloone kawa be7ana; ika neera odetana. Neeni Babiloone biitta baana’ yaagees Goday.
34.4: “Gidoshin, Yihuda kawaw Sedeqiyaasa, Goday giyaba si7a. Neeni olan hayqaka.
34.5: Ne saro hayqana. Neepe kase de7ida kawota bonchuwas, ne mayzatas ixaane cuyisidaysada, asay ne bonchuwas ixaane cuyisana. Woo! nu kawaw, yaagidi new yeekana. Taani Goday haysa odayis” yaagees.
34.6: Hessafe guye, nabey Ermiyaasi ha tinbitiya Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasas Yerusalaamen odis.
34.7: He wode Babiloone olanchoti Yerusalaame katamaanne Yihudan attida Laakisonne Azeeqa katamata olidosona. Yihudan attida gimbetida katamati enta xalaala. Aylletethafe La77a Kessi
34.8: Kawoy Sedeqiyaasi aylleta la77a kessiya awaajuwa awaajanaw Yerusalaamen de7iya asa ubbaara caaqidaape guye, Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis:
34.9: He awaajoy, issi issi Ibraawe asi addenne macca aylle aylletethafe la77a kesso. Oonika Ayhude asi gidida ba ishaa aylle oothofo.
34.10: Hessa gisho, asaynne halaqati ubbay caaqida caaquwan banta addenne macca aylleta aylletethafe la77a kessanawunne zaaridi aylletethan haaronna agganaw giigidi enta aylletethafe la77a kessidosona.
34.11: Shin enti banta qofaa laammidi, aylletethafe la77a kessida banta addenne macca aylleta zaaridi haaridosona.
34.12: Hessafe guye, Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako yaagis.
34.13: Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Taani hinte mayzata Gibxefe, aylletetha biittafe kessida wode entara haysada yaagada caaqas.
34.14: He caaquwa maaran, ‘Ibraawe aylley de7iya ase ubbay, aylleta usupun laythi oosisidi, laapuntha laythan aylletethafe kessidi yeddite’ yaagada kiittas. Shin hinte mayzati ta odiyaba si7onna ixidosona; taw kiitetibookona.
34.15: Hinteka mata wodepe kase hinte nagaraape simmidi, aylleta la77a kessanaw awaajideta; ta sinthan suureba oothideta. Qassi hessa oothanaw ta sinthan, ta sunthay xeegetiya ta keethan caaqideta.
34.16: Shin hinte, hinte qofaa laammidi, ta sunthaa tunisideta. Enti koyida bessaa baana mela la77a kessida addenne macca aylleta zaaridi haarideta.”
34.17: Hessa gisho, Goday, “Hinte taw kiitetonna ixidi, hinte ishaa woyko hinte shooruwa aylletethafe la77a kessiya awaajuwa awaajibeketa. Hinte bolla oli, boshinne koshi keyana mela ta awaajayis. Ta hintena sa7a bolla de7iya kawotethatas dagama oothana.
34.18: Ta caaquwa menthida asaa, ta sinthan caaquwa naagonna ixida asaa, shukidi, nam7u bessan shaakidi, iya giddora aadhida maraa mela ta enta oothana.
34.19: He asay Yihuda halaqata, Yerusalaame halaqata, biitta ayseysata, kahinetanne nam7u bessan shaakida maraa ashuwa giddora aadhida asa ubbaa.
34.20: Ta enta, enta morketa kusheninne enta wodhanaw koyiya asa kushen aathada immana; enta ahay salo kafotasinne sa7a do7atas kathi gidana.
34.21: “Taani Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasanne iya halaqata, enta morketa kushen, enta wodhanaw koyeyisata kusheninne hintena oleysa aggida Babiloone olanchota kushen aathada immana.
34.22: Taani Babiloone olanchota kiittin; enti ha katama simmana. Enti ha katamaa olana, di7ananne taman xuuggana. Yihudan de7iya katamata asi doonna baysa bessi oothana” yaagees Goday.

35.1: Iyosyaasa na7aa Yihuda kawa Iyo7aqeema laythan, Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis.
35.2: “Rakaaba yara gidida asaako bada, entara odetada, Xoossa keetha kifiletape issuwa giddo gelsada woyne ushsha entaw imma” yaagis.
35.3: Taani bada, Kabasa na7aa na7aa, Ermiyaasa na7aa Ya7izaana, iya ishatanne iya adde nayta ubbaa, Rakaaba yaraa ubbaa ekada,
35.4: xoossa keethi ehas. Enta, Yigidaala na7aa, Xoossa asi gidida Hanaana nayta kifile gelsas. He kifiley, pengiya naagiya Saluma na7aa Ma7iseya kifiliyape bolla baggara, halaqata kifiliya matan de7ees.
35.5: Hessafe guye, taani Rakaaba yarata sinthan woyne ushshay kumida xuggatanne xuu7ata wothada, “Woyne ushsha uyite” yaagas.
35.6: Shin enti zaaridi, “Nu woyne ushshu uyoko; nu mayzay Rakaaba na7ay Yoonadaabi nuuko, ‘Hintenne hinte nayti woyne ushshu merinaw uyopite.
35.7: Keethe keexofite; goshshe goyopite; woyne tokofite. Dunkaane giddon de7ite; hinte adussa laythi ha biittan daana’ yaagis.
35.8: Nu mayzay Rakaaba na7ay Yoonadaabi nuna kiitida ubbaa kiitetida. Nuuni woyko nu macheti woyko nu adde nayti woyko nu macca nayti nu de7o laytha ubban woyne ushshu uyibooko.
35.9: Duussa keethi keexibooko; woyne gade woyko goshshi nuus baawa.
35.10: Nu dunkaanen de7ida; nu mayzay Yoonadaabi kiitida ubbaa kiitetida.
35.11: Shin Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori nu biitta bolla dendida wode, ‘Babiloonenne Soore olanchotape attanaw, Yerusalaame boos’ yaagida. Ha77i nu Yerusalaamen de7ey hessasa” yaagidosona.
35.13: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees. “Yihuda asaakonne Yerusalaame asaako bada haysada yaaga; ‘Ta qaala naaganaw haysafe tamaareketi.’
35.14: Rakaaba na7ay Yoonadaabi ba adde nayta woyne ushshu uyonnaada kiittida kiitaa naagidosona. Enti banta mayza kiitaa naagidi hachi gakanaw woyne ushshu uyokona. Taani hintew ubba wode odayis; shin hinte tana si7ibeeketa.
35.15: Taani zaarada zaarada nabeta, ta aylleta hinteko yeddas; enti, ‘Hinte ubbay hinte iita ogiyape simmite; hinte oosuwa loythite; hara xoossata goyinnofite; entaw oothopite. He wode, ta hintewunne hinte mayzatas immida biittan hinte daana’ yaagidosona. Shin hinte tana si7anaw hinte haythaa taako zaaribeeketa.
35.16: Rakaaba na7aa Yoonadaabe kochati enta mayzay enta kiitida kiita oothidosona; shin ha asay taw kiitetibeenna yaaga” yaagees Goday.
35.17: “Hessa gisho, Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees. ‘Si7ite, ta Yihuda asaa bollanne Yerusalaamen de7eyisata bolla ehana gida iitabaa ehana. Ta entaw odin, si7onna ixidosona; ta enta xeegin koyonna ixidosona’ ” yaagees.
35.18: Hessafe guye, Ermiyaasi Rakaaba yaratako, “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay hintena haysada yaagees: ‘Hinte, hinte mayza Yoonadaabas kiitetida gisho, iya wogaa kaallida gishonne I kiitida ubbaa oothida gisho,
35.19: Rakaaba na7ay Yoonadaabi, taw oothiya adde asi awudeka dhayenna’ ” yaagees.

36.1: Iyosyaasa na7ay Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi kawotida oyddantho laythan, Goday Ermiyaasako haysada yaagis:
36.2: “Issi xaatha maxaafaa ekada, Iyosyaasa wode taani new odo doomida koyro gallasape doomada, hachi gakanaw Isra7eele bolla, Yihuda bollanne hara kawotethata bolla taani odida qaala ubbaa xaafa.
36.3: Ta Yihuda asaa bolla ehana gada halchida bosha ubbaa si7idi, ooni eri, enti banta iita oosuwape simmana; ta enta naaquwanne enta nagaraa atto gaana” yaagis.
36.4: Hessa gisho, Ermiyaasi Neera na7aa Baaroka xeegidi, Goday iyaw odidaba ubbaa Baarokas odin, I xaatha maxaafan xaafis.
36.5: Hessafe guye, Ermiyaasi Baarokako, “Taani qasho keethan de7iya gisho, xoossa keethi gelanaw danda7ike.
36.6: Hessa gisho, ne xooma gallas xoossa keethi bada, ta odin, ne xaatha maxaafan xaafida Godaa qaala entaw nabbaba; banta katamatape yida Yihuda asa ubbaas nabbaba.
36.7: Ha asaa bolla Goday awaajida hanqoy gita gidiya gisho, ooni eri, enti banta iita oosuwape simmidi, Godaa woossana” yaagis.
36.8: Neera na7ay Baaroki nabey Ermiyaasi kiittidaysada xoossa keethan Godaa qaala ubbaa nabbabis.
36.9: Iyosyaasa na7ay Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi kawotida ichashantho laythan, uddufuntho ageenan, Yerusalaamen de7iya asaasinne Yihuda katamatape yida asa ubbay Godaa sinthan xoomana mela awaajidosona.
36.10: Baaroki Xoossa keethan, qommo bagga dabaaban, Ooratha Penge geetetiya bessan, xaafiya Safaana na7aa, Gamaara kifiliyan eqidi, Ermiyaasa qaalay xaafetida xaatha maxaafa asa ubbaas nabbabis.
36.11: Safaana na7aa na7ay, Gamaara na7ay Mikayi maxaafape Godaa qaala Baaroki nabbabishin si7ida wode,
36.12: kawo gadhon xaafey uttiya kifiliya bis. I biya wode, xaafey Elishami, Shamaya na7ay Dali, Akboora na7ay Elnaatani, Safaana na7ay Gamaara, Hananiya na7ay Xidiqenne hara halaqati yan uttidosona.
36.13: Baaroki asas maxaafape nabbabishin si7ida qaala ubbaa Mikayi entako odis.
36.14: Halaqati Naatana na7aa Yihuda Baarokako kiittidi, “Asaas neeni nabbabida maxaafaa ekada haa ya” yaagidosona. (Naatani Salama na7a; Salami Kuusa na7a.) Baaroki maxaafaa ekidi, entako yis.
36.15: Entika iya, “Ane uttada, nuus maxaafaa nabbaba” yaagidosona. Yaagin Baaroki maxaafaa nabbabis.
36.16: I nabbabida qaala ubbaa si7idi yayyidosona, issoy issuwa xeellidi, Baaroka, “Ha qaala ubbaa nuuni kawas odanaw koshshees” yaagidosona.
36.17: Qassika zaaridi, “Neeni ha qaala ubbaa waatada xaafidaako nuus oda. Haysa new Ermiyaasi odin xaafadii?” yaagidosona.
36.18: Baaroki, “Ee, ha qaala ubbaa Ermiyaasi ba doonape taw odis; taani qalamen ha xaatha maxaafan xaafas” yaagis.
36.19: Enti Baaroka, “Neeninne Ermiyaasi bidi qosetite; hinte de7iya bessaa oonika eropo” yaagidosona.
36.20: Halaqati maxaafa xaafiya Elishama kifilen wothidaape guye, kawoy de7iya dabaaba bidi, hanidaba ubbaa kawas odidosona.
36.21: He maxaafaa ehana mela, kawoy Yihuda kiittis; xaatha maxaafaa Elishama kifilepe ehidi, kawasinne iya yuushuwan eqida halaqatas nabbabis.
36.22: Uddufuntho ageenan sa7i balgo gidiya gisho, kawoy balguwa aathiya keethan uttis. He wode kawa sinthan de7iya coociyan Tami eexees.
36.23: Yihudi heedzu woyko oyddu bessata nabbabidaape guye, kawoy he bessata xaatha maxaafape mashshan qanxi qanxidi, taman yeggis; hessada oothidi, maxaafa kumethi xuuggis.
36.24: Ha qaala si7idi kawoynne iyara oothiya moorinnati ubbay ayinne babibookona; woyko kayotidi, banta ma7uwa peedhibokonna.
36.25: Hari attoshin Elnaatani, Dalaynne Gamaari kawoy he maxaafaa xuuggonna mela woossinka, enta woosa si7onna ixis.
36.26: Kawa na7a Yirahima7eela, Aziri7eela na7aa Sarayanne Abdi7eela na7aa Selema, xaafiya Baarokanne nabiya Ermiyaasa oykana mela kawoy kiittis. Shin Goday enta qottis. Ermiyaasi zaaridi Xaafida Xaatha Maxaafa
36.27: Ermiyaasi odin, Baaroki xaafida maxaafaa kawoy xuuggidi simmin, Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagishe yis:
36.28: “Hara xaatha maxaafaa ekada, Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi xuuggida xaatha maxaafan de7iya qaala ubbaa zaarada xaafa.
36.29: Qassi Yihuda kawa Iyo7aqeema haysada yaaga: Goday haysada yaagees; Neeni, ‘Babiloone kawoy yidi, ha biitta dhaysana; qassi yan de7iya asaanne mehiya wursana’ gada ayis xaafadii?” yaagada maxaafaa xuuggadasa.
36.30: “Hessa gisho, Goday Yihuda kawa Iyo7aqeema haysada yaagees: Dawita araatan uttiya kochay new kumthi deenna. Ne ahay coo holetidi, gallasi awa suulos, qamma meegon shocetana.
36.31: Hinte nagaraa gisho nena, ne kochaanne neera oothiya moorinnata ubbaa seerana. Enti taani odidaba si7onna ixida gisho, ta gida iitaba ubbay hinte bolla, Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya asa ubba bolla ehana” yaagees.
36.32: Hessafe guye, Ermiyaasi hara xaatha maxaafaa ekidi, Neera na7aa xaafiya Baarokas immis. Baaroki Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi taman xuuggida xaatha maxaafaa qaala ubbaa Ermiyaasi iyaw doonan odin xaafis. Qassi Ermiyaasi hessa daaniya hara qaalaka gujin, ubbaka Baaroki xaafis.

37.1: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Iyo7aqeema na7aa Ikoniyaana bessan Iyosyaasa na7aa Sedeqiyaasa Yihuda biittan kawothis.
37.2: Sedeqiyaasi, iyara oothiya halaqatinne biittan de7iya asa ubbay, Goday nabiya Ermiyaasa baggara odida qaalas kiitetibookonna.
37.3: Shin kawoy Sedeqiyaasi Selema na7aa Yokaalanne Ma7iseya na7aa kahiniya Sofoniyaasa, “Hayyana, nu gisho Godaa nu Xoossaa woossa” yaagidi Ermiyaasako kiittis.
37.4: He wode Ermiyaasi qasho keethi geliboonna gisho, asaa giddon simeretees.
37.5: Gibxe kawa olanchoti, Gibxefe keydaysa Yerusalaame teqida Babiloone olanchoti si7ida wode Yerusalaame yeddidi keyidosona.
37.6: Hessafe guye, Godaa qaalay nabiya Ermiyaasako yis.
37.7: “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: tana oychana mela hintena taako kiitida Yihuda kawas haysada yaagite; ‘Hintena maaddanaw yida Gibxe kawa olanchoti banta biitta simmidi baana.
37.8: Qassi Babiloone olanchoti simmidi yaana; ha katamaa olidi oykana; taman iya xuuggana’ yaagite.
37.9: “Babiloone olanchoti simmidi yuussay attonna gisho ‘Babiloone olanchoti yookona’ gidi hintena hintew cimmofite.
37.10: Hinte Babiloone olanchota kumethi xooniyakoka, madunxidi, dunkaanen zin7idaysati dendidi, ha katamaa taman xuuggana” yaagees Goday.
37.11: Gibxe kawa olanchoti matida gisho, Babiloone olanchoti Yerusalaame aggidi banta de7iya bessaa guye simmidosona.
37.12: He wode Ermiyaasi ba gisho biitta ekanaw Biniyaame biitta baanaw Yerusalaamepe dendis.
37.13: Gidoshin, I bidi, Biniyaame Penge gakiya wode pengiya naageysatape issoy, Hananiya na7ay, Saleema na7a Yeera, “Ne nuna kaddada Babiloone baasa gidikii?” yaagidi oykis.
37.14: Ermiyaasi zaaridi, “Ne geysa mela ta Babiloone biya asi gidike” yaagis. Shin Yeerey I geysa si7onna ixidi Ermiyaasa oykidi halaqatako efis.
37.15: Halaqati daro hanqetidi, Ermiyaasa wadhi, enti qasho keethi oothida, xaafiya Yoonataana keethan iya qachidosona.
37.16: Ermiyaasi yan biitta garsan de7iya kifiliyan daro wode gam7is.
37.17: Hessafe guye, kawoy Sedeqiyaasi ase kiittidi, Ermiyaasa ba kawo gadho xeegisidi, dumma qosan iya, “Goday new odidabay de7ii?” yaagidi oychis. Ermiyaasi zaaridi, “Ee de7ees; neeni Babiloone kawa kushen aadhada imetana” yaagis
37.18: Qassika Ermiyaasi kawa Sedeqiyaasa haysada yaagidi oychis: “Tana hinte qasho keethan yegganaw ta ne bolla, new oothiya halaqata bolla woyko ha asaa bolla ay bala oothadina?
37.19: Yaatin, ‘Babiloone kawoy yidi hintenanne hinte biitta olenna’ yaagidi new tinbite odida ne nabeti ha77i awun de7oona?
37.20: Ta godaw, kawaw, si7a; ta oychiya issiba ne polana mela nena woossayis. Ta he bessan hayqonna mela iya keethay qasho keethi gidida xaafiya Yoonataana soo tana guye zaaropa” yaagis.
37.21: Kawoy Sedeqiyaasi naageysata dabaaban Ermiyaasa daana mela kiittis. Yan I de7ishin katamape daabboy dhayana gakanaw gallas gallas issi issi daabbo uukiya bessaafe ehidi iyaw immoosona. Hessa gisho, Ermiyaasa kawa zaban gam7is.

38.1: Mataana na7ay Safaaxi, Phaskora na7ay Godoliya, Selema na7ay Yokaalinne Malkaya na7ay Phaskori Ermiyaasi asa ubbaas odida qaala si7idosona.
38.2: Ermiyaasi, “Ha kataman attiya oonika olan, koshaninne boshan hayqana. Shin Babiloonetas ba kushe immiya oonika hayqenna; attana; de7on daana.
38.3: Yerusalaame katamay Babiloone kawa olanchota kushen aadhidi imetana; entika iya polo di77ana” yaagees Goday.
38.4: Hessafe guye, halaqati kawako bidi, “Ha addey hayqanaw koshshees; haysa mela oda odidi, ha kataman de7iya olanchotinne asa ubbay shuggana mela oothis. I ase qohiyaba amotteesipe attishin, saroba amottenna” yaagidosona.
38.5: Kawoy Sedeqiyaasi zaaridi, “Hinte iya bolla oothana gidaba ta hintena digganaw danda7ike” yaagis.
38.6: Enti Ermiyaasa kawo gadho dabaaban de7iya, kawa na7aa Malkaya haatha ollan, wodoron duge yeggidosona. He wode he ollan silimope attishin, haathi baawa; Ermiyaasi he silimuwa giddo gelis.
38.7: Shin Tophe ase gidida, kawo morinay, Abemeleke geetetiya addey Ermiyaasi ollan yegetidaysa si7is. He wode kawoy Biniyaame Penge pirda oyden uttis.
38.9: “Ta godaw kawaw, ha asati gita iitabaa oothidosona; enti nabiya Ermiyaasa haatha ollan yeggidosona. Qassi kataman qumi bayna gisho I yan koshan hayqana” yaagis.
38.10: Kawoy zaaridi, Tophe addey Ebed-Melekako, “Hastamu asi neera eka bada, Ermiyaasi hayqonna de7ishin haatha ollafe kessite” yaagis.
38.11: Ebed-Meleki ase ekidi, bidi kawo gadhon shalo minjiya keethaafe garsa baggara de7iya kifiliya gelidi, gal7a ma7onne curqa ekis. He curqa wodoruwa xeeran qachidi, Ermiyaasas duge olla giddo yeddis.
38.12: Tophe addey Ebed-Meleki Ermiyaasa xeegidi, “Ha curqa ma7uwa wodoruwape garsara ne shophiyan wotha” yaagis. Ermiyaasi I gidaysada oothis.
38.13: Enti wodoruwara goochidi, Ermiyaasa ollaafe kessidi, naageysata keethi gelsidi gordidosona. Sedeqiyaasi Ermiyaasa Zaaridi Oychis
38.14: Hessafe guye, kawoy Sedeqiyaasi Ermiyaasa kiittidi ehisidi, xoossa keethi geliya heedzantho pengiya matan, “Ta nena issiba oychana; ne taape qosopa” yaagis.
38.15: Ermiyaasi zaaridi, “Ta odiko, ne tana wodhikii? Ta zorin ne si7aka” yaagis.
38.16: Kawoy Sedeqiyaasi, “De7o Xoossay eriya mela, ta nena wodhike; nena wodhanaw koyeysatas aathada immike” yaagidi qosan Ermiyaasas caaqis.
38.17: Ermiyaasi zaaridi, “Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: ‘Babiloone kawa halaqatas ne kushe immiko, ne paxa attana; ha katamay taman xuugetenna; nenne ne keetha asay de7on daana.
38.18: Shin ne entaw kushe immonna ixiko, ha katamay Babiloonetas aadhidi imetana; enti iya xuuggana; ne entafe kessa ekaka’ ” yaagis.
38.19: Kawoy Sedeqiyaasi, “Ta yayyey ha biitta kaddidi, Babiloone bida Ayhudetasa. Babilooneti tana enta kushen aathidi immin, Ayhudeti tana kaa7ana” yaagidi zaaris.
38.20: Ermiyaasi, “Aykoy baawa! Enti nena entaw aathidi immokona. Ta odiya Godaa qaalas hayyana kiiteta. Hessi new lo77o gidana; ne paxa attana.
38.21: Shin ne kushe immonna ixiko, Goday tana bessida qoncethi de7ees.
38.22: Hessika, Yihuda kawo gadhon attida maccasati ubbay di7etidi, Babiloone halaqatako baana. Enti neeko, ‘Ne mata laggeti nena balethidosona; enti nena xoonidosona. Shin ha77i ne tohoy silimo giddo gelin, he laggeti nena yeggidi bidosona’ yaagana.
38.23: Ne machetinne ne nayti ubbay Babiloone di7etidi baana. Ne enta kushepe kessa ekaka. Babiloone kawoy nena oykana. Ha katamay taman xuugetana” yaagis.
38.24: Sedeqiyaasi zaaridi, “Haysa ne taw odidaysa asas odonna ixiko ne hayqaka.
38.25: Halaqati ta neera odetidaysa si7idi, ‘Neera kawara ay odetidaako nuus oda. Ne nuus qottonna ixiko, nu nena wodhoko’ yaagidi oychana.
38.26: Neeni, ‘Ta yan hayqonna mela tana zaarada qasho keethi gidida Yoonataana soo yeddonna mela kawa woossas’ ” gada zara yaaga.
38.27: Hessafe guye, halaqati ubbay Ermiyaasako yidi, he oysha oychidosona. Kawoy iya kiittidaysada entaw odis; Ermiyaasara kawara haasayishin si7ida asi bayna gisho enti si77i gidoosona.
38.28: Yerusalaamey oyketana wodey gakanaw, Ermiyaasi naageysata dabaaban gordetidi gam7is.

39.1: Sedeqiyaasi Yihudan kawotida uddufuntho laythan, tammantha ageenan, Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoorinne iya olanchoti ubbay yidi, Yerusalaame teqidosona.
39.2: Sedeqiyaasi kawotida tammanne issintho laythan, oyddantho ageenan, uddufuntho gallasan Babiloone olanchoti katama gimbiya menthidosona.
39.3: He wode Babiloone kawa halaqati, Ergaal-Sarasira, Samgaar-Nabo, Sarsakimanne Ergaal-Sarasira geeteteysati hara daro halaqatara issife yidi Giddo Penge geetetiya bessan uttidosona.
39.4: Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasinne iya olanchoti ubbay Babiloone olanchota be7ida wode baqatidosona. Qamma katamaape keyidi, kawa atakilte bessaa efiya ogiyara, nam7u dirsa gimbeta issife gathiya pengiyara keyidi Yordaanose Zangaarako simmidi bidosona.
39.5: Gidoshin, Babiloone olanchoti enta yedethidi, Iyaarko demba gathishe, Sedeqiyaasa oykidosona. Hamaata biittan, Irbila kataman de7iya kawa Nabukadanaxoorako efidosona. Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori yan Sedeqiyaasa bolla pirdis.
39.6: Babiloone kawoy, Sedeqiyaasa ade nayta iya sinthan, Irbila kataman wodhis; qassi Yihuda halaqata ubbaa wodhis.
39.7: Sedeqiyaasa ayfeta wooci kessidi, iya Babiloone biitta efanaw santhalaatan qachis.
39.8: Babiloone olanchoti kawo gadhonne asay de7iya keetha ubbaa taman xuuggidosona; Yerusalaame gimbiyaka laallidosona.
39.9: Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani kataman attida asaanne kaddidi iyako yida asa ubbaa di77idi Babiloone biitta efis.
39.10: Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani aykoka bayna guutha manqota Yihudan aggidi, entaw woyne gadenne goshsha gade immis. Ermiyaasi Biletis
39.11: Nabukadanaxoori, kawa naageysata halaqaa Nabuzardaana haysada yaagidi kiittis:
39.12: “Bada Ermiyaasa koya demmada, iyaw koshshiyaba ubbaa ootha; iya bolla hara iitabaa aykoka oothofa” yaagis.
39.13: Hessa gisho, Nabuzardaani, Nabushazbaana, Ergaal-Sarasiranne Babiloone kawa halaqata ubbaa kiittidi,
39.14: Ermiyaasa qashetidi de7iya, naageysata dabaabape kessidosona. Ba soo efidi wothana mela Safaana na7aa, Akqaama na7aa Godoliyas hadara immidosona. Hessa gaason, Ermiyaasi ba biitta asaara issife de7is.
39.15: Ermiyaasi naageysata dabaaban qashetidi de7ishin, Godaa qaalay iyako haysada yaagidi yis.
39.16: “Bada, Tophe addiya Ebemelekako haysada yaaga: ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, haysada yaagees: hizape guye ta odidaysada ha katamaa bolla lo77oba gidonashin, dhayo ehana. Hessi ubbay haniya wode ne ha kataman uttada, ne ayfen be7ana.
39.17: Gidoshin, he gallas ta nena ashshana; ne yayiya, ne morketa kushen aathada immike.
39.18: Ta nena polo ashshana; ne olan hayqaka; ne tanan ammanetida gisho, hayqope attana’ ” yaagees Goday.

40.1: Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani Ermiyaasa Raman birshidi simmin, Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako yis. Nabuzardaani Yerusalaamepenne Yihudape di77idi, Babiloone efanaw qachida asaa giddon Ermiyaasi santhalaatan qashetidi de7ees.
40.2: Kawa naageysata halaqay Ermiyaasa dumma kessidi, haysada yaagis: “Goday ne Xoossay, dhayo ha biitta bolla ehanaysa odis.
40.3: I ehana gidaysada ha77i oothis; Godaa bolla hinte nagara oothida gishonne iyaw kiitetonna ixida gisho haysi ubbay hanis.
40.4: Heko, ha77i ta ne kushen de7iya santhalaata birshada nena yeddas. Taara Babiloone baana giiko yedha; ta new koshshiyaba ubbaa kunthana. Babiloone baanaw koyonna ixiko attanaw danda7aasa. Biitta ubbay ne sinthan de7ees; nena lo77ida bessi awuka ba” yaagis.
40.5: Ermiyaasi iya matape boonna de7ishin, Nabuzardaani gujidi yaagis; “Safaana na7aa, Akqaama na7aa Godoliyako ba. Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori iya Yihuda katamata haariya asi oothidi shuumis. Hessa gisho, iyara issife yan asaara de7a; woyko nena lo77ida bessi awuka ba” yaagis. Kawa naageysata halaqay iyaw shinqenne hara imota immidi yeddis.
40.6: Ermiyaasi Mixiphan de7iya Akqaama na7aa Godoliyako bis. I yan attida asaara issife de7is. Godoliya Hayquwa (2 Kawo 25:22-24)
40.7: Yihuda toora moconatapene olanchotape guuthati Babiloone kawas kushe immibookona. Enti Babiloone kawoy, Akqaama na7a Godoliya biitta haareysa oothidi shuumidaysanne Babiloone di7etidi boonna Yihudan attida manqotas halaqa oothidaysa si7idosona.
40.8: Naatana na7ay Isma7eeli, Qareya nayti Yohaaninne Yoonataani, Tanhumeta na7ay Sarayi, Naxoofa addiya Yoofa naytinne Ma7ika addiya na7ay Yazaani banta olanchota ubbaara Godoliyako Mixipha yidosona.
40.9: Safaana na7ay, Akqaama na7ay Godoliya entaw haysada yaagidi caaqis: “Babiloonetas kushe immanaw yayyofite; he biittan de7ite. Babiloone kawas haaretite; ubbabay hintew inje gidana.
40.10: Ta Mixiphan uttada, Babiloone biittafe hintera gahetanaw yaa ubbaara hinte doona gidada odetana. Shin hinte de7iya bessan woyne, shamaho zaytenne hara katha ayfe ubbaa shiishidi dagayite” yaagis.
40.11: Moo7aben, Amoonen, Edoomeninne hara biittatan de7iya Ayhude ubbay Babiloone kawoy, guutha Yihuda asati Yihudan attana mela oothidaysanne Safaana na7a Akqaama na7a Godoliya enta bolla shuumidaysa si7idosona.
40.12: Enti laaletidi de7iya banta biittafe Yihuda simmidi, Godoliya de7iya bessaa Mixipha yidosona. Yan enti daro woynenne hara katha ayfe shiishidi dagaayidosona.
40.13: Hessafe guye, Qaraya na7ay Yohaaninne kushe immiboona toora moconati ubbay Godoliyako Mixipha yidi,
40.14: “Amoone kawoy Ba7alisi nena wodhana mela Naatana na7aa Isma7eela yeddidaysa eray?” yaagidosona. Shin Akqaama na7ay Godoliya enti odaa ammanonna ixis.
40.15: Qaraya na7ay Yohaani Mixiphan de7iya Godoliyako yidi, “Oonika eronna de7ishin bada, Nataniyaa na7aa Isma7eela ta wodhana. I nena wodhiko, ne matan shiiqida Ayhude ubbay laaletana; qassi Yihudan attida asa ubbay wurana” yaagis.
40.16: Shin Akqaama na7ay Godoliya zaaridi, “Isma7eelaba ne odiya ubbay wordo gidiya gisho hessa melaba oothofa” yaagis.

41.1: Laapuntha ageenan kawo koche gididi, kawa moorinnatape issoy, Elsama na7ay, Naatana na7ay Isma7eeli tammu asaara issife Akqaama na7aa Godoliyara gahetanaw Mixipha bis. Ubbay uttidi kathi mishin,
41.2: Naatana na7ay Isma7eelinne iyara de7iya tammu asati banta mashshaa mashshaa kessidi, Babiloone kawoy Yihuda bolla shuumida Akqaama na7aa Godoliya wodhidosona.
41.3: Isma7eeli qassi Mixiphan Godoliyara de7iya Ayhudetanne Babiloone olanchota ubbaa wodhis.
41.4: Godoliya hayqida wontetha gallas, oonika iya hayquwa eronna de7ishin,
41.5: Seekemape, Seelopenne Samaarepe hospun tammu asati azzanidi, banta buuchaa meedidi, banta ma7uwa daakidi, banta som7uwa gaarishe yidosona. Enti Xoossa keethaas immiya kathinne ixaane ehidosona.
41.6: Isma7eeli yeekishe Mixiphafe keyidi, entara gahetanaw bis. Enta gahetida wode, “Akqaama na7aa Godoliyako haa yidi iya be7ite” yaagis.
41.7: Enti katamaa gelida wode Isma7eelinne iyara de7iya asati enta wodhidi haatha ollan yeggidosona.
41.8: Shin he hospun tammu asatape tammati Isma7eela haysada yaagidi woossidosona: “Nuna wodhopa! Nu goshshan nu qosida daro gistey, bangi, shamaho zayteynne eessi de7ees” yaagidosona. I enta wodhonna yeddi aggis.
41.9: Isma7eeli asaa wodhidi yeggida ollay, Isra7eele olanaw Ba7oosi yida wode kawoy Asi bookisida gita gimbetida haatha olla. Nataniyaa na7ay Isma7eeli he ollaa ahan kunthis.
41.10: Isma7eeli kawa macca naytanne Mixiphan attida asa ubbaa di77is. Hessati kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani Akqaama na7aa Godoliya aawatetha garsan Mixiphan wothidaysata. I enta di77idi, baara ekidi, Amoone biitta baanaw dendis.
41.11: Qaraya na7ay Yohaaninne iyara de7iya toora moconati Isma7eeli oothida iitaba ubbaa si7idosona.
41.12: Banta asaa ekidi, iyara oletanaw bidosona; Isma7eela Gaba7oonan de7iya gita eele haatha matan oykidosona.
41.13: Isma7eeli di77idi efiya asa ubbay Qaraya na7aa Yohaanananne iyara de7iya toora moconata be7ida wode daro ufaytidosona.
41.14: He di7etidaysati ubbay guye simmidi, Qaraya na7aa Yohaananan gahetidosona.
41.15: Shin Isma7eelinne hara hospun asati Yohaananape kessi ekidi, Amoone biitta baqatidosona.
41.16: Isma7eeli Akqaama na7aa Godoliya wodhidi, Mixiphafe di77idi ehida olanchoti, maccasati, naytinne shuufati ubbay Qaraya na7aa Yohaanaranne hara toora moconatara dendidi bidosona.
41.17: Enti yaape dendidi, Gibxe baanaw, Beeteleme matan de7iya Gerot-Kamahama geetetiya bessan shempidosona.
41.18: Enti Gibxe biday Babiloone kawoy shuumida Akqaama na7aa Godoliya Isma7eeli wodhida gisho, Babiloonetas yayyidi, Babiloonepe baqatidi, Gibxe baanaw dendidosona.

42.1: Tora moconati ubbay, Qaraya na7ay Yohaani, Hoshaya na7ay azariyaas asa ubbay, guuthafe gita gakanaw,
42.2: nabiya Ermiyaasako yidi, “Nu nena oychiyaba nuus ootharki. Attida nu gisho Godaa ne Xoossaa woossarki. Nu kase daro; shin ha77i ne be7eysada guutha asa xalaali attida.
42.3: Nu biya ogiyanne nu oothanaba I nuna bessaana mela Godaa ne Xoossaa nu gisho woossa” yaagidosona.
42.4: Nabey Ermiyaasi zaaridi, “Lo77o; hinte oyshaada, Godaa hinte Xoossaa ta woossana; hintefe aykoka qosonna I odiyaba ubbaa hintew odana” yaagis.
42.5: Enti zaaridi, Ermiyaasako, “Goday ne Xoossay ne baggara nuna kiittiyaba ubbaa nu polonna ixiko, Goday ba huuphen nu bolla tumanne ammanetida marka gido.
42.6: Nu dosiyaba gidin, ixiyaba gidin, nu nena iyako kiittiya Goday, nu Xoossay kiittiyaba nu oothana. Nu iyaw kiitetiko, nuus ubbabay inje gidana” yaagidosona.
42.7: Tammu gallasape guye, Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako yis.
42.8: Qaraya na7aa Yohaana, iyara de7iya toora moconatanne asa ubbaa, guuthafe gita gakanaw xeegidi,
42.9: Hinte woosa ta iyako shiishana mela hinte tana kiitida Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees.
42.10: “ ‘Ta kase hinte bolla ehida iitabay tana azzanthida gisho, hinte ha biittan uttiko, ta hintena keexanape attishin, laallike; tokanape attishin, shoddike.
42.11: Hinte ha77i yayiya Babiloone kawas aykoka yayyofite. Hintena iya kushepe ashshanaw ta hintera de7iya gisho yayyofite.
42.12: Ta hintew qadhetana; yaatada I hintew qadhetidi, hintena hinte biitta zaarana mela oothana’ yaagees Goday.
42.13: “Gidoshin, hinte Godaas, hinte Xoossaas kiitetonna ixidi, ha biittan uttoko giiko,
42.14: qassi hinte, ‘Ola worenne olas punniya moyze si7onnanne koshi bayna Gibxe bidi, yan daana’ giiko,
42.15: hinteno, Yihudan attida asaw, Goday giyaba si7ite. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: ‘Hinte Gibxe bidi, yan daanaw qofa qachiko,
42.16: hinte yayyida olay Gibxen hintena oykana; hinte hirgida koshay hintena kaallidi baana; hinte yan Gibxen hayqana.
42.17: Gibxe bidi daanaw qofa qachida asa ubbay olan woyko koshan woyko boshan hayqana. Ta enta bolla ehiya iitaape issoyka kessi ekenna woyko attenna’ yaagees.
42.18: “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, ‘Yerusalaamen de7eyisata bolla ta hanqoynne ta yiloy gukidaysada, hinte Gibxe geliya wode hinte bolla ta hanqoy hessada gukana. Hinte dagamas, cashshas, baadethasinne miicha attana; ha bessaa zaaridi be7eketa’ yaagees.
42.19: “Yihudan attidaysato, Goday hinteko, ‘Gibxe boopite!’ yaagis. Ta hachi hinteko, ‘Naagetite’ geysa si7ite.
42.20: Hinte taako, ‘Nu gisho Godaa nu Xoossaa woossa; I new odiyaba ubbaa nuus oda; nu oothana’ yaagidi, tana Godaako, hinte Xoossaako, kiittideta; hessan gita bala balideta.
42.21: Ta I gidaba ubbaa hachi hintew odas. Shin Goday hinte Xoossay ta baggara hintew kiitida qaalas kiitetonna ixideta.
42.22: Hiza, haysa si7ite; hinte bidi daanaw koyiya biittan hinte olan, koshaninne boshan hayqidi wurana” yaagis.

43.1: Goday enta Xoossay kiitida qaala ubbaa Ermiyaasi entaw odidi wursidaape guye,
43.2: Hoshaya na7ay Azaariyasi, Qaraya na7ay Yohaaninne otorancho asa ubbay Ermiyaasako, “Ne wordo odaasa! Goday nu Xoossay nu Gibxe bidi uttonna mela digganaw nena nuuko kiittibeenna.
43.3: Shin Babiloone asay nuna wodhanaada woyko di77idi banta biitta efanaada ne nuna enta kushen aathada immana mela nena nu bolla denthiday Neera na7aa Baaroka” yaagidosona.
43.4: Qaraya na7ay Yohaani, toora moconati ubbaynne asa ubbay Yihuda biittan daana mela Goday enta kiitida kiitta polonna ixidosona.
43.5: Qaraya na7ay Yohaaninne toora moconati ubbay banta laaletida kawotethata ubbaafe Yihudan daanaw simmida Yihuda asa bantara ekidi Gibxe bidosona.
43.6: Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani Safaana na7aa, Akqaama na7aa Godoliyara daana mela ashshida addeta, maccasa, naytanne kawa macca nayta ubbaa efidosona. Qassi nabiya Ermiyaasanne Neera na7aa Baaroka efidosona.
43.7: Enti Godaa kiitaa ixidi, Gibxe biitta gelidi, Xafinaasa katamaa gakanaw bidosona.
43.8: Xafinaasan Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis.
43.9: “Gita shuchata ekada, Yihuda asay be7ishin, Xafinaasan de7iya Gibxe kawa gadho geliya bessan sintha baggara de7iya baasuwan mooga.
43.10: Entako, ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; ta kiittada, ta aylliya Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora ehisana. Ha moogetida shuchata bolla iya kawotethaa araata wothana. I ba kawotetha dunkaaniya iya bolla essana.
43.11: I yidi Gibxe biitta olana. Hayqos besseysati hayqana; di7etanaw besseysati di7etana; mashshan hayqanaw besseysati mashshan hayqana.
43.12: Gibxen de7iya eeqa xoossata keethaa tama oythana; eeqata xuuggana woyko di77ana. Henthanchoy ba itiya ma7eysada, Gibxe biitta ma7ana. Yaatidi, yaape saro baana.
43.13: I, Gibxe biittan Heliyoota kataman de7iya hawultiya mentherethana; Gibxe xoossata keethaa taman xuuggana’ ” yaagis.

44.1: Gibxen Migdoola, Xafinaasa, Mempisanne Phatiroosa biittan de7iya Ayhudetas Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis.
44.2: “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, Yerusalaame bollanne Yihuda katamaa ubbaa bolla ta ehida dhayo ubbaa hinte, hinte ayfen be7ideta. Enti hachi gakanaw laaletidi attidosona; oonika yan deenna.
44.3: Hessi haniday, enti iita ooso oothidi, tana hanqethida gishosa. Enti woyko hinte woyko hinte mayzati eronna hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisidi entaw goyinnidosona.
44.4: ‘Ta ixiya haysa mela iitabaa oothopite’ yaagidi odana mela zaara zaara ta aylleta, nabeta kiittas.
44.5: Gidoshin, enti si7onna woyko akeekona ixidosona. Hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisiya iita oosuwa aggonna ixidosona.
44.6: Hessa gaason ta suulliya hanqoynne yiloy Yihuda katamata bollanne Yerusalaame ogetan eexis. Enti hachi hinte be7eysada laaletidosona; baysa gididosona.
44.7: “Ha77ika Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, Isra7eele Xoossay, haysada yaagees; hinte kochay attonna mela, maccasa, addeta, naytanne yooga nayta Yihuda biittafe dhaysanaada iitabaa hinte, hinte bolla ayis oothetii?
44.8: Hinte daanaw yida Gibxe biittan hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisidi tana ayis hanqethetii? Sa7an de7iya kawotethata ubbaa giddon baadethasinne bores attidi, hintena dhaysanaw ayis koyeetii?
44.9: Kase hinte aawati, Yihuda kawotinne enta macheti, hintenne hinte macheti Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan oothida iita ubbaa dogidetiyee?
44.10: Hinte hachi gakanaw hintenatethaa kawushibeketa; tana bonchibeeketa. Ta hintewunne hinte mayzatas immida higgiyanne woga kaallibeketa.
44.11: “Hessa gisho, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, haysada yaagees; ta hintena, Yihuda zertheta ubbaa dhaysanaw qofa qachas.
44.12: Yihudan attida asaa giddofe, Gibxe bidi, yan daanaw qofa qachidaysata ta dhaysana. Enti ubbay Gibxen wurana; olaninne koshan hayqana. Gitape guuthu gakanaw de7iya ubbay olaninne koshan dhayana. Enti dagamas, cashshas, baadethasinne miichas attana.
44.13: Ta Yerusalaame, olan, koshaninne boshan seeridaysada Gibxe biittan de7eyisata seerana.
44.14: Attida Yihuda asaape Gibxe bidi de7eysati Gibxeta kushiyape polo kessi ekokona. Enti simmidi daana gidi amotiya Yihuda biitta ay asika simmenna. Guutha asape attishin, oonika simmidi yeenna” yaagis.
44.15: Enta macheti hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisethi eriya addey ubbay, yan de7iya maccasa ubbaynne gita maabara gididi, Gibxeninne Phatiroosan de7iya asa ubbay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidosona.
44.16: “Neeni Godaa sunthan nuus odiyaba ubbaa nu si7oko.
44.17: Nu oothana gidi qopidaba ubbaa oothana. Nuuni, nu mayzati, nu kawotinne nu halaqati Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan kase oothidaysada Salo Kawiw geetetiyaris nu xoossees ixaane cuyisana; ushsha yarshuwa iw gussana. Nu kase hessa oothiya wode, nuus daro kathi de7ees; he wode nuus sa7i keeha; nuna aybika metibeenna.
44.18: Shin Salo Kawees ixaane cuyiseysanne ushsha yarsho gusseysa aggidaape guye, nuus ubbabay pacis; nu olaninne koshan wurida” yaagidosona.
44.19: Maccasati gujidi, “Nu Salo Kawees malan uythu uukiya wode, ixaane cuyisiya wodenne ushsha yarsho iw gussiya wode nu azinati eronna de7ishin, nu oothidabay aybika baawa” yaagidosona.
44.20: Haysada yaagidi zaarida asa ubbaas, maccasasinne addetas, Ermiyaasi haysada yaagis;
44.21: “Hintenne hinte mayzati, hinte kawotinne hinte halaqati, biittan de7iya asa ubbay, Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan ixaane cuyisidaysa Goday erenna woyko dogis gidi qopeetii?
44.22: Hinte oothiya iitanne shaatiya oosuwa Goday si77i gaanaw danda7iboona gisho, hinte biitta hachi hinte be7eysada laaletida, baysanne baadetida biitta oothis.
44.23: Ha dhayo ubbay hintena gakiday, hinte hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisida gishosa, Godaa bolla nagara oothida gishosa, Godaa qaala si7onna ixida gishosanne iya higgiya, iya wogaanne awaajuwas kiitetonna ixida gishosa” yaagis.
44.24: Hessafe guye, Ermiyaasi asa ubbaasinne maccasas haysada yaagis; “Hinteno, Yihudape yidi, Gibxe biittan de7iya asaw, Goday giyaba si7ite.
44.25: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, haysada yaagees; hintenne hinte macheti, ‘Nuuni Salo Kawees ixaane cuyisana; ushsha yarshuwa iw gussana’ gidi caaqida caaquwa polidi, ooson bessideta. Hiza, guye goopite; hinte caaquwa polite.
44.26: “Gidoshin, hinteno, Gibxe biittan de7iya Yihuda asaw, Goday giyaba si7ite! Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Hizape guye Gibxe biittan de7iya Yihuda asaape issoyka ta sunthan, “Ubbaa Haariya Goday ero” ’ gidi caaqonna mela ta gita sunthan caaqas.
44.27: Ta enta bolla lo77oba gidonashin, iitabaa ehanaw minnayis. Gibxen de7iya Yihuda asay wurana gakanaw olaninne koshan hayqana.
44.28: Olape attida guutha asati Gibxefe Yihuda simmana. He wode Gibxen de7iya Yihuda asay, ta qaalapenne enta qaalape awusi tumeeko erana.
44.29: Ta hintena ha bessan seeriya wode, ‘Ta hinte bolla iitabaa ehana’ gidaysi tuma gideysas ta hintew malaata immana.
44.30: Ta Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasa iyaw morke gididi, iya wodhanaw koyiya Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras aathada immidaysada Gibxe kawa Hofira iya wodhanaw koyiya iya morketas aathada immana” yaagees Goday.

45.1: Iyosyaasa na7ay Iyo7aqeemi Yihudan kawotida oyddantho laythan, Neera na7ay Baaroki ha qaalata Ermiyaasi odin, si7idi, maxaafan xaafis. He wode Ermiyaasi iyaw odida qaalay haysa:
45.2: “Baaroka, Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay neeko haysada yaagees:
45.3: Neeni, ‘Goday ta sakuwa bolla azzano gujida gisho tanooshsho! Taani un7an daaburada shempo dhayas’ ” yaagadasa.
45.4: Baaroka, Goday neeko haysada yaagees: “Ta keexidaysa ta laallana; ta tokidaysa ta shoddana. Ta haysa biitta ubban oothana.
45.5: Yaatin, ne new gitaba koyayee? Hessa koyopa. Asa ubbaa bolla ta dhayo ehana. Shin ne bida bessa ubban ta ne shempuwa ashshana” yaagees Goday.

46.1: Kawotethatabaa Goday Ermiyaasas odida qaalay haysa.
46.2: Iyo7aasa na7ay Iyo7aqeemi Yihudan kawotida oyddantho laythan, Efraxiisa shaafa matan, Karkamisha geetetiya bessan, Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori xoonida Gibxe kawa Nako olanchotabaa Goday haysada yaagees.
46.3: Hinte tooranne gondalle giigisite; olas keyite.
46.4: Hinte parata bixaalidi toggite; hinte huuphiyan birata barneexa wothite. Hinte bessaa bessaa oykite; hinte toora leefite; hinte ola ma7uwa ma7ite.
46.5: “Shin haysi ta be7ey aybee? enti yayyidi guye simmidosona. Wolqaamati xoonetidosona; guye xeellonna baqatidosona; Enta yuusho ubban dagami de7ees” yaagees Goday.
46.6: Eesoteysi kessi ekenna; minoyka attanaw danda7enna. Pudeha baggan Efraxiisa shaafa matan, ubbay dhubetidi kundidosona.
46.7: Haysi Nayle shaafa kixada dendey, di7o haathada goggey oonee?
46.8: Gibxey Nayle shaafada dendees; di7o haathada gupees. Gibxey, “Taani kixada, biittan eellana; katamatanne iyan de7iya asa ubbaa dhaysana” yaagees.
46.9: Parato, gupidi keyite; para gaareto woxite. Gondalle oykida Tophenne Puuxa asaw, dongen dukiya Luuda asaw, mino olanchoto, dendidi oletite.
46.10: He gallasay Godaa Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa gallas, Goday ba morketa bolla halo keyiya gallas. Iya mashshay kallana gakanaw enta maana; alana gakanaw enta suuthaa uyana. Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay, pudeha baggan Efraxiisa shaafa matan, enta yarsho oothidi ekana.
46.11: Geela7ee, Gibxe macca naatte, Galada biitta bada tiyetiya dhale eha. Gidoshin, ne coo dhale darsaasape attishin, new paxoy baawa.
46.12: Kawotethati ne yeella si7idosona; ne yeehoy biitta ubbaa kumana. Ne olanchoti issoy issuwan dhubetidi, ubbay issife kundidosona.
46.13: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Gibxe olanaw yaanaysa, Goday nabiya Ermiyaasas odida qaalay haysa:
46.14: Haysa Gibxen oda; Migdoolan, Mempisaninne Xafinaasan awaaja. Hinte bessan bessan eqite; giigetite; hinte yuushuwan de7iya ubbaa mashshi maana.
46.15: Hinte mino olanchoti ayis kundidee? Goday enta sugida gisho gidennee?
46.16: Olanchoti dhubetidi kundidosona; issoy issuwa, “Dendidi yedhite; morke mashshafe attanaw, nu asaako, nu biitta simmoos” yaagosona.
46.17: Enti yan Gibxe kawako, “Ba qaada go7etonna coo wursiya odancho” gidi sunthana.
46.18: “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa” geetetiya kawoy haysada yaagees: “Taani, ta shempuwan caaqayis; dereta giddon Taabore Derey, abba matan de7iya Qarmeloosa Derey, aduqeysada aduqiya morkey hinte bolla yaana.
46.19: Hinteno, Gibxen de7eysato, di7etidi baanaw giigite. Mempisa katamay laaletidi, oonika de7onna mela biitta gidana.
46.20: Gibxey lo77o ussa mela; shin pudeha bagga biittafe yaa boxiyan iya saxetana.
46.21: Miishey cigetin oothiya olanchoti modhida wofaano mela. Enta dhayo gallasay matida gisho, enti seeretiya wodey gakida gisho, enti issife guye simmidi baqatidosona; enti banta bessan eqibookona.
46.22: Morkey wolqan sugidi yaa wode, Gibxe asay baqatiya shooshada kolxana. Morketi mithi qanxiya asada, kalta ekidi iya bolla yaana.
46.23: Asay sixida wora qeexidi dhayseysada, Gibxe asaa qanxidi wursana Morketa tayboy boolepe daro; enta taybanaw danda7etenna.
46.24: Gibxe macca na7iya kawuyana; pudeha bagga asaas aadhada imetana.”
46.25: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees. “Taani Tebisa xoossa Amoone, kawa paarona, Gibxe biittanne Gibxe xoossata, Gibxe kawotanne kawa paarona bolla zempiya ubbaa seerana.
46.26: Enta shempuwa koyiya Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora kusheninne iya olanchota kushen aathada immana. Hessafe guye, Gibxe biittay kaseysada asi de7iya biitta gidana” yaagees Goday.
46.27: “Ta aylliyaw, Yayqooba yayyofa; Isra7eele, dagammofa. Nena haaho bessafe, ne kochay di7etidi bida biittafe ashshana. Yayqoobi simmidi, saron wopu gidi daana; enta yashisiyabay deenna.
46.28: Ta aylliyaw, Yayqooba, ta neera de7iya gisho, yayyofa. Ta nena laallida kawotethata ubbaa dhaysana; shin nena dhaysike. Ta nena xillo pirdan seerana; shin seeri bayna nena coo aggike” yaagees Goday.

47.1: Gibxe kawoy Gaaza olidi oykanaape kase, Filisxeemeba Godaape nabiya Ermiyaasako yida qaalay haysa:
47.2: Goday haysada yaagees; “Heko, pudeha baggafe haathi dhuuqana; di7oy gelida kixa haathada goggana. Biittanne biittan de7iyaba ubbaa, katamatanne enta giddon de7iya asa ubbaa muukana. Asay waassana; biittan de7iya ubbay yeekana.
47.3: Parata girsaa, para gaareta kooshincha, gaareta gondorsa girsaa si7ana. Aawata kushey argaacida gisho, banta nayta maaddanaw guye simmokona.
47.4: Filisxeeme asa dhaysanaw, Xiroosanne Sidoona maaddanaw attiya asaa dhaysanaw wodey gakis. Goday Filisxeemepe attidaysata, Haathan teqetida de7iya Kaftoorape yida kochata dhaysana.
47.5: Gaazi kayotada ba huuphiya meedasu; Asqalooni ba kushiya doonna bolla wothasu. Hinteno, abba gaxan attidaysato, awude gakanaw hinte asatethaa gaaretii?
47.6: Hinte, ‘Godaa mashshaw, neeni si77i goonna ixey awudesee? Ne bessaa simmada gela; si77i gada utta’ yaageeta.
47.7: Shin Goday iya kiittin, I waanidi si77i gaanee? Asqaloonanne abba gaxan de7iya biitta olana mela kiittas” yaagis.

48.1: Moo7abe Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees; “I dhayana gisho, Nabo katamaa ayye! Qiratayma katamay yeellatananne; oyketana; enta miixay kawuyana; meqeretana.
48.2: Hizape Moo7abe ceeqoy dhayana; Haseboona katamaa asay Moo7abe bolla, ‘Haayite, ha biitta dhaysana’ yaagidi iitabaa maqetis. Neno, Madmaana katame, mashshi nena yedethana gisho si77i ga.
48.3: Horonayma asay, ‘Dhayoynne kundethi, gakis’ gidi waassiya waasuwa si7ite!
48.4: Moo7abey meqeretana; iya nayti yeekiya yeehuwa si7ite!
48.5: Enti yeekishe, Luhita pude keyana; Horonaymape duge wodhishe, dhayo waasuwa si7ana.
48.6: Issoy issoy, ‘Baqatite; hinte shempiw ashshite; mela biittan de7iya Aro7eerada dummatite, hinte shempuwa ashshite’ yaagana.
48.7: Neeni ne wolqaaninne ne duretethan ceeqetida gisho, neka di7etana. Kamooshika ba kahinetaranne halaqatara, di7etidi baana.
48.8: Goday odidaysada, katama ubbaa dhayseysi yaana. Issi katamika attenna; zangaaraynne demba ubbay dhayana.
48.9: Moo7abey paallidi attana mela qefe immite. I katamay dhayana laattiya asika demmenna.
48.10: Godaa oosuwa qeli gidi oothiya uray baadetidaysa gido. Suuthu gussonna mela ba mashsha teqiya uray baadetidaysa gido!
48.11: “Moo7abey yalagatethafe doomidi, injen de7ida asa mela; I hara biitta di7etibeenna. Moo7abey otope oton tigetonanne qaaxonna, mal7oy laametonnanne sawoy aggonna, uttidi de7ida woyne ushsha mela.
48.12: Taani otuwa gupanthesata kiittiya wodey yaana. Enti iya gussana; otuwape xiizo dhaysana; otuwa mentherethana.
48.13: Isra7eele asay ba ammanetida, Beetelen de7iya eeqan kawuyidaysada Moo7abey ba xoossaa Kamooshan kawuyana.
48.14: “Hinte, ‘Nu wolqaama asinne mino olancho’ gidi ayis ceeqetetii?
48.15: Heko, Moo7abeynne yan de7iya katamati dhayidosona. Iya yalaga adde nayti shukettanaw duge bidosona” yaagees, kawoy, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
48.16: Moo7abe dhayoy matatis; iya laaletetha wodey ellesidi gakis.
48.17: Iya yuushuwan de7iya asay, iya gitatetha eriya ubbay, “Mino gidida kawotethaa xam7ay waanidi meqidee?” Bonchetida xam7ay waanidi tinchetidee? yaagidi zeleelite.
48.18: “Hinteno, Diboona kataman de7eysato, hinte boncho bessafe wodhidi, mela biittan uttite. Moo7abe dhayseysi hinte bolla yaana; hinte miixa ubbaa laallana.
48.19: Aro7eera kataman de7eysato, oge doonan eqidi xeellite; kessi ekidi baqatiya addetanne maccasa, ‘Aybe keyday?’ yaagidi oychite.
48.20: Enti, ‘Moo7abey kundida gisho kawuyis; iyaw yeekitenne zeleelite. Moo7abe dhaydaysa gisho Arnoona shaafa matan awaajite’ ” yaagidi zaarana.
48.24: Qiriyootanne, Baasora katamata bollanne mataninne haahon de7iya Moo7abe katamata bolla pirdi yis.
48.25: Moo7abe kacey qanxetis; iya qesey meqis.”
48.26: Godaa bolla otortida gisho, Moo7abe ushshidi mathoyite. Ba cooshshaa bolla gondoreto; asa ubbay iya bolla qelqiso.
48.27: Kase ne Isra7eele bolla qelqisabikii? Iyabaa haasaya wode kadhada huuphe qaathiday Isra7eeley kaysotara oyketida gishoyee?
48.28: Hinteno, Moo7aben de7eysato, katamape keydi, shucha hom7on de7ite. Aafo doonan baw keethe keexiya holle mela gidite.
48.29: Moo7abey daro otortis; Moo7abey ay mela ba ganna gabbisidaako, ceeqetiyako, otortiyako, ay mela bana dhoqu oothiyako, ta si7as.
48.30: Ta enta ceequwa erayis; shin aykoka maaddenna; enta otoroy aykoka oothenna.
48.31: Hessa gisho, ta Moo7abes waassas; Qir-Hereesa asaas kayotada yeekayis.
48.32: Hinteno, Sebama asaw, Ya7izeera asaas yeekeysafe aathada hintew yeekayis. Hinte tashey daayidi, Maxine Abbaa pinnidi, Ya7izeera gakida woyne mela; shin hinte woyne ayfiyanne wurcuwa bonqeysati yidi dhaysidosona.
48.33: Ufaysinne Lo77obay ayfiya Moo7abe biittafe eketis. Woyne gum7iya bessaafe woyney goggonnaada teqas. Oonika ililishe woyne gum7enna. Si7etiya girsi de7ikoka ufaysa girsi gidenna.
48.34: Enti Haseboonaninne Eliyaalan waassiya waasoy Yahaaxa gakanaw si7etees. Zo7aarape bidi Horonaymanne Eglaat-Shalisha gakanaw si7etees. Hari attoshin, Nimirima haathay melis.
48.35: Taani Moo7abepe dhoqa bessatan goyinnesatanne banta xoossatas ixaane cuyiseyisata dhaysana.
48.36: “Enti kase demmida duretethay ha77i dhayida gisho, ta wozanay Moo7abesinne Qir-Hereesa asaas susul7eda yeekas.
48.37: Enti banta huuphiyanne banta buuchaa meedidosona; banta kushiya qanxidi madunxisidosona; banta xeessan kayo ma7o dancidosona.
48.38: Taani Moo7abe oonika koyonna otoda menthida gisho, Moo7abeta keethaa bollaninne dabaaban yeehope attishin, harabay baawa” yaagees Goday.
48.39: Moo7abey aybi meqo meqide! Iya asay aybi waaso waassi! Moo7abe waani yeellatidi, ba zokuwa zaaridee? Hessa gisho, Moo7abey ba yuushuwan de7iya ubbaas miichasinne dagamas attis.
48.40: Arganthi ba qefiya miccidi yeysada morkey Moo7abe bolla yaana.
48.41: Iya katamati oyketana; iya miixati eketana. He gallas Moo7abe mino olanchota wozanay iqethi oykida maccasa wozana mela un7etana.
48.42: Moo7abe ta bolla makallida gisho dhayana; hizape guye kawotethi gididi deenna.
48.43: Moo7abe asaw, yashshi, olinne xihey hintena naagees.
48.44: Daganthiyabaape baqatiya oonika ollan kundana; ollafe keyiya oonika xihen oyketana. Taani Moo7abe seeriya wode hessa oothana.
48.45: “Baqatidi bidaysati wolqa dhayidi, Haseboona katama kuyan eqidosona. Haseboona katamaape Tami, kawoy Sihooney de7ida keethaafe lacoy keyidi, Moo7abe biittanne yan de7iya makallancho asaa mis.
48.46: Moo7abe asaw, hintena ayye! Kamoosha geetetiya eeqa xoossaa goyinneysati dhayidosona; enta adde naytinne macca nayti di7etidi bidosona.
48.47: Gidoshin, wursethan taani Moo7abe zaarada oorathana” yaagees Goday. Moo7abe bolla odetida pirday haysan wuris.

49.1: Amoonebaa Goday haysada yaagees; “Isra7eeles adde na7i baawee? Iya laattey baawee? Yaatin, Moloka geetetiya eeqa xoossaa goyinniya asati Gaade biitta ayis oykidona? Enta kataman ayis uttidona?
49.2: Amoone biittan Raaba katamaa bolla ola waasoy si7etana mela ta oothana wodey yaana. He katamay laaletidi baysa gidana. Iya yuushuwan de7iya gutati taman xuugetana. Isra7eeley bana ba biittafe gooddidaysata gooddana” yaagees Goday.
49.3: “Haseboona asaw, Gaye katamay laaletida gisho zeleelite. Raaba asaw, yeekite; kayo ma7o ma7idi kayotite; katamaa gimbiya giddon woxeretite. Hinte xoossay Moloki ba kahinetaranne ba halaqatara di7etis.
49.4: Ammanoy bayna asaw, ‘Nuna olanay oonee?’ yaagidi hinte duretethaaninne hinte aradda zangaaratan ayis ceeqetetii?
49.5: Ta ne yuushuwan de7eysati nena daganthana mela oothana” yaagees Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay. Hinte ubbay keyidi baqatana gisho baqatidi bidaysata shiishiya asi dhayana.
49.6: “Gidoshin, wursethan ta Amoone asaa zaarada oorathana” yaagees Goday. Edoomes Odetida Tinbite
49.7: Edoomeba Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees; “Temaana asaas de7iya cincatethay aw bidee? Zoreysatape zorey dhayidee? Enta cincatethay entafe eketidee?
49.8: Taani Eesawe kochaa seeriya wode iya bolla dhayo ehana gisho, Dadaanen de7eysato, baqatidi aafon qosetite.
49.9: Woyne maxeysati poshile ashshokona? Kaysoti qamma geliko, bantaw koyaba xalaala ekokona?
49.10: Shin ta Eesawa kochaa qaarada kallo ashshana; enti qosetanaw danda7onna mela, enti qosetiya bessa qaarada qonce bessi oothana. Eesawe sheeshay, iya dabbotinne iya shooroti ubbay dhayana; entafe issoyka attenna.
49.11: Hinte giddon de7iya yi7o nayta aggaagite; enta ta dichana. Hinte am7etika tanan ammaneto” yaagees.
49.12: Goday haysada yaagees; “Hiza seera ekanaw bessonna asas seeretethi attonnaba gidiko, hinte waanidi seerettonna attanee? Tuma hinteka seera xuu7ape uyeetape attishin, coo atteketa.
49.13: Baasora katamay baysa gididi attana; iya be7ida asa ubbaas dagamas, qelqisethasinne baadethas attana. Iya yuushuwan de7iya guta ubbay merinaw laaletidi attana. Haysa taani ta sunthan caaqayis” yaagees Goday.
49.14: Taani Godaape yida issi kiita si7as. Kawotethata giddo kiitetidaysi, “Edoome teqanaw shiiqite; iyara oletanaw dendite” yaagis.
49.15: “Hiza, ta nena kawotethata giddon guuthana; asaa giddon kadhetida asi oothana.
49.16: Shucha qophoninne dere bolla de7eyso, ne daganthoynne ne otoroy nena cimmis. Ne keethaa arganthada dhoqan keexikoka, ta nena yaape duge wodhisana” yaagees Goday.
49.17: “Edoomey ase daganthiya biitta gidana. Yaara aadhiya asa ubbay iya dhayuwa be7idi, dagammana; malaaletana.
49.18: Soodomeynne Gamoori banta yuushuwan de7iya katamatara dhayiya wode hanidaysada oonika yan deenna; asi yan uttenna” yaagees Goday.
