49.19: “Yordaanose shaafa lanqen de7iya woraape dorsati heemetiya lo77o qooroy de7iya bessaa, qoponna keyiya gaammoda, ta Edoome asata qoponna enta biittafe yedethana. Ta doorida asi iya bolla shuumana. Ta meli oonee? Ta oothana gidaba teqanaw danda7ey oonee? Taara eqetanaw danda7iya henthanchoy oonee?
49.20: “Ta Edoome bollanne Temaana katamaa bolla oothanaw halchidabanne qopidaba si7ite. Enta nayta wolqan goochidi efana; hessa gaason enta soo asay dagammana.
49.21: Edoome kundethaa girsay biitta qaathana; Edoometa waasoy Zo7o Abbaa gakanaw si7etana.
49.22: Arganthi ba qefiya miccidi duge paallidi yeysada, morkey Baasora bolla yaana. He wode Edoome olanchoti iqethi oykida maccasada hirgana” yaagees. Damasqos Odetida Tinbite
49.23: Damasqoba Goday haysada yaagees; “Iita oda si7ida gisho, Hamaatanne Arfada katamatan de7iya asay yeellatis; yayyis. Zuley shocida abbada enta wozanay shempo demmanaw danda7ibeenna.
49.24: Damasqoy daaburis; enti dagaman kokoridi baqatidosona; maccas iqethi oykeysada metoynne un7i enta oykis.
49.25: Ufaysi kumida eretida katamay waanidi baysa gididee?
49.26: He wode he kataman de7iya yalaga addeti katamaa giddo ogetan hayqana; olanchoti ubbay wurana.
49.27: Taani Damasqo katama dirsa gimbiyan tama yeddana; he tamay Wolde-Adara miixa maana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday. Qedaaresinne Haxooras Odetida Tinbite
49.28: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori olidi xoonida Qedaarenne Haxoora kawotethatabaa Goday haysada yaagees; “Dendidi, Qedaare asaa olite; doloha baggara de7iya asaa wursite.
49.29: Enta dunkaanetanne enta wudeta ekite. Enta gesheta, enta shaluwanne enta gimaleta ekite. Yaatidi entaw, ‘Hinte yuushuwan dagami de7ees’ yaagidi odite.
49.30: Haxooran de7eysato, Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori hinte bolla iitabaa oothanaw maqetidi uttida gisho, baqatite; aafon qosetite” yaagees Goday.
49.31: “Dendada; hirgi bayna saro de7iya kawotethata ola. Enta katama gimbiyas ibithi woyko kobey baawa; enti bantarka de7oosona.
49.32: “Enta gimaleti bonqetana; enta wudey di7etana. Banta huuphiya gaxaa meedeyisata carkon laallana; ta ubba bessara enta bolla dhayo ehana.
49.33: Haxoori merinaw workanati de7iya mela biitta gidana. Oonika yan deenna; asi yan uttenna” yaagees Goday. Elaamas Odetida Tinbite
49.34: Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi koyro kawotida wode, Elaamaba Godaape Ermiyaasako yida qaalay haysa;
49.35: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees; “Elaamas wolqa gidida donge dukiya asata ta wodhana.
49.36: Ubba bessara ta Elama bolla carko ehana; enta he carkuwan laallana. Hessa gisho, Elama asay laaletidi gakonna biitti deenna.
49.37: Enta morketa sinthaninne enta wodhanaw koyeyisata sinthan ta Elama daganthana. Ta gita hanquwan enta bolla dhayo ehana. Ta enta dhaysana gakanaw mashshan yedethana.
49.38: Taani Elama kawanne enta halaqata dhaysada ta araata yan wothana.
49.39: Gidoshin, wursetha wode taani Elama zaarada oorathana” yaagees Goday.

50.1: Babiloonenne Babiloone asaaba nabiya Ermiyaasa baggara Goday odida qaalay haysa:
50.2: “Kawotethata giddon oditenne awaajite. Bandira dhoqu oothi oykidi, aykoka qosonna, haysada yaagidi odite. ‘Babilooney kundis! Beella geetetiya eeqay yeellatis; Marduka geetetiya eeqay kawuyis. Iya misileti yeellatidosona; iya eeqati kawuyidosona.
50.3: Pudeha baggafe issi kawotethi yidi, Babiloone biitta dhaysana. Asaynne mehey baqatana; oonika yan deenna’ ” yaagis.
50.4: “He wodenne he gallas Isra7eeleynne Yihudi issife yeekishe yidi Godaa banta Xoossaa koyana.
50.5: Enti Xiyoone efiya ogiya oychana; banta som7uwa yaa zaarana. Enti, polo dogetonna merina caaquwan Godaara” oyketana.
50.6: “Ta asay dhayida dorsa mela; enta henthanchoti enta balethidi, zuma bolla guye yeddidosona. Issi zumaape hara zumaa bolla toylatidi banta girbiya dogidosona.
50.7: Demmida ubbay enta shankatis. Enta morketi, ‘Nu aykoka balibooko; ha metoy enta gakiday, enti Godaa, banta shempo bessaa, banta mayzata ufaysa bolla nagara oothida gishosa.’
50.8: “Isra7eele asaw, Babiloonepe baqatite; Babiloone biittafe keyite; wude kaalethiya kole deesha mela gidite.
50.9: Taani pudeha baggafe gita kawotethata cugaa denthada, Babiloone bolla ehana hanayis. Enti iya olidi oykana; enta dongey dukidi, balonna olancho mela.
50.10: Babilooney bonqetana; iya bonqiya ubbay kallana” yaagees Goday.
50.11: Babiloone asaw, ta asaa bonqeysato, hinte ufaytidi hashshu gideta. Qooron kallida ussada peenuqideta; korma parada caagideta.
50.12: Shin ha77i hinte gita katamay yeellatananne kawuyana. Kawotethata giddon Babilooney ubbaafe laafa gidana; haathi bayna mela biitta gidana.
50.13: Godaa hanquwa gaason, Babilooney dhayana; laaletana. Iya matara aadhiya ubbay iya bolla gakida bosha be7idi, dagammananne malaaletana.
50.14: “Donge dukeysato, Babiloone olanaw iya yuushuwan salpite; I Godaa bolla nagara oothida gisho hinte dongiyan iya dukite.
50.15: Ubba baggara Babiloone bolla ola waaso waassite; Babilooney kushe immis; iya gimbeti kundidosona; iya gimbe dirsay laaletis. Goday iya bolla halo keyishe de7iya gisho, hinte iya bolla halo keyite. I harata bolla oothidaba hinteka iya bolla oothite.
50.16: Zerethi zereysanne caka wode baacara keyeysa Babiloonepe dhaysite. Dhayseysata mashshaa yayyida gisho, he biittan de7iya asa ubbay ba yaraako yaraako simmidi ba biitta biitta baqatana.
50.17: “Isra7eeley gaammoy yedethidi laallida dorsaa mela. Koyro Asoore kawoy iya ashuwa mis; wursethan Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori iya meqethaa dhoggis.”
50.18: Hessa gisho, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay, “Asoore kawa ta seeridaysada Babiloone kawanne iya biitta seerana.
50.19: Shin Isra7eele, iya hentha bessaa zaarana; Qarmeloosanne Baasane Deretan I heemetana. I Efreemanne Galada gezze biittan kallidi maana.
50.20: He wode, hayqope ta ashshida Isra7eele asaa nagaraa ta atto gana gisho, asay Isra7eelen nagara koyana, shin demmokona. Yihudan nagara koyana, shin bentenna” yaagees Goday.
50.21: “Miraatayma biittaninne Piqodan de7iya asaa bolla dendidi enta olite; wodhite; enta polo dhaysite. Ta hintena kiittiya ubbaa oothite” yaagees Goday.
50.22: Biitta bolla ola waasoy si7etees; gita dhayoy gakis.
50.23: Biitta ubbaa liiqisiya naariqay waanidi meqide! Waanidi liiqide! Kawotethata ubbaa giddon Babilooney waanidi daganthiyaba gidide!
50.24: Neno, Babiloone, ta nena oykanaw xihe wothas; neeni eronnashin gelada oyketadasa. Neeni Godaara eqetida gisho oyketadasa.
50.25: Taani ta ola miishiya wothiya keethaa dooyada, ta yiluwan ola miishiya yaape kessas. Hessa oothiday, Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Babiloone biittan oothiya oosoy de7iya gishosa.
50.26: Yaara haara iya bolla dendite; kathay de7iya iya shaaliya dooyite; di7uwa kathada doorite; Aybibaaka ashshona wursidi dhaysite.
50.27: Booru shukeysada enta olanchota wodhite. Babiloone asay seeretiya wodey gakida gisho enta ayye!
50.28: “Di7etida asay Babiloonepe kessi ekidi, Yerusalaame baqatana. Babiloone asay Xoossa keethaa bolla oothidabaas Goday, enta Xoossay halo keyanaysa enti Xiyoonen odana.
50.29: Babiloone olanaw donge dukiya ubbaa xeegite; issoyka kessi ekonnaada iya yuushuwa teqo. Godaa bolla, Isra7eele Geeshsha bolla, I otortida gisho, iya oosuwada iyaw zaarite. I harata bolla oothidaysada iya bolla oothite.
50.30: Hessa gisho, iya yalaga addeti katamaa giddo ogiyan hayqana; he gallas iya olanchoti ubbay dhayana” yaagees Goday.
50.31: Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, “Neeni seeretiya wodey gakida gisho, neno, otoranchuwaw, ta ne bolla dendas.
50.32: Otoranchoy dhubetidi kundana; iya denthiya asi deenna. Ta iya katamata taman oythana; he tamay yuushuwan de7iya ubba dhaysana” yaagees.
50.33: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay un7etidosona. Enta di77idi efidaysati enta minthidi oykidosona; enta yeddenaw koybookona.
50.34: Shin enta Wozeysi mino; iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa. I, enta biittas shempo immanaw enta gisho mootetees. Shin Babiloone biittan de7eyisata bolla dagama yeddana.
50.35: Babilooney, Babiloonen de7eysati, iya halaqatinne iya cincati mashshan hayqana” yaagees Goday.
50.36: “Iya eeya wordo nabeti mashshan hayqonna. Dagammiya iya wolqaama olanchoti mashshan hayqana.
50.37: Iya parata bolla, iya para gaareta bollanne maccasa mela gidida iya allaga olanchota bolla mashshi yo. Iya shaluwa minjiya keethaa bolla mashshi yo; iya buqura ubbay bonqetana.
50.38: Babiloonen eeqi kumida gishonne dagamman kokoriya eeqati de7iya gisho; iya haathay melo; iya bolla koshi yo.
50.39: “Hessa gisho, Babilooney bazzo do7atinne workanati de7iya bessi gidana; qassi yanchoti yan daana. Yan merinaw asi deenna; yeletaape yeleta gakanaw asi de7iya bessi gidenna.
50.40: Xoossay beni Soodomenne Gamoora enta yuushuwan de7iya katamatara dhaysidaysada Babiloonen oonika deenna; asi yan uttenna” yaagees Goday.
50.41: “Heko, asay pudeha baggafe yaana; mino kawotethatinne daro kawoti sa7aa gaxape yaanaw dendidosona.
50.42: Enti banta dongiyanne toora oykidosona; enti wozana minonne yeddi maaronna asi. Enti banta para toggidi biya wode, beetay shociya abba guunthada hanees. Neno, Babiloone, enti ubbay olas giigida asi gididi ne bolla salpidosona.
50.43: “Babiloone kawoy hessa si7iya wode iya kushey daaburidi silis; iqethi oykida maccasada un7etis.
50.44: “Yordaanose shaafa lanqen de7iya woraape, lo77o qooroy de7iya bessafe qoponna keyiya gaammoda, ta yada, Babiloone asaa enta biittafe yedethana. Hessafe guye, ta doorida asi iya bolla shuumana; yaatin ta meli oonee? Ta oothana gidaba teqanay oonee? Ay henthanchoy taara eqetanaw danda7ii?
50.45: Hessa gisho, Goday Babiloone bollanne Babiloone biitta bolla halchidabanne qopidaba si7ite. Enta nayta wolqan goochidi efana; hessa gaason enta soo asa ubbay dagammana.
50.46: Babiloone kundethaa girsay biitta qaathana; Babiloone waasoy kawotethata ubban si7etana” yaagees.

51.1: Babiloone asaanne Babiloone biitta dhaysiya carko kiittana.
51.2: Taani Babiloone bolla carkoda punniya allagata kiittana. Iya dhayuwa gallas enti ubba bessara iya un7ethana.
51.3: Iya olanchoti dongiya dukana gakanaw woyko banta ola miishiya dancana gakanaw naagopite. Iya yalaga addetas mishetopite; iya olanchota polo dhaysite.
51.4: Enti Babiloone biittan shuketana; I dabaaban cadetidi kundana.
51.5: Enti biitta nagaran kunthikoka, Xoossay, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Geeshshay, Isra7eelenne Yihuda am7ida yeggidi aggibeenna.
51.6: Babiloonepe baqatite; issoy issoy ba shempuwa ashsho. I oothida nagaraa gaason hinte wuropite. Ha wodey taani Goday halo keyiya wode.
51.7: Babilooney sa7an de7iya asa ubbay uyidi mathotiya, woyne ushshi tigetiya, ta kushen de7iya worqa wanca mela. Kawotethati ubbay he woyne ushsha uyidi gooyidosona.
51.8: Babilooney qoponna kundidi meqis. Hessa gisho, iyaw yeekite; I paxaneko ooni eri iya madunthaas dhale immite.
51.9: Babiloonen de7iya allaga asay, “Nu Babiloone pathanaw koyida; shin paxanaw danda7ibeenna. Iya pirday haakidi salo gakida gishonne shaara gakanaw dhoqu gida gisho iya aggidi nu biitta simmoos” yaagidosona.
51.10: Isra7eele asay, “Goday nuus pirdida gisho, Xiyoone bidi, Goday nu Xoossay oothidaba odana” yaagana.
51.11: “Goday Babiloone dhaysanaw qofa qachida gisho, Meedona kawota denthis. I ba keethaa gisho halo keyanaw qopis. Meedona halaqati, ‘Donge toora leefite; gondalle oykite.
51.12: Babiloone bolla ola bandira denthite; minthidi naagite. Wocheyisata enta bessan bessan wothite; zugidi caddiya olanchota giigisite’ ” yaagidosona. Goday Babiloone asa bolla qopidabaanne ba gida ba oothana.
51.13: Babiloone, neeni daro shaafatinne duretethi kumida biitta, shin ne wursethay gakis; neeni bessonna ogen shiishiya go77ay attis.
51.14: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, “Booley biitta kumeysada taani asaa ne biittan kunthana; enti nena xoonida ufaysan banta qaala dhoqu oothidi ne bolla gayrana” yaagidi ba sunthan caaqis.
51.15: Goday ba wolqan sa7aa medhis; ba cincatethan biitta baasis; salota ba akeekan miccis.
51.16: I kiittiya wode, salon de7iya haathati guummoosona. Shaarata sa7aa gaxape ehees; iri bukiya wode wol7anthi wol7amees; ba minja bessaafe carkuwa kessees.
51.17: Asi ubbay eeyanne akeeki baynaysa; enta misileti wordonne shempoy baynayisata gidiya gisho, worqaa sheeshidi eeqa medheysati yeellatidosona.
51.18: He misileti pathonaysatanne kedhetidaysata; enta bolla Xoossay pirdiya wode enti dhayana.
51.19: Shin Yayqooba Xoossay enta mela gidenna; ubbaba medhiday iya. I baw doorida kochay Isra7eele asaa; iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa. Godaa Naariqa
51.20: “Babiloone, ne ta naariqanne ta ola miishe; Nena go7etada taani biittata mentherethas; kawotethata dhaysas.
51.21: Nena go7etada paratanne para toggeyisata; para gaaretanne enta laaggeyisata mentherethas.
51.22: Nena go7etada maccanne adde, cimanne nayta panthinne geela7o mentherethas.
51.23: Henthanchuwanne iya wudiya, goyeysanne iya waatha boorata, deriya haareysatanne halaqata nena go7etada mentherethas” yaagees Goday.
51.24: “Babilooneynne Babiloone asay Xiyoone bolla oothida iita oosuwa gisho hinte xeellishin ta halo keyana” yaagees Goday.
51.25: “Neno, Babiloone, ne biitta dhaysiya zuma mela; shin ta Goday nena ixas. Taani ta kushiya yeddada, nena zumaa bollafe duge gondorsana; neeni xuugetida zuma gidada attana.
51.26: Neepe baason yeggiya woyko gimbees eketiya shuchi deenna; ne merinaw baysa gidana” yaagees Goday.
51.27: “Babiloone bolla ola bandira denthite; asa giddon moyze punnite. Iya olanaw asaa ubbaa giigisite; Araraate, Minanne Askanaaza kawotethata xeegite. Ola halaqata shuumite; boole mela daro parata ehite.
51.28: Babiloone olanaw kawotethata ubbaa giigisite; Meedona kawota, enta halaqata, deriya haareysatanne enti haariya biitta asa ubbaa denthite.
51.29: “Babilooney oonika doonna baysa oothanaw Goday halchida halchuwa poliya gisho, biitta ubbay kokoresinne porqatees.
51.30: Babiloone olanchoti ola aggidi, banta miixan uttidosona. Enta wolqay laafin, maccasa mela gididosona. Enta keethati xuugetidosona; katama pengiya kobe mithati meqidosona.
51.31: Ha gaxape hini gaxa gakanaw, katamay morken oyketidaysa Babiloone kawas odanaw, woxeysi woxeysa kaallidi, kiitetidaysi kiitetidaysa kaallidi boosona.
51.32: Shaafara pinniya bessati oyketidaysa, haatha gaxan de7iya woray xuugetidaysanne olanchoti dagammidaysa enti kawas odanaw woxoosona” yaagees Goday.
51.33: “Babiloone biittay kathi bukiya wudumma gidana; guutha wodepe guye I caketiya wodey yaana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday, Isra7eele Xoossay. Goday Isra7eele Maaddana
51.34: Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori nuna wursidi mis; nu katamaa kaysa oto kessis. Dawey mitteysada iya mittis; mal7oba midi kuntheysada I nu shaluwan ba ganjiya kunthis; attidaysa mucidi cuttis.
51.35: Xiyooney, “Babilooney nu bolla oothida iitaba ubbay iya bolla simmo” yaagosona. Yerusalaamey, “Nu suuthaa acoy Babiloone asa oyko” yaagosona.
51.36: Hessa gisho, Goday Yerusalaame asaa haysada yaagees: “Ta ne gisho mootetana; ne haluwa ta keyana. Taani Babiloone haathaanne pultota melisana.
51.37: Babilooney laaletha doorenne workanati gupiya bessi gidana. Iya be7iya ubbay dagammananne qelqisana; yan issi asika deenna.
51.38: Babiloone asa ubbay gaammoda gudoosona; gaammo marada daarosona.
51.39: Enta asatethay ho77iya wode, ta entaw ushsha gibira giigisana. Enti mathotana gakanaw ta enta ushshana; enti zaaridi dendonna mela merinaw dhiskana” yaagees Goday.
51.40: Shukanaw efiya urgeda, marazedanne koleda taani enta shuka bessi efana.
51.41: “Asa ubbay sabbiya Babilooney waanidi oyketide! Babilooney kawotethata giddon waanidi daganthiyaba gidide!
51.42: Babiloone morketi abba beetay dendeysada dendidi kataman eellidosona.
51.43: Iya katamati laaletidi, daganthiyaba gididosona; haathi bayna mela biitta daanidosona; asi doonna bessinne oonika kanthidi aadhona bessi gididosona.
51.44: Beella geetetiya Babiloone eeqa ta seerana; I mittidaba iya uluwape kessana. Hizape guye, kawotethati iyako goggeysa aggana; Babiloone gimbey kundana.
51.45: “Ta asaw, iya giddofe keyite! Hinte, Godaa hanqo suuluwape hintena ashshite!
51.46: Biittan odetiya odaa si7iya wode ufaysi qanxofitenne yayyofite. Laythan laythan odi kaallidi kaallidi yaana. He wode kawoy kawa bolla dendiya makalla odi biittan si7etana.”
51.47: “Hessa gisho, taani Babiloone eeqa misileta seeriya gallasi yaana. Biitta ubbay yeellatana; hayqidaysati ubbay katamaa giddon kundana.
51.48: Pudeha baggafe yaana dhayseysata kushen Babilooney geliya wode saloninne sa7an de7iya ubbabay ililana.
51.49: Babilooney, Isra7eele asaanne sa7an de7iya asa ubbaa wodhidaysada Babiloone asay hayqanaw koshshees.
51.50: Ta asaw, olape kessi ekidaysato, biite; haysan eqofite. Hinte de7iya haaho biittan tana Godaa hassayite; Yerusalaame qopite.”
51.51: Hinte, “Nuuni cayetida gisho kawuyida; allagati Xoossa keethan de7iya geeshsha bessata gelida gisho, nu yeella ma7ida” yaagideta.
51.52: Shin “Taani Goday Babiloone eeqata seeriya wodey yaana. Madunxidaysati biitta ubban oolana.
51.53: Babilooney salo pude keyidi, yan miixa medhanaw danda7iyakoka, yaa gakanaw keyidi, iya yan dhaysiya asi taani kiittana” yaagees Goday.
51.54: “Babiloonen waasoy, Babiloone biittan gita dhayo girsi si7etana.
51.55: Goday Babiloone dhaysana; iya wolqaama girsa si77i oothana. Abba beetada guummiya morketi olishe ceeqetana.
51.56: Dhayseysati Babiloone bolla yaana; iya olanchoti oyketana; enta dongey meqana. Taani Goday halo keyiya Xoosse gidiya gisho, enta oosuwada entaw zaarana.
51.57: Iya halaqata, iya cinca asata, iya deriya haareyisata, iya toora moconatanne iya olanchota mathoyana. Enti zaaridi dendonna mela merinaw dhiskana” Taani kawoy, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa geeteteysi haysa odayis.
51.58: “Gita Babiloone gimbey kundana; iya adussa pengeti taman xuugetana. Asay oothidaba ubbay hada; kawotethati daaburiyabay tamasa” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
51.59: Maseya na7aa, Neera na7ay Sarayi kawa Sedeqiyaasa shuuma. Sedeqiyaasi Yihudan kawotida oyddantho laythan, Sarayi iyara Babiloone biya wode Ermiyaasi Saraya bolla kiita yeddis.
51.60: Babiloone bolla gakanaw de7iya iitaba ubbaanne Babiloone xeelliya haraba ubbaa Ermiyaasi maxaafan xaafis.
51.61: Sarayako, “Neeni Babiloone gakida wode ne qaala dhoqu oothada asaas ha maxaafa nabbaba.
51.62: Qassi haysada yaagada woossa: ‘Abeeti Godaw, neeni ha bessaa dhaysana; ha bessan shempora de7iya medhetethi, asinne mehey deenna; ha bessay merinaw mela biitta gidana’ yaaga.
51.63: Ha maxaafa nabbaba wursidaape guye, maxaafa shuchara gatha qachada, Efraxiisa shaafan hola.
51.64: Taani Goday iya bolla ehiya dhayuwa gaason, Babilooney zaaridi dendonna mela haysada muuketana” yaaga. Ermiyaasi odida qaalay haysan wuris.

52.1: Sedeqiyaasi kawotiya wode, iyaw laythi laatamanne issino; I Yerusalaamen tammanne issi laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Amxaalo; iya Libina kataman de7iya Ermiyaasa na7a.
52.2: Iyo7aqeemi oothidaysada Sedeqiyaasi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
52.3: Goday Yerusalaame bollanne Yihuda bolla hanqetida gisho enta ba sinthafe diggis. Sedeqiyaasi Babiloone kawa bolla makallis.
52.4: Sedeqiyaasi kawotida uddufuntho laythan, tammantho ageenan, tammantho gallasan Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori ba olanchota ubbaa ekidi, Yerusalaame teqis. Enti iya yuushuwan biitta dooridosona.
52.5: Sedeqiyaasi kawotida tammanne issintho laythi gakanaw, Yerusalaamey teqetidi gam7is.
52.6: He laythi oyddantho ageenan, uddufuntho gallasan, koshi suullin, asay miyaba dhayis.
52.7: Katama gimbey issi baggara meqis. Babiloone asay katamaa yuushuwa naagikoka, Yihuda kawa olanchoti ubbay qamma kawo atakilte bessaa efiya ogiya oykidi, nam7u dirsaa gimbeta issife gathiya pengiyara keyidi baqatidosona. Enti Yordaanose zangaarako simmidi bidosona.
52.8: Shin Babiloone olanchoti kawa Sedeqiyaasa yedethidi, Iyaarko demba gathishe oykidosona. Iya olanchoti ubbay iya kaddidi laaletidosona.
52.9: Hessafe guye, iya Hamaata biittan, Irbila kataman de7iya Babiloone kawako efidosona. Yan Nabukadanaxoori Sedeqiyaasa bolla pirdis.
52.10: Sedeqiyaasa adde nayta Sedeqiyaasi xeellishin, Babiloone kawoy wodhis. Yihuda halaqata ubbaa yan Irbila kataman wodhidosona.
52.11: Sedeqiyaasa ayfeta woocidi, santhalaatan qachidi, Babiloone efidosona. I hayqana gakanaw, yan qasho keethan iya wothidosona.
52.12: Nabukadanaxoori Babiloonen kawotida tammanne uddufuntho laythan, ichashantho ageenan, tammantho gallasan, kawa moorinnay, kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani Yerusalaame gelis.
52.13: Xoossa keethaa, kawo gadhonne Yerusalaamen de7iya keethata ubbaa taman xuuggis; qassi gita keethata ubbaa xuuggis.
52.14: Babiloone olanchoti ubbay kawa naageysata halaqaa kiitan, Yerusalaame katamaa yuushuwan de7iya dirsa gimbiya ubbaa laallidosona.
52.15: Nabuzardaani guutha manqota, kataman attida asata, kaddidi Babiloone olanchotan gelida asatanne kushe hiillanchota di77idi Babiloone efis.
52.16: Shin Nabuzardaani manqotape guutha asaa woyne tokanaadanne gade goyanaada Yihudan aggis.
52.17: Babilooneti Xoossa keetha karen eqida naase birata tuuqeta, caana gaaretanne gita kereta mentherethidi, naase birata ubbaa Babiloone efidosona.
52.18: Kereta, akaafata, xompe shaluwa xeera pittiyabata, xaarota, ixaane saanetanne yarsho wode go7etiya naase birata miisheta ubbaa efidosona.
52.19: Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani worqafenne birape oosetida disteta, tama ekiya miisheta, xaarota, laafa kereta, xompe wothiya kocata, ixaane saanetanne ushsha yarshos go7etiya otota efis.
52.20: Kawoy Solomoney Xoossa keethan oosetiyabas medhida nam7u tuussati, gita kereta, tammanne nam7u kormata misiletinne caana gaareti medhetida naase biratati mizaanen likanaw danda7etenna.
52.21: Nam7u tuussati issi mela gididi, issoy issoy tammanne hospun wadha adusse. Enta ubbay tammanne nam7u wadha. Entaw giddoy kaysi gididi, biratay oyddu biradhe keena orde.
52.22: Nam7u tuussata huuphiyan naasepe oosetida gumboti de7oosona. Issi gumbuwa geesay ichashu wadha gididi, yuushoy gite misileninne oromaane misilen alleeqetidi uttis. Nam7antho gumboyka iya mela.
52.23: Gumbotas miyen miyen de7iya oromaaneta misileti uddufun tammanne usupuna; yuushuwan de7iya gite misiletape bolla baggara de7iya oromaane misileti issi xeeta. Yihuda Asay Babiloone Di7etis (2 Kawo 25:18-21, 27-30)
52.24: Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani kahine halaqaa Saraya, iya kaalliya kahiniya Sofoniyaasanne penge naagiya heedzu asata oykis.
52.25: Kataman de7iya asaape toora mocona, kawa zoreysatape laapun asata efis. Toora mocona, xaafiya, asaa olanchota dooriya halaqanne hara usupun tammu asata efis.
52.26: Nabuzardaani enta ubbaa ekidi, Babiloone kawako, Irbila katamaa efis.
52.27: Hamaata biittan, Irbila kataman, Babiloone kawoy enta ubbaa wodhisis. Hessada hanidi, Yihuda asay banta biittafe di7etidi bidosona.
52.28: Nabukadanaxoori kawotida laapuntho laythan, heedzu mukulunne laatamanne heedzu asay Yihudape di7etis.
52.29: Tammanne hospuntho laythan hospun xeetanne hastamanne nam7u asay Yerusalaamepe di7etis.
52.30: Nabukadanaxoori kawotida laatamanne heedzantho laythan kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani laapun xeetanne oytamanne ichashu asaa di77is. Di7etida asa tayboy oyddu mukulunne usupun xeeta. Yo7akina Biletetha
52.31: Yo7akini di7etida hastamanne laapuntha laythan, tammanne nam7antho ageenan, laatamanne ichashantho gallasan, Yoor-Marodaaki kawotida laythi Yihuda kawa Yo7akina bonchidi, qashope birshis.
52.32: Yoor-Marodaaki Yo7akinara mal7o qaala odetidi, Babiloonen di7on de7iya hara kawota ubbaafe aathidi iya bonchis.
52.33: Hessa gisho, Yo7akini qasho keethan ma7iya ma7uwa laammidi, ba de7o laytha ubban kawo gaytape mishe de7is.
52.34: Yo7akini hayqana gakanaw, gallas gallas iyaw koshshiyaba ubbaa Babiloone kawoy immis.

1.1: Kase asi kumida katamiya ha77i waanada asi bayna bessi gidadee? Kase kawotethata giddon gita gididaara ha77i waanada am7o gidadee? Katamata giddon kawo gididaara ha77i waanada aylle gidadee?
1.2: Qamma yibbata yeeho yeekashe aqawusu; afuthi I ayfe karera duge wodhees. Kase iyo doseysatape ha77i iyo minthethiya issoyka baawa. I laggeti iyo aathidi immidosona; iw morke gididosona.
1.3: Yihudi naaqetada; aylletada di7etasu; ha77i kawotethata giddon de7awusu; shin shempo bessi demmabuku. Iya metootada de7ishin, yedetheysati iyo demmidosona.
1.4: Laytha ba7aale bonchanaw yaa asi bayna gisho, Xiyoone ogeti yeekosona. I dirsa pengeti baysatidosona; I kahineti oolosona. Yan de7iya geela7o nayti un7etidosona; iyaka un7etada yeekawusu.
1.5: I morketi iw godaa gididosona; entaw injetin de7idosona. I, nagaraa gaason Goday iyo un7ethis; I nayti morketan di7etidi bidosona.
1.6: Xiyooni bonchoy iipe qaaretis; I, halaqatika miya bessi dhayida gaarada hanidosona; Enti wolqa dhayidi bantana yedetheyisata sinthafe baqatidosona.
1.7: Yerusalaamey ba metuwanne ba un7a gallasan, beni ba boncho shaluwa hassayawusu. I, asay morketa kushen aadhidi imetida wode, iyo maaddiya issoyka bentibeenna. I morketi iyo xeellidi, I dhayuwan miicidosona.
1.8: Yerusalaamey gita nagara oothida gisho tunasu; iyo bonchida ubbay I kalluwa be7ida gisho kadhees; iya oolashe guye simmasu.
1.9: Tunatethi I afilaa bolla bentis; sinthafe ba bolla yaanaba qopabuuku. I kundethay daganthiyaba gidis; iyo minthethiya oonika baawa. Iya, “Abeeti Godaw, ta un7etetha be7a! ta morketi tana xoonidosona” yaagasu.
1.10: Morketi I boncho shaluwa bonqidosona; kase ne maabara giddo gelonna mela, neeni diggida asati, I keethaa gelishin be7asu.
1.11: I asati koshatidi kathi demmanaw oolosona; enti de7on daanaw banta shaluwa kathan laammoosona. Yerusalaamey haysada yaagasu; Abeeti Godaw, tana xeella; ta kawushatethaa be7a!
1.12: Hinteno, haysara aadheysato, haysi hintew aykoka daanennee? Ane be7ite; akeekite; ba eexiya hanqo gallasan, Xoossay ta bolla ehida metuwa mela metoy de7ii?
1.13: Bollafe tama duge yeddis; he tamay ta meqethaa giddo gelis. Ta tohoy xihen oyketis; tana guye zaaris; tana gallas ubbaa labbanthidi yeggi aggis.
1.14: Ta oothida nagara ubbaa shiishi qachidi, qambarada ta gannan wothis; yaatidi ta wolqaa wursis. Ta eqetanaw danda7onna asaas, tana aathidi immis.
1.15: Goday ta giddon de7iya wolqaama olanchota ubbaa diggis. Ta yalagata dhaysanaw wode qachis; woyne yedheysada, Goday Yihuda geela7ota yedhis.
1.16: Taani yeekashe ta afuthaa gussey hessasa; tana minthetheynne katisiya oonika baawa; morkey goobin, ta nayti un7etidosona.
1.17: Xiyooney ba kushiya miccasu; shin iyo minthethiya oonika baawa. I yuushuwan de7eysati iyo morkanaada Goday oothis. Yerusalaamey enta giddon tuna gidasu.
1.18: Iya haysada yaagasu; “Goday xillo; iya kiitetonna ixiday tana. Hinteno, asato ubbay si7ite; ta metuwaka be7ite; ta panthatinne ta geela7oti di7etidosona.
1.19: Ta laggeta xeegas; shin enti tana cimmidosona; kahinetinne cimati banta shempuwa ashshanaw, kathi koyishe katama giddon hayqidosona.
1.20: Abeeti Godaw, ta waayiya be7a! ta garsay dagammis. Taani daro makallida gisho, ta wozanay meqis; karen mashshi wursees; son hayqoy de7ees.
1.21: Asay ta zelelsa si7idosona; shin tana minthethiya issi asika baawa. Ta morketi ta metuwa si7idosona; ne ta bolla oothidaban ufaytidosona. Enti taada hanana mela, enta bolla ne awaajida gallasaa eha!
1.22: Enta iitatetha ubbay ne sinthe gako; ta nagaraa gisho tana seeridaysada entaka seera; ta zelelsay daris; ta wozanayka meqis.”

2.1: Goday ba hanqo shaarape garsan, Xiyoone na7iw, waatidi wothide! Isra7eele bonchuwa salope sa7a holis; ba hanquwa gallas, iya tohoy yedhiya bessaa qopibeenna.
2.2: Goday Yihudan keethata ubbaa qadhetonna dhaysis; ba hanquwan Yihuda biitta miixaa ubbaa laallis; he kawotethaanne halaqata sa7an duge yeggidi kawushis.
2.3: Ba wolqaama hanquwan Isra7eele wolqaa mentherethis; morkey iya olanaw yaa wode Goday ba ushacha kushiya enta bollafe diggis. Ba yuushuwan de7iyaba ubbaa miya tamada, Yayqooba bolla tama lacoy eexis.
2.4: Morkeda I ba dongiya enta bolla dafis; un7ethiya iya ushacha kushey giigis. Ayfees lo77iya asa ubbaa wodhis; Xiyoone bolla ba sheniya tamada qolis.
2.5: Goday morkeda hanidi, Isra7eele dhaysis; kawo gadhotanne miixa ubbaa laallis yihuda asaas yeehonne kayo gujis.
2.6: Ba keetha atakilte gaden de7iya shaqarada shoddidi holis; laytha ba7aaletinne Sambaatati dogetanaada oothis; ba gita hanquwan kawanne kahiniya kawushis.
2.7: Goday ba yarsho bessa kadhis; ba keethaa aggaagis; kawo gadhota gimbiya morketa kushen yeggis. Laytha ba7aale bonchiya gallasa wocamada, morketi Xoossa keethan wocamidosona.
2.8: Goday Xiyooni na7e dirsa gimbiya, laallanaw qachis; I bolla wadha wodoro yeggis. Iyo dhaysona de7ishe ba kushiya zaarenna; gimbeynne miixay issife kundanaada oothis.
2.9: Yerusalaame penge sanqati biittan moogetidosona; enta gorde mithata mentherethidi dhaysis. Kawoynne moorinnati di7etidi kawotethata giddo bidosona; higge tamaarsey baawa; nabetika hizape guye qoncethi be7okona.
2.10: Xiyoone cimati si77i gidi biittan uttidosona; banta huuphen baana qolidi kayo ma7o ma7idosona; Yerusalaame geela7oti sa7an duge hokidosona.
2.11: Ta asay dhayida gisho, guutha nayti katamaa ogiya bolla daaburidi kundida gisho, ta ayfey afuthan tulcatis; ta wozanay azzanon dagammis.
2.12: Enti banta aayetako, “Kathi imma! haathe imma” yaagidi waassoosona; katamaa ogiyan madunxidi labbaniya asada, enti daaburin enta shempoy enta aayeta ki7on keyees.
2.13: Yerusalaame naatte, taani nebaa ay gaanee? ne qohuwa ta aybira ginayo? Dosetida Xiyoone geela7e, ta nena waatada minthetho? Ne madunthay abba mela ciimmo; nena ooni pathanaw danda7ii?
2.14: Ne nabeti wordonne pathonna qoncethi be7idosona; ne di7etonna mela ne nagaraa qoncisidi odibookona; enti balethiya wordo qoncethi new be7idosona.
2.15: Ne matara aadhiya ubbay ba kushiya baqees; “Biittan ubbaafe aadhada lo77iya katamiya hanno? Biitta ubbaas ufaysi geetetida katamiya hanno?” yaagidi nena qelqisishe banta huuphiya qaathidosona.
2.16: Ne morketi ubbay banta doona ne bolla dooyidosona; ne bolla qelqisidosona. Banta achaa qarcishe haysada yaagosona; nu enta dhaysida, nu amotiday hessa wursethan be7ida.
2.17: Goday ba qopidaba oothis; kase odida ba qaala polis. Yerusalaames qadhetonna iyo laallis I morketi ufaytana mela, morketa wolqaa minthis.
2.18: Xiyoone, ne dirsa gimbey Godaako waasso! ne afuthay qammanne gallas shaafada goggo! Newuka shempofa; ne ayfiyas shempo immofa!
2.19: Qamma dendada waassa; Godaa sinthan ne wozanaa haathada gussa. Koshatidi oge doonan kundida ne nayta shempuwas ne kushiya iyako pude denthada woossa!
2.20: Abeeti Godaw, be7a! kase haysada neeni oodde bolla oothadii? Aayeti banta ki7on ko77isidi dichida banta nayta mo gay? kahinetinne nabeti Xoossa keethan hayqo gay?
2.21: Ciminne na7atethi oge bolla kundidosona; geela7otinne panthati mashshan wuridosona. Neeni ne hanquwa gallas enta wodhadasa; entaw qadhetonna enta buthadasa.
2.22: Gibira gallas ase xeegeysada, daganthiya ta morketa ubba bessafe xeegadasa. Godaa hanqo gallasan oonika kessi ekibeenna woyko attibeenna. Taani ta ki7on ko77isada dichida nayta ubbaa morkey wodhidi dhaysis.

3.1: Godaa shene xam7an meto be7ida asi tana.
3.2: Tana ba sinthafe kessidi, poo7oy bayna dhuman wothis.
3.3: Gallas kumethi tana shocanaw zaari zaari ba kushiya denthis.
3.4: I, ta galbaanne ta ashuwa cimisis; ta meqethaa menthis.
3.5: I, ta yuushuwa metoninne daaburan diris.
3.6: Beni hayqida asada tana dhuman wothis.
3.7: Ta kessa ekonna mela, ta yuushuwa diris; deexo duthan tana duxis.
3.8: Taani maade koyada iya xeegin, iyako waassin, tana si7onna ixis.
3.9: Ta ogiya wolqaama shuchan gordis; ta ogiya geellayis.
3.10: I, taw zugidi naagiya babantha mela, qosetidi naagiya gaammo mela gidis.
3.11: I, tana ta ogiyape kessidi duuserethis; tana asi bayna bessan yeggi aggis.
3.12: Ba dongiya dafidi, tana dukanaw mallis.
3.13: Ba dongiya dafidi, ta wozana ayfen caddis.
3.14: Taani asa ubbaas miichas attas; gallas kumethi bore yethas gidas.
3.15: I, tana meton camisis; camo godare uuthi tana ushshidi kalsis.
3.16: I, ta achaa acen menthis; tana baanan yedhis.
3.17: Saroy taape haakis; taani inje duussu dogas.
3.18: Hessa gisho, “Ta wolqay taape eketis; taani Godan wothida ufaysa ubbay dhayis” yaagas.
3.19: Ta metuwanne ta un7aa hassayin de7oy tana cammis.
3.20: Ta hessa kumethi dogike; ta shempoy azzanees.
3.21: Gidoshin, ta issiba ta wozanan qopiya wode ta ufaysan kumayis.
3.22: Hessika, nuuni dhayboonay Godaa siiquwape dendoysana; iya qadhey wuri erenna.
3.23: Enti wonta wonta oorathi; ne daro ammanthasa.
3.24: Goday ta saama; hessa gisho, ta iyan ufaysi wothana.
3.25: Iyan banta ufaysa wotheysatasinne iya koyeysatas Goday lo77o.
3.26: Asi si77i gidi Godaa atotethan naagiko lo77o.
3.27: As ba na7atethan meto danda7a tamaariko lo77o.
3.28: Goday meto ehiya wode si77i gidi utto.
3.29: Iyaw sinthafe ufaysi daanaw danda7iya gisho bana ziqi ootho.
3.30: I ba shakala baqeysas immo; cashshe kallo.
3.32: I asa bolla meto ehikoka, ba merina siiquwa darotethan zaaridi qadhetees.
3.33: I asa bolla meto woyko un7a ehidi ufaytenna.
3.34: Bittan de7iya qasho asa banta tohuwpe garsan yedhiya wode,
3.35: Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaa sinthan asa maati yedhetiya wode,
3.36: Xillo pirdi dhayiya wode Goday hessa ubbaa be7eneyee?
3.37: Goday kiittonashin odidi polisanaw danda7ey oonee?
3.38: Iitaba gidin lo77oba odi poley Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossa gidenneyee?
3.39: Yaatin, asi de7on de7ishe ba nagaraa gisho seeretiya wode ayis zuuzumii?
3.40: Ane nu ogiya paacoos; Godaako simmoos.
3.41: Nu wozanaa nu kushiyara salon de7iya Xoossaako denthidi haysada yaagos:
3.42: Nu nena naaqida; new makallida; neka nuus atto gabaaka.
3.43: Ne hanquwan kametada nuna yedethada; ne nuus qadhetonna nuna wodhadasa.
3.44: Nu woosay neeko gakonnaada, nenatethaa shaaran kammadasa.
3.45: Asaa giddon nuna pitonne buure oothadasa.
3.46: Nu morketi ubbay nu bolla banta doona dooyidosona.
3.47: Nu dagamaninne giten gelida; metoninne un7an laaletida.
3.48: Ta asaa gakida waayiya gaason ta ayfepe afuthu shaafada goggees.
3.50: Goday salope duge be7ana gakanaw hessi hanees.
3.51: Ta kataman de7iya maccasata bolla gakidaba ta ayfey be7ida wode ta wozanay azzanis.
3.52: Coo tana morkeysati kafo shankatiyada tana shankatidosona.
3.53: Ta paxa de7ishin tana ollan yeggidi, ollaa doona shuchan gordidosona.
3.54: Haathi kumidi ta huuphera goggiya wode ta dhayas gada qopas.
3.55: Abeeti Godaw, ta ciimmo ollan de7ashe ne sunthaa xeegas.
3.56: Ta waasuwa si7anaada ta nena woossiya wode tana si7adasa.
3.57: Taani nena xeegida wode taako shiiqada, “Babofa” yaagadasa.
3.58: Abeeti Godaw ne ta mootuwa mootetada tana wozadasa.
3.59: Abeeti Godaw, ne ta un7aa be7adasa; hessa gisho, ne taw pirda.
3.60: Enti halo keyanaw ta bolla maqetiya maquwa ubbaa be7adasa.
3.61: Abeeti Godaw, enti tana cayiya cashshaanne ta bolla maqetiya maquwa ubbaa si7adasa.
3.62: Ta morketi gallas kumethi ta bolla zuuzumeysanne kalkasheysa si7adasa.
3.63: Enti uttishenne eqishe tana boridi yexoosona.
3.64: Abeeti Godaw, enti oothida oosuwas bessiya zaaruwa entaw qanxa!
3.65: Enta wozanaa eysa; ne baadethay enta gako.
3.66: Abeeti Godaw, ne enta ne hanquwan yedetha; salope garsan enta dhaysa.

4.1: Worqey phooleysa waanidi aggidee? geeshsha worqay waanidi dammidee? Xoossa keethay gimbetida shuchay oge doonan laaletis.
4.2: Kase al7o worqa mela bonchetida Xiyoone nayti ha77i biittafe medhetida oto gididosona.
4.3: Hari attoshin worakani ba mari dhanthawusu; shin ta asay bazzon de7iya yanchoda, ba naytas iita gidis.
4.4: Saamo gaason yooga nayta inxarsay kottonora oyketis; nayti kathi woossosona; shin entaw immiya oonika baawa.
4.5: Kase mal7o katha xalaala meysati ha77i oge doonan koshan wuridosona. Kase liino ma7idi diccidaysati ha77i bido bolla zin7idosona.
4.6: Ta asaa nagaray, oodde kusheyka iyo bochonna, qoponna shiretidi wodhida Soodome asa nagarape daro.
4.7: Yihuda halaqati shachafe aadhida geeshshi, maathafe aadhida boothu. Enta asatethay zo7o inqofe aadhida aarise; enta medhoy sanpare al7o shucha mela.
4.8: Shin ha77i enta som7oy shaalape aadhidi kareexis; asasi ogen enta be7idi erenna; enta gogay meqethaara oyketidi mithada melis.
4.9: Miyaba dhayidi, koshan hayqidaysatape olan hayqidaysati lo77o.
4.10: Ta asaa bolla yida dhayuwa gaason, qadhetiya aayeti banta nayta doysidi midosona.
4.11: Godaa hanqo xuu7ay kumis; I ba suulliya sheniya tigis. Yerusalaame baasuwa tama oythis.
4.12: Ha sa7a kawotape woyko kawotethatan de7iya asaape oonika morkey Yerusalaame pengiyara gelana gidi ammanibena.
4.13: Shin haysi haniday iya nabetinne nagarasinne iya kahineti oothida naaquwasa, xillota suuthaa iya giddon gussida gishosa.
4.14: Enti qooqe asada, oge tattafoosona; enti suuthan tunida gisho enta ma7uwa oonika bochanaw koyenna.
4.15: Hessa gisho, asay, “Kichite! hinte tuna gidiya gisho, nuna bochofite!” yaagidi enta bolla waassidosona. Enti baqatidi toylatiya wode, kawotethatan de7iya asay, “Hinte nuura haysan daanaw danda7eketa” yaagidosona.
4.16: Goday enta laallis; I entaba zaaridi qopenna; enta kahineti bonchetokona; enta cimati nashetookona.
4.17: Nu ayfey maado demmanaw xeellishe coo daaburis; nuna ashshanaw danda7onna kawotethatape maado naagida.
4.18: Asay nu gedaa kaalliya gisho, nu katama ogera hemetanaw danda7ibooko. Nu wursethay matis; nu laythay wuris; nuus dhayo wodeyka gakis.
4.19: Nuna yedetheysati piradhiya arganthafe aadhidi eesotoosona; enti nuna dere huuphera yedethidosona; bazzon hokidi nuna naagidosona.
4.20: Goday tiyida kawoy, nu de7uwas shempoy, enta xihiyan oyketis. Nu iya kuya garsan uttidi, kawotethata giddon daana gidi qopida.
4.21: Hinteno, Uxa biittan de7iya Edoome asaw, ufaytite; hashshu giite. Shin xuu7ay hinte bolla yaana; hinte mathotidi kallo attana.
4.22: Hinteno, Xiyoone asaw, hinte seeray gidana; I hizape hintena di7o biittan wothenna. Shin Edoome asaw, hinte seeretana; hinte nagarayka qoncana.

5.1: Abeeti Godaw, nuna gakidaba ubbaa qopa; nu kawushatethaa be7a!
5.2: Nu laatay allagatas, nu keethayka imatha asaas imetis.
5.3: Nuuni aawi hayqida na7a gidida; nu aayetika am7o gididosona.
5.4: Nuuni ushsha haatha shammidi ekoos; eethiya mithas gate qanxoos.
5.5: Nuna yedetheysati nu gindiya garsana; nu daaburida shin shempanaw danda7ibooko.
5.6: Nuuni kathi kallana gidi, Gibxetasinne Asooretas kushe immida.
5.7: Nagara oothiday nu mayzata, shin enti ha77i dookona; enti ekanaw bessiya seera ekiday nuna.
5.8: Nuna aylleti haaroosona; enta kushepe nuna ashshiya oonika baawa.
5.9: Mashshan wodheysati bazzon de7iya gisho, nu shempuwa bayzidi kathi demmida.
5.10: Iita kosha gaason, nu gogay tama cooceda michees.
5.11: Maccasata Xiyoonen geela7ota Yihuda katamatan wolqan oykidi tunisidosona.
5.12: Halaqata efidi kaqidosona; cimati bonchetibookona.
5.13: Yalaga addeti woxan gaaccidosona; adde nayti deexo mithi tookidi gandigaridosona.
5.14: Cimati katama pengen pirdanaw utteysa aggidosona; yalaga addeti nayti yethi dogidosona.
5.15: Nu wozanaape ufaysi kichis; nu dursay yeehon laametis.
5.16: Nu huuphiyape kallachay kundis; nu nagara oothida gisho nuna ayye!
5.17: Hessa gisho, nu wozanay daaburis; nu ayfey teljumis.
5.18: Xiyoone Derey baysa gidida gisho, workanati yan gupoosona.
5.19: Abeeti Godaw, ne merinaw haarasa; ne araatay yeletaape yeletaa gakanaasa.
5.20: Neeni nuna ayis ubba wode dogay? haysa mela adussa wode nuna ayis aggay?
5.21: Abeeti Godaw, nuna neeko zaara; nu simmana; nu wodiya beniysatho zaarada ooratha.
5.22: Neeni nuna polo aggadiyee? Ne hanquwas zawi baaweyee?

1.1: Hastamantho laythan, oyddantho ageenan, ichashantho gallas, taani Koboora shaafan di7etida asaa giddon de7ishin saloti dooyetin, Xoossaa qoncethi be7as.
1.2: Kawoy Yo7akini di7etida ichashantho laythan, he ageenan ichashantho gallasan,
1.3: Kaldaaweta biittan Koboora shaafa matan de7iya taako, Buza na7aa, kahiniya Hizqeelako, Godaa qaalay yis; Godaa wolqay tana haaris.
1.4: Ta xeelliya wode gotey pudeha baggafe yishin be7as; wolqaama shaara giddofe wol7anthi bentees; iya yuushuwan de7iya saloy poo7is. Tama giddo baggay phooliya naase birata daanees.
1.5: Iya giddon oyddu de7on de7iya medhetethati de7oosona. Enta malay asa mala daanees.
1.6: Enta issuwas issuwas oyddu oyddu som7oynne oyddu oyddu qefey de7ees.
1.7: Enta geday sitti gis; enta tohoy mehe qincafile mela; he tohoti quchidi geeshshida naase biratada phoolees.
1.8: Enta qefiyape garsara oyddu baggara asa kushe daaniya kushey de7ees. He oyddu medhetethatas som7oynne qefey de7ees.
1.9: Enta qefey issoy issuwa bochees; enti ubbay yaa haa simmonna sitti gidi sinthe boosona.
1.10: Enta issuwas issuwas sintha baggara asa som7oy de7ees; ushacha baggara gaammo som7oy de7ees; haddirsa baggara boora som7oy de7ees; guye baggara argantha som7oy de7ees.
1.11: Enta qefey dhoqu gidi micetidi uttis; enta issuwa issuwa nam7u qefey nam7u baggara hanko medhetethata qefey bochees; nam7u qefey enta asatethaa kammees.
1.12: Enti ubbay sitti gidi sinthe boosona; yaa haa simmonna, Xoossa Ayyaanay biya soo awuka boosona.
1.13: Ha de7on de7iya medhetethata giddon issi eexiya tama bonqo daaneysi de7ees. He tamay sinthenne guye qaaxiya, eexiya xompe daanees; he tamay phoolees; iya giddofe wol7anthi keyees.
1.14: Ha de7on de7iya medhetethati wol7anthada sinthenne guye eeson simeretoosona.
1.15: Heko, ha oyddu medhetethata ta be7iya wode, enta miyen, sa7an de7iya gertota be7as; issi issi medhetetha miyen issi issi gertoy de7ees.
1.16: Ha gertoti al7o shuchada phoolosona; enti oydday medhoninne malan issoy issuwa daanosona. Issi gertoy hanko gertuwa giddora kanthidi aadhidaba daanees.
1.17: Enti biya wode oyddu baggafe awu simmidi baaneko yaa haa simmonna boosona.
1.18: Gitanne yashshiya oyddu gertoti de7oosona; he gertotas gaxi de7ees; he gaxaa yuushoy ayfen kumidi uttis.
1.19: Ha medhetethati biya wode, enta miyen de7iya gertoti genderetoosona. He medhetethati biittafe pude dendiya wode gertotika dendoosona.
1.20: Ayyaanay biya awuka enti dendidi boosona. Hessi haney, de7o Ayyaanay gertota giddon de7iya gishosa.
1.21: De7o Ayyaanay gertota giddon de7iya gisho, medhetethati biya wode gertoti boosona; medhetethati eqiya wode gertoti eqoosona; medhetethati biittafe pude dendiya wode gertoti entara dendoosona.
1.22: De7on de7iya medhetethata huuphe soope bolla baggara mastooteda phoolidi ayfe caddiya salo gufantho daaniyabay micetidi de7ees.
1.23: He salo gufanthuwafe garsa baggara enta qefey sitti gidi, issoy issuwako micetidi uttis. Enta ubbaas banta asatethaa kammiya nam7u nam7u qefey de7ees.
1.24: Medhetethati paalliya wode enta qefiya girsay haatha kixa guunthada, Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossa qaaladanne daro olanchota kooshinchada haneysa si7as. Enti paalo aggiya wode banta qefiya shiishidi ekoosona.
1.25: Enti banta qefiya shiishi ekidi, he bessan eqidashin, enta huuphe soope bolla baggara de7iya salo gufanthuwafe bolla dhoqafe girsi si7etis.
1.26: Salo gufanthuwafe bolla baggara sanpare geetetiya al7o shuchafe medhetida araata daaneysi de7ees; araata daaneysa bolla ase daaneysi uttis.
1.27: Taani iya be7iya wode iyaw xeesse daaneysafe bolla baggay taman de7iya naase biratada phoolees. Iyape garsa baggay tama daanees; iya yuushon phooliya poo7oy de7ees.
1.28: Iya yuushuwan de7iya phooliya poo7oy ira wode shaaran eqiya zuulla daanees. Haysi Godaa boncho qoncethaa daanees. Taani hessa be7ida wode biittan duge gufannada issi qaala girsi si7as.

2.1: I taako, “Asa na7aw, denda eqa. Ta neera odetanaw koyayis” yaagis.
2.2: I taara odetiya wode Xoossa Ayyaani ta giddo gelidi, tana ta tohuwan essis; I taw odeysa si7as.
2.3: “Asa na7aw, ta nena Isra7eele asaako, ta bolla makallida deriyako kiittayis. Entinne enta mayzati hachi gakanaw ta bolla makallida mela de7oosona.
2.4: Enti wozana muumenne yeelli baynayisata gidiya gisho, ta nena entako kiittayis. Taani, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagayis.
2.5: Ha makallancho asay si7in, si7onna ixin, nabey enta giddon de7eysa enti erana.
2.6: Asa na7aw, entawunne enta qaalas yayyofa! Kinchoteynne xunduqey ne yuushon de7ikoka, qassi korneta giddon ne uttikoka yayyofa. Enti makallancho koche gidiya gisho entaw woyko enta qaalas yayyofa.
2.7: Enti makallancho koche gidiya gisho enti si7in, si7onna ixin ta qaala entaw oda.
2.8: Shin, asa na7aw, ta new odeysa si7a. Ha makallancho asaada neka makallancho gidopa; ne doona dooyada ta new immeysa ma” yaagis.
2.9: Ta xeelliya wode, Heko, taako micetida kushe be7as; he kushiyan xaatha maxaafi de7ees.
2.10: I ta sinthan he xaatha maxaafa billis; he maxaafas nam7u baggara yeehoy, azzanoynne zelelsi huuphe qofa gididi xaafetis.

3.1: Xoossay, “Asa na7aw, ne sinthan de7eysa ma; ha xaatha maxaafa ma; bada, Isra7eele asaas oda” yaagis.
3.2: Hessa gisho, taani ta doona dooyin, I tana xaaxa maxaafa barsis.
3.3: I taako, “Asa na7aw, ha ta nena barsiya xaatha maxaafa ma; iyara ne uluwa kuntha” yaagis. Ta miya wode ta doonan eessada mal7is.
3.4: Xoossay taako, “Asa na7aw, dendada, Isra7eele asaako ba; ta qaala entaw oda.
3.5: Neeni kiitetiday, enta doonay eretonnanne qaalay gelonna asaako gidenna; shin neeni Isra7eele asaako kiitetadasa.
3.6: Taani nena enta qaalay gelonna, enta doonay eretonnanne akeekanaw metiya daro deriyako ta nena kiittabike. Ta nena entako kiittidaba gidiyako, enti ne odiyaba si7anashin.
3.7: Isra7eele asay ta odiyaba si7anaw koyonna gisho, ne odeysa si7okona. Isra7eele asay wozana muumenne yeelli baynayisata gidiya gisho ne odiyaba si7okona.
3.8: Shin taani nena entada wozana muumenne yeelli baynaysa oothana.
3.9: Taani nena yashshi baynanne zaallafe aadhida mino oothana. Enti makallancho gidikoka, entaw yayyofa; entaw dagammofa” yaagis.
3.10: Gujidi Xoossay, “Asa na7aw, ta new odiya qaala ubbaa minthada si7a; akeeka.
3.11: Di7on de7iya ne asaako bada entaw oda. Enti si7in, si7onna ixin, taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday odeysa entaw oda” yaagis.
3.12: Hessafe guye, Ayyaanay tana pude denthis; Godaa bonchoy ba bessaafe pude dendiya wode taape guyera wolqaama guunthu si7as.
3.13: Hessika, de7on de7iya medhetethata qefey issoy issuwara boshetiya girsaynne enta miyen de7iya gertota girsaara gahetidi, wolqaama guuntha girsi si7as.
3.14: Ayyaanay tana pude denthis; tana ekidi hara bessi efis; Godaa gita wolqay tana haaris; ta ayyaanan cametashenne yilotashe bas.
3.15: Koboora shaafa matan, Tel-Abiban de7iya di7etida asaako gakas. Taani dagammada yan entara laapun gallas gam7as. Hizqeeli Naagiso Asi
3.16: Laapuntho gallas wursethan Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis:
3.17: “Asa na7aw, ta nena Isra7eele asaa naagiya asi oothas. Ta doonape keyiya qaala si7idi, naagana mela entaw oda.
3.18: Taani nagaranchuwa, ‘Tuma neeni hayqana’ giya wode, ne bada iyaw odonna ixiko, I ba iita ogiyape simmana melanne iya shempoy attana mela ne iya naagisonna ixiko, I ba nagaran hayqana; shin iya suutha gisho ta nena oychana.
3.19: Neeni nagaranchuwas odin, I ba nagarapenne ba iita ogiyape simmonna ixiko, I ba nagaran hayqana; shin neeni ne huuphiya ashshana.
3.20: “Xillo asi ba xillotethaafe guye simmidi, iita oothiya wode ta iya sinthan dhube wothin, I hayqana. I simmana mela ne iyaw odonna gisho I ba nagaran hayqana. I kase oothida xillo oosoy zaaridi qofetenna; shin taani iya suuthaa gisho nena oykana.
3.21: Shin xillo asi nagaraa oothonna mela ne iyaw odin, I ne kiita si7idi, nagara oothonna aggiko, tuma I de7on daana; neeni nena ashshana” yaagis. Hizqeela Doonay Muumis
3.22: He bessan Godaa wolqay tana haaris; I taako, “Dendada zangaara ba; yan ta new odana” yaagis.
3.23: Ta dendada, zangaara bas. He bessan kase Koboora shaafa matan ta be7idaysada, yan Godaa bonchuwa be7as; taani sa7an som7ora gufannas.
3.24: Shin Ayyaanay ta giddo gelidi, tana ta tohaan essis. Goday taako, “Ne soo bada, ne bolla pengiya gordada utta.
3.25: Asa na7aw, ne wodoron qashetana; asako keyanaw danda7aka.
3.26: Ha makallancho asaas ne odonna melanne enta bolla hanqetonna mela ta ne doona muumisana.
3.27: Shin ta new odiya wodenne ne doona dooyiya wode neeni, ‘Ubbaa Haariya Goday, enti makallancho gidiya gisho, si7iya oonika si7o; si7onna ixiya oonika si7opo’ yaagada” odana.

4.1: “Neno asa na7aw, biittafe medhida xuube ekada, ne sinthan wotha; yaatada Yerusalaame katamaa misile iya bolla medha.
4.2: Katamaa yuushuwa dira; iya biitta doora; miixa keetha; olanchoti uttiya bessi giigisa; gimbiya laaliya duruma iya yuushon giigisa.
4.3: Birata bashe ekada, ne giddoninne katamaa giddon dirsi oothada essa. Ne som7uwa iyako zaarada dereeqa; katamaa yuushuwa teqa; iya teqeyka nena; hessika Isra7eele asaas malla gidana.
4.4: “Isra7eele asaa seeretethas malla gidana mela neeni ne haddirsa miyen zin7a. Neeni ne haddirsa miyen zin7iya gallasata taybuwan Isra7eele asay waanidi seeretanaw de7iyako bessaana.
4.5: Isra7eele asay waanidi seeretanaw de7iyako bessanaw neeni zin7ana mela heedzu xeetanne uddufun tammu gallas new immas; issi gallasi issi laythara gina gidana.
4.6: “Neeni he gallasata polidaape guye, zaarada, Yihuda asay waanidi seeretanaw de7iyako bessanaw ne ushacha miyen zin7ana mela oytamu gallas new immas. Issi gallasi issi laythara gina gidana.
4.7: Ne som7uwa teqetida Yerusalaameko zaarada, ne kushiya denthada mandashe, Yerusalaame bolla tinbite oda.
4.8: He teqethay wurana gakanaw issi miyepe hara miye shiretonna mela ta nena wodoron qachana.
4.9: “Neeni gistenne banga, qom7olonne misire, maldonne murqa ekada, kathi wothiya miishen qolada, neeni zin7iya heedzu xeetanne uddufun tammu gallas iyape kathada maana.
4.10: Gallas gallas ne miya katha mazanna; ika nam7u xeetanne hastamu giraame gido; hessa iya woden woden ma.
4.11: Gallas gallas ne uyaa haathayka likera gido; ika nam7u kubbaya gido; hessa iya woden woden uya.
4.12: Wora sheesha kem7ele eethada, asay xeellishin, he walakida kathaa banga uythada uukada ma.
4.13: Hessi Isra7eele asay ta enta laaliya kawotethata giddon de7ishe, tunida kathi maanaw de7eysas malla” yaagis.
4.14: Taani, “Hay7i! Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, hessi hanenna; taani tunada erike. Ta na7atethafe doomada hachi gakanaw, bawuta woyko do7i wodhidaba ma erike; tunida ashoy ta doonako shiiqi erenna” yaagas.
4.15: I zaaridi, “Lo77o, yaatiko, wora sheesha kem7elen uukeysa aggada, osha kem7elen ne uythaa uuka” yaagis.
4.16: I gujidi, “Neno, asa na7aw, akeeka! Yerusalaame katamaa kathi gelonna mela taani teqana hanayis. Asay kathi hirgishe makidi maana; haathe yayyishe likidi uyana.
4.17: Hiza, entaw de7iya kathaynne haathay wurana; enti dagaman issoy issuwa xeellana; banta nagaraa gaason seeretidi gilqana.

5.1: “Neno, asa na7aw, oco mashshi ekada, maqlara meediyada ne huuphiyanne ne buuchaa meeda. He huuphiya mizaanen mazzana; ne binaana heedzu bessan shaaka.
5.2: Neeni teqiya gallasay wuriya wode, ne shaakida binaanape sikuwa ne giigisida katama misiliyas gidduwan wothada taman xuugga. Nam7antho sikuwa he katamaa yuushuwa ubban mashshan qanxeretha. Heedzantho sikuwa carko bolla laalla; ta enta mashshan yedethana.
5.3: Iyape guutha binaana ekada, ne ma7uwa macaran qacha.
5.4: Qassi iyape guuthara ekada, taman yeggada xuugga. Yan doomida tamay Isra7eele asa ubbaa gakana” yaagis.
5.5: Ubbaa Haariya Goday, “Kawotethata ubbaa iya yuushon essada, iya giddon wothida, Yerusalaame katamaa haysa be7a.
5.6: Shin I ba iita oosuwan ba yuushuwan de7iya biittatapenne kawotethatape aadhidi ta higgiyanne ta wogaa bolla makallis. Tuma I ta higgiya menthis; ta wogaa kaallibeenna” yaagees.
5.7: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday, “Ne yuushuwan de7iya kawotethatape aadhada meto medhadasa; ta higgiya menthadasa; ta wogaa naagonna ixadasa. Hari attoshin, ne yuushuwan de7iya kawotethata wogaadaka de7ibeeketa” yaagees.
5.8: Hessa gaason, Ubbaa Haariya Goday, “Neno, Yerusalaame, taani ne bolla dendana; hara kawotethati ubbay be7ishin, ne bolla taani pirdaa ehana.
5.9: Ixetida eeqa goyinno ubbaa ne oothida gisho, haysafe kase oothaboonna, sinthafeka yoonna pirdaa ta ne bolla ehana.
5.10: Hessa gaason, ne giddon aawati banta nayta maana; nayti banta aawata maana. Ta hintena pirdana; attidaysata carko bolla laallana.
5.11: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday, taani ta de7uwan caaqayis. Hinte eeqataninne ixetida oosotan ta keetha tunisida gisho, ta hintena biittafe pittada dhaysana. Ta hintew qadhetike; hintena maarike.
5.12: Ne giddon de7iya asaape issi sikoy katamaa giddon boshaninne koshan hayqana; nam7antho sikoy mashshan wurana; heedzantho sikuwa carko bolla laallada, enta mashshan yedethana” yaagees.
5.13: “Ta yiloy enta bolla poletana; ta wolqaama hanqoy irxana. Taani ta hanquwa enta bolla wursiya wode taani qanaaten odidaysa enti erana.
5.14: “Ne yuushuwan de7iya kawotethata giddoninne hinte matara aadhiya ubbaa sinthan ta hintena baysa oothana; hintena miichas aggana.
5.15: Ta hintena ta hanquwan, ta yiluwaninne, qadhey bayna seeran pirdiya wode hinte yuushuwan de7iya kawotethata sinthan qelqisethas, cashshas, hintena be7ida asi naagetiyabaanne dagammiyaba oothana.
5.16: Dukiya donge toorada, ta hintena wodhiyanne dhaysiya kosha hinte bolla yeddana. Taani zaara zaara kosha hinte bolla ehana; kathi Yerusalaame gelonna mela teqana.
5.17: Taani koshanne do7a hinte bolla yeddana; enti hinte nayta dhaysana; boshanne shempo wodho hinte bolla ehana” yaagees Goday.

6.1: Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis.
6.2: “Neno, asa na7aw, Isra7eele zumata dereeqa xeellashe, enta bolla tinbite oda.
6.3: Hinteno, Isra7eele dereto, Ubbaa Haariya Godaa qaala si7ite. Ubbaa Haariya Goday Isra7eele zumatako, zoozetako, zangaaratakonne kakatako haysada yaagees: ‘Asay eeqa goyinniya bessata taani dhaysanaw mashsha yeddana.
6.4: Hinte yarsho xarpheezati laaletana; hinte ixaane cuyisiya miisheti meqana; hayqida hinte asay hinte eeqata sinthan yegetana.
6.5: Taani Isra7eele asaa aha enta eeqata sinthan zin7isana; hinte meqethata hinte yarsho xarpheezata yuushon laallana.
6.6: Hinte de7iya bessa ubbaan, hinte katamatinne hinte goyinno bessati laaletana. Hessadaka, hinte yarsho bessay tunananne laaletana; hinte eeqati meqana; hinte ixaane cuyisiya miisheti meqana; hinte oothidaba ubbay pitetidi dhayana.
6.7: Hayqida asay hinte giddon kundana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte hessan erana.
6.8: Taani hinte giddon mashshafe attida guuthata paxa ashshana; hinte biittataninne kawotethata giddon laaletana.
6.9: Mashshafe attida enti, di7etidi bida kawotethata giddon de7ishe tana hassayana. Enti banta layma wozananinne amotiya ayfiyan eeqa goyinnanaw simmidi ta wozanaa menthidaysa enti akeekana. Enti banta iita oosuwaninne ixetida eeqa goyinno gaason bantana shaatettana.
6.10: Taani Godaa gideysa enti erana. Taani enta bolla iitabaa ehana giday coo babiso gidonnaysa enti akeekana’ ” yaagees.
6.11: Ubbaa Haariya Goday taako haysada yaagees: “Isra7eele asaay ixetida eeqa goyinnida gisho, ne hanquwa biradhen mallada bessa; ne yiluwa biitta qakada qoncisa. Entana ayye! Enti olan, koshaninne gadon wurana.
6.12: Haahon de7ey gadon dhayana; matan de7ey olan hayqana; paxa attiday, koshan wurana. Hessada oothada, ta hanquwa enta bolla polana.
6.13: Enta ahay enta eeqata giddo ubban, enta yarsho bessa yuusho ubban, zumata bolla ubban, dere bolla ubban, cil7o mitha garsa ubban, daashsha mitha garsa ubban, banta eeqatas sawiya yarsho yarshida bessa ubban kundida wode taani Godaa gideysa erana.
6.14: Taani ta kushiya yeddada, enti de7iya biitta ubbaa, dugeha mela biittafe bidi pudehan de7iya Deblaata gakanaw baysa oothana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti hessan erana” yaagees.

7.1: Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis.
7.2: “Neno asa na7aw, Ubbaa Haariya Goday Isra7eele biittako haysada yaagees: ‘Wursethi matis; ubba baggara ha biitta bolla wursethi yis.
7.3: Ha77i, wursethi hinte bolla gakis; taani ta hanquwa hinte bolla yeddana. Taani hinte oosuwada, hinte bolla pirdana; hinte ixetida eeqa goyinnida gisho hintena seerana.
7.4: Taani hintew qadhetike; hintena maarike. Hinte iita oosuwada hinte bolla pirdana; hinte giddon de7iya ixetida eeqa goyinnota qoncisana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte hessan erana’ ” yaagees.
7.5: Ubbaa Haariya Goday, “Heko, gadoy gakis; gadoy gado bolla yees.
7.6: Wursethi gakis; wursethi matis; I hinte bolla dendis; Heko, gakis.
7.7: Biitta bolla de7eysato, hinte pirday gakis; wodey matis; gallasay matatis. Hessi dagama gallasipe attishin, zumata bolla ufaysan ililiya gallas gidenna.
7.8: Ha77i mata wode taani ta hanquwa hinte bolla gussana; ta yiluwa hinte bolla wursana. Taani hinte oosuwa gisho hinte bolla pirdana; ixetida eeqa goyinnida gisho hintena seerana.
7.9: Ta hintew qadhetike; hintena maarike. Hinte iita oosuwada hinte bolla pirdana; hinte giddon de7iya ixetida eeqa goyinnota qoncisana. He wode hintena seerey tana Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
7.10: “Heko, gallasay! He gallasay gakis! Hinte dhayoy matis! Hinte iitatethay gambuxis; hinte otoroy ciiyis.
7.11: Geellatetha gaason iita oosoy daris. Entafe issoyka attenna; enta shaluwape woyko enta asaape woyko enta bonchuwafe attanabay baawa.
7.12: Wodey gakis; gallasay matis; ta hanqoy asa ubbaa bolla gidiya gisho shammeysi ufaytofo; bayzeysi azzanopo.
7.13: Nam7ay de7on de7iya wode ubban, bayzidaysi ba bayzidaba ekanaw guye simmenna. Isra7eele asa ubba bolla odetida ha qoncethay poletonna attenna. Enta nagaraa gaason entafe issoyka ba shempuwa ashshena.
7.14: Ta hanqoy asa ubbaa bolla qoncanaw de7iya gisho enti olas moyze punnidi giigetokona; oonika olas keyenna.
7.15: “Karen oli de7ees; son boshinne koshi de7ees. Katamaape karen de7ey olan hayqana; katamaa giddon de7ey boshaninne koshaninne wurana.
7.16: Kessi ekidi attidaysati, zangaarape yashshan dere bolla piradhidi keyida holleda, banta nagaraa gisho dere bolla zeleelana.
7.17: Kushe ubbay doccana; ubbay yashshan kokoridi sheeshi yeggana.
7.18: Enti kayo ma7o ma7ana; yashshan kokorana. Enta ubbaa som7oy yeella ma7ana; enta ubbaa huuphey meedettana.
7.19: Enti banta bira ogen holana; enta worqay tunaba gidana. Godaa wolqaama hanqo gallas enta biraynne enta worqay enta ashshanaw danda7enna. Entaw dhube gididi, nagaran gelsida, biraynne worqay ulo kumidi, enta koshape ashshena.
7.20: “Enti banta al7o alleeqota otortidi, ixetida eeqanne yeellayiya misile medhanaw go7etidosona. Hessa gisho, taani he al7o alleeqota entaw tunabaa kessas.
7.21: Taani enta alleequwa allaga biitta asaas di7o, biittan de7iya iita asaas bonqe aathada immana; enti iya tunisana.
7.22: He wode taani ta som7uwa hara soo zaarana; ta boncho keetha pangati gelidi tunisana.
7.23: “Suure pirda dhayon biittay suuthan kumida gishonne katamay geella ooson kumida gisho santhalaata giigisa.
7.24: Taani iita kawotethata ehada enta keethata bonqana mela oothana. Wolqaamata otoruwa dhaysana; enta geeshsha goyinno bessati tunana.
7.25: Enti dagammiya wode saro koyana; shin demmokona.
7.26: Issi gadoy hara gado kaalethana; issi worey hara wore kaallidi yaana. Enti nabetape qoncethi koyana; Kahinetas tamaarsiyabay dhayana; cimatas zoriyabay dhayana.
7.27: Kawoy yeekana; halaqay ufaysi qanxana; asay yashshan kokorana. Taani entaw enta oosuwada oothana; enti harata bolla pirdidaysada ta enta bolla pirdana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti hessan erana” yaagees.

8.1: Nuuni di7etida usupuntho laythan, usupuntho ageenan, ichashantho gallasan, taani ta son uttidashin, Yihuda cimatika ta sinthan uttidashin, Ubbaa Haariya Godaa wolqay tana haaris.
8.2: Heko, taani dhoqu gada xeelliya wode ase daaneysa be7as. Iyaw xeesse daaneysafe garsa baggay tama laco daanees; bolla baggay phooliya naase birata daanees.
8.3: I kushe daaniyaba taako yeddidi, ta binaana oykis. Ayyaanay tana sa7apenne salope giddo pude denthidi, Xoossaa qoncethan tana Yerusalaame efis. Yan qommo baggara Xoossaa keetha giddo dabaaba geliya pengiyara gelsidi, Godaa qanaatiya denthethiya eeqay eqida bessaa bessis.
8.4: Heko, kase taani zangaaran be7idaysada, Isra7eele Xoossaa bonchuwa yan be7as.
8.5: Goday taako, “Neno asa na7aw, pudeha bagga xeella” yaagis. Taani xeelliya wode qanaate denthethiya eeqay, dirsa pengiya sinthan de7iya yarsho bessa matan de7eysa be7as.
8.6: I taako, “Neno, asa na7aw, enti oothiyaba be7ay? Tana ta geeshsha keethafe haassanaw, Isra7eele asay oothiya ixetida eeqa goyinnuwa be7ay? Haysafe aadhiya ixetida eeqa goyinno neeni buroo be7ana” yaagis.
8.7: I tana Xoossaa keetha dabaaba penge ehin, taani xeelliya wode, Heko, godaa bolla xoo7e be7as.
8.8: I taako, “Neno, asa na7aw, godaa booka” yaagin, ta bookiya wode issi penge yan be7as.
8.9: I taako, “Gelada enti yan oothiya iita oosuwanne ixetida eeqa be7a” yaagis.
8.10: Ta giddo gelada xeelliya wode, Heko, sa7ara gooshetiya dumma dumma medhetethata misiley, tuna do7ata misileynne Isra7eele asaa eeqata ubbaa misiley godaa bolla yuuyi aadhidi medheti uttidaysa be7as.
8.11: Entafe sintha baggara Isra7eele asaape laapun tammu cimati eqidosona; Safaana na7aa Ya7izaani enta giddon eqis. Ubbay ixaane cuyisiyaba banta kushen oykidosona; ixaaniya cuyay tuqu gees.
8.12: Goday taako, “Neno, asa na7aw, Isra7eele asaa cimati ubbay dhuman banta eeqa misiliya keethan oothiyaba be7ay? Enti, Goday nuna be7enna; Goday ha biitta aggis” yaagosona.
8.13: I taako, “Haysafe aadhiya ixetida eeqa goyinno neeni buroo be7ana” yaagis.
8.14: Hessafe guye, pudeha baggan de7iya Xoossa keethaa pengiyako efin, Heko, maccasay yan uttidi, Tamuuza geetetiya banta xoossas yeekishin be7as.
8.15: I taako, “Neno asa na7aw, haysa be7ay? Haysafe aadhiya ixetida eeqa goyinno neeni buroo be7ana” yaagis.
8.16: Hessafe guye, I tana Xoossaa keetha giddo dabaaba efis; yan Xoossaa keetha pengiya matan, barandaafenne yarsho bessaafe giddon, laatamanne ichashu gidiya asata be7as. Enti banta zokuwa Xoossa keethaako, banta som7uwa dolohako zaaridi, dolohara keyiya awa goyinnoosona.
8.17: Goday taako, “Neno asa na7aw, haysa be7adii? Yihuda asay ha ixetida eqa goyinnoy haysan ootheysi entaw laafaba gididee? Enti biitta geella ooson kunthidi, zaari zaaridi tana hanqethanaw bessii? Enti bantaw danda7etida mela tana iissidi cayoosona.
8.18: Hesaa gisho, ta entara hanqon gahetana; ta entaw qadhetike; entafe issuwaka ashshike. Enti banta qaala dhoqa oothidi waassinka, ta enta si7ike” yaagis.

9.1: Hessafe guye, “Katamaa seeranaw dooretida asati, ola miishe banta kushen oykidi haa yoosona” yaagidi waassishin taani si7as.
9.2: Heko, wodhiya ola miishe banta kushen oykida usupun asati, Pudeha baggan de7iya qommo pengiyafe yidosona. Entara issife liinope oosetida ma7o ma7idi, ba miyen xaafiyabaa korojon oykida issi asi de7ees. Enti giddo gelidi, naase biratape oosetida yarsho bessa matan eqidosona.
9.3: Isra7eele Xoossaa bonchoy ba de7iya kiruubetape dendidi, Xoossaa keetha penge bis. Goday liino ma7idi, ba miyen xaafiyabaa korojon oykida addiya xeegidi,
9.4: “Yerusalaame katamaa giddo kanthada bashe, yan oosetiya ixetida eeqa goyinnuwa gisho azzanishenne oolishe de7iya asaa som7on malla wotha” yaagis.
9.5: Ta si7ishin, Xoossay haratako haysada yaagis: “Iya geedo kaallidi, katamaa giddo kanthidi wodhite. Issuwaka maaropite; oodeska qadhetofite.
9.6: Cimata, panthata, geela7ota, maccasatanne nayta ubbaa shukite; shin som7on malli de7iya ase oonaka bochofite. Ta keethan wodho doomite” yaagis. Enti Xoossaa keetha sinthan eqida cimatan wodho doomidosona.
9.7: Xoossay, “Bidi Xoossaa keetha tunisite; dabaabata ahan kunthite” yaagis. Enti keyidi, katamaa giddo ubban wodho doomidosona.
9.8: Enti wodhishin, taani tarka attada, ta som7uwara biittan gufannada, ta qaala dhoqu oothada, “Abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, neeni Yerusalaame bolla gussiya ne hanquwan Isra7eelepe attidaysata kumethi dhaysanee?” yaagas.
9.9: I zaaridi, “Isra7eelenne Yihuda asaa nagaray daro; biitta ubbay suuthan kumis. Katama ubban suure pirdi baawa. Asay, ‘Goday ha biitta aggis; Goday be7enna’ yaagosona.
9.10: Hessa gisho, ta entaw qadhetike; entana maarike. Taani enta ogiya mela entaw zaarana” yaagis.
9.11: Hessafe guye, liino ma7idi, ba miyen xaafiyabaa korojon oykida addey, guye simmidi, “Ne tana kiittidaysada oothas” yaagis.

10.1: Taani Kiruubeta huuphepe bolla baggara de7iya salo gufantho daaneysa be7as. Kirubeela bolla sanpare al7o shuchafe oosetida araata be7as.
10.2: Goday liino ma7ida addiyako, “Kirubeelape garsa baggara gertota giddora kanthada ba. Xiifa bonqo ne kushen kopheta ekada, katamaa bolla laalla” yaagis. Ta xeellishin tama ekanaw gelis.
10.3: Addey soo geliya wode Kirubeeti Xoossa keethafe garsa baggara eqidosona; giddo dabaaban shaari kumis.
10.4: Godaa bonchoy Kirubeela bollafe dendidi, Xoossa keetha penge bis. Shaari keethaa kumis; dabaabay Godaa boncho phoolethan kumis.
10.5: Kirubeela qefiya girsay Ubbaa Haariya Godaa girsada kare dabaaban si7etees.
10.6: Goday liino ma7ida addiya, “Kirubeela garsa baggan de7iya gertota giddofe tama eka” yaagidi kiittin, I gelidi issi gertuwa matan eqis.
10.7: Kirubeelape issoy banta giddon de7iya taman ba kushiya yeddidi, iyape guuthara ekidi, liino ma7ida addiya kushen wothin, I ekidi keyis.
10.8: Kirubeela qefiyape garsa baggara asa kushe daaniyabay de7ees.
10.9: Ta xeelliya wode Kirubeela matan oyddu gertoy de7ees. Issi issi Kiruubiya matan issi issi gertoy de7eysa be7as; he gertoy al7o shuchada phoolees.
10.10: Enti oydday issoy issuwa daanosona; issi issi gertoy hara gerto giddora kanthi aadhidi medhetida daanees.
10.11: Kirubeeti biya wode oyddu bagga yaa haa simmonna boosona; issi gertoti bida ginde hanko gertoy yaa haa simmonna sitti gidi boosona.
10.12: Enta kumetha bolla, hessika enta zokuwan, enta kushiyan, enta qefiyaninne enta oyddu gertotan xeelliya ayfey kumis.
10.13: Ta si7ishin, gertoti yuuyiya gertota geetetidi xeegetidosona.
10.14: Issi issi Kiruubiyas oyddu som7oy de7ees. Koyro som7oy kiruube som7o, nam7anthoy asa som7o, heedzanthoy gaammo som7o; oyddanthoy argantha som7o.
10.15: Kiruubeti pude dendidosona. Enti taani Koboora shaafa matan be7ida de7on de7iya medhetathata.
10.16: Kiruubeti biya wode, enta miyen de7iya gertoti boosona; Kiruubeti biittafe pude dendanaw banta qefiya micciya wode gertoti enta miyepe shaaketokona.
10.17: De7on de7iya medhetethata ayyaanay gertota giddon de7iya gisho, enti eqiya wode gertoti eqoosona; enti biittafe pude dendiya wode enti dendoosona.
10.18: Hessafe guye, Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keetha pengefe dendidi, Kiruubetape bolla baggan eqis.
10.19: Ta xeellishin, Kiruubeti banta qefiya miccidi, kirikirotara issife biittafe pude dendidosona. Enti Xoossaa keethafe doloha bagga pengiya matan eqidosona. Isra7eele Xoossaa bonchoy entafe bolla baggara de7ees.
10.20: Enti Koboora shaafan Isra7eele Xoossaafe garsa baggara be7ida de7on de7iya medhetathata. Enti kiruubeta gideysa ta eras.
10.21: Enta ubbaas oyddu som7otinne, oyddu qefeti de7oosona; enta qefetape garsa baggara asa kushe daaniyabay de7ees.
10.22: Enta som7oti Koboora shaafa matan ta be7ida som7ota daanosona. Enti ubbay sitti gidi sinthe boosona.

11.1: Xoossa Ayyaanay tana denthidi, Xoossa keethas doloha bagga pengiyako efis. Pengiya matan laatamanne ichashu addeti de7oosona; enta giddon asaa kaalethiya Azuura na7aa Ya7izaana Banaya na7aa Palaxa be7as.
11.2: Goday taako, “Neno asa na7aw, ha asay katamaa bolla iita qofa qopoosona; iita zore zoretoosona.
11.3: Enti, ‘Nuuni keethe zaaridi keexana wodey matatis. Ha katamay asho xaaro; nuuni qassi asho’ yaagosona.
11.4: Hessa gisho, tinbite oda; asa na7aw, enta bolla tinbite oda” yaagis.
11.5: Godaa Ayyaanay ta bolla wodhidi, taako haysada yaagis: “Isra7eele asaw, hinte hessada geeta; shin ta hinte ay qopiyako erayis.
11.6: Ha kataman hinte daro asaa wodhidi, oge ubban aha kunthideta” yaagees.
11.7: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Hinte wodhidi yeggida ahay asho; ha katamay asho xaaro; shin ta hintena ha katamaape yedethada kessana.
11.8: Hinte olas yayyideta; shin ta hinte yayyida olaa hinte bolla ehana.
11.9: Ta hintena ha katamaape kessada, allagatas aathada immana; ta hintena hinte zawan pirdana.
11.10: Hinte olan wurana; ta hintena hinte biittan pirdana. He wode hinte ta Godaa gideysa erana.
11.11: Ha katamay hintew asho xaaro gidenna; hinteka iya giddon asho gideketa. Ta hinte bolla Isra7eele zawan pirdana.
11.12: Hinte ta higgiyanne ta wogaa shaaridi hinte yuushuwan de7iya kawotethata wogaa mela de7ida gisho hinte bolla pirdey Godaa gideysa hinte erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
11.13: Ta tinbite odiya wode Banaya na7aa Palaxi hayqin, taani gufannada, ta qaala dhoqu oothada, “Abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, Isra7eelepe attidaysata kumethi wursana hanayee?” yaagada waassas.
11.14: Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagidi yis;
11.15: “Neno asa na7aw, Yerusalaamen de7iya Isra7eele asay nebaanne di7on de7iya ne dabbotabaa, ‘Enti Godaape haakidosona; ha biittay nuus laata gididi imetis’ ” yaagidi haasayoosona. Di7ope Simo Ufaysi De7ees
11.16: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta enta haahon de7iya kawotethata giddo yeddikoka, biitta ubban laallikoka, enti bida biittatan guutha wodes entara gidana” yaagees.
11.17: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta hintena kawotethatapenne hinte laaletida biittatape shiishana; Isra7eele biitta zaarada hintew immana.
11.18: Enti guye simmidi yaa wode tuna misiletanne eeqata biittafe dhaysana.
11.19: Taani entaw issi wozana immana; ooratha ayyaana enta giddon wothana. Entafe shucha wozanaa diggada, asho wozana entaw immana.
11.20: He wode enti ta higgiya kaallana; ta kiita naagana. Enti ta ase gidana; taani enta Xoossaa gidana.
11.21: Gidoshin, ixetida misiliyanne tuna eeqa goyinnanaw doseyisata taani enta oosuwada oothana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
11.22: He wode Kiruubeti banta qefiya miccidosona; enta miyen gertoti de7oosona. Isra7eele Xoossaa bonchoy entafe bollara de7ees.
11.23: Godaa bonchoy katamaa giddofe dendidi, doloha baggan de7iya zumaa bolla eqis.
11.24: Xoossaa Ayyaanay taw immida qoncethan Ayyaanay tana biittafe denthidi, Kaldaaweta biittan de7iya di7etidaysatako efis. Hessafe guye, qoncethay taape shaaketis.
11.25: Goday tana bessidaba ubbaa di7on de7eysatas odas.

12.1: Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagidi yis;
12.2: “Neno asa na7aw, neeni geella asaa giddon de7aasa. Enti geella asi gidiya gisho entaw ayfey de7ees, shin demmokona; haythi de7ees, shin si7okona.
12.3: Hessa gisho, asa na7aw, di7on biya asada, neeni efanaw danda7iyaba ubba shiisha qachada, gallas enti be7ishin keyada, ne de7iya bessaafe hara bessi ba. Ooni eri enti geella asi gidikoka akeekana.
12.4: Gallas enti xeellishin, di7o biya asada, ne qachidaba kare kessa; omarsi enti xeellishin, di7etidi biya asada keya.
12.5: Enti xeellishin, ne keethaa godaa lukada xoo7iyara keya.
12.6: Ne kessida miishiya enti xeellishin, ne hashen tookada, lem7ishin dendada ba. Ne awu biyako be7onna mela ne som7uwa kamma. Ne haniyabay Isra7eele asaas malla gidana” yaagis.
12.7: Taani I tana kiittidaysada oothas. Di7etidi biya asada, gallas ta qachidaba kare kessas. Omarsi ta keetha godaa ta kushen lukada keyas; ta kessida miishiya enti xeellishin, ta hashen tookada, lem7ishin bas.
12.8: Wonta guura Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagidi yis.
12.9: “Neno asa na7aw, geella Isra7eele asay, ‘Ne oothiyabay aybee?’ gidi nena oychibookona?
12.10: Entaw Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. ‘Ha tinbitey Yerusalaamen de7iya halaqabaanne Isra7eele asaaba odees.’
12.11: Ne haniyabay entaw malla gideysa oda; enti di7etidi hara biitta baana.
12.12: Enta giddon de7iya halaqay godaa lukidi ba miishiya ba hashen tookidi, lem7ishin baana; biitta be7onna mela ba som7uwa kammana.
12.13: Ta gite iya sinthan yeggada oykana. Taani iya Kaldaaweta biitta Babiloone katamaa ehana; shin I he katamaa be7onna hayqana.
12.14: Iya yuushon de7iya iya maaddeysatanne iya olanchota ubbaa ta ubba bessi piski oothana; ta enta mashshan yedethana.
12.15: “Enta ta hara biittatanne kawotethata giddo laaliya wode ta Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana.
12.16: Enti biiya kawotethata giddon banta tuna ooso paaxana mela entafe guuthata olape, koshapenne hargepe attidi akekanada oothana. Ta Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagis.
12.17: Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagidi yis;
12.18: “Neno asa na7aw, ne kathaa dagaman ma; ne haathaa yashshan kokorashe uya.
12.19: Biittan de7iya asaako haysada yaaga. Ubbaa Haariya Goday Isra7eele biittan de7iya Yerusalaame asaaba haysada yaagees: ‘Biittan de7iya asa ubbay gene oothiya gisho enta biittay kallo attana, enti banta uythaa hirgan maana; banta haatha dagaman uyana.
12.20: Ha77i asi kumida katamati dhayana; biittay baysa gidana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana’ ” yaagees.
12.21: Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagidi yis;
12.22: “Neno asa na7aw, hinte Isra7eele biittan, wode aduqis qoncethi ubbay hada gidis aadhis yaagidi leemisey I aybee?
12.23: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Taani ha leemisoy nam7antho odetonna mela oothana; enti zaaridi, Isra7eele biittan leemisokona’ yaagees. ‘Gallasay matatis; qoncethi ubbay poletana hanees’ yaaga.
12.24: Hizape guye Isra7eele asaa giddon wordo qoncethinne murunno deenna.
12.25: Ta Goday odanaw koydaba odana; hessika gam7onna poletana. Hinteno, geellato, ta odiyaba ubbaa hinte laythan polana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
12.26: Qassika Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagidi yis.
12.27: “Neno asa na7aw, Isra7eele asay, ‘I be7ida qoncethaynne I odiya tinbitey daro laythafe guye hananaba’ yaagidi odoosona.
12.28: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Ta odiya qaalay poletanaape attishin, issoyka gam7enna’ ” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

13.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
13.2: “Neno asa na7aw, Isra7eelen tinbite odiya nabeta bolla ne tinbite oda. Bantaw medhi kessidi tinbite odeyisata haysada yaaga; Godaa qaala si7ite.
13.3: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Aybaka be7onna banta qofan dendidi tinbite odiya eeya nabeta ayye!’
13.4: Isra7eele asaw, hinte nabeti laaletida kataman de7iya workanata mela.
13.5: Godaa gallasan olan minnidi eqana mela Isra7eele asaa dirsa gimbiya minthidi essibeeketa; pude laaletida bessaa keybeketa.
13.6: Enta qoncethaynne enta bitay wordo. Enti Goday kiittonnashin, Goday haysada yaagees yaagosona. Enti odeysa Goday polana gidi naagoosona.
13.7: Taani odonnashin, Goday haysada yaagees yaagidi odiyanne wordo qoncethi be7eysatanne muranchota gideketii?” yaagees.
13.8: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Hinte be7ida qoncethanne hinte odida tinbitey wordo gidiya gisho ta hintew morke gidana.
13.9: Wordo qoncethi be7iyanne muranchiya nabeta bolla taani ta kushiya denthana. Enti ta asaa zoretan gelokona; Isra7eele asaa mazgaben xaafetokona; enti Isra7eele biitta gelokona. He wode ta Ubbaa Haariya Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
13.10: “Saroy baynashin sa7i saro yaagidi ta asaa balethoosona. Asay shuchu keelidi doorin, enti booqinte tiyoosona.
13.11: Ha booqinte tiyeysatas; ha hinte tiyida gimbey kundana; wolqaama iri bukana. Taani gita shachi yeggana; wolqaama gotey dendana.
13.12: He gimbey kundiya wode asay hinte tiyida nooray anee? yaagidi oychonna aggane” yaagees.
13.13: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani gimbiya laallanaw; ta hanquwan wolqaama gote yeddana; ta yiluwan gita shacha kiittana, ta sheniyan wolqaama ira bukisana.
13.14: Hinte booqinte tiyida gimbiya ta mentherethana; baasoy bentana gakanaw laallana. I kundiya wode hinte iya giddon hayqana; he wode taani Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
13.15: Ta hanqoy gimbiya bollanne gimbiya booqinte tiyida asata bolla wodhana. Ta hinteko, ‘Gimbey baawa; gimbiya booqinte tiyidaysatika dookona.
13.16: Isra7eelen de7iya nabeti, Yerusalaameba tinbite odeysati, saroy baynashin saro qoncethi be7eysati dookona’ ” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
13.17: “Neno asa na7aw, banta qofan dendidi, tinbite odiya maccasa dereeqa xeellada enta bolla tinbite oda.
13.18: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Hara asa bolla wolqi daanada, enta hashiya bolla murunnoba sikiyanne asas ubbaas biitta qace giigisiya maccasa ayye! Hinte ta asaa xihen oykidi hinte shempuwa ashshanee?
13.19: Issi kophe banga woyko issi baso uythi demmanaw, yeellayaba oothidi, ta asaa sinthan tana kawushsheeta. Hinte hayqanaw bessonnayisata wodhidi daanaw bessonnayisata ashsheeta. Yaatidi ta asaa wordo odeeta; entika hinte worduwa si7oosona’ ” yaagees.
13.20: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Hintew hara asaa bolla wolqi daana mela hinte kushen qachida murunnuwa qacciya ta dafa ekana. Ta iya hinte kushiyape duutha holana; xihepe kessi ekiya kafoda ta enta hinte xihiyape kessa ekana.
13.21: Taani hinte shaashiya qaara ekada, ta asaa merinaw hinte kushepe ashshana. Taani Godaa hinte he wode erana.
13.22: Taani azzanthaboonna xillo asaa wozanaa hinte wordon azzanthideta; nagaranchoti banta iita oosuwape simmidi, banta shempuwa ashshona mela enta minthideta.
13.23: Hizape hinte wordo qoncethi be7eketa; murunneketa. Taani ta asaa hinte kushepe kessa ekana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana” yaagees.

14.1: Isra7eele cimatape issoti issoti taako yidi, ta sinthan uttidosona.
14.2: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
14.3: “Asa na7aw, ha asati banta wozanan eeqa essidosona; enta nagaray entaw dhube shuchi gidis. Yaatin, enti tana oychana mela oothoyee?”
14.4: Ne entaw Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda; “Isra7eele asaape oonika eeqa ba wozanan wothidi, iya nagaray iyaw dhube shuchu gidin, nabe oychanaw biiko, taani ta huuphen iya eeqata darotethaada iyaw zaarana.
14.5: He eeqati Isra7eele asaa taape haassidosona; shin ha77i ta entaw immiya zaaruwan enta wozanaa taako zaarana” yaagees.
14.6: “Hessa gisho, Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda. Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; nagara paaxite; hinte eeqa aggite; hinte tuna ooso ubbaafe simmite.
14.7: “Isra7eele asaa gidin woyko Isra7eele biittan de7iya allaga biitta asaa gidin, taape haakidi, ba wozanan eeqa wothidi, iya nagaray iyaw dhube shuchu gidin, tana zore oychanaw nabeko biiko, taani Goday ta huuphen iyaw zaaro immana.
14.8: Taani he uraa morkana; ta iya asa malasinne miichas ashshana; taani iya ta asaa giddofe dhaysana; ta Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana.
14.9: Issi nabey cimetidi tinbite odiko, he nabey odana mela cimmiday tana Godaa. Taani iya bolla ta kushiya wothada, ta asaa giddofe iya dhaysana.
14.10: Enti banta nagara seera tookana; nabeynne nabiya oycheysi issi gina seeretana.
14.11: Hizape guye Isra7eele asay oge baletidi taape haakenna; banta nagaran bantana tunisokona. Enti ta ase gidana; taanika enta Xoossaa gidana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday. Nohe, Daanelanne Iyyoba
14.12: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
14.13: “Asa na7aw, issi biitta asay nagara oothidi, taw ammanetona ixiko, taani ta kushiya denthada, enta kathaa dhaysada, kosha ehana; asaanne mehiya wodhana.
14.14: Hari attoshin ha heedzu asati Nohey, Daanelinne Iyyobi he biittan de7iyakoka, enti banta xillotethan banta shempuwa xalaala ashshana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
14.15: “Taani enta biitta bolla wora do7ata yeddada, he biittay asi baynanne oonika kanthonna mela he biitta baysa oothana.
14.16: Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Hari attoshin, ha heedzu asati he biittan de7iyakoka, enti banta nayta ashshanaw danda7okona. Enti bantaw attana; shin biittay baysa gidana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
14.17: “Taani he biitta bolla toora yeddada, yan de7iya asaanne mehiya wodhiko,
14.18: taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Ha heedzu asati he biittan de7iyakoka, banta nayta ashshanaw danda7okona. Enti bantaw attana” yaagees Goday.
14.19: “Taani he biitta bolla iita harge yeddada, ta hanquwan suuthi gukana mela oothiko, yan de7iya asaanne mehiya wodhiko,
14.20: taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Hari attoshin, Nohey, Daanelinne Iyyobi he biittan de7iyakoka, enti banta xillotethan banta shempuwa ashshanaape attishin, banta nayta ashshokona” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
14.21: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Taani asaanne mehiya wodhanaw Yerusalaame bolla oyddu iita pirdata: toora, kosha, wora do7atanne harge yeddana.
14.22: Gidoshin, attidi keyida guutha asati; macca naytinne adde nayti yaape keyana. Enti hinteko yaa wode enta hanotaanne enta oosuwa hinte be7idi, ta Yerusalaame bolla ehida gadoy like gideysa akeekana.
14.23: Hinte enta hanotaanne enta oosuwa be7idi, ta enta bolla coo pirdonnaysa erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

15.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
15.2: “Asa na7aw, woyney woran de7iya hara mithafe aybin aadhii?
15.3: Go77i de7iya ba oothanaw qanxetidi eriyee? Aykoba kaqiya kocaa iyape kessanaw danda7eetii?
15.4: Iya tama oysethanaw taman yeggin, xeeraynne dulley taman meetetin attida dunchay ay maaddanee?
15.5: Xuugetonna de7ishe, ayko maaddonnaysi tami min miccidi ay maaddanee?”
