15.6: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani woran de7iya mithaa giddofe woyne mithaa tamas aathada immidaysada Yerusalaamen de7iya asaa hessada oothana.
15.7: Taani ta som7uwa enta bolla zaarana; enti issi tamape keykoka, hara tami enta maana. Taani ta som7uwa enta bolla zaariya wode taani Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
15.8: Enti tanan ammanetona aggida gisho ta enta biitta baysa kessana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

16.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
16.2: “Asa na7aw, Yerusalaame iya tuna oosota erisa.
16.3: Ubbaa Haariya Goday Yerusalaameko haysada yaagees. Ne mayzanne ne sheeshay Kanaane biittana; ne aaway Amoore; ne aayiya Hite asi.
16.4: Ne yellatiya gallas ne gul7ay qanxetibnna; woyko nena geeshshanaw haathan meecetabaaka; woyko maxinen gorpetada curqan xaaxetabaaka.
16.5: Ha geetetidaysatape hari attoshin issuwa oothanaw new mishetiday baawa. Ne yeletida gallas boretida gisho wora yegetadasape attishin, new oonika qadhetibeenna.
16.6: “Ta yaara aadhiya wode neeni ne suuthan iitada zohetishin be7ada, neeni ne suuthan zin7ida de7ishin, ‘De7on de7a’ yaagas.
16.7: Ta nena aradda biittan de7iya kathada dichas. Neeni dicca aduqada, gamma gakadasa. Ne dhanthay uttis; ne huuphey diccis; shin ne kallo de7aasa.
16.8: “Zaarada ta yaara aadhashe nena xeelliya wode, neeni gelos gakada, kallo borsetiya ase gidadasa. Ta afila maccara ne bolla yeggada, ne kalluwa kammas; ta neera caaqada nena taw buzo oothas” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
16.9: “Suuthan iitida ne asatethaa haathan meecca geeshshada, zayten tiyas.
16.10: Taani nena alleeqo ma7o mayzas; lo77o galbafe oosetida caamma aasisas; liino shaashe nena qacisas; al7o kuta qulintisas.
16.11: Nena alleequwan alleeqisas; ne kushen sagaayo aathas; ne qoodhiya worqan mayzas.
16.12: Ne sidhene, ne haythan worqa, ne huuphen lo77o kallacha wothas.
16.13: Ne worqaninne biran alleeqetadasa; ne ma7o ubbay al7o liino, al7o kutanne alleeqo qamise. Ne miya kathay lo77o dhiille, eessinne zayte. Neeni daro puulatada, kawo gidanaw gakadasa.
16.14: Ta new immida bonchuwa gaason, ne daro puulatida gisho kawotethata ubban eretadasa” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
16.15: “Shin neeni ne puulan ammanetada, haratan eretida gisho ogera aadhiya ubbaas nena aatha immadasa.
16.16: Ne ma7uwape baggaa ekada, ne goyinno bessata alleeqisadasa; yan laymatadasa. Hessa melabay haysafe kase hanibeenna; sinthafeka hananaw bessenna.
16.17: Ta new immida worqafenne birape oosetida lo77o alleeqo, adde misileta oothada entara laymatadasa.
16.18: Ta immida alleeqo ma7uwa he misileta mayzadasa; ta zaytiyanne ta ixaaniya entaw shiishadasa.
16.19: Ta new immida lo77o dhiilliya, zaytiyanne eessa enta sinthan sawo tonku giya yarsho oothada shiishadasa” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
16.20: Ne laymatethay guuxibeenashin, ne taw yelida adde naytanne macca nayta efada, eeqatas yarshadasa.
16.21: Ne ta nayta shukada, eeqatas taman yarshadasa.
16.22: Ne tunatethaaninne ne laymatethan ubban de7ashe, kase ne yalagatetha laytha, kallo suuthan muuketada zohetiya wodiya dogadasa.
16.23: Ubbaa Haariya Goday, “Ayye! Nena ayye!” yaagees. Ha iitatetha ubbaa bolla gujada,
16.24: dabaaba ubban dhoqa eeqa goyinniya bessata new giigisadasa.
16.25: Oge doonan laymatiya bessata keexada, ne puula tunisadasa; ogera aadhiya ubbaas ne asatethaa aatha immada, laymatethi darsadasa.
16.26: Neeni amon kumida, ne shooro gidida Gibxetara laymatadasa; ne laymatethan tana yiloyadasa.
16.27: Hessa gisho, taani ta kushiya ne bolla denthas; nena gakiya ne anjuwa guuthas. Taani nena ne poko hanotan yeellatiya, nena morkiya Filisxeemetas aathada immas.
16.28: Ne alonna asi gidiya gisho, Asoore asaara laymatadasa. He ubban taw gidana gabaaka.
16.29: Zal7en aqiya Kaldaawetara laymatadasa, shin hessi taw gidana gabaaka.
16.30: Ubbaa Haariya Goday, “Neeni yeelli bayna layma maccasada haniyara, ne aybi laafa ase!
16.31: Neeni oge doonan laymatiya bessata new keexiya wodenne dabaaba ubban eeqas goyinniya bessata giigisadasa. Gidoshin, hara layma maccasati ekiya miishe ekabaaka.
16.32: Neeni ba azinay de7ishin, allaga addetara laymatiya maccasa mela.
16.33: Layma maccasas miishey qanxetees, shin neeni ne laggethotas imota immaasa; enti ubba bessafe neeko yaana mela entaw miishe immaasa.
16.34: Neeni laymatiya hara maccasatape dumma; neera laymatanaw nena kaalliya oonika baawa. Neeni gede imota immasape attishin, haa ekaka; neeni haratape dumma” yaagees.
16.35: Neno, layma yerusalaame Godaa qaala si7a.
16.36: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Neeni ne laymatetha amuwan ne laggethotas ne asatethaa qaarida gisho, ne eeqata ubba gishonne ne nayta suuthaa ne entaw gussida gisho,
16.37: ne entan ufaytida ne laggethota ubbaa, ne doseysatanne ne ixeyisata ta new morke oothada shiishana. Taani enta dumma dumma bessafe ne yuushuwan shiishada, enta sinthan nena qaarana; enti ne kalluwa be7ana.
16.38: Taani layma maccasata bollanne suuthu gussiya maccasata bolla pirdeysada ne bolla pirdana; ta hanquwaninne ta qaanatiyan ne bolla hayqo ehana.
16.39: Ta nena ne laggethotas aathada immana; enti ne laymatiya bessatanne eeqa goyinno bessata laallana. Enti ne ma7uwa qaaridi, ne lo77o alleequwa ekidi, nena xire kallo ashshana.
16.40: Nena shuchan caddidi, mashshan qanxerethidi wodhiya asaa ne bolla enti denthethana.
16.41: Enti ne keethaa xuuggidi, daro maccasa sinthan ne bolla pirdana. Ta ne laymatetha agisana; ne laggethotas gede miishe qanxaka.
16.42: Hessan ne bolla de7iya ta yiloy irxana; ta qanaatiya neepe haassana; hizape si77i gaana; zaarada hanqetike.
16.43: Neeni ne na7atetha laytha dogada, ha iita ooso ubban tana hanqethadasa. Hessa gisho, ne oothidaba ubbaa ta ne bolla zaarana. Ne tuna ooso ubbaa bolla laymatethi ayis gujadiii?” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday. Na7iya Aaye Mela
16.44: “Yerusalaame, asay nena, ‘Na7iya aaye mala’ gidi leemisana.
16.45: Tuma neeni ba azinaanne ba nayta shaatetiya ne aaye mela; banta azinatanne banta nayta shaatetiya ne micheta mela; ne aayiya Hite asi; ne aaway Amoore asi.
16.46: Ne bayra michiya, ba gutaraa neepe pudeha baggan de7iya Samaarenne I macca nayta; ne kaalo michiya ba gutaraa neepe dugeha baggan de7iya Soodomenne I macca nayta.
16.47: Ne enta ogiya kaallada enta tuna oosota polo xalaala gidonashin, guutha woden entafe aadhada iita oothadasa.
16.48: “Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Neeninne ne gutan de7eysati oothidaysada ne michiya Soodomenne I macca nayti oothibookona.
16.49: Ne michiya Soodome oothida nagaray haysa: iyanne I macca nayti otorancho, enti kallidaysatanne inje duussu de7ikoka enti metootanchotanne manqota maaddibokona.
16.50: Enti otorancho gididi, ta sinthan tuna ooso oothidosona. Hessa gisho, hinte be7idaysata ta enta dhaysas.
16.51: “Samaarey ne oothida nagaras baggaaka oothabuuku; ne iipe aadhada shaatiya tuna oothadasa. Ne oothida tuna oosota ubbaa gaason ne micheti xillo azzanana mela oothadasa.
16.52: Neeni ne micheta suure asi kessida gisho yeella ma7a. Ne nagaray entaysafe aadhidi iitin, enti neepe xillo daanidosona. Hessa gisho, kawuyada yeella ma7a.
16.53: “Gidoshin, Soodomenne I macca nayta, Samaarenne I macca nayta taani enta shaluwa zaariya wode ne shaluwaka zaarana.
16.54: Neban neeni daro yeellatana; ne kawushatethay daro gidiya gisho ne micheti hessan minettana.
16.55: Ne micheti, Soodome ba gutataranne Samaariya ba macca naytara banta kase duusako simmana; neka ne macca naytara kase ne duussako simmana.
16.56: Ne otortiya wode ne miche Soodomi bolla qelqisabikii?
16.57: Hessi haniday ne nagaray qoncanaape kase gidennee? Ha77i neeni ne yuushuwan de7iya Edoomes michetisnne I shoorotas, Filisxeemesinne I miche naytas; hessadaka nena ixiya ubbaas bores attadasa.
16.58: Ne laymatetha gishonne ne tuna oosota gisho ne seeretana” yaagees Goday.
16.59: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Neeni ufaysa qaala menthada, caaquwa laallida gisho ne oothida oosuwada ta new oothana.
16.60: Gidoshin, ta ne na7atetha wodiyan neera caaqida caaqo qaala hassayana; merinaw neera caaqana.
16.61: Ne bayranne ne kaalo micheta ta neeko ehiya wode neeni ne hemethaa hassayada yeellatana. Shin hessi ta neera caaqida caaquwa mela gidonna ixikoka, ta enta new na7a oothada immana.
16.62: Taani ta caaquwa neera oorathana; he wode ta Godaa gideysa ne erana.
16.63: Ne oothida nagaraa ubbaa taani atto giya wode ne oothidaba hassayada, yeellas ne doona oykana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

17.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagidi taako yis:
17.2: “Asa na7aw, Isra7eele asaas qan7ishin oda; leemison qoncisa.
17.3: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. ‘Gita qefeynne dumma dumma mallara de7iya baalleti de7iya issi arganthi de7ees. He arganthay Libaanose yidi ziga xeeran oykis.
17.4: He zigaa xeera menthi ekidi, zal7ey dariya biitta efidi zal7anchota kataman tokis.
17.5: I Isra7eele biittafe aaca efidi, aradda biittan, haatha matan tokis.
17.6: Aacay daro aduqonna de7ishe daayidi arganthaako simmidi diccis; shin iya xaphoy biitta giddo gelis. He woyney daro tashenne haythe kessis.
17.7: Hessadaka, gita qefeynne daro baalleti de7iya hara arganthi de7ees. Haathe demmanaw he woyney ba toketida bessafe he arganthay de7iya bessaako ba xaphuwanne ba tashiya yeddis.
17.8: Shin, he woyney tashe kessana mela, ayfe ayfana melanne lo77o woyne gidana mela aradda biittan, daro haathi de7iya bessan toketis’ ” yaagees.
17.9: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. “He woyney diccanee? Koyro iya tokida arganthay iya shoddenee? Iya ayfeta qoqofidi, iya irxa haythata melisennee? Iya he bessaafe xaphora shoddanaw gita wolqaa woyko daro asi koshshenna.
17.10: Iya shoddidi, hara bessan tokiyako I diccanee? Doloha bagga carkoy shocin ba toketida bessan melennee?”
17.11: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
17.12: “He leemisuwa birshethay aybeko ane ha geella asata oycha. Hessi aybe giiko, Babiloone kawoy Yerusalaame yidi, enta kawaanne enta halaqata di77idi, Babiloone efis.
17.13: Kawa soo asaape issuwa ekidi, baara caaqisidi, asaa giddofe eretidaysata di77idi efis.
17.14: Hessa oothiday enta kawotethay wolqa dhayidi, zaaridi dendonnaada banta caaquwa xalaala naagidi daana melasa.
17.15: Shin Yihuda kawoy makallidi, paratanne daro olanchota yeddana mela Gibxe kiittis. Yaatin hessi hanandee? Hessa oothida I kessi ekandee? I caaquwa menthidi seerettonna attandee?”
17.16: “Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Bana kawothida kawa caaquwa menthida gishonne caaquwa kadhida gisho, he kawa biittan, Babiloonen I hayqana.
17.17: Babiloone olanchoti daro asaa wodhanaw gimbiya yuushon biitta dooridi dirsi giigisiya wode, Gibxe kawoy ba olanchotaranne ba daro asaara yidi aykoka maaddenna.
17.18: I caaqo kadhidi menthida gishonne ba kushiya immidi, ba gida ba ubba polonna aggida gisho kessi ekanaw danda7enna.”
17.19: “Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. I caaquwa kadhidi ta caaquwa menthida gisho ta sunthan caaqidas ta iya bolla zaarada ehana.
17.20: Taani ta gitiya iya bolla miccin, I ta xihiyan oyketana. I taw ammanetona ixida gisho ta iya Babiloone efada, yan iya bolla pirdana.
17.21: Dooretida iya olanchoti mashshan hayqana; attidaysati dumma dumma bessara laaletana.” Hessa odey tana, Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
17.22: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Taani ta huuphen adussa ziga xeera qanxa ekada, dhoqanne adussa zumaa huuphen tokana.
17.23: Taani iya Isra7eele zumaa huuphen tokana; yan daayana; ayfe ayfananne lo77o ziga gidana. Kafo koche ubbay iyan keexana; enti iya tashiya kuyan shempana.
17.24: Adussa mithaa ziqi ootheynne qantha mithaa dhoqu oothey, qassi cil7o mithaa meliseynne mela mithaa aacisey tana Godaa gideysa biittan de7iya mitha ubbay erana. Taani Goday haysa odas; ta odidaysa ta oothana” yaagees.

18.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
18.2: “Isra7eele biittaba asay, ‘Aawati qawu7e woyne min, nayta achay hayqis’ yaagidi odiya leemisoy aybee?
18.3: Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Hizape guye hinte Isra7eele biittan ha leemisuwa leemiseketa.
18.4: Asa ubbaa shempoy tabaa; aawa shempoynne na7aa shempoy tabaa. Nagara oothiya shempoy i, baw hayqana.
18.5: “Issi asi xillo gidiko, tuma pirdanne suureba oothiko,
18.6: I deriya bolla de7iya eeqa goyinniya bessan meenna; Isra7eele asaa eeqa goyinnenna; ba shooruwa machiw tunisenna; kushe metora de7iya maccara aqena;
18.7: Oonaka un7ethenna; acos oykidaba guye zaarees, bonqenna; koshatida asi muzees; kallotida asi mayzees;
18.8: ba miishiya yelora tal7ena; ba kushiya iitabaape naagees; ase sigethishe xillo pirdees.
18.9: Ta higgiya naagees; ta wogaa ammanetethan polees; he uray xillo asi gidiya gisho I de7on daana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
18.10: Gidoshin, he uraas shempo wodhiya woyko kallidi de7eysatape issuwa oothiya iita na7i de7iko,
18.11: iya aaway haysatape issuwaka oothonna aggin, iya na7ay dere bolla eeqa goyinno bessatan miiko, asa macho tunisiko,
18.12: metootanchotanne manqota un7ethiko, bonqiko, acos oykidaba zaaronna ixiko, eeqa goyinniko, tunabaa oothiko,
18.13: ba miishiya yelora tal7idi wodhe ekiko, hessa mela asi de7on de7anee? I de7on deenna! I hessa mela tunabaa oothida gisho tuma hayqana; iya gomey iya oykana.
18.14: “Ha iita uraas na7i de7iko he na7ay ba aaway oothiya ha nagara ubbaa be7ishe, hessa melaba oothonna ixiko,
18.15: I dere bolla de7iya eeqa goyinno bessatan moonna ixiko, Isra7eele asaa eeqa goyinnona ixiko, ba laggiya machiw tunisonna ixiko,
18.16: oonaka un7ethonna ixiki, acos oykidaba guye zaariko, bonqona ixiko, koshatidaysa muziko, kallotidaysa mayziko,
18.17: Iita oosope ba kushiya teqiko wodhe ekanaw yelora tal7onna ixiko, ta higgiya naagiko, ta wogaa kaalliko, yaatiko, he na7ay de7on daanape attishin, ba aawa nagaraa gaason hayqenna.
18.18: Shin iya aaway asa maata sugida gisho, ba ishata bonqida gishonne ba asaa giddon iitaa oothida gisho ba nagaraa gaason hayqana.
18.19: “Shin hinte, ‘Na7ay ba aawa nagara gaason ayis seeretennee?’ ” yaageeta. Na7ay tuma pirdanne suure oothidi, ta higgiya minthidi naagiko, tuma de7on daana.
18.20: Nagara oothiya uray baw hayqana. Na7ay aawa nagaraa gaason seeretenna; hessadaka, aaway na7aa nagaraa gaason seeretenna. Xillo asi ba xillotethaa gatiya ekana; iita asi ba iitatethan seeretana.
18.21: Shin iita asi ba nagara ubbaafe simmidi, ta kiita naagiko tuma pirdaanne suure oothiko, I tuma de7on daanape attishin, hayqenna.
18.22: I oothida nagaraape issoyka qofetenna; ba oothida xillo oosuwa gaason I de7on daana.
18.23: Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday, iita asi ba iita ogiyape simmidi, de7on de7eysan ufaytaysipe attishin, iya hayquwan ufaytike.
18.24: Shin xillo asi ba xillotethaa aggidi, iita asi oothiya tuna oosota ubba oothiko, I de7on daanee? Hanenna, I oothida xillo oosuwape issoyka qofetenna; I ammanetona ixida gishonne I oothida nagaraa gisho I hayqana.
18.25: Gidoshin, “Hinte, ‘Godaa ogey suure gidenna’ geeta. Isra7eele asaw, si7ite; suure gidonnay ta ogiyayee? Hinte ogiya gidennee?
18.26: Xillo asi ba xillotethaa aggidi, iita oothiya wode ba nagaran hayqees; ba oothida qohuwa gaason de7on de7ena.
18.27: Shin iita asi ba iitatethaa aggidi, tuma pirdanne suure oothiya wode ba shempuwa ashshana.
18.28: I ba oothida nagaraa qopidi guye simmida gisho, I tuma de7on daanape attishin, hayqenna.
18.29: Shin Isra7eele asay, ‘Godaa ogey suure gidenna’ yaagidosona. Isra7eele asaw, suure gidonnay ta ogiya? Hinte ogiya gidennee?
18.30: “Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, ta hintena hinte oosuwatho oosuwatho pirdana. Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; nagari hintew dhayos gaaso gidonna mela paaxite; hinte bala ubbaafe simmite.
18.31: Hinte iita oosuwa ubba wora yeggidi, ooratha wozananne ooratha ayyaana ekite. Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, ayis hayqeetii?
18.32: Taani issi asa hayqonka ufaytike. Hessa gisho, hinte nagaraa paaxidi, de7on de7ite” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

19.1: Goday Hizqeelako, Isra7eele halaqatas haysada yaagada zeleela:
19.2: “Hinte aayiya gaammota giddon waanida gaammo! Yalaga gaammota giddon zin7ada, ba marata dichasu.
19.3: Iya ba maratape issuwa dichin, I wodala gaammo gidis; shanka tamaaris; ase muussu doomis.
19.4: Kawotethati ubbay iyabaa si7idosona; enti bookida ollan gelidi oyketis; siidhen wodoro aathidi Gibxe biitta efidosona.
19.5: Iya aayiya naagidaysi hanonna ixin, I ufaysay dhaydaysa be7ida wode, ba maratape issuwa dichada, wodala gaammo kessasu.
19.6: I wodala gaammo gididi, hara gaammota simeretis; I shanka tamaaris; ase muussu oykis.
19.7: I enta miixaa mentherethis; katamata dhaysis; I gudiya wode biittan de7iya asa ubbay dagammees.
19.8: Iya yuushuwan de7iya kawotethati ubbay iya oykanaw xihe wothidosona; banta gitiya miccidosona; enta ollan I oyketis;
19.9: Enti iya sidhen wodoro aathidi hoothen yeggidi, Babiloone kawako efidosona. I gudeysi zaaridi Isra7eelen si7etonna mela enti iya qasho keethan yeggidosona.
19.10: Ne aayiya haatha doonan toketida woyne mela; daro haathi de7iya gisho woyney daashshaninne ayfen kumidi de7ees.
19.11: Iya tasheti mino gidiya gisho kawota xam7a gididosona. Woyney woran de7iya mithatape aadhidi diccis; ba tashiya darotethaaninne adussatethan ubbaafe bollara bentis.
19.12: Shin he woyney hanqon shodetidi sa7an yegetis; doloha carkoy iya ayfiya melisis; iya mino tashey melin tami mis.
19.13: Ha77i I haathi bayna mela biittan toketis.
19.14: Tami iya ubbaafe keyidi, iya ayfiyanne tashiya mis. Kawota xam7a gidana mino tashey, iya bolla bentibeenna. Haysi yeeho zelelsi; haysa zelelsi kessiya wode go7etanaw bessees” yaagis.

20.1: Nu di7etida laapuntho laythan, ichashantho ageenan, tammantho gallasan, Isra7eele cimatape guuthati Godaa sheniya oychanaw yidi, ta sinthan uttidosona.
20.2: He wode Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis;
20.3: “Asa na7aw, Ubbaa Haariya Goday, Isra7eele cimatako Goday haysada yaagees yaaga: ‘Hinte ta sheniya oychanaw yidetii? Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas: hinte tana oychana mela ta koyke.’
20.4: “Asa na7a ne enta bolla pirdanee? Tuma enta bolla pirdanee? Hessa gidiko, enta mayzata tuna oosuwa enta erisa.
20.5: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada entaw oda. ‘Taani Isra7eele doorida wode ta kushiya denthada Yayqooba zerethas caaqas. Taani tanatethaa Gibxe biittan entaw qoncisas. Ta kushiya denthada, taani Godaa, hinte Xoossa.
20.6: Ta hintena Gibxefe kessada, hintew doorida biitta, maathinne eessi goggiya biitta, hara biitta ubbaafe aadhida lo77o biitta ehana’ gada caaqas.
20.7: Ta entako, ‘Hinte issoy issoy dosiya tuna eeqata diggite; Gibxe eeqatan hintena tunisopite. Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa’ ” yaagas.
20.8: Gidoshin, enti taw makallidi, ta odiyaba si7onna ixidosona. Enti banta amotida tuna eeqata diggibookona; Gibxe eeqata goyinno aggibokona. Hessa gisho, enti Gibxen de7ishin, ta hanquwa enta bolla gussanaw qopas. Ta sheniya wursanaw qofa qachas.
20.9: Shin enti de7iya kawotethata giddoninne Isra7eele asaa Gibxefe kessanaw caaqiya wode ta tanatethaa erisida asaa sinthan ta sunthay tunonna mela oothas.
20.10: Hessa gisho, ta enta Gibxefe kessada mela biitta ehas.
20.11: Kiitetiya ubbaas de7o immiya ta higgiya entaw immas; ta wogaa enta tamaarsas.
20.12: Enta geeshshey tana Godaa gideysa enti erana mela, ta Sambaata taapenne entafe giddon malla oothada immas.
20.13: Shin Isra7eele asay mela biittan ta bolla makallidosona. Kiitetyida ubbaas de7o immiya ta higgiya menthidosona; ta wogaa kaallibookona; ta Sambaata tunisidosona. Taani mela biittan ta hanquwa enta bolla gussada enta dhaysanaw qopas.
20.14: Shin ta enta Gibxefe kessiya wode be7ida kawotethata sinthan ta sunthay tunonna mela enta dhaysabike.
20.15: Enti mela biittan de7ishin, entaw immida, hara biitta ubbaafe lo77o gidida maathinne eessi goggiya biitta, enta gelsike gada caaqas.
20.16: Hessi haniday enti eeqa goyinnidi, ta higgiya menthida gisho, ta wogaa kaalliboonna gishonne ta Sambaata tunisida gishosa.
20.17: Gidoshin, ta entaw qadhetida gisho, mela biittan enta wursa dhaysabike.
20.18: Enti mela biitta de7ishin, enta naytako haysada yaagas; “Hinte aawata wogaa kaallopite; enta higgiya naagopite; woyko enta eeqatan tunopite.
20.19: Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa. Ta wogaas kiitetite; ta higgiya naagite.
20.20: Ta hintera caaqida caaquwas malla gidana melanne taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa gideysa hinte erana mela Sambaata dummayite” yaagas.
20.21: “Shin enta nayti ta bolla makallidosona; kiitetiya ubbaas de7o immiya ta wogaa menthidosona; ta higgiya naagibookona; ta Sambaata tunisidosona. Yaatin, mela biittan ta hanquwa enta bolla gussada ta yiloy wurana gakanaw entana dhaysanaw qopas.
20.22: Shin taani enta Gibxefe kessiya wode be7ida kawotethata sinthan ta sunthay tunonna mela enta dhaysabike.
20.23: Enta hara kawotethata giddonne dumma dumma biitta laallanaw mela biittan ta kushiya denthada caaqas.
20.24: Enti ta wogas kiitetonna ixidosona; ta higgiya menthidosona; ta Sambaata tunisidosona; banta aawata eeqa amotidosona.
20.25: Yaatin, entaw lo77o gidonna wogatanne de7o immonna higgeta immas.
20.26: Enti banta yarshuwan tunanaada, banta bayra nayta yarshanaada, ta enta yedda bessaas. Ta hessa oothiday enta daganthanaasanne taani Godaa gideysa enti erana melasa” yaagis.
20.27: “Hessa gisho, asa na7aw, Isra7eele asaas, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda: hessa oothidi hinte aawati ammanetona ixidi tana cayidosona.
20.28: Ta entaw immana gada ta kushiya dentha caaqida biitta enta ehida wode, enti dereta ubbanne irxa mitha ubba be7idosona. Yan banta yarshuwa yarshidosona. Banta, ixaaniyaninne ushsha yarshuwan tana yiloyidosona.
20.29: Taani, ‘Haysi hinte biya dhoqa bessay aybee?’ yaagada oychas. Hachi gakanaw he bessay ‘Bama’ geetetees iya birshethay ‘Dhoqa Goyinno Bessata’ geetetidi xeegetees” yaagees. Seeranne Maarota
20.30: “Hessa gisho, Isra7eele asaas, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees yaagada oda: ‘Hinte mayzati oothida nagara oothidi, ayis hintena tuniseetii? Enta tuna eeqa goyinnanaw amotidi ayis kaalleetii?’
20.31: Hachika hinte yarshuwa yarshiya wode hinte nayta taman yarshidi, eeqa ubban hintena tuniseeta. Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, taani hintenan oysheto? Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas: ta hintenan oyshetike.
20.32: Hinte, ‘Nuuni mithinne shuchu goyinniya hara kawotethata melanne biittan de7iya hara asaa mela gidana yaagidi qopeeta. Shin hinte qofay polo hanenna.’ ”
20.33: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta mino qesiyan, ta micetida kushiyaninne ta hanquwan hinte bolla kawotana.
20.34: Kawotethata giddofe ta hintena kessana; hinte laaletida biitta ubbaafe ta mino qesiyan, ta micetida kushiyaninne ta hanquwan hintena shiishana.
20.35: Ta hintena ‘kawotethata mela biitta’ giya mela biitta ehada, hintena ta sinthan essada, hinte bolla pirdana.
20.36: Gibxe mela biittan hinte mayzata bolla pirdidaysada, hinte bolla pirdana.
20.37: Taani hintena ta kawotetha xam7a garsan haarana; hinte ta caaquwa naagana mela oothana.
20.38: Makallanchotanne nagaranchota ta hinte giddofe diggana; ha77i enti de7iya biittafe ta enta kessana. Shin enti Isra7eele biitta gelonna mela teqana; he wode taani Godaa gideysa hinte erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
20.39: Isra7eele asaw, hinteko Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Ha77i ta odeysa hinte si7onna ixiko, ubbay bidi hinte eeqa goyinnite. Shin hizape guye, hinte imotaninne hinte eeqatan ta geeshsha sunthaa tunisopite.
20.40: Ta geeshsha zumaa bolla, dhoqa Isra7eele zumaa bolla hinte Isra7eele asay tana, Ubbaa Haariya Godaa goyinnana. Taani hintena ekana; hinte yarshuwa, hinte doorida imuwanne hinte geeshsha imuwa ta hintefe koyana.
20.41: Hinte laaletida kawotethata giddofe taani hintena ehiya wodenne hara biittatape ta hintena shiishiya wode sawo tonku geetetiya yarshoda ta hintena ekana. Kawotethati xeellishin, hinte giddon ta geeshshatetha qoncisana.
20.42: Kase hinte mayzatas immana gada ta kushiya denthada caaqida Isra7eele biitta hintena zaarada ehida wode taani Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
20.43: Hinte iita hanotaanne hinte tuna oosuwa hinte he bessan hassayana; hinte oothida iita ooso ubbaa hinte shaatettana.
20.44: Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, hinte iita hanota melanne hinte tuna oosuwa mela gidonashin, ta sunthaa gisho ta oothiya wode taani Godaa gideysa hinte erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday. Dugeha Bagga Bolla Odetida Tinbite
20.45: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
20.46: “Asa na7aw, dugeha bagga simmada xeella; dugeha baggaas oda; dugeha wora bolla tinbite oda.
20.47: Dugeha woraas, Ubbaa Haariya Goday odiyaba si7a yaagada oda. ‘Ta ne giddon tama yeddana; he tamay cil7o mithaanne mela mithaa ubbaa maana. He eexiya tamay to7enna; dugehape bidi, pudeha bagga gakanaw de7iya asa som7o ubbaa he lacoy labana.
20.48: He tama oythiday tana Godaa gideysa asa ubbay be7ana. He tamay to7enna’ ” yaagees.
20.49: Taani zaarada, “Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, hessa oda gada tana kiittofa. Enti, ‘I ubba wode leemison odees gidennee?’ yaagosona” yaagas.

21.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
21.2: “Asa na7aw, ne som7uwa Yerusalaameko zaarada, asay goyinniya bessata bollanne Isra7eele biitta bolla tinbite oda.
21.3: Haysada yaaga: ‘Taani new morke. Taani ta mashsha shoohuwape shoddada, ne gidope xillo asaanne iita asa ubbaa wursana.
21.4: Xilluwanne nagaranchuwa ubba dhaysanaw dugehape pudeha gakanaw de7iya asa ubba bolla ta mashsha shoddana.
21.5: Taani Goday, ta mashsha shoohuwape shoddidaysanne guye zaaronnaysa asa ubbay erana’ ” yaagees.
21.6: “Hessa gisho, asa na7aw, asa ubbay xeellishin, ne wozanay meqin, cametada olla.
21.7: ‘Ayis oolay?’ yaagidi enti nena oychiko, ‘Sinthara yaa iita woriya gisho ollayis’ yaaga. He woriyan, ‘Wozani ubbay yashshan seerana; kushe ubbay argaacana; goobatethi ubbay eketana; gulbati ubbay kokorana. He wodey gakis; tuma poletana’ ” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
21.8: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
21.9: “Asa na7aw, tinbite oda; taani Goday odiyaba asaas oda; mashsha; leefetidanne qushetida mashsha.
21.10: “Gora7anaw leefetis; wol7antha mela phoolanaw qushetis. Ta asay imetida seera ixida gisho, hizape guye, oonika ufaytenna.
21.11: Go7etanaw mashshay qushetis; leefetidinne qushetidi, Gora7eysas imetanaasa.
21.12: Asa na7aw, yeekanne zeleela; ha mashshay giigetiday ta asaa bollanne Isra7eele halaqata bollana. Halaqati ta asaara issife mashshan hayqana; Hessa gisho, azzanada ne tiraa qoxa.
21.13: Taani ta asaa paacana; enti nagara paaxonna ixiko, ha metoy ubbay enta bolla yaana; Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysa odis.
21.14: “Ha77ika asa na7aw, tinbite oda; ne kushiya baqa. He wode mashshi nam7u toho heedzu toho zaaridi shocana; hessika daganthiya, yuushuwa ubban wodhiyanne shukiya mashshi.
21.15: Hessi enta wozanay til7anaadanne entafe daroti dhubetanaada oothana. Hintena ayye! Hinte pengen mashshi wol7antha mela wol7amees; shukanaw shoohope shodetis.
21.16: Neno, qara mashshaw, ushachinne haddirsi simmida ne simmida bagga ubbaa butha.
21.17: Hiza Taani ta kushiya baqana; ta hanqoy dochana” yaagees Goday.
21.18: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
21.19: “Asa na7aw, Babiloone kawa mashshay yaa nam7u ogetan malla wotha. Nam7u ogeti issi biittafe dendoosona; ogey katamako simmiya ogen mallata tuussu essa.
21.20: Issi ogiyan de7iya malla Raaba geetetiya Amoone katamaa biya ogiya mallees; hankoy ogey gimbetida Yihudan de7iya Yerusalaame katamaa biya ogiya mallees.
21.21: Babiloone kawoy ogeti gahetiya daggalan, malla tuussata matan eqees. I awu ogiyara baaneko eranaw, donge tooran saama yeggana; ba eeqata zore oychana; maraaciya be7ana.
21.22: Gimbiya pengiya laaliya duruma ehana mela, wodho kiita aathana mela, ceeqetana mela, dirsa pengiya laaliya duruma katama pengen essana mela, biitta doorana melanne miixa giigisana mela Yerusalaame saami iyaw ushacha kushen keyis.
21.23: Yerusalaame asay Babiloone kawuwara caaqida gisho, hessi banta bolla gakana gidi qopibookona. Shin Babiloone kawoy enta di77iya wode enti banta nagaraa hassayana.
21.24: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; hinte nagaray qoncis; hinte bala gideysa asa ubbay erees; hinte oosoy hinte nagarancho gideysa bessees. Hessa gisho, hinte iita oosoy hassayetana; hinte, hinte morketas aadhidi imetana.
21.25: “Neno, iitanne tuna gidida Isra7eele halaqaw, ne pirdaa gallasay gakis.
21.26: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ne huuphiyape kallachaa dentha; ne huuphe xaatha qaara. Hizape guye kaseysada hananabay baawa; ziqay dhoqu gaana; dhoqay ziqi gaane.
21.27: Gado! Gado! Taani ha katamaa dhaysana. Pirdanaw maati de7eysi yaana gakanaw ha katamay zaaridi keexetenna. I yaa wode ta iyaw aathada immana” yaagees.
21.28: Asa na7aw, haysada yaagada tinbite oda. Isra7eele cayiya Amooneta Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. “Dhaysiya mashshi shoohope shodetis; wodhanaw wol7amees; wursanaw qushetees.
21.29: Hinte be7iya qoncethay wordo; hinte odiya tinbitey wordo. Hinte iitanne tuna asi; hinte pirda gallasay gakis hinte qoodhen mashshi wodhana hanees.
21.30: Mashshaa shoohuwan zaarite; hinte medhetida bessan, hinte yeletida biittan ta hinte bolla pirdana.
21.31: Taani ta hanquwa hinte bolla gussana; ta hanqo tamay hinte bolla eexana; dhayso meezetida, wozana mino asaas aathada immana.
21.32: Hinte taman dhayana; hinte suuthay hinte biittan gukana; hinte zaaridi hassayeteketa. Taani Goday haysa odas” yaagis.

22.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
22.2: “Asa na7aw, shempo wodheysati kumida katamaa bolla pirdanaw giigadiii? Yaatiko, I oothida tuna ooso ubbaa iyaw oda.
22.3: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda: ne daro asaa wodhida gishonne eeqa goyinnon nena tunisida gisho ne dhayo wodey gakis.
22.4: Ne gussida suuthan bala gidadasa; ne oothida eeqan tunadasa. Ne pirdaa gallasay matatis; ne dhayo wodey gakis. Hessa gisho, ta nena kawotethatas miichasinne hara biittatas qelqisees aggana.
22.5: Neno, ne sunthay iitida dagami kumida katamaw, mataninne haahon de7eysati nena qelqisana.
22.6: “Ne giddon de7iya Isra7eele halaqati ubbay suuthu gussanaw banta wolqaa ay mela go7etiyako be7a.
22.7: Ne giddon de7eysati banta aawanne banta aayiw bonchokona. Enti bete asaa cimmoosona; am7etanne aawu aayiya bayna nayta naaqoosona.
22.8: Enti ta geeshsha miisheta kadhoosona; ta Sambaata tunisoosona.
22.9: Ne giddon issoti issoti harata wodhisanaw wordon odoosona; harati eeqas yashetidaba moosona; harati laymatoosona.
22.10: Ne giddon issoti issoti ba aawa machera tunoosona; harati kushe metoy de7iya maccasara wolqan tunisoosona.
22.11: Ne giddon issoti issoti ba shooruwa machera tunoosona; aaway ba na7a machera tunees; ba aawa na7iw, ba michiw wolqan iissidi yeellayees.
22.12: Ne giddon issoti issoti miishe ekidi, shempo wodhoosona; harati banta miishiya banta yara gidida Isra7eeletas yelora tal7oosona; enta bonqidi bantaw duretoosona; tana kumethi dogidosona” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
22.13: “Asay bessonna miishe ekiya gishonne shempo wodhiya gisho, taani ta kushiya hinte bolla denthana.
22.14: Ta nena seeriya wode ne goobatethay neera daanee? Woyko ne kushey mino gidanee? Taani Goday haysa odas; ta odidaysada oothana.
22.15: Ta nena kawotethata giddoninne biittata giddon laallana; ne tunatethaa neepe diggana.
22.16: Hara kawotethata sinthan ne kawuyana; taani Godaa gideysa ne erana” yaagis.
22.17: Goday taako haysada yaagis:
22.18: “Asa na7aw, Isra7eele asay aykoka pathokona; enti ubbay bira sheeshiya wode naase biratape, qorqorope, biratapenne irsaasepe keya sha7a mela.
22.19: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Hinte ubbay atala mela gidida gisho ta hintena ubbaa Yerusalaame shiishana.
22.20: Bira, naase birata, birata, irsaasenne qorqoro taman hubidi sheesheysada ta hintena shiishada ta hanquwana til7isana.
22.21: Ta hintena Yerusalaame shiishada, ta hanqo tama hinte bolla eethada hintena yan til7isana.
22.22: Biri coocen shee7eysada hinte Yerusalaamen til7ana. He wode taani Goday ta hanquwa hinte bolla gussidaysa hinte erana’ ” yaagees.
22.23: Zaaridi Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
22.24: “Asa na7aw, enta biittay tunida gisho, ta hanquwan iri bukonna mela diggada enta seera domidasa Isra7eele asaas oda.
22.25: Ne giddon enta halaqati wodhidaba gudishe mentherethiya gaammo mela; enti wodhoosona; miishe gidin, hara buqura gidin, ubbaa bantaw ekoosona; daro maccasata am7o oothidosona.
22.26: Kahineti ta higgiya menthidosona; ta geeshshabata bonchibookona. Geeshshinne geeshshi gidonna ba shaakokona; tunanne tunaa gidonna ba shaakidi tamaarsokona; ta Sambaata yeggi aggideta. Hessa gaason ta Isra7eele asaa giddon bonchetabike.
22.27: Halaqati banta wodhidaba duuserethiya suudhume mela; enti bantaw bessona duretethi demmanaw shempo wodhoosona.
22.28: Nabeti godaa booqinte tiyiya asada, wordo qoncethi be7idi, wordo tinbite odidi enta nagaraa genthoosona. Goday odonna de7ishin, ‘Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees’ yaagosona.
22.29: Biittan de7iya asay bonqoosona; manqotanne metootanchota un7ethoosona; enti suure pirdaa diggidi bete asaa geellayosona.
22.30: “Taani biitta dhaysona mela dirsa gimbiya keexey, laaletida dirsa gimbiya baggara ta sinthan eqidi naagiya issi asi koyas; shin oonaka demmabike.
22.31: Hessa gisho, ta hanquwa enta bolla gussana; taani ta yiluwan enta dhaysana; enti oosuwa enta bolla zaarana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

23.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
23.2: “Asa na7aw, issi aayepe yeletida nam7u micheti de7oosona.
23.3: Enti Gibxen de7ishe, banta na7atethafe doomidi, layma gididosona. He biittan de7iya addeti enta dhanthan kaa7idosona; enta geela7otethay eketis.
23.4: Entafe bayre sunthay Ohoolo; kaalo miche sunthay Ohooliba. Enta nam7a taani machin, taw addenne macca na7a yelidosona. Ohoola Samaare; Ohooliba qassi Yerusalaame.”
23.5: “Ohoola taw macho gidada de7ashe laymatasu; iya ba olancho gidida Asoore laggethota kaallada bawusu.
23.6: Enti kaalose daaniya ma7o ma7ida olanchota, biitta haareysatanne toora moconata; enti ubbay na7atethinne mala lo77o gidida para toggiya asata.
23.7: Iya bana layma oothada, ubbaafe lo77iya Asoore addetas bana aathada immasu. I laymatethay iya Asoore eeqata goyinnada tunana mela oothis.
23.8: Iya Gibxen doomida laymatetha ha77ika aggabuku; I na7atethafe doomidi, addeti I dhanthaa kaa7osonanne iira laymatoosona.”
23.9: “Hessa gisho, iya minthada siiqiya Asoore laggethotas taani iyo aathada immas.
23.10: Enti iyo qaaridi kalloydosona; I addenne macca nayta di7idi oykidosona; iyo mashshan wodhidosona. Iyo gakida pirda gaason, maccasa giddon qelqisethas attasu.”
23.11: “I michiya Ohooliba hessa be7asu; iya ba amuwaninne ba laymatethan ba michefe aadhada tuna gidasu.
23.12: Iyaka Asoore haareysati, toora moconata, lo77o ma7o ma7ida olanchotanne para toggiya asata, na7atethinne mala lo77o asata minthada siiqasu.
23.13: Iyaka bana tunisidaysa be7as; enti nam7ay issi ogen boosona.”
23.14: “Iya ba laymatetha yaa darsasu; iya godaa bolla woocetidi oosetidi zo7o qalamen tiyetada Kaldaaweta adde misile be7asu.
23.15: Enti banta xeessan zinnaare dancidosona; banta huuphiyan lo77o carqe xaaxidosona. Enti ubbay Kaldaawe biittafe yida Kaldaaweta halaqata daanosona.
23.16: Iya enta misileta be7ida wode daro siiqada, enta xeeganaw Kaldaaweta biitta ase kiittasu.
23.17: Babilooneti iiko yidi, iira laymatidi iyo tunisidosona. Enti iyo daro tunisidaape guye, iya enta shaatetasu.
23.18: Iya ba laymatetha qoncen oothida wodenne ba kalluwa qaara bessida wode, taani I michiw aggidaysada iyoka shaatettada aggas.
23.19: Shin iya Gibxen layma gidada de7iya, ba yalagatetha wodiya hassayada, ba laymatetha kaseysafe yaa darsasu.
23.20: Enta atunthay hareysa mela, enta kochay paraysa mela gidida ba laggethota kaallada basu.
23.21: Neno, Ohoolibe, ne yalagatetha wodiyan Gibxe addeti ne dhanthan kaa7ishin, ne geela7otetha ekishin, neeni polida laymatetha zaarada ha77i oothanaw amottaasa.”
23.22: Hessa gisho, Ohoolibe, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani ne laggethota, ne shaatetta aggidaysata ne bolla denthana; ta enta ne bolla ubba bessara ehana.
23.23: Babiloonetanne Kaldaaweta ubbaa, Faaquda, Sohaane Qo7aana, Asooreta ubbaa, na7atethinne mala lo77o asata, biitta haareyisata, toora moconata, olanchota, halaqatanne para toggiya asata ne bolla ehana.
23.24: Enti ola para gaaretara, caana gaaretaranne daro olanchotara pudeha baggafe hinte bolla yaana. Enti wogga gondallenne guutha gondalle oykidi, birata barneexa wothidi, ne yuushuwan salpana. Taani nena entaw aathada immana; enti nena banta wogaa mela pirdana.
23.25: Taani ta hanquwa ne bolla yeddana; enti neera hanqo suulan gahetana. Enti ne siidhiyanne ne haythaa qanxana; attidaysati mashshan wurana. Enti ne adde naytanne ne macca nayta oykana; attidaysata taman xuuggana.
23.26: Enti ne ma7o ubbaa neepe qaaridi ekana; ne alleeqo ubbaa neepe kessidi ekana.
23.27: Hessada oothada, ne Gibxefe ehida laymatetha amuwa neepe diggana. Neeni nam7antho Gibxeta eeqa misileta dhoqu gada xeellonnaada woyko enta hassayonnaada oothana.”
23.28: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani nena ne ixeyisata, ne shaatettada aggidaysatas aathada immana.
23.29: Enti nena ixana; ne daaburada demmidaba ubba bonqidi, nena xire kallo ashshana. Ne laymatetha amoy qoncanaada oothana. Ne laymatetha amoy,
23.30: hessa ne bolla ehis. Neeni kawotethatara laymatadasa; enta eeqatara nena tunisadasa.
23.31: Ne michiya bida ogiya neka badasa. Hessa gisho, nena I xuu7aa ushshana.”
23.32: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Neeni ne miche xuu7ape uyana; he xuu7ay gitanne ciimmo. I tigin, daro ekiya gisho, asi ubbay ne bolla miicananne nena qidhana.
23.33: Neeni mathota gandigarananne azzanana. Hessi ne miche Samaare xuu7ay new dagamanne dhayo ehana.
23.34: Ne iya xiizothada uyana; xuu7a menthana; kun7an ne dhantha gaarana.” Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysa odayis.
23.35: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Neeni tana dogida gisho, taw zoko zaarida gishonne ne laymatetha amuwas gate ekana.”
23.36: Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Asa na7aw, Ohooli bollanne Ohoolibi bolla pirdanaw giigetadii? Enti oothida tuna oosuwa entaw oda.
23.37: Enti nam7ay laymatidosona; shempo wodhidosona. Enti banta eeqa goyinnidosona. Hari attoshin, enti taw yelida banta adde nayta banta eeqatas kathi oothidi yarshidosona.
23.38: Hessafe aathidi hara iitabaa ta bolla oothidosona; enti ta keethaa tunisidosona; he wode ta Sambaataka shaaridosona.
23.39: Enti banta nayta eeqatas yarshida gallas, enti ta keetha gelidi tunisidosona; enti ta keethan oothiday haysa.”
23.40: Enti haaho bessafe addeti yaana mela ase kiittin, enti yidosona. Hinte nam7u micheti hinte bolla meecetideta; hinte ayfiya tiyetideta; alleeqo aathideta.
23.41: Lo77o arjeeta bolla uttideta; xarpheeza bolla ta ixaaniyanne ta shamaho zaytiya wothideta.
23.42: Ufaytiya asaa koysethi hinte matan si7etees. Mathotida asay mela biitta yidosona. Hinte kushen sagaayo wothidosona; lo77o kallachata hinte huuphen goxidosona.
23.43: Taani ta wozanan, “Ha addeti asatethay laymatethan gilqida maccaseera laymatoosona” yaagas.
23.44: Addey maccasara laymateysada, haysati entara laymatidosona. Enti laymatanaw amotiya Ohooliranne Ohoolibira laymatidosona.
23.45: Enti layma gidiya gishonne shempo wodhiya gisho, xillo asati laymatiyanne shempo wodhiya enta bolla pirdana.
23.46: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Daro asa denthethada enta bolla eha. Enta daganthiyanne enta bonqiya asatas aatha imma.
23.47: Ha daganthiya asati yidi, enta shuchan caddo; mashshan butho; enta addenne macca nayta wodho; enta keethaa taman xuuggo.
23.48: Maccas ubbay naagetana mela taani biitta ubbaafe laymatethi dhaysana.
23.49: Hinte nam7u micheti hinte laymatetha gishonne eeqata hinte goyinnida nagaraa gisho hintena pirdana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana” yaagees.

24.1: Nuuni di7etida uddufuntho laythan, tammantho ageenan, tammantho gallas, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
24.2: “Asa na7aw, hachi gallas mazgaben xaafa. Babiloone kawoy Yerusalaame teqiday hachi.
24.3: Ha makallancho asaas Ubba Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada ha leemisuwa oda. Madabe diste tama bolla wothada haathe iyan tiga.
24.4: Gedaanne angaasuwa, lo77o asho ubbaa muxada, iyan yegga; lo77o meqethaa qanxerethada iyan kuntha.
24.5: Hessas ne ekana dorsay wudiyape dooretidaysa gido. Distiya garsan mithi wothada ashuwanne meqetha kaxana gakanaw doysa.”
24.6: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Suuthu gussiya katamaa ayye! Iya shi7idi geeyonna ixida naase birata diste mela gidasu. I giddon de7iya muxetida ashuwa saama yeggonna kushen gahetidaysa kessa kessa eka.
24.7: He katamay wodhida asaa suuthay hanno gakanaw in de7ees. Suuthi gussashe, aybika kammonna danda7onna zaalla bolla gussasupe attishin, baanan kammana biitta bolla gussabuuku.
24.8: Halo keyanaw, ta hanquwa denthethanaada, kamettonna mela iya gussida suuthaa taani zaalla bolla wothas.”
24.9: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Suuthu gussiya katamaa ayye! Taani mithi gujada wothana.
24.10: Daro mithi wotha; tama eetha. Ashuwa loythada doysa; cambaa mal7etha; meqetha xuugga.
24.11: Kaysa Madabe diste tama bolla wotha. Iya bolla de7iya buuqay seeridi kichana gakanawunne iya bolla de7iya shi7ay xuugetidi dhayana gakanaw suullidi michana mela tama bolla wotha.
24.12: He daaburay ubbay coo mela gidis; iya bolla de7iya daro shi7ay hari attoshin, taman kichibeenna.
24.13: Yerusalaame, nene tuniday ne iita oosuwana. Ta hanqoy ne bolla wurana gakanaw hizape neeni geeyaka. Ne tunatethafe nena geeshshanaw koyas shin, ne geeyanaw koyabaaka.
24.14: Taani Goday haysa odas; hessi hanana. Taani guye simmike; new qadhetike; ta qofaa laammike. Ne ogiyadanne ne oosuwada taani nena pirdana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysa odayis” yaagis. Hizqeela Mache Hayquwa
24.15: Qassika Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
24.16: “Asa na7aw, ne siiqiyanne ne ayfe sinthan lo77iya ne machiw akeekona wodhana. Hessan kayotofa, yeekofanne afuxofa.
24.17: Oola, shin ne ooliya asi si7opo; hayqidaaris kayotofa. Neeni ne huuphen qace xaaxa; ne tohuwan caamma aatha. Ne doona kammofa; shochi moopa.”
24.18: Wonta taani asaas odas; omarsi ta machiya hayqasu. Wontetha gallas Goday tana kiittidaysada oothas.
24.19: Asay taako, “Ha neeni oothiyabas birshethay aybeko nuus ayis odikii?” yaagis.
24.20: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis yaagada entaw odas.
24.21: Ubbaa Haariya Goday Isra7eele asaa haysada yaagees; “Hinte ceeqetiya, hinte ayfe amuwanne hinte shempoy amotiya ta keethaa taani tunisana hanayis. Hinte guye ashshida hinte adde naytinne hinte macca nayti mashshan wurana.
24.22: He wode ta oothidaysada hinte oothana. Hinte doona kammeketa; shochu meeketa.
24.23: Hinte huuphiya xaaxite; hinte tohuwan caamma aathite. Kayoteketa woyko yeekeketa. Shin hinte hinte nagaraa gaason gilqananne issoy issuwara oolana.
24.24: He wode Hizqeeli hintew malaata gidana; I oothidaysada, hinte oothana. Hessi haniya wode, taani Ubbaa Haariya Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
24.25: “Asa na7aw, taani enta ufaysaanne bonchuwa, enta ayfen lo77iyabaanne enta wozanay amotiyaba mino bessa, qassi enta adde naytanne enta macca nayta entafe ekana.
24.26: He gallas new wore odanaw issi asi kessi ekidi yaana.
24.27: He gallas ne doonay dooyetana; ne iyara odetana; zaarada muume gidaka. Hessada hanada, ne asaas malaata gidana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagis.

25.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
25.2: “Asa na7aw, ne som7uwa Amooneko zaarada, enta bolla tinbite oda.
25.3: Ubbaa Haariya Goday odiya qaala si7ite. Hinte ta keetha tunisiya wode, Isra7eele biittay baysa attiya wodenne Yihuda asay di7etiya wode hashshu gideta.
25.4: Taani hintena doloha bagga biitta asaas laata oothada immana. Enti hinte giddon kambe keexidi daana. Hinte mithaa ayfiya enti maana; hinte maatha enti uyana.
25.5: Taani Raaba katamaa gimaleti heemetiya bessi kessana; Amooneta biitta dorsaa wudey pee7iya bessi oothana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana.
25.6: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Hinte Isra7eele dhayuwan kushe baqida gisho, gupida gishonne ufaytidi qelqisida gisho,
25.7: taani hinte bolla ta kushiya denthas. Hintena kawotethatas di7o oothada immana. Ta hintena asaape shoddana; kawotethata giddofe dhaysana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte he woden erana’ ” yaagees. Moo7abe Bolla Odetida Tinbite
25.8: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Moo7abeynne Sayre, ‘Yihudi hara kawotethata ubba mela’ yaagida gisho,
25.9: taani Moo7abe biitta teqana; iya zawa naagiya, eretida Beet-Yashimoota, Ba7aal-Ma7oonanne Qiratayma katamata dhaysana.
25.10: Hizape guye Amooneta gujada, enti kawotethata giddon hassayetonna mela enta doloha bagga biittafe yida asaas aathada immana.
25.11: Taani Moo7abe pirdana; taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees. Edoome Bolla Odetida Tinbite
25.12: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Edoomey Yihuda bolla halo keyida gishonne qohida gisho,
25.13: taani kushiya Edoome bolla denthana. Yan de7iya asaanne mehiya kumethi dhaysada baysa kessana. Temaanape bidi, Dedaana katamaa gakanaw enti mashshan wurana.
25.14: Taani Isra7eele baggara Edoome bolla halo keyana. Isra7eeleti enta bolla ta yiluwa mela oothana. Taani halo keydaysa Edoomey erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday. Filisxeeme Bolla Odetida Tinbite
25.15: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Filisxeemeti banta wozanaa iitatethan halo keyida gishonne aqida morken Yihuda kadhidi dhaysanaw koyida gisho,
25.16: taani ta kushiya Filisxeemeta bolla denthana. Taani Keltaaweta qanxana; abba doonan attidaysata ubbaa dhaysana.
25.17: Ta enta bolla gita halo keyana; ta hanquwan enta seerana. Taani enta bolla halo keyiya wode, taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees.

26.1: Nuuni di7etida tammanne issantho laythan, ageena koyro gallasan, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
26.2: “Asa na7aw, Xiroosa asay ufaytishe, ‘Hashshu! Yerusalaamey kundis; iya pengey waggi gidi dooyetis. I laaletidi dooyetida gisho hizape guye nu duretana’ yaagosona.
26.3: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Neno, Xiroosa, taani new morke. Abba zuley dendeysada taani daro kawotethata ne bolla ehana.
26.4: Enti ne dirsa gimbiya laallana; ne gimbe shakota menthana. Ta nena biitta ubbaa quchidi efin, kallo de7iya zaalla oothana.
26.5: Neeni abba giddon asay banta molo gitiya melisanaw micciya bessi gidana. Hara kawotethati Xiroosa bonqana.
26.6: Waanna biittan de7iya gutata mashshan wursana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana’ yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
26.7: “Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Xiroosa bolla ola denthana mela kawota kawo gidida Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora, paratara, para gaaretaranne daro olanchotara pudeha baggafe ehana.
26.8: Enti waanna biittan de7iya gutata mashshan wursana. Enti nena teqidi, ne dirsa gimbiya gathidi, biitta doorana; banta gondalliya ne bolla denthana.
26.9: Dirsa gimbeta dom7idi laaliya miishen ne dirsa gimbiya mentherethana; banta ola miishen ne adussa gimbeta laallana.
26.10: Iya parati daro gidiya gisho, enti denthiya baanay nena kammana. Paratinne parata gaareti laaletida katamaa dirsa pengiyara geliya wode enti sissiya garmamoy ne dirsa gimbiya qaathana.
26.11: Enta parati ogeta ubbaa yedhana. Ne asaa mashshan wursana; ne wolqaama tuussati sa7an kundana.
26.12: Ne shaloy di7etana; ne zal7iya miisheti bonqetana. Ne dirsa gimbetanne ne lo77o keethata ubbaa dhaysana; ne shuchata, ne sanqaanne laaletida ubbaa efidi abban yeggana.
26.13: Ne mal7o yetha ta teqana; ne diitha girsay zaari si7etenna.
26.14: Ta nena kallo de7iya zaalla oothana; neeni asay banta molo gitiya micciya bessi gidana. Taani Goday haysa odida gisho, neeni zaarada keexetaka’ ” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
26.15: “Ubbaa Haariya Goday Xiroosa katamaako haysada yaagees: ‘Ne morketi ne bolla dendiya wode yuushoy abban teqetida biittan de7iya asay, ne goyretiya wode waassiya waasuwa si7idi, yashshan kokorana.
26.16: Abbaa doonan de7iya haareysati banta araatape wodhana. Banta boncho ma7uwanne alleeqetidi oosetida ma7uwa qaaridi yashshan kokorishe biittan uttana. Ne bolla gakida metuwa qopidi, enti daro dagammana; enti ubba wode kokorishe daana.’
26.17: Enti new haysada yaagidi zelelsi kessana: “Abbaa doonan de7iya yashshiya katamata; wolqaama asay de7iya katame, neeni waana laaletadii? Neeninne ne giddon de7ida asay abba doonan de7iya asa ubbaa yashisadasashin.
26.18: Neeni kundiya gallas yuushoy abban teqetida biittati kokoridosona. Haathan teqetida biittati ne dhayuwan dagammidosona” yaagis.
26.19: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Ha77i oonika doonna katamatada ta nena baysa kessana. Taani abba haatha ne bolla ehin, daro haathay nena kammana.
26.20: Neeni si7oole gelada beni hayqida asaara walaketana mela oothana. Neeni biittafe garsan, beni moogetidi, merinaw laaletidi attidaysatara daana mela oothana. Neeni zaarada asi de7iya katama gidaka; de7on de7eyisata biittan zaarada besse demmaka.
26.21: Taani ne wursethaa daganthiya wursethi oothana; new hessi wursethi gidana. Asi nena koyana; shin neeni zaarada bentaka” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

27.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
27.3: Yuushoy abban teqetida biittan de7iyanne abba gaxan de7iya daro asaara zal7iya, katamaas, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees. “ ‘Neno Xiroosa, taani puulanne borey bayna mala lo77o’ ” yaagadasa.
27.4: Ne zaway abba gul7aana; nena keexeysati loythidi oothidi keexidosona.
27.5: Ne sanqa Sanira xiiddan oothidosona; ne markabiya tuussaa Libaanose zigan giigisidosona.
27.6: Haathaa pidhiya mithati Baasane wolaape oosetidosona. Ne markabiya hiixay Qophiroosa xiiddan, iya yuushoy dangarsa zaalen alleeqetis.
27.7: Ne sharay bandirada haahon bentana mela, Gibxeta liinope alleeqetidi oosetis. Ne kamaa geshey Qophiroosape yida, kaalose ocha teera daaniya ma7ope oosetidaysata.
27.8: Ne markabiya kolxiseysati Sidoonanne Arwada katamatape yidaysata; ne markabiya laaggeysati loohida ne asata.
27.9: Markabiya giigiseysati Gebaalape yida eranchotanne kaalethiya hiillanchota; abban biya markabe ubban de7iya oosanchoti wodha keya gidi ne giddon zal7oosona.
27.10: “Farsefe, Liidepenne Liibepe yida olanchoti, ne olanchota maaddidi oletidosona. Banta gondalliyanne banta ola barneexa ne giddon kaqidosona; enti nena bonchida asata.
27.11: Arwadanne Heleka olanchoti, ne dirsa gimbiya naagoosona. Gammada asay ne adussa gimbi shako bolla naagoosona; banta gondalliya ne gimbiya bolla kaqidosona; ne puulatana mela oothiday entana.
27.12: Ne daro duretetha gaason Tarsesi neera zal7is; I bira, birata, qorqoronne irsaase neera laammidi zal7oosona.
27.13: Yawaani, Tubaalinne Mosahi neera zal7idosona; aylletanne naase birata immidi, ne miishiyara laammidosona.
27.14: Beet-Torgaama asay toga parata, ola paratanne baqulota immidi, ne miishiyara laammis.
27.15: Didaana asay neera zal7idosona; yuushoy abban teqetida biittatan de7iya asay dangarsa zaalenne zophe mithi new ehoosona.
27.16: “Ne daro duretetha gaason, Soore asati neera zal7idosona; enti ciliilo al7o shuchi, zo7o al7o shuchi, yeleello alleeqo, ocha teera daaniya ma7uwa, al7o liinonne alleeqetida ma7o ehidi ne miishiyara laammidosona.
27.17: Yihudanne Isra7eele asay neera zal7idosona; enti Minite gade giste, maldo, eessi, zaytenne dhalliya balsaame zayte ne miishiyara laammidosona.
27.18: Ne daro duretethinne shalloy de7iya gisho, Damasqoy, Kelboona, woyniyanne zahaara dorsa ikise immidi ne miishiyara laammidosona.
27.19: Uzaalen de7iya Daanenne Yawaana asay ne dumma dumma miisheta shammidosona. Enti ne miishiyara laammanaw alleeqetida biratanne dumma dumma sawo ehidosona.
27.21: Arabetinne Qedaare halaqati ubbay ne zal7e miishiyas dorsa urgeta, marazetanne deeshata ehidosona.
27.22: Saabanne Rama zal7anchoti al7o shuchu, worqanne dooretida sawota immidi, ne miishiyara laammidosona.
27.23: Kaarane, Kane, Edene, sabba Asoorenne Kelmaada katamati ubbay neera zal7idosona.
27.24: Enti lo77o ma7ota, kaalose daaniya ma7uwa, alleeqetida ma7uwa, gazza sigaajata, loythi dooqida sibaagotanne wodorota immidi, ne giyan zal7oosona.
27.25: “Tarsesa markabeti ne miisheta caanidosona. Neeni darobay caanetin, abba bolla biya markabe mela gidadasa.
27.26: Ne markabiya laaggeysati nena ekidi, abba giddo gina efidosona; shin doloha carkoy nena abba giddon mentherethis.
27.27: Neeni meqeretida wode ne duretethaynne ne zal7e miishe ubbay, ne markabiya laaggeysati, ne markabiya giigiseysati, ne zal7anchotinne ne giddon de7iya olanchoti ubbay abba giddon muuketidosona.
27.28: Enta waasoy abba gaxaa de7iya biitta daganthis.
27.29: “Markabiya bolla uttidi haatha pidheysati ubbay markabetape keyidi, abba gaxan eqidosona.
27.30: Enti ubbay banta huuphen baana qolidi, bidon gondoretishe, ne dhayuwa gisho iita yeeho yeekidosona.
27.31: New kayotidi, banta huuphiya meedidi, kayo ma7o ma7idosona; enti daro azzanidi new yeekidosona.
27.32: Enti haysada yaagidi new zeleelidosona: “Ha77i abba giddon si77i gida, Xiroosa meli oonee?”
27.33: “Ne zal7e miishey abba pinnidi yaa wode, daro asaa kalsadasa; ne shaluwan biittan de7iya kawoti duretidosona.
27.34: Shin ha77i ciimmo abban meqeretadasa; ne zal7e miisheynne new oothiya asa ubbay, neera abba giddon muuketidi dhayidosona.
27.35: Yuushoy abban teqetida biittan de7iya asa ubbay ne bolla gakidaba be7idi dagammidosona. Enta kawoti daro yayyidosona; enta som7oy yashshan shullis.
27.36: Ne wursethay daganthiyaba gidis; neeni zaarada daaka. Hessa gisho, biitta ubban de7iya zal7anchoti, shinchalle gidoosona” yaagis.

28.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
28.2: “Asa na7aw, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gadas Xiroosa halaqa oda: ‘Ne wozanay otortida gisho, taani xoosse; taani abba giddon, xoossata araatan uttas’ yaagadasa. Neeni, ‘Taani xoossada, cinca gidas gada qopikoka ne asepe attishin, xoosse gidaka.
28.3: Ne Daanelape aadhada cincay? Ay xuurika neepe geemmennee?
28.4: Tuma ne cincatethaaninne ne akeekan dure gidadasa; ne buqura minja keethan biranne worqaa shiishadasa.
28.5: Ne zal7iya eran daro wodhe demmadasa; ne duretetha gaason ne wozanay otortis’ ” yaagees.
28.6: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani xoossada cinca gada qopiya gisho,
28.7: ta ne bolla qadhey bayna wozana mino morketa ehana; enti neeni cincatethaninne eratethan shiishida shalo ubbaa mashshan dhaysana; enti ne bonchuwa tunisana.
28.8: Enti nena si7oole yeddana, neka ciimmo abban hayqana.
28.9: Enti nena wodhanaw yaa wode neeni, ‘Taani xoossa’ gaanee? Nena wodhiya asaa kushen ne kundiya wode ne asepe attishin, xoosse gidaka.
28.10: Neeni allagata kushen ammanonna asi hayqiya hayqo hayqana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
28.11: Qassi Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
28.12: “Asa na7aw, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada Xiroosa kawas zeleela: ‘Neeni kase cincatethan kumadasa; neeni asi leemisidi odiya puulanne cinca gidadasa.
28.13: Neeni Edenen, Xoossa gannatiyan kase de7adasa; sardiyoone, toophaze, almaaze, birille, margide, yasphide, sanparenne baluure geetetiya al7o shuchan alleeqetada, lo77o worqa alleeqo kase ma7adasa; ne medhetida gallas he ubbay new giigis.
28.14: Nena naagiya kiruube oothada shuumas; nena tiyas. Ta geeshsha zumaa bolla ne de7adasa; tamada phooliya al7o shuchata giddon simeretadasa.
28.15: Ne medhetida gallasaape doomada, iitabay ne bolla bentana gakanaw borey bayna de7adasa.
28.16: Ne daro zal7en mathotida gisho buqethan kumada, nagara oothadasa. Hessa gisho, ta geeshsha zumaape nena wolqan kessas. Nena naagiya kiruubey, he tamada phooliya al7o shuchata giddofe yedethis.
28.17: Neeni mala lo77o gidiya gisho daro otortadasa; ne boncho koyada cincatetha kawushadasa. Hessa gisho, ta nena sa7an yeggas; hara kawoti nena be7idi bayana mela oothas.
28.18: Ne nagaraninne ne balethiya zal7iyan, ne goyinno bessata tunisadasa. Hessa gisho, tami ne giddofe keyanaada oothas; ika nena mis. Ubbay xeellishin, ta nena xuuggada sa7aa bolla bido kessas.
28.19: Nena kase eriya kawotethati ubbay dagammidosona. Ne wursethay yashshiyabaa gidis; neeni zaarada bentaka’ ” yaagis. Sidoona Bolla Odetida Tinbite
28.20: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
28.21: “Asa na7aw, ne som7uwa Sidoonako zaarada iya bolla tinbite oda.
28.22: Neno, Sidoona, ta new morke gidana. Taani ne bolla oothiyaban ta bonchoy qoncana. Ne giddon de7eysati pirdan taani ta geeshshatetha bessiya wode, taani Godaa gideysa enti ubbay erana.
28.23: Ta ne bolla iita harge yeddana; oge ubban suuthi gukanaada oothana. Ubba baggara yaa olaa gaason ne asay mashshan hayqana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana.
28.24: Hizape guye Isra7eele yuushon de7iya, iya kadhidi xeelliya, biitta ubban aguntha melanne kinchote mela qohiya oonika deenna. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
28.25: “Isra7eele asaa laaletida biitta ubbaafe shiishada ehiya wodenne kawotethata ubbaa sinthan taani ta geeshshatetha bessiya wode, taani ta aylliya Yayqoobas immida banta biittan enti daana.
28.26: Yan enti saronne naagetidi daana; keethe keexana; woyne tokana. Enta kadhidi xeelliya enta shoorota ubbaa taani pirdiya wode Isra7eele asay saro daana. Taani Godaa enta Xoossaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

29.1: Nuuni di7etida tammantho laythan, tammantho ageenan, tammanne nam7antho gallas, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
29.2: “Asa na7aw, ne som7uwa Gibxe kawako zaarada, iya bollanne Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla tinbite oda.
29.3: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. ‘Neno, Nayle shaafa giddon zin7ida, gitanne yashshiya do7a daaneyso. Nayle shaafay tabaa; iya medhiday tana’ giya Gibxe kawaw, ta new morke gidana.
29.4: Ta ne siidhen dafo aathana; ne shaafan de7iya molota qefey ne galbara oyketana mela oothana; moloti ne gogaara oyketidi uttidashin, ta nena haathaafe goochada gaxa kessana.
29.5: Ta nenanne ne shaafan de7iya molota ubbaa mela biitta holana; ne ahay denban yegetidi attana; ne aha shiishidi moogiya asi dhayana. Ta nena salo kafotasinne sa7aa do7atas kathi oothana.
29.6: Gibxen de7iya asa ubbay taani Godaa gideysa he wode erana. “Neeni Isra7eele asaas maqa xam7a gidadasa;
29.7: Enti nena oykida wode meqada enta shophen caddadasa; enti nenan zempida wode meqada enta zokuwa duuthadasa.
29.8: Hessa gisho, taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday, ne bolla mashshe dentheyisata ehana; enti ne asaanne ne mehiya ubbaa wursana.
29.9: Gibxe laaletidi baysa biitta gidana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana. Neeni, ‘Nayle shaafay tabaa; iya medhiday tana’ yaagida gisho,
29.10: taani ne bollanne ne shaafa bolla dendas. Pudeha baggara Migdoolape doomada, dugeha baggara Aswaana gakanaw, yaara kanthidi Tophe zawa gakanaw Gibxe ubbaa asi bayna baysa besse kessana.
29.11: Ase gidin mehe gidin yaara kanthenna; oytamu laythi wurana gakanaw, aybika yan deenna.
29.12: Taani Gibxe biitta ubbaafe aadhida baysa biitta oothana; iya katamati oytamu laythi wurana gakanaw, hara laaletida katama ubbaafe aadhidi laaletida katama gidana. Gibxe asaa taani kawotethata giddoninne hara asaa giddon laallana” yaagees.
29.13: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Oytamu laythafe guye, taani Gibxey laaletida kawotethata giddofe shiishana.
29.14: Taani nena zaarada gashtisana enta yeletida dugeha Gibxen de7iya Phatroosa biitta zaarana; yan enti laafa kawotethi gididi daana.
29.15: Gibxey hara kawotethata ubbaafe laafa kawotethi gidana. Zaaridi hara kawotethata bolla bana dhoqu dhoqu oothenna; I hara kawotethi haaronnaada taani iya guuthana.
29.16: Isra7eeley zaaridi maado demmanaw Gibxen ammanetena; Gibxen ammanetida ammanetethay ay mela qohoko Isra7eeley akeekana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees.
29.17: Nuuni di7etida laatamanne laapuntho laythan, koyro ageenan, koyro gallasan, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
29.18: “Asa na7aw, Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Xiroosa bolla olaa denthanaw giigis. Enta huuphey qolettana gakanawunne enta hashey shooletana gakanaw olanchoti deexo tooho tookana mela oothidosona. Gidoshin, kawoynne olanchoti ha daabura ubban Xiroosape demmidabay baawa.
29.19: ‘Taani Gibxe biitta Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras aathada immana; ika ba olanchotas damooze gidana mela di7oninne bonqen oykidaba ubbaa ekidi baana.
29.20: Inne iya olanchoti taw oothida gisho, taani iyaw Gibxe biitta enta daaburas damooze oothada immana’ ” yaagees Ubba Haariya Goday.
29.21: “He gallas taani Isra7eele deriya minthana. Hizqeela, neka asaas odana mela ta nena minthana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagis.

30.1: Qassika Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
30.2: “Asa na7aw, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada tinbite oda. “ ‘He gallasaa ayye! Yaagada zeleela.’
30.3: He gallasay matis! Godaa gallasay gakis! He gallasay shaari kammida gallas kawotethata ubbaas meto gallas gidana.
30.4: Gibxe bolla oli yaana; Tophe bolla un7i yaana. Daroti Gibxe biittan hayqana; iya duretethay bonqetana; iya baasoy shodetana.
30.5: He olay Tophe, Liide, Liibe, Arabenne caaqo dere ubbay Gibxera issife mashshan wursana” yaagees.
30.6: Gibxe maaddeysati kundana; iya otoruwa wolqay wurana. Migdoolape bidi Aswaana gakanaw, enti mashshan hayqana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday hessa odayis.
30.7: Gibxey biitta ubbaafe aadhida baysa biitta gidana; iya katamati hara laaletida katama ubbaafe aadhidi laaletidi attana.
30.8: Taani Gibxe taman oythiya wodenne iya maaddeysati ubbay hayqidi wuriya wode, taani Godaa gideysa enti erana.
30.9: “He wode taani saro de7iya Tophe asaa daganthanaw asata markaben kiittana. Gibxey pirdetiya gallas Tophe asaa bolla waayey yaana. He gallasay gakis” yaagees.
30.10: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora kushen taani Gibxe duretetha dhaysana.
30.11: Kawotethata ubbaafe aadhidi, wozana mino olanchota kaalethidi yidi, biitta dhaysana; enti Gibxe asaa bolla mashshe shoddidi, biittan aha kunthana.
30.12: Nayle shaafa taani melisana; taani Gibxe iita asata kushen aathada immana; he biittanne yan de7iyaba ubbaa allagatan dhaysana. Taani Goday haysa odas” yaagees.
30.13: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Mempisa kataman de7iya eeqatanne misileta ubbaa ta dhaysana; Gibxe biittan zaaridi halaqay deenna; biitta ubbaa taani yashisana.
30.14: Taani Phatroosa geetetiya dugeha bagga Gibxe baysa kessana; pudeha baggara de7iya Xo7aane kataman tama yeddana; Tebisa katama pirdana.
30.15: Gibxe miixa gidida Pelusiyaman ta hanquwa gussana; Tebisa asa ubbaa wursana.
30.16: Taani Gibxen tama oythana; Pelusiyami daro waayetana; Tebisa dirsa gimbey laaletana; Mempisa katamaa duuxonna metoy gakana.
30.17: Onaninne Bubastu kataman de7iya na7atethati ubbay mashshan wurana; maccasay di7etidi baana.
30.18: Gibxe wolqaa ta mentherethiya wode Xafinaasan gallasi qammana; I otoruwa wolqay wurana; Gibxe shaari kammana; he katama yuushon de7iya gutati ubbaa di7etidi baana.
30.19: Taani Gibxe hessada oothada pirdana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees.
30.20: Nuuni di7etida tammanne issintho laythan, koyro ageenan, laapuntha gallasan, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
30.21: “Asa na7aw, ta Gibxe kawa qesiya menthas; iya woyshaninne curqan xaaxidi, koolidi pathiya hiilli baawa; hizape guye I minotethi demmidi mashshe oykanaw danda7enna.
30.22: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees. Taani Gibxe kawas morke gidana. Kase iyaw meqida qesiyanne lo77o de7iya qesiya nam7aaka ta menthana; iya mashshay iya kushepe sa7an wodhanaada oothana.
30.23: Taani Gibxeta kawotethata giddoninne hara biittatan laallana.
30.24: Taani Babiloone kawa nam7u qesiya minthada, ta mashsha iya oythana. Shin Gibxe kawa qesiya menthana; ba morkiya sinthan I hayqana haniya asada oolana.
30.25: Taani Gibxe kawa qesiya daabursada, Babiloone kawa qesiya minthana. Taani Babiloone kawa ta mashsha oythiya wodenne I Gibxe bolla denthiya wode Gibxeti taani Godaa gideysa erana.
30.26: Gibxeta taani kawotethata giddoninne biitta ubban laallana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees.

31.1: Nuuni di7etida tammanne issintho laythan, heedzantho ageenan, koyro gallasan, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
31.2: “Asa na7aw, Gibxe kawasinne asa ubbaas haysada yaagada oda: ‘Ne gitatetha ta oodera gaaddeyo?’ ”
31.3: Ne lo77o daashsha kuyay de7iya Libaanose ziga mela; I diccis; iya xeeray shaara gakis.
31.4: Yan iya dichiya haathi de7ees; pulto ciimmoti iya dichidosona. Shaafati goggidi iya yuushuwa irxisidosona; pultoti mithay doliya bessa ubbaa ushshoosona.
31.5: He mithay woran de7iya mitha ubbaafe aduqis; iya daashshay daris; tashey aduqis; haathi darida gisho ordis.
31.6: Salo kafoti iya daashshan banta keethaa keexidosona; bazzo do7ati iya kuya garsan na7a yelidosona; gita kawotethati ubbay iya kuyan shempoosona.
31.7: Ba xaphuwa ciimmo haathan duge yeddida gisho he mithay ba daashsha tashiyara waanidi lo77i!
31.8: Hari attoshin Xoossa gannatiyan he zigaara giniya zigi baawa; iya mela daashshi de7iya xiiddika baawa. Hessa mela ocha mithi, Xoossa gannatiyan hessa mela lo77o mithi baawa.
31.9: Taani iya daro daashshan puulayas; Edene geetetiya Xoossa gannatiyan de7iya mithati ubbay iya qanaatoosona.
31.10: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “He mithay aduqidi diccida gisho, iya xeeray shaara gakida gishonne I ba geesan otortida gisho,
31.11: ta iya yegga aggas; wolqaama, allaga kawas aathada immas. He kawoy iya iitatethaa mela iya bolla oothana.
31.12: Wozana mino allagati he mitha qanxidi yeggana; qanxida tasheti deretan, ollataninne zangaaratan yegetidi attana. Iya kuyan shempiya kawotethati ubbay he bessaa aggidi baana.
31.13: Salo kafoti yidi kundida mithaa bolla uttana; bazzo do7ati iya tasheta yedhana.
31.14: Haatha matan dicciya mithata giddon iya mela aduqidi, xeeray shaara gakiya mithi deenna. Hayqiya asa bolla gakiya hayqo pirday he mithaa bolla gakana; I duufon de7eysatara gidana” yaagees.
31.15: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “He mithay duufo geliya gallas ciimmo pulto haathati iyaw kayotana mela oothana. He pulto haathay goggonna mela oothana; Libaanosey iya gisho azzanana mela oothana; wora mitha ubbay shullana.
31.16: Ta he mithaa duufon holiya wode, iya kundethaa girsan kawotetha ubbay qaaxana. Kundidi duufon gelida Edene mithatinne haathe uyidi ordida lo77o Libaanose mithati ubbay iya kundethan mintena.
31.17: Kawotethata giddon iyara issifidaysatinne iya kuyan de7iya ubbay kase mashshan hayqidaysatara gahetanaw iyara issife duufo gelana.
31.18: Edene gannatiyan de7iya mithata giddon hessa mela gitinne lo77oy baawa. Shin ha77i Edene mithatada ika hayqidi duufon gelees; yan I mashshan hayqida ammanonaysatara gahetana. “He mithay Gibxe kawaanne iya asaa leemiso” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

32.1: Nuuni di7etida tammanne nam7antho laythan, tammanne nam7antho ageenan, koyro gallasan, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
32.2: “Asa na7aw, Gibxe kawas haysada yaagada zeleela. Neeni kawotethatas giddon nena gaammo mela kessadasa; shin ne abba giddon de7iya yeeruntha mela. Ne haathaafe keyadasa; ne tohuwan yedhada, haatha buulloyadasa.
32.3: Daro asay shiiqiya wode taani ta gitiyan nena oykana; asay nena goochidi, haathaafe gaxa kessana.
32.4: Taani nena biittan hola aggana; sa7a bolla miccana; salo kafota ne bolla utisana; bazzo do7ata ne ashuwa kalsana.
32.5: Ta ne ashuwa dereta bolla laallana; zangaarata ne ahan kunthana.
32.6: Shaafata kumidi dereta kammana, gakanaw, ne suuthay gukana mela oothana.
32.7: Ta nena dhaysiya wode saloy goozetana; xoolintoti dhumana; away shaaran kametana; ageenay ba poo7uwa diggana.
32.8: Neepe bollara de7iya salo poo7ota ubbaa dhaysada, biitta dhumisana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
32.9: Ne bolla gakida dhayuwa ne eronna kawotethata sissiya wode daro asa wozanay un7ethana.
32.10: Daro kawotethati nena be7idi dagammana. Taani ta mashsha enta sinthan shoddada seesiya wode, kawotethati yashshan kokorana; ne kundiya wode enti ubbay banta shempuwas yayyana.
32.11: Ubbaa Haariya Goday Gibxe kawako haysada yaagees: “Babiloone kawa mashshay ne bolla yaana.
32.12: Hara kawotethatape aadhida, wozana mino olanchoti banta mashshan daro asaa wursanaada taani oothana. Enti Gibxe otoruwa dhaysana; daro asay wurana.
32.13: Daro haatha matan de7iya mehe ubbaa ta dhaysana; hizape guye, haatha buulloya asi woyko mehey deenna.
32.14: He wode taani ne haathata xillisana; ne shaafata wopu oothada gogisana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysa odayis.
32.15: Taani Gibxe baysa kessiya wode iyan de7iya ubbaa quchada dhaysiya wodenne iyan de7iya asa ubbaa shociya wode taani Godaa gideysa enti erana.
32.16: Ha ubbay entaw zeleeletiya zelelsi gidana. Kawotethata maccasati Gibxesinne iya daro asaas zeleelana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
32.17: Nuuni di7etida tammanne nam7antho laythan, he ageenan, tammanne ichashantho gallasan, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
32.18: “Asa na7aw, daro gidida Gibxe olanchota gisho yeeka. Iyonne, wolqaama kawotethata macca nayta hayqidi duufo geleysatara issife duge duufo moyza.
32.19: Entako, ‘Hinteno Gibxeto, hinte haratape aadhidi mala lo77o? Hinte duufo gelana; yan hinte Godaa qaxaretonaysatara issife moogetana.’
32.20: Gibxe biittas mashshi shodetidi uttida gisho, enti mashshan hayqidaysata giddon kundana; Gibxey ba daro asaara duge gooshetana.
32.21: Duufon de7iya wolqaamaa halaqati Gibxebaanne Gibxera issifidaysataba haasayishe, ‘Enti duge yidosona; Godaa qaxaretonayisata mashshan hayqidaysatara enti zin7idosona’ yaagosona.
32.22: “Asoorey duufon de7ees. Olan hayqida Asoore olanchota duufoti iya yuushuwa teqidi uttidosona.
32.23: Enta duufoti ollas wursetha gaxan de7oosona. Iya olanchoti duufuwa yuushon keeletidosona; kase de7on de7iya asa heeran buqethi denthiya asay shuketidosona; mashshan wuridosona.
32.24: “Elaami duufon de7ees; iya olanchoti ubbay shuketidosona mashshan kundidosona. De7on de7iya asa matan buqethi denthidasati ubbay qaxaretona biitta garsi aadhidosona duufo gelidi zin7idosona.
32.25: Hayqidaysata giddon Elaamas bessi giigidi uttis. Elama olanchota duufoti iya yuushuwan de7oosona; enti ubbay mashshan hayqidosona. Enti ubbay qaxaretiboonaysatanne mashshan hayqidaysata Enti de7on de7eyisata giddon buqethi denthida gisho duufo geelidaystara issife zin7idosona.
32.26: “Mosahinne Tobaali banta olanchotara duufon de7oosona; enti kase kawotethata ubbaa yashshan kokorsidaysata gidikoka, enti ubbay mashshan hayqidosona. Enti ubbay qaxaretonayisata. Enti de7on de7eyisata giddon buqethi denthida gisho mashshan hayqidosona.
32.27: Enti beni gooba olanchoti banta ola miishiya dancidi banta gondalliya tiran wothidi banta mashsha borkotidi mogeteysada bonchon mogetibookona. Ha olanchota de7on de7iya asa giddon buqethi denthida gisho enta nagaray enta meqetha bolla de7ees.
32.28: “Hinte Gibxe asati xoonetananne mashshan hayqida, ammanonna asatara issife zin7ana.
32.29: “Edoomey ba kawotaranne ba halaqatara issife duufon de7ees; enti kase mino olanchota; shin ha77i olan hayqida, ammanonna asatara ollan gelidosona.
32.30: “Pudeha bagga halaqatinne Sidoona asay duufon de7oosona. Enti kase banta wolqan asaa yashisidosona; shin ha77i enti banta yeellara yaa gelidosona. Mashshan hayqida qaxaretiboonna asaara issife duufo geloosona.
32.31: “Gibxe kawoynne iya olanchoti, mashshan hayqida olanchota yan be7idi minettana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
32.32: “Ta haysafe kase kawotethati Gibxe kawas yayyana mela oothidaba gidikoka, inne iya olanchoti Godaa ammanonna, mashshan hayqida asatara issife zin7ana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

33.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
33.2: “Asa na7aw, ne biitta asaas haysada yaagada oda: ‘Ta issi biitta bolla olaa ehiya wode he biitta asay banta bolla yaaba wochiya asi dooro banta giddofe dooro.
33.3: He wochiya uray morkey yishin be7idi, asay naagetana mela moyze punniko,
33.4: Oonika moyze punuwa si7idi, naagetonna ixin, oli yidi iya wodhiko, suuthaa acoy iya oyko.
33.5: I moyze punuwa si7idi, naagetonna ixida gisho iya suuthaa acoy iya bollana. I si7idi naagetidaba gidiyako hayqope attanashin.
33.6: Shin wocheysi morkey yeysa be7ishe, moyze punnidi asaa erisonna aggiko, olay yidi, he asaape issi asi wodhiko, he uray ba nagaran hayqees; shin taani iya suuthaa wocheysa kushepe ekana’ ” yaaga.
33.7: “Asa na7aw, ta nena Isra7eele asaas wochiya asi oothas; ta new odeysa si7ada asaa akeekisa.
33.8: Taani issi iita asi, ‘Neeni tuma hayqana’ giya wode, I ba nagaraape simmana mela ne iyaw odonna ixiko, he uray ba nagaran hayqees; shin taani iya suuthaa gisho nena achana.
33.9: Shin nagaranchoy ba nagaraape simmana mela ne odin, I ixiko, I ba nagaran hayqees; shin ne ne shempuwa ashshaasa.”
33.10: “Asa na7aw, Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda: ‘Hinte, nu nagaray nu qohoy nu bolla de7ees; hessa gaason nu gilqida. Yaatin, nu waanidi paxa daanaw danda7oona?’ ” yaageeta.
33.11: Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqayis: “Nagaranchoy ba nagaraa aggidi, de7on daana mela koyaysipe attishin, nagaranchuwa hayquwan ufaytike. Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, simmite; hinte iita oosuwa aggite! Ayis hayqanaw koyeetii?” yaagis.
33.12: Asa na7aw, ne biitta asaas oda. “Xillo asi nagara oothiko, iya kase xillotethay iya ashshena; qassi nagaranchoy ba nagaraape simmiko, kase nagaraa gisho I pirdetenna. Xillo asi nagara oothiko, kase xillotethaa gisho de7on daanaw danda7enna.
33.13: Taani xillo asako, ‘Neeni tuma de7on daana’ yaagida wode, I ba xillotethan ammanetidi nagara oothiko, ba oothida nagaran I hayqanaape attishin, kase xillotethay iyaw qofetenna.
33.14: Qassi taani nagarancho asako, ‘Neeni tuma hayqana’ yaagida wode I ba nagaraape simmidi, tumanne suure ooso oothiko,
33.15: miishe tal7anaw oykidaba zaariko, kaysotidaba guye immiko, nagara ooso aggidi, de7o immiya higgiya naagiko, I tuma de7on daanape attishin, hayqenna.
33.16: I kase oothida nagaray issoy qofetenna; ha77i tumanne suure ooso oothida gisho, I tuma de7on daana.
33.17: “Gidoshin, ne biitta asay, ‘Godaa ogey like gidenna’ yaagosona; shin like gidonnay enta ogiya.
33.18: Xillo asi ba xillotethaa aggidi, nagara oothiko, I ba nagaran hayqana.
33.19: Qassi nagarancho asi ba nagaraape simmidi, tumanne suure ooso oothiko, he oosuwan I de7on daana.
33.20: Shin hinte, ‘Godaa oge like gidenna’ yaageeta. Isra7eele asaw, ta hinte issuwa issuwa bolla hinte oosuwada pirdana” yaagis. Yerusalaame Kundethi
33.21: Nuuni di7etida tammanne nam7antho laythan, tammantho ageenan, ichashantho gallasan, Yerusalaamepe kessi ekidi yida issi asi katamay kundidaysa taw odis.
33.22: He uray yaanape issi gallasi sinthe, omarsa wode Godaa kushey ta bolla de7ees; ta doonay dooyetis; wontetha gallas he uray taako gakiya wode taani oda doomas.
33.23: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
33.24: “Asa na7aw, Isra7eele biittan laaletida katamatan de7iya asay haysada yaagosona: ‘Abrahaamey barka de7iya issi asi; I ha biitta laattis; shin nuuni daro; biittay tuma nuus laata gididi imetis’ ” yaagosona.
33.25: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada entaw oda. “Hinte ha77ika suuthara de7iya asho meeta; eeqa goyinneta; shempo wodheeta. Haysa ubbaa oothishe hinte tuma biitta laattanee?
33.26: Hinte hinte mashshan ammaneteta; tuna ooso ootheeta; hinte ubbay hinte shooruwa macheta tuniseeta. Haysa ubbaa oothishe hinte tuma biitta laattanee?” yaagees.
33.27: Ubbaa Haariya Goday ba de7uwan caaqidi haysada yaagees: “Laaletida katamatan de7iya asay mashshan hayqana; katamaape gaxan de7iya asaa taani bazzo do7aas kathi oothana; dere bollanne gongolo giddon de7iya asay iita hargen hayqana.
33.28: Ta he biitta kallonne baysi kessana; enti otortiya wolqay wurana; Isra7eele dereti ay asika yaara kanthonna baysi gidana.
33.29: Enti oothida tunaa gaason taani biitta kallonne baysi kessiya wode, taani Godaa gideysa enti erana” yaagees.
33.30: “Asa na7aw, asay katamaa dirsa mataninne banta keethata pengen eqidi, issoy issuwara haysada yaagidi, nebaa odetees. ‘Haayite; Godaa matape yida qaalay woygiyako ane si7oos’ yaagosona.
33.31: Enti kase asay yeysada neeko yoosona; ta asada ne sinthan uttoosona; ne odeysa si7oosona; shin oothokona. Enti siiqoba haasayoosona; shin enta wozanay go77a xalaala yaaretees.
33.32: Ne entaw issi siiqo mazmure lo77o girsan yexiyanne diithi loythidi diixiya asa mela. Enti ne odeysa si7oosona; shin oothokona.
33.33: Shin ne odeysi tuma poletana; poletiya wode, nabey enta giddon de7eysa enti erana” yaagis.

34.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagidi taako yis.
34.2: “Asa na7aw, Isra7eele henthanchota bolla haysada yaagada tinbite oda: hinteno, hintena heemmiya Isra7eele henthanchoto, hintena ayye! Hinte dorsata heemmanaw bessennee?
34.3: Enta maatha uyeeta; enta ikisiyape dadetida suufiya ma77eeta; entafe modhuwa shukidi meeta; shin dorsata suure heemmeketa.
34.4: Daaburidaysata gashtisibeketa; hargidaysata pathibeeketa; meqidaysata koolibeeketa; betidaysata zaaribeeketa; dhaydaysata koybeketa. Hessa aggidi enta wolqan un7ethidi haarideta.
34.5: Dorsati ubbay heemmiya asi dhayin laaletidosona; bazzo do7atas kathi gididosona.
34.6: Ta dorsati laaletidosona; enti zumata bollanne dereta bolla toylatidosona. Biitta gaxa gakanaw laaletidosona; shin enta xomoosey woyko koyey baawa” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
34.7: Hessa gisho, hinteno, henthanchoto, Godaa qaala si7ite.
34.8: “Taani ta de7uwan caaqayis: Ta dorsata heemmiya asi dhayin, ta dorsati oyketidi, bazzo do7atas kathi gididosona. Ta henthanchoti ta dorsata koyiboona gishonne enti ta dorsata heemmonna aggidi, bantana heemmida gisho,
34.10: Ta hintew, henthanchohotas morke gidana; ta dorsata taani hintefe ekana; ta hintena nam7antho entaw henthancho oothike. Hizape guye hinte hintena heemmishe de7eketa. Ta dorsata ta hintefe ekana; hizape enti hintew kathi gidokona” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
34.11: “Taani ta huuphen ta dorsata xomoosananne koyana.
34.12: Henthanchoy ba dorsatape dhayin koyeysada, taani ta dorsata koyana; shaarinne dhumi goozida gallas enti dhayida bessaafe ta enta shiishana.
34.13: Taani kawotethata giddofenne hara biitta ubbaafe shiishanada, entana, enta biitta ehana. Isra7eele deretan, pultotaninne asay de7iya bessatan enta heemmana.
34.14: Taani enta lo77o qooron heemmana; Isra7eele zumati enti heemetiya besse gidana. Enti lo77o qooroy de7iya Isra7eele zumata bolla hemetananne allatana.
34.15: Taani ta huuphen ta dorsata heemmananne shempisana.
34.16: Taani dhayidaysa koyana; betidaysa zaarana; meqidaysa koolana; hargidaysa pathana. Shin taani suure pirdiya henthancho gidiya gisho genen modhidaysanne minnidaysa dhaysana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
34.17: Hinteno, ta dorsato, “Hintena ubbaa ta pirdana; keeha iitaape, dorsaa deeshape ta shaakana.
34.18: Hinte lo77o qooron heemmeteysi gidonna ixin, attida maata tohon yedheetii? Qassi hinte xillo haathi uyeysi gidonna ixin, attida haatha tohon buulloyetii?
34.19: Ta dorsati hinte tohon yedhida maata maanawunne hinte tohon buulloyida haatha uyanaw bessii?” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
34.20: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday entako haysada yaagees: “Modho mehiya giddoninne gilqa mehiya giddon ta ta huuphen pirdana.
34.21: Daaburanchota, hinte, hinte miyanne hinte hashiyan sugiya gishonne gaxa kessana gakanaw hinte enta hinte kaciyan qayciya gisho,
34.22: taani ta dorsata ashshana. Hizape guye oonika enta oykenna; ta keeha dorsata giddoninne iita dorsata giddon ta pirdana.
34.23: Ta enta bolla issi henthanchuwa, ta aylliya Dawita shuumana; I enta heemmananne entaw henthancho gidana.
34.24: Hizape guye ta Goday enta Xoossaa gidana; ta aylley Dawiti enta giddon halaqa gidana” yaagees Goday.
34.25: “Ta entara sarotetha caaqo caaqana; iita do7ata taani biittafe diggana; ta dorsati bazzon saro daana; wora garsan hirgi bayna allatana.
34.26: Ta entanne ta zuma yuushon de7iya bessata anjana. Entaw koshshiya ira woden woden immana; he iray entaw anjo gidana.
34.27: Gaden de7iya mithati ayfana; biittay kathi dolisana; ubbay banta biittan saro daana. Ta enta qambara menthada, enta aylle oothidi haaridaysata kushepe kessiya wode taani Godaa gideysa enti erana.
34.28: Hara kawotethati enta bonqokona; biittan de7iya do7ati enta mookonna; aykoyka daganthonna enti saro daana.
34.29: Ta entaw aradda biitta immana; enti zaaridi koshan wurokona; woyko hara kawotethatas cashshas attokona.
34.30: He wode enti taani Goday, enta Xoossay entara de7eysanne Isra7eele asay ta ase gideysa enti erana.
34.31: Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, hinte ta wude; ta qooron miya ta wudiya; hinte ta ase, taani hinte Xoossaa” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

35.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
35.2: “Asa na7aw, Sayre zumako ne som7uwa zaarada tinbite oda:
