35.3: ‘Neno, Sayre zumaw, ta new morke gidana; taani ta kushiya ne bolla denthada, nena kallonne baysa kessana.
35.4: Taani ne katamata laallana; ne baysa gidana. Taani Godaa gideysa ne he wode erana’ ” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
35.5: New Isra7eelera wuronna morketethi de7iya gisho, enta un7aa wodenne enta wursetha pirdaa wode, enta ne mashshas aathada immadasa.
35.6: Ta Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqayis: taani nena hayqon pirdana; ne hayqope kessa ekanaw danda7aka. Ne ase wodho ixonna gisho ase wodhey nena kallana.
35.7: Taani Sayre zumaa kallonne baysa kessana; yaara oonika aadhona mela oothana.
35.8: Taani ne dereta ubbaa ahan kunthana; dereti, shaafatinne zangaarati mashshan hayqidaysata ahan kametana.
35.9: Ta nena merinaw baysa oothana; ne katamati kallo attana; Taani Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana.
35.10: “Taani Goday Isra7eeleninne Yihudan de7ishin hinte, ‘Ha nam7u kawotethatanne ha nam7u biittata nu oykana; enti nubaa gidana gida gisho,
35.11: Hinte enta morkidi, enta bolla yilotida gishonne qanaatida gisho ta hintew seerana. Ta hintena pirdiya wode taani tana gideysa hintena erisana.’
35.12: Hinte, ‘Isra7eele dereti baysa attidosona; nuuni midi dhaysana mela nuus imetidosona’ gidi, cayida cashsha ubbaa taani Goday si7idaysa hinte he wode erana.
35.13: Ne ta bolla otoron odetida odaanne zawi bayna haasayida haasaya taani si7as.
35.14: Biitta ubbay ufaytiya wode taani hintena baysa kessana.
35.15: Isra7eele laata biittay baysa gidida wode hinte ufaytida gisho, Sayre zumaw Edoome biitta ubbaa taani baysa oothana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

36.1: “Asa na7aw, Isra7eele zumata haysada yaagada tinbite oda: ‘Hinteno, Isra7eele zumato, Godaa qaala si7ite.’
36.2: Hinte morketi, ‘Hashshu! Beni dhoqa dereti ubbay nu laata gididosona’ yaagidosona.
36.3: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada tinbite oda. Enti hintena ubba bessara mentherethidi baysa oothida gishonne hinte hara kawotethatan haaretana mela oothida gisho hintena cashshasinne miichas aggis.
36.4: Godaa qaala si7ite! Ubbaa Haariya Goday deretako, zumatako, zangaaratako, ollatako, yuushuwan de7iya hara kawotethan bonqetida, qelqisetidanne baysa attida katamatako haysada yaagees.
36.5: Taani, ta eexiya qaanatiyan hara kawotethata bollanne Edoome ubba bolla tuma odas. Enti ufaytishenne kadhishe ta biitta bantaw ekidosona; hentha gadeta laattidosona.
36.6: Hessa gisho, Isra7eele biitta bolla tinbite oda. Kawotethata cashshaa gisho, ta qanaaten eexada deretas, zumatas, zangaaratsinne ollatas odeysa oda.
36.7: Hinte yuushuwan de7iya kawotethati ubbay kawuyanaysa taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday hintew ta kushiya denthada caaqada odayis.
36.8: “Shin, Isra7eele dereta bolla de7iya mithati ta asaa Isra7eeles zaaridi aacana; ayfe ayfana; enti eeson banta biitta simmana.
36.9: Ta hintera de7ayis; ta hinteko simmana; hinte biittay goyetananne zeretana.
36.10: Ta Isra7eele asaa taybuwa ha biittan darsana; asay katamatan daana; laaletida bessati zaaridi gimbetana.
36.11: Taani asaanne mehiya hintew darsana; enti yeletananne darana. Beni hinte de7idaysada daana; kaseysafe aathada ta hintena dureyana. He wode hinte, taani Godaa gideysa erana.
36.12: Taani ta asaa Isra7eele, ha biittan zaaridi daana mela oothana. Zaaridi he biittay hinte nayta dhaysena; biittay hinte laata biitta gidana” yaagees.
36.13: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees asay hintena, “Biittay ase miya biitta” kawotethiuwka, “Na7i bayna asi oothasu” yaageysi tuma.
36.14: Hizape guye, biittay, “Ase miya biitta” giduku; qassi kawotethati, “Na7i bayna asi gidokona” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
36.15: “Hizape guye, kawotethata cashshaa ta hintena sissike; hizape guye yeellateketa; he biittay hintew dhube giduku” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
36.16: Zaaridi, Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
36.17: “Asa na7aw, Isra7eele asay banta biittan de7iya wode, banta hanotaaninne banta oosuwan biitta tunisidosona; enta hanoy ta sinthan maccasa kushe meto mela.
36.18: Enti biittan suuthu gussida gishonne banta eeqan biitta tunisida gisho ta hanquwa enta bolla gussas.
36.19: Taani enta kawotethata giddon laallas; biitta ubban zeras. Taani enta hanotaanne enta oosuwa mela pirdas.
36.20: Enti bida besse ubban asay enta, ‘Haysati Godaa asata; enti iya biittafe keydaysata’ ” yaagidi ta geeshsha sunthaa tunisana mela oothidosona.
36.21: Shin Isra7eele asay bida kawotethata ubban tunisida ta geeshsha sunthay tana qofisees.
36.22: “Hessa gisho, taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday, Isra7eele asaas giyaba oda. ‘Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, ta hessa oothey, hinte bida kawotethata giddon tunisida ta geeshsha sunthaa gishope attishin, hinte gisho gidenna.
36.23: Hinte tunisida, kawotethata giddon tunida ta gita sunthaa geeshshatetha ta bessaana. Enti xeellishin, hinte baggara ta geeshshatetha bessiya wode, taani Godaa gideysa enti erana’ ” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
36.24: “Taani hintena kawotethata giddofe kessana; biitta ubbaafe shiishada hinte biitta zaarada ehana.
36.25: Ta hinte bolla xillo haathi dharcana; hinteka geeyana. Hintena hinte tunatethi ubbaafenne eeqa goyinno ubbaafe geeshshana.
36.26: Ta hintew ooratha wozanaa immana; ooratha ayyaana hinte giddon wothana; shucha wozanaa hintefe kessada, asho wozanaa hintew immana.
36.27: Ta Ayyaana hinte giddon wothana; ta wogaanne ta higgiya naagana mela oothana.
36.28: Ta hinte mayzatas immida biittan hinte daana; hinte ta ase gidana; taka hinte Xoossaa gidana.
36.29: Hinte tuna ubbaafe ta hintena ashshana; kathay hintew darana mela oothana; zaarada hinte bolla kosha ehike.
36.30: Koshaa gaason hinte kawotethata giddon kawuyonna mela hinte mitha ayfiyanne hinte goshsha kathan kunthana.
36.31: He wode hinte, hinte iita hanotaanne iita ogiya hassayana. Hinte nagaraanne hinte tuna oosuwa gisho, hinte hintena shaatettana.
36.32: Ta hessa ubbaa oothey hinte gisho gidonnaysa erite. Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, hinte hanotan yeellatitenne kawuyite” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
36.33: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta hintena, hinte nagaraa ubbaafe geeshshiya wode, hinte katamatan zaaridi daana mela oothana; laaletidaysati zaaridi gimbetana.
36.34: Iya matara aadhiya asaa sinthan baysa gididi de7iya biittay goshsha biitta gidana.
36.35: Asay, ‘Haysi kase baysa gidida biittay ha77i waanidi Edene Gannate gididee? Kase laaletida, asi doonnanne baysa katamati ha77i waanidi yuushoy gimbetidanne asi de7iya katamata gididona?’ yaagana.
36.36: He wode hinte yuushuwan de7iya attida kawotethati, taani laaletida katamata zaarada keexidaysanne baysa biittay zaaridi kathi dolana mela oothiday tana Godaa gideysa enti erana. Taani Goday hessa odas; ta odidaysa ta oothana” yaagees.
36.37: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Isra7eele asay issi toho tana maado oychana mela oothana; enta taybuwa wudeda darsana.
36.38: Ba7aale gallas yarshos yida wude mehen Yerusalaamey kumeysada, laaletida katamatan ase kunthana. He wode enti taani Godaa gideysa erana” yaagis.

37.1: Godaa kushey ta bolla de7ees; iya Ayyaanay tana meqethi kumida zangaaran wothis.
37.2: I tana enta giddon yaanne haanne yuushshis; ta hinchi gidi melida daro meqethata zangaara giddon be7as.
37.3: I, “Asa na7aw, ha meqethati zaaridi, shempora daanaw danda7oona?” yaagis. Taani, “Ubbaa Haariya Godaw, haysa ne eraasa” yaagas.
37.4: I taako, “Ha meqethatas haysada yaagada tinbite oda; hinteno, melida meqethato, Godaa qaala si7ite.
37.5: Ubbaa Haariya Goday ha meqethatako haysada yaagees: ‘Taani shempo hinte giddo gelsana; zaaridi hinte de7on daana.
37.6: Ta hinte bolla shaya wothana; hintena asho mayzana; hintena gogan kammana. Hinte de7on daana mela ta hinte giddo shempo gelsana. He wode hinte taani Godaa gideysa erana’ ” yaagees.
37.7: I tana kiittidaysada tinbite odas; ta tinbite odo doomiya wode girsi si7etis; meqethati shiiqidi, ba bessan bessan oyketidosona.
37.8: Ta xeelliya wode, enta bolla shayi de7ees; ashoy enta bolla bentis; galba ma7idosona; shin shempoy enta giddon deenna.
37.9: I taako, “Asa na7aw, carkuwas tinbite oda; neno, carkuwaw, oyddu baggafe haa ya; enti de7on daana mela ha hayqidaysata bolla shempo punna” yaagis.
37.10: I tana kiittidaysada tinbite odas; shempoy enta giddo gelis; de7o demmidosona; enti daro olancho gididi banta tohon eqidosona.
37.11: I taako, “Asa na7aw, ha meqethati Isra7eele asaa leemiso; Isra7eele asay, ‘Nu meqethati melidosona; nu ufaysay dhayis; nubay kumethi halis’ yaagosona.
37.12: Hessa gisho, entaw haysada yaagada tinbite oda; ‘Hinteno, ta asaw, taani hinte duufuwa dooyana; hintena yaape kessana; ta hintena zaarada, Isra7eele biitta ehana.
37.13: Ta asaw, ta hinte duufuwa dooyiya wodenne hintena kessiya wode, ta Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
37.14: Taani ta Ayyaana hinte giddon wothana; hinte de7on daana. Taani hintena, hinte biittan wothana. He wode taani Goday odidaysanne oothidaysa hinte erana’ ” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday. Issi darenne Issi kawo
37.15: Zaaridi Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
37.16: “Asa na7aw, issi mitha xam7a ekada, iya bolla, ‘Haysi Yihudasinne iyara de7iya Isra7eele asaasa’ yaagada xaafa. Qassi hara xam7a ekada, iya bolla, ‘Haysi Efreema; Yoosefanne iyara de7iya Isra7eele asaasa’ yaagada xaafa.
37.17: Hessafe guye, enti ne kushen issi xam7a gidana mela nam7a issife gathada oyka.
37.18: Ne biitta asay neeko, ‘Haysi ne ootheysi aybee? Nuus birshethaa oda’ yaagidi oychiko,
37.19: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda: taani Efreema kushen de7iya Yoosefa xam7anne iyara de7iya Isra7eele kochata ekanaw hanayis; enta nam7aa issi xam7a oothanaw, Yihuda xam7ara gathana. Enti nam7ay ta kushen isso gidana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday yaagada oda.
37.20: “He ne enta bolla xaafida nam7u xam7ata enta sinthan oykada,
37.21: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. Taani Isra7eele asaa enti laaletida kawotethata giddofe kessana; ta enta shiishada, enta biitta zaarada ehana.
37.22: Isra7eele dereta bollanne enta biittan ta enta issi kawotethi oothana; enta ubbaa bolla issi kawo kawothana. Qassi enti zaaridi nam7u biitta gidokona; nam7u kawotethi gididi shaaketokona.
37.23: Hizape guye, enti banta eeqatan, banta ixetidabataninne banta nagara ubban bantana tunisokona. Taani enta kundida bessaafe denthada nagara ubbaafe geeshshana. Enti ta ase gidana; taka entaw Xoosse gidana.
37.24: “Ta aylley Dawiti enta kawo gidana; entaw ubbaas issi henthancho xalaali daana. Enti ta higgiya kaallana; ta wogaa minthidi naagana.
37.25: Taani ta aylliya Yayqoobas immidanne enta mayzati de7ida biittan enti daana. He biittan enti, enta naytinne enta nayta nayti merinaw daana; ta aylley Dawiti enta bolla merinaw kawo gidana.
37.26: Ta entara sarotetha caaqo caaqana; he caaqoy merinaa caaqo gidana. Taani enta minthada essana; enta taybuwa darsana; ta keethaa merinaw enta giddon wothana.
37.27: Taani yan entara daana; entaw Xoosse gidana; enti ta ase gidana.
37.28: Xoossa keethay enta giddon merinaw de7iya wode, Isra7eele geeshshey tani, Godaa gideysa kawotethati erana” yaagis.

38.1: Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
38.2: “Asa na7aw, Maagoge biittan de7iya Mosahanne Tobeela asaa bolla waanna halaqa gidida Googe bolla tinbite oda.
38.3: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. Mosahanne Tobeela waanna halaqa gidida Googe ta ne bolla dendas.
38.4: Ta nena guye zaarana; ne sidhen dafo aathada, ne olanchotara, ne paratara, ola miishe ma7ida ne para asatara, banta mashsha leefida, gitanne guutha gondalle oykida asaara nena goochada kessana.
38.5: Farsefe, Tophefenne Liibepe yida asay gondalle oykidi, huuphen birata barneexa wothidi, entara gidana.
38.6: Gomerinne iya olanchoti ubbay, pudeha baggan de7iya Beet-Torgaaminne iya olanchoti neera gidana.
38.7: “Nenne neeko shiiqida asa ubbay dendite; hintena giigisite; ne entaw halaqa gida.
38.8: Daro wodepe guye, ne olas koyettana; sinthafe yaana laythatan daro wode baysa gididi de7ida biitta, olape shempida biittanne, iyan de7iya asay daro kawotethatape Isra7eele dereta shiiqida biitta olanaw ne dendana. Enti daro kawotethatape shiiqidaysatanne ubbay ha77i saro de7eyisata.
38.9: Neeni, ne olanchotinne neera de7iya daro kawotethati goteda dendana; hinte shaarada biitta kammana” yaagees.
38.10: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “He wode qofi ne wozana giddo yin, ne iitabaa halchana.
38.11: Neeni, ‘Taani diretiboonna gutata olana; wopu gidi, hirgi bayna de7iya asata, dirsi, pengey woyko gordey bayna katamata ta olana.
38.12: Taani enta di77ananne bonqana; kase baysa gidida biitta yidi uttida, kawotethata giddofe shiiqida, mehenne miishe haarida, biittas gul7an uttida asaa bolla ta kushiya denthana’ yaagana.
38.13: Saaba asaynne Didaana asay Tarsesa zal7anchotinne na7atethi olanchoti ubbay, ‘Ne bonqanaw yadii? Ne olanchota di7o toossanaw, biranne worqa gaazisanaw, mehenne miishe ekanawunne di7uwa bonqanaw daro asi shiishadii?’ ” yaagana.
38.14: Hessa gisho, asa na7aw, Googe bolla haysada yaagada tinbite oda. Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “He wode, ta asay Isra7eele hirgi bayna de7iya wode, neeni akeekikii?
38.15: Neeni de7iya pudeha bagga biittafe yaana. Nenne neera de7iya daro kawotethati para toggidi, mino olancho gididi, yaana.
38.16: Biitta kammiya shaarada, ne ta asaa Isra7eele bolla yaana. Googe sinthafe yaana wodiyan ta nena ta biitta bolla denthana. Hessa ta oothey kawotethati tana erana melanne taani ne baggara oothiyabay ta geeshshatetha enta sinthan bessaana melasa” yaagees.
38.17: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani ta aylle gidida Isra7eele nabeta baggara, kase wode zaara zaarada Isra7eelen tinbite odas.
38.18: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Googey Isra7eele bolla dendiya wode ta hanqoy suullana.
38.19: He wode Isra7eele biittan wolqaama biitta qaaxoy hanana; taani ta sheniyaninne ta eexiya hanquwan awaajas.
38.20: Abbaa moloy, salo kafoy, deren de7iya meheynne do7ay, sa7a bolla woxi qaaxiya medhetethi ubbaynne sa7an de7iya asa ubbay ta sinthan kokorana. Dereti kundana; aafoti woddana; dirsa gimbe ubbay laaletana.
38.21: Ta zumatan ubban Googe bolla mashshi dendana mela oothana; olanchoti banta mashsha banta bolla zaaridi, issoy issuwa wodhana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysa odas.
38.22: Taani hargeninne hayqon iya seerana; wolqaama ira, shachi, xuuggiya diinne iya bolla, iya olanchota bollanne iyara de7iya kawotethata bolla bukisana.
38.23: Hessada oothada, taani ta gitatethaanne ta geeshshatetha bessaana. Daro kawotethata taani tanatethaa erisana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana’ ” yaagis.

39.1: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Asa na7aw, Googe bolla haysada yaagada tinbite oda. Mosahanne Tobeela asaas waanna halaqa gidida Googe, ta new morke.
39.2: Ta nena guye zaarana; haaho gidida pudeha bagga biittafe goocha kessada, Isra7eele dereta bolla nena ehana.
39.3: Taani ne haddirsa kushiyape dongeta baqa yeggana, ne ushacha kushiyape donge toorata yegisana.
39.4: Neeni, ne olanchotinne neera de7iya kawotethati ubbay Isra7eele deriya bolla kundidi attana. Taani hinte ashuwa kafotasinne bazzo do7atas kathi oothada immana.
39.5: Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday hessa odida gisho, hinte ubbay denban kundidi attana.
39.6: Maagoge biittaninne yuushoy abban teqetida biittatan, hirgi bayna uttida asaa bolla taani eexiya tama yeddana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana.
39.7: Ta geeshsha sunthay ta asaa Isra7eele giddon eretanaada oothana. Hizape guye ta geeshsha sunthay cayetena. Kawotethati taani Godaa, Isra7eele Geeshshaa gideysa erana” yaagis.
39.8: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “He gallasay yaana; attenna” yaagada ta odida gallasay haysa.
39.9: “He wode Isra7eele katamatan de7iya asay keyidi, ola miisheta ubbaa taman eethana; hessika guuthanne gita gondalleta, dongeta, donge toora, tooratanne xam7ata ubba xuuggana. Laapun laythi kumethi enti eeso mithi oothidi go7etana.
39.10: Enti mithi mixanaw woyko worape mithi qanxanaw koshshenna. Enti shiishida ola miisheta eeso mithi oothidi go7etana. Bantana bonqidaysata zaaridi bonqana; entaba ekidaysatape enti zaaridi ekana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
39.11: He gallas Googe moogetiya bessi taani iyaw Isra7eele biittan immana. He bessay abbaafe doloha baggara de7iya Ooge asata Zangaara geetetiya zangaara giddon gidana. Googeynne iya olanchoti ubbay yan moogetiya gisho, enta duufoy yaara hemetiya asaas oge gordana. He bessay, “Googe Olanchota zangaara” geetetidi xeegetana.
39.12: “Isra7eele asay biitta geeshshanaw, laapun ageena kumethi aha moogishe gam7ana.
39.13: He biittan de7iya asa ubbay aha moogon maadetana; hessan, taani ta bonchuwa qoncisiya wode entaw boncho gidana” yaagees Ubbaa haariya Goday.
39.14: Laapun ageenape guye attida ahi de7iko, moogana mela asi dooretana; he asay biittay geeyana gakanaw ubba wode biitta ubban yuuyidi attida aha demmidi moogosona.
39.15: Enti biittan yuuyishin, asa meqethi bentiko, he meqetha matan malla wothidi aadhana. Moogeysati yidi, Googe Olanchota zangaaran moogana.
39.16: He katama sunthay Hamoona geetetana. Enti biitta zaaridi geeshshana. Iya heeran, “Olanchota Katamaa” geetetidi xeegetiya katami daana.
39.17: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Asa na7aw, kafo kochenne sa7a do7atas haysada yaagada xeega. Ta hintew Isra7eele dereta bolla giigisida gita yarsho ba7aalen asho maanawunne suuthu uyanaw ubba bessafe shiiqidi haayite.
39.18: Hinte mino asata ashuwa maana; biitta halaqata suuthaa uyana. Enti hintew Baasane modho urge dorsada, marazeda, koledanne boora mela gidana.
39.19: Taani hintew giigisida yarsho ba7aalen hinte kallana gakanaw, modho maana; mathotana gakanaw, suuthu uyana.
39.20: Ta hintew giigisiya gibiraape parata, para asata, mino toora asatanne hara olanchota ubba ashuwa hinte kallana gakanaw maana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
39.21: “Taani kawotethata giddon ta bonchuwa qoncisana. Kawotethati ubbay ta enta pirdida pirdanne ta enta bolla denthida ta kushiya be7ana.
39.22: He wodiyape doomidi, Isra7eele asay taani Godaa, enta Xoossaa gideysa erana.
39.23: Isra7eele asay di7etidi biday banta nagara gaason, gideysa hara kawotethati erana. Enti taw ammanetona ixida gisho, taani ta som7uwa entafe denthada, enta morketas enta aathada immin, enti ubbay olan hayqidosona.
39.24: Enta tunatethaanne enta iitatetha mela entaw bessiya seera seeras; ta som7uwa entafe genthas” yaagis.
39.25: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees. “Ha77i taani Yayqooba kochata di7ope zaarada gashtisana; Isra7eele asaa ubbaas qadhetana. Ta geeshsha sunthas mishetada cayetonna mela oothana.
39.26: Enta yashshiyabay bayna, banta biittan saro duussu doomiya wode kase banta yeellanne taw ammanetona ixidaysa dogana.
39.27: Taani enta kawotethata ubbaa giddofe zaarada ehana; morketa biittafe enta shiishana. Hessada oothada, taani geeshshi gideysa enta baggara kawotethata ubbaa bessaana.
39.28: Enti di7etidi baana mela oothiday tana gidiya gishonne enta shiishada, enta biitta zaarida gisho, taani Godaa enta Xoossaa gideysa enti erana. Taani entafe issuwaka kawotethata giddon aggike.
39.29: Taani ta Ayyaana Isra7eele asaa bolla gussana; zaarada ta som7uwa entafe genthike” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

40.1: Nuuni di7etida laatamanne ichashantho laythan, Yerusalaamey xoonetida tammanne oyddantho laythan, koyro ageenan, tammantho gallasan Godaa kushey ta bolla de7ees. I tana denthidi Yerusalaame efis.
40.2: Xoossay tana qoncethan Isra7eele biitta efidi, issi zuma bolla essis. He zumaape dugeha baggara daro keethi keexetida katama daaniyaba be7as.
40.3: I tana yaa efin taani naase biratada phooliya issi addiya be7as. He uray liinope oosetida wodoronne wadha xam7a oykidi, dirsa pengiya matan eqis.
40.4: I taako, “Asa na7aw, ta nena ha bessaa ehiday ta nena bessiyaba ubbaa ne mintha akeekana melasa. Hessa gisho, ne ayfiyan xeella; ne haythan si7a; ne wozanan wotha. Ne be7iyaba ubbaa Isra7eele asaas oda” yaagis. Doloha Bagga Pengiya
40.5: Taani Xoossa keetha yuuyi aadhida dirsa gimbiya be7as. He addiya kushen usupun wadha adusse gidida xam7i de7ees. Issi adussa wadhay issi wadho bolla oyddu biradheta guja gidees. Dirsa gimbiya likiya wode dalgatethay issi wadhanne takadho; gompaynne adussatethay usupun wadha.
40.6: Hessafe guye, doloha baggara de7iya dirsa pengiyako bis. Dethaa keyidi, geliya pengiya wadhiya wode usupun wadha gidis.
40.7: Yaara aadhiya wode ushacharanne haddirsara penge naageysati eqiya heedzu heedzu kifileti de7oosona. Issi issi kifiley usupun wadha adussenne usupun wadha dalga. Enta giddon de7iya godati ichashu wadha orde. Pengiya naageysata kifiletape ya baggara, Xoossa keethako simmida usupun wadha barandi de7ees.
40.8: He uray geliya bessaa barandaa wadhin, hospun wadha gidis.
40.9: Xoossa keethaako simmida pengey wursethan de7ees. He barandaa tuuqeta ordetethay nam7u wadha.
40.10: Doloha bagga pengiyan ushachaninne haddirsa baggan issi gina gidida heedzu naago keethi de7ees.
40.11: He uray dirsa pengiya wadhiya wode dalgatethay tammu wadha, adussatethay tammanne heedzu wadha.
40.12: Issi issi penge naageysata kifiliya sinthan adussatethay issi wadha, dalgatethay issi wadha gidida godi de7ees; naageysata kifileti nam7u baggara usupun usupun wadha.
40.13: Hafinthan de7iya naageysata kifileti guye baggafe hefinthan de7iya naageysata kifileta guye bagga gakanaw de7iya bessay laatamanne ichashu wadha gidis.
40.14: He uray dabaaba sinthan de7iya wursetha kifiliya wadhin, laatamu wadha gidis.
40.15: Pengiya geliya bessaafe bidi, wursethan de7iya iya barandaa gakanaw de7iya pengiya adussatethay ishatamu wadha.
40.16: Kifileta ubbaas kare bagga simmida guutha maskooteti de7oosona; kifiletape giddon de7iya godatas maskooteti de7oosona. Yaanne haanne shaakiya godata bolla zamba misiley de7ees. Kare Dabaaba
40.17: He uray tana kare dabaabako efis. Yan taani dabaaba yuushon de7iya shuchi hiixetida baasuwanne he baasuwa keexetida hastamu kifileta be7as.
40.18: Shuchay hiixetida baasoy dabaaba yuusho ubbaa gakis; kare dabaabay giddo dabaabape ziqees.
40.19: Giddo dabaaba gathiya, dhoqan oosetida, dirsa pengey de7ees. He uray nam7u pengetape giddon de7iya bessaa wadhin, gompay wuloha bagga xeetu wadha doloha baggay xeetu wadha gidis. Pudeha Pengiya
40.20: He uray tana qommo bagga efidi, kare bagga dabaaba sinthan de7iya dirsa pengiya wadhis.
40.21: Wulohape ushachaninne haddirsa baggara de7iya heedzu naageysata kifileti, entafe giddon de7iya godatinne iya baranday koyro doloha pengiya baggan wadhin issi gina gididosona. Dirsa penge adussatethay ichashu wadha; dalgatethay laatamanne ichashu wadha.
40.22: Baranday, maskootetinne zamba misiley kase doloha pengiya baggan be7idaysada issi gina. Yaa gathiya laapun dethati de7oosona. Baranday dabaaba sintha baggara de7ees.
40.23: Doloha baggan, qommo bagga giddo dabaabas hara pengey de7ees. He uray ha nam7u dirsa pengetape giddon de7iya bessaa wadhin, xeetu wadha gidis. Dugeha Pengiya
40.24: He uray tana garsa bagga dirsa pengiyako kaalethin, yan hara dirsa penge be7as. I tuuqetanne gido kifileta wadhiya wode haratara gina gidis.
40.25: He dirsa pengiya matan de7iya kifileta ubbaas maskooteti de7oosona. Dirsaa pengiya adussatethay ishatamu wadha; dalgatethay laatamanne ichashu wadha.
40.26: Yaa gathiya laapun dethati de7oosona. Baranday dabaaba sinthan de7ees. Pengiya bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara zamba misiley de7ees.
40.27: Giddo dabaabas hara pengey de7ees. He uray ha nam7u dirsa pengetape giddon de7iya bessaa wadhin, xeetu wadha gidis. Giddo Dabaaba Gelsiya Pengeta
40.28: He uray tana garsa dirsa pengiya baggara giddo dabaabako efis. I dirsa pengiya wadhin, hara pengetara gina gidis.
40.29: Naageyisata kifileti, godatinne barandati ubbay hara dirsa pengetara issi gina. He dirsa pengiya yuushon de7iya kifileta ubbaas maskooteti de7oosona. Ha pengiya adussatethay ishatamu wadha; gompay laatamanne ichashu wadha.
40.30: He dirsa pengey yuushuwan barandati de7oosona; enta adussatethay laatamanne ichashu wadha; gompay ichashu wadha.
40.31: He barandati kare bagga dabaaba sinthan de7oosona. Pengiya bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara zamba misiley de7ees. Yaa gathiya hospun dethati de7oosona.
40.32: He uray tana doloha bagga dirsa pengiyara giddo dabaabako efis. I he dirsa pengiya wadhin, hara pengetara gina gidis.
40.33: Naageyisata kifileti, godatinne baranday hanko dirsa pengetara issi gina. He dirsa pengiya yuushon de7iya kifileta ubbaas maskooteti de7oosona. He pengiya adussatethay ishatamu wadha; gompay laatamanne ichashu wadha.
40.34: Baranday kare bagga dabaaba sinthan de7ees. Pengiya bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara zamba misiley de7ees. Yaa gathiya hospun dethati de7oosona.
40.35: He uray tana pudeha bagga dirsa pengiyako efis. I he dirsa pengiya wadhin, hanko pengetara issi gina gidis.
40.36: Naageyisata kifileti, godatinne baranday hanko dirsa pengetara issi gina. He dirsa pengiya yuushon maskooteti de7oosona. He pengiya adussatethay ishatamu wadha; gompay laatamanne ichashu wadha.
40.37: Baranday kare bagga dabaaba sinthan de7ees. Pengiya bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara zamba misiley de7ees. Yaa gathiya hospun dethati de7oosona. Pudeha Pengiya Matan De7iya Keethata
40.38: Kare dabaaba qommo baggara, giddo dirsa pengiya barandaara oyketidi, hara kifiley de7ees. Xuussa yarsho ehiya mehe ashoy meecetey he kifiliyana.
40.39: He barandan ha baggara nam7u xarpheezati, ya baggara nam7u xarpheezati de7oosona; xuussa yarshos, nagara yarshosinne naaqo yarshos mehe ubbay shuketiya he xarpheezata bollana.
40.40: Barandaafe kare baggara qommo dirsa pengiya matan nam7u xarpheezati ha baggara, nam7u xarpheezati ya baggara de7oosona.
40.41: Hessa gisho, yarshos shiiqida mehey shuketiya hospun xarpheezati de7oosona; entafe oyddati barandan de7oosona; oyddati kare dabaaban de7oosona.
40.42: Xuussa yarsho wothanaw giigisida, shuchafe masetidi oosetida oyddu xarpheezati de7oosona. Entaw adusatethay issi wadhanne takadho; dalgatethay issi wadhanne takadho geesay issi wadhanne takadho. Xuussa yarshonne hara yarsho ubbaa shukiya miisheti he xarpheezata bolla uttoosona.
40.43: Oyddu biradhe aduqiya kaqota godaa bolla yuuyi aadhidi dhishetidi uttidosona. Yarshos shiishiya asho ubbay he xarpheezata bolla uttees. Kahineta Kifileta
40.44: He uray tana giddo dabaaba gelsis. Yan pengeti giddo dabaabako dooyetiya nam7u kifileti de7oosona. Entafe issi kifiley qommo dirsa pengiya matara garsa bagga simmis; nam7anthoy garsa dirsa pengiya matara qommo bagga simmis.
40.45: He uray, “Dugeha bagga simmida kifiley Xoossa keethan oothiya kahinetaba.
40.46: Qommo bagga simmida kifiley yarsho bessan oothiya kahinetaba. Kahineti ubbay Saadoqa yaraape yeletida Leeweta; Godaa sinthan eqidi oothanaw besseysati haysata xalaala” yaagis.
40.47: He uray dabaaba wadhin, adusatethay xeetu wadha, dalgatethay xeetu wadha gidis. Dabaaban Xoossa keethafe sintha baggara issi yarsho bessi de7ees.
40.48: I tana Xoossa keetha barandaako efis. Barandaa geliya bessan eqida gobaneta13 wadhin, adussatethay ichashu wadha; dalgatethay tammanne oyddu wadha. Haddirsaranne ushachara de7iya godata ordetethay heedzu wadha gidis.
40.49: Barandaa adussatethay laatamu wadha; gompay tammu wadha. Yaa gathiya tammu dethati de7oosona. Geliya bessan ushacharanne haddirsara eqida nam7u tuuqeti de7oosona.

41.1: Hessafe guye, he uray tana Xoossaa keethan de7iya Geeshsha Bessaa gelsis. He Geeshsha Bessaa giddora aathiya ogiya likin usupun wadha gidis.
41.2: Gompay tammu wadha gidis. Haddirsaranne ushachara de7iya godata gompay ichashu wadha. I Geeshsha Bessaa wadhin adussatethay oytamu wadha, gompay laatamu wadha gidis.
41.3: Hessafe guye, qol7a gelis. Qol7a geliya ogiya wadhin, nam7u wadha gidis; gompay usupun wadha gidis; haddirsaranne ushachara de7iya godata gompay laapun wadha gidis.
41.4: I qol7a wadhin, adussatethay laatamu wadha, dalgatethay laatamu wadha gidis. Hessafe guye, “Haysi Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa” yaagis.
41.5: He uray Xoossaa keethaa godaa wadhin, ordetethay usupun wadha gidis. He godaara oyketidi, Xoossaa keetha gido bagga yuushuwan keexetida oyddu oyddu wadha dalgiya daro kifileti de7oosona.
41.6: He kifileti issoy issuwa bolla keexetida heedzu pooqe gidin, issi issi pooqiya bolla hastamu kifileti de7oosona. Gimbiya yuushon de7iya kifileta tookiya tuuqeti de7oosona. Shin he tuuqeti gimbiya giddo kumethi gelibookona.
41.7: Xoossa keethaa yuushon de7iya kifileta dalgatethay pooqey gujiya wode gujees. Xoossa keethaa yuushon de7iya keethaa oosoy garsafe pude dalgishe biya gisho keethay pude guzhetida wode ubban kifileta dalgatethay gujishe bees. Giddo pooqiyara kanthidi, qommo wursetha pooqiya gakanaw efiya dethati de7oosona.
41.8: Xoossa keethaa yuushon dhoqu gida baasoy de7eysa be7as. Iya yuushuwan de7iya kifileti he baasuwa bolla keexetidosona; he baasoy giddo dabaabape usupun wadha dhoqees.
41.9: He kifileta kare bagga godaa ordetethay ichashu wadha. Kaysa bessay Xoossa keethaafenne,
41.10: kahineta kifiliyape giddon de7ees; iya ordetethay laatamu wadha.
41.11: Kaysa bessaafe ushachaninne haddirsa baggan de7iya kifileta gelsiya pengeti de7oosona. He pengeti issoy qommo baggara, issoy qassi garsa baggara de7ees. Kaysa bessaa yuushuwa gasethiya baasuwa dalgatethay ichashu wadha.
41.12: Xoossa keethafe wuloha baggara de7iya kaysa bessaafe sintha baggara issi keethi de7ees. He keethaa adussatethay uddufun tammu wadha; gompay laapun tammu wadha. He keethaa godaa ordetethay ichashu wadha.
41.13: He uray Xoossa keetha kare baggaa wadhin, adusatethay xeetu wadha. Xoossa keethaafe guye baggara de7iya kaysa bessaa kanthidi wuloha bagga keethaa gakanaw de7iya bessaa wadhin xeetu wadha gidis.
41.14: Doloha baggara de7iya Xoossaa keetha gompay nam7u kaysa bessata gujidi wadhin xeetu wadha gidis.
41.15: Nam7u baggara de7iya aadhiya bessata gujidi, wuloha baggara de7iya keetha adussatethaa wadhin, xeetu wadha gidis. Xoossaa keetha Geeshsha Bessay, iya qol7aynne iya baranday
41.16: wuygepe bidi, maskooteta gakanaw de7iya bessay mithan licetidi uttis; maskootetika mithan licetidi uttidosona.
41.17: Xoossa keetha soo bagga kifileta goday, pengetape bolla aadhana gakanaw alleeqetidi uttis.
41.18: Kifileta yuushon, zamba mithaninne kiruubeta misiley alleeqetis. He zamba mitha misileti alleeqetiday nam7u kiruubetape giddona. Kiruubetas nam7u nam7u som7oy de7ees.
41.19: Issi baggara asa som7o daaniya som7oy zamba misiliya xeellees; hanko baggara gaammo som7o daaniya som7oy zamba misiliya xeellees.
41.20: Geeshsha bessi wuygepe bidi, pengetape bolla baggan de7iya bessaa gakanaw, godaa yuusho ubbay hessada alleeqetis.
41.21: Xoossa keetha penge xangeti ubbay oyddu maazaney de7iya ubbay issi like. Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa geliya bessaa sinthan
41.22: mithafe oosetida yarsho bessi daaniya bessi bentees. Ika oyddu maazaney gididi, dalgatethaynne adussatethay issi gina; issoy issoy nam7u wadha; adussatethay heedzu wadha. Maazaneta tuussati, baasotinne miye baggan de7iya sanqati ubbay mithafe oosetidosona. He uray taako, “Haysi Godaa sinthan de7iya xarpheeza” yaagis.
41.23: Geeshsha Bessaa gelsiya issi pengey de7ees; Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa gelsiya issi pengey de7ees.
41.24: Issi issi pengiyas giddon daakotidi dooyetiya nam7u sanqati de7oosona.
41.25: Godata bolla medhetidaysada Geeshsha Bessaa pengeta sanqata bolla kiruubetanne zambata misiley medhetidi uttis. Gaathi geliya kifiliya sinthan, kare baggara mithafe oosetida kami de7ees.
41.26: He kifiliya geliya godata miyen maskooteti de7oosona. Godati zamba misilen alleeqetidosona. He kifiliya geliya ushachaninne haddirsan de7iya kifileta dethaa baggara kammiya kaari de7ees.

42.1: Hessafe guye, he uray tana pudeha bagga pengiyara kare dabaabako kaalethidi Xoossa keethaa giddo dabaaba gimbiyara oyketida keethaako tana ehis.
42.2: He keethaa wulay pudeha bagga simmis. Ha keethay xeetu wadha adussenne ishatamu wadha dalga.
42.3: Gido dabaabape laatamu wadha haakidi, qassi sintha baggara kare dabaaban de7iya hiixetida shuchafe sintha baggara woliko simmida heedzu dethi de7iya pooqey de7ees.
42.4: He kifileta pengeti pude xeelloosona. Entafe sintha baggara tammu wadha dalganne xeetu wadha adusse gidida giddora aathiya ogey de7ees.
42.5: He keethas bolla heedzantho pooqey nam7antho pooqiyape xuummees; nam7anthoy koyruwape xuummees. Hessi haniday enti issoy issuwafe guye shiiqidi gimbetida gishosa.
42.6: He pooqiyas bolla bagga kifileti gido kifiletapenne garsa bagga kifiletape xuummiya gisho, kare dabaaban de7iya hara keethatada entaw tuussi baawa.
42.7: He kifiletape sintha baggara ishatamu wadha aduqiya kare dabaaba baggara de7iya issi gimbey de7ees.
42.8: Kare dabaaba baggara de7iya kifileta adussatethay ishatamu wadha gidishin, Xoossa keethaa sinthan de7iya kifileta adussatethay xeetu wadha.
42.9: Kare dabaabape gathi geliya wode doloha baggara garsa kifileta geliya pengey de7ees.
42.10: Dugeha baggara kare dabaaba kaallidi Xoossa keethaa dabaabara oyketidi keexetida kare dabaabako simmida kifiley de7ees.
42.11: He keethaa kifileta sinthan ogey de7ees. He keethay qommo baggan de7iya keethara issi gina; adussatethay, dalgatethay, kifiletinne pengeti ubbay issi gina.
42.12: Dirsa gimbey wuriya doloha bagga gaxa doomidi gimbiyas dugeha baggara de7iya kifileta geliya pengey de7ees.
42.13: He uray taako, “Xoossa keethaa dabaaba sinthan, pudeha bagganinne dugeha baggan de7iya kifileti kahinetassa. He kifileta giddon Godaa sinthan oothiya kahineti ubbaafe geeshsha kathaa maana. He kifileti geeshshi gidiya gisho, ubbaafe geeshsha imota, hessika katha yarsho, nagara yarshonne naaqo yarsho enti yan wothana.
42.14: Kahineti issi toho Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa gelidaape guye, Xoossaas oothiya wode ma77iya ma7oti geeshshi gidiya gisho, banta ooso ma7uwa laammonnashin kare dabaaba keyanaw danda7okona. Enti asaako kare keyishe kase ma7iya hara ma7ota ma7idi keyanaw koshshees” yaagis.
42.15: He uray Xoossaa keetha gaatha baggaa wadhidi wursidaape guye doloha bagga dirsa pengiyara tana kare kessidi, Xoossa keethaa kare baggaa yuushuwa ubba wadhis.
42.16: Wadha xam7a ekidi, doloha baggaa wadhin, ichashu xeetu wadha gidis.
42.17: Pudeha baggaa he xam7an wadhin, ichashu xeetu wadha gidis.
42.18: Dugeha baggaa wadhin, ichashu xeetu wadha gidis.
42.19: Wuloha baggaa wadhin, ichashu xeetu wadha gidis.
42.20: Hessada oothidi, I oyddu baggaa ubbaa wadhis. Iya yuushuwan ichashu xeetu wadha aduqiya, qassi ichashu xeetu wadha dalgiya dirsa gimbey de7ees. He gimbey geeshsha bessanne coo bessaa shaakanaasa.

43.1: He uray tana doloha bagga pengiyako ehis.
43.2: Taani Isra7eele Xoossaa bonchoy doloha baggafe yeysa be7as. Iya yuussaa girsay kixa haatha guntha mela; biittay iya bonchuwan poo7is.
43.3: Ta be7ida qoncethay kase Goday Yerusalaame katamaa dhaysanaw yida wode be7ida qoncethaa daanees. Koboora shaafa matan taani be7ida qoncethaa daanees. He wode ta som7uwa sa7a gathada gufannas.
43.4: Godaa bonchoy doloha pengiyara Xoossaa keethaa giddo gelis.
43.5: He wode Godaa Ayyaanay tana denthidi, giddo dabaaba gelsin, Heko, Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumis.
43.6: Yan he uray ta matan eqidashin, Xoossa keetha giddofe Goday taw odishin si7as.
43.7: I taako, “Asa na7aw, haysi ta araatay uttiyanne ta tohoy yedhiya besse. Ta Isra7eele asaa giddon merinaw daana. Hizape guye Isra7eele asaa gidin, enta kawota gidin, eeqa goyinnidi woyko banta kawota hawulte goyinnishe ta geeshsha sunthaa tunisokona.
43.8: Issi godaa xalaali tananne enta shaakin, banta pengiya ta pengiya matan, banta penge zizgiya ta penge mithaa matan essidosona. Banta ixetida oosuwan ta geeshsha suntha tunisidosona. Hessa gisho, taani ta hanquwan enta dhaysas.
43.9: Hiza eeqa goyinno aggo; banta kawota hawulte ta matape diggo. Yaatiko, ta enta giddon merinaw daana.”
43.10: Zaaridi Goday taako, “Asa na7aw, ta nena bessida Xoossa keethaa oosuwa Isra7eele asaas oda; enti banta oothida nagaran yeellatana mela iya medhuwaba entaw oda.
43.11: Enti banta oothidaban yeellatiyaba gidiko, Xoossaa keethaa mallaa, I keexetida hanota, keyiya dethata, geliya pengetanne iya kumetha misiliya entaw qoncisa. Hessadaka, iya wogaa, iya higgiya ubbaa enta erisa. He keetha hanota kaallana mela iya higgiyanne woga naagana mela enti xeellishin xaafa.
43.12: Xoossa keetha higgey haysa, zumaa huuphen, Xoossa keethaa yuushuwan de7iya bessa ubbay Ubbaafe Geeshshi gidana.” Yarsho Bessa
43.13: Yarsho bessay kase Xoossa keethaa wadhidaysada, issi wadhanne oyddu biradhe gujidi wadhetis. Yarsho bessaa baasuwa yuushon issi wadha ziqanne issi wadha dalgiya olli de7ees; he ollay kare baggara issi takadho dhoqees; hessi yarsho bessa dhoqatethaa.
43.14: Baasuwape bidi, koyro dethaa gakanaw dhoqatethay nam7u wadha; gompay issi wadha. Guutha dethaafe bidi gita dethaa gakanaw dhoqatethay oyddu wadha; qassi gompay issi wadha.
43.15: Yarshoy xuussa coocey de7iya wursetha dethay oyddu wadha dhoqa. I oyddu maazane gididi, oyddu maazaniya bolla issi issi kacey de7ees;
43.16: Tamay eexiya coocey oyddu maazane gididi, adussatethaynne dalgatethay tammanne nam7u wadha.
43.17: Nam7antho dethay hessa mela oyddu maazane gididi, adussatethaynne dalgatethay tammanne oyddu wadha. He dethaa kare bagga gaxay issi takadho dhoqees; yuushon issi wadha olli de7ees. Yarsho bessaa pude efiya dethati doloha baggan de7oosona.
43.18: Ubbaa Haariya Goday taako, “Asa na7aw, xuussa yarsho yarshanawunne suuthu wurxanaw, yarsho bessa gimbidi wursiya gallas oosetana wogay haysa.
43.19: Ta sinthan eqidi oothiya Saadoqa yaraape yeletida Leewe koche gidida kahinetas nagara yarsho oothada issi wofaano imma” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
43.20: Neeni he suuthaafe ekada, oyddu kaceta, nam7antho dethaa oyddu maazanetanne he dethaa gaxaa tiya. Hessada oothada, yarsho bessa geeshsha.
43.21: Nagara yarshos imetida kormaa ekada, Xoossaa keethaas teqetida geeshsha bessaafe kare baggara iyaw giigida bessan xuugga.
43.22: Wontetha gallas borey bayna issi kole ekada, nagara yarsho oothada yarsha. Kase korma suuthan geeshshidaysada he koliya suuthan yarsho bessa geeshsha.
43.23: Geeshsha simmada borey bayna issi wofaanonne issi maraze ekada,
43.24: nam7aaka Godaa sinthe shiisha. Kahineti enta bolla maxine laallidi, Godaas xuussa yarsho oothidi yarsho.
43.25: “Laapun gallas kumethi, issi issi gallas, issi kole, issi wofaanonne issi maraze nagara yarsho oothada yarsha.
43.26: Kahineti laapun gallas kumethi yarsho bessa geeshshidi Godaas dummayo.
43.27: Ha gallasati wuriya wode, hospuntho gallasaape doomidi, kahineti xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho shiisho. He wode ta hintenan ufaytana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

44.1: Hessafe guye, he uray tana guye zaaridi, Xoossa keethas doloha baggara de7iya kare bagga dirsa pengiyako ehiya wode dirsa pengey gordetidi uttis.
44.2: Goday taako, “Ha pengey gordan daanape attishin, nam7antho dooyetenna. Goday Isra7eele Xoossay yaara gelida gisho oonika yaara gelenna. Hessa gisho, he pengey gordan daana.
44.3: Gidoshin, Isra7eele halaqay, Godaa sinthan uythi maanaw yan uttanaw danda7ees. Pengiya barandaara I gelanawunne keyanaw danda7ees” yaagis.
44.4: He uray tana pudeha pengiyako efiya ogiyara efidi, Xoossa keethas sintha bagga gathis. Yan gidada ta be7iya wode, Heko, Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumidi uttidaysa be7ada som7ora sa7an gufannas.
44.5: Goday taako, “Asa na7aw, Xoossa keetha wogatanne iya higgeta ubbaa ne be7eysanne si7eysa loythada naaga. Xoossa keethaa gelanawunne keyanaw bessiya asatinne bessonna asati oonanteko loythada akeeka.
44.6: Makallancho Isra7eele asaas, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. ‘Hinteno, Isra7eele asaw, hinte oothiya tuna oosota aggite.
44.7: Hinte taw ta kathaa, modhuwanne suuthu yarsho oothidi shiishiya wode wozanaynne ashoy qaxaretiboona allaga asata Xoossa keethi gelsidi ta keethaa tunisideta; ta caaquwa menthideta.
44.8: Ta geeshsha miisheta bolla aawatona ixidi, ta keethan allagata aawaydeta’ ” yaagees.
44.9: Hessa gisho, Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Isra7eele asaa giddon de7iya allaga asi, ba wozananinne ba ashuwa qaxaretiboona, oonika ta keetha gelopo.”
44.10: “Tana aggidi, Isra7eele asaara eeqa goyinnida Leeweta ta seerana.
44.11: Enti ta keethan oosancho gido; ta keetha dirsa pengeta naago; Xoossa keethaa oosuwaka ootho. Enti xuussa yarshonne asay ehiya hara yarsho shuko; qassi asaas oothanaw asaako shiiqo.
44.12: Shin enti kase Isra7eele asaa eeqa goyinnisida gishonne asaa nagarako kaalethida gisho, enti banta nagaraa seera ekana mela ta kushe denthada caaqas” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
44.13: Enti kahine gididi oothanaw taako shiiqopo; woyko taw dummatida geeshshabakonne Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaako shiiqopo. Enti banta oothida tuna oosuwa gisho, oyshetana.
44.14: Hessa gisho enti Xoossa keethan aawatanadanne iya giddon oothanaw de7iya ooso ubbaa oothana mela ta enta shuumana. Kahinetetha Woga
44.15: “Shin Isra7eele asay tana aggidi, ta sinthafe haakida wode Xoossa keethaa wogaa ammanetidi polida, Leewe koche gidida kahineti, Saadoqa yarati, taw oothanaw taako shiiqo. Modhdhuwanne suuthaa shiishidi enti ta sinthan ootho” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
44.16: Xoossa keethaa enti gelo; taw oothanaw ta yarsho bessa enti shiiqo; aawatetha enti oyko.
44.17: Enti Xoossa keethaas giddo dabaaba geliya wode, liinope dadetida ma7o ma7o; giddo dabaaba pengen woyko Xoossaa keetha giddon oothiya wode suufe ma7o ma77ofa.
44.18: Enti banta huuphen liino goxidi; banta xeessan liino qantha sure danco; cawaya ma7o ma7ofo.
44.19: Asay de7iya kare dabaaba enti keyanaape sinthe Xoossa keethan oothishe ma7ida ma7uwa qaaridi, geeshsha kifiletan wotho. Hessika, asay enta geeshsha ma7uwa bochidi qohetonna melasa.
44.20: “Kahineti banta huuphiya meedetofo woyko adussidi dichofo; banta huuphiya maaran qanxeto.
44.21: Ay kahineti giddo dabaaba geliya wode woyne ushshi uyopo.
44.22: Enti azini hayqida, woyko sayo maccas ekofo. Isra7eele asaape geela7o eko; woyko azinay kahine gididi de7ishe hayqida maccas eko.
44.23: “Kahineti Godaas dummatidabaanne dummatonnaba giddon de7iya dummatethaa ta asaa tamaarso; geeshshinne tuna giddon de7iya dummatethaa enta besso.
44.24: Ay mootoy dendikoka, kahineti higgey odeysada pirdo. Ta higgeynne ta wogay geysada ta ba7aaleta boncho; ta Sambaata dummayidi boncho.
44.25: “Kahiney hayqida ahako shiiqidi, bana tunisopo. Gidoshin, hayqiday aawa woyko aayo woyko iya adde na7a woyko macca na7a woyko isha woyko azina gelaboonna micho gidiko bana tuniso.
44.26: Tunidaape guye, laapun gallas gam7o; hessafe guye, I geeshshi gidana.
44.27: Geeshsha bessan haggaazanaw giddo dabaaba geliya wode ba nagaraa gisho yarsho shiisho” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
44.28: Kahinetas laati baawa; ta entaw laata. Isra7eele biittan entaw ay laataka immopite; enta laatay tana.
44.29: Enti katha yarsho, nagara yarshonne naaqo yarsho mo. Isra7eele biittan Godaas dummayidaba ubbay entassa.
44.30: Koyro gakiya dumma dumma kathaa xeera ayfeynne hinte Godaas immiya imota ubbay kahinetassa. Hinte keethay anjetana mela hinte dhiilliyafe koyro kushiya entaw immite.
44.31: Kahineti bawuta woyko do7i wodhida kafo asho woyko mehe asho moopo.

45.1: “Biittaa laattanaw hinte saaman shaakiya wode he biittafe issi saamaa Godaas dummayite. Hessika tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga aduqiyanne tammu kilo mitire dalgiya besse gido. He bessay ubbay geeshsha besse gido.
45.2: He bessaafe oyddu maazane de7iya adussatethaynne dalgatethay issi gina gidiya ichashu xeetu wadha, bessi Xoossa keethaas teqeto; iya yuushon ishatamu wadha gidida kaysa bessi de7o.
45.3: He Godaas dummayida bessaafe adusatethay tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga, gompay ichashu kilo mitire gidida besse wadhada shaaka. He bessay Ubbaafe geeshsha bessay de7iya Xoossa Keethas, gididi de7o.
45.4: Hessi Xoossa keetha giddon Godaas haggaazanaw, iyako shiiqiya kahinetas dummatida geeshsha bessi gido. Hessi kahineta keethaynne Xoossa keethay keexetiya besse gido.
45.5: Qassi attida tammanne nam7u kilo mitire bagga aduqiyanne ichashu kilo mitire bagga dalgiya bessay Xoossaa keethan oothiya Leewetas laata gido; enti bantaw duussa katamata yan keexo.
45.6: “Godaas dummayida bessaa matan tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga aduqiyanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga dalgiya bessay katamaa keexanaw de7o; he bessay Isra7eele asa ubbaas gido.
45.7: Isra7eele halaqaas imetida gishoy nam7u baggara Godaas dummayida bessaaninne katamaa bessan zawatees. I wuloha baggara Medetiraane Abbaa gakees; doloha baggara Isra7eele biitta zawa gakees. Iya adussatethay Isra7eele kochaafe issuwa gishuwada wuloha bagga zawape bidi, doloha bagga zawa gakees.
45.8: He gishoy Isra7eele halaqaas laata gade gido. Hizape guye ta halaqati ta asaa un7ethofo; enti Isra7eele asa ubbay ba kochan kochan biitta ekanaada oothonna” yaagees.
45.9: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Hinteno, Isra7eele halaqato, hintew ha77i gidana! Buqethinne asaa un7etho aggite; suure pirdite; xillotethi oothite. Ta asaa enta laata biittafe shoddidi gooddeysa aggite. Haysa odey tana Ubbaa Haariya Godaa.
45.10: Hintew issuwas issuwas like mizaaneynne maka miishey de7o.
45.11: Maka miishe ubbaas giddo gidiya gomare geetetiya maka miishe gido. Melaba makiya ifa geetetiya miisheynne gukiyaba makiya baate geetetiya miishey issi like gido. Hessa guussay, issi gomerey tammu ifaranne tammu baatera issi gina gidees.
45.12: Guuthaba makiya wode hinte maka miishey saqile gido. Laatamu geeri issi saqile gido; usupun tammu saqiley issi minaane gido. Yarshotanne Geeshsha Gallasata
45.13: “Hinte imuwa immishe haysada immite. Hinte shiishiya gistefe usupun tammaafe issi kushe, bangafe usupun tammaafe issi kushe gido.
45.14: Shamaho zaytiyape xeetape issi kushe immite. Hessa makiya wode ne makiya miishey baate gido. Tammu baatey issi gomare woyko issi Qoore gidees.
45.15: Isra7eele asay heemmiya nam7u xeetu mehepe de7iya issi wudiyape issi issi mehe immite. Hessi asaa nagara atotethas yarshetiya, katha yarshora, xuussa yarshoranne issifetetha yarshora shiiqana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
45.16: Biittan de7iya asa ubbay hessa ubbaa Isra7eele halaqaas immo.
45.17: Halaqay oothiya oosoy, Isra7eele asay bonchiya ba7aaletan, ageena xeeron Sambaatata gallasan, xuussa yarsho, katha yarshonne ushsha yarsho shiisho. Isra7eele asaa nagara atotethas nagara yarsho, katha yarsho, xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho koshshiyaba immo.
45.18: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Koyro ageenan, koyro gallasan borey bayna issi wofaano Xoossa keethaa geeshshanaw shiisha.
45.19: Kahiney nagaraa yarsho suuthaafe ekidi, Xoossaa keetha penge xangeta, yarsho bessa yuushon de7iya dethan de7iya oyddu maazanetanne giddo dabaaba efiya dirsa penge xangeta tiyo.
45.20: Oonika qoponna woyko eronna oothida nagara atotethas, he ageenan laapuntho gallas hessada ootha. Yaatada Xoossa keetha geeshsha.
45.21: “Koyro ageenan, tammanne oyddantho gallas Paasika Ba7aale bonchite; laapun gallas gakanaw, irshoy bayna uythi miite.
45.22: Koyro gallas halaqay ba gishonne ba asaa gisho nagara yarsho oothidi issi kormaa shiisho.
45.23: He ba7aaley bonchetiya laapun gallasatan gallas gallas borey bayna laapun kormatanne laapun maraze dorsi xuussa yarsho oothidi, Godaas shiisho. Hessara gathidi nagara yarshos gallas gallas issi deesha kole shiisho.
45.24: Issi issi kormanne maraze yarshiya wode, katha yarshos tammane laapun kilo giraame gistenne heedzu litiro zayte shiisho.
45.25: “Laapuntho ageenan, tammanne ichashantho gallasan doomiya laapun gallasa ba7aale wode nagara yarsho, xuussa yarsho, katha yarshonne zayte kaseysafe dummayonna halaqay shiisho” yaagees.

46.1: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Giddo dabaaba gelsiya doloha bagga dirsa pengey usupun ooso gallasatan gordetidi gam7o; shin Sambaata gallasinne ageena xeero gallasan dooyeto.
46.2: Isra7eele halaqay dirsa pengiya baggara kare dabaabape gaathi gelidi, dirsa pengiya matan eqo. Kahineti I immida xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho shiisho. I yan dirsa pengiya matan goyinnidi simmidi kare keyo. Shin dirsa pengey omarsi gakanaw gordetenna.
46.3: He biitta asay Sambaataninne ageena xeero wode he gido dabaaba pengiya sinthan Godaa goyinno.
46.4: Halaqay Sambaata gallas Godaas xuussa yarsho oothidi, borey bayna usupun urge dorsatanne issi maraze dorsi shiisho.
46.5: Issi dorsa urgiyara tammane laapun kilo giraame katha yarsho immo. Urge dorsatar shiiqiya katha yarshoy halaqay baw shiishanaw koyeysa mela gido. Qassi issi issi tammane laapun kilo giraame kathara heedzu heedzu litiro zaytey immo.
46.6: Ageena xeero gallas borey bayna issi wofaano, usupun urge dorsatanne issi maraze shiisho.
46.7: Issi issi wofaanonne urge dorsi yarshiya wode katha yarshos issi issi tammanne laapun kilo giraame gistenne heedzu heedzu litiro zayte shiisho. Urge dorsatara shiiqiya katha yarshoy halaqay baw shiishanaw koydaysa mela gido.
46.8: Halaqay gelishe, dirsa penge barandaara aadhidi gelo; keyisheka yaara keyo.
46.9: “Asay ba7aale gallas Godaa goyinnanaw yaa wode goyinnanaw pudeha pengiyara gelidaysati garsa pengiyara keyo; dugeha pengera gelidaysati pudeha pengera keyo. Oonika ba sinthan de7iya pengiyara sitti gidi keyope attishin, ba gelida pengiyara keyopo.
46.10: Enti geliya wode, halaqay entara gelo; enti keyiya wode entara keyo.
46.11: “Ufaysa gallasataninne laytha ba7aaletan issi issi kormaranne issi issi maraziyara shiiqiya katha yarshoy issi issi tammane laapun kilo giraame gistera heedzu heedzu litiro zaytera gido. Qassi urge dorsaara shiiqiya yarshoy halaqay baw shiishanaw koydaysa mela gido.
46.12: Halaqay ba dosan immiya yarsho, hessika xuussa yarsho woyko issifetetha yarsho Godaas ehiya wode, doloha bagga dirsa pengey iyaw dooyeto. Ba xuussa yarshuwa woyko issifetetha yarshuwa Sambaata gallas I shiisheysada shiisho. I keyidi bin, dirsa pengey gordeto. Gallasa Yarsho
46.13: “Halaqay gallas gallas borey bayna issi laythi gidida issi dorse xuussa yarsho oothidi, Godaas shiisho; I hessa wonta guura pacey bayna ootho.
46.14: Hessadaka nam7u kilo giraame dhiilley issi litiro zaytera munuqetidi, wonta guura katha yarsho gididi shiiqo. Hessi hinte Godaas gallas gallas shiishiya yarsho wogaa.
46.15: Haysi urge dorsay, kathinne zaytey paci bayna wonta wonta xuussa yarsho gididi shiiqanaw bessees” yaagees.
46.16: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Halaqay ba gadiyape shaakidi, ba adde naytape issuwas immiko, hessi he na7aasinne iya naytas laata gidees.
46.17: Shin halaqay ba gadiyape shaakidi, ba aylletape issuwas immiko, Ishatamantho Laytha ba7aaley gakanaw, he gadey iyabaa gidees. Hessafe guye, halaqaas simmo; hessi halaqaasa gidiya gisho, merinaw iyawunne iya naytas laata gidees.
46.18: Halaqay ase naaqidi, asaa laata gadiya wolqan ekofo. Ta asay ba laata gadiyape shodetonna mela I ba adde naytas ba gadiyape immo” yaagees. Yarsho Giigisiya Bessata
46.19: Hessafe guye, he uray tana qommo baggan de7iya kahineta kifileta geliya pengiyako ehis. Hessati giddo dabaaba gathiya garsa bagga dirsa pengiya matan de7eyisata. Kifiletape wuloha baggara taani issi bessi be7as.
46.20: I taako, “Ha bessay kahineti nagara yarshonne naaqo yarsho ashuwa doysiya bessinne katha yarsho uukiya bessi. He bessan go7etiya gaasoy asaa qohoy gakonna mela geeshsha yarshuwafe kare dabaaba keyenna” yaagis.
46.21: Hessafe guye, he uray tana kare bagga dabaaba efidi, dabaaba oyddu maazaneta yuushshidi bessis. Issi issi maazaniyan guutha dabaabi de7ees.
46.22: Oyddu maazanetan de7iya dabaabati issi gina; enti oytamu wadha adusse; hastamu wadha orde.
46.23: He oyddu dabaabata yuushon shucha gimbey de7ees; gimbiya garsan tama eethiya bessi de7ees.
46.24: He uray taako, “Haysi ubbay Xoossaa keethan ootheysati asay ehiya yarshuwa doysiya bessata” yaagis.

47.1: He uray zaaridi, tana Xoossa keetha geliya pengiyako efis. Xoossa keetha geliya pengiyafe garsara haathi pultidi, Xoossa keethaafe doloha bagga goggees. Xoossa keethas garsa baggara duge goggidi, yarsho bessaafe garsa baggara kanthees.
47.2: I tana qommo pengiya baggara kessidi, doloha pengiyako yuushshis. He pengiyafe garsa baggara haathi goggees.
47.3: He uray wadha wodoro ba kushen oykidi, doloha bagga bidi, goggiya haatha kaallidi, issi mukulu wadhis. Tana haatha giddora kaalethis; haathay taw shuqule gakis.
47.4: Zaaridi issi mukulu wadhidi, haatha giddora tana kaalethis. Haathay taw gulbata gakis. Qassi issi mukulu wadhidi, tana haatha giddora kaalethis. He wode haathay taw xeesse gakis.
47.5: I qassi issi mukulu wadhis. Shin he haathay daro ciimmo gidiya gisho, ta pinnanaw danda7abike; I asi wadhonna pinnanaw danda7onna shaafa gidis.
47.6: He uray taako, “Asa na7aw, haysa akeekada be7a?” yaagis. Hessafe guye, I tana shaafa gaxa guye zaaris.
47.7: Ta yaa gakiya wode shaafa gaxan ha baggaranne ya baggara daro mithi de7eysa be7as.
47.8: I taako, “Ha haathay doloha bagga goggidi, Arabe zangaaranne Maxine Abban gelees. Haathay Maxine Abbaa geliya wode Maxine Abbay ooraxidi xillo haathi gidees.
47.9: Shaafay goggidi biya bessan dumma dumma medhetethati de7oosona. He shaafay yaara goggiya gishonne he haatha oorathidi xillisiya gisho daro moloti yan de7oosona. Hessa gisho haathay goggiya bessan de7iya medhetethati ubbay de7on daana.
47.10: Molo oykiya asati abba gaxan eqana; Engaadape bidi En Eglayma gakanaw de7iya bessay molo oykanaw gite yeggiya besse gidana. Medetiraane Abban de7iya molotada, yan daro dumma dumma moloti daana.
47.11: Shin abba gaxan de7iya eelleynne cafa haathay maxine gididi attanaape attishin, ooraxidi xillenna.
47.12: He shaafa doonan ha baggaranne ya baggara meetetiya ayfe immiya, dumma dumma qommo mithati de7oosona. Enta haythay qoqofetenna; ayfe aggokona. Xoossa keethaafe keyiya haathay entako goggiya gisho, enti ageenan ageenan ooratha ayfe ayfana. Enti ayfiya ayfey kathi gidana; enta haythay dhale gidana” yaagees. Biitta Zawata
47.13: Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zerethaas laata biitta oothada, ne shaakana zaway haysa. Yoosefa kochaas nam7u saami imeto.
47.14: Taani kase hinte mayzata ha biitta laatisanaw caaqas; ha77i hinte ubbay shaakidi laattite.
47.15: “Pudeha bagga biitta zaway haysa: Medetiraane Abbaafe dendidi, Hetloonanne Hamaata kanthidi, Xedaada gakees.
47.16: Damasqofenne Hamaatape giddon de7iya Berootanne Sibrayma katamata kanthidi, Hawurana zawan de7iya Tikoona katamaa gakees.
47.17: Isra7eele biitta pudeha bagga zaway Hamaata biitta pudeha baggan aggidi, Medetiraane Abbaafe doloha bagga bidi, Damasqo zawan de7iya Haxar-Enaana katamaa gakees.
47.18: “Doloha bagga zaway Haxar-Enaanape dendidi, Damasqofenne Hawuranape gidduwara kanthees. Isra7eelepenne Galadape giddon de7iya Yordaanose shaafan zawatidi Maxine Abbaa kanthidi Tamaare katamaa gakees.
47.19: “Dugeha bagga zaway Tamaarape dendidi, Mariba Qaadesan de7iya haatha gakees. Yaape Gibxe shaafape bidi Medetiraane Abbaa gakees. Hessi dugeha zawa.
47.20: “Wuloha bagga zaway Medetiraane Abbaa gididi, pudeha baggara Hamaata sinthara kanthidi wuloha bagga gakees.
47.22: Hintenne hinte giddon na7a yelidi de7iya bete asaas laata biitta oothidi shaakite. Enta hinte, hinte biittan yeletida Isra7eele asada xeellite. Enti Isra7eele kochatara taybetidi biitta saaman shaaketidi eko.
47.23: Bete asi Isra7eelen kochaara awunka de7iko, he I de7iya kochaa giddon iyaw laata biitta immite” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

48.1: “Biittaa shaakanaw mazgabetida kochata sunthay haysa: Pudeha baggara issi saami Daane kochaas imeto. Hessika Hetloonape Hamaata efiya ogiya kaallidi, yaape Damasqo biittan de7iya Haxar-Enaana katamaa gakees. Hessi dolohape bidi wuloha gakanaw de7iya bessaas pudeha bagga zawa gidana.
48.2: Daane zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Aseera kochaas imeto.
48.3: Aseera zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Niftaaleme kochaas imeto.
48.4: Niftaaleme zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Minaase kochaas imeto.
48.5: Minaase zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Efreema kochaas imeto.
48.6: Efreema zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Robeela kochaas imeto.
48.7: Robeela zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Yihuda kochaas imeto. Biitta Gina Gishethan De7iya Bessa
48.8: “Yihuda zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saama dummaya wotha. Iya gompay tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga gido. Dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya adussatethay issi kochaa shaakin gakiya saamara gina. Iyaw giddo ginan Xoossa keetha de7ees.
48.9: “He bessaafe neeni Godaas dummayada wothiya bessay tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga adussenne tammu kilo mitire dalga gido.
48.10: He bessaafe baggay kahinetas dummatida besse gido; I pudeha baggara tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga adusse; wuloha baggaranne doloha baggara ichashu kilo mitire dalga gido. Xoossa keethay iyaw giddo ginan de7ees.
48.11: Ha dummatida bessay Isra7eele asay ta ogiyape kare kare keyida wode entara kare keyida Leewetada giddona, ammanetidi taw oothishe gam7ida, geeshsha kahinetas, Saadoqa yaratas imeto.
48.12: Hessi Godaas dummatida biittafe entaw dumma gisho; I Ubbaafe geeshsha Bessi. Enta zaway Leewetas saaman imeto.
48.13: “Kahineta zawara oyketidi, Leewetas adussatethay tammanne nam7u kilo mitire bagga, dalgatethay ichashu kilo mitire gidida issi saami imeto.
48.14: Enti he biittafe bayzanaw woyko laammanaw koshshenna. He biittay lo77o biitta gidiya gisho, hara asa kushen gelanaw bessenna; Godaas I geeshsha besse.
48.15: “Attida nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga dalganne tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga adussa bessay katamaa asa ubbay keethaasinne mehe heemmiya besse gido; katamay he biitta giddo ginan de7o.
48.16: He katamay oyddu maazanera de7ees. Pudeha baggay oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha; dugeha baggay oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha; doloha baggay oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha; wuloha baggay oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha.
48.17: Katamaas hentha gadey de7o; he gadey pudeha baggara, dugeha baggara, doloha baggaranne wuloha baggara nam7u xeetanne ishatamu wadha dalga gido.
48.18: Xoossa keethay keexetidi simmin, geeshsha bessan attida bessay doloha baggara adussatethay ichashu kilo mitire; wuloha baggara adussatethay ichashu kilo mitire gido. Attida biittay he kataman de7iya asaas goshsha biitta gidana.
48.19: He kataman de7iya Isra7eele zare gidida oonika he biitta goyanaw danda7ees.
48.20: Hinte dummaya bessaa oyddu maazaney tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga aduqo. He bessay katamay keexetida bessaanne geeshsha bessaa gujees.
48.21: “Geeshsha bessaafenne katamaa bessaafe attida biittay halaqaa gisho gido. Hessika tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga gidida geeshsha bessaafe bidi doloha bagga zawa gakees. Wuloha baggan de7iya tammanne nam7u kilo mitire gidida katamaa biittay wuloha baggaa zawa gakees. Hessada hanidi geeshsha bessaynne Xoossay keethay giddon gidana.
48.22: Hessa gisho, Leeweta biittaynne katamaa biittay halaqaas imetida biittafe giddon gidana. He halaqaa biittay pudeha baggara Yihuda laatan, garsa baggara Biniyaame laatan zawatees. Attida Kochatas Imetida Biitta
48.23: “Attida kochatas biittay haysada hanidi shaaketis. Dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Biniyaame kochaas imeto.
48.24: Biniyaame zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Simoona kochaas imeto.
48.25: Simoona zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Yisakoora kochaas imeto.
48.26: Yisakoora zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Zabloona kochaas imeto.
48.27: Zabloona zawara oyketidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Gaade kochaas imeto.
48.28: Gaade dugeha zaway Tamaara katamaape dendidi, Mariba Qaadesan de7iya pultouwa gakidi, Gibxe shaafa kaallidi, Medetiraane Abbaa gakees.
48.29: “Hinte Isra7eele asaas shaakana biittay haysa; hessi enta gishuwa” yaagidi Ubbaa Haariya Goday odis. Katama Pengeta
48.30: Katamaape keyiya pengeti haysata. Pudeha baggara de7iya oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu aduqiya pengiyafe doomidi,
48.31: katamaa pengeti Isra7eele kochata sunthan xeegetana. Pudeha baggara de7iya heedzu pengeti Robeela penge, Yihuda pengenne Leewe penge gidana.
48.32: Doloha baggara oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha aduqiya heedzu pengeti, Yoosefa penge, Biniyaame pengenne Daane penge gidana.
48.33: Dugeha baggara oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu aduqiya heedzu pengeti, Simoona penge, Yisakoora pengenne Zabloona penge gidana.
48.34: Wuloha baggara oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha aduqiya heedzu pengeti, Gaade penge, Aseera pengenne Niftaaleme penge gidana.
48.35: “Katamaa yuushoy kumethi wadhin, tammanne hospun mukulu wadha gidana. He wodepe doomidi he katamay, ‘Goday Yan De7ees’ geetetidi xeegetana” yaagees.

1.1: Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi kawotida heedzantho laythan Babiloone Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaame katama bolla dendi katamaa teqis.
1.2: Goday Yihuda kawa Iyo7akemenne Xoossa keethan de7iya miishetape baggaa, iya kushen aathidi immis. I he miisheta Sana7oora biittan de7iya ba eeqa xoossata keethi efidi, miishe minjiya keethan wothis.
1.3: Kawoy, Asfanaaza geetetiya ba oosanchota halaqaa haysada yaagidi kiittis: “Isra7eele asaa giddofe kawo koche gididaysatanne gita asata koche gididaysata doora.
1.4: Dooretana na7atethati, borey baynayisata, mala lo77ota, timirte ellesidi ekanaw danda7eyisata, akeekanchota, eratethi kumidaysatanne kawo gadhon oothanaw danda7eyisata gidanaw bessees. Enta Babiloone doonanne xaafo tamaarsa” yaagis.
1.5: Enti maana kathaanne uyana woyne ushsha kawa kathaafenne ushshafe gallas gallas immana mela kawoy kiittis. Heedzu laythi loohidaape guye kawa sinthe shiiqidi ooso doomana mela qofa kuuyis.
1.6: Dooretidaysata giddofe Yihuda koche gidida Daanela, Anaana, Misa7eelanne Azaara geeteteysati de7oosona.
1.7: Kawa oosanchota halaqay enta suntha laammidi, Daanela Bilxasoora, Anaana Sidiraaqa, Misa7eela Misaaqa, Azaara Abdanaago gidi sunthis.
1.8: Daaneli kawa kathaa midinne woyne ushsha uyidi, bana tunisonna mela ba wozanan qofa qachidi, he qofaa ekanaada, kawa oosanchota halaqaa woossis.
1.9: Xoossay, oosanchota halaqaa sinthan Daanelas sabanne qadhe immis.
1.10: Gidoshin, oosanchota halaqay Daanelako, “Hintew ha kathaanne ushsha kiitida ta godaa, kawa yayyayis. Hinte lagge gidida na7atethata som7uwafe hinte som7oy gilqidi bentiko, hinte gaason kawoy tana wodhana” yaagis.
1.11: Oosanchota halaqay shuumin Daanela, Anaana, Misa7eelanne Azaara naagiya addiyako, Daaneli haysada yaagis:
1.12: “Maanaw nuus atakilte, uyanaw haatha xalaala immada, nuna ne aylleta tammu gallas paaca.
1.13: Yaatada, nu som7uwanne kawo kathaa miya na7atethata som7uwa xeellada, nuna ne aylleta new bentidaysada ootha” yaagis.
1.14: I, hessa ekidi tammu gallas enta paacis.
1.15: Tammu gallasape guye, kawa kathaa mida na7atethata ubbaafe enta som7oy ciiyin, modhidi bentidosona.
1.16: I, entaw giigida kathaanne woyne ushsha diggidi atakilte immis.
1.17: Ha oyddu na7atethatas Xoossay eranne ubba qommo xuufenne timirte ekiya akeeka immis. Daaneli qoncethinne amuho birshethi erees.
1.18: Kawoy, na7atethati baako gelanaada kiitida wodey gakin, oosanchota halaqay enta Nabukadanaxoora sinthe ehis.
1.19: Kawoy, enta odisiya wode Daanela, Anaana, Misa7eelanne Azaara mela asi enta giddon bentibeenna. Yaatin, enti kawas oothanaw gelidosona.
1.20: Kawoy enta oychida ay cincatethaanne akeeka oyshan, iya kawotethan de7iya marotapenne bitanchotape enti tammu kushe aadhidi bentidosona.
1.21: Daaneli, kawoy Qiroosi kawotida koyro laytha gakanaw gam7is.

2.1: Nabukadanaxoori kawotida nam7antho laythan amuho amuhis. He amuhoy iya daganthin, dhiskoy iya ekonna ixis.
2.2: Hessa gisho, I amuhida amuhuwa iyaw odana mela maroti, bitanchoti, murunneysatinne xoolinto taybeysati yaana mela kawoy kiittis. Enti yidi iya sinthan eqidosona.
2.3: Kawoy entako, “Tana daganthiya amuho amuhas; he amuhoy aybeko eranaw koyayis” yaagis.
2.4: Xoolinto taybeysati Soore doonan, “Kawaw, merinaw kawota! Ne amuhuwa nuus ne aylletas oda; nu new iya birshethaa odana” yaagidosona.
2.5: Kawoy entako, “Hinte ha amuhuwanne iya birshethaa tana erisonna ixiko, ta hintena qanxana; hinte keethay buure yeggiya bessi gidanaysa ta hintew minthada odayis.
2.6: Shin hinte amuhuwanne iya birshethaa taw odiko, imota, woytonne daro boncho taape demmana. Hessa gisho, ane amuhuwanne iya birshethaa tana erisite” yaagis.
2.7: Enti zaaridi, “Kawoy amuhuwa nuus ba aylletas odo; nu iya birshethaa erisana” yaagidosona.
2.8: Kawoy zaaridi, “Ta mino qofa hinte eriya gisho wode adussanaw hinte koyeysa ta erayis.
2.9: Hinte amuhuwa taw odonna ixiko, issi pirdi hintena naagees. Hanotay laametana gidi hinte ufaysi oothiya gisho taw wordonne gene qaala odanaw maqetideta. Hessa gisho, amuhuwa taw odite. Yaatiko, hinte iya birshethaa erisanaw danda7eysa ta erana” yaagis.
2.10: Xoolinto taybeysati zaaridi, “Kawoy oychiya oysha zaaranaw danda7iya issi asika biittan baawa. Ay gitanne wolqaama kawoy marota, bitanchotanne xoolinto taybeyisata hessa melaba oychidi erenna.
2.11: Kawoy oychida oyshoy deexo; asa giddon doonna xoossatape attishin, hessa kawas qoncisanaw danda7ey baawa” yaagidosona.
2.12: Kawoy daro yilotidi, Babiloonen de7iya cincata ubbaa wodhanaada kiittis.
2.13: Cincata wodhanaw awaajoy keyis; Daanelanne iya laggeta wodhanaw asi kiitetis.
2.14: Kawa naageysata halaqay Ariyooki, Babiloonen de7iya cincata wodhanaw keyiya wode Daaneli iya cincatethaninne hiillan odisis.
2.15: I kawa naageysata halaqaa Ariyooka, “Kawoy haysa mela iita awaajo ayis kessidee?” gidi oychis. Ariyooki hanota Daanelas odis.
2.16: Daaneli kawako gelidi, amuhuwa birshethaa erisanaw baw wodey imetana mela woossis.
2.17: Hessafe guye Daaneli ba soo simmidi, ba heedzu laggetas, Anaaniyas, Misa7eelasinne Azaariyasi hanota odis.
2.18: Enti Babiloonen de7iya hanko cincatara issife hayqonnaada, salo Xoossay maarota oothidi, ha xuura entaw qoncisanaada woossana mela entaw odis.
2.19: He qamma xuuray Daanelas qoncis. Daaneli salo Xoossaa haysada yaagidi galatis;
2.20: “Cincatethinne wolqi Xoossasa gidiya gisho, iya sunthay merinaape merinaa gakanaw galatetto.
2.21: I wodetanne ageenata laammees; kawota araatan utisees; araatape diggees. Cincatas cincatethi immees; akeekanchotas era immees.
2.22: I xuuraanne geemmidaba qoncisees; I dhuman de7iyaba erees; poo7oy iyara de7ees.
2.23: Ta mayzata Xoossaw, ta nena galatayis; sabbayis. Ne taw cincatethinne wolqa immadasa; nuuni nena oychidaba tana erisadasa; kawa amuhuwa nuna erisadasa” yaagis. Daaneli Amuho Birshis
2.24: Hessafe guye, Daaneli Babiloonen de7iya cincata wodhisanaw kawuwape kiita ekida, Ariyookako bidi, “Cincata wodhopa; tana kawako gelsa; taani iya amuhuwa birshethaa iya erisana” yaagis.
2.25: Ariyooki ellesidi Daanela kawako gelsidi, kawako, “Yihudape di7etidi yida asaape kawa amuhuwa birshethaa erisanaw danda7iya ase demmas” yaagis.
2.26: Kawoy Bilxasoora geetetiya Daanela, “Ta amuhida amuhuwanne iya birshethaa tana erisanaw danda7ay?” gidi oychis.
2.27: Daaneli haysada yaagidi zaaris: “Kawaw, ne oychida xuuraa qoncisanaw danda7iya cinca asi, maroy, bitanchoynne, murunniya asi baawa.
2.28: Shin xuura qoncisiya issi Xoossi salon de7ees. Wursetha wodetan hananaba I, nena bessis. Ne arsan zin7ada, ne be7ida amuhoynne qoncethay haysa.
2.29: “Kawaw, ne arsan zin7ada, sinthafe yaanaba qopadasa. He wode xuura qoncisiya Xoossay sinthafe hananaba nena bessis.
2.30: Ha xuuray taw qonciday, ta hara asape cinca gidida gisho gidenna. Shin neeni kawoy, amuhuwa birshethaa eranaadanne ne huuphen simeretiya qofa akeekana melasa.
2.31: “Kawaw, ne daro gita, phooliyanne xeellanaw yashshiya misiley ne sinthan eqidaysa be7adasa.
2.32: He misiliya huuphey, walahi bayna worqafe, iya tiraynne kusheti birape, uloynne wodireti naase biratape,
2.33: suyley biratapenne toho yacha baggay biratape baggay biittafe medhetis.
2.34: Neeni misiliya xeelliya wode, issi shuchi asa kushey bochonna dhoqolletidi, biratapenne biittafe medhetida misiliya toho yacha bolla wodhidi gaaccis.
2.35: He wode birati, urqi, naase biratay, birinne worqey ubbay gaacetidi, bonen wudumman de7iya suulaa mela gidin, aykoyka attonnashin carkoy pitidi efis. Shin misiliya bolla wodhida shuchay zuma gididi sa7aa kumis.
2.36: “Amuhoy haysa; ha77i birshethaa nuuni new odana.
2.37: Kawaw, neeni kawota kawo. Salo Xoossay new kawotethinne wolqa, minotethinne boncho immis.
2.38: Neeni biitta ubbaa haaranaada oothis; ase, do7anne salo kafo ne kushen wothis. Hessa gisho, worqa huuphey nena.
2.39: “Neepe guye, minotethan nena gakonna hara kawotethi dendana. Kaallidi, biitta ubbaa haariya, naase birata gidiya, heedzantho kawotethi dendana.
2.40: Wursethan ubbaa gaaccidi liiqisiya biratada minnida oyddantho kawotethi dendana. Birati ubbaa gaaccidi liiqiseysada I, baape kase dendida kawotethata gaaccidi liiqisana.
2.41: “Tohotinne toho biradheti baggay biratape, baggay biittafe medhetidaysa ne be7idaysada, he kawotethay shaaketida kawotethi gidana. Birati biittara walaketin, neeni be7idaysada baggay biratada mino gidana.
2.42: Toho biradheti baggay birata, baggay biitta gididaysada, ha kawotethaas baggay mino, baggay shugo gidana.
2.43: Birati biittara walaketin neeni be7idaysada he nam7u bagga asay geloninne ekon walaketana. Shin birati biittara walaketanaw danda7onaysada enti issino gididi gam7anaw danda7okona.
2.44: “He kawota laythan, salo Xoossay kundonna, hara asas aadhidi imetonna kawotethaa essana. He eqida kawotethay, he kawotethata ubbaa gaaccidi dhaysana; shin I merinaw eqidi daana.
2.45: Asa kushey bochonna zumaape dhoqolletidi, wodhidi, biratape, naase biratape, biittafe, birapenne biittafe medhetida misiliya gaaccida shuchaa birshethay he kawotethaa. “Gita Xoossay sinthafe hananaba kawa bessis. Amuhoy tuma; birshethayka ammanetidaysa” yaagidi zaaris.
2.46: Hessafe guye, kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Daanela bonchidi, gufannis; asay iya sinthan yarsho yarshana melanne ixaane cuyisana mela kiittis.
2.47: Kawoy Daanela, “Tuma ne Xoossay xoossata Xoosse, kawota Godanne xuura qoncisiya Xoosse. Neeni ha xuuraa qoncisanaw danda7iday hessa gishosa” yaagis.
2.48: Hessafe guye, kawoy Daanela aathidi bonchis; daronne al7o imotata iyaw immis. Babiloone biitta haariya ase oothis; Babiloonen de7iya cincata ubbaa bolla halaqa oothidi shuumis.
2.49: Daaneli oyshan, kawoy Sidiraaqa, Misaaqanne Abdanaago Babiloone biitta ayseysata oothidi shuumis; shin Daaneli kawo keethan gam7is.

3.1: Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori adussatethay usupun tammu wadha, gompay usupun wadha gidiya misile worqafe medhidi, Babiloone biittan Duura Demban essis.
3.2: He misiliya anjisanaw yaana mela, kawo moorinnata, shuumata, biitta ayseysata, kawa zoreyisata, miishe keethan ootheyisata, pirda daynnata, higge eranchotanne awuraja shuumata xeegis.
3.3: He wode kawo moorinnati, shuumati, biitta ayseysati, kawa zoreysati, miishe keethan ootheysati, pirda daynnati, higge eranchotinne awuraja shuumati shiiqidi, kawoy Nabukadanaxoori essida misiliya sinthan eqidosona.
3.4: He wode awaajiya addey ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, haysada yaagis: “Hinteno, asaw, kawotethato, dumma dumma doona odeteysato,
3.5: ubbay moyze, suusul7e, maasinqo, diithi, zayenne hara yetha miishe girsi si7iya wode, kawoy Nabukadanaxoori essida worqa misiliyas gufannidi goyinnite.
3.6: Misiliya sinthan gufannidi goyinnona oonika, he saatiyan eexiya itoone taman holetana” yaagis.
3.7: Hessa gisho, asay, kawotethatinne dumma dumma doona odetiya ubbay moyze, suusul7e, maasinqo, diithi, zayenne hara yetha miishe girsi si7ida wode biittan gufannidi, kawoy Nabukadanaxoori essida worqa misiliyas goyinnidosona.
3.8: He wode Babiloone asatape issoti issoti Ayhudeta mootidosona.
3.9: Enti kawa Nabukadanaxoorako haysada yaagidosona; “Kawaw, merinaw kawota.
3.10: Kawaw, ne moyze, suusul7e, maasinqo, diithi, zayenne hara yetha miishe girsi si7iya oonika gufannidi, worqa misiliyas goyinnana mela,
3.11: biittan gufannidi goyinnona asi de7iko, itoone taman holetana mela awaajo kessadasa.
3.12: Shin kawaw, neeni Babiloone biittan shuumida Ayhudeti, Sidiraaqi, Misaaqinne Abdanaagoy ne kiita ixidosona. Ne xoossatas oothokona; qassi ne essida worqa misiliyaka goyinnokona” yaagidosona.
3.13: Nabukadanaxoori hessa si7ida wode, yilo eexidi, Sidiraaqa, Misaaqanne Abdanaago ehana mela kiittis; enta kawa sinthe ehidosona.
3.14: Nabukadanaxoori enta haysada yaagis: “Sidiraaqa, Misaaqa, Abdanaago, hinte ta xoossatas oothiboonaysinne ta essida worqa misiliya goyinniboonaysi tumee?
3.15: Ha77i moyze, suusul7e, maasinqo, diithi, zayenne hara yetha miishe girsi si7iya wode ta essida misiliyas gufannidi goyinniko lo77o. Shin hinte goyinnona ixiko, ellesidi eexiya itoone taman holetana. Ay xoossika hintena ta kushepe ashshena” yaagis.
3.16: Sidiraaqi, Misaaqinne Abdanaagoy zaaridi, “Kawaw, Nabukadanaxoora, haysas nu new zaaro immanaw bessenna.
3.17: Kawaw, nu eexiya itoone taman holetiyakoka, nu iyaw oothiya Xoossay tamape nuna ashshanaw danda7ees. Qassi kawaw, I nuna ne kushepe ashshana.
3.18: Shin kawaw, I nuna ashshona ixikoka, nuuni ne xoossatas oothonaysanne ne essida worqa misiliya goyinnanaysa era” yaagidosona.
3.19: He wode Nabukadanaxoori Sidiraaqa, Misaaqanne Abdanaago bolla yilo eexin, iya som7oy laametis. Tamay kase eexeysafe laapun kushe aadhidi eexana mela kiittis.
3.20: Sidiraaqa, Misaaqanne Abdanaago qachidi, eexiya itoone taman holana mela, ba olanchota giddofe mino asata kiittis.
3.21: Enti banta afilara, suriyara, huuphe xaatharanne hara ma7o ubbaara de7ishin, eexiya itoone taman holidosona.
3.22: Kawa kiitay daro eeso gidida gishonne itoone tamay kasepe aadhidi eexiya gisho, Sidiraaqa, Misaaqanne, Abdanaago taman holida, mino asata tama lacoy wodhis.
3.23: Ha heedzu qashetida asati, Sidiraaqi, Misaaqinne Abdanaagoy, eexiya itoone taman wodhidosona.
3.24: Hessafe guye, kawoy Nabukadanaxoori malaaletidi, eeson dendi eqidi, “Nu qachidi eexiya itoone taman yeggida asati heedza gidokonaayee?” yaagidi bana zoreyisata oychis. Enti, “Kawaw, ee, tuma heedza” yaagidi zaaridosona.
3.25: Kawoy zaaridi, “Qashope birshetidi, tama giddon yaanne haanne hemetiya, tamay aykoka bochonna oyddu asata be7ayis; oyddanthoy xoossata na7a daanees” yaagis.
3.26: Nabukadanaxoori eexiya itoone tama mata shiiqidi, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa oosanchoto, Sidiraaqa, Misaaqa, Abdanaago, keyidi haa yiite!” yaagidi xeegis. Sidiraaqi, Misaaqinne Abdanaagoy tama giddofe keyidosona.
3.27: Kawuwape garsara biitta ayseysati, moorinnati, shuumatinne kawa zoreysati entako shiiqidosona. Tamay enta asatethaa bochiboonaysa, enta huuphe binaanape issoyka xuugetiboonnaysa, enta ma7oyka meetetiboonaysanne tama peenoy enta bolla baynaysa be7idosona.
3.28: Hessafe guye, Nabukadanaxoori haysada yaagis: “Sidiraaqa, Misaaqanne Abdanaago Xoossay galatetto. I, ba kiitanchuwa kiittidi, banan ammanetida, ba aylleta ashshis. Enti kawa kiita ixidi, banta Xoossaafe attishin, hara xoosse goyinnanaape hayqanaw dosidosona.
3.29: Hesaa gisho, hara ay xoossika haysada oothidi ase ashshona gisho, Sidiraaqa, Misaaqanne Abdanaago Xoossaa toochidi odetiya ay asika, woyko ay kawotethika, woyko dumma dumma doonan odetiya ay kochayka qanxetana mela enta keethayka laaletidi, pito doore gidana mela taani kiittas” yaagis.
3.30: Kawoy Sidiraaqa, Misaaqanne Abdanaago Babiloone biittan dhoqu dhoqu oothidi shuumis.

4.1: Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori, Asaas, kawotethatas, dumma dumma doonan odetiya kochatas haysada yaagidi dabdaabe xaafis: Saroy hintew gido,
4.2: Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay taw oothida, malaalsibaanne oorathaba ta hintew odanaw koyayis.
4.3: Iya malaatay ayba gite! I oothiya oorathabay ayba mino! Iya kawotethay merina kawotethi; I yeletaape yeletaa gakanaw haarees.
4.4: Taani, Nabukadanaxoori ta keethan injetin, ta kawo gadhon miikotin de7ayis.
4.5: Issi gallas taani yashshiya amuho be7as. Taani ta arsan zin7ada, be7ida amuhoynne qoncethay tana daganthis.
4.6: Hessa gisho, amuhuwa birshethaa tana erisana mela Babiloonen de7iya cincata ubbaa taako ehana mela kiittas.
4.7: He wode maroti, muranchoti, xoolinto taybeysatinne bitanchoti taako yin, ta amuhuwa entaw odas; shin enti birshethaa tana erisanaw danda7ibookona.
4.8: Wursethan ta xoossaa sunthan Bilxasoora geetetidi xeegetiya, geeshsha xoossata ayyaani iyan de7iya, Daaneli taako gelin, iyaw ta amuhuwa odas.
4.9: Cincata halaqa gidida Bilxasoora, geeshsha xoossata ayyaani nenan de7eysanne ayba xuurika neepe geemmonaysa taani erayis. Taani be7ida amuhoy haysa; ane taw iya birshetha oda.
4.10: Taani ta arsan zin7ada, biittas gidi zawan issi gita mithi eqidaysa qoncethan be7as.
4.11: He mithay diccidi gitatisinne minnis. Iya xeeray salo gakees; sa7aa gaxape gaxa gakanaw bentees.
4.12: He mithaa haythay xeellanaw lo77ees; iya ayfeyka daro; iya bolla ubbaas meetetiyabay de7ees. Sa7a do7ati iya kuyan shempoosona; salo kafoti iya tashiya bolla keexidi de7oosona. De7ora de7iya ubbay iyape mees.
4.13: “Taani ta arsan zin7ada, geeshsha kiitanchoy salope wodhishin qoncethan be7as.
4.14: Ika ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, haysada yaagis: ‘Ha mithaa qanxite; iya tashiya karite; iya haytha duuthite; iya ayfiya laallite. Iya garsan de7iya do7atinne iya tashiyan uttiya kafoti ubbay baqato.
4.15: Shin durumaanne iya xaphuwa birataninne naase birata santhalaatan qachidi, biittan, maata giddon aggaagite. Salo akan laako; bazzon maata giddon do7ara de7o.
4.16: Iya kahay asape do7aysan laameto; hessada hanidi laapun laythi de7o.
4.17: Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay asa nayta kawotetha ubbaa haareysa, kawotethi koyiya asas immeysanne hari attoshin boretidaysa shuumeysa de7on de7iya asi ubbay erana mela, hessa kiitanchoti awaajidosona; geeshshati pirdaa ehidosona’ ” yaagis.
4.18: “Taani, Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori be7ida amuhoy haysa: Ha77i, Bilxasoora, taw iya birshethaa oda. Ta kawotethan de7iya cincatape issoyka tana birshetha erisanaw danda7ibeenna. Shin geeshsha xoossata ayyaani nenan de7iya gisho, neeni danda7aasa” yaagas. Daaneli Amuho Birshethaa
4.19: He wode Bilxasoora geetetiya Daaneli dagammidi, haniyaba dhayis. I dagammida gisho guutha wode si77i gidi gam7is. Yaatin, kawoy, “Bilxasoora, ha amuhoynne iya birshethay nena daganthofo” yaagis. Bilxasoori zaaridi, “Ta godaw, ha amuhoy nena ixeysatas, iya birshethay ne morketas gido.
4.20: Ne amuhon be7ida mithay, diccidi minniday, daayidi salo gakiday, sa7a gaxape gaxa gakanaw bentiday,
4.21: haythay xeellanaw lo77ey, ayfey dariday, iya bolla ubbaas miyabay de7ey, do7ati iya kuyan shempidaynne salo kafoti iya tashiyan keexidi de7ey,
4.22: kawaw, he mithay nena. Neeni gitatadasa; minnadasa; ne gitatethay diccidi, salo gakis; ne maatay sa7aa gaxape gaxa gakis.”
4.23: “Kawaw, geeshsha kiitanchoy salope wodhidi, ‘Ha mithaa qanxidi dhaysite; shin iya durumaanne iya xaphuwa birataninne naase birata santhalaatan qachidi, biittan, maata giddon aggaagite. I salo akan laako; laapun laythi gakanaw woran do7ada de7o’ ” giya wode be7adasa.
4.24: “Kawaw, birshethay haysa: haysi Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay ta godaa, kawa bolla polanaw kiitida pirda.
4.25: Neeni asa giddofe goodetada do7atara issife daana. Neeni boorada maata maananne salo akan laakana. Qassi Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay, asa nayta kawotetha ubbaa haareysanne kawotethi ba koyida asas immeysa ne erana gakanaw, laapun laythi ne bollara aadhana.
4.26: Durumay xaphora biittan attanaada kiitetidaysi, salo Xoossay biitta ubbaa haareysa neeni eriya wode, ne kawotethay new simmanaysa bessees.
4.27: Kawaw, ta zoriya eka. Nagara ooso aggada suureba ootha; un7etidaysata naaqo aggada entaw qadheta. Ooni eri neeni saro daana wodey aduqonna aggenna” yaagis. Amuhoy Poletis
4.28: Ha ubbay kawa Nabukadanaxoora bolla gakis.
4.29: Tammanne nam7u ageenape guye, kawoy Babiloonen de7iya kawo gadho bolla de7iya bessan simeretees.
4.30: Kawoy, “Taani, ta gita wolqan, ta gita bonchuwas kawoy daana mela ta keexida wolqaama Babiloone katamay haysa gidennee?” yaagis.
4.31: I, ba odaa wursonna de7ishin, salope haysada giya qaali yidi, “Kawa Nabukadanaxoora, ne bolla pirdetida pirday haysa: ne kawotethay neepe eketis.
4.32: Neeni asa giddofe goodetada, bazzo do7atara daana; ne boorada maata maana. Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay asa nayta kawotetha ubbaa haareysanne I ba koyaida asas kawotethi immeysa neeni erana gakanaw laapun laythi ne bollara aadhana” yaagis.
4.33: Nabukadanaxoora bolla geetetidabay ellesidi poletis. Asa giddofe goodetidi, boorada maata mis. Iya asatethay salo akan laakis. Iya binaanay anko baalleda, iya xugunthayka kafo xugunthada diccis.
