15.32: Yesuusi ba tamaareta baako xeegidi, “Ha daro asay taara heedzu gallas gam7ida gishonne entaw ha77i miyabay bayna gisho taani entaw qadhetayis. Enti ogen daaburidi kundonna mela ayko muzonna enta mela yeddanaw koyke” yaagis.
15.33: Iya tamaareti zaaridi, “Nuuni ha bazzuwan haysa keena asaas gidiya kathi awupe demmanee?” yaagidosona.
15.34: Yesuusi entako, “Hintew aapun uythi de7ii?” yaagidi oychis. Enti zaaridi, “Laapun uythinne laafa molotape guuthi de7ees” yaagidosona.
15.35: Yesuusi deriya sa7an uttite yaagidi kiittis.
15.36: Hessafe guye, he laapun uythaanne moluwa ekidi Xoossaa galatis. Menthidi ba tamaaretas immis. Iya tamaareti daro asaas gishidosona.
15.37: Asa ubbay midi kallidosona. Iya tamaareti, mishin attida tiifiya laapun gita gayta kumethi denthidosona.
15.38: Mida asay maccasinne na7a paydonna adde xalaali oyddu mukulu.
15.39: Yesuusi deriya yeddidaape guye wogoluwan gelidi Magedoona biitta bis.

16.1: Farsaawetinne Saduqaaweti Yesuusako yidosona. Iya paacanaw koyidi, bantana salope malaata besso gidi oychidosona.
16.2: Shin I entako, “Sa7i omarsiya wode, ‘Saloy zo77ida gisho wonto booqallana’ yaageeta.
16.3: Wontiya wode, ‘Saloy zo77idi shaaratida gisho iri bukana’ yaageeta. Yaatin hinte salo mallaa be7idi ereeta, shin wodiya malla eranaw danda7ibeeketa.
16.4: Iitanne ammanonna yeletethay malaata koyees. Shin iyaw Yoonasa malaatape hara malaati imetenna” yaagis. Hessafe guye, entana yan aggidi hara soo bis. Farsaawetanne Saduqaaweta Irsho (Mar 8:14-21)
16.5: Enti abbaafe hefinthi pinnida wode daabbo ekidi yaanaysa dogidosona.
16.6: Yesuusi entako, “Farsaawetapenne Saduqaaweta irshuwafe naagetite” yaagis.
16.7: Entika banta garsan, “I hessa giday nu daabbo ekidi yoonna gishosa gidana” yaagidosona.
16.8: Yesuus enta qofaa eridi, “Hinteno, ammanoy pacidaysato! Daabbo ekonna yida gisho woli giddon ayis odeteetii?
16.9: Ha77ika hinte akeeketii? Ichashu mukulu asaas ichashu uythaa gishidaysanne enti midi kallin hinte aapun gayta kumethi denthidaako dogidetii?
16.10: Hessadaka, laapun uythaa oyddu mukulu asaas gishidaysanne enti midi kallin, hinte aapun gita gayta kumethi denthidaako akeekeketii?
16.11: Hiza, taani Farsaawetanne Saduqaaweta irshuwafe naagetite gada odeysi daabboba gidonnaysa akeekeketii?” yaagis.
16.12: Yaatin, iya tamaareti Yesuusi odey munuqa denthanaw yegetiya irshoba gidonashin Farsaawetanne Saduqaaweta timirtiyafe naagetanaysa gideysa akeekidosona. Phexroosa Markatetha (Mar 8:27-30; Luqa 9:18-21)
16.13: Yesuusi Qisaare Filphoosa biitta gakida wode ba tamaaretako, “Asay, Asa Na7aa oona goonna?” yaagidi oychis.
16.14: Entika, “Issoti issoti Xammaqiya Yohaanisa, harati Eeliyaasa qassi hankoti Ermiyaasa woyko nabetape issuwa goosona” yaagidosona.
16.15: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Yaatin, hinte tana oona geetii?” gidi enta oychis.
16.16: Simoona Phexroosi zaaridi, “Neeni Kiristoosa, de7o Xoossaa na7a” yaagis.
16.17: Yesuusi Phexroosako, “Yoona na7aa Simoona, neeni anjetidaysa! Haysa new qoncisiday saluwan de7iya ta aawape attishin, ase gidenna.
16.18: Ta new odayis Phexroosa, neeni zaalla! Taani ha zaalla bolla ta woosa keethaa keexana. Hayqo wolqatika iyo xoonokona.
16.19: Salo kawotethaa qulpeta ta new immana. Sa7an neeni diggiyabay ubbay salon Xoossaa matan digetidaba gidana. Sa7an neeni hano giyabay ubbay salon Xoossaa matan hanidaba gidana” yaagis.
16.20: Hessafe guye, I, Kiristoosa gideysa oodeska odonna mela ba tamaareta minthidi kiittis. Yesuusi Bana Gakana Waaya Odis
16.21: He wodiyape doomidi Yesuusi ba tamaaretas, “Taani Yerusalaame baanaw bessees. Yan deriya cimatan, kahine halaqatanne higge astamaareta kushen waaye ekanaw bessees. Enti tana wodhana, shin taani heedzantho gallas hayqope dendana” yaagidi qoncisis.
16.22: Phexroosi Yesuusa gaxa kessidi, “Godaw, hessi hanenna! Hessa melabay nena ubbaraka gakofo!” yaagidi hanqetis.
16.23: Yesuusi Phexroosako guye simmidi, “Ha Xalahiyaw, taape haaka! Neeni asa qofa qopaasape attishin, Xoossaa qofa qoponna gisho taw dhube gidaasa” yaagis.
16.24: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Oonika tana kaallanaw koyaba gidiko bana kaddo, ba masqaliya tookidi tana kaallo.
16.25: Ba de7uwa ashshanaw koyiya ubbay dhaysees. Shin ba de7uwa ta gisho gidi aathidi immeysi ashshees.
16.26: Asi alame kumethi baw oothidi, gidoshin ba shempuwa dhaysiko iya ay maaddii? Woyko asi ba shempuwa laame ay immanaw danda7ii?
16.27: Asa na7ay ba aawa bonchuwan ba kiitanchotara yaana. He wode issi issi uraas iya oosuwada immana.
16.28: Ta tuma odayis; haysan eqida asatape Asa Na7ay kawo gididi simmeysa be7ana gakanaw hayqonnaysati haysan de7oosona” yaagis.

17.1: Usupun gallasape guye Yesuusi, Phexroosa, Yayqoobanne iya ishaa Yohaanisa baara ekidi bantarka gidanaw zuma bolla keyis.
17.2: Yan enta sinthan Yesuusa malay kumethi laametis; iya som7oyka awada xolqis. Iya ma7oyka daro booxis.
17.3: Heko, Museynne Eeliyaasi iyara odetishin be7idosona.
17.4: Phexroosi Yesuusako, “Nuuni haysa hashshu yida. Ne koyko issino new, issino Muses, issino Eeliyaasas haysan heedzu shaqara shaqarana” yaagis.
17.5: Phexroosi hessa buroo odishin bootha shaaray entana kammis. Shaara giddora, “Tana ufaysiya, ta dosiya na7ay haysa, iya si7ite!” giya qaalay yis.
17.6: Yesuusa tamaareti hessa si7ida wode dagammidi banta som7uwara sa7an kundidosona.
17.7: Shin Yesuusi entako shiiqidi enta bochidi, “Dendite, yayyofite!” yaagis.
17.8: Enti dhoqu gidi be7iya wode Yesuusape hara oonaka be7ibookona.
17.9: Enti zumaa bollafe wodhishin Yesuusi entako, “Asa Na7ay hayqope dendana gakanaw ha hinte be7idaba oodeska odopite” gidi kiittis.
17.10: Yesuusa tamaareti, “Yaatin, higge astamaareti Eeliyaasi Kiristoosape kasetidi yaana giday aybisee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
17.11: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ee! Eeliyaasi kaseti yidi ubbaba giigisana.
17.12: Shin ta hintew tuma odayis; Eeliyaasi kasetidi yis. Entika iya bolla koydaba oothidosonape attishin, iya shaaki eribookona. Hessada Asa Na7ay enta kushen waayetana” yaagis.
17.13: He wode Yesuusi giday Xammaqiya Yohaanisaba gideysa akeekidosona. Tuna Ayyaani Oykida Na7a (Mar 9:14-29; Luqa 9:37-43)
17.14: Enti deriyape asaako simmiya wode issi asi Yesuusa sinthan gulbatidi,
17.15: “Godaw, hayyana ta na7aas qadhetarki; iya shocidi yeggiya hargey daro un7ethidi tamaninne haathan yeggees.
17.16: Ne tamaaretako ehas, shin enti pathanaw danda7ibookona” yaagis.
17.17: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hinteno, ammanonna geella yeletethaw awude gakanaw ta hintera daanee? Awude gakanaw ta hintena danda7anee? Ane na7aa haa eki yiite” yaagis.
17.18: Yesuusi tuna ayyaana hanqin, tuna ayyaanay na7aape keyis; he saatenka na7ay paxis.
17.19: Hessafe guye, Yesuusa tamaareti bantarka iyako shiiqidi, “Nuuni tuna ayyaana kessanaw danda7iboonay aybisee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
17.20: I entako, “Hintew ammanoy laafida gishosa. Ta hintew tuma odayis; gaashe ayfe mela ammanoy hintew de7iko ‘Ha zumaa haysafe dendada gede aadha’ giiko hintew kiitetana. Hintew danda7etonabay deenna.
17.21: [Shin hessa melay woosapenne xoomape attishin, haran keyenna”] yaagis. Yesuusi Ba Hayquwaba Zaaridi Odis (Mar 9:30-32; Luqa 9:43-45)
17.22: Yesuusa tamaareti Galilan shiiqidi de7ishin Yesuusi entako, “Asa Na7i asa kushen aadhidi imetana.
17.23: Enti iya wodhana, shin I heedzantho gallas hayqope dendana” yaagis. Iya tamaaretika daro qiirotidosona. Xoossa Keetha Giira
17.24: Yesuusaranne iya tamaaretara Qifirnahooma katama gakida wode Xoossa Keetha giira qanxiseysati Phexroosako yidi, “Hinte astamaarey Xoossa Keetha giira giirii?” yaagidi oychidosona.
17.25: Phexroosi zaaridi, “Giirees” yaagis. Phexroosi soo geliya wode Yesuusi kasetidi, “Phexroosa, new ay daanii? Ha sa7aa kawotethati qaraxanne giira oope ekona? Gade asapeye woyko asa gade asapee?” yaagidi oychis.
17.26: Phexroosi “Asa gade asape” gidi zaaris. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Gade asay giira giirokona guussu.
17.27: Shin enti dhubetonna mela abba bada molo oykanaw manxaqo yegga. Koyro ne oykiya moluwa doona dooyada giiras gidiya miishe ne gishonne ta gisho efada giira” yaagis.

18.1: He wode Yesuusa tamaareti yidi, “Salo kawotethan ubbaafe aadhey oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
18.2: Yesuusi issi guutha na7a xeegidi enta giddon essidi haysada yaagis.
18.3: “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte laametonnanne guutha naytada hanonna ixiko salo kawotethaa ubbaraka gelanaw danda7eketa.
18.4: Hiza, ha guutha na7ada bana kawushiya oonika salo kawotethan ubbaafe aadheysa gidana.
18.5: Haysa mela na7a ta sunthan mokiya oonika tana mokees.
18.6: “Shin tanan ammaniya ha guuthatape issuwa nagara oothana mela dhube gidiya oonika gita gaacha woxa ba qoodhen qachidi ciimmo abban mitetiko iyaw lo77o.
18.7: Alamen asay nagara oothana mela oothiyabati de7iya gisho alamiya ayye! Hessa melabati yoonna attenna, shin dhubey iya gaason yaa uraa ayye!
18.8: “Ne kushey woyko ne tohoy nena balethiko neepe qanxa yegga. Neeni nam7u kushera woyko nam7u tohora merinaa taman yegetanaape kushe woyko toho duuxa gidada merinaa de7o demmeysi new lo77o.
18.9: Qassi ne ayfey nena balethiko iyo wooca kessada wora hola. Neeni nam7u ayfera gaanname taman yegeteysafe issi ayfera merinaa de7uwa geleysi new lo77o.
18.10: “Ta hintew odayis; salon de7iya enta naagiya kiitanchoti ubba wode salon de7iya ta Aawa sinthan de7iya gisho, hinte ha guuthatape issuwaka kadhonna mela naagetite.
18.11: Asa Na7ay dhaydaysata ashshanaw yis” yaagis. Dhayda Dorsa Leemiso (Luqa 15:3-7)
18.12: Qassi Yesuusi, “Hintew ay daanii? Issi uraas xeetu dorsati de7eysatape issoy dhayiko uddufun tammanne uddufunata deriya bolla yeggi aggidi he dhayidaysa koyanaw beennee?
18.13: Ta tuma odayis; I demmida wode uddufun tammanne uddufunatape aathidi dhayidi bentida issi dorsa gisho ufaytees.
18.14: Hessadaka, salon de7iya hinte aaway ha guuthatape issoy dhayana mela koyenna. Qohida Asi Waatanee?
18.15: “Ne ishay nena qohiko nerka iyako bada iya qohuwa iyaw oda. I nena si7iko iya new isha ootha.
18.16: Shin I nena si7onna ixiko, nam7u woyko heedzu asa markan mootoy lasetiya gisho, issi woyko nam7u asi ekada iyako ba.
18.17: I entana si7onna ixiko, woosa keethas oda. Woosa keethi giyaba si7onna ixiko ammanonna asada woyko qaraxa qanxisiya asada iya payda.
18.18: “Ta hintew tuma odayis; sa7an hinte diggiyabati ubbay salon Xoossaa matan digetidaba gidana. Sa7an hinte hano giyabati ubbay salon Xoossa matan hanidaba gidana.
18.19: “Qassika ta hintew odayis; sa7an hintefe nam7ay banta woossiyabas issi wozanan gididi Xoossaa woossiyaba gidiko salon de7iya ta Aaway hintew oothana.
18.20: Tana kaalleysatape nam7a woyko heedza gididi shiiqiya bessan taani enta giddon bentana” yaagis. Atto Guussaba
18.21: He wode Phexroosi Yesuusako yidi, “Godaw, ta ishay tana qohiko aapun toho taani atto gaanaw bessii? Laapun toho gakanaaseyee?” gidi oychis.
18.22: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Gidenna, laapun tammu toho laapunape attishin, laapun toho gidenna.
18.23: “Hessa gisho, Xoossaa kawotethay ba oosanchotara ba miishey pacidaakonne palahidaako be7anaw qopida kawa daanees.
18.24: He kawoy miishey pacidaakonne palahidaako be7iya wode daro gindiginda acoy de7iya issi uraa iyako ehidosona.
18.25: Shin he aylley acuwa qanxanaw xoonetin iyara, iya machera, iya naytinne iyaw de7iyabay ubbay bayzetidi acoy cigetana mela iya goday kiittis.
18.26: Yaatin aylley ba godaa tohuwa bolla gulbatidi, ‘Ta godaw, hayyana guutha wode takarki, ta acuwa ubbaa ta ciggana’ yaagidi woossis.
18.27: Kawoy iyaw qadhetidi, yeddi aggis; iya acuwa maaris.
18.28: “Shin he aylley keyi bidi ba lagge oosanchotape issoy baape daro guutha miishe tal7idaysa, ‘Ne bolla de7iya ta miishiya taw cigga’ gidi qoodhe oykis.
18.29: “He iya lagee aylley iya sinthan gulbatidi, ‘Hayyana guutha wode takarki taani ta acuwa ubbaa ciggana’ yaagidi woossis.
18.30: “Shin ixidi eki efidi ba laggey acuwa qanxana gakanaw qasho keethi gelsis.
18.31: Hessa gisho, hara lagge oosanchoti hessa be7ida wode daro yilotidi, bidi banta godaas I oothidaba ubbaa odidosona.
18.32: “Yaatin kawoy he aylliya xeegisidi, ‘Ha iita aylliyaw, neeni tana woossida gisho, ta ne acuwa ubbaa new maaras.
18.33: Yaatin, taani ne acuwa maaridaysada neeni ne lagge aylliya acuwa maaranaw new bessennee?’ yaagis.
18.34: Hessa gisho, kawoy daro yilotidi, I ba acuwa ubbaa ciggana gakanaw paxa kaa7etana mela qasho keethan yeggis.
18.35: “Hessadaka, hinte issoy issoy hinte ishaa wozanape maaronna ixiko salon de7iya ta Aaway hintena hessada oothana” yaagis.

19.1: Yesuusi hessa odi ongidaape guye, Galilape dendidi Yordaanose Shaafape hefinthan de7iya Yihuda biitta bis.
19.2: Daro asay iya kaallidi bin enta giddofe harganchota pathis.
19.3: Farsaaweti iya paacanaw koyidi iyako yidi, “Issi asi ay gaasonka ba machiw yeddanaw bessii?” yaagidi oychidosona.
19.4: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Xoossay koyro addenne maccas oothi medhidaysa hinte nabbabibeketii?
19.5: ‘Hessa gisho, Issi asi ba aawanne ba aayiw aggidi ba machera issino gidees, nam7ayka issi asho gidoosona.’
19.6: Hessa gisho, enti issi asi gidoosonape attishin, nam7u asi gidokona. Hiza, Xoossi qachidaysa asi shaakofo” yaagis.
19.7: Farsaaweti, “Yaatin, Musey issi asi anjo worqate immidi yeddana mela ayis kiittidee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
19.8: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hinte, hinte macheta yeddana mela Musey hintena kiittiday, hinte wozanaa minotethaa gishope attishin, koyrope hessa mela gidenna.
19.9: Ta hintew odayis; ba machiya laymatonna de7ishin yeddidi hara ekiya oonika laammees” yaagis.
19.10: Iya tamaareti iyako, “Azinabaynne machibay hessa mela gidiko eko geloy attiko lo77o” yaagidosona.
19.11: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hessa mela timirtey Xoossay danda7a immidaysatasafe attishin, asa ubbaasa gidenna.
19.12: Hiza, yeletishe shuufa gididi yeletidaysati de7oosona, qassi asi qaaratidaysati de7oosona, qassi salo kawotethaa gisho gidi bantana shuufaydaysati de7oosona. Hessa gisho, haysa ekanaw danda7iya oonika eko” yaagis. Yesuusi Yooga Nayta Anjis (Mar 10:13-16; Luqa 18:15-17)
19.13: Yesuusi ba kushiya guutha nayta bolla wothidi entaw woossana mela issi issi asay nayta iyako ehidosona. Shin iya tamaareti asaa hanqetidosona.
19.14: Shin Yesuusi, “Xoossaa kawotethay haysata melasa gidiya gisho, guutha nayti taako yeysa diggofite; yo giite” yaagis.
19.15: Ba kushiya enta bolla wothidaape guye he bessaafe aggidi bis. Dure Na7atetha Ura (Mar 10:17-31; Luqa 18:18-30)
19.16: Issi gallas issi uray Yesuusako yidi, “Astamaariyaw, taani merinaa de7o demmanaw ay lo77oba ootho?” yaagis.
19.17: Yesuusi iyako, “Lo77oba ne tana ayis oychay? Issi Xoossaafe attishin, hari lo77oy baawa. Shin neeni merinaa de7uwa ekanaw koyko kiitata naaga” yaagis.
19.18: Uray zaaridi, “Awusa kiitata” yaagidi oychis. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Wodhopa, laymatopa, kaysotopa, wordo markatofa,
19.19: ne aawanne ne aayiw boncha, ne shooruwa ne huupheda dosa” yaagis.
19.20: He na7atethay, “Taani haysata ubbaa na7atethafe doomada naagas. Yaatin, hari taw paciyabay aybee?” yaagidi oychis.
19.21: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Neeni polo gidanaw koyko bada new de7iyaba bayzada manqotas imma; neeni salon duretana. Yaata simma yada tana kaalla” yaagis.
19.22: Shin he na7atetha uray daro dure gidiya gisho, hessa si7ida wode azzanishe aggidi bis.
19.23: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi ba tamaareta, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; durey salo kawotethi gelanaysi daro meto.
19.24: Dure asi Xoossaa kawotethaa gelanaysafe gimaley narpe luhora aadheysi kawuyees” yaagis.
19.25: Yesuusa tamaareti hessa si7idi malaaletidi, “Yaatin, ooni attanaw danda7ii?” yaagidi oychidosona.
19.26: Yesuusi enta caddi xeellidi, “Haysi asas danda7etenna, shin Xoossas ubbay danda7etees” yaagis.
19.27: Phexroosi zaaridi, “Nuuni ubbaba aggidi nena kaallida. Yaatin, nuuni ay demmanee?” yaagis.
19.28: Yesuusi entako haysada yaagis: “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Asa Na7ay yaana alamiyan ba boncho araatan uttiya wode hinte tammanne nam7ati, tana kaallidaysati, tammanne nam7u araatan uttidi tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zerethata bolla pirdana.
19.29: Ta sunthaa gisho keethe woyko ishata woyko micheta woyko aawa woyko aayiw woyko nayta woyko gadee aggiday oonika xeetu kushe ekana. Qassi merinaa de7uwaka ekana.
19.30: Shin daroti ha77i dethan sinthe gididaysati guye gidana, qassi guye gididaysati sinthe gidana” yaagis.

20.1: “Xoossaa kawotethay ba woyne gaden une oothiya asi oosisanaw wonta guura keyida ura daanees.
20.2: I he une oothiya asa hachi hachi issi dinaare qanxanaw entara giigidi, enta ba woyne gadiya giddo yeddis.
20.3: “Qassi wontafe heedzu saate gidishin keyidi ooso dhayidi giya bolla eqida hara asata demmis.
20.4: I entako, ‘Hinteka ta woyne gadee giddo bidi oothite, taani hintew bessiya gatiya qanxana’ yaagis.
20.5: Entika bidosona. Qassika I usupun saateninne uddufun saaten keyidi hessada oothis.
20.6: Tammanne issi saate gidishin I keyiya wode harati yan eqidaysata demmidi, ‘Hinte ooso oothonna gallas kumethi haysan ayis eqidi pee7idetii?’ yaagis.
20.7: “Enti zaaridi, ‘Nuna une oosisiya asi dhayida gishosa’ yaagidosona. “Ika, ‘Hinteka ta woyne gadiya giddo bidi oothite’ yaagis.
20.8: “Sa7i omarsin, woyne gadiya goday oosanchota halaqaako, ‘Oosanchota xeegada wursethan ooso gelidaysatape doomada koyro gelidaysata gakanaw enta gatiya qanxa’ yaagis.
20.9: Tammanne issi saaten ooso oykidaysati yidi, huuphen huuphen issi issi dinaare ekidosona.
20.10: Koyro ooso oykidaysati yidi, bantaw daro imetana gidi qopidosona. Shin entika huuphen huuphen issi issi dinaare ekidosona.
20.11: Banta miishiya eki simmidi godaa bolla zuuzumidosona.
20.12: ‘Haysati guyepe yidi issi saate xalaala oothidosona. Shin gallas kumethi awa suulan daaburidi pee7ida nuura enti waanidi issino gidoona’ yaagidosona.
20.13: “Woyniya goday oosanchotape issuwako, ‘Ta ishaw, taani nena qohabike; ne taara giigiday issi dinaaresa gidennee?
20.14: Ne miishiya ekada ne soo ba. Ta omarsi yidaysaska neysa mela immanaw koyayis.
20.15: Taani ta miishiyan koydaba oothanaw taw maati baawee? Woyko taani keeha gidida gisho neeni qanaatay?’ yaagis.
20.16: “Hessada ha77i dethan guye gididaysati sinthatana, sinthatidaysati qassi guyetana” yaagis. Yesuusi Ba Hayquwaba Heedzantho Odis (Mar 10:32-34; Luqa 18:31-34)
20.17: Yesuusi Yerusalaame bishe, tammanne nam7u tamaareta dumma gaxa kessidi entako yaagis:
20.18: “Heko, nuuni ha77i Yerusalaame buussaa bolla de7oos. Yan Asa Na7ay kahine halaqatasinne higge astamaaretas aadhidi imetana. Enti iya bolla hayqo pirda pirdana.
20.19: Iya Ayhude gidonna deriyas aathidi immana. Enti iya kawushana, garaafana, yaatidi iya masqaliya bolla kaqana. Shin I heedzantho gallas hayqope dendana” yaagis. Zabdiyoosa Nayta Aaye Woosa (Mar 10:35-45)
20.20: He wode Zabdiyoosa machiya ba nam7u adde naytara Yesuusako yada, iya sinthan gulbatada issiba iya woossasu.
20.21: Yesuusi iiko, “Ne ay koyay?” yaagis. Iya zaarada, “Ne kawotethan ha ta nam7u nayti issoy ne ushachan issoy ne haddirsan utto garki!” yaagasu.
20.22: Shin Yesuusi naytako zaaridi, “Hinte ay woossiyako ereketa; taani uyanaw de7iya waaye xuu7aa uyanaw danda7eetii?” yaagis. Entika, “Ee danda7oos” yaagidosona.
20.23: Yesuusi, “Tumaka taani uyanaw de7iya xuu7ape hinte uyana. Shin ta ushachaninne haddirsan uttanayisata doorey tana gidike. He bessay imetey, ta aaway immanaw giigisida asatasa” yaagis.
20.24: Attida tammu iya tamaareti hessa si7ida wode nam7u ishata bolla hanqetidosona.
20.25: Shin Yesuusi enta ubbaa xeegidi haysada yaagis. “Ayhude gidonna asaa haareysati banta asaa bolla godateysanne enta kaaletheysati wolqan haareysa hinte ereeta.
20.26: Shin hinte giddon hessada gidopo. Hintefe gitatanaw koyiya oonika hintew aylle gido.
20.27: Hinte giddon ubbaafe bolla gidanaw koyiya oonika hintew aylle gidanaw bessees.
20.28: Hessadaka, Asa Na7ay ase haggaazanawunne daro asaa wozanaw ba shempuwa immanaw yisipe attishin, asan haggaazetanaw yibeenna” yaagis. Nam7u Qooqeti Paxidosona (Mar 10:46-52; Luqa 18:35-43)
20.29: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Iyaarkofe keyidi bishin, daro asay entana kaallidosona.
20.30: Oge gaxan uttida nam7u qooqeti Yesuusi yaara aadheysa si7idi, “Godaw, Dawita Na7aw, nuus qadhetarki” yaagidi waassidosona.
20.31: Daro asay entana, “Hayzite” yaagidi kaccidosona. Shin enti, “Godaw, Dawita na7aw, nuus qadhetarki” gidi guji waassidosona.
20.32: Yesuusi eqidi, enta xeegidi, “Ta hintew ay oothana mela koyeetii?” yaagidi oychis.
20.33: Entika, “Godaw, nu ayfey xeellana mela koyoos” yaagidosona.
20.34: Yesuusi entaw qadhetidi, enta ayfiya bochis. Ellesidi enta ayfey xeellis; enti iya kaallidi bidosona.

21.1: Yesuusaranne iya tamaaretara Yerusalaame matidi, Shamaho zuma bolla de7iya Beetefaage geetetiya gutaa gakishe, Yesuusi ba tamaaretape nam7ata baape sinthe yaagidi kiittis:
21.2: “Hintefe sinthan de7iya guta biite. Yan issi harey qashon de7iyaro I maarara hinte demmana. Enta billidi haa eki yiite.
21.3: Oonika hintena oychiko, ‘Goday entana koyees’ yaagite. I entana iiraka yeddi aggana” yaagis.
21.4: Hessika nabey,
21.5: “Xiyoone katamaas, ‘Heko, ne kawoy ashke gididi, hare bollanne hare mara bolla uttidi, neeko yees’ yaagite” yaagidi xaafidaysi poletana mela hessi hanis.
21.6: Iya tamaareti bidi Yesuusi enta kiitidaysada oothidosona.
21.7: Hariiwunne hare maraa ehidi bollara ma7ida banta ma7uwa enta zokon yeggidosona. Yesuusi ma7ota bolla uttis.
21.8: Daro asay banta ma7uwa ogiyan hiixidosona. Harati bonco tashidi oge bolla yeggidosona.
21.9: Yesuusape sinthara hemeteysatinne iyape guyera kaalliya daro asay, “Hosaana! Dawita na7ay galatetto! Godaa sunthan yeysi anjetidaysa! Bonchoy Ubbaafe Dhoqa Saluwan Xoossaas gido!” yaagidi waassidosona.
21.10: Yesuusi Yerusalaame katamaa gelida wode he kataman de7iya asa ubbay, “Haysi oonee?” yaagidi yarkidosona.
21.11: Asay, “Haysi Galilan de7iya Naazirete katamaape yida nabiya Yesuusa” yaagidosona. Xoossa Keethafe Zal7eyisata Kessis (Mar 11:15-19; Luqa 19:45-48; Yoha 2:13-22)
21.12: Yesuusi Xoossa Keethi gelidi, yan bayzeysatanne shammeyisata ubbaa kare goodis. Miishe laammeyisata xarpheezatanne holleta bayziya oydeta shiri yeggis.
21.13: Ika entako, “Xoossaa qaalan, ‘Ta keethay Xoossaa woossiya keethi geetetana’ geetetidi xaafetis. Shin hinte pangati qosetiya gongolo oothideta” yaagis.
21.14: Yesuusi xoossa keethan de7ishin qooqetinne gundati iyako yin enta pathis.
21.15: Shin kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti Yesuusi oothida malaalsiyabata be7idaysasinne guutha nayti xoossa keethan, “Dawita na7ay, galatetto” yaagidi waasseysa si7idi hanqetidosona.
21.16: Enti Yesuusako, “Haysati geysa ne si7ay?” yaagidosona. Yesuusi, “Ee si7ayis, Xoossaa qaalan, ‘Guutha nayta doonaninne dhammiya nayta doonan galata wothadasa’ geetetidi xaafetidaysa hinte nabbabibeketii?” yaagis.
21.17: Entana yan aggidi Bitaane katamaa bidi aqis. Yesuusi Baaddida Balase Mithiw (Mar 11:12-14, 20-24)
21.18: Yesuusi wonta guura katama simmidi yishe koshatis.
21.19: Oge gaxan issi balase mithi be7idi iiko bis. Shin haythafe attishin, hara aykoka demmibeenna. Hessa gisho, iyo, “Hizape nam7antho ayfe ayfopa!” yaagis. He balase mithiya ellesada mela aggasu.
21.20: Iya tamaareti hessa be7idi, “Ha balasiya waanada ellesa meladee?” yaagidi malaaletidosona.
21.21: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hintew ammanoy de7iko, qassi hinte sidhonna ixiko balase bolla taani oothidaysa mela xalaala ootheketa, shin ‘Ha zumaa shodetada abban wodha’ yaagiko hanana.
21.22: Ammanidi hinte woossiyaba aybiba gidikoka hinte ekana” yaagis. Yesuusa Maatay Oyshetetha (Mar 11:27-33; Luqa 20:1-8)
21.23: Yesuusi Xoossa Keetha gelidi tamaarsishin, kahine halaqatinne Ayhude cimati iyako yidi, “Neeni haysa oothana mela new ay maati de7ii? New ha maata immiday oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
21.24: Yesuusi entako, “Taanika hintena issiba oychayis; hinte taw hessa zaariko, taani ay maatan oothiyako hintew odana.
21.25: Yohaanisi xammaqana mela maatay awupe imetidee? Xoossafeye asapee?” yaagis. Enti banta giddon zoretidi, “Nuuni, ‘Xoossafe’ giiko, I nuna, ‘Yaatin ayis ammanibeketii?’ yaagana.
21.26: Nuuni, ‘Asape’ giiko, asa ubbay Yohaanisa nabe oothi xeelliya gisho, asaa yayyoos” yaagidosona.
21.27: Hessa gisho, “Nuuni eroko” yaagidi zaaridosona. Ika, “Hiza, taanika haysa ay maatan oothiyako hintew odike” yaagis. Nam7u Nayta Leemiso
21.28: “Yesuusi kaallidika haysada yaagis: nam7u adde nayti de7iya issi uray de7ees. He uray bayra na7aako bidi, ‘Ta na7aw, hachi woyne giddo bada ootha’ yaagis.
21.29: Na7ay zaaridi, ‘Atto biike’ yaagis. Shin guyepe ba wozanan qopi ekidi oothanaw bis.
21.30: Aaway ba kaalo na7aako bidi, ba bayra na7aako gidaysada kiittis. Ika, ‘Ero, ta aawaw’ yaagis. Shin bibeenna.
21.31: Ha nam7u naytape ba aawas kiitetidaysi awusee?” yaagis. Entika, “Bayra” yaagidosona. Yesuusi entako, “Ta hintew tuma odayis; qaraxa qanxiseysatinne laymateysati hintefe sinthatidi Xoossaa kawotethaa gelana.
21.32: Xammaqiya Yohaanisi suure ogiya tamaarsishe yin I geysa ammanibeketa. Shin qaraxa qanxiseysatinne laymateysati ammanidosona. Hinte hari attoshin, enta be7idika hinte nagaraape simmidi ammanibeketa” yaagis. Goshshanchota Leemiso (Mar 12:1-12; Luqa 20:9-19)
21.33: Qassika Yesuusi haysada yaagis; “Hara leemiso si7ite, woyne tokida issi uray de7ees. He woyniya yuushuwa diris. Woyne gum7iya olla bookis. Woyniya naaganaw shako shaakis. Hessafe guye, gadiya kothe immidi hara biitta bis.
21.34: Woyne ayfiya maxiya wodey gakin bana gakiya baggaa ekidi yaana mela ba aylleta entako yeddis.
21.35: Kothe aawati iya aylleta oykidi issuwa wadhidosona, hankuwa wodhidosona qassi attidaysa shuchan caddidosona.
21.36: Woyne atakiltiya goday kaseysatape dariya hara aylleta kiittis. Kothe aawati enta bollaka hankoyisata bolla oothidaysada oothidosona.
21.37: Wursethan I, ‘Ta na7aa enti bonchana!’ yaagidi ba na7aa entako kiittis.
21.38: “Shin kothe aawati na7aa be7idi banta giddon ‘Gadiya laattanaysi haysa, iya wodhidi gadiya nuuni laattoos!’ yaagidosona.
21.39: Na7a oykidi woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi wodhidosona.
21.40: “Hiza, woyne gadiya goday yaa wode he kothe aawata waatanee?” yaagidi oychis.
21.41: Enti zaaridi, “I he iita asata iita wodho wodhidi, woyney ayfiya wode iya gakiya baggaa woden woden immiya hara kothe aawatas immana” yaagidosona.
21.42: Yesuusi zaaridi entako, Xoossaa qaalan, “ ‘Gimbeysati boridi ixida shuchay, godaa xaphuwa minthiya, ubbaafe aadhiya shuchaa gidis. Haysi Goday oothidaba; nu ayfiyas malaalsiyaba’ geetetidi xaafetidaysa nabbabibeketii?
21.43: “Hessa gisho, taani hintew odayis; Xoossaa kawotethay hintefe eketidi lo77o ayfe ayfiya asatas imetana.
21.44: [Ha shucha bolla kundiya oonika meqeretana. Qassi ha shuchay iya bolla wodhiya urayka gaacetana”] yaagis.
21.45: Kahine halaqatinne Farsaaweti Yesuusi odida leemisuwan bantana odidaysa eridosona.
21.46: Enti Yesuusa oykanaw koydosona, shin asay Yesuusa nabe oothidi xeelliya gisho, asaas yayyidosona.

22.1: Yesuusi asaas zaaridi haysada yaagidi leemiso odis.
22.2: “Xoossaa kawotethay ba na7aas yaagano giigisida kawa daanees.
22.3: He kawoy yaagano yaana mela odi wothida asata xeeganaw ba aylleta kiittis. Shin asati yaanaw koybookona.
22.4: Qassi hara aylleta xeegidi, xeegetida asatako bidi, ‘Taani ta sangatanne modhida gatarmenthota shukas; ubbabay giigis. Ta yaaganuwa haa yiite yaagite’ yaagidi kiittis.
22.5: Shin xeegetidaysati xeessaa ixidi, banta oosos oosos bidosona. Issoy ba goshshas, hankoy ba zal7iyas bis.
22.6: Harati qassi kawa aylleta oykidi, kawushi wadhidi wodhidosona.
22.7: “Kawoy daro yilotidi, ba wotaadareta yeddidi shempo wodhidaysata wodhisis, enta katamaka xuuggis.
22.8: Hessafe guye, ba aylletako, ‘Yaaganoy giigis, shin xeegetidaysati yaaganuwas bessiya asi gidokona.
22.9: Hessa gisho, wogga ogeta bidi, demmida asi ubbaa yaaganuwa yaana mela xeegite’ yaagis.
22.10: Aylleti ogiya bolla bidi banta demmida asi ubbaa lo77otanne iitata ehidi yaagano shaqara gelsidi kunthidosona.
22.11: “Shin kawoy kathaa maanaw uttida asaa be7anaw gelida wode yaagano ma7o ma7iboona issi asi demmis.
22.12: Iyako, ‘La, ne yaagano ma7o ma7onna waanada haysa geladii?’ yaagis. Shin uray si77i gis.
22.13: “Kawoy ba aylletako, ‘Ha uraa kushiyanne tohuwa qachidi, kare dhumaa kessi yeggite. Yan iyaw yeehonne acha garcethi gidana’ yaagis.
22.14: “Hessadaka, Xoossaa kawotethaas xeegetidaysati daro shin dooretidaysati guutha” yaagis. Giiraba (Mar 12:13-17; Luqa 20:20-26)
22.15: Hessafe guye, Farsaaweti bidi, Yesuusa waati odan oykaneeko zoretidosona.
22.16: Banta tamaaretanne Herodiisa baggatape issota issota kiittidosona. Entika, “Astamaariyaw, ne tuma odeysa nu eroos. Neeni asape ase shaakaka, asa woygandes gada aykoka oothaka, Xoossa oge tumatethan tamaarsaasa.
22.17: Ane nuus oda, nuuni Roome Kawas giira giiranaw bessi bessennee?” yaagidosona.
22.18: Shin Yesuusi enta iita qofaa eridi, “Ha cubboto, tana ayis paacetii?
22.19: Giira giiriya miishiya tana bessite” yaagis. Entika iyaw santime ehidosona.
22.20: I, “Ha sunthaynne misiley oodebayee?” yaagis.
22.21: Enti, “Roome Kawoysa” yaagidosona. Yaatin Yesuusi entako, “Hiza, Kawas besseysa kawas, Xoossas besseysa Xoossas immite” yaagis.
22.22: Enti hessa si7ida wode malaaletidi iya matape aggidi bidosona. Hayqope Dendoba (Mar 12:18-27; Luqa 20:27-40)
22.23: He gallas hayqope dendoy baawa giya Saduqaaweti Yesuusako yidi, yaagidi iya oychidosona.
22.24: “Astamaariyaw, ‘Musey, issi asi na7a yelonna hayqiko, he hayqidaysa ishay iya machiw ekidi, ba ishaas na7a yelo’ yaagidi kiittis.
22.25: Nu eriya laapun ishati de7oosona. Bayray macho ekidi na7a yelonna hayqis. Iya machiw iya kaalo ishay ekis.
22.26: Hessadaka, he maccasiw ekida nam7anthoyka, heedzanthoyka, bidi laapunati wurana gakanaw ubbay hayqidosona.
22.28: Yaatin, laapunati ubbay iyo ekida gisho, hayqope dendiya gallas, he maccasiya laapunatape awusas macho gidanee?” yaagidosona.
22.29: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hinte Xoossaa qaalay tamaarsiyaba woyko iya wolqaa eronna gisho baleeta.
22.30: Asay hayqope dendiya wode salon de7iya kiitanchota mela gidanaape attishin, ekokona gelokona.
22.31: Qassi hayqida asati hayqope dendanaba Xoossay hintew odidaysa nabbabibeketii?
22.32: Xoossay, ‘Taani Abrahaame Xoossaa, Yisaaqa Xoossaa, Yayqooba Xoossaa’ yaagis. Hessa gisho, Xoossay paxa de7eyisata Xoossaafe attishin, hayqidaysata Xoossaa gidenna” yaagis.
22.33: Daro asay hessa si7idi, iya timirtiyan malaaletidosona. Ubbaafe Bayra Kiita (Mar 12:28-34; Luqa 10:25-28)
22.34: Yesuusi Saduqaawetas gaanaba dhaysidaysa Farsaaweti si7ida wode issife shiiqidosona.
22.35: Enta giddofe issi higge astamaarey Yesuusa paace oysho oychis.
22.36: “Astamaariyaw, higge ubbaafe aadheysi awusee?” yaagidi oychis.
22.37: Yesuusi zaaridi, “ ‘Ne Godaa, ne Xoossaa, ne kumetha wozanape, ne kumetha shempuwafe, ne kumetha qofaape dosa.
22.39: Nam7antho ubbaafe aadhiya kiitay, ase ubbaa ne huuphiya ne doseysada dosa’ yaageysa.
22.40: Muse higgeynne nabeta timirtey ubbay ha kiitata bolla katoosona” yaagis. Kiristoosi Oodde Na7ee? (Mar 12:35-37; Luqa 20:41-44)
22.41: Farsaaweti issi bolla shiiqidi de7ishin, Yesuusi entana,
22.42: “Kiristoosaba hinte woygetii? I oodde na7ee?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “I Kawa Dawita na7a” yaagidi zaaridosona.
22.43: Yesuusi entako, “Yaatin, Dawiti Geeshsha Ayyaanan gididi waatidi Kiristoosa, ‘Godaa’ gidi xeegii? Dawiti gishe,
22.44: “ ‘Godaa Xoossay, ta Godaako, ne morketa ne tohoy yedhiyaso oothana gakanaw, haysan taape ushacha baggan utta’ gis.
22.45: Hiza, Dawiti Kiristoosa Godaa gidi xeegiko, waanidi Kiristoosi Dawita na7a gidii?” yaagis.
22.46: Yesuusas issi qaala zaaranaw danda7ida asi oonika baawa. Qassi he gallasape doomidi hara oysha oychanaw oonika danda7ibeenna.

23.1: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi shiiqida asaasinne ba tamaaretas haysada yaagis.
23.2: “Higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti Muse higgiya billanaw maatara de7oosona.
23.3: Hessa gisho, enti hintena kiittiya ubbaa oothitenne naagite. Shin enti ootheysada oothopite. Ayis giiko, enti odeysada oothokona.
23.4: Enti tookanaw danda7etonna tooho qachidi asaa toossosona. Shin bantaw hari attoshin, he toohuwa asay tookiya wode biradhe xeeran bochanaw koyokona.
23.5: “Shin enti banta ooso ubbaa asi be7onna mela oothosona. Banta som7oninne qesen qachiya maxaafaa xiqisey de7iya kitaafe dalgisoosona, banta ma7uwa macaraa adussosona.
23.6: Moketiya bessan boncho bessinne ayhude woosa keethatan daro lo77iya oyde dosoosona.
23.7: Asay giyan entana bonchon sarothanaysanne ‘Astamaariyaw’ gidi xeeganaysa koyoosona.
23.8: “Shin hinte astamaarey issuwa xalaala gidida gishonne hinte ubbay ishata gidida gisho, ‘Astamaariyaw’ geetetidi xeegetofite.
23.9: Hintew salon issi aawa xalaali de7iya gisho, ha sa7an oonaka ‘Aawaw’ gidi xeegopite.
23.10: Hintew issi Goday Kiristoosa xalaali de7iya gisho ‘Godaw’ geetetidi xeegetofite.
23.11: Hinte giddon bayratey hinte aylle gido.
23.12: Bana gitaya oonika kawuyana; bana kawushiya oonika gitatana. Higge Astamaaretinne Farsaaweti Boretidosona (Mar 12:40; Luqa 11:39-42)
23.13: “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, asa sinthan salo kawotethaa gordeysato hintena ayye! Hinte, hinte huuphen geleketa qassi harataka gelseketa.
23.14: “[Hinteno cubboto, higge astamaaretonne, Farsaaweto, am7eta keetha hinte bonqishe, asi be7o gidi woosa adusseta. Hessa gisho, hintena ayye! Ubbaafe aadhiya pirday hintena naagees.]
23.15: “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hinte issi uraa ammanthanaw abbaranne sa7ara yuuyeta. Shin hinte iya ammanthida wode he uraa hintefe aathidi Gaannames giigetidaysa oothiya gisho, hintena ayye!
23.16: “Oonika xoossa keethan caaqiko aykoyka baawa. Shin Xoossaa Keethan de7iya worqan caaqiko, he caaqoy iya gomana giya qooqeto, hintew qooqidi harata kaaletheysato, hintena ayye!
23.17: Hinteno, eeyato, qooqeto, worqay aadhiyee? Worqiya Xoossas dummaya xoossa keethay aadhii?
23.18: Qassi ‘Oonika yarsho bessan caaqiko, aykoyka baawa. Shin oonika iya bolla de7iya yarshuwan caaqiko, he caaqoy iya gomana’ yaagidi tamaarseeta.
23.19: Hinteno, qooqeto, yarshoy aadhiyee? Yarshuwa Xoossas dummaya bessay aadhii?
23.20: Hessa gisho, yarsho bessan caaqiya uray, he yarsho bessaaninne iya bolla de7iya ubbaban caaqees.
23.21: Xoossa keethan caaqiya uray, he xoossa keethaninne iyan de7iya Xoossan caaqees.
23.22: Salon caaqiya uray Xoossaa araataninne he araata bolla uttiya Xoossan caaqees.
23.23: “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hintena ayye! Hinte kareetha sawope, naatiropenne okashepe asraata kesseeta. Shin higgen de7iya aadhidi koshsheyisata aggideta. Hessika, suure pirda, qadhetethinne ubbaban ammanetethi. Harataka aggonashin haysata hinte oothanaw bessees.
23.24: Hintew qooqidi hara asi kaaletheysato, hinte ushshafe udunxe kessidi gimale miteeta.
23.25: “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hintena ayye! Hinte shaatiyasinne keriyas bolla baggaa geeshsheeta. Shin entaw garsan bonqeynne uuzetethi kumi uttis.
23.26: Neno qooqe Farsaawiyaw, shaatiyasinne keriyas garsa kasetada geeshsha. Hessafe guye, bolla baggayka geeshshi gidana.
23.27: “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hintena ayye! Kare baggara qalame tiyetidi lo77idi, giddon meqethinne wooqidabay kumida duufota daaneta.
23.28: Hessadaka, bolla baggara asas lo77o daaneta. Shin hinte garsan cubbotethinne iitatethi kumis.
23.29: “Hinteno, cubboto, higge astamaaretonne Farsaaweto, hintena ayye! Hinte nabetas duufo keexeta, qassi xillota duufuwaka loytheeta.
23.30: Qassi hinte, ‘Nuuni beni nu aawata wode de7idaba gidiyako, entara issife nabeta suuthaa gussokoshin’ yaageeta.
23.31: Hessa gisho, hinte nabeta wodhida asaa nayta gideysa hinte hinte huuphen markateeta.
23.32: Hiza, hinte aawati doomidaysa hinte polite.
23.33: “Ha shooshato, shoosha nayto, hinte Gaanname pirdaafe waanidi attanee?
23.34: Hessa gisho, heko, taani nabeta, cinca asatanne astamaareta hinteko kiittana. Entafe issota issota hinte wodhananne masqala bolla kaqana. Baggata ayhude woosa keethatan lisson garaafananne katamaape katama gooddana.
23.35: Hessa gisho, xilluwa Aabela wodhida wodepe doomidi, Xoossa Keethasinne yarsho bessaafe giddon hinte wodhida Baraka na7a Zakaryaasa wode gakanaw hayqida xillo asa ubba gisho, hinte seeretana.
23.36: Taani hintew tuma odayis; hintenne hinte aawati oothida nagaraas ha pirda ubbay ha yeletethaa bolla gakana. Yesuusi Yerusalaames yeekis (Luqa 13:34-35)
23.37: “Yerusalaame, Yerusalaame, nabeta wodhiyare! Xoossay neeko kiittidaysata shuchan caddiyare! Kuttoy ba nayta ba qefen hapheysada taani ne asaa ta qesiyan gechanaw aapun toho koyadina! Shin tana diggadasa.
23.38: Hiza, heko, hinte keethay kaysi gidana.
23.39: Taani hintew odayis; ‘Godaa sunthan yeysi anjetidaysa’ hinte gaana gakanaw nam7antho tana be7eketa” yaagis.

24.1: Yesuusi Xoossa Keethafe keyidi bishin, iya tamaareti iyako yidi, malaaletidi Xoossa Keetha gimbiya bessidosona.
24.2: Yesuusi entako zaaridi, “Ee! Haysa ubbaa be7eetii? Taani hintew tumaa odayis; shuchi shucha bolla gimbetida mela laaletonna attenna” yaagis. Sinthafe Hananabata (Mar 13:3-13; Luqa 21:7-19)
24.3: Yesuusi Shamaho zuma bolla uttidashin, iya tamaareti bantarka iyako yidi, “Hessi awude hananeeko nuus oda. Qassi ne yuussasinne wodiya wursethaas malaatay aybee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
24.4: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hintena oonika balethonna mela naagetite!
24.5: Ayis giiko, daro asati ta sunthan, ‘Taani Kiristoosa, Xoossay asaa ashshanaw kiittidaysa’ yaagishe yidi daro asaa balethana.
24.6: Matan de7iya ola girsaa, haahon de7iya ola wore si7anaw de7eeta. Hessa melabay hananaw bessiya gisho Hirgofite. Shin wursethay buroona.
24.7: Derey deriyara, issi kawotethay hara kawotethaara oletana. Koshaynne biitta qaaxoy ubba bessan hanana.
24.8: Hessi ubbay yelo iqethas zooke mela.
24.9: “He wode asay hintena waayees aathidi immana, qachananne wodhana. Ta sunthaa gisho asa ubbay hintena ixana.
24.10: He wode daroti ammano aggana. Banta giddon issoy issuwa aathidi immana, issoy issuwa ixana.
24.11: Qassi daro wordo nabeti dendidi darota balethana.
24.12: Geellatethi dariya gisho, daro asaa siiqoy irxana.
24.13: Shin wursethi gakanaw genciya uray attana.
24.14: Asa ubbaas marka gidana mela Xoossaa kawotethaa Wongelay biitta ubban odetana. Hessafe guye, wursethay yaana. Tuna Dhayo (Mar 13:14-23; Luqa 21:20-24)
24.15: “Hessa gisho, nabiya Daaneli odida dhayo tunatethay geeshsha bessan eqidaysa hinte be7ana. (Akeekiso: Hessi woy guusseko nabbabeysi akeeko!)
24.16: He wode Yihuda biittan de7eysati deriyako baqato.
24.17: Keetha huuphen de7iya uray ba son de7iyaba ekanaw soo gelonna baqato.
24.18: Gaden de7eysi ba ma7uwa ekanaw guye simmofo.
24.19: He wode qantha maccasatasinne dhanthiya maccasatas daro un7a gidana.
24.20: Balgon woyko Sambaatan hinte baqatoy gidonna mela Xoossaa woossite.
24.21: Ayis giiko, sa7i medhetoosape hachi gakanaw hanonnabay, qassi sinthafeka ubbaraka hanonna waayey he wode hanana.
24.22: Xoossay he gallasata taybuwa guuthonnaako ase gidida oonika attenna. Shin I ba doorida asata gisho, he gallasata taybuwa guuthana.
24.23: “He wode oonika hintena, ‘Heko, Kiristoosi haysan’ woyko ‘Hinin de7ees’ yaagiko ammanopite.
24.24: Ayis giiko, wordo Kiristoosatinne wordo nabeti dendana. Entaw danda7etiko, hari attoshin Xoossay dooridaysataka balethanaw gita malaatatanne malaalsiyabata oothana.
24.25: Akeekite, taani hintew haysa kasetada odas.
24.26: “Hessa gisho, asay hinteko, ‘Heko, Kiristoosi bazzon de7ees’ giiko, yaa boopite. Woyko hinteko, ‘Heko, qol7an de7ees’ giiko, entaba ammanopite.
24.27: Ayis giiko, wol7anthi salon wol7amidi, dolohape wuloha gakanaw benteysada, Asa Na7aa yuussay hessada hanana.
24.28: “Bawuti de7iyason ankoti shiiqana. Kiristoosi Nam7antho Yaana (Mar 13:24-27; Luqa 21:25-28)
24.29: “He wode he waaye gallasatape guye, ellesidi away dhumana, ageenay ba poo7uwa diggana. Xoolintoti salope wodhana, qassi salon de7iya wolqati buqettana.
24.30: He wode Asa Na7aa yuussaa mallay saluwa bolla bentana. Sa7an de7iya asi ubbay yeekana. Qassi Asa Na7ay, wolqaranne gita bonchuwara saluwa shaara giddora yishin enti be7ana.
24.31: I ba kiitanchota gita moyze punora kiittana. Enti sa7aa oyddu baggaa bidi, ha gaxape ya gaxa gakanaw de7iya iyaw dooretidaysata shiishana. Balase Mithee Leemiso (Mar 13:28-31; Luqa 21:29-33)
24.32: “Balase mithafe tamaarite. Iya aacada hayxiya wode torchey matatidaysa hinte ereeta.
24.33: Hessadaka, hinte ha ubbaba be7iya wode Yesuusi matidi pengen de7eysa erite.
24.34: Taani hintew tuma odayis; ha ubbabay poletana gakanaw, ha yeletethay aadhenna.
24.35: Saloynne sa7i aadhana, shin ta qaalay ubbaka aadhenna. Yesuusi Yaana Wode Oonika Erenna (Mar 13:32-37; Luqa 17:26-30, 34-36)
24.36: “He gallasaanne he saatiya salon de7iya ta aawape attishin, hari salo kiitanchota gidin woyko Na7aa gidin oonika erenna.
24.37: Asa Na7aa yuussay, Nohe wode hanidaysa mela gidana.
24.38: He wode dhayo haathay yaanape sinthe Nohey markabiyan gelida gallasa gakanaw, asay mishenne uyishe, ekishenne gelishe gam7is.
24.39: Dhayo haathay yidi, enta ubbaa dhaysana gakanaw akeekibokona. Asa Na7aa yuussayka hessada hanana.
24.40: “He wode nam7u asati gaden oothana. Entafe issoy eketana, hankoy attana.
24.41: Nam7u maccasati issife gaaccana. Entafe issiniya eketana hankiya attana.
24.42: “Hiza, hinte Goday ay gallas yaaneko hinte eronna gisho, minnidi naagite.
24.43: Shin kaysoy qammafe ay saaten yaaneko goday eriyako, ba keethay booketonna mela barkidi naaganashin.
24.44: Hessadaka, Asa Na7ay hinte qoponna saaten yaana gisho, hinteka giigidi de7ite. Iitanne Lo77o Aylle Leemiso (Luqa 12:41-48)
24.45: “Yaatin, ba soo asaas kathaa koshshiya wodiyan immana mela iya goday doorida ammantheysinne wozanaama aylley oonee?
24.46: I ba goday kiittidaysa oothishin iya goday yidi demmiya aylley anjetidaysa.
24.47: Taani hintew tuma odayis; goday he aylliya babaa ubbaa bolla shuumana.
24.48: Shin he aylley iita gidiko, ‘Ta goday gam7idi yaana’ yaagidi ba wozanan qopidi,
24.49: ba lagge oosanchota wadho doomiko, mathoteysatara miikonne uyiko,
24.50: he aylliya goday I qoponna gallasinne I eronna saaten,
24.51: yidi iya qanxerethana. Iya qaada cubbotara oothana. He bessan iyaw yeehonne ache garcethi gidana.

25.1: “He wode salo kawotethay banta xompe oykidi, macho ehanaw bida addiya mokanaw keyida tammu geela7ota daanees.
25.2: Entafe ichashati eeya, qassi ichashati cinca.
25.3: Eeyati xompe oykidosona, shin guzha zayte oykibookona.
25.4: Shin cincati banta xompenne hara guzha zayte oykidosona.
25.5: Machiw ekeysi gam7in, he geela7oti bantana dhiskoy oykin dhiskidosona.
25.6: “Giddi bilahe gidiya wode, ‘Heko, machiw eheysi gakis, iya mokanaw keyite’ giya gita caboy si7etis.
25.7: “He wode he geela7oti ubbay barkidi, banta xompiya giigisidosona.
25.8: Eeyati cincatako, ‘Nu xompey to7ana haniya gisho, hinte zaytiyape nuus immerketi’ yaagidosona.
25.9: “Shin cincati zaaridi, ‘Akay, nuusinne hintew gidiya zaytey baawa. Hessa gisho, bidi hintew shammidi ekite’ yaagidosona.
25.10: Eeya geela7oti zayte shammanaw bin, machiw ekeysi puttu gis. Giigeti uttida ichashu geela7oti iyara issife yaagano keethi gelidosona; kareyka gordeti aggis.
25.11: “Guyepe hanko geela7oti yidi, ‘Godaw, godaw, nuus dooyarki’ yaagidosona.
25.12: “Shin I zaaridi, ‘Taani hintew tuma odayis; ta hintena erike!’
25.13: “Hiza, Asa Na7ay yaana gallasaa woyko saatiya hinte eronna gisho barkidi naagite. Heedzu Oosanchota Leemiso (Luqa 19:11-27)
25.14: “Xoossaa kawotethay ba oosanchota xeegidi baw de7iyaba entaw sheedhidi oge baanaw keyida uraa daanees.
25.15: Entaw huuphen huuphen enta wolqaa mela issuwas ichashu karxiite bira, issuwas nam7u karxiite bira qassi issuwas issi karxiite bira immidi ba ogiya bis.
25.16: Ichashu karxiite bira ekida aylley ellesi bidi zal7idi, hara ichashu karxiite bira wodhisis.
25.17: Hessadaka, qassi nam7u karxiite bira ekida aylley hara nam7u karxiite bira wodhisis.
25.18: Shin issi karxiite bira ekidaysi bidi, olla bookidi, ba godaa miishiya moogis.
25.19: “Daro wodepe guye he aylleta goday yidi, ba miishiya entara salla7is.
25.20: Ichashu karxiite bira ekida aylley yidi, hara ichashu karxiite bira ehidi, ‘Ta godaw, neeni taw ichashu karxiite bira immadasa. Shin taani hara ichashu karxiite bira wodhisas’ yaagis.
25.21: Iya goday, ‘Zamboy! Neeni lo77onne ammanthiya aylle; neeni guuthaban ammanetadasa. Taani nena darobaa bolla shuumana; haa gelada ne godaara ufayta’ yaagis.
25.22: “Qassi nam7u karxiite bira ekidaysi yidi, ‘Ta godaw, neeni taw nam7u karxiite bira immadasa. Shin taani hara nam7u karxiite bira wodhisas’ yaagis.
25.23: Iya goday, ‘Zamboy! Neeni lo77onne ammanthiya aylle; neeni guuthaban ammanetadasa. Taani nena darobaa bolla shuumana; haa gelada ne godaara ufayta’ yaagis.
25.24: “Qassi issi karxiite bira ekidaysi yidi, ‘Ta godaw, neeni zeronna bessafe cakiyanne dharcona bessafe maxiya iita asi gideysa taani erayis.
25.25: Hessa gisho, yayyada ne bira biittan moogas. Ne miishey haysish’ yaagis.
25.26: “Iya goday zaaridi, ‘Ha iita azalla aylliyaw, taani zeronna bessafe cakeysanne dharcona bessafe maxiya asi gideysa eradasa.
25.27: Yaatin, neeni ta miishiya banken wothidaba gidiyako, taani simmiya wode ta miishiya wodhera ekanaysa diggadasa.
25.28: Hessa gisho, miishiya iyape ekidi, tammu karxiite biri de7eysas immite.
25.29: Ayis giiko, de7iya ubbaas guzhetananne darana. Shin baynaysafe hari attoshin, he iyaw de7iya guuthiyaka eketana.
25.30: Ha maaddonna aylliya kare dhumaa kessi yeggite. Yan iyaw yeehonne ache garcethi gidana’ yaagis. Wode Wursetha Pirda
25.31: “Asa Na7ay, kiitancho ubbatara, ba bonchuwara yaa wode I ba boncho kawotetha araata bolla uttana.
25.32: Biittan de7iya asi ubbay iya sinthe shiiqana. Henthanchoy dorsata deeshatape shaakeysada I he asaa nam7an shaakana.
25.33: Qassi dorsata ushacha baggara deeshata haddirsa baggara essana.
25.34: “Hessafe guye, kawoy ushacha baggara de7eysatako haysada yaagana: ‘Ta Aaway anjidaysato, ha yidi sa7i medhetiya wodepe doomidi hintew giigida kawotetha laattite.
25.35: Ayis giiko, taani koshatin muzideta, saamotin ushshideta, eretonna imatha asi gidada bin mokideta,
25.36: kallotin mayzideta, hargetin hargisideta, qashetin tana oychideta’ yaagana.
25.37: “Hessafe guye, xilloti zaaridi, ‘Godaw, neeni koshatin awude be7idi muzido? Woyko neeni saamotin awude be7idi ushshido?
25.38: Neeni imathe gidada yin awude be7idi mokido? Woyko neeni kallotin awude mayzido?
25.39: Neeni hargin woyko qashetin neeko bidi nena awude oychido?’ yaagana.
25.40: Kawoy zaaridi, ‘Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte tana kaalliya ha ubbaafe guuxeysas oothidaysa taw oothideta’ yaagana.
25.41: “He wode haddirsa baggara de7eysatako, ‘Ha baadetidaysato, ta matape haakite. Xalahesinne iya kiitanchotas giigida merinaa taman biite.
25.42: Ayis giiko, koshatin tana muzibeeketa; saamotin ushshibeeketa.
25.43: Taani imathe gidada bin tana mokibeketa, kallotin mayzibeeketa, hargininne qashetin tana oychibeeketa’ yaagana.
25.44: “He wode enti, ‘Godaw, neeni koshatin woyko saamotin woyko imathe gidada bin woyko kallotin woyko hargin woyko qashetin be7idi nena awude maaddonna ixido?’ yaagidi zaarana.
25.45: “He wode kawoy zaaridi entako, ‘Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte tana kaalliya ha ubbaafe guuxeysa maaddonna ixidaysi, tana maaddonna ixidaysa’ yaagana.
25.46: Hessa gisho, he asati merinaa pirdas qassi xilloti merinaa de7uwas baana” yaagis.

26.1: Yesuusi ha timirtiya ubbaa wursida wode ba tamaaretako,
26.2: “Nam7u gallasape guye, Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallas gideysa ereeta. He gallas Asa Na7i masqale bolla kaqetanaw asa kushen aadhidi imetana” yaagis.
26.3: He wode kahine halaqatinne cimati, Qayyaafa geetetiya kahine halaqaa keethan shiiqidi,
26.4: asi eronna Yesuusa oykidi, wodhanaw maqetidosona.
26.5: Shin enti, “Asay ooshshi kessonna mela gidi, Paasika bonchiya gallas hessa oothoko” yaagidosona. Yesuusa Shitto Tiyida Maccasiw (Mar 14:3-9; Yoha 12:1-8)
26.6: Yesuusi Bitaane kataman baro hargida Simoona son de7ees.
26.7: Yesuusi imatuwa bolla de7ishin issi maccasiya albasxiroosa philqaaxe kumetha daro al7o shitto eka yada Yesuusa huuphen tigasu.
26.8: Shin Yesuusa tamaareti hessa be7idi hanqetidi, “Ha shittoy coo iitey aybisee?
26.9: Ha shittoy al7o gaten bayzetidi, miishey manqotas imetanaw danda7etees” yaagidosona.
26.10: Yesuusi enti geysa eridi, entako, “Ha maccasiw ayis waaysetii? Iya taw lo77oba oothasu.
26.11: Manqoti ubba wode hintera daana. Shin taani hintera ubba wode de7ike.
26.12: Iya ha shittuwa ta bolla tigidaysi tana mooganaw giigisanaasa.
26.13: Taani hintew tuma odayis; biitta ubban ha Wongelay sabbaketiya bessan awunka, asay iyo hassayana mela iya oothidaysi odetana” yaagis. Yihudi Yesuusa Aathidi Imuwa (Mar 14:10-11; Luqa 22:3-6)
26.14: He wode tammanne nam7u Yesuusa tamaaretape issoy, Asqoroota Yihuda geeteteysi kahine halaqatako,
26.15: bidi, “Taani hintew Yesuusa aatha immiko, hinte taw ay immanee?” yaagidi enta oychis. Enti zoretidi hastamu bira santime immidosona.
26.16: Hessafe guye, Yihudi Yesuusa aathidi immanaw injetiya wode wochees. Godaa Kahuwa (Mar 14:22-26; Luqa 22:15-20; 2 Qoro 11:23-25)
26.17: Uytha Ba7aale bonchiya koyro gallas, Yesuusa tamaareti iyako yidi, “Paasika bonchiya gallas neeni maana kathi nuuni awun giigisino?” yaagidosona.
26.18: Yesuusi entako, “Kataman de7iya addiyako bidi, ‘Astamaarey, taw wodey gakida gisho, ta tamaaretara Paasika bonchiya gallasa ne son aathana yaagees’ yaagite” yaagis.
26.19: Iya tamaareti Yesuusi bantana kiitidaysada oothidi, Paasika Ba7aale gallas maana kathaa giigisidosona.
26.20: Sa7ay omarsiya wode, Yesuusi tammanne nam7u hawaaretara kathi maanaw uttis.
26.21: Enti mishin, Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hintefe issi uray tana aathidi immana” yaagis.
26.22: Enti daro dagammidi, issoy issoy, “Godaw, tuma taneshsha?” gidi iya oychidosona.
26.23: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ba kushiya taara issife shaatiyan yeddeysi I tana aathidi immana.
26.24: Asa Na7ay, Xoossaa qaalan iyaw xaafetidaysada hayqana. Shin Asa Na7aa aathidi immiya uraa ayye! He uray yeletonna attidaako iyaw lo77oshin” yaagis.
26.25: Iya aathidi immanaw de7iya Yihudi zaaridi, “Astamaariyaw, neeni gey taneyee?” yaagis. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Neeni ne huuphen gadasa” yaagis.
26.26: Enti mishin, Yesuusi uythaa ekidi Xoossaa galatis. He uythaa menthidi ba tamaaretas immidi, “He7ite, miite, haysi ta ashuwa” yaagis.
26.27: Xuu7aa ekidi, Xoossaa galatis. Entaw immidi, “Ubbay haysafe uyite.
26.28: Haysi daro asa nagara atotethas mela gukiya ta suuthaa. Ha suuthay Xoossay hintera geliya caaquwa mintheysa.
26.29: Shin taani hintew odayis; taani ta Aawa kawotethan ooratha woyne ushsha hintera uyana gallasa gakanaw nam7antho ha woyne ushsha uyike” yaagis.
26.30: Galata mazmure yexidaape guye, Shamaho zuma bidosona. Phexroosi Yesuusa Kaddanaysi Odetis (Mar 14:27-31; Luqa 22:31-34; Yoha 13:36-38)
26.31: He wode Yesuusi entako, “ ‘Xoossay henthanchuwa shocana dorsatika laaletana’ geetetidi Xoossa qaalan xaafetidaysa mela hachi qamma hinte ubbay tana aggidi baqatana.
26.32: Shin taani hayqope dendidaape guye hintefe sinthatada Galila baana” yaagis.
26.33: Phexroosi zaaridi, “Enti ubbay nena aggidi baqatikoka, taani nena aggike” yaagis.
26.34: Yesuusi Phexroosako, “Taani new tuma odayis; hachi qamma kuttoy waassanaape sinthe neeni tana heedzu toho kaddana” yaagis.
26.35: Phexroosi zaaridi, “Taani neera issife hayqope attishin, nena ubbaka kaddike” yaagis. Hanko iya tamaareti ubbayka hessada gidoosona. Yesuusi Geetasamanen Woossis (Mar 14:32-42; Luqa 22:39-46)
26.36: Yaatidi, Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Geetasemaane geetetiya bessaa bidi, entako, “Taani hini bada Xoossaa woossashana, hinte haysan uttite” yaagis.
26.37: Phexroosanne Zabdiyoosa nayta nam7ata baara eki bidi daro azzanonne un7etethi doomis.
26.38: Qassika entako, “Taani hayqos gathiya un7a un7etas. Haysan taara gam7itenne minnidi naagite” yaagis.
26.39: Guuthi sinthe bidi biittan gufannidi, “Ta Aawaw, danda7etiyaba gidiko ha waaye xuu7aa taape digga. Shin ne sheney hanope attishin, ta sheney hanopo” yaagidi Xoossaa woossis.
26.40: Yesuusi ba tamaaretako simmi yidi enti dhiskidashin demmis. Phexroosako, “Hinte issi saatekoka dhiskonna taara minnanaw danda7ibeeketii?
26.41: Paacen hinte gelonna mela barkidi naagitenne Xoossaa woossite. Hintew lo77o amoy de7ees, shin hinte daaburancho asi” yaagis.
26.42: Yesuusi qassi nam7antho bidi, “Ta Aawaw, taani ha waaye xuu7ape uyonna de7ishe aadhanaw danda7etonnaba gidiko ne sheney hano” yaagidi Xoossaa woossis.
26.43: Qassika simmi yaa wode iya tamaareta ayfiya dhiskoy goozin, zin7idashin demmis.
26.44: Qassika enta aggidi, bidi kase qaala zaari heedzantho woossis.
26.45: Hessafe guye, ba tamaaretako yidi, “Ha77i gakanaw dhisketinne shempetii? Heko, Asa Na7i, nagaranchota kushen aadhidi imetiya saatey gakis.
26.46: Dendidi yedhite, tana aathidi immeysi haysish gakis” yaagis. Yesuusi Oyketis (Mar 14:43-50; Luqa 22:47-53; Yoha 18:3-12)
26.47: Yesuusi buroo hessa haasayishin, tammanne nam7u tamaaretape issoy, Yihudi gaki wodhis. Kahine halaqatinne deriya cimati kiitida daro asati mashshenne xam7a oykidi iyara issife yidosona.
26.48: Yesuusa aathidi immiya Yihudi he daro asaako, “Taani yeereysi hinte koyeysi iya, iya oykite” yaagidi malla immi wothis.
26.49: Iiraka Yesuusako shiiqidi, “Astamaariyaw, saro de7ay” yaagidi iya yeeris.
26.50: Yesuusi iyako, “Ta laggiyaw, neeni oothanaba ootha agga” yaagis. Hessafe guye, shiiqidi, Yesuusa oykidosona.
26.51: Yesuusara de7eysatape issoy ba mashsha shoddidi kahine halaqaa aylliya shocidi, iya haythaa qanxidi yeggis.
26.52: Shin Yesuusi, “Ne mashsha guye shoohuwan zaara. Ayis giiko, mashsha shoddiya ubbay mashshan hayqana.
26.53: Ta, ta Aawa woossiyako daro mukulun taybetiya kiitanchota yeddanaw danda7onnaba new daanii?
26.54: Yaatin, Xoossaa qaalan hessada hananaw bessees geetetidaysi waanidi poletanee?” yaagis.
26.55: He saatiyan, Yesuusi he shiiqida daro asaako, “Tana panga oothidi oykanaw mashshanne xam7a oykidi yidetii? Taani xoossa keethan gallas gallas tamaarsashe hintera de7iya wode tana oykibeeketa.
26.56: Shin haysi ubbay hanidaysi nabeti Xoossaa qaalan xaafidaysi poletana melasa” yaagis. He wode iya tamaareti ubbay iya aggidi baqatidosona. Yesuusi Pirda Shango Sinthan (Mar 14:53-65; Luqa 22:54-55, 63-71; Yoha 18:13-14, 19-24)
26.57: Yesuusa oykidaysati kahine halaqaa Qayyaafako iya efidosona. Yan higge astamaaretinne biitta cimati shiiqidi de7oosona.
26.58: Shin Phexroosi kahine halaqaa zabbaa gakanaw haahon iya kaallis. Iya wursethay shaaketana gakanaw zabbaa gelidi naageysatara uttis.
26.59: Kahine halaqatinne shiiqida asa ubbay Yesuusa wodhanaw iya bolla wordo marka koydosona.
26.60: Daroti yidi iya bolla wordo marka markatidosona, shin aykoka demmibookona. Guyepe nam7u asati yidi,
26.61: “Ha uray, ‘Taani Xoossa Keetha laallada heedzu gallasan zaara keexanaw danda7ayis’ yaagis” yaagidosona.
26.62: Kahineta halaqay dendi eqidi Yesuusako, “Haysati nena mootiya mootuwas neeni zaariyabay baawee?” yaagis.
26.63: Shin Yesuusi si77i gis. Qassika kahine halaqay, “Taani nena de7o Xoossaa sunthan oykayis; neeni Xoossaa Na7aa Kiristoosa gidiko nuus oda” yaagis.
26.64: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Neeni ne huuphenka gadasa. Shin taani hintew odayis; hizape guye, Asa Na7ay wolqaama Xoossaa ushacha baggan uttidashin, qassi salo shaarara yishin hinte be7ana” yaagis.
26.65: He wode kahine halaqay daro yilotidi ba ma7uwa peedhidi, “Haysa be7ite Xoossaa cayis! Nuna hara marka ay koshshii? I ha77i cayidaysa hinte si7ideta.
26.66: Hinte qofay aybee?” yaagis. Entika, “Iyaw hayqo bessees” yaagidi zaaridosona.
26.67: Yaatin, enti iya som7on cuttidi dechidosona. Harati iya baqidi,
26.68: “Kiristoosa! Nena dechiday oonee? Ane nuus oda” yaagidosona. Phexroosi Yesuusa Kaddis (Mar 14:66-72; Luqa 22:56-62; Yoha 18:15-18, 25-27)
26.69: Phexroosi zabban uttidashin, issi aylliya iyako yada, “Neenika Galila Yesuusara issife de7aasa” yaagasu.
26.70: Shin I enta ubbaa sinthan he aylleko, “Neeni giyabay aybeko taani erike” yaagidi kaddis.
26.71: Qassi bidi dirsaa pengeko gakishin hara aylliya iya be7ada, yan de7iya asaako, “Ha uray Naazirete Yesuusara de7ees” yaagasu.
26.72: Phexroosi nam7antho caaqidi, “Taani he uraa erike!” yaagis.
26.73: Guuthu gam7ishin, yan eqida asati Phexroosako yidi, “Neka tuma entara issife de7aasa; neeni ne odan eretasa” yaagidosona.
26.74: Hessafe guye, Phexroosi, “Taani he uraa erike!” yaagidi, bana baadethinne caaqo doomis. He wode iiraka kuttoy waassi aggis.
26.75: Yesuusi iyako, “Neeni kuttoy waassanaape sinthe tana heedzu toho kaddana” gidaysa Phexroosi akeekidi, kare keyidi iita yeeho yeekis.

27.1: Wonta guura kahine halaqatinne biitta cimati ubbay Yesuusa wodhisanaw maqetidosona.
27.2: Enti Yesuusa qachi efidi deriya haariya Philaxoosas aathidi immidosona.
27.3: He wode Yesuusa oythida Yihudi, Philaxoosi Yesuusa bolla pirdidaysa be7idi, qiirotidi, he hastamu bira santime kahine halaqatasinne deriya cimatas guye zaaris.
27.4: “Taani xillo asi hayqos aatha immada nagara oothas” yaagis. Shin enti, “Hessi nu meto gidenna ne meto” yaagidosona.
27.5: Yihudi miishiya Xoossa Keethan yeggi aggidi enta matape bidi, suletidi hayqis.
27.6: Kahine halaqati miishiya ekidi, “Ha miishey suutha miishe gidiya gisho, nuuni Xoossa Keethaa miishiyara gatheysi woga gidenna” yaagidosona.
27.7: Hessafe guye, issife zoretidi, bete asi mooganaw mana biitta shammidosona.
27.8: Hessa gisho, he gadey hachi gakanaw suutha biitta geetetidi xeegetees.
27.9: Nabiya Ermiyaasi, “Isra7eele asay iyaw qanxanaw gammatida hastamu bira santime ekidosona.
27.10: Goday tana kiitidaysada mana biitta shammanaw immidosona” gidaysi he wode poletis. Yesuusi Philaxoosa Sinthan (Mar 15:2-5; Luqa 23:3-5; Yoha 18:33-38)
27.11: Yesuusi deriya haariya Philaxoosa sinthe shiiqin, Philaxoosi iyako, “Neeni Ayhude kawo?” yaagidi oychis. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ne gadasa” yaagis.
27.12: Kahine halaqatinne biitta cimati iya mootiya wode entaw aybi zaaroka immibeenna.
27.13: He wode Philaxoosi Yesuusako, “Haysati nena mootiya mootuwa ubbaa si7ikii?” yaagis.
27.14: Yesuusi hari attoshin, issi qaalaka zaaronna ixin, deriya haareysi daro malaaletis. Yesuusi Hayqo Pirdetis (Mar 15:6-15; Luqa 23:13-25; Yoha 18:39-40; 19:1-16)
27.15: Deriya haareysi laythan laythan Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallasan, asay koyiya issi asi qashope birshiya wogi de7ees.
27.16: He wode issi Barbaana Yesuusa geetetiya daro eretida iita asi qasho keethan de7ees.
27.17: Hessa gisho, daro asay shiiqidi de7ishin Philaxoosi, “Taani hintew Barbaana billoye woyko Yesuusa geetetiya Kiristoosa billo?” yaagidi asaa oychis.
27.18: I hessa giday enti qanaatidi Yesuusa oythidaysa eriya gishosa.
27.19: Philaxoosi pirda keethan uttidashin, iya machiya, “Taani hachi qamma amuhon iyabaa daro waayetashe aqida gisho, he xillo uraa bolla aybibaaka oothofa” yaagada kiittasu.
27.20: He wode kahine halaqati, “Barbaani bileto, Yesuusi hayqo” gidi Philaxoosa woossana mela asaa cimmidosona.
27.21: Philaxoosi zaaridi, “Taani enta nam7aafe hintew oona billana mela koyeetii?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Barbaana billana mela koyoos” yaagidosona.
27.22: Philaxoosi, “Yaatin, Yesuusa geetetiya Kiristoosa waato?” yaagidi enta oychis. Ubbay zaaridi, “Masqaliya bolla iya kaqa” yaagidosona.
27.23: Philaxoosi asaako, “Ayis? I ay iitabaa oothidee?” yaagidi oychis. Shin asay kaseysafe aathidi, “Masqaliya bolla iya kaqa” gidi waassidosona.
27.24: Ooshshi denthethofe hara aybibaaka oothanaw danda7etonaysa Philaxoosi be7idi, haathe ekidi, “Ha uraa hayquwan taani de7ike. Hessa oothey hintena” yaagidi asaa sinthan ba kushiya meecetis.
27.25: Asa ubbay zaaridi, “Iya suuthaa gomey nunanne nu nayta gako” yaagidosona.
27.26: Yaatin, Philaxoosi Barbaana entaw billidi, Yesuusa lisson garaafidi, masqaliya bolla kaqetidi hayqana mela entaw aathidi immis. Yesuusa Bolla Qelqisidosona (Mar 15:16-20; Yoha 19:2-3)
27.27: Hessafe guye, Philaxoosa wotaadareti Yesuusa deriya haareysa soo eki efin, wotaadareti ubbay iya yuushuwan eqidosona.
27.28: Iya afilaa qaari ekidi zo7o afila mayzidosona.
27.29: Qassi aguntha kallacha giigisidi, iya huuphen wothidosona. Iya ushacha kushiyan mayre xam7a oythidi, iya sinthan gulbatidi, “Ayhude kawaw, mukulu laythi kawota!” yaagidi, iya bolla qelqisidosona.
27.30: Iya bolla cuttidosona. He mayre xam7aa ekidi, iya huuphen shocidosona.
27.31: Enti iya bolla qelqisidaape guye, zo7o afilaa iyape qaari ekidi, iya afilaa iya mayzidosona. Masqaliya bolla iya kaqanaw eki efidosona. Yesuusi Kaqetis (Mar 15:21-32; Luqa 23:25-43; Yoha 19:17-27)
27.32: Enti kare keyidi, issi Simoona geetetiya Qereena biitta asi demmidi, Yesuusa masqaliya wolqan toossidosona.
27.33: Golgota geetetiya bessi gakidosona. “Golgota” guussay “Guugge bessi” guussu.
27.34: Hessan enti ciiye walaketida woyne ushsha uyo gidi iyaw immidosona. Shin I hessa ganxi ekidi, uyonna ixis.
27.35: Enti masqaliya bolla iya kaqidaysafe guye, iya afilaa shaakidi, saama yeggidi ekidosona.
27.36: Hessafe guye, yan uttidi iya naagidosona.
27.37: Qassi, “Haysi Ayhude Kawa Yesuusa” giya mooto xuufiya iya huuphe son wothidosona.
27.38: Yesuusara he wode nam7u pangata issuwa iyape ushacha baggan, hankuwa iyape haddirsa baggara, masqaliya bolla kaqidosona.
27.39: Ogiyara aadhiya asay Yesuusa boridi, iya bolla cuttishe,
27.40: “Xoossa Keethaa laallada heedzu gallasa giddon keexeyso, nena ashsha. Neeni Xoossaa Na7a gidiko, ane masqaliya bollafe wodha” yaagidosona.
27.41: Hessadaka, kahine halaqati, higge astamaaretinne biitta cimati issife Yesuusa bolla qelqisidosona. Haysada yaagidosona:
27.42: “Harata ashshis, shin bana ashshanaw danda7ibeenna. I Isra7eele kawo gidiko, ane masqaliya bollafe ha77i wodho, nuka iya ammanana.
27.43: Xoossan I ammanetees, Xoossay iya ashshanaw koyko ane ashsho. Ayis giiko, I bana, ‘Taani Xoossaa Na7a’ gees” yaagidosona.
27.44: Qassi hari attoshin, iyara masqaliya bolla kaqetida pangatika hessada gidi iya bolla qelqisidosona. Yesuusa Hayquwa (Mar 15:33-41; Luqa 23:44-49; Yoha 19:28-30)
27.45: Usupun saatepe bidi, uddufun saate gakanaw biitta ubbay dhumis.
27.46: Uddufun saate gidiya wode Yesuusi, “Elohe, Elohe, lama sabaqtanii?” gidi gita waaso waassis. “Elohe, Elohe, lama sabaqtanii?” geysa birshethay “Ta Xoossaw, ta Xoossaw, tana ayis aggadii?” guussu.
27.47: Hessan eqida asaape issoti issoti hessa si7idi, “Ha uray Eeliyaasa xeegees” yaagidosona.
27.48: Iira entafe issoy woxi bidi, isponje ekidi, caala woyne ushsha kunthis. Hessa mayre xam7a xeeran wothidi ushshanaw iya doonako shiishis.
27.49: Shin hankoti, “Naaga, Eeliyaasi iya ashshanaw yaaneko ane be7oos” yaagidosona.
27.50: Yesuusi nam7antho gita waaso waassidi, hayqi aggis.
27.51: He saaten xoossa keethan kaqetida magaraajoy qommofe duge gakanaw nam7u keyidi, peedheti wodhis. Biittay qaaxis, zaallayka phalqetis.
27.52: Duufoti dooyetin Xoossaa asatape daroti hayqope dendidosona.
27.53: Enti duufope keyidi, Yesuusi hayqope dendidaape guye, geeshsha katamaa bidosona; yan enti daro asaas bentidosona.
27.54: Mato halaqaynne iyara Yesuusa naagiya wotaadareti biittay qaaxidaysanne hessan hanidaba be7ida wode daro yayyidi “Tuma haysi Xoossaa Na7aa” yaagidosona.
27.55: Hessan daro maccasati, Galilape doomidi Yesuusa haggaazishe kaallidaysati haahon eqidi xeelloosona.
27.56: Enta giddon Magdela Mayraama, Yayqoobanne Yoosefa aayiya Mayraamanne Zabdiyoosa machiya de7oosona. Yesuusi Moogetis (Mar 15:42-47; Luqa 23:50-56; Yoha 19:38-42)
27.57: Sa7ay omarsiya wode Yoosefa geetetiya issi dure aday, Armaate katamape yis. I ba huuphenka Yesuusa kaalliya asi.
27.58: Yoosefi Philaxoosako bidi, Yesuusa aha ekanaw woossis. Philaxoosi ahay Yoosefas imetana mela kiittis.
27.59: Yesuusa aha ekidi, geeshsha moogo afilan xaaxis.
27.60: Baw moogetanaw shuchafe woocida ooratha gongolon iya aha wothis. Qassi he gongoluwa doonan gita shuchaa gondorsi wothidi, aggidi bis.
27.61: Magdela Mayraamanne hanko Mayraama he gongoluwako simmidi uttidosona.
27.62: Wontethe Sambaata gallas, kahine halaqatinne Farsaaweti Philaxoosako yidi, haysada yaagidosona:
27.63: “Godaw, ha wordanchoy paxa de7ishe, ‘Taani heedzu gallasape guye, hayqope dendana’ yaagidaysi nuus hassayetis.
27.64: Hessa gisho, I moogetida gongoluwa heedzu gallas gakanaw, minthi naagana mela kiittarki. Hessi hanonna ixiko, iya tamaareti bidi iya aha kaysi dhaysidi, ‘Hayqope dendis’ yaagidi asaas odiko nam7antho balesoy koyroysafe ubba haa iitana” yaagidosona.
27.65: Philaxoosi entako, “Hintew naageysati de7oosona; bidi hintew danda7etida mela naagisite” yaagis.
27.66: Hessa gisho, enti bidi duufoy boshetonna mela shuchaa bolla maatame wothidi wotaadaretan naagisidosona.

28.1: Sambaati aadhin, wogga wode wonta guura, Magdela Mayraamanne hanko Mayraama Yesuusi moogetida gongoluwa be7anaw bidosona.
28.2: Qoponna wolqaama biitta qaaxoy hanis. Godaa kiitanchoy salope wodhidi duufuwa doonan de7iya shuchaa gondorsidi iya bolla uttis.
28.3: Iya malay wol7anthi daanees. Iya ma7oyka shachada boothi.
28.4: Naageysati kiitanchuwa be7idi, yashshan kokoridi, hayqida asada hanidosona.
28.5: Kiitanchoy maccasatako, “Hinte masqaliya bolla kaqetida Yesuusa koyeysa taani eriya gisho, yayyofite.
28.6: I kase odidaysa mela hayqope dendis; haysan deenna. Haa yidi iya zin7isida bessaa be7ite.
28.7: Hinte ha77i ellesi bidi, iya tamaaretas, ‘Yesuusi hayqope dendis. Qassi I hintefe sinthatidi Galila baana; hinte iya yan be7ana’ yaagidi odite. Taani hintew haysa odanaw yas” yaagis.
28.8: Enti yayyishenne daro ufaytishe, duufuwa matape ellessidi bidi, iya tamaaretas odanaw woxidosona.
28.9: Qoponna Yesuusi entara gahetidi entako, “Saroy hintew gido” yaagis. Enti iyako shiiqidi, iya tohuwa oykidi iyaw goyinnidosona.
28.10: He wode Yesuusi entako, “Yayyofite; bidi ta tamaareti Galila baana mela entaw odite. Enti yan tana be7ana” yaagis.
28.11: He maccasati bishin, duufuwa naagiya wotaadaretape baggati katamaa bidi, hanidaba ubbaa kahine halaqatas odidosona.
28.12: Kahine halaqatinne cimati shiiqidi zoretidi, wotaadaretas daro miishe immidi,
28.13: “ ‘Nuuni dhiskidashin iya tamaareti qamma yidi, iya aha kaysidosona’ yaagite.
28.14: Ha odaa deriya haareysi si7iko, hessi hinte bala gidonnaysa nuuni iya odi ammanthana. Hintena aybika Hirgisopo” yaagidosona.
28.15: Wotaaddareti miishiya ekidi, kiitetidaysada oothidosona. Ha oday Ayhude matan hachi gakanaw odetishe de7ees. Gita Kiita (Mar 16:14-18; Luqa 24:36-49; Yoha 20:19-23; Hawa 1:6-8)
28.16: Tammanne issi iya tamaareti Yesuusi bantana biite gida Galila Zumaa bolla Keyidosona.
28.17: Yan enti iya be7ida wode iyaw goyinnidosona, shin entafe issoti issoti sidhidosona.
28.18: Yesuusi entako shiiqidi, “Saloninne sa7an maati ubbay taw imetis.
28.19: Hiza, hinte ubba bessi bidi, Aawa, Na7aa, Geeshsha Ayyaana sunthan ase ubbaa xammaqidi tana kaalleyisata oothite.
28.20: Taani hintena kiittidaba ubbaa enti naagana mela enta tamaarsite. Taani wodiya wursethaa gakanaw ubba wode hintera de7ayis” yaagis.

1.1: Haysi Xoossa Na7a Yesuus Kiristoosa wongelaa doomethi.
1.2: Nabiya Isayaasi xaafida maxaafan Xoossay, “Heko, taani ta kiitanchuwa taani neepe sinthe yeddana. I ne ogiya giigisana.
1.3: Issoy mela biittan ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, ‘Godaa ogiya giigisite; I hemetana horoga iyaw suurisite gis’ ” yaagees.
1.4: Xammaqiya Yohaanisi asaa xammaqishe, “Hinte nagaraape simmidi xammaqetite; Xoossay hinte nagaraa atto gaana” yaagidi qaala odishe mela biittafe yis.
1.5: Yihuda biittan de7iya asa ubbaynne Yerusalaame katamaa asa ubbay Yohaanisako yoosona. Banta nagara paaxin, Yohaanisi enta Yordaanose Shaafan xammaqees.
1.6: Yohaanisi gimale ikisepe dadetida afila ma77ees. Ba xeessan dafo dancees; qassi boolenne degera eessi mees.
1.7: Yohaanisi qaala odishe, “Taape guyera daro minneysi yees. Hari attoshin, taani iya caammaa wodoruwa hokada billanaw bessike.
1.8: Taani hintena haathan xammaqayis, shin I hintena Geeshsha Ayyaanan xammaqana” yaagis. Yesuusa Xammaqetethinne Paacetethi (Maato 3:13-17; 4:1-11; Luqa 3:21-22; 4:1-13)
1.9: Yesuusi he wode Galila biittan de7iya Naazirete katamaape yin, Yohaanisi Yordaanose Shaafan iya xammaqis.
1.10: Yesuusi haathaafe keyiya wode saloy dooyetin, Geeshsha Ayyaanay ba bolla holleda wodhishin be7is.
1.11: Qassi salope, “Taani dosiya ta na7ay nena; ta nenan ufaytayis” giya qaalay yis.
1.12: Iira Geeshsha Ayyaanay Yesuusa mela biitta efis.
1.13: Yesuusi mela biittan Xalahen paacetishe oytamu gallas gam7is. Do7atara de7is, shin kiitanchoti yidi iya maaddidosona. Yesuusi Xeegida Koyro Tamaareta (Maato 4:12-22; Luqa 4:14-15; 5:1-11)
1.14: Yohaanisi qashetidaape guye, Yesuusi Xoossaa kawotethaa Wongela odishe Galila biitta bis.
1.15: Yan, “Wodey gakis; Xoossaa kawotethay matatis. Hinte nagaraape simmidi, Wongelan ammanite” yaagis.
1.16: Yesuusi Galila Abbaa matara aadhishe, molo oykiya, Simoonanne iya ishaa Indiriyasa, banta gitiya abban yeggeyisata be7is.
1.17: Entako, “Tana kaallite; taani hintena ase oythu tamaarsana” yaagis.
1.18: Enti ellesidi banta gitiya yeggi aggidi Yesuusa kaallidosona.
1.19: Yesuusi guuthi sinthe bidi, nam7u ishata Zabdiyoosa nayta, Yayqoobanne Yohaanisa wogoluwa giddon banta gitiya giigiseyisata be7is.
1.20: I enta be7ida mela xeegis. Enti banta aawa Zabdiyoosa, iya oosanchotara wogoluwa giddon yeggi aggidi Yesuusa kaallidi bidosona. Tuna Ayyaani Oykida Ura (Luqa 4:31-37)
1.21: Enti Qifirnahooma katamaa gelidosona. Sambaati gelida mela Yesuusi ellesidi ayhude woosa keethi gelidi tamaarso oykis.
1.22: Maatara de7iya asada tamaarsesipe attishin, higge astamaaretatho tamaarsonna gisho, asay iya timirtiyan malaaletidosona.
1.23: He wode tuna ayyaanay oykida issi uray ayhude woosa keethi gelidi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi,
1.24: “Naazirete Yesuusa, neeni nuupe ay koyay? Nuna dhaysanaw yadii? Neeni ooneko ta erayis; neeni Xoossaa Geeshshaa gidikii?” yaagis.
1.25: Yesuusi he tuna ayyaana, “Hayza, ha addiyafe keya” gidi kiittis.
1.26: Tuna ayyaanay uraa daferethidi, waassidi iyape keyis.
1.27: Asa ubbay malaaletidi, “Haysi aybee? Ha uray ba maatan hari attoshin tuna ayyaanataka kiittees. Enti iyaw kiitetoosona; haysi aybi ooratha timirtee?” gidi, banta giddon issoy issuwa oychidosona.
1.28: Yesuusa sunthay ellesidi Galila biittan de7iya heera ubban keyis. Daro Harganchoti Paxidosona (Maato 8:14-17; Luqa 4:38-41)
1.29: Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethafe keyidi, Yayqoobaranne Yohaanisara Simoona soonne Indiriyasa soo bis.
1.30: Simoona mache aayiya qoxo misha hargada zin7idaaro Yesuusi yaa gakiya wode iyaw odidosona.
1.31: I iiko shiiqidi, I kushiya oykidi, iyo denthidi essis. Qoxoynne mishay aggin iya enta mokasu.
1.32: Hargida asa ubbaanne tuna ayyaanati oykida asa ubbaa omarsi away wullidaape guye, iyako ehidosona.
1.33: Kataman de7iya asa ubbay he keetha kare shiiqidosona.
1.34: Yesuusi dumma dumma hargen oyketida daro asaa pathidi, daro tuna ayyaanata kessis. I ooneko tuna ayyaanati erida gisho, enta odisonna diggis. Yesuusi Galilan Tamaarso Doometha (Luqa 4:42-44)
1.35: Yesuusi wonta guura dendidi, asi bayna bessi bidi, yan Xoossaa woossis.
1.36: Simooninne iyara de7eysati iya koyishe bidosona.
1.37: Enti iya demmidi, “Asa ubbay nena koyees” yaagidosona.
1.38: Yesuusi qassi enta, “He heeran de7iya hara katamata yedhite. Taani yiday Wongela odanaw gidiya gisho yanka qaala odanaw bessees” yaagis.
1.39: Ayhude woosa keethatan qaala odishenne tuna ayyaanata kessishe, Galila biitta ubban yuuyis. Baro Harganchuwa (Maato 8:1-4; Luqa 5:12-17)
1.40: Baroy oykida issi uray Yesuusako yidi, iya sinthan gulbatidi, “Neeni koyko tana geeshshanaw danda7aasa” yaagidi woossis.
1.41: Yesuusi iyaw qadhetidi, ba kushiya yeddidi iya bochidi, “Taani koyayis, geeyiya” yaagis.
1.42: Ellesidi baroy uraa yeddin uray paxis.
1.43: Yesuusi uraa minthi naagisidi kessi yeddis.
1.44: Yesuusi iya, “Nena era, haysa oodeska odopa. Shin bada ne asatethaa kahine bessa. Neeni ha77i geeshshi gididaysa asaa erisanaw, Musey kiitida yarshuwa yarsha” yaagis.
1.45: Shin uray bidi, guta ubban asa ubbaas odis. Hessa gisho, Yesuusi qonce keyidi, katama gelanaw danda7ibeenna. Shin asi bayna bessan gaxan de7is; qassi asay ubba bessafe iyako yoosona.

2.1: Guutha gallasape guye, Yesuusi Qifirnahooma simmidi, son de7ees giya oday si7etis.
2.2: Asaa keethay ekonna ixin, hari attoshin kareyka xuummana gakanaw daro asay shiiqin, Yesuusi qaala tamaarsis.
2.3: Oyddu asati issi gunda uraa tookidi iyako ehidosona.
2.4: Asay darida gisho, uraa Yesuusako shiishanaw entaw danda7etonna ixin, Yesuusi de7iya ginara keetha qaaridi, kaara qawuxidi uraa I zin7ida algara duge yeddidi Yesuusa sinthan wodhisidosona.
2.5: Yesuusi enta ammanuwa be7idi, he gunda uraa, “Ta na7aw, ne nagaray atto geetetis” yaagis.
2.6: Higge astamaaretape he bessan uttida issoti issoti banta wozanan,
2.7: “La ha uray haysa mela iitabaa Xoossaa bolla ayis odeetii? Xoossaa xalaalape attishin, hari ooni nagara atto gaanaw danda7ii?” gidi qopidosona.
2.8: Enti banta wozanan hessada qopidaysa Yesuusi ellesidi ba ayyaanan eridi, entako, “Hinte hinte wozanan ayis hessada qopeetii?
2.9: Gunda uraa, ‘Ne nagaray atto geetetis’ geysi mateyee? Woyko, ‘Denda eqada ne algaa tookada ba’ geysi matee?
2.10: Shin taw, Asa Na7aas, sa7a bolla nagara atto gaanaw maati de7eysa hinte erana mela” gidi he gunda uraako,
2.11: “Nena gayis, denda eqada ne algaa tookada ne soo ba” yaagis.
2.12: Uray ellesi dendi eqidi, ba algaa tookidi asa ubbay be7ishin bis. Asa ubbay malaaletidi, “Nuuni haysa mela malaalsiyaba be7i eroko” yaagidi Xoossaa galatidosona. Yesuusi Leewe Xeessa (Maato 9:9-13; Luqa 5:27-32)
2.13: Yesuusi qassi Galila Abbaa doona simmi bidi, baako yida asa ubbaa tamaarsis.
2.14: Yaara aadhishe, Ilfiyoosa na7aa Leewe geeteteysi qaraxa qanxisiya bessan uttidaysa be7idi, “Tana kaalla” yaagis. Leewey dendi eqidi iya kaallis.
2.15: Yesuusi kathi maanaw Leewe son uttis. Iya kaalliya asay daro gidiya gisho, qaraxa qanxisiya daro asaynne nagaranchoti iyaranne iya tamaaretara issife uttidosona.
2.16: Higge astamaare gidida issi issi Farsaaweti Yesuusi nagaranchotaranne qaraxa qanxiseysatara kathi mishin be7idi, “I ayis nagaranchotaranne qaraxa qanxiseysatara kathi mii?” yaagidi, iya tamaareta oychidosona.
2.17: Yesuusi enti geysa si7idi, “Harganchotape attishin, paxatas aakime koshshenna. Taani nagaranchota xeeganaw yasipe attishin, xillota xeeganaw yabiike” yaagidi entaw zaaris. Yesuusi Xoomaba Oyshetis (Maato 9:14-17; Luqa 5:33-39)
2.18: Xammaqiya Yohaanisa tamaaretinne Farsaaweti xoomosona. Issi issi asati Yesuusako yidi, “Yohaanisa tamaaretinne Farsaaweta tamaareti xoomosona, shin ne tamaareti ayis xoomokonaa?” yaagidosona.
2.19: Yesuusi entako, “Yaaganuwa yida asati machiw ekeysi entara de7ishin, xoomanaw danda7onna? Machiw ekeysi entara de7ishin, xoomanaw danda7okona.
2.20: Shin machiw ekeysi enta matape eketana wodey yaana, enti he wode xoomana.
2.21: “Gal7a ma7o bolla ooratha carqe wothidi sikiya asi baawa. Wothidi sikiko, oorathay ceega ma7uwa daakees; daakethayka kaseysafe darees.
2.22: Qassi mal7anto woyne ceega ogoron qoliya asi baawa. Shin qoliko, he woyney ogoruwa daakees, bawuka gukees, ogoroyka iitees. Shin mal7anto woyney ooratha ogoron qoletees” yaagis. Sambaataba Bonchanaw Bessii? (Maato 12:1-8; Luqa 6:1-5)
2.23: Yesuusi issi Sambaata gallas banga gade giddora aadhishin, iya tamaareti iyara bishe banga tiya shirkidi moosona.
2.24: Farsaaweti Yesuusako, “Heko, ne tamaareti Sambaata gallas woga gidonnaba ayis oothonna?” yaagidosona.
2.25: Yesuusi entako, “Dawiti koshatidi, miyaba koyida wode, baara de7eysatara oothidaysa nabbabibeketii?
2.26: Abyataari kahine halaqa gididi de7iya wode Dawiti Xoossa keethi gelidi, kahineta xalaali maanape attishin, oonika maanaw woga gidonnaysa Godaa sinthan wothida daabbuwa mis, baara de7eystaska immis” yaagis.
2.27: Qassika Yesuusi entako, “Sambaati asa na7a go77as medhetisipe attishin, asi Sambaatas medhetibeenna.
2.28: Hessa gisho, Asa Na7ay, hari attoshin Sambaataska Godaa” yaagis.

3.1: Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethi simmi gelis. Yan kushey gundida issi uray de7ees.
3.2: Issi issi asay Yesuusa mootanaw koyidi, kushey gundida uraa Sambaata gallas I pathikonne aggiko be7anaw koyidi minthidi naagoosona.
3.3: Yesuusi kushey gundida uraa, “Denda eqada haa sinthe ya” yaagis.
3.4: Hessafe guye, asaako, “Sambaata gallas lo77oba ootheysi wogeye iitabaa ootheysi wogee? Asa shempo ashoye woyko wodho?” yaagidi oychis. Shin asay si77i gis.
3.5: Yesuusi hanqetidi, enta yuushshi aathi xeellidi, enti odin si7onnayisata gidiya gisho, enta bolla daro azzanis. He addiyako, “Ne kushiya piddi ootha” yaagis. Uray piddi oothin iya kushey paxis.
3.6: Ellesidi Farsaaweti ayhude woosa keethafe kare keyidi, Yesuusa waati wodhaneko maqetanaw Herodiisa baggatara issi soo shiiqidosona. Daro Asi Yesuusa Kaallees
3.7: Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Galila Abbaako bis. Galilapenne Yihudape yida daro asay iya kaallidosona.
3.8: Qassika Yerusalaamepe, Edomiyaasape, Yordaanose Shaafa pinthafe, Xiroosa katamaapenne Sidoona katamaape Yesuusi oothidaba si7idi, daro asay iyako yidosona.
3.9: Asaa darotethaafe dendoysan iya un7ethonna mela iya tamaareti wogolo iyaw giigisana mela kiittis.
3.10: Daro asaa I pathida gisho, hargiya asa ubbay iya bochanaw sugetoosona.
3.11: Tuna ayyaanay oykida asati iya be7ida wode iya sinthan kundidi, banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Neeni Xoossaa Na7aa gidikii?” yaagosona.
3.12: He tuna ayyaanati iya oonatetha oodeska qoncisonna mela entaw minthidi odis. Tammanne Nam7u Hawaareta (Maato 10:1-4; Luqa 6:12-16)
3.13: Yesuusi deriya bolla keyidi, ba koyida asata baako xeegis; entika iyako bidosona.
3.14: Enti baara daana melanne qaala tamaarsana mela tammanne nam7ata dooridi, enta, “Hawaareta” gidi sunthis.
3.15: Tuna ayyaanataka kessana mela entaw maata immis.
3.16: I doorida tammanne nam7ati haysata: Phexroosa yaagidi sunthida Simoona,
3.17: Bo7anerges (Dada Nayta) yaagidi sunthidaysata, Zabdiyoosa nayta Yayqoobanne Yayqooba ishaa Yohaanisa,
3.18: Indiriyasa, Filphoosa, Bartelemoosa, Maatosa, Toomasa, Ilfiyoosa na7a Yayqooba, Taadiyosa, ba biittas mishetiya Simoonanne,
3.19: Yesuusa aathidi immida Asqoroota Yihuda. Yesuusanne Bi7eel-Zebuula (Maato 12:22-32; Luqa 11:14-23; 12:10)
3.20: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi soo bis. Qassi daro asay shiiqin, inne iya tamaareti hari attoshin kathi maanawuka danda7ibookona.
3.21: Asay iya, “Gooyees” giya gisho, iya dabboti hessa si7idi iya ekanaw bidosona.
3.22: Higge astamaaretape issoti issoti Yerusalaamepe yidi, “Iya bolla Bi7eel-Zebuuli de7ees”, I, “Xalahey wolqan tuna ayyaanata kessees” yaagidi odetidosona.
3.23: Yesuusi asaa baako xeegidi leemiso odis. “Xalahey Xalahe waati kessanaw danda7ii?
3.24: Issi kawotethay ba giddon shaaketiko he kawotethay eqanaw danda7enna.
3.25: Hessadaka, issi keetha asay banta giddon shaaketiko dhayanape attishin, daanaw danda7okona.
3.26: Hiza, Xalahey baara kacetidi shaaketiko dhayope attishin, daanaw danda7enna.
3.27: “Shin koyrottidi wolqaama uraa qachonna de7ishe iya keetha gelidi, iya miishiya bonqanaw danda7iya asi baawa. Qachi simmidi iya keetha bonqanaw danda7ees.
3.28: “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Xoossay asa naytas nagara ubbaanne enti cayiya cashshe ubbaa atto gaana.
3.29: Shin Geeshsha Ayyaana bolla iitabaa odetiya oodeska merinaa nagara gidanaape attishin, Xoossay ubbaraka iya maarenna” yaagis.
3.30: Yesuusi hessa giday, issi issi asati, “Iya bolla tuna ayyaanay de7ees” yaagida gishosa. Yesuusa Aayiwunne Iya Ishata (Maato 12:46-50; Luqa 8:19-21)
3.31: Iya aayanne iya ishati yidi karen eqidi, iyako ase kiittidi iya xeegidosona.
3.32: Iya matan uttida daro asati, “Heko, ne aayeranne ne ishatara karen eqidi nena koyoosona” yaagidosona.
3.33: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ta aayiya oonee? Qassi ta ishati oonantee?” yaagis.
3.34: Ba matan uttida asa yuushshi aathi xeellidi, “Heko, ta aayanne ta ishati haysata.
3.35: Xoossay sheniya oothiya ubbay ta isha, ta michonne ta aayo” yaagis.

4.1: Yesuusi zaaridi Galila Abbaa matan tamaarsees. Daro asay iya matan yuushuwan shiiqin, abban de7iya wogoluwa giddo gelidi uttis, asa ubbay Abbaa matan de7ees.
4.2: I enta darobaa leemison tamaarsis. Tamaarsishe haysada yaagis:
4.3: “Si7ite! Issi uray zerethi zeranaw keyis.
4.4: I zerishin, issi issi zerethay oge gaxan wodhis; kafoti yidi midosona.
4.5: Issi issi zerethay garsan shaalloy de7iya biitta bolla wodhis. Daro biitti bayna gisho, he zerethay ellesidi dolis.
4.6: Shin awi keyida wode shullis. Loythidi xapho yeddiboonna gisho, ellesi melis.
4.7: Issi issi zerethay aguntha giddon wodhis. Dolidaysa agunthay diccidi cuullida gisho ayfe ayfonna attis.
4.8: Issi issi zerethay aradda biittan wodhidi dolis. Diccidi issoy hastama, issoy usupun tamma issoy xeeta ayfis” yaagis.
