18.2: “Issi kataman Xoossas yashetonna, asas yeellatonna issi daynni de7ees
18.3: He kataman issi am7iya de7awusu. Iyaka, ‘Ta giddoninne ta morkiya giddon de7iya mootuwa pirda’ yaagada ubba wode he daynnaako simeretawusu.
18.4: Daynnay guutha wodes I odaa si7onna ixis, shin guyepe ba wozanan, ‘Taani Xoossas yayyonna, asas yeellatonna ixikoka,
18.5: ha am7iya tana waaysiya gisho iw pirdana; yaatonna ixiko ubba wode yada tana salethana’ ” yaagidi qopis.
18.6: Godayka, “Geella daynnay gidaysa si7ideta;
18.7: Xoossay qammanne gallas iyako waassiya ba dooridaysatas pirdeneyee? Entana maaddanaw gam7iyee?
18.8: Ta hintew odeysa si7ite, ellesidi pirdana. Gidoshin, Asa Na7i yaa wode sa7a bolla ammano demmandesha?” yaagis. Farsaawiyanne Qaraxa Qanxisiya Ura
18.9: Qassi zaaridi, Yesuusi, bantana xillo asada oothidi ceeqeteysatasinne harata kadheysatas haysada yaagidi leemiso odis:
18.10: “Nam7u asati woossanaw Xoossa Keethi bidosona. Issoy Farsaawe hankoy qassi qaraxa qanxisiya asi.
18.11: Farsaawey eqidi baw woossishe, ‘Xoossaw taani harata mela bonqancho, geellanne laymatiya asi, aadhada qassi ha qaraxa qanxisiya uraa mela gidonna gisho nena galatayis.
18.12: Saamintafe nam7u toho xoomayis, ta demmiyaba ubbaafe asraata kessayis’ yaagis.
18.13: “Shin qaraxa qanxiseysi haahon eqidi hari attoshin salo dhoqu gidi xeellanawka yayyidi ba tiraa iccishe ‘Xoossaw, tana nagaranchuwa maararki’ gidi woossis.
18.14: Ta hintew odeysa si7ite; Farsaawiyape haysi qaraxa qanxiseysi Xoossaa sinthan xillo gididi ba soo simmis. Ayis giiko, bana dhoqu dhoqu oothiya asi kawuyana, bana kawushiya asi dhoqu dhoqu gaana” yaagis. Yesuusanne Yooga Nayta (Maato 19:13-30; Mar 10:13-31)
18.15: Yesuusi yooga nayta bolla ba kushiya wothidi anjana mela asay iyako ehoosona. Yesuusa tamaareti hessa be7idi “Ayis Yesuusako eheetii?” yaagidi kaccidosona.
18.16: Shin Yesuusi nayta baako xeegidi, “Yooga nayti taako yaanaysa diggofite; yo giite. Ayis giiko, Xoossa kawotethay entada hanidaysatasa.
18.17: Taani hintew tuma odayis; Xoossa kawotetha yooga naytatho ekonnay oonika yaa gelenna” yaagis. Dure Ura Oysha (Maato 19:16-30; Mar 10:17-31)
18.18: Ayhude halaqatape issoy, “Keeha astamaariyaw, merina de7o demmanaw ay ootho?” yaagidi oychis.
18.19: Yesuusi iyako, “Ayis tana keehaw yaagada xeegay? Issi Xoossafe attishin, hari keehi baawa.
18.20: Laammofa, wodhopa, kaysotopa, wordo markatofa, ne aawanne ne aayiw boncha” giya kiita eray gidi oychis.
18.21: Urayka, “Hessata ubbaa taani na7atethafe doomada naagashe gam7as” yaagis.
18.22: Yesuusi hessa si7ida wode, “Hiza, new issibay pacees; new de7iyaba ubbaa bayzada manqotas imma; salon nena shaloy naagees. Yaata simmada, tana kaalla” yaagis.
18.23: Shin uray hessa si7ida wode iyaw daro shaloy de7iya gisho daro qiirotis.
18.24: Yesuusi uraa be7idi, “Dure asas Xoossa kawotethi geloy waanidi un7andesha?
18.25: Durey Xoossa kawotethi gelanaysafe gimaley narpe luhora kantheysi kawuyees” yaagis.
18.26: Hessa si7ida asay, “Hessa gidiko ooni attanee?” yaagidosona.
18.28: Phexroosi, “Heko nuuni nubaa ubbaa aggidi nena kaallida” yaagis.
18.29: “Yesuusi tuma ta hintew odayis; Xoossaa kawotethaas gidi ba keethaa woyko ba machiw woyko ba ishata woyko ba aawanne ba aayiw woyko ba nayta aggiday;
18.30: ha wodiyan dako daro, yaana alamen merina de7o ekonnay oonika baawa” yaagis. Yesuusi Ba Hayquwaba Heedzantho Odis (Maato 20:17-19; Mar 10:32-34)
18.31: Yesuusi tammanne nam7ata baako xeegidi, “Ane Yerusalaame boos, nabeti Asa Na7aba xaafidaba ubbay yan poletana.
18.32: I Ayhude gidonna asaas aadhidi imetana. Enti iya toochana, cayananne iya bolla cuttana.
18.33: Iya garaafidaape guye, wodhana, shin heedzantho gallasan I hayqope dendana” yaagis.
18.34: Shin iya tamaareti he ubbaafe issibaaka akeekibokona. Iya xuuray entaw qosetida gisho I woygidaako eribookona. Qooqey Xeellis (Maato 20:29-34; Mar 10:46-52)
18.35: Yesuusi Iyaarko matiya wode issi qooqe uray oge gaxan uttidi woossees.
18.36: Qooqe uray asay he bessaara aadhishin si7idi, “I aybee?” gidi oychis.
18.38: I, “Dawita na7aw, Yesuusa, tana maararki” yaagidi waassis.
18.39: Sinthe sinthe biya asati, “Si7i ga” gidi hanqetidosona. Shin I, “Dawita na7aw, tana maara” yaagidi darsidi waassis.
18.40: Yesuusi eqidi uraa baako ehana mela kiittis. Urayka, iyako shiiqin,
18.41: “Ta new ay oothana mela koyay?” yaagidi oychis. Qooqey, “Godaw ta xeellanaw koyayis” yaagis.
18.42: Yesuusi, “Xeella, ne ammanoy nena pathis” yaagis.
18.43: Uray ellesidi xeelli aggis. Xoossaa bonchishe Yesuusa kaallis. Asa ubbay hessa be7idi Xoosse galatidosona.

19.1: Yesuusi Iyaarko gelidi aadhees.
19.2: Yan Zakiyoosa geetetiya qaraxa qanxiseyisata halaqay de7ees. I daro dure.
19.3: I Yesuusi ooneko be7anaw koyis. I qanthi gidiya gisho asaa darotethaafe dendoysan Yesuusa be7anaw danda7ibeenna.
19.4: Yesuusa be7anaw koyidi I biya ogiyas sinthe woxi bidi issi boobba mitha bolla keyis.
19.5: Yesuusi he bessaa gakishe dhoqu gidi be7idi, “Zakiyoosa, hachi ta ne son pee7anaw bessiya gisho elle wodha” yaagis.
19.6: I ellesi wodhidi ufaysan Yesuusa mokis.
19.7: He bessan de7iya asaa ubbay hessa be7idi, “Nagaranchuwa soo gelidi moketaniw hanees” yaagidi zuuzumidosona.
19.8: Gidoshin, Zakiyoosi eqidi Godaako, “Godaw, Heko taw de7iya shalo ubbaafe baggaa manqotas immana. Asape aybaka wordon balethada ekidaba gidiko oyddu kushe zaarana” yaagis.
19.9: Yesuusi qassi, “Ha uray Abrahaame na7a gidida gisho hachi atotethay ha soo yis.
19.10: Asa Na7ay yiday dhayidaysa koyanaasanne ashshanaasa” yaagis. Tammu Minaane Leemiso (Maato 25:14-30)
19.11: Asay hessa si7iya wode, Yesuusi Yerusalaame matatida gishonne Xoossaa kawotethay ha77i matara qoncana daanida gisho entaw leemiso odis.
19.12: Hessa gisho, Yesuusi, “Issi gita asi de7eysi baw kawotethi ekidi yaanaw hara biitta bis.
19.13: Iyaw oothiya aylletape tammata xeegidi issuwas issuwas tammu minaane immidi ‘Ta simmada yaana gakanaw ha miishiyara zal7ite’ yaagis.
19.14: “He biitta asay iya ixiya gisho, ha uray nu bolla kawotana mela nu koyoko yaagidi ase iya guyera kiittidosona.
19.15: “Gidoshin, he uray kawo gididi ba biitta simmis. He tammu aylleti I immida miishiyan ay mela zal7idi wodhisidaako eranaw koyidi entana xeegisis.
19.16: “Koyroysi yidi, ‘Godaw, ne taw immida miishey haraa tamma wodhis’ yaagis.
19.17: “Iya Goday, ‘Neno ammanetida aylliyaw lo77o oothadasa. Neeni guuthaban ammanetida gisho new tammu katamata bolla maata immas’ yaagis.
19.18: “Nam7anthoy yidi, ‘Godaw, ne taw immida miishey haraa ichasha wodhis’ yaagis.
19.19: “Goday iyako, ‘Newuka qassi ichashu katamata bolla maata immas’ yaagis.
19.20: “Heko heedzanthoy yidi, ‘Godaw, ta curqan xaaxada naagida ne miishiya hannashu.
19.21: Ayis giiko, neeni nebaa gidonnaba ekeysanne ne zeronnaba cakiya iita asi gidiya gisho new yayyas’ yaagis.
19.22: “Iya goday zaaridi, ‘Neno iita aylliyaw ne doonatho ta nena pirdana. Ta wothonnaba ekeysanne zeronnaba cakiya asi gideysa ne eriko,
19.23: ta yada ta miishiya wodhera ekana mela zal7iya asaas ayis immabikii?’
19.24: “Iya goday he bessan eqidaysatako, ‘Iyara de7iya miishiya ekidi tamma wodhisidaysas immite’ yaagis.
19.25: “Enti, ‘Godaw, iyaw kaseka tammu minaaney de7ees’ yaagidosona.
19.26: “Goday, ta hintew odayis; ‘De7iya ubbaas hari guzhetana, shin baynaysafe haray atto iyaw de7iyaraka eketana.
19.27: Gidoshin, ta enta bolla kawotonna mela koydaysata he ta morketa ha ta sinthe ehidi gora7ite’ gis” yaagis. Gita Bonchon Yerusalaame Geluwa (Maato 21:1-11; Mar 11:1-11; Yoha 12:12-19)
19.28: Yesuusi hessa odidaape guye, entafe sinthe hemetidi Yerusalaame bis.
19.29: Shamaho zuma bolla de7iya Beetefaagenne Bitaane matida wode ba tamaaretape nam7ata kiittidi,
19.30: “Hinte sinthan de7iya gutaa biite, hinte yaa gakiya wode oonika toggonna qashetidi de7iya hare mari demmana. Iya billidi haa eki yiite.
19.31: Oonika, ‘Ayis billeetii?’ gidi oychiko, ‘Goday iya koyees’ yaagite” yaagis.
19.32: Kiitetidaysati bidi I gidaysada hanin be7idosona.
19.33: Enti hare maraa billishin godati be7idi, “Hare maraa ayis billeetii?” yaagidosona.
19.35: Yaape hare maraa Yesuusako ehidosona. Banta ma7uwa hare maraa zokon yeggidi Yesuusa hare maraa bolla utisidosona.
19.36: Asayka I biya ogiya bolla banta ma7uwa hiixidosona.
19.37: Shamaho zuma dugethe wodhisiya ogiyako matiya wode, taybon keehi daro asay enti be7ida malaalsiyaban ufaytidi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi,
19.38: “Godaa sunthan yaa kawoy anjetidaysa saluwan saroy ubbaafe dhoqa saluwan bonchoy Xoossaas gido” yaagidi Xoossaa galatidosona.
19.39: Asaa giddofe issi issi Farsaaweti Yesuusako, “Astamaariyaw, ne tamaareta hayzite gada hanqeta” yaagidosona.
19.40: I entako, “Enti si77i giiko shuchati waassana” yaagis.
19.41: Yesuusi Yerusalaame matishe katamaa be7idi iyaw yeekis.
19.42: “New saro gidanaysa hachi ne eridaba gidiyakoshin, ha77i ne ayfiyape geemmis.
19.43: Ne morketi ne yuushuwa diridi dumma dumma ogiyara nena teqidi un7ethiya wodey yaana.
19.44: Nenanne ne dirsaa garsan de7iya ne nayta dhaysana. Issi issi shuchu denthidi laallana, ayis giiko Xoossay nena ashshanaw yaa wodiya erabaaka” yaagidi iw yeekis.
19.45: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi Xoossa Keethi gelidi zal7eyisata yaape goodis.
19.46: Qassi, “ ‘Ta keethay Xoossaa woossiya keethi gidana’ gidi xaafetis, shin hinte ta keethaa pangata gongolo oothideta” yaagis.
19.47: Gallas gallas xoossa keethan tamaarsees. Kahineta halaqati, higge astamaaretinne deriya cimati iya wodhanaw oge koyoosona.
19.48: Gidoshin, asa ubbay iya timirtiya banta wozana yeggidi si7iya gisho, entaw oothanabay dhayis.

20.1: Issi gallas Yesuusi xoossa keethan asaa tamaarsishininne Wongela markatishin, kahine halaqati, higge astamaaretinne deriya cimati issife iyako yidi,
20.2: “Neeni haysata aybi maatan oothiyako nuus oda. Ha maata new immiday oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
20.3: I entako, “Taka hintena issiba oychana, ane taw zaarite.
20.4: Xammaqiya Yohaanisa xinqatey Xoossafeye asapee?” yaagis.
20.5: Enti woli giddon yaagidi zoretidosona: “Xoossafe giiko yaatin, ayis ammanibeketii?” yaagana.
20.6: “Asape giiko, asa ubbay Yohaanisi nabe gideysa ammaniya gisho nuna shuchan caddana.”
20.7: Yaaniya gisho, “Awupeko nu eroko” yaagidi zaaridosona.
20.8: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hiza, taka ay maatan haysata oothiyako hintew odike” yaagis. Goshshanchota Leemiso (Maato 21:33-46; Mar 12:1-12)
20.9: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi yaagidi ha leemisuwa asaas odis: “Issi asi woyne tokis. Goshshanchotas kera immidi daro wode gam7idi yaanaw hara biitta bis.
20.10: Woyne ayfiya maxiya wodey gakin woyne ayfiyape iyaw yeddana mela goshshanchotako ba aylliya kiittis. Shin goshshanchoti he aylliya oykidi wadhidi mela kushe yeddidosona.
20.11: Kaallidika hara aylliya kiittis. Qassi goshshanchoti iya wadhidi, kawushidi mela kushe yeddidosona.
20.12: Ha77ika zaaridi heedzantho aylliya kiittis. Goshshanchoti iyaka madunxisidi woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi yeggidosona.
20.13: “Woyne gadiya goday, ‘Yaatin ta ay ootho? Ane qassi ta dosiya ta na7a yeddana; ooni eri enti iya bonchona aggokona’ yaagis.
20.14: “Shin goshshanchoti uraa na7a be7ida wode, ‘Haysi iya laattanaysa, haa yiite iya wodhana, yaatiko laatay nuus gidana’ yaagidi zoretidosona.
20.15: Woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi wodhidosona. Yaatin, woyne gadiya goday he asata waatanee?
20.16: Yidi he goshshanchota dhaysana, woyne gadiya hara asatas immana. Asay hessa si7ida wode ‘Shinchalle hessa melaba gathofo’ yaagidosona.
20.17: “Yesuusi enta caddi xeellidi, “ ‘Yaatin, gimbe keexiya asati borida shuchay, keethaas malanne minotethi immiya ubbaafe aadhiya shuchi gidis’ geetetidi xaafetidaysa birshethay aybee?
20.18: He shuchaa bolla kundiya ubbay qoxettana, shuchay iya bolla wodhiya ubbay liiqana” yaagis.
20.19: Higge astamaaretinne kahine halaqati ha leemisoy odetiday enta bolla gideysa eridi he wode iya oykanaw koydosona, shin asaas babidosona. Giiraba (Maato 22:15-22; Mar 12:13-17)
20.20: Hessa gisho, Yesuusa deriya haariya Roome kawa maatas aathidi immanaw koyidi iya doonape bala qaala naagoosona. Hessa polisanaw xillo daanidi cimmiya asata iyako kiittidosona.
20.21: Kiitetidi bida asati, “Astamaariyaw, neeni odeysinne tamaarseysi like gideysa, qassi Xoossaa ogiya tumatethan tamaarseysanne oonaka shaakonnaysa nu eroos.
20.22: Hanoshin, Roome kawas giira giiranaw bessi bessennee?” yaagidi iya oychidosona.
20.23: Shin I enta wozanaa iitatetha erida gisho,
20.24: “Ane tana issi santime bessite, Iya bolla de7iya misileynne sunthay oodebayee?” yaagis. Enti zaaridi, “Roome Kawa Qeesareysa” yaagidosona.
20.25: I zaaridi, “Yaatiko, Qeesareba Qeesares, Xoossaba Xoossaas immite” yaagis.
20.26: Hessa gisho, I zaarida zaaruwan asaa sinthan bala demmanaw danda7ibookona. Iya zaaruwan malaaletidi si77i gidoosona. Hayqope Dendoba (Maato 22:23-33; Mar 12:18-27)
20.27: Hayqope dendoy baawa giya Saduqaawetape issoti issoti Yesuusako yidi,
20.28: “Astamaariyaw, issi asi macho ekidi na7a yelonna hayqiko, iya ishay he maccasiw ekidi nayta yelidi ba ishaas koche ashshana mela Musey xaafis.
20.29: Heko laapun ishati de7oosona. Koyroysi macho ekidi na7a yelonna hayqis.
20.30: Nam7anthoy iyo ekidi na7a yelonna hayqis.
20.31: Heedzanthoyka hessatho hanis. Laapunati ubbay hessada hanidi iyo ekidosona, shin na7a yelonna hayqidosona.
20.33: Hiza, laapun addey iyo ekida gisho hayqope dendiya wode iya oodde macho gidanee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
20.34: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Asay ha wodiyan ekoosonanne geloosona.
20.35: Shin hayqope dendidi yaana alamiyan daanaw besseysati ekokonanne gelokona.
20.36: Enti kiitancho mela gidiya gisho sinthafe hayqokona. Hayqope dendida gisho enti Xoossaa nayta.
20.37: Musey Godaa, ‘Abrahaame Godaa, Yisaaqa Godaa, Yayqooba Godaa’ gidi tushiya giddon xuugetiya tama taarikiya xaafidaysan hayqida asay dendeysa bessees.
20.38: Ubbay iyaw de7on de7eyisata gidiya gisho I de7on de7eyisata Godaape attishin, hayqidaysata Godaa gidenna” yaagidi zaaris.
20.39: Higge astamaaretape issoti issoti, “Astamaariyaw, lo77oba odadasa” yaagidosona.
20.40: Hessafe guye, hara oysho oychanaw yayyidosona. Kiristoosi Oodde Na7ee? (Maato 22:41-46; Mar 12:35-37)
20.41: Iyape kaallidi Yesuusi entako, “Asay Kiristoosa waatidi Dawita na7a yaagona?
20.42: -43 Ayis giiko, Dawiti ba huuphen ba maxaafan, “ ‘Xoossay ta Godaako “Ta ne morketa ne tohoy yedhiyaso oothana gakanaw taape ushacha baggan utta” gis’ yaagis.
20.44: “Hiza, Dawiti Kiristoosa, ‘Godaa gidi xeegishe iyaw na7a waanidi gidii?’ ” yaagis.
20.46: “Adussa ma7o ma7idi yuushshe doseysatape, giyan boncho sarotho, ayhude woosa keethan boncho oyde, moketiya sonka boncho bessi koyiya higge astamaaretape naagetite.
20.47: Enti am7eta keethaa kalloyoosona, xillo asi daanidi woosa adussosona. Hessati ubbaafe aadhiya iita pirda ekana” yaagis.

21.1: Dure asay xoossa keethan muxaata saaxiniyan yeggishin Yesuusi dhoqu gidi asaa be7is.
21.2: Qassi issi manqo am7iya nam7u sikina yeggishin be7idi,
21.3: “Ta hintew tuma odayis; ha manqo am7iya ubbaafe aathada immasu.
21.4: Ayis giiko, ha asa ubbay bantaw de7iyabaape immidosona, shin iya ba pacaape, baw de7iya aquwa ubbaa immasu” yaagis. Wode Wursetha Malaatata (Maato 24:3-14; Mar 13:3-23)
21.5: Yesuusa tamaaretape issoti issoti Xoossa Keethay daro lo77iya shuchaninne asay Xoossaas immida imotan lo77idaysa odetoosona.
21.6: Shin Yesuusi, “Ha hinte be7iyabay ubbay laaletonna, shuchi shucha bolla gimbetida mela attonna wodey yaana” yaagis.
21.7: Entika, “Astamaariyaw, ha ubbay hananay awudee? Qassi haysi hananaysas malaatay aybee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
21.8: Yesuusi yaagidi entaw zaaro immis: “Baletonna mela naagetite. Daroti, ‘Taani Kiristoosa, wodey matatis’ yaagishe ta sunthan yaana, shin hinte enta kaallopite.
21.9: Hinte olabaanne asaa geellatetha si7iya wode dagammofite. Hessi sinthatidi hananaysi attonnaba gidiya gisho wodiya wursethay ellesidi yeenna” yaagis.
21.10: Kaallidika, “Derey deriya bolla, kawotethay kawotethaa bolla dendana.
21.11: Gita biitta qaaxoy hanana, koshaynne gadoy dumma dumma bessan darana, yashshiyabaynne gita malaatati salope qoncana.
21.12: Shin ha ubbay hananaape sinthe ta sunthaa gisho gidi asay hintena gooddananne oykana. Ayhude woosa keethaninne qasho keethan hintena yeggana. Kawota sinthenne deriya haareyisata sinthe hintena efana.
21.13: Hessika tabaa hinte entaw markatanaw lo77o oge gidana.
21.14: Hessa gisho, hinte oyshetiya wode woygidi zaaro immane gidi hinte wozanan un7etonna mela akeekite.
21.15: Ayis giiko, hinte morketi hintera eqetanawunne palamanaw danda7onna doonanne cincatethi ta hintew immana.
21.16: Hari attoshin, hintena yelidaysati, hinte ishati, hinte dabbotinne laggeti hintena aathidi immana. Hinte giddofe issota issota wodhana.
21.17: Ta sunthaa gisho asa ubbaa sinthan hinte ixetidaysata gidana.
21.18: Shin hari attoshin, hinte binaanape issoyka dhayenna.
21.19: Polo danda7an hinte, hinte shempuwa ashshana.”
21.20: “Yerusalaame katamay wotaadaren diretidi uttidashin hinte be7iko iyaw dhayoy matatidaysa erite.
21.21: He wode Yihudan de7iya ubbay deriyako baqato, kataman de7eysati yaape keyo, gaxariyan de7eysati katama gelopo.
21.22: Ayis giiko, ha xaafetidabay poletana mela hessi Xoossay kushe zaariya wode.
21.23: Sa7a bolla gita metoy yaana, hessanka asaa bolla Xoossaa hanqoy yaana. Hessa gisho, qanthatidaysatanne dhantheyisata ayye!
21.24: Enti mashshan hayqana, asa ubbay allaga biitta di7etana. Ayhude gidonna asaa wodey poletana gakanaw Yerusalaamey entanan yedhetidaysa gidana.
21.25: “Awan, ageenaninne, xoolintota bolla malaatati hanidi bentana. Abbaafenne zuliya deshuwape dendoysan biittan de7iya asay un7etananne yarkana.
21.26: Saluwa wolqati buqettana gisho asay yashshaninne biitta bolla aybi hanandesha gidi naagon bantana baletana.
21.27: He wode Asa Na7ay wolqaninne gita bonchuwan shaarara yishin enti be7ana.
21.28: Hinte atotethay matatida gisho ha hanoti poletethi oykiya wode giigeti eqite, hinte huuphiya dhoqu oothidi xeellite” yaagis.
21.29: Kaallidika, haysada gidi leemiso odis; “Balase mithinne hara mithata ubbaa be7ite.
21.30: Enti aaciya wode torchey matatidaysa hinte ereeta.
21.31: Hessada ha hanoti poletishin hinte be7iko Xoossaa kawotethay matatidaysa erite.
21.32: “Ta hintew tuma odayis; ha ubbay poletana gakanaw ha yeletethay aadhenna.
21.33: Saloynne sa7i aadhana, shin ta qaalay aadhenna.
21.34: “Hiza, dhassi bayna de7on, ushsha daroninne duussabaas un7etethan hinte wozanay oyketonna melanne he qammay akeekona xiheda hinte bolla gakonna mela naagetite.
21.35: He qammay biitta kumethan de7iya ubbaa bolla gakana.
21.36: Hessa gisho, yaa iitaape attanawunne Asa Na7a sinthan eqanaw danda7ana mela ubba wode minnidi woossite” yaagis.
21.37: Gallas gallas Yesuusi xoossa keethan tamaarsishe, qamma qamma Shamaho zuma bolla keyidi aqees.
21.38: Asa ubbay iya si7anaw wonta guura iyako Xoossaa Keethi yoosona.

22.1: He wode “Paasika” giya Uytha Ba7aaley matis.
22.2: Kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti ase yayiya gisho, waatidi Yesuusa banta giddofe dhaysaneko oge koyoosona.
22.3: Xalahey tammanne nam7atape issuwa gidida Asqoroota Yihuda geeteteysa gido gelis.
22.4: Yihudi kahine halaqatakonne Xoossa Keetha naageysata halaqatako bidi Yesuusa waati aathidi immaneko entara maqetis.
22.5: Entika hessan ufaytidi miishe immanaw iyara zoretidosona.
22.6: Ika zoretethan giigis. Aathi entaw immanaw asi bayna inje wode naagishe de7ees. Wursetha Kaho (Maato 26:17-25; Mar 14:12-21; Yoha 13:21-30)
22.7: Hessafe guye, Paasika dorsay shuketiya Uytha Ba7aaley gakis.
22.8: Yesuusi, “Paasika kahuwa maana mela bidi nuus giigisite” yaagidi Phexroosanne Yohaanisa kiittis.
22.9: Enti, “Nu awun giigisana mela ne koyay” yaagidi oychidosona.
22.10: I entako, “Heko hinte katama gelishin haatha oto tookida addey hintera gahetana. I bidi geliya keethaa iya kaallidi gelite.
22.11: Astamaarey godaako, ‘Ta ta tamaaretara wolla Paasika kahuwa maanaw imatha keethi awunee? yaagis’ giite.
22.12: I pooqiya bolla hiixetidi giigidi de7iya dalga kifile hintena bessaana, yan giigisite” yaagis.
22.13: Enti bidi Yesuusi gidaysada hanin demmidosona. Paasika ba7aale kahuwa yan giigisidosona.
22.14: Saateyka gakida wode Yesuusi hawaaretara wolla kahuwa bolla uttis.
22.15: I entako, “Ta waaye ekanaape sinthe ha kahuwa hintera maanaw daro amottas.
22.16: Hiza, si7ite! Xoossaa kawotethan haysas birshethay poletana gakanaw ha kahuwa zaarada miike” yaagis.
22.17: Ushshaa ekidi galati simmidi, “He7ite haysa hinte giddon shaaketite.
22.18: Si7ite! Xoossaa kawotethay yaana gakanaw hachife doomada ha woyne ushshafe zaarada uyike” yaagis.
22.19: Uythaa ekidi, galati simmidi, “Haysi hintew imetiya ta ashuwa. Haysa oothishe tana qopite” yaagidi menthidi entaw immis.
22.20: Hessadaka, kahuwape guye, ushsha ekidi, “Ha ushshay hintew gukida ta suuthan gidiya ooratha caaquwa.
22.21: Gidoshin, tana aathidi immana uraa kushey taara issife gaytaana.
22.22: Asa Na7ay iyaw geetetoysa mela hayqanaw de7ees, shin iya aathidi immiya uraa ayye!” yaagis.
22.23: Enti banta giddon, “Haysa ooni oothanee” gidi woli oychidosona.
22.24: Qassi enta giddon gita gidanay oone giya palami medhetis.
22.25: Yesuusi entako, “Deriya kawoti banta asaa wolqan haaroosona; banta deriya bolla godateysataska bantana, ‘Lo77o ootheyisata’ yaagidi xeegosona.
22.26: Shin hinte giddon hessa mela gidopo. Hinte giddon bayratey kaaloda hano; kaaletheysi kaalleysada hano.
22.27: Hanoshin, mokeysafenne Moketeysafe awusi aadhii? Moketeysa gidenneyee? Shin taani hinte giddon mokeysa mela.
22.28: “Hinteka ta metuwan taape shaaketonna taara minnidi eqidaysata.
22.29: -30 Hinte ta gaytape maana mela, uyana melanne araatata bolla uttidi tammanne nam7u Isra7eele sheeshata bolla pirdana mela ta aaway tana shuumidaysada taka hintena ta kawotethan shuumana” yaagis.
22.31: Kaallidika Yesuusi, “Simoona, Simoona, Xalahey hintena gisteda harqanaw woossis.
22.32: Shin taani ne ammanoy dhayonna mela new gaannatas. Neka simmida wode ne ishata mintha” yaagis.
22.33: Simooni, “Godaw, taani neera qashetanawunne hayqanaw giigetas” yaagis.
22.34: Yesuusi Phexroosako, “Ta new odayis; hachi kuttoy waassanaape sinthe ne tana heedzu toho kaddana” yaagis.
22.35: Kaallidika, Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintena korojoy, karxiitinne caammi baynna kiitida wode hintew pacidabay de7ii?” yaagidi oychis. Enti zaaridi, “Aykoyka pacibeenna” yaagidosona.
22.36: I entako, “Ha77i korojoynne karxiiti de7ey oyko; mashshi baynay ba afilaa bayzidi mashsha shammo.
22.37: Haa si7ite! ‘Geellatara taybetis’ geetetidi xaafetidaysi tanan poletanaw bessees. Ee, ta gisho xaafetidabay poleteysi tumatis” yaagis.
22.38: Iya tamaareti, “Godaw haysan nam7u mashshati de7oosona” yaagidosona. I, “Gidana” yaagis. Yesuusi Shamaho Deriya Bolla Woossis (Maato 26:36-46; Mar 14:32-42)
22.39: Yesuusi kase meezetidaysada dendidi Shamaho zuma bolla keyis. Iya tamaareti iya kaallidosona.
22.40: He bessaa gakida wode, “Paacen gelonna mela woossite” yaagis.
22.41: Entafe shuchi holin gakiya soo mela haakidi gulbatidi woossis.
22.42: “Ta aawaw, ne shene gidiko ha metuwa taape aatha. Shin ta shene gidopo ne sheney hano” yaagidi woossis.
22.44: Daro un7etidi minnidi woossees. Iya cawayka suuthi xokiyada sa7an xokees.
22.45: Yesuusi woosa wursidi ba tamaaretako yis. Enti, azzanope dendoysan daaburidi dhiskidashin demmidi,
22.46: “Ayis dhisketii? Paacen gelonna mela dendidi woossite” yaagis. Yesuusi Oyketis (Maato 26:47-56; Mar 14:43-50; Yoha 18:3-11)
22.47: I buroo oda bolla de7ishin daro asati yidosona. Tammanne nam7atape issoy Yihuda geeteteysi entana kaalethees. I Yesuusa yeeranaw mati shiiqis.
22.48: Shin Yesuusi, “Yihuda, Asa Na7aa yeerada aatha immanee?” yaagis.
22.49: Yesuusa tamaareti he hanuwa be7idi, “Godaw mashshan shocino?” yaagidosona.
22.50: Enta giddofe issoy kahine halaqaa oosanchuwa shocidi ushacha haytha qanxidi yeggis.
22.51: Shin Yesuusi, “Agga! Diggofite” yaagis. Uraa haythaa bochidi pathis.
22.52: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi bana oykanaw yida kahine halaqatako, Xoossa Keetha naageysata shuumatakonne cimatako, “Paanno oykiya asada mashshenne xam7a oykidi yidetii?
22.53: Ubba gallas xoossa keethan ta hintera de7iya wode ta bolla kushe wothibeeketa. Shin haysi dhuma kawotethay haarida wodenne hinte wode” yaagis. Phexroosi Yesuusa Kaddis (Maato 26:57-58, 67-75; Mar 14:53-54, 66-72; Yoha 18:12-18, 25-27)
22.54: Hessafe guye, Yesuusa oykidi kahine halaqaa zabbaa efidosona. Phexroosi haahon Yesuusa kaallees.
22.55: Asati kahine halaqaa zabban tama eethidi wolla uttidashin Phexroosi entara issife uttis.
22.56: Issi gadhindiya Phexroosi tama matan uttidaysa cadda xeellada, “Ha uray iyara de7ees” yaagasu.
22.57: Shin Phexroosi, “Ha maccasete ta he uraa erike” yaagidi kaddis.
22.58: Guutha wodepe guye issi hara addey iya be7idi, “Neka entafe issuwa” yaagis. Shin Phexroosi, “Ha addiyaw tana gidike” yaagis.
22.59: Issi saate mela gam7idaape guye issi hara addey tillisidi, “Ha uray Galilape gidiya gisho sidhey bayna iyara de7ees” yaagis.
22.60: Shin Phexroosi, “Ha addiyaw, ne geysa ta erike” yaagis. I he oda ongonna de7ishin kuttoy waassis.
22.61: Goday guye simmidi Phexroosa xeellis. Phexroosi, “Hachi kuttoy waassanaape sinthe ne tana heedzu toho kaddana” yaagidi, Goday odida qaala akeekis.
22.62: Phexroosi kare keyidi daro kokoridi yeekis.
22.63: Yesuusa naagiya asati iya leqisonne deshethi oykidosona.
22.64: Iya ayfiya goozidi “Ane tinbite oda; nena dechiday oonee?” yaagidi oychoosona.
22.65: Hara daro cashshe cayidi kawushoosona. Yesuusi Pirda Shango Sinthan (Maato 26:59-66; Mar 14:55-64; Yoha 18:19-24)
22.66: Sa7i wontiya wode Ayhude biitta cimati, kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti shiiqidi, Yesuusa banta sinthe shiishidosona.
22.67: Enti, “Neeni Kiristoosee? Ane nuus oda?” yaagidi oychidosona. Yesuusi, “Ta odiyako ammaneketa.
22.69: Shin Asa Na7ay haysafe gede baggan wolqaama Xoossaa ushacha baggan uttana” yaagis.
22.70: He wode ubbay, “Yaatin, neeni Xoossaa na7ee?” yaagidosona. I, “Ta Xoossaa na7a gideysa hinte gideta” yaagis.
22.71: Enti, “Hiza, hara marka ay koshshii? I ba inxarsan odishin nu si7ida” yaagidosona.

23.1: He bessan shiiqida shangoti ubbay dendidi Yesuusa Philaxoosako efidosona.
23.2: “Ha uray nu asaa balethishin, kawas giira giironna mela diggishininne qassi, ‘Taani Kiristoosa hinte kawa’ yaagishin demmida” yaagidi mootidosona.
23.3: Philaxoosi Yesuusa, “Neeni Ayhudeta kawo?” yaagidi oychis. Yesuusi, “Ee, ne gidaysa mela” yaagis.
23.4: Philaxoosi kahine halaqatakonne asaako, “Ha uraa bolla taani issi balaka demmabike” yaagis.
23.5: Shin enti, “Ha uray Galilape doomidi haysa gakanaw Yihuda kumetha iitabas denthethees” yaagidi minthi odidosona.
23.6: Philaxoosi hessa si7ida wode Yesuusi Galila aseeko eranaw koyidi iya oychis.
23.7: Yesuusi Herodiisa biittafe yida asi gideysa Philaxoosi erida wode Herodiisi he wode Yerusalaamen de7iya gisho iyako yeddis.
23.8: Herodiisi Yesuusa be7anaw daro wodepe koyishe de7iya gisho, iya be7ida wode daro ufaytis. Ayis giiko, iyabaa si7ida gisho malaalsiyaba oothin be7anaw amotishe de7ees.
23.9: Herodiisi Yesuusa daro oyshota oychis, shin I aykoka zaaribeenna.
23.10: Kahineta halaqatinne higge astamaareti yan eqidi minthidi iya mootosona.
23.11: Herodiisaranne iya wotaadaretara Yesuusa kadhidosonanne leqsidosona. Boncho afila mayzidi Philaxoosako zaaridi yeddidosona.
23.12: Herodiisaranne Philaxoosara kase morkeshin he gallas wolla giigidosona.
23.13: Philaxoosi kahine halaqata, asaa haareysatanne asaa xeegidi,
23.14: “ ‘Ha uray asaa geellatethas denthethees’ gidi taako ehideta. Taka hinte sinthan pilgada hinte shiishida mootuwas aybi balaka demmabike.
23.15: Herodiisi, hessatho aybi balaka iya bolla demmiboonna gisho nuuko yeddis. Tumaka ha uray hayqos gathiya aybi balaka oothibeenna.
23.16: Hessa gisho, iya garaafada billa yeddana” yaagis.
23.17: Hessa I giday Paasika Ba7aale wode issi asi entaw billanaysi iyaw attonnaba gidiya gishosa.
23.18: Derey ubbay issi bolla, “Ha uraa gede digga, nuus Barbaana billa” yaagidi waassidosona.
23.19: Barbaani katamaa giddon asaa iitabas denthethidi ase wodhidi qashetida asi.
23.20: Philaxoosi Yesuusa billanaw koyidi asaas zaari odis.
23.22: Philaxoosi heedzantho, “Ha uray qohidabay aybee? Wodhos gathiya bala ta demmabike. Hessa gisho, garaafada yedda aggana” yaagis.
23.23: Enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Kaqetanaw bessees” gidi minthi waassidosona. Enta waasoyka xoonis.
23.24: Enta oysha gisho, gidi Philaxoosi iya bolla pirdis.
23.25: Ase iitabas denthethidaysanne ase wodhidi qashetidaysa billana mela woossida gisho he uraa entaw billis. Shin Yesuusa enti koydaba oothana mela entaw aathidi immis. Yesuusa Kaqetetha (Maato 27:31-44; Mar 15:21-32; Yoha 19:17-27)
23.26: Yesuusa oykidi efishin Simoona geetetiya Qereena biitta addey gaxarepe yishin, demmidi masqaliya toossidi Yesuusa kaallidi baana mela un7ethidosona.
23.27: Daro asaynne banta tiraa iccishe yeekiya maccasati iya guyera kaalloosona.
23.28: Shin Yesuusi entako guye simmidi, “Hinteno, Yerusalaame maccasato, hinte huuphesinne hinte naytas yeekitepe attishin, taw yeekofite.
23.29: ‘Heko maynthati, yelonna ulotinne dhanthonna dhanthati anjetidosona’ hinte yaagana gallasay yaana.
23.30: He wode dereta, ‘Nu bolla kundite’, zumataka, ‘Nuna kammite’ yaagana.
23.31: Hiza, qaye mithaa hessatho oothiko mela mithaa waatandesha?” yaagis.
23.32: Iyara wodhanaw hara nam7u worandzota efidosona.
23.33: Qeraaniyo geetetiya bessaa gathidi kaqidosona. Worandzotape issuwa ushacha baggara hankuwa haddirsa baggara kaqidosona.
23.34: Yesuusi, “Ta aawaw, enti ay oothiyako eronna gisho, neeni entaw atto yaaga” yaagis. Enti iya afilaa bolla saama yeggidi shaaketidi ekidosona.
23.35: Asay eqidi xeelloosona, shin deriya haareysati, “Harata ashshis; Xoossay doorida Kiristoosi iya gidiko ane bana asho” yaagidi leqsidosona.
23.36: Wotaaddareti iyako shiiqidi, caala woyne ushsha immidosona.
23.37: Yaatidi, “Neeni Ayhudeta kawo gidiko ne huuphiya ashsha” yaagidi leqsidosona.
23.38: Iyaw huuphe baggara, “Haysi Ayhudeta kawo” giya xuufey de7ees.
23.39: Kaqetida worandzotape issoy cashshe sa7ara goochishe, “Ane neeni Kiristoosa gidiko, nenaka nunaka ashsha” yaagis.
23.40: Shin hanko worandzoy, “Neeni haysa mela pirdan de7ashe hari attoshin, Xoossas yayyikii?
23.41: Nuuni nu oothida nagaraa gisho bessiya pirda ekoos, shin ha uray issi iitabaa oothibeenna” yaagidi hanqetis.
23.42: Qassika, “Yesuusa, ne ne kawotethaara yaa wode tana qopa” yaagis.
23.43: Yesuusi, “Ta new tuma odayis; hachi neeni taara gannaten gidana” yaagis.
23.44: -45 He gallas usupun saatepe bidi uddufun saate gakanaw away poo7uwa diggida gisho, biitta ubbaa bolla dhuma gidis. Xoossa Keetha geshey daaketidi nam7an shaaketis.
23.46: Yesuusi, qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Ta aawaw, ta ta shempiw ne kushen sheedhayis” yaagidi hayqis.
23.47: Mato halaqay, hanidaysa be7idi, “Haysi uray tumaka xillo” yaagidi Xoossaa galatis.
23.48: Ha haniyaba be7anaw he bessaa shiiqida asa ubbay hanidaba be7ida wode banta tiraa iccishe banta soo simmidosona.
23.49: Gidoshin, Yesuusa matan eriya asa ubbay, hessadaka Galilape kaallidi yida maccasati hessa be7ishe haahon eqidosona.
23.50: -51 Ayhude shangotape issoy, Yoosefa geetetiya uray de7ees. I Armaate geetetiya Yihuda katamaape yis. I lo77onne Xillo asi gidiya gisho Xoossaa kawotethaa yuussaa naagees. Shangotape issuwa gidishe enta zoretethaaninne oosuwan deenna.
23.52: He uray Philaxoosako bidi, Yesuusa aha mooganaw taw imma gidi woossis.
23.53: Philaxoosi eka yaagin, Yesuusa aha wodhisidi afilara xaaxis. Zaallafe woocidi kessida hara asi moogetonna ooratha duufon wothis.
23.54: Sambaati gelana haniya gisho, he gallasay giigetetha qamma.
23.55: Galilape dendidi Yesuusa kaallidi yida maccasati Yoosefara bidi iya aha waati moogiyako duufuwa akeekidi be7idosona.
23.56: Yaape simmidi shittonne qibaate giigisidosona. Higgey kiitteysa mela Sambaata gallas shempi pee7idosona.

24.1: Saamintafe koyro gallas, wogga wode wonta daro guura, maccasati banta giigisida shittuwa ekidi duufuwa bidosona.
24.2: Enti yaa gakiya wode duufuwa doonan de7iya shuchay gonderetidi kichoysa demmidosona.
24.3: Enti duufuwa gaathi gelidosona, shin Godaa Yesuusa aha demmibookona.
24.4: Enti yan eqidi aybi hanide gidi qopishin akeekona daro phooliya afila ma7ida nam7u asati enta matan eqidosona.
24.5: Maccasati yashetidi banta huuphiya sa7an ziqi oothidi de7ishin, asati entako, “De7on de7eysa hayqota giddon ayis koyeetii?
24.6: -7 I haysan deenna; hayqope dendis, ‘Asa Na7ay nagaranchota kushen aadhidi imetana; entika iya kaqana. I heedzantho qamman hayqope dendana’ yaagidi, I hintera Galilan de7ishe hintew odida qaala qopite” yaagis.
24.8: Maccasati he wode iya qaala qopidosona.
24.9: Maccasati duufuwape simmidi hanidaba ubbaa tammanne issotasinne haratasika odidosona.
24.10: Hessa hawaaretas odiday Magdela Mayraamo, Yohaana, Yayqooba aayiw Mayraamonne entara de7iya hara maccasata.
24.11: Shin entaw maccasati odidaysi elmo daanin ammanibookona.
24.12: Shin Phexroosi dendi woxidi duufo bis. He bessaa gakidi, hokidi gaathi xeelliya wode moogo afilaa xalaala be7is. Hanidaban malaaletishe ba soo simmis. Emahoose Oge Bolla (Mar 16:12-13)
24.13: He gallas kaalliya tamaaretape nam7ati Yerusalaamepe tammanne issi kilo mitire haakiya Emahoose guta boosona.
24.15: Enti he hanotaba qopishenne odetishe biya wode Yesuusi ba huuphen shiiqidi entara bees.
24.16: Hanoshin, enti iya eronna mela enta ayfey oyketis.
24.17: I, “Hinte wolla oge bolla de7ishe odeteysi aybee?” yaagis. Enti azzanidi si77i gidi eqidosona.
24.18: Entafe issoy Qeliyoophe geeteteysi, “Ha qammata giddon Yerusalaamen hanidaba eronnaysi, ne biittas imatheyee?” yaagis.
24.19: I zaaridi, “I hanidaysi aybee?” yaagidi oychis. Enti, “Xoossaa sinthaninne asa sinthan oosoninne odan mino nabe gidida Naazirete Yesuusaba.
24.20: Iya kahine halaqatinne haareysati hayqo pirdas aathi immidi, kaqidosona.
24.21: Nuuni Isra7eele asaa wozande gidi ufaytidi naagidashin haysi hanin hachi heedzantho qamma.
24.22: Qassi nu giddofe issi issi maccasati nuna malaalsidosona. Enti hachi wonta guura duufuwa bidosona.
24.23: Iya aha dhayida wode simmi yidi, ‘I paxa de7ees’ giya kiitanchoti qoncin be7ida yaagidi odidosona.
24.24: Nu giddofeka issoti issoti duufuwa bidi maccasati odidaysatho hanin be7idosona, shin iya be7ibookona” yaagis.
24.25: I entako, “Hinteno, akeekona asato, hinte wozanay nabeti odidaba ubbaa ammananaw gam7eysato,
24.26: Kiristoosi ha metuwa ekanawunne ba bonchuwan gelanaw bessennee?” yaagis.
24.27: Musepenne nabeta ubbaafe dendidi Geeshsha Maxaafan iyabay xaafetidaysa ubbaa entaw qoncisis.
24.28: Enti biya gutaako matatida wode Yesuusi aadhidi haaho soo biya daanin,
24.29: Enti, “Sa7ay qammida gisho nuura aqa” yaagidi minthidi woossidosona. Hessa gisho, entara aqanaw gelis.
24.30: Entara issife gayta bolla uttidi, uythaa denthidi, menthidi, anjidi entaw immis.
24.31: He wode enti erana mela enta ayfey dooyetis. Entika eridosona. Shin I entafe geemmis.
24.32: Enti, “Nu ogiya bolla de7ishin I nuus Geeshsha Maxaafaa birshishininne nuna odisishin, nu wozanay xuugetibeennee?” yaagidosona.
24.33: He wode dendidi guye Yerusalaame yidosona. Tammanne issotinne harati issi bolla shiiqidi de7ishin demmidosona.
24.34: Enti, “Goday tuma dendis; Simoonas qoncis” yaagidosona.
24.35: He nam7u tamaareti Emmahuuse ogiya bolla de7ishin hanidaysanne uythaa menthida wode waati iya eridaako entaw odidosona. Yesuusi Ba Tamaaretas Qoncis (Maato 28:16-20; Mar 16:14-18; Yoha 20:19-23; Hawa 1:6-8)
24.36: Nam7u tamaareti hessa oda bolla de7ishin, Yesuusi enta giddon eqidi, “Saroy hintew gido” yaagis.
24.37: Gidoshin, enti dagammidi, moytille be7ida daanin yayyidosona.
24.38: I entako, “Ayis babidetii? Ayis sidhey hinte wozanan gelidee?
24.39: Ta kushiyanne ta tohuwa be7ite; taani tana. Qassi oykidi be7ite; tanan hinte be7eysada, moytilles ashoynne meqethi baawa” yaagis.
24.40: Yaagidi, ba tohuwanne ba kushiya enta bessis.
24.41: Enti ufaysafe dendoysan ammanonna malaaletethan de7ishin, Yesuusi entako, “Haysan hintew miyabay de7ii?” yaagis.
24.42: Enti issi caacetida molo iyaw immidosona.
24.44: I, “Ta hintera gam7ida wode ubban Muse maxaafatan, nabeta maxaafataninne Mazmure maxaafatan, ta gisho xaafetidabay ubbay poletanaw bessees yaagada ta hintew odida qaalay haysa” yaagis.
24.45: He wode Geeshsha Maxaafata akeekana mela enta wozanaa dooyis.
24.46: Hessadaka, “Kiristoosi waaye ekana, heedzantho qamman hayqope dendana yaagidi xaafetis.
24.47: Yerusalaamepe dendidi asaa ubbaas nagaraape maarotethaynne atotethay iya sunthan markatana.
24.49: Heko, taka ta aaway immida ufaysaa hintew yeddana. Hinte salope wolqa ma7ana gakanaw Yerusalaame kataman gam7ite” yaagis. Yesuusi Pude Salo Bis (Mar 16:19-20; Hawa 1:9-11)
24.50: Hessafe guye, Bitaane katamaa entana ekidi bis. Ba kushiya denthidi anjis.
24.51: Entana anjishe entafe shaaketidi pude salo eketis.
24.52: Enti ziggi goyinnidi daro ufaysan Yerusalaame simmidosona.
24.53: Xoossaa ubbaa wode galatishe xoossa keethan gam7idosona.

1.1: Qaalay koyro de7ees. Qaalayka Xoossara de7ees; he Qaalay Xoossaa.
1.2: Koyrope Qaalay Xoossara de7ees.
1.3: Xoossay ubbaba Qaala baggara medhis. Medhetidabaape issoyka iya baggara medhetonabay baawa.
1.4: Iyan de7oy de7ees; he de7oy asaas poo7o.
1.5: Poo7oy dhuman poo7ees; dhumay poo7uwa xoonibeenna.
1.6: Xoossay kiitida, issi Yohaanisa geetetiya asi de7ees.
1.7: Asa ubbay poo7uwan ammanana mela I poo7os marka gididi yis.
1.8: I poo7uwabaa markatanaw yisipe attishin, ba huuphen poo7o gidenna.
1.9: Asa ubbaas poo7isiya tuma poo7oy alamiya yees.
1.10: Qaalay alamen de7is. Xoossay Qaalan alamiya medhis, shin alamey iya eribeenna.
1.11: I ba asaako yis, shin iya asay iya ekibookona.
1.12: Shin I bana ekidaysatasinne iya sunthan ammanidaysatas Xoossaa nayta gidana mela maata immis.
1.13: Enti Xoossafe yeletidosonape attishin, asi yeletiya wogan woyko adde shenen woyko asa amon yeletibookona. Xoossay I enta aawa.
1.14: Qaalay ase gidis; aadho keehatethaanne tumaa kumidi nu giddon de7is. I aawas issi na7aa gididi ekida iya bonchuwa nuuni be7ida.
1.15: Yohaanisi iyabaa markatis. Ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Taani, ‘Taape guyera yeysi taape kase de7iya gisho taape aadhees’ gada markatidaysi haysa” yaagis.
1.16: Nuuni ubbay iya aadho keehatetha kumethaafe anjo bolla anjo ekida.
1.17: Xoossay higgiya Muse baggara immis, shin aadho keehatethaynne tumatethay Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara yis.
1.18: Xoossaa be7ida asi oonika baawa; ba Aawa matan de7iya issi Na7aa xalaali baw Xoosse gididaysi iya qoncisis. Xammaqiya Yohaanisa Markatethi (Maato 3:1-12; Mar 1:1-8; Luqa 3:1-8)
1.19: Yerusalaamen de7iya Ayhude halaqati, kahinetanne Leeweta, “Neeni oonee?” gidi, Yohaanisa oychana mela iyako kiittin, Yohaanisi entaw markatida markatethay haysa.
1.20: Yohaanisi, “Taani Kiristoosa gidike” yaagidi, geeshshidi markatisipe attishin, kaddibeenna.
1.21: Enti, “Yaatin, neeni oonee? Neeni Eeliyaaseyee?” yaagidi oychidosona. Yohaanisi, “Akay, gidike” yaagis. Qassi enti, “Neeni yaana geetetida nabiyayee?” yaagidi oychidosona. Yohaanisi, “Akay” gidi zaaris.
1.22: Yaatin, “Neeni oonee? Nuuni nuna kiitidaysatas odana mela neeni nena oona gay?” yaagidosona.
1.23: Yohaanisi zaaridi, “Nabiya Isayaasi gidaysada, “ ‘Godaa ogiya suurisite!’ gidi mela biittan waassiya uraa qaalay tana” yaagis.
1.24: Qassi Farsaaweti kiitida asati
1.25: Yohaanisako, “Neeni Kiristoosa woyko Eeliyaasa woyko nabe gidonna ixiko, yaatin ayis xammaqay?” gidi oychidosona.
1.26: Yohaanisi zaaridi, “Taani haathan xammaqayis, shin hinte eronna asi hinte giddon eqis.
1.27: I taape guyera yees. Taani hari attoshin iya caammaa wodoruwa billanaw bessike” yaagis.
1.28: Hessi ubbay Yordaanose Shaafape hefinthan, Bitaane kataman, Yohaanisi xammaqiya bessan hanis. Yesuusi Xoossa Dorse
1.29: Yohaanisi wontetha gallas Yesuusi baako yishin be7idi, “Alamiya nagaraa quchiya Xoossaa Dorsay haysa!
1.30: Taani, ‘Taape guyera issi asi yaana. I taape kase de7iya gisho taape aadhees’ gada odidaysi haysa.
1.31: I ooneko taani erike. Shin Isra7eele asaas iya qoncisanaw haathan xammaqashe yas” yaagis.
1.32: Yohaanisi haysada yaagidi markatis: “Geeshsha Ayyaanay salope holleda wodhishininne iyara de7ishin be7as.
1.33: Hessi hananaape kase taani iya erike. Shin haathan xammaqanaw tana kiitida Xoossay, ‘Geeshsha Ayyaanay wodhidi iyara de7ishin neeni be7anaysinne Geeshsha Ayyaanan xammaqanaysi iya’ yaagidi taw odis.
1.34: Taani hessi hanishin be7ada, I Xoossaa Na7aa gididaysa markatayis” yaagis. Koyro Yesuusa Tamaareta
1.35: Qassi wontetha gallas Yohaanisi ba tamaaretape nam7atara issife eqis.
1.36: Yesuusi aadhishin, Yohaanisi be7idi, “Xoossaa dorsay haysish!” yaagis.
1.37: Yohaanisa nam7u tamaareti Yohaanisi geysa si7idi Yesuusa kaallidosona.
1.38: Yesuusi bana kaalleyisata guye simmi be7idi, “Ay koyeetii?” yaagidi oychis. Enti zaaridi, “Astamaariyaw, neeni awun de7ay?” yaagidosona.
1.39: Yesuusi entako, “Haa yidi be7ite” yaagis. Enti bidi I de7iyasuwa be7idosona. He gallas sa7i tammu saate heera gidiya gisho iya matan pee7idosona.
1.40: Yohaanisi gidaysa si7idi, Yesuusa kaallida nam7u tamaaretape issoy, Simoon Phexroosa ishaa Indiriyasa.
1.41: Indiriyasi koyro ba ishaa Simoonara gahetidi, “Nuuni Kiristoosa demmida” yaagis.
1.42: Indiriyasi Simoona Yesuusako ehis. Yesuusi Simoona be7idi, “Neeni Yoona na7aa Simoona; ne sunthay Keefa gidi xeegetana” yaagis. Filphoosanne Natina7eela Xeegetethaa
1.43: Wontetha gallas Yesuusi Galila biitta baanaw qofa qachis. I Filphoosara gahetidi, “Tana kaalla!” yaagis.
1.44: Filphoosi, Indiriyasinne Phexroosi de7ida Beetesayda katamaape yida ase.
1.45: Filphoosi Natina7eelara gahetidi, “Musey higge maxaafan, qassi nabetika iyabaa xaafida Yoosefa na7aa Naazirete Yesuusa nuuni demmida” yaagis.
1.46: Natina7eeli zaaridi, “Naazirete katamaape lo77obay keyanaw danda7ii?” yaagis. Filphoosi, “Yada be7a” yaagis.
1.47: Natina7eeli baako yeysa Yesuusi be7idi, “Geney bayna tuma Isra7eele asi haysa!” yaagis.
1.48: Natina7eeli Yesuusako, “Neeni tana awun eray?” yaagis. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Filphoosi nena xeeganaape sinthe, neeni balase mithaa garsan de7ishin taani nena be7as” yaagis.
1.49: Natina7eeli zaaridi, “Astamaariyaw, neeni Xoossaa Na7aa! Neeni Isra7eele kawo!” yaagis.
1.50: Yesuusi iyako, “Taani nena balase mithee garsan be7as gida gisho ammanay? Neeni haysafe aadhiyaba be7ana!” yaagis.
1.51: Qassi Yesuusi, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; saloy dooyetin, Xoossaa kiitanchoti Asa Na7aa bolla keyishininne wodhishin hinte be7ana” yaagis.

2.1: Heedzantho gallas Galila biittan Qaana kataman yaaganoy yaaganetis. Yesuusa aayiya he yaaganuwan de7awusu.
2.2: Yesuusika ba tamaaretara issife he yaaganuwa xeegetis.
2.3: Woyne ushshay wurin, Yesuusa aayiya Yesuusako, “Entaw woyne ushshay wuris” yaagasu.
2.4: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ta aaye, ne haysan gelopa? Ta wodey buroo gakibeenna” yaagis.
2.5: Yesuusa aayiya oosanchotako, “I hintew odiyaba aybiba gidikoka oothite” yaagasu.
2.6: Ayhudeti banta geeshsho wogaas go7etiya usupun shucha baathati he bessan de7oosona. Issi issi baathay nam7u woyko heedzu xugga oykees.
2.7: Yesuusi oosanchotako, “Baathatan haathe kunthite” yaagis. Enti baathatas doona gakanaw haathe kunthidosona.
2.8: Yesuusi entako, “Ha77i duuqidi yaaganuwa aawatethan poliseysas immite” yaagis. Enti iyaw efidi immidosona.
2.9: Yaaganuwa aawatethan poliseysi woyne ushshi laametida haatha ganxi ekidi awupe yidaako eribeenna, shin haatha kunthida oosanchoti eroosona. Yaaganuwa aawatethan poliseysi machiw ekeysa xeegidi,
2.10: “Oonika lo77o woyne ushsha asaa koyrottidi ushshees. Yaatidi asay uyi kallidaape guye, qiraariya immees. Shin neeni lo77o woyne ushsha hanno gakanaw wotha aggadasa” yaagis.
2.11: Yesuusi ha koyro malaata Galila biittan Qaana kataman oothis; hessan ba gitatetha bessis. Iya tamaareti iya ammanidosona.
2.12: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi ba aayera, ba ishataranne ba tamaaretara issife Qifirnahooma katamaa bidi guutha gallas gam7is. Xoossa Keethafe Zal7eyisata Kessis (Maato 21:12-13; Mar 11:15-17; Luqa 19:45-46)
2.13: Ayhudeti bonchiya Paasika Ba7aale gallasay matatin Yesuusi Yerusalaame bis.
2.14: Bidi xoossa keethan boorata, miizata, dorsatanne holleta bayzeysatanne banta oydiyan uttidi miishe laammeyisata demmis.
2.15: I xurqafe dooqidi asaa ubbaa enta mehetara Xoossa Keethafe gooddidi kare kessis. Miishe laammeyisata xarpheezataka aathi yeggidi enta miishiya laallis.
2.16: Holle bayzeyisata, “Ha holleta haysafe kessite; ta Aawa keetha giya oothopite” yaagis.
2.17: Iya tamaareti Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Taani ne keethas mishetiya mishay tana tamada xuuggees” geetetidi xaafetidaysa akeekidosona.
2.18: Hessafe guye, Ayhudeti zaaridi, “Ne haysa oothanaw new maati de7eysas nuna ay malaata oothada bessanee?” yaagidosona.
2.19: Yesuusi, “Ha Xoossa Keetha laallite; taani heedzu gallasan zaarada keexana” yaagis.
2.20: Qassika Ayhudeti, “Ha Xoossa Keetha keexanaw oytamanne usupun laythi ekis, shin neeni heedzu gallasan keexanee?” yaagidosona.
2.21: Shin Yesuusi odiya Xoossa Keethay ba asatethaba.
2.22: Hessa gisho, Yesuusi hayqope dendidaape guye iya tamaareti I hessa gidaysa akeekidosona. Qassi enti Geeshsha maxaafan xaafetidaysanne Yesuusi odidaysa ammanidosona.
2.23: Yesuusi Paasika bonchiya bessan Yerusalaamen de7ishin, I oothida malaatata be7idi daro asay iya ammanidosona.
2.24: Shin Yesuusi asaa ubbaa eriya gisho enta ammanibena.
2.25: Asa wozanan de7iyaba I ba huuphen eriya gisho asaba oonika iyaw odana mela koshshibeenna.

3.1: Farsaaweta yaraape gidida, Ayhudeta halaqay, Niqodimoosa geetetiya issi addey de7ees.
3.2: Niqodimoosi qamma Yesuusako yidi, “Astamaariyaw, neeni Xoossay kiitida astamaare gideysa nuuni eroos. Ayis giiko, Xoossay iyara doonna ixiko ha neeni oothiya malaata oothanaw danda7iya asi baawa” yaagis.
3.3: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani new tuma odayis; oonika zaari yeletonna ixiko Xoossaa kawotethaa be7anaw danda7enna” yaagis.
3.4: Niqodimoosi, “Ceega asi waanidi zaari yeletanaw danda7ii? Ba aaye ulo simmi gelidi zaari yeletanaw danda7ii?” yaagis.
3.5: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani new tuma odayis; oonika haathafenne Geeshsha Ayyaanape yeletonna ixiko, Xoossaa kawotethaa gelanaw danda7enna.
3.6: Asho na7atethi aawupenne aayipe yees; Xoossaa na7atethi Geeshsha Ayyaanape imetees.
3.7: Taani, ‘Hinte zaari yeletanaw bessees’ gada hintew odida gisho neeni malaaletofa.
3.8: Carkoy ba koyida bessi carkees. Neeni iya kooshincha si7asape attishin, I awupe yaako woyko aw biyako eraka. Ayyaanape yeletida ubbay hessa mela” yaagis.
3.9: Yaatin Niqodimoosi, “Hessi waanidi hananaw danda7ii?” yaagidi oychis.
3.10: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Neeni Isra7eeleta astamaare gidashe haysa erikii?
3.11: Taani new tuma odayis; nu eriyaba odoosinne be7idaba markatoos, shin nu markatethaa hinte ekeketa.
3.12: Taani hintew sa7aba odin hinte ammanonnaba gidiko saloba odin waatidi ammananee?
3.13: Salope wodhida Asa Na7aape attishin, salo keyday oonika baawa; [salon de7iya Asa Na7ay tana”] yaagis.
3.14: -15 Musey mela biittan Naase birata shooshi kaqidaysada tana ammanida ubbay merinaa de7uwa ekana mela Asa Na7ay dhoqu gaanaw bessees.
3.16: Xoossaa Na7aa ammaniya ubbay merinaa de7uwa laattanaape attishin, dhayonna mela Xoossay ha alamiya daro dosida gisho ba issi Na7aa immis.
3.17: Xoossay ba Na7aa ha alamiya kiittiday alamiya pirdanaw gidonashin alamiya iya baggara ashshanaasa.
3.18: Na7aa ammaniya oonika pirdetenna, shin Na7aa ammanonna oonika issi Xoossaa Na7aa ammanibona gisho ha77i pirdetis.
3.19: Pirdayka haysa: poo7oy alamiya yis, shin asaa oosoy iita gidiya gisho asay poo7uwape aathidi dhumaa dosees.
3.20: Iitabaa oothiya oonika poo7o ixees. Ayis giiko, ba oosoy qonconna mela poo7uwako yeenna.
3.21: Shin tuma oothiya oonika Xoossay kiitidaysada I oothidaysa poo7oy qoncisana mela poo7uwako yees. Xammaqiya Yohaanisi Yesuusaba Markatis
3.22: Hessafe guye, Yesuusinne iya tamaareti Yihuda biitta bidosona. Yesuusi yan xammaqishe entara guutha wode uttis.
3.23: Qassi Yohaanisi Saleema matan de7iya Henoona giya bessan gidiya haathi de7iya gisho asaa yan xammaqees. Asayka yaa bidi xammaqetosona.
3.24: He wode Yohaanisi buroo qashetibeenna.
3.25: Hessafe guye, Yohaanisa tamaaretinne issi Ayhude addey geeshsho wogabaa palamidosona.
3.26: Enti Yohaanisako bidi, “Astamaariyaw, Yordaanose Shaafape hefinthan neera de7eysi, neeni iyabaa markatidaysi, Heko xammaqees. Asa ubbayka iyako boosona” yaagidosona.
3.27: Yohaanisi zaaridi, “Xoossay immonna asi aybibaaka ekanaw danda7enna.
3.28: ‘Taani Kiristoosa gidike, shin iyape sinthe kiitetas’ gidaysas taw hinte, hinte huuphen marka.
3.29: Gelos giigidaara ekenaw giigidaysasa. Ekeysa laggey iya matan eqidi I geysa si7iya wode daro ufaytees. Hessa gisho, haysi ta ufaysay poletis.
3.30: I gitatanaw taani guuxanaw bessees” yaagis.
3.31: Bollafe yeysi ubbaafe bolla. Sa7ape bentidaysi sa7aba. I sa7aba odees. Salope yeysi ubbaafe bolla.
3.32: I ba be7idabaanne si7idaba markatees, shin iya markatethaa ekey baawa.
3.33: Iya markatethaa ekiya oonika Xoossay tuma gideysa qoncisees.
3.34: Xoossay ba geeshsha Ayyaana iyaw kumethi immiya gisho Xoossay kiittidaysi Xoossaa qaala odees.
3.35: Aaway ba Na7aa dosidi ubbaba iya kushen wothis.
3.36: Na7aa ammaniya uraas merinaa de7oy de7ees. Shin Na7aa ammanonaysa bolla Xoossaa hanqoy de7eesipe attishin, I de7o demmenna.

4.1: Yesuusi Yohaanisape daro kaalliya asaa baako shiisheysanne xammaqeysa Farsaaweti si7idosona.
4.2: Gidikoka Yesuusa tamaareti xammaqidosonape attishin, Yesuusi oonaka xammaqibeenna.
4.3: Yesuusi asay iyabaa geysa si7ida wode Yihudape dendidi Galila bis.
4.4: I, Galila bishe Samaarera aadhanaysi attonnaba gidis.
4.5: Hessa gisho, Yayqoobi ba na7aa Yoosefas immida gadiya matan de7iya Sikaare geetetiya Samaare katamaa bis.
4.6: He bessan Yayqooba haatha ollay de7ees. Yesuusi hemethan daaburidi he haatha olla matan uttis. He wode sa7i usupun saate heera.
4.7: Issi Samaare katamaa maccas he ollaafe haathe tikanaw yasu. Yesuusi he maccaseeko, “Tana haathe ushsharki” yaagis.
4.8: He wode Yesuusa tamaareti kathi shammanaw katama bidosonashin.
4.9: He maccasiya zaarada, “Neeni Ayhude ase gidashe, Samaare maccas gidiya tana waanada haathe ushsha gay?” yaagasu. Hessa iya giday Ayhudeti Samaaretara gahetonna gishosa.
4.10: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Neeni Xoossa imotanne haathe tana ushsha geysi ooneko eridaba gidiyako iya ne woossana; ika new de7o immiya haathi immanashin” yaagis.
4.11: Maccasiya zaarada, “Godaw, new duuqiyabay baawa; ollayka ziqa. Yaatin, de7o immiya haathi ne awupe ekanee?
4.12: Nuus ha haatha olla immida nu aawa Yayqoobape neeni aadhay? I, iya naytinne iya mehey ha ollaafe uyidosona” yaagasu.
4.13: Yesuusi, “Ha haathaafe uyida oonika zaari saamotana.
4.14: Shin taani immana haatha uyaa oonika ubbaka saamotenna. Taani immiya haathay iya giddon merinaa de7o immiya goggiya pulto gidana” yaagis.
4.15: Maccasiya zaarada, “Godaw, taani saamotonna melanne haathe tikanaw ha bessaa yoonna mela taw he haatha imma” yaagasu.
4.16: Yesuusi iiko, “Bada ne azinaa xeegada ya” yaagis.
4.17: Maccasiya zaarada, “Taw azini baawa” yaagasu. Yesuusi iiko, “Taw azini baawa gashe balabaka.
4.18: New kase ichashu azinati de7oosona. Ha77i neera de7iya addey ne azina gidenna. Neeni ha77i tuma odadasa” yaagis.
4.19: Maccasiya zaarada, “Godaw, neeni nabe gideysa taani eras.
4.20: Nu aawati ha zumaa bolla Xoossaa goyinnidosona. Shin hinte Ayhudeti asi Xoossas goyinnanaw bessiya bessay Yerusalaamena geeta” yaagasu.
4.21: Yesuusi, “Ha maccasete tana ammana; ha zumaa bolla woyko Yerusalaamen Aawas hinte goyinnona wodey yaana.
4.22: Hinte Samaareti eronnaysa goyinneta. Shin nuuni atotethay Ayhudepe yaa gisho nu ereysa goyinnoos.
4.23: Shin Aawas tuman goyinneysati Ayyaananinne tumatethan goyinnana wodey matatis; ha77ika gakis. Hiza, Aaway koyey haysa mela ogiyan goyinneyisata.
4.24: Xoossay Ayyaana; iyaw goyinneysati Ayyaananinne tumatethan goyinnanaw bessees” yaagis.
4.25: Maccasiya zaarada, “Kiristoosi yaanaysa taani erayis. I yaa wode nuus ubbaba odana” yaagasu.
4.26: Yesuusi, “Ha neera odetey taani iya” yaagis.
4.27: Enti odetishin, Yesuusa tamaareti bida bessaafe simmidosona. Yesuusi maccasara odetishin enti be7idi daro malaaletidosona. Shin maccaseeko, “Ay koyay?” Woyko Yesuusako, “Iira ayis odetay?” giday oonika baawa.
4.28: Hessafe guye, maccasiya ba haatha otuwa aggada guye katamaa bada asaako,
4.29: “Taani oothidaba ubbaa taw odida addiya be7anaw yedhite. I Kiristoosa gidandesha?” yaagasu.
4.31: Hessi hanishin, iya tamaareti Yesuusako, “Guuthaba marki” yaagidi woossidosona.
4.32: Shin I, “Taw hinte eronna kathi ta meysi de7ees” yaagis.
4.33: Hessa gisho, iya tamaareti banta giddon, “Iyaw miyaba asi ehonna aggenna” yaagidosona.
4.34: Yesuusi entako, “Ta kathay tana kiittidaysa sheniya oothanaysanne iya oosuwa polanaysa.
4.35: Hinte, ‘Oyddu ageenape guye kathay caketana’ geeketiyee? Shin taani hintew odayis; kathay kaxidi shiishoos gakidaysa loythi xeellite.
4.36: Zereysinne cakeysi issife ufaytana mela cakeysi damooziya ekees qassi kathaa merinaa de7os shiishees.
4.37: Hiza, ‘Issoy zerees; hankoy qassi cakees’ giya oday tuma.
4.38: Hinte daaburiboonaysa shiishana mela taani hintena kiittas. Harati oothi daaburidasuwan gelidi hinte enta daabura ayfiya ekideta” yaagis.
4.39: Maccasiya, “I, taani oothida ubbaba odis” gada markatida gisho he kataman de7iya Samaare asaape daroti Yesuusa ammanidosona.
4.40: Samaare asay Yesuusako yidi, banta matan gam7ana mela Yesuusa woossin I yan nam7u gallas uttis.
4.41: I odiya qaala gisho kaseysafe daro asay ammanidosona.
4.42: Qassi enti maccaseeko, “Ha77i nu ammaney nu huuphen I geysa si7ida gishosafe attishin, neeni markatida gishosa gidenna. Qassi I tuma ha alamiya ashsheysa gideysa nuuni erida” yaagidosona. Issi Shuuma Na7a Paxuwa
4.43: Nam7u gallasape guye, Yesuusi yaape keyidi Galila biitta bis.
4.44: Yesuusi ba huuphen, “Nabey ba biittan bonchetenna” yaagidi kasetidi odis.
4.45: Yesuusi Galila gakida wode Galila asay iya mokidosona. Ayis giiko, Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallas enti Yerusalaamen de7iya gisho I oothidaba ubbaa be7idosona.
4.46: Yesuusi haatha woyne ushshi laammida bessaa, Galilan de7iya Qaana katama bis. Qifirnahooman kawo keethan oothiya issi shuumas na7ay hargetis.
4.47: Yesuusi Yihudape Galila yidaysa he shuumay si7idi iyako yis. Hayqanaw matida ba na7aa bidi pathana mela Yesuusa woossis.
4.48: Yesuusi shuumako, “Xoossay oothiya malaatatanne oorathabata be7onna de7ishe hinte ubbaraka ammaneketa” yaagis.
4.49: Shuumay zaaridi, “Godaw, ta na7ay hayqonna de7ishin taara yedharki” yaagis.
4.50: Yesuusi, “Ne soo ba; ne na7ay paxana” yaagis. He shuumay Yesuusi gidaysa ammanidi ba soo bis.
4.51: I ba soo bishin iya aylleti iyako yishe iyara ogen gahetidi, “Ne na7ay paxis” gidoosona.
4.52: I ba aylleta ba na7aas ay saaten lo77idaako oychis. Enti zaaridi, “Zine laapun saaten mishay aggis” yaagidosona.
4.53: Na7aa aaway Yesuusi baako, “Ne na7ay paxana” giday he saatiyan gideysa akeekis. Hessa gisho, inne iya soo asa ubbay ammanidosona.
4.54: Hessi Yesuusi Yihudape Galila yidi oothida nam7antho malaata.

5.1: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi Ayhudeti bonchiya baaliya bonchanaw Yerusalaame bis.
5.2: Yerusalaamen Dorsa Pengiya matan Ibraawetho doonan Beetesayda giya teqetida haathi de7ees. He teqeti uttida haatha matan ichashu shempiya bessati de7oosona.
5.3: [Hessan haathay qaaxanaysa naagiya] daro harganchoti, qooqeti, wobbetinne gundati zin7idosona.
5.4: [Ayis giiko, issi issi toho Godaa kiitanchoy teqetida haathan wodhidi haatha qaathees. Haathay qaaxiya wode koyro gelida uray bana oykida ay hargefeka paxees.]
5.5: He bessan hastamanne hospun laythi hargetida issi addey de7ees.
5.6: Yesuusi yan zin7ida addiya be7idi, qassi daro wode hargetidaysa eridi addiyako, “Paxanaw koyay?” yaagis.
5.7: Harganchoy zaaridi, “Godaw, haathay qaaxiya wode tana haathan yeggiya asi baawa. Taani gelana haniya wode haray taape sinthatidi geli kichees” yaagis.
5.8: Yesuusi iyako, “Denda eqa; ne algaa tookada ba” yaagis.
5.9: Addey iiraka paxis; ba algaa tookidi bis. Hessi Sambaata gallasan hanis.
5.10: Hessa gisho, Ayhudeti paxida addiyako, “Hachi sa7i Sambaata; neeni ne algaa tookeysi woga gidenna” yaagidosona.
5.11: Shin addey, “Tana pathidaysi, ne algaa tookada ba gis” yaagidi zaaris.
5.12: Enti iyako, “Nena, ne algaa tookada ba giday I oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
5.13: Shin Yesuusi he bessan daro asaa giddora erisonna kanthidi bida gisho addey bana pathiday ooneko erenna.
5.14: Yesuusi guyepe he addiya xoossa keethan demmidi, “Heko, neeni paxadasa; haysafe iitabay nena gakonna mela zaarada nagara oothofa” yaagis.
5.15: Hessafe guye, addey bidi bana pathidaysi Yesuusa gididaysa Ayhudetas odis.
5.16: Yesuusi hessa Sambaata gallas oothida gisho, Ayhudeti Yesuusa goodda oykidosona.
5.17: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ta Aaway ubba wode oothees; taka oothanaw bessees” yaagis.
5.18: Yesuusi Sambaata bonchona gisho xalaalas gidonashin Xoossay ba Aawa gidi bana Xoossara giigisida gisho, Ayhudeti iya wodhanaw kasepe minthidi koydosona.
5.19: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Na7ay barka aykoka oothanaw danda7enna. I ba Aaway oothishin be7oysa xalaala oothees. Aaway ootheysa Na7ayka oothees.
5.20: Aaway ba Na7aa dosiya gisho I oothiya ooso ubbaa ba Na7aa bessees. Hinte malaaletana mela I haysafe aadhiya ooso ba Na7aa bessaana.
5.21: Aaway hayqidaysata hayqope denthidi entaw de7o immeysada Na7ayka ba koyeysatas de7o immees.
5.22: Aaway Na7aas pirda maata ubbaa immispe attishin, I oonaka pirdenna.
5.23: Asa ubbay Aawa boncheysada Na7aaka bonchana. Na7aa bonchona oonika Na7aa kiitida Aawaka bonchenna.
5.24: “Taani hintew tuma odayis; ta qaala si7eysasinne tana kiittidaysa ammaneysas merinaa de7oy de7ees. I hayqope de7on pinnida gisho pirdetenna.
5.25: Taani hintew tuma odayis; hayqida asay Xoossaa Na7aa qaala si7iya wodey yaana; hessika ha77i. He qaala si7ey de7on daana.
5.26: Aaway de7os pulto gididaysada Na7aaka de7os pulto oothis.
5.27: Na7ay Asa Na7a gidiya gisho Aaway Na7aas pirda maata immis.
5.28: “Duufon de7eysati iya qaala si7idi dendiya wodey yaana gisho haysan malaaletofite.
5.29: Lo77o oothidaysati de7on daanaw qassi iita oothidaysati pirda ekanaw duufope dendana.
5.30: “Taani ta maatan aybibaaka oothanaw danda7ike. Xoossay taw odidaysada pirdayis. Taani tana kiittidaysi koyaba oothaysipe attishin, ta koyaba oothonna gisho ta pirday tuma.
5.31: “Taani tabaa markatiko ta markatethay tuma gidenna.
5.32: Tabaa markatiya hari de7ees; I tabaa markateysi tuma gideysa taani erayis.
5.33: “Hinte Yohaanisako ase kiittin I tumaas markatis.
5.34: Taani hessa hintew odey, hinte attana mela gadape attishin, asa markatethi taw koshshin gidenna.
5.35: Yohaanisi muqaadada eexishe poo7is. Hinte guutha wode iya poo7uwan ufaytideta.
5.36: “Shin taw Yohaanisape aadhiya marki de7ees. Taani oothana mela ta Aaway taw immida oosoti tabaa markatoosona; Aaway tana kiittidaysa qoncisosona.
5.37: “Qassi tana kiitida Aawayka ba huuphen tabaa markatees. Hinte iya qaala ubbaraka si7ibeeketa woyko iya malaa be7ibeeketa.
5.38: I kiittidaysa hinte ammanonna gisho iya qaalay hinte wozanan baawa.
5.39: “Geeshsha Maxaafatape merinaa de7o demmanabaa hintew daanin enta pilgeeta; enti tabaa markatoosona.
5.40: Shin hinte de7o demmanaw taako yaanaw koyeketa.
5.42: Shin taani hinte wozanan Xoossaa siiqoy baynaysa erayis.
5.43: Taani ta Aawa maatan yas, shin tana mokibeketa. Haray ba maatan yaa wode iya mokeeta.
5.44: Hinte issoy issuwafe boncho koyeysati, issi Xoossaafe yaa galata ekanaw koyonnaysati, waanidi tana ammananaw danda7eetii?
5.45: “Taani ta Aawa sinthan hintena mootiyaba hintew daanopo. Hintena mootanay hinte ufaysan naagiya Muse.
5.46: Hinte Muse ammanidaba gidiyako I tabaa xaafida gisho tanaka ammananashin.
5.47: Shin hinte I xaafidaysa ammanonna ixiko ta qaala waatidi ammananee?” yaagis.

6.1: Hessafe guye, Yesuusi Xibradoosa geetetiya Galila Abbaafe hefinthi pinnis.
6.2: I harganchota pason oothida malaata be7ida gisho, daro asay iya kaallidosona.
6.3: Yesuusi zumaa bolla keyidi, yan ba tamaaretara issife uttis.
6.4: Ayhudeti bonchiya Paasika Ba7aale gallasay gakis.
6.5: Yesuusi daro asay baako yeysa be7idi Filphoosako, “Ha asaa ubbaa muzanaw gidiya kathi awupe shammanee?” yaagis.
6.6: I hessa Filphoosa paacanaw gisipe attishin, I ba huuphen ay oothaneko erees.
6.7: Filphoosi zaaridi Yesuusako, “Hari attoshin, Huuphen huuphen, issi issi barsi gathanaw, nam7u xeetu dinaaren uythu shamminka gidenna” yaagis.
6.8: Qassi Yesuusa tamaaretape issoy, Simoon Phexroosa ishay Indiriyasi,
6.9: “Ichashu banga uythinne nam7u molo oykida issi na7ay haysan de7ees, shin ha asa ubbaas hessi ay maaddanee?” yaagis.
6.10: Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Asaa utisite” yaagis. He bessan daro maati de7ees; asa ubbay uttis. Adde asaa tayboy ichashu mukulu gidana.
6.11: Yesuusi uythaa ekidi Xoossaa galati simmidi yan uttida asaas gishis. Moluwaka ekidi hessada oothidi immin, asay ba koydaysa mela mis.
6.12: Enti ubbay kallidaape guye, Yesuusi ba tamaaretako, “Issibayka iitonna mela attida tiifiya shiishite” yaagis.
6.13: Hessa gisho, enti ubbaa shiishidosona. Asay min attida banga uytha tiifiya shiishidi tammanne nam7u gayta kunthidosona.
6.14: Asay Yesuusi oothida malaatata be7ida wode, “Haysi tuma ha alamiya yaana geetetida nabiya” yaagidosona.
6.15: Yesuusi enti iya oykidi wolqan kawo oothanaw haneysa eridi, barka zumaa bolla zaaridi keyis. Yesuusi Abba Bollara Hemetis (Maato 14:22-33; Mar 6:45-52)
6.16: Sa7ay omarsida wode Yesuusa tamaareti abbaako wodhidosona.
6.17: Sa7ay qammida gishonne Yesuusi buroo entako yiboona gisho iya tamaareti wogolon gelidi abba pinnidi Qifirnahooma baanaw dendidosona.
6.18: Wolqaama carkoy carkida gisho abbay qaaxees.
6.19: Ichashu woyko usupun kilo mitire gideysa mela enti abba pidhidi bidaape guye, Yesuusi abba bollara hemetishe yeysa be7idi yayyidosona.
6.20: Shin I, “Babofite, tana” yaagis.
6.21: Enti ufaytidi iya wogoluwan gelsidosona; iiraka wogoloy enti biya abba gaxa gakis. Yesuusi De7o Uythu
6.22: Wontetha gallas abbaafe hefinthan attida daro asay issi wogolo xalaali de7eysa be7idosona. Yesuusi ba tamaaretara wogoluwan gelidi, entara boonnaysanne enti bantarka bidaysa akeekidosona.
6.23: Shin Xibradoosape hara wogoloti Yesuusi Xoossaa galatin, asay uythaa mida bessaa yidosona.
6.24: Asay Yesuusi woyko iya tamaareti yan baynaysa be7idi, Yesuusa koyanaw wogolotan gelidi Qifirnahooma bidosona.
6.25: Asay Yesuusa abbaafe hefinthan demmida wode, “Astamaariyaw, haa awude yadii?” yaagis.
6.26: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte tana koyey uythi midi kallida gishosafe attishin, malaata be7ida gishosa gidenna.
6.27: Samiya kathas oothopite, shin merinaa de7o immiya kathas oothite. Xoossaa Aaway I oothana mela iyaw maata immida gisho he katha Asa Na7ay hintew immana” yaagis.
6.28: Yaatin enti, “Nuuni Xoossaa oosuwa oothanaw ay oothanee?” yaagidi Yesuusa oychidosona.
6.29: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hinte oothana mela Xoossay koyiya oosoy haysa: I kiittidaysa ammanite” yaagis.
6.30: Enti zaaridi, “Nuuni be7idi, nena ammanana mela ay malaata ne bessanee? Ne ay oothanee?
6.31: Geeshsha Maxaafan, ‘Enti maana mela uythu salope immis’ geetetidi xaafetidaysada nu aawati mela biittan manna midosona” yaagidosona.
6.32: Yesuusi, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hintew salope tuma uythaa immiday ta Aawape attishin, Muse gidenna.
6.33: Hiza, Xoossay immiya uythay salope wodhidaysi alamiyas de7o immeysa” yaagis.
6.34: Enti zaaridi, “Godaw, nuus he uythaa ubba wode imma” yaagidosona.
6.35: Yesuusi, “Taani de7o immiya uythaa; taako yaa oonika ubbaraka koshatenna. Qassi tana ammaniya uray ubbaraka saamotenna.
6.36: Shin taani hintew odas; hinte tana be7ideta, shin ammaneketa.
6.37: Ta Aaway taw immiya ubbay taako yaana; qassi taako yaa oonaka kare yeddike.
6.38: Taani ta koyaba oothanaw gidonashin tana kiittidaysi koyaba oothanaw salope yas.
6.39: Tana kiittidaysi koyey haysa: taani I taw immida ubbataka wursetha gallas hayqope denthana melape attishin, issuwaka dhaysana mela koyenna.
6.40: Hiza, ta Aaway koyey hessa: Na7aa be7idi ammaniya ubbay merinaa de7uwa ekana; taani he ubbaa wursetha gallas merinaa de7os hayqope denthana” yaagis.
6.41: Yesuusi, “Taani salope wodhida uythaa” gida gisho, Ayhudeti iya bolla zuuzumidosona.
6.42: Enti, “Haysi nuuni iya aawanne iya aayiw eriya Yoosefa Na7aa Yesuusa gidennee? Yaatin, I waanidi, ‘Taani salope wodhas’ gaanaw danda7ii?” yaagidosona.
6.44: Tana kiitida ta Aaway taako ehiya asape attishin, taako yaanaw danda7iya oonika baawa. Taani wursetha gallas iya merinaa de7os hayqope denthana.
6.45: Nabeti, ‘Xoossay asa ubbaa tamaarsana’ yaagidi xaafidosona. Aawa si7eysinne iyape tamaariya oonika taako yees.
6.46: Xoossaa matape yidaysafe attishin, Aawa be7iday oonika baawa; iya xalaali Aawa be7is.
6.47: “Taani hintew tuma odayis; tana ammaniya oodeska merinaa de7oy de7ees.
6.49: Hinte aawati mela biittan manna midosona, shin hayqidosona.
6.50: Salope yaa uythay haysa; he uythaa miya oonika hayqenna.
6.51: Salope yida de7o uythay tana. Oonika ha uythaa miiko merinaw daana. Qassi ha alamey de7on daana mela taani hintew immana uythay ta ashuwa” yaagis.
6.52: Ayhudeti, “Ha addey ba ashuwa nu maana mela nuus waatidi immanaw danda7ii?” yaagidi banta giddon palamidosona.
6.53: Hessa gisho, Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Asa Na7aa ashuwa, hinte moonna ixiko, qassi iya suuthaa hinte uyonna ixiko, hintew de7oy baawa.
6.54: Ta ashuwa miya uraasinne ta suuthaa uyaa uraas merinaa de7oy de7ees. Taani wursetha gallas iya hayqope denthana.
6.55: Ta ashoy tuma kathi; ta suuthayka tuma ushshu.
6.56: Ta ashuwa miya uraynne ta suuthaa uyaa uray tanan de7ees; taka iyan de7ayis.
6.57: De7o Aaway tana kiittin, taani iya baggara de7on de7eysada, tana miya urayka ta gaason de7on daana.
6.58: Salope wodhida uythay haysa: hinte aawati midi hayqida manna mela gidenna; ha uythaa miya uray merinaw daana” yaagis.
6.59: Yesuusi Qifirnahooma kataman ayhude woosa keethan haysa tamaarsis. Merina De7o Qaala
6.60: Yesuusa tamaaretape dariya baggay hessa si7ida wode, “Haysi gelonna timirte; haysi ooddes gelii?” yaagidosona.
6.61: Yesuusi ba tamaareti hessas zuuzumidaysa eridi, “Haysi hintena dhubbii?
6.62: Yaatin, Asa Na7ay kase de7iyasuwa pude keyishin hinte be7idi woygandetii?
6.63: Geeshsha Ayyaanay de7o immees; asa wolqi aykoka maaddenna. Ta hintew odiya qaalay de7o immiya Geeshsha Ayyaanape yees.
6.64: Shin hinte giddon ammanonaysati de7oosona” yaagis. Ammanonaysati oonanteko Yesuusi koyrope doomidi erees. Qassi bana aathidi immanay ooneko erees.
6.65: Qassika Yesuusi, “Aaway ba goonna oonika taako yaanaw danda7enna gada taani odiday hessa gishosa” yaagis.
6.66: Hessa gaason, Yesuusa kaalleysatape daroti iya aggidi guye simmidosona; zaari iya kaallibookona.
6.67: Yesuusi ba tammanne nam7u tamaaretako, “Hinteka aggidi baanaw koyeetii?” yaagidi oychis.
6.68: Simoon Phexroosi zaaridi, “Godaw, nuuni oodeko baanee? New merinaa de7o immiya qaalay de7ees.
6.69: Neeni Xoossaa Geeshshaa gideysa nuuni ammanoosinne eroos” yaagis.
6.70: Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintena tammanne nam7ata doorabikina? Shin hintefe issoy Xalahe” yaagis.
6.71: Yesuusi hessa giday Simoona Na7aa Asqoroota Yihudasa. Yihudi Yesuusa aathidi immanaw de7iya tammanne nam7u tamaaretape issuwa.

7.1: Hessafe guye, Ayhudeti Yesuusa wodhanaw koyiya gisho I Yihuda aggidi Galilan simeretees.
7.2: Ayhudeti bonchiya Shaqara Ba7aaley bonchetanaw matis.
7.3: Hessa gisho, Yesuusa ishati, “Ne tamaareti neeni oothiya malaatata be7ana mela haysafe dendada Yihuda biitta ba.
7.4: Baw eretanaw koya asi oonika ba oosuwa genthenna. Neeni haysata oothada nebaa alamiya erisa” yaagidosona.
7.5: Iya ishati hessa giday iyan ammanibona gishosa.
7.6: Yesuusi entako, “Taw inje wodey gakibeenna, shin hintew ubba wodey injetees.
7.7: Alamey hintena ixanaw danda7enna, shin taani alamiya oosoy iita gideysa markatiya gisho tana ixees.
7.8: Hinte baaliya biite; ta wodey gakiboonna gisho taani baaliya biike” yaagis.
7.9: I hessa gidi Galilan attis.
7.10: Iya ishati ba7aale bonchanaw bidaape guye Yesuusi oonaka erisonna qosan he bessaa bis.
7.11: Ayhudeti ba7aale bonchiya bessan, “I awun de7ii?” yaagidi iya koydosona.
7.12: Asay kalkashidi iyabaa odetoosona. Baggay, “I lo77o asi” giya wode harati qassi, “Akay, I asaa balethees” yaagosona.
7.13: Shin Ayhude halaqatas yayyida gisho oonika iyabaa qoncen odetenna.
7.14: Baaliya bonchidi giddo gathiya wode Yesuusi Xoossa Keethi bidi tamaarso oykis.
7.15: Ayhudeti, “Ha addey timirte tamaaronna haysa ubbaa waati eridee?” yaagidi malaaletidosona.
7.16: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Ta tamaarsiya timirtey tana kiitida Xoossaa matape yaa timirtefe attishin, tabaa gidenna.
7.17: Xoossaa sheniya oothanaw koyiya oonika ha timirtey Xoossaa matape yaakonne woyko taani taape odiyako erana.
7.18: Babaa odiya oonika ba huuphe boncho koyees. Shin bana kiittidaysa bonchuwa koyiya oonika I tumancho; iyan wordoy baawa.
7.19: Musey hintew higgiya immis, shin hintefe oonika higgiya naagibeenna. Yaatin ayis tana wodhanaw koyeetii?” yaagis.
7.20: Asay zaaridi, “Nena Xalahey oykis; nena wodhanaw oonee koyey?” yaagidosona.
7.21: Yesuusi, “Taani issi malaata oothin hinte ubbay malaaletideta.
7.22: Hinte, hinte nayta qaxarana mela Musey kiittis. Shin qaxaro hinte mayzati doomidosonape attishin, Muse gidenna. Hessa gisho, hinte Sambaata gallas adde nayta qaxareeta.
7.23: Muse higgey kiitida gisho, hinte Sambaata gallas qaxariyabaa gidiko, taani issi asa kumetha asatethaa pathida gisho, taara ayis kacceetii?
7.24: Tuma pirda pirditepe attishin, asa som7o be7idi pirdofite” yaagis. Yesuusi, I Kiristoosee?
7.25: Yerusalaame asaape issoti issoti, “Enti wodhanaw koyiya uray haysa gidennee?
7.26: Heko, I qoncen odees; enti iya aykoka gookona. I Kiristoosa gideysa Ayhude halaqati tuma eridonaasha?
7.27: Kiristoosi yaa wode I awupe yaako oonika erenna, shin I awupe yidaako nu eroos” yaagidosona.
7.28: Yesuusi xoossa keethan tamaarsishe ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Tuma hinte taani oonekonne ta awupe yidaako ereetii? Taani ta maatan yabiike, shin tana kiittidaysi tumancho; hinte iya ereketa.
7.29: Shin taani I kiittin iya matape yida gisho iya erayis” yaagis.
7.30: Hessa gisho, enti iya oykanaw koydosona. Shin iya wodey buroo gakiboonna gisho oonika iya bolla kushe wothibeenna.
7.31: Shin daro asay Yesuusa ammanidi, “Kiristoosi yaa wode ha uray oothida malaatatape dariya malaata oothaneyee?” yaagidosona.
7.32: Farsaaweti daro asay Yesuusaba kalkasheysa si7idosona. Kahine halaqatinne Farsaaweti iya oythidi qashisanaw Xoossa Keethi naageysata kiittidosona.
7.33: Yesuusi, “Taani hintera guutha wode gam7ana; hessafe guye tana kiittidaysako baana.
7.34: Hinte tana koyana, shin demmeketa. Taani de7iyasuwa hinte yaanaw danda7eketa” yaagis.
7.35: Ayhudeti issoy issuwara, “Haysi nuuni demmonaso aw baana hanii? Girike kataman de7iya Ayhudetako bidi Giriketa tamaarsanaw haniyee?
7.36: ‘Hinte tana koyana, shin demmeketa’ qassi, ‘Taani de7iyasuwa hinte yaanaw danda7eketa’ guussay ay guussee?” yaagidosona. De7o Haathe
7.37: Baaliya bonchiya gallasatape wolqaamanne wursetha gallasan Yesuusi dendidi, ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Saamotida oonika taako yidi uyo.
7.38: Tana ammaniya oonika Geeshsha Maxaafay gidaysada de7o immiya pulto haathay iyape goggana” yaagis.
7.39: I hessa giday iya ammanidaysati ekanaw de7iya Geeshsha Ayyaanaba. Yesuusi buroo bonchetiboona gisho, he wode Geeshsha Ayyaanay imetibeenna.
7.40: He asaape daroti I geysa si7idi, “Tuma haysi nabiya” yaagidosona.
7.41: Harati qassi, “Haysi Kiristoosa” yaagidosona. Shin harati qassi, “Kiristoosi Galilape waanidi keyii?
7.42: Geeshsha Maxaafay, ‘Kiristoosi Dawita sheeshape Dawiti de7ida Beeteleme katamaape yaana’ yaageneyee?” yaagidosona.
7.43: Hessa gisho, Yesuusa gaason asay banta giddon shaaketidosona.
7.44: He asaape issoti issoti iya oykanaw koydosona, shin oonika iya bolla kushe wothibeenna. Ayhude Halaqati Ammanibookona
7.45: Xoossa Keetha naageysati kahine halaqatakonne Farsaawetako guye simmi yin enti, “Ayis iya ehibeketii?” yaagidi oychidosona.
7.46: Xoossa Keetha naageysati entako, “Ha addey odeteysatho oonika odetenna” yaagidi zaaridosona.
7.48: Ayhude halaqatape woyko Farsaawetepe iya ammanida asi de7ii?
7.49: Muse higgiya eronna ha asay baadetidaysata” yaagidosona.
7.50: Farsaawetape issoy qamma Yesuusako bida Niqodimoosi entako,
7.51: “Issi asi giyaba si7onna woyko I ay oothidaako eronna de7ishe koyrottidi iya bolla pirdeysi nu higgiyan de7ii?” yaagis.
7.52: Enti zaaridi, “Neenika qassi Galila biitta asee? Galila biittafe nabey keyonnaysa Geeshsha Maxaafape pilgada demma” yaagidosona.
7.53: Issoy issoy aggidi ba soo ba soo bis.

8.1: Shin Yesuusi Shamaho zuma bolla keyis.
8.2: Qassi wontetha gallas guura Xoossa Keethi simmis. Daro asay iyako yin uttidi enta tamaarsis.
8.3: Higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti laymatishin oykida issi maccasiw iyako ehidosona. Enti asa ubbaa sinthan iyo essidi,
8.4: “Astamaariyaw, ha maccasiya laymatishin nu oykida.
8.5: Muse higgey hanni mela maccas shuchan cadeta hayqana mela kiittees. Yaatin, neeni woygay?” yaagidosona.
8.6: Enti hessa giday Yesuusa paacidi iya mootiyaba demmanaasa. Shin Yesuusi hokidi ba biradhen biitta bolla xaafis.
8.7: Enti iya zaari zaari oychidi aggonna ixin, pude dhoqu gidi, “Hinte giddon nagara oothiboonna asi koyrottidi iyo shuchan caddo” yaagis.
8.8: Qassika hokidi biitta bolla xaafis.
8.9: Enti hessa si7ida wode cimatape doomidi issoy issoy keyishe wuridosona. Yesuusa xalaali he bessan eqida maccaseera attis.
8.10: I pude dhoqu gidi maccaseeko, “Maccasete, asati aw bidonaa? Ne bolla pirdiday oonika baawee?” yaagis.
8.11: Maccasiya, “Godaw, oonika baawa” yaagasu. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taanika ne bolla pirdike. Ba; zaarada nagara oothofa” yaagis. Yesuusi Alames Poo7o
8.12: Qassika Yesuusi asaako, “Taani alamiyas poo7o. Tana kaalliya oonika de7o immiya poo7uwa ekanaape attishin, dhuman simeretenna” yaagidi odis.
8.13: Farsaaweti, “Neeni nebaa markataasa, shin ne markatethay tuma gidenna” yaagidosona.
8.14: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani tabaa markatikoka ta markatethay tuma. Ayis giiko, taani awupe yidaako qassi aw biyako erayis, shin hinte ereketa.
8.15: Hinte asa qofan pirdeta; taani issi asa bollaka pirdike.
8.16: Taani pirdiyaba gidikoka ta pirday tuma. Ayis giiko, tana kiitida ta Aaway taara de7eesipe attishin, taani tarka de7ike.
8.17: Nam7u asa markatethi tuma gideysi hinte higgiyan xaafetis.
8.18: Taani tabaa ta huuphen markatayis; qassi tana kiitida ta Aawayka tabaa markatees” yaagis.
8.19: Enti, “Ne aaway awun de7ii?” yaagidi iya oychidosona. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hinte tana woyko ta Aawa ereketa. Tana eridaba gidiyako, hinte ta Aawaka eranashin” yaagis.
8.20: Yesuusi xoossa keethan muxaata miishiya yeggiya saaxiney de7iya bessan hessa tamaarsis. Iya qammay buroo gakiboonna gisho oonika iya oykibeenna.
8.21: Qassika Yesuusi entako, “Taani baana; hinte tana koyana, shin hinte atotethi demmonna hinte nagaran hayqana. Taani biya bessaa hinte baanaw danda7eketa” yaagis.
8.22: Ayhude halaqati, “I, ‘Taani biya bessaa hinte baanaw danda7eketa’ yaagees. I bana barka wodhaneyee?” yaagidosona.
8.23: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Hinte garsafe; taani bollafe. Hinte ha alamiyape, taani ha alamiyape gidike.
8.24: Hinte atotethi demmonna hinte nagaran hayqana gada taani hintew odiday hessasa. ‘Taani Tana Gideysa’ hinte ammanonna ixiko hinte atotethi demmonna hinte nagaran hayqana” yaagis.
8.25: Enti, “Neeni oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona. Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani, koyrope hintew odida tana.
8.26: Taani hintebaa odada pirdiyabay darobay de7ees. Shin tana kiittidaysi tumancho; qassi taani iyape si7idaysa xalaala alamiyas odayis” yaagis.
8.27: Yesuusi ba Aawaba odeysa enti akeekibokona.
8.28: Hessa gisho, Yesuusi entako, “Hinte Asa Na7aa pude dhoqu oothiya wode Taani Tana Gideysa hinte erana. Qassika taani ta maatan aykoka oothonaysanne ta Aaway tana tamaarsidaysa odeysa hinte erana.
8.29: Tana kiittidaysi taara de7ees. Taani ubba wode iya ufaysiyabaa oothiya gisho I tana ta xalaala aggibeenna” yaagis.
8.30: Yesuusi hessa odishin si7ida daro asay iya ammanidosona. Tumi La77a Kessees
8.31: Yesuusi bana ammanida asatako, “Hinte ta timirtiyas kiitetiko tuma tana kaalleyisata.
8.32: Hinte tumaa erana; tumayka hintena aylletethafe kessana” yaagis.
8.33: Enti zaaridi, “Nuuni Abrahaame sheeshi; nuuni oodeska aylletibooko. Neeni woygada, ‘Hinte aylletethafe keyana’ gay?” yaagidosona.
8.34: Yesuusi zaaridi, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; nagara oothiya oonika nagara aylle.
8.35: Aylley merinaw soo asaara deenna, shin na7ay merinaw soo asaara de7ees.
8.36: Na7ay hintena aylletethafe kessiko hinte aylletethafe tuma keyana.
8.37: Hinte Abrahaame sheeshi gideysa taani erayis. Shin ta qaalay hinte wozanan bayna gisho, tana wodhanaw koyeeta.
8.38: Taani ta Aaway tana bessidaysa odayis, shin hinteka hinte aawape si7idaysa ootheeta” yaagis.
8.39: Enti zaaridi, “Nu aaway Abrahaame” yaagidosona. Yesuusi entako, “Hinte Abrahaame nayta gidiyako I oothidaysa oothana.
8.40: Shin Xoossafe si7ida tumaa odida tana hinte wodhanaw koyeeta. Abrahaamey hessada oothibeenna.
8.41: Hinte, hinte aaway oothidaysa ootheeta” yaagis. Enti zaaridi, “Nuuni tuma Xoossaa nayta; nuus issi Aaway Xoossaa xalaali de7ees” yaagidosona.
8.42: Yesuusi entako, “Xoossay tuma hinte aawa gidiyako hinte tana dosana; ayis giiko, taani Xoossaa matape yada haysan de7ayis. Tana I kiittisipe attishin, taani ta maatan yabiike.
8.43: Taani geysa hinte si7anaw koyonna gisho ta giyabay hintew gelenna.
8.44: Hinte, hinte aawa Xalahe nayta. Qassi hinte, hinte aaway amotiyaba oothanaw koyeeta. I koyrope doomidi shempo wodheysa. Tumi iyan bayna gisho I tumaa ixees. Wordoy iyaw medho gidida gishonne I wordo aawa gidiya gisho wordo odetishe baape odetees.
8.45: Taani tuma odayis, shin hinte tana ammaneketa.
8.46: Hintefe, ‘Neeni nagara oothishin ta be7as’ gaanaw danda7ey oonee? Taani tuma odetiyaba gidiko tana ayis ammaneketii?
8.47: Xoossaa asi Xoossay giyaba si7ees. Hinte Xoossaa asi gidonna gisho Xoossay giyaba si7eketa” yaagis. Yesuusi Abrahaamepe Sinthe De7ees
8.48: Ayhudeti zaaridi, “ ‘Neeni Samaare asi; nenan tuna ayyaanay de7ees’ gishe like gidoko?” yaagidosona.
8.49: Yesuusi entako “Ta bolla tuna ayyaani baawa. Taani ta Aawa bonchayis, shin hinte tana kawusheta.
8.50: Taani ta huuphe boncho koyke; taani bonchetana mela koyeysinne taw pirdeysi de7ees.
8.51: Taani hintew tuma odayis; ta qaala naagiya oonika hayqenna” yaagis.
8.52: Ayhudeti zaaridi, “Ne bolla tuna ayyaanay de7eysa nuuni ha77i erida. Abrahaamey hayqis; nabetika hayqidosona. Shin neeni, ‘Ta qaala naagiya oonika hayqenna’ yaagasa.
8.53: Neeni hayqida nu aawa Abrahaamepe aadhayee? Nabetika qassi hayqidosona. Neeni nena oona gada qopay?” yaagidosona.
8.54: Yesuusi, “Taani tana bonchiko ta bonchoy hada. Hinte, ‘Nu Xoossaa’ giya ta Aaway I tana bonchees.
8.55: Hinte iya eronna ixiko taani iya erayis. Taani iya erike giiko hinte mela wordotayis. Shin taani iya erayis; qassi iya qaalaka naagayis.
8.56: Hinte aaway Abrahaamey ta yuussaa gallasa be7idi ufaytanaw amottis; be7idika ufaytis” yaagis.
8.57: Ayhudeti zaaridi, “Hari attoshin, new ishatamu laythi kumibeenashin waanada Abrahaame be7as gay?” yaagidosona.
8.58: Yesuusi entako, “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Abrahaamey yeletanaape kase, ‘Taani Tana’ ” yaagis.
8.59: Hessa gisho, enti Yesuusa caddanaw shuchi ekidosona. Shin Yesuusi entafe geemmidi Xoossa Keethafe keyidi bis.

9.1: Yesuusi bishe yeletoosape qooqe gididi de7iya issi addiya be7is.
9.2: Iya tamaareti, “Astamaariyaw, ha addey qooqe gididi yeletana mela nagara oothiday oonee? I oothideye woyko iya yelidaysati oothidona?” yaagidi oychidosona.
9.3: Yesuusi, “Xoossaa oosoy iya bolla qoncana melape attishin, I woyko iya yelidaysati nagara oothida gisho gidenna.
9.4: Sa7i gallas de7ishin tana kiittidaysa oosuwa nu oothanaw bessees. Oonika oothanaw danda7onna qammay yees.
9.5: Taani alamiyan de7ashe alamiyas poo7o” yaagis.
9.6: Yesuusi hessa gidi sa7an cuttis. Ba cuchan guutha biitta laakothidi he urqan qooqe addiya ayfiya tiyis.
9.7: Yaatidi, “Bada Salihoome (Salihoome guussay Kiitetidaysa guussu) geetetiya teqetida haathan ne ayfiya meeceta” yaagis. Hessa gisho, addey bidi ba ayfiya meecetidi xeellishe simmis.
9.8: Addiya shoorotinne addey kase woossishin be7ida asay, “Haysi uttidi woossiya addiya gidenneyee?” yaagidosona.
9.9: Issi issi asay, “Haysi iya” yaagidosona. Harati qassi, “Akay, haysi iya daaneesipe attishin, iya gidenna” yaagidosona. Shin addey, “Ee, tana” yaagis.
