23.21: Shin neeni enti giyaba si7opa. Ayis giiko, oytamape dariya asati Phawuloosa wodhonna de7ishe ‘Kathi mooko, haathe uyoko’ gidi caaqetidi, qosetidi iya naagoosona. Ha77i ne giyaba xalaala si7anaw naagoosona” yaagis.
23.22: Shaalaqay zaaridi, “Ha oda ne taw odidaysa hara oodeska odopa” yaagidi kiittidi na7aa guye yeddis. Phawuloosi Filkisa Sinthan
23.23: Shaalaqay mato halaqatape nam7ata xeegidi, “Qammafe heedzu saaten Qisaare baanaw, nam7u xeetu wotaadareta, laapun tammu para asatanne nam7u xeetu tooranchota giigisite.
23.24: Deriya aysiya Filkisako Phawuloosa saro gathanaw toga mehe giigisite” yaagidi enta kiittis.
23.25: Shaalaqay Filkisas haysada giya dabdaabe xaafis:
23.26: “Qalawudiyoosa Lusiyoosape deriya aysiya boncho Filkisas, saroy new gido.
23.27: Ayhudeti ha uraa oykidi wodhana hanishin, I Roome biitta asi gidoysa erada wotaadaretara gakada iya ashshas.
23.28: Enti iya ayis mootiyako eranaw koyada enta shiiquwan iya shiishas.
23.29: Enti banta higgiyas iya mootidaysafe attishin, iya wodhisiyaba woyko qashisiyaba gidonnaysa ta demmas.
23.30: Enti ha uraa bolla maqetida zigirsay tana gakin, taani ellesada iya neeko yeddas. Iya mooteysati ne sinthan bidi mootana mela kiittas” yaagis.
23.31: Hessa gisho, wotaadareti kiitetidaysada Phawuloosa ekidi, qamma Antiphaxirisa gathidosona.
23.32: Wontetha gallas para asati iyara baana mela oothidi toho asati guye simmidosona.
23.33: Togay Qisaare gakidi dabdaabiya deriya ayseysas immidi, Phawuloosa iya sinthe aathidosona.
23.34: Deriya ayseysi dabdaabiya nabbabidaape guye, “Phawuloosa, ne aw awuraja asee?” gidi iya oychis. I Kilqiya asi gidoysa erida wode,
23.35: “Taani nebaa nena mooteysati yaa wode si7ana” yaagis. Wotaaddareti Phawuloosa Herodiisa gadhon naagana mela kiittis.

24.1: Ichashu gallasape guye kahine halaqay, Hanaani, cimataranne Xerxeluusa geetetiya issi xabaqaara Qisaare bis. Enti deriya ayseysa bolla Phawuloosa mootidosona.
24.2: Phawuloosi xeegetidi gelida wode, Xerxeluusi iya haysada yaagidi mootis: “Boncho Filkisa, nuuni ne baggara daro sarotethaa demmida, ne lo77o aysuwan nu biittay daro laametis.
24.3: Boncho Filkisa, nuuni awunka awude gidin daro galatan hessa ekoos.
24.4: Taani nena gam7isonashin neeni ne keehatethan nubaa qanthan si7ana mela nena woossayis.
24.5: Ha uray dhube gididi biitta ubban de7iya Ayhudeta giddon buqethi medhidi Naaziraweta bagga asaa kaaletheysa gidoysa erida.
24.6: Hari attoshin, Xoossa Keetha tunisana hanishin nuuni iya oykida; nu higgiyada iya bolla pirdanaw qopida.
24.7: Shin shaalaqa Lusiyoosi yidi, wolqan nu kushepe iya wothi ekis.
24.8: Iya mooteysati neeko yaana mela kiittis. Neeni ne huuphen ha uraa pilgada nuuni iya mootiya mootuwa ubbaa eranaw danda7aasa” yaagis.
24.9: Ayhudetika, “Ha oday tuma” gidi iya qofaa ma7idosona.
24.10: Deriya ayseysi Phawuloosa oda gidi mallis. Phawuloosi haysada gidi zaaris: “Neeni daro wodepe doomada, ha asaas pirdashe de7eysa erada ta odas ufaysan zaaro immayis.
24.11: Taani Yerusalaame goyinnanaw keyin tammanne nam7u gallasape aadhonaysa neeni ne huuphen eranaw danda7aasa.
24.12: Ayhudeti tana Xoossaa Keethan gidin ayhude woosa keethan gidin kataman gidin ooderaka palamishin woyko asa shiishada maqishin issi asika demmibeenna.
24.13: Ha77ika enti tana mootiyabas marka demmanaw danda7okona.
24.14: “Shin taani haysa issiba ammanayis; taani higgen de7iyabaanne nabeti xaafida ubbaba ammanada, nu aawata Xoossaa, enti wordo giya ogiyan goyinnayis.
24.15: Enti banta huuphen ammaneysa mela xillotinne nagaranchoti hayqope dendanaysa taka ammanayis.
24.16: Hessa gisho, taani Xoossaa sinthaninne asaa sinthan ubba wode lo77o kahi taw daana mela minnayis.
24.17: “Taani Yerusalaamepe keyoosape daro laythafe guye ta biitta manqotas maade immanawunne yarsho yarshanaw Yerusalaame bas.
24.18: Taani xoossa keethan hessa oothada geeshsha wogaa pola simmin tana demmidosona. He wode taara asi baawa, ooshshika keybeenna.
24.19: Shin Iisepe yida issi issi Ayhudeti hessan de7oosona; enti ta bolla oda koyko yidi tana ne bolla mootanaw danda7oosona.
24.20: Woyko taani shanguwa sinthe shiiqida wode oothida bali de7iko haysati ne sinthan de7eysati odonna.
24.21: Taani enta giddon eqada, ‘Hayqidaysati dendana gada waassada odida gisho hachi hinte sinthan ta bolla pirdoosona’ gas; hessafe haraba oothabike” yaagis.
24.22: Shin Filkisi Xoossaa ogiyaba geeshshi erida gisho, “Taani hinte oda shaalaqa Lusiyoosi yaa wode pirdana” yaagidi moyzis.
24.23: Filkisi qassi Phawuloosa qachonna naagana melanne iya dabbotape oonika iya oychanaw yishin diggonna mela mato halaqaa kiittis.
24.24: Guutha gallasape guye, Filkisi Ayhude bagga gidida ba mache Dirusillara yidi Phawuloosa kiiti ehisidi Yesuus Kiristoosan ammanoba iyape si7is.
24.25: Phawuloosi xillotethabaa, ba huuphe haarobaanne yaanaw de7iya pirdaba odishin, Filkisi yayyidi, “Neeni ha77is ba; taw injetida wode nena xeegisana” yaagis.
24.26: He wode Phawuloosape wodhaafe ekanaw qopidi, iya zaari zaari xeegisidi iyara odetees.
24.27: Nam7u laythafe guye, Filkisa bessaa Phorqiyoos Fisxoosi ekis. Filkisi Ayhudeta ufaysanaw koyidi Phawuloosa billonna aggaagis.

25.1: Fisxoosi kawotida heedzu gallasape guye Qisaarepe Yerusalaame bis.
25.2: Yan kahine halaqatinne Ayhudeta kaaletheysati Phawuloosa mootidosona.
25.3: Phawuloosa Yerusalaame ehishin ogen qosetidi iya wodhanaw entaw injetana mela bantana maaddo gidi Fisxoosa woossidosona.
25.4: Fisxoosi entako, “Phawuloosi, Qisaaren qasho keethan de7ees; taani ta huuphenka ellesada guye simmana hanayis.
25.5: I balidabay de7iko hinte giddon aawateysati taara Qisaare bidi iya mootona” yaagidi zaaris.
25.6: Fisxoosi enta matan hospun woyko tammu gallasa mela gam7idaape guye Qisaare bis. Wontetha gallas pirda oyden uttidi Phawuloosa ehana mela kiittis.
25.7: I yin Yerusalaamepe yida Ayhudeti iya yuushuwan eqidi enti lathanaw danda7onna daro deexo mooto iya bolla shiishidosona.
25.8: Phawuloosi zaaridi, “Taani Ayhude higgiya gidin Xoossa Keethaa woyko Roome Kawa Qeesare naaqabike” yaagis.
25.9: Shin Fisxoosi Ayhudeta ufaysanaw koyidi Phawuloosako, “Yerusalaame bada ha mootuwaba yan ta sinthan pirdetanaw koyay?” yaagidi oychis.
25.10: Shin Phawuloosi, “Taani pirdetanaw bessiya Qeesare pirda keethan eqa kichas. Neeni loytha ereysada taani Ayhudeta aybinka naaqabike.
25.11: Hiza, taani naaqidabay woyko hayqos gathiyaba oothidaba gidiko hayqope tana ashsha giike. Shin enti tana mootiya mootoy mela gididaape guye oonika tana entaw aathidi immanaw danda7enna. Qeesarey tabaa pirdo gada oychayis” yaagis.
25.12: He wode Fisxoosi ba zoranchotara zoretidi, “Neeni Qeesarey tabaa pirdo gada oychadasa; Qeesareko baasa” yaagidi zaaris. Phawuloosi Agirphanne Barniqe Sinthan
25.13: Guutha gallasape guye Kawoy Agirphinne Barniqey Fisxoosa sarothanaw Qisaare bidosona.
25.14: Yan enti daro gallas gam7in, Fisxoosi Kawas Phawuloosaba haysada yaagidi odis; “Filkisi billonna aggidi bida issi addey haysan de7ees.
25.15: Taani Yerusalaame bida wode kahine halaqatinne Ayhude cimati iya bolla pirdana mela tana woossidi iyabaa taw odidosona.
25.16: Taani, ‘Mootetida uray bana mooteyisata sinthan eqidi ba mootidabaas zaaro immonnashin, oona gidikoka aadhidi imeteysi Roome higge gidenna’ yaagada entaw zaaras.
25.17: “Hessa gisho, enti haysan shiiqida wode taani gam7onna wontetha gallas pirda keethaa gelada Phawuloosa ehana mela kiittas.
25.18: Iya mooteysati iya matan eqidi, iitaban iya mootonna aggokona gada taani qopidaysa mela iya mootibookona.
25.19: Shin enti banta haymaanotebanne Phawuloosi, ‘Paxa de7ees’ giya issi hayqida Yesuusa geetetiya addiyaba iyara palamoosona.
25.20: Ha oday tana shaakanaw metida gisho, Phawuloosi Yerusalaame bidi, yan pirdetanaw koyaako gada iya oychas.
25.21: Shin Phawuloosi ba oda Qeesarey iyabaa be7ana gakanaw qasho keethan gam7anaw oychis. Taani iya Qeesareko yeddana gakanaw I qashetana mela kiittas” yaagis.
25.22: Hessa gisho, Agirphi Fisxoosako, “Taani ta huuphenka he uray giyaba si7anaw koyayis” yaagis. Fisxoosi iyako, “Neeni wonto I giyaba si7ana” yaagis.
25.23: Wontetha gallas Agirphinne Barniqey gita bonchon shaalaqataranne kataman de7iya gita asatara yidi pirda keethi gelidosona. Fisxoosi Phawuloosa xeegisidi ehis.
25.24: Fisxoosi, “Kawaw Agirpha, haysan nuura de7iya asaw, Ayhudeti Yerusalaamenka haysanka waassidi, ‘I hizape guye paxa daanaw bessenna’ yaagidi, tana woossida uraa haysa be7eeta.
25.25: Shin iya hayqos gathiyaba aybibaaka taani demmabike. I ba huuphen, ‘Qeesarey tabaa pirdo yaagada oychayis’ gida gisho, Qeesareko iya yeddanaw qofa qachas.
25.26: Taani iyabaa ta godaa Qeesares xaafanaw gidiya gaasoy aybika baawa. Hessa gisho, iyabaa hinte be7iko ta xaafiyabay bentaneko gada hinte sinthe ubbaraka Kawaw, Agirpha, ne sinthe iya ehas.
25.27: Ayis giiko, qashetida asi bolla daynnas aathiya wode I ayis mootetidaako qoncisonna aggeysi taw eeyatethi daanees” yaagis.

26.1: Agirphi Phawuloosako, “Neeni nebaa odanaw danda7aasa” yaagis. He wode Phawuloosi ba kushiya denthidi haysada yaagis:
26.2: “Kawaw, Agirpha, Ayhudeti tana mootidabaas zaaro immanaw hachi ne sinthan eqashe ta qaaday lo77o gada qopayis.
26.3: Neeni Ayhude woganne palama loythada eriya gisho tana saletonna si7ana mela nena woossayis.
26.4: “Taani na7atethafe doomada ta asaa giddoninne Yerusalaamen de7ida ta de7uwa Ayhude ubbay eroosona.
26.5: Taani koyrope doomada, nu haymaanote higgiya minthidi naagiya Farsaaweta yaraape gideysa enti markatanaw koyko eroosona.
26.6: Ha77ika taani Xoossay nu aawatas immana gida ufaysaa naagiya gisho mootetada haysan eqas.
26.7: Qassi tammanne nam7u nu aawata sheeshay Xoossaa qammanne gallas minthidi goyinnishe Xoossay immana gidaysa ekanaw ufaysan naagoosona. Kawaw Agirpha, Ayhudeti tana mootey taani ufaysan hessa naagiya gishosa.
26.8: Ayhudeto, Xoossay hayqidaysata dentheysa ayis ammaneketii?
26.9: “Kase taani ta huuphenka Naazirete Yesuusa sunthaa teqanaw danda7etidaba ubbaa oothanaw bessees gada qopas.
26.10: Taani Yerusalaamen oothiday haysa. Kahine halaqatape maata ekada Xoossaa asatape darota qashisas. Enta wodhiya wodeka enta hayquwa dosas.
26.11: Daro wode ayhude woosa keethaa ubban enti seeretana melanne Yesuusa cayidi kaddana mela un7ethas. Taani wogi bayna enta hanqetada hari attoshin, hara biitta katamata gakanaw enta gooddas.
26.12: “Taani ha odas kahine halaqatape maatanne kiitaa ekada Damasqo bayis.
26.13: Kawaw, taani seeta gallas ogen de7ishin awa poo7ope daro aadhiya poo7oy ta yuushuwaninne taara beyisata yuushuwan salope poo7is.
26.14: Nuuni ubbayka sa7an kundida wode Ibraawetho doonan, ‘Saa7ola, Saa7ola, tana ayis goodday? Neeni, nena caddiya birata xam7a qakiko nena qohaasa’ yaagidi taw odishin si7as.
26.15: “Taani, ‘Godaw, neeni oonee?’ yaagas. “Goday, ‘Taani, neeni gooddiya Yesuusa;
26.16: shin denda eqa. Hachi neeni tana be7idaysaninne sinthafe ta new bessanaysa haratas markatana mela ta oosancho oothada nena shuumanaw new bentas.
26.17: Isra7eele asatapenne taani nena entako kiittiya Ayhude gidonaysatape nena ashshana.
26.18: Neeni enta ayfiya dooyana, dhumape poo7oko, Xalahe kushepe Xoossako enta zaarana. Enti tanan ammanidi nagara atotetha ekana. Xoossay doorida asaa giddon banta laata demmana’ yaagis.
26.19: “Kawaw Agirpha, hessa gisho, taw salope bentida qoncethas kiitetanaysa ixabike.
26.20: Shin taani koyrottada Damasqon hessafe guye Yerusalaameninne Yihuda biitta ubban de7eysatinne Ayhude gidonnaysati banta nagaraape Xoossaako simmana melanne nagaraape simuwa bessiya ooso oothana mela qaala odas.
26.21: Hessa gisho, Ayhudeti tana xoossa keethan oykidi wodhanaw koydosona.
26.22: Hachi gakanaw Xoossaa maadey taape shaaketibeenna; yaaniya gisho, guuthaasinne gitaas markatashe haysan eqas. Nabetinne Musey hanana gidi odidaysafe haraa issibaaka taani odidabay baawa.
26.23: Hessika, ‘Kiristoosi waaye ekanaw bessees; qassi hayqope koyro dendidi Ayhudetasinne Ayhude gidonaysatas atotetha poo7o odanaw bessees’ gidaysa” yaagis.
26.24: Phawuloosi hessa yaagidi zaarishin, Fisxoosi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Phawuloosa, ne gooyadasa; ne daro timirtey nena gooshshatethas gathis” yaagis.
26.25: Shin Phawuloosi, “Boncho Fisxoosa, taani tumabaanne bessiyaba odaysipe attishin, gooyabike.
26.26: Taani qoncen odiya odaa Kawoy erees. Ha oday geeman oosetiboonna gisho issoyka iyape geemmonaysa taani geeshshada erayis.
26.27: “Kawaw Agirpha, neeni nabeta ammanaasa gidikii? Neeni ammaneysa taani erayis” yaagis.
26.28: Kawoy Agirphi, Phawuloosako, “Ha guutha saaten tana kiristaane oothanaw koyay?” yaagis.
26.29: Phawuloosi, “Daro wode gidin guutha wode ne xalaala gidonashin hachi tana si7iya ubbay ha qashuwape attishin, ta mela gidana mela Xoossaa woossayis” yaagis.
26.30: Hessafe guye, Kawoy Fisxoosi, Barniqeynne entara uttida ubbayka dendidosona.
26.31: Yaape keyidi bishe issoy issuwara, “Ha uray hayqos woyko qashos gathiyaba aykoka oothibeenna” yaagidi odetidosona.
26.32: Agirphi Fisxoosako, “Ha uray ‘Qeesarey tabaa pirdo’ goonnako biletanaw danda7ees shin” yaagis.

27.1: Nuuni markaben Xaale baanaw qachida wode Awugisxoosa wotaadareta geeteteysatape issi Yuuliyoosa geetetiya mato halaqaas Phawuloosanne hara guutha qasho asata aathidi iyaw immidosona.
27.2: Iise gaxan de7iya biittata biya Adramixiyoone markaben gelidi dendida. Maqedoone asi gidida Teselonqe Arsxirokoosi nuura de7ees.
27.3: Wontetha gallas nuuni Sidoona gakishin, Yuuliyoosi Phawuloosas keehidi ba laggetako bidi koshshiyaban maaddana mela entako iya yeddis.
27.4: Yaape dendidi sinthara nu bolla carkiya gisho haathan teqetida biitta, Qophiroosan zempidi aadhida.
27.5: Kilqiyanne Phinfile matan de7iya abba pinnidi Liiqen de7iya Mura gakida.
27.6: Yan mato halaqay Xaale biya Iskindire markabe demmidi, iyan nuna gelsis.
27.7: Nuuni daro gallas loddara bidi, daro meton Qandoosa katama mati gakida. Yaara baanaw nuna carkoy diggin Salmonara aadhidi haathan teqetida biitta, Qarxeesan zempidi aadhida.
27.8: Daro meton gaxa gaxa oykidi Laasa katamaa matan de7iya abba doonan “Markabey Wopu Gidi Shempiya bessi” geetetiya bessa gakida.
27.9: Nuuni yan daro wode gam7idaape guye xoomi biletida gisho hizape markaben buussi metiya gisho Phawuloosi enta zoris.
27.10: “Asaw, nu buussan gita boshinne daro qohoy de7eysi taw bentees; qohoy caana bollanne markabiya bolla xalaala gidonashin nu de7uwa bollaka gakana” yaagis.
27.11: Shin mato halaqay Phawuloosi gidaysafe aathidi markabiya laaggeysinne markabiya goday geysan ammanis.
27.12: He abba doonan de7iya katamay balgo ageena aathanaw entaw injetonna gisho, dariya asati bantaw danda7etiko Finqe katamaa gakidi balgo ageena yan aathanaw zoretidosona. Finqey pudeha-wulohapenne dugeha-wulohape giddon abba doonan de7iya katama. Abba Bolla Gotey Dendis
27.13: Kawusha dugeha carkoy loddara carkida wode banta qopidaysada hanidaba entaw daanin dendidi, markabey qaaxonna mela oykiya birata pude ekidi Qarxeesa matara aadhidosona.
27.14: Shin daro gam7onna “Awuraqis” geetetiya wolqaama gotey haathan teqetida biittafe duge enta bolla dendis.
27.15: He gotey markabiya sugidi efonna diggida gisho carkoy markabiya ba dosida soo efis.
27.16: Nuuni yuushoy abban teqetida biitta, Qeedan zempidi bishe daro metootetidi markabiya wogoluwa ashshanaw danda7ida.
27.17: Enti wogoluwa pude kessidaape guye wodoruwan markabiya bolla xaaxidi, minthi qachidosona. Surtisa geetetiya shafiyan bantana dom7ethana gidi hirgidi, markabiya sharaa wodhisidi markabiya coo yeddi aggidosona.
27.18: Gotey wolqaamishe bin wontetha gallas caanaape baggaa abban holo oykidosona.
27.19: Heedzantho gallas markabiya miishiya ekidi banta kushen holidosona.
27.20: Nuuni daro gallas awa ayfenne xoolinto be7onna gishonne wolqaama uushoy nu bolla uushida gisho sinthafe nuuni shempora attana gidi qopibooko.
27.21: He wode enti daro gallas kathi moonna gam7ida gisho Phawuloosi enta giddon dendi eqidi, “Asaw, hinte ta zoriya ekidi Qarxeesape dendonna aggidako ha metoynne qohoy nuna gakenna.
27.22: Shin taani hintena yayyofite gada zorayis; ayis giiko, ha markabey dhayanape attishin, hintefe issi asa shempoyka dhayenna.
27.23: Zine qamma ta iyabaa gididaysinne ta goyinniya Xoossay kiitida kiitanchoy ta matan eqidi,
27.24: ‘Phawuloosa, yayyofa; neeni Roome biitta Kawa Qeesare sinthan eqanaw bessees. Heko Xoossay ne gisho neera biya asa ubbaa shempuwa ashshis’ yaagis.
27.25: Hessa gisho, asaw, yayyofite. He kiitanchoy taw odidaysi hananaysa taani ammanayis.
27.26: Shin carkoy nuna efidi issi yuushoy abban teqetida biitta gaxan holana” yaagis. Markabey Meqis
27.27: Tammanne oyddantho qamman Adire Abban nuna carkoy gedenne haa sugishin, gidi bilahe gidiya wode markabiyan ootheysatas biittako matidaba daanis.
27.28: Enti ciimmotetha eranaw koyidi wodoro xeeran deexiyaba qachidi abban yeggin, abbay hospun tammu wadha gidis. Guuthi gam7idi, zaari yeggin usupun tammu wadha gidis.
27.29: Enti abba gaxan de7iya shuchan dom7etona mela yayyidi, markabey boonna mela oykiya oyddu biratata markabiyape guyera abban yeggidi, sa7i wontana mela Xoossaa woossosona.
27.30: Markabiyan ootheysati markabiyape baqatanaw koyidi, markabey boonna mela oykiya biratata markabiyape sintha baggara abban yeggiya daanin wogoluwa abban yeggidosona.
27.31: Phawuloosi mato halaqaakonne wotaadaretako, “Haysati markabiyan shempi uttonna ixiko hinte attanaw danda7eketa” yaagis.
27.32: Hessa gisho, wotaadareti wogoloy qashetida wodoruwa qanxidi yeddi aggidosona.
27.33: Sa7ay wontana hanishin ubbay kathi maana mela Phawuloosi asaako, “Hinte kathi moonna naagishe hachira tammanne oyddu gallas gam7ideta.
27.34: Hessa gisho, guutha kathi hinte maana mela taani hintena woossayis. Hinte gashtisana mela guutha kathi maanaw koshshees; hari attoshin hinte huuphe binaanape issoyka dhayenna” yaagis.
27.35: Phawuloosi hessa gidi uythi ekidi ubbaa sinthan Xoossaa galatis; uythaa menthidi muussu doomis.
27.36: Ubbay minetidi bantaw kathi ekidi midosona.
27.37: Nuuni markabiyan de7eysati nam7u xeetanne laapun tammanne usupuna.
27.38: Enti midi kallida wode caana gistiya abban yeggidi markabiya deexuwa kawushidosona.
27.39: Sa7ay wontida wode markabiya oosanchoti aw biitta gakidaako eronnashin, abba gaxan de7iya shafenne silimo be7idosona. Bantaw danda7etiko markabiya he shafiyako shiishanaw qopidosona.
27.40: Yaatidi, markabey boonna mela oykiya biratata birshidi abban yeggidosona. He wode laagiya mithaa qachiya wodoruwa birshidosona. Hessafe guye, carkoy markabiya sinthe sugana mela markabiya efiya sharaa sintha baggara dhoqu oothidi buussu doomidosona.
27.41: Shin markabey shafe dooren dom7etidi mitetis. Markabiyas sintha baggay xuggunidi shafiya caddi oykidi qaaxonna ixin, guye baggay zuliya sugethan meqeretethi oykis.
27.42: Wotaaddareti qasho asaape issoyka haatha wadhidi kessi ekonna mela enta wodhanaw zoretidosona.
27.43: Shin mato halaqay Phawuloosa ashshanaw koyidi wotaadareta zoreta ixis. Haathe wadho eriya ubbay markabiyape haathan gupi gupi wodhidi kasetidi gaxa keyana mela kiittis.
27.44: Attidaysati sanqa bollanne, markabiya me7uwa bolla keyana mela kiittis. Hessada hanidi ubbay gaxa sarora keyidosona.

28.1: Nuuni gaxa saro keyida wode gakida bessay yuushoy abban teqetida biitta, Malta gideysa erida.
28.2: Malta asay nuus daro keeha keehidosona. Iri bukiya gishonne meegiya gisho tama eethidi nuna ubbaa mokidosona.
28.3: Phawuloosi daro afira shiishidi taman wothishin, shooshi seela gisho keyidi iya kushiya bolla xaaxetidi iya dukis.
28.4: Malta asay shooshi Phawuloosa kushen xaaxetidaysa be7ida wode issoy issuwako, “Tuma ha uray shempo wodhida asi; hari attoshin abbaafe I attinka xoossa pirdafe attidi paxa daanaw danda7ibeenna” yaagidosona.
28.5: Shin Phawuloosi ba kushiyape shooshaa wuxarkidi, taman yeggis; iya aykoka qohibeenna.
28.6: Enti, “Iya asatethay kixees, woyko akeekona kundidi hayqees” gidi iya naagoosona. Shin daro wode naagidi iya asatethan aybika dummatidabay dhayin, “Hessi xoosse” yaagidi banta qofaa laammidosona.
28.7: He heeran yuushoy abban teqetida biitta halaqaa, Pupliyoosa geeteteysas gadey de7ees; heedzu gallas gakanaw I nuna siiqon mokis.
28.8: Pupliyoosa aaway qoxo, mishanne ulo uttison hargetidi zin7idi de7ees. Phawuloosi iya soo gelidi iyaw Xoossaa woossis; ba kushiya iya bolla wothidi pathis.
28.9: Hessafe guye, yuushoy abban teqetida biitta, Maltan de7iya hargiya hara asatika yidi paxidosona.
28.10: Enti nuna daro boncho bonchidosona; nuuni markaben baanaw dendida wode oges koshshiyaba nuus immidosona. Phawuloosi Roome Gakis
28.11: Heedzu ageenape guye, Maltan balgo aathidi Markaben gelidi Iskindire baanaw dendida. He markabiya bolla Diyosqoroosa geetetiya mente eeqata misiley de7ees.
28.12: Sirakuuse katamaa gelidi yan heedzu gallas uttida.
28.13: Yaape dendidi Regiyume katamaa gakida. Issi gallasape guye, dugeha bagga carkoy carkin, wontetha gallas Putiyoola katamaa gakida.
28.14: Yan nuuni issi issi ammaniya asata demmin, bantara saaminta gam7ana mela nuna woossidosona. Hessafe guye, Roome bida.
28.15: Roomen de7iya ammaniya asati nubaa si7idi, Afiyoosa Giyan, Heedzu Imatha Keethi gakanaw nuna mokanaw yidosona. Phawuloosi enta be7ida wode Xoossaa galatidi minetis.
28.16: Nuuni Roome gelida wode Phawuloosi bana naagiya wotaadariyara barka de7o geetetis.
28.17: Heedzu gallasape guye, Phawuloosi Ayhudeta halaqata baako xeegisis. Enti shiiqida wode entako, “Ta ishato, taani nu asaa woyko nu aawata wogaa bolla aybi qohoka oothabike, shin tana Yerusalaamen qachidi Roome asaas aathidi immidosona.
28.18: Enti ta mootuwa be7idi hayqos gathiyaba ta bolla aybibaaka demmiboonna gisho tana billanaw qopidosona.
28.19: Shin Ayhudeti hessa ixida wode, ‘Tabaa Qeesarey pirdo’ yaagasipe attishin, taani ta deriya mootiyabay de7in gidenna.
28.20: Taani hintena xeegisiday hintena be7anawunne hintew haysa odanaasa. Taani ha santhalaatan qashetiday Isra7eele asay naagiya ufaysaa gishosa” yaagis.
28.21: Ayhude halaqati Phawuloosako, “Nuus Yihudape nebaa xaafetida dabdaabey gakibeenna. Yaape yida asatape issoyka nebaa iita odiday baawa.
28.22: Shin ha ne kaalliya ammanuwa dumma dumma bessan asay ixeysa nuuni eriya gisho ne qofaa si7anaw koyoos” yaagidosona.
28.23: Enti banta yaana gallas Phawuloosas qaxaridi, he gallas daridi I de7iyasuwa yidosona. I wontafe omarsi gakanaw Xoossaa kawotethaaba entaw markatis. Qassi enti Yesuusaba ammanana mela Muse higgiyafenne nabeta maxaafape qoncisidi enta tamaarsis.
28.24: Issoti issoti Phawuloosi gidaysa ammanidosona, shin harati ammanibookona.
28.25: Enti banta giddon oda ma7onna ixida wode Phawuloosi issiba gidaape guye bidosona. I haysada yaagis: “Geeshsha Ayyaanay nu aawatas nabiya Isayaasa doonan odidaysi tuma.
28.26: “ ‘Neeni he asaako bada, hinte sissi si7eeta, shin hintew gelenna; hinte be7o be7eeta, shin demmeketa.
28.27: Ayis giiko, ha deriya wozanay muumis; enta haythay tullis; enta ayfeyka goozetis. Hessi bayneko, enti banta ayfiyan be7idi, banta haythan si7idi, banta wozanan akeekidi, taako simmanashin; taka enta pathanashin’ yaaga” yaagis.
28.28: “Hiza, haysi Xoossaa atotetha kiitay Ayhude gidonaysatas gideysa ereeta. Entika si7ana” yaagis.
28.29: Phawuloosi hessa gidaape guye, Ayhudeti banta giddon daro palamishe keyidi bidosona.
28.30: Phawuloosi kera keethan nam7u laythi kumethi de7is; yan de7ishe baako yaa ubbaa mokees.
28.31: Yashshi baynanne oonika diggonashin Xoossa kawotethaaba sabbakis; Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosaba qoncisidi tamaarsees.

1.1: Yesuus Kiristoosa aylle gidida, hawaare gidana mela xeegetidaysafenne Xoossaa Wongela sabbakana mela dooretida Phawuloosi kiitida kiitaa.
1.2: Xoossay daro wodepe sinthe ba nabeta baggara immana yaagida Xoossaa Wongelay Geeshsha Maxaafatan xaafetis.
1.3: He Wongelay ashon Dawita sheeshape yeletida, Xoossaa Na7aa, nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosaba.
1.4: Qassi I ba geeshsha Ayyaanan hayqope dendidi, Xoossaa Na7aa gideysa gita wolqan bessis.
1.5: Iya baggara Ayhude gidonna asa ubbay, ammanidi kiitetana mela Kiristoosa sunthaa gisho, Xoossay aadho keehatethinne hawaaretetha maata nuus immis.
1.6: Yesuus Kiristoosas gidana mela xeegetida asatape baggati hintena.
1.7: Roomen de7iya, Xoossay siiqeysatasinne iya geeshsha dere gidana mela dooridaysatas. Xoossaa nu Aawapenne Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosape aadho keehatethaynne sarotethay hintew gido. Galata Woosa
1.8: Ubbaafe koyrottada, hinte ammanoy biitta ubban si7etida gisho, Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara hinte gisho ta Xoossaa galatayis.
1.9: Taani iya Na7aa wongelaba kumetha wozanan odiya Xoossay, taani ta woosan ubba wode hintena qopeysas I marka.
1.10: Wursethan, Xoossaa shene gidiko, taani hinteko baanaw ogey taw injetana mela ubba wode woossayis.
1.11: Taani hintew Ayyaana imuwa shaakanawunne hintena be7anaw laamotayis.
1.12: Hessika, taani hinte ammanuwan, qassi hinte ta ammanuwan minettana melasa.
1.13: Ta ishato, taani Ayhude gidonna asaape ayfe demmidaysada, hintefeka ayfe demmanaw hinteko baanaw qopas, shin digetas.
1.14: Tamaarida asaasinne tamaariboonna asaas qassi cincatasinne eeyatas taw acoy de7ees.
1.15: Hessa gisho, Roomen de7iya hintewuka wongela odanaw amottayis. Wongeli Xoossa Wolqa
1.16: Iya ammaniya ubbaa, koyrottidi Ayhudeta, kaallidi Ayhude gidonnayisata ashshanaw Wongelay Xoossaa wolqaa gidiya gisho, ta Wongelan yeellatike.
1.17: Xilloy ammanon de7on daana geetetidi Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafetis. Wongelan Xoossaa xillotethay qoncis; koyrope wursethi gakanaw, asay xilley ammanonna. Asa Iitatethi
1.18: Tumay eretonna mela banta iita ooson kammiya asaa bollanne nagara ubbaa bolla, Xoossaa hanqoy salope wodhees.
1.19: Xoossay entaw qoncanaw bessiyaba qoncisida gisho, enti Xoossaba eroosona.
1.20: Alamey medhetoosape doomidi, asaas bentonna Xoossaa kandoy, hessika iya merinaa wolqaynne Xoossatethay iya medhetethan qoncidi de7iya gisho, asay banta iitatethaas gaasoyabay baawa.
1.21: Enti Xoossaa erishe, iya bonchibookonanne galatibookona. Enta qofay maaddonnaba gidis; enta akeekona wozanay dhumis.
1.22: Enti bantana cincata goosona, shin eeyata.
1.23: Enti hayqonna Xoossaa goyinnanaysa aggidi, hayqiya asa medhon, kafota medhon, do7ata medhoninne ulora gooshetiyabata daanisidi oothida misileta goyinnidosona.
1.24: Hessa gisho, enti issoy issuwara borsoba oothidi, banta asatethaa kawushana mela Xoossay enta wozanay amotiya tuna oosos enta yeggi aggis.
1.25: Hessi haniday enti Xoossaa tumaa wordon laammida gishonne medhida Xoossaa aggidi, medhetethi goyinnida gishosa. Xoossay merinaw galatetidaysa. Amin7i.
1.26: Hessa gisho, Xoossay entana enta borso amuwas yeggi aggis. Enta maccasay bantaw bessiya addera gahetethi aggidi, bessonnaba hanidi maccasi maccasara gahetidosona.
1.27: Hessadaka, addeti bantaw bessiya maccasara gahetethi aggidi, addey addera gahetidosona. Addeti issoy issuwara amon xuugetidi, borsoba oothidosona. Banta oothida nagaraas bessiya pirdaa ekidosona.
1.28: Enti Xoossaa erishe, hari attoshin iyabaa qopanaw koyonna ixida gisho, bessonnaba oothana mela Xoossay entana pathonna qofas aathidi immis.
1.29: Entan geellatethi, iitatethi, yiiqey, geney, qanaatey, shempo wodhoy, palami, cimoynne iita amoy kumis. Enti zigireyisata,
1.30: asa sunthi iisseyisata, Xoossaa ixeyisata, cayeyisata, otoreyisata, ceeqeteyisata, iitabaa oothanaw koyeysatanne banta aayesinne aawas kiitetonayisata,
1.31: akeekonayisata, caaqo mentheyisata, siiqoy baynayisata, qadhey baynayisata.
1.32: Hayisata mela ootheysatas hayqoy bessees giya Xoossaa higgiya erishe, haysata oothosona. Enti bantaw ooso xalaala gidonashin, oothiya harataka nashshoosona.

2.1: Hessa gisho, neno harata bolla pirdeyso, neeni gaasoyabay baawa. Neeni harata bolla pirdashe, he neeni pirdiya uraa mela oothiko, neeni, ne bolla pirdaasa.
2.2: Hessa mela ooso ootheyisata bolla Xoossay xillo pirdaa pirdeysa nu eroos.
2.3: Neno, hessa mela ooso ootheyisata bolla pirdeyso, enti ootheysa mela ootheyso, neeni Xoossaa pirdaafe attanaba daanii?
2.4: Woyko Xoossaa keehatetha, gencanne danda7a darotethaa kadhayee? Xoossay new keehiday nena nagaraape zaaranaw gideysa erikiyee?
2.5: Shin hintew shucha wozaninne si7onna haythi de7ees. Hessa gisho, Xoossaa hanqoynne xillo pirday qonciya gallas, ne bolla pirday darana mela oothaasa.
2.6: Xoossay issuwas issuwas iya oosuwa mela immana.
2.7: Lo77o ooson minnidi, galataa, bonchonne dhayonna de7uwa koyeysatas Xoossay merinaa de7uwa immana.
2.8: Shin bantana siiqeyisata, tumaa ixeysatanne iitabaa oothanaw koyeyisata bolla Xoossaa hanqoynne pirday yaana.
2.9: Iitabaa oothiya asa ubbaa, koyrottidi Ayhudeta, kaallidi Ayhude gidonna asaa metoynne waayey gakana.
2.10: Shin Xoossay lo77o ooso oothiya ubbaas, koyrottidi Ayhudetas, kaallidi Ayhude gidonaysatas galataa, bonchonne sarotethaa immana.
2.11: Xoossay som7o be7idi ase shaakenna.
2.12: Higgey bayna nagara oothida ubbay higgey bayna dhayana. Higgey de7ishin, nagara oothida ubbay higgen pirdetana.
2.13: Xoossaa sinthan xilleysati higge naageysatape attishin, higge sissa xalaala si7eyisata gidokona.
2.14: Higgey bayna Ayhude gidonna asay medhon higgey kiitteysa oothosona. Entaw xaafetida higgey bayna ixikoka enti banta wozanan higgiya eroosona.
2.15: Enta hanotay, higge kiitay enta wozanan xaafetidaysa bessees. Qassi enta kahay enta bolla markatees. Enta qofay issi issi toho entana bala gees; issi issi toho entana like gees.
2.16: Ta tamaarsida Wongela mela Xoossay Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara asa wozanan geemmida qofaa pirdiya wode hessi eretana. Ayhudetanne Enta Higgiya
2.17: Shin ne nena Ayhude gaasa; higgen zempaasa; Xoossan ceeqasa.
2.18: Ne oothana mela Xoossay koyiyabay aybeko eraasa. Higgiya tamaarida gisho, tuma gidiyaba dooranaw eraasa.
2.19: Neeni qooqeta kaaletheysa, qassi dhuman de7eysatas poo7o gideysa shaaka eraasa.
2.20: Neeni higgiyafe demmida eratethaninne tumatethan eeyata eriseysanne yoogata tamaarseysa gideysa eraasa.
2.21: Yaatin, ne harata tamaarseysi ne nena ayis tamaarsikii? Neeni, “Kaysotopa” gashe, neeni ne huuphen kaysotayee?
2.22: Neeni, “Laammofa” gashe, neeni ne huuphen laammayee? Neeni eeqa ixashe, eeqay de7iya keethaa bonqayee?
2.23: Neeni Xoossaa higgiyan ceeqetasa, shin higgiyas kiitetonna ixada Xoossaa yeellayay?
2.24: Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Hinte gaason Xoossaa sunthay Ayhude gidonna asatan cayetees” geetetidi xaafetis.
2.25: Ne higges kiitetiko, ne qaxaretethaas maadey de7ees, shin neeni higgiyas kiitetonna ixiko ne qaxaretethay qaxaretiboona mela gidees.
2.26: Ayhude gidonna asi qaxaretonna de7ishe, higgiyas kiitetiko, Xoossay iya qaxaretida mela taybennee?
2.27: Hinte, Ayhude asati, hintew xaafetida higgeynne qaxaroy de7ishin, hinte higges kiitetonna ixiko, Ayhude gidonna asay qaxaretonna ixikoka higges kiitetidi, hinte bolla pirdana.
2.28: Hiza, sunthan Ayhude gidida ubbay tuma Ayhude gidenna. Qassi kare asatethaa qaxaroy tuma qaxaro gidenna.
2.29: Shin tuma Ayhudetethi gaatha baggan Ayhude gideysa. Tuma qaxaretethi Xoossaa Ayyaanan oosetiya wozana qaxaretethafe attishin, xaafetida higgiyan oosetiya asatethaa qaxaro gidenna. He uray galataa Xoossafe ekeesipe attishin, asape gidenna.

3.1: Yaatin, Ayhude giddon ay dummatethi de7ii? Woyko qaxaretethan ay maadey de7ii?
3.2: Tumaka Ayhude gidoy daro ogera maaddees. Ubbaafe sinthe Xoossay ba qaala hadara Ayhudetas immis.
3.3: Yaatin, entafe issoti issoti qaala ammanonna ixiko, enta ixoy Xoossaa ammanetetha diggiyee?
3.4: Diggenna! Asa ubbay wordancho gidikoka Xoossay tuma gido. Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Ne qaalan ne xillaasa; nena mooteysa pirdan lathaasa” geetetidi xaafetis.
3.5: Yaatin, nu nagaray Xoossay xillo gideysa bessiyaba gidiko, nu woyganee? Xoossay nu nagaraa gisho, nu bolla pirdiko, like gidenneyee? Haysa taani asa qofatho gayis.
3.6: Hessi ubbaraka hanenna. Hessada haniko, Xoossay ha alamiya bolla waati pirdanee?
3.7: Shin ta wordotethay Xoossa tumaa qoncisidi, iya bonchuwa darsi bessiyaba gidiko, yaatin, ayis ta bolla nagaranchoda pirdeetii?
3.8: Issi issi asay, “Lo77oy yaana mela iita oothoos” yaagidi tamaarsiyada oothidi tana mootosona. Hessa mela asaa bolla yaa Xoossaa pirday like. Asi Ubbay Nagarancho
3.9: Yaatin, nuuni woyganee? Nu Ayhudeti, Ayhude gidonaysatape aadhonayee? Gidenna! Ayhude gidin, Ayhude gidonna ixin ubbay nagarancho gideysa taani kasetada hintew odas.
3.10: Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Xillo asi issoyka baawa.
3.11: Akeekiya asi baawa, Xoossaa koyiya oonika baawa.
3.12: Asa ubbay Xoossaas zoko zaaridosona; ubbay issife pathonnaba gididosona. Lo77o oothiya oonika baawa; issi asika baawa.
3.13: Enta doonape keyiya qaalay, dooyetida duufope keyiya xinqo mela; banta inxarsan cimmoosona. Enta doonape ase wodhiya, shoosha marzey keyees.
3.14: Enta doonan camo odaynne baadethi kumis.
3.15: Enti suuthi gussanaw ellesoosona.
3.16: Enta ogiyan dhayoynne qohoy de7ees.
3.17: Enti sarotetha ogiya erokona.
3.18: Banta de7uwan Xoossaas yayyokonna” geetetidi xaafetis.
3.19: Ase ubbaa doona oythanawunne kumetha alamiya Xoossaa pirdaafe garsan shiishanaw, higgey imetiday higgefe garsan aqeysatas gideysa nu eroos.
3.20: Hessa gisho, oonika higges kiitetidi Xoossaa sinthan xillanaw danda7enna. Higgey asi ubbay nagarancho gideysa bessees. Xillotethi Ammanona
3.21: Shin ha77i Xoossay asi higgey baynashin xilliya oge qoncisis. He ogiya Muse higgeynne nabeti markatidosona.
3.22: Ha xillotethaa, Xoossay Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara asa ubbaas shaakoy bayna immees.
3.23: Asa ubbay nagara oothidosona; Xoossay entaw immida bonchuwafe haakidi attidosona.
3.24: Shin enti Xoossaa aadho keehatethan, woziya Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara coo xillidosona.
3.25: Xoossay Yesuus Kiristoosa yarsho oothidi immiday, iya ammaniya ubbay iya suuthan nagara atotethi demmana melasa. Xoossay hessa oothiday ba danda7an kase nagaraa taybonna aggidi, ba xillotethaa bessanaasa.
3.26: Ha77i wodiyan Yesuusa ammaniya ubbaa xillisidi, Xoossay ba huuphen xillo gideysa bessees.
3.27: Yaatin, nu ceeqetiyabay aybi de7ii? Aybika baawa. Nuuni ceeqetey higges kiitetiya gishoyee? Akay! Ammano gishosa.
3.28: Xoossay ase xillisey ammanonape attishin, higges kiitetethan gidonnaysa nu akeekos.
3.29: Woyko Xoossay Ayhudeta xalaala Xoosseyee? Ayhude gidonaysatas Xoosse gidenneyee? Tuma, Ayhude gidonaysataska I Xoosse.
3.30: Xoossay isso; Ayhudetanne Ayhude gidonnayisata ammanon xillisey iya.
3.31: Yaatin, nuuni higgiya ammano gisho shaaros guusseyee? Gidenna! Higgiya minthosipe attishin.

4.1: Yaatin, nu mayzay Abrahaamey ay demmidee?
4.2: Abrahaamey ooson xillidaba gidiyako, I ceeqetiyabay de7ees, gidoshin, Xoossaa sinthan ceeqetanaw danda7enna.
4.3: Geeshsha Maxaafay, “Abrahaamey Xoossaa ammanis; Xoossay hessa iyaw xillotethi oothidi ekis” yaagees.
4.4: Oothiya uray ekiya damoozey, iya ooso wolqaas cigetiya gatepe attishin, iyaw imota gidenna.
4.5: Shin ooso oothonna oonika nagaranchuwa xillisiya Xoossaa ammaniko, iya ammanoy iyaw xillotethi gididi taybetees.
4.6: Geeshsha Maxaafan Dawiti, oosoy bayna Xoossay xillisiya asati ay mela anjetidako haysada yaagidi qoncisees:
4.7: “Enta balay atto geetetidaysatinne enta nagaray kametidaysati anjetidaysata.
4.8: Goday iya nagaraa taybonna asi anjetidaysa” yaagees.
4.9: Yaatin, Dawiti odida anjoy qaxaretida asaa xalaalaseyee? Woyko qaxaretiboona asaasee? Nuuni, “Geeshsha Maxaafay, ‘Abrahaamey Xoossaa ammanis; Xoossay hessa iyaw xillotethi oothidi ekis’ yaagees” gida.
4.10: Yaatin, hessi awude hanidee? Abrahaamey qaxaretineyee? Woyko qaxaretona de7ishinee? Qaxaretanaape sinthe hanisipe attishin, guye gidenna.
4.11: Abrahaamey qaxaretanaape sinthe iya ammanoy iyaw xillotethi gididi taybetidaysa erisanaw, iya qaxaroy malaata gidis. Hessa gisho, Abrahaamey qaxaretonna ammaneysatasinne ammanon xilleyisata ubbaas aawa gidis.
4.12: I qaxaretidaysataska aawa. Abrahaamey entaw aawa gididay enti qaxaretida gisho, xalaalas gidonashin, I qaxaretanaape sinthe ammanida ammanuwa enti kaallida gishosa.
4.13: Abrahaamesinne iya sheeshas, “Alamiya ta hintew immana” yaagida ufaysay, Abrahaamey ammanon xillida gishosafe attishin, higge naagidi polida gisho gidenna.
4.14: Higges kiitetidaysati Xoossay immana gida ufaysa laateyisata gidiko, asaa ammanoy maaddenna; Xoossaa ufaysay hada gidis.
4.15: Higge menthoy Xoossaa hanqo ehees, shin higgey baynason higge menthoy baawa.
4.16: Hessa gisho, Xoossay immida ufaysay ammanon eketees. Ha ufaysay Abrahaame sheesha ubbaas Xoossaa aadho keehatetha baggara imetidaysa qoncisees. Hessika higge naageysata xalaalas gidonashin, Abrahaameda ammanida ubbaasa. Abrahaamey nu ubbaas aawa.
4.17: Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Ta nena daro kawotethatas aawa oothas” geetetidi Abrahaame gisho, xaafetis. Ha ufaysay Abrahaames imetiday hayqidaysatas de7o immeysinne oorathaba oothiya Xoossay iya gideysa I ammanida gishosa.
4.18: Xoossay Abrahaames daro koche immanaysa caaqis. Ufaysi oothanaw aykoka danda7etonna wode Abrahaamey Xoossan ammanida gishonne ufaysi oothida gisho, daro kawotethatas aawa gidis.
4.19: Abrahaames xeetu laythi kumana hanikoka, ba daaburida asatethanne Saara na7a yelanaw danda7onnaysa erishe ba ammanuwan daaburibeenna.
4.20: Gidoshin, I ba ammanuwan minnidi Xoossaas boncho immispe attishin, Xoossay immida ufaysaa ammanonna ixidi, sidhibeenna.
4.21: Abrahaamey, Xoossay caaqida caaquwa polanaysa ba kumetha wozanan ammanis.
4.22: Hessa gisho, Xoossay iya ammanuwa xillotethan taybis.
4.23: Shin, “Iyaw xillotethan taybis” giya qaalay Abrahaame xalaalas xaafetibeenna.
4.24: He qaalay nu Godaa Yesuusa hayqope denthida Xoossaa ammaniya nuuska nu ammanoy xillotethan taybetana mela xaafetis.
4.25: Xoossay iya nu nagara gisho, hayqos aathidi immis; I nuna xillisanaw hayqope dendis.

5.1: Hiza, nu ammanon xillida gisho, nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara Xoossara nuus sarotethi de7ees.
5.2: Nuuni iya baggara ha77i nu eqida aadho keehatetha giddo ammanon gelida. Hessa gisho, nu Xoossaa bonchuwa shaaketanaw de7iya ufaysan ceeqetoos.
5.3: Hessa xalaala gidonashin, metoy danda7a eheysa nu eriya gisho, nu metuwanka ceeqetoos.
5.4: Qassi danda7ay genca, gencay ufaysi immeysa nu eroos.
5.5: Nuus immida Geeshsha Ayyaana baggara Xoossay ba siiquwa nu wozanan gussida gisho he ufaysay nuna yeellayenna.
5.6: Nuuni buroo daaburanchota gididi de7ishin, Xoossaa wodey gakin, Kiristoosi nagaranchota gisho hayqis.
5.7: Xillo asa gisho hayqana asi demmanaysi daro meto, shin keeha asa gisho hayqana asi ooni eri bentonna aggenna.
5.8: Shin nuuni buroo nagarancho gididi de7ishin, Kiristoosi nu gisho hayqis. Hessi Xoossay nuna ay mela siiqiyako iya siiquwa bessees.
5.9: Hiza, nuuni Kiristoosa suuthan xillidaba gidiko, ubbaafe aathidi iya baggara Xoossaa hanquwafe attana.
5.10: Nuuni Xoossara kase morke, shin iya Na7aa hayquwan iyara sigetida. Hessafe aathidi, ha77i nuuni Xoossara sigetidaape guye, iya na7aa de7uwa gaason nuuni attana.
5.11: Hessa xalaala gidonashin, ha77i nuna Xoossara sigethida nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara nu Xoossan ceeqetoos. Addaamenne Kiristoosa
5.12: Addaame baggara nagari ha alamiya gelis. He nagaraa baggara hayqoy yis. Asi ubbay nagara oothida gisho hayqoy asa zare ubbaa gakis.
5.13: Higgey imetanaape sinthe alamen nagari de7ees, shin higgey bayna wode nagari nagara gididi taybetenna.
5.14: Shin Addaamepe Muse gakanaw hayqoy asa ubbaa haaris. Hari attoshin, Addaameda higges kiitetonna ixidi, nagara oothiboonayisata bollaka hayqoy kawotis. Addaamey yaana Yesuusas leemiso.
5.15: Shin Xoossaa aadho keehatethay Addaame nagaraa mela gidenna. Issi asa nagara baggara daro asay hayqis. Shin Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara Xoossaa aadho keehatethay asa ubbaas daridi imetis.
5.16: Addaame nagaraa giddoninne Xoossaa imota giddon daro dummatethi de7ees. Issi asa nagara gaason Xoossay iya bolla pirdis. Shin asay daro nagara oothinka Xoossaa aadho keehatethay xillotethaa ehis.
5.17: Issi asa nagara gaason hayqoy asa ubbaa bolla kawotis. Shin Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara Xoossaa aadho keehatethaanne xillotetha imota ekiya ubbay, xoono de7on de7oosona.
5.18: Hiza, issi asi nagara oothida gaason asa ubbaa bolla pirdi yidaysada issi asi xillo oothida gaason, Xoossay ase ubbaa xillisidi entaw de7o immees.
5.19: Issi asi kiitetonna ixida gaason, daro asay nagarancho gididaysada issi asa kiitetethan daro asay xillana.
5.20: Asay nagara wolqaa erana mela higgey yis, shin nagara wolqay darida wode Xoossaa aadho keehatethay aadhidi daris.
5.21: Nagari hayqo wolqan kawotidaysa mela Xoossa aadho keehatethay xillotethaa wolqan kawotidi, nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara nuna merinaa de7uwako kaalethees.

6.1: Yaatin, nuuni woyganee? Xoossaa aadho keehatethay darana mela nagaran minnidi de7ino?
6.2: Akay, nuuni nagaras hayqidaba gidiko, yaatin, nuuni hizape waanidi nagaran daanee?
6.3: Nu ubbay Kiristoos Yesuusara issifanaw xammaqetida wode iya hayquwan iyara issifanaw xammaqetidaysa ereketiyee?
6.4: Nu xammaqetida wode Kiristoosara hayqidanne moogetida. Kiristoosi Xoossaa Aawa boncho wolqan hayqope dendidaysa mela nuka ooratha de7on daana.
6.5: Nu iya hayquwan iyara issino gidiko, hessadaka, iya denduwan iyara issino gidana.
6.6: Nu hizape nagaras aylle gidonna melanne nu nagarancho asatethaa wolqay dhayana mela nu cima asatethay Kiristoosara kaqetidaysa eroos.
6.7: Issi asi Kiristoosan hayqidaba gidiko, I nagara wolqafe la77a keyis.
6.8: Nuuni Kiristoosara hayqiko, iyara de7on daanaysa ammanoos.
6.9: Kiristoosi hayqope dendida gisho, zaari I hayqonaysanne hayqoy sinthafe iya haaronnaysa nu eroos.
6.10: I hayqida wode nagaras issitoho wursethi gakanaw hayqis, shin ha77i de7on Xoossaas de7ees.
6.11: Hessadaka, hinte nagaras hayqidi, Godaa Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara Xoossas de7on de7eysa qopite.
6.12: Hessa gisho, hinte, hinte asatethaa amuwas kiitetonna mela hayqiya hinte asatethaa nagari haaropo.
6.13: Qassi hinte asatethaa nagara oothanaw geellatetha miishe oothidi immofite. Shin hinte hayqope dendidi, de7on de7iya asada hinte asatethaa Xoossaas immite. Qassi hinte kumetha asatethaa xillo ooso oothanaw Xoossaas aathidi immite.
6.14: Hinte Xoossaa aadho keehatetha garsan de7eetape attishin, higgefe garsan de7onna gisho nagari hintena haaranaw bessenna. Xillotetha Aylle
6.15: Yaatin, nu woyganee? Higgefe garsan gidonashin, Xoossaa aadho keehatetha garsan de7iya gisho nagara oothaneyee? Akay!
6.16: Hinte issi asas kiitetanaw hintena aylle oothidi immiya wode he hinte kiiteteysas aylle gideysa ereeta. Hessadaka, hinte nagaras kiitetiko, hintew hayqo ehiya nagaraas aylle gideeta. Woyko hinte Xoossas kiitetiko xillotethi ehiya Xoossaas aylle gideeta.
6.17: Kase hinte nagaras aylle, shin ha77i hinte ekida tuma timirtiyas kumetha wozanape kiitetida gisho Xoossaas galati gido.
6.18: Hinte nagara aylletetha qashope biletidi xillotetha aylle gidideta.
6.19: Hinte hinte qofan daaburancho gidiya gisho, taani oodeska geliya ogen odayis. Kase hinte, hinte asatethaa tunanne iitabaa oothanaw aylle oothidi immidaysa mela ha77i hinte asatethaa geeshshi gidana mela xillotetha aylle oothidi immite.
6.20: Hinte nagaras aylletidi de7iya wode xillotethas haareteketa.
6.21: Hintena ha77i yeellayiya beni hinte iita oosuwape ay maade demmidetii? He oosota wursethay hayqo.
6.22: Shin hinte nagara aylletetha qashope biletidi, Xoossaas aylle gidideta. Hessi hintena geeshshi oothidi merinaa de7uwako kaalethees.
6.23: Nagara gatey hayqo. Shin Xoossay, nu Godaa Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara immiya imotay merinaa de7o.

7.1: Ta ishato, taani odey higge eriya asatasa. Higgey issi asi paxa de7iya wode ubban iya haarees.
7.2: Leemisos, azina gelida maccasiya I azinay paxa de7iya wode higgen iyara qashetasu. Shin I azinay hayqiko iyara iya caaqida caaqoy iyo haarenna.
7.3: Hessa gisho, iya ba azinay paxa de7ishin, hara adde geliko, iya laammidaaro geetetawusu. Shin I azinay hayqiko, caaqoy iyo haaronna gisho iya hara azina geliko, iya laammidaaro geetetuku.
7.4: Hessa gisho, ta ishato, hinte Kiristoosa asatethaa baggara higge wolqaas hayqidi, Xoossaas ayfe ayfanaw hayqope dendida Kiristoosas gidideta.
7.5: Nu asho amoy nuna haarin, nu de7iya wode higgey guji nagara oothana mela nuna denthethees. Nu asatethaa giddon iita amotethi de7iya gisho nuuni hayqo ayfe ayfana mela oothis.
7.6: Shin ha77i nuuni nuna qachida higgiyas hayqida gisho nuuni higge qashope biletida. Hessa gisho, Geeshsha Ayyaana ogen Xoossaas kiitetosipe attishin, xaafetida cima higgiyas kiitetoko. Higgenne Nagara
7.7: Yaatin, nuuni woyganee? Higgey ba huuphen nagaree? Gidenna! Shin higgey nagari aybeko tana erisis. Higgey, “Amotofa” goonnako, amotethi aybeko taani erike.
7.8: Shin ta ubbaba amottana mela nagari higge baggara tanan oge demmis. Higgey bayneko nagari hayqidaysa.
7.9: Kase higgey bayna wode ta paxa, shin higgey imetida wode nagari paxin ta qassi hayqas.
7.10: Taani de7on daana mela Xoossay immida higgey taw hayqo ehis.
7.11: Nagari higge baggara tana cimmiya ogiya demmidi, wodhis.
7.12: Hessa gisho, higgey geeshshi; iyan xaafetida kiitayka geeshshi, xillonne lo77o.
7.13: Yaatin, lo77o gididabay ta bolla hayqo ehideyee? Gidenna! Shin nagari nagara gideysi qoncana mela lo77oban maaddetidi taw hayqo ehis. Hessa gisho, nagara nagaratethay higge baggara aadhidi eretis.
7.14: Nuuni higgey ayyaanaba gideysa eroos. Shin taani nagaras bayzetida asho asi.
7.15: Taani oothiyaba akeekike; taani dosiyaba oothanaysa aggada ta ixiyaba oothayis.
7.16: Taani ixiyaba oothiya gidiko, higgey lo77o gideysa ta ma7ayis.
7.17: Hessa gidiko, he oosuwa tanan de7iya nagaray oothaysipe attishin, ta oothike.
7.18: Tanan, hessika ta ashuwan lo77obay baynaysa erayis. Lo77oba oothiya amotethi tanan de7ees, shin lo77oba oothanaw danda7ike.
7.19: Taani ixiya iitabaa oothaysipe attishin, ta dosiya lo77oba oothike.
7.20: Taani ixiyaba oothiya gidiko, hessa tanan de7iya nagaray ootheesipe attishin, oothey tana gidike.
7.21: Hiza, ta lo77oba oothanaw dosishin, iitabaa oosoy woga gideysa demmas.
7.22: Taani ta wozanan Xoossaa higgiyan ufaytayis.
7.23: Shin ta asatethaa giddon de7iya ta qofaa higgiyara oletiya dumma higge be7ayis. He higgey ta asatethaa giddon oothiya nagara higgiyas tana aylle oothidi immis.
7.24: Taani waanida yibbata asee? Hayqos efiya ha asatethafe tana ashshanay oonee?
7.25: Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara tana ashshiya Xoossaas galatay gido. Hiza, taani ta qofan Xoossaa higgiyas haaretayis; shin ta asatethan tana nagara oosisiya higgiyas haaretayis.

8.1: Hessa gisho, Kiristoos Yesuusan de7eysati ha77i pirdetokona.
8.2: Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara nuus de7o immiya Geeshsha Ayyaana higgey, tana nagaranne hayqo higge aylletethaafe kessis.
8.3: Nu nagara asatethaa gaason, higgey daaburancho gidiya gisho nuna ashshanaw danda7ibeenna. Xoossay ba na7aa nagarancho asa leemison nagaras yarsho gidana mela kiittidi hessa oothis. Yaatidi, Xoossay Kiristoosa ashuwa baggara nagara, nagarancho asa giddon pirdis.
8.4: Xoossay hessa oothiday, nu asho amoy koyeysada gidonashin, Geeshsha Ayyaanay koyeysada de7iya nu bolla higgiya xillo kiitay poletana melasa.
8.5: Banta asho amuwa kaallidi de7eysati bantana ufaysiyabaa qopoosona. Shin Geeshsha Ayyaana shenen de7eysati Geeshsha Ayyaana ufaysiyabaa qopoosona.
8.6: Nu qofay asho amos haaretiko hayqo ehees, shin ayyaana amos haaretiko de7onne sarotethi ehees.
8.7: Asho amos haaretiya asi Xoossaa higgiyas kiitetanaw koyonna gishonne kiitetanaw danda7onna gisho, Xoossara morke.
8.8: Banta asho amuwas haareteysati Xoossaa ufaysanaw danda7okona.
8.9: Shin Xoossaa Ayyaanay hintenan de7ikonne hintena haariko, hinte Ayyaana shenen de7eetape attishin, hinte asho amuwas haareteketa. Kiristoosa Ayyaanay bayna oonika Kiristoosaba gidenna.
8.10: Shin Kiristoosi hintenan de7iko, hinte asatethay nagara gaason hayqidaysa. Shin hinte ayyaanay xillotethaa gaason de7on de7ees.
8.11: Shin Yesuusa hayqope denthida Xoossaa Ayyaanay hintenan de7iko, Kiristoosa hayqope denthida Xoossay, hintenan de7iya ba Geeshsha Ayyaanan hayqiya hinte asatethaas de7o immana.
8.12: Hiza, ta ishato, nuuni nu asho amuwa kaallidi daanaw bessenna.
8.13: Hinte, hinte asho amuwas de7iko hayqana, shin Geeshsha Ayyaana wolqan nagara oosuwa wodhiko hinte de7on daana.
8.14: Xoossaa Ayyaanay kaalethiya ubbay Xoossaa nayta.
8.15: Nuuni, “Abbaa, ta Aawaw” yaagidi xeegiya, Xoossaa nayta oothiya Geeshsha Ayyaana ekidaape attishin, zaaridi yashshan daanaw aylle oothiya ayyaana ekibooko.
8.16: Xoossaa Ayyaanay nu ayyaanara gididi nuuni Xoossaa nayta gideysa markatees.
8.17: Nuuni iya nayta gidiko Xoossaa anjuwa laattana; Kiristoosara wolla he anjuwa laattana. Qassi nuuni Kiristoosara metuwa ekiko iyara wolla iya bonchuwan shaaketana. Yaana Bonchuwa
8.18: Nuuni ha77i waayetiya waayiya, sinthafe nuus qoncana bonchuwara gathi be7iko, ginisanaw danda7etenna gada qopayis.
8.19: Medhetetha ubbay Xoossaa nayta qoncethaa daro laamotidi naagoosona.
8.20: Medhetetha ubbay hada gidis; hessika, medhetetha dooron gidonashin, ufaysan naagana mela oothida Xoossaa shenen hanis.
8.21: Medhetethay ba huuphen dhayo aylletethaafe wozetidi, Xoossaa naytara wolla boncho la77a shaaketana.
8.22: Medhetethay issife hanno gakanaw iqethi oykida maccasada ooleninne un7an de7eysa nu eroos.
8.23: Qassi hessa medhetetha xalaala gidonashin, Geeshsha Ayyaana bayra imotada ekida nuuni, nu huuphen nu asatethaas wozo gidida Xoossaa nayta gidana ufaysaa naagishe nu asatethan oolos.
8.24: Ha ufaysan nuuni attida. Shin nuuni ufaysi oothiyabay bentiya gidiko hessa ooni ufaysi oothii?
8.25: Shin nu be7onnaba demmana gidi ufaysan naagiko hessa danda7an naagoos.
8.26: Hessada Geeshsha Ayyaanay nu daaburan maaddees. Nuuni Xoossaa waati woossanaw bessiyako eroko, shin Geeshsha Ayyaanay ba huuphen, asi odanaw danda7etonna qaalan nuus gaannatees.
8.27: Qassi asa wozana eriya Xoossay Geeshsha Ayyaana qofay aybeko erees. Geeshsha Ayyaanay Xoossaa sheniyada geeshshatas gaannatees.
8.28: Xoossaa siiqeysatasinne iya sheniyada xeegetidaysatas Xoossay ubbaa lo77os ootheysa eroos.
8.29: Xoossay koyrottidi eridaysati ba Na7aa daanana melanne na7ayka ammaneyisata giddon bayra gidana mela enta dummayidi wothis.
8.30: Xoossay koyrottidi dummayidaysata xeegis; he xeegidaysata xillisis; he xillisidaysata qassi bonchis. Xoossa Siiqo
8.31: Yaatin, nu ha ubbaas woyganee? Xoossay nu bagga gidiko nuura oone eqetanay?
8.32: I hari attoshin, ba na7aas qadhetonnashin, nu gisho aathidi immis. Yaatin, ba na7aa nuus aathidi immidaysi waanidi ubbaba coo immennee?
8.33: Xoossay entana xillisida gisho I dooridaysata oone mootanay?
8.34: Yaatin, enta bolla pirdanaw danda7ey oonee? Oonika baawa. Hayqope dendidi Xoossaa ushachan uttida, Kiristoos Yesuusi, I nuus gaannatees.
8.35: Hiza, nuna Kiristoosa siiquwape shaakanay oonee? Waayeye woyko metoye woyko goodeye woyko kosheye woyko kallotetheye woyko yashsheye woyko oleyee?
8.36: Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Nuuni ne gisho kumetha gallas hayqoos; shukas efiya dorsada taybetida” geetetidi xaafetidaysa mela gidis.
8.37: Shin nuuni, nuna siiqida Kiristoosan ha ubbaa polo xoonos.
8.38: Hessa gisho, hayqo gidin de7o gidin kiitanchota gidin haareyisata gidin ha77i de7eysa gidin sinthafe yaanaysa gidin wolqaamata gidin,
8.39: salo wolqaa gidin sa7a wolqaa gidin ay medhetethi gidin nu Godaa, Kiristoos Yesuusan de7iya Xoossaa siiquwape nuna shaakanaw danda7onnaysa taani eras.

9.1: Taani Kiristoosan tuma odayis, wordotike. Geeshsha Ayyaanay kaalethiya ta kahay taani wordotonnaysa taw markatees.
9.2: Ta wozanan Isra7eeletas daro qadhetaysinne qamma gallas qopayis.
9.3: Taani, ta ishata gisho, Kiristoosape shaaketada Xoossaa baadethafe garsan de7idaako dosaysishin.
9.4: Enti Isra7eeleta, Xoossay enta ba nayta oothis, ba bonchuwa entaw qoncisis. Entara caaqis; higgiya entaw immis. Enti Xoossaa goyinnana tuma ogiya bessis; Xoossay ufaysa qaala entaw immis.
9.5: Enti yeletethan mayzata koche; qassi Kiristoosi ashon enta koche gididi yis. Ubbaafe bolla gidida Xoossay merinaw galatetto. Amin7i!
9.6: Gidoshin, Xoossay gelida qaalay poletonna attis guussu gidenna. Isra7eele asa ubbay Xoossaa asi gidokona.
9.7: Qassi Abrahaame zare ubbay Abrahaame nayta gidokona. Xoossay Abrahaames, “Ne kochay Yisaaqa baggara xeegetana” yaagis.
9.8: Hessa guussay ashon yeletida nayti ubbay Xoossaa nayta gidokona. Shin tuma Isra7eele nayti Xoossay Abrahaames gelida qaalada yeletida nayta.
9.9: Xoossay immana gidi gelida qaalay, “Taani wonto laythi hannoode yaana; Saaraka adde na7a yelana” yaageysa.
9.10: Hessa xalaala gidonashin, Irbiqinne Yisaaqi yelida mente adde naytabaa akeekite.
9.11: Enti yeletanaape woyko iita woyko lo77o oothanaape sinthe Xoossaa dooroy ooson gidonashin xeessan gideysa qoncisanaw,
9.12: “Bayray kaaluwas kiitetana” yaagidi Goday Irbiqas odis.
9.13: Hessika Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Yayqooba dosas, Eesawe ixas” geetetidi xaafetis.
9.14: Yaatin, nuuni woyganee? Xoossay ase asape shaakiyee? Gidenna.
9.15: Goday Museko, “Ta maaranaw koydaysata maarana; ta qadhetanaw koydaysatas qadhetana” yaagis.
9.16: Hiza, Xoossaa dooroy asa shenen woyko ooson gidonashin iya maarotethaana.
9.17: Geeshsha Maxaafan, Gibxe kawako, “Taani, ta wolqaa nenan bessanawunne ta sunthay alame ubban eretana mela hessas nena kawothas” geetetidi xaafetis.
9.18: Hiza, Xoossay maaranaw koyeysa maarees; wozanaa muumisanaw koyeysa wozanaa muumisees. Xoossa Hanqonne Maarotethi
9.19: Hintefe issoy, “Yaatin, Xoossay ase iita ooso gisho ayis borii? Xoossaa sheniya ixas gaanay oonee?” yaagidi oychanaw danda7ees.
9.20: Shin ta ishaw, Xoossara palamanaw neeni oonee? Urqafe Medhetida miishey bana medhidaysa, “Tana haysada oothada ayis medhadii?” gidi oychanaw danda7ii?
9.21: Woyko urqa medheysi issi urqafe issuwa boncho miishe, hankuwa qassi tooshe miishe oothidi medhanaw maati baawee?
9.22: Xoossay ba hanquwa bessanawunne ba wolqaa erisanaw koyidi, pirdas giigida hanqo nayta daro gencan danda7idaako ne ay eray?
9.23: Hessa I oothiday koyrottidi bonchoos giigisida, ba doorida naytas ba bonchuwa qoncisanaasa.
9.24: Ayhude gidin, woyko Ayhude gidonna asa ubbay Xoossan dooretida.
9.25: Nabiya Hose maxaafan, “Ta ase gidonnayisata, ‘Ta ase’ gada xeegana. Ta siiqaboonna deriya, ‘Siiqetidaysata’ gada xeegana.
9.26: Enti, ‘Ta ase gideketa’ geetetidi xeegetida bessan, ‘De7o Xoossaa nayta’ geetetidi xeegetana” yaagees.
9.27: Nabiya Isayaasi Isra7eele asaaba, “Isra7eele asay abba gaxan de7iya shafeda darikoka, entafe guutha asa xalaali attana.
9.28: Goday alamiya ubbaa bolla ellesidi polo pirdaa pirdana.”
9.29: Qassika Isayaasi, “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday nuus guutha koche ashshonaba gidiyako, nuuni Soodomenne Gamoora katamaada dhayanashin” yaagidi koyrottidi odis.
9.30: Yaatin, nu woyganee? Xillotethaa koyiboona Ayhude gidonna asay ammanon xillotethi demmidosona.
9.31: Shin xillotethako gathiya higgey de7iya Isra7eele asay xillotethi demmibookona.
9.32: Ayis demmibookona? Enti xillotethaa ammanon gidonashin, ooson ekanaw koyida gishosa. Yaaniya gisho, enti, “Dhubiya shuchan” dhubetidosona.
9.33: Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Taani Xiyoonen dhubbi kundisiya shuchaa wothana. Iyan ammaniya oonika yeellatenna” geetetidi xaafetis.

10.1: Ta ishato, ta kumetha wozanan ta amotteynne Xoosse woossey Isra7eeley attana melasa.
10.2: Enti Xoossaas mishetoosonashin, tuma eratethan mishetonnaysa ta markatayis.
10.3: Enti Xoossaa xillotethaa ogiya eronna ixidi, banta huuphe xillotethaa kaallidosonape attishin, Xoossaa xillotethaa koybookona.
10.4: Asi ubbay ammanon xillana mela Kiristoosi higgiya polis. Atotethi Ubbaasa
10.5: Asi higge naagidi ekiya xillotethabaa Musey xaafishe, “Higge naagiya oonika he higgiya naagida mela de7ees” yaagis.
10.6: Shin ammanon ekiya xillotethabaa geetetiday haysa: “Ne wozanan, ‘Ooni salo keyanee?’ yaagopa; hessi Kiristoosa wodhisanaasa.
10.7: Woyko, ‘Duge sa7a garsi wodhanay oonee?’ goopa; hessi Kiristoosa duufope kessanaasa.
10.8: Shin yaagidi xaafetis: ‘Xoossaa qaalay ne matana; ne doonaninne ne wozanan de7ees’ Nuuni hintew odiya ammano qaalay haysa.
10.9: “Yesuusi Godaa” gada ne doonan markatikonne Xoossay iya hayqope denthidaysa ne wozanan ammaniko, ne attana.
10.10: Asi ba wozanan ammanidi xillees; ba doonan markatidi attees.
10.11: Geeshsha Maxaafay, “Iyan ammaniya oonika yeellatenna” yaagees.
10.12: Issi Xoossay ubbaa Godaa gidiya gisho, Ayhudeta giddoninne Ayhude gidonna asaa giddon dummatethi baawa. I bana xeegiya ubbaas daro keeha.
10.13: Geeshsha Maxaafay, “Godaa sunthaa xeegiya oonika attana” yaagees.
10.14: Yaatin, enti ammanonna de7ishe waanidi iya xeeganaw danda7onna? Enti iyabaa si7onna de7ishe waatidi iya ammananaw danda7onna? Qassi entaw qaala odiya asi bayna de7ishin, waanidi si7anaw danda7oona?
10.15: Kiitetida asi bayna de7ishin, qaalay waanidi odetanaw danda7ii? Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Ufaysa Wongela odiya asaa tohoti waanidi lo77oona!” yaagidi xaafetis.
10.16: Shin Isayaasi, “Godaw, nu markatethaa ooni ammanidee?” yaagidaysada, ubbay Wongela ammanibookona.
10.17: Hessa gisho, ammanoy sissafe yees; sissi Kiristoosa qaalape yees.
10.18: Gidoshin, Isra7eele asay qaala si7ibookona guusseyee? Akay, si7idosona. Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Enta qaalay biitta ubban si7etis, enta oday sa7aa gaxa gakis” yaagetis.
10.19: Shin Isra7eele asay eribookona guusseyee? Musey kase, “Taani hintena leqetida asan qiiroysana; qassi eeya asan hintena yiloyana” yaagis.
10.20: Qassi Isayaasi, “Tana koyiboona asaas bentas; tana oychiboona asaas qoncas” yaagidi yayyonna odis.
10.21: Shin Isayaasi Isra7eeletaba odishe, “Ubbaa gallas kiitetonna asaasinne tana ixiya asaas ta kushiya miccas” yaagees.

11.1: Ane ta oychayis: yaatin, Xoossay ba asaa aggideyee? Aggibeenna! Taani ta huuphen Isra7eele; Abrahaame sheeshi; Biniyaame koche.
11.2: Xoossay koyro doorida ba asata yeggenna. Geeshsha Maxaafan, Eeliyaasi Isra7eeleta Xoossaa sinthan waati mootidaako, hinte ereketii?
11.3: Eeliyaasi, “Godaw, enti ne nabeta wodhidosona, ne yarsho bessaaka laallidosona. Ta tarka attas; enti tanaka wodhanaw koyoosona” yaagis.
11.4: Xoossay iyaw woygidi zaaridee? “Ba7aale geetetiya eeqas goyinniboona laapun mukulu asaa taw ashshas” yaagis.
11.5: Hessadaka, ha wodiyan Xoossay ba aadho keehatethan doorida guutha Isra7eeleti de7oosona.
11.6: I enta dooriday ba aadho keehatethanaape attishin, enta ooson gidenna. Dooroy ooson gidiko, iya aadho keehatethay tuma aadho keehatethi gidenna.
11.7: Yaatin, waanidee? Isra7eeleti banta koyaba demmibookona, shin Xoossay doorida guuthati demmidosona. Attidaysati banta wozanaa muumisidosona.
11.8: Hessika, Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Enti banta ayfiyan be7onnaada banta haythan si7onnaada, hanno gakanaw entaw Xoossay azalla ayyaana immis” geetetidi xaafetidaysada hanis.
11.9: Qassi Dawiti, “Enti miya gaytay enta xiheda oyko; enta gufanthiya aafo gido; enta iitatethay enta bolla gako.
11.10: Enti xeellonnaada enta ayfey goozeto; ubba wode meton enti kuunidi de7o” yaagis.
11.11: Yaatin, Ayhudeti zaari dendonna mela kundidonayee? Gidenna! Enta kundethay Ayhude gidonna asay attana mela gaaso gidis. Hessika Ayhudeti enta bolla qanaatanaada oothis.
11.12: Ayhudeta nagaray alamiyas daro anjo ehis; qassi enta kundethay Ayhude gidonna asaas daro anjo gidis. Yaatin, dooretida Ayhudeti kumethi attiya wode anjoy ay mela darandeesha!
11.13: Taani, ha77i hintew Ayhude gidonna asaas odayis. Ayhude gidonna asaas hawaare gidada ootheysan taani daro ceeqetayis.
11.14: Ta hessa oothiday taw ashon koche gidida Isra7eeleta qiiroyada entafe guuthata ashshanaasa.
11.15: Xoossay enta yeggida wode, ha alamey Xoossara sigetis. Xoossay enta shiishi ekiya wode hayqida asi hayqope dendida mela gidees.
11.16: Koyro menthida baso uythay Xoossaas yarshetidi geeshshi gidiko, muume uythayka geeshshi. Mithas xaphoy geeshshi gidiko, tasheyka geeshshi.
11.17: Gaden tokida shamaho tashe gidida Ayhudeti karetin, hinte bazzon dolida shamaho tashe gidida Ayhude gidonnaysati enta bessan dhanthetidi enta anjuwanne duretetha shaaketideta.
11.18: Hiza, hinte tasheda karetidi wodhida Ayhudeta bolla otortofite. Hinte otortiyaba gidiko, xaphoy hintena tookesipe attishin, hinte xaphuwa tookonnaysa akeekite.
11.19: Neeni, “He tasheti karetiday, ta enta bessan dhanthetana melasa” gaanaw danda7aasa.
11.20: Hessi tuma. Enti ammanibona gisho karetidosona. Neeni ammanida gisho he bessan eqadasa. Neeni yayyanaw besseesipe attishin, otoranaw bessenna.
11.21: Xoossay medhon tashe gidida Ayhudetas qadhetonna ixiko hintewuka qadhetenna.
11.22: Hiza, Xoossay ay mela keehekonne ay mela yashshiyako be7a. I yashshey kiitetonayisata, qassi I keehey iya ammanidi minnidi eqidaysatasa. Minnidi eqonna ixiko hinteka karetana.
11.23: Ayhudeti ammaniko, kase enti de7iya bessaa simmana. Xoossay enta zaaridi, wothanaw danda7ees.
11.24: Hintena bazzon de7iya shamaho gidida Ayhude gidonnayisata qanxidi, gaden tooketida shamahuwa bolla hintena tokiko, medhon gade shamaho gidida Ayhudeta banta koyro bessan zaari tokanaw waanidi danda7etennee? Xoossa Maarotethi Ubbaasa
11.25: Ta ishato, hinte hintena erancho gidi ceeqetofite. Ta hintew odiya issi xuuri de7ees. Hessika Isra7eeletape baggay si7onna ixiday wursethi gakanaw gidonashin, attanaw de7iya Ayhude gidonna asay kumethi Xoossako yaana gakanaasa.
11.26: Hessadaka, Isra7eele asa ubbay attana. Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Nuna ashsheysi Xiyoonepe yaana; Yayqooba kochaafe iita ubbaa diggana.
11.27: Taani enta nagara atto giya wode entara caaqana caaqoy haysa” geetetidi xaafetis.
11.28: Ayhudeti Wongela ekonna ixidi, hinte gisho Xoossara morke gididosona. Gidoshin, ha77ika enti dooretidaysata, Xoossay enta aawata gisho enta dosees.
11.29: Xoossay ba imuwaninne ba xeessan qiirotenna.
11.30: Hinte Ayhude gidonnaysati kase Xoossaas kiitetibeketa. Shin ha77i Ayhudeti kiitetonna ixin, hinte Xoossaa maarotethaa ekideta.
11.31: Hessadaka, hinte ekida maarotethaa Ayhudeti ekana mela ha77i Xoossaas kiitetonna ixidosona.
11.32: Xoossay asa ubbaa ba maarotethaa bessanaw koyidi, asi ubbay kiitetonna ixana mela oothis.
11.33: Xoossaa duretetha, cincatethaanne eratethaa akeekidi odanay oonee? Iya pirday pilgetenna, iya ogey eretenna.
11.34: Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Godaa qofaa erey oonee? Iya zoranaw danda7ey oonee?
11.35: Xoossaas tal7eynne tal7iya zaaridi ekey oonee?” yaagees.
11.36: Ubbaa I medhis; ubbay iyan de7ees; ubbay iya bonchosa. Xoossaas merinaw bonchoy gido. Amin7i.

12.1: Hiza, ta ishato, hinte, hinte asatethaa Xoossaa ufaysiya, de7onne geeshsha yarsho oothidi, immana mela taani hintena Xoossaa maarotethan woossayis. Xoossaa hinte goyinnanaw bessiya tuma ogey hessa.
12.2: Lo77o, ufayseysanne polo gidida Xoossaa sheniya hinte shaaki eranaw hinte qofan laametitepe attishin, ha alamiya daanopite.
12.3: Xoossay hinte issuwas issuwas immida ammanuwa mela wozanaama asada qopite. Qopanaw besseysafe aathidi hintena dummayidi, otoron qopofite gada taw imetida aadho keehatethan hintew odayis.
12.4: Nu issi asatethaa giddon dumma dumma kifileti de7oosona; he dumma dumma kifiletas dumma dumma oosoy de7ees.
12.5: Hessada, nuuni daro asi gidikoka, Kiristoosan issi asatethi gidida. Nuuni issi asatethi gididi dumma dumma kifileti issoy issuwara oyketida.
12.6: Nuus imetida aadho keehatethan dumma dumma imotati de7oosona. Nu imoy tinbit odo gidiko, nuus de7iya ammanuwa mela odanaw bessees.
12.7: Nu imoy harata maade gidiko, he oosuwan minnanaw bessees; tamaarso gidiko, he tamaarsuwan minnanaw bessees.
12.8: Nu imoy harata minthetho gidiko, minnidi minthethanaw bessees. Nu imoy nuus de7iyabaape haratas imo gidiko, wozanape immanaw bessees. Nu imoy ayso gidiko, minnidi aysanaw bessees. Nu imoy haratas keeho gidiko, ufaysan keehanaw bessees.
12.9: Hinte siiqoy qoodhepe qommon gidanaw bessenna. Iitaba ixite; lo77oba minthidi oykite.
12.10: Issoy issuwara ishada siiqetite; issoy issuwa bonchite.
12.11: Azallofite; hinte ayyaanan minnidi, Godaas oothite.
12.12: Xoossay immida ufaysan ufaytite; metuwa danda7ite; ubba wode Xoossaa woossite.
12.13: Ammaniya geeshshata koshshiyaban maaddite; imathata mokite.
12.14: Hintena goodeyisata anjite; anjitepe attishin, baaddofite.
12.15: Ufayteysatara ufaytite; yeekeysatara yeekite.
12.16: Issoy issuwara issi qofan de7ite. Otoro qofaa aggidi, hintena kawushidi, kawusha ooso oothite. Hinte hintena cinca gidi qopofite.
12.17: Oonika hintew iitabaa oothiko, he uraas iita zaaropite. Asa ubbaa sinthan nashisiya lo77o ooso oothite.
12.18: Asa ubbaara saron daanaw hintew danda7etiya ubbaa oothite.
12.19: Ta ishato, hinte, hinte huuphen asas halo keyopite. Xoossay halo kessana mela iyaw aggaagite. Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Taani halo kessana; taani kushe zaarana” yaagees Goday, geetetidi xaafetis.
12.20: Shin Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Ne morkey koshatiko muza; I saamotiko ushsha. Neeni hessa oothiko iya huuphen yeella tama bonqo qolaasa” geetetidi xaafetis.
12.21: Iitaa lo77on xoonape attishin, iitan xoonetofa.

13.1: Xoossaa shene gidonashin maati imetonna gishonne ha77i de7iya shuumatika Xoossaa shenen shuumetida gisho asi ubbay deriya ayseysatas kiitetanaw bessees.
13.2: Hessa gisho, maatara de7eysatas kiitetonna ixiya oonika Xoossaa kiitaa ixees. Kiitetonna ixiya oonika ba bolla pirdaa ehees.
13.3: Ayseysati iita ootheysatape attishin, lo77o ootheyisata yashshokona. Ayseysatas yayyonna agganaw koyay? Yaako lo77o ootha; enti nena galatana.
13.4: Enti new lo77oba oothanaw shuumetida Xoossaa aylle. Shin neeni iitabaa oothiko, enti iitabaa oothidaysa seeriya gisho iyaw yayya. Enti iita ootheyisata seeridi, Xoossaa hanquwa qoncisiya Xoossaa aylle.
13.5: Hessa gisho, Xoossaa hanquwa xalaalas gidonashin, hinte kahay markatiya gisho deriya ayseysatas kiitetanaw bessees.
13.6: Hinte giira giireyka hessasa. Deriya ayseysati he oosuwa oothey, enti Xoossaa aylleta gidida gishosa.
13.7: Issuwas issuwas besseysa immite. Giira giiranaw besseysas giirite; qaraxa qanxanaw besseysas qaraxa qanxite; yayyanaw besseysas yayyite; bonchoy besseysa bonchite. Issoy Issuwara Dosetite
13.8: Issoy issuwara siiqetite. Siiqo acope attishin, hinte bolla hara acoy doopo. Ase siiqiya oonika higgey geysa polis.
13.9: “Laammofa; wodhopa; kaysotopa; amottofa” giya kiitaynne hara kiita ubbay, “Ase ne huupheda dosa” giya kiitan qashetis.
13.10: Ase siiqiya oonika iya bolla iitabaa oothenna. Hessa gisho, ase siiqeysi higge kiitaa polis.
13.11: Dhiskofe hinte barkiya wodey ha77i gideysa akeekidi hessa oothite. Nu attana wodey koyro nu ammanida wodiyape ha77i nuuko matis.
13.12: Dhuma wodey aadhanaw hanees; wontay matis. Hiza, nuuni dhuma ooso aggidi poo7o ola miishe oykoos.
13.13: Ane gallas poo7on de7iya asada maaran de7oos. Mathoninne laymatethara gahetiya dumma dumma tuna oosotan, palamaninne qanaaten gidopo.
13.14: Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa kanduwa ma7ite; hinte nagarancho asatethay ba amuwa polana mela iyaw qopofite.

14.1: Ammanon daaburida oonaka shiishi ekitepe attishin, iya qofaa bolla pirdofite.
14.2: Leemisos, ammanon minnida issi asi ay kathika maanaw danda7ees. Shin ammanon daaburiya asi atakilte xalaala mees.
14.3: Ubbabaa miya asi moonna uraa kadhopo. Ubbabaa moonna asi miya uraa bolla pirdofo. Xoossay ubbaa miya uraa shiishi ekis.
14.4: Hara asa aylle bolla pirdey neeni oonee? I daaburin woyko minnin ba Godaasa. Goday iya essanaw danda7iya gisho I minnidi eqana.
14.5: Qassi “Issi gallasay hara gallasape aadhees” yaagidi qopiya asi de7ees. Haray qassi, “Gallasati ubbay issi mela” gidi qopees. Shin issoy issoy ba qofaa akeekidi qacho.
14.6: Issi gallasaa hara gallasatape aathidi bonchiya oonika Godaa bonchoos gidi oothees. Ubba kathi miya asi Godaa bonchoos gidi mees. I miya he kathaa gisho, Xoossaa galatees. Ubba kathi moonna asi Godaa bonchoos moonna aggees; qassi moonna agon Xoosse galatees.
14.7: Nuupe oonika baw deenna; qassi nu giddofe oonika baw hayqenna.
14.8: Nu de7on de7iko Godaas de7oos; qassi hayqikoka Godaas hayqoos. Hiza, nu de7on de7in woyko hayqin Godaasa.
14.9: Kiristoosi hayqidi hayqope dendiday, de7on de7eysatasinne hayqidaysatas Godaa gidanaasa.
14.10: Yaatin, neeni ne ishaa bolla ayis pirday? Woyko neeni ne ishaa ayis kadhay? Nuuni ubbay Xoossaa pirda araata sinthan eqana.
14.11: Geeshsha Maxaafan Goday, “Taani de7on de7ayis; asa ubbay ta sinthan gulbatana; taani Xoossaa gideysa markatana” yaagees.
14.12: Hiza, nu oothidabaas nu huuphen huuphen Xoossaa sinthan shiiqidi zaaro immana. Hara Asi Dhubethofa
14.13: Hessa gisho, nuuni issoy issuwa bolla pirdeysa aggoos. Shin hinte ishaa dhubisidi woyko qaxidi nagaran gelsiyaba oothonnaada naagetite.
14.14: Godaa Yesuusa ammaniya asada, ba huuphen tuna gidida kathi baynaysa taani geeshshada erayis. Shin issi asi issiba tuna gidi qopiko hessi iyaw tuna gidees.
14.15: Ne miya katha gisho ne ishaa dhubiyaba gidiko, Kiristoosan de7iya ne ishaa siiqaka. Kiristoosi iya gisho hayqida uraa ne miya kathan iya ayyaana de7uwa dhaysofa.
14.16: Hiza, hintew de7iya la77atetha harati borana mela oothopite.
14.17: Xoossaa kawotethay Geeshsha Ayyaanay immiya xillotethi, sarotethinne tuma ufaysife attishin, muussabaanne ushshaba gidenna.
14.18: Hessada Kiristoosas oothiya asi Xoossaa ufaysees; asanka anjetees.
14.19: Hessa gisho, ane nuuni sarotethi bentiya ogiyanne issuwa issuwa ammanon minthiya ogiya koyoos.
14.20: Katha gisho gada Xoossaa oosuwa dhaysofa. Ubba kathi meetetees, shin hara asi nagaran dhubisiya kathi muussi iita.
14.21: Ne ishay dhubetonna mela asho moonna woyko ushshu uyonna woyko ne ishaa dhubiya haraba oothonna agoy lo77o.
14.22: Hiza, ha ne ammanuwa ne giddoninne ne Xoossaa giddon naaga. Like gidi qopidaba oothiya wode iya kahay mootonna uray anjetidaysa.
14.23: Shin sidhishe miya uraas iya muussay ammanon gidonna gisho pirdetees. Ammanoy bayna oosetida ooso ubbay nagara.

15.1: Nuuni ammanon minnidaysati daaburanchota toohuwa tookanaw bessees. Nuuni nuna ufaysanaw bessenna.
15.2: Nuuni nu ishaa ammanon minthanaw iya maaddanawunne ufaysanaw bessees.
15.3: Kiristoosi bana ufaysibeenna. Shin Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Asay nena cayida cashshay tana gakis” geetetidi xaafetidaysada hanis.
15.4: Geeshsha Maxaafay immiya gencaninne minthethuwan nu ufaysaa ekana mela Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafetida ubbay nuna tamaarsanaw xaafetis.
15.5: Gencanne minotethi immiya Goday hinte Kiristoos Yesuusa kaalliya wode issifetethi hintew immo.
15.6: Hessika, nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa Aawa, Xoossaa, issi wozananinne issi qaalan hinte bonchana melasa. Wongeli Asa Ubbaasa
15.7: Kiristoosi hintena ekidaysada Xoossaa bonchoos issoy issuwa ekite.
15.8: Xoossay beni aawatas immida ufaysay poletana melanne iya tumatethay eretana mela Kiristoosi Ayhudeta aylle gididi yidaysa ta hintew odayis.
15.9: Kiristoosi Ayhudeta aylle gidida hara gaasoy qassi Ayhude gidonna asati Xoossaa iya maarotethaa gisho galatana melasa. Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Ta nena Ayhude gidonna asaa giddon galatana; ne sunthaa sabbana” geetetidi xaafetidaysada hanis.
15.10: Qassi, “Ayhude gidonna asato, Xoossaa deriyara ufaytite” yaagetis.
15.11: Qassi zaaridi, “Ayhude gidonna asato, Godaa galatite; kawotetha ubbay iya sabbite” yaagetis.
15.12: Hessada Isayaasi, “Isseye kochaafe yeletiya issoy yaana; I kawotetha ubbaa haarana. Enti banta ufaysaa iya bolla wothana” yaagees.
15.13: Geeshsha Ayyaana wolqan hinte diccana mela ufaysi immiya Xoossay, hinte ammanuwa gaason hintew ufaysinne sarotethi kumethi immo. Phawuloosi Kiita Xaafida Gaaso
15.14: Ta ishato, hintenan lo77otethinne eratethi kumidaysa qassi issoy issuwa zoranaw danda7eysa ta geeshshada erayis.
15.15: Taani hintena issi issiba guja akeekisanaw koyada yayyonna ha dabdaabiya hintew xaafas.
15.16: Taani Kiristoos Yesuusa aylle gidada, Ayhude gidonna asaas kahineda oothada, Wongela odana mela Xoossay taw aadho keehatetha immis. Ayhude gidonna asay Geeshsha Ayyaanan geeyidi, Xoossaa ufaysiya yarsho gidana mela Xoossay hessa oothis.
15.17: Taani Kiristoos Yesuusan gidada Xoossaas oothiya oosuwan ceeqetayis.
15.18: Ayhude gidonna asay Xoossaas kiitetanaada, Kiristoosi ta qaalanne ta oosuwa baggara oothida oosuwape attishin, hari ta ceeqetiyabay baawa.
15.19: Xoossay hessa malaataninne Geeshsha Ayyaana wolqan waati oothidaako ta hintew odana. Taani Yerusalaamepe doomada, Iliwarqoone gakanaw Kiristoosa Wongela sabbakas.
15.20: Taani hara asi baasida bessan keexanaw koyke. Kiristoosa sunthay xeegetiboona bessan Wongela odanaw amottayis.
15.21: Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Iyabay odetiboonna asati iya be7ana; iyabaa si7iboona asati akeekana” geetetidi xaafetis.
15.22: Hessa gaason, taani hinteko yaanaw danda7abike.
15.23: Shin taani ha77i ha heeran ta oosuwa ongida gishonne daro laythafe doomada hintena be7anaw laamotida gisho,
15.24: taani Ispeene bashe hintena be7anaw qopas. Qassi guutha wode hintera ufaytidaape guye, Ispeene biya wode hinte ta ogiyas tana maaddana mela koyayis.
15.25: Shin ha77i taani Xoossaa asata maaddanaw Yerusalaame bayis.
15.26: Maqedoonenne Akayan de7iya Xoossa asati, Yerusalaamen de7iya manqota miishen maaddanaw koyida gishosa.
15.27: Enti manqota maaddanaysi entaw attonnaba gidida gisho banta huuphen hessa oothanaw qofa qachidosona. Ayhudeti Ayhude gidonaysatara ayyaana anjuwa shaaketiko, enti qassi bantaw de7iyaban Ayhudeta maaddanaw bessees.
15.28: Hessa gisho, taani he shiiqida miishiya entaw immidaape guye, Ispeene bashe hinte matara aadhana.
15.29: Taani hinteko biya wode Kiristoosa anjuwan kumada baanaysa erayis.
15.30: Ta ishato, taw Xoossaa woossishe ta baaxiyan taara eqana mela Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosaninne Geeshsha Ayyaana siiquwan hintena woossayis.
15.31: Xoossay tana Yihudan de7iya ammanonna asatape ashshanaadanne Yerusalaamen ta oothana oosoy Xoossaa asata matan eketana mela taw woossite.
15.32: Qassi Xoossay giiko, taani hinteko bada ufaysan hintera shempana mela taw woossite.
15.33: Sarotethaa Xoossay hinte ubbaara gido. Amin7i.

16.1: Kinkire kataman de7iya woosa keethan oothiya nu michiya Feebena lo77o maccas gideysa hinte erana mela koyayis.
16.2: Hinte ammaniya asati Godaa sunthan mokanaw bessiya ammaniya asatape issuwada iyo mokite. Iya hintefe koyaba ubbaa iyo maaddite. Iya ba huuphen daro asaa maaddasu; qassi tana ta huuphenka daro maaddasu.
16.3: Kiristoos Yesuusa oosuwa taara issife oothiya Phirisqillanne Aqila saro giite.
16.4: Enti ta gisho banta shempuwa aathidi immidosona. Ta xalaala gidonashin, Ayhude gidonna asaa woosa keetha ubbay enta galatees.
16.5: Enta son shiiqiya ammaniya asaa saro giite. Iise biittan Kiristoosa koyro ammanida, ta dosiya Ephanexoosas ta sarothuwa odite.
16.6: Hinte gisho ooson daro daaburida Mayraamo saro giite.
16.7: Taara qasho keethan aathida ta Ayhude laggeta Andiraniqosanne Yuniyasa saro giite. Enti Yesuusa hawaareta giddon eretidaysata. Qassi enti Kiristoosa taape sinthe ammanidosona.
16.8: Godan ammaniya ta siiqo laggiya, Philiyaxoona saro giite.
16.9: Kiristoosa oosuwa nuura issife oothiya Urbaanosanne ta dosiya Istakuusa saro giite.
16.10: Kiristoosan ammanthiya aylliya Aphelisas ta sarothuwa odite. Arsxobuloosa soo asaas ta sarothuwa odite.
16.11: Ta Ayhude laggiya Herodiyoona saro giite. Narsisasinne iya soo asaape Kiristoosa ammanidaysata saro giite.
16.12: Godaa oosuwan daaburiya Tirufaynanne Tirufoosa saro giite. Qassi Godaas daro daaburada oothiya, ta dosiya Xarsido saro giite.
16.13: Godaa oosuwan daro eretida Rufoosasinne tana ba na7ada be7iya iya aayes ta sarothuwa odite.
16.14: Asqarixoonas, Afilesonphas, Hermeesas, Phaxrobaanas, Hermaasinne entara de7iya ammaniya ishata ubbaas ta sarothuwa odite.
16.15: Filologuusa, Yuula, Neera, iya michiw, Alinxoosanne entara de7iya ammaniya asa ubbaa saro giite.
16.16: Geeshsha yeeretethi yeeretishe, issoy issuwa sarothite. Kiristoosa woosa keetha ubbay hintena saro yaagosona. Wursetha Zore
16.17: Ta ishato, hinte tamaarida timirtiya ixidi, hinte giddon shaaketethinne meto medhiya asatape naagetite. Entafe haakite.
16.18: Hessa mela asati bantaw oothosonape attishin, nu Godaa Kiristoosas oothokona. Banta mal7iya doonaninne saphothiya qaalan ayko eronna asaa wozanaa balethoosona.
16.19: Wongelas hinte kiitetidaysa asa ubbay si7idaysi tana ufaysees. Shin hinte lo77oba erana melanne iitabaape haakana mela ta koyayis.
16.20: Sarotethaa Xoossay Xalahiya hinte tohuwape garsan gaaci yeggana. Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hintera gido.
16.21: Taara oothiya Ximotiyoosi hintena saro yaagees. Hessadaka, ta dabboti Luqiyoosi, Yaasoninne Sosiphaxroosi hintena saro yaagosona.
16.22: Taani, ha dabdaabiya xaafida, Xarxiyoosi, hintena Godaa sunthan saro yaagayis.
16.23: Tana mokidaynne woosa keetha ubbay iya son shiiqiya Gaayoosi, hintena saro yaagees. Katamaa miishiya oykiya Erasxoosinne nu ishaa Qarxoosi hintena saro yaagosona.
16.24: [Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hinte ubbaara gido. Amin7i.]
16.25: Galatay Xoossaas gido. Taani, Yesuus Kiristoosaba odiya Wongela qaalanne daro wodepe qosetidi gam7ida tumatethan, Xoossay hintena ammanon minthidi essanaw danda7ees.
16.26: Shin ha77i he tumay qoncis. Kawotetha ubbay ammanidi kiitetana mela merinaa Xoossaa kiitan nabeti he tumabaa xaafidosona.
16.27: Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara cincatethi iya xalaalas de7iya, issi Xoossaas merinaw bonchoy gido. Amin7i.

1.1: Xoossaa sheniyan Yesuus Kiristoosa hawaare gidanaw xeegetida Phawuloosinne, nu isha Sosteneesi,
1.2: Qorontoosan de7iya Xoossa woosa keethaas, Yesuus Kiristoosan geeydaysatasinne geeshshi gidana mela xeegetidaysatas; qassi entawunne nuus Godaa gidiya nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa suntha ubba bessan xeegiya ubbaas.
1.3: Xoossay, nu Aawaynne Goday Yesuus Kiristoosi hintew aadho keehatethaanne sarotethaa immo. Phawuloosi Xoosse Galatees
1.4: Xoossay Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara hintew immida aadho keehatetha gisho, taani ubba wode Xoossaa galatayis.
1.5: Iyan odaninne eratetha ubban hinte duretideta.
1.6: Taani Kiristoosaba markatidaysi tuma gideysa hessi qoncisees.
1.7: Hessa gisho, hinte nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa yuussaa naagishe de7ishin, ay ayyaana imoyka hintew pacenna.
1.8: Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosi simmiya wode hinte boretonayisata gidana mela wursethi gakanaw I hintena minthana.
1.9: Ba Na7a, nu Godaa, Yesuus Kiristoosara issifetethi daana mela hintena xeegida Xoossay ammanetidaysa. Woosa Keethan De7iya Shaaketethi
1.10: Ta ishato, hinte giddon shaaketethi doonna melanne hinte issi wozananinne issi qofan isso gididi daana mela, nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa sunthan hintena woossayis.
1.11: Ta ishato, Qelo7e soo asay hinte giddon ooshshi de7eysa taw odidosona.
1.12: Ta hintew odeysi haysa: hintefe issoti issoti, “Taani Phawuloosasa; taani Aphiloosasa; taani Phexroosassa; taani Kiristoosassa” yaageeta.
1.13: Kiristoosi shaaketideyee? Hinte gisho, masqaliya bolla kaqetiday Phawulooseyee? Woyko hinte Phawuloosa sunthan xammaqetidetiyee?
1.14: Taani Qarisphoosinne Gaayoosi attishin, hintefe oonaka xammaqaboonna gisho, Xoosse galatayis.
1.15: Hessa gisho, oonika hintena ta sunthan xammaqetideta gaanaw danda7enna.
1.16: [Qassi Isxifaanose soo asaaka ta xammaqidaysa akeekayis, shin hara oona xammaqidaako hassayike.]
1.17: Kiristoosi tana kiittiday wongela odana melasafe attishin, xammaqana mela gidenna. Kiristoosi masqaley hada gidonna mela taani asa cincatetha qaalan odike. Kiristoosi Xoossa Wolqanne Cincatethi
1.18: Kiristoosa masqala qaalay dhayeysatas eeyatethi, shin nuus atteysatas Xoossa wolqa.
1.19: Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Taani cincata cincatethaa dhaysana; akeekanchota akeeka balethana” yaagees.
1.20: Yaatin, cinci awun de7ii? Higge astamaarey awunee? Woyko ha sa7a eranchoy awun de7ii? Xoossay ha sa7aa cincatetha eeyatethi oothibeennee?
1.21: Ha sa7aa asay banta cincatethan Xoossa eronna mela ba cincatethan diggidi, eeyatethan taybetiya, nuuni odiya qaalan ammaneyisata ashshanaw Xoossa shene gidis.
1.22: Ayhudeti malaata be7anaw koyoosona; qassi Giriketi cincatethi koyoosona.
1.23: Shin nuuni masqale bolla kaqetida Kiristoosa sabbakoos. Hessi Ayhudetas dhube; qassi Giriketas eeyatethi gidis.
1.24: Shin Xoossay xeegidaysatas, Ayhude gidin, Girike gidin Kiristoosi Xoossa wolqaanne iya cincatethaa.
1.25: Xoossa eeyatethi asa cincatethafe aadhees; qassi Xoossa daaburay asa minotethafe minnees.
1.26: Hiza, ta ishato, Xoossay hintena xeegiya wode hinte ay mela aseeko qopite. Asa qofan, hinte giddofe daroti cinca, wolqaamanne dhoqa koche gideketa.
1.27: Shin Xoossay cincata yeellayanaw alamen de7iya eeyata dooris; qassi minota yeellayanaw alamen de7iya daaburanchota dooris.
1.28: Ha alamiyan gita geetetidaba dhaysanaw, Xoossi, ha sa7aa kawushaba, kadhetidabanne pathonaba dooris.
1.29: Xoossa sinthan oonika ceeqetonna mela hessa oothis.
1.30: Shin, hintew Kiristoos Yesuusara issifetethi daana mela Xoossay hessa oothis. I, nuus Xoossafe cincatethi, xillotethi, geeshshatethinne atotethi gidis.
1.31: Hessa gisho, Geeshsha Maxaafan, “Ceeqetiya oonika Godan ceeqo” yaagees.
