18.15: He kataman zal7idi duretida zal7anchoti I metuwa babidi iipe haakidi eqana. Enti yeekananne kayotana.
18.16: Qassi, “ ‘Liino, kaalose ma7onne zo7o ma7o ma7ada, worqan, boncho shuchaninne inqo geetetiya al7o shuchan alleeqetida, he gita katamees ayye!
18.17: Haysa mela gita shalo ubbay issi saate giddon dhayis’ yaagidosona. “Markabiya laagiya ubbay, markabiyan biya ubbay, markabiya bolla oothiya ubbaynne abban zal7iya ubbay haaki eqidosona.
18.18: He katamiya xuugetin keyiya cuyaa be7ida wode, ‘Ha gita katamiw daaniya hara katami de7ishsha?’ yaagidosona.
18.19: Enti banta huuphen baana qolidi, waassidosonanne kayotidosona. “ ‘Abbaa bolla markabeti de7iya ubbay, I shaluwan duretida ubbay, he katamiya issi saaten dhayida gisho, ayye! Ayye!
18.20: Saluwaw, I dhayuwan ufayta! Geeshshato, hawaareto, nabeto, Xoossay hinte gisho I bolla pirdida gisho ufaytite’ yaagidosona.”
18.21: Yaatin, mino kiitanchoy woxa daaniya gita shuchu denthidi abban holishe, “Gita katamiya Babilooney wolqan holettada haysada kundana; iya hachife guye ubbaka bentuku.
18.22: Diithi diixeysatinne yexeysati, suusul7enne moyze punneysati, hizape guye ne giddon ubbaka si7etokona. Ay kocha zal7e zal7iya asika ne giddon bentenna. Woxa girsi hizape guye ne giddon si7etenna.
18.23: Xompe poo7oy zaaridi ne giddon poo7enna. Macho ekeysinne azina geliyari qaali hizape guye ne giddon si7etenna. Ne zal7anchoti biitta ubban eretida wolqaamata. Ne bitan kawotethata ubbaa cimmadasa” yaagis.
18.24: Nabeta suuthay, geeshshata suuthaynne biitta bolla hayqida asa ubbaa suuthay I giddon bentida gisho Babilooney pirdetasu.

19.1: Yaatin, salon daro asay, “Xoossay galatetto! Atotethay, bonchoynne wolqay nu Xoossaas gido.
19.2: Iya pirday tumanne xillo. Sa7aa tunisida iita laymiw Xoossay pirdis. Xoossay ba aylleta suuthaa iipe achis” yaagishin si7as.
19.3: He asay zaaridi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Xoossa galati gako. He katamiya merinaw cuyashe daana” yaagidosona.
19.4: Laatamanne oyddu cimatinne de7on de7iya oyddu medhetethati araatan uttida Xoossaas gufannidi, “Amin7i! Xoossa galati gako” yaagidi goyinnidosona.
19.5: Yaatin, “Xoossa aylleti, Xoosse yayiya guuthinne giti ubbay, nu Xoossaa galatite” giya qaalay araatape keyis.
19.6: Yaatin, daro asada wocamiya, wolqaama shaafada guummiya, dadada dechiya girsay, “Xoossaa galati gako; nu Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossay kawotis.
19.7: Dorsaa yaaganoy gakida gishonne iya geliyara giigida gisho, nu ufaytoos, galatoosinne Dorsaa bonchoos.
19.8: Gelos giigidaara phooliyanne geeshshi gidida liino ma7ana mela iw imetis” yaagishin ta si7as. (Liino ma7oy geeshshata xillo ooso leemiso.)
19.9: Hessafe guye, kiitanchoy taako, “Dorsa yaagano xeegetidaysati anjetidaysata” gada xaafa. He kiitanchoy gujidi, “Haysi Xoossaa tuma qaala” yaagis.
19.10: He wode ta iya goyinnanaw iya tohuwa bolla kundas. Shin I, “Hessa oothofa! Taani Yesuusaba markatiya ne melanne ne ishata mela. Ne Xoossaa goyinna” yaagis. Hiza, Yesuusaba markatidaysatas nabetetha ayyaani de7ees. Bootha Para Toggidaysa
19.11: Yaatin, saloy dooyetin, yan bootha pari de7eysa be7as. He para toggidaysi Ammanetidaysanne Tumancho geetetees. I xillotethan pirdesinne oletees.
19.12: Iya ayfey tama laco daanees; iya huuphen daro kallachi de7ees. Iya bolla I attishin, hari oonika eronna xaafetida sunthi de7ees.
19.13: I suuthan muuketida ma7o ma7is; iya sunthayka Xoossaa Qaala.
19.14: Phooliyanne geeshshi gidida liino ma7ida salo olanchoti bootha parata toggidi iya geedo kaalloosona.
19.15: Kawotethata qanxiya qara mashshay iya doonape keyees. I birata xam7an asaa haarana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaa hanqo woyne ushsha gum7iya bessaa I yedhana.
19.16: Iya ma7uwa bollanne iya wodiriya bolla, “Kawota Kawuwanne godata Godaa” giya sunthay xaafetis.
19.17: Hessafe guye, issi kiitanchoy awa bolla eqidaysa be7as. He kiitanchoy salora piradhiya kafo ubbaas ba qaala dhoqu oothidi, “Haa yiite! Xoossaa gibira maanaw issi bessi shiiqite.
19.18: Yidi kawota ashuwa, shaalaqata ashuwa, wotaadareta ashuwa, parata ashuwa, parata toggeyisata ashuwa, asa ubbaa ashuwa, aylleta ashuwa, womaannota ashuwa, gitatanne guuthata ashuwa miite” yaagis.
19.19: Do7ay, para toggidaysaranne iya olanchotara oletanaw sa7a kawotinne enta olanchoti issi bessi shiiqidashin be7as.
19.20: Shin he do7aynne iya sunthan malaatata oothida wordo nabey iyara issife oyketis. He malaatatan do7aa mallay de7eysatanne iya misiliya goyinneyisata I balethis. Do7aynne wordo nabey nam7ayka diinnen eexiya tama abban paxa yegetidosona.
19.21: Attidaysati para toggidaysa doonape keyiya mashshan hayqidosona. Kafoti ubbay enta ashuwa midi kallidosona.

20.1: Zawi bayna olla qulpiyanne gita santhalaata ba kushen oykida issi kiitanchoy salope wodhishin be7as.
20.2: I dawiya oykidi mukulu laythas qachis. He dawey koyro shoosha, Daabuloosa woyko Xalahe.
20.3: Kiitanchoy zawi bayna ollan iya yeggidi, mukulu laythi wurana gakanaw kawotethata zaari balethonna mela qulpen gordidi attamis. Hessafe guye, dawey guutha wodes biletanaw bessees.
20.4: Hessafe guye, araatatanne araatata bolla uttidi pirdana mela maati imetidaysata be7as. Yesuusas markatida gishonne Xoossaa qaala odida gisho banta qoodhiya goyretida asaa shempuwa be7as. Enti do7aa woyko do7aa misiliya goyinnibookona. Enti do7aa malla banta som7on woyko banta kushen wothibookona. Enti hayqope dendidi Kiristoosara issife mukulu laythi haaridosona.
20.5: Haysi koyro denduwa; attida hanko hayqidaysati mukulu laythay wurana gakanaw hayqope dendibookona.
20.6: Koyro denduwas qaadi de7eysati anjetidaysatanne geeshshata. Enta bolla nam7antho hayquwas wolqi baawa. Enti Xoossaasinne Kiristoosas kahine gidana; iyara issife mukulu laythi haarana. Xalahe Xoonetethi
20.7: Mukulu laythay wuridaape guye Xalahey qashope biletana.
20.8: I sa7aa gaxape gaxa gakanaw de7iya kawotethata, entika, Googenne Maagoge geeteteyisata balethidi olas shiishanaw keyana. Enta paydoy abba gaxan de7iya shafe mela.
20.9: Enti biitta ubban laaletidi, geeshshata heeranne Xoossay dosiya katamaa teqidosona. Shin tami salope wodhidi entana mis.
20.10: Enta balethida Xalahey, do7aynne wordo nabey yegetida eexiya diinne tama abban yegetis. Enti qammanne gallas merinaw paxa kaa7etana. Wursetha Pirda
20.11: Hessafe guye, gita bootha araata bolla uttidaysa be7as. Sa7inne saloy iya sinthafe baqatidosona; enti zaari bentibookona.
20.12: Hayqidaysati, gitatinne guuthati araata sinthan eqidaysata be7as; maxaafati dooyetidosona; qassi de7o maxaafa gidida hara maxaafi dooyetis. Hayqidaysati maxaafan xaafetida banta oosuwada pirda ekidosona.
20.13: Abbay ba giddon de7iya hayqidaysata immis; hayqoynne Si7ooley banta giddon de7iya hayqidaysata immidosona. Issi issi asi ba oosuwada pirda ekis.
20.14: Yaatin, hayqoynne Si7ooley tama abban yegetidosona. He tama abbay nam7antho hayqo.
20.15: De7o maxaafan iya sunthay xaafetiboonna asi oonika tama abban yegetis.

21.1: Taani ooratha salonne ooratha sa7a be7as. Koyro saloynne koyro sa7i dhayis; abbayka dhayis.
21.2: Geeshsha katamiya, ooratha Yerusalaamey, azina gelanaw alleeqetada giigada de7iya maccasada salope Xoossaa matape duge wodhishin be7as.
21.3: Araatape haysada yaagidi, odiya gita qaala si7as; “Xoossa Keethay asaara de7ees; Xoossay ba bonchuwara asaara issife daana. Enti iya dere gidana; Xoossay ba huuphen entara daana; I enta Xoossaa gidana.
21.4: Xoossay enta ayfepe afutha ubbaa quchana. Hizape hayqoy woyko kayoy woyko waasoy woyko waayey deenna. Gal77ay ubbay aadhis” yaagis.
21.5: Araata bolla uttidaysi, “Taani ubbaa oorathi oothana” yaagis. Qassi zaaridi taako, “Taani odeysi ammantheysanne tuma gidiya gisho xaafa” yaagis.
21.6: Qassi taako, “Poletis! Taani Alfanne Omega; Doomethinne Polo. Saamotida oonaka de7o haatha pultofe gate qanxonna coo ushshana.
21.7: Xooniya oonika hessa ubbaa laattana; taani iyaw Xoossaa gidana; ika ta na7a gidana.
21.8: Shin yashshanchota, ammanetonayisata, tunata, shempo wodheyisata, laymateyisata, biteyisata, eeqa goyinneysatanne wordanchota qaaday diinney eexiya tama abban gidana. Hessi nam7antho hayqo” yaagis.
21.9: Laapun wursetha boshati kumida laapun xuu7ata oykida laapun kiitanchotape issoy taako yidi, “Haaya, taani nena gelos giigida Dorsaa machiw bessaana” yaagis.
21.10: Kiitanchoy tana zuma huuphe Geeshsha Ayyaanan kessidi, geeshsha katamay, Yerusalaamey, salope Xoossaa matape duge wodhishin bessis.
21.11: He katamay Xoossaa bonchon poo7ees. He katamaa poo7oy yasphide geetetiya al7o shuchaa mela; geeshsha birilleda phoolees.
21.12: He katamaa dirsay wolqaamanne adusse. Iyaw tammanne nam7u pengetinne he pengeta naagiya tammanne nam7u kiitanchoti de7oosona. Pengeta bolla tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zerethata sunthay xaafetis.
21.13: Doloha baggara heedzu pengeti, pudeha baggara heedzu pengeti, dugeha baggara heedzu pengetinne wuloha baggara heedzu pengeti de7oosona.
21.14: Katamaa gimbe dirsay tammanne nam7u shucha baasota bolla eqis. Enta bolla tammanne nam7u Dorsaa hawaareta sunthay xaafetis.
21.15: Taw odiya kiitanchuwas, katamaa, iya pengetanne iya dirsaa wadhiya worqa xam7ay de7ees.
21.16: Katamaas oyddu maazaneti de7oosona; katamaa geesaynne gompay issi gina. Kiitanchoy katamaa ba xam7an wadhin, katamay tammanne nam7u mukulu kilo mitire gidis; katamaa geesay, gompaynne dhoqatethay issi gina.
21.17: Kiitanchoy qassi dirsaa wadhin, kiitanchoy go7etiya asa kushen issi xeetanne oytamanne oyddu wadha gidis.
21.18: Katamaa dirsay yasphide geetetiya shuchan diretis. Katamay mastooteda phooliya walahi bayna worqan oosetis.
21.19: Katamaa dirsaa baasoy ubba qommo bonchetida shuchan alleeqetis. Koyro hiixetida shuchay yasphide, nam7anthoy sanpare, heedzanthoy kelqedoone, oyddanthoy baluure,
21.20: ichashanthoy sardonkisa, usupunthoy sardiyoone, laapunthoy kiristiloobe, hospunthoy birille, uddufunthoy toophaze, tammanthoy kirisphiraasise, tammanne issinthoy yaakinte, tammanne nam7anthoy ametesxinoosa.
21.21: Tammanne nam7u pengetas tammanne nam7u al7o shuchi de7ees. Issi issi pengey issi al7o shuchan oosetis. Katamaa wogga ogey mastooteda phooliya walahi bayna worqafe oosetis.
21.22: Goday, Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaynne Dorsay katamaas keethe gidiya gisho, ta he kataman Xoossa keethi be7abike.
21.23: Xoossaa bonchoy he katamaas poo7iya gishonne Dorsay iyaw xompe gidiya gisho katamaas awa woyko ageena poo7o koshshenna.
21.24: Kawotethati he katamaa poo7on hemetana; kawotika banta bonchuwa yaa ehana.
21.25: Qammi yan bayna gisho katamaa pengeti ubba gallas dooya gidana; ubbaraka gordetokona.
21.26: Kawotethata gitatethaynne bonchoy he katamaa yaana.
21.27: Dorsaa de7o maxaafan sunthay xaafetidaysata xalaali attishin, tunabaa woyko yeellayaba oothey woyko wordotey oonika he katamaa gelenna.

22.1: Yaatidi, kiitanchoy tana Xoossaa kawotetha araatapenne Dorsaa kawotethaa araatape goggiya mastooteda phooliya de7o haatha shaafa bessis.
22.2: He shaafay katama ogiya giddora duge goggees. Shaafape hefintha baggaranne hafintha baggara ageenan issi toho; laythan tammanne nam7u toho ayfiya de7o mithi de7ees. He mitha boncoy kawotethata ubbaa hargefe pathees.
22.3: He kataman aybi baadethika deenna. Xoossaa kawotetha araataynne Dorsaa kawotetha araatay he kataman daana. Xoossaa aylleti Xoossaas oothana.
22.4: Enti iya som7uwa be7ana; iya sunthay enta som7on xaafetana.
22.5: Hizape qammi deenna; Godaa Xoossay entaw xompe gidiya gisho entaw xompe woyko awa poo7o koshshenna. Enti meri merinaw kawotana. Yesuusa Yuussaa
22.6: Kiitanchoy taako, “Ha ta odiya qaalay tumanne ammantheysa. Goday, nabeta ba Geeshsha Ayyaanan kiittiya Xoossay, matan hananaba ba aylleta bessanaw ba kiitanchuwa kiittis” yaagis.
22.7: Yesuusi, “Heko ta ellesada yaana; ha maxaafan de7iya tinbite qaala naagiya oonika anjetidaysa” yaagis.
22.8: Taani, Yohaanisi, he ubbaba si7as; be7as. Taani hessa si7ida wodenne be7ida wode hessa tana bessida kiitanchuwa goyinnanaw iya tohuwa bolla kundas.
22.9: Shin kiitanchoy taako, “Hessa oothofa! Taani needa, nabetada ne ishatadanne ha maxaafan de7iya ubbaa kiitetiya aylleta mela; Xoossaa goyinna” yaagis.
22.10: Kiitanchoy zaaridi, “Ha ubbay poletiya wodey matatida gisho ha maxaafan xaafetida tinbite qaala maatamen gordofa.
22.11: Iita oothey gujidi iita ootho; tuney gujidi tuno. Lo77o oothey gujidi lo77o ootho; geeyey gujidi geeyo” yaagis.
22.12: Yesuusi, “Heko, taani ellesada yaana. Issuwas issuwas iya oosuwada immanaw ta woytoy taara de7ees.
22.13: Taani Alfanne Omega; Koyronne Wursethi; Doomethinne Polo.
22.14: “Banta ma7uwa meeccidi geeshsheysati anjetidaysata. De7o mithee ayfiya maanawunne katamaa pengiyara gelanaw entaw maati imetis.
22.15: Shin kanati, biteysati, laymateysati, shempo wodheysati, eeqa goyinneysati, wordo doseysatinne ootheysati karen de7oosona.
22.16: “Taani, Yesuusi, ha markatethaa hintew, woosa keethatas odana mela ta kiitanchuwa kiittas. Taani Dawita sheeshinne koche. Taani poo7iya guura bakala” yaagis.
22.17: Geeshsha Ayyaanaynne gelanaw giigida maccasiya, “Haaya” yaagosona. Qassi haysa si7iya oonika, “Haaya” yaago. Saamotida oonika haayo; de7o haatha koyiya oonika coo eko.
22.18: Taani ha maxaafan xaafetida tinbite qaala si7iya oonaka zorayis. Oonika ha qaala bolla issiba gujiko, Xoossay ha maxaafan xaafetida bosha iya bolla gujana.
22.19: Oonika maxaafan de7iya tinbite qaalape issiba pacisiko, Xoossay ha maxaafan xaafetida de7o mithaa ayfiyapenne geeshsha katamaape iya qaada pacisana.
22.20: Ha ubbaa markateysi, “Tuma, taani ellesada yaana” yaagees. Amin7i; Godaa Yesuusa, haaya.
22.21: Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hinte ubbaara gido. Amin7i.
